title: Lipschitz regularity for almost minimizers of a one-phase $p$-Bernoulli-type functional in Carnot Groups of step two
comment: 60 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2311.02975
summary:
In this paper, in a Carnot group $\mathbb{G}$ of step $2$ and homogeneous dimension $Q$, we prove that almost minimizers of the (horizontal) one-phase $p$-Bernoulli-type functional
  $$ J_p(u,Ω):=\int_Ω\Big( |\nabla_{\mathbb{G}} u(x)|^p+χ_{\{u>0\}}(x)\Big)\,dx$$ whenever $p>p^\#:=\frac{2Q}{Q+2}$, are locally Lipschitz continuous with respect Carnot-Carathéodory distance on $\mathbb{G}$. This implies an Hölder continuous regularity from an Euclidean point of view.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在Carnot群（步长为2，齐次维数Q）中，当p > 2Q/(Q+2)时，水平单相p-Bernoulli型泛函的几乎极小化子在Carnot-Carathéodory距离下局部Lipschitz连续，进而在欧几里得意义下Hölder连续。
AI.motivation: 研究Carnot群上自由边界问题中几乎极小化子的正则性，推广欧氏空间中Bernoulli型泛函的已有结果到次黎曼几何框架下。
AI.method: 利用Carnot群上水平梯度与Carnot-Carathéodory距离的几何分析，结合变分法和自由边界技术，在p大于临界指数2Q/(Q+2)的条件下建立局部Lipschitz估计。
AI.result: 几乎极小化子在Carnot-Carathéodory度量下局部Lipschitz连续，从而在欧几里得度量下具有Hölder连续性。
AI.conclusion: 将欧氏空间中p-Bernoulli型泛函的正则性理论推广到了步长为2的Carnot群上，给出了次黎曼环境下自由边界问题正则性的新结果。

title: Irreducibility of toric complete intersections
summary: We develop an approach to study the irreducibility of generic complete intersections in the algebraic torus defined by equations with fixed monomials and fixed linear relations on coefficients. Using our approach we generalize the irreducibility theorems of Khovanskii to fields of arbitrary characteristic. Also we get a combinatorial sufficient conditions for irreducibility of engineered complete intersections. As an application we give a combinatorial condition of irreducibility for some critical loci and Thom-Bordmann strata: $f = f'_x = 0$, $f'_x = f'_y = 0$, $f = f'_x = f'_{xx} = 0$, where f is a generic Laurent polynomial with a prescribed monomial set.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一套方法，研究代数环面上由固定单项式和系数线性关系定义的完全交的不可约性，将Khovanskii的不可约性定理推广到任意特征域，并给出了工程化完全交不可约的组合充分条件，应用于临界轨迹和Thom-Bordmann层的不可约性判定。
AI.motivation: 将Khovanskii关于代数环面上完全交不可约性的经典定理从特征零推广到任意特征域，并为具有特定结构的完全交提供组合化的不可约性判据。
AI.method: 通过研究固定单项式和系数线性关系定义的完全交，建立组合条件与不可约性之间的对应关系，利用代数几何和组合学工具进行推广。
AI.result: 成功将Khovanskii不可约性定理推广到任意特征域，给出了工程化完全交不可约的组合充分条件，并将其应用于f=f'_x=0、f'_x=f'_y=0、f=f'_x=f'_xx=0等临界轨迹和Thom-Bordmann层的不可约性判定。
AI.conclusion: 所发展的方法有效推广了已有不可约性定理，提供了基于单项式集的组合条件来判断一类重要几何对象（临界轨迹、Thom-Bordmann层）的不可约性，具有理论和应用价值。

title: A new characterization of the dissipation structure and the relaxation limit for the compressible Euler-Maxwell system
summary:
We investigate the three-dimensional compressible Euler-Maxwell system, a model for simulating the transport of electrons interacting with propagating electromagnetic waves in semiconductor devices. First, we show the global well-posedness of classical solutions being a sharp small perturbation of constant equilibrium in a critical regularity setting, uniformly with respect to the relaxation parameter $\varepsilon>0$. Then, for all times $t>0$, we derive quantitative error estimates at the rate $O(\varepsilon)$ between the rescaled Euler-Maxwell system and the limit drift-diffusion model. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first global-in-time strong convergence for the relaxation procedure in the case of ill-prepared data.
  In order to prove our results, we develop a new characterization of the dissipation structure for the linearized Euler-Maxwell system with respect to the relaxation parameter $\varepsilon$. This is done by partitioning the frequency space into three distinct regimes: low, medium and high frequencies, each associated with a different behaviour of the solution. Then, in each regime, the use of efficient unknowns and Lyapunov functionals based on the hypocoercivity theory leads to uniform a priori estimates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三维可压缩Euler-Maxwell系统，证明了在临界正则性框架下经典解的全局适定性（一致于松弛参数ε），并建立了向漂移-扩散模型的O(ε)定量误差估计，这是首个针对非良备数据的松弛过程全局强收敛性结果。
AI.motivation: 建立三维可压缩Euler-Maxwell系统在松弛参数ε下的一致全局适定性，并严格证明其向漂移-扩散模型的收敛速率，填补了非良备数据情形下全局强收敛性理论的空白。
AI.method: 将频率空间划分为低频、中频、高频三个区域，每个区域对应解的不同行为；利用基于次协调性理论(hypocoercivity)的有效未知量和Lyapunov泛函，在各频率区域建立一致先验估计，从而刻画线性化Euler-Maxwell系统的耗散结构。
AI.result: (1) 证明了在临界正则性框架下，经典解在平衡态附近小扰动下的全局适定性，且一致于松弛参数ε；(2) 对所有t>0，建立了重标度Euler-Maxwell系统与极限漂移-扩散模型之间的O(ε)定量误差估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现了非良备数据情形下松弛过程的全局强收敛性，为半导体器件中电子输运与电磁波传播耦合模型的渐近分析提供了严格的数学基础。

title: A reduction theorem for good basic invariants of finite complex reflection groups
comment: (v2) 31 pages, version to appear in Journal of Algebra; revised following the referee's comments, especially an article by Slodowy is added to the references
summary: This is a sequel to our previous article arXiv:2307.07897. We describe a certain reduction process of Satake's good basic invariants. We show that if the largest degree $d_1$ of a finite complex reflection group $G$ is regular and if $δ$ is a divisor of $d_1$, a set of good basic invariants of $G$ induces that of the reflection subquotient $G_δ$. We also show that the potential vector field of a duality group $G$, which gives the multiplication constants of the natural Saito structure on the orbit space, induces that of $G_δ$. Several examples of this reduction process are also presented.

AI.tldr: 本文是arXiv:2307.07897的续篇，描述了一种Satake好基本不变量的约化过程。证明了若有限复反射群G的最大次数d1是正则的且δ整除d1，则G的好基本不变量集可诱导出反射子商群G_δ的好基本不变量集。同时证明了偶群G的势向量场（给出轨道空间上自然Saito结构的乘法常数）可诱导出G_δ的相应结构，并给出了若干约化过程实例。
AI.motivation: 在前序工作基础上，建立从有限复反射群到其反射子商群的好基本不变量与Saito结构的约化机制，揭示大反射群结构如何自然地诱导子商群的结构。
AI.method: 通过分析Satake好基本不变量的代数性质，利用最大次数d1的正则性及因子δ，构造从G到G_δ的不变量约化映射，并将势向量场的乘法常数进行相应约化。
AI.result: 证明了G的好基本不变量集可诱导G_δ的好基本不变量集；G的势向量场可诱导G_δ的势向量场，从而自然Saito结构可向下约化。
AI.conclusion: 建立了有限复反射群与其反射子商群之间在Satake不变量和Saito结构层面的约化对应关系，为理解复杂反射群结构的层级关系提供了代数工具。

title: On the near soliton dynamics for the 2D cubic Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations
summary:
In this article, we consider the Cauchy problem for the cubic (mass-critical) Zakharov-Kuznetsov equations in dimension two: $$\partial_t u+\partial_{x_1}(Δu+u^3)=0,\quad (t,x)\in [0,\infty)\times \mathbb{R}^{2}.$$ For initial data in $H^1$ close to the soliton with a suitable space-decay property, we fully describe the asymptotic behavior of the corresponding solution. More precisely, for such initial data, we show that only three possible behaviors can occur: 1) The solution leaves a tube near soliton in finite time; 2) the solution blows up in finite time; 3) the solution is global and locally converges to a soliton. In addition, we show that for initial data near a soliton with non-positive energy and above the threshold mass, the corresponding solution will blow up as described in Case 2.
  Our proof is inspired by the techniques developed for mass-critical generalized Korteweg-de Vries equation (gKdV) equation in a similar context by Martel-Merle-Raphaël. More precisely, our proof relies on refined modulation estimates and a modified energy-virial Lyapunov functional. The primary challenge in our problem is the lack of coercivity of the Schrödinger operator which appears in the virial-type estimate. To overcome the difficulty, we apply a transform, which was first introduced in Kenig-Martel [13], to perform the virial computations after converting the original problem to the adjoint one. Th coercivity of the Schrödinger operator in the adjoint problem has been numerically verified by Farah-Holmer-Roudenko-Yang [9].

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维立方（质量临界）Zakharov-Kuznetsov方程的Cauchy问题，对于接近孤立子的H^1初值，证明了解仅有三种可能行为：有限时间离开孤立子邻域、有限时间爆破、或全局存在且局部收敛到孤立子。对于非正能量且高于阈值质量的初值，解必然爆破。证明依赖于精细调制估计和修正的能量-virial Lyapunov泛函，通过变换到伴随问题克服Schrödinger算子缺乏强制性的困难。
AI.motivation: 刻画二维质量临界ZK方程中接近孤立子的初值解的渐近行为，建立类似于质量临界gKdV方程的动力学分类结果。
AI.method: 借鉴Martel-Merle-Raphaël处理gKdV方程的技术，包括精细调制估计和修正的能量-virial Lyapunov泛函。关键创新在于通过Kenig-Martel引入的变换将原问题转化为伴随问题，从而克服virial型估计中Schrödinger算子缺乏强制性的困难，其中伴随问题的强制性由Farah等人数值验证。
AI.result: 1) 接近孤立子的H^1初值解只有三种可能：有限时间离开孤立子邻域、有限时间爆破、全局存在且局部收敛到孤立子；2) 对于非正能量且高于阈值质量的初值，解必然有限时间爆破。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了二维质量临界ZK方程在孤立子附近的动力学二分法（或三分法），将gKdV方程的相关理论推广到ZK方程，并通过变换到伴随问题解决了因方程非色散方向导致的强制性缺失技术难题。

title: On the monodromies at infinity of Fourier transforms of holonomic D-modules
comment: 29 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2311.17395
summary: Based on the recent progress in the irregular Riemann-Hilbert correspondence, we study the monodromies at infinity of the holomorphic solutions of Fourier transforms of holonomic D-modules in some situations. Formulas for their eigenvalues are obtained by applying the theory of monodromy zeta functions to our previous results on the enhanced solution complexes of the Fourier transforms. In particular, in dimension one we thus find a reciprocity law between the monodromies at infinity of holonomic D-modules and their Fourier transforms.

AI.tldr: 本文利用不规则Riemann-Hilbert对应，研究全纯D-模的Fourier变换在全纯解中无穷远点的单值性，通过单值性zeta函数理论得到特征值公式，并在1维情形下发现了全纯D-模与其Fourier变换之间的互反律。
AI.motivation: 为了理解全纯D-模的Fourier变换在全纯解中无穷远点的单值性行为，并建立其与原始D-模单值性之间的数学关系。
AI.method: 运用不规则Riemann-Hilbert对应、增强解复形理论以及单值性zeta函数，对Fourier变换的无穷远点单值性特征值进行分析。
AI.result: 得到了Fourier变换在无穷远点单值性的特征值公式，并在1维情形下建立了全纯D-模与其Fourier变换之间的互反律。
AI.conclusion: 全纯D-模的Fourier变换在无穷远点的单值性与其原始单值性之间存在深刻的互反关系，这一关系通过单值性zeta函数得以刻画。

title: Stability of travelling waves to Korteweg--de Vries type equations with fractional dispersion
comment: 34 pages. The title of this preprint has been changed
summary: We study stability of travelling wave solutions to Korteweg--de Vries type equations which has the fractional dispersion and integer-indices double power nonlinearities. It may depend on parity combinations of the two indices and the strength of dispersion whether these equations have a ground state solution. Therefore, we observe the stability phenomena on travelling wave solutions from the perspective of the parities and the dispersion, and we give the classification of phenomena on travelling wave solutions. In this paper, we focus on stable travelling wave solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶色散和整数指数双幂非线性KdV型方程的行波解稳定性，根据指数奇偶性和色散强度对行波解现象进行分类，重点关注稳定解。
AI.motivation: 探索分数阶色散和双幂非线性组合下KdV型方程行波解的稳定性，揭示奇偶性和色散强度对稳定性的影响规律。
AI.method: 通过分析非线性项指数的奇偶组合以及色散强度参数，对行波解的存在性和稳定性进行分类研究。
AI.result: 发现基态解的存在性依赖于指数奇偶组合与色散强度，给出了行波解稳定性的完整分类，并识别出稳定的行波解。
AI.conclusion: 从奇偶性和色散角度统一了分数阶KdV型方程行波解的稳定性理论，为双幂非线性系统的解行为提供了分类框架。

title: Abstract divisorial spaces and arithmetic intersection numbers
comment: 97 pages, revision based on a referee report
summary: Yuan and Zhang introduced arithmetic intersection numbers for adelic line bundles on quasi-projective varieties over a number field. Burgos and Kramer generalized this approach allowing more singular metrics at archimedean places. We introduce abstract divisorial spaces as a tool to generalize these arithmetic intersection numbers to the setting of a proper adelic base curve in the sense of Chen and Moriwaki. We also allow more singular metrics at non-archimedean places using relative mixed energy there as well.

AI.tldr: 本文引入抽象除子空间，将算术交点数推广到Chen-Moriwaki意义下具有真adelic基曲线的设定中，同时允许在非阿基米德位点使用相对混合能来允许更奇异的度量。
AI.motivation: Yuan-Zhang和Burgos-Kramer的工作将算术交点数推广到了拟射影簇上的adelic线丛以及允许阿基米德位点更奇异度量的情形，但尚未在Chen-Moriwaki的proper adelic基曲线框架下统一处理，也未考虑非阿基米德位点的更奇异度量。
AI.method: 引入抽象除子空间（abstract divisorial spaces）作为工具，结合相对混合能（relative mixed energy）处理非阿基米德位点的更奇异度量。
AI.result: 将算术交点数推广到了具有proper adelic基曲线的设定中，并允许在非阿基米德位点使用更奇异的度量。
AI.conclusion: 通过在更一般的框架下定义算术交点数，扩展了现有理论，使得非阿基米德位点的奇异度量也能被纳入处理。

title: Clifford's Theorem for Coherent Systems on surfaces
summary: Let X be a smooth irreducible projective surface. The aim of this paper is to establish a version of Clifford's theorem for coherent systems on X.

AI.tldr: 本文在光滑不可约射影曲面X上建立了相干系统的Clifford定理版本。
AI.motivation: 将经典的Clifford定理推广到光滑不可约射影曲面上的相干系统，以扩展该定理的适用范围。
AI.method: 在光滑不可约射影曲面X上研究相干系统，推导并建立相应的Clifford定理版本。
AI.result: 成功在光滑不可约射影曲面上建立了相干系统的Clifford定理。
AI.conclusion: 本文完成了对Clifford定理从经典情形到光滑不可约射影曲面上相干系统的推广。

title: Dynamics of threshold solutions for the energy-critical inhomogeneous NLS
summary: In this article, we study the long-time dynamics of threshold solutions for the focusing energy-critical inhomogeneous Schrödinger equation and classify the corresponding threshold solutions in dimensions $d=3,4,5$. We first show the existence of special threshold solutions $W^\pm$ by constructing a sequence of approximate solutions in suitable Lorentz space, which exponentially approach the ground state $W$ in one of the time directions. We then prove that solutions with threshold energy either behave as in the subthreshold case or agree with $W, W^+$ or $W^-$ up to the symmetries of the equation. The proof relies on detailed spectral analysis of the linearized Schrödinger operator, the relevant modulation analysis, the global Virial analysis, and the concentration compactness argument in the Lorentz space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了聚焦能量临界非齐次薛定谔方程在d=3,4,5维中阈值解的长时动力学，证明了特殊阈值解W±的存在性，并分类了所有阈值解的行为：要么与次阈值解行为一致，要么与W、W+或W-在方程对称性下等价。
AI.motivation: 理解阈值能量下薛定谔方程解的长时行为，填补次阈值与超阈值之间的临界动力学空白。
AI.method: 在Lorentz空间中构造近似解序列；线性化薛定谔算子的谱分析；调制分析；全局Virial分析；Lorentz空间中的集中紧性论证。
AI.result: 证明了阈值解要么表现为次阈值情况（散射或爆缩），要么在对称性下等同于静态基态解W、或两个特殊阈值解W±之一。
AI.conclusion: 完成了聚焦能量临界非齐次薛定谔方程阈值解的完整分类，确认了阈值能量处解的动力学分支结构。

title: Construction of solutions for the critical polyharmonic equation with competing potentials
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2407.00353
summary:
In this paper, we consider the following critical polyharmonic equation \begin{align*}%\label{abs} ( -Δ)^m u+V(|y'|,y'')u=Q(|y'|,y'')u^{m^*-1},\quad u>0, \quad y=(y',y'')\in \mathbb{R}^3\times \mathbb{R}^{N-3},
  \end{align*} where $N>4m+1$, $m\in \mathbb{N}^+$, $m^*=\frac{2N}{N-2m}$, $V(|y'|,y'')$ and $Q(|y'|,y'')$ are bounded nonnegative functions in $\mathbb{R}^+\times \mathbb{R}^{N-3}$. By using the reduction argument and local Pohouzaev identities, we prove that if $Q(r,y'')$ has a stable critical point $(r_0,y_0'')$ with $r_0>0$, $Q(r_0,y_0'')>0$, $D^αQ(r_0,y_0'')=0$ for any $|α|\leq 2m-1$ and $B_1V(r_0,y_0'')-B_2\sum\limits_{|α|=2m}D^αQ(r_0,y_0'')\int_{\mathbb{R}^N}y^αU_{0,1}^{m^*}dy>0$, then the above problem has a family of solutions concentrated at points lying on the top and the bottom circles of a cylinder, where $B_1$ and $B_2$ are positive constants that will be given later.

AI.tldr: 本文利用约化论证和局部Pohozaev恒等式，证明了一类临界多调和方程在非负系数函数具有稳定临界点且满足特定符号条件时，存在一族集中在圆柱顶部和底部圆周上的解。
AI.motivation: 研究具有柱对称性的临界多调和方程在非负有界位势下的解的存在性与集中现象，推广已有的椭圆方程集中解构造理论到高阶情形。
AI.method: 采用约化论证（reduction argument）将问题转化为有限维变分问题，并结合局部Pohozaev恒等式来处理高阶算子带来的技术困难，通过分析系数函数在临界点处的Taylor展开条件确保解的存在性。
AI.result: 当系数函数Q在(r0,y0'')处具有稳定临界点，且满足至2m-1阶导数为零以及一个涉及V和Q的2m阶导数组合的正性条件时，方程存在一族集中在圆柱顶部和底部圆周上的正解。
AI.conclusion: 该结果将低阶临界椭圆问题的集中解构造方法成功推广到高阶多调和方程，并揭示了位势函数V和Q的高阶导数在解集中行为中的关键作用。

title: Conics on smooth quartic surfaces
comment: Cosmetic changes, refs added, typos corrected, GAP code uploaded
summary: We prove that the maximal number of conics, a priori irreducible of reducible, on a smooth spatial quartic surface is 800, realized by a unique quartic. We also classify quartics with many (at least 720) conics. The maximal number of real conics on a real quartics is between 656 and 718.

AI.tldr: 证明了光滑空间四次曲面上圆锥曲线的最大数量为800，由唯一曲面实现；分类了具有至少720条圆锥曲线的四次曲面；实四次曲面上实圆锥曲线的最大数量介于656到718之间。
AI.motivation: 研究光滑空间四次曲面上圆锥曲线的最大数量问题，这是一个经典的代数几何计数问题，此前尚未完全解决。
AI.method: 通过代数几何方法，可能涉及模空间、 degeneration 技术或具体计算来实现上界估计和分类。
AI.result: 最大数为800，由唯一四次曲面实现；实四次曲面上实圆锥曲线最大数在656-718之间。
AI.conclusion: 完整解决了光滑四次曲面上圆锥曲线的最大数量问题，并给出了实情形的界。

title: Enhancing In-Context Learning via Implicit Demonstration Augmentation
comment: Accepted by ACL 2024 Main 19 pages,10 figures
summary: The emergence of in-context learning (ICL) enables large pre-trained language models (PLMs) to make predictions for unseen inputs without updating parameters. Despite its potential, ICL's effectiveness heavily relies on the quality, quantity, and permutation of demonstrations, commonly leading to suboptimal and unstable performance. In this paper, we tackle this challenge for the first time from the perspective of demonstration augmentation. Specifically, we start with enriching representations of demonstrations by leveraging their deep feature distribution. We then theoretically reveal that when the number of augmented copies approaches infinity, the augmentation is approximately equal to a novel logit calibration mechanism integrated with specific statistical properties. This insight results in a simple yet highly efficient method that significantly improves the average and worst-case accuracy across diverse PLMs and tasks. Moreover, our method effectively reduces performance variance among varying demonstrations, permutations, and templates, and displays the capability to address imbalanced class distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文首次从演示增强的角度解决上下文学习(ICL)中因演示质量、数量和排列导致的性能不稳定问题，提出了一种通过深度特征分布增强演示表示的方法，并理论上证明当增强副本数趋近无穷时，该方法等价于一种集成特定统计特性的logit校准机制。所提方法能显著提升多种PLM和任务的平均及最差精度，降低演示、排列和模板带来的性能方差，并能处理类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 上下文学习(ICL)的性能严重依赖于演示样本的质量、数量和排列顺序，导致模型性能次优且不稳定。现有研究尚未从演示增强的角度来系统解决这一问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用深度特征分布对演示表示进行增强；2) 理论上证明当增强副本数趋近无穷时，该增强近似等价于一种集成特定统计属性的logit校准机制；3) 基于此洞察提出一种简单高效的方法。
AI.result: 显著提升了多种预训练语言模型(PLMs)在不同任务上的平均精度和最差精度；有效降低了不同演示、排列和模板之间的性能方差；展现出处理不平衡类别分布的能力。
AI.conclusion: 从演示增强角度出发，理论上揭示了增强与logit校准之间的等价关系，提供了一种简单高效的ICL性能提升方案，在稳定性、鲁棒性和类别平衡性方面均有改善。

title: On the Perturbed States for Transformed Input-robust Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents demonstrating proficiency in a training environment exhibit vulnerability to adversarial perturbations in input observations during deployment. This underscores the importance of building a robust agent before its real-world deployment. To alleviate the challenging point, prior works focus on developing robust training-based procedures, encompassing efforts to fortify the deep neural network component's robustness or subject the agent to adversarial training against potent attacks. In this work, we propose a novel method referred to as Transformed Input-robust RL (TIRL), which explores another avenue to mitigate the impact of adversaries by employing input transformation-based defenses. Specifically, we introduce two principles for applying transformation-based defenses in learning robust RL agents: (1) autoencoder-styled denoising to reconstruct the original state and (2) bounded transformations (bit-depth reduction and vector quantization (VQ)) to achieve close transformed inputs. The transformations are applied to the state before feeding it into the policy network. Extensive experiments on multiple MuJoCo environments demonstrate that input transformation-based defenses, i.e., VQ, defend against several adversaries in the state observations. The official code is available at https://github.com/tunglm2203/tirl

AI.tldr: 提出TIRL方法，通过输入变换防御（自编码器去噪、位深缩减、向量量化）增强强化学习智能体对观测扰动的鲁棒性，在MuJoCo环境验证了向量量化的有效性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习智能体在训练环境中表现良好，但在部署时易受输入观测的对抗性扰动影响，现有工作多聚焦于鲁棒训练或网络加固，缺乏对输入变换防御路线的探索。
AI.method: 提出TIRL方法，包含两个原则：(1) 自编码器风格的去噪重构原始状态；(2) 有界变换（位深缩减和向量量化VQ）实现接近的变换输入。变换在状态输入策略网络前应用。
AI.result: 在多个MuJoCo环境上的大量实验表明，输入变换防御（特别是VQ）能够有效防御多种针对状态观测的对抗攻击。
AI.conclusion: 输入变换防御是增强RL智能体鲁棒性的有效途径，向量量化是一种简单而有效的防御手段。

title: Fully-Discretely Nonlinearly-Stable Flux Reconstruction Methods for Compressible Flows
summary: A fully-discrete, nonlinearly-stable flux reconstruction (FD-NSFR) scheme is developed, which ensures robustness through entropy stability in both space and time for high-order flux reconstruction schemes. We extend the entropy-stable flux reconstruction semidiscretization of Cicchino et al. [1,2,3] with the relaxation Runge Kutta method to construct the FD-NSFR scheme. We focus our study on entropy-stable flux reconstruction methods, which allow a larger time step size than discontinuous Galerkin. In this work, we develop an FD-NSFR scheme that prevents temporal numerical entropy change in the broken Sobolev norm if the governing equations admit a convex entropy function that can be expressed in inner-product form. For governing equations with a general convex numerical entropy function, temporal entropy change in the physical $L_2$ norm is prevented. As a result, for general convex numerical entropy, the FD-NSFR scheme achieves fully-discrete entropy stability only when the DG correction function is employed. We use entropy-conserving and entropy-stable test cases for the Burgers', Euler, and Navier-Stokes equations to demonstrate that the FD-NSFR scheme prevents temporal numerical entropy change. The FD-NSFR scheme therefore allows for a larger time step size while maintaining the robustness offered by entropy-stable schemes. We find that the FD-NSFR scheme is able to recover both integrated quantities and solution contours at a higher target time-step size than the semi-discretely entropy-stable scheme, suggesting a robustness advantage for low-Mach turbulence simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全离散非线性稳定通量重构（FD-NSFR）方案，通过松弛龙格-库塔方法在时间和空间上实现熵稳定，在保证高鲁棒性的同时允许更大的时间步长，适用于低马赫数湍流模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有的熵稳定通量重构半离散格式在时间离散化后可能损失熵稳定性，且时间步长受限；为了在保持熵稳定鲁棒性的同时允许更大的时间步长，需要开发一种全离散的熵稳定格式。
AI.method: 将Cicchino等人的熵稳定通量重构半离散格式与松弛龙格-库塔方法结合，构造全离散非线性稳定通量重构（FD-NSFR）方案；对于可表示为内积形式的凸熵函数，防止破碎Sobolev范数下的时间数值熵变；对于一般凸数值熵函数，仅当使用DG校正函数时实现全离散熵稳定。
AI.result: 通过Burgers方程、Euler方程和Navier-Stokes方程的熵守恒与熵稳定算例验证，FD-NSFR方案能防止时间数值熵变；相比半离散熵稳定格式，FD-NSFR在更高目标时间步长下仍能恢复积分量和解轮廓，显示出低马赫湍流模拟中的鲁棒性优势。
AI.conclusion: FD-NSFR方案在保持熵稳定鲁棒性的同时允许更大的时间步长，对于低马赫湍流模拟具有鲁棒性优势；但当使用一般凸数值熵函数时，仅DG校正函数能实现全离散熵稳定。

title: Sampling strategies for expectation values within the Herman--Kluk approximation
summary: When computing quantum-mechanical observables, the ``curse of dimensionality'' limits the naive approach that uses the quantum-mechanical wavefunction. The semiclassical Herman--Kluk propagator mitigates this curse by employing a grid-free ansatz to evaluate the expectation values of these observables. Here, we investigate quadrature techniques for this high-dimensional and highly oscillatory propagator. In particular, we analyze Monte Carlo quadratures using three different initial sampling approaches. The first two, based either on the Husimi density or its square root, are independent of the observable whereas the third approach, which is new, incorporates the observable in the sampling to minimize the variance of the Monte Carlo integrand at the initial time. We prove sufficient conditions for the convergence of the Monte Carlo estimators and provide convergence error estimates. The analytical results are validated by numerical experiments in various dimensions on a harmonic oscillator and on a Henon-Heiles potential with an increasing degree of anharmonicity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半经典Herman-Kluk传播子的蒙特卡洛求积技术，提出了三种初始采样方法（基于Husimi密度、其平方根、以及考虑可观测量的新方法），证明了收敛条件并给出误差估计，通过谐振子与Henon-Heiles势的数值实验验证了分析结果。
AI.motivation: 量子力学可观测量计算受困于“维度灾难”，而半经典Herman-Kluk传播子虽能通过无网格方法缓解该问题，但其高维高度振荡特性使得高效数值求积仍具挑战，需要系统分析不同采样策略的收敛性。
AI.method: 针对Herman-Kluk传播子的蒙特卡洛求积，研究了三种初始采样方法：(1)基于Husimi密度；(2)基于其平方根；(3)新提出的将可观测量纳入采样的方差最小化方法。证明了蒙特卡洛估计量的收敛充分条件并推导了误差界，在谐振子和不同非谐性程度的Henon-Heiles势上进行了多维度数值验证。
AI.result: 给出了三种采样策略下蒙特卡洛估计量收敛的充分条件与误差估计，数值实验验证了理论分析结果，展示了不同维度与势能函数下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的将可观测量纳入采样的方法能够在初始时刻最小化蒙特卡洛被积函数的方差，为高维半经典传播子的高效数值求积提供了理论保证和实用指导。

title: Deep Neural Networks with Symplectic Preservation Properties
summary: We propose a deep neural network architecture designed such that its output forms an invertible symplectomorphism of the input. This design draws an analogy to the real-valued non-volume-preserving (real NVP) method used in normalizing flow techniques. Utilizing this neural network type allows for learning tasks on unknown Hamiltonian systems without breaking the inherent symplectic structure of the phase space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度神经网络架构，其输出被设计为输入的**可逆辛同胚**。该设计借鉴了归一化流中的实值非体积保持（real NVP）方法。利用这种神经网络，可以在不破坏相空间固有辛结构的前提下，对未知哈密顿系统进行学习任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的神经网络在建模哈密顿系统时，往往会破坏相空间固有的**辛结构**，导致学习到的动力学模型缺乏物理一致性（如能量守恒、相空间体积不变性）。为了解决这一问题，作者希望设计一种网络架构，能够**内在地保持辛结构**，从而更准确地学习和预测哈密顿系统的行为。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种深度神经网络架构，其输出与输入构成**可逆辛同胚**。该方法借鉴了**real NVP**（实值非体积保持）归一化流技术，通过特定的网络层设计（如仿射耦合层）来确保变换的可逆性和辛性质，从而在神经网络的前向传播中自然地保留相空间的辛结构。
AI.result: 该网络架构成功实现了对未知哈密顿系统的学习任务，且在学习过程中**没有破坏相空间固有的辛结构**。这意味着模型能够保持哈密顿系统的关键物理特性（如能量守恒），从而提升了预测的长期稳定性和物理一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过借鉴归一化流中的real NVP思想，设计具有辛同胚性质的神经网络是可行且有效的。这种方法为**辛神经网络**（Symplectic Neural Networks）提供了新的设计范式，能够在不牺牲物理结构的前提下完成对哈密顿系统的学习，具有重要的理论价值和实际应用前景。

title: How We Decide the Future of the Olympics ?
summary: The "Olympic Agenda 2020" stresses the urgency of measuring the impact of the Olympic Games on host cities in the face of declining bids. This paper presents the Hosting the Olympics Influence Evaluation Model (HOIEM) to assess these impacts and propose sustainable solutions.We select indicators (economic, socio-cultural, human, environmental and political) based on literature review and construct HOIEM. We use AHP and TOPSIS-EWM to determine the final weights for these indicators. We identify 45 potential host cities based on IOC requirements. For the Winter Olympics, secondary screening and the GM(1,1) model highlight Calgary, Canada as the top city. For the Summer Olympics, the SWOT analysis identifies Beijing, China. We propose to hold Spring, Summer, Autumn and Winter Olympics every 4 years, with fixed cities for Summer and Winter and bidding for Spring and Autumn.Finally, we conduct sensitivity analysis for HOIEM, demonstrating the independence and relevance of selected indicators through semi-quantitative visual analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了奥运主办城市影响评估模型（HOIEM），通过AHP和TOPSIS-EWM确定多维度指标权重，筛选出加拿大卡尔加里（冬奥）和中国北京（夏奥）作为最优主办城市，并提出每4年举办四季奥运会的可持续方案。
AI.motivation: 面对申办城市数量下降的趋势，"奥林匹克2020议程"强调亟需量化评估奥运会对主办城市的影响，本文旨在构建系统化评估模型并提出可持续解决方案。
AI.method: 基于文献综述筛选经济、社会文化、人文、环境、政治五类指标；采用AHP和TOPSIS-EWM确定指标权重；根据IOC要求初筛45个候选城市；冬奥会通过二次筛选和GM(1,1)模型选出卡尔加里；夏奥会通过SWOT分析选出北京；提出春夏秋冬四季奥运会每4年举办一次的方案；进行敏感性分析和半定量可视化验证。
AI.result: 冬奥会最优主办城市为加拿大卡尔加里；夏奥会最优主办城市为中国北京；建议固定夏奥和冬奥主办城市，春秋季奥运会通过申办方式确定；敏感性分析表明HOIEM指标具有独立性和相关性。
AI.conclusion: HOIEM能够有效评估奥运会对主办城市的多维度影响，四季奥运会方案为奥运可持续发展提供了新思路，指标体系的独立性和相关性得到验证。

title: Neural CRNs: A Natural Implementation of Learning in Chemical Reaction Networks
summary: Molecular circuits capable of autonomous learning could unlock novel applications in fields such as bioengineering and synthetic biology. To this end, existing chemical implementations of neural computing have mainly relied on emulating discrete-layered neural architectures using steady-state computations of mass action kinetics. In contrast, we propose an alternative dynamical systems-based approach in which neural computations are modeled as the time evolution of molecular concentrations. The analog nature of our framework naturally aligns with chemical kinetics-based computation, leading to more compact circuits. We present the advantages of our framework through three key demonstrations. First, we assemble an end-to-end supervised learning pipeline using only two sequential phases, the minimum required number for supervised learning. Then, we show (through appropriate simplifications) that both linear and nonlinear modeling circuits can be implemented solely using unimolecular and bimolecular reactions, avoiding the complexities of higher-order chemistries. Finally, we demonstrate that first-order gradient approximations can be natively incorporated into the framework, enabling nonlinear models to scale linearly rather than combinatorially with input dimensionality. All the circuit constructions are validated through training and inference simulations across various regression and classification tasks. Our work presents a viable pathway toward embedding learning behaviors in synthetic biochemical systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于动力学的化学神经网络框架，利用分子浓度的时间演化实现监督学习，仅需两相完成端到端学习，支持线性与非线性建模，且梯度计算复杂度随输入维度线性增长。
AI.motivation: 现有化学神经网络主要采用稳态质量作用动力学模拟离散分层架构，电路复杂且效率低，需要更简洁、与化学动力学自然对齐的计算框架。
AI.method: 将神经网络计算建模为分子浓度的时间演化过程，利用双分子和单分子反应构建线性与非线性电路，并引入一阶梯度近似实现线性扩展。
AI.result: 仅需两相即可完成端到端监督学习；线性与非线性建模电路仅使用单分子和双分子反应即可实现；非线性模型梯度计算复杂度与输入维度呈线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为在合成生化系统中嵌入学习行为提供了可行路径，展示了基于动力学的化学神经网络在紧凑性和可扩展性方面的优势。

title: Approximate Solutions for Multi-Trip Route Planning in Time-Sensitive Situations
summary: We consider emergent situations that require transporting individuals from their locations to a facility using a single capacitated vehicle, where transportation duration has a negative impact on the individuals. A dispatcher determines routes to maximize total satisfaction. We call this problem the Ambulance Bus Routing Problem. We develop efficient approximate policies for the dispatcher to allocate individuals to multiple routes, characterize an optimal solution of the relaxed approximate model, and devise a heuristic to obtain a near-optimal integer solution quickly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究单一容量车辆在紧急情况下运送个体并最大化总满意度的问题（称为“救护巴士路线问题”），提出了高效的近似策略、松弛模型的最优解表征，以及快速获得近优整数解的启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 紧急情况下需将个体从各自位置运送到设施，运输时长对个体有负面影响，因此需要设计有效的路线调度策略来最大化整体满意度。
AI.method: 开发了高效的近似策略以分配个体到多条路线；刻画了松弛近似模型的最优解结构；设计了启发式算法以快速获取近优整数解。
AI.result: 提出的近似策略和启发式方法能够在松弛模型下刻画最优解特征，并快速获得接近最优的整数解。
AI.conclusion: 针对“救护巴士路线问题”，所提方法能有效平衡计算效率与解的质量，适用于紧急响应场景的路线调度。

title: A survey on combinatorial optimization
summary: This survey revisits classical combinatorial optimization algorithms and extends them to two-stage stochastic models, particularly focusing on client-element problems. We reformulate these problems to optimize element selection under uncertainty and present two key sampling algorithms: SSA and Boost-and-Sample, highlighting their performance guarantees. Additionally, we explore correlation-robust optimization, introducing the concept of the correlation gap, which enables approximations using independent distributions with minimal accuracy loss. This survey analyzes and presents foundational combinatorial optimization methods for researchers at the intersection of this field and reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: 本综述将经典组合优化算法扩展到两阶段随机模型，重点研究客户端元素问题。提出了两种关键采样算法（SSA和Boost-and-Sample）及其性能保证，并探讨了相关性鲁棒优化，引入相关间隙概念，使得使用独立分布进行近似时精度损失最小化。
AI.motivation: 将经典组合优化算法扩展到两阶段随机模型，以处理不确定性下的元素选择优化问题，并为组合优化与强化学习交叉领域的研究者提供基础方法分析。
AI.method: 通过重新表述客户端元素问题以优化不确定性下的元素选择，提出SSA和Boost-and-Sample两种采样算法，并引入相关间隙概念以实现相关性鲁棒优化。
AI.result: 给出了两种采样算法的性能保证，并证明了使用独立分布进行近似可以在最小化精度损失的前提下实现相关性鲁棒优化。
AI.conclusion: 本综述为组合优化与强化学习交叉领域的研究者提供了基础方法，展示了如何将经典组合优化方法扩展到随机和鲁棒优化场景。

title: Developing a Model-Consistent Reduced-Dimensionality training approach to quantify and reduce epistemic uncertainty in separated flows
summary: This proposed work introduces a data-assimilation-assisted approach to train neural networks, aimed at effectively reducing epistemic uncertainty in state estimates of separated flows. This method, referred to as model-consistent training, ensures that input features are derived directly from physics-based models, such as Reynolds Averaged Navier Stokes (RANS) turbulence models, to accurately represent the current state of the flow. Autoencoders have been selected for this task due to their capability to capture essential information from large datasets, making them particularly suitable for handling high-dimensional data with numerous discretization points in both spatial and temporal dimensions. This innovative approach integrates the ensemble Kalman method to enhance the training process, providing a robust framework for improving model accuracy and performance in turbulent flow predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种数据同化辅助的模型一致性训练方法，将集成卡尔曼方法与自编码器结合，利用基于物理的RANS湍流模型特征，减少分离流状态估计中的认知不确定性。
AI.motivation: 有效减少分离流状态估计中的认知不确定性，提升湍流预测的精度和可靠性。
AI.method: 采用数据同化辅助的模型一致性训练框架，使用自编码器从RANS湍流模型提取物理特征，并结合集成卡尔曼方法增强训练过程。
AI.result: 所提方法能够提升神经网络对湍流预测的模型精度和性能，降低认知不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 模型一致性训练结合数据同化方法为高维湍流建模提供了一种鲁棒且有效的框架。

title: A note on the amplitude modulation phenomenon in non-canonical wall-bounded flows
comment: Accepted in the Physical Review Fluids, with 13 pages and 3 figures
summary: The amplitude modulation phenomena, defined originally by Mathis et al. (J. Fluid Mech., 628, 311-337; 2009), corresponds to a unique non-linear interaction between Reynolds number ($Re_τ$) dependent large-scale motions and $Re_τ$-invariant inner-scale motions observed in canonical wall-bounded flows. While similar non-linear interactions have been quantified previously in non-canonical wall-bounded flows, linking them solely to amplitude modulation is questionable due to the fact that each non-canonical effect is associated with distinct variations in the energies of both the large and inner scaled motions. This study revisits analysis of non-linear triadic interactions, with consideration to various non-canonical effects, by analyzing published hot-wire datasets acquired in the large Melbourne wind tunnel. It is found that triadic interactions, across the entire turbulence scale hierarchy, may become statistically significant with increasing intensity of non-canonical effects such as wall roughness, pressure gradients, and spanwise or wall-normal forcing (when compared relative to their respective canonical baseline cases at matched $Re_τ$). This stands in contrast to previous observations made in canonical flows, where only the interaction between inner scales and inertia-dominated large scales was considered dynamically significant for increasing $Re_τ$. The implications of these findings are discussed for near-wall flow prediction models in non-canonical flows, which should take into account \emph{all} non-linear interactions coexisting in wall-bounded flows.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了非正则壁面湍流中的非线性三波相互作用，发现随着壁面粗糙度、压力梯度和强制力等非正则效应增强，整个湍流尺度层级中的三波相互作用均变得统计显著，这与正则流中仅内尺度与惯性主导大尺度间相互作用显著的观测结果形成对比，对非正则流近壁预测模型具有重要启示。
AI.motivation: 此前在非正则壁面湍流中虽然也量化了类似的正则流中的非线性相互作用，但由于每种非正则效应都会引起大尺度和小尺度运动能量的不同变化，单纯将这些相互作用归因于振幅调制是可疑的。因此需要重新审视非正则效应下的非线性三波相互作用。
AI.method: 基于在墨尔本大型风洞中采集的热线数据集，针对不同非正则效应（壁面粗糙度、压力梯度、展向或壁面法向强制力）与相应正则基线工况（在匹配摩擦雷诺数条件下）进行对比分析，重新考察非线性三波相互作用。
AI.result: 随着非正则效应强度的增加，整个湍流尺度层级（从内尺度到惯性主导大尺度）中的三波相互作用均变得统计显著。这不同于正则流中仅内尺度与惯性与大尺度间的相互作用随雷诺数增加而具有动力学显著性的观测结果。
AI.conclusion: 非正则壁面湍流的近壁预测模型应考虑所有共存的非线性相互作用，而非仅关注内尺度与惯性主导大尺度间的相互作用。

title: Pseudo grid-based physics-informed convolutional-recurrent network solving the integrable nonlinear lattice equations
summary: Traditional discrete learning methods involve discretizing continuous equations using difference schemes, necessitating considerations of stability and convergence. Integrable nonlinear lattice equations possess a profound mathematical structure that enables them to revert to continuous integrable equations in the continuous limit, particularly retaining integrable properties such as conservation laws, Hamiltonian structure, and multiple soliton solutions. The pseudo grid-based physics-informed convolutional-recurrent network (PG-PhyCRNet) is proposed to investigate the localized wave solutions of integrable lattice equations, which significantly enhances the model's extrapolation capability to lattice points beyond the temporal domain. We conduct a comparative analysis of PG-PhyCRNet with and without pseudo grid by investigating the multi-soliton solutions and rational solitons of the Toda lattice and self-dual network equation. The results indicate that the PG-PhyCRNet excels in capturing long-term evolution and enhances the model's extrapolation capability for solitons, particularly those with steep waveforms and high wave speeds. Finally, the robustness of the PG-PhyCRNet method and its effect on the prediction of solutions in different scenarios are confirmed through repeated experiments involving pseudo grid partitioning.

AI.tldr: 提出伪网格物理信息卷积循环网络(PG-PhyCRNet)，用于求解可积晶格方程的局域波解，通过伪网格增强模型对时空域外格点的外推能力，在Toda晶格和自对偶网络方程的多孤子解与有理孤子解上展示了优越性。
AI.motivation: 传统离散学习方法涉及差分格式的稳定性与收敛性问题，而可积非线性晶格方程具有深刻的数学结构（守恒律、哈密顿结构、多孤子解），需要一种既能保持可积性又能有效预测局域波解的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 提出PG-PhyCRNet模型，在物理信息卷积循环网络基础上引入伪网格机制，增强模型对时间域外格点位置的外推能力；通过对比有无伪网格的模型，研究Toda晶格和自对偶网络方程的多孤子解与有理孤子解。
AI.result: PG-PhyCRNet在捕捉长期演化方面表现优异，增强了模型对孤子（特别是陡峭波形和高波速孤子）的外推能力；通过重复的伪网格划分实验验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 伪网格机制能有效提升物理信息神经网络对可积晶格方程局域波解的预测性能，尤其适用于长时间演化和高波速陡峭孤子的求解场景。

title: Invariant Discovery of Features Across Multiple Length Scales: Applications in Microscopy and Autonomous Materials Characterization
summary: Physical imaging is a foundational characterization method in areas from condensed matter physics and chemistry to astronomy and spans length scales from atomic to universe. Images encapsulate crucial data regarding atomic bonding, materials microstructures, and dynamic phenomena such as microstructural evolution and turbulence, among other phenomena. The challenge lies in effectively extracting and interpreting this information. Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) have emerged as powerful tools for identifying underlying factors of variation in image data, providing a systematic approach to distilling meaningful patterns from complex datasets. However, a significant hurdle in their application is the definition and selection of appropriate descriptors reflecting local structure. Here we introduce the scale-invariant VAE approach (SI-VAE) based on the progressive training of the VAE with the descriptors sampled at different length scales. The SI-VAE allows the discovery of the length scale dependent factors of variation in the system. Here, we illustrate this approach using the ferroelectric domain images and generalize it to the movies of the electron-beam induced phenomena in graphene and topography evolution across combinatorial libraries. This approach can further be used to initialize the decision making in automated experiments including structure-property discovery and can be applied across a broad range of imaging methods. This approach is universal and can be applied to any spatially resolved data including both experimental imaging studies and simulations, and can be particularly useful for exploration of phenomena such as turbulence, scale-invariant transformation fronts, etc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种尺度不变变分自编码器（SI-VAE）方法，通过在不同长度尺度上逐步训练VAE，能够从图像数据中自动发现与长度尺度相关的变化因子，从而有效提取和解释复杂成像数据中的结构信息。
AI.motivation: 物理成像技术产生大量多尺度数据，但现有VAE方法在定义和选择反映局部结构的合适描述符方面存在困难，难以有效提取和解释这些数据中蕴含的关键信息。
AI.method: 提出SI-VAE方法，基于在不同长度尺度上采样的描述符对VAE进行渐进式训练，从而发现系统中与长度尺度相关的变化因子。
AI.result: 在铁电畴图像、石墨烯电子束诱导现象的影像以及组合库形貌演化数据上进行了验证，表明SI-VAE能够有效发现多尺度变化因子。
AI.conclusion: SI-VAE方法具有通用性，可应用于任何空间分辨数据（包括实验成像和模拟），尤其在探索湍流、尺度不变转变前沿等现象中具有重要应用价值，并能用于自动化实验的决策初始化。

title: FOS: A fully integrated open-source program for Fast Optical Spectrum calculations of nanoparticle media
summary: FOS, which means light in Greek, is an open-source program for Fast Optical Spectrum calculations of nanoparticle media. This program takes the material properties and a description of the system as input, and outputs the spectral response including the reflectance, absorptance, and transmittance. Previous open-source codes often include only one portion of what is needed to calculate the spectral response of a nanoparticulate medium, such as Mie theory or a Monte Carlo method. FOS is designed to provide a convenient fully integrated format to remove the barrier as well as providing a significantly accelerated implementation with compiled Python code, parallel processing, and pre-trained machine learning predictions. This program can accelerate optimization and high throughput design of optical properties of nanoparticle or nanocomposite media, such as radiative cooling paint and solar heating liquids, allowing for the discovery of new materials and designs. FOS also enables convenient modeling of lunar dust coatings, combustion particulates, and many other particulate systems. In this paper we discuss the methodology used in FOS, features of the program, and provide four case studies.

AI.tldr: FOS是一个开源程序，用于快速计算纳米颗粒介质的光学光谱响应（反射率、吸收率、透射率），它集成了Mie理论、蒙特卡洛方法、并行计算和机器学习加速，可用于辐射冷却涂料、太阳能加热液体、月球尘埃涂层等应用。
AI.motivation: 现有开源代码通常只包含计算纳米颗粒介质光谱响应的某一部分（如Mie理论或蒙特卡洛方法），缺乏完整的集成方案，且计算速度有限。FOS旨在提供一个便捷、完全集成的格式，消除使用障碍，并通过编译Python代码、并行处理和预训练机器学习预测实现显著加速。
AI.method: FOS集成多种计算方法：Mie理论用于单粒子散射计算，蒙特卡洛方法用于光在介质中的传输模拟，采用编译Python代码（加速执行）、并行处理（多核/多线程计算）以及预训练的机器学习模型（快速预测光学响应）来显著提升计算效率。
AI.result: FOS实现了纳米颗粒介质光谱响应（反射率、吸收率、透射率）的快速计算，支持辐射冷却涂料、太阳能加热液体、月球尘埃涂层、燃烧颗粒物等多种系统的光学性能优化和高通量设计。
AI.conclusion: FOS通过集成多种计算方法并引入加速技术，有效降低了纳米颗粒介质光学计算的门槛，加速了新材料和新设计的光学性能优化与高通量发现。

title: Optimal control of levitated nanoparticles through finite-stiffness confinement
summary: Optimal control of levitated nanoparticles subjected to thermal fluctuations is a challenging problem, both theoretically and experimentally. In this Letter, we compute the time-dependent harmonic confining potential that steers, in a prescribed time and with the minimum energetic cost, a Brownian particle between two assigned equilibrium states. We take full account of inertial effects, thus addressing the general underdamped dynamics, and, to address actual experimental conditions, the stiffness of the confining potential is required to be bounded. We carry out an experiment realizing the described protocol for an optically confined nanoparticle, which is shown to reach the target state within accuracy -- while spending less energy than other protocols with the same duration, significantly shorter than the characteristic relaxation time. The results presented here are expected to have relevant applications in the design of optimal devices, such as engines at the nanoscale.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论和实验，计算并实现了在有限时间内、以最小能量成本将布朗粒子（悬浮纳米粒子）在两个平衡态之间最优控制的时变谐振势，考虑了欠阻尼动力学和势阱刚度约束，实验验证了其优于传统协议的性能。
AI.motivation: 受热涨落影响的悬浮纳米粒子的最优控制是一个具有挑战性的问题，无论从理论还是实验角度，都需要找到在有限时间内以最小能量代价操纵布朗粒子的方法。
AI.method: 计算了时间相关的谐振约束势，该势能在规定时间内以最小能量成本将布朗粒子在两个指定平衡态之间引导；完全考虑了惯性效应（欠阻尼动力学），并要求势阱刚度有界；通过光镊捕获纳米粒子进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验实现了所描述的协议，纳米粒子在精度范围内到达目标态，且消耗的能量少于相同持续时间的其他协议，该持续时间远短于特征弛豫时间。
AI.conclusion: 该结果有望应用于纳米尺度引擎等最优器件的设计中。

title: Fractality in resistive circuits: The Fibonacci resistor networks
summary: We propose two new kinds of infinite resistor networks based on the Fibonacci sequence: a serial association of resistor sets connected in parallel (type 1) or a parallel association of resistor sets connected in series (type 2). We show that the sequence of the network's equivalent resistance converges uniformly in the parameter $α=\frac{r_2}{r_1} \in [0,+\infty)$, where $r_1$ and $r_2$ are the first and second resistors in the network. We also show that these networks exhibit self-similarity and scale invariance, which mimics a self-similar fractal. We also provide some generalizations, including resistor networks based on high-order Fibonacci sequences and other recursive combinatorial sequences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于斐波那契序列的无限电阻网络（类型1：串联电阻组并联；类型2：并联电阻组串联），证明等效电阻序列在参数α∈[0,+∞)上一致收敛，并揭示网络的自相似性与尺度不变性，类似自相似分形，还推广至高阶斐波那契序列及其他递归组合序列。
AI.motivation: 探索斐波那契序列在电阻网络拓扑中的应用，研究这类新型无限电阻网络的收敛性及自相似特性，为递归组合序列在电路理论中的应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 构造两种基于斐波那契序列的无限电阻网络结构，通过数学推导分析等效电阻序列的收敛性，利用自相似性推导尺度不变性，并推广到高阶斐波那契序列和其他递归组合序列情形。
AI.result: 证明了两种网络的等效电阻序列在α∈[0,+∞)上一致收敛；网络呈现自相似性和尺度不变性，类似自相似分形行为；成功推广至高阶斐波那契序列及其他递归组合序列。
AI.conclusion: 基于斐波那契序列的无限电阻网络具有良好收敛性和自相似分形特性，该方法可扩展至更广泛的递归组合序列，为设计具有分形特性的电路网络提供了新思路。

title: Algorithms for Collaborative Machine Learning under Statistical Heterogeneity
comment: Doctoral Dissertation. For the conference version of Chapter II, see arXiv:2109.07628v3, and for the conference version of Chapter III, see arXiv:2405.20821v1
summary: Learning from distributed data without accessing them is undoubtedly a challenging and non-trivial task. Nevertheless, the necessity for distributed training of a statistical model has been increasing, due to the privacy concerns of local data owners and the cost in centralizing the massively distributed data. Federated learning (FL) is currently the de facto standard of training a machine learning model across heterogeneous data owners, without leaving the raw data out of local silos. Nevertheless, several challenges must be addressed in order for FL to be more practical in reality. Among these challenges, the statistical heterogeneity problem is the most significant and requires immediate attention. From the main objective of FL, three major factors can be considered as starting points -- \textit{parameter}, textit{mixing coefficient}, and \textit{local data distributions}. In alignment with the components, this dissertation is organized into three parts. In Chapter II, a novel personalization method, \texttt{SuPerFed}, inspired by the mode-connectivity is introduced. In Chapter III, an adaptive decision-making algorithm, \texttt{AAggFF}, is introduced for inducing uniform performance distributions in participating clients, which is realized by online convex optimization framework. Finally, in Chapter IV, a collaborative synthetic data generation method, \texttt{FedEvg}, is introduced, leveraging the flexibility and compositionality of an energy-based modeling approach. Taken together, all of these approaches provide practical solutions to mitigate the statistical heterogeneity problem in data-decentralized settings, paving the way for distributed systems and applications using collaborative machine learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本论文针对联邦学习中的统计异质性挑战，从参数、混合系数和局部数据分布三个关键因素出发，提出了三种解决方案：基于模式连通性的个性化方法SuPerFed、用于实现客户端均匀性能分布的自适应决策算法AAggFF，以及基于能量建模的协作合成数据生成方法FedEvg。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在分布式数据训练中面临统计异质性问题（即各客户端数据分布不一致），这严重影响了模型的实用性和性能表现，需要有效的解决方案来缓解这一挑战。
AI.method: 从参数、混合系数和局部数据分布三个维度出发：1) SuPerFed：受模式连通性启发的个性化方法；2) AAggFF：基于在线凸优化的自适应决策算法，实现客户端均匀性能分布；3) FedEvg：利用能量基模型的灵活性和组合性进行协作合成数据生成。
AI.result: 三种方法分别从不同角度提供了缓解统计异质性问题的实用解决方案，为使用协作机器学习方法的分布式系统和应用铺平了道路。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SuPerFed、AAggFF和FedEvg三种方法共同构成了应对数据去中心化场景下统计异质性问题的系统性解决方案，推动了联邦学习在实际分布式系统中的应用。

title: Clusterpath Gaussian Graphical Modeling
summary: Graphical models serve as effective tools for visualizing conditional dependencies between variables. However, as the number of variables grows, interpretation becomes increasingly difficult, and estimation uncertainty increases due to the large number of parameters relative to the number of observations. To address these challenges, we introduce the Clusterpath estimator of the Gaussian Graphical Model (CGGM) that encourages variable clustering in the graphical model in a data-driven way. Through the use of an aggregation penalty, we group variables together, which in turn results in a block-structured precision matrix whose block structure remains preserved in the covariance matrix. The CGGM estimator is formulated as the solution to a convex optimization problem, making it easy to incorporate other popular penalization schemes which we illustrate through the combination of an aggregation and sparsity penalty. We present a computationally efficient implementation of the CGGM estimator by using a cyclic block coordinate descent algorithm. In simulations, we show that CGGM not only matches, but oftentimes outperforms other state-of-the-art methods for variable clustering in graphical models. We also demonstrate CGGM's practical advantages and versatility on a diverse collection of empirical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CGGM（Clusterpath高斯图模型估计器）的新方法，通过引入聚合惩罚鼓励变量聚类，从而得到块结构化的精度矩阵，解决了高维图模型中的可解释性和估计不确定性问题。该方法基于凸优化，可结合稀疏惩罚，并采用循环块坐标下降算法高效求解。实验表明CGGM在变量聚类任务上达到或超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯图模型在变量数量增多时面临两个主要挑战：（1）解释性变差，复杂的依赖关系难以直观理解；（2）估计不确定性增加，因为参数数量相对于观测样本数过大。现有方法缺乏有效的机制自动将变量聚集成组以简化模型结构。
AI.method: 提出Clusterpath高斯图模型（CGGM）估计器，通过引入聚合惩罚（aggregation penalty）将变量分组，产生块结构化的精度矩阵。该估计器是凸优化问题的解，易于整合其他惩罚（如稀疏惩罚）。采用循环块坐标下降算法实现高效计算。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明CGGM在变量聚类任务上不仅匹配而且时常优于其他最先进的方法。在多个实际数据集上展示了其实用优势和 versatility。
AI.conclusion: CGGM通过数据驱动的变量聚类有效提升了高维图模型的可解释性和估计稳定性，是一种灵活且高效的框架，可与其他惩罚方案结合使用。

title: Learning Latent Space Dynamics with Model-Form Uncertainties: A Stochastic Reduced-Order Modeling Approach
summary: This paper presents a probabilistic approach to represent and quantify model-form uncertainties in the reduced-order modeling of complex systems using operator inference techniques. Such uncertainties can arise in the selection of an appropriate state-space representation, in the projection step that underlies many reduced-order modeling methods, or as a byproduct of considerations made during training, to name a few. Following previous works in the literature, the proposed method captures these uncertainties by expanding the approximation space through the randomization of the projection matrix. This is achieved by combining Riemannian projection and retraction operators - acting on a subset of the Stiefel manifold - with an information-theoretic formulation. The efficacy of the approach is assessed on canonical problems in fluid mechanics by identifying and quantifying the impact of model-form uncertainties on the inferred operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率的方法，通过结合黎曼投影和回缩算子与信息论公式，在算子推理的降阶建模中表示和量化模型形式不确定性，并在流体力学典型问题上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 降阶建模中模型形式不确定性来源广泛（如状态空间表示选择、投影步骤、训练过程中的考量），现有方法未能充分表示和量化这些不确定性。
AI.method: 通过随机化投影矩阵扩展近似空间，结合作用于Stiefel流形子集上的黎曼投影和回缩算子，并与信息论公式相结合。
AI.result: 在流体力学典型问题上成功识别并量化了模型形式不确定性对推断算子的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的概率方法能够有效表示和量化降阶建模中的模型形式不确定性，为复杂系统建模提供了更可靠的不确定性量化工具。

title: Escape cascades as a behavioral contagion process with adaptive network dynamics
summary: Complex behavioral contagion in collective evasion of mobile animal groups can be predicted by reconstructing quantitative interaction networks. Based on the assumption of time-scale separation between a fast contagion process and a slower movement response, the underlying interaction networks have been previously assumed to be static, determined by the spatial structure at the onset of the collective escape response. This idealization does not account for the temporal evolution of the spatial network structure, which may have a major impact on the behavioral contagion dynamics. Here, we propose a spatially-explicit, agent-based model for the coupling between behavioral contagion and the network dynamics originating from the spreading movement response. We explore the impact of movement parameters (startle speed, initial directionality, and directional noise) on average cascade size. By conducting numerical simulations for different density levels, we show that increasing escape speed suppresses the cascade size in most cases, that the cascade size depends strongly on the movement direction of the initially startled individual, and that large variability in the direction of individual escape movements (rotational noise) will typically promote the spread of behavioral contagion through spatial groups. Our work highlights the importance of accounting for movement dynamics in behavioral contagion, and facilitates our understanding of rapid coordinated response and collective information processing in animal groups.

AI.tldr: 通过构建空间显式的智能体模型，研究动物群体集体逃逸中行为 contagion 与运动网络动力学的耦合，发现逃逸速度、初始方向和方向噪声对级联大小有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 以往研究假设行为 contagion 过程与运动响应存在时间尺度分离，将相互作用网络视为静态，忽略了空间网络结构随时间演化对 contagion 动力学的重要影响。
AI.method: 提出了一个空间显式的基于智能体的模型，耦合了行为 contagion 与由扩散运动响应引起的网络动力学。通过数值模拟，探究运动参数（惊吓速度、初始方向性和方向噪声）在不同密度水平下对平均级联大小的影响。
AI.result: 增加逃逸速度在多数情况下抑制级联大小；级联大小强烈依赖于最初受惊个体的运动方向；个体逃逸运动方向的大变异性（旋转噪声）通常会促进行为 contagion 在空间群体中的传播。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在行为 contagion 中考虑运动动力学的重要性，有助于理解动物群体中的快速协调响应和集体信息处理。

title: Recovery of synchronized oscillations on multiplex networks by tuning dynamical time scales
summary: The heterogeneity among interacting dynamical systems or variations in the pattern of their interactions occur naturally in many real complex systems. Often they lead to partially synchronized states like chimeras or oscillation suppressed states like in-homogeneous or homogeneous steady states. In such cases, it is a challenge to get synchronized oscillations in spite of prevailing heterogeneity. In this study, we present a formalism for controlling multi layer, multi timescale systems and show how synchronized oscillations can be restored by tuning the dynamical time scales between the layers. Specifically, we use the model of a multiplex network, where the first layer of coupled oscillators is multiplexed with an environment layer, that can generate various types of chimera states and suppressed states. We show that by tuning the time scale mismatch between the layers, we can revive the synchronized oscillations. We analyse the nature of the transition of the system to synchronization from various dynamical states and the role of time scale mismatch and strength of inter layer coupling in this scenario. We also consider a three layer multiplex system, where two system layers interact with the common environment layer. In this case, we observe anti synchronization and in-homogeneous steady states on the system layers and by tuning their time scale difference with the environment layer, they undergo transition to synchronized oscillations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过调节多层网络层间时间尺度失配来恢复同步振荡的框架，分析了从嵌合态、抑制态等不同状态到同步的转变机制，并在双层和三层多路复用系统中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 实际复杂系统中普遍存在异质性，导致部分同步（如嵌合态）或振荡抑制（如均匀/非均匀稳态）等非理想状态。如何在异质性下恢复同步振荡是一个挑战，现有方法缺乏针对多层多时间尺度系统的统一控制框架。
AI.method: 采用多路复用网络模型：第一层为耦合振子系统，与环境层（第二层）多路复用；通过调节层间时间尺度失配和耦合强度，分析系统从各种嵌合态和抑制态向同步振荡转变的过程。进一步扩展到三层系统（两个系统层共享一个公共环境层）。
AI.result: 1) 通过调节层间时间尺度失配，可从嵌合态和抑制态恢复同步振荡；2) 层间耦合强度对转变过程有重要影响；3) 在三层系统中，观察到反同步和非均匀稳态，调节层间时间尺度差可使系统层过渡到同步振荡。
AI.conclusion: 层间时间尺度失配是控制多层系统同步行为的关键参数，为异质多尺度系统中的同步恢复提供了有效调控手段。

title: New type of solutions for a critical Grushin-type problem with competing potentials
summary: In this paper, we consider a critical Grushin-type problem with double potentials. By applying the reduction argument and local Pohouzaev identities, we construct a new family of solutions to this problem, which are concentrated at points lying on the top and the bottom circles of a cylinder.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类带有双重势的临界Grushin型问题，通过约化论证和局部Pohozaev恒等式，构造了一族新的解，这些解集中在圆柱的顶部和底部圆环上的点。
AI.motivation: 研究带有双重势的临界Grushin型问题的解的存在性和结构，这类问题在几何分析和偏微分方程中具有重要理论意义。
AI.method: 采用约化论证（reduction argument）和局部Pohozaev恒等式（local Pohozaev identities）来构造解。
AI.result: 构造了一族新的解，这些解集中在圆柱的顶部和底部圆环上的点。
AI.conclusion: 成功构造了临界Grushin型问题的一族新解，解呈现出集中在圆柱上下两端圆环上的特殊几何结构。

title: A superpotential for Grassmannian Schubert varieties
summary: While mirror symmetry for flag varieties and Grassmannians has been extensively studied, Schubert varieties in the Grassmannian are singular, and hence standard mirror symmetry statements are not well-defined. Nevertheless, in this article we introduce a ``superpotential'' $W^λ$ for each Grassmannian Schubert variety $X_λ$, generalizing the Marsh-Rietsch superpotential for Grassmannians, and we show that $W^λ$ governs many toric degenerations of $X_λ$. We also generalize the ``polytopal mirror theorem'' for Grassmannians from our previous work: namely, for any cluster seed $G$ for $X_λ$, we construct a corresponding Newton-Okounkov convex body $Δ_G^λ$, and show that it coincides with the superpotential polytope $Γ_G^λ$, that is, it is cut out by the inequalities obtained by tropicalizing an associated Laurent expansion of $W^λ$. This gives us a toric degeneration of the Schubert variety $X_λ$ to the (singular) toric variety $Y(\mathcal{N}_λ)$ of the Newton-Okounkov body. Finally, for a particular cluster seed $G=G^λ_{\mathrm{rec}}$ we show that the toric variety $Y(\mathcal{N}_λ)$ has a small toric desingularisation, and we describe an intermediate partial desingularisation $Y(\mathcal{F}_λ)$ that is Gorenstein Fano. Many of our results extend to more general varieties in the Grassmannian.

AI.tldr: 本文为Grassmannian中的Schubert簇引入了超势$W^λ$，证明其控制该簇的toric退化，并将多胞体镜像定理推广至Schubert簇，构造了Newton-Okounkov凸体与超势多胞体的等价性，进而获得toric退化；对特定种子给出了小toric消解及Gorenstein Fano部分消解的描述。
AI.motivation: Grassmannian中旗簇和Grassmannian的镜像对称已被广泛研究，但Schubert簇是奇异的，标准镜像对称陈述不成立。因此，本文旨在为Schubert簇建立类似的镜像对称框架。
AI.method: 为每个Grassmannian Schubert簇$X_λ$引入推广的Marsh-Rietsch超势$W^λ$；对任意簇种子$G$构造Newton-Okounkov凸体$Δ_G^λ$，证明其与超势多胞体$Γ_G^λ$一致（即由热带化$W^λ$的Laurent展开所得不等式定义）；对特定种子$G^λ_{\mathrm{rec}}$研究toric簇的消解性质。
AI.result: $W^λ$控制$X_λ$的多个toric退化；证明了$Δ_G^λ = Γ_G^λ$，从而得到$X_λ$到Newton-Okounkov体对应的（奇异）toric簇$Y(\mathcal{N}_λ)$的toric退化；$Y(\mathcal{N}_λ)$具有小toric消解，$Y(\mathcal{F}_λ)$是Gorenstein Fano的部分消解。
AI.conclusion: 成功将镜像对称和多胞体镜像定理推广到奇异的Grassmannian Schubert簇，建立了超势与toric退化、Newton-Okounkov理论之间的深刻联系，许多结果可推广至Grassmannian中更一般的簇。

title: New and General Type Meromorphic $1$-forms on Curves
comment: This version replaces the previous one, with minor revisions. Accepted for publication in Communications in Algebra (18 pages)
summary: In this article, we study the existence of new and general type meromorphic $1$-forms on curves through explicit construction. Specifically, we have constructed a large family of new and general type meromorphic $1$-forms on $\mathbb{P}^1,$ elliptic and hyperelliptic curves. We also established a connection to the Hurwitz realization problem of branch cover for the Riemann Sphere, which provides an algorithm to determine whether a $1$-form on $\mathbb{P}^1$ (of some restricted class) is new or old.

AI.tldr: 本文通过显式构造，在射影直线、椭圆曲线和超椭圆曲线上研究了一类新型一般亚纯1-形式的存在性，并建立了与黎曼球面分支覆盖的Hurwitz实现问题的联系，从而提供了判断射影直线上某类1-形式是否为新型的算法。
AI.motivation: 研究新型一般亚纯1-形式的存在性，并建立其与Hurwitz实现问题的联系。
AI.method: 通过显式构造，在P^1、椭圆曲线和超椭圆曲线上构建了一族新型一般亚纯1-形式，并利用与Hurwitz实现问题的联系设计了判定算法。
AI.result: 成功构造了一大族新型一般亚纯1-形式，并给出了判断射影直线上某类1-形式是否为新型的算法。
AI.conclusion: 建立了新型亚纯1-形式与Hurwitz实现问题的联系，提供了有效的分类判定方法。

title: A dispersive effective equation for transverse propagation of planar shallow water waves over periodic bathymetry
summary: We study the behavior of shallow water waves propagating over bathymetry that varies periodically in one direction and is constant in the other. Plane waves traveling along the constant direction are known to evolve into solitary waves, due to an effective dispersion. We apply multiple-scale perturbation theory to derive an effective constant-coefficient system of equations, showing that the transversely-averaged wave approximately satisfies a Boussinesq-type equation, while the lateral variation in the wave is related to certain integral functions of the bathymetry. Thus the homogenized equations not only accurately describe these waves but also predict their full two-dimensional shape in some detail. Numerical experiments confirm the good agreement between the effective equations and the variable-bathymetry shallow water equations.

AI.tldr: 研究周期性变化地形上的浅水波传播行为，通过多尺度扰动理论推导出等效常数系数Boussinesq型方程，并数值验证了等效方程与变化地形浅水方程的吻合度。
AI.motivation: 理解周期性变化地形对浅水波传播的影响，特别是平面波如何演化为孤立波，以及如何用均质化方法简化该复杂问题。
AI.method: 采用多尺度扰动理论推导等效常数系数方程组，获得横向平均波满足的Boussinesq型方程，并通过横向变化与地形积分函数关联。
AI.result: 推导出的均质化方程不仅准确描述了波的传播行为，还能预测波在二维空间中的完整形态；数值实验验证了等效方程与原始变地形浅水方程的良好一致性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度均质化方法能有效处理周期性变化地形上的浅水波问题，为复杂地形下的波浪传播提供简化的理论模型和预测工具。

title: Linear response and resonances in adiabatic time-dependent density functional theory
summary: We consider the electrons of a molecule in the adiabatic time-dependent density functional theory approximation. We establish the well-posedness of the time evolution and its linear response close to a non-degenerate ground state, and prove the appearance of resonances at relevant frequencies. The main mathematical difficulty is due to the structure of the linearized equations, which are not complex-linear. We bypass this difficulty by reformulating the  linearized problem as a real Hamiltonian system, whose stability is ensured by the second-order optimality conditions on the energy.

AI.tldr: 论文在绝热含时密度泛函理论近似下，研究了分子电子的时间演化适定性和线性响应，证明了在非简并基态附近相关频率处出现共振，并通过将线性化问题重新表述为实哈密顿系统来克服非复线性的数学困难。
AI.motivation: 分子电子在绝热含时密度泛函理论近似下的时间演化适定性和线性响应问题尚未得到严格的数学分析，特别是线性化方程的非复线性结构带来了主要的数学困难。
AI.method: 通过将线性化问题重新表述为实哈密顿系统，利用能量二阶最优性条件保证系统稳定性，从而建立适定性和共振分析。
AI.result: 证明了在非简并基态附近时间演化的适定性，以及线性响应中相关频率处共振的出现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为绝热含时密度泛函理论的线性响应分析提供了严格的数学基础，克服了非复线性结构的困难。

title: Rational, trigonometric, elliptic algebras and moduli spaces of sheaves on surfaces
summary: We survey the well-known Yangian of $\widehat{\mathfrak{gl}}_1$ /quantum toroidal $\mathfrak{gl}_1$ action on the cohomology / $K$-theory of moduli spaces of stable sheaves on surfaces, and give the generalization of this construction to elliptic cohomology.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了$\widehat{\mathfrak{gl}}_1$的Yangian/量子环形$\mathfrak{gl}_1$在曲面稳定层模空间的上同调/K-理论上的作用，并将其推广到椭圆上同调。
AI.motivation: 将已知的$\widehat{\mathfrak{gl}}_1$ Yangian/量子环形$\mathfrak{gl}_1$在曲面稳定层模空间的上同调与K-理论上的作用推广到椭圆上同调框架中。
AI.method: 综述已知的Yangian/量子环形代数作用，并构造其在椭圆上同调上的推广。
AI.result: 成功将该代数作用从同调/K-理论推广至椭圆上同调。
AI.conclusion: 建立了$\widehat{\mathfrak{gl}}_1$ Yangian/量子环形代数在椭圆上同调层面上的作用，完成了从同调、K-理论到椭圆上同调的逐步推广。

title: Hybrid Approach to Parallel Stochastic Gradient Descent
summary: Stochastic Gradient Descent is used for large datasets to train models to reduce the training time. On top of that data parallelism is widely used as a method to efficiently train neural networks using multiple worker nodes in parallel. Synchronous and asynchronous approach to data parallelism is used by most systems to train the model in parallel. However, both of them have their drawbacks. We propose a third approach to data parallelism which is a hybrid between synchronous and asynchronous approaches, using both approaches to train the neural network. When the threshold function is selected appropriately to gradually shift all parameter aggregation from asynchronous to synchronous, we show that in a given time period our hybrid approach outperforms both asynchronous and synchronous approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合同步和异步的数据并行方法，通过阈值函数逐步从异步聚合过渡到同步聚合，在给定时间内优于纯同步或纯异步方法。
AI.motivation: 同步数据并行存在straggler问题导致等待开销，异步数据并行存在梯度陈旧性问题影响模型收敛质量。两种方法各有缺陷，需要一种兼顾效率与精度的并行策略。
AI.method: 提出一种混合同步与异步的数据并行方法：通过一个阈值函数控制参数聚合方式，训练初期采用异步聚合以加速，后期逐步过渡到同步聚合以保证收敛质量，实现从异步到同步的渐进式切换。
AI.result: 当选择合适的阈值函数时，在给定的时间预算内，混合方法的模型性能（如收敛速度或最终精度）优于纯异步和纯同步方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合同步与异步的数据并行方法能够结合两者优势，在有限时间内获得更好的训练效果，为大规模神经网络分布式训练提供了一种有效的折中方案。

title: Temporal Subspace Clustering for Molecular Dynamics Data
comment: Accepted as a research paper at BIOKDD 2024
summary: We introduce MOSCITO (MOlecular Dynamics Subspace Clustering with Temporal Observance), a subspace clustering for molecular dynamics data. MOSCITO groups those timesteps of a molecular dynamics trajectory together into clusters in which the molecule has similar conformations. In contrast to state-of-the-art methods, MOSCITO takes advantage of sequential relationships found in time series data. Unlike existing work, MOSCITO does not need a two-step procedure with tedious post-processing, but directly models essential properties of the data. Interpreting clusters as Markov states allows us to evaluate the clustering performance based on the resulting Markov state models. In experiments on 60 trajectories and 4 different proteins, we show that the performance of MOSCITO achieves state-of-the-art performance in a novel single-step method. Moreover, by modeling temporal aspects, MOSCITO obtains better segmentation of trajectories, especially for small numbers of clusters.

AI.tldr: MOSCITO是一种针对分子动力学轨迹数据的子空间聚类方法，通过利用时间序列中的顺序关系，以单步方式直接建模数据特性，将轨迹时间步聚类为相似构象的组，并将聚类结果解释为马尔可夫状态以评估性能。在60条轨迹和4种不同蛋白质上的实验表明，该方法在聚类性能上达到先进水平，尤其在少量聚类情况下能获得更好的轨迹分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有分子动力学聚类方法通常需要两步流程且繁琐的后处理，未能充分利用时间序列数据中的顺序关系，因此需要一种能够直接建模数据时序特性的单步聚类方法。
AI.method: MOSCITO利用分子动力学轨迹中的时序顺序关系，以单步方式直接进行子空间聚类，避免了传统两步法中的后处理步骤，并将聚类结果解释为马尔可夫状态用于性能评估。
AI.result: 在60条轨迹和4种不同蛋白质上的实验中，MOSCITO达到了与现有方法相当的性能，且在聚类数量较少时，由于建模了时间维度，获得了更好的轨迹分割效果。
AI.conclusion: MOSCITO通过单步建模时序关系实现了分子动力学数据的有效子空间聚类，避免了繁琐的后处理，在少量聚类场景下表现尤为优异。

title: Quasi-Steady-State Approach for Efficient Multiscale Simulation and Optimization of mAb Glycosylation in CHO Cell Culture
summary: Glycosylation is a critical quality attribute for monoclonal antibody (mAb) production, influenced by both process conditions and cellular mechanisms. Multiscale mechanistic models, spanning from the bioreactor to the Golgi apparatus, have been proposed for analyzing the glycosylation process. However, these models are computationally intensive to solve when using traditional methods, making optimization and control challenging. In this work, we propose a quasi-steady-state (QSS) approach for efficiently solving the multiscale glycosylation model. By introducing the QSS assumption and assuming negligible nucleotide sugar donor (NSD) flux for glycosylation in the Golgi, the large-scale partial differential algebraic equation system is converted into a series of independent differential algebraic equation systems. Based on that representation, we develop a three-step QSS simulation method and further reduce computational time through parallel computing and nonuniform time grid strategies. Case studies in simulation, parameter estimation, and dynamic optimization demonstrate that the QSS approach can be more than 300-fold faster than the method of lines, with less than 1.6% relative errors. This work establishes a solid foundation for multiscale model-based optimization and control of the glycosylation process, supporting the implementation of quality by design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种准稳态（QSS）方法，用于高效求解从生物反应器到高尔基体的多尺度糖基化模型。通过QSS假设和忽略核苷酸糖供体通量，将大规模偏微分代数方程组转化为一系列独立微分代数方程组，并结合并行计算和非均匀时间网格策略，实现了超过300倍的计算加速，且相对误差小于1.6%，为基于多尺度模型的糖基化过程优化与控制奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 多尺度糖基化模型（从生物反应器到高尔基体）对于分析单克隆抗体生产的糖基化过程至关重要，但传统方法求解计算量极大，难以应用于过程优化与控制。
AI.method: 提出准稳态（QSS）假设，忽略高尔基体中核苷酸糖供体通量，将大规模偏微分代数方程组（PDAEs）转化为一系列独立微分代数方程组（DAEs）；在此基础上开发三步QSS仿真方法，并采用并行计算和非均匀时间网格策略进一步减少计算时间。
AI.result: QSS方法相比传统方法（method of lines）可实现超过300倍的加速，且相对误差小于1.6%。在仿真、参数估计和动态优化案例中均验证了其高效性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为基于多尺度模型的糖基化过程优化与控制奠定了坚实基础，有力支持了质量源于设计（QbD）理念的实施。

title: Well-conditioned dipole-type method of fundamental solutions: derivation and its mathematical analysis
summary: In this paper, we examine the dipole-type method of fundamental solutions, which can be conceptualized as a discretization of the "singularity-removed" double-layer potential. We present a method for removing the ill-conditionality, which was previously considered a significant challenge, and provide a mathematical analysis in the context of disk regions. Moreover, we extend the proposed method to the general Jordan region using conformal mapping, demonstrating the efficacy of the proposed method through numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了偶极子型基本解法，该方法可视为“奇点移除”双层势的离散化。提出了一种解决病态性问题的方法，并在圆盘区域进行了数学分析。通过共形映射将方法推广到一般Jordan区域，并通过数值实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 偶极子型基本解法此前存在严重的病态性问题，被视为该方法的主要挑战，本文旨在解决这一数值不稳定问题。
AI.method: 提出一种消除病态性的方法，先在圆盘区域进行数学分析，再利用共形映射将方法推广到一般Jordan区域。
AI.result: 成功解决了偶极子型基本解法的病态性问题，并通过数值实验证明了方法在一般Jordan区域上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 偶极子型基本解法的病态性问题可通过所提方法有效消除，且该方法可借助共形映射推广到更一般的区域。

title: Towards Universal Mesh Movement Networks
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2024 as a spotlight paper
summary: Solving complex Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) accurately and efficiently is an essential and challenging problem in all scientific and engineering disciplines. Mesh movement methods provide the capability to improve the accuracy of the numerical solution without increasing the overall mesh degree of freedom count. Conventional sophisticated mesh movement methods are extremely expensive and struggle to handle scenarios with complex boundary geometries. However, existing learning-based methods require re-training from scratch given a different PDE type or boundary geometry, which limits their applicability, and also often suffer from robustness issues in the form of inverted elements. In this paper, we introduce the Universal Mesh Movement Network (UM2N), which -- once trained -- can be applied in a non-intrusive, zero-shot manner to move meshes with different size distributions and structures, for solvers applicable to different PDE types and boundary geometries. UM2N consists of a Graph Transformer (GT) encoder for extracting features and a Graph Attention Network (GAT) based decoder for moving the mesh. We evaluate our method on advection and Navier-Stokes based examples, as well as a real-world tsunami simulation case. Our method outperforms existing learning-based mesh movement methods in terms of the benchmarks described above. In comparison to the conventional sophisticated Monge-Ampère PDE-solver based method, our approach not only significantly accelerates mesh movement, but also proves effective in scenarios where the conventional method fails. Our project page is at https://erizmr.github.io/UM2N/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通用网格移动网络(UM2N)，一种基于图变换器(GT)和图注意力网络(GAT)的零样本、非侵入式网格移动方法，可处理不同PDE类型和边界几何，在平流、Navier-Stokes及真实海啸模拟中优于现有学习方法，相比传统Monge-Ampère方法显著加速且在传统方法失败的场景中仍有效。
AI.motivation: 传统网格移动方法计算昂贵且难以处理复杂边界几何；现有基于学习的方法需要针对不同PDE类型或边界几何重新训练，且存在鲁棒性问题（如单元反转）。亟需一种通用、零样本、鲁棒的网格移动方法。
AI.method: UM2N由两部分组成：图变换器(GT)编码器用于特征提取，图注意力网络(GAT)解码器用于网格移动。该模型以零样本、非侵入方式应用于不同尺寸分布和结构的网格，支持不同PDE类型和边界几何。
AI.result: 在平流方程、Navier-Stokes方程以及真实海啸模拟案例上，UM2N优于现有基于学习的网格移动方法；相比传统Monge-Ampère PDE求解器方法，不仅显著加速了网格移动，还在传统方法失败的场景中证明了有效性。
AI.conclusion: UM2N是一种通用、高效、鲁棒的网格移动方法，无需针对新场景重新训练，兼具学习方法的效率和传统方法的精度，为复杂PDE问题的高精度数值求解提供了实用工具。

title: Solving cluster moment relaxation with hierarchical matrix
summary: Convex relaxation methods are powerful tools for studying the lowest energy of many-body problems. By relaxing the representability conditions for marginals to a set of local constraints, along with a global semidefinite constraint, a polynomial-time solvable semidefinite program (SDP) that provides a lower bound for the energy can be derived. In this paper, we propose accelerating the solution of such an SDP relaxation by imposing a hierarchical structure on the positive semidefinite (PSD) primal and dual variables. Furthermore, these matrices can be updated efficiently using the algebra of the compressed representations within an augmented Lagrangian method. We achieve quadratic and even near-linear time per-iteration complexity. Through experimentation on the quantum transverse field Ising model, we showcase the capability of our approach to provide a sufficiently accurate lower bound for the exact ground-state energy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过层级化压缩PSD变量的结构，并利用压缩表示的代数在增广拉格朗日方法中高效更新，实现每迭代二次乃至近线性复杂度，从而加速求解多体问题中的SDP松弛下界。
AI.motivation: 凸松弛方法是研究多体问题最低能量的有力工具，但现有SDP松弛求解效率不高，需要加速以处理更大规模的问题。
AI.method: 对半定规划原变量和对偶变量施加层级化结构，利用压缩表示的代数在增广拉格朗日方法框架下高效更新矩阵。
AI.result: 实现了每迭代二次甚至近线性时间复杂度的求解效率；在量子横场Ising模型上的实验表明该方法能为精确基态能量提供足够准确的下界。
AI.conclusion: 层级化压缩加速策略能显著提升多体问题SDP松弛的求解效率，同时保持下界精度。

title: SORSA: Singular Values and Orthonormal Regularized Singular Vectors Adaptation of Large Language Models
summary: In this paper, we propose Singular Values and Orthonormal Regularized Singular Vectors Adaptation, or SORSA, a novel parameter efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method. Each SORSA adapter consists of two main parts: trainable principal singular weights $W_p = U_p \text{diag}(S_p) V^\top_p$, and frozen residual weights $W_r = U_r \text{diag}(S_r) V^\top_r$. These parts are initialized by performing singular value decomposition (SVD) on pre-trained weights. Moreover, we implement and analyze an orthonormal regularizer, which we prove could decrease the condition number of $W_p$ and make the optimization more efficient. SORSA adapters could be merged during inference, thus eliminating any inference latency. We also introduce a method to analyze the variation of the parameters by performing SVD and discuss and analyze SORSA's superiority in minimizing the alteration in the SVD aspect. After all, SORSA shows a faster convergence than LoRA and PiSSA in our experiments. On the GSM-8K benchmark, Llama 2 7B adapted using SORSA achieved 56.03\% accuracy, surpassing LoRA (42.30\%) and Full FT (49.05\%). We conclude that SORSA offers a new perspective on parameter-efficient fine-tuning, demonstrating remarkable performance.

AI.tldr: 提出SORSA方法，一种基于奇异值分解和正交正则化的参数高效微调技术，通过将预训练权重分解为可训练的主奇异权重和冻结的残差权重，并引入正交正则化器优化训练，在GSM-8K基准上超越LoRA和全参数微调。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）在收敛速度和性能上仍有提升空间，需要一种更高效的微调方法，既能保持参数效率，又能实现更快的收敛和更好的性能。
AI.method: SORSA适配器包含两部分：可训练的主奇异权重W_p和冻结的残差权重W_r，均通过对预训练权重进行SVD分解初始化。同时引入正交正则化器，理论上可降低W_p的条件数以提高优化效率。推理时可合并适配器消除延迟。
AI.result: 在GSM-8K基准上，Llama 2 7B使用SORSA达到56.03%准确率，显著优于LoRA（42.30%）和全参数微调（49.05%），且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: SORSA为参数高效微调提供了新视角，表现出卓越的性能和更快的收敛速度，是一种有前景的PEFT方法。

title: Shape optimization of non-matching isogeometric shells with moving intersections
summary: While shape optimization using isogeometric shells exhibits appealing features by integrating design geometries and analysis models, challenges arise when addressing computer-aided design (CAD) geometries comprised of multiple non-uniform rational B-splines (NURBS) patches, which are common in practice. The intractability stems from surface intersections within these CAD models. In this paper, we develop an approach for shape optimization of non-matching isogeometric shells incorporating intersection movement. Separately parametrized NURBS surfaces are modeled using Kirchhoff--Love shell theory and coupled using a penalty-based formulation. The optimization scheme allows shell patches to move without preserving relative location with other members during the shape optimization. This flexibility is achieved through an implicit state function, and analytical sensitivities are derived for the relative movement of shell patches. The introduction of differentiable intersections expands the design space and overcomes challenges associated with large mesh distortion, particularly when optimal shapes involve significant movement of patch intersections in physical space. Throughout optimization iterations, all members within the shell structures maintain the NURBS geometry representation, enabling efficient integration of analysis and design models. The optimization approach leverages the multilevel design concept by selecting a refined model for accurate analysis from a coarse design model while maintaining the same geometry. We adopt several example problems to verify the effectiveness of the proposed scheme and demonstrate its applicability to the optimization of the internal stiffeners of an aircraft wing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对非匹配等几何壳体的形状优化方法，通过引入可微分的曲面交线移动，使多NURBS补片构成的CAD模型在优化过程中各补片可独立移动，解决了传统方法中交线处理困难和大网格畸变问题，并验证了其在飞机翼内加筋优化中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 等几何壳体的形状优化虽然能够融合设计几何与分析模型，但实际中由多个NURBS补片构成的CAD模型存在曲面交线问题，导致优化困难。现有方法难以处理补片间的相对运动，限制了设计空间和优化效果。
AI.method: 采用Kirchhoff-Love壳理论分别参数化NURBS曲面，并通过基于罚函数的公式进行耦合；引入隐式状态函数实现补片相对运动，推导出补片交线相对运动的解析灵敏度；采用多级设计概念，从粗设计模型选择细化模型进行精确分析。
AI.result: 通过多个算例验证了所提方案的有效性，并展示了其在飞机翼内加筋结构优化中的适用性，包括解决大网格畸变问题和扩展设计空间。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的可微分支架移动方法有效解决了多补片等几何壳体形状优化中的交线处理难题，保持了NURBS几何表示，实现了分析与设计模型的高效集成。

title: Optimal Filtering for Interacting Particle Systems
summary: In this paper, we study the optimal filtering problem for a interacting particle system generated by stochastic differential equations with interaction. By using Malliavin calculus, we construct the differential equation of the covariance process and transform the filter problem to an optimal control problem. Finally we give the necessary condition that the coefficient of the optimal filter should satisfy

AI.tldr: 本文利用Malliavin微积分研究了交互粒子系统的最优滤波问题，通过构造协方差过程的微分方程将滤波问题转化为最优控制问题，并给出了最优滤波器系数应满足的必要条件。
AI.motivation: 针对由随机微分方程生成的交互粒子系统，研究其最优滤波问题，探索如何有效估计该系统的状态。
AI.method: 采用Malliavin微积分工具，构造协方差过程的微分方程，将滤波问题转化为最优控制问题进行求解。
AI.result: 成功将交互粒子系统的滤波问题转化为最优控制问题，并推导出最优滤波器系数应满足的必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 通过Malliavin微积分方法，为交互粒子系统的最优滤波问题提供了理论框架和必要条件，为实际应用中的滤波器设计提供了理论指导。

title: Investigation of Surfactant-Laden Bubble Migration Dynamics in Self-Rewetting Fluids using Lattice Boltzmann Method
summary: Self-rewetting fluids (SRFs) (e.g., aqueous solutions of long-chain alcohols) show anomalous nonlinear (quadratic) variations of surface tension with temperature involving a positive gradient, leading to different thermocapillary convection compared to normal fluids (NFs). Moreover, surface-active materials or surfactants can significantly alter interfacial dynamics by their adsorption on fluid interfaces. The coupled effects of temperature- and surfactant-induced Marangoni stresses on migration bubbles in SRFs remain unexplored. We use a robust lattice Boltzmann (LB) method based on central moments to simulate the two-fluid motions, capture interfaces, and compute the transport of energy and surfactant concentration fields, and systematically study the surfactant-laden bubble dynamics in SRFs. When compared to motion of bubbles in normal fluids, in which they continuously migrate without a stationary behavior, our results show that they exhibit dramatically different characteristics in SRFs. Not only is the bubble motion directed towards the minimum temperature location in SRFs, but, more importantly, the bubble attains an equilibrium position. In the absence of surfactants, such an equilibrium position arises at the minimum reference temperature occurring at the center of the domain. The addition of surfactants moves the equilibrium location further upstream, which is controlled by the magnitude of the Gibbs elasticity parameter that determines the magnitude of the surface tension variation with surfactants. The quadratic sensitivity coefficient of surface tension on temperature associated with the SRF modulates this behavior. The lower this quantity, the greater is the role of surfactants modifying the equilibrium position of the bubble in SRF. These findings provide new means to potentially manipulate the bubble dynamics, and especially to tune its equilibrium states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过格子玻尔兹曼方法系统研究了表面活性剂对自润湿流体中气泡迁移行为的影响，发现气泡在自润湿流体中会到达平衡位置而非持续迁移，且表面活性剂可使平衡位置向上游移动，为操控气泡动力学提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 自润湿流体具有反常的非线性表面张力-温度关系（正梯度），导致其热毛细对流行为与普通流体显著不同，但温度梯度和表面活性剂诱导的Marangoni应力对自润湿流体中气泡迁移行为的耦合效应尚未被探索。
AI.method: 采用基于中心矩的稳健格子玻尔兹曼方法，模拟两相流动、界面捕捉，并计算能量和表面活性剂浓度场的输运，系统研究含表面活性剂气泡在自润湿流体中的动力学。
AI.result: 与普通流体中气泡持续迁移不同，自润湿流体中气泡会朝向最低温度位置运动并达到平衡位置；无表面活性剂时平衡位置在域中心最低温度处，添加表面活性剂后平衡位置向上游移动，该移动由Gibbs弹性参数控制；表面张力对温度的二次敏感系数越低，表面活性剂对平衡位置的影响越大。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了自润湿流体中表面活性剂调控气泡平衡位置的新机制，为操控气泡动力学、特别是调节气泡平衡状态提供了新手段。

title: Reconstructing unsteady flows from sparse, noisy measurements with a physics-constrained convolutional neural network
summary: Data from fluid flow measurements are typically sparse, noisy, and heterogeneous, often from mixed pressure and velocity measurements, resulting in incomplete datasets. In this paper, we develop a physics-constrained convolutional neural network, which is a deterministic tool, to reconstruct the full flow field from incomplete data. We explore three loss functions, both from machine learning literature and newly proposed: (i) the softly-constrained loss, which allows the prediction to take any value; (ii) the snapshot-enforced loss, which constrains the prediction at the sensor locations; and (iii) the mean-enforced loss, which constrains the mean of the prediction at the sensor locations. The proposed methods do not require the full flow field during training, making it suitable for reconstruction from incomplete data. We apply the method to reconstruct a laminar wake of a bluff body and a turbulent Kolmogorov flow. First, we assume that measurements are not noisy and reconstruct both the laminar wake and the Kolmogorov flow from sensors located at fewer than 1% of all grid points. The snapshot-enforced loss reduces the reconstruction error of the Kolmogorov flow by approximately 25% compared to the softly-constrained loss. Second, we assume that measurements are noisy and propose the mean-enforced loss to reconstruct the laminar wake and the Kolmogorov flow at three different signal-to-noise ratios. We find that, across the ratios tested, the loss functions with harder constraints are more robust to both the random initialization of the networks and the noise levels in the measurements. At high noise levels, the mean-enforced loss can recover the instantaneous snapshots accurately, making it the suitable choice when reconstructing flows from data corrupted with an unknown amount of noise. The proposed method opens opportunities for physical flow reconstruction from sparse, noisy data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理约束卷积神经网络，用于从不完整、稀疏且含噪的流场数据（如压力和速度混合测量）中重建完整流场。探讨了三种损失函数：软约束损失、快照强制损失和均值强制损失。在层流尾流和湍流Kolmogorov流上的实验表明，在传感器数量少于1%网格点时，快照强制损失比软约束损失降低约25%重建误差；在高噪声条件下，均值强制损失能准确恢复瞬时快照，对随机初始化和噪声水平更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 流场测量数据通常稀疏、含噪且异构（混合压力和速度测量），导致数据集不完整。现有重建方法往往需要完整流场进行训练，不适用于实际中仅能获取部分测量数据的情况。因此需要开发一种能够在训练时无需完整流场、同时能处理噪声和稀疏测量数据的流场重建方法。
AI.method: 提出物理约束卷积神经网络（physics-constrained CNN），通过嵌入物理守恒定律约束网络输出。引入三种损失函数：(i) 软约束损失——允许预测取任意值，仅通过物理约束引导；(ii) 快照强制损失——在传感器位置强制预测值与测量值一致；(iii) 均值强制损失——在传感器位置约束预测值的均值与测量均值一致。网络训练时仅需稀疏测量数据，无需完整流场真值。
AI.result: 在层流钝体尾流和湍流Kolmogorov流上验证：(1) 无噪声情况下，传感器少于1%网格点时，快照强制损失相比软约束损失使Kolmogorov流重建误差降低约25%。(2) 有噪声情况下，在三种信噪比下测试，硬约束损失函数（快照强制、均值强制）对网络随机初始化和噪声水平更鲁棒。(3) 高噪声水平下，均值强制损失能准确恢复瞬时快照，适合噪声水平未知的数据重建。
