AI.conclusion: 该方法为从稀疏、含噪数据中重建物理流场开辟了新途径。硬约束损失函数（特别是均值强制损失）在噪声环境下表现更优，为实际工程中利用有限传感器数据进行流场重建提供了可行方案。

title: Hyperboloidal Method for Quasinormal Modes of Non-Relativistic Operators
summary: The recently reported compactified hyperboloidal method has found wide use in the numerical computation of quasinormal modes, with implications for fields as diverse as gravitational physics and optics. We extend this intrinsically relativistic method into the non-relativistic domain, demonstrating its use to calculate the quasinormal modes of the Schrödinger equation and solve related bound-state problems. We also describe how to further generalize this method, offering a perspective on the importance of non-relativistic quasinormal modes for the programme of black hole spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文将原本用于相对论引力系统的紧致化双曲方法扩展至非相对论领域，成功求解了薛定谔方程的准正则模式及相关束缚态问题，并讨论了该方法对黑洞光谱学的重要意义。
AI.motivation: 紧致化双曲方法已在相对论引力系统的准正则模式数值计算中得到广泛应用，但尚未被系统地推广到非相对论领域。作者希望将这一方法延伸到薛定谔方程等非相对论系统中，以计算其准正则模式并解决束缚态问题，从而拓展该方法的应用范围。
AI.method: 本文采用紧致化双曲方法（compactified hyperboloidal method），这是一种利用坐标变换将无穷远处压缩至有限计算域的技术。作者将其从相对论框架推广到非相对论领域，具体应用于薛定谔方程的准正则模式求解和束缚态问题的数值计算，并进一步描述了该方法的通用化扩展策略。
AI.result: 成功将紧致化双曲方法从相对论领域推广到非相对论领域，验证了其在薛定谔方程准正则模式计算和束缚态问题求解中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 紧致化双曲方法不仅适用于相对论系统，也能有效处理非相对论系统中的准正则模式计算问题。这一扩展为黑洞光谱学中非相对论准正则模式的研究提供了新的视角和工具，有望推动相关领域的交叉与融合。

title: Fast and scalable finite-element based approach for density functional theory calculations using projector-augmented wave method
summary: In this work, we present a computationally efficient methodology that utilizes a local real-space formulation of the projector augmented wave (PAW) method discretized with a finite-element (FE) basis to enable accurate and large-scale electronic structure calculations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first real-space approach for DFT calculations, combining the efficiency of PAW formalism involving smooth electronic fields with the ability of systematically improvable higher-order finite-element basis to achieve significant computational gains. In particular, we have developed efficient strategies for solving the underlying FE discretized PAW generalized eigenproblem by employing the Chebyshev filtered subspace iteration approach to compute the desired eigenspace in each self-consistent field iteration. These strategies leverage the low-rank perturbation of the FE basis overlap matrix in conjunction with reduced order quadrature rules to invert the discretized PAW overlap matrix while also exploiting the sparsity of both the local and non-local parts of the discretized PAW Hamiltonian and overlap matrices. Using the proposed approach, we benchmark the accuracy and performance on various representative examples involving periodic and non-periodic systems with plane-wave-based PAW implementations. Furthermore, we also demonstrate a considerable computational advantage ($\sim$ 5$\times$ -- 10$\times$) over state-of-the-art plane-wave methods for medium to large-scale systems ($\sim$ 6,000 -- 35,000 electrons). Finally, we show that our approach (PAW-FE) significantly reduces the degrees of freedom to achieve the desired accuracy, thereby enabling large-scale DFT simulations ($>$ 50,000 electrons) at an order of magnitude lower computational cost compared to norm-conserving pseudopotential calculations using finite-element discretized calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局域实空间有限元离散的投影缀加波（PAW）方法，实现了高效、可系统改进的大规模电子结构计算。该方法首次将PAW形式与高阶有限元基结合，利用切比雪夫滤波子空间迭代、低秩摄动和降阶求积规则等策略求解广义本征问题。在周期性/非周期性体系中验证了与平面波方法相当的精度，在中大规模体系（~6,000–35,000电子）上实现了约5–10倍的计算加速，并在超过50,000电子的体系中比模守恒赝势有限元方法降低一个数量级的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有DFT计算方法存在瓶颈：平面波方法计算成本高，传统实空间方法（如有限差分）精度有限，模守恒赝势方法在大规模体系下自由度过多。因此需要一种兼具PAW形式的高效性与有限元基可系统改进特性的实空间方法，以支撑更大规模的DFT模拟。
AI.method: 采用局域实空间PAW形式的有限元离散化；使用高阶有限元基实现系统可改进性；引入切比雪夫滤波子空间迭代（ChFSI）求解FE离散的PAW广义本征问题；利用重叠矩阵的低秩摄动特性和降阶求积规则高效求逆；利用离散PAW哈密顿和重叠矩阵的稀疏性处理局域和非局域部分。
AI.result: 在周期和非周期体系上与平面波PAW实现精度对齐；在中大规模体系（~6,000–35,000电子）上比平面波方法快约5–10倍；在>50,000电子体系中，相比模守恒赝势有限元方法降低一个数量级计算成本；显著减少达到目标精度所需的自由度。
AI.conclusion: PAW-FE方法是一种高效、可扩展且精度可控的实空间DFT方案，尤其适用于大规模体系，在计算效率和可扩展性上显著优于传统平面波和模守恒赝势方法。

title: Mixed Steklov-Neumann problem: asymptotic analysis and applications to diffusion-controlled reactions
summary: We consider the mixed Steklov-Neumann spectral problem for the modified Helmholtz equation in a bounded domain when the Steklov condition is imposed on a connected subset of the smooth boundary. In order to deduce the asymptotic behavior in the limit when the size of the subset goes to zero, we reformulate the original problem in terms of an integral operator whose kernel is the restriction of a suitable Green's function (or pseudo-Green's function) to the subset. Its singular behavior on the boundary yields the asymptotic formulas for the eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of the Steklov-Neumann problem. While this analysis remains at a formal level, it is supported by extensive numerical results for two basic examples: an arc on the boundary of a disk and a spherical cap on the boundary of a ball. Solving the original Steklov-Neumann problem numerically in these domains, we validate the asymptotic formulas and reveal their high accuracy, even when the subset is not small. A straightforward application of these spectral results to first-passage processes and diffusion-controlled reactions is presented. We revisit the small-target limit of the mean first-reaction time on perfectly or partially reactive targets. The effect of multiple failed reaction attempts is quantified by a universal function for the whole range of reactivities. Moreover, we extend these results to more sophisticated surface reactions that go beyond the conventional narrow escape problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了修改后的亥姆霍兹方程在混合Steklov-Neumann谱问题中，当Steklov条件施加在光滑边界的一个连通子集上时，该子集尺寸趋近于零的渐近行为。通过积分算子重新表述原问题，得到了特征值和特征函数的渐近公式，并利用数值实验验证了其高精度。这些谱结果被应用于首次通过过程和扩散控制反应，改进了小靶极限下的平均首次反应时间，并推广到更复杂的表面反应。
AI.motivation: 研究当边界上施加Steklov条件的子集尺寸趋于零时，混合Steklov-Neumann谱问题的渐近行为，以理解小靶极限下的扩散控制反应和首次通过过程。
AI.method: 将原问题重新表述为积分算子形式，其核为Green's函数（或伪Green's函数）在子集上的限制；利用边界上的奇异性推导特征值和特征函数的渐近公式；在圆盘和球体上进行数值验证。
AI.result: 获得了Steklov-Neumann问题特征值和特征函数的渐近公式，数值实验验证了公式的高精度，即使子集尺寸并非很小。推导了小靶极限下平均首次反应时间的通用函数，并推广到更复杂的表面反应场景。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的渐近分析为小靶极限下的扩散控制反应提供了精确的定量框架，特别是通过通用函数量化了多次失败反应尝试的影响，超越了传统的窄逃逸问题。

title: Simulation of the continuous-time random walk using subordination schemes
summary: The continuous time random walk model has been widely applied in various fields, including physics, biology, chemistry, finance, social phenomena, etc. In this work, we present an algorithm that utilizes a subordinate formula to generate data of the continuous time random walk in the long time limit. The algorithm has been validated using commonly employed observables, such as typical fluctuations of the positional distribution, rare fluctuations, the mean and the variance of the position, and breakthrough curves with time-dependent bias, demonstrating a perfect match.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用从属公式生成长时间极限下连续时间随机游走数据的算法，并通过多种常用观测指标验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 连续时间随机游走模型在多个领域有广泛应用，但长时间极限下的数据生成存在挑战，现有方法可能不够高效或准确。
AI.method: 基于从属公式设计算法，生成连续时间随机游走在长时间极限下的数据。
AI.result: 算法在位置分布的典型波动、罕见波动、位置均值与方差、以及含时偏置的穿透曲线等观测指标上均与理论预期完美匹配。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的算法能够准确高效地生成长时间极限下的连续时间随机游走数据，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Oscillatory and dissipative dynamics of complex probability in non-equilibrium stochastic processes
summary: For a Markov and stationary stochastic process described by the well-known classical master equation, we introduce complex transition rates instead of real transition rates to study the pre-thermal oscillatory behaviour in complex probabilities. Further, for purely imaginary transition rates we obtain persistent infinitely long lived oscillations in complex probability whose nature depends on the dimensionality of the state space. We also take a peek into cases where we perturb the relaxation matrix for a dichotomous process with an oscillatory drive where the relative sign of the angular frequency of the drive decides whether there will be dissipation in the complex probability or not.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了经典主方程中引入复转移速率后的复概率预热振荡行为，发现纯虚转移速率可产生持续无限长的振荡，且振荡性质依赖于状态空间维度；同时分析了二值过程中弛豫矩阵受振荡驱动微扰时，驱动角频率相对符号对复概率耗散的影响。
AI.motivation: 经典主方程通常描述具有实转移速率的马尔可夫平稳随机过程，其概率演化最终趋于稳态。作者希望引入复转移速率，探索复概率空间中是否存在预热振荡行为，从而扩展对非平衡统计物理和量子-经典过渡区域的理解。
AI.method: 从经典主方程出发，将实数转移速率推广为复数，构造复概率演化方程。在纯虚转移速率极限下解析求解系统演化，分析不同状态空间维度下的振荡模式。此外，对二值（二态）过程引入一个振荡驱动的弛豫矩阵微扰，研究驱动频率相对符号对复概率耗散行为的影响。
AI.result: (1) 纯虚转移速率下，复概率呈现出无限长寿命的持续性振荡，其模式（频率、振幅）依赖于状态空间的维数。(2) 在二值过程中，施加振荡驱动后，驱动角频率的相对符号（与系统固有频率同号或异号）决定了复概率是否出现耗散（即是否被阻尼），从而实现了对耗散/无耗散行为的控制。
AI.conclusion: 将经典主方程的转移速率拓展到复数域是一种可行且有效的理论框架，能够揭示复概率中丰富的预热振荡动力学。纯虚速率下的持久振荡为研究无耗散概率流提供了新视角；而驱动符号控制的耗散机制则为相干与退相干之间的切换提供了可调控的途径，对理解量子-经典过渡及设计类量子振荡器具有启发性。

title: Distributionally Robust Optimization as a Scalable Framework to Characterize Extreme Value Distributions
summary: The goal of this paper is to develop distributionally robust optimization (DRO) estimators, specifically for multidimensional Extreme Value Theory (EVT) statistics. EVT supports using semi-parametric models called max-stable distributions built from spatial Poisson point processes. While powerful, these models are only asymptotically valid for large samples. However, since extreme data is by definition scarce, the potential for model misspecification error is inherent to these applications, thus DRO estimators are natural. In order to mitigate over-conservative estimates while enhancing out-of-sample performance, we study DRO estimators informed by semi-parametric max-stable constraints in the space of point processes. We study both tractable convex formulations for some problems of interest (e.g. CVaR) and more general neural network based estimators. Both approaches are validated using synthetically generated data, recovering prescribed characteristics, and verifying the efficacy of the proposed techniques. Additionally, the proposed method is applied to a real data set of financial returns for comparison to a previous analysis. We established the proposed model as a novel formulation in the multivariate EVT domain, and innovative with respect to performance when compared to relevant alternate proposals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了分布鲁棒优化（DRO）估计器，用于多维极值理论（EVT）统计量。通过半参数最大稳定约束在点过程空间构建DRO模型，既开发了可处理凸形式（如CVaR）也开发了神经网络估计器，在合成数据和金融收益真实数据上验证了其优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 极值数据天然稀缺，导致半参数最大稳定模型存在模型误指定风险，传统估计方法过于保守或样本外表现不佳，因此需要DRO方法来平衡鲁棒性与估计效率。
AI.method: 在点过程空间中引入半参数最大稳定约束，构建DRO估计器。一方面推导了某些目标函数（如CVaR）的可处理凸优化形式，另一方面设计了基于神经网络的通用估计器，并在合成数据与金融收益真实数据集上验证。
AI.result: 合成数据实验成功恢复了预设特征，验证了方法的有效性；金融收益率真实数据应用表明，所提模型在多维EVT领域相比现有方案具有性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多维极值理论提供了新颖的DRO框架，既能缓解过度保守估计问题，又能提升样本外表现，在理论和实证上均优于相关替代方案。

title: Particle Semi-Implicit Variational Inference
summary: Semi-implicit variational inference (SIVI) enriches the expressiveness of variational families by utilizing a kernel and a mixing distribution to hierarchically define the variational distribution. Existing SIVI methods parameterize the mixing distribution using implicit distributions, leading to intractable variational densities. As a result, directly maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO) is not possible, so they resort to one of the following: optimizing bounds on the ELBO, employing costly inner-loop Markov chain Monte Carlo runs, or solving minimax objectives. In this paper, we propose a novel method for SIVI called Particle Variational Inference (PVI) which employs empirical measures to approximate the optimal mixing distributions characterized as the minimizer of a free energy functional. PVI arises naturally as a particle approximation of a Euclidean--Wasserstein gradient flow and, unlike prior works, it directly optimizes the ELBO whilst making no parametric assumption about the mixing distribution. Our empirical results demonstrate that PVI performs favourably compared to other SIVI methods across various tasks. Moreover, we provide a theoretical analysis of the behaviour of the gradient flow of a related free energy functional: establishing the existence and uniqueness of solutions as well as propagation of chaos results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出粒子变分推断（PVI），通过经验测度近似最优混合分布，直接优化ELBO，无需参数假设，在SIVI方法中表现优越。
AI.motivation: 现有SIVI方法使用隐式分布参数化混合分布，导致变分密度不可解，无法直接最大化ELBO，需依赖边界优化、内循环MCMC或极小极大目标，效率与精度受限。
AI.method: 提出粒子变分推断（PVI），采用经验测度近似最优混合分布（自由能泛函的最小化器），通过Euclidean-Wasserstein梯度流的粒子近似直接优化ELBO，不对混合分布做参数假设。
AI.result: 实验表明PVI在多种任务上优于其他SIVI方法；理论分析证明了相关自由能泛函梯度流解的存在唯一性及混沌传播性质。
AI.conclusion: PVI通过粒子近似无需参数假设即可直接优化ELBO，同时提供理论保证，是一种更优的SIVI方法。

title: Multi-Task Combinatorial Bandits for Budget Allocation
summary: Today's top advertisers typically manage hundreds of campaigns simultaneously and consistently launch new ones throughout the year. A crucial challenge for marketing managers is determining the optimal allocation of limited budgets across various ad lines in each campaign to maximize cumulative returns, especially given the huge uncertainty in return outcomes. In this paper, we propose to formulate budget allocation as a multi-task combinatorial bandit problem and introduce a novel online budget allocation system. The proposed system: i) integrates a Bayesian hierarchical model to intelligently utilize the metadata of campaigns and ad lines and budget size, ensuring efficient information sharing; ii) provides the flexibility to incorporate diverse modeling techniques such as Linear Regression, Gaussian Processes, and Neural Networks, catering to diverse environmental complexities; and iii) employs the Thompson sampling (TS) technique to strike a balance between exploration and exploitation. Through offline evaluation and online experiments, our system demonstrates robustness and adaptability, effectively maximizing the overall cumulative returns. A Python implementation of the proposed procedure is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MCMAB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将预算分配问题建模为多任务组合赌博机问题，并开发了一个集成贝叶斯分层模型、多种建模技术（线性回归、高斯过程、神经网络）和汤普森采样的在线预算分配系统，通过离线评估和在线实验验证了其在最大化累积收益方面的鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.motivation: 大型广告主通常同时管理数百个广告活动并持续推出新活动，营销经理面临的核心挑战是在回报结果高度不确定的情况下，如何在各个广告线之间最优分配有限预算以最大化累积收益。
AI.method: 将预算分配形式化为多任务组合赌博机问题；集成贝叶斯分层模型以利用活动和广告线的元数据及预算规模实现信息共享；支持线性回归、高斯过程和神经网络等多种建模技术；采用汤普森采样平衡探索与利用。
AI.result: 通过离线评估和在线实验验证，系统展现了鲁棒性和适应性，有效最大化总体累积收益。
AI.conclusion: 提出的在线预算分配系统能够有效解决多广告活动场景下的预算分配问题，具备良好的信息共享机制和灵活的建模能力，并提供了Python开源实现。

title: Boltzmann approach to collective motion via nonlocal visual interaction
summary: Visual cues play crucial roles in the collective motion of animals, birds, fish, and insects. The interaction mediated by visual information is essentially non-local and has many-body nature due to occlusion, which poses a challenging problem in modeling the emergent collective behavior. In this paper, we introduce a Boltzmann-equation approach incorporating non-local visual interaction. Occlusion is treated in a self-consistent manner via a coarse-grained density field, which renders the interaction effectively pairwise. Our model also incorporates the recent finding that each organism stochastically selects a neighbor to interact at each instant. We analytically derive the order-disorder transition point, and show that the visual screening effect raises the transition threshold, which does not vanish when the density of the agents or the range of the intrinsic interaction is taken to infinity. Our analysis suggests that the model exhibits a discontinuous transition as in the local interaction models, and but the discontinuity is weakened by the non-locality. Our study clarifies the essential role of non-locality in the visual interactions among moving organisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于玻尔兹曼方程的非局部视觉交互模型，通过自洽粗粒化密度场处理遮挡效应，解析推导了有序-无序转变点，发现视觉屏蔽提高了转变阈值，且非局域性削弱了相变的不连续性。
AI.motivation: 生物集体运动中视觉信息介导的交互本质上是非局域且多体的，由于遮挡效应使得建模极具挑战性，现有模型难以准确捕捉非局域视觉交互对涌现集体行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用玻尔兹曼方程框架，引入非局部视觉交互；通过粗粒化密度场自洽处理遮挡效应，将多体交互有效简化为两体交互；考虑每个个体在每个时刻随机选择一个邻居进行交互的机制。
AI.result: 解析推导了有序-无序转变点，发现视觉屏蔽效应提高了转变阈值，且该阈值的提高不会因密度或交互范围趋于无穷而消失；模型呈现不连续相变，但非局域性削弱了其不连续性。
AI.conclusion: 阐明了非局域性在运动生物视觉交互中的关键作用，为理解遮挡效应如何影响集体运动的涌现相变提供了理论依据。

title: Co-evolutionary dynamics for two adaptively coupled Theta neurons
summary: Natural and technological networks exhibit dynamics that can lead to complex cooperative behaviors, such as synchronization in coupled oscillators and rhythmic activity in neuronal networks. Understanding these collective dynamics is crucial for deciphering a range of phenomena from brain activity to power grid stability. Recent interest in co-evolutionary networks has highlighted the intricate interplay between dynamics on and of the network with mixed time scales. Here, we explore the collective behavior of excitable oscillators in a simple networks of two Theta neurons with adaptive coupling without self-interaction. Through a combination of bifurcation analysis and numerical simulations, we seek to understand how the level of adaptivity in the coupling strength, $a$, influences the dynamics. We first investigate the dynamics possible in the non-adaptive limit; our bifurcation analysis reveals stability regions of quiescence and spiking behaviors, where the spiking frequencies mode-lock in a variety of configurations. Second, as we increase the adaptivity $a$, we observe a widening of the associated Arnol'd tongues, which may overlap and give room for multi-stable configurations. For larger adaptivity, the mode-locked regions may further undergo a period-doubling cascade into chaos. Our findings contribute to the mathematical theory of adaptive networks and offer insights into the potential mechanisms underlying neuronal communication and synchronization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有自适应耦合的两个Theta神经元网络的集体动力学，通过分岔分析和数值模拟揭示了非自适应极限下的静息与发放行为，以及随着自适应参数a增大，Arnold舌头展宽、重叠导致多稳态，最终经倍周期级联进入混沌等复杂动力学现象。
AI.motivation: 理解自适应网络中耦合强度可塑性如何影响可激发振荡器的集体行为，为揭示神经通信和同步机制提供理论基础。
AI.method: 结合分岔分析与数值模拟，研究两个无自交互的Theta神经元在自适应耦合下的动力学，重点分析自适应参数a对系统行为的影响。
AI.result: 在非自适应极限下发现静息与发放状态以及多种锁频模式；随着自适应a增大，Arnold舌头展宽并重叠产生多稳态；更高a下锁频区域经倍周期级联进入混沌。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果丰富了自适应网络的数学理论，为理解神经元通信与同步的潜在机制提供了新见解。

title: On selection dynamics for a nonlocal phenotype-structured model
summary: This paper is devoted to the analysis of the long-time behavior of a phenotypic-structured model where phenotypic changes do not occur. We give a mathematical description of the process in which the best adapted trait is selected in a given environment created by the total population. It is exhibited that the long-time limit of the unique solution to the nonlocal equation is given by a Dirac mass centered at the peak of the fitness within or at the boundary of the region where the initial data is positive. Specially, If the peak of the fitness can't be in the support of the solution, then the infinite time blow-up of the solution occurs near the boundary of the region where the solution is positive. Moreover, our numerical results facilitate a deeper understanding of identifying the position of the centers.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一种表型结构模型（无表型变化）的长期行为，证明非局部方程的唯一解在长时间极限下收敛于适应度峰值处的狄拉克测度，若峰值不在解的支持域内，则解在边界附近发生无限时间爆破，数值结果帮助识别中心位置。
AI.motivation: 理解无表型变化情况下表型结构模型中最佳适应性状在给定环境中的选择机制，揭示长期演化行为。
AI.method: 采用非局部方程建模，通过数学分析研究解的长时间渐近行为，结合数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.result: 长时间极限下解收敛为适应度峰值处的狄拉克测度；若峰值不在初始正区域的支持内，解在边界附近发生无限时间爆破。
AI.conclusion: 表型结构模型在无表型变化时，长期选择行为由适应度峰值位置决定，数值结果有助于确定中心位置。

title: Rational Curves on Coindex 3 Fano Varieties
summary: We describe the moduli space of rational curves on smooth Fano varieties of coindex 3. For varieties of dimension 5 or greater, we prove the moduli space has a single irreducible component for each effective numerical class of curves. For varieties of dimension 4, we describe families of rational curves in terms of Fujita's $a$-invariant. Our results verify Lehmann and Tanimoto's Geometric Manin's Conjecture for all smooth coindex 3 Fano varieties over the complex numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了余指数为3的光滑Fano簇上有理曲线模空间的结构，证明了在维数≥5时，每个有效数值类曲线对应单一不可约分支；在维数4时，用Fujita a-不变量描述有理曲线族，从而验证了Lehmann和Tanimoto的几何Manin猜想在复数域上所有光滑余指数3 Fano簇上的成立。
AI.motivation: 理解Fano簇上有理曲线的模空间结构是代数几何的核心问题。Manin猜想预测了Fano簇上有理点计数渐近行为，而Lehmann和Tanimoto提出了几何版本的Manin猜想，用模空间成分描述有理曲线分布。本文旨在验证该猜想在余指数3的光滑Fano簇上的成立性。
AI.method: 通过将Fano簇按维数分类处理：对维数≥5的情形，证明每个有效数值类曲线模空间只有单一不可约分支；对维数4的情形，利用Fujita的a-不变量对有理曲线族进行描述和分类。
AI.result: 维数≥5的光滑余指数3 Fano簇上，每个有效数值类曲线对应单一不可约分支；维数4时，用Fujita a-不变量给出了有理曲线族的完整描述。最终验证了Lehmann-Tanimoto几何Manin猜想在复数域上所有光滑余指数3 Fano簇上的成立。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整刻画了余指数3的光滑Fano簇上有理曲线模空间结构，为几何Manin猜想提供了新的证据支持，推广了该猜想的适用范围。

title: 527 elliptic fibrations on Enriques surfaces
summary: Barth and Peters showed that a general complex Enriques surface has exactly 527 isomorphism classes of elliptic fibrations. We show that every Enriques surface has precisely 527 isomorphism classes of elliptic fibrations when counted with the appropriate multiplicity. Their reducible singular fibers and the multiplicities can be calculated explicitly. The same statements hold over any algebraically closed field of characteristic not two. To explain these results, we construct a moduli space of complex elliptic Enriques surfaces and study the ramification behavior of the forgetful map to the moduli space of unpolarized Enriques surfaces. Curiously, the ramification indices of a similar map compute the hyperbolic volume of the rational polyhedral fundamental domain appearing in the Morrison-Kawamata cone conjecture.

AI.tldr: 本文证明每个Enriques曲面恰好有527个椭圆纤维化的同构类（当以适当重数计数时），并推广了Barth和Peters关于一般复Enriques曲面的结论。通过构造复椭圆Enriques曲面的模空间并研究遗忘映射的分歧行为，解释了这一结果，并发现了与Morrison-Kawamata锥猜想中基本域的双曲体积相关的奇妙联系。
AI.motivation: 推广Barth和Peters关于一般复Enriques曲面恰好有527个椭圆纤维化同构类的结论，证明该结论对每个Enriques曲面（在适当重数下）都成立，并揭示背后的模空间几何学解释。
AI.method: 构造复椭圆Enriques曲面的模空间，研究遗忘映射（到非极化Enriques曲面模空间）的分歧行为；通过计算可约奇异纤维及其重数来显式验证计数结果。
AI.result: 每个Enriques曲面（在特征非2的代数闭域上）恰好有527个椭圆纤维化的同构类（按适当重数计数）；类似遗忘映射的分歧指数可计算Morrison-Kawamata锥猜想中有理多面体基本域的双曲体积。
AI.conclusion: 527这一数字具有普遍性，并非仅对一般Enriques曲面成立；该计数与模空间几何及双曲体积之间存在深刻联系，揭示了Enriques曲面椭圆纤维化结构的丰富性。

title: Pointwise estimates for the fundamental solutions of higher order Schrödinger equations in odd dimensions II: high dimensional case
summary: In this paper, for any odd $n$ and any integer $m\geq1$ with $n>4m$, we study the fundamental solution of the higher order Schrödinger equation \begin{equation*} \mathrm{i}\partial_tu(x,t)=((-Δ)^m+V(x))u(x,t),\quad t\in \mathbb{R},\,\,x\in \mathbb{R}^n, \end{equation*} where $V$ is a real-valued $C^{\frac{n+1}{2}-2m}$ potential with certain decay. Let $P_{ac}(H)$ denote the projection onto the absolutely continuous spectrum space of $H=(-Δ)^m+V$, and assume that $H$ has no positive embedded eigenvalue. Our main result says that $e^{-\mathrm{i}tH}P_{ac}(H)$ has integral kernel $K(t,x,y)$ satisfying \begin{equation*} |K(t, x,y)|\le C(1+|t|)^{-(\frac{n}{2m}-σ)}(1+|t|^{-\frac{n}{2 m}})\left(1+|t|^{-\frac{1}{2 m}}|x-y|\right)^{-\frac{n(m-1)}{2 m-1}},\quad t\neq0,\,x,y\in\mathbb{R}^n, \end{equation*} where $σ=2$ if $0$ is an eigenvalue of $H$, and $σ=0$ otherwise. A similar result for smoothing operators $H^\fracα{2m}e^{-\mathrm{i}tH}P_{ac}(H)$ is also given. The regularity condition $V\in C^{\frac{n+1}{2}-2m}$ is optimal in the second order case, and it also seems optimal when $m>1$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了奇数维空间n>4m条件下高阶薛定谔方程的基本解，证明了在无正嵌入本征值假设下，其积分核具有特定的时空衰减估计，且势函数V的正则性条件是最优的。
AI.motivation: 建立奇数维高阶薛定谔方程（含实值势V）基本解的积分核衰减估计，并研究势函数正则性条件的最优性。
AI.method: 利用绝对连续谱投影算子P_ac(H)，结合势函数V∈C^{(n+1)/2-2m}的正则性假设，分析算子e^{-itH}P_ac(H)的积分核K(t,x,y)的衰减行为；同时考虑零本征值对衰减指数σ的影响（σ=2若0是本征值，否则σ=0）。
AI.conclusion: 势函数V∈C^{(n+1)/2-2m}的正则性条件在二阶情形（m=1）是最优的，对于高阶情形（m>1）似乎也是最优的。

title: To collide, or not to collide, that is the question -- a survey
summary: We give a detailed overview over known results for (no-)collision of a body with the boundary of its container.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了物体与容器边界碰撞/非碰撞问题的已知结果。
AI.motivation: 系统梳理和总结物体与容器边界碰撞问题的现有研究成果，为后续研究提供参考。
AI.method: 对已知的碰撞与非碰撞问题的相关文献和结果进行详细综述。
AI.result: 汇总了物体与容器边界碰撞问题的现有研究成果。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个关于物体与容器边界碰撞问题的全面概述，指出了该领域的研究现状。

title: Geometry of syzygies of sheaves on $\mathbb{P}^2$ via interpolation and Bridgeland stability
comment: this paper supersedes arXiv posting arXiv:2110.15346, which will not be published independently
summary: We show that the minimal free resolution of a general semi-stable sheaf $U$ on $\mathbb{P}^2$ contains a subcomplex that determines an extremal ray of the cone of effective divisors of its moduli space. We provide evidence that this is part of a general phenomenon in which minimal free resolutions, for distinct Betti tables, contain subcomplexes depending on wall-crossing. From this viewpoint, we provide new computations of the movable cones and Mori decompositions of some moduli spaces of sheaves using syzygies.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了 $\mathbb{P}^2$ 上一般半稳定层的极小自由分解包含一个子复形，该子复形决定了其模空间有效除子锥的一个极射线，并基于合冲提供了某些模空间的可动锥和 Mori 分解的新计算。
AI.motivation: 探索极小自由分解中的子复形与模空间有效除子锥极射线之间的内在联系，并揭示其作为跨越不同 Betti 表的壁穿越现象的普遍规律。
AI.method: 通过分析 $\mathbb{P}^2$ 上一般半稳定层 $U$ 的极小自由分解，提取其包含的子复形；利用合冲（syzygies）理论计算模空间的可动锥（movable cones）和 Mori 分解。
AI.result: 发现极小自由分解中的子复形决定了模空间有效除子锥的一个极射线；基于此方法给出了若干模空间可动锥和 Mori 分解的新计算结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解模空间几何与极小自由分解之间的深层联系提供了新视角，表明壁穿越现象在 Betti 表不同的极小自由分解中均存在对应的子复形结构。

title: Curriculum Learning with Quality-Driven Data Selection
summary: The impressive multimodal capabilities demonstrated by OpenAI's GPT-4 have generated significant interest in the development of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Visual instruction tuning of MLLMs with machine-generated instruction-following data has shown to enhance zero-shot capabilities across various tasks. However, there has been limited exploration into controlling the quality of the instruction data.Current methodologies for data selection in MLLMs often rely on single, unreliable scores or use downstream tasks for selection, which is time-consuming and can lead to potential overfitting on the chosen evaluation datasets. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a novel data selection methodology that utilizes image-text correlation and model perplexity to evaluate and select data of varying quality. This approach leverages the distinct distribution of these two attributes, mapping data quality into a two-dimensional space that allows for the selection of data based on their location within this distribution. By utilizing this space, we can analyze the impact of task type settings, used as prompts, on data quality. Additionally, this space can be used to construct multi-stage subsets of varying quality to facilitate curriculum learning. Our research includes comprehensive experiments conducted on various datasets. The results emphasize substantial enhancements in five commonly assessed capabilities compared to using the complete dataset. Our codes, data, and models are publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EHIT-31B4

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像-文本相关性和模型困惑度的二维数据选择方法，用于提升多模态大语言模型的指令微调质量，实验证明该方法在五个评估能力上均优于使用完整数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM的视觉指令微调中，数据选择方法存在两个主要问题：一是依赖单一、不可靠的评分；二是使用下游任务进行数据选择，既耗时又可能导致对评估数据集的过拟合。因此，需要一种更高效、更可靠的数据质量控制方法。
AI.method: 提出一种利用图像-文本相关性（image-text correlation）和模型困惑度（perplexity）两个指标的二维数据选择方法。将数据质量映射到二维空间，根据数据在此空间中的分布位置进行筛选。进一步利用该空间分析任务提示对数据质量的影响，并构建多阶段子集以支持课程学习。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的综合实验表明，该方法在五个常用评估能力上相比使用完整数据集均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过二维质量空间进行数据选择，可以有效提升MLLM的指令微调效果，避免了传统单一评分或下游任务选择的局限性，同时支持课程学习等高级训练策略。

title: Adaptive Transit Signal Priority based on Deep Reinforcement Learning and Connected Vehicles in a Traffic Microsimulation Environment
summary: Model free reinforcement learning (RL) provides a potential alternative to earlier formulations of adaptive transit signal priority (TSP) algorithms based on mathematical programming that require complex and nonlinear objective functions. This study extends RL - based traffic control to include TSP. Using a microscopic simulation environment and connected vehicle data, the study develops and tests a TSP event-based RL agent that assumes control from another developed RL - based general traffic signal controller. The TSP agent assumes control when transit buses enter the dedicated short-range communication (DSRC) zone of the intersection. This agent is shown to reduce the bus travel time by about 21%, with marginal impacts to general traffic at a saturation rate of 0.95. The TSP agent also shows slightly better bus travel time compared to actuated signal control with TSP. The architecture of the agent and simulation is selected considering the need to improve simulation run time efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无模型强化学习的交通信号优先控制（TSP）算法，利用微观仿真和网联车数据，将TSP事件型RL智能体集成到已有RL通用信号控制器中。在饱和率为0.95的条件下，该智能体可使公交行程时间减少约21%，对普通交通影响较小，且性能略优于传统感应控制加TSP方案。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应公交信号优先算法依赖数学规划，目标函数复杂且非线性，无模型强化学习提供了一种更灵活的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于强化学习的TSP事件型智能体，在公交车辆进入交叉口DSRC区域时接管RL通用信号控制器的控制权，利用微观仿真环境和网联车数据进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 在饱和率0.95下，公交行程时间降低约21%，对普通交通影响轻微；性能略优于传统感应控制加TSP方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的RL-TSP智能体在减少公交延误方面有效且对普通交通影响小，同时考虑了仿真运行效率的优化。

title: A Hybrid Algorithm for Systems of Non-interacting Particles with an External Potential
summary: Our focus is on simulating the dynamics of non-interacting particles including the effects of an external potential, which, under certain assumptions, can be formally described by the Dean-Kawasaki equation. The Dean-Kawasaki equation can be solved numerically using standard finite volume methods. However, the numerical approximation implicitly requires a sufficiently large number of particles to ensure the positivity of the solution and accurate approximation of the stochastic flux. To address this challenge, we extend hybrid algorithms for particle systems to scenarios where the density is low. The aim is to create a hybrid algorithm that switches from a finite volume discretization to a particle-based method when the particle density falls below a certain threshold. We develop criteria for determining this threshold by comparing higher-order statistics obtained from the finite volume method with particle simulations. We then demonstrate the use of the resulting criteria for dynamic adaptation in both two- and three-dimensional spatial settings in the absence of an external potential. Finally we consider the dynamics when an external potential is included.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Dean-Kawasaki方程在低粒子密度下的数值模拟难题，提出了一种混合算法：当粒子密度低于阈值时，从有限体积法自适应切换至基于粒子的方法。该阈值通过对比高阶统计量确定，并在二维和三维空间（含与不含外势场）中验证了动态自适应的有效性。
AI.motivation: Dean-Kawasaki方程的标准有限体积法在粒子数较少时无法保证解的正性且随机通量近似不准，需要发展一种能处理低密度场景的数值方法。
AI.method: 通过比较有限体积法与粒子模拟的高阶统计量，确定密度切换阈值，构建有限体积法与粒子方法之间的自适应混合算法，并在二维和三维空间中分别考察无外势场和有外势场情形下的动态切换表现。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于高阶统计量对比的密度阈值判定准则，并在二维和三维空间（无外势场）中展示了动态自适应的有效性；进一步扩展至含外势场的动力学场景。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法能够在低密度区域自动切换至粒子方法，克服有限体积法在低粒子数下的局限性，为Dean-Kawasaki方程提供更鲁棒的数值求解策略。

title: Constraint Energy Minimizing Generalized Multiscale Finite Element Method for Convection Diffusion Equations with Inhomogeneous Boundary Conditions
comment: 36 pages.11 figures. Submitted to Journal of Computational Mathematics
summary: In this paper, we develop the constraint energy minimizing generalized multiscale finite element method (CEM-GMsFEM) for convection-diffusion equations with inhomogeneous Dirichlet, Neumann and Robin boundary conditions, along with high-contrast coefficients. For time independent problems, boundary correctors $\mathcal{D}^m$ and $\mathcal{N}^{m}$ for Dirichlet, Neumann, and Robin conditions are designed. For time dependent problems, a scheme to update the boundary correctors is formulated. Error analysis in both cases is given to show the first-order convergence in energy norm with respect to the coarse mesh size $H$ and second-order convergence in $L^2-$norm, as verified by numerical examples, with which different finite difference schemes are compared for temporal discretization. Nonlinear problems are also demonstrated in combination with Strang splitting.

AI.tldr: 本文针对含非齐次Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界条件及高对比系数的对流-扩散方程，发展了约束能量最小化广义多尺度有限元方法(CEM-GMsFEM)，设计了时间无关和依赖问题的边界校正算子，给出了能量范数一阶和L²范数二阶收敛性的误差分析，并通过数值算例验证，同时展示了非线性问题的Strang分裂处理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有CEM-GMsFEM主要针对齐次边界条件，无法直接处理具有非齐次Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界条件及高对比系数的对流-扩散方程，需要发展能够处理这些复杂边界条件的多尺度方法。
AI.method: 1) 针对时间无关问题，设计了Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界校正算子D^m和N^m；2) 针对时间依赖问题，制定了边界校正算子的更新方案；3) 提供了能量范数一阶收敛和L²范数二阶收敛的误差分析；4) 通过数值算例与不同有限差分格式进行对比；5) 结合Strang分裂处理非线性问题。
AI.result: 在能量范数下实现了关于粗网格尺寸H的一阶收敛，在L²范数下实现了二阶收敛。数值算例验证了理论收敛阶，并与不同有限差分格式进行了比较。
AI.conclusion: CEM-GMsFEM可有效处理含非齐次边界条件和高对比系数的对流-扩散方程，包括时间无关、时间依赖及非线性问题，具有良好的收敛性能和数值精度。

title: On the injectivity of mean value mappings between quadrilaterals
comment: Barycentric mapping, mean value coordinates, injectivity, Jacobian determinant
summary: Mean value coordinates can be used to map one polygon into another, with application to computer graphics and curve and surface modelling. In this paper we show that if the polygons are quadrilaterals, and if the target quadrilateral is convex, then the mapping is injective.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了当源多边形和目标多边形均为四边形，且目标四边形为凸时，均值坐标映射是单射的。
AI.motivation: 均值坐标在计算机图形学和曲面建模中被广泛用于多边形间的映射，但其映射是否为单射（即无自交、无折叠）的关键性质尚未得到充分证明，尤其是在四边形这一基础情形下。
AI.method: 本文通过理论分析，聚焦于源和目标均为四边形、且目标四边形为凸的条件，证明均值坐标映射在该设定下是单射的。
AI.result: 在四边形情形下，只要目标四边形是凸的，均值坐标映射就是单射（即双射、无折叠）。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为均值坐标在四边形网格变形、纹理映射等实际应用中的可靠性与有效性提供了理论保障。

title: An Operational Scheduling Framework for Tanker-based Water Distribution System under Uncertainty
summary: Tanker water systems play critical role in providing adequate service to meet potable water demands in the face of acute water crisis in many cities globally. Managing tanker movements among the supply and demand sides requires an efficient scheduling framework that could promote economic feasibility, ensure timely delivery, and avoid water wastage. However, to realize such a sustainable water supply operation, inherent uncertainties related to consumer demand and tanker travel time need to accounted in the operational scheduling. Herein, a two-stage stochastic optimization model with a recourse approach is developed for scheduling and optimization of tanker based water supply and treatment facility operations under uncertainty. The uncertain water demands and tanker travel times are combinedly modelled in a computationally efficient manner using a hybrid Monte Carlo simulation and scenario tree approach. The maximum demand fulfillment, limited extraction of groundwater, and timely delivery of quality water are enforced through a set of constraints to achieve sustainable operation. A representative urban case study is demonstrated, results are discussed for two uncertainty cases (i) only demand, and (ii) integrated demand-travel time. Value of stochastic solution over expected value and perfect information model solutions are analyzed and features of the framework for informed decision-making are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段随机优化模型，用于在需求和时间不确定性下调度水罐车供水系统，通过混合蒙特卡洛模拟与情景树方法实现高效计算，并以城市案例验证了模型在提升决策质量和运营可持续性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 全球许多城市面临严重水资源危机，水罐车供水系统在满足饮用水需求方面至关重要。然而，现有调度框架未能充分考虑消费者需求和运输时间的内在不确定性，导致经济可行性差、交付不及时和水资源浪费。
AI.method: 构建了两阶段随机优化模型（含补偿/ recourse 方法），将不确定的水需求和运输时间通过混合蒙特卡洛模拟与情景树方法高效建模，并通过约束条件实现最大需求满足、限制地下水开采和按时交付。
AI.result: 通过城市案例研究，分析了两种不确定性情景（仅需求不确定性、需求与运输时间联合不确定性），并对比了随机解与期望值模型、完美信息模型的价值差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效处理不确定条件下的调度决策，为水罐车供水系统的可持续运营提供支持，具备辅助知情决策的实用价值。

title: 3-in-1: 2D Rotary Adaptation for Efficient Finetuning, Efficient Batching and Composability
summary: Parameter-efficient finetuning (PEFT) methods effectively adapt large language models (LLMs) to diverse downstream tasks, reducing storage and GPU memory demands. Despite these advantages, several applications pose new challenges to PEFT beyond mere parameter efficiency. One notable challenge involves the efficient deployment of LLMs equipped with multiple task- or user-specific adapters, particularly when different adapters are needed for distinct requests within the same batch. Another challenge is the interpretability of LLMs, which is crucial for understanding how LLMs function. Previous studies introduced various approaches to address different challenges. In this paper, we introduce a novel method, RoAd, which employs a straightforward 2D rotation to adapt LLMs and addresses all the above challenges: (1) RoAd is remarkably parameter-efficient, delivering optimal performance on GLUE, eight commonsense reasoning tasks and four arithmetic reasoning tasks with $<0.1\%$ trainable parameters; (2) RoAd facilitates the efficient serving of requests requiring different adapters within a batch, with an overhead comparable to element-wise multiplication instead of batch matrix multiplication; (3) RoAd enhances LLM's interpretability through integration within a framework of distributed interchange intervention, demonstrated via composition experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoAd方法，通过简单的2D旋转实现参数高效微调，在GLUE、8个常识推理和4个算术推理任务上以<0.1%的可训练参数取得最优性能，同时支持批处理中不同适配器的高效服务（开销接近逐元素乘法而非批量矩阵乘法），并通过分布式交换干预框架提升LLM的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法虽然节省参数和显存，但在多任务/多用户适配器的高效批处理部署以及模型可解释性方面存在不足，亟需一种能同时解决这些挑战的统一方法。
AI.method: 提出RoAd方法，采用简单的2D旋转操作对LLM进行适配，而非传统的低秩矩阵分解或加法式适配。
AI.result: (1) 在GLUE、8个常识推理、4个算术推理任务上用<0.1%的可训练参数达到最优；(2) 不同适配器的批处理服务开销仅为逐元素乘法级别，远低于批量矩阵乘法；(3) 通过分布式交换干预框架增强了模型可解释性，并通过组合实验验证。
AI.conclusion: RoAd通过极简的2D旋转机制，在参数效率、部署效率和可解释性三个维度上同时超越现有PEFT方法，为LLM的高效适配和可解释性研究提供了新范式。

title: Quadratic Optimal Control of Graphon Q-noise Linear Systems
summary: The modelling of linear quadratic Gaussian optimal control problems on large complex networks is intractable computationally. Graphon theory provides an approach to overcome these issues by defining limit objects for infinite sequences of graphs permitting one to approximate arbitrarily large networks by infinite dimensional operators. This is extended to stochastic systems by the use of Q-noise, a generalization of Wiener processes in finite dimensional spaces to processes in function spaces. The optimal control of linear quadratic problems on graphon systems with Q-noise disturbances are defined and shown to be the limit of the corresponding finite graph optimal control problem. The theory is extended to low rank systems, and a fully worked special case is presented. In addition, the worst-case long-range average and infinite horizon discounted optimal control performance with respect to Q-noise distribution are computed for a small set of standard graphon limits.

AI.tldr: 本文利用图论（Graphon）和Q-噪声理论，将大规模复杂网络上的线性二次高斯最优控制问题扩展到无限维系统，证明了有限图最优控制问题在极限下收敛于图论系统，并针对低秩系统和标准图论极限的 worst-case 控制性能进行了计算。
AI.motivation: 大规模复杂网络上的线性二次高斯（LQG）最优控制问题在计算上难以处理，亟需一种能够突破维数灾难、有效近似任意大型网络的理论方法。
AI.method: 采用图论（Graphon）作为无限序列图的极限对象，将任意大网络近似为无限维算子；引入Q-噪声（Wiener过程在函数空间中的推广）将随机系统扩展到无限维；定义并推导了图论系统上LQG最优控制问题的极限形式，并推广至低秩系统。
AI.result: 证明了图论系统上的LQG最优控制问题是相应有限图最优控制问题的极限；将理论成功扩展到低秩系统并给出了完整特例；针对一组标准图论极限，计算了Q-噪声分布下的 worst-case 长期平均和无限时域折扣最优控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 图论与Q-噪声相结合为大规模网络LQG控制问题提供了一种可行的极限近似框架，且该理论可推广至低秩系统，为复杂网络控制提供新的分析工具。

title: Modelling and analysis of multi-timescale uncertainty in energy system planning
summary: Recent developments in decomposition methods for multi-stage stochastic programming with block separable recourse enable the solution to large-scale stochastic programs with multi-timescale uncertainty. Multi-timescale uncertainty is important in energy system planning problems. Therefore, the proposed algorithms were applied to energy system planning problems to demonstrate their performance. However, the impact of multi-timescale uncertainty on energy system planning is not sufficiently analysed. In this paper, we address this research gap by comprehensively modelling and analysing short-term and long-term uncertainty in energy system planning. We use the REORIENT model to conduct the analysis. We also propose a parallel stabilised Benders decomposition as an alternative solution method to existing methods. We analyse the multi-timescale uncertainty regarding stability, the value of the stochastic solution, the rolling horizon value of the stochastic solutions and the planning decisions. The results show that (1) including multi-timescale uncertainty yields an increase in the value of the stochastic solutions, (2) long-term uncertainty in the right-hand side parameters affects the solution structure more than cost coefficient uncertainty, (3) parallel stabilised Benders decomposition is up to 7.5 times faster than the serial version.

AI.tldr: 本文通过REORIENT模型全面建模并分析了能源系统规划中的多时间尺度不确定性（短期与长期），提出了并行稳定Benders分解作为求解方法。研究发现：多时间尺度不确定性提升了随机解的价值，长期右端项不确定性比成本系数不确定性对解结构影响更大，并行分解比串行快7.5倍。
AI.motivation: 现有分解方法虽已应用于能源系统规划，但多时间尺度不确定性对能源系统规划的影响尚未得到充分分析，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 基于REORIENT模型对短期和长期不确定性进行综合建模，提出并行稳定Benders分解方法，从稳定性、随机解价值、滚动时域随机解价值及规划决策等维度进行多时间尺度不确定性分析。
AI.result: (1) 包含多时间尺度不确定性提高了随机解的价值；(2) 长期右端项不确定性比成本系数不确定性对解结构影响更大；(3) 并行稳定Benders分解比串行版本快7.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 多时间尺度不确定性对能源系统规划具有显著影响，所提出的并行稳定Benders分解方法在计算效率上具有明显优势。

title: Gradient dynamics model for drops of volatile liquid on a porous substrate
summary: We present a mesoscopic hydrodynamic model for a spreading drop of volatile partially wetting liquid on a solid porous layer of small thickness. Thereby, evaporation takes place under strong confinement, i.e., we consider a drop that spreads on one of two parallel plates that form a narrow gap. Our gradient dynamics model describes the coupled dynamics of the vertically averaged vapor density profile, the drop height profile, and the vertically averaged saturation profile in the porous layer. The underlying free energy incorporates saturation-dependent wettability, capillarity of the drop and within the porous layer, air and vapor entropy, and an entropic contribution relevant close to complete filling of the porous layer. After developing the model we discuss the resulting sorption isotherm and illustrate typical drop spreading and imbibition behavior including the formation of a saturation halo within the porous substrate.

AI.tldr: 提出一个介观水动力学模型，描述挥发性部分润湿液滴在薄多孔固体层上的铺展行为，该模型考虑强受限环境（两平行板间的窄间隙）下的蒸发，并耦合了垂直平均蒸汽密度、液滴高度和多孔层饱和度三个场变量。
AI.motivation: 挥发性液滴在多孔基底上的铺展和吸入行为在工业涂覆、喷墨打印、土壤灌溉等领域具有重要应用，而现有模型未能充分描述强受限条件下蒸发与多孔介质吸液的耦合动力学。
AI.method: 基于梯度动力学（gradient dynamics）方法构建自由能泛函，包含与饱和度相关的润湿性、液滴及多孔层毛细力、空气与蒸汽熵、以及接近多孔层完全填充时的熵贡献。模型耦合了垂直平均蒸汽密度、液滴高度和多孔层饱和度三个演化方程。
AI.result: 推导了相应的吸附等温线，并展示了典型的液滴铺展和吸入行为，包括多孔基底中饱和晕（saturation halo）的形成。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能够有效描述强受限环境下挥发性液滴在多孔介质上的铺展、蒸发和吸入耦合动力学，特别是捕捉了多孔层内饱和晕这一关键现象。

title: Modelling aerodynamic forces and torques of spheroid particles in compressible flows
summary: In the present study, we conduct numerical simulations of compressible flows around spheroid particles, for the purpose of refining empirical formulas for drag force, lift force, and pitching torque acting on them. Through an analysis of approximately a thousand numerical simulation cases spanning a wide range of Mach numbers, Reynolds numbers and particle aspect ratios, we first identify the crucial parameters that are strongly correlated with the forces and torques via Spearman correlation analysis, based on which the empirical formulas for the drag force, lift force and pitching torque coefficients are refined. The novel formulas developed for compressible flows exhibit consistency with their incompressible counterparts at low Mach number limits and, moreover, yield accurate predictions with average relative errors of less than 5%. This underscores their robustness and reliability in predicting aerodynamic loads on spheroidal particles under various flow conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过约1000组数值模拟数据，利用Spearman相关性分析识别关键参数，改进并提出了适用于可压缩流中椭球体颗粒的阻力、升力和俯仰力矩系数的经验公式，平均相对误差小于5%。
AI.motivation: 现有椭球体颗粒在可压缩流中的气动力/力矩经验公式精度不足，需要基于更全面的数值数据进行精细化改进。
AI.method: 对约1000个涵盖宽范围马赫数、雷诺数和颗粒长宽比的案例进行数值模拟，通过Spearman相关性分析识别强相关参数，据此改进阻力、升力和俯仰力矩系数的经验公式。
AI.result: 新公式在低马赫数极限下与不可压缩流公式一致，平均相对误差小于5%，具有良好的鲁棒性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的经验公式能够准确预测不同流动条件下椭球体颗粒的气动载荷，为可压缩流中的颗粒动力学研究提供了有效工具。

title: Simple proof that there is no sign problem in Path Integral Monte Carlo simulations of fermions in one dimension
summary: It is widely known that there is no sign problem in Path Integral Monte Carlo (PIMC) simulations of fermions in one dimension. Yet, as far as the author is aware, there is no direct proof of this in the literature. This work shows that the $sign$ of the $N$-fermion anti-symmetric free propagator is given by the product of all possible pairs of particle separations, or relative displacements. For a non-vanishing closed-loop product of such propagators, as required by PIMC, all relative displacements from adjacent propagators are paired into perfect squares, and therefore the loop product must be positive, but only in one dimension. By comparison, permutation sampling, which does not evaluate the determinant of the anti-symmetric propagator exactly, remains plagued by a low-level sign problem, even in one dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在费米子的路径积分蒙特卡洛（PIMC）模拟中，一维情况下反反对称传播子的闭环乘积必然为正，从而消除了符号问题；而置换采样方法即使在二维中仍存在轻度符号问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管一维费米子PIMC模拟中不存在符号问题是广为人知的，但文献中缺乏直接证明。本文旨在提供这一严格证明。
AI.method: 通过分析N费米子反对称自由传播子的符号，证明其由所有粒子对间距（相对位移）的乘积给出。对于PIMC所需的非零闭环传播子乘积，所有相邻传播子的相对位移都配对为完全平方数，从而证明在一维中该闭环乘积必为正。
AI.result: 一维PIMC中反对称传播子的闭环乘积恒为正，不存在符号问题；置换采样方法因未精确计算反对称传播子的行列式，即使在二维仍存在轻度符号问题。
AI.conclusion: 一维费米子PIMC无符号问题有严格的数学证明，为相关模拟提供了理论保证；同时指出置换采样方法在符号问题上的局限性。

title: Hyperparameter Optimization for Atomic Cluster Expansion Potentials
summary: Machine-learning-based interatomic potentials enable accurate materials simulations on extended time- and lengthscales. ML potentials based on the Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE) framework have recently shown promising performance for this purpose. Here, we describe a largely automated computational approach to optimizing hyperparameters for ACE potential models. We extend our openly available Python package, XPOT, to include an interface for ACE fitting, and discuss the optimization of the functional form and complexity of these models based on systematic sweeps across relevant hyperparameters. We showcase the usefulness of the approach for two example systems: the covalent network of silicon and the phase-change material Sb$_{2}$Te$_{3}$. More generally, our work emphasizes the importance of hyperparameter selection in the development of advanced ML potential models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于XPOT软件包自动化优化ACE（原子簇展开）机器学习势函数超参数的方法，并在硅和Sb₂Te₃两个材料体系中验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习势函数中超参数的选择对模型性能至关重要，但目前缺乏系统化的自动化优化方案，手动调参效率低下且难以保证最优性。
AI.method: 扩展了开源Python软件包XPOT，集成了ACE势函数拟合接口，通过对相关超参数进行系统性扫描来实现ACE模型函数形式和复杂度的自动化优化。
AI.result: 在共价网络硅和相变材料Sb₂Te₃两个示例体系中，该方法成功优化了ACE势函数的超参数，展示了自动化超参数优化的实用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 超参数选择在先进机器学习势函数模型开发中至关重要，本文提出的自动化优化方法可提高ACE势函数建模的效率和质量。

title: Data-Efficient Construction of High-Fidelity Graph Deep Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary: Machine learning potentials (MLPs) have become an indispensable tool in large-scale atomistic simulations because of their ability to reproduce ab initio potential energy surfaces (PESs) very accurately at a fraction of computational cost. For computational efficiency, the training data for most MLPs today are computed using relatively cheap density functional theory (DFT) methods such as the Perdew-Burke-Ernzerhof (PBE) generalized gradient approximation (GGA) functional. Meta-GGAs such as the recently developed strongly constrained and appropriately normed (SCAN) functional have been shown to yield significantly improved descriptions of atomic interactions for diversely bonded systems, but their higher computational cost remains an impediment to their use in MLP development. In this work, we outline a data-efficient multi-fidelity approach to constructing Materials 3-body Graph Network (M3GNet) interatomic potentials that integrate different levels of theory within a single model. Using silicon and water as examples, we show that a multi-fidelity M3GNet model trained on a combined dataset of low-fidelity GGA calculations with 10% of high-fidelity SCAN calculations can achieve accuracies comparable to a single-fidelity M3GNet model trained on a dataset comprising 8x the number of SCAN calculations. This work paves the way for the development of high-fidelity MLPs in a cost-effective manner by leveraging existing low-fidelity datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多保真度M3GNet机器学习势构建方法，通过在低精度GGA数据中混合10%的高精度SCAN数据，在硅和水体系上实现了与纯SCAN数据集训练8倍数据量相当的精密度，显著降低了高保真MLP的开发成本。
AI.motivation: 高保真度meta-GGA泛函（如SCAN）在多类键合体系中精度显著优于GGA，但其计算成本过高限制了其在机器学习势数据集生成中的应用，亟需一种数据高效的方法来降低成本同时保持精度。
AI.method: 基于M3GNet（Materials 3-body Graph Network）框架，采用多保真度学习策略，在同一个模型中融合不同理论层级的数据——以大量低保真度GGA（PBE）计算数据为基础，混合少量（10%）高保真度SCAN计算数据，构建联合数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在硅和水体系上，多保真度M3GNet模型仅需10%的高保真SCAN数据即可达到与纯SCAN单保真度模型训练8倍数据量时相当的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用已有的低保真度数据集，以数据高效的方式实现了高保真度MLP的开发，为降低成本、提升MLP精度提供了可行路径。

title: Force and kinetics of fast and slow muscle myosin determined with a synthetic sarcomere-like nanomachine
comment: Buonfiglio V, Pertici I, Marcello M, Morotti I, Caremani M, Reconditi M, Linari M, Fanelli D, Lombardi V, Bianco P. Force and kinetics of fast and slow muscle myosin determined with a synthetic sarcomere-like nanomachine. Commun Biol. 2024 Mar 23;7(1):361. doi: 10.1038/s42003-024-06033-8. PMID: 38521889; PMCID: PMC10960843
summary: Myosin II is the muscle molecular motor that works in two bipolar arrays in each thick filament of the striated (skeletal and cardiac) muscle, converting the chemical energy into steady force and shortening by cyclic ATP--driven interactions with the nearby actin filaments. Different isoforms of the myosin motor in the skeletal muscles account for the different functional requirements of the slow muscles (primarily responsible for the posture) and fast muscles (responsible for voluntary movements). To clarify the molecular basis of the differences, here the isoform--dependent mechanokinetic parameters underpinning the force of slow and fast muscles are defined with a unidimensional synthetic nanomachine powered by pure myosin isoforms from either slow or fast rabbit skeletal muscle. Data fitting with a stochastic model provides a self--consistent estimate of all the mechanokinetic properties of the motor ensemble including the motor force, the fraction of actin--attached motors and the rate of transition through the attachment--detachment cycle. The achievements in this paper set the stage for any future study on the emergent mechanokinetic properties of an ensemble of myosin molecules either engineered or purified from mutant animal models or human biopsies.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用纯化的慢肌和快肌肌球蛋白亚型构建一维合成纳米机器，结合随机模型拟合，系统定义了两种肌纤维类型中肌球蛋白分子的力学-动力学参数差异，包括单分子力、肌动蛋白结合比例及附着-解离循环速率，为未来肌球蛋白群体特性的研究奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 慢肌（维持姿势）和快肌（自主运动）具有不同的功能需求，其肌球蛋白亚型差异的分子基础尚不清晰，需要明确不同亚型的力学-动力学参数如何决定肌肉收缩力的差异。
AI.method: 从兔骨骼肌中纯化慢肌和快肌肌球蛋白亚型，构建一维合成纳米机器；通过随机模型拟合实验数据，自洽地估算肌球蛋白群体的所有力学-动力学特性，包括单分子力、肌动蛋白结合比例和附着-解离循环速率。
AI.result: 成功定义了慢肌和快肌肌球蛋白亚型依赖的力学-动力学参数，获得了自洽的肌球蛋白群体力学-动力学特性估计值，揭示了两种亚型在分子层面的功能差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为未来研究工程化或从突变动物模型/人类活检中纯化的肌球蛋白分子群体的涌现力学-动力学特性奠定了基础。

title: Ergodicity breaking and restoration in models of heat transport with microscopic reversibility
summary: The behavior of lattice models in which time reversibility is enforced at the level of trajectories (microscopic reversibility) is studied analytically. Conditions for ergodicity breaking are explored, and a few examples of systems characterized by an additional conserved quantity besides energy are presented. All the systems are characterized by ergodicity restoration when put in contact with a thermal bath, except for specific choices of the interactions between the atoms in the system and the bath. The study shows that the additional conserved quantities return to play a role in non-equilibrium conditions. The similarities with the behavior of some mesoscale systems, in which the transition rates satisfy detailed balance but not microscopic reversibility, are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本论文从解析角度研究了在轨迹层面强制满足时间反演对称性（微观可逆性）的晶格模型。探讨了遍历性破缺的条件，并给出了除能量外存在额外守恒量的系统示例。研究表明，与热浴接触可恢复遍历性（特定相互作用选择除外），且额外守恒量在非平衡条件下重新发挥作用。论文还讨论了与某些满足细致平衡但不满足微观可逆性的介观系统的相似性。
AI.motivation: 探索在轨迹层面强制时间反演对称性的晶格模型中遍历性破缺的条件，以及额外守恒量在非平衡条件下的作用。
AI.method: 采用解析方法研究晶格模型，通过强制微观可逆性（轨迹层面的时间反演对称性）来系统分析遍历性破缺的条件，并构造具有额外守恒量的系统示例。同时比较了与满足细致平衡但不满足微观可逆性的介观系统的行为。
AI.result: 1) 识别了遍历性破缺的条件；2) 给出了具有额外守恒量的系统示例；3) 除特定原子-热浴相互作用外，与热浴接触可恢复遍历性；4) 额外守恒量在非平衡条件下重新发挥重要作用；5) 揭示了与某些介观系统行为的相似性。
AI.conclusion: 微观可逆性强制下的晶格模型存在遍历性破缺，但通常可通过热浴恢复；额外守恒量在非平衡条件下作用显著；微观可逆性与细致平衡的区别对系统行为有重要影响。

title: Empirical Bayes Linked Matrix Decomposition
summary: Data for several applications in diverse fields can be represented as multiple matrices that are linked across rows or columns. This is particularly common in molecular biomedical research, in which multiple molecular "omics" technologies may capture different feature sets (e.g., corresponding to rows in a matrix) and/or different sample populations (corresponding to columns). This has motivated a large body of work on integrative matrix factorization approaches that identify and decompose low-dimensional signal that is shared across multiple matrices or specific to a given matrix. We propose an empirical variational Bayesian approach to this problem that has several advantages over existing techniques, including the flexibility to accommodate shared signal over any number of row or column sets (i.e., bidimensional integration), an intuitive model-based objective function that yields appropriate shrinkage for the inferred signals, and a relatively efficient estimation algorithm with no tuning parameters. A general result establishes conditions for the uniqueness of the underlying decomposition for a broad family of methods that includes the proposed approach. For scenarios with missing data, we describe an associated iterative imputation approach that is novel for the single-matrix context and a powerful approach for "blockwise" imputation (in which an entire row or column is missing) in various linked matrix contexts. Extensive simulations show that the method performs very well under different scenarios with respect to recovering underlying low-rank signal, accurately decomposing shared and specific signals, and accurately imputing missing data. The approach is applied to gene expression and miRNA data from breast cancer tissue and normal breast tissue, for which it gives an informative decomposition of variation and outperforms alternative strategies for missing data imputation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种经验变分贝叶斯方法，用于多矩阵联合矩阵分解，支持双向整合（行和列）、无调参、模型驱动收缩、唯一性保证，并在缺失数据（包括整行/整列缺失）的迭代插补上表现出色，在乳腺癌基因表达与miRNA数据中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 许多应用（特别是分子生物医学）中的数据可表示为多个通过行或列关联的矩阵（如不同组学技术捕获不同特征集或样本群体），需要整合性矩阵分解方法来识别并分解跨矩阵共享或矩阵特定的低维信号。现有方法在灵活性、调参复杂度和双向整合能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出一种经验变分贝叶斯（empirical variational Bayesian）方法进行整合性矩阵分解。该方法支持任意数量的行集或列集上的双向整合（bidimensional integration），基于模型的客观函数可实现信号的适当收缩，估计算法相对高效且无调参参数。同时建立了保证分解唯一性的通用条件，并针对缺失数据提出了迭代插补策略，适用于单矩阵和多矩阵（块缺失）场景。
AI.result: 广泛模拟表明，该方法在恢复低秩信号、准确分解共享与特定信号、准确插补缺失数据方面表现出色；应用于乳腺癌组织与正常乳腺组织的基因表达和miRNA数据，给出了有信息量的变异分解，并在缺失数据插补上优于替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 该经验变分贝叶斯方法在灵活性、无调参、唯一性保证和缺失数据插补能力上优于现有技术，在多矩阵整合分析中具有广泛应用前景。

title: Lack of self-similarity in transverse velocity increments and circulation statistics in two-dimensional turbulence
summary: We study the statistics of longitudinal and transverse structure functions, as well as velocity circulation in the inverse energy cascade of two-dimensional turbulence. By means of direct numerical simulations of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations, we show that transverse structure functions exhibit an anomalous scaling, in contrast to the self-similar behavior of longitudinal ones. We derive an analytical relation that shows that the scaling exponents of transverse structure functions and velocity circulation are related in two-dimensional turbulence.

AI.tldr: 本文通过二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的数值模拟，研究了逆能量级联中纵向和横向结构函数以及速度环流的统计特性，发现横向结构函数呈现反常标度（非自相似），而纵向结构函数表现为自相似行为，并推导了横向结构函数与速度环流标度指数之间的解析关系。
AI.motivation: 揭示二维湍流逆能量级联中不同统计量（纵向与横向结构函数、速度环流）的标度行为差异，特别是深入理解横向结构函数的反常标度现象及其与环流之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 采用直接数值模拟（DNS）对二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程进行求解，计算纵向和横向结构函数及速度环流的统计量，并通过解析推导建立横向结构函数与速度环流标度指数之间的理论关系。
AI.result: 横向结构函数表现出反常标度（即标度指数偏离自相似预测），而纵向结构函数则呈现自相似行为；同时推导出了二维湍流中横向结构函数与速度环流标度指数之间的解析关系式。
AI.conclusion: 二维湍流逆能量级联中，纵向与横向结构函数表现出截然不同的标度行为（自相似 vs. 反常），且横向结构函数与速度环流在标度指数上存在理论关联，这为理解二维湍流的间歇性和多尺度统计特性提供了新的见解。

title: Freezing receding contact lines
summary: We investigate experimentally the receding of a contact line when a Peltier module is pulled out of a water bath at constant speed, while a ice layer is also growing at constant speed on the Peltier module. A steady regime is therefore reached for all the parameters used in this studied, corresponding to a dynamical stationnary meniscus. We show that the height of the meniscus provides most of the properties of the flow. For high pulling rate, it is related to the amount of liquid of the equivalent Landau-Levich (LL) film that would be extracted from the bath, which is eventually freezing as the plate is lifted upward. For smaller velocity, so that no LL film would be formed without freezing, the meniscus height is directly linked to the contact angle of water on ice in these conditions. Solving numerically the meniscus equation taking into account the solidifcation of water, our results suggest that the contact angle of water on ice should be around $6^\circ$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究Peltier模块从水浴中恒速拉出时，接触线在冰层同时生长条件下的退缩行为，发现稳态弯月面高度能反映流动特性，并利用数值模拟推测水在冰上的接触角约为6°。
AI.motivation: 探究冰层生长与接触线退缩同时发生时的动态润湿行为，特别是弯月面高度与流动特性的关系，并确定水在冰上的接触角。
AI.method: 实验将Peltier模块以恒定速度从水浴中拉出，同时以恒定速度生长冰层，测量稳态弯月面高度；结合Landau-Levich膜理论分析高拉速情形，以及接触角分析低拉速情形；通过数值求解考虑凝固的弯月面方程进行对比验证。
AI.result: 高拉速时弯月面高度与Landau-Levich膜理论相关；低拉速时弯月面高度由水在冰上的接触角直接决定；数值模拟结果表明水在冰上的接触角约为6°。
AI.conclusion: 稳态弯月面高度是描述该动态凝固-润湿系统的关键参数，水在冰上的接触角约为6°。

title: Kubernetes Deployment Options for On-Prem Clusters
summary: Over the last decade, the Kubernetes container orchestration platform has become essential to many scientific workflows. Despite its popularity, deploying a production-ready Kubernetes cluster on-premises can be challenging for system administrators. Many of the proprietary integrations that application developers take for granted in commercial cloud environments must be replaced with alternatives when deployed locally. This article will compare three popular deployment strategies for sites deploying Kubernetes on-premise: Kubeadm with Kubespray, OpenShift / OKD and Rancher via K3S/RKE2.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种本地部署Kubernetes的策略：Kubeadm+Kubespray、OpenShift/OKD和Rancher(K3S/RKE2)，旨在帮助系统管理员选择适合本地生产环境的部署方案。
AI.motivation: Kubernetes已成为科学工作流的关键平台，但本地部署生产级集群对系统管理员而言充满挑战，因为商业云环境中许多专有集成需要在本地用替代方案替换。因此需要对比主流本地部署策略以提供选型指导。
AI.method: 对比分析三种主流本地Kubernetes部署策略：Kubeadm结合Kubespray（社区驱动、高度可定制）、OpenShift/OKD（企业级、集成丰富）、Rancher通过K3S/RKE2（轻量级、管理便捷）。
AI.result: 三种方案各有优劣：Kubeadm+Kubespray适合需要高度定制的团队；OpenShift/OKD提供最完整的企业级功能但复杂度高；Rancher(K3S/RKE2)在轻量化和易管理性上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本地部署Kubernetes需根据运维能力、定制需求和资源情况选择合适方案，没有普适的最优解。

title: An iterative Monte Carlo method to solve nonlinear second-order differential equations
summary: The Monte Carlo method is a thriving and mathematically beautiful numerical technique used extensively, nowadays, to deal with many demanding problems in diverse fields. Here, we present an iterative Monte Carlo algorithm to work out very general nonlinear second-order differential equations, with Dirichlet boundary conditions. An example of its usage is, also, reported.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于求解具有狄利克雷边界条件的非线性二阶微分方程的迭代蒙特卡洛算法，并给出了使用示例。
AI.motivation: 蒙特卡洛方法是一种广泛应用于各领域的数值技术，但在求解非线性二阶微分方程方面仍有探索空间，作者旨在扩展蒙特卡洛方法在该问题上的应用。
AI.method: 提出了一种迭代蒙特卡洛算法，用于处理具有狄利克雷边界条件的非常一般的非线性二阶微分方程。
AI.result: 给出了该算法的一个使用示例，证明了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该迭代蒙特卡洛算法能够有效求解带狄利克雷边界条件的非线性二阶微分方程，拓展了蒙特卡洛方法的适用范围。

title: The role of sputtered atom and ion energy distribution in films deposited by Physical Vapor Deposition: A molecular dynamics approach
summary: We present a comparative study of copper film growth with a constant energy neutral beam, thermal evaporation, dc magnetron sputtering, high-power impulse magnetron sputtering (HiP-IMS), and bipolar HiPIMS, through molecular dynamics simulations. Experimentally determined energy distribution functions were utilized to model the deposition processes. Our results indicate significant differences in the film quality, growth rate, and substrate erosion between the various physical vapor deposition techniques. Bipolar HiPIMS shows the potential for improved film structure under certain conditions, albeit with increased substrate erosion. Bipolar +180 V HiPIMS with 10% Cu + ions exhibited the best film properties in terms of crystallinity and atomic stress among the PVD processes investigated.

AI.tldr: 通过分子动力学模拟，对比研究了常能中性束、热蒸发、直流磁控溅射、高功率脉冲磁控溅射（HiPIMS）和双极HiPIMS等物理气相沉积技术中铜薄膜的生长过程。结果显示不同技术在薄膜质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀方面存在显著差异。双极HiPIMS在特定条件下展现出改善薄膜结构的潜力，其中双极+180 V HiPIMS（含10% Cu+离子）在结晶度和原子应力方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 比较不同物理气相沉积（PVD）技术对铜薄膜生长质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀的影响，以寻找能够优化薄膜结构（如结晶度和原子应力）的沉积方法。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学（MD）模拟，并将实验测定的能量分布函数作为输入来建模不同PVD工艺（常能中性束、热蒸发、直流磁控溅射、HiPIMS、双极HiPIMS）中的沉积过程。
AI.result: 不同PVD技术在薄膜质量、生长速率和衬底侵蚀方面差异显著。双极HiPIMS在特定条件下可改善薄膜结构，但衬底侵蚀增加。双极+180 V HiPIMS（10% Cu+离子）在所有研究中PVD工艺中表现出最佳的结晶度和原子应力。
AI.conclusion: 双极HiPIMS技术，特别是施加+180 V偏压且含有10% Cu+离子的条件，有望制备高质量铜薄膜，但需注意其带来的衬底侵蚀问题。

title: Moderately dense granular gas of inelastic rough spheres
summary: A kinetic theory for moderately dense gases of inelastic and rough spherical molecules is developed from the Enskog equation where a macroscopic state is characterized by 29 scalar fields which correspond to the moments of the distribution function: mass density, hydrodynamic velocity, pressure tensor, absolute temperature, translational and rotational heat fluxes, hydrodynamic angular velocity and angular velocity flux. The balance equations for the 29 scalar fields are obtained from a transfer equation derived from the Enskog equation where the kinetic and potential parts of the new moments of the distribution function and production terms are calculated from Grad's distribution function for the basic fields. The transition from the 29 field theory to an eight field theory -- with mass density, hydrodynamic velocity, absolute temperature and hydrodynamic angular velocity -- leads to the determination of the transport coefficients of the Navier-Stokes and Fourier laws. The transport coefficients are functions of the normal and tangential restitution coefficients and of the local equilibrium radial distribution function. The transport coefficients in the limiting case of elastic rough spheres is also determined.

AI.tldr: 基于Enskog方程，发展了非弹性粗糙球分子中等密度气体的动理论，使用29个标量场描述宏观状态，并推导了平衡方程和输运系数，输运系数依赖于法向和切向恢复系数以及径向分布函数。
AI.motivation: 扩展动理论到非弹性粗糙球分子的中等密度气体，建立更完整的宏观描述框架，并推导Navier-Stokes和Fourier定律的输运系数。
AI.method: 从Enskog方程出发，利用29个标量场（质量密度、流体速度、压力张量、绝对温度、平动和转动热流、流体角速度及角速度通量）表征宏观状态；通过传递方程导出平衡方程，使用Grad分布函数计算新矩的动能和势能部分以及产生项；从29场理论约化到8场理论（质量密度、流体速度、绝对温度、流体角速度）以确定输运系数。
AI.result: 得到了输运系数，它们是法向和切向恢复系数以及局部平衡径向分布函数的函数；并确定了弹性粗糙球极限情况下的输运系数。
AI.conclusion: 成功发展了非弹性粗糙球分子中等密度气体的29场动理论，并建立了到8场理论的约化路径，为颗粒流等系统的输运性质提供了理论基础。

title: Exact moments for a run and tumble particle in a harmonic trap with a finite tumble time
summary: We study the problem of a run and tumble particle in a harmonic trap, with a finite run and tumble time, by a direct integration of the equation of motion. An exact 1D steady state distribution, diagram laws and a programmable Volterra difference equation are derived to calculate any order of moments in any other dimension, both for steady state as well as the Laplace transform in time for the intermediate states. We also use the moments to infer the distribution by considering a Gaussian quadrature for the corresponding measure, and from the scaling law of high order moments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过直接积分运动方程，研究了谐波陷阱中具有有限运行和翻滚时间的运行-翻滚粒子问题，推导出了精确的一维稳态分布、图解法则和可编程的Volterra差分方程，用于计算任意维度下稳态和中间状态的拉普拉斯变换的各阶矩，并利用矩通过高斯求积和标度律推断分布。
AI.motivation: 研究谐波陷阱中具有有限运行和翻滚时间的运行-翻滚粒子的精确稳态分布和矩的计算方法。
AI.method: 直接积分运动方程，推导一维稳态分布、图解法则和可编程的Volterra差分方程，计算任意维度的矩，并通过高斯求积和标度律推断分布。
AI.result: 得到了精确的一维稳态分布，推导出了图解法则和Volterra差分方程，可用于计算任意维度的各阶矩（稳态及中间状态的拉普拉斯变换），并通过矩推断出分布。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为运行-翻滚粒子在谐波陷阱中的动力学提供了精确的解析框架，能够计算各阶矩并重建分布。

title: Alpha-VI DeepONet: A prior-robust variational Bayesian approach for enhancing DeepONets with uncertainty quantification
summary: We introduce a novel deep operator network (DeepONet) framework that incorporates generalised variational inference (GVI) using Rényi's $α$-divergence to learn complex operators while quantifying uncertainty. By incorporating Bayesian neural networks as the building blocks for the branch and trunk networks, our framework endows DeepONet with uncertainty quantification. The use of Rényi's $α$-divergence, instead of the Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD), commonly used in standard variational inference, mitigates issues related to prior misspecification that are prevalent in Variational Bayesian DeepONets. This approach offers enhanced flexibility and robustness. We demonstrate that modifying the variational objective function yields superior results in terms of minimising the mean squared error and improving the negative log-likelihood on the test set. Our framework's efficacy is validated across various mechanical systems, where it outperforms both deterministic and standard KLD-based VI DeepONets in predictive accuracy and uncertainty quantification. The hyperparameter $α$, which controls the degree of robustness, can be tuned to optimise performance for specific problems. We apply this approach to a range of mechanics problems, including gravity pendulum, advection-diffusion, and diffusion-reaction systems. Our findings underscore the potential of $α$-VI DeepONet to advance the field of data-driven operator learning and its applications in engineering and scientific domains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Rényi α-散度广义变分推断的贝叶斯深度算子网络（α-VI DeepONet），用于在复杂算子学习中实现不确定性量化，解决了标准变分推断中先验误指定问题，并在多种力学系统中取得优于确定性DeepONet和标准KL散度VI DeepONet的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准变分贝叶斯DeepONet使用Kullback-Leibler散度进行推断，存在对先验分布误指定敏感的问题，影响了不确定性量化的鲁棒性和预测准确性。
AI.method: 将贝叶斯神经网络作为分支网络和主干网络的基本构件，以Rényi α-散度替代KL散度作为变分推断的目标函数，构建广义变分推断框架；通过超参数α控制鲁棒性程度。
AI.result: 在重力摆、对流扩散和扩散反应等力学系统中，α-VI DeepONet在均方误差和负对数似然指标上均优于确定性DeepONet和标准KL散度VI DeepONet，展现出更好的预测精度和不确定性量化能力。
AI.conclusion: α-VI DeepONet通过调节α超参数能够灵活适应不同问题，为数据驱动算子学习领域（特别是工程与科学应用）提供了更鲁棒的不确定性量化方案。

title: Bayesian Entropy Neural Networks for Physics-Aware Prediction
summary: This paper addresses the need for deep learning models to integrate well-defined constraints into their outputs, driven by their application in surrogate models, learning with limited data and partial information, and scenarios requiring flexible model behavior to incorporate non-data sample information. We introduce Bayesian Entropy Neural Networks (BENN), a framework grounded in Maximum Entropy (MaxEnt) principles, designed to impose constraints on Bayesian Neural Network (BNN) predictions. BENN is capable of constraining not only the predicted values but also their derivatives and variances, ensuring a more robust and reliable model output. To achieve simultaneous uncertainty quantification and constraint satisfaction, we employ the method of multipliers approach. This allows for the concurrent estimation of neural network parameters and the Lagrangian multipliers associated with the constraints. Our experiments, spanning diverse applications such as beam deflection modeling and microstructure generation, demonstrate the effectiveness of BENN. The results highlight significant improvements over traditional BNNs and showcase competitive performance relative to contemporary constrained deep learning methods.

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯熵神经网络（BENN），基于最大熵原理在贝叶斯神经网络的预测值、导数及方差上施加约束，通过乘子法同时估计网络参数和拉格朗日乘子，在梁变形建模和微结构生成等任务中优于传统BNN并达到与当代约束深度学习方法竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型需要在输出中集成良好定义的约束，以适用于代理模型、有限数据和部分信息学习、以及需要灵活模型行为融入非数据样本信息的场景。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯熵神经网络（BENN），基于最大熵（MaxEnt）原理对贝叶斯神经网络的预测施加约束，能同时约束预测值、导数及方差；采用乘子法（method of multipliers）同时估计神经网络参数和与约束相关的拉格朗日乘子，实现不确定性量化与约束满足的协同优化。
AI.result: 在梁变形建模和微结构生成等多样化应用中，BENN相比传统BNN有显著改进，与当代约束深度学习方法相比展现出具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: BENN框架有效结合了最大熵原理与贝叶斯神经网络，能够在保证不确定性量化的同时施加多种约束，为需要融合先验知识约束的深度学习任务提供了鲁棒且可靠的解决方案。

title: EnsLoss: Stochastic Calibrated Loss Ensembles for Preventing Overfitting in Classification
summary: Empirical risk minimization (ERM) with a computationally feasible surrogate loss is a widely accepted approach for classification. Notably, the convexity and calibration (CC) properties of a loss function ensure consistency of ERM in maximizing accuracy, thereby offering a wide range of options for surrogate losses. In this article, we propose a novel ensemble method, namely EnsLoss, which extends the ensemble learning concept to combine loss functions within the ERM framework. A key feature of our method is the consideration on preserving the "legitimacy" of the combined losses, i.e., ensuring the CC properties. Specifically, we first transform the CC conditions of losses into loss-derivatives, thereby bypassing the need for explicit loss functions and directly generating calibrated loss-derivatives. Therefore, inspired by Dropout, EnsLoss enables loss ensembles through one training process with doubly stochastic gradient descent (i.e., random batch samples and random calibrated loss-derivatives). We theoretically establish the statistical consistency of our approach and provide insights into its benefits. The numerical effectiveness of EnsLoss compared to fixed loss methods is demonstrated through experiments on a broad range of 14 OpenML tabular datasets and 46 image datasets with various deep learning architectures. Python repository and source code are available on GitHub at https://github.com/statmlben/ensloss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 EnsLoss 方法，将集成学习思想扩展至损失函数层面，通过在 ERM 框架内组合多个保持凸性和校准性的损失函数，利用双重随机梯度下降（随机批样本和随机校准损失导数）在一次训练过程中实现损失集成，理论证明了统计一致性，并在 14 个 OpenML 表格数据集和 46 个图像数据集上验证了优于固定损失方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有经验风险最小化（ERM）框架中，虽然已有多种满足凸性和校准性（CC）的替代损失函数可供选择，但单一损失函数在不同数据分布和任务上表现各异，缺乏一种灵活组合多个合法损失函数以提升模型泛化能力的方法。本文旨在将集成学习思想引入损失函数层面，实现损失函数的自适应组合，同时保证组合后损失函数的合法性（即保持 CC 属性）。
AI.method: 首先将损失函数的 CC 条件转化为对损失导数的约束，从而绕过显式定义损失函数，直接生成满足校准性的损失导数。受 Dropout 启发，采用双重随机梯度下降（DSGD）训练：每次迭代不仅随机采样批样本，还随机采样一个校准的损失导数，从而实现一次训练过程中的损失集成。理论推导了该方法的统计一致性。
AI.result: 在 14 个 OpenML 表格数据集和 46 个图像数据集上，结合多种深度学习架构进行实验，EnsLoss 方法在分类性能上显著优于使用单一固定损失函数的基线方法，验证了其数值有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EnsLoss 是一种新颖有效的损失集成方法，在不增加显式损失函数设计负担的前提下，通过随机采样校准损失导数实现自适应损失组合，理论上保证了统计一致性，实验证明了其广泛的适用性和优越性。代码已开源。

title: Self-Organization in Computation & Chemistry: Return to AlChemy
summary: How do complex adaptive systems, such as life, emerge from simple constituent parts? In the 1990s Walter Fontana and Leo Buss proposed a novel modeling approach to this question, based on a formal model of computation known as $λ$ calculus. The model demonstrated how simple rules, embedded in a combinatorially large space of possibilities, could yield complex, dynamically stable organizations, reminiscent of biochemical reaction networks. Here, we revisit this classic model, called AlChemy, which has been understudied over the past thirty years. We reproduce the original results and study the robustness of those results using the greater computing resources available today. Our analysis reveals several unanticipated features of the system, demonstrating a surprising mix of dynamical robustness and fragility. Specifically, we find that complex, stable organizations emerge more frequently than previously expected, that these organizations are robust against collapse into trivial fixed-points, but that these stable organizations cannot be easily combined into higher order entities. We also study the role played by the random generators used in the model, characterizing the initial distribution of objects produced by two random expression generators, and their consequences on the results. Finally, we provide a constructive proof that shows how an extension of the model, based on typed $λ$ calculus, could simulate transitions between arbitrary states in any possible chemical reaction network, thus indicating a concrete connection between AlChemy and chemical reaction networks. We conclude with a discussion of possible applications of AlChemy to self-organization in modern programming languages and quantitative approaches to the origin of life.

AI.tldr: 本文复现并扩展研究了1990年代Walter Fontana和Leo Buss提出的AlChemy模型——一个基于λ演算的复杂适应系统模型。研究发现稳定组织比预期更频繁出现，对坍缩为平凡不动点具有鲁棒性，但难以组合成更高阶实体。同时通过类型化λ演算证明了该模型与化学反应网络之间的形式化联系。
AI.motivation: 探索复杂适应系统（如生命）如何从简单组成部分涌现出来，重新审视过去三十年被忽视的AlChemy模型，利用现代计算资源检验其原始结果的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于λ演算的形式化计算模型，复现原始实验并使用更大计算资源进行稳健性分析；研究随机表达式生成器对初始分布的影响；通过类型化λ演算提供构造性证明，建立与化学反应网络的联系。
AI.result: 复杂稳定组织出现频率高于预期；这些组织对坍缩为平凡不动点具有鲁棒性；但稳定组织难以组合为更高阶实体；随机生成器的选择对结果有显著影响；类型化λ演算扩展可模拟任意化学反应网络的状态转换。
AI.conclusion: AlChemy模型展示了动态鲁棒性与脆弱性的意外混合，为理解自组织现象提供了新视角，并在现代编程语言自组织与生命起源定量研究中有潜在应用。

title: Inverse stochastic resonance in adaptive small-world neural networks
summary: Inverse stochastic resonance (ISR) is a phenomenon where noise reduces rather than increases the firing rate of a neuron, sometimes leading to complete quiescence. ISR was first experimentally verified with cerebellar Purkinje neurons. These experiments showed that ISR enables optimal information transfer between the input and output spike train of neurons. Subsequent studies demonstrated the efficiency of information processing and transfer in neural networks with small-world topology. We conducted a numerical investigation into the impact of adaptivity on ISR in a small-world network of noisy FitzHugh-Nagumo (FHN) neurons, operating in a bistable regime with a stable fixed point and a limit cycle -- a prerequisite for ISR. Our results show that the degree of ISR is highly dependent on the FHN model's timescale separation parameter $ε$. The network structure undergoes dynamic adaptation via mechanisms of either spike-time-dependent plasticity (STDP) with potentiation-/depression-domination parameter $P$, or homeostatic structural plasticity (HSP) with rewiring frequency $F$. We demonstrate that both STDP and HSP amplify ISR when $ε$ lies within the bistability region of FHN neurons. Specifically, at larger values of $ε$ within the bistability regime, higher rewiring frequencies $F$ enhance ISR at intermediate (weak) synaptic noise intensities, while values of $P$ consistent with depression-domination (potentiation-domination) enhance (deteriorate) ISR. Moreover, although STDP and HSP parameters may jointly enhance ISR, $P$ has a greater impact on ISR compared to $F$. Our findings inform future ISR enhancement strategies in noisy artificial neural circuits, aiming to optimize information transfer between input and output spike trains in neuromorphic systems, and prompt venues for experiments in neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自适应机制（STDP和HSP）对噪声诱导的小世界网络FitzHugh-Nagumo神经元中逆随机共振（ISR）的影响。结果表明，两种可塑性机制均能在特定时间尺度分离参数ε下增强ISR，其中STDP的增强/抑制主导参数P比HSP的重新连接频率F对ISR的影响更大。
AI.motivation: 逆随机共振（ISR）已被实验证实存在于小脑浦肯野神经元中，并能够优化信息传递效率。然而，网络自适应机制（如STDP和HSP）如何影响ISR尚不明确，理解这一关系对于在神经形态系统中优化信息传递至关重要。
AI.method: 采用数值模拟方法，在双稳态（稳定不动点和极限环共存）的小世界网络中对带噪声的FitzHugh-Nagumo（FHN）神经元进行建模，分别引入基于脉冲时间依赖的可塑性（STDP，参数P控制增强/抑制主导）和稳态结构可塑性（HSP，参数F控制重连频率），系统研究了不同时间尺度分离参数ε下ISR的变化规律。
AI.result: 1) ISR的程度高度依赖于FHN模型的时间尺度分离参数ε；2) 在FHN神经元处于双稳态区域的ε取值下，STDP和HSP均能增强ISR；3) 在双稳态区域内较大的ε下，较高的重连频率F在中等（弱）突触噪声强度下增强ISR，而抑制主导的P值增强ISR、增强主导的P值削弱ISR；4) 尽管STDP和HSP参数可联合增强ISR，但P对ISR的影响大于F。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了自适应可塑性机制增强ISR的条件与规律，为在噪声人工神经回路中设计ISR增强策略、优化神经形态系统中输入-输出脉冲序列间的信息传递提供了理论指导，并启发后续在神经网络中进行实验验证。

title: Towards an asymptotic analysis of the anisotropic Ginzburg-Landau model
summary: We develop a set of tools for the asymptotic analysis of minimizers of the anisotropic Ginzburg-Landau functional among the admissible competitors with Dirichlet boundary datum of negative degree.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有负度Dirichlet边界数据的各向异性Ginzburg-Landau泛函，建立了一套用于极小元渐近分析的工具。
AI.motivation: 研究各向异性Ginzburg-Landau泛函在负度Dirichlet边界条件下的极小元渐近行为，填补该领域理论工具的空白。
AI.method: 开发一套渐近分析工具，用于分析各向异性Ginzburg-Landau泛函在负度Dirichlet边界数据下可容许竞争函数中极小元的渐近性质。
AI.result: 建立了一套可用于分析负度边界条件下各向异性Ginzburg-Landau泛函极小元渐近行为的工具集。
AI.conclusion: 本文所发展的工具为各向异性Ginzburg-Landau模型在负拓扑度边界条件下的渐近分析提供了理论框架。

title: The Classification of Rigid Torus Quotients with Canonical Singularities in Dimension Three
comment: 26 pages, MAGMA code on personal homepage
summary: We provide a fine classification of rigid three-dimensional torus quotients with isolated canonical singularities, up to biholomorphism and diffeomorphism. This complements the classification of Calabi-Yau 3-folds of type $\rm{III}_0$, which are those quotients with Gorenstein singularities.

AI.tldr: 本文对具有孤立规范奇点的刚性三维环面商空间进行了精细分类，分别从双全纯同构和微分同构的角度进行分类，补充了III₀型Calabi-Yau 3-流形的分类结果。
AI.motivation: 对具有孤立规范奇点的刚性三维环面商空间进行精细分类，以补充已有关于Gorenstein奇点的III₀型Calabi-Yau 3-流形的分类工作。
AI.method: 采用精细分类的方法，从双全纯同构和微分同构两个等价关系出发，对具有孤立规范奇点的刚性三维环面商空间进行分类。
AI.result: 得到了具有孤立规范奇点的刚性三维环面商空间在双全纯同构和微分同构下的精细分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 该分类结果补充并完善了III₀型Calabi-Yau 3-流形的分类体系。

title: Kawaguchi-Silverman conjecture for int-amplified endomorphism
summary: Let $X$ be a $\mathbb{Q}$-factorial klt projective variety admitting an int-amplified endomorphism $f$, i.e., the modulus of any eigenvalue of $f^*|_{\text{NS}(X)}$ is greater than $1$. We prove Kawaguchi-Silverman conjecture for $f$ and also any other surjective endomorphism of $X$: the first dynamical degree equals the arithmetic degree of any point with Zariski dense orbit. This generalizes an early result of Kawaguchi and Silverman for the polarized $f$ case, i.e., $f^*|_{\text{NS}(X)}$ is diagonalizable with all eigenvalues of the same modulus greater than $1$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了对于具有内放大自同态的Q-析因klt射影簇X，Kawaguchi-Silverman猜想成立：任何具有Zariski稠密轨道的点的第一动力学度等于算术度。这推广了Kawaguchi和Silverman关于极化情形的早期结果。
AI.motivation: 内放大自同态是比极化自同态更广泛的一类映射，Kawaguchi-Silverman猜想在极化情形已被证明，但更一般的内放大情形尚未解决。本文旨在将这一猜想推广到内放大自同态情形。
AI.method: 利用内放大自同态的性质（f^*|_{NS(X)}的所有特征值模长大于1）以及代数几何中的技巧，通过分析自同态在Néron-Severi群上的作用来建立动力学度与算术度的关系。
AI.result: 证明了对于Q-析因klt射影簇X上的内放大自同态f以及X上的任何其他满射自同态，Kawaguchi-Silverman猜想成立：第一动力学度等于任何具有Zariski稠密轨道的点的算术度。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Kawaguchi-Silverman猜想从极化自同态情形推广到更一般的内放大自同态情形，深化了算术动力学与代数几何交叉领域的理论认识。

title: A strongly degenerate fully nonlinear mean field game with nonlocal diffusion
comment: Earlier version of arXiv:2104.06985 has been split into two articles. The latest version of arXiv:2104.06985 is now the first part and this article is the second part
summary: There are few results on mean field game (MFG) systems where the PDEs are either fully nonlinear or have degenerate diffusions. This paper introduces a problem that combines both difficulties. We prove existence and uniqueness for a strongly degenerate, fully nonlinear MFG system by using the well-posedness theory for fully nonlinear MFGs established in our previous paper. It is the first such application in a degenerate setting. Our MFG involves a controlled pure jump (nonlocal) Lévy diffusion of order less than one, and monotone, smoothing couplings. The key difficulty is obtaining uniqueness for the corresponding degenerate, non-smooth Fokker-Plank equation: since the regularity of the coefficient and the order of the diffusion are interdependent, it holds when the order is sufficiently low. Viscosity solutions and a non-standard doubling of variables argument are used along with a bootstrapping procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文针对同时具有完全非线性和退化扩散的均值场博弈（MFG）系统，证明了强退化、完全非线性MFG系统的解的存在唯一性。这是首次在退化设定下应用完全非线性MFG的适定性理论。该MFG涉及阶数低于1的受控纯跳跃（非局部）Lévy扩散，以及单调、光滑的耦合。关键难点在于获得对应退化、非光滑Fokker-Plank方程的唯一性：由于系数正则性与扩散阶数相互依赖，唯一性在阶数足够低时成立。方法上使用了粘性解、非标准变元对偶论证和自举程序。
AI.motivation: 现有均值场博弈（MFG）系统中，PDE为完全非线性或具有退化扩散的结果很少。本文旨在引入并解决一个同时包含这两种困难的MFG问题，填补该领域的空白。
AI.method: 利用作者先前建立的完全非线性MFG适定性理论，通过粘性解、非标准变元对偶论证以及自举程序，处理受控纯跳跃（非局部）Lévy扩散（阶数低于1）和单调光滑耦合的强退化完全非线性MFG系统。关键步骤是在扩散阶数足够低时，证明对应退化非光滑Fokker-Plank方程的唯一性，其中系数正则性与扩散阶数相互依赖。
AI.result: 证明了强退化、完全非线性MFG系统解的存在唯一性，这是首次在退化设定下成功应用完全非线性MFG的适定性理论。
AI.conclusion: 在扩散阶数足够低的情况下，强退化完全非线性MFG系统的适定性问题可以解决，为未来研究更复杂的退化非线性MFG系统提供了理论基础和方法论参考。

title: Stationary solution to Stochastically Forced Euler-Poisson Equations in Bounded Domain: Part 1. 3-D Insulating Boundary
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2407.20104
summary: This paper is concerned with $3$-D stochastic Euler-Poisson equations with insulating boundary conditions forced by the Wiener process. We first establish the global existence and uniqueness of the solution to the system, then we prove that the solution converges to its steady-state time-asymptotically.
