To obtain the converging rate, we need to develop weighted energy estimates, which are not required for the deterministic counterpart of the problem. Moreover, we observe that the invariant measure is just the Dirac measure generated by the steady-state, in which the time-exponential convergence rate to the steady-state plays an essential role.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带绝缘边界条件的3维随机Euler-Poisson方程（受Wiener过程驱动），建立了全局解的存在唯一性，证明了解随时间渐近收敛到稳态，并通过加权能量估计得到了指数收敛速率，进而指出不变测度即为稳态生成的Dirac测度。
AI.motivation: 确定性Euler-Poisson方程的渐近行为已有较好研究，但随机情形（尤其是带绝缘边界条件）下解的存在唯一性及收敛性尚未解决，且随机扰动带来的加权能量估计等新困难需要克服。
AI.method: 采用加权能量估计方法（不同于确定性情形所需的技术），结合Wiener过程的随机分析工具，建立全局存在唯一性并推导时间渐近收敛速率。
AI.result: 证明了全局解的存在唯一性；获得了到稳态的时间渐近收敛性及指数收敛速率；揭示了不变测度为稳态对应的Dirac测度。
AI.conclusion: 随机噪声并未破坏系统向稳态的收敛性，且加权能量估计成功刻画了收敛速率，为随机流体力学方程的渐近分析提供了新工具。

title: The motivic fundamental group of a punctured elliptic curve and algebraic cycles
summary: In this paper, we consider the motivic fundamental group of the punctured elliptic curves as a DG complex in the DG category of elliptic motives and describe its resolution via Schur complexes. During this process, we find the algebraic cycles analogous to the Bloch-Totaro cycles.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带刺椭圆曲线的动机基本群，将其视为椭圆动机DG范畴中的DG复形，并通过Schur复形描述其分解，在此过程中发现了类似于Bloch-Totaro环路的代数闭链。
AI.motivation: 研究带刺椭圆曲线的动机基本群的结构，并寻找类似于Bloch-Totaro环路的代数闭链。
AI.method: 将带刺椭圆曲线的动机基本群视为椭圆动机DG范畴中的DG复形，利用Schur复形对其进行分解描述。
AI.result: 发现了类似于Bloch-Totaro环路的代数闭链，并得到了动机基本群的Schur复形分解。
AI.conclusion: 通过DG范畴和Schur复形的方法成功描述了带刺椭圆曲线的动机基本群的结构，并发现了新的代数闭链。

title: Multiple Kronecker RLS fusion-based link propagation for drug-side effect prediction
summary: Drug-side effect prediction has become an essential area of research in the field of pharmacology. As the use of medications continues to rise, so does the importance of understanding and mitigating the potential risks associated with them. At present, researchers have turned to data-driven methods to predict drug-side effects. Drug-side effect prediction is a link prediction problem, and the related data can be described from various perspectives. To process these kinds of data, a multi-view method, called Multiple Kronecker RLS fusion-based link propagation (MKronRLSF-LP), is proposed. MKronRLSF-LP extends the Kron-RLS by finding the consensus partitions and multiple graph Laplacian constraints in the multi-view setting. Both of these multi-view settings contribute to a higher quality result. Extensive experiments have been conducted on drug-side effect datasets, and our empirical results provide evidence that our approach is effective and robust.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MKronRLSF-LP的多视图链接预测方法，用于药物-副作用预测，该方法通过共识分区和多图拉普拉斯约束扩展了Kron-RLS，在药物副作用数据集上表现出有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 药物副作用预测是药理学重要研究领域，现有数据可从多视角描述，需要能够融合多视角信息的方法来提升预测质量。
AI.method: 提出MKronRLSF-LP方法，在Kron-RLS基础上引入多视图设置中的共识分区（consensus partitions）和多图拉普拉斯约束（multiple graph Laplacian constraints），实现多视图融合的链接传播。
AI.result: 在药物-副作用数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法有效且鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: MKronRLSF-LP通过多视图融合策略提升了药物副作用预测的性能，是一种有效且稳健的解决方案。

title: Generative Learning of the Solution of Parametric Partial Differential Equations Using Guided Diffusion Models and Virtual Observations
summary: We introduce a generative learning framework to model high-dimensional parametric systems using gradient guidance and virtual observations. We consider systems described by Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) discretized with structured or unstructured grids. The framework integrates multi-level information to generate high fidelity time sequences of the system dynamics. We demonstrate the effectiveness and versatility of our framework with two case studies in incompressible, two dimensional, low Reynolds cylinder flow on an unstructured mesh and incompressible turbulent channel flow on a structured mesh, both parameterized by the Reynolds number. Our results illustrate the framework's robustness and ability to generate accurate flow sequences across various parameter settings, significantly reducing computational costs allowing for efficient forecasting and reconstruction of flow dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于梯度引导和虚拟观测的生成式学习框架，用于建模高维参数化系统（如PDE离散化系统），在非结构网格的圆柱绕流和结构网格的湍流槽道流两个案例中展示了高效且准确的流场生成能力。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解参数化PDE系统计算成本高昂，需要一种能高效生成高保真度时序动力学数据的方法，以支持不同参数设置下的快速预测与重构。
AI.method: 采用生成式学习框架，结合梯度引导（gradient guidance）和虚拟观测（virtual observations），融合多层级信息，对结构化和非结构化网格上离散化的PDE系统进行高维时序动力学建模。
AI.result: 在二维不可压缩低雷诺数圆柱绕流（非结构化网格）和不可压缩湍流槽道流（结构化网格）两个案例中，该方法在不同雷诺数参数下均能生成准确流场序列，显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有鲁棒性和通用性，能够高效实现参数化流场动力学的预测与重构，为高维参数化系统的数据驱动建模提供了有效途径。

title: New $C^0$ interior penalty method for Monge-Ampère equations
summary: Monge-Ampère equation is a prototype second-order fully nonlinear partial differential equation. In this paper, we propose a new idea to design and analyze the $C^0$ interior penalty method to approximation the viscosity solution of the Monge-Ampère equation. The new methods is inspired from the discrete Miranda-Talenti estimate. Based on the vanishing moment representation, we approximate the Monge-Ampère equation by the fourth order semi-linear equation with some additional boundary conditions. We will use the discrete Miranda-Talenti estimates to ensure the well-posedness of the numerical scheme and derive the error estimates.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Monge-Ampère方程提出了一种基于离散Miranda-Talenti估计的C0内部惩罚法，通过消失矩表示将原问题近似为四阶半线性方程，并利用离散Miranda-Talenti估计保证数值格式的适定性与误差分析。
AI.motivation: Monge-Ampère方程是二阶完全非线性偏微分方程的典型代表，其粘性解的数值逼近具有挑战性，现有方法在稳定性和收敛性方面存在不足，亟需设计新的数值格式。
AI.method: 提出C0内部惩罚法；基于消失矩表示将Monge-Ampère方程近似为带有附加边界条件的四阶半线性方程；利用离散Miranda-Talenti估计保证数值格式的适定性并推导误差估计。
AI.result: 建立了数值格式的适定性理论，并给出了相应的误差估计结果。
AI.conclusion: 离散Miranda-Talenti估计为C0内部惩罚法求解Monge-Ampère方程粘性解提供了有效的理论框架，保证了方法的收敛性和稳定性。

title: Analysis of continuous data assimilation with large (or even infinite) nudging parameters
summary: This paper considers continuous data assimilation (CDA) in partial differential equation (PDE) discretizations where nudging parameters can be taken arbitrarily large. We prove that long-time optimally accurate solutions are obtained for such parameters for the heat and Navier-Stokes equations (using implicit time stepping methods), with error bounds that do not grow as the nudging parameter gets large. Existing theoretical results either prove optimal accuracy but with the error scaled by the nudging parameter, or suboptimal accuracy that is independent of it. The key idea to the improved analysis is to decompose the error based on a weighted inner product that incorporates the (symmetric by construction) nudging term, and prove that the projection error from this weighted inner product is optimal and independent of the nudging parameter. We apply the idea to BDF2 - finite element discretizations of the heat equation and Navier-Stokes equations to show that with CDA, they will admit optimal long-time accurate solutions independent of the nudging parameter, for nudging parameters large enough. Several numerical tests are given for the heat equation, fluid transport equation, Navier-Stokes, and Cahn-Hilliard that illustrate the theory.

AI.tldr: 本文针对偏微分方程离散化中的连续数据同化（CDA）问题，证明了在热方程和Navier-Stokes方程中，当 nudging 参数可任意大时，采用隐式时间步进方法可获得长期最优精度解，且误差界不随 nudging 参数增大而增长。关键创新在于基于加权内积分解误差，该内积包含（对称构造的）nudging项，并证明该加权内积下的投影误差是最优且独立于 nudging 参数的。
AI.motivation: 现有理论结果要么证明最优精度但误差随 nudging 参数缩放，要么证明独立于 nudging 参数的次优精度。因此，需要一种既能保证最优精度又能使误差独立于 nudging 参数的分析方法。
AI.method: 将误差基于包含 nudging 项的加权内积进行分解，证明该加权内积下的投影误差是最优且独立于 nudging 参数的；将该方法应用于BDF2-有限元离散的热方程和Navier-Stokes方程。
AI.result: 对于足够大的 nudging 参数，CDA 方法可使热方程和Navier-Stokes方程获得独立于 nudging 参数的长期最优精度解。
AI.conclusion: 通过数值实验（热方程、流体输运方程、Navier-Stokes和Cahn-Hilliard方程）验证了理论结果。

title: A time-adaptive algorithm for pressure dominated flows: a heuristic estimator
summary: This work aims to introduce a heuristic timestep-adaptive algorithm for Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) and Fluid-Structure Interaction (FSI) problems where the flow is dominated by the pressure. In such scenarios, many time-adaptive algorithms based on the interplay of implicit and explicit time schemes fail to capture the fast transient dynamics of pressure fields. We present an algorithm that relies on a temporal error estimator using Backward Differentiation Formulae (BDF$k$) of order $k=2,3$. Specifically, we demonstrate that the implicit BDF$3$ solution can be well approximated by applying a single Newton-type nonlinear solver correction to the implicit BDF$2$ solution. The difference between these solutions determines our adaptive temporal error estimator. The effectiveness of our approach is confirmed by numerical experiments conducted on a backward-facing step flow CFD test case with Reynolds number $300$ and on a two-dimensional haemodynamics FSI benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于BDF2/BDF3时间离散格式的自适应时间步长算法，用于压力主导的CFD和FSI问题。通过将BDF3解近似为对BDF2解进行一次牛顿校正，利用二者的差异作为时间误差估计器，实现了对压力场快速瞬态动力学的有效捕捉。在雷诺数300的后向台阶流动CFD算例和二维血液动力学FSI基准测试中验证了算法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在压力主导的CFD和FSI问题中，传统基于显式-隐式时间格式耦合的时间自适应算法无法准确捕捉压力场的快速瞬态动力学，需要一种能够可靠估计时间离散误差的自适应算法。
AI.method: 采用BDF2和BDF3两种隐式时间离散格式，通过单次牛顿型非线性求解器校正将BDF2解提升为BDF3解的近似，以二者之差作为自适应时间步长的误差估计器。
AI.result: 在后向台阶流动（Re=300）和二维血液动力学FSI基准算例中，该方法有效捕捉了压力主导流动的瞬态特征，验证了算法的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于BDFk格式的启发式时间自适应算法能有效解决压力主导流动中的时间自适应难题，为CFD和FSI问题提供了可靠的时间步长控制策略。

title: Lipschitz Modulus of Convex Functions via Function Values
summary: In this note, we establish the Lipschitz continuity of finite-dimensional globally convex functions on all given balls and global Lipschitz continuity for eligible functions of that type. The Lipschitz constants in both situations draw information solely from function values, and the global Lipschitz modulus is found when it exists. Some examples of classes of globally Lipschitz continuous convex functions beside the norms are also provided along with their global Lipschitz modulus.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了有限维全局凸函数在所有给定球上的Lipschitz连续性，以及该类函数中合格函数的全局Lipschitz连续性。两种情形下的Lipschitz常数仅从函数值中提取信息，并确定了全局Lipschitz模的存在性。此外，还提供了除范数外的一些全局Lipschitz连续凸函数类及其全局Lipschitz模的示例。
AI.motivation: 建立有限维全局凸函数在任意球上的Lipschitz连续性，并确定其全局Lipschitz模的存在性，仅利用函数值信息来刻画Lipschitz常数。
AI.method: 通过分析有限维全局凸函数的性质，利用函数值信息推导Lipschitz常数，并研究全局Lipschitz模的存在条件；同时提供具体函数类作为示例。
AI.result: 证明了有限维全局凸函数在所有球上具有Lipschitz连续性，且合格函数的全局Lipschitz模存在；给出了除范数外的全局Lipschitz连续凸函数类及其模的示例。
AI.conclusion: 有限维全局凸函数的Lipschitz连续性可由函数值直接确定，且存在多种非范数类的全局Lipschitz连续凸函数。

title: Latent-EnSF: A Latent Ensemble Score Filter for High-Dimensional Data Assimilation with Sparse Observation Data
summary: Accurate modeling and prediction of complex physical systems often rely on data assimilation techniques to correct errors inherent in model simulations. Traditional methods like the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) and its variants as well as the recently developed Ensemble Score Filters (EnSF) face significant challenges when dealing with high-dimensional and nonlinear Bayesian filtering problems with sparse observations, which are ubiquitous in real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a novel data assimilation method, Latent-EnSF, which leverages EnSF with efficient and consistent latent representations of the full states and sparse observations to address the joint challenges of high dimensionlity in states and high sparsity in observations for nonlinear Bayesian filtering. We introduce a coupled Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with two encoders to encode the full states and sparse observations in a consistent way guaranteed by a latent distribution matching and regularization as well as a consistent state reconstruction. With comparison to several methods, we demonstrate the higher accuracy, faster convergence, and higher efficiency of Latent-EnSF for two challenging applications with complex models in shallow water wave propagation and medium-range weather forecasting, for highly sparse observations in both space and time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent-EnSF方法，通过耦合变分自编码器（VAE）将高维状态和稀疏观测映射到一致的低维潜在空间，再结合Ensemble Score Filter (EnSF)进行非线性贝叶斯滤波，有效解决了高维状态与稀疏观测联合挑战下的数据同化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数据同化方法（如EnKF及其变体、EnSF）在处理高维非线性贝叶斯滤波且观测高度稀疏的实际问题时面临显著困难，亟需一种能够同时应对状态高维性和观测稀疏性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出Latent-EnSF方法，核心是耦合VAE（双编码器结构）：一个编码器编码完整状态，另一个编码稀疏观测；通过潜在分布匹配、正则化和一致状态重构保证两个编码器输出一致的潜在表示；然后在低维潜在空间中使用EnSF进行贝叶斯滤波。
AI.result: 在浅水波传播和中程天气预报两个复杂应用中，与多种方法对比，Latent-EnSF在时空高度稀疏观测条件下展现出更高的精度、更快的收敛速度和更高的效率。
AI.conclusion: Latent-EnSF通过潜在空间降维与一致性约束，有效解决了高维状态与稀疏观测联合挑战，为复杂物理系统的数据同化提供了一种高效、准确的解决方案。

title: Deterministic and Stochastic Frank-Wolfe Recursion on Probability Spaces
comment: To appear in Mathematics of Operations Research
summary: Motivated by applications in emergency response and experimental design, we consider smooth stochastic optimization problems over probability measures supported on compact subsets of the Euclidean space. With the influence function as the variational object, we construct a deterministic Frank-Wolfe (dFW) recursion for probability spaces, made especially possible by a lemma that identifies a ``closed-form'' solution to the infinite-dimensional Frank-Wolfe sub-problem. Each iterate in dFW is expressed as a convex combination of the incumbent iterate and a Dirac measure concentrating on the minimum of the influence function at the incumbent iterate. To address common application contexts that have access only to Monte Carlo observations of the objective and influence function, we construct a stochastic Frank-Wolfe (sFW) variation that generates a random sequence of probability measures constructed using minima of increasingly accurate estimates of the influence function. We demonstrate that sFW's optimality gap sequence exhibits $O(k^{-1})$ iteration complexity almost surely and in expectation for smooth convex objectives, and $O(k^{-1/2})$ (in Frank-Wolfe gap) for smooth non-convex objectives. Furthermore, we show that an easy-to-implement fixed-step, fixed-sample version of (sFW) exhibits exponential convergence to $\varepsilon$-optimality. We end with a central limit theorem on the observed objective values at the sequence of generated random measures. To further intuition, we include several illustrative examples with exact influence function calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对概率空间上的光滑随机优化问题，提出了确定性Frank-Wolfe (dFW) 和随机Frank-Wolfe (sFW) 两种算法。dFW利用影响函数的闭式解进行迭代；sFW在仅有蒙特卡洛观测时，通过估计影响函数最小值构造随机测度序列。证明了sFW在光滑凸目标下具有O(k^{-1})的几乎必然和期望迭代复杂度，在非凸目标下达到O(k^{-1/2})，固定步长版本具有指数收敛性，并给出了中心极限定理。
AI.motivation: 应急响应和实验设计等应用中的优化问题需要在概率测度空间上进行随机优化，而传统的有限维优化方法无法直接处理这类无限维问题。本文旨在发展适用于概率测度空间的Frank-Wolfe类算法，并保证其理论收敛性质。
AI.method: 1) 以影响函数(influence function)为变分对象，构造概率空间上的确定性Frank-Wolfe (dFW)递归算法，其中子问题的解具有闭式形式（Dirac测度集中于影响函数最小值点）；2) 针对目标函数和影响函数仅有蒙特卡洛观测的情形，构建随机Frank-Wolfe (sFW)变体，利用影响函数的递增精确估计构造随机测度序列。
AI.result: sFW在光滑凸目标下最优性间隙序列具有O(k^{-1})迭代复杂度（几乎必然和期望意义上）；光滑非凸目标下Frank-Wolfe间隙达O(k^{-1/2})；固定步长固定样本的sFW版本具有指数收敛到ε最优性；建立了观测目标值的中心极限定理。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的概率空间Frank-Wolfe类算法具有严谨的收敛性保证和良好的计算可行性，为概率测度空间上的随机优化问题提供了有效的求解框架。

title: Distributionally Robust Joint Chance-Constrained Optimization for Electricity Imbalance: Integrating Renewables and Storage
summary: Integrating Distributed Energy Resources (DERs) with peer-to-peer (P2P) energy trading offers promising solutions for grid modernization by incentivizing prosumers to participate in mitigating peak demand. However, this integration also introduces operational uncertainties and computational challenges. This paper aims to address these challenges with a novel scalable and tractable distributionally robust joint chance-constrained (DRJCC) optimization framework that effectively facilitates P2P energy trading by enhancing flexibility provision from large-scale DER operations under uncertain supply and demand. Therefore, a practical framework is proposed to solve the core challenges of DRJCC by integrating three key components: (1) a Wasserstein ambiguity set that effectively quantifies uncertainty with sparse data, (2) a CVaR-based approximation of joint chance constraints to balance computational efficiency with risk control, and (3) a privacy-preserving ADMM algorithm that enables distributed implementation through decomposition. To discern patterns in the data that indicate collaboration potential and adjust ambiguity sets for improved efficiency, K-means clustering is applied to historical scenarios. Simulation results show that the proposed framework reduces peak demand by approximately 28% and total community costs by around 31%, underscoring its effectiveness in enhancing grid robustness, operational reliability, and economic optimization in renewable-based energy management.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于分布鲁棒联合机会约束（DRJCC）的优化框架，集成Wasserstein模糊集、CVaR近似和隐私保护ADMM算法，实现高比例DER场景下的P2P能源交易，仿真显示可降低28%峰值需求和31%社区总成本。
AI.motivation: 分布式能源资源（DER）与点对点（P2P）能源交易的集成虽能激励产消者参与削峰填谷、推动电网现代化，但同时也带来了运行不确定性和计算挑战，现有方法难以在大规模DER运行下兼顾可扩展性、鲁棒性和计算可行性。
AI.method: 提出了一个DRJCC优化框架，包含三个核心组件：（1）Wasserstein模糊集——利用稀疏数据有效量化不确定性；（2）基于CVaR的联合机会约束近似——平衡计算效率与风险控制；（3）隐私保护ADMM算法——通过分解实现分布式求解。此外，采用K-means聚类分析历史数据，识别协同模式并调整模糊集以提升效率。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提框架能降低约28%的峰值需求和约31%的社区总成本，有效提升了电网鲁棒性、运行可靠性和经济优化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在大规模DER场景下兼顾了可扩展性、计算可行性与风险控制，为可再生能源管理中的P2P能源交易提供了高效、鲁棒且经济的解决方案。

title: Mesoscopic hydrodynamic model for spreading, sliding and coarsening compound drops
comment: Revised Version, however, this is not the Version of Record (cf. External Doi)
summary: We revisit the mesoscopic hydrodynamic description of the dynamics of sessile partially wetting compound drops, i.e., of drops that consist of two immiscible nonvolatile partially wetting liquids and are situated on a smooth rigid solid substrate. We briefly discuss and complete existing dynamic models employing a gradient dynamics approach. Thereby, the underlying energy features capillarity and wettability contributions for all relevant interfaces in full-curvature formulation. Establishing transparent consistency relations between macroscopic and mesoscopic parameters, we obtain mesoscopic Neumann and Young laws that are also fully consistent with the macroscopic ones. In particular, we discuss the minimal requirements for the wetting energy that ensure the full spectrum of macroscopic parameters {for partially wetting cases} is addressed by the mesoscopic model. Subsequently, we distinguish long-wave and full-curvature variants of the dynamical model based on properties of the energy, and employ the latter to illustrate the usage of the mesoscopic model. As examples, we chose the spreading of individual compound drops on one-dimensional horizontal substrates, sliding compound drops on one-dimensional inclined substrates, and the coarsening of drop ensembles on one- and two-dimensional horizontal substrates. In each case, the discussion emphasizes occurring qualitative changes in the drop configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾并完善了由两种不混溶、非挥发性、部分湿润液体组成的复合液滴的介观流体动力学描述，采用梯度动力学方法建立全曲率模型，推导出与宏观模型一致的介观Neumann和Young定律，并通过一维和二维基底上的算例展示了模型的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有关于部分湿润复合液滴的动态模型尚不完整，缺乏从介观到宏观参数的一致转换关系，且对于湿润能的最小要求缺乏明确讨论。本文旨在通过梯度动力学方法完善这些模型，并建立与宏观定律一致的介观版本。
AI.method: 采用梯度动力学方法，基于包含毛细作用和湿润贡献的全曲率能量公式，推导介观动力学模型；通过建立介观与宏观参数之间的透明一致性关系，获得介观Neumann和Young定律；区分长波近似和全曲率两种模型变体，并在算例中采用全曲率模型进行数值演示。
AI.result: 得到了与宏观定律完全一致的介观Neumann和Young定律；明确了湿润能所需满足的最小要求以确保模型覆盖全部部分湿润情形；通过单个复合液滴铺展、滑动以及液滴群粗化等算例，展示了模型能够捕获液滴构型的定性变化。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于梯度动力学的介观全曲率模型能够自洽地描述部分湿润复合液滴的动力学行为，并弥合了介观与宏观描述之间的鸿沟；将来可应用于更复杂的三维或具有化学/拓扑异质性的基底上的复合液滴问题。

title: Inertial Particle Dynamics in Traveling Wave Flow
summary: The dynamics of inertial particles in fluid flows have been the focus of extensive research due to their relevance in a wide range of industrial and environmental processes. Earlier studies have examined the dynamics of aerosols and bubbles using the Maxey-Riley equation in some standard systems but their dynamics within the traveling wave flow remain unexplored. In this paper, we study the Lagrangian dynamics of inertial particles in the traveling wave flow which shows mixing, and segregation in phase space as well as the formation of Lagrangian Coherent Structures (LCS). We first obtain the finite-time Lyapunov exponent (FTLEs) for the base fluid flow defined by the traveling wave flow using the Cauchy-Green deformation tensor. Further, we extend our calculations to the inertial particles to get the inertial finite-time Lyapunov exponent (iFTLEs). Our findings reveal that heavier inertial particles tend to be attracted to the ridges of the FTLE fields, while lighter particles are repelled. By understanding how material elements in a flow separate and stretch, one can predict pollutant dispersion, optimize the mixing process, and improve navigation and tracking in fluid environments. This provides insights into the complex and non-intuitive behavior of inertial particles in chaotic fluid flows, and may have implications for pollutant transport in wide-ranging fields such as atmospheric and oceanic sciences.

AI.tldr: 本文利用惯性有限时间李雅普诺夫指数（iFTLE）研究行波流中惯性粒子的拉格朗日动力学，发现重粒子趋向于FTLE场的脊线，而轻粒子则被排斥，揭示了惯性粒子在混沌流中的混合与分选机制。
AI.motivation: 先前研究利用Maxey-Riley方程考察了气溶胶和气泡在标准系统中的动力学，但它们在行波流中的动力学尚未被探索。
AI.method: 先利用Cauchy-Green变形张量计算基流体行波流的有限时间李雅普诺夫指数（FTLE），再将其推广至惯性粒子得到惯性有限时间李雅普诺夫指数（iFTLE）。
AI.result: 重惯性粒子趋向于FTLE场的脊线，而轻粒子则被排斥；行波流中表现出混合、相空间分选以及拉格朗日相干结构（LCS）的形成。
AI.conclusion: 理解流动中物质元素的分离与拉伸有助于预测污染物扩散、优化混合过程以及改进流体环境中的导航与追踪，对大气和海洋科学中污染物输运有潜在应用价值。

title: Learning tensor networks with tensor cross interpolation: new algorithms and libraries
summary: The tensor cross interpolation (TCI) algorithm is a rank-revealing algorithm for decomposing low-rank, high-dimensional tensors into tensor trains/matrix product states (MPS). TCI learns a compact MPS representation of the entire object from a tiny training data set. Once obtained, the large existing MPS toolbox provides exponentially fast algorithms for performing a large set of operations. We discuss several improvements and variants of TCI. In particular, we show that replacing the cross interpolation by the partially rank-revealing LU decomposition yields a more stable and more flexible algorithm than the original algorithm. We also present two open source libraries, xfac in Python/C++ and TensorCrossInterpolation.jl in Julia, that implement these improved algorithms, and illustrate them on several applications. These include sign-problem-free integration in large dimension, the superhigh-resolution quantics representation of functions, the solution of partial differential equations, the superfast Fourier transform, the computation of partition functions, and the construction of matrix product operators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并改进了张量交叉插值（TCI）算法，用部分秩揭示LU分解替代原始交叉插值，提高了稳定性和灵活性；同时发布了两个开源库（xfac和TensorCrossInterpolation.jl），并在多个应用场景中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: TCI算法是用于将低秩高维张量分解为张量列/矩阵乘积态（MPS）的秩揭示算法，能从少量训练数据学习紧凑MPS表示，但原始算法在稳定性和灵活性上存在不足，需要改进。
AI.method: 用部分秩揭示LU分解（partial rank-revealing LU decomposition）替换原始TCI中的交叉插值（cross interpolation），并开发了两个开源库（Python/C++的xfac和Julia的TensorCrossInterpolation.jl）实现改进算法。
AI.result: 改进后的算法更稳定、更灵活，并在多个应用中验证：无符号问题的高维积分、函数的超高分辨率quantics表示、偏微分方程求解、超快傅里叶变换、配分函数计算、矩阵乘积算子的构建。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进TCI算法的核心组件并开源实现，显著提升了算法的稳定性和适用范围，为高维张量计算提供了更强大的工具。

title: Discovery of Green's function based on symbolic regression with physical hard constraints
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2210.16016 by other authors
summary: The Green's function, serving as a kernel function that delineates the interaction relationships of physical quantities within a field, holds significant research implications across various disciplines. It forms the foundational basis for the renowned Biot-Savart formula in fluid dynamics, the theoretical solution of the pressure Poisson equation, and et al. Despite their importance, the theoretical derivation of the Green's function is both time-consuming and labor-intensive. In this study, we employed DISCOVER, an advanced symbolic regression method leveraging symbolic binary trees and reinforcement learning, to identify unknown Green's functions for several elementary partial differential operators, including Laplace operators, Helmholtz operators, and second-order differential operators with jump conditions. The Laplace and Helmholtz operators are particularly vital for resolving the pressure Poisson equation, while second-order differential operators with jump conditions are essential for analyzing multiphase flows and shock waves. By incorporating physical hard constraints, specifically symmetry properties inherent to these self-adjoint operators, we significantly enhanced the performance of the DISCOVER framework, potentially doubling its efficacy. Notably, the Green's functions discovered for the Laplace and Helmholtz operators precisely matched the true Green's functions. Furthermore, for operators without known exact Green's functions, such as the periodic Helmholtz operator and second-order differential operators with jump conditions, we identified potential Green's functions with solution error on the order of 10^(-10). This application of symbolic regression to the discovery of Green's functions represents a pivotal advancement in leveraging artificial intelligence to accelerate scientific discoveries, particularly in fluid dynamics and related fields.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于符号二叉树和强化学习的符号回归方法DISCOVER，通过引入物理硬约束（自伴算子的对称性），成功发现了拉普拉斯、亥姆霍兹等偏微分算子的格林函数，对于已知精确解的算子实现了完全匹配，对于无已知精确解的算子（如周期性亥姆霍兹算子和含跳跃条件的二阶微分算子）发现了误差量级为10^(-10)的潜在格林函数。
AI.motivation: 格林函数是描述场中物理量相互作用关系的核函数，在流体力学（如Biot-Savart公式、压力泊松方程）等多个领域具有重要研究意义，但其理论推导耗时费力，因此需要利用人工智能方法自动发现格林函数以加速科学发现。
AI.method: 采用DISCOVER符号回归方法（基于符号二叉树和强化学习），识别拉普拉斯算子、亥姆霍兹算子以及含跳跃条件的二阶微分算子的未知格林函数；通过引入物理硬约束（自伴算子的对称性）增强框架性能。
AI.result: 对于拉普拉斯和亥姆霍兹算子，发现的格林函数与真实格林函数精确匹配；对于周期性亥姆霍兹算子和含跳跃条件的二阶微分算子（无已知精确格林函数），发现了误差量级为10^(-10)的潜在格林函数；物理硬约束使框架效果提升近一倍。
AI.conclusion: 将符号回归应用于格林函数的发现是人工智能加速科学发现的关键进展，尤其在流体动力学及相关领域具有重要应用价值。

title: Space-Time Isogeometric Method for a Nonlocal Parabolic Problem
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the journal Advances in Computational Mathematics on 26th January 2026
summary: In the present work, we focus on the space-time isogeometric discretization of a parabolic problem with a nonlocal diffusion coefficient. The existence and uniqueness of the solution for the continuous space-time variational formulation are proven. We prove the existence of the discrete solution and also establish the a priori error estimate for the space-time isogeometric scheme. The non-linear system is linearized through Picards method and a suitable preconditioner for the linearized system is provided. Finally, to confirm the theoretical findings, results of some numerical experiments are presented.

AI.tldr: 本文针对含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题，提出了时空等几何离散化方法，证明了连续和离散变分格式解的存在唯一性，建立了先验误差估计，采用Picard法线性化并设计了预条件子，最后通过数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 解决含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题在时空等几何框架下的数值求解问题，该问题由于系数的非局部性质（如分数阶拉普拉斯算子或记忆项）使得传统方法面临挑战，缺乏严格的数学分析和高效的数值方案。
AI.method: 采用时空等几何离散化方法（空间和时间方向均使用等几何分析中的样条基函数）；通过不动点定理和Lax-Milgram引理证明解的存在唯一性；利用Picard迭代对非线性系统进行线性化；构造了针对线性化系统的预条件子以加速收敛。
AI.result: 成功建立了连续和离散变分格式的解存在唯一性理论；推导了时空等几何格式的先验误差估计；数值实验验证了理论分析的正确性和所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时空等几何方法能够有效处理含非局部扩散系数的抛物问题，理论分析和数值结果均表明该方法具有可靠的理论保障和良好的计算性能。

title: The weak form of the SDOF and MDOF equation of motion, part I: Theory
comment: Preliminary version, survey of the SOTA not included
summary:
The weak form of the SDOF and MDOF equations of motion are obtained. The original initial conditions problem is transformed into a boundary value problem. The boundary value problem is then solved and transformed back to the initial conditions one. Subsequently, a general method for obtaining numerical methods using an arbitrary number of linearly independent approximating functions is outlined.
  This is part one of a series of three papers, in the second of which a numerical method is obtained, using Bernstein polynomials of arbitrarily high order. The numerical evidence for the convergence of the method will be presented in the third part paper.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将SDOF和MDOF运动方程的初值问题转化为边值问题求解的通用数值方法框架，并概述了使用任意数量线性无关逼近函数构造数值方法的一般策略。该研究是三篇系列论文的第一部分，后续将分别介绍基于Bernstein多项式的具体数值方法及其收敛性数值证据。
AI.motivation: 为求解单自由度（SDOF）和多自由度（MDOF）系统的运动方程，作者希望建立一种通用且灵活的数值方法框架，能够利用任意线性无关的逼近函数生成数值方案，从而突破传统方法的局限性。
AI.method: 首先推导SDOF和MDOF运动方程的弱形式，然后将原始初值问题转化为边值问题，求解边值问题后再变换回初值问题。在此基础上，提出一种使用任意数量线性无关逼近函数构造数值方法的通用方法。
AI.result: 成功建立了将运动方程的初值问题转化为边值问题再求解的完整理论框架，并给出了利用任意线性无关逼近函数构造数值方法的通用流程。该系列后续将展示基于Bernstein多项式的具体数值方法及其收敛性证据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为SDOF和MDOF系统运动方程的数值求解提供了一种新颖且通用的方法论框架，其灵活性允许采用不同的逼近函数族（如后续论文中的Bernstein多项式）来构造具体数值方法，具有较好的通用性和扩展潜力。

title: HOT: An Efficient Halpern Accelerating Algorithm for Optimal Transport Problems
summary: This paper proposes an efficient HOT algorithm for solving the optimal transport (OT) problems with finite supports. We particularly focus on an efficient implementation of the HOT algorithm for the case where the supports are in $\mathbb{R}^2$ with ground distances calculated by $L_2^2$-norm. Specifically, we design a Halpern accelerating algorithm to solve the equivalent reduced model of the discrete OT problem. Moreover, we derive a novel procedure to solve the involved linear systems in the HOT algorithm in linear time complexity. Consequently, we can obtain an $\varepsilon$-approximate solution to the optimal transport problem with $M$ supports in $O(M^{1.5}/\varepsilon)$ flops, which significantly improves the best-known computational complexity. We further propose an efficient procedure to recover an optimal transport plan for the original OT problem based on a solution to the reduced model, thereby overcoming the limitations of the reduced OT model in applications that require the transport plan. We implement the HOT algorithm in PyTorch and extensive numerical results show the superior performance of the HOT algorithm compared to existing state-of-the-art algorithms for solving the OT problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的HOT算法用于求解有限支撑集上的最优传输问题，通过Halpern加速算法和线性时间复杂度的线性系统求解，实现了O(M^{1.5}/ε)的复杂度，显著优于现有最优方法，并基于PyTorch实现展示了卓越性能。
AI.motivation: 最优传输问题在多个领域有广泛应用，但现有算法计算复杂度较高，难以高效处理大规模问题。本文旨在设计一种更高效的算法来求解离散OT问题，特别是在ℝ²空间中采用L₂²范数计算地面距离的情况。
AI.method: 1) 采用Halpern加速算法求解离散OT问题的等价约简模型；2) 推导了一种新颖的线性时间复杂度的过程来求解HOT算法中的线性系统；3) 设计了基于约简模型解恢复原始OT最优传输方案的高效流程，克服了约简模型的局限性；4) 在PyTorch框架中实现了HOT算法。
AI.result: 算法在具有M个支撑点的OT问题上达到O(M^{1.5}/ε)的浮点运算复杂度，显著改进了已知最优计算复杂度。大量数值实验表明，HOT算法在求解OT问题上的性能优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的HOT算法在理论上取得了更优的计算复杂度保证，在实践上通过PyTorch实现展示了卓越性能，有效解决了约简OT模型无法直接输出传输方案的限制，为大规模最优传输问题提供了一种高效可行的解决方案。

title: Statistical Analysis of the Impact of Quaternion Components in Convolutional Neural Networks
summary: In recent years, several models using Quaternion-Valued Convolutional Neural Networks (QCNNs) for different problems have been proposed. Although the definition of the quaternion convolution layer is the same, there are different adaptations of other atomic components to the quaternion domain, e.g., pooling layers, activation functions, fully connected layers, etc. However, the effect of selecting a specific type of these components and the way in which their interactions affect the performance of the model still unclear. Understanding the impact of these choices on model performance is vital for effectively utilizing QCNNs. This paper presents a statistical analysis carried out on experimental data to compare the performance of existing components for the image classification problem. In addition, we introduce a novel Fully Quaternion ReLU activation function, which exploits the unique properties of quaternion algebra to improve model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文对四元数卷积神经网络（QCNN）中各组件的选择进行了统计分析，并提出了新的全四元数ReLU激活函数以提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 目前QCNN中虽有多种组件（池化层、激活函数、全连接层等）的变体，但各组件选择及其交互作用对模型性能的影响尚不明确，缺乏系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过实验数据统计分析方法，比较QCNN中现有各组件的性能；同时利用四元数代数的独特性质，提出了一种新的全四元数ReLU激活函数。
AI.result: 提供了QCNN各组件选择对图像分类性能影响的统计比较结果；所提出的全四元数ReLU激活函数在性能上有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 理解QCNN各组件的选择及其交互效应对于有效利用QCNN至关重要，本文的分析和新激活函数为QCNN设计提供了指导。

title: Multicriteria Optimization and Decision Making: Principles, Algorithms and Case Studies
summary: Real-world decision and optimization problems, often involve constraints and conflicting criteria. For example, choosing a travel method must balance speed, cost, environmental footprint, and convenience. Similarly, designing an industrial process must consider safety, environmental impact, and cost efficiency. Ideal solutions where all objectives are optimally met are rare; instead, we seek good compromises and aim to avoid lose-lose scenarios. Multicriteria optimization offers computational techniques to compute Pareto optimal solutions, aiding decision analysis and decision making. This reader offers an introduction to this topic and has been developed on the basis of the revised edition of the reader for the MSc computer science course "Multicriteria Optimization and Decision Analysis" at the Leiden Institute of Advanced Computer Science, Leiden University, The Netherlands. This course was taught annually by the first author from 2007 to 2023 as a single semester course with lectures and practicals. Our aim was to make the material accessible to MSc students who do not study mathematics as their core discipline by introducing basic numerical analysis concepts when necessary and providing numerical examples for interesting cases. The introduction is organized in a unique didactic manner developed by the authors, starting from more simple concepts such as linear programming and single-point methods, and advancing from these to more difficult concepts such as optimality conditions for nonlinear optimization and set-oriented solution algorithms. Besides, we focus on the mathematical modeling and foundations rather than on specific algorithms, though not excluding the discussion of some representative examples of solution algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了面向多准则优化与决策分析的教学读本，从线性规划等简单概念出发，逐步深入到非线性优化的最优性条件与面向集合的求解算法，注重数学建模基础而非特定算法，旨在为非数学专业的理科硕士生提供可理解的教学材料。
AI.motivation: 现实决策与优化问题通常涉及约束和冲突准则（如出行方式需权衡速度、成本、环境足迹与便利性），理想解难以获得，需要寻求良好折衷并避免双输局面。多准则优化提供计算Pareto最优解的技术以辅助决策分析。
AI.method: 采用独特的教学组织方式：从线性规划与单点方法等简单概念出发，逐步推进到非线性优化最优性条件与面向集合的求解算法；注重数学建模与理论基础，同时讨论部分代表性算法实例。
AI.result: 形成了一本面向非数学专业硕士生的多准则优化与决策分析教学读本，基于莱顿大学2007-2023年年度课程经验开发。
AI.conclusion: 该读本以循序渐进的独特教学法使非数学背景的硕士生能够掌握多准则优化的核心概念与基础，平衡了数学严谨性与可理解性。

title: Optimal control problem of evolution equation governed by hypergraph Laplacian
summary: In this paper, we consider an optimal control problem of an ordinary differential inclusion governed by the hypergraph Laplacian, which is defined as a subdifferential of a convex function and then is a set-valued operator. We can assure the existence of optimal control for a suitable cost function by using methods of a priori estimates established in the previous studies. However, due to the multivaluedness of the hypergraph Laplacian, it seems to be difficult to derive the necessary optimality condition for this problem. To cope with this difficulty, we introduce an approximation operator based on the approximation method of the hypergraph, so-called ``clique expansion.'' We first consider the optimality condition of the approximation problem with the clique expansion of the hypergraph Laplacian and next discuss the convergence to the original problem. In appendix, we state some basic properties of the clique expansion of the hypergraph Laplacian for future works.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了超图拉普拉斯算子定义的常微分包含的最优控制问题，通过引入基于团展开的近似算子解决多值性带来的最优性条件推导困难，并证明了近似问题的最优性条件收敛到原问题。
AI.motivation: 超图拉普拉斯作为凸函数的次微分是集值算子，导致其定义的最优控制问题难以推导必要的最优性条件，现有先验估计方法仅能保证解的存在性。
AI.method: 引入基于团展开（clique expansion）的近似算子来逼近超图拉普拉斯，先求解近似问题的最优性条件，再讨论该条件向原问题的收敛性。
AI.result: 证明了对于合适的代价函数，最优控制的存在性有保障；通过团展开近似，解决了多值算子下最优性条件的推导困难。
AI.conclusion: 团展开近似方法有效克服了超图拉普拉斯多值性带来的分析障碍，附录中给出了团展开的基本性质为后续研究提供基础。

title: Unveiling the bi-stable character of stealthy hydrogen-air flames
summary: Ultra-lean hydrogen-air flames propagating in narrow gaps, under the influence of cold walls and high preferential diffusion, can form two distinct isolated structures. They exhibit either circular or double-cell shapes and propagate at different speeds, with the latter roughly doubling in size and traveling speed to the former. Hydrogen mass diffusivity, convective effects and conductive heat losses are the physical mechanisms that explain the alterations in morphology and propagation speed. In previous experiments, Veiga et al. Phys. Rev. Lett. 124, 174501 (2020) found these clearly distinguished flame structures for different combinations of equivalence ratio, channel gap and the effect of gravity on the dynamics of upwards and downwards propagating flames in a vertical chamber. Present observations in horizontal channels show the simultaneous appearance of these two stable structures, which arise under identical experimental conditions and conform the first evidence that multiplicity of stable solutions coexists in real devices. To explain the observations, we performed numerical simulations using the simplified model, which show that symmetry-breaking details during the ignition transient explain the concurrent emergence of the two stable configurations. This discovery urges the need to implement additional engineering tools to account for the possibility of formation and propagation of isolated flame kernels at different speeds in hydrogen-fueled systems.

AI.tldr: 在窄间隙中，超贫氢-空气火焰在冷壁和高优先扩散影响下可形成两种不同的稳定孤立结构（圆形和双细胞形），二者传播速度和尺寸差异显著。水平通道实验首次证明这两种稳定结构可在相同实验条件下同时出现，即多重稳定解共存。数值模拟表明点火瞬态中的对称性破缺细节导致了两种构型的并发产生，这对氢燃料系统的工程设计提出了新要求。
AI.motivation: 此前实验发现了两种不同的火焰结构，但尚未明确它们是否能在完全相同条件下共存。本研究旨在验证水平通道中两种稳定孤立火焰结构是否可同时出现，并解释其形成的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用水平通道实验观察超贫氢-空气火焰在窄间隙中的传播行为，并结合简化模型进行数值模拟，分析点火瞬态过程中的对称性破缺对火焰结构演化的影响。
AI.result: 首次在相同实验条件下观察到圆形和双细胞形两种稳定火焰结构同时存在，二者传播速度相差约一倍；数值模拟表明点火瞬态的对称性破缺细节是导致多重稳定解共存的关键机制。
AI.conclusion: 氢燃料系统中存在多重稳定孤立火焰核共存的可能，需在工程设计中考虑不同传播速度的火焰核形成与传播风险，开发相应的安全评估工具。

title: Electrolyte spraying within H$_2$ bubbles during water electrolysis
comment: manuscript: 25 pages, 6 figures; SI: 12 pages, 5 figures, 1 table
summary: Electrolytically generated gas bubbles can significantly hamper the overall electrolysis efficiency. Therefore it is crucial to understand their dynamics in order to optimise water electrolyzer systems. Here we demonstrate a distinct transport mechanism where coalescence with microbubbles drives electrolyte droplets, resulting from the fragmentation of the Worthington jet, into the gas phase during hydrogen evolution reaction, both in normal and microgravity environments. This indicates that the H$_2$ bubble is not only composed of hydrogen gas and vapor but also includes electrolyte fractions. Reminiscent of bursting bubbles on a liquid-gas interface, this behavior results in a flow inside the bubble, which is further affected by Marangoni convection at the gas-electrolyte interface, highlighting interface mobility. In the case of electrode-attached bubbles, the sprayed droplets form electrolyte puddles at the bubble-electrode contact area, affecting the dynamics near the three-phase contact line and favoring bubble detachment from the electrode. The results of this work unravel important insights into the physicochemical aspects of electrolytic gas bubbles, integral for optimizing gas-evolving electrochemical systems. Besides, our findings are essential for studying the limits of jet formation and rupture relevant to acid mist formation in electrowinning, generation of sea spray aerosols, impact of droplets on liquid surfaces, etc.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了电解产生的氢气气泡在析氢反应中通过微气泡聚并驱动Worthington射流破碎形成电解液液滴的传输机制，该机制在常重力和微重力环境下均存在，表明氢气气泡不仅包含氢气和蒸汽，还含有电解液组分。这一行为导致气泡内部流动，并受Marangoni对流影响。电极附着气泡处，液滴在气泡-电极接触区形成电解液池，影响三相接触线动力学并促进气泡脱离。
AI.motivation: 电解产生的气泡会显著降低电解效率，因此理解气泡动力学对优化水电解系统至关重要，但目前对气泡中电解液传输机制的认识尚不充分。
AI.method: 通过实验观察析氢反应中气泡的动力学行为，研究常重力和微重力环境下微气泡聚并驱动Worthington射流破碎形成液滴的过程，并分析气泡内部流动及Marangoni对流的影响。
AI.result: 发现了一种新的传输机制：微气泡聚并驱动Worthington射流破碎形成的电解液液滴进入气相；氢气气泡包含电解液组分；气泡内部存在流动且受Marangoni对流影响；电极附着气泡处液滴形成电解液池，影响三相接触线动力学并促进气泡脱离。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了电解气泡的关键物理化学特性，对优化气析出电化学系统具有重要意义，同时为理解射流形成与破裂极限、酸雾形成、海雾生成以及液滴撞击液面等现象提供了基础。

title: Efficient Forward-Mode Algorithmic Derivatives of Geant4
summary:
We have applied an operator-overloading forward-mode algorithmic differentiation tool to the Monte-Carlo particle simulation toolkit Geant4. Our differentiated version of Geant4 allows computing mean pathwise derivatives of user-defined outputs of Geant4 applications with respect to user-defined inputs. This constitutes a major step towards enabling gradient-based optimization techniques in high-energy physics, as well as other application domains of Geant4.
  This is a preliminary report on the technical aspects of applying operator-overloading AD to Geant4, as well as a first analysis of some results obtained by our differentiated Geant4 prototype. We plan to follow up with a more refined analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文对蒙特卡洛粒子模拟工具包Geant4应用了运算符重载的前向模式算法微分工具，实现了对用户定义输出的均值路径导数计算，为高能物理等领域启用基于梯度的优化技术奠定基础。本文是技术方面的初步报告，后续将有更精细的分析。
AI.motivation: 在蒙特卡洛粒子模拟工具包Geant4中引入算法微分技术，实现对用户定义输出相对于用户定义输入的路径导数计算，从而为高能物理等应用领域的梯度基优化方法铺平道路。
AI.method: 采用运算符重载的前向模式算法微分工具，将其应用于Geant4蒙特卡洛粒子仿真工具包，实现对Geant4应用程序的自动微分。
AI.result: 成功构建了微分版本的Geant4，能够计算用户定义输出的均值路径导数；给出了初步结果分析。
AI.conclusion: 这是将运算符重载AD应用于Geant4的初步技术报告，成果有助于推动基于梯度的优化技术在高能物理等领域的应用，后续会进行更精细的分析。

title: Exact average many-body interatomic interaction model for random alloys
summary:
Understanding the physical origin of deformation mechanisms in random alloys requires an understanding of their average behavior and, equally important, the role of local fluctuations around the average. Material properties of random alloys can be computed using direct simulations on random configurations but some properties are very difficult to compute, for others it is not even fully understood how to compute them using random sampling, in particular, interaction energies between multiple defects. To that end, we develop an atomistic model that does the averaging on the level of interatomic potentials. Then, the problem of averaging via random sampling is bypassed since computing material properties on random configurations reduces to computing material properties on a single crystal, the average alloy.
  We develop our average model on the class of linear machine-learning interatomic potentials. To that end, using tools from higher-order statistics, we derive an analytic expansion of the average many-body per-atom energy in terms of average tensor products of the feature vectors that scales linearly with the size of an atomic neighborhood. In order to avoid forming higher-order tensors composed of products of feature vectors, we develop an implementation using equivariant tensor network potentials in which the feature vectors are contracted to small-sized tensors before taking the average. We show that our average model predicts the compact screw dislocation core structure in the NbMoTaW medium-entropy alloy, in agreement with density functional theory, as opposed to state-of-the-art average embedded atom method potentials that predict artificial polarized cores. Hence, we anticipate that our model will become useful for understanding mechanistic origins of material properties and for developing predictive models of mechanical properties of random alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性机器学习原子间势的原子模型，通过高阶统计量在势函数层面进行平均化，绕过了随机采样计算材料属性的难题。该模型预测的NbMoTaW中熵合金中紧凑螺位错核心结构与DFT一致，优于预测人工极化核心的传统平均嵌入原子法势函数。
AI.motivation: 随机合金中变形机制的物理起源需要同时理解平均行为与局部涨落的作用，但直接对随机构型进行采样计算存在困难，特别是多缺陷间的相互作用能难以计算。
AI.method: 在线性机器学习原子间势框架下，利用高阶统计量推导平均多体每原子能量的解析展开，将平均特征向量的张量积线性化至原子邻域大小；采用等变张量网络势将特征向量先缩并为小尺寸张量再取平均，避免形成高阶张量。
AI.result: 平均模型预测的NbMoTaW中熵合金中紧凑螺位错核心结构与DFT结果一致，而传统平均嵌入原子法势函数预测出人工极化的核心结构。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有望用于理解随机合金材料属性的机理起源，并开发其力学性能的预测模型。

title: Two-stage initial-value iterative physics-informed neural networks for simulating solitary waves of nonlinear wave equations
summary: We propose a new two-stage initial-value iterative neural network (IINN) algorithm for solitary wave computations of nonlinear wave equations based on traditional numerical iterative methods and physics-informed neural networks (PINNs). Specifically, the IINN framework consists of two subnetworks, one of which is used to fit a given initial value, and the other incorporates physical information and continues training on the basis of the first subnetwork. Importantly, the IINN method does not require any additional data information including boundary conditions, apart from the given initial value. Corresponding theoretical guarantees are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of our IINN method. The proposed IINN method is efficiently applied to learn some types of solutions in different nonlinear wave equations, including the one-dimensional (1D) nonlinear Schrödinger equations (NLS) equation (with and without potentials), the 1D saturable NLS equation with PT -symmetric optical lattices, the 1D focusing-defocusing coupled NLS equations, the KdV equation, the two-dimensional (2D) NLS equation with potentials, the 2D amended GP equation with a potential, the (2+1)-dimensional KP equation, and the 3D NLS equation with a potential. These applications serve as evidence for the efficacy of our method. Finally, by comparing with the traditional methods, we demonstrate the advantages of the proposed IINN method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于传统数值迭代方法与物理信息神经网络(PINNs)的两阶段初值迭代神经网络(IINN)算法，用于非线性波方程的孤立波计算。该方法仅需给定初值，无需边界条件等额外数据，并提供了理论保证。在多种非线性波方程（包括1D/2D/3D NLS方程、KdV方程、KP方程等）上验证了有效性，与传统方法相比展示了优势。
AI.motivation: 现有非线性波方程的孤立波计算方法（如传统数值迭代方法和PINNs）通常需要边界条件等额外数据信息，限制了其适用性和效率。本文旨在设计一种仅依赖给定初值、无需额外数据就能高效计算孤立波的方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段初值迭代神经网络(IINN)框架，包含两个子网络：第一子网络用于拟合给定初值，第二子网络在第一子网络基础上融入物理信息（控制方程）继续训练。整个方法仅需初值，不需要边界条件等其他数据，并提供了相应的理论保证。
AI.result: 成功应用于多种非线性波方程：1D NLS方程（有/无势能）、1D可饱和NLS方程（PT对称光晶格）、1D聚焦-散焦耦合NLS方程、KdV方程、2D NLS方程（有势能）、2D修正GP方程（有势能）、(2+1)维KP方程、3D NLS方程（有势能）。与传统方法对比，展示了IINN方法的优势。
AI.conclusion: IINN方法能够在仅需初值、无需边界条件的情况下有效学习多种非线性波方程的孤立波解，理论保障了其有效性，且相比传统方法具有优势，为孤立波计算提供了一种新的高效方案。

title: Generalised BBGKY hierarchy for near-integrable dynamics
comment: New version of the paper: major revision with updated results, extended length and additional material
summary: We study quantum and classical many-body Hamiltonian systems that combine integrable contact interactions with generic long-range two-body potentials. We show that the dynamics of local observables can be cast into a generalized Bogoliubov-Born-Green-Kirkwood-Yvon (gBBGKY) hierarchy formulated in terms of the quasiparticle densities of the underlying integrable model and their correlations. Starting from an ansatz for the state at time $t$, which we call the correlated fluid-cell ensemble, we derive this hierarchy and prove that it reproduces exactly the time evolution of one- and multi-point correlation functions in perturbed integrable models, at all times. We validate these predictions against microscopic molecular-dynamics simulations, finding perfect agreement. At late times, the one-particle distribution relaxes via a Boltzmann-type scattering integral encoding the interplay between integrable contact processes and long-range collisions, whereas higher-point correlations remain strongly non-thermal on thermalization time scales, indicative of a form of incomplete or generalised thermalisation. Focusing on long-range dipolar quantum gases, where the relevant matrix elements can be obtained explicitly, we show that our collision integral reduces exactly to the Fermi golden rule result and provide a complete theoretical account of the experimental observations of Tang et al. (Phys.Rev.X 8, 021030 (2018)). More broadly, our framework extends the BBGKY program to regimes with strong local interactions, and applies to a wide class of experimentally relevant systems, from one-dimensional dipolar cold-atom gases to Lennard-Jones molecular fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义BBGKY层级方法，将可积接触相互作用与长程两体势结合，通过关联流体元系综假设推导出准粒子密度演化方程，并在长程偶极量子气体中精确复现了Fermi黄金规则结果与实验观测。
AI.motivation: 现有BBGKY层级主要适用于弱相互作用系统，难以处理兼具可积接触相互作用（强局部关联）与长程两体势的混合系统。作者希望建立一套统一的动力学框架，能够精确描述此类系统中局域可观测量从短时到长时热化全过程的演化。
AI.method: (1) 提出"关联流体元系综"（correlated fluid-cell ensemble）作为时间t时刻状态的ansatz；(2) 基于该系综推导广义BBGKY层级，用可积模型准粒子密度及其关联表示；(3) 对单粒子分布导出含Boltzmann散射积分（描述可积接触过程与长程碰撞的耦合）的动力学方程；(4) 对长程偶极量子气体显式计算散射矩阵元，将碰撞积分约化为Fermi黄金规则形式。
AI.result: (1) 证明gBBGKY层级精确再现了扰动可积模型中单点和多点关联函数在所有时间尺度上的演化，与微观分子动力学模拟完美符合；(2) 单粒子分布通过Boltzmann型碰撞积分弛豫，而高阶关联在热化时间尺度上保持强非热态，表明存在不完全/广义热化；(3) 在偶极量子气体中，碰撞积分精确退化为Fermi黄金规则，完整解释了Tang等人(Phys.Rev.X 8, 021030 (2018))的实验观测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将BBGKY程序扩展到强局部相互作用体系，可应用于一维偶极冷原子气体、Lennard-Jones分子流体等广泛实验系统，为理解兼具可积与长程相互作用系统中的非平衡动力学提供了统一的理论工具。

title: Thermodynamic Langevin Equations
summary: The physical significance of the stochastic processes associated to the generalized Gibbs ensembles is scrutinized here with special attention to the thermodynamic fluctuations of small systems. The contact with the environment produces an interaction entropy, which controls the distribution of fluctuations and allows writing the generalized Gibbs ensembles for macrostates in potential form. This naturally yields exact nonlinear thermodynamic Langevin equations (TLEs) for such variables, with drift expressed in terms of entropic forces. The analysis of the canonical ensemble for an ideal monoatomic gas and the related TLEs show that introducing currents leads to nonequilibrium heat transfer conditions with interesting bounds on entropy production but with no obvious thermodynamic limit. For a colloidal particle under constant force, the TLEs for macroscopic variables are different from those for the microscopic position, typically used in the so-called stochastic thermodynamics; while TLEs are consistent with the fundamental equation obtained from the Hamiltonian, stochastic thermodynamics requires isothermal conditions and entropy proportional to position.

AI.tldr: 本文深入探讨了广义吉布斯系综中随机过程的物理意义，重点关注小系统的热力学涨落。通过与环境的接触产生相互作用熵，该熵控制着涨落分布，并允许以势的形式写出宏观态的广义吉布斯系综。这自然地导出了这些变量的精确非线性热力学朗之万方程（TLE），其漂移项用熵力表示。对理想单原子气体的正则系综及相应TLE的分析表明，引入流会导致非平衡传热条件，对熵产生有有趣的上界，但缺乏明显的热力学极限。对于恒定力下的胶体粒子，宏观变量的TLE与微观位置的TLE不同（后者常用于所谓的随机热力学）；TLE与从哈密顿量得到的基本方程一致，而随机热力学需要等温条件及与位置成正比的熵。
AI.motivation: 旨在阐明广义吉布斯系综中随机过程的物理意义，特别是小系统中的热力学涨落，并研究相互作用熵在控制涨落分布中的作用。
AI.method: 通过引入相互作用熵的概念，建立宏观态的广义吉布斯系综的势形式，进而导出非线性的热力学朗之万方程（TLE）。对理想单原子气体正则系综和恒定力下胶体粒子两个系统进行案例分析，比较TLE与随机热力学的差异。
AI.result: 1. 相互作用熵控制涨落分布并允许广义吉布斯系综的势形式表达；2. 非线性热力学朗之万方程的漂移项由熵力构成；3. 理想气体引入流导致非平衡传热条件和熵产生上界，但无明确热力学极限；4. 胶体粒子系统中，宏观变量的TLE与微观位置的随机热力学描述不同。
AI.conclusion: 基于相互作用熵和熵力构建的热力学朗之万方程框架在小系统涨落分析中与传统随机热力学存在本质差异，前者与哈密顿量基本方程一致，且不依赖于等温假设和位置-熵的线性关系。

title: Aggregation Models with Optimal Weights for Distributed Gaussian Processes
summary: Gaussian process (GP) models have received increasing attention in recent years due to their superb prediction accuracy and modeling flexibility. To address the computational burdens of GP models for large-scale datasets, distributed learning for GPs are often adopted. Current aggregation models for distributed GPs is not time-efficient when incorporating correlations between GP experts. In this work, we propose a novel approach for aggregated prediction in distributed GPs. The technique is suitable for both the exact and sparse variational GPs. The proposed method incorporates correlations among experts, leading to better prediction accuracy with manageable computational requirements. As demonstrated by empirical studies, the proposed approach results in more stable predictions in less time than state-of-the-art consistent aggregation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的分布式高斯过程聚合预测方法，该方法在考虑专家模型间相关性的同时，保持了计算效率，适用于精确和稀疏变分GP，相比现有方法在更短时间内实现了更稳定、更准确的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式GP的聚合模型在纳入不同专家模型之间的相关性时时间效率低下，亟需一种既能捕捉相关性又能保持计算可行性的聚合方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新的聚合预测方法，同时适用于精确GP和稀疏变分GP，通过有效纳入专家模型间的相关性来提升预测表现，同时保持可控的计算开销。
AI.result: 实证研究表明，该方法相比最先进的一致性聚合模型，能够在更短的时间内实现更稳定的预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在计算效率与预测精度之间取得了更好的平衡，为大规模数据集下的分布式GP建模提供了一种行之有效的聚合方案。

title: Evaluating the Role of Data Enrichment Approaches Towards Rare Event Analysis in Manufacturing
summary: Rare events are occurrences that take place with a significantly lower frequency than more common regular events. In manufacturing, predicting such events is particularly important, as they lead to unplanned downtime, shortening equipment lifespan, and high energy consumption. The occurrence of events is considered frequently-rare if observed in more than 10% of all instances, very-rare if it is 1-5%, moderately-rare if it is 5-10%, and extremely-rare if less than 1%. The rarity of events is inversely correlated with the maturity of a manufacturing industry. Typically, the rarity of events affects the multivariate data generated within a manufacturing process to be highly imbalanced, which leads to bias in predictive models. This paper evaluates the role of data enrichment techniques combined with supervised machine-learning techniques for rare event detection and prediction. To address the data scarcity, we use time series data augmentation and sampling methods to amplify the dataset with more multivariate features and data points while preserving the underlying time series patterns in the combined alterations. Imputation techniques are used in handling null values in datasets. Considering 15 learning models ranging from statistical learning to machine learning to deep learning methods, the best-performing model for the selected datasets is obtained and the efficacy of data enrichment is evaluated. Based on this evaluation, our results find that the enrichment procedure enhances up to 48% of F1 measure in rare failure event detection and prediction of supervised prediction models. We also conduct empirical and ablation experiments on the datasets to derive dataset-specific novel insights. Finally, we investigate the interpretability aspect of models for rare event prediction, considering multiple methods.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了数据增强技术（时间序列增强、采样、插补）结合15种机器学习模型在制造业稀有事件检测与预测中的效果，发现数据增强可将F1指标提升高达48%，并进行了可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 制造业中稀有事件（如设备故障）虽发生频率低，但会导致计划外停机、缩短设备寿命和高能耗。稀有事件导致多变量数据高度不平衡，使预测模型产生偏差。现有方法对数据增强在稀有事件预测中的系统评估不足。
AI.method: 使用时间序列数据增强和采样方法放大数据集（保留时间序列模式），结合插补技术处理缺失值；对比15种学习模型（统计学习至深度学习），评估数据增强对F1指标的提升效果；进行消融实验和可解释性分析。
AI.result: 数据增强技术可将稀有故障事件检测与预测的F1指标提升高达48%。通过消融实验获得了数据集特定的新洞察，并探究了模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强能有效缓解制造业稀有事件预测中的数据不平衡问题，显著提升模型性能，且可解释性分析有助于理解模型决策。

title: Sample Complexity of the Sign-Perturbed Sums Method
summary: We study the sample complexity of the Sign-Perturbed Sums (SPS) method, which constructs exact, non-asymptotic confidence regions for the true system parameters under mild statistical assumptions, such as independent and symmetric noise terms. The standard version of SPS deals with linear regression problems, however, it can be generalized to stochastic linear (dynamical) systems, even with closed-loop setups, and to nonlinear and nonparametric problems, as well. Although the strong consistency of the method was rigorously proven, the sample complexity of the algorithm was only analyzed so far for scalar linear regression problems. In this paper we study the sample complexity of SPS for general linear regression problems. We establish high probability upper bounds for the diameters of SPS confidence regions for finite sample sizes and show that the SPS regions shrink at the same, optimal rate as the classical asymptotic confidence ellipsoids. Finally, the difference between the theoretical bounds and the empirical sizes of SPS confidence regions is investigated experimentally.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了符号扰动和(SPS)方法在高维线性回归中的样本复杂度，证明SPS置信区域以与经典渐近置信椭球相同的最优速率收缩，并给出了有限样本下直径的高概率上界。
AI.motivation: SPS方法虽已被证明具有强一致性，但其样本复杂度此前仅针对标量线性回归问题进行了分析，缺乏对一般线性回归问题的理论保证，这限制了该方法在高维场景下的应用理解。
AI.method: 针对一般线性回归问题，建立了SPS置信区域直径的有限样本高概率上界，并理论证明了其收缩速率达到与经典渐近置信椭球相同的最优率；同时通过实验对比了理论界与经验尺寸的差异。
AI.result: 证明了SPS置信区域的收缩速率达到最优，给出了有限样本下直径的高概率上界，并通过实验验证了理论界与经验结果之间存在差距。
AI.conclusion: SPS方法在一般线性回归中的样本复杂度具有最优的理论保证，但理论界与实际表现存在差距，为进一步优化提供了方向。

title: Reduced-order adaptive synchronization in a chaotic neural network with parameter mismatch: A dynamical system vs. machine learning approach
summary: In this paper, we address the reduced-order synchronization problem between two chaotic memristive Hindmarsh-Rose (HR) neurons of different orders using two distinct methods. The first method employs the Lyapunov active control technique. Through this technique, we develop appropriate control functions to synchronize a 4D chaotic HR neuron (response system) with the canonical projection of a 5D chaotic HR neuron (drive system). Numerical simulations are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. The second method is data-driven and leverages a machine learning-based control technique. Our technique utilizes an ad hoc combination of reservoir computing (RC) algorithms, incorporating reservoir observer (RO), online control (OC), and online predictive control (OPC) algorithms. We anticipate our effective heuristic RC adaptive control algorithm to guide the development of more formally structured and systematic, data-driven RC control approaches to chaotic synchronization problems, and to inspire more data-driven neuromorphic methods for controlling and achieving synchronization in chaotic neural networks in vivo.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Lyapunov主动控制技术和数据驱动的机器学习控制（基于储备池计算的观察、在线控制和在线预测控制算法）两种方法，实现不同阶次混沌忆阻Hindmarsh-Rose神经元之间的降阶同步。
AI.motivation: 解决不同阶次混沌忆阻HR神经元之间的降阶同步问题，探索从传统控制理论到数据驱动方法的可行性，为混沌神经网络同步提供新的控制范式。
AI.method: 方法一：基于Lyapunov主动控制技术，设计控制函数实现4D响应系统与5D驱动系统投影的同步；方法二：基于储备池计算(Reservoir Computing)的机器学习控制技术，组合使用储备池观测器(RO)、在线控制(OC)和在线预测控制(OPC)算法。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了Lyapunov主动控制方法的有效性；启发式RC自适应控制算法为数据驱动混沌同步问题提供了有效方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的数据驱动RC控制方法有望指导更系统化的RC混沌同步控制方法的发展，并启发更多数据驱动的神经形态方法实现混沌神经网络在体内的控制和同步。

title: Non-local transitions and ground state switching in the self-organization of vascular networks
summary: The model by Hu and Cai [Phys. Rev. Lett., Vol. 111(13) (2013)] describes the self-organization of vascular networks for transport of fluids from source to sinks. Diameters, and thereby conductances, of vessel segments evolve so as to minimize a cost functional E. The cost is the trade-off between the power required for pumping the fluid and the energy consumption for vessel maintenance. The model has been used to show emergence of cyclic structures in the presence of locally fluctuating demand, i.e. non-constant net flow at sink nodes. Under rapid and sufficiently large fluctuations, the dynamics exhibits bistability of tree-like and cyclic network structures. We compare these solutions in terms of the cost functional E. Close to the saddle-node bifurcation giving rise to the cyclic solutions, we find a parameter regime where the tree-like solution rather than the cyclic solution is cost-optimal. Thus we discover an additional, non-local transition where tree-like and cyclic solutions exchange their roles as minimum-cost (or ground) states. The findings hold both in a small system of one source and a few sinks and in an empirical vascular network with hundreds of sinks. In the small system, we further analyze the case of slower fluctuations, i.e., on the same time scale as network adaptation. We find that the noisy dynamics settles around the cyclic structures even when these structures are not cost-optimal.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Hu-Cai血管网络自组织模型，发现在快速大波动下网络出现树状与环状结构的双稳态，且环状结构虽由鞍结分岔产生，但在某些参数区域树状结构才是成本最优解。两种结构在最小成本状态上发生非局域交换。在慢波动条件下，即使环状结构非成本最优，噪声动力学仍会围绕环状结构稳定存在。
AI.motivation: 探究Hu-Cai血管网络模型中树状与环状结构在成本函数下的最优性关系，以及波动速率对网络结构选择的影响。
AI.method: 通过Hu-Cai模型分析血管网络自组织动力学，比较树状与环状结构在成本函数E下的最优性；在小型系统与具有数百个汇点的经验血管网络中分别验证；分析慢波动条件下噪声动力学对结构稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 发现靠近产生环状解的鞍结分岔附近，存在树状解而非环状解成本最优的参数区域；树状与环状解在最小成本状态上发生非局域交换；在慢波动条件下，噪声动力学围绕环状结构稳定存在，即使环状结构并非成本最优。
AI.conclusion: 血管网络的自组织存在非局域相变，树状与环状结构可互换最小成本状态的角色；波动速率影响网络结构的实际选择，慢波动下系统可能停留在非最优的环状结构上。

title: Bridging Large Eddy Simulation and Reduced Order Modeling of Convection-Dominated Flows through Spatial Filtering: Review and Perspectives
summary: Reduced order models (ROMs) have achieved a lot of success in reducing the computational cost of traditional numerical methods across many disciplines. For convection-dominated (e.g., turbulent) flows, however, standard ROMs generally yield inaccurate results, usually affected by spurious oscillations. Thus, ROMs are usually equipped with numerical stabilization or closure models to account for the effect of the discarded modes. The literature on ROM closures and stabilizations is large and growing fast. In this paper, we focus on one particular type of ROM closures and stabilizations that are inspired by Large Eddy Simulation (LES). These ROMs, which we call LES-ROMs, are extremely easy to implement, very efficient, and accurate. Carefully tuned LES-ROMs can accurately capture the average physical quantities of interest in challenging convection-dominated flows in many applications. LES-ROM are constructed by leveraging spatial filtering, i.e., the same principle used to build classical LES models. This ensures a modeling consistency between LES-ROMs and the approaches that generated the data used to train them. It also ``bridges'' two distinct research fields (LES and ROMs), disconnected until now. This paper is a review of LES-ROMs. It starts with a description of a versatile LES strategy called evolve-filter-relax (EFR) that has been successfully used as a full order method. We then show how the EFR strategy, and spatial filtering in general, can be leveraged to construct LES-ROMs. Several applications of LES-ROMs are presented. Finally, we draw conclusions and outline several research directions and open questions in the LES-ROM development. While we do not claim this review to be comprehensive, we certainly hope it serves as a brief and friendly introduction to this exciting research area, which has a lot of potential in practical numerical simulation of convection-dominated flows.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了受大涡模拟（LES）启发的降阶模型（LES-ROM），该模型通过空间滤波技术解决对流主导（如湍流）流动中标准ROM精度差、存在伪振荡的问题，具有易实现、高效、准确的特点，并回顾了EFR策略及其在LES-ROM构建中的应用、多种应用场景及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 标准降阶模型在对流主导（如湍流）流动中精度差，常出现伪振荡，需要数值稳定化或封闭模型来补偿截断模态的影响。LES-ROM受大涡模拟启发，提供了一种易于实现、高效且准确的替代方案，同时桥接了LES和ROM两个此前相对独立的研究领域。
AI.method: LES-ROM通过空间滤波（即LES的核心原理）构建，核心策略是"演化-滤波-松弛"（EFR）。EFR先作为全阶方法被成功应用，而后被推广到ROM框架中，通过滤波操作截断高频模态的影响，再结合松弛步骤实现数值稳定和封闭效果。
AI.result: 精心调参的LES-ROM能够准确捕捉对流主导流动中的平均物理量，在多个应用场景中表现出色。EFR策略在ROM框架下同样有效，实现了计算效率与精度的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: LES-ROM是一个有潜力的研究方向，为对流主导流动的数值模拟提供了实用方案。文章指出了若干待解决的研究问题和未来方向，但并非全面综述，而是作为该领域的友好入门介绍。

title: Global pathwise solutions of an abstract stochastic equation
summary: We establish the existence and uniqueness of the maximal pathwise solution for an abstract nonlinear stochastic evolutional equation, which takes the two and three dimensional stochastic Navier-Stokes equations as a typical model, forced by a multiplicative white noise, and show that the pathwise solution exists globally in time in a positive probability when the initial data is sufficiently small. Moreover, a global pathwise solution is obtained for the stochastic Navier-Stokes equations defined on torus when the data is properly regular and small.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一类抽象非线性随机发展方程（以二维和三维随机Navier-Stokes方程为典型模型）在乘性白噪声驱动下最大路径解的存在唯一性，并证明了当初始数据足够小时，路径解在正概率下全局存在。此外，对于定义在环面上的随机Navier-Stokes方程，当数据适当正则且小时，获得了全局路径解。
AI.motivation: 随机Navier-Stokes方程是描述湍流和流体动力学中随机现象的重要模型，其解的整体存在性和唯一性是随机偏微分方程领域的核心问题。以往研究通常关注概率意义上的解（如鞅解），而路径wise解（即几乎每条样本路径都满足的解）的全局存在性在三维情形下极具挑战性。
AI.method: 采用抽象发展方程的框架，建立最大路径解的存在唯一性理论；通过小初始条件的假设，利用能量估计和随机分析工具证明解在正概率下的全局存在性；针对环面区域上的情形，结合数据的正则性和小性条件得到全局路径解。
AI.result: (1) 抽象非线性随机发展方程最大路径解的存在唯一性；(2) 初始数据足够小时，路径解在正概率下全局存在；(3) 环面上随机Navier-Stokes方程在数据适当正则且小时存在全局路径解。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一般抽象框架下的最大路径解理论，并将其应用于随机Navier-Stokes方程，揭示了小初始条件对解全局存在性的关键作用，为随机流体动力学方程的路径wise分析提供了新工具。

title: Boundedness of complements for log Calabi-Yau threefolds
summary: In this paper, we study the theory of complements, introduced by Shokurov, for Calabi-Yau type varieties with the coefficient set $[0,1]$. We show that there exists a finite set of positive integers $\mathcal{N}$, such that if a threefold pair $(X/Z\ni z,B)$ has an $\mathbb{R}$-complement which is klt over a neighborhood of $z$, then it has an $n$-complement for some $n\in\mathcal{N}$. We also show the boundedness of complements for $\mathbb{R}$-complementary surface pairs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Calabi-Yau型簇上的补理论（Shokurov引入），证明了对于系数集[0,1]的三维配对，若存在klt的R-补，则存在某个有限正整数集N中的n-补；同时证明了R-互补曲面配对的补的有界性。
AI.motivation: 将Shokurov的补理论从系数集{1}推广到更一般的系数集[0,1]，建立Calabi-Yau型簇上R-补与n-补之间的存在性联系，推进双有理几何中互补问题的分类理论。
AI.method: 通过分析Calabi-Yau型簇的奇点性质和配对结构，利用有限正整数集的构造，结合klt条件的邻域性质，对三维情形和曲面情形分别建立存在性论证。
AI.result: 1. 存在有限正整数集N，使得任意具有klt R-补的三维配对存在某个n∈N的n-补；2. R-互补曲面配对的补具有有界性。
AI.conclusion: 将Shokurov补理论推广到系数集[0,1]，在三维和曲面情形下建立了R-补到n-补的有限可约化结果，为高维双有理几何的互补问题提供了重要进展。

title: Countably Generated Matrix Algebras
summary: We define the completion of an associative algebra $A$ in a set $M=\{M_1,\dots,M_r\}$ of $r$ right $A$-modules in such a way that if $\mathfrak a\subseteq A$ is an ideal in a commutative ring $A$ the completion $A$ in the (right) module $A/\mathfrak a$ is $\hat A^M\simeq \hat A^{\mathfrak a}.$ This works by defining $\hat A^M$ as a formal algebra determined up to a computation in a category called GMMP-algebras. From deformation theory we get that the computation results in a formal algebra which is the prorepresenting hull of the noncommutative deformation functor, and this hull is unique up to isomorphism.

AI.tldr: 本文定义了结合代数在右模集上的完备化，通过GMMP代数范畴中的计算得到形式代数，该代数同构于非交换形变函子的prorepresenting hull，并且唯一到同构。
AI.motivation: 将交换环中理想完备化的概念推广到非交换结合代数的模集完备化，建立形变理论中prorepresenting hull的唯一性。
AI.method: 通过定义结合代数A在右A-模集M上的完备化，利用GMMP代数范畴进行计算，得到形式代数，并证明其与非交换形变函子的prorepresenting hull同构。
AI.result: 对于交换环A中的理想a，在右模A/a上的完备化与理想的完备化同构。一般情况下的完备化结果是一个形式代数，该代数是唯一的prorepresenting hull。
AI.conclusion: 非交换情形下的模集完备化可以统一描述交换情形中的理想完备化，且其计算结果作为形变函子的prorepresenting hull具有唯一性。

title: The 3D kinetic Couette flow via the Boltzmann equation in the diffusive limit
summary: In the paper we study the Boltzmann equation in the diffusive limit in a channel domain $\mathbb{T}^2\times (-1,1)$ for the 3D kinetic Couette flow. Our results demonstrate that the first-order approximation of the solutions is governed by the perturbed incompressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system around the fluid Couette flow. Moverover, in the absence of external forces, the 3D kinetic Couette flow asymptotically converges over time to the 1D steady planar kinetic Couette flow. Our proof relies on (i) the Fourier transform on $\mathbb{T}^2$ to essentially reduce the 3D problem to a one-dimensional one, (ii) anisotropic Chemin-Lerner type function spaces, incorporating the Wiener algebra, to control nonlinear terms and address the singularity associated with a small Knudsen number in the diffusive limit, and (iii) Caflisch's decomposition, combined with the $L^2\cap L^\infty$ interplay technique, to manage the growth of large velocities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究3D动力学Couette流在通道区域中的玻尔兹曼方程扩散极限，证明其一阶近似由受扰动的不可压Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统支配，且在无外力时渐近收敛于1D稳态平面动力学Couette流。
AI.motivation: 研究玻尔兹曼方程在动力学Couette流场景下的扩散极限行为，理解从微观动力学到宏观流体力学描述的渐近关系。
AI.method: (i) 利用傅里叶变换将3D问题降维至1D；(ii) 构建各向异性的Chemin-Lerner型函数空间（结合Wiener代数）处理非线性项和克努森数奇异；(iii) 采用Caflisch分解与L²∩L∞交互技术控制大速度增长。
AI.result: 一阶近似解由受扰动的不可压Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统控制；无外力时，3D动力学Couette流随时间渐近收敛到1D稳态平面动力学Couette流。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了玻尔兹曼方程在Couette流场景下的扩散极限理论，揭示了微观动力学到宏观流体力学极限的严格数学联系。

title: Sharp kernel bounds for parabolic operators with first order degeneracy
summary:
We prove sharp upper and lower estimates for the parabolic kernel of the singular elliptic operator \begin{align*}
  \mathcal L&=\mbox{Tr }\left(AD^2\right)+\frac{\left(v,\nabla\right)}y, \end{align*} in the half-space $\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+=\{(x,y): x \in \mathbb{R}^N, y>0\}$ under Neumann or oblique derivative boundary conditions at $y=0$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了半空间$\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+$中奇异椭圆算子$\mathcal L=\mbox{Tr }\left(AD^2\right)+\frac{\left(v,\nabla\right)}y$在Neumann或斜导数边界条件下的抛物核，并证明了其尖锐的上界和下界估计。
AI.motivation: 该算子在Neumann或斜导数边界条件下的抛物核估计此前缺乏精确的上下界结果，需要建立尖锐的估计以理解其解析性质和相关的扩散过程。
AI.method: 采用解析估计方法，结合奇异椭圆算子的结构和边界条件，推导出抛物核的精确上界和下界。
AI.result: 得到了该奇异椭圆算子在Neumann或斜导数边界条件下抛物核的尖锐上界和下界估计。
AI.conclusion: 建立了该奇异椭圆算子抛物核的最优估计，为相关偏微分方程和随机过程研究提供了理论基础。

title: A simple intelligent adaptive network
summary: For real-world complex system constantly enduring perturbation, to achieve survival goal in changing yet unknown environments, the central problem is constantly adapting themself to external environments according to environmental feedback. Such adaptability is considered the nature of general intelligence. Inspired by thermodynamics, we develop a self-adaptive network utilizing only macroscopic information to achieve desired landscape through reconfiguring itself in unknown environments. By continuously estimating environment entropy, our network can adaptively realize desired landscape represented by topological measures. Our network achieves adaptation under several scenarios, including confinement on phase space and geographic constraint. A unique power law distinguishes our network from memoryless systems. Furthermore, our simple strategy could enable brain network and communication network to adaptively maintain essential topological characteristics. Compared to data-driven methods, our self-adaptive network is understandable without careful choice of learning architectures and parameters. Our self-adaptive network could help to understand adaptive intelligence through the lens of thermodynamics.

AI.tldr: 受热力学启发，本文提出一种仅利用宏观环境熵信息的自适应网络，通过自我重构在未知环境中实现期望的拓扑景观，无需数据驱动的学习架构和参数选择。
AI.motivation: 现实复杂系统持续受扰动，需要在变化且未知的环境中通过环境反馈不断自我适应以实现生存目标，这种适应能力被认为是一般智能的本质。现有数据驱动方法需要精心选择学习架构和参数，缺乏可理解性。
AI.method: 基于热力学启发，开发一种仅利用宏观信息（环境熵）的自适应网络。网络通过持续估计环境熵，自我重构以实现由拓扑度量表征的期望景观。
AI.result: 在多种场景下（包括相空间约束和地理约束）实现了自适应；网络展现出独特的幂律分布，区别于无记忆系统；该策略能使脑网络和通信网络自适应地维持关键拓扑特征。
AI.conclusion: 该自适网络具有可理解性，无需精心选择学习架构和参数；为通过热力学视角理解自适应智能提供了新途径。

title: Boiling stratified flow: a laboratory analogy for atmospheric moist convection
summary: We present a novel laboratory experiment, boiling stratified flow, as an analogy for atmospheric moist convection. A layer of diluted syrup is placed below freshwater in a beaker and heated from below. The vertical temperature profile in the experiment is analogous to the vapor mixing ratio in the atmosphere while the vertical profile of freshwater concentration in the experiment is analogous to the potential temperature profile in the atmosphere. Boiling starts when the bottom of the syrup layer reaches the boiling point, producing bubbles and vortex rings that stir the two-layer density interface and bring colder fresh water into the syrup layer. When the syrup layer at the beginning of the experiment is sufficiently thin and diluted, the vortex rings entrain more cold water than needed to remove superheating in the syrup layer, ending the boiling. When the syrup layer is deep and concentrated, the boiling is steady since the entrained colder water instantaneously removes the superheating in the bottom syrup layer. A theory is derived to predict the entrainment rate and the transition between the intermittent and steady boiling regimes, validated by experimental data. We suggest that these dynamics may share similarities with the mixing and lifecycle of cumulus convection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种煮沸分层流实验作为大气湿对流的类比，发现稀薄糖浆层导致间歇性沸腾，深厚糖浆层导致稳定沸腾，并建立了预测夹卷率和两种沸腾模式转变的理论。
AI.motivation: 寻找一种实验室尺度的流体实验来模拟和类比大气湿对流的复杂动力学过程，特别是积云对流中的混合与生命周期。
AI.method: 在烧杯中构建稀释糖浆-淡水双层系统并从底部加热，测量垂直温度（类比大气水汽混合比）和淡水浓度（类比大气位温）剖面，观察气泡和涡环对密度界面的搅拌作用。
AI.result: 薄糖浆层时涡环卷携过多冷水导致沸腾停止（间歇性）；厚糖浆层时卷携的冷水恰好移除过热，沸腾持续（稳态）。推导的理论成功预测了夹卷率及两态转变。
AI.conclusion: 该实验系统再现了类似积云对流中的夹卷混合和生命周期特征，为理解大气湿对流提供了新的实验室类比工具。

title: On $C^1$ regularity for degenerate elliptic equations in the plane
summary:
We show that Lipschitz solutions $u$ of $\mathrm{div}\, G(
abla u)=0$ in $B_1\subset\mathbb R^2$ are $C^1$, for strictly monotone vector fields $G\in C^0(\mathbb R^2;\mathbb R^2)$ satisfying a mild ellipticity condition. If $G=
abla F$ for a strictly convex function $F$, and $0\leq λ(ξ)\leq Λ(ξ)$ are the two eigenvalues of $
abla^2 F(ξ)$, our assumption is that the set $\lbraceλ=0brace \cap \lbrace Λ=\inftybrace$, where ellipticity degenerates $both$ from below and from above, is finite. This extends results by De Silva and Savin (Duke Math. J. 151, No. 3, p.487-532, 2010), which assumed either that set empty, or the larger set $\lbrace λ=0brace$ finite. Our main new input is to transfer estimates in $\lbrace λ> 0 brace $ to estimates in $\lbrace Λ<\inftybrace$ by means of a conjugate equation. When $G$ is not a gradient, the ellipticity assumption needs to be interpreted in a specific way, and we highlight the nontrivial effect of the antisymmetric part of $
abla G$.

AI.tldr: 对于二维Lipschitz解，在满足退化椭圆条件的严格单调向量场G下，本文证明了其C^1正则性，通过共轭方程将正椭圆区域的估计转移到有限椭圆区域的估计，扩展了De Silva和Savin的结果。
AI.motivation: 已有结果（De Silva & Savin, 2010）假设退化集合为空或特征值λ=0的集合有限，本文希望进一步放宽条件，允许同时在两个方向上退化（λ=0且Λ=∞）的情况，只需该退化集合有限。
AI.method: 核心创新在于通过共轭方程（conjugate equation）将{λ>0}区域的估计转移到{Λ<∞}区域，从而处理同时退化的情况。对于非梯度向量场G，需特殊解释椭圆性条件，并分析∇G反对称部分的影响。
AI.result: 证明了在退化集合{λ=0}∩{Λ=∞}为有限集的条件下，二维Lipschitz解具有C^1正则性；同时揭示了非梯度情形下反对称部分对正则性的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该结果扩展了退化椭圆方程的正则性理论，特别是允许椭圆性同时在上下界退化，并建立了梯度场与非梯度场情形之间的联系。

title: Rational weighted projective hypersurfaces
comment: 13 pages, 1 figure. v2: final version, to appear in International Mathematics Research Notices
summary: A very general hypersurface of dimension $n$ and degree $d$ in complex projective space is rational if $d \leq 2$, but is expected to be irrational for all $n, d \geq 3$. Hypersurfaces in weighted projective space with degree small relative to the weights are likewise rational. In this paper, we introduce rationality constructions for weighted hypersurfaces of higher degree that provide many new rational examples over any field. We answer in the affirmative a question of T. Okada about the existence of very general terminal Fano rational weighted hypersurfaces in all dimensions $n \geq 6$.

AI.tldr: 本文为加权射影空间中的高次超曲面引入新的有理构造，在任意域上构造了许多新的有理例子，并肯定回答了Okada关于所有维度n≥6上存在非常一般的终端Fano有理加权超曲面的问题。
AI.motivation: 复射影空间中非常一般的光滑超曲面在d≥3时预期为无理，但加权射影空间中存在更多有理例子。作者旨在构造加权超曲面的有理新例子，并回答Okada关于高维终端Fano有理加权超曲面存在性的问题。
AI.method: 通过引入加权超曲面在更高次数下的有理构造方法，在任意域上构造新的有理例子。
AI.result: 在任意域上构造了许多新的有理加权超曲面例子；对所有n≥6，存在非常一般的终端Fano有理加权超曲面。
AI.conclusion: 肯定回答了Okada关于所有维度n≥6上终端Fano有理加权超曲面存在性的问题，并提供了更广泛的有理构造。

title: On the two-dimensional Jacobian conjecture: Magnus' formula revisited, IV
summary: Let $(F,G)$ be a Jacobian pair with $d=w\text{-deg}(F)$ and $e=w\text{-deg}(G)$ for some direction $w$. A generalized Magnus' formula approximates $G$ as $\sum_{γ\ge 0} c_γF^{\frac{e-γ}{d}}$ for some complex numbers $c_γ$. We develop an approach to the two-dimensional Jacobian conjecture, aiming to minimize the use of terms corresponding to $γ>0$. As an initial step in this approach, we define and study the inner polynomials of $F$ and $G$. The main result of this paper shows that the northeastern vertex of the Newton polygon of each inner polynomial is located within a specific region. As applications of this result, we introduce several conjectures and prove some of them for special cases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维雅可比猜想，通过广义Magnus公式将G近似为F的幂级数，定义并研究F和G的内多项式，证明了内多项式牛顿多边形的东北顶点位于特定区域内，并据此提出若干猜想及特例证明。
AI.motivation: 雅可比猜想是代数几何中的著名难题，本文试图发展一种新方法以最小化广义Magnus公式中高阶项的使用，从而推进二维情形的证明。
AI.method: 利用广义Magnus公式建立F与G之间的幂级数关系，定义内多项式及其牛顿多边形，通过分析东北顶点的位置限制推导主要结论。
AI.result: 证明了每个内多项式的牛顿多边形的东北顶点位于某个特定区域内，基于此提出若干猜想并证明了部分特殊情形。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为二维雅可比猜想提供了新的几何约束条件，为进一步缩减广义Magnus公式中正项贡献奠定了基础。

title: Singular semilinear elliptic equations in half-spaces
summary: We prove the monotonicity of positive solutions to the problem $-Δu = f(u)$ in $\mathbb{R}^N_+ := \{(x',x_N)\in\mathbb{R}^N \mid x_N>0 \}$ under zero Dirichlet boundary condition with a possible singular nonlinearity $f$. In some situations, we can derive a precise estimate on the blow-up rate of $\frac{\partial u}{\partialη}$ as $x_N \to 0^+$, where $(η,e_N)>0$, and obtain a classification result. The main tools we use are the method of moving planes and the sliding method.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了半空间上带奇异非线性的Dirichlet问题正解的单调性，给出了边界导数爆破速率的精确估计，并获得了分类结果。主要工具为移动平面法和滑动法。
AI.motivation: 研究半空间上带可能奇异非线性项的椭圆方程正解的单调性、边界行为及分类问题。
AI.method: 采用移动平面法（method of moving planes）和滑动法（sliding method）作为主要分析工具。
AI.result: 证明了正解的单调性；在某些情形下导出了法向导数∂u/∂η在x_N→0⁺时爆破速率的精确估计；并得到了分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 移动平面法和滑动法可有效处理半空间上奇异非线性椭圆方程的正解性质，包括单调性、边界爆破行为及完整分类。

title: Infinite dimensional metapopulation SIS model with generalized incidence rate
summary: We consider an infinite-dimension SIS model introduced by Delmas, Dronnier and Zitt, with a more general incidence rate, and study its equilibria. Unsurprisingly, there exists at least one endemic equilibrium if and only if the basic reproduction number is larger than 1. When the pathogen transmission exhibits one way propagation, it is possible to observe different possible endemic equilibria. We characterize in a general setting all the equilibria, using a decomposition of the space into atoms, given by the transmission operator. We also prove that the proportion of infected individuals converges to an equilibrium, which is uniquely determined by the support of the initial condition.We extend those results to infinite-dimensional SIS models with reservoir or with immigration.

AI.tldr: 研究了一种更一般感染率的无限维SIS模型的平衡态，证明了地方病平衡态存在当且仅当基本再生数大于1，并通过传输算子将空间分解为原子来刻画所有平衡态，还证明了感染者比例收敛于由初始条件支撑唯一确定的平衡态，并将结果推广到含储库或移民的模型。
AI.motivation: 已有无限维SIS模型（Delmas, Dronnier, Zitt）的平衡态理论尚不完整，特别是在更一般感染率下平衡态的存在性、唯一性及收敛性分析不足，且实际应用中常涉及病原体的单向传播、储库效应和移民等复杂因素。
AI.method: 基于传输算子对状态空间进行原子分解，利用基本再生数阈值条件分析平衡态存在性；通过构造合适的Lyapunov泛函或利用单调动力系统理论证明解的收敛性；针对单向传播情形讨论多重平衡态的特征化；将框架推广至含储库项和移民项的扩展模型。
AI.result: (1) 地方病平衡态存在的充要条件是基本再生数R0>1；(2) 当病原体单向传播时，可能出现多个不同的地方病平衡态；(3) 利用传输算子对空间的原子分解，可完整刻画所有平衡态；(4) 感染者比例收敛到由初始条件支撑唯一确定的平衡态；(5) 以上结论可推广至含储库或移民的SIS模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为无限维SIS模型的平衡态分析提供了统一的理论框架，揭示了单向传播导致的多平衡态现象，并建立了收敛性结果的普适性，为传染病建模中复杂传播机制（如环境储库、移民迁入）的数学分析奠定了基础。

title: Quotients of Jacobians
summary: We prove that the quotient of Jacobian of a curve whose genus is greater than or equal to 5 under the action of a finite group acting on the curve is never uniruled, and classify all curves of genus 3 and 4 whose quotients of Jacobian is uniruled.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，对于亏格≥5的曲线，其雅可比商在有限群作用下绝非单有理的；并分类了亏格3和4中雅可比商为单有理的所有曲线。
AI.motivation: 研究曲线雅可比商在有限群作用下的单有理性质，特别关注不同亏格下的分类问题。
AI.method: 通过代数几何方法，分析亏格≥5的曲线雅可比商的结构，证明其非单有理；对亏格3和4的曲线进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 亏格≥5的曲线雅可比商绝非单有理；完全分类了亏格3和4中雅可比商为单有理的所有曲线。
AI.conclusion: 曲线雅可比商的单有理性质与曲线亏格密切相关，亏格5以上该性质消失，而低亏格情形则有精确分类。

title: A Case Study on Contextual Machine Translation in a Professional Scenario of Subtitling
summary: Incorporating extra-textual context such as film metadata into the machine translation (MT) pipeline can enhance translation quality, as indicated by automatic evaluation in recent work. However, the positive impact of such systems in industry remains unproven. We report on an industrial case study carried out to investigate the benefit of MT in a professional scenario of translating TV subtitles with a focus on how leveraging extra-textual context impacts post-editing. We found that post-editors marked significantly fewer context-related errors when correcting the outputs of MTCue, the context-aware model, as opposed to non-contextual models. We also present the results of a survey of the employed post-editors, which highlights contextual inadequacy as a significant gap consistently observed in MT. Our findings strengthen the motivation for further work within fully contextual MT.

AI.tldr: 本文通过工业案例研究，验证了融入额外文本语境（如电影元数据）的上下文感知机器翻译系统（MTCue）在专业电视字幕翻译后编辑中能显著减少语境相关错误，强化了全语境机器翻译的研究动机。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动评估表明将额外文本语境（如电影元数据）融入机器翻译流程可提升翻译质量，但此类系统在工业环境中的实际效益尚未得到验证。
AI.method: 通过工业案例研究，在电视字幕翻译的专业场景中比较上下文感知模型（MTCue）与非上下文模型在后编辑中的表现，并辅以后编辑者的问卷调查。
AI.result: 后编辑者在纠正MTCue（上下文感知模型）输出时标记的语境相关错误显著少于非上下文模型；问卷调查显示语境不充分是机器翻译中持续存在的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强化了进一步推进全语境机器翻译的研究动机。

title: Penzai + Treescope: A Toolkit for Interpreting, Visualizing, and Editing Models As Data
comment: Presented at the ICML 2024 Mechanistic Interpretability workshop (Spotlight). 5 pages
summary: Much of today's machine learning research involves interpreting, modifying or visualizing models after they are trained.
