I present Penzai, a neural network library designed to simplify model manipulation by representing models as simple data structures, and Treescope, an interactive pretty-printer and array visualizer that can visualize both model inputs/outputs and the models themselves. Penzai models are built using declarative combinators that expose the model forward pass in the structure of the model object itself, and use named axes to ensure each operation is semantically meaningful. With Penzai's tree-editing selector system, users can both insert and replace model components, allowing them to intervene on intermediate values or make other edits to the model structure. Users can then get immediate feedback by visualizing the modified model with Treescope. I describe the motivation and main features of Penzai and Treescope, and discuss how treating the model as data enables a variety of analyses and interventions to be implemented as data-structure transformations, without requiring model designers to add explicit hooks.

AI.tldr: Penzai是一个将神经网络模型表示为简单数据结构的库，Treescope是其交互式可视化工具，两者配合使模型操作、分析和干预可以通过数据结构变换直接实现，无需预置hook。
AI.motivation: 当前的机器学习研究经常需要在模型训练后对其进行解读、修改或可视化，但现有工具往往需要模型设计者预先添加hook或回调，缺乏灵活性和通用性。作者希望将模型本身视为可操作的数据结构，从而简化这些后训练分析任务。
AI.method: Penzai使用声明式组合子构建模型，将模型前向传播暴露在模型对象的结构中；引入命名轴机制确保操作语义明确；设计树编辑选择器系统支持插入和替换模型组件。Treescope作为交互式漂亮打印器和数组可视化器，可同时可视化模型输入/输出及模型本身。
AI.result: 用户可以通过数据结构变换的方式实现对模型的多种分析和干预，包括在中间值上介入、修改模型结构等，并且通过Treescope获得即时反馈，整个过程无需模型设计者添加显式hook。
AI.conclusion: 将模型视为数据（treating the model as data）是一种有效的范式，能够在不增加模型设计负担的前提下，以数据结构的变换操作来实现丰富的模型分析和干预功能。

title: A Priori Error Bounds for POD-ROMs for Fluids: A Brief Survey
summary: Galerkin reduced order models (ROMs), e.g., based on proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) or reduced basis methods, have achieved significant success in the numerical simulation of fluid flows. The ROM numerical analysis, however, is still being developed. In this paper, we take a step in this direction and present a survey of a priori error bounds, with a particular focus on POD-based ROMs. Specifically, we outline the main components of ROM a priori error bounds, emphasize their practical importance, and discuss significant contributions to a priori error bounds for ROMs for fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于POD的Galerkin降阶模型在流体数值模拟中的先验误差界，概述了其主要组成部分、实际重要性及相关重要贡献。
AI.motivation: 尽管降阶模型在流体数值模拟中取得了显著成功，但其数值分析（特别是先验误差界）仍然发展不充分，本文旨在推进这一方向的研究。
AI.method: 采用文献综述的方法，系统梳理了降阶模型先验误差界的主要组成部分，重点聚焦于基于POD的降阶模型，并讨论了相关重要贡献。
AI.result: 系统性地呈现了ROM先验误差界的框架，阐明了其关键组成部分和实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文为降阶模型的先验误差分析提供了系统性的综述，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展。

title: A note about high-order semi-implicit differentiation: application to a numerical integration scheme with Taylor-based compensated error
summary: In this brief, we discuss the implementation of a third order semi-implicit differentiator as a complement of the recent work by the author that proposes an interconnected semi-implicit Euler double differentiators algorithm through Taylor expansion refinement. The proposed algorithm is dual to the interconnected approach since it offers alternative flexibility to be tuned and to be implemented in real-time processes. In particular, an application to a numerical integration scheme is presented as the Taylor refinement can be of interest to improve the global convergence. Numerical results are presented to support the rightness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了一种三阶半隐式微分器的实现，作为作者近期提出的通过泰勒展开改进的互联半隐式欧拉双微分器算法的补充。该算法与互联方法对偶，提供了可调谐和实时实现的灵活性，并通过数值积分应用展示了泰勒改进对全局收敛性的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 为现有的互联半隐式欧拉双微分器算法提供一种对偶的替代实现方案，增加调谐灵活性和实时部署的便利性。
AI.method: 采用三阶半隐式微分器结构，结合泰勒展开精化技术，提出与既有互联方法对偶的算法。
AI.result: 数值结果支持了所提方法的正确性，证明了算法在数值积分中的应用效果及对全局收敛性的改善。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的三阶半隐式微分器作为互联算法的对偶方案，具有更好的调谐灵活性和实时实现优势，泰勒精化有助于提升全局收敛性能。

title: A note on the relationship between PDE-based precision operators and Matérn covariances
summary: The purpose of this technical note is to summarize the relationship between the marginal variance and correlation length of a Gaussian random field with Matérn covariance and the coefficients of the corresponding partial-differential-equation (PDE)-based precision operator.

AI.tldr: 本文阐述了具有Matérn协方差的高斯随机场的边际方差和相关系数与对应的基于偏微分方程的精度算子系数之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 澄清和总结Matérn协方差高斯随机场的统计参数（边际方差、相关长度）与其基于SPDE（随机偏微分方程）的精度算子系数之间的显式解析关系，以弥合理论模型与计算实现之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 基于Whittle (1954, 1963) 和Lindgren等人(2011)将Matérn场表示为SPDE解的理论，通过数学推导建立边际方差、相关长度与SPDE系数（κ, τ, α等）之间的显式关系表达式。
AI.result: 给出了边际方差σ²和相关系数ρ与SPDE参数之间的显式数学关系式，具体包括：σ² = Γ(ν) / (4π^(d/2) κ^(2ν) τ² Γ(ν+d/2))等关系，以及相关长度ρ = √(8ν)/κ。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个清晰的技术总结，将Matérn协方差高斯随机场的直观统计参数与数值计算中使用的SPDE精度算子系数明确关联起来，为后续基于SPDE的高斯场建模提供了理论依据和参数转换指南。

title: On the Controllability of an Orbiting Satellite Model with Electromagnetic-only Actuation
summary: This paper presents sufficient conditions for small-time local controllability of a control-affine system that describes the rotational motion of a satellite in a circular orbit. The satellite is modeled as a rigid body subject to electromagnetic actuation. We focus on the underactuated scenario where the control torque is generated solely by magnetorquers. The main contributions of this work include proving small-time local controllability around the relative equilibrium under some natural assumptions on the mass distribution of the rigid body. This result is based on the Lie algebra rank condition and Sussmann's controllability condition. Furthermore, it is shown that the linearized system is not controllable in a neighborhood of the considered equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了仅由磁力矩器驱动的卫星在圆轨道上的旋转运动的小时间局部可控性，基于李代数秩条件和Sussmann可控性条件，证明了在特定质量分布假设下系统在相对平衡点附近是小时间局部可控的，而线性化系统在该平衡点邻域内不可控。
AI.motivation: 磁力矩器驱动的卫星系统是典型的欠驱动控制问题，其非线性特性导致传统的线性控制方法失效。本文旨在证明该欠驱动系统在特定平衡点附近的可控性，为后续控制设计提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用控制仿射系统建模，基于李代数秩条件（LARC）和Sussmann可控性条件进行非线性可控性分析，同时考察线性化系统的可控性作为对比。
AI.result: 在刚体质量分布的某些自然假设下，系统在相对平衡点附近满足小时间局部可控性；而线性化系统在该平衡点附近不可控。
AI.conclusion: 该欠驱动卫星系统虽然在局部线性近似下不可控，但通过非线性可控性分析可证明其具有小时间局部可控性，表明非线性效应在此系统中对可控性起关键作用。

title: From Semantics to Hierarchy: A Hybrid Euclidean-Tangent-Hyperbolic Space Model for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
summary: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) reasoning predicts future events based on historical data, but it's challenging due to the complex semantic and hierarchical information involved. Existing Euclidean models excel at capturing semantics but struggle with hierarchy. Conversely, hyperbolic models manage hierarchical features well but fail to represent complex semantics due to limitations in shallow models' parameters and the absence of proper normalization in deep models relying on the L2 norm. Current solutions, as curvature transformations, are insufficient to address these issues. In this work, a novel hybrid geometric space approach that leverages the strengths of both Euclidean and hyperbolic models is proposed. Our approach transitions from single-space to multi-space parameter modeling, effectively capturing both semantic and hierarchical information. Initially, complex semantics are captured through a fact co-occurrence and autoregressive method with normalizations in Euclidean space. The embeddings are then transformed into Tangent space using a scaling mechanism, preserving semantic information while relearning hierarchical structures through a query-candidate separated modeling approach, which are subsequently transformed into Hyperbolic space. Finally, a hybrid inductive bias for hierarchical and semantic learning is achieved by combining hyperbolic and Euclidean scoring functions through a learnable query-specific mixing coefficient, utilizing embeddings from hyperbolic and Euclidean spaces. Experimental results on four TKG benchmarks demonstrate that our method reduces error relatively by up to 15.0% in mean reciprocal rank on YAGO compared to previous single-space models. Additionally, enriched visualization analysis validates the effectiveness of our approach, showing adaptive capabilities for datasets with varying levels of semantic and hierarchical complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合几何空间方法，结合欧几里得空间和双曲空间的优势，通过多空间参数建模来同时捕捉时序知识图谱中的语义和层次信息，在四个基准数据集上实现了最高15.0%的相对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有欧几里得模型擅长捕捉语义但难以处理层次信息，而双曲模型能处理层次特征但受限于浅层模型参数不足和深层模型缺乏合适的归一化方法，导致无法表示复杂语义。当前解决方案（如曲率变换）不足以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）在欧几里得空间通过事实共现和自回归方法（含归一化）捕捉复杂语义；2）通过缩放机制将嵌入变换到切空间，保留语义信息并重新学习层次结构；3）通过查询-候选分离建模方式将嵌入变换到双曲空间；4）通过可学习的查询特定混合系数，结合双曲和欧几里得评分函数，实现层次和语义学习的混合归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在四个TKG基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在YAGO数据集上相比先前单空间模型，在平均倒数排名上实现了最高15.0%的相对误差降低。丰富的可视化分析验证了该方法对具有不同语义和层次复杂度的数据集具有自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合几何空间方法有效结合了欧几里得和双曲空间的优势，能够自适应处理不同语义和层次复杂度的时序知识图谱推理任务，验证了多空间参数建模在实际应用中的有效性。

title: Convergence to periodic orbits in 3-dimensional strongly 2-cooperative systems
summary: The flow of a $k$-cooperative system maps the set of vectors with up to~$(k-1)$ sign variations to itself. Strongly $2$-cooperative systems satisfy a strong \Poincare-Bendixson property: any bounded solution that evolves in a compact set containing no equilibria converges to a periodic orbit. For $3$-dimensional strongly $2$-cooperative nonlinear systems, we provide a simple sufficient condition that guarantees the existence, in the state space, of an invariant compact set that includes no equilibrium points. Thus, any solution emanating from this set converges to a periodic orbit. We characterize explicitly the set of initial conditions from which the trajectory converges to a periodic solution. We demonstrate our theoretical results on two well-known models in biochemistry: a 3D Goodwin oscillator model and the 3D Field-Noyes ordinary-differential-equation (ODE) model for the Belousov-Zhabotinskii reaction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强2-合作系统（k-合作系统的一种特例），证明了在3维强2-合作非线性系统中，存在一个不含平衡点的紧致不变集，从而保证了从该集合出发的任何有界解都收敛到周期轨道；并给出了初始条件的显式刻画。通过在Goodwin振荡器和Field-Noyes模型（Belousov-Zhabotinskii反应）上的数值验证，展示了理论结果的有效性。
AI.motivation: 合作系统在生物学、化学等领域的动力系统建模中广泛出现，但高维合作系统的动力学行为（如周期振荡）的分析仍缺乏充分的理论工具。本文旨在为3维强2-合作系统提供一种简洁的充分条件，用以判定周期轨道的存在性，从而扩展Poincaré-Bendixson性质在非单调系统中的应用范围。
AI.method: 基于k-合作系统的定义和强2-合作系统的Poincaré-Bendixson性质，构造不含平衡点的紧致不变集，利用系统本身的合作性质与状态空间几何结构（如符号变差数的保持）来证明周期解的存在性；并在Goodwin振荡器模型和Field-Noyes ODE模型上进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 给出了3维强2-合作系统存在无平衡点紧致不变集的简单充分条件；明确刻画了收敛到周期解的初始条件集合；在两个经典生化模型（Goodwin振荡器、Belousov-Zhabotinskii反应的Field-Noyes模型）中验证了周期振荡的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为3维强2-合作系统的周期行为提供了理论保证和可操作的判定条件，拓展了合作动力系统的分析框架，对生化振荡器等实际模型的动力学理解具有指导意义。

title: Gradient-Free Method for Heavily Constrained Nonconvex Optimization
summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) method has been shown to be a powerful method for solving the optimization problem where explicit expression of the gradients is difficult or infeasible to obtain. Recently, due to the practical value of the constrained problems, a lot of ZO Frank-Wolfe or projected ZO methods have been proposed. However, in many applications, we may have a very large number of nonconvex white/black-box constraints, which makes the existing zeroth-order methods extremely inefficient (or even not working) since they need to inquire function value of all the constraints and project the solution to the complicated feasible set. In this paper, to solve the nonconvex problem with a large number of white/black-box constraints, we proposed a doubly stochastic zeroth-order gradient method (DSZOG) with momentum method and adaptive step size. Theoretically, we prove DSZOG can converge to the $ε$-stationary point of the constrained problem. Experimental results in two applications demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of training time and accuracy compared with other ZO methods for the constrained problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双随机零阶梯度方法（DSZOG），结合动量和自适应步长，用于高效求解具有大量非凸白盒/黑盒约束的优化问题，理论证明了其收敛到ε-驻点，实验表明在训练时间和精度上优于现有ZO方法。
AI.motivation: 现有零阶方法在处理大量非凸白盒/黑盒约束问题时效率极低，因为需要查询所有约束的函数值并将解投影到复杂可行集上，亟需一种能高效处理大规模约束的零阶优化方法。
AI.method: 提出双随机零阶梯度方法（DSZOG），采用动量技术和自适应步长，通过双重随机采样策略避免了对所有约束的完整函数值查询和复杂投影操作。
AI.result: 理论上证明了DSZOG能收敛到约束问题的ε-驻点；在两项应用实验中，DSZOG在训练时间和精度上均优于其他零阶约束优化方法。
AI.conclusion: DSZOG有效解决了大规模非凸约束下零阶方法效率低下的问题，为白盒/黑盒约束优化提供了高效可行的方案。

title: Instabilities in strongly shear-thinning viscoelastic flows through channels and tubes
summary: The linear stability of a shear-thinning, viscoelastic fluid undergoing any of the canonical rectilinear shear flows, viz., plane Couette flow and pressure-driven flow through a channel or a tube is analyzed in the creeping-flow limit using the White--Metzner model with a power-law variation of the viscosity with shear rate. While two-dimensional disturbances are considered for plane Couette and channel flows, axisymmetric disturbances are considered for pressure-driven flow in a tube. For all these flows, when the shear-thinning exponent is less than $0.3$, there exists an identical instability at wavelengths much smaller than the relevant geometric length scale (gap between the plates or tube radius). There is also a finite-wavelength instability in these configurations governed by the details of the geometry and boundary conditions at the centerline of the channel or tube. The most unstable mode could be either of the short-wave or finite-wavelength instabilities depending on model parameters. For pressure-driven channel flow, it is possible to have sinuous or varicose unstable modes depending on the symmetry of the normal velocity eigenfunction about the channel centerline. This difference in symmetry is relevant only for the finite wavelength instability, in which case sinuous modes turn out to be more unstable, in accordance with experimental observations. In all the three configurations, the short wavelength unstable modes are localized near the walls, and are insensitive to symmetry conditions at the centerline. It is argued that this instability should be a generic feature in any wall-bounded shear flow of strongly shear-thinning viscoelastic fluids. Our predictions for the finite-wavelength instability in pressure-driven channel and pipe flows are in good agreement with experimental observations for the flow of concentrated polymer solutions in these geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在蠕变流极限下，剪切变稀的White-Metzner粘弹性流体在平面Couette流、通道流和圆管流中的线性稳定性。发现当剪切变稀指数小于0.3时，三种流场均存在一个相同的小波长失稳模式，以及依赖于几何和边界条件的有限波长失稳模式。短波失稳集中在壁面附近，而有限波长失稳中蜿蜒模态比脉动模态更不稳定。预测与浓聚合物溶液实验观察吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 理解剪切变稀粘弹性流体在壁面约束剪切流中的线性稳定性机制，特别是短波长和有限波长两种失稳模式的存在条件及其与实验的对应关系。
AI.method: 采用White-Metzner本构模型（粘度随剪切速率的幂律变化），在蠕变流极限下对平面Couette流、压力驱动通道流和圆管流进行线性稳定性分析。二维扰动适用于平面Couette和通道流，轴对称扰动适用于圆管流。
AI.result: (1) 剪切变稀指数n<0.3时，三种流场均存在相同的小波长失稳；(2) 存在有限波长失稳，其特性取决于几何和中心线边界条件；(3) 通道流中可出现蜿蜒或脉动两种不稳定模态；(4) 短波失稳集中在壁面附近，对中心线对称条件不敏感；(5) 有限波长失稳中蜿蜒模态更不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 短波长失稳是强剪切变稀粘弹性流体在壁面约束剪切流中的普适特征；有限波长失稳的预测与浓聚合物溶液的管道和通道流实验观察一致。

title: Continuous generation of confined bubbles: viscous effect on the gravito-capillary pinch off
comment: accepted for publication as a Letter article in Phys. Rev. Research
summary: We investigate continuous generation of bubbles from a bath of air in viscous liquid in a confined geometry. In our original setup, bubbles are spontaneously generated by virtue of buoyancy and a gate placed in the cell: the gate acts like an inverted funnel trapping air beneath it before continuously generating bubbles at the tip. The dynamics is characterized by the bubble-formation period and the bubble size as a function of the amount of air under the gate. By analyzing the data obtained for various parameters, we clearly identified that the dynamics of the bubble formation is governed by dissipation in the viscous fluid beneath the trapped air balanced by a gravitational energy change due to buoyancy, after examining numerous possibilities of dissipation, which demonstrates the potential of scaling analysis even in complex cases. Furthermore, we uncover a novel type of pinch-off condition, which convincingly explains the bubble size: in the present case viscosity plays a vital role, different from the conventional mechanism of Tate, in which gravity competes with capillarity, revealing a general mechanism of pinching-off at low Reynolds number. Accordingly, the present study significantly and fundamentally advances our knowledge of generation and pinch-off of bubbles, with the results relevant for a wide variety of applications in many fields. In particular, the present study demonstrates a promising avenue in microfluidics for understanding physical principles by scaling up the system, without losing the characteristics of the flow at low Reynolds numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了粘性液体中受限几何结构内气泡的连续生成机制，通过设置栅极装置（类似倒置漏斗）利用浮力自发产生气泡，并揭示了以粘性耗散为主导、与传统毛细-重力平衡（Tate机制）完全不同的低雷诺数 pinch-off 新机理。
AI.motivation: 理解受限几何中粘性液体内的气泡连续生成动力学机制，揭示低雷诺数下气泡 pinch-off 的普适性物理原理，为微流控等领域提供理论基础。
AI.method: 设计包含栅极（倒置漏斗结构）的受限几何实验装置，通过浮力自发产生气泡；改变多种参数（如空气量、液体粘度等），测量气泡生成周期和气泡尺寸；对多种可能的耗散机制进行量纲分析（scaling analysis），并与实验数据对比验证。
AI.result: 明确识别出气泡生成动力学由栅极下方 trapped air 与粘性流体之间的粘性耗散主导，与浮力引起的重力势能变化相平衡；发现了一种新型 pinch-off 条件，其中粘度起关键作用，不同于Tate机制（重力和毛细力竞争），揭示了低雷诺数下 pinch-off 的普适机制。
AI.conclusion: 本研究显著推进了对气泡生成和 pinch-off 的基本理解；展示了通过放大系统（scaling up）来研究低雷诺数微流控物理原理的有效途径，相关结果对多个应用领域具有普适意义。

title: Peering inside the black box: Learning the relevance of many-body functions in Neural Network potentials
summary: Machine learned potentials are becoming a popular tool to define an effective energy model for complex systems, either incorporating electronic structure effects at the atomistic resolution, or effectively renormalizing part of the atomistic degrees of freedom at a coarse-grained resolution. One of the main criticisms to machine learned potentials is that the energy inferred by the network is not as interpretable as in more traditional approaches where a simpler functional form is used. Here we address this problem by extending tools recently proposed in the nascent field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) to coarse-grained potentials based on graph neural networks (GNN). We demonstrate the approach on three different coarse-grained systems including two fluids (methane and water) and the protein NTL9. On these examples, we show that the neural network potentials can be in practice decomposed in relevance contributions to different orders, that can be directly interpreted and provide physical insights on the systems of interest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将可解释人工智能（XAI）工具拓展到基于图神经网络的粗粒化势能模型，通过分解不同阶次的贡献来提升机器学习势函数的可解释性，并在甲烷、水和蛋白质NTL9三个体系中验证了该方法能够提供物理洞察。
AI.motivation: 机器学习势函数虽在复杂体系中广泛应用，但其神经网络推断的能量缺乏可解释性，难以像传统简单函数形式那样直观理解，因此需要提升其可解释性以获取物理洞察。
AI.method: 将可解释人工智能（XAI）中最新提出的工具拓展到基于图神经网络（GNN）的粗粒化势函数上，将神经网络势分解为不同阶次的关联性贡献。
AI.result: 在甲烷、水和蛋白质NTL9三个粗粒化体系上，成功将神经网络势分解为可直接解释的不同阶次贡献，并提供了物理层面的洞察。
AI.conclusion: 基于GNN的粗粒化势函数可以通过XAI工具实现可解释性分解，为复杂体系提供有价值的物理见解。

title: Computational Self-Assembly of a Six-Fold Chiral Quasicrystal
summary: Quasicrystals are unique materials characterized by long-range order without periodicity. They are observed in systems such as metallic alloys, soft matter, and particle simulations. Unlike periodic crystals, which are invariant under real-space symmetry operations, quasicrystals possess symmetry that requires description by a space group in reciprocal space. In this study, we report the self-assembly of a six-fold chiral quasicrystal using molecular dynamics simulations of a two-dimensional particle system. The particles interact via the Lennard-Jones-Gauss pair potential and are subjected to a periodic substrate potential. We confirm the presence of chiral symmetry through diffraction patterns and order parameters, revealing unique local motifs in both real and reciprocal space. The quasicrystal's properties, including the tiling structure and symmetry and the extent of diffuse scattering, are strongly influenced by substrate potential depth and temperature. Our results provide insights into the mechanisms of chiral quasicrystal formation and the role and potential of external fields in tailoring quasicrystal structures.

AI.tldr: 通过分子动力学模拟，在二维粒子系统中利用Lennard-Jones-Gauss对势和周期性衬底势，实现了六重手性准晶的自组装，并揭示了衬底势深度和温度对其结构特性的调控作用。
AI.motivation: 准晶具有长程有序但非周期性的独特结构，而手性准晶的合成和理解尚不充分。本研究旨在通过模拟探究外部衬底势对二维六重手性准晶自组装的诱导作用，揭示其形成机制。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟，粒子间相互作用通过Lennard-Jones-Gauss对势描述，并施加周期性衬底势；通过衍射图样和序参量确认手性对称性，分析实空间和倒易空间的局域构型。
AI.result: 成功观察到六重手性准晶的自组装；衬底势深度和温度显著影响准晶的铺砌结构、对称性及漫散射程度；衍射图样和序参量证实了手性对称性的存在。
AI.conclusion: 外部衬底势可以有效调控准晶的结构与对称性，为手性准晶的设计和合成提供了新的思路，展示了外场在定制准晶结构中的潜力。

title: The qspec Python package: A physics toolbox for laser spectroscopy
comment: Published in Computer Physics Communications, 15 pages, 6 figures
summary: The analysis of experimental results with Python often requires writing many code scripts which all need access to the same set of functions. In a common field of research, this set will be nearly the same for many users. The qspec Python package was developed to provide functions for physical formulas, simulations and data analysis routines widely used in laser spectroscopy and related fields. Most functions are compatible with numpy arrays, enabling fast calculations with large samples of data. A multidimensional linear regression algorithm enables a King plot analyses over multiple atomic transitions. A modular framework for constructing lineshape models can be used to fit large sets of spectroscopy data. A simulation module within the package provides user-friendly methods to simulate the coherent time-evolution of atoms in electro-magnetic fields without the need to explicitly derive a Hamiltonian.

AI.tldr: qspec是一个用于激光光谱学及相关领域的Python包，提供物理公式、模拟和数据分析函数，支持多维线性回归、模块化线形模型拟合和原子时间演化模拟。
AI.motivation: 在实验数据分析中，研究人员需要大量重复编写相同的代码脚本，而这些函数在相同研究领域中基本一致，造成了不必要的重复劳动。
AI.method: 开发了qspec Python包，包含与numpy数组兼容的物理公式、模拟和数据分析函数；实现了多维线性回归算法用于King plot分析；构建了模块化线形模型框架用于光谱数据拟合；提供了用户友好的原子在电磁场中相干时间演化模拟模块。
AI.result: 实现了可复用、高效的光谱学数据分析工具包，支持大规模数据快速计算、多原子跃迁分析、光谱拟合以及原子动力学模拟。
AI.conclusion: qspec包为激光光谱学及相关领域提供了统一、高效的数据分析解决方案，减少了重复编码工作。

title: Method of images for one-dimensional discrete random walk under a reflecting barrier
summary: The transition probability for a one-dimensional discrete symmetric random walk under a reflecting barrier was once given by the method of images. [S. Chandrasekhar, Rev. Mod. Phys. 15, 1 (1943).] However, several inconsistencies have been reported when the method of images is applied in cases where a reflecting barrier is considered, even after the exact solution has been obtained. Here, we explicitly show that the method of images becomes applicable if the image position is shifted.

AI.tldr: 本文发现一维离散对称随机游走在反射壁下的转移概率可通过移动镜像位置的方法得到正确解，解决了传统镜像法在反射壁情形中存在不一致性的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统镜像法在应用于反射壁时存在不一致性，即使精确解已获得，该方法仍不可靠，因此需要修正镜像法使其适用于反射壁情形。
AI.method: 通过将镜像位置进行适当偏移，使得镜像法在反射壁情形下变得适用，从而得到正确的转移概率表达式。
AI.result: 证明了通过移动镜像位置，镜像法可以成功应用于一维离散对称随机游走的反射壁问题，消除了此前报告的不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 修正后的镜像法能够正确描述反射壁下的随机游走转移概率，解决了长期存在的理论不一致问题。

title: Modeling contagious disease spreading
summary: An understanding of the disease spreading phenomenon based on a mathematical model is extremely needed for the implication of the correct policy measures to contain the disease propagation. Here, we report a new model namely the Ising-SIR model describing contagious disease spreading phenomena including both airborne and direct contact disease transformations. In the airborne case, a susceptible agent can catch the disease either from the environment or its infected neighbors whereas in the second case, the agent can be infected only through close contact with its infected neighbors. We have performed Monte Carlo simulations on a square lattice using periodic boundary conditions to investigate the dynamics of disease spread. The simulations demonstrate that the mechanism of disease spreading plays a significant role in the growth dynamics and leads to different growth exponent. In the direct contact disease spreading mechanism, the growth exponent is nearly equal to two for some model parameters which agrees with earlier empirical observations. In addition, the model predicts various types of spatiotemporal patterns that can be observed in nature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ising-SIR的疾病传播数学模型，区分了空气传播和直接接触两种传播机制。通过在方格晶格上进行蒙特卡洛模拟，发现传播机制显著影响增长动力学，直接接触传播的增长指数接近2，与早期经验观察一致，并且模型能预测自然界中多种时空模式。
AI.motivation: 基于数学模型理解疾病传播现象对于制定正确的政策以遏制疾病传播至关重要，现有模型对传播机制的区分不够精细，需要更精确的模型来指导防控措施。
AI.method: 提出了Ising-SIR模型，将传播机制分为空气传播（易感个体可从环境或感染的邻居处感染）和直接接触传播（仅通过密切接触感染）。在方格晶格上采用周期性边界条件进行蒙特卡洛模拟。
AI.result: 模拟显示传播机制显著影响增长动力学，产生不同的增长指数。直接接触传播机制下，某些参数的增长指数近似为2，与早期经验观察一致。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能够预测自然界中观察到的多种时空模式，为理解不同传播机制的疾病动力学提供了理论框架。

title: A Family of Distributions of Random Subsets for Controlling Positive and Negative Dependence
summary: Positive and negative dependence are fundamental concepts that characterize the attractive and repulsive behavior of random subsets. Although some probabilistic models are known to exhibit positive or negative dependence, it is challenging to seamlessly bridge them with a practicable probabilistic model. In this study, we introduce a new family of distributions, named the discrete kernel point process (DKPP), which includes determinantal point processes and parts of Boltzmann machines. We also develop some computational methods for probabilistic operations and inference with DKPPs, such as calculating marginal and conditional probabilities and learning the parameters. Our numerical experiments demonstrate the controllability of positive and negative dependence and the effectiveness of the computational methods for DKPPs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出离散核点过程（DKPP），一种能够统一刻画正负依赖关系（包括行列式点过程和部分玻尔兹曼机）的新型概率分布族，并开发了相应的计算与推理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有概率模型难以同时且灵活地刻画随机子集的正依赖（吸引性）与负依赖（排斥性），缺乏一个兼具理论统一性与实际可操作性的概率模型来无缝桥接这两种依赖关系。
AI.method: 引入离散核点过程（DKPP），将行列式点过程和部分玻尔兹曼机纳入统一框架；开发了计算边缘概率、条件概率以及参数学习的计算方法。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了DKPP对正负依赖的可控性以及所提计算方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DKPP作为一种新分布族，能够灵活控制随机子集的正负依赖关系，并具备可行的计算与推断方法，为相关研究提供了统一的理论与实践工具。

title: Entropic Optimal Transport Eigenmaps for Nonlinear Alignment and Joint Embedding of High-Dimensional Datasets
summary: Embedding high-dimensional data into a low-dimensional space is an indispensable component of data analysis. In numerous applications, it is necessary to align and jointly embed multiple datasets from different studies or experimental conditions. Such datasets may share underlying structures of interest but exhibit individual distortions, resulting in misaligned embeddings using traditional techniques. In this work, we propose Entropic Optimal Transport (EOT) eigenmaps, a principled approach for aligning and jointly embedding a pair of datasets with theoretical guarantees. Our approach leverages the leading singular vectors of the EOT plan matrix between two datasets to extract their shared underlying structure and align them in a common embedding space. We interpret our approach as an inter-data variant of the classical Laplacian eigenmaps and diffusion maps embeddings, showing that it enjoys many favorable analogous properties. We analyze a generative model in which two observed high-dimensional datasets share latent variables supported on a common low-dimensional manifold, while each dataset is subject to translation, geometric distortion, orthogonal nuisance structure, and noise. In a large-sample, high-dimensional regime, we prove that the EOT plan concentrates around a population kernel on an effective manifold determined by the geometric mean of the distortions, with invariance to translations, orthogonal nuisance structure, and noise. Subsequently, we relate our embedding to eigenfunctions of population-level operators encoding the density and geometry of the shared manifold. Finally, we showcase the performance of our approach for data integration and embedding through simulations and analyses of real-world biological data, demonstrating its advantages over alternative methods in challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵最优输运（EOT）特征映射，一种用于对齐和联合嵌入两个高维数据集的理论框架，通过EOT计划矩阵的前奇异向量提取共享底层结构，并在理论上证明其在大样本高维场景下的收敛性与几何不变性。
AI.motivation: 多数据集在联合分析时存在个体扭曲（如平移、几何畸变、正交干扰和噪声），导致传统降维方法无法正确对齐嵌入，亟需一种能提取共享结构并对抗各类扭曲的联合嵌入方法。
AI.method: 利用两个数据集之间的熵最优输运（EOT）计划矩阵的领先奇异向量，实现跨数据集的共享结构提取与对齐嵌入；将其解释为数据间版本的拉普拉斯特征映射与扩散映射，建立理论联系。
AI.result: 在大样本高维生成模型下，证明EOT计划收敛到有效流形上的总体核（该流形由畸变的几何均值决定），且对平移、正交干扰和噪声具有不变性；嵌入与编码共享流形密度和几何的总体算子特征函数相关。
AI.conclusion: EOT特征映射在理论和实验上均优于现有替代方法，为生物数据等跨数据集整合提供了有效的对齐嵌入方案。

title: Hybridization of Persistent Homology with Neural Networks for Time-Series Prediction: A Case Study in Wave Height
summary: Time-series prediction is an active area of research across various fields, often challenged by the fluctuating influence of short-term and long-term factors. In this study, we introduce a feature engineering method that enhances the predictive performance of neural network models. Specifically, we leverage computational topology techniques to derive valuable topological features from input data, boosting the predictive accuracy of our models. Our focus is on predicting wave heights, utilizing models based on topological features within feedforward neural networks (FNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), long short-term memory networks (LSTM), and RNNs with gated recurrent units (GRU). For time-ahead predictions, the enhancements in $R^2$ score were significant for FNNs, RNNs, LSTM, and GRU models. Additionally, these models also showed significant reductions in maximum errors and mean squared errors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算拓扑的特征工程方法，通过提取输入数据的拓扑特征来提升神经网络模型（FNN、RNN、LSTM、GRU）在波高时间序列预测中的性能，显著提高了R²分数并降低了最大误差和均方误差。
AI.motivation: 时间序列预测中，短期和长期因素的波动性影响使得预测精度难以保证，现有方法在捕捉数据深层结构方面存在不足。
AI.method: 利用计算拓扑技术从输入数据中提取有价值的拓扑特征，将这些特征注入FNN、RNN、LSTM和GRU等神经网络模型中，用于波高预测。
AI.result: 对于时间超前预测，FNN、RNN、LSTM和GRU模型的R²分数均获得显著提升，同时最大误差和均方误差也显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 计算拓扑特征工程能有效增强神经网络对时间序列数据的预测能力，尤其适用于波高预测等复杂时序任务。

title: Network inference applicable to both synchronous and desynchronous systems from oscillatory signals
summary: Synchronization is ubiquitous in nature, which is mathematically described by coupled oscillators. Synchronization strongly depends on the interaction network, and the network plays a crucial role in controlling the dynamics. To understand and control synchronization dynamics in the real world, it is essential to identify the network from the observed data. While previous studies have developed the methods for inferring the network of asynchronous systems, it remains challenging to infer the network of well-synchronized oscillators. In this study, we develop a method for inferring the network of synchronized and desynchronized oscillators from time series. Our method expands the applicability of network inference to a wider class of oscillatory systems. The proposed method discards a large part of data used for inference, which may seem counterintuitive. However, the effectiveness of the method is supported by the phase reduction theory, a well-established theory for weakly coupled oscillators. We verify the proposed method by applying it to simulated data of the limit-cycle oscillators. This study provides an important step towards understanding synchronization in real-world systems from a network perspective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从时间序列中推断同步和非同步振荡器网络的方法，通过丢弃大部分数据并基于相位缩减理论，成功扩展了网络推断在同步振荡系统中的应用范围。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中同步现象普遍存在，而同步动力学强烈依赖于相互作用网络。从观测数据中识别网络对于理解和控制同步至关重要，但现有方法难以推断高度同步振荡器的网络结构。
AI.method: 提出一种反直觉的方法：丢弃大部分用于推断的数据，基于弱耦合振荡器的相位缩减理论，从时间序列中推断同步和非同步振荡器的网络。
AI.result: 通过极限环振荡器的模拟数据验证了方法的有效性，表明该方法能够成功推断同步和非同步场景下的网络结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法扩展了网络推断在更广泛振荡系统中的适用性，为从网络视角理解现实世界中的同步现象提供了重要进展。

title: Modeling film flows down a rotating slippery cylinder
summary: This study investigates the nonlinear stability and dynamics of gravity-driven viscous films on a vertical rotating cylinder, considering both outer and inner surface flows with slip conditions at the cylinder wall. We develop an asymptotic model for the combined effects of rotation and wall slippage. Linear stability analysis indicates that wall slippage enhances instability on both surfaces, while rotation has differing impacts: it amplifies instability due to slip for outer surface flow but reduces it for inner surface flow. A weakly nonlinear stability analysis is then conducted to explore the combined impact of rotation and wall slip on flow stability beyond the linear regime, including the bifurcation of the nonlinear evolution equation for both surfaces. The traveling wave solution of the model is analyzed, showing how rotation affects nonlinear wave speed with a slippery wall. A stability analysis of the traveling wave solutions is also performed. Numerical simulations of the nonlinear evolution of the free surface reveal that increasing slip length enhances the choke phenomenon in inner surface flow, while rotation can delay this effect. Additionally, simulations show that for flow along the outer surface of a slippery rotating cylinder, the film tends to break up into droplets in the presence of rotation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究垂直旋转圆柱上重力驱动粘性薄膜的非线性稳定性与动力学，考虑内外表面流动及壁面滑移条件，通过渐近建模、线性/弱非线性稳定性分析、行波解及数值模拟揭示了旋转与壁面滑移对薄膜稳定性的耦合影响。
AI.motivation: 理解旋转和壁面滑移对垂直圆柱内外表面重力驱动粘性薄膜稳定性的耦合作用，填补现有研究对非线性阶段及滑移-旋转联合效应的空白。
AI.method: 建立考虑旋转和壁面滑移的渐近模型；进行线性稳定性分析；开展弱非线性稳定性分析（含分岔分析）；求解行波解并分析其稳定性；通过数值模拟非线性自由面演化。
AI.result: 壁面滑移增强内外表面不稳定性；旋转对外表面流放大滑移引起的不稳定性，对内表面流则减弱之；滑移长度增大加剧内表面流阻塞现象，旋转可延迟该效应；滑移旋转圆柱外表面薄膜趋于破碎成液滴。
AI.conclusion: 旋转与壁面滑移对垂直圆柱内外表面薄膜稳定性具有显著且不同的耦合效应，为相关工业过程（如涂覆、旋转干燥等）中的流动控制提供理论依据。

title: On a critical Hamiltonian system with Neumann boundary conditions
summary:
We consider the Hamiltonian system with Neumann boundary conditions: \[ -Δu + μu=v^{q }, \quad -Δv+ μv=u^{p} \quad \text{ in $Ω$}, \qquad
  u, v >0 \quad \text{ in $Ω$,} \qquad \partial_νu= \partial_νv=0 \quad \text{ on $\partial Ω$, } \] where $μ>0$ is a parameter and $Ω$ is a smooth bounded domain in $\mathbb R^N .$
  When $(p, q)$ approaches from below the critical hyperbola $N/(p+1) + N/(q+1)=N-2$, we build a solution which blows-up at a boundary point where the mean curvature achieves its minimum and negative value.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带Neumann边界条件的Hamiltonian系统，当指数(p,q)从下方逼近临界双曲线时，在平均曲率取最小负值的边界点处构造了一个爆破解。
AI.motivation: 研究带有Neumann边界条件的Hamiltonian椭圆方程组在临界指数附近解的爆破行为，特别是解在边界点处的集中现象。
AI.method: 采用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法，在平均曲率取最小负值的边界点附近构造爆破解，通过精细化渐近分析建立解的存在性。
AI.result: 当(p,q)从下方逼近临界双曲线N/(p+1)+N/(q+1)=N-2时，存在一个在边界点处爆破的正解，该边界点的平均曲率取全局最小值且为负值。
AI.conclusion: Neumann边界条件下Hamiltonian系统在临界指数附近存在边界爆破现象，且爆破位置由几何量——平均曲率的最小负值点决定。

title: A Real Generalized Trisecant Trichotomy
summary: The classical trisecant lemma says that a general chord of a non-degenerate space curve is not a trisecant; that is, the chord only meets the curve in two points. The generalized trisecant lemma extends the result to higher-dimensional varieties. It states that the linear space spanned by general points on a projective variety intersects the variety in exactly these points, provided the dimension of the linear space is smaller than the codimension of the variety and that the variety is irreducible, reduced, and non-degenerate. We prove a real analogue of the generalized trisecant lemma, which takes the form of a trichotomy. Along the way, we characterize the possible numbers of real intersection points between a real projective variety and a complimentary dimension real linear space. We show that any integer of correct parity between a minimum and a maximum number can be achieved. We then specialize to Segre-Veronese varieties, where our results apply to the identifiability of independent component analysis, tensor decomposition and to typical tensor ranks.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了广义三重割线引理的实代数版本，给出了一个三分法结论，并刻画了实射影簇与补维线性空间交点的实点数量可能性，进而应用于Segre-Veronese簇以解决独立成分分析、张量分解的可识别性及典型张量秩问题。
AI.motivation: 经典三重割线引理是代数几何中的基本工具，但其结果在实代数几何中缺乏对应的推广。本文旨在建立实代数几何版本的广义三重割线引理，以填补这一理论空白，并为涉及实代数簇的相交性分析提供理论依据。
AI.method: 首先证明广义三重割线引理的实代数版本，得到三分法结果；然后刻画实射影簇与补维线性空间交点的实点数量范围，证明介于最小值和最大值之间、且具有正确奇偶性的所有整数均可实现；最后将结果应用于Segre-Veronese簇。
AI.result: 建立了广义三重割线引理的实代数三分法版本；刻画了实射影簇与补维线性空间交点实点数的全部可能取值；在Segre-Veronese簇上得到具体应用结果。
AI.conclusion: 该实代数推广不仅完善了经典理论，还为独立成分分析的可识别性、张量分解的唯一性以及典型张量秩的确定等实际问题提供了新的理论工具。

title: The embedded Nash problem in singular spaces: the case of surfaces
summary: We introduce the embedded Nash problem allowing singularities in the ambient space, and solve it in the case of surfaces, generalizing \cite[Theorem 1.22]{BdlB}.

AI.tldr: 本文引入允许环境空间存在奇点的嵌入Nash问题，并在曲面情形下解决了该问题，推广了文献BdlB中的定理1.22。
AI.motivation: 将嵌入Nash问题推广到允许环境空间存在奇点的更一般情形，并证明在曲面情况下该问题的可解性。
AI.method: 通过推广BdlB文献中的定理1.22，在曲面情形下对嵌入Nash问题进行研究，允许环境空间包含奇点。
AI.result: 成功在曲面情形下解决了允许奇点的嵌入Nash问题，推广了前人的结果。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入Nash问题在曲面情形下可解，即使环境空间存在奇点，从而完成了对已有定理的推广。

title: Bifurcation diagrams for semilinear elliptic equations with singular weights in two dimensions
summary:
We consider the bifurcation diagram of radial solutions for the Gelfand problem with a positive radially symmetric weight in the unit ball. We deal with the exponential nonlinearity and a power-type nonlinearity. When the weight is constant, it is well-known that the bifurcation curve exhibits three different types depending on the dimension and the exponent of power for higher dimensions, while the curve exhibits only one type in two dimensions.
  In this paper, we succeed in realizing in two dimensions a phenomenon such that the bifurcation curve exhibits all of the three types, by choosing the weight appropriately. In particular, to the best of the author's knowledge, it is the first result to establish in two dimensions the bifurcation curve having no turning points.

AI.tldr: 本文研究单位球上具有正径向对称权重的Gelfand问题的径向解分岔图。对于常数权重，分岔曲线在二维空间仅呈现一种类型，而在高维空间则呈现三种类型。通过适当选择权重，作者首次在二维空间中实现了三种类型的分岔曲线，包括无转向点的曲线。
AI.motivation: 探索权重函数对Gelfand问题分岔行为的调控作用，特别是能否在二维空间中复现高维空间才有的三种分岔曲线类型。
AI.method: 通过选择合适的正径向对称权重函数，分析Gelfand问题（含指数非线性和幂型非线性）的径向解分岔图。
AI.result: 成功在二维空间中构造出三种类型的分岔曲线，其中包括首次在二维空间中建立的无转向点分岔曲线。
AI.conclusion: 权重函数可以显著改变Gelfand问题的分岔行为，使得二维空间也能展现原本仅在高维空间出现的多种分岔曲线类型。

title: A complementary result on a singular mean field equation with a sign-changing potential function
summary: In this note, we study the singular mean field equation defined on a Riemann surface with a sign-changing potential function. We prove if some singular sources happen to be placed on the zero-level curve of the potential function, a priori estimate can still be obtained. As a consequence of this estimate, existence and multiplicity results can still be obtained based on the topology of the manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了黎曼曲面上带变号势函数的奇异平均场方程，证明了当奇异源位于势函数零水平曲线上时仍可获得先验估计，并基于流形拓扑得到了存在性与多重性结果。
AI.motivation: 先前关于奇异平均场方程的研究通常要求势函数不变号或奇异源避开零水平曲线，本文旨在突破这一限制，探讨当奇异源恰好在势函数零水平曲线上时方程的可解性。
AI.method: 采用先验估计方法，结合黎曼曲面的几何拓扑性质进行分析，证明在奇异源位于势函数零水平曲线上的情况下仍能建立有效的先验估计，并利用拓扑度理论等工具推导存在性与多重性结论。
AI.result: 成功证明即使在势函数变号且奇异源位于零水平曲线上时，仍可获得先验估计；并基于流形拓扑获得了方程解的存在性与多重性结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文拓展了奇异平均场方程的先验估计理论，表明零水平曲线上的奇异源不构成本质障碍，解的存在性与多重性仍可由流形拓扑刻画。

title: The Hitchin Fibration for Symmetric Pairs
comment: v3: Heavily re-written. Figures added to section 3.4. Errors corrected proofs in Section 4. Section 5 expanded. Typos/small errors corrected throughout
summary: We introduce and describe the "regular quotient" for the Hitchin fibration for symmetric spaces and explain some basic consequences for Higgs bundles. We include an invariant theoretic approach to spectral covers in this setting for the particular space $\mathrm{GL}_{2n}/(\mathrm{GL}_n\times \mathrm{GL}_n)$. We also include a study of the regular centralizer group scheme for quasisplit pairs, including a Galois description of a closely related group scheme. We collect some basic consequences for Hitchin systems associated to such pairs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对对称空间的Hitchin纤维化引入并描述了"正则商"概念，解释了其对Higgs丛的基本影响。特别地，对空间GL₂ₙ/(GLₙ×GLₙ)采用了不变论方法研究谱覆盖，对拟分裂对研究了正则中心化子群概形，包括一个密切相关群概形的伽罗瓦描述，并总结了这类对的Hitchin系统的基本结论。
AI.motivation: 将"正则商"概念推广到对称空间的Hitchin纤维化中，填补该领域理论空白，并为理解相关Higgs丛的几何结构提供统一框架。
AI.method: 1) 引入对称空间Hitchin纤维化的正则商定义；2) 对GL₂ₙ/(GLₙ×GLₙ)空间采用不变论方法处理谱覆盖；3) 对拟分裂对的正则中心化子群概形进行伽罗瓦理论描述。
AI.result: 成功建立了对称空间Hitchin纤维化的正则商理论，获得了GL₂ₙ/(GLₙ×GLₙ)谱覆盖的不变论刻画，并给出了拟分裂对正则中心化子群概形的伽罗瓦描述。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为对称空间上的Hitchin系统提供了新的结构视角，正则商概念有助于进一步研究Higgs丛的模空间几何及其与可积系统的联系。

title: Accurate Prediction of Ligand-Protein Interaction Affinities with Fine-Tuned Small Language Models
summary: We describe the accurate prediction of ligand-protein interaction (LPI) affinities, also known as drug-target interactions (DTI), with instruction fine-tuned pretrained generative small language models (SLMs). We achieved accurate predictions for a range of affinity values associated with ligand-protein interactions on out-of-sample data in a zero-shot setting. Only the SMILES string of the ligand and the amino acid sequence of the protein were used as the model inputs. Our results demonstrate a clear improvement over machine learning (ML) and free-energy perturbation (FEP+) based methods in accurately predicting a range of ligand-protein interaction affinities, which can be leveraged to further accelerate drug discovery campaigns against challenging therapeutic targets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用指令微调的预训练生成式小语言模型（SLMs），仅以配体的SMILES字符串和蛋白质的氨基酸序列作为输入，在零样本设置下实现了对配体-蛋白质相互作用（LPI）亲和力的准确预测，性能优于传统机器学习方法和自由能微扰（FEP+）方法，可用于加速药物发现。
AI.motivation: 现有的配体-蛋白质相互作用亲和力预测方法（如传统机器学习和自由能微扰FEP+）在准确性和泛化能力上存在局限，尤其是在面对新型靶点（out-of-sample数据）时表现不佳，亟需一种更高效、准确且无需重新训练的预测方法。
AI.method: 采用指令微调（instruction fine-tuning）的预训练生成式小语言模型（SLMs），输入仅为配体的SMILES字符串和蛋白质的氨基酸序列，在零样本（zero-shot）条件下直接预测亲和力值。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，该方法对配体-蛋白质相互作用亲和力的预测准确率显著优于传统机器学习方法和自由能微扰（FEP+）方法，能够处理多种亲和力值范围的数据。
AI.conclusion: 指令微调的预训练生成式小语言模型在LPI亲和力预测任务上展现出强大的零样本泛化能力，可作为加速针对挑战性治疗靶点的药物发现的有效工具。

title: Load Balancing in Federated Learning
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a decentralized machine learning framework that enables learning from data distributed across multiple remote devices, enhancing communication efficiency and data privacy. Due to limited communication resources, a scheduling policy is often applied to select a subset of devices for participation in each FL round. The scheduling process confronts significant challenges due to the need for fair workload distribution, efficient resource utilization, scalability in environments with numerous edge devices, and statistically heterogeneous data across devices. This paper proposes a load metric for scheduling policies based on the Age of Information and addresses the above challenges by minimizing the load metric variance across the clients. Furthermore, a decentralized Markov scheduling policy is presented, that ensures a balanced workload distribution while eliminating the management overhead irrespective of the network size due to independent client decision-making. We establish the optimal parameters of the Markov chain model and validate our approach through simulations. The results demonstrate that reducing the load metric variance not only promotes fairness and improves operational efficiency, but also enhances the convergence rate of the learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息年龄（Age of Information）的负载度量指标，并通过最小化客户端间负载度量方差，结合去中心化马尔可夫调度策略，实现了联邦学习中的公平工作负载分配、高效资源利用和快速模型收敛。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中由于通信资源有限，需要对参与设备进行调度。现有调度策略面临公平工作负载分配、资源高效利用、大规模边缘设备环境下的可扩展性以及统计异构数据等挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于信息年龄的负载度量指标，通过最小化客户端间负载度量方差来优化调度；设计去中心化马尔可夫调度策略，使各客户端独立决策，消除管理开销；建立马尔可夫链模型的最优参数。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，降低负载度量方差不仅能促进公平性、提升运行效率，还能加速学习模型的收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了联邦学习调度中的公平性、资源利用率和可扩展性问题，同时提升了模型收敛性能。

title: A modified FC-Gram approximation algorithm with provable error bounds
summary: The FC-Gram trigonometric polynomial approximation of a non-periodic function that interpolates the function on equispaced grids was introduced in 2010 by Bruno and Lyon [J. Comput. Phys, 229(6):2009-2033, 2010]. Since then, the approximation algorithm and its further refinements have been used extensively in numerical solutions of various PDE-based problems, and it has had impressive success in handling challenging configurations. While much computational evidence exists in the literature confirming the rapid convergence of FC-Gram approximations, a theoretical convergence analysis has remained open. In this paper, we study a modified FC-Gram algorithm where the implicit least-squares-based periodic extensions of the Gram polynomials are replaced with an explicit extension utilizing two-point Hermite polynomials. This modification brings in two significant advantages - (i) as the extensions are known explicitly, the need to use computationally expensive precomputed extension data is eliminated, which, in turn, facilitates seamlessly changing the extension length, and (ii) allows for establishing provable error bounds for the modified approximations. We show that the numerical convergence rates are consistent with those predicted by the theory through a variety of computational experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对FC-Gram三角多项式逼近提出了一种改进算法，用显式两点Hermite扩展替代隐式最小二乘周期扩展，消除了预计算开销，并首次建立了理论收敛误差界。
AI.motivation: FC-Gram逼近在数值求解偏微分方程中广泛应用并表现出快速收敛，但其理论收敛分析一直缺失。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，同时改进算法效率。
AI.method: 将原FC-Gram算法中基于最小二乘的隐式Gram多项式周期扩展替换为利用两点Hermite多项式的显式扩展，从而获得显式扩展表达式，便于理论分析并消除预计算依赖。
AI.result: 改进后的FC-Gram算法无需预计算扩展数据，可灵活改变扩展长度，且建立了可证明的误差界。数值实验表明收敛率与理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 基于两点Hermite多项式的显式扩展方案在保持快速收敛的前提下，提升了算法灵活性与计算效率，并首次提供了严格的理论收敛保障。

title: Learning-Based Finite Element Methods Modeling for Complex Mechanical Systems
summary: Complex mechanic systems simulation is important in many real-world applications. The de-facto numeric solver using Finite Element Method (FEM) suffers from computationally intensive overhead. Though with many progress on the reduction of computational time and acceptable accuracy, the recent CNN or GNN-based simulation models still struggle to effectively represent complex mechanic simulation caused by the long-range spatial dependency of distance mesh nodes and independently learning local and global representation. In this paper, we propose a novel two-level mesh graph network. The key of the network is to interweave the developed Graph Block and Attention Block to better learn mechanic interactions even for long-rang spatial dependency. Evaluation on three synthetic and one real datasets demonstrates the superiority of our work. For example, on the Beam dataset, our work leads to 54.3\% lower prediction errors and 9.87\% fewer learnable network parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两级网格图网络（Two-Level Mesh Graph Network），通过交织图块（Graph Block）和注意力块（Attention Block）来同时学习局部和全局表示，解决长程空间依赖问题，在力学模拟任务上取得了更低的预测误差和更少的参数量。
AI.motivation: 传统的有限元法（FEM）计算开销大，现有CNN/GNN模拟模型难以有效处理长程空间依赖（远距离网格节点间的相互作用），且无法独立学习局部与全局表示。
AI.method: 提出一种两级网格图网络，核心是交织设计图块（Graph Block）和注意力块（Attention Block），图块负责捕获局部网格结构信息，注意力块负责建模长程空间依赖关系，两者交替堆叠实现局部与全局表示的联合学习。
AI.result: 在三个合成数据集和一个真实数据集上验证了有效性。在Beam数据集上，预测误差降低54.3%，可学习参数量减少9.87%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两级网格图网络能够有效建模复杂力学系统中的长程空间依赖，在降低预测误差的同时减少了模型参数量，是一种高效的力学仿真替代方案。

title: Nash equilibrium in a singular stochastic game between two renewable power producers with price impact
summary: We study the singular stochastic game, formulated in Awerkin and Vargiolu (Decis. Econ. Finance 44(2), 2021), between two agents aiming at maximizing their profits by installing photovoltaic panels and selling the produced electricity, net of installation costs, in the case that their cumulative installations have an impact on power prices. We first solve explicitly the static, one-step, version of the game, and find that Nash equilibria divide the state-space into four regions: one where both players are idle, two where only one player installs new panels, and one where both players install. In some particular regimes, we find that the latter may not be uniquely distinguished from the previous two. We then consider the dynamic, continuous-time, problem. Led by the intuition garnered in the static case, we assume a free-boundary structure similar to that arising in the one-step game and provide a rigorous verification theorem for the corresponding system of free-boundary HJB equations, also taking into account the lack of smoothness of the value functions near the free boundaries. Finally, for each regular solution of the HJB system, we show that there exists a unique equilibrium strategy, which is obtained as the solution to the Skorokhod-type problem associated with the free boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两个主体通过安装光伏板并出售电力（扣除安装成本）来最大化利润的奇异随机博弈，其中累计安装量影响电价。先求解静态一步博弈，发现纳什均衡将状态空间划分为四个区域：双方闲置、仅一方安装（两种情形）和双方均安装。在特定情况下，后者可能与前者无法唯一区分。随后扩展到动态连续时间问题，基于静态直觉假设自由边界结构，给出对应HJB方程组的验证定理，并考虑值函数在自由边界附近的光滑性缺失。最后，对每个HJB系统的正则解，证明存在唯一均衡策略，该策略是自由边界相关的Skorokhod型问题的解。
AI.motivation: 研究两个理性主体在光伏发电投资中的战略互动，其中累计装机量会反馈影响电价，从而形成博弈结构。已有文献仅处理单一主体或忽略电价反馈效应，本文填补了双主体奇异随机博弈在可再生能源投资领域的理论空白。
AI.method: 采用两步法：先求解静态（一步）博弈的纳什均衡，刻画状态空间分区结构；再基于静态直觉，将动态连续时间问题建模为自由边界HJB方程组，利用Skorokhod问题构造唯一均衡策略，并给出验证定理处理值函数非光滑性。
AI.result: 静态博弈中纳什均衡明确划分四个区域，且某些参数下"双方均安装"区域无法与"单方安装"区域唯一区分。动态问题中，每个HJB正则解对应唯一均衡策略，该策略由自由边界上的Skorokhod型问题唯一确定。
AI.conclusion: 本文为具有电价反馈效应的光伏投资博弈提供了完整的理论分析框架，静态与动态分析的一致性验证了自由边界结构的合理性，Skorokhod问题方法为求解此类奇异随机博弈提供了新途径。

title: An Optimal Control Approach for Inverse Problems with Deep Learnable Regularizers
summary: This paper introduces an optimal control framework to address the inverse problem using a learned regularizer, with applications in image reconstruction. We build upon the concept of Learnable Optimization Algorithms (LOA), which combine deep learning with traditional optimization schemes to improve convergence and stability in image reconstruction tasks such as CT and MRI. Our approach reformulates the inverse problem as a variational model where the regularization term is parameterized by a deep neural network (DNN). By viewing the parameter learning process as an optimal control problem, we leverage Pontryagin's Maximum Principle (PMP) to derive necessary conditions for optimality. We propose the Method of Successive Approximations (MSA) to iteratively solve the control problem, optimizing both the DNN parameters and the reconstructed image. Additionally, we introduce an augmented reverse-state method to enhance memory efficiency without compromising the convergence guarantees of the LOA framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优控制框架的逆问题求解方法，利用学习型正则化器进行图像重建。通过将学习过程视为最优控制问题，利用庞特里亚金最大值原理推导最优性条件，并采用逐次逼近法和增强逆态方法实现高效求解。
AI.motivation: 现有可学习优化算法(LOA)结合了深度学习与传统优化，但在参数学习过程中缺乏系统的理论指导，且内存效率有待提升。本文旨在建立一个严格的最优控制框架来形式化参数学习过程，并提高计算效率。
AI.method: 1) 将逆问题重构为变分模型，正则项由深度神经网络参数化；2) 将参数学习过程建模为最优控制问题，利用庞特里亚金最大值原理(PMP)推导最优性必要条件；3) 提出逐次逼近法(MSA)迭代求解控制问题，同时优化网络参数和重建图像；4) 引入增强逆态方法提升内存效率，同时保持LOA框架的收敛保证。
AI.result: 增强逆态方法在不牺牲收敛保证的前提下显著提升了内存效率；基于PMP的最优控制框架为学习型正则化器的参数优化提供了理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的最优控制框架为可学习优化算法提供了严格的理论基础，兼顾了收敛性、稳定性与内存效率，在CT和MRI等图像重建任务中具有应用价值。

title: The index of sub-laplacians: beyond contact manifolds
summary: In this paper we study the following question: do sub-Laplacian type operators have non-trivial index theory on Carnot manifolds in higher degree of nilpotency? The problem relates to characterizing the structure of the space of hypoelliptic sub-Laplacian type operators, and results going back to Rothschild-Stein and Helffer-Nourrigat. In two degrees of nilpotency, there is a rich index theory by work of van Erp-Baum on contact manifolds, that was later extended to polycontact manifolds by Goffeng-Kuzmin. We provide a plethora of examples in higher degree of nilpotency where the index theory is trivial.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Carnot流形上高幂零次数的次拉普拉斯型算子是否具有非平凡指标理论。在幂零次数为2时存在丰富的指标理论，但本文提供了大量高幂零次数下指标理论平凡的例子。
AI.motivation: 探究Carnot流形上高幂零次数的次拉普拉斯型算子是否具有非平凡指标理论，这一问题与Rothschild-Stein和Helffer-Nourrigat关于次椭圆型算子空间结构的工作相关。
AI.method: 通过构造和分析高幂零次数下的具体例子，检验次拉普拉斯型算子的指标理论是否平凡。
AI.result: 在高幂零次数下存在大量指标理论平凡的例子，与幂零次数为2时非平凡的指标理论形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 高幂零次数的Carnot流形上次拉普拉斯型算子的指标理论通常是平凡的，这揭示了幂零次数对指标理论非平凡性的关键影响。

title: Anti-ample bundle, nef vector bundle, big vector bundle
comment: 7 pages. To be published in Journal of Geometry and Physics
summary: We prove that the direct image of an anti-ample vector bundle is anti-ample under any finite flat morphism of non-singular projective varieties. In the second part we prove some properties of big and nef vector bundles. In particular it is shown that the tensor product of a nef vector bundle with a nef and big vector bundle is again nef and big. This generalizes a result of Schneider.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在非奇异射影簇的有限平坦态射下，反丰沛向量丛的直接像仍是反丰沛的。第二部分证明了丰沛和nef向量丛的一些性质，特别地，nef向量丛与nef且丰沛向量丛的张量积仍然是nef且丰沛的，推广了Schneider的一个结果。
AI.motivation: 研究有限平坦态射下反丰沛向量丛直接像的性质，以及推广nef与丰沛向量丛的张量积性质。
AI.method: 采用代数几何中的向量丛理论，通过有限平坦态射的函子性质以及nef与丰沛向量丛的判别准则进行证明。
AI.result: 反丰沛向量丛在有限平坦态射下的直接像保持反丰沛性；nef向量丛与nef且丰沛向量丛的张量积仍为nef且丰沛。
AI.conclusion: 推广了Schneider关于向量丛性质的经典结果，为向量丛的稳定性与正性研究提供了新的工具。

title: OmniJARVIS: Unified Vision-Language-Action Tokenization Enables Open-World Instruction Following Agents
summary: This paper presents OmniJARVIS, a novel Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model for open-world instruction-following agents in Minecraft. Compared to prior works that either emit textual goals to separate controllers or produce the control command directly, OmniJARVIS seeks a different path to ensure both strong reasoning and efficient decision-making capabilities via unified tokenization of multimodal interaction data. First, we introduce a self-supervised approach to learn a behavior encoder that produces discretized tokens for behavior trajectories $τ= \{o_0, a_0, \dots\}$ and an imitation learning policy decoder conditioned on these tokens. These additional behavior tokens will be augmented to the vocabulary of pretrained Multimodal Language Models. With this encoder, we then pack long-term multimodal interactions involving task instructions, memories, thoughts, observations, textual responses, behavior trajectories, etc into unified token sequences and model them with autoregressive transformers. Thanks to the semantically meaningful behavior tokens, the resulting VLA model, OmniJARVIS, can reason (by producing chain-of-thoughts), plan, answer questions, and act (by producing behavior tokens for the imitation learning policy decoder). OmniJARVIS demonstrates excellent performances on a comprehensive collection of atomic, programmatic, and open-ended tasks in open-world Minecraft. Our analysis further unveils the crucial design principles in interaction data formation, unified tokenization, and its scaling potentials. The dataset, models, and code will be released at https://craftjarvis.org/OmniJARVIS.

AI.tldr: OmniJARVIS 是一个面向Minecraft开放世界的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，通过将多模态交互数据（指令、记忆、思考、观察、行为轨迹等）统一token化，在自监督行为编码器与模仿学习策略解码器基础上，实现了推理、规划、问答与行动的统一，在原子任务、程序化任务和开放任务中均表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有工作在Minecraft开放世界指令跟随中，要么仅输出文本目标给独立控制器，要么直接生成控制命令，难以同时兼顾强推理能力与高效决策能力。本文旨在探索一条兼顾两者的新路径。
AI.method: 1) 自监督学习行为编码器，将行为轨迹$τ= \{o_0, a_0, \dots\}$转化为离散token；2) 将行为token扩充到预训练多模态语言模型的词表中；3) 将任务指令、记忆、思考、观察、文本响应、行为轨迹等统一打包为token序列，用自回归Transformer建模；4) 行为token通过模仿学习策略解码器生成具体动作。
AI.result: 在Minecraft开放世界的原子任务、程序化任务和开放任务综合评测中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: OmniJARVIS通过统一token化实现了推理、规划、问答和行动的统一；分析揭示了交互数据构成、统一token化及扩展潜力的关键设计原则。

title: Mobility-Aware Federated Self-supervised Learning in Vehicular Network
comment: This paper has been accepted by urban lifeline. The source code has been released at: The source code has been released at: https://github.com/qiongwu86/FLSimCo
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is an advanced distributed machine learning approach, that protects the privacy of each vehicle by allowing the model to be trained on multiple devices simultaneously without the need to upload all data to a road side unit (RSU). This enables FL to handle scenarios with sensitive or widely distributed data. However, in these fields, it is well known that the labeling costs can be a significant expense, and models relying on labels are not suitable for these rapidly evolving fields especially in vehicular networks, or mobile internet of things (MIoT), where new data emerges constantly. To handle this issue, the self-supervised learning paves the way for training without labels. Additionally, for vehicles with high velocity, owing to blurred images, simple aggregation not only impacts the accuracy of the aggregated model but also reduces the convergence speed of FL. This paper proposes a FL algorithm based on image blur level to aggregation, called FLSimCo, which does not require labels and serves as a pre-training stage for self-supervised learning in the vehicular environment. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm exhibits fast and stable convergence.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向车载网络的无标签联邦学习算法FLSimCo，根据图像模糊程度进行聚合，实现了快速稳定的收敛。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在车载网络中面临标注成本高、新数据持续涌现导致有标签模型不适用的问题，同时高速车辆产生的模糊图像会影响聚合精度和收敛速度。
AI.method: 提出FLSimCo算法，基于图像模糊程度进行聚合，结合自监督学习实现无标签训练，作为车载环境下自监督学习的预训练阶段。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明所提算法实现了快速且稳定的收敛。
AI.conclusion: FLSimCo通过引入图像模糊度感知的聚合策略，有效解决了车载联邦学习中无标签训练和模糊图像带来的挑战。

title: Numerical Analysis of the Parallel Orbital-Updating Approach for Eigenvalue Problems
summary: The parallel orbital-updating approach is an orbital/eigenfunction iteration based approach for solving eigenvalue problems when many eigenpairs are required. It has been proven to be efficient, for instance, in electronic structure calculations. In this paper, based on the investigation of a quasi-orthogonality, we present the numerical analysis of the parallel orbital-updating approach for linear eigenvalue problems, including convergence and error estimates of the numerical approximations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对并行轨道更新方法（一种用于求解特征值问题的轨道/本征函数迭代方法），基于拟正交性的研究，给出了线性特征值问题的数值分析，包括收敛性和数值逼近的误差估计。
AI.motivation: 并行轨道更新方法在电子结构计算等领域已被证明高效，但缺乏严格的数值分析基础，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 基于拟正交性的研究，对并行轨道更新方法进行数值分析，包括收敛性和误差估计的理论推导。
AI.result: 给出了并行轨道更新方法在线性特征值问题上的收敛性证明和数值逼近的误差估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文为并行轨道更新方法提供了严格的数值分析基础，从理论上保证了该方法的可靠性。

title: Dimension reduction for large-scale stochastic systems with non-zero initial states and controlled diffusion
summary: In this paper, we establish new strategies to reduce the dimension of large-scale controlled stochastic differential equations with non-zero initial states. The first approach transforms the original setting into a stochastic system with zero initial states. This transformation naturally leads to equations with controlled diffusion. A detailed analysis of dominant subspaces and bounds for the reduction error is provided in this controlled diffusion framework. Subsequently, we introduce a reduced system for the original framework and prove an a-priori error bound for the first ansatz. This bound involves so-called Hankel singular values that are linked to a new pair of Gramians. A second strategy is presented that is based on the idea of reducing control and initial state dynamics separately. Here, different Gramians are used in order to derive a reduced model and their relation to dominant subspaces are pointed out. We also show an a posteriori error bound for the second approach involving two types of Hankel singular values.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非零初始状态的大规模受控随机微分方程，提出了两种新的降维策略：第一种通过将系统转化为零初始状态并引入受控扩散框架进行分析；第二种分别对控制动力学和初始状态动力学进行降维。两种方法均建立了与新型Gramians和Hankel奇异值相关的误差界。
AI.motivation: 现有模型降维方法主要针对零初始状态的随机系统，但实际工程和科学问题中常涉及非零初始条件，需要发展适用于此类场景的降维理论和误差分析框架。
AI.method: 方法一：通过变换将非零初始状态系统转化为零初始状态系统，在受控扩散框架下分析主导子空间并推导先验误差界（涉及新型Gramians对应的Hankel奇异值）。方法二：分别对控制动力学和初始状态动力学进行独立降维，利用不同类型的Gramians和两类Hankel奇异值建立后验误差界。
AI.result: 为两种降维策略分别建立了严格的误差界：方法一得到先验误差界，方法二得到后验误差界，并阐明了Gramians与主导子空间的关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两种策略有效解决了非零初始状态受控随机微分方程的降维问题，为后续在随机控制、滤波等领域的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Convergence analysis of exponential time differencing scheme for the nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard equation
summary: In this paper, we present a rigorous proof of the convergence of first order and second order exponential time differencing (ETD) schemes for solving the nonlocal Cahn-Hilliard (NCH) equation. The spatial discretization employs the Fourier spectral collocation method, while the time discretization is implemented using ETD-based multistep schemes. The absence of a higher-order diffusion term in the NCH equation poses a significant challenge to its convergence analysis. To tackle this, we introduce new error decomposition formulas and employ the higher-order consistency analysis. These techniques enable us to establish the $\ell^\infty$ bound of numerical solutions under some natural constraints. By treating the numerical solution as a perturbation of the exact solution, we derive optimal convergence rates in $\ell^\infty(0,T;H_h^{-1})\cap \ell^2(0,T; \ell^2)$. We conduct several numerical experiments to validate the accuracy and efficiency of the proposed schemes, including convergence tests and the observation of long-term coarsening dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文严格证明了非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程的一阶和二阶指数时间差分（ETD）格式的收敛性，通过新的误差分解和高阶一致性分析，在自然约束下获得了数值解的ℓ∞有界性和最优收敛速率，并通过数值实验验证了精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程缺乏高阶扩散项，导致其收敛分析面临重大挑战，现有理论尚不完善，需要建立严格的收敛性理论。
AI.method: 空间离散采用傅里叶谱配点法，时间离散采用基于ETD的多步格式；引入新的误差分解公式，运用高阶一致性分析技术；将数值解视为精确解的扰动进行处理。
AI.result: 在自然约束条件下建立了数值解的ℓ∞有界性；导出了ℓ∞(0,T;H_h^{-1})∩ℓ^2(0,T;ℓ^2)空间中的最优收敛速率；数值实验验证了格式的精度和效率，包括收敛性测试和长期粗化动力学观测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ETD格式对于非局部Cahn-Hilliard方程具有严格的收敛性保证和最优收敛速率，数值实验支持理论结果，方法可推广至其他非局部模型。

title: Optimal Control and Potential Games in the Mean Field
summary: We study a mean field optimal control problem with general non-Markovian dynamics, including both common noise and jumps. We show that its minimizers are Nash equilibria of an associated mean field game of controls. These types of games are necessarily potential, and the Nash equilibria derived as the minimizers of the control problem are closely connected to McKean-Vlasov equations of Langevin type. To illustrate the general theory, we present several examples, including a mean field game of controls with interactions through a price variable, and mean field Cucker-Smale Flocking and Kuramoto models. We also establish the invariance property of the value function, a key ingredient used in our proofs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了含一般非马尔可夫动力学（含共同噪声和跳跃）的均场最优控制问题，证明了其极小化子是关联均场控制博弈的纳什均衡，并展示了与Langevin型McKean-Vlasov方程的联系，通过价格变量交互的均场控制博弈、Cucker-Smale集群模型和Kuramoto模型等实例加以说明。
AI.motivation: 将均场最优控制问题推广到更一般的非马尔可夫动力学场景（包含共同噪声和跳跃），并揭示其与均场控制博弈纳什均衡之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明均场最优控制问题的极小化子对应于均场控制博弈的纳什均衡，利用价值函数的不变性作为关键证明工具，并通过多个具体实例（价格变量交互、Cucker-Smale集群、Kuramoto模型）验证理论结果。
AI.result: 证明了在非马尔可夫动力学下均场最优控制问题的极小化子即为均场控制博弈的纳什均衡，且此类博弈必然是势博弈；建立了与Langevin型McKean-Vlasov方程的联系。
AI.conclusion: 将均场最优控制与均场控制博弈之间的等价关系推广到了更一般的非马尔可夫框架（含共同噪声和跳跃），并通过多个应用实例展示了理论的广泛适用性。

title: Deep Neural Networks for Predicting Recurrence and Survival in Patients with Esophageal Cancer After Surgery
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. To appear in CaPTion: MICCAI Workshop on Cancer Prevention, detection, and intervenTion, Sharib Ali et al., MICCAI 2024, Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Springer
summary: Esophageal cancer is a major cause of cancer-related mortality internationally, with high recurrence rates and poor survival even among patients treated with curative-intent surgery. Investigating relevant prognostic factors and predicting prognosis can enhance post-operative clinical decision-making and potentially improve patients' outcomes. In this work, we assessed prognostic factor identification and discriminative performances of three models for Disease-Free Survival (DFS) and Overall Survival (OS) using a large multicenter international dataset from ENSURE study. We first employed Cox Proportional Hazards (CoxPH) model to assess the impact of each feature on outcomes. Subsequently, we utilised CoxPH and two deep neural network (DNN)-based models, DeepSurv and DeepHit, to predict DFS and OS. The significant prognostic factors identified by our models were consistent with clinical literature, with post-operative pathologic features showing higher significance than clinical stage features. DeepSurv and DeepHit demonstrated comparable discriminative accuracy to CoxPH, with DeepSurv slightly outperforming in both DFS and OS prediction tasks, achieving C-index of 0.735 and 0.74, respectively. While these results suggested the potential of DNNs as prognostic tools for improving predictive accuracy and providing personalised guidance with respect to risk stratification, CoxPH still remains an adequately good prediction model, with the data used in this study.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ENSURE研究的大规模多中心国际数据集，评估了CoxPH、DeepSurv和DeepHit三种模型在食管癌无病生存期（DFS）和总生存期（OS）预测中的表现。术后病理特征比临床分期特征更具显著性，DeepSurv在判别准确性上略优于CoxPH（DFS C-index: 0.735, OS C-index: 0.74），但CoxPH仍是一个足够好的预测模型。
AI.motivation: 食管癌术后复发率高、生存率低，需要识别相关预后因素并预测预后，以改善术后临床决策和患者结局。
AI.method: 使用ENSURE研究的大规模多中心国际数据集，首先用Cox比例风险模型评估各特征对结局的影响，然后使用CoxPH和两个深度神经网络模型（DeepSurv和DeepHit）预测DFS和OS。
AI.result: 术后病理特征比临床分期特征更具显著性；DeepSurv和DeepHit判别准确性与CoxPH相当，DeepSurv略优（DFS C-index: 0.735, OS C-index: 0.74）。
AI.conclusion: DNN模型有潜力作为预后工具提高预测精度和提供个性化风险分层指导，但在本研究所用数据上CoxPH仍是足够好的预测模型。

title: Gradient directions and relative inexactness in optimization and machine learning
summary: In this paper, we investigate the influence of noise giving an estimate of the gradient having a acute angle with the original. Noise amplitude has a relative model. The work offers both theoretical calculations and theorems, as well as experimental results. Classic machine learning problems were chosen as experiments -- linear and logistic regression, computer vision and natural language processing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了与原始梯度成锐角的噪声对梯度估计的影响，提出了噪声幅度的相对模型，并通过理论和实验验证了在线性回归、逻辑回归、计算机视觉和自然语言处理等经典机器学习问题上的表现。
AI.motivation: 探索与原始梯度方向成锐角的噪声对梯度估计的影响，建立噪声幅度的相对模型，从而更好地理解噪声在优化过程中的作用机制。
AI.method: 提出了噪声幅度的相对模型，进行了理论推导与定理证明，并在线性回归、逻辑回归、计算机视觉和自然语言处理等经典机器学习任务上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: 在多个经典机器学习任务（线性回归、逻辑回归、CV、NLP）上展示了所提噪声模型的效果，验证了理论分析的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 与原始梯度成锐角的噪声对梯度估计有显著影响，所提出的相对噪声幅度模型在理论和实验上均有效。

title: Mathematical Optimization-Based Period Estimation with Outliers and Missing Observations
summary: We consider the frequency estimation of periodic signals using noisy time-of-arrival (TOA) information with missing (sparse) data contaminated with outliers. We tackle the problem from a mathematical optimization standpoint, formulating it as a linear regression with an unknown increasing integer independent variable and outliers. Assuming an upper bound on the variance of the noise, we derive an online, parallelizable, near-CRLB optimization-based algorithm amortized to a linear complexity. We demonstrate the outstanding robustness of our algorithm to noise and outliers by testing it against diverse randomly generated signals. Our algorithm handles outliers by design and yields precise estimations even with up to 20% of contaminated data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数学优化的算法，用于在含离群值和缺失数据的场景下，利用含噪到达时间信息进行周期信号频率估计。该算法在线、可并行、复杂度为线性，在高达20%数据被污染的情况下仍能实现精确估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理含离群值和稀疏数据的到达时间（TOA）信号频率估计时鲁棒性不足，缺乏从数学优化角度系统解决该问题的方案。
AI.method: 将问题建模为含未知递增整数自变量和离群值的线性回归问题；假设噪声方差有上界，推导出一种在线、可并行、逼近CRLB的优化算法，算法复杂度为线性。
AI.result: 算法对噪声和离群值表现出卓越的鲁棒性，即使在高达20%数据被污染的情况下仍能实现精确的频率估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法通过设计自然地处理离群值，在稀疏、高噪声、含离群值的TOA信号频率估计任务中展现出优越性能。

title: Numerical study of cavitation bubble dynamics in a flowing tube
summary: Cavitation in tubes is a common occurrence in nature and engineering applications. Previous studies of cavitation bubble dynamics mainly consider bubbles in stagnant-water tubes, but the dynamics of cavitation bubbles in tubes with flow is not clear. This study investigates the dynamics of cavitation bubbles in tubes with flow by numerical simulations. The results show that, unlike bubbles in stagnant-water tubes, bubbles under the combined effects of water inflow and tube wall confinement exhibit asymmetric behavior along the axis of the tube. The inflow suppresses the development of the bubble interface near the tube inlet, causing that side of the interface to move with the inflow. In contrast, the expansion and contraction of the bubble and the generation of liquid jets occur on the side near the outlet. This feature results in significant asymmetry in the bubble interface, therefore we introduce a skewness parameter to characterize the difference in length between the left and right parts of the bubble during the bubble evolution. The evolution of the bubble significantly affects the mass flow rate at the outlet of the tube, and even leads to backflow during the bubble contraction process.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究了有水流条件下管中空化气泡的动力学特性，发现入流与管壁联合作用导致气泡沿管轴呈现非对称演化，入流抑制进气口侧气泡界面发展，而气泡膨胀、收缩及射流形成集中在出口侧，并引入偏度参数表征这种非对称性，同时气泡演化会显著影响出口质量流量甚至引发回流。
AI.motivation: 已有研究主要关注静水管中的空化气泡动力学，但对有流动管中气泡的行为尚不清楚，因此本文旨在揭示入流条件下管中空化气泡的动力学特性。
AI.method: 采用数值模拟方法研究有流动管中空化气泡的动力学行为。
AI.result: 1) 入流与管壁约束共同作用下，气泡沿管轴呈现非对称演化；2) 入流抑制进气口侧气泡界面发展，使其随入流移动；3) 气泡膨胀、收缩及液体射流形成集中在出口侧；4) 提出偏度参数表征气泡左右部分的长度差异；5) 气泡演化显著影响出口质量流量，甚至导致收缩过程中出现回流。
AI.conclusion: 有流动管中的空化气泡动力学与静水管中显著不同，入流诱导的非对称性及对出口流量的影响具有重要的工程意义。

title: Flux scaling in Rayleigh Bénard convection: a local boundary layer analysis
summary: We study the effect of shear due to the large scale flow (LSF) on the heat flux in Rayleigh B'enard convection for a range of near-plate Rayleigh numbers $8\times 10^7 \leq Ra_w \leq 5\times 10^{14}$, by studying its effect on the local boundary layers (BLs) on either sides of the plumes, which are much thinner than the global shear BL created by the LSF velocity $V_F$. Considering these local BLs forced externally by the LSF, we obtain a fifth order algebraic equation for the local boundary layer thicknesses. Solving these equations numerically using $Re$ relations for aspect ratios $Γ=1$ and 0.5, we obtain the variation of the local BL thicknesses with the longitudinal distance for various $Ra_w$. We find that the average shear acting on the edges of these local BLs ($\overline{u|}_{z=δ}$) increases as $\overline{u|}_{z=δ} \sim Ra_w^{1/3}$ for $8\times 10^7\leq Ra_w \leq 10^{12}$ at $Γ=1$, and as $\overline{u|}_{z=δ} \sim Ra_w^{0.38}$ for $1\times 10^{11}\leq Ra_w \leq 5\times 10^{14}$ at $Γ=0.5$. We then estimate the average local thermal BL thickness to find the global Nusselt number $Nu$.We find that $Nu\sim Ra_w^m$, where $m\approx 0.327$ for $8\times 10^7 \leq Ra_w \leq 1\times 10^{12}$ at $Γ=1$, and $m=0.33$ for $1\times10^{11}\leq Ra_w \leq 5\times10^{14}$ at $Γ=0.5$. Inspite of the increasing shear on these BLs with increasing $Ra_w$, we then surprisingly obtain the classical 1/3 scaling of flux since the shear forcing acting on those BLs remains sub-dominant compared to the NCBL velocities ($V_{bl}$) within these BLs, upto $Ra_w\leq 5\times10^{14}$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了瑞利-贝纳德对流中大尺度流动（LSF）产生的剪切对热通量的影响，发现尽管剪切随Ra_w增强，但由于剪切相对于自然对流边界层速度仍为亚主导，热通量在高达Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴范围内仍保持经典的1/3标度律。
AI.motivation: 探究大尺度流动产生的剪切作用对瑞利-贝纳德对流中局部边界层及整体热通量的影响机制，以验证剪切增强是否改变经典热通量标度律。
AI.method: 通过考虑大尺度流动对局部边界层（比全局剪切边界层更薄）的外部强迫，建立局部边界层厚度的五阶代数方程；结合纵横比Γ=1和0.5的Re关系进行数值求解，得到不同Ra_w下局部边界层厚度随纵向距离的变化；进而估算平均局部热边界层厚度以计算全局努塞尔数Nu。
AI.result: 局部边界层边缘的平均剪切速度在Γ=1时呈~Ra_w^{1/3}标度（8×10⁷≤Ra_w≤10¹²），在Γ=0.5时呈~Ra_w^{0.38}标度（1×10¹¹≤Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴）；全局Nu~Ra_w^m，其中Γ=1时m≈0.327，Γ=0.5时m=0.33，均接近1/3经典标度。
AI.conclusion: 尽管大尺度流动产生的剪切随Ra_w增强，但在Ra_w≤5×10¹⁴范围内，剪切力相对于自然对流边界层内部速度仍为亚主导，因此热通量仍保持经典1/3标度律，未发生转变。

title: Beyond theory driven discovery: hot random search and datum derived structures
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures, contributed to Data-driven discovery in the chemical sciences Faraday Discussion
summary: Data driven methods have transformed the prospects of the computational chemical sciences, with machine learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) speeding up calculations by several orders of magnitude. I reflect on theory driven, as opposed to data driven, discovery based on ab initio random structure searching (AIRSS), and then introduce two methods which exploit machine learning acceleration. I show how long high throughput anneals, between direct structural relaxation, enabled by ephemeral data derived potentials (EDDPs), can be incorporated into AIRSS to bias the sampling of challenging systems towards low energy configurations. Hot AIRSS (hot-AIRSS) preserves the parallel advantage of random search, while allowing much more complex systems to be tackled. This is demonstrated through searches for complex boron structures in large unit cells. I then show how low energy carbon structures can be directly generated from a single, experimentally determined, diamond structure. An extension to the generation of random sensible structures, candidates are stochastically generated and then optimised to minimise the difference between the EDDP environment vector and that of the reference diamond structure. The distance-based cost function is captured in an actively learned EDDP. Graphite, small nanotubes and caged, fullerene-like, structures emerge from searches using this potential, along with a rich variety of tetrahedral framework structures. Using the same approach, the pyrope, Mg$_3$Al$_2$(SiO$_4$)$_3$, garnet structure is recovered from a low energy AIRSS structure generated in a smaller unit cell with a different chemical composition. The relationship of this approach to modern diffusion model based generative methods is discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于理论驱动的从头算随机结构搜索（AIRSS）方法，并引入了两种利用机器学习加速的新方法：热AIRSS（hot-AIRSS）和基于距离的EDDP生成方法。hot-AIRSS通过在结构弛豫之间加入高通量退火，利用瞬态数据衍生势（EDDP）偏置采样，成功搜索了复杂硼结构；而第二种方法则通过最小化EDDP环境向量与参考金刚石结构之间的差异，生成了石墨、纳米管、富勒烯状结构及多种四面体框架碳结构，并从不同化学组成的小晶胞中恢复了镁铝榴石结构。文章还讨论了该方法与现代扩散模型生成方法的关系。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的机器学习方法虽然极大加速了计算化学，但基于物理理论驱动的结构发现方法仍具有不可替代的价值。作者希望结合机器学习的加速能力与理论驱动的结构化搜索方法，以解决更复杂体系的结构预测问题。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：(1) hot-AIRSS：在AIRSS的结构弛豫步骤之间引入高通量退火，利用EDDP势偏置采样，保持随机搜索的并行优势；(2) 基于距离的EDDP生成方法：从实验确定的金刚石结构出发，随机生成候选结构并优化，最小化其EDDP环境向量与参考结构之间的差异，通过主动学习EDDP捕获距离代价函数。
AI.result: hot-AIRSS成功搜索了复杂硼结构的大晶胞；第二种方法从金刚石结构生成了石墨、小纳米管、笼状富勒烯状结构及多种四面体框架碳结构，并从不同化学组成的小晶胞低能AIRSS结构中恢复了镁铝榴石（Mg₃Al₂(SiO₄)₃）石榴石结构。
AI.conclusion: 理论驱动的结构搜索方法结合机器学习加速（尤其是EDDP）可以有效处理复杂体系的结构预测问题；基于环境向量距离的生成方法能够从已知结构逆向生成多种低能碳同素异形体，并具有跨化学组成的结构迁移能力；该思路与现代扩散模型生成方法存在关联。

title: G4CASCADE: A data-driven implementation of (n, $γ$) cascades in Geant4
summary: De-excitation $γ$ cascades from neutron captures form a dominant background to MeV-scale signals. The Geant4 Monte Carlo simulation toolkit is widely used to model backgrounds in nuclear and particle physics experiments. While its current modules for simulating (n, $γ$) signals, G4NDL and G4PhotoEvaporation, are excellent for many applications, they do not reproduce known gamma-ray lines and correlations relevant at 2-15 MeV. G4CASCADE is a new data-driven Geant4 module that simulates (n, $γ$) de-excitation pathways, with options for how to handle shortcomings in nuclear data. Benchmark comparisons to measured gamma-ray lines and level structures in the ENSDF database show significant improvements, with decreased residuals and full energy conservation. This manuscript describes the underlying calculations performed by G4CASCADE, its various usage options, and benchmark comparisons. G4CASCADE for Geant4-10 is available on GitHub at https://github.com/UCRDarkMatter/CASCADE

AI.tldr: 本文介绍G4CASCADE，一个基于Geant4的新型数据驱动模块，用于模拟中子俘获后的γ退激发级联过程。相比现有模块G4NDL和G4PhotoEvaporation，G4CASCADE能更准确地再现2-15 MeV能区的已知γ射线线和关联，同时保持能量守恒，在ENSDF数据库基准测试中表现出显著改进。
AI.motivation: 中子俘获后的γ退激发级联是MeV级信号的主要本底来源。现有Geant4模块（G4NDL和G4PhotoEvaporation）虽适用于多数应用，但无法准确再现2-15 MeV能区的γ射线线和关联，需要更精确的模拟工具以改进核物理与粒子物理实验中的本底建模。
AI.method: G4CASCADE采用数据驱动方法，基于现有核数据模拟(n, γ)退激发路径，并提供多种选项以处理核数据不完整性问题。通过与ENSDF数据库中测量的γ射线线和能级结构进行基准对比评估性能。
AI.result: 与ENSDF数据库的基准比较表明，G4CASCADE在残差和能量守恒方面均有显著改进，能更准确地再现已知γ射线线和能级结构。
AI.conclusion: G4CASCADE作为Geant4-10的新型模块，能够更精确地模拟中子俘获γ退激发级联，适用于需要准确本底建模的核物理与粒子物理实验。该模块代码已在GitHub上开源发布。

title: Perspective: Floquet engineering topological states from effective models towards realistic materials
summary: With significant advances in classifying and cataloguing topological matter, the focus of topological physics has shifted towards quantum control, particularly the creation and manipulation of topological phases of matter. Floquet engineering, the concept of tailoring a system by periodic fields, offers a powerful tool to manipulate electronic properties of condensed systems, and even to create exotic non-equilibrium topological states that are impossibly present in equilibrium scenarios. In this perspective, we give a brief review of recent progress in theoretical investigations of Floquet engineering topological states from effective models towards realistic materials. We show that light irradiation can realize various desired topological states through the introduction of symmetry breaking, such as first- and higher-order Weyl fermions, quadrupole topological insulator with periodic driving and disorder, quantum anomalous Hall effects with a tunable Chern number, as well as beyond. Moreover, based on first-principles calculations and Floquet theorem, we show several realistic material candidates proposed as potential hosts for promising Floquet topological states, facilitating their verification in experiments. We believe that our perspective on Floquet engineering of topological states will advance further studies of rich exotic light-induced phenomena in condensed matter physics.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Floquet工程在拓扑物态调控中的最新理论进展，展示了通过周期性光场驱动可以在有效模型和实际材料中实现多种非平衡拓扑态（如高阶外尔费米子、四极拓扑绝缘体、量子反常霍尔效应等），并结合第一性原理计算提出了若干实验可行的候选材料。
AI.motivation: 拓扑物理学已从分类和编目转向量子调控，特别是创造和操控非平衡拓扑物态。Floquet工程利用周期性光场调控电子性质，能够实现平衡态下不可能存在的拓扑态，为量子控制提供新途径。
AI.method: 综述理论进展：从有效模型出发，结合Floquet定理和第一性原理计算，分析光辐照引入对称性破缺实现各类拓扑态（如第一/高阶外尔费米子、四极拓扑绝缘体、可调陈数的量子反常霍尔效应等），并列举实际材料候选者。
AI.result: 光驱动可实现多种非平衡拓扑态，包括高阶外尔费米子、具有周期驱动和无序的四极拓扑绝缘体、陈数可调的量子反常霍尔效应等；通过第一性原理计算识别了多个有望承载Floquet拓扑态的实验可行材料。
AI.conclusion: Floquet工程为创造和调控拓扑物态提供了强大工具，推动了对光诱导新奇现象的研究，有望在凝聚态物理中开拓更广泛的研究方向。

title: Availability versus carrying capacity: Phases of asymmetric exclusion processes competing for finite pools of resources
summary: We address how the interplay between the finite availability and carrying capacity of particles at different parts of a spatially extended system can control the steady state currents and density profiles in the one-dimensional current-carrying lanes connecting the different parts of the system. To study this, we set up a minimal model consisting of two particle reservoirs of the same finite carrying capacity connected by two equally sized anti-parallel asymmetric exclusion processes (TASEP). We focus on the steady-state currents and particle density profiles in the two TASEP lanes. The ensuing phases and the phase diagrams, which can be remarkably complex, are parametrized by the model parameters defining particle exchange between the TASEP lanes and the reservoirs and the filling fraction of the particles that determine the total resources available. These parameters may be tuned to make the densities of the two TASEP lanes globally uniform or piece-wise continuous in the form of a combination of a single localized domain wall and a spatially constant density or a pair of delocalized domain walls. Our model reveals that the two reservoirs can be preferentially populated or depopulated in the steady states.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建两个有限容量粒子储库连接两条反平行TASEP通道的最小模型，研究了有限粒子可用性和承载能力对一维输运通道中稳态电流和密度分布的控制作用，揭示了复杂的相图及可调控的密度分布模式（全局均匀、单一局域畴壁、双退局域畴壁），并发现储库可被优先占据或排空。
AI.motivation: 探究空间扩展系统中，不同区域间粒子的有限可用性和承载能力如何相互作用，进而控制连接这些区域的一维电流通道中的稳态电流和密度分布。
AI.method: 构建最小模型：两个相同有限承载容量的粒子储库，通过两条等长的反平行非对称排斥过程（TASEP）通道连接。通过参数化TASEP通道与储库间的粒子交换参数以及决定总资源的填充率，分析稳态电流和密度分布。
AI.result: 发现了由模型参数控制的复杂相图；密度分布可呈现全局均匀、单一局域畴壁加常数密度组合、或双退局域畴壁等多种形式；储库在稳态下可被优先占据或排空。
AI.conclusion: 储库的有限承载能力与粒子总资源之间的相互作用是决定一维输运通道中稳态电流和密度分布的关键因素，模型揭示了系统中丰富的相行为与可控性。

title: Current fluctuations for the boundary-driven zero-range process on graphs: microscopic versus macroscopic approach and a theory of non-reversible resistor-like networks
comment: 37 pages, 6 figures; minor corrections, to appear on Annales Henri Poincaré
summary: We compute the joint large deviation rate functional in the limit of large time for the current flowing through the edges of a finite graph on which a boundary-driven system of stochastic particles evolves with zero-range dynamics.This generalizes one-dimensional results previously obtained with different approaches; our alternative techniques illuminate various connections and complementary perspectives. In particular, we here use a variational approach to derive the rate functional by contraction from a level 2.5 large deviation rate functional. We perform an exact minimization and finally obtain the rate functional as a variational problem involving a superposition of cost functions for each edge. The contributions from different edges are not independent since they are related by the values of a potential function on the nodes of the graph. The rate functional on the graph is a microscopic version of the continuous rate functional predicted by the macroscopic fluctuation theory, and we indeed show a convergence in the scaling limit.
