If we split the graph into two connected regions by a cutset and are interested just in the current flowing through the cutset, we find that the result is the same as that of an effective system composed of only one effective edge (as happens at macroscopic level and is expected also for other models). The characteristics of this effective edge are related to the ``capacities'' of the graph and can be obtained by a reduction using elementary transformations as in electrical networks; specifically, we treat components in parallel, in series, and in $N$-star configurations (reduced to effective complete $N$-graphs). Our reduction procedure is directly related to the reduction to the trace process and, since the dynamics is in general not reversible, it is also closely connected to the theory of non-reversible electrical networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有限图上具有零程相互作用的边界驱动随机粒子系统中边电流的联合大偏差率泛函，通过变分方法从2.5级大偏差率泛函收缩得到，证明了与宏观涨落理论的尺度极限收敛，并发展了类似于电路的图约化方法（串联、并联、N-星形结构），最终将图简化为等效单边系统。
AI.motivation: 将一维零程粒子系统的大偏差结果推广到有限图结构，通过变分方法揭示不同方法间的联系，并建立微观与宏观涨落理论之间的桥梁。
AI.method: 采用变分方法，从level 2.5大偏差率泛函出发通过收缩原理推导边电流的率泛函，进行精确极小化，利用节点势函数耦合各边贡献，并通过电路类比（串联、并联、N-星形约化）对图进行简化处理。
AI.result: 得到了图上边电流联合大偏差率泛函的变分形式，证明了其在尺度极限下收敛到宏观涨落理论预测的连续率泛函，并建立了通过割集电流的有效单边等效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非平衡统计物理中图上的大偏差理论提供了统一框架，建立了微观动力学与宏观涨落理论的联系，并将电路网络约化方法推广到不可逆动力学系统。

title: A Decision-driven Methodology for Designing Uncertainty-aware AI Self-Assessment
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has revolutionized decision-making processes and systems throughout society and, in particular, has emerged as a significant technology in high-impact scenarios of national interest. Yet, despite AI's impressive predictive capabilities in controlled settings, it still suffers from a range of practical setbacks preventing its widespread use in various critical scenarios. In particular, it is generally unclear if a given AI system's predictions can be trusted by decision-makers in downstream applications. To address the need for more transparent, robust, and trustworthy AI systems, a suite of tools has been developed to quantify the uncertainty of AI predictions and, more generally, enable AI to "self-assess" the reliability of its predictions. In this manuscript, we categorize methods for AI self-assessment along several key dimensions and provide guidelines for selecting and designing the appropriate method for a practitioner's needs. In particular, we focus on uncertainty estimation techniques that consider the impact of self-assessment on the choices made by downstream decision-makers and on the resulting costs and benefits of decision outcomes. To demonstrate the utility of our methodology for self-assessment design, we illustrate its use for two realistic national-interest scenarios. This manuscript is a practical guide for machine learning engineers and AI system users to select the ideal self-assessment techniques for each problem.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了AI自我评估（不确定性量化）的方法分类体系，提供了面向实践者的方法选择指南，并通过两个国家利益场景案例展示了该方法论的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在受控环境中展现出强大的预测能力，但在关键高风险场景中，决策者无法判断AI预测的可信度，这阻碍了AI的广泛应用。因此，亟需开发使AI能够自我评估预测可靠性的方法，以提升系统的透明性、鲁棒性和可信赖性。
AI.method: 本文沿多个关键维度对AI自我评估方法进行分类，重点关注不确定性估计技术，并考虑自我评估对下游决策者选择及决策结果成本效益的影响。提供了面向实践者的方法选择和设计指南，并通过两个国家利益相关场景进行案例验证。
AI.result: 建立了一套完整的AI自我评估方法分类体系，明确了不同维度下的方法选择原则，并通过现实场景验证了该方法论对机器学习工程师和AI系统用户的实用指导价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文为机器学习工程师和AI系统用户提供了选择理想自我评估技术的实用指南，有助于推动AI在高风险决策场景中的可信部署。

title: The Epistemic Uncertainty Hole: an issue of Bayesian Neural Networks
summary: Bayesian Deep Learning (BDL) gives access not only to aleatoric uncertainty, as standard neural networks already do, but also to epistemic uncertainty, a measure of confidence a model has in its own predictions. In this article, we show through experiments that the evolution of epistemic uncertainty metrics regarding the model size and the size of the training set, goes against theoretical expectations. More precisely, we observe that the epistemic uncertainty collapses literally in the presence of large models and sometimes also of little training data, while we expect the exact opposite behaviour. This phenomenon, which we call "epistemic uncertainty hole", is all the more problematic as it undermines the entire applicative potential of BDL, which is based precisely on the use of epistemic uncertainty. As an example, we evaluate the practical consequences of this uncertainty hole on one of the main applications of BDL, namely the detection of out-of-distribution samples

AI.tldr: 本文发现贝叶斯深度学习中的认知不确定性在大模型或小训练集下会出现“不确定性空洞”现象（即认知不确定性意外坍塌），与理论预期相反，这严重损害了BDL在OOD检测等应用中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 理论上，大模型和少数据应导致更高的认知不确定性（体现模型对未知的认知），但实际观测到相反行为——认知不确定性反而坍塌。这种理论与实际的不一致亟需揭示，以评估BDL的应用潜力是否会因此受到根本性影响。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同模型大小和训练集规模下认知不确定性度量的变化，系统性地观察到认知不确定性在大模型或小训练集情况下出现意外坍缩的现象，并将其定义为“认知不确定性空洞”，同时在OOD检测任务上验证该现象的负面影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，当模型规模增大或训练数据不足时，认知不确定性并非如理论预期那样升高，反而显著下降甚至接近零，形成“不确定性空洞”。这种坍缩现象直接破坏了BDL在OOD样本检测等关键应用中的表现。
AI.conclusion: 认知不确定性空洞是BDL面临的一个根本性缺陷，可能导致其依赖认知不确定性的应用（如OOD检测）失效，这说明现有BDL方法在实际部署中可能存在严重局限性，需要新的理论或技术突破来解决这一矛盾。

title: A sparse PAC-Bayesian approach for high-dimensional quantile prediction
summary: Quantile regression, a robust method for estimating conditional quantiles, has advanced significantly in fields such as econometrics, statistics, and machine learning. In high-dimensional settings, where the number of covariates exceeds sample size, penalized methods like lasso have been developed to address sparsity challenges. Bayesian methods, initially connected to quantile regression via the asymmetric Laplace likelihood, have also evolved, though issues with posterior variance have led to new approaches, including pseudo/score likelihoods. This paper presents a novel probabilistic machine learning approach for high-dimensional quantile prediction. It uses a pseudo-Bayesian framework with a scaled Student-t prior and Langevin Monte Carlo for efficient computation. The method demonstrates strong theoretical guarantees, through PAC-Bayes bounds, that establish non-asymptotic oracle inequalities, showing minimax-optimal prediction error and adaptability to unknown sparsity. Its effectiveness is validated through simulations and real-world data, where it performs competitively against established frequentist and Bayesian techniques.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于伪贝叶斯框架和缩放Student-t先验的高维分位数预测方法，利用Langevin蒙特卡洛实现高效计算，通过PAC-Bayes界理论保证得到极小极大最优预测误差并适应未知稀疏性。
AI.motivation: 高维分位数回归中，现有频率学派惩罚方法（如lasso）和贝叶斯方法（基于非对称拉普拉斯似然）存在后验方差问题，需要一种兼具理论保证和计算效率的新方法。
AI.method: 采用伪贝叶斯框架（伪/得分似然），引入缩放Student-t先验，利用Langevin蒙特卡洛进行高效后验采样与计算。
AI.result: 通过PAC-Bayes界建立了非渐近oracle不等式，证明方法达到极小极大最优预测误差，且能自适应未知稀疏性；模拟和真实数据实验表现优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的伪贝叶斯高维分位数预测方法在理论最优性和实证性能上均具有竞争力，是一种有效的概率机器学习方案。

title: Dynamical analysis of a parameter-aware reservoir computer
summary: Reservoir computing has been shown to be a useful framework for predicting critical transitions of a dynamical system if the bifurcation parameter is also provided as an input. Its utility is significant because in real-world scenarios, the exact model equations are unknown. This Letter shows how the theory of dynamical system provides the underlying mechanism behind the prediction. Using numerical methods, by considering dynamical systems which show Hopf bifurcation, we demonstrate that the map produced by the reservoir after a successful training undergoes a Neimark-Sacker bifurcation such that the critical point of the map is in immediate proximity to that of the original dynamical system. In addition, we have compared and analyzed different structures in the phase space. Our findings provide insight into the functioning of machine learning algorithms for predicting critical transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了储备池计算在预测动力系统临界相变时的内在机制：训练后的储备池产生的映射会发生Neimark-Sacker分岔，且其临界点与原动力系统（显示Hopf分岔）的临界点非常接近，从而解释了为何该方法能有效预测临界相变。
AI.motivation: 储备池计算已被证明在给定分岔参数作为输入时，能有效预测动力系统的临界相变，但其背后的工作机制尚不明确。本文旨在从动力系统理论的角度揭示这一预测能力的内在机理。
AI.method: 通过数值方法，考虑具有Hopf分岔的动力系统，训练储备池后分析其产生的映射，研究该映射是否经历Neimark-Sacker分岔，并比较临界点位置及相空间的不同结构。
AI.result: 成功训练后的储备池产生的映射会经历Neimark-Sacker分岔，且该映射的临界点与原动力系统的临界点非常接近。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了机器学习算法（尤其是储备池计算）预测临界相变的深层工作机制，为理解此类方法的有效性提供了理论支持。

title: Turbulence modulation in liquid-liquid two-phase Taylor-Couette turbulence
summary: We investigate the coupling effects of the two-phase interface, viscosity ratio, and density ratio of the dispersed phase to the continuous phase on the flow statistics in two-phase Taylor-Couette turbulence at a system Reynolds number of 6000 and a system Weber number of 10 using interface-resolved three-dimensional direct numerical simulations with the volume-of-fluid method. Our study focuses on four different scenarios: neutral droplets, low-viscosity droplets, light droplets, and low-viscosity light droplets. We find that neutral droplets and low-viscosity droplets primarily contribute to drag enhancement through the two-phase interface, while light droplets reduce the system's drag by explicitly reducing Reynolds stress due to the density dependence of Reynolds stress. Additionally, low-viscosity light droplets contribute to greater drag reduction by further reducing momentum transport near the inner cylinder and implicitly reducing Reynolds stress. While interfacial tension enhances turbulent kinetic energy (TKE) transport, drag enhancement is not strongly correlated with TKE transport for both neutral droplets and low-viscosity droplets. Light droplets primarily reduce the production term by diminishing Reynolds stress, whereas the density contrast between the phases boosts TKE transport near the inner wall. Therefore, the reduction in the dissipation rate is predominantly attributed to decreased turbulence production, causing drag reduction. For low-viscosity light droplets, the production term diminishes further, primarily due to their greater reduction in Reynolds stress, while reduced viscosity weakens the density difference's contribution to TKE transport near the inner cylinder, resulting in a more pronounced reduction in the dissipation rate and consequently stronger drag reduction. Our findings provide new insights into the turbulence modulation in two-phase flow.

AI.tldr: 本文通过界面解析三维直接数值模拟，研究了系统雷诺数6000、韦伯数10下泰勒-库埃特湍流中两相界面的耦合效应、粘度比和密度比对流动统计量的影响。发现中性液滴和低粘度液滴主要通过两相界面增强阻力，轻液滴通过降低雷诺应力减少阻力，低粘度轻液滴则通过进一步降低动量输运和雷诺应力实现更大减阻。
AI.motivation: 探究两相泰勒-库埃特湍流中界面耦合效应、粘度比和密度比对流动统计量的影响机制，揭示不同物性组合对湍流调制的物理机理。
AI.method: 采用界面解析三维直接数值模拟（DNS）与流体体积法（VOF），在系统雷诺数6000、韦伯数10下，针对四种不同液滴场景（中性液滴、低粘度液滴、轻液滴、低粘度轻液滴）进行对比研究。
AI.result: 中性液滴和低粘度液滴通过两相界面增强阻力；轻液滴通过密度效应降低雷诺应力从而减阻；低粘度轻液滴进一步降低内筒附近动量输运并间接降低雷诺应力，实现更大减阻。界面张力增强湍动能输运，但阻力增强与湍动能输运相关性不强。轻液滴通过降低雷诺应力减少生成项，密度对比增强近内壁湍动能输运。低粘度轻液滴中生成项进一步减小，粘度降低削弱了密度差异对湍动能输运的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 不同物性组合对两相泰勒-库埃特湍流的阻力特性影响差异显著，揭示了密度比和粘度比耦合效应对湍流调制的关键作用，为两相流湍流调制提供新见解。

title: $C^{1,α}$ regularity for degenerate fully nonlinear elliptic equations with oblique boundary conditions on $C^1$ domains
summary: We provide a sharp $C^{1,α}$ estimate up to the boundary for a viscosity solution of a degenerate fully nonlinear elliptic equation with the oblique boundary condition on a $C^1$ domain. To this end, we first obtain a uniform boundary H{ö}lder estimate with the oblique boundary condition in an "almost $C^1$-flat" domain for the equations which is uniformly elliptic only where the gradient is far from some point, and then we establish a desired $C^{1,α}$ regularity based on perturbation and compactness arguments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带斜边界条件的退化全非线性椭圆方程，在$C^1$区域上建立了直到边界的$C^{1,\alpha}$估计。首先在“几乎$C^1$-平坦”区域中获得了斜边界条件下的均匀边界Hölder估计，然后通过摄动和紧性论证得到了所需的$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性。
AI.motivation: 退化全非线性椭圆方程在自由边界问题、最优控制等领域有重要应用，而斜边界条件在实际问题中（如金融数学中的反射扩散过程）也广泛出现。此前在$C^1$区域上此类问题的边界$C^{1,\alpha}$估计尚不完整，特别是在梯度退化情形下，现有工具难以直接应用。因此，作者旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 分两步走：第一步，在“几乎$C^1$-平坦”区域上（即$C^1$边界经局部平坦化处理后），利用比较原理和迭代技巧建立斜边界条件下的均匀边界Hölder估计，其中方程仅在梯度远离某点时一致椭圆；第二步，通过摄动方法将问题逼近于具有常系数的线性方程，结合紧性论证（即解的序列若有界则存在收敛子列），将局部$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性传递到边界。
AI.result: 成功获得了在$C^1$区域上带斜边界条件的退化全非线性椭圆方程的锐利（sharp）$C^{1,\alpha}$估计，即解的Hölder半范数在边界附近可被控制，且指标$\alpha$达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在$C^1$区域上建立了带斜边界条件的退化全非线性椭圆方程的边界$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性，完善了该类问题的理论体系。该结果可推广至更一般的一阶边界条件，并为自由边值问题的正则性分析提供新工具。

title: Improved fewnomial upper bounds from Wronskians and dessins d'enfant
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, part of Section 3 is a revised version of Section 3 from the ArXiv submission 1512.05688, comments are welcome!
summary: We use Grothendieck's dessins d'enfant to show that if $P$ and $Q$ are two real polynomials, any real function of the form $x^α(1-x)^β P - Q$, has at most $°P +°Q + 2$ roots in the interval $]0,~1[$. As a consequence, we obtain an upper bound on the number of positive solutions to a real polynomial system $f=g=0$ in two variables where $f$ has three monomials terms, and $g$ has $t$ terms. The approach we adopt for tackling this Fewnomial bound relies on the theory of Wronskians, which was used in Koiran et.\ al.\ (J.\ Symb.\ Comput., 2015) for producing the first upper bound which is polynomial in $t$.

AI.tldr: 利用Grothendieck's dessins d'enfant证明了形式为x^α(1-x)^β P - Q的实函数在区间]0,1[上至多有deg(P)+deg(Q)+2个根，并由此得到了二元实多项式系统f=g=0（其中f含三项，g含t项）正解数量的上界，该上界基于Wronskian理论且关于t是多项式级别的。
AI.motivation: 为Fewnomial问题（多项式项数少时解的数量上界）提供新的上界，特别是针对f为三项式、g含t项的二元实多项式系统，给出关于t的多项式级别上界。
AI.method: 利用Grothendieck's dessins d'enfant（一种组合-代数几何工具）分析实函数x^α(1-x)^β P - Q的根数；借助Wronskian理论（源自Koiran et al., J. Symb. Comput., 2015）推导Fewnomial上界。
AI.result: 证明了x^α(1-x)^β P - Q在]0,1[上至多有deg(P)+deg(Q)+2个根；由此得到二元系统f=g=0（f含三项，g含t项）正解数量的上界，该上界关于t是多项式级别的。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个关于二元Fewnomial系统正解数量的新上界，验证了dessins d'enfant和Wronskian理论在Fewnomial问题中的有效性。

title: Remarks on the Griffiths infinitesimal invariant of algebraic curves
summary: We study two canonically defined admissible normal functions on the moduli space of smooth genus 4 algebraic curves including the Ceresa normal function. In particular, we study the vanishing criteria for the Griffiths infinitesimal invariants of both normal functions over a specific family of curves.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了光滑亏格4代数曲线模空间上两类规范定义的可容许正规函数（包括Ceresa正规函数），特别关注了特定曲线族上两者Griffiths无穷小不变量的消失准则。
AI.motivation: 理解模空间中特定曲线族上Ceresa正规函数等可容许正规函数的Griffiths无穷小不变量的消失条件，以揭示这些函数在代数几何中的深层结构与性质。
AI.method: 通过分析两类规范定义的可容许正规函数（包括Ceresa正规函数）在光滑亏格4代数曲线模空间上的行为，重点研究其Griffiths无穷小不变量在特定曲线族上的消失准则。
AI.result: 得到了特定曲线族上Ceresa正规函数等两类可容许正规函数的Griffiths无穷小不变量的消失条件。
AI.conclusion: 论文揭示了亏格4曲线模空间上可容许正规函数的无穷小不变量在特定族上的消失规律，为理解Ceresa正规函数等对象的几何性质提供了重要判据。

title: Nonlinear two-dimensional water waves with arbitrary vorticity
summary:
We consider the two-dimensional water-wave problem with a general non-zero vorticity field in a fluid volume with a flat bed and a free surface. The nonlinear equations of motion for the chosen surface and volume variables are expressed with the aid of the Dirichlet-Neumann operator and the Green function of the Laplace operator in the fluid domain. Moreover, we provide new explicit expressions for both objects.
  The field of a point vortex and its interaction with the free surface is studied as an example. In the small-amplitude long-wave Boussinesq and KdV regimes, we obtain appropriate systems of coupled equations for the dynamics of the point vortex and the time evolution of the free surface variables.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有一般非零涡度场的二维水波问题，利用Dirichlet-Neumann算子和Laplace算子的格林函数表达非线性运动方程，并给出了两者的新显式表达式。以点涡场及其与自由表面的相互作用为例，在小振幅长波的Boussinesq和KdV regime下，得到了点涡动力学与自由表面变量时间演化的耦合方程组。
AI.motivation: 现有水波理论多假设无旋流动，但实际海洋环境中存在非零涡度场（如风生流、剪切流），因此需要建立能够处理一般涡度场的二维水波运动方程，并给出Dirichlet-Neumann算子和格林函数的显式表达式以支持后续分析。
AI.method: 利用Dirichlet-Neumann算子将表面变量与体积变量关联，结合Laplace算子的格林函数，构造非线性运动方程；随后针对点涡与自由表面的相互作用，在Boussinesq和KdV regime下进行小振幅长波近似，推导耦合方程组。
AI.result: 给出了Dirichlet-Neumann算子和格林函数的新显式表达式；在Boussinesq和KdV regime下，得到了描述点涡动力学与自由表面演化的耦合方程组。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的方法适用于一般非零涡度场的二维水波问题，点涡-自由表面耦合方程组为后续研究涡与表面波的非线性相互作用提供了理论基础。

title: Rigidity for the non self-dual Chern--Simons--Schr{ö}dinger equation at the level of the soliton
summary: In this paper we prove a rigidity result for a solution to the non self-dual Chern--Simons--Schr{ö}dinger equation at the level of the soliton.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了非自对偶Chern-Simons-Schrödinger方程在孤子层面上的一个刚性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究非自对偶Chern-Simons-Schrödinger方程孤子解的刚性性质，以理解其稳定性和结构特征。
AI.method: 采用数学分析中的刚性理论方法，针对非自对偶Chern-Simons-Schrödinger方程的孤子解进行证明。
AI.result: 成功证明了非自对偶Chern-Simons-Schrödinger方程孤子解的一个刚性结果。
AI.conclusion: 该刚性结果揭示了非自对偶Chern-Simons-Schrödinger方程孤子解的内在约束特性，对理解该方程的动力学行为具有重要意义。

title: The Noether inequality for threefolds and three moduli spaces with minimal volumes
comment: The final version. To appear in Proc. Lond. Math. Soc
summary:
We establish the Noether inequality
  \[\textrm{Vol}(X)\geq \frac{4}{3}p_g(X)-\frac{10}{3}\] for all projective $3$-folds $X$ of general type with geometric genus $5\leq p_g(X)\leq 10$ where $\textrm{Vol}(X)$ is the canonical volume. This result resolves all remaining cases of the Noether inequality for $3$-folds.
  We further investigate the moduli spaces of canonical $3$-folds with small genera and minimal volumes. For a $3$-fold of general type with geometric genus $2$ and with minimal canonical volume $\frac{1}{3}$, we prove that its canonical model is a hypersurface of degree $16$ in $\mathbb{P}(1,1,2,3,8)$, which gives an explicit description of its canonical ring. This implies that the coarse moduli space $\mathcal{M}_{\frac{1}{3}, 2}$, parametrizing all canonical $3$-folds with canonical volume $\frac{1}{3}$ and geometric genus $2$, is an irreducible unirational variety of dimension $189$. Parallel studies show that $\mathcal{M}_{1, 3}$ is irreducible, unirational, and $236$-dimensional, and that $\mathcal{M}_{2, 4}$ is irreducible, unirational, and $270$-dimensional. As being conceived, every member in these 3 families is simply-connected.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了射影三维簇的Noether不等式，解决了所有剩余情况；并研究了具有小亏格和最小体积的典范三维簇的模空间，证明了几个粗模空间是不可约有理簇，维数分别为189、236、270，且每个成员都是单连通的。
AI.motivation: 解决一般型射影三维簇Noether不等式的所有剩余情况（几何亏格5≤pg(X)≤10），并进一步研究具有小几何亏格和最小典范体积的三维典范簇的模空间结构。
AI.method: 通过建立Noether不等式Vol(X)≥(4/3)pg(X)-10/3，并对特定情形（几何亏格2、3、4且对应最小典范体积1/3、1、2）构造典范模型的显式描述（如几何亏格2时典范模型为P(1,1,2,3,8)中的16次超曲面），进而分析模空间的结构与维数。
AI.result: 1. 完成了三维簇Noether不等式所有剩余情况的证明；2. 证明了M_{1/3,2}是不可约有理簇，维数189；M_{1,3}不可约有理由维数236；M_{2,4}不可约有理由维数270；3. 证明了这三个族中的每个成员都是单连通的。
AI.conclusion: 三维簇的Noether不等式在几何亏格5≤pg≤10范围内被完全解决，且小亏格-最小体积的典范三维簇的模空间具有明确的不可约有理结构及维数。

title: Instance Temperature Knowledge Distillation
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) enhances the performance of a student network by allowing it to learn the knowledge transferred from a teacher network incrementally. Existing methods dynamically adjust the temperature to enable the student network to adapt to the varying learning difficulties at different learning stages of KD. KD is a continuous process, but when adjusting the temperature, these methods consider only the immediate benefits of the operation in the current learning phase and fail to take into account its future returns. To address this issue, we formulate the adjustment of temperature as a sequential decision-making task and propose a method based on reinforcement learning, termed RLKD. Importantly, we design a novel state representation to enable the agent to make more informed action (i.e. instance temperature adjustment). To handle the problem of delayed rewards in our method due to the KD setting, we explore an instance reward calibration approach. In addition,we devise an efficient exploration strategy that enables the agent to learn valuable instance temperature adjustment policy more efficiently. Our framework can serve as a plug-and-play technique to be inserted into various KD methods easily, and we validate its effectiveness on both image classification and object detection tasks. Our project is at https://itkd123.github.io/ITKD.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的知识蒸馏温度调节方法RLKD，将温度调整建模为序列决策任务，通过状态表征、奖励校准和高效探索策略实现动态温度调节，可即插即用地集成到多种KD方法中，在图像分类和目标检测任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在动态调整温度时仅考虑当前阶段的即时收益，忽略了未来回报，未能充分利用KD作为连续过程的特性。
AI.method: 将温度调整建模为强化学习序列决策任务，设计新颖的状态表征使智能体做出更明智的实例温度调整；提出实例奖励校准方法处理延迟奖励问题；设计高效探索策略使智能体更高效地学习有价值的温度调整策略。
AI.result: RLKD可作为即插即用技术轻松集成到多种KD方法中，在图像分类和目标检测任务上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的温度调整策略能有效考虑未来回报，优于仅考虑即时收益的现有方法。

title: High Performance Im2win and Direct Convolutions using Three Tensor Layouts on SIMD Architectures
summary: Convolution is the core component within deep neural networks and it is computationally intensive and time consuming. Tensor data layouts significantly impact convolution operations in terms of memory access and computational efficiency. Yet, there is still a lack of comprehensive performance characterization on data layouts on SIMD architectures concerning convolution methods. This paper proposes three novel data layouts for im2win convolution: NHWC, CHWN, and CHWN8, and introduces a set of general optimization techniques for both direct and im2win convolutions. We compare the optimized im2win convolution with the direct convolution and PyTorch's im2col-based convolution across the aforementioned layouts on SIMD machines. The experiments demonstrated that the im2win convolution with the new NHWC layout achieved up to 355% performance speedup over NCHW layout. Our optimizations also significantly improve the performance of both im2win and direct convolutions. Our optimized im2win and direct convolutions achieved up to 95% and 94% of machine's theoretical peak performance, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SIMD架构上的卷积运算，提出了三种新型数据布局（NHWC、CHWN、CHWN8）用于im2win卷积，并引入通用优化技术，实验表明NHWC布局相比NCHW实现了最高355%的加速，优化后的im2win和直接卷积分别达到机器理论峰值的95%和94%。
AI.motivation: 张量数据布局对SIMD架构上的卷积运算的内存访问和计算效率有显著影响，但目前缺乏针对不同卷积方法在数据布局方面的全面性能表征。
AI.method: 提出三种新型数据布局（NHWC、CHWN、CHWN8）用于im2win卷积，并引入针对直接卷积和im2win卷积的通用优化技术，在SIMD机器上跨多种布局进行性能对比。
AI.result: im2win卷积结合NHWC布局比NCHW布局最高提速355%；优化后的im2win和直接卷积分别达到机器理论峰值的95%和94%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的新型数据布局和通用优化技术能显著提升SIMD架构上卷积运算的性能，im2win卷积在NHWC布局下表现最优。

title: Constructing stable, high-order finite-difference operators on point clouds over complex geometries
summary: High-order difference operators with the summation-by-parts (SBP) property can be used to build stable discretizations of hyperbolic conservation laws; however, most high-order SBP operators require a conforming, high-order mesh for the domain of interest. To circumvent this requirement, we present an algorithm for building high-order, diagonal-norm, first-derivative SBP operators on point clouds over level-set geometries. The algorithm is not mesh-free, since it uses a Cartesian cut-cell mesh to define the sparsity pattern of the operators and to provide intermediate quadrature rules; however, the mesh is generated automatically and can be discarded once the SBP operators have been constructed. Using this temporary mesh, we construct local, cell-based SBP difference operators that are assembled into global SBP operators. We identify conditions for the existence of a positive-definite diagonal mass matrix, and we compute the diagonal norm by solving a sparse system of linear inequalities using an interior-point algorithm. We also describe an artificial dissipation operator that complements the first-derivative operators when solving hyperbolic problems, although the dissipation is not required for stability. The numerical results confirm the conditions under which a diagonal norm exists and study the distribution of the norm's entries. In addition, the results verify the accuracy and stability of the point-cloud SBP operators using the linear advection equation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在点云上构建高阶对角范数SBP差分算子的算法，通过临时笛卡尔切割网格自动生成算子稀疏模式，解决了传统SBP算子需要高阶适应网格的限制，并验证了线性对流方程下的精度与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 大多数高阶SBP算子需要适应性的高阶网格，这限制了其在复杂几何上的应用。为规避这一要求，需发展一种能在非网格化点云上构建SBP算子的方法。
AI.method: 利用笛卡尔切割网格自动生成临时中间网格来定义算子稀疏模式和提供中间求积规则；在此网格上构造局部基于单元的SBP差分算子并组装为全局SBP算子；通过求解稀疏线性不等式系统（内点算法）计算对角范数；同时构造人工耗散算子以辅助求解双曲问题。
AI.result: 数值结果验证了对角范数存在的条件，研究了范数条目的分布，并通过线性对流方程验证了点云SBP算子的精度和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法成功构建了高阶对角范数SBP算子，无需高阶适应网格，稳定性不依赖于人工耗散，为点云上的双曲守恒律离散化提供了可行方案。

title: Factorization of a prime matrix in even blocks
summary: In this paper, a matrix is said to be prime if the row and column of this matrix are both prime numbers. We establish various necessary and sufficient conditions for developing matrices into the sum of tensor products of prime matrices. For example, if the diagonal of a matrix blocked evenly are pairwise commutative, it yields such a decomposition. The computational complexity of multiplication of these algorithms is shown to be $O(n^{5/2})$. In the section 5, a decomposition is proved to hold if and only if every even natural number greater than 2 is the sum of two prime numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究行数和列数均为素数的"素数矩阵"，给出了将其分解为素数矩阵张量积之和的充要条件（如均匀分块对角线两两可交换性），并证明该分解在计算复杂度O(n^{5/2})下等价于哥德巴赫猜想（每个大于2的偶数可表示为两个素数之和）。
AI.motivation: 建立素数矩阵（行数和列数均为素数）的张量积分解理论，并揭示该分解的存在性与经典数论问题（哥德巴赫猜想）之间的深层联系。
AI.method: 通过定义素数矩阵（行、列数均为素数），研究矩阵均匀分块后对角线元素的交换性条件，推导张量积分解的充要条件，并分析算法复杂度。
AI.result: 给出若干充要条件（如分块对角线两两可交换性），算法复杂度为O(n^{5/2})，且在第5节证明该分解成立当且仅当哥德巴赫猜想成立。
AI.conclusion: 素数矩阵的张量积分解问题与哥德巴赫猜想等价，表明该代数分解的存在性依赖于未解决的数论猜想。

title: A Nonconforming Virtual Element Method for Advection-Diffusion-Reaction Problems with CIP Stabilization
summary: We study a nonconforming virtual element method (VEM) for advection-diffusion-reaction problems with continuous interior penalty (CIP) stabilization. The design of the method is based on a standard variational formulation of the problem (no skew-symmetrization), and boundary conditions are imposed with a Nitsche technique. We use the enhanced version of VEM, with a ``DoFi-DoFi'' stabilization in the diffusion and reaction terms. We prove stability of the proposed method and derive $h$-version error estimates.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种用于对流-扩散-反应问题的非协调虚拟单元方法，采用连续内部惩罚稳定化技术。该方法基于标准变分形式（无斜对称化），使用Nitsche方法处理边界条件，采用增强型VEM并配合"DoFi-DoFi"稳定化处理扩散和反应项。证明了方法的稳定性并推导了h版本误差估计。
AI.motivation: 针对对流-扩散-反应问题，现有数值方法在应对复杂几何和非协调网格时存在局限性，需要开发一种既能处理非协调网格又能保证稳定性和精度的数值方法。
AI.method: 采用非协调虚拟单元法(VEM)，结合连续内部惩罚(CIP)稳定化技术。使用标准变分形式（无斜对称化），通过Nitsche方法施加边界条件，采用增强型VEM版本，并用"DoFi-DoFi"稳定化处理扩散和反应项。
AI.result: 证明了所提方法的稳定性，并推导了h版本误差估计。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非协调VEM-CIP方法在对流-扩散-反应问题上是稳定且收敛的，误差估计表明该方法具有可靠的精度。

title: Learning with Linear Function Approximations in Mean-Field Control
summary: The paper focuses on mean-field type multi-agent control problems with finite state and action spaces where the dynamics and cost structures are symmetric and homogeneous, and are affected by the distribution of the agents. A standard solution method for these problems is to consider the infinite population limit as an approximation and use symmetric solutions of the limit problem to achieve near optimality. The control policies, and in particular the dynamics, depend on the population distribution in the finite population setting, or the marginal distribution of the state variable of a representative agent for the infinite population setting. Hence, learning and planning for these control problems generally require estimating the reaction of the system to all possible state distributions of the agents. To overcome this issue, we consider linear function approximation for the control problem and provide coordinated and independent learning methods. We rigorously establish error upper bounds for the performance of learned solutions. The performance gap stems from (i) the mismatch due to estimating the true model with a linear one, and (ii) using the infinite population solution in the finite population problem as an approximate control. The provided upper bounds quantify the impact of these error sources on the overall performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有限状态和动作空间下的均场型多智能体控制问题，提出基于线性函数近似的协调与独立学习方法，并建立了性能误差的上界，量化了线性模型近似和无限种群近似两种误差源的影响。
AI.motivation: 均场型多智能体控制问题中，控制策略和动力学依赖于种群分布或边际分布，导致学习和规划需要估计系统对所有可能状态分布的响应，计算复杂度极高。为克服这一困难，需要更高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 采用线性函数近似对控制问题进行近似，分别提出协调学习和独立学习方法，并在理论上推导性能误差的上界，将误差来源分解为线性模型近似误差和无限种群近似误差两部分。
AI.result: 建立了性能误差的严格上界，定量刻画了线性模型近似误差和无限种群近似误差对整体性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 线性函数近似结合无限种群极限方法可以有效地解决均场型多智能体控制问题的学习与规划难题，且两类误差源的影响可以被上界量化。

title: Spatially-Aware Diffusion Models with Cross-Attention for Global Field Reconstruction with Sparse Observations
summary: Diffusion models have gained attention for their ability to represent complex distributions and incorporate uncertainty, making them ideal for robust predictions in the presence of noisy or incomplete data. In this study, we develop and enhance score-based diffusion models in field reconstruction tasks, where the goal is to estimate complete spatial fields from partial observations. We introduce a condition encoding approach to construct a tractable mapping mapping between observed and unobserved regions using a learnable integration of sparse observations and interpolated fields as an inductive bias. With refined sensing representations and an unraveled temporal dimension, our method can handle arbitrary moving sensors and effectively reconstruct fields. Furthermore, we conduct a comprehensive benchmark of our approach against a deterministic interpolation-based method across various static and time-dependent PDEs. Our study attempts to addresses the gap in strong baselines for evaluating performance across varying sampling hyperparameters, noise levels, and conditioning methods. Our results show that diffusion models with cross-attention and the proposed conditional encoding generally outperform other methods under noisy conditions, although the deterministic method excels with noiseless data. Additionally, both the diffusion models and the deterministic method surpass the numerical approach in accuracy and computational cost for the steady problem. We also demonstrate the ability of the model to capture possible reconstructions and improve the accuracy of fused results in covariance-based correction tasks using ensemble sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强的基于分数的扩散模型，通过条件编码方法将稀疏观测与插值场作为归纳偏置，实现对部分观测空间场的高效重建，并能在静态和时变PDE任务中处理任意移动传感器。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在表示复杂分布和处理不确定性方面具有优势，但在场重建任务中缺乏强基线以及针对采样超参数、噪声水平和条件方法的系统评估，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出条件编码方法，通过学习可微的稀疏观测与插值场融合作为归纳偏置，结合交叉注意力机制和展开的时间维度，实现任意移动传感器的场重建。
AI.result: 扩散模型在噪声条件下优于确定性插值方法，但确定性方法在无噪声数据上表现最佳；两种方法在稳态问题上的精度和计算成本均优于数值方法；扩散模型通过集成采样可提升协方差校正任务的融合精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于交叉注意力的扩散模型结合所提条件编码是处理带噪部分观测场重建的有效方法，同时在不确定性量化与集成融合方面具有独特优势。

title: Unified Control Framework: A Novel Perspective on Constrained Optimization, Optimization-based Control, and Parameter Estimation
summary: A common theme in all the above areas is designing a dynamical system to accomplish desired objectives, possibly in some predefined optimal way. Since control theory advances the idea of suitably modifying the behavior of a dynamical system, this paper explores the role of control theory in designing efficient algorithms (or dynamical systems) related to problems surrounding the optimization framework, including constrained optimization, optimization-based control, and parameter estimation. This amalgamation of control theory with the above-mentioned areas has been made possible by the recently introduced paradigm of Passivity and Immersion (P\&I) based control. The generality and working of P\&I, as compared to the existing approaches in control theory, are best introduced through the example presented below.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了控制理论（特别是基于无源性和浸入（P&I）控制范式）在设计高效算法中的应用，涵盖约束优化、基于优化的控制和参数估计等问题，通过将动态系统设计为达到期望目标，实现了控制理论与优化框架的融合。
AI.motivation: 控制理论能够通过适当修改动态系统行为来实现期望目标，而优化框架中的许多问题（如约束优化、优化控制、参数估计）也可以被视为设计动态系统以达到最优目标。因此，探索控制理论在这些算法设计中的作用具有自然动机，尤其是利用P&I范式来实现这一融合。
AI.method: 采用基于无源性和浸入（Passivity and Immersion, P&I）的控制范式作为核心方法，将动态系统设计与控制理论相结合，应用于优化框架下的各类问题，并通过具体示例展示P&I相对于传统控制方法的通用性和工作原理。
AI.result: P&I控制范式能够有效地将控制理论与约束优化、优化控制和参数估计等问题统一起来，提供了一种比现有控制方法更通用的动态系统设计途径。
AI.conclusion: 控制理论，尤其是P&I控制范式，在算法设计领域具有重要价值，能够为优化框架下的各类问题提供一种统一的动态系统设计视角，其通用性优于传统控制方法。

title: Optimality conditions and subdifferential calculus for infinite sums of functions
comment: 27 pages The last section has been removed. It will be submitted as a separate paper
summary: The paper extends the widely used in optimisation theory decoupling techniques to infinite collections of functions. Extended concepts of uniform lower semicontinuity and firm uniform lower semicontinuity are discussed. The main theorems give fuzzy subdifferential necessary conditions (multiplier rules) for a local minimum of the sum of an infinite collection of functions and fuzzy subdifferential sum rules without the traditional Lipschitz continuity assumptions. More subtle "quasi" versions of the uniform infimum and uniform lower semicontinuity properties are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文将对偶解耦技术从有限函数扩展至无限函数族，讨论了均匀下半连续和强均匀下半连续的概念，在无需传统Lipschitz连续假设下，给出了无限函数和局部极小值的模糊次微分必要条件（乘子法则）以及模糊次微分和法则，并探讨了更精细的“拟”版本均匀下确界与均匀下半连续性性质。
AI.motivation: 将对偶解耦技术从有限函数集合扩展至无限函数族，解决无限函数和优化问题中缺乏合适次微分必要条件的问题，并突破传统Lipschitz连续假设的限制。
AI.method: 扩展了均匀下半连续性和强均匀下半连续性的概念，引入“拟”版本均匀性质，利用模糊次微分分析工具建立无限函数族的乘子法则和和法则。
AI.result: 获得了无限函数和局部极小值的模糊次微分必要条件（乘子规则）及模糊次微分和规则，且无需Lipschitz连续假设。
AI.conclusion: 成功将对偶解耦技术推广至无限函数集合，在较弱的正则性条件下建立了次微分最优性条件和和法则，为无限维优化问题提供了新的理论工具。

title: Flow Reconstruction Using Spatially Restricted Domains Based on Enhanced Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Networks
summary: This study aims to reconstruct the complete flow field from spatially restricted domain data by utilizing an Enhanced Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Network (ESRGAN) model. The difficulty in flow field reconstruction lies in accurately capturing and reconstructing large amounts of data under nonlinear, multi-scale, and complex flow while ensuring physical consistency and high computational efficiency. The ESRGAN model has a strong information mapping capability, capturing fluctuating features from local flow fields of varying geometries and sizes. The model effectiveness in reconstructing the whole domain flow field is validated by comparing instantaneous velocity fields, flow statistical properties, and probability density distributions. Using laminar bluff body flow from Direct Numerical Simulation (DNS) as a priori case, the model successfully reconstructs the complete flow field from three non-overlapping limited regions, with flow statistical properties perfectly matching the original data. Validation of the power spectrum density (PSD) for the reconstruction results also proves that the model could conform to the temporal behavior of the real complete flow field. Additionally, tests using DNS turbulent channel flow with a friction Reynolds number ($Re_τ= 180$) demonstrate the model ability to reconstruct turbulent fields, though the quality of results depends on the number of flow features in the local regions. Finally, the model is applied to reconstruct turbulence flow fields from Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) experimental measurements, using limited data from the near-wake region to reconstruct a larger field of view. The turbulence statistics closely match the experimental data, indicating that the model can serve as a reliable data-driven method to overcome PIV field-of-view limitations while saving computational costs.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用增强型超分辨率生成对抗网络（ESRGAN）从局部空间域数据中成功重建完整流场，在层流钝体绕流、湍流槽道流（Reτ=180）及PIV实验测量中均验证了其有效性，可作为克服PIV视场限制、节省计算成本的可靠数据驱动方法。
AI.motivation: 流场重建面临非线性、多尺度、复杂流动下的大量数据精确捕捉与重构难题，需同时保证物理一致性和高计算效率。现有方法在受限空间域数据下难以完整重建流场，且PIV实验存在视场限制。
AI.method: 采用增强型超分辨率生成对抗网络（ESRGAN）模型，通过从不同几何尺寸的局部流场中捕捉波动特征，利用强信息映射能力实现全域流场重建。使用DNS层流钝体绕流、DNS湍流槽道流（Reτ=180）及PIV实验数据进行验证。
AI.result: 在层流钝体绕流中，从三个非重叠有限区域成功重建完整流场，统计特性与原始数据完美匹配；湍流槽道流中重建质量取决于局部区域包含的流动特征数量；PIV实验中从近尾流区有限数据重建更大视场，湍流统计量与实验数据高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: ESRGAN模型可作为可靠的数据驱动方法，有效克服PIV视场限制，在保证物理一致性的同时显著降低计算成本。

title: A wall model for separated flows: embedded learning to improve a posteriori performance
summary: The development of a wall model using machine learning methods for the large-eddy simulation (LES) of separated flows is still an unsolved problem. Our approach is to leverage the significance of separated flow data, for which existing theories are not applicable, and the existing knowledge of wall-bounded flows (such as the law of the wall) along with embedded learning to address this issue. The proposed so-called features-embedded-learning (FEL) wall model comprises two submodels: one for predicting the wall shear stress and another for calculating the eddy viscosity at the first off-wall grid nodes. We train the former using the wall-resolved LES data of the periodic hill flow and the law of the wall. For the latter, we propose a modified mixing length model, with the model coefficient trained using the ensemble Kalman method. The proposed FEL model is assessed using the separated flows with different flow configurations, grid resolutions, and Reynolds numbers. Overall good a posteriori performance is observed for predicting the statistics of the recirculation bubble, wall stresses, and turbulence characteristics. The statistics of the modelled subgrid-scale (SGS) stresses at the first off-wall grids are compared with those calculated using the wall-resolved LES data. The comparison shows that the amplitude and distribution of the SGS stresses obtained using the proposed model agree better with the reference data when compared with the conventional wall model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种特征嵌入学习（FEL）壁面模型，用于大涡模拟（LES）中的分离流。该模型包含两个子模型：一个利用壁面解析LES数据和壁面律预测壁面剪应力，另一个使用改进的混合长度模型（通过集合卡尔曼方法训练系数）计算第一层离壁网格节点的涡粘性。在多种分离流配置、网格分辨率和雷诺数下验证，后验性能良好，能准确预测回流泡、壁面应力和湍流特性，且SGS应力统计优于传统壁面模型。
AI.motivation: 现有壁面模型理论（如壁面律）在分离流中不适用，而纯数据驱动的机器学习方法缺乏物理可解释性和泛化能力。作者希望结合分离流数据的显著特征与壁面边界层的已有知识（壁面律）进行嵌入学习，解决分离流LES中壁面建模这一难题。
AI.method: 提出FEL壁面模型，由两个子模型组成：(1) 壁面剪应力预测子模型，利用周期性山丘流动的壁面解析LES数据与壁面律联合训练；(2) 第一层离壁网格涡粘性计算子模型，采用改进的混合长度模型，其系数通过集合卡尔曼方法进行数据同化训练。两个子模型协同工作，将物理先验知识与数据驱动学习嵌入同一框架。
AI.result: 在多种分离流构型、网格分辨率和雷诺数下进行后验评估，模型在预测回流泡统计量、壁面应力和湍流特性方面总体表现良好。与传统壁面模型相比，FEL模型在第一层离壁网格上获得的亚网格尺度（SGS）应力的幅值和分布与壁面解析LES参考数据吻合更好。
AI.conclusion: 特征嵌入学习方法能够有效结合物理先验（壁面律）与分离流数据，所提出的FEL壁面模型在分离流LES中优于传统壁面模型，兼具物理可解释性和数据驱动的适应性，为解决分离流壁面建模问题提供了新思路。

title: Structure Preserving Restarts of the Non-Symmetric Lanczos Algorithm via the Implicitly shifted LR algorithm
summary: The implicitly shifted QR iteration is used as a restart procedure for the Arnoldi method for the calculation of a few dominant eigenvalues of a large matrix. We show that the underlying idea of implicit polynomial filtering can be utilized in much the same manner via the implicitly shifted LR iteration to create a restart procedure for the non-symmetric Lanczos algorithm for eigenvalue computations, which preserves the tri-diagonal structure of the reduced matrix.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于隐式移位LR迭代的重启策略，用于非对称Lanczos算法的特征值计算，该策略能够保持缩减矩阵的三对角结构，其核心思想源于隐式多项式滤波。
AI.motivation: 将隐式移位QR迭代中使用的隐式多项式滤波思想推广到LR迭代，为非对称Lanczos算法创建一种能保持三对角结构的重启过程，以高效计算大型矩阵的少数占优特征值。
AI.method: 通过隐式移位LR迭代替代QR迭代，将隐式多项式滤波的思想应用于非对称Lanczos算法的重启过程，从而在计算过程中保持缩减矩阵的三对角结构。
AI.result: 成功实现了非对称Lanczos算法的重启过程，且该过程保留了缩减矩阵的三对角结构，类似于隐式移位QR迭代在Arnoldi方法中的效果。
AI.conclusion: 隐式多项式滤波的思想可以有效地通过LR迭代推广到非对称Lanczos算法，为大型矩阵特征值计算提供了一种保持结构优势的重启策略。

title: Revisiting Shooting Point Monte Carlo Methods for Transition Path Sampling
summary: Rare event sampling algorithms are essential for understanding processes that occur infrequently on the molecular scale, yet they are important for the long-time dynamics of complex molecular systems. One of these algorithms, transition path sampling (TPS), has become a standard technique to study such rare processes since no prior knowledge on the transition region is required. Most TPS methods generate new trajectories from old trajectories by selecting a point along the old trajectory, modifying its momentum in some way, and then ``shooting'' a new trajectory by integrating forward and backward in time. In some procedures, the shooting point is selected independently for each trial move, but in others, the shooting point evolves from one path to the next so that successive shooting points are related to each other. To account for this memory effect, we introduce a theoretical framework based on an extended ensemble that includes both paths and shooting indices. We derive appropriate acceptance rules for various path sampling algorithms in this extended formalism, ensuring the correct sampling of the transition path ensemble. Our framework reveals the need for amended acceptance criteria in the flexible-length aimless shooting and spring shooting methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对过渡路径采样（TPS）算法中存在的记忆效应问题，提出了一个基于扩展系综的理论框架，该框架同时考虑路径和射击索引，推导了不同路径采样算法的正确接受规则，并揭示了柔性长度无目标射击和弹簧射击方法需要修正接受准则。
AI.motivation: TPS算法在生成新轨迹时，射击点的选择方式存在差异：有些方法独立选择射击点，而有些方法中射击点随路径演变而存在记忆效应。现有理论未能充分考虑这种记忆效应对采样正确性的影响。
AI.method: 提出一个扩展系综理论框架，将路径和射击索引（shooting indices）同时纳入考虑，在此基础上推导各种路径采样算法的适当接受规则。
AI.result: 该框架揭示了柔性长度无目标射击（flexible-length aimless shooting）和弹簧射击（spring shooting）方法需要修正接受准则。
AI.conclusion: 扩展系综框架为考虑记忆效应的TPS算法提供了正确的理论依据，确保了过渡路径系综的正确采样。

title: AI-Machine Learning-Enabled Tokamak Digital Twin
summary: In addressing the Department of Energy's April, 2022 announcement of a Bold Decadal Vision for delivering a Fusion Pilot Plant by 2035, associated software tools need to be developed for the integration of real world engineering and supply chain data with advanced science models that are accelerated with Machine Learning. An associated research and development effort has been introduced here with promising early progress on the delivery of a realistic Digital Twin Tokamak that has benefited from accelerated advances by the Princeton University AI Deep Learning innovative near-real-time simulators accompanied by technological capabilities from the NVIDIA Omniverse, an open computing platform for building and operating applications that connect with leading scientific computing visualization software. Working with the CAD files for the GA/DIII-D tokamak including equilibrium evolution as an exemplar tokamak application using Omniverse, the Princeton-NVIDIA collaboration has integrated modern AI/HPC-enabled near-real-time kinetic dynamics to connect and accelerate state-of-the-art, synthetic, HPC simulators to model fusion devices and control systems. The overarching goal is to deliver an interactive scientific digital twin of an advanced MFE tokamak that enables near-real-time simulation workflows built with Omniverse to eventually help open doors to new capabilities for generating clean power for a better future.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了普林斯顿大学与NVIDIA合作，利用AI深度学习、HPC加速和Omniverse平台，开发面向聚变试点电厂（2035目标）的数字孪生托卡马克系统，基于GA/DIII-D托卡马克CAD文件和平衡演化数据，实现近实时仿真工作流，以支持未来清洁聚变能源的工程集成与科学建模。
AI.motivation: 响应美国能源部2022年4月提出的"2035年前交付聚变试点电厂"的宏大十年愿景，需要开发能够将真实世界工程与供应链数据、先进科学模型以及机器学习加速能力相集成的软件工具。
AI.method: 基于普林斯顿大学的AI深度学习近实时模拟器与NVIDIA Omniverse开放计算平台，结合GA/DIII-D托卡马克的CAD文件（含平衡演化数据），集成现代AI/HPC加速的近实时动力学，连接并加速最先进的合成HPC模拟器，用于聚变装置与控制系统建模。
AI.result: 在数字孪生托卡马克的交付方面取得了有希望的早期进展，实现了近实时仿真工作流的构建。
AI.conclusion: 最终目标是交付一个交互式的科学数字孪生先进磁约束聚变托卡马克，实现基于Omniverse的近实时仿真工作流，为未来清洁聚变能源发电开辟新能力。

title: The magnon mediated plasmon friction: a functional integral approach
summary: In this paper, we discuss quantum friction in a system formed by two metallic surfaces separated by a ferromagnetic intermedium of a certain thickness. The internal degrees of freedom in the two metallic surfaces are assumed to be plasmons, while the excitations in the intermediate material are magnons, modeling plasmons coupled to magnons. During relative sliding, one surface moves uniformly parallel to the other, causing friction in the system. By calculating the effective action of the magnons, we can determine the particle production probability, which shows a positive correlation between the probability and the sliding speed. Finally, we derive the frictional force of the system, with both theoretical and numerical results indicating that the friction, like the particle production probability, also has a positive correlation with the speed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两金属表面间夹有铁磁中间层体系的量子摩擦，其中金属表面的等离激元与铁磁层中的磁振子耦合，在相对滑动时产生摩擦。通过计算磁振子的有效作用得到粒子产生概率和摩擦力，结果表明两者均与滑动速度正相关。
AI.motivation: 探索量子摩擦在等离激元-磁振子耦合体系中的行为机制，揭示粒子产生概率与摩擦力的速度依赖性。
AI.method: 构建两金属表面（等离激元）中间夹铁磁层（磁振子）的体系，通过磁振子有效作用量计算粒子产生概率，并推导摩擦力表达式，结合理论和数值分析。
AI.result: 粒子产生概率与滑动速度正相关；摩擦力也与滑动速度正相关。
AI.conclusion: 在等离激元-磁振子耦合的滑动体系中，量子摩擦随速度增大而增大，揭示了量子摩擦在这种多体系统中的速度依赖性特征。

title: Microcanonical Free Cumulants in lattice systems
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, accompanying paper to Arxiv:2303.00713
summary: Recently, the full version of the Eigenstate Thermalization Hypothesis (ETH) has been systematized using Free Probability. In this paper, we present a detailed discussion of the Free Cumulants approach to many-body dynamics within the microcanonical ensemble. Differences between the later and canonical averages are known to manifest in the time-dependent fluctuations of extensive operators. Thus, the microcanonical ensemble is essential to extend the application of Free Probability to the broad class of extensive observables. We numerically demonstrate the validity of our approach in a non-integrable spin chain Hamiltonian for extensive observables at finite energy density. Our results confirm the full ETH properties, specifically the suppression of crossing contributions and the factorization of non-crossing ones, thus demonstrating that the microcanonical free cumulants encode ETH smooth correlations for both local and extensive observables.

AI.tldr: 本文利用自由概率论系统化微正则系综下的本征态热化假说（ETH），通过自由累积量方法研究多体动力学，并在非可积自旋链模型中数值验证了该方法对广延算符的有效性，确认了ETH的完全性质。
AI.motivation: 微正则系综与正则系综在广延算符的时间依赖涨落中存在差异，因此需要将自由概率论的应用扩展到微正则系综下，以处理广延可观测量。
AI.method: 采用自由累积量方法，在微正则系综框架下分析多体动力学；在非可积自旋链哈密顿量中对广延可观测量进行数值模拟。
AI.result: 数值结果确认了完全ETH性质：交叉贡献被抑制，非交叉贡献满足因子化，表明微正则自由累积量能编码ETH的平滑关联。
AI.conclusion: 微正则系综下的自由累积量方法能够有效描述局域和广延可观测量的ETH平滑关联，拓展了自由概率论在量子多体系统中的应用范围。

title: Point Prediction for Streaming Data
summary:
We present two new approaches for point prediction with streaming data. One is based on the Count-Min sketch (CMS) and the other is based on Gaussian process priors with a random bias. These methods are intended for the most general predictive problems where no true model can be usefully formulated for the data stream. In statistical contexts, this is often called the $\mathcal{M}$-open problem class. Under the assumption that the data consists of i.i.d samples from a fixed distribution function $F$, we show that the CMS-based estimates of the distribution function are consistent.
  We compare our new methods with two established predictors in terms of cumulative $L^1$ error. One is based on the Shtarkov solution (often called the normalized maximum likelihood) in the normal experts setting and the other is based on Dirichlet process priors. These comparisons are for two cases. The first is one-pass meaning that the updating of the predictors is done using the fact that the CMS is a sketch. For predictors that are not one-pass, we use streaming $K$-means to give a representative subset of fixed size that can be updated as data accumulate.
  Preliminary computational work suggests that the one-pass median version of the CMS method is rarely outperformed by the other methods for sufficiently complex data. We also find that predictors based on Gaussian process priors with random biases perform well. The Shtarkov predictors we use here did not perform as well probably because we were only using the simplest example. The other predictors seemed to perform well mainly when the data did not look like they came from an M-open data generator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种面向流式数据的点预测方法：基于Count-Min Sketch（CMS）和基于随机偏置的高斯过程先验。这些方法针对M-open问题（即无法构建真实模型的通用预测问题）。在i.i.d.假设下证明了CMS分布函数估计的一致性，并在累积L1误差下与Shtarkov解（正态专家设定）和Dirichlet过程先验进行了比较。实验表明，CMS的中位数版本在复杂数据上表现优异，随机偏置高斯过程方法也表现良好。
AI.motivation: 流式数据预测中，数据生成过程往往过于复杂以至于无法构建真实模型（即M-open问题），现有方法在处理此类通用预测问题时存在局限性，亟需开发不依赖特定模型假设的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种方法：(1) 基于Count-Min Sketch的分布函数估计方法，利用sketch实现单遍数据流处理；(2) 基于随机偏置的高斯过程先验的预测方法。为处理非单遍方法的流式更新，采用流式K-means维护固定大小的代表性子集。
AI.result: 理论证明了CMS分布函数估计在i.i.d.假设下的一致性。实验结果表明：CMS单遍中位数版本在复杂数据上极少被其他方法超越；随机偏置高斯过程先验方法表现良好；Shtarkov预测器因仅使用最简单示例而表现不佳；其他预测器仅在数据不来自M-open生成器时表现良好。
AI.conclusion: CMS方法和随机偏置高斯过程方法在流式数据预测的M-open场景下具有竞争力，尤其CMS方法因其单遍处理特性适合大规模流式数据。需要进一步探索更复杂的Shtarkov预测器。

title: Feynman-Kac Operator Expectation Estimator
summary: The Feynman-Kac Operator Expectation Estimator (FKEE) is an innovative method for estimating the target Mathematical Expectation $\mathbb{E}_{X\sim P}[f(X)]$ without relying on a large number of samples, in contrast to the commonly used Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) Expectation Estimator. FKEE comprises diffusion bridge models and approximation of the Feynman-Kac operator. The key idea is to use the solution to the Feynmann-Kac equation at the initial time $u(x_0,0)=\mathbb{E}[f(X_T)|X_0=x_0]$. We use Physically Informed Neural Networks (PINN) to approximate the Feynman-Kac operator, which enables the incorporation of diffusion bridge models into the expectation estimator and significantly improves the efficiency of using data while substantially reducing the variance. Diffusion Bridge Model is a more general MCMC method. In order to incorporate extensive MCMC algorithms, we propose a new diffusion bridge model based on the Minimum Wasserstein distance. This diffusion bridge model is universal and reduces the training time of the PINN. FKEE also reduces the adverse impact of the curse of dimensionality and weakens the assumptions on the distribution of $X$ and performance function $f$ in the general MCMC expectation estimator. The theoretical properties of this universal diffusion bridge model are also shown. Finally, we demonstrate the advantages and potential applications of this method through various concrete experiments, including the challenging task of approximating the partition function in the random graph model such as the Ising model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Feynman-Kac算子期望估计器（FKEE），利用扩散桥模型和PINN近似Feynman-Kac算子，无需大量样本即可高效估计数学期望，显著降低方差，并减轻维数灾难的影响。基于最小Wasserstein距离的通用扩散桥模型被引入以兼容广泛MCMC算法。实验验证了其在随机图模型（如Ising模型）配分函数近似等任务中的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统MCMC期望估计器依赖大量样本，效率低下且方差较大；现有方法在维数灾难和分布假设上存在局限。FKEE旨在通过算子近似和扩散桥模型，提升数据利用效率、降低方差，并放宽对分布和性能函数的假设。
AI.method: 利用Feynman-Kac方程的解在初始时刻的条件期望关系，采用PINN近似Feynman-Kac算子；提出基于最小Wasserstein距离的通用扩散桥模型，以兼容多种MCMC算法并减少PINN训练时间。
AI.result: FKEE显著提升了数据利用效率，大幅降低了方差；所提出的扩散桥模型具有通用性，减少了PINN训练时间；有效减轻了维数灾难的影响，并放宽了MCMC期望估计器对分布和性能函数的假设；在Ising模型配分函数近似等任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: FKEE是一种高效、低方差的期望估计新范式，结合扩散桥模型与PINN，在理论性质和实际应用（如随机图模型）中均展现出显著优势。

title: Deep non-parametric logistic model with case-control data and external summary information
summary: The case-control sampling design serves as a pivotal strategy in mitigating the imbalanced structure observed in binary data. We consider the estimation of a non-parametric logistic model with the case-control data supplemented by external summary information. The incorporation of external summary information ensures the identifiability of the model. We propose a two-step estimation procedure. In the first step, the external information is utilized to estimate the marginal case proportion. In the second step, the estimated proportion is used to construct a weighted objective function for parameter training. A deep neural network architecture is employed for functional approximation. We further derive the non-asymptotic error bound of the proposed estimator. Following this the convergence rate is obtained and is shown to reach the optimal speed of the non-parametric regression estimation. Simulation studies are conducted to evaluate the theoretical findings of the proposed method. A real data example is analyzed for illustration.

AI.tldr: 本文针对不平衡二进制数据，提出一种基于病例-对照抽样设计与外部摘要信息相结合的非参数逻辑回归估计方法，采用两步估计流程和深度神经网络逼近，并推导了非渐近误差界和最优收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 病例-对照抽样设计能有效缓解二进制数据中的类别不平衡问题，但现有方法在利用外部摘要信息进行非参数逻辑模型估计时，模型的可识别性和估计误差的理论性质尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出两步估计法：第一步利用外部摘要信息估计边缘病例比例；第二步将估计的比例用于构建加权目标函数进行参数训练，并采用深度神经网络进行函数逼近。
AI.result: 推导了所提估计量的非渐近误差界，证明收敛速度达到非参数回归估计的最优速度；通过模拟研究和真实数据分析验证了理论发现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法在理论上达到了最优收敛速度，结合外部信息与深度神经网络能有效处理病例-对照抽样下的非参数逻辑模型估计问题。

title: Setting of the Poincaré section for accurately calculating the phase of rhythmic spatiotemporal dynamics
summary: The synchronization analysis of limit-cycle oscillators is prevalent in many fields, including physics, chemistry, and life sciences. It relies on the phase calculation that utilizes measurements. However, the synchronization of spatiotemporal dynamics cannot be analyzed because a standardized method for calculating the phase has not been established. The presence of spatial structure complicates the determination of which measurements should be used for accurate phase calculation. To address this, we explore a method for calculating the phase from the time series of measurements taken at a single spatial grid point. The phase is calculated to increase linearly between event times when the measurement time series intersects the Poincaré section. The difference between the calculated phase and the isochron-based phase, resulting from the discrepancy between the isochron and the Poincaré section, is evaluated using a linear approximation near the limit-cycle solution. We found that the difference is small when measurements are taken from regions that dominate the rhythms of the entire spatiotemporal dynamics. Furthermore, we investigate an alternative method where the Poincaré section is applied to the time series obtained through orthogonal decomposition of the entire spatiotemporal dynamics. We present two decomposition schemes that utilize the principal component analysis. For illustration, the phase is calculated from the measurements of spatiotemporal dynamics exhibiting target waves or oscillating spots, simulated by weakly coupled FitzHugh-Nagumo reaction-diffusion models.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了从时空动力学中计算相位的方法，通过对单网格点测量时间序列应用庞加莱截面，并比较了与等时相位的差异，发现从主导全局节律区域测量时误差较小；同时研究了基于正交分解（如PCA）的替代方法，并通过FitzHugh-Nagumo反应扩散模型验证。
AI.motivation: 极限环振荡器的同步分析依赖相位计算，但现有的相位计算方法无法直接应用于具有空间结构的时空动力学，因为空间结构使得确定哪些测量值用于准确相位计算变得复杂。
AI.method: 提出从单网格点测量时间序列中计算相位的方法：在测量时间序列与庞加莱截面相交的事件时刻之间线性增加相位。使用线性近似评估计算相位与基于等时线的相位之间的差异。此外，提出对时空动力学进行正交分解（利用主成分分析）后对时间序列应用庞加莱截面的替代方法。
AI.result: 发现当测量点位于主导全局节律的区域时，计算相位与等时相位之间的差异较小。通过弱耦合FitzHugh-Nagumo反应扩散模型模拟的目标波或振荡斑点的时空动力学验证了相位计算方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够从时空动力学中有效计算相位，为分析时空同步提供了可行的标准化手段。

title: 2.5D turbulence in shear-thinning jets
summary: The dimensional transition in turbulent jets of a shear-thinning fluid is studied via direct numerical simulations. Our findings reveal that under vertical confinement, the flow exhibits a unique mixed-dimensional (or 2.5D) state, where large-scale two-dimensional and small-scale three-dimensional structures coexist. This transition from three-dimensional turbulence near the inlet to two-dimensional dynamics downstream is dictated by the level of confinement: weak confinement guarantees turbulence to remain three-dimensional, whereas strong confinement forces the transition to two-dimensions; the mixed-dimensional state is observed for moderate confinement and it emerges as soon as flow scales are larger than the vertical length. In this scenario, we observed that the mixed-dimensional state is an overall more energetic state and it shows a multi-cascade process, where the direct cascade of energy at small scales and the direct cascade of enstrophy at large scales coexist. The results provide insights into the complex dynamics of confined turbulent flows, relevant in both natural and industrial settings.

AI.tldr: 通过直接数值模拟研究了剪切稀化流体湍流射流在垂直受限下的维度转变，发现了混合维度（2.5D）状态，其中大尺度二维和小尺度三维结构共存，并伴随多级串级过程。
AI.motivation: 探究剪切稀化流体在垂直受限湍流射流中的维度转变机制，理解受限程度对湍流维度演化的影响，以及混合维度状态下的能量串级特性。
AI.method: 采用直接数值模拟（DNS）方法，对不同垂直受限程度下的剪切稀化流体湍流射流进行数值计算分析。
AI.result: 发现三种维度状态：弱受限保持三维湍流、强受限迫使向二维转变、中等受限出现混合维度（2.5D）状态；混合维度状态下大尺度二维与小尺度三维结构共存，且呈现双串级过程（小尺度能量正向串级、大尺度涡量拟能正向串级）。
AI.conclusion: 混合维度状态是整体能量更高的状态，其多级串级机制为受限湍流复杂动力学提供了新见解，对自然和工业应用具有参考价值。

title: A nonlocal regularization of a generalized Busenberg-Travis cross-diffusion system
summary: A cross-diffusion system with Lotka-Volterra reaction terms in a bounded domain with no-flux boundary conditions is analyzed. The system is a nonlocal regularization of a generalized Busenberg-Travis model, which describes segregating population species with local averaging. The partial velocities are the solutions of an elliptic regularization of Darcy's law, which can be interpreted as a Brinkman's law. The following results are proved: the existence of global weak solutions; localization limit; boundedness and uniqueness of weak solutions (in one space dimension); exponential decay of the solutions. Moreover, the weak-strong uniqueness property for the limiting system is shown.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一个带有Lotka-Volterra反应项和no-flux边界条件的交叉扩散系统，该系统是广义Busenberg-Travis模型的非局部正则化，证明了全局弱解的存在性、局部化极限、有界性与唯一性（一维）、指数衰减以及弱-强唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究种群分离现象，对描述种群竞争的广义Busenberg-Travis模型进行数学分析，特别是考虑非局部正则化和Brinkman定律的椭圆正则化效果。
AI.method: 采用非局部正则化方法处理交叉扩散系统，将Darcy定律的椭圆正则化（Brinkman定律）用于描述偏速度，在有限域中施加no-flux边界条件进行分析。
AI.result: 证明了全局弱解的存在性、局部化极限存在、一维情形下弱解的有界性与唯一性、解的指数衰减性质，以及极限系统的弱-强唯一性。
AI.conclusion: 该交叉扩散系统在数学上具有良好的适定性，具备解的存在性、唯一性和稳定性等关键性质。

title: On the geometry of spaces of filtrations on local rings
comment: Minor changes according to referee's report
summary: We study the geometry of spaces of fitrations on a Noetherian local domain. We introduce a metric $d_1$ on the space of saturated filtrations, inspired by the Darvas metric in complex geometry, such that it is a geodesic metric space. In the toric case, using Newton-Okounkov bodies, we identify the space of saturated monomial filtrations with a subspace of $L^1_\mathrm{loc}$. We also consider several other topologies on such spaces and study the semi-continuity of the log canonical threshold function in the spirit of Kollár-Demailly. Moreover, there is a natural lattice structure on the space of saturated filtrations, which is a generalization of the classical result that the ideals of a ring form a lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了诺特局部整环上饱和滤过空间的几何结构，引入了类似Darvas度量的$d_1$度量使其成为测地度量空间；在环面情形下利用Newton-Okounkov体将其与$L^1_\mathrm{loc}$子空间等同；研究了该空间上的多种拓扑及log规范阈值函数的半连续性，并建立了饱和滤过空间的格结构。
AI.motivation: 受复几何中Darvas度量的启发，将滤过空间几何化，为交换代数中的滤过理论提供度量几何框架，并建立与复几何、toric几何等领域的联系。
AI.method: 定义$d_1$度量并证明其测地性质；在toric情形下通过Newton-Okounkov体将饱和单项式滤过空间嵌入$L^1_\mathrm{loc}$；研究不同拓扑及其等价性；分析log规范阈值函数的半连续性；揭示滤过空间的格结构。
AI.result: 构造了饱和滤过空间上的$d_1$度量并证明其为测地度量空间；在toric情形下给出了饱和滤过空间与$L^1_\mathrm{loc}$子空间的显式对应；证明了log规范阈值函数在适当拓扑下的上半连续性；建立了饱和滤过空间的格结构，推广了理想格经典结果。
AI.conclusion: 建立了诺特局部整环上饱和滤过空间的度量几何理论，推广了Kollár-Demailly关于log规范阈值半连续性的结果，并揭示了滤过空间的格结构，为滤过理论提供了新的几何视角。

title: Quasi-F-splittings in birational geometry III
comment: 123 pages. To appear in Memoirs of the European Mathematical Society
summary: We prove that $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein quasi-$F$-regular singularities are klt. To this end, we shall introduce quasi-test ideals.

AI.tldr: 本文证明 $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein 拟 $F$-正则奇点是 klt 奇点，为此引入了拟测试理想的概念。
AI.motivation: 建立拟 $F$-正则奇点与 klt 奇点之间的包含关系，澄清这两类奇点在 $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein 条件下的等价性。
AI.method: 引入拟测试理想（quasi-test ideals）作为新的技术工具，通过其性质来建立 $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein 拟 $F$-正则奇点与 klt 奇点之间的联系。
AI.result: 证明了 $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein 拟 $F$-正则奇点一定是 klt 奇点。
AI.conclusion: 在 $\mathbb Q$-Gorenstein 条件下，拟 $F$-正则奇点与 klt 奇点是一致的；拟测试理想是处理此类问题的有效工具。

title: Well-posedness for a higher order water wave model on modulation spaces

AI.tldr: 本文研究了高阶水波模型的初值问题，在调制空间$M_s^{2,p}(\mathbb{R})$和基于$L^p$的Sobolev空间$H^{s,p}(\mathbb{R})$中证明了局部适定性，并利用高低频技术与先验估计将调制空间中的局部解延拓为整体解。
AI.motivation: 解决高阶水波模型在不同函数空间（调制空间和Sobolev空间）中的适定性问题，特别是放宽对初始数据正则性的要求，并建立从局部到整体的解存在性。
AI.method: 推导了多线性估计，分别针对调制空间$M_s^{2,p}(\mathbb{R})$和Sobolev空间$H^{s,p}(\mathbb{R})$建立了局部适定性条件；结合高低频分解技术与先验估计，将局部解延拓为全局解。
AI.result: 证明了IVP在$M_s^{2,p}(\mathbb{R})$中当$s>1, p\geq 1$时局部适定；在$H^{s,p}(\mathbb{R})$中当$p\in[1,\infty), s\geq\max\{1/p+1/2,1\}$时局部适定。调制空间中的局部解在$1\leq 3/2-1/p < s < 2$或$(s,p)\in[2,\infty]\times[2,\infty]$时全局可延拓。
AI.conclusion: 本文在调制空间和Sobolev空间中建立了高阶水波模型的适定性理论，并给出了局部解整体化的充分条件。

title: Second order regularity for solutions to anisotropic degenerate elliptic equations
summary: We consider solutions to degenerate anisotropic elliptic equations in order to study their regularity. In particular we establish second-order estimates and enclose regularity results for the stress field. All our results are new even in the euclidean case.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了退化各向异性椭圆方程的解，建立了二阶估计和应力场的正则性结果，这些结果即使在欧几里得情形下也是新的。
AI.motivation: 研究退化各向异性椭圆方程的解的正则性，特别是建立二阶估计和应力场的正则性结果。
AI.method: 通过分析退化各向异性椭圆方程的结构，建立二阶估计并推导应力场的正则性结果。
AI.result: 获得了新的二阶估计和应力场的正则性结果，即使在欧几里得情形下这些结果也是新的。
AI.conclusion: 本文为退化各向异性椭圆方程的解的正则性提供了新的理论结果，特别是关于二阶估计和应力场方面。

title: Tannakian fundamental groups of blended extensions
comment: Comments are welcome! Changes to the first version: Changes have been made to weaken the hypotheses. An argument has been added to show an isomorphism is independent of the choice of the fiber functor. Some typos have been fixed and other minor changes have been made to improve the exposition
summary:
Let $A_1, A_2,A_3$ be semisimple objects in a neutral tannakian category over a field of characteristic zero. Let $L$ be an extension of $A_2$ by $A_1$, and $N$ an extension of $A_3$ by $A_2$. Let $M$ be a blended extension (extension panachée) of $N$ by $L$. Under very mild and natural hypotheses, we study the unipotent radical of the tannakian fundamental group of $M$. Examples where our results apply include the unipotent radicals of motivic Galois groups of any mixed motive with three weights.
  As an application, we give a proof of the unipotent part of the Hodge-Nori conjecture for 1-motives (which is now a theorem of André in the setting of Nori motives) in the setting of any tannakian category of motives where the group $Ext^1(1,\mathbb{Q}(1))$ is as expected.

AI.tldr: 在特征零域上的中性坦纳克范畴中，研究了半单对象扩展的混合扩展（extension panachée）的坦纳克基本群的幂单根，并在极弱自然假设下给出了结构描述。作为应用，在Ext^1(1,ℚ(1))符合预期的任意动机坦纳克范畴中，证明了1-动机的Hodge-Nori猜想（André定理）的幂单部分。
AI.motivation: 理解混合扩展（extension panachée）的坦纳克基本群的幂单根结构，为研究混合动机的伽罗瓦群提供统一框架。
AI.method: 利用中性坦纳克范畴的 formalism，对三个半单对象间的扩展进行逐步构造（L是A₂由A₁的扩展，N是A₃由A₂的扩展，M是N由L的混合扩展），在极弱自然假设下分析其坦纳克基本群的幂单根。
AI.result: 在极弱自然假设下，给出了混合扩展M的坦纳克基本群幂单根的完整描述；该结果适用于任意具有三个权重的混合动机的动机伽罗瓦群的幂单根。
AI.conclusion: 作为应用，在Ext^1(1,ℚ(1))符合预期的任意动机坦纳克范畴中，证明了1-动机的Hodge-Nori猜想的幂单部分（该猜想在Nori动机框架下由André证明）。

title: Generative AI for Synthetic Data Across Multiple Medical Modalities: A Systematic Review of Recent Developments and Challenges
summary:
This paper presents a comprehensive systematic review of generative models (GANs, VAEs, DMs, and LLMs) used to synthesize various medical data types, including imaging (dermoscopic, mammographic, ultrasound, CT, MRI, and X-ray), text, time-series, and tabular data (EHR). Unlike previous narrowly focused reviews, our study encompasses a broad array of medical data modalities and explores various generative models. Our search strategy queries databases such as Scopus, PubMed, and ArXiv, focusing on recent works from January 2021 to November 2023, excluding reviews and perspectives. This period emphasizes recent advancements beyond GANs, which have been extensively covered previously.
  The survey reveals insights from three key aspects: (1) Synthesis applications and purpose of synthesis, (2) generation techniques, and (3) evaluation methods. It highlights clinically valid synthesis applications, demonstrating the potential of synthetic data to tackle diverse clinical requirements. While conditional models incorporating class labels, segmentation masks and image translations are prevalent, there is a gap in utilizing prior clinical knowledge and patient-specific context, suggesting a need for more personalized synthesis approaches and emphasizing the importance of tailoring generative approaches to the unique characteristics of medical data. Additionally, there is a significant gap in using synthetic data beyond augmentation, such as for validation and evaluation of downstream medical AI models. The survey uncovers that the lack of standardized evaluation methodologies tailored to medical images is a barrier to clinical application, underscoring the need for in-depth evaluation approaches, benchmarking, and comparative studies to promote openness and collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文对生成模型（GANs、VAEs、DMs、LLMs）在多种医疗数据类型（影像、文本、时序、表格数据）合成中的应用进行了系统性综述，发现条件模型广泛应用但缺乏先验知识和患者个性化情境的利用，合成数据主要用于数据增强而非验证评估，且缺乏针对医学图像的标准化评估方法。
AI.motivation: 以往综述过于狭隘，缺乏对多种医疗数据模态和多种生成模型的综合性研究，需要一份涵盖2021年1月至2023年11月期间最新进展的全面综述，以填补这一空白。
AI.method: 系统检索Scopus、PubMed和ArXiv数据库，聚焦2021年1月至2023年11月的相关文献，排除综述和观点类文章，从合成应用与目的、生成技术、评估方法三个关键维度进行分析。
AI.result: (1) 条件模型（结合类标签、分割掩码、图像翻译）使用广泛，但缺乏先验临床知识和患者特定上下文的利用；(2) 合成数据主要用于数据增强，缺乏用于下游模型验证和评估的应用；(3) 缺乏针对医学图像的标准化评估方法，阻碍了临床转化。
AI.conclusion: 需要更个性化的合成方法，将生成方法适配医学数据的独特特征；需要拓展合成数据在增强之外的应用场景；亟需建立医学图像合成数据的标准化评估框架、基准测试和比较研究。

title: Relevance of the Basset history term for Lagrangian particle dynamics
summary: The movement of small but finite spherical particles in a fluid can be described by the Maxey-Riley equation (MRE) if they are too large to be considered passive tracers. The MRE contains an integral "history term" modeling wake effects, which causes the force acting on a particle at some given time to depend on its full past trajectory. The history term causes complications in the numerical solution of the MRE and is therefore often neglected, despite both numerical and experimental evidence that its effects are generally not negligible. By numerically computing trajectories with and without the history term of a large number of particles in different flow fields, we investigate its impact on the large-scale Lagrangian dynamics of simulated particles. We show that for moderate to large Stokes numbers, ignoring the history term leads to significant differences in clustering patterns. Furthermore, we compute finite-time Lyapunov exponents and show that, even for small particles, the differences in the resulting scalar field from ignoring the BHT can be significant, in particular if the underlying flow is turbulent.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Maxey-Riley方程中的历史项对颗粒拉格朗日动力学的影响，发现忽略该项会导致颗粒聚集模式和标量场产生显著差异，尤其在湍流和高斯托克斯数条件下。
AI.motivation: Maxey-Riley方程中的历史项模拟尾流效应，使颗粒受力依赖于完整历史轨迹，但该项因数值求解复杂常被忽略。尽管有数值和实验证据表明其影响不可忽视，但缺乏对其在大尺度拉格朗日动力学中系统影响的研究。
AI.method: 通过数值计算大量颗粒在不同流场中（含与不含历史项）的轨迹，比较其聚集模式，并计算有限时间李雅普诺夫指数来量化标量场差异。
AI.result: 对于中等到大斯托克斯数，忽略历史项会导致颗粒聚集模式显著不同；对于小颗粒，即使斯托克斯数较小，在湍流背景下忽略历史项也会导致标量场的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 历史项在MRE中不可随意忽略，其对颗粒聚集和标量场分布的影响在多种流动条件下均显著，需在数值模拟中予以考虑。

title: Uniform approximation by harmonic polynomials for solving the Dirichlet problem of Laplace's equation on a disk
summary: In this paper, we study the Dirichlet problem for Laplace's equation in an open disk. The uniqueness of solutions is ensured by the well-known weak maximum principle. We introduce a novel approach to demonstrate the existence of a solution using harmonic polynomials that converge uniformly to a solution. Specifically, we rigorously derive the convergence rate of the harmonic polynomials and show that smoother boundary data and proximity of the target point to the disk's origin accelerate the convergence. Additionally, we obtain uniform estimates for the derivatives of solutions of arbitrary orders, controlled by $L^1$-boundary data. Notably, the constants in our estimates are significantly improved compared to existing results. Furthermore, we provide an enhanced radius of convergence for Taylor's series of the solution at each point in the open disk.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了开圆盘中拉普拉斯方程的狄利克雷问题，提出了一种利用调和多项式一致收敛到解的新存在性证明方法，严格推导了收敛速度，分析了边界光滑度和目标点位置对收敛的影响，并给出了导数的一致估计和改进的泰勒级数收敛半径。
AI.motivation: 为拉普拉斯方程在开圆盘上的狄利克雷问题提供一种新的存在性证明方法，并改进现有估计中的常数和收敛半径。
AI.method: 利用调和多项式一致逼近解的方法，通过调和多项式序列的收敛性证明解的存在性，并分析收敛速度。
AI.result: 推导了调和多项式的收敛速度，表明边界数据越光滑、目标点越接近圆心则收敛越快；获得了任意阶导数由L^1边界数据控制的一致估计，且常数优于已有结果；改进了解在开圆盘内各点泰勒级数的收敛半径。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法不仅给出了解的存在性新证明，还提供了更优的定量估计，在理论和数值分析中具有潜在应用价值。

title: New solutions of the Poincaré Center Problem in degree 3
comment: Includes 5 figures; updated references; revised section on the inverse problem; the role of singularities is emphasized throughout the paper
summary: Let $ω$ be a plane autonomous system and C its configuration of algebraic integral curves. If the singularities of C are quasi-homogeneous we we present new criteria that guarantee Darboux integrability. We use this to construct previously unknown components of the center variety in degree 3.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的Darboux可积性准则，适用于具有拟齐次奇点的平面自治系统代数积分曲线配置，并利用该准则构造了三次系统中中心簇的先前未知的分支。
AI.motivation: 现有Darboux可积性理论在处理具有拟齐次奇点的代数积分曲线配置时存在局限性，需要发展新的判据来扩展可积系统的识别范围，进而发现中心簇中尚未被描述的分支结构。
AI.method: 针对平面自治系统ω及其代数积分曲线配置C，假设C的奇点为拟齐次，推导出新的Darboux可积性充分条件；将该判据应用于三次多项式微分系统的中心分类问题，通过代数与几何分析构造新的中心簇分支。
AI.result: 建立了拟齐次奇点条件下Darboux可积性的新准则；在三次系统中发现了之前未知的中心簇分支，丰富了中心簇的完整分类。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的新准则有效拓展了Darboux可积性的适用范围，并为中心簇的结构分析提供了新工具，有助于完善多项式微分系统的可积性与中心问题研究。

title: Limiting mixed Hodge structures associated to I-surfaces with simple elliptic singularities
comment: 43 pages. v.3: more details added, proof of Theorem 3.9 revised, typos corrected and other minor revisions
summary: An I-surface $X$ is a surface of general type with $K_X^2 =1$ and $p_g(X) =2$. This paper studies the asymptotic behavior of the period map for I-surfaces acquiring simple elliptic singularities. First we describe the relationship between the deformation theory of such surfaces and their $d$-semistable models. Next we analyze the mixed Hodge structures on the $d$-semistable models, the corresponding limiting mixed Hodge structures, and the monodromy. There are $6$ possible boundary strata for which the relevant limiting mixed Hodge structures satisfy: $\dim W_1 = 4$, and hence $W_2/W_1$ is of pure type $(1,1)$. We show that, in each case, the nilpotent orbit of limiting mixed Hodge structures determines the boundary stratum and prove a global Torelli theorem for one such stratum.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一般型I曲面（K_X^2=1, p_g=2）在获得简单椭圆奇点时周期映射的渐近行为，描述了变形理论与d-半稳定模型的关系，分析了混合霍奇结构与单值性，证明了6种边界层中极限混合霍奇结构的幂零轨道决定边界层，并在其中一种层上证明了全局Torelli定理。
AI.motivation: 理解I曲面在获得简单椭圆奇点时的周期映射渐近行为，揭示边界退化过程中混合霍奇结构的结构特征。
AI.method: 通过建立I曲面变形理论与d-半稳定模型之间的关系，分析d-半稳定模型上的混合霍奇结构、对应的极限混合霍奇结构及单值性，利用幂零轨道刻画边界层。
AI.result: 找出了6种边界层，其中极限混合霍奇结构满足dim W_1=4且W_2/W_1为纯(1,1)型；证明了每种情况下幂零轨道决定边界层；在一种边界层上证明了全局Torelli定理。
AI.conclusion: 幂零轨道可唯一确定I曲面退化时的边界层，且至少在一个边界层上全局Torelli定理成立。

title: Singular Elliptic PDEs: an extensive overview
summary:
In this survey we provide an overview of nonlinear elliptic homogeneous boundary value problems featuring singular zero-order terms with respect to the unknown variable whose prototype equation is $$ -Δu = {u^{-γ}} \ \text{in}\ Ω$$ where $Ω$ is a bounded subset of $\mathbb{R}^N$ ($N\geq 2$), and $γ>0$.
  We start by outlining the basic concepts and the mathematical framework needed for setting the problem. Both old and new key existence and uniqueness results are presented, alongside regularity issues depending on the regularity of the data. The presentation aims to be modern, self-contained and consistent. Some examples and open problems are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 该综述系统总结了带有奇异零阶项的非线性椭圆齐次边值问题，以方程 -Δu = u^{-γ} 为核心，涵盖了数学框架、存在唯一性、正则性以及若干开放问题。
AI.motivation: 奇异零阶项（如 u^{-γ}）在物理、生物和工程模型中广泛出现，但其数学理论尚不完善，亟需一份系统性的梳理与总结。
AI.method: 采用自洽且现代的综述方法，首先建立问题所需的数学框架，然后系统回顾存在性、唯一性和正则性的经典与新近结果，最后通过示例和开放问题进行延伸讨论。
AI.result: 给出了依赖于数据正则性的各类正则性结果，并整理了存在性与唯一性方面的重要结论。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为带有奇异零阶项的非线性椭圆问题提供了完整的理论图谱，并指出了当前理论中的若干开放问题，为后续研究提供了方向。

title: Direct and inverse abstract Cauchy problems with fractional powers of almost sectorial operators
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication in the journal Fractional Calculus and Applied Analysis
summary: We derive the explicit solution operator of an abstract Cauchy problem involving a time-variable coefficient and a fractional power of an almost sectorial operator. The time-variable coefficient is recovered by solving the inverse abstract Cauchy problem using the solution operator representation. As a complement, we also study similar problems by considering almost sectorial operators that depend on a time-variable.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了含时变系数和几乎扇形算子分数幂的抽象柯西问题的显式解算子，并通过逆问题恢复时变系数，同时研究了算子本身随时间变化的情形。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多针对常系数或标准扇形算子，对于时变系数结合几乎扇形算子分数幂的问题缺乏系统解法，且逆问题中恢复时变系数的工作尚不充分。
AI.method: 利用几乎扇形算子的分数幂理论，构造显式解算子表达式；通过逆抽象柯西问题的解算子表示来反演时变系数；并将方法推广至算子本身时变的情形。
AI.result: 获得了含时变系数与几乎扇形算子分数幂的抽象柯西问题的显式解算子；成功通过逆问题重建时变系数；扩展了方法以处理算子依赖时间的情形。
AI.conclusion: 为时变系数与几乎扇形算子分数幂耦合的抽象问题提供了系统的解析框架，并为相关逆问题和时变算子问题奠定了理论基础。

title: Generalized Motives through Witt Vectors
summary: We generalize condensed motives, through Witt vectors and the associated moduli stacks of generalized line bundles.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过Witt向量和广义线丛模空间推广了压缩动机理论。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩动机理论的框架在处理某些数论和几何对象时存在局限性，需要更一般的工具来统一和推广相关构造。
AI.method: 利用Witt向量及其相关的广义线丛模空间作为核心工具，对原有的压缩动机概念进行推广和重新形式化。
AI.result: 建立了一个更一般的压缩动机理论框架，能够涵盖更广泛的数学对象和构造。
AI.conclusion: 通过Witt向量和广义线丛模空间的引入，成功推广了压缩动机理论，为后续研究提供了更强大的理论工具。

title: From Efficient Multimodal Models to World Models: A Survey
summary: Multimodal Large Models (MLMs) are becoming a significant research focus, combining powerful large language models with multimodal learning to perform complex tasks across different data modalities. This review explores the latest developments and challenges in MLMs, emphasizing their potential in achieving artificial general intelligence and as a pathway to world models. We provide an overview of key techniques such as Multimodal Chain of Thought (M-COT), Multimodal Instruction Tuning (M-IT), and Multimodal In-Context Learning (M-ICL). Additionally, we discuss both the fundamental and specific technologies of multimodal models, highlighting their applications, input/output modalities, and design characteristics. Despite significant advancements, the development of a unified multimodal model remains elusive. We discuss the integration of 3D generation and embodied intelligence to enhance world simulation capabilities and propose incorporating external rule systems for improved reasoning and decision-making. Finally, we outline future research directions to address these challenges and advance the field.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态大模型的最新进展，涵盖M-COT、M-IT、M-ICL等关键技术，讨论了3D生成与具身智能的融合及外部规则系统的引入，指出统一多模态模型仍是未解难题，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型正成为研究热点，具备通往通用人工智能和世界模型的潜力，但统一多模态模型的构建仍面临挑战，亟需系统性的综述来梳理现状、明确问题并指引未来方向。
AI.method: 对多模态大模型的关键技术（M-COT、M-IT、M-ICL）进行系统梳理，分析模型的基础与特定技术，讨论3D生成与具身智能的集成方案以及外部规则系统的引入方式。
AI.result: 总结了多模态大模型在应用、输入/输出模态和设计特性方面的进展，指出统一多模态模型仍未实现，但3D生成、具身智能和外部规则系统是增强世界模拟与推理决策能力的有前景路径。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大模型在通往AGI和世界模型的路径上取得了显著进展，但统一模型仍是重大挑战；未来需重点关注3D生成、具身智能与外部规则系统的深度融合。

title: ABC Align: Large Language Model Alignment for Safety & Accuracy
summary: Alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains an unsolved problem. Human preferences are highly distributed and can be captured at multiple levels of abstraction, from the individual to diverse populations. Organisational preferences, represented by standards and principles, are defined to mitigate reputational risk or meet legislative obligations. In this paper, we present ABC Align, a novel alignment methodology for LLMs that enables integration of the standards and preferences of a large media organisation into the LLM itself. We combine a set of data and methods that build on recent breakthroughs in synthetic data generation, preference optimisation, and post-training model quantisation. Our unified approach mitigates bias and improves accuracy, while preserving reasoning capability, as measured against standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: ABC Align是一种将大型媒体组织的标准与偏好整合到LLM中的新型对齐方法，通过结合合成数据生成、偏好优化和后训练量化，在保持推理能力的同时减少偏差并提高准确性。
AI.motivation: LLM对齐问题尚未解决，人类偏好高度分布且可在多个抽象层级捕获，而组织偏好（如标准和原则）对缓解声誉风险和满足立法义务至关重要，现有方法未能有效整合这些组织级偏好。
AI.method: 提出ABC Align方法，结合合成数据生成、偏好优化和后训练模型量化三组数据与方法，形成统一的对齐框架。
AI.result: 该方法能够在标准基准测试中减少偏差、提高准确性，同时保持推理能力。
AI.conclusion: ABC Align有效地将大型媒体组织的标准和偏好融入LLM，为组织级对齐提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Efficient Decomposition-Based Algorithms for $\ell_1$-Regularized Inverse Problems with Column-Orthogonal and Kronecker Product Matrices
summary: We consider an $\ell_1$-regularized inverse problem where both the forward and regularization operators have a Kronecker product structure. By leveraging this structure, a joint decomposition can be obtained using generalized singular value decompositions. We show how this joint decomposition can be effectively integrated into the Split Bregman and Majorization-Minimization methods to solve the $\ell_1$-regularized inverse problem. Furthermore, for cases involving column-orthogonal regularization matrices, we prove that the joint decomposition can be derived directly from the singular value decomposition of the system matrix. As a result, we show that framelet and wavelet operators are efficient for these decomposition-based algorithms in the context of $\ell_1$-regularized image deblurring problems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有Kronecker积结构的前向算子和正则化算子的ℓ1正则化逆问题，利用广义奇异值分解（GSVD）实现联合分解，并将其集成到Split Bregman和Majorization-Minimization方法中。对于列正交正则化矩阵，证明联合分解可直接从系统矩阵的SVD导出，并验证了框架小波和 wavelet 算子在该类分解算法中的有效性，应用于图像去模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的ℓ1正则化逆问题求解方法在处理具有Kronecker积结构的大规模问题时计算负担重，缺乏对这种特殊结构的有效利用。本文旨在利用Kronecker积结构推导联合分解，并将其高效集成到主流优化算法中，以降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 利用广义奇异值分解（GSVD）对具有Kronecker积结构的前向算子和正则化算子进行联合分解；将分解结果集成到Split Bregman和Majorization-Minimization算法框架中；针对列正交正则化矩阵的特殊情况，证明联合分解可由系统矩阵的SVD直接导出；理论分析框架小波和wavelet算子在该分解框架下的计算效率优势。
AI.result: 证明了列正交正则化矩阵情况下联合分解可从系统矩阵SVD直接获得；验证了框架小波和wavelet算子作为正则化算子时，在基于分解的算法中具有高效性；所提方法可显著降低ℓ1正则化图像去模糊问题的计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 利用Kronecker积结构和GSVD联合分解可以高效解决大规模ℓ1正则化逆问题，尤其是图像去模糊；框架小波和wavelet算子因其结构特性特别适合此类分解算法，为实际应用提供了理论依据和算法支撑。

title: Superlinear Convergence of GMRES for clustered eigenvalues and its application to least squares problems
summary: The objective of this paper is to understand the superlinear convergence behavior of the GMRES method when the coefficient matrix has clustered eigenvalues. In order to understand the phenomenon, we analyze the convergence using the Vandermonde matrix which is defined using the eigenvalues of the coefficient matrix. Although eigenvalues alone cannot explain the convergence, they may provide an upper bound of the residual, together with the right hand side vector and the eigenvectors of the coefficient matrix. We show that when the coefficient matrix is diagonalizable, if the eigenvalues of the coefficient matrix are clustered, the upper bound of the convergence curve shows superlinear convergence, when the norm of the matrix obtained by decomposing the right hand side vector into the eigenvector components is not so large. We apply the analysis to explain the convergence of inner-iteration preconditioned GMRES for least squares problems.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了GMRES方法在系数矩阵特征值聚类时的超线性收敛行为，通过Vandermonde矩阵建立了残差上界，并应用于内迭代预条件GMRES求解最小二乘问题。
AI.motivation: 理解GMRES方法在系数矩阵特征值聚类情况下呈现超线性收敛行为的根本原因。
AI.method: 利用系数矩阵特征值定义的Vandermonde矩阵分析收敛性；在可对角化假设下，结合右端向量在特征向量基底上的分解矩阵的范数，推导残差的上界。
AI.result: 当系数矩阵可对角化、特征值聚类且右端向量特征分量分解矩阵范数不大时，残差上界呈现超线性收敛。
AI.conclusion: 该分析可用于解释内迭代预条件GMRES求解最小二乘问题的收敛行为。

title: Multiple-GPU accelerated high-order gas-kinetic scheme on three-dimensional unstructured meshes
summary: Recently, successes have been achieved for the high-order gas-kinetic schemes (HGKS) on unstructured meshes for compressible flows. In this paper, to accelerate the computation, HGKS is implemented with the graphical processing unit (GPU) using the compute unified device architecture (CUDA). HGKS on unstructured meshes is a fully explicit scheme, and the acceleration framework can be developed based on the cell-level parallelism. For single-GPU computation, the connectivity of geometric information is generated for the requirement of data localization and independence. Based on such data structure, the kernels and corresponding girds of CUDA are set. With the one-to-one mapping between the indices of cells and CUDA threads, the single-GPU computation using CUDA can be implemented for HGKS. For multiple-GPU computation, the domain decomposition and data exchange need to be taken into account. The domain is decomposed into subdomains by METIS, and the MPI processes are created for the control of each process and communication among GPUs. With reconstruction of connectivity and adding ghost cells, the main configuration of CUDA for single-GPU can be inherited by each GPU. The benchmark cases for compressible flows, including accuracy test and flow passing through a sphere, are presented to assess the numerical performance of HGKS with Nvidia RTX A5000 and Tesla V100 GPUs.
