For single-GPU computation, compared with the parallel central processing unit (CPU) code running on the Intel Xeon Gold 5120 CPU with open multi-processing (OpenMP) directives, 5x speedup is achieved by RTX A5000 and 9x speedup is achieved by Tesla V100. For multiple-GPU computation, HGKS code scales properly with the increasing number of GPU. Numerical results confirm the excellent performance of multiple-GPU accelerated HGKS on unstructured meshes.

AI.tldr: 本文在非结构网格上实现了基于GPU（CUDA）的高阶气体动理学格式（HGKS），通过单GPU和多GPU并行加速，相比CPU（OpenMP）分别获得5倍（RTX A5000）和9倍（Tesla V100）加速比，且多GPU扩展性良好。
AI.motivation: 非结构网格上的HGKS虽然在高精度可压缩流动模拟中表现优异，但计算开销大；为了加速该显式格式的计算，引入GPU并行计算。
AI.method: 基于细胞级并行构建单GPU加速框架：生成几何连接信息以支持数据本地化和独立性，建立CUDA核函数与网格的一一映射。多GPU方面，使用METIS进行区域分解，MPI管理进程间通信，通过重构连接和添加虚拟网格使单GPU配置可被各GPU继承。
AI.result: 单GPU测试：相比Intel Xeon Gold 5120 CPU+OpenMP，RTX A5000加速5倍，Tesla V100加速9倍。多GPU测试：加速比随GPU数量增加而良好缩放。
AI.conclusion: 基于GPU的HGKS在非结构网格上展现了优异的单卡加速能力和多卡扩展性能，验证了该加速框架的有效性。

title: Reduced-Rank Estimation for Ill-Conditioned Stochastic Linear Model with High Signal-to-Noise Ratio
summary: Reduced-rank approach has been used for decades in robust linear estimation of both deterministic and random vector of parameters in linear model y=Hx+\sqrt{epsilon}n. In practical settings, estimation is frequently performed under incomplete or inexact model knowledge, which in the stochastic case significantly increases mean-square-error (MSE) of an estimate obtained by the linear minimum mean-square-error (MMSE) estimator, which is MSE-optimal among linear estimators in the theoretical case of perfect model knowledge. However, the improved performance of reduced-rank estimators over MMSE estimator in estimation under incomplete or inexact model knowledge has been established to date only by means of numerical simulations and arguments indicating that the reduced-rank approach may provide improved performance over MMSE estimator in certain settings. In this paper we focus on the high signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) case, which has not been previously considered as a natural area of application of reduced-rank estimators. We first show explicit sufficient conditions under which familiar reduced-rank MMSE and truncated SVD estimators achieve lower MSE than MMSE estimator if singular values of array response matrix H are perturbed. We then extend these results to the case of a generic perturbation of array response matrix H, and demonstrate why MMSE estimator frequently attains higher MSE than reduced-rank MMSE and truncated SVD estimators if H is ill-conditioned. The main results of this paper are verified in numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文严格证明了在高信噪比条件下，当阵列响应矩阵H受扰动时，降秩MMSE估计器和截断SVD估计器的MSE低于标准MMSE估计器的充分条件，并解释了MMSE估计器在H病态时为何常具有更高MSE。
AI.motivation: 降秩估计器在不完全或不精确模型知识下可能优于MMSE估计器，但此前仅靠数值仿真支撑，缺乏严格的理论证明。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 针对高SNR场景（此前未被关注），推导了H奇异值受扰动以及H受一般扰动时，降秩MMSE和截断SVD估计器优于MMSE估计器的显式充分条件，并通过数值仿真验证。
AI.result: 给出了H奇异值扰动和一般扰动下降秩估计器MSE更低的充分条件，解释了病态H下MMSE估计器性能劣化的理论原因。
AI.conclusion: 降秩估计器在高SNR且H不精确或病态时，理论上可优于MMSE估计器，为降秩方法的实际应用提供了理论依据。

title: Unveiling Processing--Property Relationships in Laser Powder Bed Fusion: The Synergy of Machine Learning and High-throughput Experiments
summary: Achieving desired mechanical properties in additive manufacturing requires many experiments and a well-defined design framework becomes crucial in reducing trials and conserving resources. Here, we propose a methodology embracing the synergy between high-throughput (HT) experimentation and hierarchical machine learning (ML) to unveil the complex relationships between a large set of process parameters in Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) and selected mechanical properties (tensile strength and ductility). The HT method envisions the fabrication of small samples for rapid automated hardness and porosity characterization, and a smaller set of tensile specimens for more labor-intensive direct measurement of yield strength and ductility. The ML approach is based on a sequential application of Gaussian processes (GPs) where the correlations between process parameters and hardness/porosity are first learnt and subsequently adopted by the GPs that relate strength and ductility to process parameters. Finally, an optimization scheme is devised that leverages these GPs to identify the processing parameters that maximize combinations of strength and ductility. By founding the learning on larger easy-to-collect and smaller labor-intensive data, we reduce the reliance on expensive characterization and enable exploration of a large processing space. Our approach is material-agnostic and herein we demonstrate its application on 17-4PH stainless steel.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高通量实验与分层机器学习的方法，通过建立工艺参数-硬度/孔隙率-强度/延展性的两阶段高斯过程模型，以少量拉伸实验数据驱动大量工艺参数空间的优化，并在17-4PH不锈钢LPBF工艺上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 增材制造中实现所需力学性能需要大量实验，缺乏系统化的设计框架导致资源浪费。现有方法依赖大量昂贵的拉伸测试，亟需一种能减少昂贵表征、同时探索大工艺参数空间的高效方法论。
AI.method: 高通量实验制备小样品进行快速硬度与孔隙率表征，辅以少量拉伸试样直接测量强度与延展性。机器学习方面采用分层高斯过程：第一层学习工艺参数与硬度/孔隙率的映射关系，第二层将该映射作为先验，学习工艺参数与强度/延展性的关系。最后基于GP模型进行多目标优化以寻找最优工艺参数组合。
AI.result: 该方法在17-4PH不锈钢LPBF工艺上成功实现，通过将大量易采集数据（硬度/孔隙率）与少量劳动密集型数据（拉伸性能）结合，减少了昂贵表征需求，实现了大工艺参数空间的有效探索与优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有材料无关性，通过分层学习策略有效降低了增材制造工艺优化中对昂贵力学测试的依赖，为快速、资源节约型的工艺参数设计提供了系统化框架。

title: Incorporating Service Reliability in Multi-depot Vehicle Scheduling
summary: The multi-depot vehicle scheduling problem (MDVSP) is a critical planning challenge for transit agencies. We introduce a novel approach to MDVSP by incorporating service reliability through chance-constrained programming (CCP), targeting the pivotal issue of travel time uncertainty and its impact on transit service quality. Our model guarantees service reliability measured by on-time performance (OTP), a primary metric for transit agencies, and fairness across different service areas.We propose an exact branch-and-cut (B&C) scheme to solve our CCP model. We present several cut-generation procedures that exploit the underlying problem structure and analyze the relationship between the obtained cut families. Additionally, we design a Lagrangian-based heuristic to handle large-scale instances reflective of real-world transit operations. Our approach partitions the set of trips, each subset leading to a subproblem that can be efficiently solved with our B&C algorithm, and then employs a procedure to combine the subproblem solutions to create a vehicle schedule that satisfies all the planning constraints of the MDVSP. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates the superiority of our stochastic variant in achieving cost-effective schedules with reliable OTP guarantees compared to alternatives commonly used by practitioners, as well as the computational benefits of our methodologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机会约束规划（CCP）的多车场车辆调度问题（MDVSP）新方法，通过分支切割（B&C）精确算法和拉格朗日启发式算法，在保证准点率（OTP）和服务公平性的前提下，实现成本高效的车辆调度方案。
AI.motivation: 公共交通机构面临旅行时间不确定性对服务质量的影响，现有MDVSP方法未能充分考虑服务可靠性（准点率）和不同服务区域间的公平性，亟需一种兼顾成本与可靠性的随机规划方法。
AI.method: 1）采用机会约束规划（CCP）对旅行时间不确定性建模，以准点率（OTP）作为服务可靠性约束；2）设计精确的分支切割（B&C）算法，利用问题结构生成多种割平面族；3）提出基于拉格朗日松弛的启发式算法，将大规模问题分解为子问题分别求解后合并。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的随机模型相比实践中的常用替代方案，能够在保证可靠OTP的前提下实现更经济的调度方案；所提算法的计算效率显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 将服务可靠性（OTP）纳入MDVSP优化框架能够有效平衡成本与服务质量，所提的B&C精确算法和拉格朗日启发式算法适用于实际大规模运营场景。

title: The landscape of deterministic and stochastic optimal control problems: One-shot Optimization versus Dynamic Programming
summary: Optimal control problems can be solved via a one-shot (single) optimization or a sequence of optimization using dynamic programming (DP). However, the computation of their global optima often faces NP-hardness, and thus only locally optimal solutions may be obtained at best. In this work, we consider the discrete-time finite-horizon optimal control problem in both deterministic and stochastic cases and study the optimization landscapes associated with two different approaches: one-shot and DP. In the deterministic case, we prove that each local minimizer of the one-shot optimization corresponds to some control input induced by a locally minimum control policy of DP, and vice versa. However, with a parameterized policy approach, we prove that deterministic and stochastic cases both exhibit the desirable property that each local minimizer of DP corresponds to some local minimizer of the one-shot optimization, but the converse does not necessarily hold. Nonetheless, under different technical assumptions for deterministic and stochastic cases, if there exists only a single locally minimum control policy, one-shot and DP turn out to capture the same local solution. These results pave the way to understand the performance and stability of local search methods in optimal control.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了离散时间有限时域最优控制问题（确定性和随机性情形），分析了单次优化（one-shot）与动态规划（DP）两种方法的优化景观，证明了局部极小解之间的对应关系及其条件。
AI.motivation: 最优控制问题常面临NP-hardness，只能得到局部最优解。理解不同优化方法（one-shot vs DP）的局部极小解之间的关系，对于局部搜索方法的性能和稳定性至关重要。
AI.method: 分别在确定性和随机性离散时间有限时域最优控制问题中，理论分析one-shot优化与DP优化的局部极小解之间的对应关系，包括正反向映射、参数化策略下的关系以及唯一局部极小策略的充分条件。
AI.result: 确定性情形下，one-shot每个局部极小解对应DP的一个局部最优控制策略，反之亦然。参数化策略下，确定性与随机性情形中DP的每个局部极小解都对应one-shot的一个局部极小解，但反向不一定成立。当仅存在单个局部最优控制策略时，两种方法捕捉到相同的局部解。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为理解最优控制中局部搜索方法的性能和稳定性奠定了理论基础。

title: Breakup of viscous liquid bridges on solid surfaces
summary: The breakup dynamics of viscous liquid bridges on solid surfaces is studied experimentally. It is found that the dynamics bears similarities to the breakup of free liquid bridges in the viscous regime. Nevertheless, the dynamics is significantly influenced by the wettability of the solid substrate. Therefore, it is essential to take into account the interaction between the solid and the liquid, especially at the three-phase contact line. It is shown that when the breakup velocity is low and the solid surface is hydrophobic, the dominant channel of energy dissipation is likely due to thermally activated jumping of molecules, as described by the Molecular Kinetic Theory. Nevertheless, the viscous dissipation in the bulk due to axial flow along the bridge can be of importance for long bridges. In view of this, a scaling relation for the time dependence of the minimum width of the liquid bridge is derived. For high viscosities, the scaling relation captures the time evolution of the minimum width very well. Furthermore, it is found that external geometrical constraints alter the dynamic behavior of low and high viscosity liquid bridges in a different fashion. This discrepancy is explained by considering the dominant forces in each regime. Lastly, the morphology of the satellite droplets deposited on the surface is qualitatively compared to that of free liquid bridges.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究了固体表面上粘性液桥的断裂动力学，发现其与自由液桥相似但受表面润湿性显著影响。在低断裂速度和疏水表面下，能量耗散主要由分子动能理论描述的热激活分子跳跃主导，而长液桥中轴向流动引起的体相粘性耗散也重要。推导了液桥最小宽度随时间变化的标度关系，高粘度下吻合良好。外部几何约束对低/高粘度液桥影响不同，可通过各区域主导力解释。最后定性比较了沉积在表面的卫星液滴形态与自由液桥的差异。
AI.motivation: 理解固体表面上粘性液桥的断裂动力学，特别是固液相互作用（润湿性、三相接触线）对断裂过程的影响机制，以及不同粘度下能量耗散的主导因素。
AI.method: 实验研究固体表面粘性液桥断裂动力学，结合分子动能理论和标度分析，推导液桥最小宽度的时间标度关系，并比较不同粘度及几何约束下的动力学行为。
AI.result: 发现疏水表面低断裂速度下能量耗散由热激活分子跳跃主导（分子动能理论），长液桥中轴向流动的体相粘性耗散显著；推导的标度关系在高粘度下精确捕捉最小宽度演化；外部几何约束对高低粘度液桥影响不同。
AI.conclusion: 固体表面液桥断裂受润湿性和三相接触线动力学显著影响，需考虑固液相互作用；高粘度下标度关系有效；不同粘度对外部约束的响应差异源于各区域主导力的不同。

title: Adaptive mesh refinement algorithm for CESE schemes on quadrilateral meshes
summary: This study presents constructions of the space-time Conservation Element and Solution Element (CESE) methods to accommodate adaptive unstructured quadrilateral meshes. Subsequently, a novel algorithm is devised to effectively manage the mesh adaptation process for staggered schemes, leveraging a unique cell-tree-vertex data structure that expedites the construction of conservation elements and simplifies the interconnection among computational cells. The integration of second-order a-α, Courant number-insensitive, and upwind CESE schemes with this adaptation algorithm is demonstrated. Numerical simulations focusing on compressible inviscid flows are carried out to validate the effectiveness of the extended schemes and the adaptation algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了适用于自适应非结构四边形网格的时空守恒元/解元（CESE）方法，并设计了一种基于单元-树-顶点数据结构的新算法来管理交错格式的网格自适应过程，数值实验验证了该方法在可压缩无粘流模拟中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 将CESE方法从结构化网格拓展到自适应非结构四边形网格，以提升其对复杂几何和流动特征的适应能力，同时解决交错格式中网格自适应管理的复杂性。
AI.method: 1) 构建了适应自适应非结构四边形网格的CESE方法框架；2) 提出基于单元-树-顶点（cell-tree-vertex）数据结构的网格自适应算法，加速守恒元构建并简化单元间连接；3) 将二阶a-α、Courant数不敏感及迎风CESE格式与自适应算法集成。
AI.result: 通过对可压缩无粘流动的数值模拟，验证了扩展后的CESE格式及自适应算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应非结构四边形网格CESE方法及其网格管理算法能够有效处理复杂流动问题，为CESE方法在工程应用中的推广提供了支持。

title: Unified Gas-Kinetic Wave-Particle Method for Multiscale Flow Simulation of Partially Ionized Plasma
summary: The Unified Gas-Kinetic Wave-Particle (UGKWP) method is constructed for partially ionized plasma (PIP). This method possesses both multiscale and unified preserving (UP) properties. The multiscale property allows the method to capture a wide range of plasma physics, from the particle transport in the kinetic regime to the two-fluid and magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) in the near continuum regimes, with the variation of local cell Knudsen number and normalized Larmor radius.The unified preserving property ensures that the numerical time step is not limited by the particle collision time in the continuum regime for the capturing of dissipative macroscopic solutions of the resistivity, Hall-effect, and all the way to the ideal MHD equations.The UGKWP is clearly distinguishable from the classical single scale Particle-in-Cell/Monte Carlo Collision (PIC/MCC) methods.The UGKWP method combines the evolution of microscopic velocity distribution with the evolution of macroscopic mean field quantities, granting it UP properties. Moreover, the time step in UGKWP is not constrained by the plasma cyclotron period through the Crank-Nicolson scheme for fluid and electromagnetic field interactions. The momentum and energy exchange between different species is approximated by the Andries-Aoki-Perthame (AAP) model. Overall, the UGKWP method enables a smooth transition from the PIC method in the rarefied regime to the MHD solvers in the continuum regime. This method has been extensively tested on a variety of phenomena ranging from kinetic Landau damping to the macroscopic flow problems, such as the Brio-Wu shock tube, Orszag-Tang vortex, and Geospace Environmental Modeling (GEM) magnetic reconnection. These tests demonstrate that the proposed method can capture the fundamental features of PIP across different scales seamlessly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于部分电离等离子体（PIP）的统一气体动理学波粒（UGKWP）方法，该方法兼具多尺度特性和统一保持（UP）特性，能够在从稀薄动理学 regime 到连续介质 regime 的广泛范围内无缝捕获等离子体物理现象，并在数值时间步长上不受粒子碰撞时间和等离子体回旋周期的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有的经典单尺度PIC/MCC方法难以在多尺度条件下高效模拟部分电离等离子体，且数值时间步长受限于粒子碰撞时间和等离子体回旋周期，亟需一种兼具多尺度特性和统一保持特性的新方法。
AI.method: UGKWP方法将微观速度分布演化与宏观平均场量演化相结合，采用Crank-Nicolson格式处理流体与电磁场相互作用以解除回旋周期限制，利用Andries-Aoki-Perthame（AAP）模型近似不同物种间的动量和能量交换，从而实现从PIC方法到MHD求解器的平滑过渡。
AI.result: 在Landau阻尼、Brio-Wu激波管、Orszag-Tang涡旋和GEM磁重联等多项测试中，UGKWP方法均能跨尺度无缝捕获PIP的基本特征。
AI.conclusion: UGKWP方法是一种兼具多尺度与统一保持特性的新型数值方法，能够高效、准确地模拟部分电离等离子体在宽广尺度范围内的物理现象。

title: Review of the finite difference Hartree-Fock method for atoms and diatomic molecules, and its implementation in the x2dhf program
summary: We present an extensive review of the two-dimensional finite difference Hartree--Fock (FD HF) method, and present its implementation in the newest version of X2DHF, the FD HF program for atoms and diatomic molecules. The program was originally published in Comput. Phys. Commun. in 1996, and was last revised in 2013. X2DHF can be used to obtain HF limit values of total energies and multipole moments for a wide range of diatomic molecules and their ions, using either point nuclei or a finite nuclear model. Polarizabilities ($α_{zz}$) and hyperpolarizabilities ($β_{zzz}$, $γ_{zzzz}$, ${A}_{z,zz}$, ${B}_{zz,zz}$) can also be computed by the program with the finite-field method. X2DHF has been extensively used in the literature to assess the accuracy of existing atomic basis sets and to help in developing new ones. As a new feature since the last revision, the program can now also perform Kohn-Sham density functional calculations with local and generalized gradient exchange-correlation functionals with the Libxc library of density functionals, enabling new types of studies. Furthermore, the initialization of calculations has been greatly simplified. As before, X2DHF can also perform one-particle calculations with (smooth) Coulomb, Green-Sellin-Zachor and Krammers-Henneberger potentials, while calculations with a superposition of atomic potentials have been added as a new feature. The program is easy to install from the GitHub repository and build via CMake using the x2dhfctl script that facilitates creating its single- and multiple-threaded versions, as well as building in Libxc support. Calculations can be carried out with X2DHF in double- or quadruple-precision arithmetic.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了二维有限差分Hartree-Fock (FD HF)方法，并介绍了X2DHF程序的最新版本。该程序可计算双原子分子及其离子的HF极限总能量、多极矩、极化率与超极化率，新增支持Kohn-Sham密度泛函计算（通过Libxc库）、叠加原子势计算，并简化了初始化流程。程序支持双/四精度计算，易于通过GitHub安装与CMake构建。
AI.motivation: X2DHF程序自1996年发布以来被广泛用于评估和发展原子基组，但随着计算需求的发展，需要扩展其功能（如DFT支持）并简化使用流程，以满足更广泛的研究需求。
AI.method: 基于二维有限差分法求解Hartree-Fock方程，采用点核或有限核模型，通过有限场法计算极化率与超极化率。新版本集成Libxc库实现Kohn-Sham DFT计算（LDA/GGA泛函），新增叠加原子势选项，支持双/四精度运算，并通过x2dhfctl脚本简化构建与安装。
AI.result: X2DHF程序已更新至新版本，能够获得HF极限总能量与多极矩，计算极化率（α_{zz}）和超极化率（β_{zzz}, γ_{zzzz}, A_{z,zz}, B_{zz,zz}），新增DFT功能与叠加原子势，简化了初始化与安装流程。
AI.conclusion: X2DHF新版本扩展了功能范围（纳入DFT计算），提升了易用性，能够为原子基组的评估与开发提供更全面的参考基准。

title: Performance Portable Monte Carlo Neutron Transport in MCDC via Numba
summary: Finding a software engineering approach that allows for portability, rapid development, and open collaboration for high-performance computing on GPUs and CPUs is a challenge. We implement a portability scheme using the Numba compiler for Python in Monte Carlo / Dynamic Code (MC/DC), a new neutron transport application for rapidly developing Monte Carlo. Using this scheme, we have built MC/DC as an application that can run as a pure Python, compiled CPU, or compiled GPU solver. In GPU mode, we use Numba paired with an asynchronous GPU scheduler called Harmonize to increase GPU performance. We present performance results (including weak scaling up to 256 nodes) for a time-dependent problem on both CPUs and GPUs and compare favorably to a production C++ code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Numba编译器的高性能计算移植方案，开发了MC/DC（蒙特卡洛/动态代码）中子传输应用，支持纯Python、编译CPU和编译GPU三种运行模式，并通过Harmonize异步调度器提升GPU性能。在256节点上展示了弱扩展性能，与C++生产代码对比表现良好。
AI.motivation: 在GPU和CPU上实现高性能计算的同时，兼顾可移植性、快速开发和开放协作是一个挑战。现有方案难以同时满足这些需求，需要一种新的软件工程方法。
AI.method: 使用Numba编译器实现Python代码的可移植性方案，构建MC/DC应用作为蒙特卡洛中子传输求解器。支持纯Python、编译CPU和编译GPU三种模式。在GPU模式下，将Numba与Harmonize异步GPU调度器配合使用以优化性能。
AI.result: 在时间相关问题上的性能测试结果包括：CPU和GPU上的弱扩展性能测试（最高256节点），以及与生产级C++代码的对比表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 基于Numba的移植方案能够有效实现Python应用在CPU和GPU上的高性能计算，兼顾了可移植性和开发效率，性能可与生产级C++代码相媲美。

title: What will be the Euclidean dimension of an Ising ferromagnetic cubic shell?
comment: Journal of Magnetism and Magnetic Materials (2024) (in press)
summary: The equilibrium and nonequilibrium properties of an Ising ferromagnetic cubic shell have been extensively studied by Monte Carlo simulation using Metropolis single spin flip algorithm. Although, geometrically the Euclidean dimension of the cubical shell is three, interestingly, the Ising ferromagnetic cubic shell undergoes ferromagnetic phase transition at a temperature which is very close to that for two-dimensional Ising ferromagnet. Surprisingly, the Ising ferromagnetic cubic shell shows a strange (neither exponential nor stretched exponential) kind of relaxation behaviour, instead of exponential relaxation as usually observed in the two dimensional Ising ferromagnet. The metastable lifetime of a ferromagnetic Ising cubical shell is studied as a function of the applied magnetic field. Here also, the cubic shell behaves more likely a two-dimensional object as found from statistical analysis and comparison with Becker-Döring prediction of classical nucleation theory.

AI.tldr: 利用蒙特卡洛模拟研究了伊辛铁磁立方壳的平衡及非平衡性质，发现其相变温度接近二维伊辛铁磁体，呈现非指数弛豫行为，且在亚稳态寿命方面表现类似二维系统。
AI.motivation: 探究三维立方壳几何结构（尽管欧几里得维度为3）是否表现出与二维伊辛铁磁体相近的相变温度，以及其弛豫动力学和亚稳态寿命等非平衡性质。
AI.method: 采用Metropolis单自旋翻转算法的蒙特卡洛模拟，对伊辛铁磁立方壳进行平衡态和非平衡态的数值研究。
AI.result: 立方壳的相变温度非常接近二维伊辛铁磁体；弛豫行为既非指数衰减也非拉伸指数衰减，表现出奇特弛豫；亚稳态寿命随磁场变化，统计分析与经典成核理论的Becker-Döring预测对比显示其行为更接近二维系统。
AI.conclusion: 伊辛铁磁立方壳在相变温度、弛豫动力学和亚稳态寿命方面均表现出类似二维伊辛铁磁体的特征，表明几何约束（薄壳结构）使其维度有效降低。

title: Universal critical phase diagram using Gini index
summary: The critical phase surface of a system, in general, can depend on one or more parameters. We show that by calculating the Gini index ($g$) of any suitably defined response function of a system, the critical phase surface can always be reduced to that of a single parameter, starting from $g=0$ and terminating at $g=g_f$, where $g_f$ is a universal number for a chosen response function in a given universality class. We demonstrate the construction with analytical and numerical calculations of mean field transverse field Ising model and site diluted Ising model on the Bethe lattice, respectively. Both models have two parameter critical phase surfaces -- transverse field and temperature for the first case and site dilution and temperature in the second case. Both can be reduced to single parameter transition points in terms of the Gini index. We have additionally demonstrated the validity of the method for a mean field two parameter opinion dynamics model that includes a tri-critical point. The method is generally applicable for any multi-parameter critical transition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过计算系统响应函数的基尼系数(g)，可以将多参数临界相面简化为单参数相变点，g从0变化到普适终值g_f。通过平均场横场Ising模型、Bethe格点稀释Ising模型和含三临界点的平均场舆论动力学模型验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 多参数临界相面通常依赖一个或多个参数，如何将多参数临界问题简化为单参数问题是一个重要挑战。现有方法缺乏通用性，本文旨在建立一种普适的降维方法。
AI.method: 计算系统响应函数的基尼系数g，将多参数临界相面映射到单参数(g)空间。利用平均场横场Ising模型(横场-温度)、Bethe格点稀释Ising模型(稀释浓度-温度)以及含三临界点的平均场舆论动力学模型进行解析和数值验证。
AI.result: 两种双参数临界相面(横场-温度、稀释浓度-温度)均可通过基尼系数简化为单参数相变点；该方法对含三临界点的多参数系统同样有效；g的终值g_f在给定响应函数和普适类下是普适常数。
AI.conclusion: 基尼系数方法可普适地适用于任意多参数临界相变问题，将多维临界面降为一维临界点，且g_f具有普适性。

title: Autoencoders in Function Space
summary: Autoencoders have found widespread application in both their original deterministic form and in their variational formulation (VAEs). In scientific applications and in image processing it is often of interest to consider data that are viewed as functions; while discretisation (of differential equations arising in the sciences) or pixellation (of images) renders problems finite dimensional in practice, conceiving first of algorithms that operate on functions, and only then discretising or pixellating, leads to better algorithms that smoothly operate between resolutions. In this paper function-space versions of the autoencoder (FAE) and variational autoencoder (FVAE) are introduced, analysed, and deployed. Well-definedness of the objective governing VAEs is a subtle issue, particularly in function space, limiting applicability. For the FVAE objective to be well defined requires compatibility of the data distribution with the chosen generative model; this can be achieved, for example, when the data arise from a stochastic differential equation, but is generally restrictive. The FAE objective, on the other hand, is well defined in many situations where FVAE fails to be. Pairing the FVAE and FAE objectives with neural operator architectures that can be evaluated on any mesh enables new applications of autoencoders to inpainting, superresolution, and generative modelling of scientific data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出函数空间中的自编码器（FAE）和变分自编码器（FVAE），克服了传统离散化方法在处理函数型数据（如科学模拟和图像）时的局限性，并分析了两种模型的目标函数在函数空间中的良定义性条件，最终展示了其在图像修复、超分辨率和科学数据生成建模中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器和VAE在处理函数型数据（如科学方程解、图像）时，先离散化再设计算法的方式限制了模型在不同分辨率间的平滑迁移能力。作者希望先在函数空间中设计算法，再离散化，以得到更优的算法。
AI.method: 提出函数空间版本的自动编码器（FAE）和变分自动编码器（FVAE）。分析FVAE目标函数在函数空间中的良定义性条件，指出其要求数据分布与生成模型兼容（如数据来自随机微分方程），而FAE目标函数在更多情况下良定义。结合神经算子架构实现任意网格上的评估。
AI.result: FVAE目标函数在函数空间中良定义需要严格的兼容条件，限制了应用范围；FAE目标函数则在更多场景下良定义。将FAE和FVAE与神经算子架构结合，可实现图像修复、超分辨率和科学数据的生成建模。
AI.conclusion: 函数空间视角下的自编码器设计能更好地处理连续型数据，FAE相比FVAE在函数空间中更具普适性，结合神经算子架构后可在多种分辨率和网格上应用，为科学数据和图像处理提供了新工具。

title: Analytical Solution of a Three-layer Network with a Matrix Exponential Activation Function
summary:
In practice, deeper networks tend to be more powerful than shallow ones, but this has not been understood theoretically. In this paper, we find the analytical solution of a three-layer network with a matrix exponential activation function, i.e., $$ f(X)=W_3\exp(W_2\exp(W_1X)), X\in \mathbb{C}^{d\times d} $$ have analytical solutions for the equations $$
  Y_1=f(X_1),Y_2=f(X_2) $$ for $X_1,X_2,Y_1,Y_2$ with only invertible assumptions. Our proof shows the power of depth and the use of a non-linear activation function, since one layer network can only solve one equation,i.e.,$Y=WX$.

AI.tldr: 本文发现一个三层网络（使用矩阵指数激活函数）在仅需可逆假设下，可以解析地求解两个方程Y1=f(X1), Y2=f(X2)，而单层网络只能求解一个方程Y=WX，从理论上证明了深度和非线性激活函数的强大能力。
AI.motivation: 实践中深层网络比浅层网络更强大，但缺乏理论解释。本文旨在从解析解的角度，证明深度网络在表达能力上的优势。
AI.method: 研究一个特定的三层网络f(X)=W3 exp(W2 exp(W1 X))，其中激活函数为矩阵指数函数，在可逆条件下求解两个方程Y1=f(X1), Y2=f(X2)的解析解。
AI.result: 该三层网络在可逆假设下能够解析地同时求解两个方程，而单层网络只能求解一个线性方程。
AI.conclusion: 从理论上证明了深度网络比浅层网络更具表达能力的根本原因：深度加上非线性激活函数可以解决更多方程（约束），即具有更高的表达能力。

title: UNSURE: self-supervised learning with Unknown Noise level and Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimate
summary: Recently, many self-supervised learning methods for image reconstruction have been proposed that can learn from noisy data alone, bypassing the need for ground-truth references. Most existing methods cluster around two classes: i) Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimate (SURE) and similar approaches that assume full knowledge of the noise distribution, and ii) Noise2Self and similar cross-validation methods that require very mild knowledge about the noise distribution. The first class of methods tends to be impractical, as the noise level is often unknown in real-world applications, and the second class is often suboptimal compared to supervised learning. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework that characterizes this expressivity-robustness trade-off and propose a new approach based on SURE, but unlike the standard SURE, does not require knowledge about the noise level. Throughout a series of experiments, we show that the proposed estimator outperforms other existing self-supervised methods on various imaging inverse problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自监督图像重建方法，在不需要噪声水平先验知识的情况下，通过理论框架刻画了表达能力与鲁棒性之间的权衡，并在多种成像逆问题中优于现有自监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督图像重建方法存在两难困境：基于SURE的方法需要完整的噪声分布知识（不实用），而基于交叉验证的方法（如Noise2Self）虽对噪声知识要求低但性能次优。作者旨在弥合这一差距，提出一种既实用又高性能的方法。
AI.method: 论文建立了一个理论框架来刻画表达能力-鲁棒性权衡，并基于SURE提出了一种不需要噪声水平先验知识的新估计器。
AI.result: 在多种成像逆问题上的实验表明，所提出的方法在性能上优于现有的自监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法成功平衡了表达能力和鲁棒性，在不依赖噪声水平先验知识的前提下实现了更优的性能，为实际场景中的自监督图像重建提供了实用解决方案。

title: Chimera states and information transfer in interacting populations of map-based neurons
summary: We investigate the synchronization behavior and the emergence of chimera states in a system of two interacting populations of maps possessing chaotic neural-like dynamics. We characterize four collective states on the space of coupling parameters of the system: complete synchronization, generalized synchronization, chimera states, and incoherence. We quantify the information exchange between the two neuron populations in chimera states. We have found a well-defined direction of the flow of information in chimera states, from the desynchronized population to the synchronized one. The incoherent population functions as a driver of the coherent neuron population in a chimera state. This feature is independent of the population sizes or population partitions. Our results yield insight into the communication mechanisms arising in brain processes such as unihemispheric sleep and epileptic seizures that have been associated to chimera states.

AI.tldr: 研究两个具有混沌类神经动力学的映射种群在相互作用下的同步行为与嵌合体状态，发现嵌合体中信息流方向明确地从去同步化种群流向同步化种群，且去同步化种群充当同步化种群的驱动者。
AI.motivation: 探究两个混沌类神经动力学映射种群相互作用下的同步行为与嵌合体状态的涌现机制，并揭示嵌合体状态中信息交换的方向性特征。
AI.method: 在系统耦合参数空间中对两个相互作用的映射种群进行动力学分析，表征了完全同步、广义同步、嵌合体状态和去同步化四种集体状态，并量化了嵌合体状态中两个神经元种群之间的信息交换。
AI.result: 在嵌合体状态中，信息流存在明确的方向性：从去同步化种群流向同步化种群；去同步化种群（非相干种群）充当同步化种群（相干种群）的驱动者；这一特征不受种群大小或种群划分方式的影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为与嵌合体状态相关的脑过程（如单半球睡眠和癫痫发作）中的通信机制提供了见解。

title: Orbital cluster-based network modelling
summary: We propose a novel reduced-order methodology to describe complex multi-frequency fluid dynamics from time-resolved snapshot data. Starting point is the Cluster-based Network Model (CNM) thanks to its fully automatable development and human interpretability. Our key innovation is to model the transitions from cluster to cluster much more accurately by replacing snapshot states with short-term trajectories ("orbits") over multiple clusters, thus avoiding nonphysical intra-cluster diffusion in the dynamic reconstruction. The proposed orbital CNM (oCNM) employs functional clustering to coarse-grain the short-term trajectories. Specifically, different filtering techniques, resulting in different temporal basis expansions, demonstrate the versatility and capability of the oCNM to adapt to diverse flow phenomena. The oCNM is illustrated on the Stuart-Landau oscillator and its post-transient solution with time-varying parameters to test its ability to capture the amplitude selection mechanism and multi-frequency behaviours. Then, the oCNM is applied to the fluidic pinball across varying flow regimes at different Reynolds numbers, including the periodic, quasi-periodic, and chaotic dynamics. This orbital-focused perspective enhances the understanding of complex temporal behaviours by incorporating high-frequency behaviour into the kinematics of short-time trajectories while modelling the dynamics of the lower frequencies. In analogy to Spectral Proper Orthogonal Decomposition, which marked the transition from spatial-only modes to spatio-temporal ones, this work advances from analysing temporal local states to examining piecewise short-term trajectories, or orbits. By merging advanced analytical methods, such as the functional representation of short-time trajectories with CNM, this study paves the way for new approaches to dissect the complex dynamics characterising turbulent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出轨道聚类网络模型(oCNM)，通过将快照状态替换为跨越多个聚类的短期轨迹（轨道）来更精确地建模聚类间转移，避免非物理的簇内扩散，实现对复杂多频流体动力学的降阶描述。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于聚类的网络模型(CNM)在动态重构中存在非物理的簇内扩散问题，无法准确捕捉多频流体动力学行为。现有方法在描述复杂时间行为（如周期、准周期和混沌动力学）方面存在局限。
AI.method: 提出轨道聚类网络模型(oCNM)，核心创新为：1) 用跨越多个聚类的短时轨迹（轨道）替代单点快照状态；2) 采用函数聚类对短时轨迹进行粗粒化；3) 结合不同滤波技术实现时间基展开，适应不同流动现象。
AI.result: 在Stuart-Landau振荡器（含时变参数）上验证了振幅选择机制和多频行为的捕捉能力；应用于流体摇板在不同雷诺数下的周期、准周期和混沌动力学场景，展示了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: oCNM通过将高频行为纳入短时轨迹的运动学中，同时建模低频动力学，增强了对复杂时间行为的理解。类比SPOD从空间模态到时空模态的转变，oCNM实现了从分析局部时间状态到分析分段短时轨迹（轨道）的进阶，为解析湍流系统复杂动力学提供了新途径。

title: A note on the maximization of the first Dirichlet eigenvalue for perforated planar domains
summary: In this work we prove that given an open bounded set $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^2$ with a $C^2$ boundary, there exists $ε:= ε(Ω)$ small enough such that for all $0 < δ< ε$ the maximum of $\{λ_1(Ω- B_δ(x)):B_δ \subset Ω\}$ is never attained when the ball is close enough to the boundary. In particular it is not obtained when $B_δ(x)$ is touching the boundary $\partial Ω$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明：对于具有C²边界的二维有界开区域Ω，存在一个足够小的ε(Ω)，使得对于所有0<δ<ε，当球B_δ(x)靠近边界时，第一Dirichlet特征值λ₁(Ω\B_δ(x))的最大值无法达到，特别地，当球与边界相切时也不能达到最大值。
AI.motivation: 研究带孔区域的特征值优化问题，探究在去除一个小圆盘的情况下，第一Dirichlet特征值的最大化问题的最优位置是否总在边界上。
AI.method: 通过严谨的数学分析，对二维有界开区域Ω（具有C²边界）进行特征值问题的变分分析，考虑去除一个小圆盘B_δ(x)后的区域Ω\B_δ(x)的第一Dirichlet特征值λ₁，研究当圆盘位置x变化时该特征值的最大值问题。
AI.result: 存在一个依赖于Ω的阈值ε>0，使得对于任意足够小的圆盘半径δ<ε，当圆盘靠近边界时，λ₁(Ω\B_δ(x))无法达到最大值；特别地，当圆盘与边界∂Ω相切时，最大值也不被达到。
AI.conclusion: 在二维带孔区域的第一Dirichlet特征值最大化问题中，对于足够小的孔洞，最优位置并非如直观所想的在边界上，而是出现在内部某处。

title: Perverse-Hodge octahedron
comment: 5 pages. To appear at ZAG volume CRC press
summary: The perverse-Hodge octahedron is a 3D enhancement of the Hodge diamond of a compact hyperkähler manifold. Its existence is equivalent to Nagai's conjecture, which holds for all known deformation types. The octahedron appears implicitly in Huybrechts-Mauri and Shen-Yin.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了perverse-Hodge八面体作为紧超凯勒流形Hodge菱形的三维推广，其存在性等价于Nagai猜想（对所有已知形变类型成立），并在Huybrechts-Mauri和Shen-Yin的工作中隐含出现。
AI.motivation: 将经典的Hodge菱形结构提升到三维，以更完整地刻画紧超凯勒流形的上同调结构，并验证Nagai猜想在这一推广下的等价性。
AI.method: 通过构造perverse-Hodge八面体作为Hodge菱形的三维增强，建立其与Nagai猜想之间的等价关系，并在已知形变类型上进行验证。
AI.result: perverse-Hodge八面体的存在性等价于Nagai猜想，且该猜想对所有已知的紧超凯勒流形形变类型成立。
AI.conclusion: perverse-Hodge八面体为理解紧超凯勒流形的上同调结构提供了更丰富的框架，Nagai猜想的成立保证了这一结构的普遍性。

title: Birational geometry of critical loci in Algebraic Vision
summary: In Algebraic Vision, the projective reconstruction of the position of each camera and scene point from the knowledge of many enough corresponding points in the views is called the structure from motion problem. It is known that the reconstruction is ambiguous if the scene points are contained in particular algebraic varieties, called critical loci. To be more precise, from the definition of criticality, for the same reconstruction problem, two critical loci arise in a natural way. In the present paper, we investigate the relations between these two critical loci, and we prove that, under some mild smoothness hypotheses, (some of) their irreducible components are birational. To this end, we introduce a unified critical locus that restores the symmetry between the two critical loci, and a natural commutative diagram relating the unified critical locus and the two single critical loci. For technical reasons, but of interest in its own, we also consider how a critical locus change when one increases the number of views.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多视图几何中结构从运动问题（SfM）的两个临界轨迹（critical loci）之间的关系，证明在光滑性假设下它们的某些不可约分量是双有理等价的。为此，引入了一个统一临界轨迹来恢复对称性，并构建了自然的交换图。同时探讨了增加视图数量时临界轨迹的变化。
AI.motivation: 在代数视觉中，结构从运动问题的重建在场景点位于特定代数簇（即临界轨迹）时存在歧义。同一重建问题自然产生两个临界轨迹，但二者之间的关系尚不明确，因此需要系统研究它们的内在联系。
AI.method: 引入统一临界轨迹以恢复两个临界轨迹之间的对称性；构建包含统一临界轨迹和两个单一临界轨迹的交换图；在光滑性假设下分析不可约分量的双有理等价性；研究增加视图数目时临界轨迹的变形规律。
AI.result: 在适当的平滑性条件下，两个临界轨迹的某些不可约分量之间具有双有理等价关系；统一临界轨迹的引入使得这种对称性得以清晰表达；增加视图数会改变临界轨迹的代数结构。
AI.conclusion: 两个临界轨迹并非独立，其不可约分量存在深刻的双有理联系。统一临界轨迹是理解这种联系的关键工具，而视图数的增加对临界轨迹的影响也具有独立的理论价值。

title: Blow-up solutions for the steady state of the Keller-Segel system on Riemann surfaces
summary:
We study the following Neumann boundary problem related to the stationary solutions of the Keller-Segel system, a basic model of chemotaxis phenomena: \[ \left\{\begin{array}{ll} -Δ_g u +βu =λ\left(\frac{Ve^u}{\int_Σ Ve^u d v_g}-1\right), &\text { in } \mathringΣ\\ \partial_{ ν_g} u=0, &\text { on } \partial Σ\end{array} \right.,\] on a compact Riemann surface $(Σ, g)$ of unit area, with interior $\mathringΣ$ and smooth boundary $\partial Σ$. Here, $Δ_g$ denote the Laplace-Beltrami operator, $dv_g$ the area element of $(Σ, g)$, and $ν_g$ the unit outward normal to $\partial Σ$ and $λ$ and $β$ are non-negative parameters, $V$ is non-negative with finite zero set.
  For any integers $m>0$ and $k,l\geq 0$ with $m=2k+l$, we establish a sufficient condition on $V$ for the existence of a sequence of blow-up solutions as $λ$ approaches the critical values $4πm$, which blows up at $k$ points in the interior and $l$ points on the boundary. Moreover, the study expands to the corresponding singular problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有Neumann边界条件的Keller-Segel系统稳态方程，在紧致黎曼曲面上建立了当参数λ趋近于临界值4πm时，存在在内部k个点和边界l个点爆破解的充分条件（其中m=2k+l），并推广至奇异情形。
AI.motivation: Keller-Segel系统是描述趋化现象的基本模型，其稳态解的存在性与爆破行为对理解生物自组织模式至关重要。本文旨在建立一般紧致黎曼曲面（带边界）上，参数趋近临界值时多重爆破解存在的充分条件。
AI.method: 采用变分方法和爆破分析技术，在单位面积的紧致黎曼曲面上研究带Neumann边界条件的非线性椭圆方程，通过构造适当的测试函数和能量估计，建立关于势函数V的充分条件。
AI.result: 对于任意正整数m及非负整数k,l满足m=2k+l，给出了V的充分条件，保证存在一列爆破解，当λ→4πm时在内部k个点和边界l个点同时爆破，并将结果推广到相应的奇异问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究完整刻画了带边界黎曼曲面上Keller-Segel系统稳态解的多重爆破现象，建立了内点爆破与边界爆破的组合机制，并拓展到奇异情形，深化了对趋化模型解空间结构的理解。

title: Scattering problem for the generalized Korteweg-de Vries equation
summary: In this paper we study the scattering problem for the initial value problem of the generalized Korteweg-de Vries (gKdV) equation. The purpose of this paper is to achieve two primary goals. Firstly, we show small data scattering for (gKdV) in the weighted Sobolev space, ensuring the initial and the asymptotic states belong to the same class. Secondly, we introduce two equivalent characterizations of scattering in the weighted Sobolev space. In particular, this involves the so-called conditional scattering in the weighted Sobolev space. A key ingredient is incorporation of the scattering criterion for (gKdV) in the Fourier-Lebesgue space by the authors into the the scattering problem in the weighted Sobolev space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究广义Korteweg-de Vries (gKdV)方程的散射问题，在加权Sobolev空间中证明了小数据散射，并引入了两种等价的散射刻画，包括条件散射。
AI.motivation: 解决gKdV方程在加权Sobolev空间中的散射问题，确保初态与渐近态属于同一函数空间，并建立散射的等价刻画条件。
AI.method: 将作者先前在Fourier-Lebesgue空间中建立的散射准则融入加权Sobolev空间的散射问题分析中。
AI.result: 在加权Sobolev空间中证明了gKdV方程的小数据散射，并给出了两种等价的散射刻画，包括条件散射。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Fourier-Lebesgue空间的散射准则迁移至加权Sobolev空间，为gKdV方程的散射理论提供了更完整的框架。

title: Nori motives (and mixed Hodge modules) with integral coefficients
summary: We construct abelian categories of integral Nori motivic sheaves over a scheme of characteristic zero. The first step is to study the presentable derived category of Nori motives over a field. Next we construct an algebra in étale motives such that modules over it afford a t-structure that restricts to constructible objects. This category of integral Nori motives has the six operations and arc-descent. We finish by providing analogous constructions and results for mixed Hodge modules on schemes over the reals.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了特征零概形上的整Nori动机层阿贝尔范畴，并建立了其六种运算与弧下降性质，同时给出了实域上混合Hodge模的类似构造。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于在特征零概形上建立整系数的Nori动机层理论，使得其具备阿贝尔范畴结构及完备的六种运算，并推广到混合Hodge模的情形。
AI.method: 首先研究域上Nori动机的可表现导出范畴；然后在étale动机中构造一个代数结构，使得其上的模层具有t-结构并能限制到可构造对象；最后将类似构造与结论推广到实域上的混合Hodge模。
AI.result: 成功构建了特征零概形上的整Nori动机层阿贝尔范畴，该范畴具有六种运算和arc下降性质；同时给出了实域上的混合Hodge模的类似结论。
AI.conclusion: 整Nori动机理论在特征零概形上具有完备的范畴论性质（六种运算、弧下降），且该框架可类比推广至混合Hodge模。

title: Efficient Long-distance Latent Relation-aware Graph Neural Network for Multi-modal Emotion Recognition in Conversations
summary: The task of multi-modal emotion recognition in conversation (MERC) aims to analyze the genuine emotional state of each utterance based on the multi-modal information in the conversation, which is crucial for conversation understanding. Existing methods focus on using graph neural networks (GNN) to model conversational relationships and capture contextual latent semantic relationships. However, due to the complexity of GNN, existing methods cannot efficiently capture the potential dependencies between long-distance utterances, which limits the performance of MERC. In this paper, we propose an Efficient Long-distance Latent Relation-aware Graph Neural Network (ELR-GNN) for multi-modal emotion recognition in conversations. Specifically, we first use pre-extracted text, video and audio features as input to Bi-LSTM to capture contextual semantic information and obtain low-level utterance features. Then, we use low-level utterance features to construct a conversational emotion interaction graph. To efficiently capture the potential dependencies between long-distance utterances, we use the dilated generalized forward push algorithm to precompute the emotional propagation between global utterances and design an emotional relation-aware operator to capture the potential semantic associations between different utterances. Furthermore, we combine early fusion and adaptive late fusion mechanisms to fuse latent dependency information between speaker relationship information and context. Finally, we obtain high-level discourse features and feed them into MLP for emotion prediction. Extensive experimental results show that ELR-GNN achieves state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark datasets IEMOCAP and MELD, with running times reduced by 52\% and 35\%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELR-GNN，一种高效的长距离潜在关系感知图神经网络，用于多模态对话情感识别。通过扩张广义前推算法预计算全局情感传播，并设计情感关系感知算子捕获长距离话语间的潜在语义关联，在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上达到SOTA性能，同时运行时间分别减少52%和35%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的多模态对话情感识别方法因GNN的复杂性，无法高效捕获长距离话语间的潜在依赖关系，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 1) 使用Bi-LSTM从文本、视频、音频特征中捕获上下文语义信息，获得低层话语特征；2) 构建对话情感交互图；3) 采用扩张广义前推算法预计算全局话语间的情感传播；4) 设计情感关系感知算子捕获话语间潜在语义关联；5) 结合早期融合和自适应晚期融合机制融合说话人关系与上下文潜在依赖信息；6) 高层特征经MLP进行情感预测。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD基准数据集上达到最先进性能，运行时间分别降低52%和35%。
AI.conclusion: ELR-GNN通过高效捕获长距离话语依赖关系，在提升多模态对话情感识别性能的同时显著降低了计算开销。

title: Discretizing Continuous Action Space with Unimodal Probability Distributions for On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
comment: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
summary: For on-policy reinforcement learning, discretizing action space for continuous control can easily express multiple modes and is straightforward to optimize. However, without considering the inherent ordering between the discrete atomic actions, the explosion in the number of discrete actions can possess undesired properties and induce a higher variance for the policy gradient estimator. In this paper, we introduce a straightforward architecture that addresses this issue by constraining the discrete policy to be unimodal using Poisson probability distributions. This unimodal architecture can better leverage the continuity in the underlying continuous action space using explicit unimodal probability distributions. We conduct extensive experiments to show that the discrete policy with the unimodal probability distribution provides significantly faster convergence and higher performance for on-policy reinforcement learning algorithms in challenging control tasks, especially in highly complex tasks such as Humanoid. We provide theoretical analysis on the variance of the policy gradient estimator, which suggests that our attentively designed unimodal discrete policy can retain a lower variance and yield a stable learning process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于泊松分布的单峰离散策略架构，用于解决连续控制任务中离散动作空间爆炸导致的策略梯度方差高、学习不稳定的问题，在Humanoid等复杂任务上实现了更快的收敛速度和更高的性能。
AI.motivation: 连续控制任务中，将动作空间离散化虽然易于表达多模态且优化简单，但离散原子动作之间固有的顺序关系被忽略，导致离散动作数量激增，进而引发策略梯度估计器方差增大，影响学习稳定性。
AI.method: 提出一种单峰离散策略架构，利用泊松概率分布对离散策略施加单峰约束，从而更好地利用底层连续动作空间的连续性，通过显式的单峰概率分布引导策略学习。
AI.result: 在极具挑战性的连续控制任务（如Humanoid）上，所提出的单峰离散策略显著加快了收敛速度并提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析表明，精心设计的单峰离散策略能够保持较低的策略梯度估计器方差，从而确保学习过程的稳定性。

title: Time-fractional diffusion equations with randomness, and efficient numerical estimations of expected values
summary: In this work, we explore a time-fractional diffusion equation of order $α\in (0,1)$ with a stochastic diffusivity parameter. We focus on efficient estimation of the expected values (considered as an infinite dimensional integral on the parametric space corresponding to the random coefficients) of linear functionals acting on the solution of our model problem. To estimate the expected value computationally, the infinite expansions of the random parameter need to be truncated. Then we approximate the high-dimensional integral over the random field using a high-order quasi-Monte Carlo method. This follows by approximating the deterministic solution over the space-time domain via a second-order accurate time-stepping scheme in combination with a spatial discretization by Galerkin finite elements. Under reasonable regularity assumptions on the given data, we show some regularity properties of the continuous solution and investigate the errors from estimating the expected value. We report on numerical experiments that complement the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究时间分数阶扩散方程（阶数α∈(0,1)）中随机扩散率参数下的期望值高效估计问题，采用准蒙特卡洛方法与伽辽金有限元离散相结合，并证明了连续解的 regularity 性质及误差分析。
AI.motivation: 针对时间分数阶扩散方程中随机扩散率参数带来的高维积分问题，需要高效估计线性泛函作用在解上的期望值，为此提出结合高阶准蒙特卡洛方法与时空离散数值方案。
AI.method: 1) 对随机参数的无穷级数展开进行截断；2) 采用高阶准蒙特卡洛方法近似高维随机场积分；3) 空间上使用伽辽金有限元离散，时间上采用二阶精度时间步进格式求解确定性问题。
AI.result: 在给定数据合理正则性假设下，证明了连续解的 regularity 性质，并对期望值估计的误差进行了理论分析；数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的截断-准蒙特卡洛-有限元混合方法能有效估计时间分数阶扩散方程中随机扩散率参数下的期望值，且理论误差分析与数值实验一致。

title: A Novel Highway Traffic Capacity Analyzing Method under Road Region Atmospheric Environment Constrains Based on Computational Fluid Dynamics Model
comment: The Transportation Research Board (TRB) 103nd Annual Meeting
summary: Highways always have a huge impact on the environment, quantifying the level of pollution and calculating the traffic capacity under environmental constraints is an important part of practicing environmental protection. Available traffic capacity methods do not focus on the traffic emissions impact on road region environment. To fill this research gap, this paper proposes a method consisting of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) model and Traffic Flow Field and the Gas Flow Field coupled model for the traffic capacity model. The COPERT 5 model is adopted to simulate the traffic emissions on highways with field measurement data and traffic conditions as initial conditions. Then, these are served as the inputs, set and further calculated using coupled model in the CFD numerical simulation phase. Finally, modeling the Traffic Capacity model and calculating the traffic capacity. The experiment results in G30 Yongshan highway section demonstrate that, with the proposed method, the CFD simulation model for traffic emissions in highway region can reflect the practical conditions (the overall error is within 10%), while the traffic capacity can be well performance with the traffic capacity model under the atmospheric pollution constraints. The annual average traffic capacity of G30 Yongshan is 739,800 vehicles, and SO2 under different constraints has the greatest limitation on traffic capacity (90,9662 vehicles), which is the most dominant impact in the environmental constraints of the road region, rest are ranked in: NO2 (246,5373), PM2.5 (323,6022), CO (771,8717), CO2 (803,7217), and PM10 (2202,0013).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CFD模型、交通流场与气体流场耦合模型以及COPERT 5排放模型的方法，用于量化高速公路环境约束下的交通容量。通过G30永山段实证，该方法误差在10%以内，并发现SO2是对交通容量限制最强的环境因子。
AI.motivation: 现有交通容量方法未关注交通排放对道路区域环境的影响，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 采用COPERT 5模型模拟高速公路交通排放，以实地测量数据和交通条件为初始条件；构建CFD数值模拟中的交通流场与气体流场耦合模型进行仿真计算；最后建立并求解环境约束下的交通容量模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效反映高速公路区域交通排放的实际状况，并在大气污染约束下良好地评估交通容量，其中SO₂是道路区域环境约束中最具主导性的影响因素。

title: On the Continuity of Schur-Horn Mapping
summary: The Schur-Horn theorem is a well-known result that characterizes the relationship between the diagonal elements and eigenvalues of a symmetric (Hermitian) matrix. In this paper, we extend this theorem by exploring the eigenvalue perturbation of a symmetric (Hermitian) matrix with fixed diagonals, which is referred to as the continuity of the Schur-Horn mapping. We introduce a concept called strong Schur-Horn continuity, characterized by minimal constraints on the perturbation. We demonstrate that several categories of matrices exhibit strong Schur-Horn continuity. Leveraging this notion, along with a majorization constraint on the perturbation, we prove the Schur-Horn continuity for general symmetric (Hermitian) matrices. The Schur-Horn continuity finds applications in oblique manifold optimization related to quantum computing.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Schur-Horn定理，提出了强Schur-Horn连续性概念，证明了多种矩阵满足该性质，并结合受控约束建立了对称（Hermitian）矩阵的Schur-Horn连续性，该结果可应用于量子计算中的斜流形优化。
AI.motivation: 经典Schur-Horn定理刻画了对称矩阵对角元与特征值之间的关系，但尚未深入探讨固定对角元下特征值扰动的连续性，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 引入强Schur-Horn连续性概念，对扰动施加最小约束条件，建立受控（majorization）约束与特征值连续性的关联，通过分类证明多种矩阵族满足该性质，进而推广至一般情形。
AI.result: 证明了在受控约束下，一般对称（Hermitian）矩阵具有Schur-Horn连续性，并识别出若干满足强连续性的矩阵类别。
AI.conclusion: Schur-Horn连续性是Schur-Horn定理的动态推广，为量子计算中斜流形优化提供了理论支撑。

title: Common Noise by Random Measures: Constructing Mean-Field Equilibria for Competitive Investment and Hedging
comment: The first version (arXiv:2408.01175v1) of this preprint has been published under the slightly different title "Common Noise by Random Measures: Mean-Field Equilibria for Competitive Investment and Hedging"; the present ver3 features several new results relative to ver1 and fixes hyperref-related compilation errors present in ver2
summary: We construct Nash-equilibria in mean-field portfolio games of optimal investment and hedging under relative performance concerns with exponential (CARA) utility preferences. Common noise dynamics are modeled by integer-valued random measures, for instance Poisson random measures, in addition to Brownian motions. Agents differ in individual risk aversions, competition weights, and initial capital endowments, while their contingent claim liabilities depend on both common and idiosyncratic risk factors. Mean-field equilibria are characterized by solutions to McKean-Vlasov backward stochastic differential equations with jumps, for which we prove existence and uniqueness of solutions, without assuming mean field interaction to be small. Moreover, we show how the equilibrium can be constructed from the optimal strategy of a single-agent optimization problem (without mean-field interaction) via an appropriate projection. Using successive changes of measure, our derivation provides a decomposition of the equilibrium strategy into three components with clear interpretations. Finally, we show how a limiting mean-field game of quadratic (instead of utility-based) hedging with relative performance concerns arises for vanishing risk aversion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带相对绩效关注的均值场投资组合博弈中的纳什均衡问题，采用指数（CARA）效用偏好，允许跳跃过程（如泊松随机测度）作为共同噪声，证明了McKean-Vlasov倒向随机微分方程解的存在唯一性，并通过单智能体优化问题的投影构建均衡策略，将策略分解为三个可解释分量，最后展示了风险厌恶趋零时二次对冲均值场博弈的极限情形。
AI.motivation: 现有均值场博弈研究多聚焦于扩散模型或连续路径情形，对于带跳跃的随机环境以及相对绩效关注下的投资与对冲混合问题关注不足。本文旨在构建一个包含跳跃过程（如泊松随机测度）的均值场投资组合博弈框架，考虑个体风险厌恶、竞争权重和初始禀赋异质性，并处理或有债权负债带来的对冲需求。
AI.method: 采用McKean-Vlasov倒向随机微分方程（BSDE）方法刻画均值场均衡，方程包含跳跃项；通过连续测度变换和投影方法，将均值场博弈的均衡策略与单智能体优化问题建立联系，实现均衡解的存在性与唯一性证明；进一步通过风险厌恶参数趋零的极限分析，建立从基于效用的对冲博弈到二次对冲均值场博弈的过渡。
AI.result: 证明了带跳跃的McKean-Vlasov BSDE在无需均值场交互小量假设下的解存在唯一性；给出了均衡策略的三分量分解（分别对应投资、对冲和竞争调整）；展示了风险厌恶趋零时极限博弈收敛到二次对冲均值场博弈。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的框架统一了带跳跃的均值场投资对冲博弈，为多智能体异质性环境下的相对绩效均衡提供了严格理论基础。均衡策略的分解结构具有清晰的经济解释，且极限分析揭示了风险中性（二次对冲）情形与CARA效用情形的内在联系。

title: Building Better Datasets: Seven Recommendations for Responsible Design from Dataset Creators
summary: The increasing demand for high-quality datasets in machine learning has raised concerns about the ethical and responsible creation of these datasets. Dataset creators play a crucial role in developing responsible practices, yet their perspectives and expertise have not yet been highlighted in the current literature. In this paper, we bridge this gap by presenting insights from a qualitative study that included interviewing 18 leading dataset creators about the current state of the field. We shed light on the challenges and considerations faced by dataset creators, and our findings underscore the potential for deeper collaboration, knowledge sharing, and collective development. Through a close analysis of their perspectives, we share seven central recommendations for improving responsible dataset creation, including issues such as data quality, documentation, privacy and consent, and how to mitigate potential harms from unintended use cases. By fostering critical reflection and sharing the experiences of dataset creators, we aim to promote responsible dataset creation practices and develop a nuanced understanding of this crucial but often undervalued aspect of machine learning research.

AI.tldr: 通过对18位领先数据集创建者的定性访谈研究，揭示了当前数据集创建中的挑战与考虑，并提出了七项促进负责任数据集创建的核心建议，涵盖数据质量、文档记录、隐私与同意以及减轻潜在危害等方面。
AI.motivation: 机器学习对高质量数据集的需求日益增长，引发了关于数据集创建伦理和负责任实践的担忧。然而，数据集创建者的视角和专业经验在现有文献中尚未得到充分关注，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 采用定性研究方法，对18位领先的数据集创建者进行了深度访谈，通过对访谈内容的细致分析提炼出核心发现和建议。
AI.result: 揭示了数据集创建者面临的多重挑战和考量，并提出了七项核心建议，包括改进数据质量、文档记录、隐私与同意管理，以及减轻意外使用带来的潜在危害。
AI.conclusion: 通过分享数据集创建者的经验，促进负责任的数据集创建实践，为机器学习研究中这一重要但常被低估的环节提供了更深入的理解，并呼吁加强协作、知识共享和集体发展。

title: Canard cascading in networks with adaptive mean-field coupling
summary: Canard cascading (CC) is observed in dynamical networks with global adaptive coupling. It is a fast-slow phenomenon characterized by a recurrent sequence of fast transitions between distinct and slowly evolving quasi-stationary states. In this letter, we uncover the dynamical mechanisms behind CC, using an illustrative example of globally and adaptively coupled semiconductor lasers, where CC represents sequential switching on and off the lasers. Firstly, we show that CC is a robust and truly adaptive network effect that is scalable with network size and does not occur without adaptation. Secondly, we uncover multiple saddle slow manifolds (unstable quasi-stationary states) linked by heteroclinic orbits (fast transitions) in the phase space of the system. This allows us to identify CC with a novel heteroclinic canard orbit that organises different unstable quasi-stationary states into an intricate fast-slow limit cycle. Although individual quasi-stationary states are unstable (saddles), the CC cycle as a whole is attractive and robust to parameter changes.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了全局自适应耦合动态网络中“鸭级联”（Canard cascading, CC）现象的动力学机制。以全局自适应耦合半导体激光器为例，CC表现为激光器序列开关的快速-慢速现象。研究发现：CC是仅存在于自适应耦合中的鲁棒网络效应，可随网络规模扩展；相空间中存在多个由异宿轨道连接的不稳定鞍慢流形，CC被识别为一种新型异宿canard轨道，将不同不稳定准稳态组织成吸引且鲁棒的快速-慢速极限环。
AI.motivation: 解释全局自适应耦合动态网络中观察到的鸭级联现象的动力学机制，特别是这种快速-慢速现象的产生原因和结构基础。
AI.method: 以全局自适应耦合半导体激光器为示例系统，通过相空间分析识别鞍慢流形和异宿轨道，将CC识别为异宿canard轨道，并验证其网络规模可扩展性和对参数变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: CC是适应性网络特有的鲁棒效应，不依赖于无自适应耦合的系统；相空间中存在多个由异宿轨道连接的不稳定鞍慢流形；CC被识别为一种新型异宿canard极限环，整体吸引且对参数变化鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: CC是一种新型异宿canard轨道，将多个不稳定准稳态组织成整体吸引的快速-慢速极限环，揭示了自适应耦合网络中复杂快速-慢速动力学的底层结构。

title: A Josephson-Anderson relation for drag in classical channel flows with streamwise periodicity: Effects of wall roughness
comment: 14 pages 9 Figures of main text + 7 pages and 8 figures of supplemental material
summary: The detailed Josephson-Anderson relation equates instantaneous work by pressure drop over any streamwise segment of a general channel and wall-normal flux of spanwise vorticity spatially integrated over that section. This relation was first derived by Huggins for quantum superfluids, but it holds also for internal flows of classical fluids and for external flows around solid bodies, corresponding there to relations of Burgers, Lighthill, Kambe, Howe and others. All of these prior results employ a background potential Euler flow with the same inflow/outflow as the physical flow, just as in Kelvin's minimum energy theorem, so that the reference potential incorporates information about flow geometry. We here generalize the detailed Josephson-Anderson relation to streamwise periodic channels appropriate for numerical simulation of classical fluid turbulence. We show that the original Neumann b.c. used by Huggins for the background potential create an unphysical vortex sheet in a periodic channel, so that we substitute instead Dirichlet b.c. We show that the minimum energy theorem still holds and our new Josephson-Anderson relation again equates work by pressure drop instantaneously to integrated flux of spanwise vorticity. The result holds for both Newtonian and non-Newtonian fluids and for general curvilinear walls. We illustrate our new formula with numerical results in a periodic channel flow with a single smooth bump, which reveals how vortex separation from the roughness element creates drag at each time instant. Drag and dissipation are thus related to vorticity structure and dynamics locally in space and time, with important applications to drag-reduction and to explanation of anomalous dissipation at high Reynolds numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文将约瑟夫森-安德森关系推广到适用于经典流体湍流数值模拟的流向周期通道中，通过用Dirichlet边界条件替代原Huggins使用的Neumann边界条件，避免了非物理的涡片产生，并证明新的关系式仍将压降做功与展向涡量通量瞬时等价。该结果适用于牛顿/非牛顿流体及一般弯曲壁面，并通过含光滑凸起的周期通道流动数值实验展示了涡分离如何产生瞬时阻力。
AI.motivation: 现有的详细约瑟夫森-安德森关系最初针对量子超流体推导，虽适用于经典流体内部流动和外部绕流，但其采用的背景势流Euler流需匹配物理流的入口/出口条件，且原Huggins使用的Neumann边界条件在周期通道中会产生非物理的涡片，限制了其在经典流体湍流数值模拟中的直接应用。因此需要推广该关系以适应流向周期通道这一数值模拟中的常见设置。
AI.method: 本文将背景势流的边界条件从Huggins原用的Neumann边界条件改为Dirichlet边界条件，以消除周期通道中非物理的涡片；同时证明了最小能量定理仍然成立，并推导了新的约瑟夫森-安德森关系式，使其同样将压降做功与展向涡量通量瞬时等价。该推导适用于牛顿和非牛顿流体以及一般弯曲壁面，并通过含单个光滑凸起的周期通道流动数值实验进行了验证。
AI.result: 证明了在周期通道中使用Dirichlet边界条件替代Neumann边界条件后，最小能量定理仍成立，新的约瑟夫森-安德森关系式正确地将压降的瞬时做功与展向涡量通量的空间积分等价起来。数值实验表明，该关系式能够揭示粗糙元（光滑凸起）处涡分离如何产生瞬时阻力，从而将阻力和耗散与涡量结构和动力学在局部时空上联系起来。
AI.conclusion: 推广后的约瑟夫森-安德森关系为理解阻力和耗散提供了新的理论工具，能够从涡量结构和动力学角度在局部时空上解释阻力产生机制，对减阻研究和解释高雷诺数下的反常耗散现象具有重要应用价值。

title: Curvilinear High-Order Mimetic Differences that Satisfy Conservation Laws
comment: Corrected typo on page 8, equation 11. Also on page 8, changed the sentence "where P and Q are diagonal weight matrix norms." to "where Q and P are diagonal positive definite matrices."
summary: We investigate the construction and usage of mimetic operators in curvilinear staggered grids. Specifically, we extend the Corbino-Castillo operators so they can be utilized to solve problems in non-trivial geometries. We prove that the resulting curvilinear operators satisfy the discrete analog of the extended Gauss-Divergence theorem. In addition, we demonstrate energy and mass conservation in curvilinear coordinates for the acoustic wave equation. These findings are illustrated in two-dimensional and three-dimensional elliptic/hyperbolic equations and can be extended to other partial differential equations as well.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了曲线交错网格中拟算子的构造与应用，将Corbino-Castillo算子扩展至非平凡几何，证明其满足离散扩展高斯散度定理，并在曲线坐标下展示了声波方程的能量与质量守恒，并通过2D/3D椭圆/双曲方程验证。
AI.motivation: 现有Corbino-Castillo拟算子仅适用于简单几何，无法直接处理非平凡曲线几何问题，因此需要扩展其适用范围。
AI.method: 将Corbino-Castillo算子推广至曲线交错网格，通过理论证明其满足离散扩展高斯散度定理，并在曲线坐标系下分析声波方程的能量与质量守恒性质。
AI.result: 证明了扩展后的曲线拟算子满足离散扩展高斯散度定理，并在曲线坐标下实现了声波方程的能量守恒与质量守恒。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的曲线拟算子可用于2D/3D椭圆/双曲方程，并可推广至其他偏微分方程，具有广泛的适用性。

title: On the prismatization of $O_K$ beyond the Hodge-Tate locus
summary: Let $X=\mathrm{Spf}(\mathcal{O}_K)$. We classify perfect complexes of $n$-truncated prismatic crystals on the prismatic site of $X$ when $n\leq 1+\frac{p-1}{e}$ by studying perfect complexes on the $n$-truncated prismatization of $X$, which are certain nilpotent thickenings of the Hodge-Tate stack of $X$ inside the prismatization of $X$. We describe the category of continuous semilinear representations and their cohomology for $G_K$ with coefficients in $B_{\mathrm{dR},n}^+$ via rationalization of vector bundles on the slight shrinking of the $n$-truncated prismatization of $X$. Along the way, we classify certain integral models for de Rham prismatic crystals studied in arXiv:2205.14914.

AI.tldr: 本文对n-截断棱柱晶体在棱柱层上的完美复形进行了分类（当n≤1+(p-1)/e时），并通过研究X的n-截断棱柱化（即X的棱柱化内部Hodge-Tate栈的幂零加厚）来实现。进一步通过向量丛的有理化描述了G_K的连续半线性表示及其B_dR,n^+系数的上同调，同时分类了arXiv:2205.14914中de Rham棱柱晶体的某些积分模型。
AI.motivation: 对n-截断棱柱晶体的完美复形进行分类，并理解G_K的连续半线性表示及其上同调，特别是通过棱柱化几何结构建立积分模型与有理系数的联系。
AI.method: 利用X的n-截断棱柱化（Hodge-Tate栈在棱柱化内部的幂零加厚）研究完美复形；通过向量丛的有理化描述连续半线性表示范畴及其上同调。
AI.result: 在n≤1+(p-1)/e的条件下分类了n-截断棱柱晶体的完美复形；描述了G_K的连续半线性表示及其B_dR,n^+系数的上同调；分类了arXiv:2205.14914中de Rham棱柱晶体的某些积分模型。
AI.conclusion: 建立了棱柱晶体理论、棱柱化几何与p进Hodge理论中表示范畴之间的桥梁，给出了积分结构与有理系数的统一处理框架。

title: Quasi-BPS categories for Higgs bundles
summary:
We introduce quasi-BPS categories for twisted Higgs bundles, which are building blocks of the derived category of coherent sheaves on the moduli stack of semistable twisted Higgs bundles over a smooth projective curve. Under some condition (called BPS condition), the quasi-BPS categories are non-commutative analogues of Hitchin integrable systems.
  We begin the study of these quasi-BPS categories by focusing on a conjectural symmetry which swaps the Euler characteristic and the weight. Our conjecture is inspired by the Dolbeault Geometric Langlands equivalence of Donagi--Pantev, by the Hausel--Thaddeus mirror symmetry, and by the $χ$-independence phenomenon for BPS invariants of curves on Calabi-Yau threefolds.
  We prove our conjecture in the case of rank two and genus zero. In higher genus, we prove a derived equivalence of rank two stable twisted Higgs moduli spaces as a special case of our conjecture.
  In a separate paper, we prove a version of our conjecture for the topological K-theory of quasi-BPS categories and we discuss the relation between quasi-BPS categories and BPS invariants of the corresponding local Calabi-Yau threefold.

AI.tldr: 本文引入了扭曲Higgs丛的拟BPS范畴，作为半稳定扭曲Higgs丛模栈上的相干层导出范畴的构建模块。在BPS条件下，这些拟BPS范畴是Hitchin可积系统的非交换类比。本文重点研究了一个交换欧拉示性数与权的对称性猜想，并在秩二、亏格零的情形下证明了该猜想；在更高亏格下，证明了秩二稳定扭曲Higgs模空间的一个导出等价作为猜想的特例。
AI.motivation: 受到Donagi-Pantev的Dolbeault几何Langlands等价、Hausel-Thaddeus镜像对称以及Calabi-Yau三维流形上曲线BPS不变量的χ-独立现象的启发，作者希望建立一种交换欧拉示性数与权的对称性，从而揭示拟BPS范畴的深层结构。
AI.method: 引入拟BPS范畴作为模栈上相干层导出范畴的构建块，在BPS条件下将其视为Hitchin可积系统的非交换类比；通过导出等价技术，分别在秩二亏格零（完全证明）和更高亏格（部分证明）下验证所提出的对称性猜想。
AI.result: 在秩二、亏格零情形下完整证明了交换欧拉示性数与权的对称性猜想；在更高亏格下，证明了秩二稳定扭曲Higgs模空间的一个导出等价。
AI.conclusion: 拟BPS范畴是研究扭曲Higgs丛模空间导出范畴的基本工具，所提出的对称性猜想在秩二情形得到支持，为进一步建立与局部Calabi-Yau三维流形上BPS不变量的联系奠定了基础。

title: Existence and weak-strong uniqueness for damage systems in viscoelasticity
summary: In this paper we investigate the existence of solutions and their weak-strong uniqueness property for a PDE system modelling damage in viscoelastic materials. In fact, we address two solution concepts, weak and strong solutions. For the former, we obtain a global-in-time existence result, but the highly nonlinear character of the system prevents us from proving their uniqueness. For the latter, we prove local-in-time existence. Then, we show that the strong solution, as long as it exists, is unique in the class of weak solutions. This weak-strong uniqueness statement is proved by means of a suitable relative energy inequality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究粘弹性材料损伤模型的弱解与强解存在性及弱-强唯一性，通过相对能量不等式证明强解在弱解类中的唯一性。
AI.motivation: 粘弹性材料损伤模型的解的存在性与唯一性是重要的数学问题，由于系统高度非线性，弱解的唯一性难以直接证明，需要建立弱-强唯一性结果以保障解的一致性。
AI.method: 分别建立弱解（全局存在）与强解（局部存在）的存在性结果，并利用相对能量不等式推导强解在弱解类中的唯一性。
AI.result: 获得了弱解的全局存在性和强解的局部存在性，并证明了强解在弱解类中是唯一的。
AI.conclusion: 基于相对能量不等式的方法可以有效处理粘弹性损伤模型中弱-强唯一性问题，为非线性PDE系统的解理论提供了重要工具。

title: Global large strong solution of the 3D inhomogeneous Navier-Stokes equations with density-dependent viscosity
summary: This paper concerns the Dirichlet problem of three-dimensional inhomogeneous Navier-Stokes equations with density-dependent viscosity. When the viscosity coefficient $μ(ρ)$ is a power function of the density ($μ(ρ)=μρ^α$ with $α>1$), it is proved that the system will admit a unique global strong solution as long as the initial data are sufficiently large. This is the first result concerning the existence of large strong solution for the inhomogeneous Navier-Stokes equations in three dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究三维非齐次Navier-Stokes方程在密度依赖黏性系数下的Dirichlet问题，证明了当黏性系数为密度的幂函数（α>1）时，系统在初始数据足够大的条件下存在唯一的全局强解，这是三维情形下首个关于大强解存在性的结果。
AI.motivation: 三维非齐次Navier-Stokes方程的大解存在性是一个具有挑战性的公开问题，现有结果大多局限于小初始数据情形。本文旨在突破这一限制，探究在密度依赖黏性系数结构下是否能够获得大初始数据下的全局强解存在性。
AI.method: 采用能量估计与先验估计相结合的分析框架，利用黏性系数μ(ρ)=μρ^α（α>1）的幂函数结构，通过构造适当的能量泛函并建立高阶正则性估计，结合紧性论证和不动点原理来完成解的存在性与唯一性证明。
AI.result: 证明了当黏性系数为密度幂函数且指数α>1时，三维非齐次Navier-Stokes方程在Dirichlet边界条件下存在唯一的全局强解，且初始数据可以充分大。这是三维情形下首个关于大强解存在性的理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该结果揭示了密度依赖黏性（尤其是超线性增长）在抑制三维流动奇性形成中的关键作用，为非齐次Navier-Stokes方程的大解理论提供了新的见解，也为相关物理模型中大Reynolds数流动的数学分析奠定了基础。

title: Toward Qin's Conjecture on Hilbert schemes of points and quasi-modular forms
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2310.10812
summary: For a line bundle $L$ on a smooth projective surface $X$ and nonnegative integers $k_1, \ldots, k_N$, Okounkov \cite{Oko} introduced the reduced generating series $\big \langle {\rm ch}_{k_1}^{L} \cdots {\rm ch}_{k_N}^{L} \big \rangle'$ for the intersection numbers among the Chern characters of the tautological bundles over the Hilbert schemes of points on $X$ and the total Chern classes of the tangent bundles of these Hilbert schemes. In \cite{Qin2}, Qin conjectured that these reduced generating series are quasi-modular forms if the canonical divisor of $X$ is numerically trivial. In this paper, we verify that Qin's conjecture holds for $\langle {\rm ch}_1^{L_1}{\rm ch}_1^{L_2} \rangle'$. The main approaches are to use the methods laid out in \cite{QY} and construct various relations regarding multiple $q$-zeta values and quasi-modular forms.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了对光滑射影曲面X（数值平凡典范除子）上，Okounkov约化生成级数⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩'是拟模形式，验证了Qin猜想的一个特例。主要方法来自文献[QY]并构造了多重q-zeta值与拟模形式的关系。
AI.motivation: Qin猜想：当曲面X的典范除子数值平凡时，Okounkov约化生成级数是拟模形式。该猜想联系了Hilbert scheme上的相交数、Chern特征与模形式理论，具有深刻的几何与数论意义。
AI.method: 沿用文献[QY]的方法，通过构造多重q-zeta值与拟模形式之间的各种关系式，对约化生成级数⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩'进行具体计算与形式分析。
AI.result: 成功验证了Qin猜想在⟨ch₁^{L₁}ch₁^{L₂}⟩'情形下成立，即该约化生成级数为拟模形式。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为Qin猜想的完整证明提供了关键特例支撑，表明利用多重q-zeta值与拟模形式的关系是解决此类问题的有效途径。

title: Granite-Function Calling Model: Introducing Function Calling Abilities via Multi-task Learning of Granular Tasks
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown tremendous promise in serving as the backbone to agentic systems, as demonstrated by their performance in multi-faceted, challenging benchmarks like SWE-Bench and Agent-Bench. However, to realize the true potential of LLMs as autonomous agents, they must learn to identify, call, and interact with external tools and application program interfaces (APIs) to complete complex tasks. These tasks together are termed function calling. Endowing LLMs with function calling abilities leads to a myriad of advantages, such as access to current and domain-specific information in databases and knowledge sources, and the ability to outsource tasks that can be reliably performed by tools, e.g., a Python interpreter or calculator. While there has been significant progress in function calling with LLMs, there is still a dearth of open models that perform on par with proprietary LLMs like GPT, Claude, and Gemini. Therefore, in this work, we introduce the GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING model under an Apache 2.0 license. The model is trained using a multi-task training approach on seven fundamental tasks encompassed in function calling, those being Nested Function Calling, Function Chaining, Parallel Functions, Function Name Detection, Parameter-Value Pair Detection, Next-Best Function, and Response Generation. We present a comprehensive evaluation on multiple out-of-domain datasets comparing GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING to more than 15 other best proprietary and open models. GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING provides the best performance among all open models on the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard and fourth overall. As a result of the diverse tasks and datasets used for training our model, we show that GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING has better generalizability on multiple tasks in seven different evaluation datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING模型（Apache 2.0许可），采用多任务训练方法覆盖函数调用的7个核心任务，在Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard上超越所有其他开源模型，综合排名第四，展现出优异的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在智能体系统中展现出巨大潜力，但开源模型在函数调用能力上仍与GPT、Claude、Gemini等专有模型存在显著差距，亟需一个性能匹敌专有模型的开源函数调用模型。
AI.method: 采用多任务训练方法，在7个函数调用基础任务（嵌套函数调用、函数链式调用、并行函数、函数名检测、参数-值对检测、下一最佳函数、响应生成）上进行联合训练，构建GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING模型。
AI.result: 在Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard上，该模型在所有开源模型中表现最佳，综合排名第四（仅次于三个专有模型）；在7个不同评估数据集的多个任务上展现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多任务训练策略能有效提升开源模型在函数调用方面的性能，GRANITE-20B-FUNCTIONCALLING填补了开源模型与专有模型在函数调用能力上的差距，且Apache 2.0许可有利于社区进一步研究和应用。

title: Online Linear Programming with Batching
summary: We study Online Linear Programming (OLP) with batching. The planning horizon is cut into $K$ batches, and the decisions on customers arriving within a batch can be delayed to the end of their associated batch. Compared with OLP without batching, the ability to delay decisions brings better operational performance, as measured by regret. Two research questions of interest are: (1) What is a lower bound of the regret as a function of $K$? (2) What algorithms can achieve the regret lower bound? These questions have been analyzed in the literature when the distribution of the reward and the resource consumption of the customers have finite support. By contrast, this paper analyzes these questions when the conditional distribution of the reward given the resource consumption is continuous, and we show the answers are different under this setting. When there is only a single type of resource and the decision maker knows the total number of customers, we propose an algorithm with a $O(\log K)$ regret upper bound and provide a $Ω(\log K)$ regret lower bound. We also propose algorithms with $O(\log K)$ regret upper bound for the setting in which there are multiple types of resource and the setting in which customers arrive following a Poisson process. All these regret upper and lower bounds are independent of the length of the planning horizon, and all the proposed algorithms delay decisions on customers arriving in only the first and the last batch. We also take customer impatience into consideration and establish a way of selecting an appropriate batch size.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带批处理的在线线性规划问题，将规划期划分为K个批次，批内决策可延迟至批次结束时执行。在奖励条件于资源消耗的连续分布假设下，提出单资源场景的O(log K)遗憾上界和Ω(log K)下界，以及多资源和泊松到达场景的O(log K)上界算法，所有界值与规划期长度无关，且仅需延迟第一批和最后一批顾客的决策。
AI.motivation: 现有文献在有穷支撑的奖励与资源消耗分布下已分析了带批处理OLP的遗憾下界和最优算法，但在连续条件分布场景下相关结论尚不明确，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出仅延迟第一批和最后一批顾客决策的算法框架；通过理论分析证明单资源场景下O(log K)遗憾上界与Ω(log K)下界；扩展至多资源场景和泊松到达场景；纳入顾客不耐烦特性以指导批次大小选取。
AI.result: (1) 单资源场景：O(log K)上界与Ω(log K)下界；(2) 多资源场景：O(log K)上界；(3) 泊松到达场景：O(log K)上界；(4) 所有界值与规划期长度T无关；(5) 推导出考虑顾客不耐烦时的最优批次大小选取方法。
AI.conclusion: 在连续条件分布下，带批处理的OLP遗憾界为log K量级且与T无关，显著优于无批处理场景；仅需在首尾两批次延迟决策即可实现最优性能。

title: A potential energy conserving finite element method for turbulent variable density flow: application to glacier-fjord circulation
summary: We introduce a continuous Galerkin finite element discretization of the non-hydrostatic Boussinesq approximation of the Navier-Stokes equations, suitable for various applications such as coastal ocean dynamics and ice-ocean interactions, among others. In particular, we introduce a consistent modification of the gravity force term which enhances conservation properties for Galerkin methods without strictly enforcing the divergence-free condition. We show that this modification results in a sharp energy estimate, including both kinetic and potential energy. Additionally, we propose a new, symmetric, tensor-based viscosity operator that is especially suitable for modeling turbulence in stratified flow. The viscosity coefficients are constructed using a residual-based shock-capturing method and the method conserves angular momentum and dissipates kinetic energy. We validate our proposed method through numerical tests and use it to model the ocean circulation and basal melting beneath the ice tongue of the Ryder Glacier and the adjacent Sherard Osborn fjord in two dimensions on a fully unstructured mesh. Our results compare favorably with a standard numerical ocean model, showing better resolved turbulent flow features and reduced artificial diffusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向非静水Boussinesq近似的连续Galerkin有限元离散格式，通过一致修正重力项和引入基于残差的对称张量粘性算子，实现了能量守恒、角动量守恒及湍流模拟的改进，并在Ryder冰川冰舌下的二维非结构化网格海洋环流与基底融化模拟中验证了其优于传统数值模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有Galerkin方法在非严格满足散度自由条件下，重力项的处理会导致能量守恒特性不佳；同时，传统粘性算子对分层流中的湍流建模不够精确，人工扩散过大，难以准确模拟冰-海相互作用等复杂物理过程。
AI.method: 1) 对Navier-Stokes方程的非静水Boussinesq近似采用连续Galerkin有限元离散；2) 引入重力项的一致修正，在不严格满足散度自由条件的前提下增强守恒性；3) 提出基于残差的激波捕捉方法构建对称张量粘性算子，该算子角动量守恒且耗散动能。
AI.result: 数值测试验证了方法的有效性；在Ryder冰川冰舌及Sherard Osborn峡湾的二维非结构化网格模拟中，与标准海洋数值模型相比，新方法解析出了更丰富的湍流特征，并显著降低了人工扩散。
AI.conclusion: 该连续Galerkin格式在非静水Boussinesq框架下兼具能量估计、角动量守恒和湍流精细解析能力，为海岸海洋动力学和冰-海相互作用等应用提供了更精确的数值工具。

title: Strong convergence of an explicit full-discrete scheme for stochastic Burgers-Huxley equation
summary: The strong convergence of an explicit full-discrete scheme is investigated for the stochastic Burgers-Huxley equation driven by additive space-time white noise, which possesses both Burgers-type and cubic nonlinearities. To discretize the continuous problem in space, we utilize a spectral Galerkin method. Subsequently, we introduce a nonlinear-tamed exponential integrator scheme, resulting in a fully discrete scheme. Within the framework of semigroup theory, this study provides precise estimations of the Sobolev regularity, $L^\infty$ regularity in space, and Hölder continuity in time for the mild solution, as well as for its semi-discrete and full-discrete approximations. Building upon these results, we establish moment boundedness for the numerical solution and obtain strong convergence rates in both spatial and temporal dimensions. A numerical example is presented to validate the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类由加性时空白噪声驱动的随机Burgers-Huxley方程的全显式离散格式的强收敛性，采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散并引入非线性驯化指数积分器，在散群理论框架下建立了精确的正则性估计，并证明了数值解的矩有界性及时空强收敛率。
AI.motivation: 针对同时具有Burgers型非线性和三次非线性的随机Burgers-Huxley方程，现有的全显式离散格式的强收敛性分析尚不充分，尤其是加性时空白噪声带来的低正则性挑战，需要建立精确的正则性估计和收敛性理论。
AI.method: 采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散，结合非线性驯化指数积分器构造全显式格式；基于散群理论框架，对温和解、半离散及全离散近似进行Sobolev正则性、空间L∞正则性及时间Hölder连续性的精确估计。
AI.result: 建立了数值解的矩有界性，获得了空间和时间维度上的强收敛率，并通过数值算例验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的全显式离散格式对于随机Burgers-Huxley方程具有可靠的强收敛性，理论分析框架适用于处理含多重非线性和低正则性噪声的随机偏微分方程。

title: Structured Sketching for Linear Systems
summary: For linear systems $Ax=b$ we develop iterative algorithms based on a sketch-and-project approach. By using judicious choices for the sketch, such as the history of residuals, we develop weighting strategies that enable short recursive formulas. The proposed algorithms have a low memory footprint and iteration complexity compared to regular sketch-and-project methods. In a set of numerical experiments the new methods compare well to GMRES, SYMMLQ and state-of-the-art randomized solvers.

AI.tldr: 本文针对线性系统 Ax=b 开发了基于 sketch-and-project 框架的迭代算法，通过利用残差历史等巧妙选择草图，设计了加权策略并实现短递推公式。新方法相比传统 sketch-and-project 方法具有更低的内存占用和迭代复杂度，数值实验表明与 GMRES、SYMMLQ 及最先进的随机求解器相比具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 降低传统 sketch-and-project 迭代方法的内存占用和迭代复杂度，提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于 sketch-and-project 框架，通过利用残差历史等历史信息选择草图，设计加权策略，实现短递推公式。
AI.result: 新方法相比传统 sketch-and-project 方法具有更低的内存占用和迭代复杂度；数值实验中与 GMRES、SYMMLQ 及最先进随机求解器相比表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 提出的加权草图投影迭代算法在内存效率和计算复杂度上优于传统方法，在数值实验中与主流求解器具有可比性。

title: A Short-Term Planning Framework for the Operation of Tanker-Based Water Distribution Systems in Urban Areas
summary: Tanker-based distribution systems have been prevalent in developing countries to supply clean and pure water in different regions. To efficiently operate such tanker service systems, a large fleet of tanker trucks are required to transport water among several water sources, water treatment plants and consumers spanning across the regions. This requires tighter coordination between water suppliers, treatment plant operations, and user groups to use available water resources in a sustainable manner, along with the assurance of water quality and timely delivery. This paper proposes a novel formulation to assist decision-making for optimizing tanker-based water distribution systems and treatment operations, with an overall objective of minimizing the total operating cost such that all of the constraints related to the water demand, supply operations, and environmental and social aspects are honored while supplying water to a maximum number of users. The problem is formulated and solved as a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) optimization framework and captures all of the nuances related to (i) water availability limitations and quality constraints from different sources, (ii) maintaining water quality as it transports via tankers, (iii) water demands for various end-use purposes, and (iv) transportation across a water supply chain. The proposed novel framework is applied to a realistic urban model to find the optimal tanker delivery schedule, ensuring appropriate treatment and timely delivery of water. The results of the case study conducted on a representative-scale problem also elucidate several aspects of treatment plant operation and consumer demand fulfillment for the efficient planning and management of tanker-based water distribution systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合整数线性规划（MILP）的优化框架，用于管理由罐车组成的水分配系统，以最小化总运营成本，同时满足水质、供应、环境和社会约束，并最大化用户供水数量。该框架综合考虑了水源可用性与水质限制、运输过程中的水质保持、不同终端用水需求及供应链运输，并在一个现实城市模型中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家普遍采用罐车水分配系统来供应清洁水，但这类系统需要大量罐车在多水源、水处理厂和用户之间协调运输，存在运营效率低、协调难度大等问题。现有方法缺乏对水质保持、多种需求约束和可持续运营的综合优化决策支持。
AI.method: 将罐车水分配与处理运营问题建模为混合整数线性规划（MILP）优化框架，目标函数为最小化总运营成本，约束条件涵盖：水源水量与水质限制、运输中水质保持、不同终端用水需求、供应链运输逻辑。在代表性城市模型上进行案例研究，求解最优罐车调度方案。
AI.result: 在代表性规模的城市案例中，该框架成功求解了最优罐车调度计划，确保了水处理适当性与交付及时性，阐明了处理厂运营与用户需求满足之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该MILP框架为罐车水分配系统的规划与管理提供了有效的决策支持工具，能够同时兼顾经济性、水质保障与用户覆盖，有助于发展中国家实现可持续的水资源分配。

title: Reframing Data Value for Large Language Models Through the Lens of Plausibility
summary: Data valuation seeks to answer the important question, "How much is this data worth?" Existing data valuation methods have largely focused on discriminative models, primarily examining data value through the lens of its utility in training. However, with the push for ever-larger language models, relying on valuation methods that require training becomes increasingly expensive and dependent on specific techniques. We propose an alternative perspective on the data value problem for language models, centering around the plausibility of the data. We posit that data holds lesser value if it can be plausibly generated by the model itself. Starting from some intuitive criteria that align with our notions of valuable data, we develop a novel value function that is computationally tractable and derived from first principles with provable properties. We conduct a theoretical analysis of our value function and evaluate it across multiple scenarios and datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据可生成性（plausibility）的全新数据估值方法，用于语言模型场景，替代传统依赖训练成本的判别式模型估值方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据估值方法主要聚焦于判别式模型，依赖于模型训练来衡量数据价值，但随着语言模型规模不断增大，这类方法计算成本高昂且高度依赖特定技术。因此，需要一种更高效、与模型训练解耦的数据估值新视角。
AI.method: 提出基于数据可生成性（plausibility）的估值视角，认为若数据能被模型自身合理生成，则其价值较低。从若干符合直觉的准则出发，推导出一个计算可行、源自第一性原理且具有可证明性质的新的价值函数。
AI.result: 通过理论分析和在多个场景与数据集上的实验评估，验证了所提价值函数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为语言模型的数据估值提供了新的替代路径，避免了昂贵的训练依赖，具有计算高效性和理论基础。

title: BattOpt: Optimal Facility Planning for Electric Vehicle Battery Recycling
summary: The electric vehicle (EV) battery supply chain will face challenges in sourcing scarce and expensive minerals required for manufacturing and in disposing of hazardous retired batteries. Integrating recycling technology into the supply chain has the potential to alleviate these issues; however, players in the battery market must design investment plans for recycling facilities. In this paper, we propose a multistage stochastic optimization model for computing minimum cost recycling capacity decisions, in which retired batteries are recycled and recovered materials are used to manufacture new batteries. We transform EverBatt, a leading evaluation framework for battery recycling cost and environmental impact, into a prescriptive decision-making tool for determining optimal investment strategies. Our model is a separable concave minimization subject to linear constraints, a class for which we design a new finitely convergent global optimization algorithm that solves up to 14x faster than comparable algorithms. We propose an equivalent reformulation of the model that reduces the total number of variables by introducing integrality constraints, drastically reducing solve times. We detail a cut grouping strategy for a Benders' decomposition which improves convergence relative to single-cut and multi-cut implementations. To produce a set of operational scenarios, we design an approach for generating time-series projections for new battery demand, retired battery supply, and material costs, leveraging state-of-the-art econometric models. We apply our model to compute optimal investment plans and quantify the impact of optimal decision-making: effective investment in recycling can reduce battery manufacturing costs by 22% and environmental impacts by up to 7%. Finally, we analyze the impact of policy instruments to reveal key insights on the efficacy of capacity grants and production credits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多阶段随机优化模型，用于计算电池回收设施的最优投资策略，并设计了一种新的全局优化算法。研究表明，有效的回收投资可降低电池制造成本22%并减少环境影响7%，同时分析了政策工具的效果。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车电池供应链面临稀有矿物采购成本高和废弃电池处理困难两大挑战，将回收技术整合到供应链中可缓解这些问题，但电池市场参与者需要设计回收设施的投资计划，目前缺乏将评估框架转化为决策工具的方法。
