In this paper, we present novel bimodal deep learning-based architectures enhanced with attention mechanism trained and tested on text and speech data for emotion classification. We report details of different deep learning based architectures and show the performance of each architecture including rigorous error analyses. Our finding suggests that deep learning based architectures trained on different types of data (text and speech) outperform architectures trained only on text or speech. Our proposed attention-based bimodal architecture outperforms several state-of-the-art systems in emotion classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意机制的双模态（文本+语音）深度学习架构用于情感分类，实验证明双模态模型优于单模态模型，且该架构在情感分类任务上超越了多个现有最优系统。
AI.motivation: 现有情感分类多基于单一文本模态，但人类情感表达同时包含文本和语音信息（语调、音高、语速等），利用双模态数据可以更全面地捕捉情感特征，提升分类性能。
AI.method: 提出基于注意机制的双模态深度学习架构，分别对文本和语音数据进行特征提取与融合，并在公开数据集的文本和语音数据上进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 双模态深度学习架构在情感分类任务上的表现优于仅使用文本或仅使用语音的单一模态架构，且所提出的基于注意力的双模态架构在性能上超越了多个现有最优系统。
AI.conclusion: 融合文本和语音的双模态学习是提升情感分类性能的有效途径，注意力机制在跨模态特征融合中发挥了关键作用。

title: Exploiting Preferences in Loss Functions for Sequential Recommendation via Weak Transitivity
comment: Accepted to CIKM 2024, Short Research Paper Track
summary: A choice of optimization objective is immensely pivotal in the design of a recommender system as it affects the general modeling process of a user's intent from previous interactions. Existing approaches mainly adhere to three categories of loss functions: pairwise, pointwise, and setwise loss functions. Despite their effectiveness, a critical and common drawback of such objectives is viewing the next observed item as a unique positive while considering all remaining items equally negative. Such a binary label assignment is generally limited to assuring a higher recommendation score of the positive item, neglecting potential structures induced by varying preferences between other unobserved items. To alleviate this issue, we propose a novel method that extends original objectives to explicitly leverage the different levels of preferences as relative orders between their scores. Finally, we demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to baseline objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的推荐系统优化方法，通过引入相对偏好顺序来扩展传统损失函数（成对、逐点、集合式），解决了传统二元标签分配忽略未观测项目间偏好结构的问题，并展现了优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的推荐系统损失函数（成对、逐点、集合式）存在一个关键缺陷：将下一个观测到的物品视为唯一正样本，其余所有物品均视为负样本。这种二元标签分配方式仅能确保正样本获得更高的推荐分数，却忽略了未观测物品之间因不同偏好程度而产生的潜在结构信息。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，将原始优化目标扩展到显式利用不同偏好水平的相对顺序关系，即在损失函数中引入未观测物品之间的相对排序信息，而不仅仅区分正负样本。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在性能上优于传统的基线优化目标（成对、逐点、集合式损失函数）。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入物品间的相对偏好顺序来改进推荐系统的优化目标，比传统的二元正负标签分配更有效，能够捕捉更丰富的用户意图结构。

title: On nonlinear magnetic field solvers using local Quasi-Newton updates
summary: Fixed-point or Newton-methods are typically employed for the numerical solution of nonlinear systems arising from discretization of nonlinear magnetic field problems. We here discuss an alternative strategy which uses local Quasi-Newton updates to construct appropriate linearizations of the material behavior during the nonlinear iteration. The resulting scheme shows similar fast convergence as the Newton-method but, like the fixed-point methods, does not require derivative information of the underlying material law. As a consequence, the method can be used for the efficient solution of models with hysteresis which involve nonsmooth material behavior. The implementation of the proposed scheme can be realized in standard finite-element codes in parallel to the fixed-point and the Newton method. A full convergence analysis of all three methods is established proving global mesh-independent convergence. The theoretical results and the performance of the nonlinear iterative schemes are evaluated by computational tests for a typical benchmark problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部拟牛顿更新的非线性迭代策略，用于求解离散化非线性磁场问题。该方法结合了牛顿法的快速收敛性和不动点法无需导数信息的优点，特别适用于包含非光滑材料行为（如磁滞）的模型。在标准有限元代码中可与不动点法和牛顿法并行实现，并建立了全局网格无关收敛性分析，数值实验验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的牛顿法需要材料本构的导数信息，而不动点法收敛速度较慢。对于包含磁滞等非光滑材料行为的模型，导数信息难以获得，因此需要一种既快速收敛又无需导数信息的替代策略。
AI.method: 在非线性迭代过程中，使用局部拟牛顿更新（Quasi-Newton updates）来构造材料行为的合适线性化，从而避免对材料本构求导。该方案可在标准有限元代码中与不动点法和牛顿法并行实现。
AI.result: 该方法收敛速度与牛顿法相当，同时像不动点法一样不需要材料本构的导数信息。建立了包括该方案在内的三种方法完整的全局网格无关收敛性分析。数值实验验证了理论结果和迭代性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的拟牛顿更新方案为求解非线性磁场问题（尤其是含磁滞的非光滑问题）提供了一种高效、鲁棒的替代方案，兼具快速收敛和无需导数信息的优势，且易于集成到现有有限元代码中。

title: Approximation of the invariant measure for stochastic Allen-Cahn equation via an explicit fully discrete scheme
summary: In this paper we propose an explicit fully discrete scheme to numerically solve the stochastic Allen-Cahn equation. The spatial discretization is done by a spectral Galerkin method, followed by the temporal discretization by a tamed accelerated exponential Euler scheme. Based on the time-independent boundedness of moments of numerical solutions, we present the weak error analysis in an infinite time interval by using Malliavin calculus. This provides a way to numerically approximate the invariant measure for the stochastic Allen-Cahn equation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种显式全离散格式来数值求解随机Allen-Cahn方程，采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散，并结合驯服加速指数欧拉方案进行时间离散。基于数值解矩的时间无关有界性，利用Malliavin微积分在无限时间区间上进行了弱误差分析，从而为随机Allen-Cahn方程的不变测度的数值逼近提供了途径。
AI.motivation: 为随机Allen-Cahn方程设计一种兼具数值稳定性和计算效率的全离散格式，并实现在无限时间区间上对不变测度的有效数值逼近。
AI.method: 采用谱Galerkin方法进行空间离散，使用驯服加速指数欧拉方案进行时间离散，利用Malliavin微积分进行弱误差分析，并证明数值解矩的时间无关有界性。
AI.result: 获得了无限时间区间上的弱误差估计，实现了对随机Allen-Cahn方程不变测度的数值逼近。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的显式全离散格式能够有效逼近随机Allen-Cahn方程的不变测度，且具有理论上的弱收敛保证。

title: A note on eigenvalues and singular values of variable Toeplitz matrices and matrix-sequences, with application to variable two-step BDF approximations to parabolic equations
comment: Corrected locations of images and references
summary: Here, we consider a more general class of matrix-sequences and we prove that they belong to the maximal $*$-algebra of generalized locally Toeplitz (GLT) matrix-sequences. Then, we identify the associated GLT symbols and GLT momentary symbols in the general setting and in the specific case, by providing in both cases a spectral and singular value analysis. More specifically, we use the GLT tools in order to study the asymptotic behaviour of the eigenvalues and singular values of the considered BDF matrix-sequences, in connection with the given non-uniform grids. Numerical examples, visualizations, and open problems end the present work.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类更一般的矩阵序列，证明了它们属于广义局部Toeplitz（GLT）矩阵序列的最大$*$-代数，并给出了相应的GLT符号和GLT瞬时符号，进而对BDF矩阵序列在非均匀网格下的特征值和奇异值进行了渐近行为分析，最后提供了数值示例、可视化和待解决问题。
AI.motivation: 将先前关于BDF矩阵序列的GLT分析推广到更一般的矩阵序列类别，以处理非均匀网格下的谱与奇异值渐近行为问题。
AI.method: 利用广义局部Toeplitz（GLT）工具，在一般框架和具体情形下分别识别GLT符号和GLT瞬时符号，进行谱与奇异值分析。
AI.result: 证明了该更一般矩阵序列属于GLT最大$*$-代数，给出了其GLT符号和瞬时符号的显式表达，并展示了数值示例与可视化结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作拓展了GLT理论的应用范围，为非均匀网格下BDF格式的谱分析提供了统一框架，同时指出了若干开放性研究问题。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Order Picking in Warehouse Operations
summary: Order picking is a pivotal operation in warehouses that directly impacts overall efficiency and profitability. This study addresses the dynamic order picking problem, a significant concern in modern warehouse management, where real-time adaptation to fluctuating order arrivals and efficient picker routing are crucial. Traditional methods, which often depend on static optimization algorithms designed around fixed order sets for the picker routing, fall short in addressing the challenges of this dynamic environment. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework tailored for single-block warehouses equipped with an autonomous picking device. By dynamically optimizing picker routes, our approach significantly reduces order throughput times and unfulfilled orders, particularly under high order arrival rates. We benchmark our DRL model against established algorithms, utilizing instances generated based on standard practices in the order picking literature. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our DRL model over benchmark algorithms. For example, at a high order arrival rate of 0.09 (i.e., 9 orders per 100 units of time on average), our approach achieves an order fulfillment rate of approximately 98%, compared to the 82% fulfillment rate observed with benchmarking algorithms. We further investigate the integration of a hyperparameter in the reward function that allows for flexible balancing between distance traveled and order completion time. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of our DRL model on out-of-sample test instances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的动态订单拣选框架，用于单块仓库中自主拣选设备的路径实时优化。在高订单到达率（0.09）下，该方法的订单履约率达98%，远超基准算法的82%。同时引入奖励函数超参数，可灵活平衡行驶距离与订单完成时间。
AI.motivation: 传统静态优化算法基于固定订单集进行拣选路径规划，无法适应现代仓库管理中订单实时波动和高效路径规划的需求，导致订单履约率低、吞吐时间长。
AI.method: 提出深度强化学习（DRL）框架，针对单块仓库中自主拣选设备，动态优化拣选路径。奖励函数中引入超参数以平衡行驶距离与订单完成时间。
AI.result: 在高订单到达率0.09下，DRL方法订单履约率约98%，基准算法为82%；模型在样本外测试实例上表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DRL框架在动态订单拣选问题上优于传统基准算法，能显著提高订单履约率并缩短吞吐时间，且通过超参数调节可实现多目标权衡。

title: Objective Features Extracted from Motor Activity Time Series for Food Addiction Analysis Using Machine Learning -- A Pilot Study
summary: Wearable sensors and IoT/IoMT platforms enable continuous, real-time monitoring, but objective digital markers for eating disorders are limited. In this study, we examined whether actimetry and machine learning (ML) could provide objective criteria for food addiction (FA) and symptom counts (SC). In 78 participants (mean age 22.1 +/- 9.5 y; 73.1% women), one week of non-dominant wrist actimetry and psychometric data (YFAS, DEBQ, ZSDS) were collected. The time series were segmented into daytime activity and nighttime rest, and statistical and entropy descriptors (FuzzyEn, DistEn, SVDEn, PermEn, PhaseEn; 256 features) were calculated. The mean Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC) was used as the primary metric in a K-nearest neighbors (KNN) pipeline with five-fold stratified cross-validation (one hundred repetitions; 500 evaluations); SHAP was used to assist in interpretation. For binary FA, activity-segment features performed best (MCC = 0.78 +/- 0.02; Accuracy ~ 95.3% +/- 0.5; Sensitivity ~ 0.77 +/- 0.03; Specificity ~ 0.98 +/- 0.004), exceeding OaS (Objective and Subjective Features) (MCC = 0.69 +/- 0.03) and rest-only (MCC = 0.50 +/- 0.03). For SC (four classes), OaS slightly surpassed actimetry (MCC = 0.40 +/- 0.01 vs 0.38 +/- 0.01; Accuracy ~ 58.1% vs 56.9%). Emotional and restrained eating were correlated with actimetric features. These findings support wrist-worn actimetry as a digital biomarker of FA that complements questionnaires and may facilitate privacy-preserving clinical translation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用78名参与者的非优势手腕动度测量数据（一周）和机器学习（KNN管道），发现白天活动段的动度特征在识别食物成瘾（FA）方面表现优异（MCC=0.78，准确率~95.3%），优于客观与主观特征组合（OaS）和仅夜间休息数据；但对于症状计数（四分类），OaS略优于动度测量。研究支持腕戴式动度测量作为FA的数字生物标志物，可补充问卷并促进隐私保护的临床转化。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴传感器和物联网/医疗物联网平台虽然能实现连续实时监测，但针对进食障碍的客观数字标志物仍然有限。现有评估主要依赖主观问卷，缺乏客观、连续的量化指标。本研究旨在探索动度测量（actimetry）结合机器学习能否为食物成瘾（FA）和症状计数（SC）提供客观标准。
AI.method: 在78名参与者（平均年龄22.1±9.5岁；73.1%女性）中，收集一周非优势手腕动度测量数据以及心理测量数据（YFAS、DEBQ、ZSDS）。将时间序列分割为白天活动段和夜间休息段，计算统计特征和熵描述符（FuzzyEn、DistEn、SVDEn、PermEn、PhaseEn），共提取256个特征。采用K近邻（KNN）管道，配合五折分层交叉验证（重复100次，共500次评估），以平均马修斯相关系数（MCC）为主要指标，并使用SHAP辅助解释。
AI.result: 对于二分类的食物成瘾（FA），白天活动段特征表现最佳（MCC=0.78±0.02；准确率~95.3%±0.5；灵敏度~0.77±0.03；特异度~0.98±0.004），超过OaS（客观与主观特征组合）（MCC=0.69±0.03）和仅休息段特征（MCC=0.50±0.03）。对于四分类的症状计数（SC），OaS略优于动度测量（MCC=0.40±0.01 vs 0.38±0.01；准确率~58.1% vs 56.9%）。情绪性饮食和限制性饮食与动度特征存在相关性。
AI.conclusion: 腕戴式动度测量可作为食物成瘾（FA）的数字生物标志物，能够补充传统问卷评估，并有助于实现隐私保护的临床转化。

title: On Some Versions of Subspace Optimization Methods with Inexact Gradient Information
summary: It is well-known that accelerated gradient first order methods possess optimal complexity estimates for the class of convex smooth minimization problems. In many practical situations, it makes sense to work with inexact gradients. However, this can lead to the accumulation of corresponding inexactness in the theoretical estimates of the rate of convergence. We propose some modification of the methods for convex optimization with inexact gradient based on the subspace optimization such as Nemirovski's Conjugate Gradients and Sequential Subspace Optimization. We research the method convergence for different condition of inexactness both in gradient value and accuracy of subspace optimization problems. Besides this, we investigate generalization of this result to the class of quasar-convex (weakly-quasi-convex) functions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对凸光滑极小化问题中梯度不精确的情况，提出了基于子空间优化的改进加速梯度方法（如Nemirovski共轭梯度和序列子空间优化），分析了不同不精确条件下的收敛性，并将结果推广到拟凸函数类。
AI.motivation: 加速梯度一阶方法在凸光滑极小化问题中具有最优复杂度，但实际应用中常面临梯度不精确的情况，这会导致收敛率估计中不精确性的累积。为此，需要改进方法以有效处理不精确梯度。
AI.method: 基于子空间优化对传统加速梯度方法进行改进，具体包括Nemirovski共轭梯度法和序列子空间优化（3S）。研究了梯度值不精确和子空间优化问题精度不精确两种条件下的方法收敛性，并将结果推广到拟凸（弱拟凸）函数类。
AI.result: 提出了改进的加速梯度方法，在不精确梯度条件下仍保持收敛性；分析了不同不精确度条件下的收敛率；将收敛性结果推广到了更一般的拟凸函数类。
AI.conclusion: 基于子空间优化的改进方法能有效处理凸优化中的不精确梯度问题，避免了不精确性的累积，且该结果可推广至拟凸函数类，扩展了方法的适用性。

title: Distributed Optimization under Edge Agreement with Application in Battery Network Management
summary: This paper investigates a distributed optimization problem under edge agreements, where each agent in the network is also subject to local convex constraints. Generalized from the concept of consensus, a group of edge agreements represents the constraints defined for neighboring agents, with each pair of neighboring agents required to satisfy one edge agreement constraint. Edge agreements are defined locally to allow more flexibility than a global consensus, enabling heterogeneous coordination within the network. This paper proposes a discrete-time algorithm to solve such problems, providing a theoretical analysis to prove its convergence. Additionally, this paper illustrates the connection between the theory of distributed optimization under edge agreements and distributed model predictive control through a distributed battery network energy management problem. This approach enables a new perspective to formulate and solve network control and optimization problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究边协议下的分布式优化问题，提出离散时间算法并证明其收敛性，通过分布式电池网络能源管理问题展示了与分布式模型预测控制的联系。
AI.motivation: 从共识概念推广，边协议为相邻智能体定义局部约束，比全局共识更灵活，支持网络中的异构协调。
AI.method: 提出离散时间算法求解边协议下的分布式优化问题，并进行理论收敛性分析。
AI.result: 算法收敛性得到理论证明，并通过分布式电池网络能源管理问题验证了与分布式模型预测控制的联系。
AI.conclusion: 边协议框架为网络控制与优化问题的建模和求解提供了新视角。

title: Non-invasive imaging assisted CFD simulation of 4D multi-modal fluid flow using In-situ adaptor
summary:
X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) is used to recover the true surfaces of fluid channels and fed to simulation tool (ANSYS) to create accurate cyber environment. The simulation tool also receives CT-assisted multiphase fluid profiles (belonging to the instance just before the flow starts) as an initial condition.
  This unique methodology is made possible by using a novel in-situ compact adaptor design is used to create fluid channels that can be placed inside any industrial X-ray CT and fulfill the above objective. It is integrated with an android based App to control the flow once placed inside CT. It is portable and compact enough: (a) to be placed inside various experimental environments, and (b) modular enough to be mounted with multi-modal systems simultaneously.
  Two key parameters, (a) spatial distribution and (b) the air volume fraction, are measured using two different non-invasive imaging modalities: (a) Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) and (d) X-ray Computed Tomography (CT). Simulated outcomes are correlated with the experimental outcomes from both EIT and X-ray CT, showing an agreement of 85 to 98 percent, respectively. Time-averaged electrically conductive fluid flow profile obtained by EIT shows a match with mass mass-attenuated fluid profile obtained by X-ray CT, justifying the utility of an in-situ adaptor. CT assistance for CFD studies can be replaced by EIT assistance as former techniques: (a) scanning time may be relatively slower than the latter, (b) it does not require rotations, (c) economical, and (d) fluid channels need not be placed inside of shielded compartment thus improving practicality. The data of analysis is shared in this work.
  Multimodal non-invasive imaging provides multiphase flow information, it also differentiates conductive, and mass-attenuated multiphase profiles at common cross-sections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合X射线CT与电阻层析成像（EIT）的非侵入式多模态成像方法，通过一种新型紧凑型适配器设计实现工业CT内的流体通道原位成像，并利用仿真工具（ANSYS）构建精确的虚拟环境。实验与仿真结果吻合度达85%-98%，验证了CT辅助CFD可被EIT替代的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统X射线CT在流体成像中扫描速度较慢、需旋转、成本高且需屏蔽环境，限制了其实用性。作者希望开发一种更经济、便捷的多模态成像方法，既能准确获取多相流空间分布和体积分数，又能与CFD仿真有效结合，最终实现用EIT替代CT进行CFD研究。
AI.method: 设计了一种紧凑型原位适配器，可置于工业X射线CT内部并集成安卓App控制流体流动。通过CT获取真实流道表面并输入ANSYS进行仿真，同时利用CT和EIT两种非侵入成像模态测量两种关键参数：空间分布和空气体积分数。将仿真结果与CT和EIT实验结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 仿真结果与EIT和X射线CT的实验结果吻合度分别为85%和98%。EIT获得的时均导电液流剖面与X射线CT的质量衰减流体剖面一致。EIT相比CT具有优势：扫描更快、无需旋转、成本更低、流道无需置于屏蔽环境中。
AI.conclusion: CT辅助CFD研究可以被EIT辅助替代，多模态非侵入成像能够提供多相流信息并区分导电和质衰多相流剖面，提升了实验的实用性和经济性。

title: Personalized and uncertainty-aware coronary hemodynamics simulations: From Bayesian estimation to improved multi-fidelity uncertainty quantification
summary: Simulations of coronary hemodynamics have improved non-invasive clinical risk stratification and treatment outcomes for coronary artery disease, compared to relying on anatomical imaging alone. However, simulations typically use empirical approaches to distribute total coronary flow amongst the arteries in the coronary tree. This ignores patient variability, the presence of disease, and other clinical factors. Further, uncertainty in the clinical data often remains unaccounted for in the modeling pipeline. We present an end-to-end uncertainty-aware pipeline to (1) personalize coronary flow simulations by incorporating branch-specific coronary flows as well as cardiac function; and (2) predict clinical and biomechanical quantities of interest with improved precision, while accounting for uncertainty in the clinical data. We assimilate patient-specific measurements of myocardial blood flow from CT myocardial perfusion imaging to estimate branch-specific coronary flows. We use adaptive Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling to estimate the joint posterior distributions of model parameters with simulated noise in the clinical data. Additionally, we determine the posterior predictive distribution for relevant quantities of interest using a new approach combining multi-fidelity Monte Carlo estimation with non-linear, data-driven dimensionality reduction. Our framework recapitulates clinically measured cardiac function as well as branch-specific coronary flows under measurement uncertainty. We substantially shrink the confidence intervals for estimated quantities of interest compared to single-fidelity and state-of-the-art multi-fidelity Monte Carlo methods. This is especially true for quantities that showed limited correlation between the low- and high-fidelity model predictions. Moreover, the proposed estimators are significantly cheaper to compute for a specified confidence level or variance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的不确定性感知管道，通过整合患者特异性心肌血流测量数据和自适应MCMC采样，实现冠脉血流模拟的个性化，并采用多保真蒙特卡洛估计与非线性降维相结合的方法，在考虑临床数据不确定性的同时，以更高精度和更低计算成本预测临床及生物力学感兴趣量。
AI.motivation: 传统的冠脉血流模拟通常采用经验性方法分配总冠脉流量，忽略了患者变异性、疾病状态及其他临床因素，且临床数据的不确定性在建模流程中往往未被考虑，导致模拟精度受限。
AI.method: (1) 利用CT心肌灌注成像的患者特异性心肌血流测量数据，估计分支特异性冠脉流量；(2) 采用自适应马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）采样估计含模拟噪声的临床数据中模型参数的联合后验分布；(3) 结合多保真蒙特卡洛估计与非线性数据驱动降维，确定感兴趣量的后验预测分布。
AI.result: 该框架能够在测量不确定性下复现临床测量的心功能及分支特异性冠脉流量；相较于单保真及现有最优的多保真蒙特卡洛方法，显著缩小了感兴趣量估计的置信区间，尤其是低、高保真模型预测相关性有限的量，且在指定置信水平或方差下计算成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的不确定性感知个性化管道能更精确、高效地预测临床与生物力学量，有望改善冠脉疾病的风险分层和治疗规划。

title: Application of the thin-film equations in modelling of Marangoni flow patterns amongst surfactant source and drain locations
summary: Surfactants that are deposited at aqueous liquid films have the ability to generate surface tension gradients at the air-water interface, and thereby induce Marangoni flow. Combined with the production and depletion of surfactants at different locations of source and drains, out-of-equilibrium surface tension gradients can be sustained, resulting in Marangoni flow patterns that drive e.g., self-organization of amphiphile myelin assemblies. Here, a mathematical model based on the thin-film equations is proposed to simulate these flow patterns. The model equations are based on the surfactant source and drain concentrations, film-height and surfactant bulk concentration. We present a numerical scheme for approximating the model equations and discuss the numerically observed properties of the model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于薄膜方程的数学模型，模拟表面活性剂在液膜中产生的Marangoni流动模式，并通过数值方案验证模型特性。
AI.motivation: 表面活性剂在气-水界面产生表面张力梯度并诱导Marangoni流动，而源和汇处表面活性剂的非平衡分布可维持持续流动模式，驱动两亲分子髓鞘组装体的自组织行为，亟需数学模型来量化描述这些流动模式。
AI.method: 基于薄膜方程构建数学模型，模型方程包含表面活性剂源/汇浓度、液膜高度和表面活性剂本体浓度等变量，并提出了数值求解方案。
AI.result: 通过数值方案近似求解模型方程，获得了模型在数值上的特性表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数学模型能够有效模拟表面活性剂驱动的Marangoni流动模式，为理解两亲分子自组织行为提供了理论工具。

title: Stability of diffusion flames under shear flow: Taylor dispersion and the formation of flame streets
summary: Diffusion flame streets, observed in non-premixed micro-combustion devices, align parallel to a shear flow. They are observed to occur in mixtures with high Lewis number ($Le$) fuels, provided that the flow Reynolds number, or the Peclet number $Pe$, exceeds a critical value. The underlying mechanisms behind these observations have not yet been fully understood. In the present paper, we identify the coupling between diffusive-thermal instabilities and Taylor dispersion as a mechanism which is able to explain the experimental observations above. The explanation is largely based on the fact that Taylor dispersion enhances all diffusion processes in the flow direction, leading effectively to anisotropic diffusion with an effective (flow-dependent) Lewis number in the flow direction which is proportional to $1/Le$ for $Pe\gg 1$. Validation of the identified mechanism is demonstrated within a simple model by investigating the stability of a planar diffusion flame established parallel to a plane Poiseuille flow in a narrow channel. A linear stability analysis, leading to an eigenvalue problem solved numerically, shows that cellular (or finite wavelength) instabilities emerge for high Lewis number fuels when the Peclet number exceeds a critical value. Furthermore, for Peclet numbers below this critical value, longwave instabilities with or without time oscillations are obtained. Stability regime diagrams are presented for illustrative cases in a $Le$-$Pe$ plane where various instability domains are identified. Finally, the linear analysis is supported and complemented by time dependent numerical simulations, describing the evolution of unstable diffusion flames. The simulations demonstrate the existence of stable cellular structures and show that the longwave instabilities are conducive to flame extinction.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了扩散-热不稳定性与泰勒色散之间的耦合机制，解释了高Lewis数燃料在微燃烧非预混装置中，当Peclet数超过临界值时形成扩散火焰街（平行于剪切流的蜂窝状火焰结构）的现象。通过线性稳定性分析和数值模拟，证明了该机制的正确性，并给出了稳定性相图。
AI.motivation: 非预混微燃烧装置中观测到的扩散火焰街现象（高Lewis数燃料、Peclet数超临界值）其底层机制尚未被完全理解，现有理论无法充分解释这些实验观测结果。
AI.method: 建立平行于平面Poiseuille流的平面扩散火焰简化模型，进行线性稳定性分析（求解特征值问题），并辅以时间依赖的数值模拟。
AI.result: 高Lewis数燃料在Peclet数超过临界值时出现蜂窝状（有限波长）不稳定性；低于临界值时出现长波不稳定性（带或不带时间振荡）；长波不稳定性导致火焰熄灭，蜂窝状结构可稳定存在。
AI.conclusion: 扩散-热不稳定性与泰勒色散的耦合是解释扩散火焰街现象的关键机制，泰勒色散增强了流动方向上的扩散过程，导致流动方向上的有效Lewis数与1/Le成正比，从而改变了火焰的稳定性特性。

title: Relaxation in Sobolev spaces and $L^1$ spectral gap of the 1D dissipative Boltzmann equation with Maxwell interactions
comment: The manuscript contains material from our previous contribution arXiv:2211.03446 which has been split into two papers
summary: We study the dynamic relaxation to equilibrium of the 1D dissipative Boltzmann equation with Maxwell interactions in classical $H^s$ Sobolev spaces. In addition, we present a spectral shrinkage analysis and spectral gap estimates for the linearised 1D dissipative Boltzmann operator with such interactions. Based on this study, we explore the convergence in $H^s$ and $L^{1}$ spaces for the linear and nonlinear models. This study extends classical results found in the literature given for spaces with weak topologies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维耗散玻尔兹曼方程在Maxwell相互作用下的动态松弛平衡问题，分析了线性化算子的谱收缩和谱间隙，并探讨了H^s和L^1空间的收敛性，将经典弱拓扑结果推广到强拓扑空间。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中关于一维耗散玻尔兹曼方程的研究主要局限于弱拓扑空间（如L^1弱收敛等），缺乏在经典Sobolev空间H^s中的强收敛分析，且线性化算子的谱结构分析尚不完善。
AI.method: 采用谱收缩分析和谱间隙估计方法，研究线性化一维耗散玻尔兹曼算子的谱性质，并基于此分析线性和非线性模型在H^s和L^1空间中的收敛性。
AI.result: 获得了线性化算子的谱收缩和谱间隙估计，并证明了在H^s和L^1空间中线性和非线性模型的收敛性结果，将经典弱拓扑结果推广到了强拓扑空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将一维耗散玻尔兹曼方程的收敛性分析从弱拓扑空间扩展到了经典Sobolev空间H^s和L^1空间，为强拓扑下的动力学方程分析提供了理论基础。

title: On smooth Fano threefolds with coregularity zero
summary: We provide examples of smooth three-dimensional Fano complete intersections of dergee 2, 4, 6, and 8 that have coregularity 0. Considering the main theorem of arXiv:2309.16784 on the remaining 101 families of smooth Fano threefolds, our result implies that each family of smooth Fano threefolds has an element of coregularity zero.

AI.tldr: 本文为每个光滑Fano三维簇族找到了一个coregularity为零的元素，填补了此前结果中缺失的度数2、4、6、8的光滑三维Fano完全交集例子。
AI.motivation: 证明所有光滑Fano三维簇族都存在coregularity为零的元素，此前已有结果覆盖了大部分族，但缺少度数2、4、6、8的光滑三维Fano完全交集的例子。
AI.method: 构造度数分别为2、4、6、8的光滑三维Fano完全交集的具体例子，并验证其coregularity为0。
AI.result: 找到了度数2、4、6、8的光滑三维Fano完全交集且coregularity为0的例子，结合arXiv:2309.16784的结论，得出所有101族光滑Fano三维簇都有coregularity为零的元素。
AI.conclusion: 每个光滑Fano三维簇族都存在coregularity为零的元素。

title: A geometric interpretation of Krull dimensions of $\boldsymbol{T}$-algebras
summary: We investigate Krull dimensions of semirings and semifields dealt in tropical geometry. For a congruence $C$ on a tropical Laurent polynomial semiring $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}]$, a finite subset $T$ of $C$ is called a finite congruence tropical basis of $C$ if the congruence variety $\boldsymbol{V}(T)$ associated with $T$ coincides with $\boldsymbol{V}(C)$. For $C$ proper, we prove that the Krull dimension of the quotient semiring $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}] / C$ coincides with the maximum of the dimension of $\boldsymbol{V}(C)$ as a polyhedral complex plus one and that of $\boldsymbol{V}(C_{\boldsymbol{B}})$ when both $C$ and $C_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ have finite congruence tropical bases, respectively. Here $C_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ is the congruence on $\boldsymbol{T}[X_1^{\pm}, \ldots, X_n^{\pm}]$ generated by $\{ (f_{\boldsymbol{B}}, g_{\boldsymbol{B}}) \,|\, (f, g) \in C \}$ and $f_{\boldsymbol{B}}$ is defined as the tropical Laurent polynomial obtained from $f$ by replacing the coefficients of all non $-\infty$ terms of $f$ with the real number zero. With this fact, we also show that rational function semifields of tropical curves that do not consist of only one point have Krull dimension two.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了热带几何中半环和半域的Krull维数。对于热带洛朗多项式半环上的同余C，若其有限子集T满足V(T)=V(C)，则称T为C的有限同余热带基。证明了当C和C_B均存在有限同余热带基时，商半环的Krull维数等于V(C)作为多面体复形的维数加一与V(C_B)维数中的最大值。并由此推出，非单点热带曲线的有理函数半域具有Krull维数2。
AI.motivation: 热带几何中半环和半域的Krull维数是理解其代数结构的重要不变量，但目前对此缺乏系统研究。本文旨在建立热带半环Krull维数与多面体复形维数之间的联系，并应用于热带曲线的有理函数半域。
AI.method: 通过引入有限同余热带基的概念，建立同余C的商半环Krull维数与V(C)作为多面体复形的维数之间的关系。利用系数归零化变换f_B构造辅助同余C_B，并证明维数公式为max(dim(V(C))+1, dim(V(C_B)))。
AI.result: 证明了当C和C_B均有有限同余热带基时，商半环Krull维数等于max(dim(V(C))+1, dim(V(C_B)))。并得到非单点热带曲线的有理函数半域Krull维数为2。
AI.conclusion: 建立了热带半环Krull维数与多面体复形维数的对应关系，为热带代数的维数理论提供了新工具。热带曲线有理函数半域的维数为2这一结果与经典代数曲线函数域的维数结论相对应。

title: On an Inverse Problem of the Generalized Bathtub Model of Network Trip Flows
summary: In this work, we investigate the generalized bathtub model, a nonlocal transport equation for describing network trip flows served by privately operated vehicles inside a road network. First, we establish the well-posedness of the mathematical model for both classical and weak solutions. Then we consider an inverse source problem of the model with model parameters embodying particular traffic situations. We establish a conditional Lipschitz stability of the inverse problem under suitable a priori regularity assumption on the problem data, using a Volterra integral formulation of the problem. Inspired by the analysis, we develop an easy-to-implement numerical method for reconstructing the flow rates, and provide the error analysis of the method. Further we present several numerical experiments to complement the theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了广义浴缸模型（一种描述道路网络中私家车网络行程流的非局部输运方程），建立了经典解和弱解的适定性，并针对模型参数体现特定交通情形的逆源问题，在适当先验正则性假设下通过Volterra积分公式建立了条件Lipschitz稳定性，进而开发了一种易于实现的数值重构方法并进行了误差分析，最后通过数值实验验证了理论分析。
AI.motivation: 研究广义浴缸模型这一非局部输运方程的数学性质及其逆问题，旨在为道路网络中私家车行程流提供严格的数学理论基础，并解决从实际交通数据中反演流量参数这一实际需求。
AI.method: 首先建立广义浴缸模型经典解和弱解的适定性；然后针对逆源问题，利用Volterra积分公式将问题转化为积分方程形式，在数据满足先验正则性假设下证明条件Lipschitz稳定性；基于理论分析设计易实现的数值重构方法，并给出误差分析。
AI.result: 建立了广义浴缸模型在经典解与弱解框架下的适定性；获得了逆源问题的条件Lipschitz稳定性结果；提出了易于实现的流量重构数值方法并完成了误差分析；数值实验验证了理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 广义浴缸模型具有良好的数学适定性，其逆源问题在合理正则性假设下具有条件稳定性，所提出的数值方法能有效重构流量，为交通流建模与参数反演提供了坚实的理论与计算基础。

title: Initial Data Identification for Conservation Laws with Spatially Discontinuous Flux
summary: We consider a scalar conservation law with a spatially discontinuous flux at a single point $x=0$, and we study the initial data identification problem for $AB$-entropy solutions associated to an interface connection $(A,B)$. This problem consists in identifying the set of initial data driven by the corresponding $AB$-entropy solution to a given target profile~$ω^T$, at a time horizon $T>0$. We provide a full characterization of such a set in terms of suitable integral inequalities, and we establish structural and geometrical properties of this set. A distinctive feature of the initial set is that it is in general not convex, differently from the case of conservation laws with convex flux independent on the space variable. The results rely on the properties of the $AB$-backward-forward evolution operator introduced in~\cite{talamini_ancona_attset}, and on a proper concept of $AB$-genuine/interface characteristic for $AB$-entropy solutions provided in this paper.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有单点空间间断通量的标量守恒律中的初始数据识别问题，针对AB-熵解给出了初始数据集的完整刻画和性质分析，发现该集合并非凸集。
AI.motivation: 研究具有空间间断通量的守恒律中，给定目标廓线后，何种初始数据能通过AB-熵解演化到达该目标，这一问题在交通流、多相流等实际应用中具有重要意义。
AI.method: 利用AB-后向-前向演化算子以及新提出的AB-真正/界面特征概念，通过合适的积分不等式对初始数据集进行刻画，并分析其结构和几何性质。
AI.result: 给出了初始数据集的完整积分不等式刻画，发现该集合并非凸集——这一特性与空间变量无关的凸通量守恒律情形形成鲜明对比。
AI.conclusion: 本文为间断通量守恒律的逆向问题提供了理论基础，揭示了空间间断性导致初始数据集的非凸性这一关键结构特征。

title: Notes on Siegfried Bosch's Algebraic Geometry and Commutative Algebra (dedicated to Grothendieck)
summary: Notes on Commutative Alegbra and Algebraic Geometry covering rings, ideals, modules, presheaves, sheaves, schemes, homological algebra, étale cohomology and further topics that are more advanced.

AI.tldr: 这是一份关于交换代数与代数几何的综合性笔记，涵盖环论、理想、模、预层、层、概形、同调代数、平展上同调以及更高级的主题。
AI.motivation: 系统性地整理交换代数与代数几何的核心概念与进阶主题，为研究者或学生提供一份连续且深入的参考资料。
AI.method: 采用笔记形式，按照从基础（环、理想、模）到几何对象（预层、层、概形），再进入同调代数和平展上同调，最后延伸至高级主题的逻辑顺序组织内容。
AI.result: 生成了一份结构化的笔记，覆盖了从基础代数结构到现代代数几何工具（如概形与平展上同调）的完整知识体系。
AI.conclusion: 该笔记为交换代数与代数几何的学习提供了系统的理论框架，适合希望深入理解该领域的读者。

title: ModeConv: A Novel Convolution for Distinguishing Anomalous and Normal Structural Behavior
summary: External influences such as traffic and environmental factors induce vibrations in structures, leading to material degradation over time. These vibrations result in cracks due to the material's lack of plasticity compromising structural integrity. Detecting such damage requires the installation of vibration sensors to capture the internal dynamics. However, distinguishing relevant eigenmodes from external noise necessitates the use of Deep Learning models. The detection of changes in eigenmodes can be used to anticipate these shifts in material properties and to discern between normal and anomalous structural behavior. Eigenmodes, representing characteristic vibration patterns, provide insights into structural dynamics and deviations from expected states. Thus, we propose ModeConv to automatically capture and analyze changes in eigenmodes, facilitating effective anomaly detection in structures and material properties. In the conducted experiments, ModeConv demonstrates computational efficiency improvements, resulting in reduced runtime for model calculations. The novel ModeConv neural network layer is tailored for temporal graph neural networks, in which every node represents one sensor. ModeConv employs a singular value decomposition based convolutional filter design for complex numbers and leverages modal transformation in lieu of Fourier or Laplace transformations in spectral graph convolutions. We include a mathematical complexity analysis illustrating the runtime reduction.

AI.tldr: 提出ModeConv神经网络层，利用奇异值分解和模态变换替代传统傅里叶/拉普拉斯变换，在时态图神经网络中通过捕捉结构振动特征模态的变化实现高效异常检测，并显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 外部环境因素（交通、环境等）引起结构振动导致材料退化与裂缝，传统振动传感器虽能捕获内部动力学，但区分相关特征模态与外部噪声困难，需借助深度学习。现有方法计算成本高，需更高效的特征模态变化检测方法。
AI.method: 提出ModeConv层，专用于时态图神经网络（每个节点代表一个传感器）；采用基于奇异值分解的复数卷积滤波器设计；用模态变换替代谱图卷积中的傅里叶或拉普拉斯变换；包含数学复杂度分析。
AI.result: 实验表明ModeConv在计算效率上有提升，显著减少了模型计算的运行时间。
AI.conclusion: ModeConv能有效自动捕获和分析特征模态变化，用于结构和材料属性的异常检测，同时具有计算效率优势。

title: OTAD: An Optimal Transport-Induced Robust Model for Agnostic Adversarial Attack
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to small adversarial perturbations of the inputs, posing a significant challenge to their reliability and robustness. Empirical methods such as adversarial training can defend against particular attacks but remain vulnerable to more powerful attacks. Alternatively, Lipschitz networks provide certified robustness to unseen perturbations but lack sufficient expressive power. To harness the advantages of both approaches, we design a novel two-step Optimal Transport induced Adversarial Defense (OTAD) model that can fit the training data accurately while preserving the local Lipschitz continuity. First, we train a DNN with a regularizer derived from optimal transport theory, yielding a discrete optimal transport map linking data to its features. By leveraging the map's inherent regularity, we interpolate the map by solving the convex integration problem (CIP) to guarantee the local Lipschitz property. OTAD is extensible to diverse architectures of ResNet and Transformer, making it suitable for complex data. For efficient computation, the CIP can be solved through training neural networks. OTAD opens a novel avenue for developing reliable and secure deep learning systems through the regularity of optimal transport maps. Empirical results demonstrate that OTAD can outperform other robust models on diverse datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于最优传输的两步式对抗防御模型（OTAD），先通过最优传输正则化训练DNN得到离散最优传输映射，再通过求解凸积分问题保证局部Lipschitz连续性，兼顾了准确性与认证鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络易受微小对抗扰动攻击，现有方法中对抗训练缺乏对更强攻击的鲁棒性，Lipschitz网络虽能提供认证鲁棒性但表达能力不足，亟需一种兼顾准确性与鲁棒性的方法。
AI.method: 设计了两步式OTAD模型：第一步利用最优传输理论中的正则化项训练DNN，得到从数据到特征的最优传输映射；第二步利用该映射的固有正则性，通过求解凸积分问题（CIP）进行插值，确保局部Lipschitz连续性。CIP可通过训练神经网络高效求解，且模型可扩展至ResNet和Transformer架构。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，OTAD在多种数据集上优于其他鲁棒模型，兼具高准确性和对未见扰动的认证鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OTAD通过最优传输映射的规律性为开发可靠安全的深度学习系统开辟了新途径，有效结合了对抗训练与Lipschitz网络的优点。

title: Nonlinear Schwarz methods to compute geodesics on manifolds
summary: We consider the leapfrog algorithm by Noakes for computing geodesics on Riemannian manifolds. The main idea behind this algorithm is to subdivide the original endpoint geodesic problem into several local problems, for which the endpoint geodesic problem can be solved more easily by any local method (e.g., the single shooting method). The algorithm then iteratively updates a piecewise geodesic to obtain a global geodesic between the original endpoints. From a domain decomposition perspective, we show that the leapfrog algorithm can be viewed as a classical Schwarz alternating method. Thanks to this analogy, we use techniques from nonlinear preconditioning to improve the convergence properties of the method. Preliminary numerical experiments suggest that this is a promising approach.

AI.tldr: 本文从区域分解视角揭示了Noakes提出的用于黎曼流形上测地线计算的leapfrog算法本质上是经典的Schwarz交替法，并利用非线性预条件技术改进其收敛性，初步数值实验表明该方法是有效的。
AI.motivation: 将原始的端点测地线问题分解为多个局部子问题，这些子问题可以通过局部方法（如单射法）更容易求解，从而获得全局测地线。
AI.method: 从区域分解视角将leapfrog算法重新解释为Schwarz交替法，并引入非线性预条件技术来改善收敛性质。
AI.result: 初步数值实验表明，基于非线性预条件的改进方法是一种有前景的途径。
AI.conclusion: Leapfrog算法与Schwarz交替法具有类比性，利用非线性预条件可提升其收敛性能。

title: A Numerical Technique for Coupling the Momentum and the Continuity Equations for Semi-Implicit 3D Ocean Models
summary: Semi-implicit methods are powerful and efficient tools for the three-dimensional modeling of coastal and oceanic processes. A semi-implicit finite difference method for 3D hydrostatic primitive equations is presented in this paper. The governing equations are time-discretized with an implicit treatment of barotropic pressure gradient and vertical viscosity. The discretized momentum equations along a water column are coupled with the depth-integrated continuity equation of the column to construct a linear system for free-surface elevations. The novelty of this work lies in formulating an efficient method with the order of complexity O(N) for coupling the momentum and the continuity equations. In this method, the horizontal velocity components are expressed in terms of neighbor free-surface elevations by some simple recursive formulas and then are substituted in the integrated continuity equation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对3D静水原始方程的半隐式有限差分方法，通过隐式处理斜压梯度与垂直黏性项，并利用O(N)复杂度的递归公式耦合动量方程与连续方程，高效求解自由表面高度。
AI.motivation: 三维沿海与海洋过程建模需要高效稳定的数值方法，半隐式方法兼具计算效率与数值稳定性，但现有方法在耦合动量方程与连续方程时复杂度较高，本文旨在设计一种线性复杂度O(N)的高效耦合方案。
AI.method: 采用半隐式时间离散，隐式处理斜压梯度与垂直黏性；将离散后的动量方程沿水柱与深度积分连续方程耦合，构建自由表面高度的线性系统；通过简单递归公式将水平速度分量表示为相邻自由表面高度的函数，代入积分连续方程求解，实现O(N)复杂度。
AI.result: 成功实现了耦合动量方程与连续方程的O(N)复杂度算法，相较于传统方法在计算效率上具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为3D静水原始方程的数值求解提供了一种高效、稳定的半隐式有限差分框架，尤其适用于大规模沿海与海洋过程模拟。

title: ROM inversion of monostatic data lifted to full MIMO
summary: The Lippmann--Schwinger--Lanczos (LSL) algorithm has recently been shown to provide an efficient tool for imaging and direct inversion of synthetic aperture radar data in multi-scattering environments [17], where the data set is limited to the monostatic, a.k.a. single input/single output (SISO) measurements. The approach is based on constructing data-driven estimates of internal fields via a reduced-order model (ROM) framework and then plugging them into the Lippmann-Schwinger integral equation. However, the approximations of the internal solutions may have more error due to missing the off diagonal elements of the multiple input/multiple output (MIMO) matrix valued transfer function. This, in turn, may result in multiple echoes in the image. Here we present a ROM-based data completion algorithm to mitigate this problem. First, we apply the LSL algorithm to the SISO data as in [17] to obtain approximate reconstructions as well as the estimate of internal field. Next, we use these estimates to calculate a forward Lippmann-Schwinger integral to populate the missing off-diagonal data (the lifting step). Finally, to update the reconstructions, we solve the Lippmann-Schwinger equation using the original SISO data, where the internal fields are constructed from the lifted MIMO data. The steps of obtaining the approximate reconstructions and internal fields and populating the missing MIMO data entries can be repeated for complex models to improve the images even further. Efficiency of the proposed approach is demonstrated on 2D and 2.5D numerical examples, where we see reconstructions are improved substantially.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ROM的数据补全算法，通过LSL算法处理SISO数据获得近似重建和内场估计，再利用Lippmann-Schwinger积分填充缺失的MIMO数据（提升步骤），最后用原始SISO数据和提升后的MIMO数据更新重建。该方法可迭代进行以改善复杂模型成像，2D和2.5D数值实验表明重建效果显著提升。
AI.motivation: LSL算法在处理单基地（SISO）合成孔径雷达数据时，由于缺失MIMO传递函数的非对角元素，导致内场近似误差较大，在图像中产生多重回波伪影。为解决这一问题，需要利用ROM框架进行数据补全。
AI.method: 1) 对SISO数据应用LSL算法，获得近似重建和内场估计；2) 利用估计结果计算前向Lippmann-Schwinger积分，填充缺失的MIMO非对角数据（提升步骤）；3) 利用原始SISO数据与由提升MIMO数据构建的内场，求解Lippmann-Schwinger方程更新重建。上述步骤可迭代执行。
AI.result: 在2D和2.5D数值算例中，该方法相比原有纯SISO LSL算法，重建质量获得显著提升，有效抑制了多重回波伪影。
AI.conclusion: 基于ROM的数据补全策略能够有效弥补SISO数据缺失的MIMO信息，通过迭代方式可进一步改善复杂散射环境下的SAR成像效果。

title: A Robust Compressed Push-Pull Method for Decentralized Nonconvex Optimization
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.07091
summary: In the modern paradigm of multi-agent networks, communication has become one of the main bottlenecks for decentralized optimization, where a large number of agents are involved in minimizing the average of the local cost functions. In this paper, we propose a robust compressed push-pull algorithm (RCPP) that combines gradient tracking with communication compression. In particular, RCPP is robust under a much more general class of compression operators that allow both relative and absolute compression errors, in contrast to the existing works which can handle either one of them or assume convex problems. We show that RCPP enjoys sublinear convergence rate for smooth and possibly nonconvex objective functions over general directed networks. Moreover, under the additional Polyak-Łojasiewicz condition, linear convergence rate can be achieved for RCPP. Numerical examples verify the theoretical findings and demonstrate the efficiency, flexibility, and robustness of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒压缩推-拉算法（RCPP），将梯度跟踪与通信压缩相结合，适用于更一般化的压缩算子（同时允许相对和绝对压缩误差），在一般有向网络上对光滑且可能非凸的目标函数具有次线性收敛率，在Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件下可实现线性收敛率。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体网络的分布式优化中，通信已成为主要瓶颈之一。现有工作在压缩算子方面仅能处理相对误差或绝对误差中的一种，或假设问题为凸问题，缺乏对更一般压缩算子的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出RCPP算法，将梯度跟踪（gradient tracking）与通信压缩（communication compression）相结合，能够处理同时包含相对和绝对误差的更一般化压缩算子，适用于一般有向网络拓扑。
AI.result: 对于光滑且可能非凸的目标函数，在一般有向网络上获得次线性收敛率；在额外Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件下，获得线性收敛率。数值实验验证了算法的效率、灵活性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RCPP算法在更一般的压缩算子设定下实现了鲁棒的分布式优化，拓展了现有方法在压缩误差类型上的适用范围，且在非凸和PL条件下均有理论保证。

title: Foundations of Multivariate Distributional Reinforcement Learning
summary: In reinforcement learning (RL), the consideration of multivariate reward signals has led to fundamental advancements in multi-objective decision-making, transfer learning, and representation learning. This work introduces the first oracle-free and computationally-tractable algorithms for provably convergent multivariate distributional dynamic programming and temporal difference learning. Our convergence rates match the familiar rates in the scalar reward setting, and additionally provide new insights into the fidelity of approximate return distribution representations as a function of the reward dimension. Surprisingly, when the reward dimension is larger than $1$, we show that standard analysis of categorical TD learning fails, which we resolve with a novel projection onto the space of mass-$1$ signed measures. Finally, with the aid of our technical results and simulations, we identify tradeoffs between distribution representations that influence the performance of multivariate distributional RL in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出了无需预言机且计算可行的多变量分布强化学习算法，证明了其在分布动态规划和时序差分学习中的收敛性，收敛速率与标量奖励设定相匹配，并揭示了奖励维度对近似收益分布表示保真度的影响。针对维度大于1时标准分类TD学习失效的问题，引入了一种到质量为1的有符号测度空间的新型投影方法。通过理论分析与仿真，识别了影响多变量分布强化学习实际性能的分布表示权衡。
AI.motivation: 在多变量奖励信号的强化学习中，现有的分布强化学习方法缺乏理论保证，特别是缺少无需预言机（oracle-free）且计算可行的算法及其收敛性分析。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 1) 提出了首个无需预言机、计算可处理的多变量分布动态规划和时序差分学习算法；2) 证明了算法的收敛性，收敛速率与标量奖励设定一致；3) 针对多变量（维度>1）导致标准分类TD学习失效的问题，设计了一种新的投影方法——投影到质量为1的有符号测度空间；4) 通过理论分析和仿真实验考察分布表示的选择对算法性能的影响。
AI.result: 1) 算法在收敛性方面取得了与标量奖励设定相匹配的速率；2) 发现了奖励维度对近似收益分布表示保真度的理论影响；3) 证明了维度大于1时标准分类TD学习不收敛，而新提出的投影方法可以有效解决；4) 识别了分布表示方式在实际应用中的性能权衡因素。
AI.conclusion: 多变量分布强化学习在理论上可以实现与标量奖励设定相当的收敛性能，但需要针对高维奖励信号设计专门的投影方法（如有符号测度空间投影），且实际部署中需要根据任务特点选择合适的分布表示形式以平衡性能表现。

title: Multistage stochastic optimization of a mono-site hydrogen infrastructure by decomposition techniques
summary: The development of hydrogen infrastructures requires to reduce their costs.  In this paper, we develop a multistage stochastic optimization model for the  management of a hydrogen infrastructure which consists of an electrolyser, a  compressor and a storage to serve a transportation demand. This infrastructure  is powered by three different sources: on-site photovoltaic panels (PV),  renewable energy through a power purchase agreement (PPA) and the power grid. We  consider uncertainties affecting on-site photovoltaic production and hydrogen  demand.  Renewable energy sources are emphasized in the hydrogen production  process to ensure eligibility for a subsidy, which is awarded if the proportion  of nonrenewable electricity usage stays under a predetermined threshold. We  solve the multistage stochastic optimization problem using a decomposition  method based on Lagrange duality. The numerical results indicate that the  solution to this problem, formulated as a policy, achieves a small duality gap,  thus proving the effectiveness of this approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多阶段随机优化模型，用于管理包含电解槽、压缩机和储氢设施的氢能基础设施，该设施由现场光伏、可再生能源购电协议（PPA）和电网三种电源供电，并考虑光伏发电和氢需求的不确定性，通过拉格朗日对偶分解方法求解，数值结果表明该策略实现了较小的对偶间隙，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 降低氢能基础设施的运营成本，同时利用可再生能源生产氢气以满足补贴资格条件（非可再生电力使用比例低于预定阈值）。
AI.method: 构建多阶段随机优化模型，考虑光伏产出和氢需求的不确定性；采用基于拉格朗日对偶的分解方法求解，将问题转化为策略形式。
AI.result: 求解得到的策略实现了较小的对偶间隙，表明所提出的分解方法在求解该多阶段随机优化问题上是有效的。
AI.conclusion: 基于拉格朗日对偶的分解方法能够有效解决氢能基础设施管理中考虑可再生能源补贴约束的多阶段随机优化问题，为降低氢能基础设施成本提供了可行的决策框架。

title: Solving Integrated Process Planning and Scheduling Problem via Graph Neural Network Based Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: The Integrated Process Planning and Scheduling (IPPS) problem combines process route planning and shop scheduling to achieve high efficiency in manufacturing and maximize resource utilization, which is crucial for modern manufacturing systems. Traditional methods using Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) and heuristic algorithms can not well balance solution quality and speed when solving IPPS. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method. We model the IPPS problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and employ a Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (GNN) to capture the complex relationships among operations, machines, and jobs. To optimize the scheduling strategy, we use Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO). Experimental results show that, compared to traditional methods, our approach significantly improves solution efficiency and quality in large-scale IPPS instances, providing superior scheduling strategies for modern intelligent manufacturing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的深度强化学习方法（结合异构图神经网络与PPO算法）来解决集成工艺规划与调度（IPPS）问题，在大规模实例上相比传统MILP和启发式方法在求解效率和质量上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统的MILP和启发式算法在解决IPPS问题时难以兼顾求解速度与解的质量，亟需一种能在大规模制造场景下高效获得高质量调度策略的新方法。
AI.method: 将IPPS建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用异构图神经网络（GNN）捕捉工序、机器与作业之间的复杂关系，并使用近端策略优化（PPO）算法训练调度策略。
AI.result: 在大型IPPS实例上，该方法相比传统方法显著提高了求解效率和解的质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DRL方法为现代智能制造系统提供了更优的调度策略，有效平衡了求解速度与解质量之间的矛盾。

title: Study of Turbulence and Pressure Recovery in the Heat Pipe Vapor Flow Using the Spectral-Element Method
comment: 14th International Topical Meeting on Nuclear Reactor Thermal-Hydraulics, Operation and Safety (NUTHOS-14)
summary: Heat pipes can efficiently and passively remove heat in nuclear microreactors. Nevertheless, the flow dynamics within heat pipes present a significant challenge in designing and optimizing them for nuclear energy applications. This work aims to explore the vapor core of heat pipes through comprehensive two- and three-dimensional simulations, with a primary focus on modeling the pressure recovery observed in the condenser section. The goal is to establish improved correlations for one-dimensional heat pipe codes. The simulations are validated against experimental data from a vapor pipe documented in the literature. The turbulence model is employed in the two-dimensional simulations through the open-source spectral-element code Nek5000. This model provides insights into pressure recovery within heat pipes with low computational cost. In addition, Large Eddy Simulations (LES) are used to capture turbulent flow features in a three-dimensional vapor pipe model, utilizing the code NekRS. Using LES is crucial for comprehending the impact of laminar-to-turbulent transition on pressure recovery. A simulation framework is created to model the heat pipe's vapor core, laying the foundation for an enhanced understanding of heat pipe behavior. The ultimate goal is to improve and optimize heat pipe designs, provide data to validate lower-fidelity approaches and enhance their performance in nuclear reactors.

AI.tldr: 本文通过二维和三维仿真（使用Nek5000和NekRS代码）研究热管蒸汽核心的压力恢复现象，旨在改进一维热管模型的相关关系，并优化核微反应堆中的热管设计。
AI.motivation: 热管在核微反应堆中能高效被动排热，但其内部流动动力学给设计和优化带来显著挑战，现有模型对冷凝段压力恢复的描述不够准确。
AI.method: 采用开源谱元代码Nek5000进行二维湍流模型仿真，同时使用NekRS进行三维大涡模拟（LES），捕捉层流-湍流转变对压力恢复的影响，并基于文献中的实验数据进行验证。
AI.result: 二维湍流模型以较低计算成本提供了压力恢复的见解；三维LES成功捕捉了湍流特征；建立了热管蒸汽核心的仿真框架，为低精度模型提供了验证数据。
AI.conclusion: 该仿真框架为理解热管行为奠定了基础，有望改进热管设计、优化其在核反应堆中的性能，并为一维热管代码提供改进的相关关系。

title: A generalized adaptive central-upwind scheme for compressible flow simulations and preventing spurious vortices
summary: This work introduces a novel adaptive central-upwind scheme designed for simulating compressible flows with discontinuities in the flow field. The proposed approach offers significant improvements in computational efficiency over the central gradient-based reconstruction approach presented in [1] (Hoffmann, Chamarthi and Frankel, JCP 2024). By leveraging a combination of conservative and characteristic variable reconstruction, the proposed approach demonstrates oscillation-free results while effectively reducing computational costs and improving the results. Furthermore, the adaptive central-upwind algorithm is generalized to be compatible not only with the gradient-based reconstruction as in [1] but with other existing methods. In this regard, with the proposed algorithm, the standard fifth/sixth-order reconstruction scheme has also been shown to outperform existing schemes with a 20-30% reduction in computational expense with improved results. Notably, the proposed approach has successfully prevented the generation of spurious vortices in the double shear layer test cases, even with linear schemes, showcasing its robustness and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型自适应中心迎风格式，用于模拟含间断的可压缩流动。该方法结合保守变量和特征变量重构，实现了无振荡结果，同时降低了计算成本。与现有方法相比，该算法在标准五/六阶重构方案上实现了20-30%的计算开销缩减，并在双剪切层测试中成功抑制了线性方案产生的虚假涡旋，展示了其鲁棒性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有中心梯度重构方法（Hoffmann, Chamarthi and Frankel, JCP 2024）在计算可压缩流动间断问题时效率有待提升，且存在虚假振荡等问题。本文旨在开发一种计算效率更高、结果更优且无振荡的新型数值格式。
AI.method: 采用保守变量与特征变量相结合的混合重构策略，提出自适应中心迎风格式。该算法不仅适用于梯度重构方法，还能推广至其他现有重构方案，通过自适应机制在保持精度的同时降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在标准五/六阶重构方案上实现20-30%的计算成本降低，同时改进了求解结果。在双剪切层测试中成功抑制了线性方案产生的虚假涡旋，证明了其抑制非物理振荡的能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应中心迎风格式在计算效率和精度方面均优于现有方法，具有良好的通用性和鲁棒性，可广泛应用于含间断的可压缩流动模拟。

title: Introducing GPU-acceleration into the Python-based Simulations of Chemistry Framework
summary: We introduce the first version of GPU4PySCF, a module that provides GPU acceleration of methods in PySCF. As a core functionality, this provides a GPU implementation of two-electron repulsion integrals (ERIs) for contracted basis sets comprising up to g functions using Rys quadrature. As an illustration of how this can accelerate a quantum chemistry workflow, we describe how to use the ERIs efficiently in the integral-direct Hartree-Fock Fock build and nuclear gradient construction. Benchmark calculations show a significant speedup of two orders of magnitude with respect to the multi-threaded CPU Hartree-Fock code of PySCF, and performance comparable to other GPU-accelerated quantum chemical packages including GAMESS and QUICK on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GPU4PySCF模块，为PySCF量子化学软件包提供GPU加速，核心功能是基于Rys求积的电子排斥积分（ERI）GPU实现（支持至g函数的收缩基组），并展示了其在积分直接Hartree-Fock框架下的Fock构建和核梯度计算中的应用。基准测试表明，相比PySCF多线程CPU代码实现约两个数量级的加速，单张NVIDIA A100 GPU性能与GAMESS、QUICK等GPU加速量子化学包相当。
AI.motivation: 量子化学计算中，电子排斥积分（ERI）计算和Hartree-Fock等方法的计算开销极大，传统CPU实现难以满足大体系或高精度需求。PySCF作为广泛使用的开源量子化学软件，缺乏高效的GPU加速支持，亟需开发GPU模块以显著提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于Rys求积方法，在GPU上实现了收缩基组（最高至g函数）的两电子排斥积分（ERI）计算；并利用该GPU加速的ERI，在积分直接Hartree-Fock框架下实现了高效的Fock矩阵构建和核梯度计算。
AI.result: 相比PySCF的多线程CPU Hartree-Fock代码，GPU加速版本实现了约两个数量级（100倍）的显著加速；在单张NVIDIA A100 GPU上，性能与GAMESS、QUICK等其他GPU加速量子化学包相当。
AI.conclusion: GPU4PySCF模块成功为PySCF提供了高效的GPU加速能力，特别是ERI计算和Hartree-Fock方法，取得了两个数量级的性能提升，使PySCF在GPU加速量子化学领域具备了与业界主流软件竞争的能力。

title: SOFI: Finding point group symmetries in atomic clusters as finding the set of degenerate solutions in a shape-matching problem
summary: Point Group (PG) symmetries play a fundamental role in many aspects of theoretical chemistry and computational materials science. With the objective to automatize the search of PG symmetry operations of generic atomic clusters, we present a new algorithm called Symmetry Operation FInder (SOFI). SOFI addresses the problem of identifying PG symmetry by framing it as a degenerate shape-matching problem, where the multiple solutions correspond to distinct symmetry operations. The developed algorithm is compared against three other algorithms dedicated to PG identification, on a large set of atomic clusters. The results, along with some illustrative use cases, showcase the effectiveness of SOFI. The SOFI algorithm is released as part of the IRA library, accessible at https://github.com/mammasmias/IterativeRotationsAssignments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SOFI的新算法，通过将点群对称性识别转化为简并形状匹配问题，来自动化识别原子团簇的点群对称操作，并在大型数据集上验证了其有效性。该算法已集成到IRA库中开源发布。
AI.motivation: 点群对称性在理论化学和计算材料科学中具有基础性作用，现有算法在自动化识别原子团簇的点群对称操作方面仍有不足，需要一种更有效的方法。
AI.method: 将点群对称性识别问题建模为简并形状匹配问题（degenerate shape-matching problem），其中多个解对应不同的对称操作，从而开发出SOFI算法。
AI.result: 在大量原子团簇数据集上，将SOFI与其他三种点群识别算法进行比较，结果表明SOFI具有较高的有效性；并通过示例用例进行了展示。
AI.conclusion: SOFI算法能够有效自动化识别原子团簇的点群对称操作，并在对比中表现出优势，已被集成到IRA库中开源发布。

title: A robust fourth-order finite-difference discretization for the strongly anisotropic transport equation in magnetized plasmas
summary: We propose a second-order temporally implicit, fourth-order-accurate spatial discretization scheme for the strongly anisotropic heat transport equation characteristic of hot, fusion-grade plasmas. Following [Du Toit et al., Comp. Phys. Comm., 228 (2018)], the scheme transforms mixed-derivative diffusion fluxes (which are responsible for the lack of a discrete maximum principle) into nonlinear advective fluxes, amenable to nonlinear-solver-friendly monotonicity-preserving limiters. The scheme enables accurate multi-dimensional heat transport simulations with up to seven orders of magnitude of heat-transport-coefficient anisotropies with low cross-field numerical error pollution and excellent algorithmic performance, with the number of linear iterations scaling very weakly with grid resolution and grid anisotropy, and scaling with the square-root of the implicit timestep. We propose a multigrid preconditioning strategy based on a second-order-accurate approximation that renders the scheme efficient and scalable under grid refinement. Several numerical tests are presented that display the expected spatial convergence rates and strong algorithmic performance, including fully nonlinear magnetohydrodynamics simulations of kink instabilities in a Bennett pinch in 2D helical geometry and of ITER in 3D toroidal geometry.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于强各向异性热输运方程的二阶时间隐式、四阶空间精度离散格式，通过将混合导数扩散通量转化为非线性平流通量并采用单调性保持限制器，实现了高达七个数量级各向异性比的准确多维热输运模拟，并提出了基于二阶近似的多重网格预条件策略以保证算法可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 热核聚变等离子体中的热输运方程具有极强的各向异性（平行与垂直方向热输运系数差异可达七个数量级），传统数值格式面临混合导数扩散通量破坏离散最大原理、交叉场数值污染严重、算法可扩展性差等挑战，亟需高精度、高效且鲁棒的离散方案。
AI.method: 采用二阶时间隐式（BDF或Crank-Nicolson类型）结合四阶空间离散；将混合导数扩散通量转化为非线性平流通量，应用单调性保持限制器；构建基于二阶精度近似的多重网格预条件器加速线性求解器收敛。
AI.result: 数值测试展示了预期的空间收敛阶；线性迭代次数对网格分辨率和网格各向异性依赖极弱，对隐式时间步长呈平方根增长；成功应用于2D螺旋几何中Bennett箍缩的扭折不稳定性及3D环形几何中ITER装置的全非线性MHD模拟。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的高阶隐式格式结合多重网格预条件策略能够高效、可扩展地处理极端各向异性热输运问题，交叉场数值污染低，适用于聚变等离子体大规模多物理模拟。

title: Resolving the kinetics of an ensemble of muscle myosin motors via a temperature-dependent fitting procedure
summary: A data fitting procedure is devised and thoroughly tested to provide self-consistent estimates of the relevant mechanokinetic parameters involved in a plausible scheme underpinning the output of an ensemble of myosin II molecular motors mimicking the muscle contraction. The method builds on a stochastic model accounting for the force exerted by the motor ensemble operated both in the low and high force-generating regimes corresponding to different temperature ranges. The proposed interpretative framework is successfully challenged against simulated data, meant to mimic the experimental output of a unidimensional synthetic nanomachine powered by pure muscle myosin isoforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种数据拟合程序，用于从模拟肌肉收缩的肌球蛋白II分子马达 ensembles 中自洽估计机械动力学参数，成功在低力与高力生成区间（对应不同温度范围）对模拟数据进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 为了从模拟肌肉收缩的肌球蛋白II分子马达集合体中自洽地估计相关的机械动力学参数，需要一种能够同时适用于低力和高力生成区间的数据拟合方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种数据拟合程序，基于随机模型构建，该模型能够解释马达集合体在低力与高力生成区间（对应不同温度范围）的力输出，并利用模拟数据（模拟由纯肌肉肌球蛋白亚型驱动的一维合成纳米机器的实验输出）进行挑战验证。
AI.result: 该拟合程序成功通过了模拟数据的验证（挑战），表明其能够提供自洽的参数估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据拟合框架是有效的，能够对涉及肌球蛋白II马达集合体的机械动力学参数进行自洽估计，适用于不同温度下的力生成区间。

title: 2D additive small-world network with distance-dependent interactions
summary: In this work, we have employed Monte Carlo calculations to study the Ising model on a 2D additive small-world network with long-range interactions depending on the geometric distance between interacting sites. The network is initially defined by a regular square lattice and with probability $p$ each site is tested for the possibility of creating a long-range interaction with any other site that has not yet received one. Here, we used the specific case where $p=1$, meaning that every site in the network has one long-range interaction in addition to the short-range interactions of the regular lattice. These long-range interactions depend on a power-law form, $J_{ij}=r_{ij}^{-α}$, with the geometric distance $r_{ij}$ between connected sites $i$ and $j$. In current two-dimensional model, we found that mean-field critical behavior is observed only at $α=0$. As $α$ increases, the network size influences the phase transition point of the system, i.e., indicating a crossover behavior. However, given the two-dimensional system, we found the critical behavior of the short-range interaction at $α\approx2$. Thus, the limitation in the number of long-range interactions compared to the globally coupled model, as well as the form of the decay of these interactions, prevented us from finding a regime with finite phase transition points and continuously varying critical exponents in $0<α<2$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过蒙特卡洛计算研究了二维可加性小世界网络上的Ising模型，其中长程相互作用随几何距离呈幂律衰减。发现平均场临界行为仅在α=0时出现；随着α增大，系统出现交叉行为；在α≈2时恢复短程相互作用的临界行为。在0<α<2区间未观察到有限相变点和连续变化的临界指数。
AI.motivation: 探究二维可加性小世界网络中长程相互作用的衰减指数α如何影响系统的临界行为，特别是探索是否存在连续变化的临界指数区间（类似于全局耦合模型中的现象）。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛计算方法，在二维规则正方晶格基础上以概率p=1为每个节点添加一条长程连接，长程相互作用的强度按J_ij = r_{ij}^{-α}的幂律形式随几何距离衰减，通过改变α值观察系统临界行为的变化。
AI.result: 平均场临界行为仅在α=0时出现；随α增大，网络尺寸影响相变点，呈现交叉行为；在α≈2时恢复短程相互作用的临界行为；在0<α<2区间未找到有限相变点和连续变化的临界指数。
AI.conclusion: 由于每个节点仅有一条长程连接（远少于全局耦合模型），且长程相互作用随距离衰减，该模型无法在0<α<2区间实现有限相变点和连续变化的临界指数。这表明长程连接的稀疏性和衰减形式共同限制了系统的临界行为。

title: DNA-SE: Towards Deep Neural-Nets Assisted Semiparametric Estimation
comment: semiparametric statistics, missing data, causal inference, Fredholm integral equations of the second kind, bi-level optimization, deep learning, AI for science
summary: Semiparametric statistics play a pivotal role in a wide range of domains, including but not limited to missing data, causal inference, and transfer learning, to name a few. In many settings, semiparametric theory leads to (nearly) statistically optimal procedures that yet involve numerically solving Fredholm integral equations of the second kind. Traditional numerical methods, such as polynomial or spline approximations, are difficult to scale to multi-dimensional problems. Alternatively, statisticians may choose to approximate the original integral equations by ones with closed-form solutions, resulting in computationally more efficient, but statistically suboptimal or even incorrect procedures. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel framework by formulating the semiparametric estimation problem as a bi-level optimization problem; and then we develop a scalable algorithm called Deep Neural-Nets Assisted Semiparametric Estimation (DNA-SE) by leveraging the universal approximation property of Deep Neural-Nets (DNN) to streamline semiparametric procedures. Through extensive numerical experiments and a real data analysis, we demonstrate the numerical and statistical advantages of $\dnase$ over traditional methods. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to bring DNN into semiparametric statistics as a numerical solver of integral equations in our proposed general framework.

AI.tldr: 提出DNA-SE框架，利用深度神经网络求解半参数统计中的Fredholm积分方程，将问题转化为双层优化，实现计算效率与统计最优性的兼顾。
AI.motivation: 半参数统计中许多最优估计需要数值求解第二类Fredholm积分方程，传统数值方法（多项式、样条）难以扩展到高维问题，而近似闭式解的方法虽计算高效但统计次优甚至错误。亟需一种既能保持统计最优性又能处理高维问题的可扩展方法。
AI.method: 将半参数估计问题重新表述为双层优化问题，利用深度神经网络的万能逼近性质作为积分方程的数值求解器，提出DNA-SE算法。
AI.result: 通过大量数值实验和真实数据分析，证明DNA-SE在数值精度和统计性能上均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将深度神经网络引入半参数统计作为积分方程的通用数值求解器，填补了计算效率和统计最优性之间的缺口。

title: Machine Learning for Complex Systems with Abnormal Pattern by Exception Maximization Outlier Detection Method
summary: This paper proposes a novel fast online methodology for outlier detection called the exception maximization outlier detection method(EMODM), which employs probabilistic models and statistical algorithms to detect abnormal patterns from the outputs of complex systems. The EMODM is based on a two-state Gaussian mixture model and demonstrates strong performance in probability anomaly detection working on real-time raw data rather than using special prior distribution information. We confirm this using the synthetic data from two numerical cases. For the real-world data, we have detected the short circuit pattern of the circuit system using EMODM by the current and voltage output of a three-phase inverter. The EMODM also found an abnormal period due to COVID-19 in the insured unemployment data of 53 regions in the United States from 2000 to 2024. The application of EMODM to these two real-life datasets demonstrated the effectiveness and accuracy of our algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于双状态高斯混合模型的异常检测方法EMODM，无需先验分布信息即可实时检测复杂系统中的异常模式，在合成数据和真实数据（三相逆变器短路检测、美国失业数据COVID-19异常周期）上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法通常需要先验分布信息或离线训练，难以满足复杂系统实时输出的异常检测需求，因此需要一种快速、在线、无需先验信息的概率异常检测方法。
AI.method: 基于双状态高斯混合模型（two-state Gaussian mixture model）的概率建模，采用异常最大化（Exception Maximization）策略进行在线异常检测，直接对实时原始数据进行概率异常检测，无需特殊的先验分布信息。
AI.result: 在合成数据（两个数值算例）和真实数据（三相逆变器电流电压的短路检测、美国53个地区2000-2024年失业保险数据中的COVID-19异常周期）上均验证了EMODM的有效性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: EMODM作为一种快速的在线异常检测方法，能够有效检测复杂系统输出中的异常模式，适用于工业系统故障检测和社会经济数据异常分析等实际场景。

title: Introduction to Machine Learning
summary: This book introduces the mathematical foundations and techniques that lead to the development and analysis of many of the algorithms that are used in machine learning. It starts with an introductory chapter that describes notation used throughout the book and serve at a reminder of basic concepts in calculus, linear algebra and probability and also introduces some measure theoretic terminology, which can be used as a reading guide for the sections that use these tools. The introductory chapters also provide background material on matrix analysis and optimization. The latter chapter provides theoretical support to many algorithms that are used in the book, including stochastic gradient descent, proximal methods, etc. After discussing basic concepts for statistical prediction, the book includes an introduction to reproducing kernel theory and Hilbert space techniques, which are used in many places, before addressing the description of various algorithms for supervised statistical learning, including linear methods, support vector machines, decision trees, boosting, or neural networks. The subject then switches to generative methods, starting with a chapter that presents sampling methods and an introduction to the theory of Markov chains. The following chapter describe the theory of graphical models, an introduction to variational methods for models with latent variables, and to deep-learning based generative models. The next chapters focus on unsupervised learning methods, for clustering, factor analysis and manifold learning. The final chapter of the book is theory-oriented and discusses concentration inequalities and generalization bounds.

AI.tldr: 本书系统介绍了机器学习算法的数学基础与核心方法，涵盖监督学习（线性方法、SVM、决策树、Boosting、神经网络）、生成方法（采样、马尔可夫链、图模型、变分法、深度生成模型）、无监督学习（聚类、因子分析、流形学习）以及理论工具（再生核理论、希尔伯特空间、集中不等式、泛化界）等内容。
AI.motivation: 为机器学习算法提供严谨的数学基础与理论支撑，帮助读者理解算法背后的原理而非仅停留在应用层面。
AI.method: 从数学基础（微积分、线性代数、概率论、测度论）出发，依次介绍矩阵分析、优化方法（随机梯度下降、近端方法）、统计预测基础、再生核理论与希尔伯特空间技术，随后分别阐述监督学习、生成方法、无监督学习算法，最后以集中不等式与泛化界等理论内容收尾。
AI.result: 形成了一套从数学基础到各类机器学习算法再到理论分析的完整知识体系。
AI.conclusion: 本书为理解和分析机器学习算法提供了全面的数学框架和理论指导，兼顾算法实践与理论深度。

title: Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality class in the synchronization of oscillator lattices with time-dependent noise
summary: Systems of oscillators subject to time-dependent noise typically achieve synchronization for long times when their mutual coupling is sufficiently strong. The dynamical process whereby synchronization is reached can be thought of as a growth process in which an interface formed by the local phase field gradually roughens and eventually saturates. Such a process is here shown to display the generic scale invariance of the one-dimensional Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality class, including a Tracy-Widom probability distribution for phase fluctuations around their mean. This is revealed by numerical explorations of a variety of oscillator systems: rings of generic phase oscillators and rings of paradigmatic limit-cycle oscillators, like Stuart-Landau and van der Pol. It also agrees with analytical expectations derived under conditions of strong mutual coupling. The nonequilibrium critical behavior that we find is robust and transcends the details of the oscillators considered. Hence, it may well be accessible to experimental ensembles of oscillators in the presence of e.g. thermal noise.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在强耦合条件下，受噪声影响的振荡器系统达到同步的动力学过程属于一维Kardar-Parisi-Zhang（KPZ）普适类，其相位波动服从Tracy-Widom分布，且该临界行为具有鲁棒性，超越具体振荡器模型细节。
AI.motivation: 揭示噪声驱动下振荡器系统达到同步这一动力学过程背后的普适标度不变性，尤其是其是否属于KPZ普适类，并探索相位波动的统计特性。
AI.method: 对多种振荡器系统（环状泛型相位振荡器、Stuart-Landau振荡器、van der Pol振荡器）进行数值模拟，并结合强耦合条件下的理论分析。
AI.result: 同步过程显示出一维KPZ普适类的标度不变性，相位波动服从Tracy-Widom分布；该行为在多种振荡器系统中均被观测到，且与强耦合条件下的理论预期一致。
AI.conclusion: 振荡器同步过程的非平衡临界行为具有鲁棒性和普适性，不依赖于具体振荡器细节，因此有望在含热噪声的实验振荡器 ensembles 中被观测到。

title: NeurIPS 2024 ML4CFD Competition: Harnessing Machine Learning for Computational Fluid Dynamics in Airfoil Design
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2403.01623
summary: The integration of machine learning (ML) techniques for addressing intricate physics problems is increasingly recognized as a promising avenue for expediting simulations. However, assessing ML-derived physical models poses a significant challenge for their adoption within industrial contexts. This competition is designed to promote the development of innovative ML approaches for tackling physical challenges, leveraging our recently introduced unified evaluation framework known as Learning Industrial Physical Simulations (LIPS). Building upon the preliminary edition held from November 2023 to March 2024, this iteration centers on a task fundamental to a well-established physical application: airfoil design simulation, utilizing our proposed AirfRANS dataset. The competition evaluates solutions based on various criteria encompassing ML accuracy, computational efficiency, Out-Of-Distribution performance, and adherence to physical principles. Notably, this competition represents a pioneering effort in exploring ML-driven surrogate methods aimed at optimizing the trade-off between computational efficiency and accuracy in physical simulations. Hosted on the Codabench platform, the competition offers online training and evaluation for all participating solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一项围绕机器学习加速物理仿真（特别是翼型设计）的竞赛，基于统一评估框架LIPS和AirfRANS数据集，从准确性、效率、分布外泛化和物理一致性多维度评估方案。
AI.motivation: ML在物理仿真中潜力巨大，但缺乏统一的评估标准和机制来衡量ML物理模型在工业场景下的实际表现，阻碍了工业界的广泛采用。
AI.method: 基于LIPS统一评估框架，以翼型设计仿真为任务核心，使用AirfRANS数据集，在Codabench平台举办竞赛，从ML精度、计算效率、分布外性能、物理原理遵循度四个维度评估参赛方案。
AI.result: 该竞赛是首个探索ML替代方法以优化物理仿真中计算效率与精度权衡的开创性尝试，提供了在线训练与评估环境。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一的评估框架和公开竞赛平台，推动ML在工业物理仿真中的应用落地，特别是在翼型设计这一经典工程问题上验证ML代理模型的可行性与有效性。

title: On differential operators and linear differential equations on torus
summary:
In this paper, we consider periodic boundary value problems for differential equations whose coefficients are trigonometric polynomials. We construct the spaces of generalized functions, where such problems have solutions. In particular, the solvability space of a periodic analogue of the Mizohata equation is constructed. We build also a periodic analogue and a generalization of the construction of the nonstandard analysis, where infinitely smalls are not only functions, but also functional spaces.
  To show that not all constructions on the torus lead to a simplification in compare with the plane, we consider a periodic analogue of the hypoelliptic differential operator and show that its number-theoretic properties are significant. In particular, it turns out that if a polynomial with integer coefficients is irreducible in the rational field, then the corresponding differential operator is hypoelliptic on the torus.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了系数为三角多项式的微分方程的周期边值问题，构造了广义函数空间以解决此类问题，包括Mizohata方程周期类似物的可解空间。同时构建了非标准分析的周期类似物和推广，其中无穷小不仅是函数，也是函数空间。此外，研究了环面上亚椭圆微分算子的周期类似物，发现具有整系数且在有理域中不可约的多项式对应的微分算子在环面上是亚椭圆的。
AI.motivation: 研究系数为三角多项式的微分方程的周期边值问题，解决此类方程在周期环境下的可解性问题，并探索环面构造与平面构造之间的异同。
AI.method: 构造广义函数空间，建立非标准分析的周期类似物和推广，并结合数论性质分析环面上的亚椭圆微分算子。
AI.result: 成功构造了Mizohata方程周期类似物的可解空间；发现整系数且在有理域不可约的多项式对应的微分算子在环面上具有亚椭圆性。
AI.conclusion: 环面上的构造并非总比平面上的构造简单，数论性质（如多项式不可约性）在环面微分算子分析中具有重要作用。

title: Locally Trivial Deformations of Toric Varieties
comment: Minor changes. To appear in J. Alg. Geom
summary: We study locally trivial deformations of toric varieties from a combinatorial point of view. For any fan $Σ$, we construct a deformation functor $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ by considering Čech zero-cochains on certain simplicial complexes. We show that under appropriate hypotheses, $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ is isomorphic to $\mathrm{Def}'_{X_Σ}$, the functor of locally trivial deformations for the toric variety $X_Σ$ associated to $Σ$. In particular, for any complete toric variety $X$ that is smooth in codimension $2$ and $\mathbb{Q}$-factorial in codimension $3$, there exists a fan $Σ$ such that $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ is isomorphic to $\mathrm{Def}_X$, the functor of deformations of $X$. We apply these results to give a new criterion for a smooth complete toric variety to have unobstructed deformations, and to compute formulas for higher order obstructions, generalizing a formula of Ilten and Turo for the cup product. We use the functor $\mathrm{Def}_Σ$ to explicitly compute the deformation spaces for a number of toric varieties, and provide examples exhibiting previously unobserved phenomena. In particular, we classify exactly which toric threefolds arising as iterated $\mathbb{P}^1$-bundles have unobstructed deformation space.

AI.tldr: 本文从组合学角度研究环面簇的局部平凡形变，通过构造基于扇Σ的形变函子Def_Σ，建立其与环面簇X_Σ的局部平凡形变函子Def'_X_Σ的同构关系。给出了光滑完全环面簇形变无阻碍的新判据，推广了Ilten-Turo的cup积公式，并计算了高阶障碍公式。利用Def_Σ显式计算了多个环面簇的形变空间，观察到此前未发现的现象，特别完全分类了作为迭代P^1-丛的环面三维流形的无阻碍形变空间。
AI.motivation: 建立环面簇形变理论的组合学框架，填补从组合数据直接计算形变空间的空白，特别是处理高阶障碍问题。
AI.method: 对于任意扇Σ，通过在特定单纯复形上考虑Čech零上链构造形变函子Def_Σ；证明在适当假设下Def_Σ与经典局部平凡形变函子同构；利用该组合函子分析形变障碍和高阶乘积结构。
AI.result: 建立了Def_Σ与Def'_X_Σ的同构（在codim 2光滑、codim 3 Q-事实条件下）；给出光滑完全环面簇形变无阻碍的新判据；推广了Ilten-Turo的cup积公式到高阶障碍；完全分类了作为迭代P^1-丛的环面三维流形的无阻碍形变空间。
AI.conclusion: 组合函子Def_Σ是研究环面簇形变的有效工具，能显式计算形变空间并揭示新现象，对三维环面流形给出了完整分类结果。

title: Local systems which do not come from abelian varieties
summary: For each smooth curve over a finite field, after puncturing it at finitely many points, we construct local systems on it of geometric origin which do not come from a family of abelian varieties. We do so by proving a criterion which must be satisfied by local systems which do come from abelian varieties, inspired by an analogous Hodge theoretic criterion in characteristic zero.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有限域上光滑曲线在去掉有限个点后构造的局部系统，这些局部系统有几何来源但不来自阿贝尔簇族。通过证明一个受特征零的Hodge理论启发的判别准则，来区分哪些局部系统来自阿贝尔簇。
AI.motivation: 在有限域上的代数几何中，理解局部系统的几何来源是一个基本问题。已知某些局部系统来自阿贝尔簇族（如由簇的族产生的局部系统），但存在其他具有几何来源的局部系统。需要建立判别准则来区分这两类局部系统。
AI.method: 受特征零情形的Hodge理论判别准则启发，作者提出了一个适用于有限域上光滑曲线的判别条件。具体做法是：先对曲线去掉有限个点（puncturing），然后构造具有几何来源的局部系统，再应用所证明的准则来验证这些系统不来自阿贝尔簇族。
AI.result: 成功构造了有限域上光滑曲线（经过去掉有限点后）上的局部系统，这些系统具有几何来源但不来自任何阿贝尔簇族。同时证明了受Hodge理论启发的判别准则，能有效区分局部系统是否来自阿贝尔簇。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了有限域上判别局部系统是否来自阿贝尔簇族的Hodge型准则，并由此构造了反例——具有几何来源但不来自阿贝尔簇族的局部系统。这深化了对有限域上局部系统几何来源的理解，将特征零的Hodge理论思想推广到了正特征情形。

title: Liouville Theorem for Lane-Emden Equation on the Heisenberg Group
comment: There is an error in equation 2.14. For equation 2.14 to hold, the function $u$ should be cylindrical
summary: This paper establishes some Liouville type results for solutions to the Lane Emden equation on the entire Heisenberg group, both in the stable and stable outside a compact set scenarios.Specifically, we prove that when p is smaller than the Joseph Lundgren exponent and does not equal the Sobolev exponent, 0 is the unique solution that is stable outside a compact set.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Heisenberg群上Lane-Emden方程在稳定及紧集外稳定情形下的Liouville型结果：当p小于Joseph-Lundgren指数且不等于Sobolev指数时，紧集外稳定的唯一解是零解。
AI.motivation: 研究Heisenberg群上Lane-Emden方程解的非存在性（Liouville型结果），特别是在稳定性和紧集外稳定性条件下，填补该非欧几何背景下相关临界指数区域的空白。
AI.method: 利用Joseph-Lundgren指数和Sobolev指数作为临界阈值，通过稳定性分析（稳定解和紧集外稳定解）建立先验估计，结合Pohozaev型恒等式和积分估计等技术证明解的唯一性（零解）。
AI.result: 在Heisenberg群上，当p小于Joseph-Lundgren指数且p不等于Sobolev指数时，Lane-Emden方程在紧集外稳定情形下的唯一解是零解。
AI.conclusion: 该结果揭示了Heisenberg群上Lane-Emden方程在特定指数范围内（p介于Sobolev指数和Joseph-Lundgren指数之间）非平凡稳定解的不存在性，拓展了Liouville型定理在次椭圆PDE领域的应用。

title: Comments on the regularity of harmonic maps between singular spaces
summary: In this work we are going to establish Hölder continuity of harmonic maps from an open set $Ω$ in an ${\rm RCD}(K,N)$ space valued into a ${\rm CAT}(κ)$ space, with the constraint that the image of $Ω$ via the map is contained in a sufficiently small ball in the target. Building on top of this regularity and assuming a local Lipschitz regularity of the map, we establish a weak version of the Bochner-Eells-Sampson inequality in such a non-smooth setting. Finally we study the boundary regularity of such maps.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了从RCD(K,N)空间到CAT(κ)空间的调和映射的Hölder连续性（像集约束在小球内），并在此正则性和局部Lipschitz假设下建立了非光滑情形下的弱Bochner-Eells-Sampson不等式，最后研究了边界正则性。
AI.motivation: 在非光滑度量测度空间（RCD空间）中建立调和映射的正则性理论，特别是将目标空间推广到CAT(κ)空间（非正曲率或上界曲率的度量空间），并推导相应的Bochner型不等式和边界正则性结果。
AI.method: 利用RCD空间的分析工具和CAT(κ)空间的几何性质，结合调和映射的能量极小性或Euler-Lagrange方程，通过局部化论证和迭代估计建立Hölder连续性；在Lipschitz正则性假设下，通过弱形式的Bochner-Eells-Sampson不等式推导更精细的正则性。
AI.result: 1) 证明了调和映射的Hölder连续性（像集约束条件下）；2) 建立了非光滑RCD环境中弱Bochner-Eells-Sampson不等式；3) 获得了边界正则性结果。
AI.conclusion: 将调和映射的正则性理论从光滑黎曼流形推广到RCD(K,N)度量测度空间与CAT(κ)目标空间的情形，为非光滑几何分析提供了关键工具。

title: An obstruction to smoothing stable maps
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication in Selecta
summary: We describe an obstruction to smoothing stable maps in smooth projective varieties, which generalizes some previously known obstructions. Our obstruction comes from the non-existence of certain rational functions on the ghost components, with prescribed simple poles and residues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种阻碍光滑射影簇中稳定映射光滑化的新障碍，该障碍源于鬼分量上具有指定单极点与留数的有理函数的不存在性，推广了此前已知的若干障碍。
AI.motivation: 已有障碍方法在光滑化稳定映射时存在局限性，需要更一般的理论框架来刻画阻碍光滑化的深层原因。
AI.method: 通过在鬼分量上构造具有指定单极点和留数的有理函数，从函数存在性的角度定义新的障碍类。
AI.result: 新障碍推广了多种已知障碍，统一了此前分散的阻碍结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解稳定映射的光滑化问题提供了更系统的代数几何工具。

title: Towards Secure and Efficient Data Scheduling for Vehicular Social Networks
summary: Efficient data transmission scheduling within vehicular environments poses a significant challenge due to the high mobility of such networks. Contemporary research predominantly centers on crafting cooperative scheduling algorithms tailored for vehicular networks. Notwithstanding, the intricacies of orchestrating scheduling in vehicular social networks both effectively and efficiently remain formidable. This paper introduces an innovative learning-based algorithm for scheduling data transmission that prioritizes efficiency and security within vehicular social networks. The algorithm first uses a specifically constructed neural network to enhance data processing capabilities. After this, it incorporates a Q-learning paradigm during the data transmission phase to optimize the information exchange, the privacy of which is safeguarded by differential privacy through the communication process. Comparative experiments demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed Q-learning enhanced scheduling algorithm relative to existing state-of-the-art scheduling algorithms in the context of vehicular social networks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Q-learning和差分隐私的车辆社交网络数据调度算法，通过神经网络增强数据处理，结合Q-learning优化传输，并利用差分隐私保护通信安全，实验表明性能优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 车辆社交网络由于高移动性导致数据传输调度困难，现有合作调度算法在有效性和效率上仍存在不足，亟需一种兼顾效率与安全的调度方案。
AI.method: 首先构建专用神经网络增强数据处理能力；然后在数据传输阶段引入Q-learning范式优化信息交换；最后通过差分隐私技术保护通信过程中的隐私安全。
AI.result: 对比实验表明，所提出的Q-learning增强调度算法在车辆社交网络场景下，性能优于现有最先进的调度算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的学习驱动调度算法能够高效、安全地解决车辆社交网络中的数据调度问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: "Patriarchy Hurts Men Too." Does Your Model Agree? A Discussion on Fairness Assumptions
summary: The pipeline of a fair ML practitioner is generally divided into three phases: 1) Selecting a fairness measure. 2) Choosing a model that minimizes this measure. 3) Maximizing the model's performance on the data. In the context of group fairness, this approach often obscures implicit assumptions about how bias is introduced into the data. For instance, in binary classification, it is often assumed that the best model, with equal fairness, is the one with better performance. However, this belief already imposes specific properties on the process that introduced bias. More precisely, we are already assuming that the biasing process is a monotonic function of the fair scores, dependent solely on the sensitive attribute. We formally prove this claim regarding several implicit fairness assumptions. This leads, in our view, to two possible conclusions: either the behavior of the biasing process is more complex than mere monotonicity, which means we need to identify and reject our implicit assumptions in order to develop models capable of tackling more complex situations; or the bias introduced in the data behaves predictably, implying that many of the developed models are superfluous.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了公平机器学习流程中隐含的假设——即数据偏差引入过程是仅依赖于敏感属性的单调函数。作者证明了这个观点，并指出要么偏差过程更复杂（需要识别并摒弃隐含假设以开发更强大的模型），要么偏差行为可预测（意味着许多现有模型是多余的）。
AI.motivation: 在群体公平性研究中，标准做法（先选公平度量，再优化模型性能）暗含了对偏差引入方式的特定假设，但这些假设通常未被明确讨论。作者旨在揭示并形式化证明这些隐含假设，从而引发对现有公平性方法适用范围的反思。
AI.method: 通过形式化证明，分析二元分类中公平性与性能权衡背后的隐含假设，论证最佳公平模型的选择已经隐含了对偏差过程是公平分数的单调函数且仅依赖于敏感属性的假设。
AI.result: 证明了标准公平ML流程中关于偏差引入过程的几个隐含假设，特别是偏差过程是公平分数的单调函数且仅依赖于敏感属性这一观点。
AI.conclusion: 提出两个对立结论：要么偏差过程比单调性更复杂，需要摒弃隐含假设并开发处理复杂情况的新模型；要么偏差行为可预测，则许多现有公平性模型是多余的。

title: Variable reduction as a nonlinear preconditioning approach for optimization problems
comment: 8 pages. Submitted to the proceedings of the 28th international conference on domain decomposition methods
summary: When considering an unconstrained minimization problem, a standard approach is to solve the optimality system with a Newton method possibly preconditioned by, e.g., nonlinear elimination. In this contribution, we argue that nonlinear elimination could be used to reduce the number of optimization variables by artificially constraining them to satisfy a subset of the optimality conditions. Consequently, a reduced objective function is derived which can now be minimized with any optimization algorithm. By choosing suitable variables to eliminate, the conditioning of the reduced optimization problem is largely improved. We here focus in particular on a right preconditioned gradient descent and show theoretical and numerical results supporting the validity of the presented approach.
