AI.tldr: 本文提出将非线性消除技术用于无约束优化问题，通过人工约束部分变量满足最优性条件来减少优化变量，从而得到简化的目标函数，并重点研究了右预条件梯度下降法的理论与数值表现。
AI.motivation: 标准牛顿法求解无约束最小化问题的最优性系统时，可能需要非线性消除等预条件技术。本文的动机是探索非线性消除能否用于减少优化变量数量，改善优化问题的条件数，从而提升求解效率。
AI.method: 通过人为约束部分变量使其满足最优性条件的子集，从而消除这些变量，导出简化的目标函数；然后可应用任意优化算法（本文重点研究右预条件梯度下降法）对该简化问题进行求解。
AI.result: 理论和数值结果均表明，选择合适的变量进行消除能够显著改善简化优化问题的条件数，并支持所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非线性消除不仅可作为预条件器，还可用于减少优化变量、改善问题条件数，且与右预条件梯度下降法结合效果良好，具有理论价值和实际应用前景。

title: Unexpected fault activation due to underground gas storage in produced reservoirs. Part II: Definition of safe operational bandwidths
summary: Underground gas storage is a versatile tool for managing energy resources and addressing pressing environmental concerns. While natural gas is stored in geological formations since the early 20th century, hydrogen has recently been considered as a potential candidate toward a more flexible and sustainable energy infrastructure. Furthermore, these formations can additionally capture gases that contribute to climate change, such as CO2. When such operations are implemented in faulted basins, however, safety concerns may arise due to the potential reactivation of pre-existing faults, which could trigger (micro)-seismicity events. In the Netherlands, it has been recently noted that fault reactivation can occur "unexpectedly" during the life of an underground gas storage (UGS) site, even when stress conditions are not expected to cause a failure. The present two-part work aims to develop a modeling framework to investigate the physical mechanisms causing such occurrences in previously produced gas reservoirs and define a safe operational bandwidth for pore pressure variation for UGS operations in the faulted reservoirs of the Upper Rotliegend Group, the Netherlands. This paper investigates in detail the mechanisms and crucial factors that result in fault reactivation at various stages of a UGS. The mathematical and numerical model described in Part I is used, also considering how the presence of stored gases may influence the mechanical properties of the reservoir and caprock, in particular the Young modulus. The study investigates the hazard of fault activation caused by the storage of different fluids for various purposes, such as long-term CO2 sequestration, CH4 and H2 injection and extraction cycles, and N2 injection as cushion gas. The results show how geological configuration, geomechanical properties, and reservoir operating conditions may increase the hazard of fault reactivation.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个建模框架，研究荷兰上罗特利根德群断层储层中地下储气库（UGS）在不同运营阶段（包括CO2封存、CH4和H2注采循环及N2垫层气注入）中断层活化的物理机制与关键因素，并定义了安全的孔隙压力变化范围。
AI.motivation: 荷兰UGS站点近期发现，即使应力条件预计不会导致破坏，断层活化仍可能"意外"发生。作者希望探究这种意外活化背后的物理机制，并确定安全运营参数范围。
AI.method: 使用Part I中建立的数学和数值模型，考虑储存气体对储层和盖层力学性质（尤其是杨氏模量）的影响，模拟不同流体（CO2、CH4、H2、N2）在不同运营场景下的断层活化风险。
AI.result: 地质构型、地质力学特性和储层运营条件均可能增加断层活化风险；不同储存流体和运营模式（长期封存vs.循环注采）对断层稳定性的影响存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 地下储气库运营中断层活化风险受多重因素耦合控制，需综合考虑地质、力学和运营条件来定义安全运营窗口，以保障断层储层中UGS的安全性。

title: Semi-implicit hybrid finite volume/finite element method for the GPR model of continuum mechanics
summary: We present a new hybrid semi-implicit finite volume / finite element numerical scheme for the solution of incompressible and weakly compressible media. From the continuum mechanics model proposed by Godunov, Peshkov and Romenski (GPR), we derive the incompressible GPR formulation as well as a weakly compressible GPR system. As for the original GPR model, the new formulations are able to describe different media, from elastoplastic solids to viscous fluids, depending on the values set for the model's relaxation parameters. Then, we propose a new numerical method for the solution of both models based on the splitting of the original systems into three subsystems: one containing the convective part and non-conservative products, a second subsystem for the source terms of the distortion tensor and heat flux equations and, finally, a pressure subsystem. In the first stage of the algorithm, the transport subsystem is solved by employing an explicit finite volume method, while the source terms are solved implicitly. Next, the pressure subsystem is implicitly discretised using finite elements. Within this methodology, unstructured grids are employed, with the pressure defined in the primal grid and the rest of the variables computed in the dual grid. To evaluate the performance of the proposed scheme, a numerical convergence analysis is carried out, which confirms the second order of accuracy in space. A wide range of benchmarks is reproduced for the incompressible and weakly compressible cases, considering both solid and fluid media. These results demonstrate the good behaviour and robustness of the proposed scheme in a variety of scenarios and conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Godunov-Peshkov-Romenski（GPR）连续介质力学模型，推导了不可压和弱可压两种新公式，并提出了基于算子分裂的混合半隐式有限体积/有限元数值方案。该方案将系统分裂为对流、源项和压力三个子系统，分别采用显式有限体积、隐式和有限元方法求解，在非结构网格上实现了空间二阶精度，并通过广泛算例验证了其在固体和流体介质中的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有GPR模型能统一描述从弹塑性固体到粘性流体的多种介质，但其数值求解方法在处理不可压和弱可压情形时仍面临挑战，需要发展高效、鲁棒的数值格式以拓展其应用范围。
AI.method: 1）从原始GPR模型出发，推导不可压GPR公式和弱可压GPR系统；2）采用算子分裂策略将系统分为三个子系统：对流子系统（含非守恒积）、源项子系统（畸变张量和热通量方程源项）和压力子系统；3）对流子系统用显式有限体积法求解，源项隐式处理，压力子系统用有限元隐式离散；4）采用非结构网格，压力定义在原始网格，其余变量定义在对偶网格。
AI.result: 数值收敛性分析确认了该方法在空间上具有二阶精度。在不可压和弱可压两种情形下，对固体和流体介质的大量基准算例均取得了良好结果，验证了方案的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合半隐式有限体积/有限元方案能有效求解不可压和弱可压GPR模型，在多种介质和工况下表现出良好的精度和鲁棒性，为统一描述固体和流体力学问题提供了可靠的数值工具。

title: Boundary null controllability of the heat equation with Wentzell boundary condition and Dirichlet control
summary: We consider the linear heat equation with a Wentzell-type boundary condition and a Dirichlet control. Such a boundary condition can be reformulated as one of dynamic type. First, we formulate the boundary controllability problem of the system within the framework of boundary control systems, proving its well-posedness. Then we reduce the question to a moment problem. Using the spectral analysis of the associated Sturm-Liouville problem and the moment method, we establish the null controllability of the system at any positive time $T$. Finally, we approximate minimum energy controls by a penalized HUM approach. This allows us to validate the theoretical controllability results obtained by the moment method.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带有Wentzell型边界条件和Dirichlet控制的线性热方程，将其转化为动态边界条件问题。在边界控制系统框架下证明了适定性，通过谱分析和矩方法建立了任意正时刻的零能控性，并利用惩罚HUM方法近似最小能量控制以验证理论结果。
AI.motivation: 研究带有Wentzell型边界条件（可转化为动态边界条件）的线性热方程的边界可控性问题，这类边界条件在数学物理中具有重要应用。
AI.method: 采用边界控制系统框架证明适定性；将可控性问题化为矩问题；利用Sturm-Liouville问题的谱分析和矩方法建立零能控性；采用惩罚HUM（Hilbert Uniqueness Method）方法近似最小能量控制。
AI.result: 证明了系统在任意正时间T下的零能控性，并通过数值方法验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 带有Wentzell型边界条件的线性热方程在任意正时刻均可实现零能控性，惩罚HUM方法能有效近似最小能量控制。

title: GSpect: Spectral Filtering for Cross-Scale Graph Classification
summary: Identifying structures in common forms the basis for networked systems design and optimization. However, real structures represented by graphs are often of varying sizes, leading to the low accuracy of traditional graph classification methods. These graphs are called cross-scale graphs. To overcome this limitation, in this study, we propose GSpect, an advanced spectral graph filtering model for cross-scale graph classification tasks. Compared with other methods, we use graph wavelet neural networks for the convolution layer of the model, which aggregates multi-scale messages to generate graph representations. We design a spectral-pooling layer which aggregates nodes to one node to reduce the cross-scale graphs to the same size. We collect and construct the cross-scale benchmark data set, MSG (Multi Scale Graphs). Experiments reveal that, on open data sets, GSpect improves the performance of classification accuracy by 1.62% on average, and for a maximum of 3.33% on PROTEINS. On MSG, GSpect improves the performance of classification accuracy by 15.55% on average. GSpect fills the gap in cross-scale graph classification studies and has potential to provide assistance in application research like diagnosis of brain disease by predicting the brain network's label and developing new drugs with molecular structures learned from their counterparts in other systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSpect，一种基于谱图滤波的跨尺度图分类模型，利用图小波神经网络聚合多尺度信息，并设计谱池化层将不同规模的图统一为相同尺寸，在公开数据集和自建跨尺度数据集MSG上分别提升分类准确率1.62%和15.55%。
AI.motivation: 真实世界中的图结构往往具有不同的规模（跨尺度图），传统图分类方法在处理这类变尺寸图时准确率较低，亟需一种能有效处理跨尺度图分类任务的方法。
AI.method: 提出GSpect模型：1）使用图小波神经网络作为卷积层，聚合多尺度消息以生成图表示；2）设计谱池化层，将节点聚合为单个节点，从而将跨尺度图统一为相同尺寸；3）构建跨尺度基准数据集MSG（Multi Scale Graphs）。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，GSpect的分类准确率平均提升1.62%，在PROTEINS数据集上最高提升3.33%；在自建MSG数据集上，分类准确率平均提升15.55%。
AI.conclusion: GSpect填补了跨尺度图分类研究的空白，在脑疾病诊断（预测脑网络标签）和基于分子结构的新药研发等应用领域具有潜在帮助。

title: Sharper Exponential Convergence Rates for Sinkhorn's Algorithm in Continuous Settings
summary: We study the convergence rate of Sinkhorn's algorithm for solving entropy-regularized optimal transport problems when at least one of the probability measures, $μ$, admits a density over $\mathbb{R}^d$. For a semi-concave cost function bounded by $c_{\infty}$ and a regularization parameter $λ> 0$, we obtain exponential convergence guarantees on the dual sub-optimality gap with contraction rate polynomial in $λ/c_{\infty}$. This represents an exponential improvement over the known contraction rate $1 - Θ(\exp(-c_{\infty}/λ))$ achievable via Hilbert's projective metric. Specifically, we prove a contraction rate value of $1-Θ(λ^2/c_\infty^2)$ when $μ$ has a bounded log-density. In some cases, such as when $μ$ is log-concave and the cost function is $c(x,y)=-\langle x, y \rangle$, this rate improves to $1-Θ(λ/c_\infty)$. The latter rate matches the one that we derive for the transport between isotropic Gaussian measures, indicating tightness in the dependency in $λ/c_\infty$. Our results are fully non-asymptotic and explicit in all the parameters of the problem.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了熵正则化最优传输问题中Sinkhorn算法的收敛速率。当至少一个概率测度μ在ℝᵈ上具有密度时，对于半凹且有界成本函数c_∞和正则化参数λ>0，本文证明了偶对偶次优间隙的指数收敛保证，其收缩率是λ/c_∞的多项式形式。这比通过Hilbert投影度量已知的1-Θ(exp(-c_∞/λ))收缩率实现了指数级改进。特别地，当μ具有有界对数密度时，证明了收缩率为1-Θ(λ²/c_∞²)。在某些情形下（如μ为对数凹且成本函数c(x,y)=-⟨x,y⟩），该速率可提升至1-Θ(λ/c_∞)，与各向同性高斯测度间传输的速率相匹配，表明λ/c_∞依赖性的紧致性。结果完全是非渐近的且所有参数显式给出。
AI.motivation: Sinkhorn算法是求解熵正则化最优传输问题的标准方法，但已有的收敛率分析（基于Hilbert投影度量）在正则化参数λ较小时收缩缓慢（收缩率接近1）。本文旨在证明在至少一个测度具有密度时，Sinkhorn算法可以实现更快的多项式收缩率（相对于λ/c_∞），从而弥补理论与实践之间的差距。
AI.method: 利用半凹成本函数和有界对数密度等条件，通过分析偶对偶问题的几何性质，推导出比Hilbert投影度量更紧的收缩率上界。具体地，作者证明了在不同假设下分别达到1-Θ(λ²/c_∞²)和1-Θ(λ/c_∞)的收缩率，并给出了紧致性分析（高斯情况）。
AI.result: 1) 当μ具有有界对数密度时，收缩率为1-Θ(λ²/c_∞²)，较已知的1-Θ(exp(-c_∞/λ))有指数级改进；2) 当μ对数凹且成本为内积时，收缩率进一步提升至1-Θ(λ/c_∞)；3) 高斯情形下得到相同速率，证明该依赖关系是紧的；4) 所有结果均为非渐近、显式的。
AI.conclusion: Sinkhorn算法在至少一个测度具有密度时，收敛速率可以从指数级慢（基于Hilbert度量）提升到多项式级快（相对于λ/c_∞），且速率在特定条件下是最优的。这为实际应用中Sinkhorn算法的高效性提供了理论依据。

title: On the risk levels of distributionally robust chance constrained problems
summary:
In this paper, we discuss the utilization of perturbed risk levels (PRLs) for the solution of chance-constrained problems via sampling-based approaches. PRLs allow the consideration of distributional ambiguity by rescaling the risk level of the nominal chance constraint. Explicit expressions of the PRL exist for some discrepancy-based ambiguity sets.
  We propose a discrepancy functional not included in previous comparisons of different PRLs based on the likelihood ratio, which we term ,,relative variation distance" (RVD). If the ambiguity set can be described by the RVD, the rescaling of the risk level with the PRL is in contrast to other discrepancy functionals possible even for very low risk levels. We derive distributionally robust one- and two-level guarantees for the solution of chance-constrained problems with randomized methods. We demonstrate the viability of the derived guarantees for a randomized MPC under distributional ambiguity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相对变化距离（RVD）的扰动风险水平（PRL）方法，用于解决采样-Based机会约束问题中的分布模糊性，即使在极低风险水平下也能实现风险水平的重新缩放，并提供了分布鲁棒的单层和双层保证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于PRL的方法在处理机会约束问题的分布模糊性时，依赖于特定的差异度量（discrepancy functional）定义的模糊集。不同差异度量在低风险水平下对风险水平的重新缩放能力存在差异，需要一种在新的差异度量下仍能有效工作的PRL方法。
AI.method: 提出一种名为"相对变化距离"（RVD）的新差异泛函，基于似然比定义。当模糊集由RVD描述时，推导了PRL的显式表达式，并给出了分布鲁棒的单层和双层概率保证。
AI.result: RVD允许在极低风险水平下实现风险水平的重新缩放，而其他差异泛函在此情况下不可行。通过随机模型预测控制（MPC）的数值实验验证了所提出保证的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RVD作为一种新的差异度量，扩展了PRL在分布模糊机会约束问题中的适用范围，尤其在低风险水平下具有显著优势，随机MPC应用验证了其实际可行性。

title: Reemergence of Trampolining in a Leidenfrost Droplet
summary: The levitating Leidenfrost (LF) state of a droplet on a heated substrate is often accompanied by fascinating behaviors such as star-shaped deformations, self-propulsion, bouncing, and trampolining. These behaviors arise due to the vapor flow instabilities at the liquid-vapor interface beneath the droplet at sizes typically comparable to the capillary length scale of the liquid. Here, we report on the spontaneous bouncing, trampolining, and hovering behavior of an unconstrained LF water droplet. We observe that a droplet exhibits intermittent increase in bouncing height at specific radii and subsequent reduction in the height of bounce leading to a quiescent LF state. The reemergence of the trampolining behavior from the quiescent hovering state without any external forcing is observed at sizes as low as 0.1 times the capillary length. We attribute the droplet bouncing behavior to the dynamics of vapor flow beneath the LF droplet. We propose that the trampolining behavior of the droplet at specific radii is triggered by subharmonic and harmonic excitation of the liquid-vapor interface. We attribute the intermittent trampolining events to the change in the natural frequency of the droplet and the vapor layer due to evaporative mass loss. This proposed mechanism of resonance-driven trampolining of LF droplets is observed to be applicable for different liquids irrespective of the initial volume and substrate temperatures, thus indicating a universality of the behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了莱顿弗罗斯特液滴在加热基底上的自发弹跳、蹦床和悬浮行为，发现液滴在特定半径下会间歇性增加弹跳高度，随后降低至静止悬浮状态，且该现象在低至毛细长度0.1倍的尺寸下仍可观察到。研究将弹跳行为归因于液滴下方蒸汽流动动力学，提出蹦床行为由液-汽界面的次谐波和谐波激发触发，而间歇性弹跳事件则与蒸发质量损失导致的液滴和蒸汽层固有频率变化有关。该共振驱动机制对不同液体、不同初始体积和基底温度均适用，表明其具有普遍性。
AI.motivation: 揭示莱顿弗罗斯特液滴在没有外部约束时自发弹跳、蹦床和悬浮行为的物理机制，并探索这些行为在不同液体和条件下的普适性。
AI.method: 实验观察莱顿弗罗斯特水滴在加热基底上的自发弹跳行为，测量不同半径下的弹跳高度变化，分析液滴下方蒸汽流动动力学，并通过理论分析提出液-汽界面的次谐波和谐波激发是蹦床行为的触发机制。
AI.result: 液滴在特定半径下会间歇性增加弹跳高度，随后降低至静止悬浮状态；在低至毛细长度0.1倍的尺寸下仍可观察到蹦床行为；该行为归因于蒸汽流动动力学和液-汽界面的次谐波/谐波激发；间歇性弹跳由液滴和蒸汽层固有频率变化引起；该机制对不同液体、初始体积和基底温度均适用。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种共振驱动的莱顿弗罗斯特液滴蹦床机制，该机制具有普适性，适用于不同液体和实验条件。

title: Investigation of cloud cavitating flow in a venturi using Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR)
summary: Unsteady cloud cavitating flow is detrimental to the efficiency of hydraulic machinery like pumps and propellers due to the resulting side-effects of vibration, noise and erosion damage. Modelling such a unsteady and highly turbulent flow remains a challenging issue. In this paper, cloud cavitating flow in a venturi is calculated using the Detached Eddy Simulation (DES) model combined with the Merkle model. The Adaptive Mesh Refinement (AMR) method is employed to speed up the calculation and investigate the mechanisms for vortex development in the venturi. The results indicate the velocity gradients and the generalized fluid element strongly influence the formation of vortices throughout a cavitation cycle. In addition, the cavitation-turbulence coupling is investigated on the local scale by comparing with high-fidelity experimental data and using profile stations. While the AMR calculation is able to predict well the time-averaged velocities and turbulence-related aspects near the throat, it displays discrepancies further downstream owing to a coarser grid refinement downstream and under-performs compared to a traditional grid simulation . Additionally, the AMR calculations is unable to reproduce the cavity width as observed in the experiments. Therefore, while AMR promises to speed the process significantly by refining grid only in regions of interest, it is comparatively in line with a traditional calculation for cavitating flows. Thus, this study intends to provide a reference to employing AMR as a tool to speed up calculations and be able to simulate turbulence-cavitation interactions accurately.

AI.tldr: 本文采用分离涡模拟(DES)结合Merkle模型计算文丘里管中的云状空化流动，并应用自适应网格细化(AMR)方法加速计算。结果表明AMR能较好预测喉部附近时均速度和湍流特性，但在下游区域因网格较粗而表现不佳，且无法复现实验观测的空穴宽度。AMR虽能通过局部细化加速计算，但在空化流动中与传统网格计算性能相当。
AI.motivation: 非稳态云状空化流会导致水力机械（如泵和螺旋桨）产生振动、噪声和侵蚀损伤，但这类非稳态高湍流流动的建模仍然具有挑战性。本文旨在探究AMR方法在加速空化湍流计算中的适用性。
AI.method: 采用分离涡模拟(DES)结合Merkle空化模型，并应用自适应网格细化(AMR)方法加速计算。通过速度梯度和广义流体元分析涡旋形成机制，并在局部尺度上通过高保真实验数据和剖面站点对比研究空化-湍流耦合。
AI.result: AMR计算能较好预测喉部附近的时均速度和湍流相关特性，但在下游区域因网格细化不足导致与实验数据存在差异，且无法复现实验观察到的空穴宽度。AMR整体性能与传统网格计算相当。
AI.conclusion: AMR方法虽能通过仅在感兴趣区域细化网格来显著加速计算过程，但在空化流动中其精度与传统计算方法相当。本研究为将AMR作为加速计算工具并准确模拟湍流-空化相互作用提供了参考。

title: Uncertainty Quantification in Reduced-Order Gas-Phase Atmospheric Chemistry Modeling using Ensemble SINDy
summary: Uncertainty quantification during atmospheric chemistry modeling is computationally expensive as it typically requires a large number of simulations using complex models. As large-scale modeling is typically performed with simplified chemical mechanisms for computational tractability, we describe a probabilistic surrogate modeling method using principal components analysis (PCA) and Ensemble Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (E-SINDy) to both automatically simplify a gas-phase chemistry mechanism and to quantify the uncertainty introduced when doing so. We demonstrate the application of this method on a small photochemical box model for ozone formation. With 100 ensemble members, the calibration $R$-squared value is 0.96 among the three latent species on average and 0.98 for ozone, demonstrating that predicted model uncertainty aligns well with actual model error. In addition to uncertainty quantification, this probabilistic method also improves accuracy as compared to an equivalent deterministic version, by $\sim$60% for the ensemble prediction mean or $\sim$50% for deterministic prediction by the best-performing single ensemble member. Overall, the ozone testing root mean square error (RMSE) is 15.1% of its root mean square (RMS) concentration. Although our probabilistic ensemble simulation ends up being slower than the reference model it emulates, we expect that use of a more complex reference model in future work will result in additional opportunities for acceleration. Versions of this approach applied to full-scale chemical mechanisms may result in improved uncertainty quantification in models of atmospheric composition, leading to enhanced atmospheric understanding and improved support for air quality control and regulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PCA和集成稀疏非线性动力学（E-SINDy）的概率代理建模方法，用于自动简化气相化学机制并量化简化引入的不确定性。在小型光化学箱模型上的实验表明，该方法在不确定性量化方面表现良好（臭氧R²=0.98），同时相比确定性版本预测精度提升约50-60%，臭氧测试RMSE为其均方根浓度的15.1%。
AI.motivation: 大气化学建模中的不确定性量化计算成本高昂，通常需要大量复杂模型仿真。而大规模建模为追求计算可行性常采用简化化学机制，但简化过程会引入不确定性，目前缺乏有效的方法来量化这种不确定性。
AI.method: 采用主成分分析（PCA）进行维度约简，结合集成稀疏非线性动力学（E-SINDy）构建概率代理模型。通过100个集成成员模拟化学机制的简化过程，同时量化简化带来的不确定性。
AI.result: 校准R²值在三种潜在物种上平均为0.96，臭氧为0.98；集成预测均值比确定性版本精度提升约60%，最优单成员确定性预测提升约50%；臭氧测试RMSE为其RMS浓度的15.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该概率方法不仅能有效量化不确定性，还能提升预测精度。虽然当前代理模型比参考模型慢，但未来应用于更复杂参考模型时有望实现加速。该方法有望改进大气成分模型中的不确定性量化，从而增强对大气过程的理解并支持空气质量管控。

title: Thermal Stoner-Wohlfarth Model for Magnetodynamics of Single Domain Nanoparticles: Implementation and Validation
summary: We present the thermal Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW) model and apply it in the context of Molecular Dynamics simulations. The model is validated against an ensemble of immobilized, randomly oriented uniaxial particles (solid superparamagnet) and a classical dilute ferrofluid for different combinations of anisotropy strength and magnetic field/moment coupling, at a fixed temperature. We compare analytical and simulation results to quantify the viability of the tSW model in reproducing the equilibrium (with and without dipole-dipole interactions) and dynamic (without dipole-dipole interactions) properties of magnetic soft matter systems. We show that if the anisotropy of a particle is more than five times higher than the thermal fluctuations, tSW is applicable and efficient. This approach allows one to consider the interplay between Néel and Brownian relaxation, often neglected in the fixed point-dipole representation-based magnetic soft matter theoretical investigations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出热Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW)模型并将其应用于分子动力学模拟，通过与固休超顺磁体和稀磁流体的解析结果对比进行验证。研究表明当粒子各向异性大于热涨落五倍时，tSW模型适用且高效，能够同时考虑Néel和Brownian弛豫机制的相互作用。
AI.motivation: 现有磁软物质理论研究多采用固定点-偶极子表示，往往忽略了Néel弛豫与Brownian弛豫之间的相互作用。研究者希望提出一种能够同时考虑两种弛豫机制、且计算高效的模型，以更准确地描述磁性软物质的平衡态和动态性质。
AI.method: 提出热Stoner-Wohlfarth (tSW)模型，将其嵌入分子动力学模拟框架。通过与两类体系（固态超顺磁体和稀释铁磁流体）的解析结果进行对比验证，考察不同各向异性强度和磁场/磁矩耦合组合下的模型表现，包括平衡态（有/无偶极-偶极相互作用）和动态性质（无偶极-偶极相互作用）。
AI.result: 当粒子的各向异性强度超过热涨落五倍以上时，tSW模型适用且计算高效。该模型能够准确描述有/无偶极相互作用下的平衡态性质以及无偶极相互作用下的动态性质。
AI.conclusion: tSW模型为磁软物质的模拟研究提供了一种有效方法，能够同时考虑Néel和Brownian弛豫机制的相互影响，弥补了传统固定点-偶极子表示方法的不足，适用于各向异性较强的磁性粒子系统。

title: FEAST nonlinear eigenvalue algorithm for $GW$ quasiparticle equations
summary: The use of Green's function in quantum many-body theory often leads to nonlinear eigenvalue problems, as Green's function needs to be defined in energy domain. The $GW$ approximation method is one of the typical examples. In this article, we introduce a method based on the FEAST eigenvalue algorithm for accurately solving the nonlinear eigenvalue $G_0W_0$ quasiparticle equation, eliminating the need for the Kohn-Sham wavefunction approximation. Based on the contour integral method for nonlinear eigenvalue problem, the energy (eigenvalue) domain is extended to complex plane. Hypercomplex number is introduced to the contour deformation calculation of $GW$ self-energy to carry imaginary parts of both Green's functions and FEAST quadrature nodes. Calculation results for various molecules are presented and compared with a more conventional graphical solution approximation method. It is confirmed that the Highest Occupied Molecular Orbital (HOMO) from the Kohn-Sham equation is very close to that of $GW$, while the Least Unoccupied Molecular Orbital (LUMO) shows noticeable differences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FEAST特征值算法的G₀W₀准粒子方程精确求解方法，通过将能量域扩展到复平面并使用超复数进行轮廓变形计算，避免了Kohn-Sham波函数近似，发现KS方程的HOMO与GW结果接近，但LUMO存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 在量子多体理论中，Green函数方法（如GW近似）导致非线性特征值问题，传统求解需要依赖于Kohn-Sham波函数近似，精度受限。本文旨在发展一种无需该近似的精确求解方法。
AI.method: 基于FEAST特征值算法的轮廓积分方法，将能量（特征值）域扩展到复平面；引入超复数（hypercomplex number）进行GW自能的轮廓变形计算，同时处理Green函数和FEAST求积节点的虚部。
AI.result: 多种分子的计算结果与传统图解近似方法进行了对比。确认KS方程的HOMO与GW结果非常接近，但LUMO存在明显差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的FEAST方法能够精确求解G₀W₀准粒子方程而不依赖KS波函数近似，且揭示了KS与GW在LUMO能级上的显著差异。

title: Entanglement Transition due to particle losses in a monitored fermionic chain
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures; Some updates on the text and figures
summary: Recently, there has been interest in the dynamics of monitored quantum systems using linear jump operators related to the creation or annihilation of particles. Here, we study the dynamics of the entanglement entropy under quantum jumps that induce local particle losses in a model of free fermions with hopping and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ pairing. We solve the non-unitary dynamics using the recently developed Faber Polynomial method and explore the different steady-state entanglement regimes by tuning the pairing strength, thus interpolating between monitored free fermions coherently driven by a particle number conserving Hamiltonian to a parity conserving one. In the absence of pairing, all quantum trajectories approach the vacuum at long times, with the entanglement entropy showing non-monotonic behavior over time that we capture with a phenomenological quasiparticle \emph{ansatz}. In this regime, quantum jumps play a key role, and we highlight this by exactly computing their waiting-time distribution. On the other hand, the interplay between losses and pairing gives rise to quantum trajectories with entangled steady-states. We show that by tuning the system parameters, a measurement-induced entanglement transition occurs where the entanglement entropy scaling changes from logarithmic to area-law. We compare this transition with the one derived in the no-click limit and observe qualitative agreement in most of the phase diagram. Furthermore, the statistics of entanglement gain and loss are analyzed to better understand the impact of the linear jump operators.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在含Z₂配对的自由费米子模型中，局部粒子损失量子跳跃下的纠缠熵动力学，利用Faber多项式方法求解非幺正动力学，发现了测量诱导的纠缠相变，并分析了纠缠增益与损失的统计特性。
AI.motivation: 理解量子跳跃（特别是线性跳跃算符对应的局部粒子损失）对受监测量子系统纠缠熵动力学的影响，以及配对强度如何调节稳态纠缠行为，探索从粒子数守恒到宇称守恒的过渡。
AI.method: 采用近期发展的Faber多项式方法求解非幺正动力学；通过调节配对强度在粒子数守恒哈密顿量和宇称守恒哈密顿量之间插值；精确计算了量子跳跃的等待时间分布；分析了纠缠增益与损失的统计特性。
AI.result: 无配对时，所有量子轨迹长时间趋近真空，纠缠熵呈现非单调行为（可用准粒子ansatz描述）；存在配对时，纠缠稳态出现；通过调节系统参数可观察到测量诱导的纠缠相变，纠缠熵标度从对数律变为面积律；该相变与无点击极限下的相变在大部分相图中定性一致。
AI.conclusion: 局部粒子损失的量子跳跃与配对相互作用共同导致测量诱导的纠缠相变，且该相变与无点击极限下的相变具有定性一致性，揭示了线性跳跃算符在受监测量子系统动力学中的关键作用。

title: Highly complex novel critical behavior from the intrinsic randomness of quantum mechanical measurements on critical ground states -- a controlled renormalization group analysis
summary: We consider the effects of weak measurements on the quantum critical ground state of the one-dimensional (a) tricritical and (b) critical quantum Ising model, by measuring in (a) the local energy and in (b) the local spin operator in a lattice formulation. By employing a controlled renormalization group (RG) analysis we find that each problem exhibits highly complex novel scaling behavior, arising from the intrinsically indeterministic ('random') nature of quantum mechanical measurements, which is governed by a measurement-dominated RG fixed point that we study within an $ε$ expansion. In the tricritical Ising case (a) we find (i): multifractal scaling behavior of energy and spin correlations in the measured groundstate, corresponding to an infinite hierarchy of independent critical exponents and, equivalently, to a continuum of universal scaling exponents for each of these correlations; (ii): the presence of logarithmic factors multiplying powerlaws in correlation functions, a hallmark of 'logarithmic conformal field theories' (CFT); (iii): universal 'effective central charges' $c^{({\rm eff})}_n$ for the prefactors of the logarithm of subsystem size of the $n$th Rényi entropies, which are independent of each other for different $n$, in contrast to the unmeasured critical ground state, and (iv): a universal ("Affleck-Ludwig") 'effective boundary entropy' $S_{\rm{eff}}$ which we show, quite generally, to be related to the system-size independent part of the Shannon entropy of the measurement record, computed explicitly here to 1-loop order. - A subset of these results have so-far also been obtained within the $ε$ expansion for the measurement-dominated critical point in the critical Ising case (b).

AI.tldr: 本文通过重整化群分析，研究了弱测量对一维三临界和临界量子伊辛模型基态的影响，发现测量主导的RG不动点导致多分形标度、对数CFT特征、有效中心荷独立于n以及有效边界熵与测量记录香农熵的关系。
AI.motivation: 探究量子测量这一内在随机过程如何改变量子临界系统基态的普适标度行为，揭示测量诱导的新奇临界现象。
AI.method: 采用可控的重整化群（RG）分析，在ε展开框架下研究测量主导的RG不动点；对三临界伊辛模型测量局域能量，对临界伊辛模型测量局域自旋算子。
AI.result: (a)三临界伊辛情况：能量和自旋关联呈现多分形标度（无穷多独立临界指数）；关联函数存在对数因子乘幂律（对数CFT特征）；Rényi熵的有效中心荷c^(eff)_n对不同n相互独立；有效边界熵与测量记录的香农熵系统无关部分存在普遍关系（1-loop计算）。(b)临界伊辛情况：部分结果已在ε展开中验证。
AI.conclusion: 弱测量能根本性地改变量子临界系统的标度行为，产生丰富的普适新临界现象，测量记录的信息论量（香农熵）与边界熵有深刻联系。

title: Quantile Regression using Random Forest Proximities
summary: Due to the dynamic nature of financial markets, maintaining models that produce precise predictions over time is difficult. Often the goal isn't just point prediction but determining uncertainty. Quantifying uncertainty, especially the aleatoric uncertainty due to the unpredictable nature of market drivers, helps investors understand varying risk levels. Recently, quantile regression forests (QRF) have emerged as a promising solution: Unlike most basic quantile regression methods that need separate models for each quantile, quantile regression forests estimate the entire conditional distribution of the target variable with a single model, while retaining all the salient features of a typical random forest. We introduce a novel approach to compute quantile regressions from random forests that leverages the proximity (i.e., distance metric) learned by the model and infers the conditional distribution of the target variable. We evaluate the proposed methodology using publicly available datasets and then apply it towards the problem of forecasting the average daily volume of corporate bonds. We show that using quantile regression using Random Forest proximities demonstrates superior performance in approximating conditional target distributions and prediction intervals to the original version of QRF. We also demonstrate that the proposed framework is significantly more computationally efficient than traditional approaches to quantile regressions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机森林邻近度（proximity）的新型分位数回归方法，该方法通过单一模型估计目标变量的完整条件分布，在预测公司债券日均交易量的任务上，相比传统分位数回归森林（QRF）在分布逼近和预测区间方面表现更优，且计算效率显著提升。
AI.motivation: 金融市场的动态性使得维持精确预测模型困难，且不仅需要点预测，更需要量化不确定性（尤其是偶然不确定性）以帮助投资者理解风险水平。现有分位数回归方法（如QRF）虽能估计条件分布，但在性能上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出一种基于随机森林邻近度（proximity/distance metric）的分位数回归方法，利用模型学习到的样本间距离度量来推断目标变量的条件分布，从而通过单一模型估计所有分位数。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和公司债券日均交易量预测任务上，该方法在逼近条件目标分布和构建预测区间方面优于原始QRF，且计算效率显著高于传统分位数回归方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于随机森林邻近度的分位数回归是一种更高效、更准确的不确定性量化方法，适用于金融领域等动态环境下的预测任务。

title: Linear causal disentanglement via higher-order cumulants
summary: Linear causal disentanglement is a recent method in causal representation learning to describe a collection of observed variables via latent variables with causal dependencies between them. It can be viewed as a generalization of both independent component analysis and linear structural equation models. We study the identifiability of linear causal disentanglement, assuming access to data under multiple contexts, each given by an intervention on a latent variable. We show that one perfect intervention on each latent variable is sufficient and in the worst case necessary to recover parameters under perfect interventions, generalizing previous work to allow more latent than observed variables. We give a constructive proof that computes parameters via a coupled tensor decomposition. For soft interventions, we find the equivalence class of latent graphs and parameters that are consistent with observed data, via the study of a system of polynomial equations. Our results hold assuming the existence of non-zero higher-order cumulants, which implies non-Gaussianity of variables.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性因果解缠的可识别性问题，证明了在完美干预下每个潜变量一次干预足以恢复参数（允许潜变量多于观测变量），并通过耦合张量分解给出构造性证明；在软干预下，通过多项式方程组刻画了潜变量图与参数的等价类。结果依赖于非零高阶累积量（非高斯性）。
AI.motivation: 线性因果解缠作为因果表示学习的新方法，将独立成分分析和线性结构方程模型统一泛化，但其可识别性条件尚不明确，尤其是在潜变量多于观测变量的场景下。
AI.method: 采用多上下文数据假设（每个上下文对应一个潜变量上的干预），通过耦合张量分解进行构造性参数恢复；对于软干预，通过分析多项式方程组系统来刻画等价类。
AI.result: 完美干预下每个潜变量一次干预在最优情况下充分且必要；软干预下给出了等价类的完整刻画；结果允许潜变量数大于观测变量数。
AI.conclusion: 线性因果解缠在非高斯性假设下具备可识别性，为因果表示学习提供了理论基础，扩展了先前工作至更一般的场景。

title: Neural Graph Matching for Video Retrieval in Large-Scale Video-driven E-commerce
summary: With the rapid development of the short video industry, traditional e-commerce has encountered a new paradigm, video-driven e-commerce, which leverages attractive videos for product showcases and provides both video and item services for users. Benefitting from the dynamic and visualized introduction of items,video-driven e-commerce has shown huge potential in stimulating consumer confidence and promoting sales. In this paper, we focus on the video retrieval task, facing the following challenges: (1) Howto handle the heterogeneities among users, items, and videos? (2)How to mine the complementarity between items and videos for better user understanding? In this paper, we first leverage the dual graph to model the co-existing of user-video and user-item interactions in video-driven e-commerce and innovatively reduce user preference understanding to a graph matching problem. To solve it, we further propose a novel bi-level Graph Matching Network(GMN), which mainly consists of node- and preference-level graph matching. Given a user, node-level graph matching aims to match videos and items, while preference-level graph matching aims to match multiple user preferences extracted from both videos and items. Then the proposed GMN can generate and improve user embedding by aggregating matched nodes or preferences from the dual graph in a bi-level manner. Comprehensive experiments show the superiority of the proposed GMN with significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches (e.g., AUC+1.9% and CTR+7.15%). We have developed it on a well-known video-driven e-commerce platform, serving hundreds of millions of users every day

AI.tldr: 本文针对视频驱动电商中的视频检索任务，提出了一种双层图匹配网络（GMN），通过节点级和偏好级图匹配解决用户-视频-物品异构性和互补性挖掘问题，在工业平台上取得了显著效果提升。
AI.motivation: 视频驱动电商中用户、物品和视频之间存在异构性，且物品与视频之间存在互补信息，如何有效建模三者关系并挖掘互补性以提升用户理解，是当前面临的核心挑战。
AI.method: 首先利用对偶图建模用户-视频和用户-物品两类交互，将用户偏好理解转化为图匹配问题；进而提出双层图匹配网络（GMN），包含节点级图匹配（匹配视频和物品）和偏好级图匹配（匹配从视频和物品中提取的多个用户偏好），通过双层聚合生成并优化用户嵌入。
AI.result: 在真实工业平台上，该方法相比SOTA方法AUC提升1.9%，CTR提升7.15%，并已部署服务于每日数亿用户。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的双层图匹配网络有效解决了视频驱动电商中的异构信息融合与互补性挖掘问题，在实际大规模应用中验证了其优越性。

title: Fourth-order compact finite difference schemes for solving biharmonic equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions
summary: In this study, we propose a genuine fourth-order compact finite difference scheme for solving biharmonic equations with Dirichlet boundary conditions in both two and three dimensions. In the 2D case, we build upon the high-order compact (HOC) schemes for flux-type boundary conditions originally developed by Zhilin Li and Kejia Pan [SIAM J. Sci. Comput., 45 (2023), pp. A646-A674] to construct a high order compact discretization for coupled boundary conditions. When considering the 3D case, we modify carefully designed undetermined coefficient methods of Li and Pan to derive the finite difference approximations of coupled boundary conditions. The resultant FD discretization maintains the global fourth order convergence and compactness. Unlike the very popular Stephenson method, the number of unknows do not increase with dimensions. Besides, it is noteworthy that the condition number of the coefficient matrix increases at a rate of $O(h^{-2})$ in both 2D and 3D. We also validate the performance of the proposed genuine HOC methods through nontrivial examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个真正的四阶紧致有限差分格式，用于求解二维和三维中带Dirichlet边界条件的双调和方程。在2D情况下，基于Li和Pan的HOC方案构建耦合边界条件的高阶紧致离散；3D情况下，改进Li和Pan的待定系数法推导耦合边界条件的有限差分近似。该方法保持全局四阶收敛性和紧致性，未知量不随维度增加，系数矩阵条件数以O(h^{-2})增长，并通过实例验证了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的双调和方程数值解法在精度和紧致性方面存在不足，特别是Stephenson方法中未知量随维度增加的问题需要解决。
AI.method: 在2D中扩展Li和Pan的HOC格式处理耦合边界条件；在3D中改进待定系数法推导耦合边界条件的有限差分近似。
AI.result: 该方法实现了全局四阶收敛，保持紧致性，未知量不随维度增加，条件数以O(h^{-2})增长。
AI.conclusion: 提出的真正四阶紧致有限差分格式在二维和三维双调和方程求解中表现优异，相比Stephenson方法具有优势。

title: Numerical and Lyapunov-Based Investigation of the Effect of Stenosis on Blood Transport Stability Using a Control-Theoretic PDE Model of Cardiovascular Flow
summary: We perform various numerical tests to study the effect of (boundary) stenosis on blood flow stability, employing a detailed and accurate, second-order finite-volume scheme for numerically implementing a partial differential equation (PDE) model, using clinically realistic values for the artery's parameters and the blood inflow. The model consists of a baseline $2\times 2$ hetero-directional, nonlinear hyperbolic PDE system, in which, the stenosis' effect is described by a pressure drop at the outlet of an arterial segment considered. We then study the stability properties (observed in our numerical tests) of a reference trajectory, corresponding to a given time-varying inflow (e.g., a periodic trajectory with period equal to the time interval between two consecutive heartbeats) and stenosis severity, deriving the respective linearized system and constructing a Lyapunov functional. Due to the fact that the linearized system is time varying, with time-varying parameters depending on the reference trajectories themselves (that, in turn, depend in an implicit manner on the stenosis degree), which cannot be derived analytically, we verify the Lyapunov-based stability conditions obtained, numerically. Both the numerical tests and the Lyapunov-based stability analysis show that a reference trajectory is asymptotically stable with a decay rate that decreases as the stenosis severity deteriorates.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高精度数值模拟和Lyapunov稳定性分析，研究了动脉狭窄对血流稳定性的影响。结果表明，参考轨迹是渐近稳定的，且衰减率随狭窄程度加重而降低。
AI.motivation: 临床中动脉狭窄（如斑块导致的血管阻塞）是常见病理现象，其如何影响血流动力学稳定性尚不明确。理解狭窄对血流稳定性的影响机制，对于心血管疾病的诊断和治疗具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用二阶有限体积格式数值求解2×2异向非线性双曲型偏微分方程组；通过出口压降描述狭窄效应；构建线性化时变系统并构造Lyapunov泛函进行稳定性分析；由于线性化系统参数依赖于参考轨迹且无法解析求解，数值验证Lyapunov稳定性条件。
AI.result: 数值测试与Lyapunov分析均表明：参考轨迹是渐近稳定的；稳定性衰减率随狭窄程度加重而降低（即狭窄越严重，系统趋于稳定的速度越慢）。
AI.conclusion: 动脉狭窄会削弱血流的稳定性，狭窄程度越严重，血流动力学系统的稳定性衰减越慢，这为临床上评估狭窄风险提供了理论依据。

title: Interprecision transfers in iterative refinement
summary: We make the interprecision transfers explicit in an algorithmic description of iterative refinement and obtain new insights into the algorithm. One example is the classic variant of iterative refinement where the matrix and the factorization are stored in a working precision and the residual is evaluated in a higher precision. In that case we make the observation that this algorithm will solve a promoted form of the original problem and thereby characterize the limiting behavior in a novel way and obtain a different version of the classic convergence analysis. We also discuss two approaches for interprecision transfer in the triangular solves.

AI.tldr: 本文通过算法化描述迭代精化中的精度间转换，揭示了经典变体（矩阵和分解以工作精度存储，残差以更高精度计算）实际上求解了原始问题的提升形式，从而以新方式刻画极限行为并获得不同版本的经典收敛分析，同时讨论了三角求解中的两种精度间转换方法。
AI.motivation: 将迭代精化中的精度间转换显式化到算法描述中，以获得对该算法的新见解。
AI.method: 通过显式地将精度间转换纳入迭代精化的算法描述，分析经典变体中矩阵/分解用工作精度存储、残差用更高精度计算的情况，发现该算法求解了原始问题的提升形式，并讨论三角求解中的两种精度间转换方法。
AI.result: 发现了经典迭代精化变体求解的是原始问题的提升形式，以新方式刻画了极限行为，并获得了不同版本的收敛分析。
AI.conclusion: 将精度间转换显式化能带来对迭代精化算法的新理解，包括对经典变体极限行为的新刻画和收敛分析的新版本。

title: Optimal Local Convergence Rates of Stochastic First-Order Methods under Local $α$-PL
summary: We study the local convergence rate of stochastic first-order methods under a local $α$-Polyak-Lojasiewicz ($α$-PL) condition in a neighborhood of a target connected component $\mathcal{M}$ of the local minimizer set. The parameter $α\in [1,2]$ is the exponent of the gradient norm in the $α$-PL inequality: $α=2$ recovers the classical PL case, $α=1$ corresponds to Holder-type error bounds, and intermediate values interpolate between these regimes. Our performance criterion is the number of oracle queries required to output $\hat{x}$ with $F(\hat{x})-l \le \varepsilon$, where $l := F(y)$ for any $y \in \mathcal{M}$. We work in a local regime where the algorithm is initialized near $\mathcal{M}$ and, with high probability, its iterates remain in that neighborhood. We establish a lower bound $Ω(\varepsilon^{-2/α})$ for all stochastic first-order methods in this regime, and we obtain a matching upper bound $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-2/α})$ for $1 \le α< 2$ via a SARAH-type variance-reduced method with time-varying batch sizes and step sizes. In the convex setting, assuming a local $α$-PL condition on the $\varepsilon$-sublevel set, we further show a complexity lower bound $\widetildeΩ(\varepsilon^{-2/α})$ for reaching an $\varepsilon$-global optimum, matching the $\varepsilon$-dependence of known accelerated stochastic subgradient methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机一阶方法在局部α-Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件下的收敛速率，建立了Ω(ε^{-2/α})的下界，并通过SARAH类方差缩减方法实现了匹配的上界O(ε^{-2/α})，在凸场景下进一步扩展至全局最优。
AI.motivation: 现有随机一阶方法的理论分析多基于全局PL条件，但实际优化中目标函数往往仅在局部满足此类条件。作者希望建立更精细的局部收敛理论，涵盖从经典PL条件（α=2）到Hölder型误差界（α=1）的连续谱系，并探索能否通过方差缩减技术达到匹配的理论下界。
AI.method: 理论分析：定义局部α-PL条件（α∈[1,2]），刻画目标函数在局部极小值集邻域内的几何结构。下界证明：采用零阶oracle与信息论论证，建立所有随机一阶方法的复杂度下界Ω(ε^{-2/α})。上界构造：设计SARAH型方差缩减方法，使用时变批大小和步长策略，证明在1≤α<2时达到O(ε^{-2/α})的上界。凸场景扩展：在ε-子水平集上假设局部α-PL条件，结合加速随机次梯度方法得到几乎匹配的复杂度下界。
AI.result: 建立了局部α-PL条件下随机一阶方法的复杂度下界Ω(ε^{-2/α})；针对1≤α<2，通过SARAH类方差缩减方法实现了匹配的上界O(ε^{-2/α})；在凸场景下，证明了达到ε-全局最优的复杂度下界为Ω̃(ε^{-2/α})，与已知加速随机次梯度方法的ε依赖关系匹配。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整刻画了局部α-PL条件下随机一阶方法的信息论最优收敛速率，表明SARAH型方差缩减方法在局部非凸优化中可以达到匹配下界的最优性能。该理论统一了从经典PL条件到Hölder型误差界的分析框架，为设计高效随机优化算法提供了理论基础。

title: Chatting Up Attachment: Using LLMs to Predict Adult Bonds
summary: Obtaining data in the medical field is challenging, making the adoption of AI technology within the space slow and high-risk. We evaluate whether we can overcome this obstacle with synthetic data generated by large language models (LLMs). In particular, we use GPT-4 and Claude 3 Opus to create agents that simulate adults with varying profiles, childhood memories, and attachment styles. These agents participate in simulated Adult Attachment Interviews (AAI), and we use their responses to train models for predicting their underlying attachment styles. We evaluate our models using a transcript dataset from 9 humans who underwent the same interview protocol, analyzed and labeled by mental health professionals. Our findings indicate that training the models using only synthetic data achieves performance comparable to training the models on human data. Additionally, while the raw embeddings from synthetic answers occupy a distinct space compared to those from real human responses, the introduction of unlabeled human data and a simple standardization allows for a closer alignment of these representations. This adjustment is supported by qualitative analyses and is reflected in the enhanced predictive accuracy of the standardized embeddings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用大语言模型（GPT-4、Claude 3 Opus）生成的合成数据来训练成人依恋风格预测模型，发现仅用合成数据训练的模型与使用真实人类数据训练的模型性能相当。通过引入无标注真实数据和简单标准化，可以进一步缩小合成嵌入与真实嵌入之间的表征差异，提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域数据获取困难，阻碍了AI技术的应用。研究者希望探索是否可以通过LLM生成的合成数据来克服这一障碍，从而降低AI在医学领域应用的风险和成本。
AI.method: 使用GPT-4和Claude 3 Opus创建具有不同档案、童年记忆和依恋风格的智能体，让其参与模拟成人依恋访谈（AAI），然后用这些合成回答训练依恋风格预测模型。评估时使用9位真实人类访谈转录数据（由心理健康专家标注），对比纯合成数据训练与真实数据训练的效果，并探索通过无标注人类数据标准化来对齐表征空间。
AI.result: 仅使用合成数据训练的模型与使用真实人类数据训练的模型性能相当。合成回答的原始嵌入与真实人类回答的嵌入位于不同的表征空间，但引入无标注真实数据并进行简单标准化后，两种表征能够更接近，预测准确性也得到了提升。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成的合成数据有望替代或补充真实数据，用于心理健康领域的模型训练，但需要一定的标准化处理来弥合合成数据与真实数据之间的表征差距。

title: Optimal Control of a Power Storage Facility with Variable Payoffs
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures, submission for International Conference on Scientific Computation and Differential Equations (2024); typos corrected
summary: We present a methodology for determining the relationship between the optimal control points of a power storage facility and a number of different factors including storage level and temperature. The interaction between different factors is considered to allow for the identification of a precise optimal control strategy to maximise the profits of a power storage facility under a variety of different conditions. The methodology is based upon traditional stochastic techniques, however by working directly with excess demand data is model independent and does not require identification of the underlying process.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于确定储能设施最优控制点与多种因素（如存储水平和温度）之间关系的方法论，该方法基于传统随机技术但直接使用过剩需求数据，具有模型独立性，无需识别底层过程，可在不同条件下最大化储能设施利润。
AI.motivation: 现有储能设施控制策略未充分考虑多种因素（如存储水平和温度）之间的交互作用，且过度依赖底层过程识别，导致模型依赖性强，难以在不同条件下实现精准优化。
AI.method: 基于传统随机技术，直接使用过剩需求数据，通过考虑多种因素之间的交互作用来识别精确最优控制策略，是一种模型独立的方法。
AI.result: 该方法能够在多种不同条件下最大化储能设施的利润，并确定最优控制点与存储水平、温度等因素之间的关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种模型独立、基于过剩需求数据的储能设施最优控制方法，通过考虑多因素交互作用，可在不同条件下实现利润最大化。

title: Quantum Computing for Discrete Optimization: A Highlight of Three Technologies
comment: 59 pages, 24 figures, 7 tables. Technical supplement: https://alex-bochkarev.github.io/qopt-overview . Source code, problem instances, and other raw data: https://github.com/alex-bochkarev/qopt-overview
summary: Quantum optimization has emerged as a promising frontier of quantum computing, providing novel numerical approaches to mathematical optimization problems. The main goal of this paper is to facilitate interdisciplinary research between the Operations Research (OR) and Quantum Computing communities by helping OR scientists to build initial intuition for-, and offering them a hands-on gateway to quantum-powered methods in the context of discrete optimization. To this end, we consider three quantum-powered optimization approaches that make use of different types of quantum hardware available on the market. To illustrate these approaches, we solve three classical optimization problems: the Traveling Salesperson Problem, Weighted Maximum Cut, and Maximum Independent Set. With a general OR audience in mind, we attempt to provide an intuition behind each approach along with key references, describe the corresponding high-level workflow, and highlight crucial practical considerations. In particular, we emphasize the importance of problem formulations and device-specific configurations, and their impact on the amount of resources required for computation (where we focus on the number of qubits). These points are illustrated with a series of experiments on three types of quantum computers: a neutral atom machine from QuEra, a quantum annealer from D-Wave, and gate-based devices from IBM.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在促进运筹学(OR)与量子计算社区之间的跨学科研究，通过三种量子计算硬件（中性原子、量子退火、门模型）解决三个经典离散优化问题（TSP、加权最大割、最大独立集），为OR科学家提供直觉入门和实践指导，重点强调问题表述、设备配置对量子比特资源需求的影响。
AI.motivation: 促进运筹学(OR)与量子计算社区之间的跨学科研究，帮助OR科学家建立量子优化方法的初步直觉，并提供可操作的实践入口。
AI.method: 选取三种商用量子硬件（QuEra中性原子、D-Wave量子退火、IBM门模型量子计算机），针对三个经典离散优化问题（TSP、加权最大割、最大独立集），描述每种方法的工作流程、核心直觉和关键实践考量，并通过实验对比问题表述和设备配置对量子比特资源消耗的影响。
AI.result: 通过系列实验展示了不同量子硬件在解决离散优化问题时的资源需求差异，强调了问题形式化表述和设备特定配置对量子比特数量的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 为OR社区提供了量子优化方法的系统性入门指导，突出了问题建模和硬件适配在量子计算资源效率中的重要性，有助于推动量子计算在运筹优化领域的实际应用。

title: Rayleigh-Bénard convective motion of stratified fluids in the Earth's troposphere
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures. The revised version (minor changes to the text) to appear in the Journal of Atmospheric and Solar-Terrestrial Physics (2025)
summary: Recently, Kaladze and Misra [Phys. Scr. 99 (2024) 085013] showed that the tropospheric stratified fluid flows may be unstable by the effects of the negative temperature gradient and the temperature-dependent density inhomogeneity arising from the thermal expansion. They also predicted that the modification in the Brunt-V{ä}is{ä}l{ä} frequency by the density inhomogeneity can lead to Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective instability in the tropospheric unbounded layers. The purpose of the present work is to revisit the Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective instability in more detail by considering both unbounded and bounded tropospheric layers. Starting from a set of fluid equations for incompressible neutral fluids with temperature gradients and using the Boussinesq approximation, we derive the general dispersion relations for Rayleigh-B{é}nard convective waves in unbounded and bounded tropospheric domains and analyze them with some particular cases both analytically and numerically. We show that the conditions for instability in these two cases significantly differ. Furthermore, we obtain and analyze the critical values of the Raleigh numbers and the expressions for the instability growth rates of thermal waves in the two cases. In the case of the bounded region, we also derive the necessary boundary conditions and note that the vertical wave number is quantified, and the corresponding eigenvalue problem is well-set.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了Rayleigh-Bénard对流不稳定性，分别针对无界和有界对流层，推导了色散关系，分析了两者的不稳定性条件差异，并给出了临界Rayleigh数和增长率。
AI.motivation: Kaladze和Misra（2024）的研究表明负温度梯度和热膨胀引起的密度不均匀性可能导致对流层不稳定，但他们对无界层的情况分析不够详尽，且未考虑有界情况。本文旨在更详细地重新研究Rayleigh-Bénard对流不稳定性，同时考虑无界和有界两种对流层情况。
AI.method: 基于不可压缩中性流体的流体方程组，引入温度梯度和Boussinesq近似，推导无界和有界对流层中Rayleigh-Bénard对流波的通用色散关系，并针对特定情形进行解析和数值分析。
AI.result: 无界和有界两种情形下的不稳定性条件存在显著差异；获得了两种情形下的临界Rayleigh数和热波不稳定增长率的表达式；在有界情形下，垂直波数被量化，本征值问题适定。
AI.conclusion: 无界和有界对流层的Rayleigh-Bénard对流不稳定性行为不同，有界情形下边界条件导致波数离散化，问题适定。

title: Inertial focusing of spherical capsule in pulsatile channel flows
summary: We present numerical analysis of the lateral movement of spherical capsule in the steady and pulsatile channel flow of a Newtonian fluid, for a wide range of oscillatory frequency. Each capsule membrane satisfying strain-hardening characteristic is simulated for different Reynolds numbers Re and capillary numbers Ca. Our numerical results showed that capsules with high Ca exhibit axial focusing at finite Re similarly to the inertialess case. We observe that the speed of the axial focusing can be substantially accelerated by making the driving pressure gradient oscillating in time. We also confirm the existence of an optimal frequency which maximises the speed of axial focusing, that remains the same found in the absence of inertia. For relatively low Ca, on the other hand, the capsule exhibits off-centre focusing, resulting in various equilibrium radial positions depending on Re. Our numerical results further clarifies the existence of a specific Re for which the effect of the flow pulsation to the equilibrium radial position is maximum. The roles of channel size on the lateral movements of the capsule are also addressed. Throughout our analyses, we have quantified the radial position of the capsule in a tube based on an empirical expression. Given that the speed of inertial focusing can be controlled by the oscillatory frequency, the results obtained here can be utilised for label-free cell alignment/sorting/separation techniques, e.g., for circulating tumor cells in cancer patients or precious hematopoietic cells such as colony-forming cells.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟分析了球形胶囊在稳态和脉动通道流中的侧向运动，研究了振荡频率、雷诺数Re和毛细数Ca对胶囊聚焦行为的影响，发现高Ca下胶囊呈现轴向聚焦且可通过压力振荡加速，存在最优频率；低Ca下出现偏心聚焦，平衡位置依赖Re。研究结果可用于无标记细胞分选技术。
AI.motivation: 探究脉动流条件下胶囊在通道流中的侧向运动规律，特别是振荡频率对惯性聚焦速度的影响，为发展无标记细胞分选技术提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用数值模拟方法，对具有应变硬化特性的胶囊膜在牛顿流体稳态和脉动通道流中进行仿真，系统变化振荡频率、雷诺数Re和毛细数Ca，并基于经验公式量化胶囊在管内的径向位置。
AI.result: 高Ca下胶囊在有限Re下呈现轴向聚焦（类无惯性情况），压力振荡可显著加速聚焦速度，且存在使聚焦速度最大化的最优频率（与无惯性情况一致）；低Ca下胶囊呈现偏心聚焦，平衡径向位置取决于Re；存在特定Re使脉动对平衡径向位置的影响最大。
AI.conclusion: 通过调控振荡频率可控制惯性聚焦速度，该发现可用于循环肿瘤细胞或造血细胞（如集落形成细胞）的无标记排列/分选/分离技术。

title: Thermalized and mixed meanfield ADP potentials for magnesium hydrides
summary: We develop meanfield approximation and numerical quadrature schemes for the evaluation of Angular-Dependent interatomic Potentials (ADPs) for magnesium and magnesium hydrides at finite temperature (thermalization) and arbitrary atomic molar fractions (mixing) within a non-equilibrium statistical mechanical framework and derive local equilibrium relations. We numerically verify and experimentally validate the accuracy and fidelity of the resulting thermalized/mixed ADPs (TADPs) by means of selected numerical tests including free entropy, heat capacity, thermal expansion, molar volumes, equation of state and elastic constants. We show that the local equilibrium properties predicted by TADPs agree closely with those computed directly from ADP by means of Molecular Dynamics (MD).

AI.tldr: 本文在非平衡统计力学框架下，开发了用于镁及镁氢化物在有限温度和任意原子摩尔分数下的角相关势(ADPs)的均场近似和数值求积方法，推导了局部平衡关系，并通过数值和实验验证了热化/混合ADPs(TADPs)在自由熵、热容、热膨胀、摩尔体积、状态方程和弹性常数等方面的精度，结果显示TADPs预测的局部平衡性质与直接通过分子动力学计算的结果高度一致。
AI.motivation: 现有ADP势函数在有限温度和混合组分条件下的热力学评估缺乏高效且准确的近似方法，直接分子动力学计算成本高昂，因此需要发展一种既能保证精度又具有计算效率的均场近似与数值求积方案。
AI.method: 采用非平衡统计力学框架，对ADP势进行均场近似和数值求积处理，实现有限温度下的热化(thermalization)和任意原子摩尔分数下的混合(mixing)，推导局部平衡关系，并通过自由熵、热容、热膨胀、摩尔体积、状态方程和弹性常数等数值测试进行验证。
AI.result: 所提出的TADPs方法在预测镁及镁氢化物的热力学和弹性性质方面，与直接使用ADP进行分子动力学计算的结果吻合良好，验证了该方法在保证精度的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 均场近似和数值求积方案能有效扩展ADP势在有限温度和混合组分条件下的应用能力，为镁及镁氢化物体系提供了一种高精度、高效率的热力学性质预测工具。

title: Graph-based Descriptors for Condensed Matter
summary: Computational scientists have long been developing a diverse portfolio of methodologies to characterise condensed matter systems. Most of the descriptors resulting from these efforts are ultimately based on the spatial configurations of particles, atoms, or molecules within these systems. Noteworthy examples include symmetry functions and the smooth overlap of atomic positions (SOAP) descriptors, which have significantly advanced the performance of predictive machine learning models for both condensed matter and small molecules. However, while graph-based descriptors are frequently employed in machine learning models to predict the functional properties of small molecules, their application in the context of condensed matter has been limited. In this paper, we put forward a number of graph-based descriptors (such as node centrality and clustering coefficients) traditionally utilised in network science, as alternative representations for condensed matter systems. We apply this graph-based formalism to investigate the dynamical properties and phase transitions of the prototypical Lennard-Jones system. We find that our graph-based formalism outperforms symmetry function descriptors in predicting the dynamical properties and phase transitions of this system. These results demonstrate the broad applicability of graph-based features in representing condensed matter systems, paving the way for exciting advancements in the field of condensed matter through the integration of network science concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将网络科学中的图描述符（如节点中心性和聚类系数）替代传统的对称函数和SOAP描述符，用于表征凝聚态物质系统。在Lennard-Jones体系上的实验表明，图描述符在预测动力学性质和相变方面优于对称函数描述符。
AI.motivation: 传统凝聚态物质描述符（如对称函数、SOAP）基于空间构型，而图描述符虽在机器学习预测小分子功能性质中广泛应用，但在凝聚态体系中的应用有限。作者旨在探索图描述符作为凝聚态体系的替代表征方法。
AI.method: 将网络科学中传统的图描述符（节点中心性、聚类系数等）应用于凝聚态体系；以Lennard-Jones体系为原型系统，使用图形式化方法研究其动力学性质和相变。
AI.result: 所提出的图描述符在预测Lennard-Jones体系的动力学性质和相变方面，性能优于传统的对称函数描述符。
AI.conclusion: 图描述符在表征凝聚态物质系统中具有广泛的适用性，通过整合网络科学概念有望推动凝聚态领域的突破性进展。

title: Perfectly Matched Layer implementation for E-H fields and Complex Wave Envelope propagation in the Smilei PIC code
summary: The design of absorbing boundary conditions (ABC) in a numerical simulation is a challenging task. In the best cases, spurious reflections remain for some angles of incidence or at certain wave lengths. In the worst, ABC are not even possible for the set of equations and/or numerical schemes used in the simulation and reflections can not be avoided at all. Perflectly Matched Layer (PML) are layers of absorbing medium which can be added at the simulation edges in order to significantly damp both outgoing and reflected waves, thus effectively playing the role of an ABC. They are able to absorb waves and prevent reflections for all angles and frequencies at a modest computational cost. It increases the simulation accuracy and negates the need of oversizing the simulation usually imposed by ABC and leading to a waste of computational resources and power. PML for finite-difference time-domain (FDTD) schemes in Particle-In-cell (PIC) codes are presented for both Maxwell's equations and, for the first time, the envelope wave equation. Being of the second order, the latter requires significant evolutions with respect to the former. It applies in particular to simulations of lasers propagating in plasmas using the reduced Complex Envelope model. The implementation is done in the open source code Smilei for both Cartesian and azimuthal modes (AM) decomposition geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了完美匹配层（PML）作为一种吸收边界条件（ABC）在数值模拟中的应用，特别是针对麦克斯韦方程组和首次提出的包络波动方程的FDTD方案。PML能在所有角度和频率下有效吸收波并防止反射，计算成本适中，已在开源代码Smilei中实现，支持笛卡尔和方位角模式分解几何。
AI.motivation: 传统的吸收边界条件（ABC）存在局限性：最佳情况下仍会在某些入射角或波长处产生伪反射，最坏情况下甚至无法为某些方程组或数值方案设计ABC，导致反射无法避免。因此需要一种更优的方案来有效吸收边界波，提高模拟精度并避免因过度扩展模拟区域而浪费计算资源。
AI.method: 采用完美匹配层（PML）作为吸收介质层添加在模拟边界，针对有限差分时域（FDTD）方案在粒子-网格（PIC）代码中实现。对麦克斯韦方程组和二阶包络波动方程分别进行PML设计，后者需要显著改进。实现基于开源代码Smilei，支持笛卡尔几何和方位角模式（AM）分解几何。
AI.result: PML能够对所有角度和频率的波进行有效吸收并防止反射，计算成本适中。提高了模拟精度，无需过度扩展模拟区域。该实现已纳入开源代码Smilei，适用于激光在等离子体中传播的复杂包络模型模拟。
AI.conclusion: PML是一种优于传统ABC的边界处理方法，能显著提升数值模拟的精度和效率，对麦克斯韦方程组和包络波动方程均适用，在PIC-FDTD框架下具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Fundamental physical constants, operation of physical phenomena and entropy increase
summary: Approaching the problem of understanding fundamental physical constants (FPCs) started with discussing the role these constants play in high-energy nuclear physics and astrophysics. Condensed matter physics was relatively unexplored in this regard. More recently, it was realised that FPCs set lower or upper bounds on key condensed matter properties. Here, we discuss a much wider role played by FPCs in condensed matter physics: at given environmental conditions, FPCs set the observability and operation of entire physical effects and phenomena. We discuss structural and superconducting phase transitions and transitions between different states of matter, with implications for life processes. We also discuss metastable states, transitions between them, chemical reactions and their products. A byproduct of this discussion is that the order of magnitude of the transition temperature can be calculated from FPCs only. We show that the new states emerging as a result of various transitions increase the phase space and entropy. Were FPCs to take different values, these transitions would become inoperative at our environmental conditions and the new states due to these transitions would not emerge. This suggests that the current values of FPCs, by enabling various transitions and reactions which give rise to new states, promote entropy increase. Based on this entropy increase and the associated increase of statistical probability, we conjecture that entropy increase is a selection principle for FPCs considered to be variable in earlier discussions.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基本物理常数（FPCs）在凝聚态物理中的广泛作用：FPCs决定了物理效应和现象在给定环境条件下的可观测性与运作，包括结构相变、超导相变、物态转变及其对生命过程的影响。作者发现转变温度的数量级可从FPCs直接计算得出，且FPCs若取不同值，这些转变将无法在现有环境条件下运作。据此提出猜想：熵增是FPCs的选择原理。
AI.motivation: 基本物理常数（FPCs）在核物理和天体物理中的作用已被广泛讨论，但在凝聚态物理中的角色相对未被充分探索。近期虽认识到FPCs对凝聚态物质关键性质设定了上下界，但其更广泛的作用仍不明确。作者旨在揭示FPCs如何决定凝聚态物理中各种现象和效应的存在与否。
AI.method: 通过分析结构相变、超导相变、物态转变及其对生命过程的影响，讨论FPCs如何设定这些转变的可观测性。从FPCs出发计算转变温度的数量级，并分析不同FPCs取值下这些转变的运作情况。基于新状态增加相空间和熵的观察，提出熵增作为FPCs选择原理的猜想。
AI.result: 发现转变温度的数量级可仅从FPCs计算得出。新状态（由各种转变产生）增加了相空间和熵。若FPCs取不同值，这些转变在当前环境条件下将无法运作，导致新状态无法出现。这表明当前FPCs值通过促进转变和反应来推动熵增。
AI.conclusion: 基于熵增及其伴随的统计概率增加，作者提出熵增是FPCs（若视为可变）的选择原理。这一猜想为理解FPCs为何取当前值提供了新的视角，将熵增原理与基本常数的取值联系起来。

title: Late-time ensembles of quantum states in quantum chaotic systems
summary: We study the universal structure of late-time ensembles obtained from unitary dynamics in quantum chaotic systems with symmetries, such as charge or energy conservation. We find that although quantum states do not ergodically explore the entire Hilbert space at late times, the late-time ensemble typically becomes indistinguishable from Haar-random states in the thermodynamic limit at the level of finite statistical moments. Importantly, our results apply to initial states easy to prepare in ongoing experiments -- specifically, product states -- that lie in the middle of the spectrum of quantum chaotic systems. We show that these states typically exhibit not only the same late-time ensemble average as Haar-random states, but also the same state-to-state fluctuations and higher statistical moments. In other words, there is no measurement -- whether local or nonlocal -- at the level of finite statistical moments that can tell that the states are not exploring the entire Hilbert space. Interestingly, within the class of low-entanglement initial states, we also find atypical initial conditions in the middle of the spectrum of Hamiltonians known to be "maximally chaotic". Such atypical states have smaller variance of the symmetry operator than Haar-random states and evolve into non-universal ensembles that can be distinguished from the Haar ensemble by simple measurements or subsystem properties. In the limiting case of initial states with negligible variance of the symmetry operator (e.g., states with fixed particle number or energy eigenstates), the late-time ensemble has universal behavior captured by constrained random-state ensembles. Our results reveal that an extremely high level of quantum state randomness can still be achieved even when dynamics is constrained by symmetries.

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有对称性（如电荷或能量守恒）的量子混沌系统中，由幺正动力学产生的晚期时间系综的普适结构。尽管量子态在晚期不会遍历整个希尔伯特空间，但在热力学极限下，晚期系综在有限统计矩层面与Haar随机态不可区分。这一结论适用于实验中易制备的乘积态。同时发现，在"最大混沌"哈密顿量谱中部的低纠缠初始态中，存在非典型初始条件，其对称算子方差较小，演化出的非普适系综可通过简单测量区分。对称算子方差可忽略的初始态（如固定粒子数态或能量本征态）的晚期系综服从约束随机态系综的普适行为。
AI.motivation: 理解具有对称性的量子混沌系统中，晚期时间系综的普适结构，特别是初始态（尤其是实验中易制备的乘积态）是否能在对称性约束下仍然达到与Haar随机态不可区分的统计特性。
AI.method: 利用随机矩阵理论和量子混沌系统的对称性约束，分析幺正动力学下晚期系综的统计矩（包括平均值、态间涨落和高阶矩），并与Haar随机态系综进行对比。特别关注处于谱中部的乘积态初始条件，以及不同对称算子方差下的行为差异。
AI.result: 在热力学极限下，典型的乘积态初始条件在晚期产生的系综与Haar随机态在有限统计矩层面不可区分，包括相同的平均值、态间涨落和高阶统计矩。但在"最大混沌"哈密顿量中，存在对称算子方差较小的非典型低纠缠初始态，其演化出的晚期系综可通过简单测量与Haar系综区分。对称算子方差可忽略的初始态则服从约束随机态系综的普适行为。
AI.conclusion: 即使在对称性约束下，量子混沌系统也能达到极高的量子态随机性水平，典型初始态在有限统计矩层面与Haar随机态不可区分。但非典型初始条件会导致可区分的非普适行为，揭示了对称性约束下量子态随机性的普适与非普适特征之间的边界。

title: On Probabilistic Embeddings in Optimal Dimension Reduction
summary: Dimension reduction algorithms are a crucial part of many data science pipelines, including data exploration, feature creation and selection, and denoising. Despite their wide utilization, many non-linear dimension reduction algorithms are poorly understood from a theoretical perspective. In this work we consider a generalized version of multidimensional scaling, which is posed as an optimization problem in which a mapping from a high-dimensional feature space to a lower-dimensional embedding space seeks to preserve either inner products or norms of the distribution in feature space, and which encompasses many commonly used dimension reduction algorithms. We analytically investigate the variational properties of this problem, leading to the following insights: 1) Solutions found using standard particle descent methods may lead to non-deterministic embeddings, 2) A relaxed or probabilistic formulation of the problem admits solutions with easily interpretable necessary conditions, 3) The globally optimal solutions to the relaxed problem actually must give a deterministic embedding. This progression of results mirrors the classical development of optimal transportation, and in a case relating to the Gromov-Wasserstein distance actually gives explicit insight into the structure of the optimal embeddings, which are parametrically determined and discontinuous. Finally, we illustrate that a standard computational implementation of this task does not learn deterministic embeddings, which means that it learns sub-optimal mappings, and that the embeddings learned in that context have highly misleading clustering structure, underscoring the delicate nature of solving this problem computationally.

AI.tldr: 本文针对广义多维缩放（一种涵盖多种常用降维算法的优化问题）进行了变分性质的理论分析，揭示了标准粒子下降法可能导致非确定性嵌入，而松弛的概率形式可解析出必要条件且全局最优解必然是确定性嵌入，最后通过实验表明标准计算实现会学到次优映射并产生误导性聚类结构。
AI.motivation: 许多非线性降维算法虽然被广泛使用，但其理论基础尚不清晰。本文旨在从变分分析的角度，深入理解以广义多维缩放为代表的降维问题的优化性质。
AI.method: 将降维问题形式化为一个优化框架（广义多维缩放），目标是在低维嵌入空间中保留高维特征空间中的内积或范数分布。采用变分分析方法研究该问题的解的性质，并引入松弛（概率化）形式进行理论推导。
AI.result: 1) 标准粒子下降法可能产生非确定性嵌入；2) 松弛形式可得出可解释的最优性必要条件；3) 松弛问题的全局最优解必然是确定性嵌入；4) 该结果与最优传输理论的发展路径类似，在涉及Gromov-Wasserstein距离的情形下，最优嵌入具有参数化且不连续的结构；5) 标准计算实现学到的是次优的、非确定性嵌入，导致聚类结构具有误导性。
AI.conclusion: 本文从变分角度深化了对非线性降维算法的理论理解，指出了计算实现中存在的根本性问题（次优映射和误导性聚类），强调了求解该优化问题的微妙性。

title: Agnostic Private Density Estimation for GMMs via List Global Stability
summary:
We consider the problem of private density estimation for mixtures of unrestricted high dimensional Gaussians in the agnostic setting. We prove the first upper bound on the sample complexity of this problem. Previously, private learnability of high dimensional GMMs was only known in the realizable setting [Afzali et al., 2024].
  To prove our result, we exploit the notion of $\textit{list global stability}$ [Ghazi et al., 2021b,a] that was originally introduced in the context of private supervised learning. We define an agnostic variant of this definition, showing that its existence is sufficient for agnostic private density estimation. We then construct an agnostic list globally stable learner for GMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不可知论（agnostic）设置下，对非限制高维高斯混合模型进行私有密度估计的问题，首次证明了该问题的样本复杂度上界，并通过引入不可知论列表全局稳定性（agnostic list global stability）概念来实现这一结果。
AI.motivation: 先前工作仅在可实现（realizable）设置下证明了高维GMM的私有可学习性[Afzali et al., 2024]，而不可知论（agnostic）设置下的私有密度估计问题尚未解决。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立不可知论设置下私有密度估计的样本复杂度上界。
AI.method: 利用列表全局稳定性（list global stability）概念[Ghazi et al., 2021b,a]，将其从私有监督学习领域扩展到密度估计领域，定义了不可知论变体；证明该定义的存在性足以保证不可知论私有密度估计；为GMM构造了不可知论列表全局稳定学习器。
AI.result: 首次给出不可知论设置下高维高斯混合模型私有密度估计的样本复杂度上界。
AI.conclusion: 列表全局稳定性框架可成功从监督学习迁移至密度估计问题，为不可知论私有密度估计提供了通用工具。

title: Non-stationary and Sparsely-correlated Multi-output Gaussian Process with Spike-and-Slab Prior
summary: Multi-output Gaussian process (MGP) is commonly used as a transfer learning method to leverage information among multiple outputs. A key advantage of MGP is providing uncertainty quantification for prediction, which is highly important for subsequent decision-making tasks. However, traditional MGP may not be sufficiently flexible to handle multivariate data with dynamic characteristics, particularly when dealing with complex temporal correlations. Additionally, since some outputs may lack correlation, transferring information among them may lead to negative transfer. To address these issues, this study proposes a non-stationary MGP model that can capture both the dynamic and sparse correlation among outputs. Specifically, the covariance functions of MGP are constructed using convolutions of time-varying kernel functions. Then a dynamic spike-and-slab prior is placed on correlation parameters to automatically decide which sources are informative to the target output in the training process. An expectation-maximization (EM) algorithm is proposed for efficient model fitting. Both numerical studies and a real case demonstrate its efficacy in capturing dynamic and sparse correlation structure and mitigating negative transfer for high-dimensional time-series data. Finally, a mountain-car reinforcement learning case highlights its potential application in decision making problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非平稳多输出高斯过程模型，通过时变核函数卷积构建协方差函数，并引入动态 spike-and-slab 先验自动识别相关输出，以捕获动态和稀疏的相关性结构，缓解负迁移，适用于高维时间序列数据。
AI.motivation: 传统多输出高斯过程在处理具有动态特征的多元时间序列数据时灵活性不足，且当某些输出间缺乏相关性时，信息迁移会导致负迁移问题。
AI.method: 通过时变核函数的卷积构造非平稳 MGP 的协方差函数，并在相关参数上施加动态 spike-and-slab 先验以自动选择对目标输出有信息的源输出，采用 EM 算法进行高效模型拟合。
AI.result: 数值实验和真实案例表明该模型能够有效捕获动态和稀疏的相关性结构，缓解负迁移；在 mountain-car 强化学习案例中展示了其在下游决策问题中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该非平稳 MGP 模型能够灵活处理高维时间序列数据中的动态和稀疏相关性，有效缓解负迁移，并具备在决策问题中的应用价值。

title: Phase transition in a kinetic mean-field game model of inertial self-propelled agents
summary: The framework of Mean-field Games (MFGs) is used for modelling the collective dynamics of large populations of non-cooperative decision-making agents. We formulate and analyze a kinetic MFG model for an interacting system of non-cooperative motile agents with inertial dynamics and finite-range interactions, where each agent is minimizing a biologically inspired cost function. By analyzing the associated coupled forward-backward in time system of nonlinear Fokker-Planck and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations, we obtain conditions for closed-loop linear stability of the spatially homogeneous MFG equilibrium that corresponds to an ordered state with non-zero mean speed. Using a combination of analysis and numerical simulations, we show that when energetic cost of control is reduced below a critical value, this equilibrium loses stability, and the system transitions to a travelling wave solution. Our work provides a game-theoretic perspective to the problem of collective motion in non-equilibrium biological and bio-inspired systems.

AI.tldr: 本文构建并分析了一个考虑惯性动力学和有限范围相互作用的平均场博弈（MFG）模型，用于研究非合作运动智能体的集体动力学。通过分析耦合的正向-反向非线性Fokker-Planck和Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程组，得到了空间均匀MFG平衡态（对应有序态且非零平均速度）的闭环线性稳定性条件。研究表明，当控制能量成本低于临界值时，该平衡态失稳，系统转变为行波解，为集体运动问题提供了博弈论视角。
AI.motivation: 现有集体运动研究多从物理或生物学角度出发，缺乏从博弈论视角理解非合作智能体在能量约束下的集体决策行为。本文旨在填补这一空白，为生物和仿生非平衡系统中的集体运动提供博弈论理论基础。
AI.method: 建立了具有惯性动力学和有限范围相互作用的动能MFG模型；通过分析耦合的非线性Fokker-Planck和Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程组，推导空间均匀MFG平衡态的闭环线性稳定性条件；结合解析分析与数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.result: 发现了控制能量成本的关键临界值：当能量成本低于该临界值时，空间均匀的有序平衡态失去稳定性，系统自发转变为行波解（travelling wave solution）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解非平衡生物与仿生系统中集体运动的涌现机制提供了博弈论框架，揭示了能量约束与群体运动模式之间的本质联系。

title: Dynamic Triad Interactions and Evolving Turbulence -- Part 2: Implications for Practical Signals
summary: We investigate how momentum and kinetic energy is transferred between Fourier components (the so-called triad interactions) in measured turbulent flow fields, i.e. in practical, discretely sampled signals with limited temporal and spatial domains. We empirically observe that the finite resolution in experimental investigations causes a decoupling between time and space, which broadens the phase match condition to include both spatial and temporal frequencies as predicted in Part 1. It is also empirically observed that the Fourier components may interact with a finite time delay and within a broadened frequency window (finite overlap widths) in both time and space, as compared to the usual integrals over infinite ranges where Fourier components interact by overlapping Dirac delta functions. Furthermore, it is empirically observed how the finite temporal and spatial measurement domains of velocity records can have a significant effect on the efficiency of the triad interactions and thereby on the shape and development of measured velocity power spectra. These finite spatial/temporal domains thus influence the measured spatial and temporal development of turbulence, the possibility for non-local interactions and hence also non-equilibrium turbulence, e.g. fractal grid generated turbulence.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验测量湍流场，研究了有限时空分辨率下傅里叶分量间的三波相互作用，发现有限测量域导致时空解耦、放宽相位匹配条件、引入有限时延和展宽频率窗口，并显著影响能谱形状及湍流发展，尤其对非平衡湍流（如分形网格生成湍流）具有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 为了理解实际测量中有限时间和空间分辨率如何影响湍流场中傅里叶分量间的动量与动能传递（即三波相互作用），填补理论与实验之间的差距。
AI.method: 在实测湍流场中（有限采样信号、有限时空域）进行经验观测，分析傅里叶分量间的相互作用，对比理论无限积分情形下的Dirac delta函数重叠条件。
AI.result: 1) 有限分辨率导致时空解耦，相位匹配条件被放宽；2) 傅里叶分量间存在有限时延和展宽的频率窗口；3) 有限的时空测量域显著影响三波相互作用效率，进而影响能谱形状和湍流发展。
AI.conclusion: 有限时空测量域是影响实测湍流中三波相互作用、非局域相互作用及非平衡湍流（如分形网格生成湍流）的重要因素，需在实验分析和理论建模中予以考虑。

title: The Compressible Navier-Stokes Equations on the Multi-Connected Domains
summary: This paper investigates the isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations on k-connected domains under Navier-slip boundary conditions. We study the multi-solvability of the stationary systems on general domains, which is closely related with the Cauchy-Riemann systems and critical points of harmonic functions on the domain. Then based on the structure of Green's functions, the commutator estimates are obtained on the circular domains and extended to general domains with the help of conformal mappings. Moreover, we will utilize these assertions to discuss the global well-posedness and large time behaviours of the non-stationary systems on general domains with large initial values containing vacuum.

AI.tldr: 本文研究k连通域上Navier滑移边界条件下等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的驻定系统多解性、Green函数结构带来的交换子估计，以及非驻定系统在含真空大初值下的整体适定性和长时间行为。
AI.motivation: 探究一般k连通区域上等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在Navier滑移边界条件下的多解性问题，该问题与Cauchy-Riemann系统及调和函数临界点密切相关；进一步建立交换子估计，为含真空大初值的非驻定系统整体适定性奠定基础。
AI.method: 利用Cauchy-Riemann系统和调和函数临界点分析驻定系统多解性；借助Green函数结构在圆域上获得交换子估计，再通过共形映射延拓至一般k连通区域。
AI.result: 在一般k连通域上获得了驻定系统的多解性刻画；建立了圆域上的交换子估计并将其推广到一般区域；证明了非驻定系统在含真空大初值下的整体适定性和长时间行为。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统解决了k连通域上Navier滑移边界条件下等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的多解性与整体适定性问题，为含真空大初值的复杂区域流动理论提供了新的分析工具。

title: Quadrics on Gushel-Mukai varieties
summary: We study Hilbert schemes of quadrics of dimension $k \in \{0,1,2,3\}$ on smooth Gushel-Mukai varieties $X$ of dimension $n \in \{2,3,4,5,6\}$ by relating them to the relative Hilbert schemes of linear subspaces of dimension $k + 1$ of a certain family, naturally associated with $X$, of quadrics of dimension $n - 1$ over the blowup of $\mathbf{P}^5$ at a point.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了光滑Gushel-Mukai簇上k维二次曲面的Hilbert scheme，通过将其与某个与X自然相关的(n-1)维二次曲面族在P^5 blowing-up点上的相对Hilbert scheme联系起来，其中该族中的线性子空间维数为k+1。
AI.motivation: 理解Gushel-Mukai簇上二次曲面的模空间结构，建立不同维数Hilbert scheme之间的联系。
AI.method: 通过将k维二次曲面的Hilbert scheme转化为某族(n-1)维二次曲面中(k+1)维线性子空间的相对Hilbert scheme，利用blowup构造建立对应关系。
AI.result: 建立了Gushel-Mukai簇上低维二次曲面Hilbert scheme与相对Hilbert scheme之间的等价关系。
AI.conclusion: 为研究Gushel-Mukai簇上的二次曲面模空间提供了新的几何框架和工具。

title: Motivic p-adic tame cohomology
comment: Minor changes. Accepted for publication in Bull. Lond. Math. Soc
summary: We construct a comparison functor between ($\mathbf{A}^1$-local) tame motives and ($\overline{\square}$-local) log-étale motives over a field $k$ of positive characteristic. This generalizes Binda--Park--Østvær's comparison for the Nisnevich topology. As a consequence, we construct an $E_\infty$-ring spectrum $H\mathbb{Z}/p^m$ representing mod $p^m$ tame motivic cohomology: the existence of this ring spectrum and the usual properties of motives imply some results on tame motivic cohomology, which were conjectured by Hübner--Schmidt.

AI.tldr: 本文在正特征域k上构建了(A^1-局部) tame motive与(□̄-局部) log-étale motive之间的比较函子，推广了Binda-Park-Østvær关于Nisnevich拓扑的比较结果。并由此构造了表示模p^m tame motivic上同调的E_∞-环谱Hℤ/p^m，证明了Hübner-Schmidt提出的若干猜想。
AI.motivation: 将已知的Nisnevich拓扑下的motive比较结果推广到更一般的tame setting，并解决Hübner-Schmidt关于tame motivic上同调的猜想，特别是构造相应的环谱。
AI.method: 通过构造比较函子联系tame motives与log-étale motives，利用motives的标准性质推导环谱的存在性及相关结论。
AI.result: 成功构造了比较函子以及E_∞-环谱Hℤ/p^m，并证明了Hübner-Schmidt提出的关于tame motivic上同调的猜想。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了tame motives与log-étale motives在正特征域上的深刻联系，为tame motivic上同调提供了环谱层面的严格基础，并验证了相关猜想。

title: Allard-type regularity theory for area minimizing currents at boundaries with arbitrary multiplicity
comment: To appear in the proceedings of the conference "Geometric Measure Theory and Applications", held in Cortona, 2024. The proceedings will be published in the Springer INdAM Series
summary: This is an announcement of a series of upcoming works on boundary regularity for area minimizing currents, one of which is in collaboration with Reinaldo Resende. The setting we consider is that of an area minimizing current with a smooth boundary taken with arbitrary multiplicity. The main result is a generalization of Allard's boundary regularity theorem from which we derive important structural consequences.

AI.tldr: 本文宣布了一系列关于面积最小化电流边界正则性的即将发表的工作，其中一项与Reinaldo Resende合作。研究对象是具有任意重数光滑边界的面积最小化电流。主要结果是Allard边界正则性定理的推广，并由此推导出重要的结构结论。
AI.motivation: 将Allard边界正则性定理从边界重数为1的情况推广到任意重数情形，以处理更一般的面积最小化电流的边界正则性问题。
AI.method: 基于Allard的边界正则性理论框架，通过推广其关键估计和论证技术，处理具有任意重数光滑边界的面积最小化电流。
AI.result: 成功将Allard边界正则性定理推广到带有任意重数光滑边界的面积最小化电流情形，并获得了重要的结构推论。
AI.conclusion: 该工作扩展了边界正则性理论的应用范围，为进一步研究面积最小化电流的边界行为提供了更一般的工具和理论基础。

title: Nonlocal problem with critical exponential nonlinearity of convolution type: A non-resonant case

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类带权的Choquard方程在有界光滑区域上的非平凡解存在性问题，其中非线性项具有Trudinger-Moser意义下的临界指数增长，权函数可能在原点处有奇性。通过变分方法，证明了除共振情形（参数λ等于算子(-Δ, H¹₀(Ω))的特征值）外，对所有参数值均存在非平凡解。
AI.motivation: 研究带有可奇异权函数的Choquard方程在临界指数增长条件下的解的存在性，特别是处理非共振情形下参数λ的全体取值范围，填补现有理论在二维有界区域上对该类方程研究的空白。
AI.method: 采用变分方法，结合Trudinger-Moser不等式处理临界指数增长的非线性项，通过分析权函数的奇性及参数λ与特征值的关系，构造适当的变分框架并证明临界点的存在性。
AI.result: 证明了在所有非共振情形（即λ不是算子(-Δ, H¹₀(Ω))的特征值）下，该带权Choquard方程均存在非平凡解。
AI.conclusion: 本文拓展了Choquard方程在二维有界区域上的存在性理论，尤其处理了权函数奇性和临界指数增长的挑战，为相关非线性非局部问题的研究提供了新的分析工具。

title: Automorphisms of Hilbert Schemes of Points on Abelian Surfaces
summary: Belmans, Oberdieck, and Rennemo asked whether natural automorphisms of Hilbert schemes of points on surfaces can be characterized by the fact that they preserve the exceptional divisor of non-reduced subschemes. Sasaki recently published examples, independently discovered by the author, of automorphisms on the Hilbert scheme of two points of certain abelian surfaces which preserve the exceptional divisor but are nevertheless unnatural, giving a negative answer to the question. We construct additional examples for abelian surfaces of unnatural automorphisms which preserve the exceptional divisor of the Hilbert scheme of an arbitrary number of points. The underlying abelian surfaces in these examples have Picard rank at least 2, and hence are not generic. We prove the converse statement that all automorphisms are natural on the Hilbert scheme of two points for a principally polarized abelian surface of Picard rank 1. Additionally, we prove the same if the polarization has self-intersection a perfect square.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Hilbert概形的自然自同构问题。针对Belmans-Oberdieck-Rennemo关于"保持非减子概形例外除子的自同构必为自然自同构"的猜想，Sasaki和作者独立发现了反例（两点Hilbert概形上的非自然自同构）。本文进一步在一般点数情形的Abel曲面Hilbert概形上构造了保持例外除子的非自然自同构，这些Abel曲面的Picard秩≥2。同时证明了对主极化Abel曲面（Picard秩=1或极化自交为完全平方）的两点Hilbert概形，所有自同构都是自然的。
AI.motivation: 回答Belmans, Oberdieck, Rennemo提出的问题：Hilbert概形上保持例外除子的自同构是否一定是自然自同构？此前Sasaki和作者独立在两点情形发现反例，本文希望推广到任意点数的情形。
AI.method: 构造法：在Picard秩≥2的Abel曲面上构造任意点数Hilbert概形的非自然自同构；分类法：对Picard秩为1或极化自交为完全平方的主极化Abel曲面，证明两点Hilbert概形上所有自同构均为自然的。
AI.result: 构造了任意点数Hilbert概形上保持例外除子的非自然自同构（需底层Abel曲面Picard秩≥2）；证明了对于Picard秩=1的主极化Abel曲面，以及极化自交为完全平方的情形，两点Hilbert概形的所有自同构都是自然的。
AI.conclusion: 原问题的答案为否定的（存在反例），且在一般点数情形均有反例；但在Picard秩1或特殊极化条件下，两点Hilbert概形上结论仍成立，表明自然性条件与底层曲面的Picard秩密切相关。

title: InfoNCE: Identifying the Gap Between Theory and Practice
summary: Prior theory work on Contrastive Learning via the InfoNCE loss showed that, under certain assumptions, the learned representations recover the ground-truth latent factors. We argue that these theories overlook crucial aspects of how CL is deployed in practice. Specifically, they either assume equal variance across all latents or that certain latents are kept invariant. However, in practice, positive pairs are often generated using augmentations such as strong cropping to just a few pixels. Hence, a more realistic assumption is that all latent factors change with a continuum of variability across all factors. We introduce AnInfoNCE, a generalization of InfoNCE that can provably uncover the latent factors in this anisotropic setting, broadly generalizing previous identifiability results in CL. We validate our identifiability results in controlled experiments and show that AnInfoNCE increases the recovery of previously collapsed information in CIFAR10 and ImageNet, albeit at the cost of downstream accuracy. Finally, we discuss the remaining mismatches between theoretical assumptions and practical implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有对比学习InfoNCE损失函数的理论假设（潜变量等方差或某些潜变量不变）与实践中数据增强（如强裁剪）导致的各向异性变异性不匹配。作者提出AnInfoNCE，推广了InfoNCE，能在各向异性设定下可辨识地恢复潜因子，理论上泛化了先前可辨识性结果。实验表明AnInfoNCE能恢复被压缩的信息，但会牺牲下游准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习InfoNCE损失的可辨识性理论假设潜变量等方差或某些潜变量保持不变，但实践中数据增强（如强裁剪）使所有潜因子均发生不同程度变化，理论与实际存在鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出AnInfoNCE，一种InfoNCE的推广形式，能够在各向异性（各潜因子变异性不同）的设定下可证明地恢复潜因子。该方法在理论上泛化了先前的可辨识性结论。
AI.result: 在控制实验中验证了可辨识性结果；在CIFAR10和ImageNet上，AnInfoNCE能恢复先前被压缩丢失的信息，但下游任务准确率有所下降。
AI.conclusion: 指出了理论假设与实际实现之间仍存在的差距，为后续对比学习理论发展提供了方向。

title: Memorization Capacity for Additive Fine-Tuning with Small ReLU Networks
summary: Fine-tuning large pre-trained models is a common practice in machine learning applications, yet its mathematical analysis remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we study fine-tuning through the lens of memorization capacity. Our new measure, the Fine-Tuning Capacity (FTC), is defined as the maximum number of samples a neural network can fine-tune, or equivalently, as the minimum number of neurons ($m$) needed to arbitrarily change $N$ labels among $K$ samples considered in the fine-tuning process. In essence, FTC extends the memorization capacity concept to the fine-tuning scenario. We analyze FTC for the additive fine-tuning scenario where the fine-tuned network is defined as the summation of the frozen pre-trained network $f$ and a neural network $g$ (with $m$ neurons) designed for fine-tuning. When $g$ is a ReLU network with either 2 or 3 layers, we obtain tight upper and lower bounds on FTC; we show that $N$ samples can be fine-tuned with $m=Θ(N)$ neurons for 2-layer networks, and with $m=Θ(\sqrt{N})$ neurons for 3-layer networks, no matter how large $K$ is. Our results recover the known memorization capacity results when $N = K$ as a special case.

AI.tldr: 本文提出微调容量（FTC）概念，研究预训练模型微调的数学基础。针对加法微调场景（冻结预训练网络f，添加可训练网络g），分析了ReLU网络在2层和3层时的FTC上下界：2层网络需要m=Θ(N)个神经元，3层网络仅需m=Θ(√N)个神经元即可任意改变K个样本中N个标签，且与K无关。当N=K时，退化为经典记忆容量结果。
