AI.motivation: 微调大型预训练模型是机器学习中的常见实践，但其数学分析在很大程度上尚未被探索。本文旨在通过记忆容量的视角来研究微调的理论基础。
AI.method: 定义微调容量（FTC）为神经网络可以微调的最大样本数，或等效地，为在K个样本中任意改变N个标签所需的最小神经元数m。针对加法微调场景（冻结预训练网络f + 可训练网络g），分析ReLU网络在2层和3层时的FTC上下界。
AI.result: 对于2层ReLU网络，微调N个样本需要m=Θ(N)个神经元；对于3层ReLU网络，仅需m=Θ(√N)个神经元。且这些结果与样本总数K无关。当N=K时，本文结果恢复已知的记忆容量结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过引入FTC概念，为微调建立了严谨的数学框架，揭示了网络深度对微调效率的关键影响：深层网络（3层）可显著降低微调所需神经元数量。该工作为理解微调的理论基础迈出了重要一步。

title: Nested Bregman Iterations for Decomposition Problems
summary: We consider the task of image reconstruction while simultaneously decomposing the reconstructed image into components with different features. A commonly used tool for this is a variational approach with an infimal convolution of appropriate functions as a regularizer. Especially for noise corrupted observations, incorporating these functionals into the classical method of Bregman iterations provides a robust method for obtaining an overall good approximation of the true image, by stopping early the iteration according to a discrepancy principle. However, crucially, the quality of the separate components depends further on the proper choice of the regularization weights associated to the infimally convoluted functionals. Here, we propose the method of Nested Bregman iterations to improve a decomposition in a structured way. This allows to transform the task of choosing the weights into the problem of stopping the iteration according to a meaningful criterion based on normalized cross-correlation. We discuss the well-definedness and the convergence behavior of the proposed method, and illustrate its strength numerically with various image decomposition tasks employing infimal convolution functionals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出嵌套Bregman迭代方法，通过结构化方式改进图像重建中的分解质量，将正则化权重选择问题转化为基于归一化交叉相关的迭代停止准则，并验证了方法的收敛性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统变分方法使用下确界卷积正则化进行图像重建与分解时，虽然Bregman迭代能通过提前停止获得良好重建，但各分量的质量严重依赖于下确界卷积泛函中正则化权重的选择，而权重选择缺乏系统有效的准则。
AI.method: 提出嵌套Bregman迭代方法，通过结构化地改进分解过程，将正则化权重的选择问题转化为根据归一化交叉相关（NCC）准则确定迭代停止时间的问题，并给出了方法的良定义性和收敛性分析。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在多种使用下确界卷积泛函的图像分解任务中表现优异，能够有效改善分量质量，并通过NCC准则自动确定合理的停止时机。
AI.conclusion: 嵌套Bregman迭代为图像重建与分解中正则化权重的选择提供了系统化解决方案，具有良好的理论保证和实际性能。

title: Lattice Boltzmann for linear elastodynamics: periodic problems and Dirichlet boundary conditions
summary: We propose a new second-order accurate lattice Boltzmann formulation for linear elastodynamics that is stable for arbitrary combinations of material parameters under a CFL-like condition. The construction of the numerical scheme uses an equivalent first-order hyperbolic system of equations as an intermediate step, for which a vectorial lattice Boltzmann formulation is introduced. The only difference to conventional lattice Boltzmann formulations is the usage of vector-valued populations, so that all computational benefits of the algorithm are preserved. Using the asymptotic expansion technique and the notion of pre-stability structures we further establish second-order consistency as well as analytical stability estimates. Lastly, we introduce a second-order consistent initialization of the populations as well as a boundary formulation for Dirichlet boundary conditions on 2D rectangular domains. All theoretical derivations are numerically verified by convergence studies using manufactured solutions and long-term stability tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量种群的新型二阶Lattice Boltzmann格式，用于线性弹性动力学，在CFL条件下对任意材料参数组合保持稳定，并通过理论分析和数值实验验证了二阶一致性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有Lattice Boltzmann方法在弹性动力学中面临稳定性受限的问题，难以兼顾任意材料参数组合下的计算稳定性与精度。
AI.method: 将线性弹性动力学转化为等价的一阶双曲系统，引入向量值种群（vector-valued populations）构建Lattice Boltzmann格式；利用渐近展开技术和预稳定性结构进行理论分析，并设计了二阶一致的初始化和Dirichlet边界条件处理方案。
AI.result: 通过制造解法的收敛性研究和长期稳定性测试，数值验证了格式在CFL条件下的二阶精度和长期稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的向量化Lattice Boltzmann方法在保持算法计算效率的同时，成功实现了对任意材料参数组合的稳定仿真，为弹性动力学问题的数值求解提供了可靠的新途径。

title: PhoTOS: Topology Optimization of Photonic Components using a Shape Library
summary: Topology Optimization (TO) holds the promise of designing next-generation compact and efficient photonic components. However, ensuring the optimized designs comply with fabrication constraints imposed by semiconductor foundries remains a challenge. This work presents a TO framework that guarantees designs satisfy fabrication criteria, particularly minimum feature size and separation. Leveraging recent advancements in machine learning and feature mapping methods, our approach constructs components by transforming shapes from a predefined library, simplifying constraint enforcement. Specifically, we introduce a Convo-implicit Variational Autoencoder to encode the discrete shape library into a differentiable space, enabling gradient-based optimization. The efficacy of our framework is demonstrated through the design of several common photonic components.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于卷积隐式变分自编码器的拓扑优化框架，通过将离散形状库编码为可微空间，在保证制造约束（最小特征尺寸和间距）的前提下实现光子元件的梯度优化设计。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑优化方法在设计光子元件时难以满足半导体代工厂的制造约束（如最小特征尺寸和最小间距），迫切需要一种既能保证优化性能又能确保制造可行性的设计框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种拓扑优化框架，利用卷积隐式变分自编码器（Convo-implicit VAE）将预定义的离散形状库编码为连续可微的潜在空间，通过梯度优化变换形状来构建元件，从而简化制造约束的强制执行。
AI.result: 通过设计多种常见光子元件，验证了所提框架能够保证优化结果满足制造约束条件（最小特征尺寸和间距），并实现有效的梯度优化。
AI.conclusion: 结合机器学习与特征映射方法的拓扑优化框架能够有效解决光子元件设计中的制造约束问题，为下一代紧凑高效光子元件的可制造设计提供可行方案。

title: Methods for Optimization Problems with Markovian Stochasticity and Non-Euclidean Geometry
summary: This paper examines a variety of classical optimization problems, including well-known minimization tasks and more general variational inequalities. We consider a stochastic formulation of these problems, and unlike most previous work, we take into account the complex Markov nature of the noise. We also consider the geometry of the problem in an arbitrary non-Euclidean setting, and propose four methods based on the Mirror Descent iteration technique. Theoretical analysis is provided for smooth and convex minimization problems and variational inequalities with Lipschitz and monotone operators. The convergence guarantees obtained are optimal for first-order stochastic methods, as evidenced by the lower bound estimates provided in this paper.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有马尔可夫噪声和非欧几何结构的随机优化与变分不等式问题，提出了四种基于Mirror Descent的算法，并给出了最优收敛性理论保证。
AI.motivation: 经典随机优化通常假设噪声为独立同分布，但实际应用中噪声往往具有马尔可夫性质；同时多数工作局限于欧几里得空间，忽略了非欧几何结构。本文旨在填补这两个缺口。
AI.method: 基于Mirror Descent迭代技术，针对光滑凸最小化问题和Lipschitz单调变分不等式，提出了四种随机优化方法，并建立了相应的理论分析框架。
AI.result: 所提方法在光滑凸最小化和Lipschitz单调变分不等式上达到一阶随机方法的最优收敛率，并通过下界估计验证了其最优性。
AI.conclusion: 在马尔可夫噪声和非欧几何的联合挑战下，Mirror Descent类方法仍能实现最优收敛，为复杂环境下的随机优化提供了理论支撑和算法方案。

title: Towards understanding Diffusion Models (on Graphs)
summary: Diffusion models have emerged from various theoretical and methodological perspectives, each offering unique insights into their underlying principles. In this work, we provide an overview of the most prominent approaches, drawing attention to their striking analogies -- namely, how seemingly diverse methodologies converge to a similar mathematical formulation of the core problem. While our ultimate goal is to understand these models in the context of graphs, we begin by conducting experiments in a simpler setting to build foundational insights. Through an empirical investigation of different diffusion and sampling techniques, we explore three critical questions: (1) What role does noise play in these models? (2) How significantly does the choice of the sampling method affect outcomes? (3) What function is the neural network approximating, and is high complexity necessary for optimal performance? Our findings aim to enhance the understanding of diffusion models and in the long run their application in graph machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了扩散模型的不同理论视角，发现它们最终收敛于相似的数学形式。通过在简化设置下的实验，作者探究了噪声的作用、采样方法的影响以及神经网络所需复杂度三个核心问题，旨在为图机器学习中的扩散模型应用奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型存在多种理论和方法的视角，各自提供了对其底层原理的独特见解。本文旨在通过梳理这些不同方法之间的惊人类比——即看似多样的方法论如何收敛到核心问题的相似数学表述——来统一理解扩散模型，并最终为图上的扩散模型应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 本文采用理论梳理与实证研究相结合的方法。首先对扩散模型的不同理论视角进行综述，揭示它们数学表述上的相似性。然后通过一个简化设置下的实验，考察不同的扩散和采样技术，系统探究三个关键问题：噪声的作用、采样方法选择的影响程度、以及神经网络近似目标函数及其所需复杂度。
AI.result: 通过对不同扩散和采样技术的实证研究，本文揭示了：（1）噪声在扩散模型中的具体作用机制；（2）采样方法选择对结果的显著影响程度；（3）神经网络近似目标函数的性质以及并非需要极高复杂度就能实现最优性能的发现。
AI.conclusion: 本文的研究发现有助于加深对扩散模型的理解，并为长期目标——在图机器学习中应用扩散模型——奠定基础。不同理论视角的收敛性表明扩散模型具有统一的数学框架，而实验结果为实际应用中的模型设计和优化提供了指导。

title: Distributionally Robust Performative Optimization
summary: In performative stochastic optimization, decisions can influence the distribution of random parameters, rendering the data-generating process itself decision-dependent. In practice, decision-makers rarely have access to the true distribution map and must instead rely on imperfect surrogate models, which can lead to severely suboptimal solutions under misspecification. Data scarcity or costly collection further exacerbates these challenges in real-world settings. To address these challenges, we propose a distributionally robust framework for performative optimization that explicitly accounts for ambiguity in the decision-dependent distribution. Our framework introduces three modeling paradigms that capture a broad range of applications in machine learning and decision-making under uncertainty. This latter setting has not previously been explored in the performative optimization literature. To tackle the intractability of the resulting nonconvex objectives, we develop an iterative algorithm named repeated robust risk minimization, which alternates between solving a decision-independent distributionally robust optimization problem and updating the ambiguity set based on the previous decision. This decoupling ensures computational tractability at each iteration while enhancing robustness to model uncertainty. We provide reformulations compatible with off-the-shelf solvers and establish theoretical guarantees on convergence and suboptimality. Extensive numerical experiments in strategic classification, revenue management, and portfolio optimization demonstrate significant performance gains over state-of-the-art baselines, highlighting the practical value of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个分布鲁棒的策略随机优化框架，通过三种建模范式刻画决策依赖分布中的模糊性，并开发了重复鲁棒风险最小化算法，在策略分类、收入管理和投资组合优化中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 策略优化中决策会影响数据分布，但决策者通常只能使用不完美的替代模型，导致模型误设下解严重次优；此外数据稀缺或收集成本高昂进一步加剧了挑战。
AI.method: 提出分布鲁棒框架，引入三种建模范式；开发重复鲁棒风险最小化算法，交替求解决策独立的分布鲁棒优化问题和基于前次决策更新模糊集；提供兼容现成求解器的重写形式并建立收敛性与次优性理论保证。
AI.result: 在策略分类、收入管理和投资组合优化的广泛数值实验中，该方法显著优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过显式建模分布模糊性有效提升了对模型不确定性的鲁棒性，且算法在保持计算可处理性的同时取得了显著性能提升，具有实用价值。

title: Probabilistic Iterative Hard Thresholding for Sparse Learning
summary: For statistical modeling wherein the data regime is unfavorable in terms of dimensionality relative to the sample size, finding hidden sparsity in the ground truth can be critical in formulating an accurate statistical model. The so-called "l0 norm" which counts the number of non-zero components in a vector, is a strong reliable mechanism of enforcing sparsity when incorporated into an optimization problem for minimizing the fit of a given model to a set of observations. However, in big data settings wherein noisy estimates of the gradient must be evaluated out of computational necessity, the literature is scant on methods that reliably converge. In this paper we present an approach towards solving expectation objective optimization problems with cardinality constraints. We prove convergence of the underlying stochastic process, and demonstrate the performance on two Machine Learning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在期望目标优化问题中处理基数约束的方法，该问题适用于数据维度高、样本量小的统计建模场景。通过引入ℓ0范数强制稀疏性，并在大数据的随机梯度下降环境下证明了随机过程的收敛性，最后在两个机器学习问题上验证了性能。
AI.motivation: 在高维小样本数据环境下，寻找真实模型中的隐藏稀疏性对准确建模至关重要。ℓ0范数是强制稀疏性的有效机制，但在大数据场景下，由于需要基于带噪声的梯度估计进行优化，现有方法缺乏可靠的收敛性保证。
AI.method: 提出了一种求解带基数约束的期望目标优化问题的方法，在随机优化框架下结合ℓ0范数正则化，并对底层的随机过程进行了收敛性证明。
AI.result: 证明了所提随机过程的收敛性，并在两个机器学习问题上展示了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大数据环境下带稀疏性约束的优化问题提供了理论收敛保证，拓展了ℓ0范数在随机优化场景中的适用性。

title: Traversing a thin lubricant film in finite time
summary: In this study, we investigate the dynamics of particles overcoming the hydrodynamic barrier posed by a thin fluid film to achieve contact in finite time, a phenomenon critical in various natural and engineered processes such as enzyme docking, catalysis, and vesicular transport. Using the framework of lubrication theory, which posits that drag force scales inversely with the film thickness, we explore how particles can achieve finite-time contact despite theoretical predictions of infinite time under constant force. We conduct experiments where a spherical particle settles under gravity and magnetic attraction, the latter introducing a spatially varying force. Our findings reveal that a spatially varying force significantly alters the settling trajectory, enabling finite-time contact. The results are supported by a simple model that links hydrodynamic drag and the impact of spatially varying forces. Finally, we illustrate that forces can be inferred from kinematic observations. In the future, this may provide insights into biological and microscale systems where direct force measurements are challenging. Our study demonstrates that varying forces can be harnessed to overcome lubrication barriers, offering potential applications in designing self-assembly systems and improving surface interaction processes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究粒子如何克服薄膜流体动力学屏障实现有限时间接触，通过重力和磁吸引力实验证明空间变化力可改变沉降轨迹，实现有限时间接触，并建立了力-运动学关联模型。
AI.motivation: 理解粒子如何在有限时间内克服薄膜流体动力学屏障（润滑理论预测在恒力下需要无限时间）实现接触，该现象对酶对接、催化、囊泡运输等自然和工程过程至关重要。
AI.method: 基于润滑理论框架，通过球形粒子在重力和磁吸引力（引入空间变化力）下的沉降实验，结合链接流体动力学阻力与空间变化力影响的简单模型进行分析。
AI.result: 空间变化力显著改变粒子的沉降轨迹，使粒子能够实现有限时间接触；力可以从运动学观测中推断得出。
AI.conclusion: 空间变化力可被利用来克服润滑屏障，为自组装系统设计和表面相互作用过程改进提供了潜在应用，未来可为难以直接测力的生物及微尺度系统提供洞察。

title: Diffusion-limited settling of highly porous particles in density-stratified fluids
summary: The vertical transport of solid material in a stratified medium is fundamental to a number of environmental applications, with implications for the carbon cycle and nutrient transport in marine ecosystems. In this work, we study the diffusion-limited settling of highly porous particles in a density-stratified fluid through a combination of experiment, analysis, and numerical simulation. By delineating and appealing to the diffusion-limited regime wherein buoyancy effects due to mass adaptation dominate hydrodynamic drag, we derive a simple expression for the steady settling velocity of a sphere as a function of the density, size, and diffusivity of the solid, as well as the density gradient of the background fluid. In this regime, smaller particles settle faster, in contrast with most conventional hydrodynamic drag mechanisms. Furthermore, we outline a general mathematical framework for computing the steady settling speed of a body of arbitrary shape in this regime and compute exact results for the case of general ellipsoids. Using hydrogels as a highly porous model system, we validate the predictions with laboratory experiments in linear stratification for a wide range of parameters. Lastly, we show how the predictions can be applied to arbitrary slowly varying background density profiles and demonstrate how a measured particle position over time can be used to reconstruct the background density profile.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验、分析和数值模拟研究了高孔隙率颗粒在密度分层流体中的扩散限制沉降，推导了稳态沉降速度的简化表达式，发现小颗粒沉降更快，并提出了适用于任意形状物体的通用数学框架，通过水凝胶实验验证了预测，还展示了如何利用颗粒位置重建背景密度剖面。
AI.motivation: 理解分层介质中固体材料的垂直输运对碳循环和海洋生态系统中的营养物输送等环境应用至关重要，但目前对高孔隙率颗粒在密度分层流体中扩散限制沉降的机制缺乏清晰认识。
AI.method: 结合实验、分析和数值模拟的方法：推导了扩散限制沉降速度的解析表达式；建立了适用于任意形状物体的通用数学框架并计算了椭球体的精确解；以水凝胶作为高孔隙率模型系统进行实验室实验验证。
AI.result: 获得了稳态沉降速度作为颗粒密度、大小、扩散率及背景流体密度梯度的函数表达式；发现在扩散限制沉降中较小颗粒沉降更快（与传统流体动力学拖曳机制相反）；通过水凝胶实验在较宽参数范围内验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的理论可应用于任意缓慢变化的背景密度剖面，且颗粒位置随时间变化的数据可用于重建背景密度分布，为环境监测提供潜在工具。

title: Efficient ensemble uncertainty estimation in Gaussian Processes Regression
summary: Reliable uncertainty measures are required when using data based machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for atomistic simulations. In this work, we propose for sparse Gaussian Process Regression type MLIP a stochastic uncertainty measure akin to the query-by-committee approach often used in conjunction with neural network based MLIPs. The uncertainty measure is coined \textit{"label noise"} ensemble uncertainty as it emerges from adding noise to the energy labels in the training data. We find that this method of calculating an ensemble uncertainty is as well calibrated as the one obtained from the closed-form expression for the posterior variance when the sparse GPR is treated as a projected process. Comparing the two methods, our proposed ensemble uncertainty is, however, faster to evaluate than the closed-form expression. Finally, we demonstrate that the proposed uncertainty measure acts better to support a Bayesian search for optimal structure of Au$_{20}$ clusters.

AI.tldr: 针对稀疏高斯过程回归型机器学习势，提出了一种类似"查询委员会"的随机不确定性度量方法（标签噪声集成不确定性），该度量比闭式后验方差计算更快，且在Au20团簇最优结构贝叶斯搜索中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 在使用基于数据的机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）进行原子模拟时，需要可靠的不确定性度量。现有方法中，神经网络型MLIPs常用查询委员会方法，但稀疏高斯过程回归型MLIPs缺乏高效且校准良好的不确定性度量方案。
AI.method: 提出"标签噪声"集成不确定性：通过向训练数据的能量标签添加噪声来生成集成，类似查询委员会方法。将该方法与稀疏GPR作为投影过程处理时的闭式后验方差表达式进行比较。
AI.result: 提出的集成不确定性度量与闭式后验方差在校准性上相当，但计算速度更快。在Au20团簇最优结构贝叶斯搜索任务中，所提不确定性度量表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 标签噪声集成不确定性是稀疏GPR型MLIP的一种高效且校准良好的替代方案，尤其适用于需要快速不确定性评估的场景，如贝叶斯优化搜索。

title: Modelling wildfire spread and spotfire merger using conformal mapping and AAA-least squares methods
comment: 22 pages, 12 figures. Submitted to Elsevier Environmental Modelling and Software
summary: A two-dimensional model of wildfire spread and merger is presented. Three features affect the fire propagation: (i) a constant basic rate of spread term accounting for radiative and convective heat transfer, (ii) the unidirectional, constant ambient wind, and (iii) a fire-induced pyrogenic wind. Two numerical methods are proposed to solve for the harmonic pyrogenic potential. The first utilizes the conformal invariance of the Laplace equation, reducing the wildfire system to a single Polubarinova-Galin type equation. The second method uses a AAA-least squares method to find a rational approximation of the potential. Various wildfire scenarios are presented and the effects of the pyrogenic wind and the radiative/convective basic rate of spread terms investigated. Firebreaks such as roads and lakes are also included and solutions are found to match well with existing numerical and experimental results. The methods proposed in this work are suitably fast and accurate to be considered for operational use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种二维野火蔓延与合并模型，同时考虑基本蔓延速率、恒定环境风和火源诱导的pyrogenic风，并采用共形映射和AAA-最小二乘法两种数值方法求解调和pyrogenic势，实现了快速准确的操作级模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有野火模型在准确性和计算效率之间难以兼顾，尤其缺乏对火源诱导的pyrogenic风的充分建模。本研究旨在开发一种既快速又准确、可实际用于操作级的野火蔓延模型。
AI.method: 建立二维野火模型，包含三项关键因素：基本辐射/对流热传导蔓延速率、恒定环境风、火源诱导pyrogenic风。利用Laplace方程的共形不变性将系统简化为Polubarinova-Galin型方程；另一种方法采用AAA-最小二乘法对势场进行有理逼近求解。
AI.result: 模拟了多种野火场景，分析了pyrogenic风和辐射/对流基本蔓延速率的影响。成功引入了道路、湖泊等防火障碍物，数值结果与已有实验和数值结果吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两种数值方法兼具速度和精度，具备操作级应用潜力，能够有效模拟真实野火场景中的复杂动力学行为。

title: nekCRF: A next generation high-order reactive low Mach flow solver for direct numerical simulations
summary: Exascale computing enables high-fidelity simulations of chemically reactive flows in practical geometries and conditions, and paves the way for valuable insights that can optimize combustion processes, ultimately reducing emissions and improving fuel combustion efficiency. However, this requires software that can fully leverage the capabilities of current high performance computing systems. The paper introduces nekCRF, a high-order reactive low Mach flow solver specifically designed for this purpose. Its capabilities and efficiency are showcased on the pre-exascale system JUWELS Booster, a GPU-based supercomputer at the Jülich Supercomputing Centre including a validation across diverse cases of varying complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了nekCRF，一个面向百亿亿次计算的高阶反应性低马赫数流动求解器，在GPU超级计算机JUWELS Booster上展示了其处理复杂燃烧仿真的能力与效率。
AI.motivation: 百亿亿次计算能够实现对实际几何和条件下反应性化学流动的高保真仿真，为优化燃烧过程、减少排放和提高燃烧效率提供有价值的洞察。然而，这需要能够充分利用当前高性能计算系统能力的软件。
AI.method: 论文提出了nekCRF，一个高阶反应性低马赫数流动求解器，设计目的是充分利用GPU加速的超级计算系统能力。
AI.result: 在预百亿亿级系统JUWELS Booster（基于GPU的超级计算机）上展示了其能力和效率，并在不同复杂度的案例中进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: nekCRF能够有效利用当前高性能计算系统进行高保真燃烧仿真，有望推动燃烧过程的优化、减排和燃料效率提升。

title: A universal black-box quantum Monte Carlo approach to quantum phase transitions
summary: We derive exact, universal, closed-form quantum Monte Carlo estimators for finite-temperature energy susceptibility and fidelity susceptibility, applicable to essentially arbitrary Hamiltonians. Combined with recent advancements in Monte Carlo, our approach enables a black-box framework for studying quantum phase transitions--without requiring prior knowledge of an order parameter or the manual design of model-specific ergodic quantum Monte Carlo update rules. We demonstrate the utility of our method by applying a single implementation to the transverse-field Ising model, the XXZ model, and an ensemble of models related by random unitaries.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了适用于任意哈密顿量的有限温能量敏感度和保真度敏感度的精确、通用、闭式量子蒙特卡洛估计量，结合最新蒙特卡洛进展，实现了无需先验序参量或手动设计更新规则的量子相变黑箱研究框架，并在横场Ising模型、XXZ模型及随机幺正相关模型集合上验证了其效用。
AI.motivation: 现有量子相变研究方法通常需要提前知道序参量或手动设计特定模型的遍历性量子蒙特卡洛更新规则，缺乏通用性和自动化能力。作者旨在提出一种无需先验知识的黑箱框架，以简化并泛化量子相变的研究过程。
AI.method: 推导了有限温能量敏感度和保真度敏感度的精确、通用、闭式量子蒙特卡洛估计量，这些估计量适用于任意哈密顿量；结合近期蒙特卡洛方法的进展，构建了黑箱框架，自动处理不同模型的量子相变检测。
AI.result: 在横场Ising模型、XXZ模型以及随机幺正相关模型集合上，使用单一实现成功验证了该框架的有效性，表明其能够识别不同量子系统的相变点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了研究量子相变的通用工具，显著降低了对人工干预的依赖，为未来自动化的量子多体系统相变分析奠定了基础。

title: Entropy production in continuous systems with unidirectional transitions
summary: We derive the expression for the entropy production for stochastic dynamics defined on a continuous space of states containing unidirectional transitions. The expression is derived by taking the continuous limit of a stochastic dynamics on a discrete space of states and is based on an expression for the entropy production appropriate for unidirectional transition. Our results shows that the entropy flux is the negative of the divergence of the vector firld whose components are the rates at which a dynamic variable changes in time. For a Hamiltonian dynamical system, it follows from this result that the entropy flux vanish identically.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了包含单向跃迁的连续状态空间中随机动力学熵产生的表达式，通过离散状态空间随机动力学的连续极限获得，证明了熵流是动态变量变化率向量场的负散度，且哈密顿动力学系统中熵流恒为零。
AI.motivation: 将熵产生理论从离散状态空间推广到包含单向跃迁的连续状态空间，以更准确地描述此类系统的不可逆性。
AI.method: 通过取离散状态空间随机动力学的连续极限，并采用适用于单向跃迁的熵产生表达式进行推导。
AI.result: 熵流等于动态变量时间变化率向量场的负散度；对于哈密顿动力系统，熵流恒为零。
AI.conclusion: 该结果统一了连续空间中单向跃迁随机动力学的热力学描述，并揭示了哈密顿系统的时间反演对称性在熵产生框架下的体现。

title: Mini-batch Estimation for Deep Cox Models: Statistical Foundations and Practical Guidance
summary: The stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm has been widely used to optimize deep Cox neural network (Cox-NN) by updating model parameters using mini-batches of data. We show that SGD aims to optimize the average of mini-batch partial-likelihood, which is different from the standard partial-likelihood. This distinction requires developing new statistical properties for the global optimizer, namely, the mini-batch maximum partial-likelihood estimator (mb-MPLE). We establish that mb-MPLE for Cox-NN is consistent and achieves the optimal minimax convergence rate up to a polylogarithmic factor. For Cox regression with linear covariate effects, we further show that mb-MPLE is $\sqrt{n}$-consistent and asymptotically normal with asymptotic variance approaching the information lower bound as batch size increases, which is confirmed by simulation studies. Additionally, we offer practical guidance on using SGD, supported by theoretical analysis and numerical evidence. For Cox-NN, we demonstrate that the ratio of the learning rate to the batch size is critical in SGD dynamics, offering insight into hyperparameter tuning. For Cox regression, we characterize the iterative convergence of SGD, ensuring that the global optimizer, mb-MPLE, can be approximated with sufficiently many iterations. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of mb-MPLE in a large-scale real-world application where the standard MPLE is intractable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用随机梯度下降（SGD）优化深度Cox神经网络（Cox-NN）时的统计性质，证明了小批量最大偏似然估计量（mb-MPLE）的相合性和最优收敛速度，并在线性Cox回归中建立了其渐近正态性和有效性。
AI.motivation: SGD在优化Cox-NN时优化的是小批量偏似然的平均值，而非标准的偏似然函数，因此需要为这一全局优化器（mb-MPLE）建立新的统计性质，填补理论空白。
AI.method: 理论推导mb-MPLE的相合性和收敛率；对线性Cox回归建立$\sqrt{n}$-相合性和渐近正态性；分析学习率与批次大小的比例在SGD动力学中的关键作用；通过模拟和真实数据验证。
AI.result: mb-MPLE具有相合性和最优极小极大收敛率（含polylog因子）；线性Cox回归中mb-MPLE是$\sqrt{n}$-相合且渐近正态的，渐近方差随批次大小增加趋近信息下界；学习率与批次大小之比是SGD动力学的关键超参数。
AI.conclusion: SGD优化Cox-NN得到的mb-MPLE具有良好的统计性质，为实践中使用SGD训练Cox模型提供了理论依据和超参数调优指导。

title: Training Guarantees of Neural Network Classification Two-Sample Tests by Kernel Analysis
summary: We construct and analyze a neural network two-sample test to determine whether two datasets came from the same distribution (null hypothesis) or not (alternative hypothesis). We perform time-analysis on a neural tangent kernel (NTK) two-sample test. In particular, we derive the theoretical minimum training time needed to ensure the NTK two-sample test detects a deviation-level between the datasets. Similarly, we derive the theoretical maximum training time before the NTK two-sample test detects a deviation-level. By approximating the neural network dynamics with the NTK dynamics, we extend this time-analysis to the realistic neural network two-sample test generated from time-varying training dynamics and finite training samples. A similar extension is done for the neural network two-sample test generated from time-varying training dynamics but trained on the population. To give statistical guarantees, we show that the statistical power associated with the neural network two-sample test goes to 1 as the neural network training samples and test evaluation samples go to infinity. Additionally, we prove that the training times needed to detect the same deviation-level in the null and alternative hypothesis scenarios are well-separated. Finally, we run some experiments showcasing a two-layer neural network two-sample test on a hard two-sample test problem and plot a heatmap of the statistical power of the two-sample test in relation to training time and network complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文构建并分析了神经网络双样本检验，基于神经正切核（NTK）推导了检测偏差所需的最小和最大训练时间，给出了统计功效趋于1的理论保证，并通过实验验证了训练时间与网络复杂度对检验效能的影响。
AI.motivation: 为神经网络双样本检验提供严格的理论分析，特别是训练时间与检测能力之间的定量关系，填补现有研究在动态训练过程中统计保证方面的空白。
AI.method: 利用NTK近似神经网络训练动力学，分别分析有限训练样本和总体分布下的时间演化行为；推导检测给定偏差水平所需的最小与最大训练时间；证明训练时间在零假设与备择假设下的可分离性；证明统计功效随样本量趋于无穷而趋近于1。
AI.result: 给出了NTK双样本检验检测偏差的理论最小和最大训练时间；证明了神经网络双样本检验的统计功效在训练样本和测试样本趋于无穷时趋近于1；证明了零假设与备择假设下检测相同偏差所需的训练时间具有良好分离性；实验验证了训练时间和网络复杂度对统计功效的影响。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络双样本检验具有严格的统计理论基础，训练时间与检测能力之间存在可量化的关系，且该方法在困难双样本检验问题上表现良好。

title: Semi-Supervised Sparse Gaussian Classification: Provable Benefits of Unlabeled Data
summary: The premise of semi-supervised learning (SSL) is that combining labeled and unlabeled data yields significantly more accurate models. Despite empirical successes, the theoretical understanding of SSL is still far from complete. In this work, we study SSL for high dimensional sparse Gaussian classification. To construct an accurate classifier a key task is feature selection, detecting the few variables that separate the two classes. % For this SSL setting, we analyze information theoretic lower bounds for accurate feature selection as well as computational lower bounds, assuming the low-degree likelihood hardness conjecture. % Our key contribution is the identification of a regime in the problem parameters (dimension, sparsity, number of labeled and unlabeled samples) where SSL is guaranteed to be advantageous for classification. Specifically, there is a regime where it is possible to construct in polynomial time an accurate SSL classifier. However, % any computationally efficient supervised or unsupervised learning schemes, that separately use only the labeled or unlabeled data would fail. Our work highlights the provable benefits of combining labeled and unlabeled data for {classification and} feature selection in high dimensions. We present simulations that complement our theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文理论分析了半监督学习在高维稀疏高斯分类中的优势，证明了在特定参数区间内，结合有标签和无标签数据能实现多项式时间内的高精度分类器，而纯监督或无监督方法则无法做到。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习虽有实践经验，但理论理解尚不完善，缺乏严格的理论证明来说明为何以及何时结合有标签和无标签数据能带来优势。
AI.method: 针对高维稀疏高斯分类问题，分析特征选择的信息论下界和计算下界（基于低度似然困难性猜想），识别出问题参数（维度、稀疏度、有标签和无标签样本数）的一个特定区间。
AI.result: 发现一个参数区间：在该区间内，可以在多项式时间内构建准确的半监督学习分类器，而任何仅使用有标签数据的监督学习或仅使用无标签数据的无监督学习都无法成功。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习在高维稀疏分类中具有可证明的优势，结合有标签和无标签数据对于特征选择和分类至关重要。模拟结果支持理论分析。

title: A thermodynamically consistent phase-field lattice Boltzmann method for two-phase electrohydrodynamic flows
summary: In this work, we aim to develop a phase-field based lattice Boltzmann (LB) method for simulating two-phase electrohydrodynamics (EHD) flows, which allows for different properties (densities, viscosities, conductivity and permittivity) of each phase while maintaining thermodynamic consistency. To this end, we first present a theoretical analysis on the two-phase EHD flows by using the Onsager's variational principle, which is an extension of Rayleigh's principle of least energy dissipation and, naturally, guarantees thermodynamic consistency. It shows that the governing equations of the model include the hydrodynamic equations, Cahn-Hilliard equation coupled with additional electrical effect, and the full Poisson-Nernst-Planck electrokinetic equations. After that, a coupled lattice Boltzmann (LB) scheme is constructed for simulating two-phase EHD flows. In particular, in order to handle two-phase EHD flows with a relatively larger electric permittivity ratio, we also introduce a delicately designed discrete forcing term into the LB equation for electrostatic field. Moreover, some numerical examples including two-phase EHD flows in planar layers and charge diffusion of a Gaussian bell are simulated with the developed LB method. It is shown that our numerical scheme shares a second-order convergence rate in space in predicting electric potential and charge density. Finally, we used the current model to simulate the deformation of a droplet under an electric field and the dynamics of droplet detachment in reversed electrowetting. Our numerical results align well with the theoretic solutions, and the available experimental/numerical data, demonstrating that the proposed method is feasible for simulating two-phase EHD flows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相场格子玻尔兹曼（LB）的两相电流体动力学（EHD）方法，允许各相具有不同物性并保持热力学一致性，通过Onsager变分原理推导控制方程，引入精心设计的离散力项处理高介电常数比，数值实验验证了二阶精度和与理论/实验的良好吻合。
AI.motivation: 现有两相EHD方法难以同时实现不同相物性（密度、黏度、电导率、介电常数）的灵活处理与热力学一致性，同时在高介电常数比条件下数值稳定性不足。
AI.method: 基于Onsager变分原理理论分析两相EHD流，推导含电效应的Cahn-Hilliard方程与完整Poisson-Nernst-Planck电动力学方程；构建耦合LB格式，引入精细设计的离散力项处理高介电常数比下的静电场问题。
AI.result: 数值格式在电势和电荷密度预测上达到空间二阶收敛；液滴变形与反电势润湿中液滴脱离的模拟结果与理论解和实验/数值数据吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 所提相场LB方法能有效模拟不同物性、高介电常数比的两相EHD流，具备热力学一致性和良好精度，具有实际应用可行性。

title: The backscattering problem for time-dependent potentials
summary: We study the inverse backscattering problem for time-dependent potentials. We prove uniqueness and Lipshitz stability for the recovery of small potentials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了时变势场的逆反散射问题，证明了小势场恢复的唯一性和Lipschitz稳定性。
AI.motivation: 反散射问题在众多科学和工程领域（如地球物理、医学成像、雷达探测等）中具有重要应用。现有研究多针对时间无关势场，而时变势场的逆反散射问题在数学理论和实际应用中更具挑战性，目前研究尚不充分。作者旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 论文采用数学分析的方法，对时变势场下的逆反散射问题进行建模。通过建立从散射数据到势场的映射，并利用泛函分析和偏微分方程理论，分析该映射在小势场条件下的性质，从而证明解的存在唯一性和稳定性。
AI.result: 成功证明了对于小势场，逆反散射问题的解是唯一的，并且该问题具有Lipschitz稳定性，即势场的微小变化会导致散射数据的变化在Lipschitz意义下有界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为时变势场的逆反散射问题提供了坚实的理论基础，证明了在小扰动条件下问题的适定性。这为后续开发实际数值重建算法奠定了基础，并推动了时变介质反散射理论的发展。

title: Toricity in families of Fano varieties
comment: 28 pages, to appear in Pure Appl. Math. Q. (special issue in honor of Caucher Birkar)
summary: Rationality is not a constructible property in families. In this article, we consider stronger notions of rationality and study their behavior in families of Fano varieties. We first show that being toric is a constructible property in families of Fano varieties. The second main result of this article concerns an intermediate notion that lies between toric and rational varieties, namely cluster type varieties. A cluster type $\mathbb Q$-factorial Fano variety contains an open dense algebraic torus, but the variety does not need to be endowed with a torus action. We prove that, in families of $\mathbb Q$-factorial terminal Fano varieties, being of cluster type is a constructible condition. As a consequence, we show that there are finitely many smooth families parametrizing $n$-dimensional smooth cluster type Fano varieties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Fano簇族中若干有理性的可构造性。主要结果：toric性质在Fano簇族中是可构造的；cluster类型（介于toric与有理之间）在ℚ-析因终末Fano簇族中也是可构造的；进而证明了光滑cluster型Fano簇仅有有限多个光滑族。
AI.motivation: 有理性质本身在簇族中不可构造，因此需要寻找更强的、可构造的合理性概念来研究Fano簇族的分类问题。
AI.method: 通过分析toric性质与cluster类型（包含开稠密代数环面但无需环面作用）在Fano簇族中的可构造性，结合ℚ-析因终末Fano簇的约束条件进行证明。
AI.result: (1) toric性质在Fano簇族中可构造；(2) cluster类型在ℚ-析因终末Fano簇族中可构造；(3) 存在有限多个光滑族参数化n维光滑cluster型Fano簇。
AI.conclusion: 在Fano簇族中，toric性质和cluster类型都是可构造的；光滑cluster型Fano簇的分类仅有有限多个光滑族。

title: Singularity categories of rational double points in arbitrary characteristic
comment: We claim the singularity category of a RDP is standard by showing the corresponding mesh algebra and Auslander algebra have the same dimension. The crucial step is Remark 2.8. However, Hideto Asashiba and Osamu Iyama have pointed out that in Remark 2.8 there is no surjection from the mesh algebra to the Auslander algebra in general. Hence we need to construct a surjection or take another strategy
summary: We establish a one-to-one correspondence between the singularity categories of rational double points and the simply-laced Dynkin graphs in arbitrary characteristic. This correspondence is well-known in characteristic zero since the rational double points are quotient singularities in characteristic zero whereas not necessarily in positive characteristic. Considering some rational double points are not taut in characteristic two, three or five, we can see there exist two rational double points which are not analytically isomorphic but whose singularity categories are triangulated equivalent. As an application, we construct a counter-example in positive characteristic of a theorem of Hua and Keller: the dg singularity category of a hypersurface singularity determines its Tyurina algebra.

AI.tldr: 本文在任意特征域上建立了有理二重点的奇点范畴与简单连缀Dynkin图之间的一一对应关系，并发现特征为2、3、5时存在不同解析型但有相同三角等价奇点范畴的有理二重点，进而构造了Hua-Keller定理在正特征情形下的反例。
AI.motivation: 经典结论在特征零下成立（因有理二重点是商奇点），但在正特征下有理二重点不一定是商奇点，且存在非taut的情况，因此需要重新建立对应关系并探究奇点范畴的三角等价性。
AI.method: 通过建立有理二重点奇点范畴与简单连缀Dynkin图之间的一一对应，利用某些特征下有理二重点的非taut性质，比较不同解析类型的奇点范畴是否三角等价。
AI.result: 证明了在任意特征下奇点范畴与Dynkin图仍有一一对应；发现特征2、3、5中存在非解析同构但奇点范畴三角等价的有理二重点；构造了Hua-Keller定理（超曲面奇点的dg奇点范畴决定其Tyurina代数）在正特征下的反例。
AI.conclusion: 奇点范畴的三角等价性比解析同构更粗糙，正特征下Hua-Keller定理不成立。

title: Inverse coefficient problems for one-dimensional time-fractional diffusion equations
summary: We prove the uniqueness in determining a spatially varying zeroth-order coefficient of a one-dimensional time-fractional diffusion equation by initial value and Cauchy data at one end point of the spatial interval.

AI.tldr: 通过初值和单端点柯西数据，唯一确定了时间分数阶扩散方程中空间变化零阶系数。
AI.motivation: 研究一维时间分数阶扩散方程中零阶系数的唯一确定性问题，该问题在反常扩散模型的参数反演中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 利用初值条件和单端点处的柯西数据（即边界处的函数值和通量值），通过分析正演解的性质并结合反证法，证明零阶系数的唯一性。
AI.result: 证明了仅需给定初值及一端点的柯西数据，即可唯一确定空间变化的零阶系数。
AI.conclusion: 该结论表明，对于时间分数阶扩散方程，在较为稀疏的观测数据条件下仍能实现系数反演的唯一性，为实际应用中的参数识别提供了理论保证。

title: Uniqueness of positive radial solutions of Choquard type equations
summary:
In this paper, we consider the following Choquard type equation \begin{equation} \left\{\begin{aligned} &-Δu+λu=γ(Φ_N(|x|)\ast|u|^p)u \ \ \mbox{in $\mathbb{R}^N$}, \\ &\lim\limits_{|x|\to\infty}u(x)=0,\\ \end{aligned}\right. \end{equation}
  where $N\geq2,λ>0,γ>0, p\in[1,2]$ and $Φ_N(|x|)$ denotes the fundamental solution of the Laplacian $-Δ$ on $\mathbb{R}^N$. This equation does not have a variational frame when $p\neq 2.$ Instead of variational methods, we prove the existence and uniqueness of positive radial solutions of the above equation via the shooting method by establishing some new differential inequalities. The proofs are based on an analysis of the corresponding system of second-order differential equations, and our results extend the existing ones in the literature from $p=2$ to $p\in[1,2]$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过打靶法（shooting method）研究了Choquard型方程在$p\in[1,2]$范围内正径向解的存在性与唯一性，将已有结果从$p=2$推广到了更一般的指数范围，并建立了新的微分不等式作为分析工具。
AI.motivation: 该方程在$p\neq2$时缺乏变分框架，传统的变分方法无法直接适用，因此需要发展新的非变分分析工具来建立解的存在性与唯一性。
AI.method: 采用打靶法（shooting method），通过分析对应的二阶微分方程组，建立新的微分不等式，从而绕开变分框架的限制。
AI.result: 成功证明了当$N\geq2,\lambda>0,\gamma>0,p\in[1,2]$时，该Choquard型方程存在唯一的正径向解。
AI.conclusion: 将Choquard方程正径向解的存在唯一性结果从已知的$p=2$情形推广到了$p\in[1,2]$的更广泛范围，为非变分框架下的此类方程提供了新的分析方法。

title: Group schemes over LG-rings and applications to cancellation theorems and Azumaya algebras
summary: We prove several results on reductive group schemes over LG-rings, e.g., existence of maximal tori and conjugacy of parabolic subgroups. These were  proven in SGA3 for the special case of semilocal rings. We apply these results to establish cancellation theorems for hermitian and quadratic forms over LG-rings and show that the Brauer classes of Azumaya algebras over connected LG-rings have a unique representative and allow Brauer decomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文在LG环上证明了约化群概形的若干结果（如极大环面的存在性、抛物子群的共轭性），并将SGA3中的半局部环情形推广到更一般的LG环；进而运用这些结论建立了LG环上埃尔米特型和二次型的消去定理，并证明连通LG环上Azumaya代数的Brauer类有唯一代表元且允许Brauer分解。
AI.motivation: 将SGA3中关于半局部环上约化群概形的经典结果（极大环面存在性、抛物子群共轭性）推广到更一般的LG环上，并利用这些代数群论结果解决LG环上埃尔米特型和二次型的消去问题，以及Azumaya代数的Brauer理论中的唯一性和分解问题。
AI.method: 在LG环框架下，利用约化群概形理论，推广SGA3中的技术方法，建立极大环面存在性和抛物子群共轭性等基本结构定理；随后将这些结构结果应用于埃尔米特型/二次型的消去定理证明，以及Azumaya代数的Brauer类唯一代表元和Brauer分解的证明。
AI.result: (1) 在LG环上证明了约化群概形存在极大环面且抛物子群共轭；(2) 建立了LG环上埃尔米特型和二次型的消去定理；(3) 证明了连通LG环上Azumaya代数的Brauer类有唯一代表元；(4) 证明了连通LG环上Brauer类允许Brauer分解。
AI.conclusion: 本文将SGA3关于半局部环的经典结果推广至LG环，并成功应用于埃尔米特型/二次型的消去理论以及Azumaya代数的Brauer理论，揭示了LG环上代数结构与不变量之间的深层联系。

title: Predicting Elevated Risk of Hospitalization Following Emergency Department Discharges
summary: Hospitalizations that follow closely on the heels of one or more emergency department visits are often symptoms of missed opportunities to form a proper diagnosis. These diagnostic errors imply a failure to recognize the need for hospitalization and deliver appropriate care, and thus also bear important connotations for patient safety. In this paper, we show how data mining techniques can be applied to a large existing hospitalization data set to learn useful models that predict these upcoming hospitalizations with high accuracy. Specifically, we use an ensemble of logistics regression, naïve Bayes and association rule classifiers to successfully predict hospitalization within 3, 7 and 14 days of an emergency department discharge. Aside from high accuracy, one of the advantages of the techniques proposed here is that the resulting classifier is easily inspected and interpreted by humans so that the learned rules can be readily operationalized. These rules can then be easily distributed and applied directly by physicians in emergency department settings to predict the risk of early admission prior to discharging their emergency department patients.

AI.tldr: 本文利用数据挖掘技术（集成逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯和关联规则分类器），从大规模住院数据集中学习高精度预测模型，用于预测急诊出院后3、7、14天内再次入院的风险，且模型易于解释和临床应用。
AI.motivation: 急诊出院后短期内再次入院往往反映了诊断错误和错失及时治疗的机会，影响患者安全。现有方法缺乏高精度且可解释的预测工具，因此需要一种既能准确预测风险又便于医生理解和应用的方法。
AI.method: 采用集成学习方法，组合逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯和关联规则分类器三种模型，对大规模历史住院数据集进行训练，预测急诊出院后3天、7天和14天内的再住院风险。
AI.result: 集成分类器在预测急诊出院后3、7、14天内再住院方面达到了高准确率，且生成的规则具有良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法不仅预测精度高，更重要的是生成的规则易于人类理解和操作，可直接分发并在急诊科由医生应用，帮助在患者出院前评估早期再入院风险，从而改善患者安全。

title: On the Limitations and Prospects of Machine Unlearning for Generative AI
summary: Generative AI (GenAI), which aims to synthesize realistic and diverse data samples from latent variables or other data modalities, has achieved remarkable results in various domains, such as natural language, images, audio, and graphs. However, they also pose challenges and risks to data privacy, security, and ethics. Machine unlearning is the process of removing or weakening the influence of specific data samples or features from a trained model, without affecting its performance on other data or tasks. While machine unlearning has shown significant efficacy in traditional machine learning tasks, it is still unclear if it could help GenAI become safer and aligned with human desire. To this end, this position paper provides an in-depth discussion of the machine unlearning approaches for GenAI. Firstly, we formulate the problem of machine unlearning tasks on GenAI and introduce the background. Subsequently, we systematically examine the limitations of machine unlearning on GenAI models by focusing on the two representative branches: LLMs and image generative (diffusion) models. Finally, we provide our prospects mainly from three aspects: benchmark, evaluation metrics, and utility-unlearning trade-off, and conscientiously advocate for the future development of this field.

AI.tldr: 本文系统探讨了生成式AI中的机器遗忘技术，重点分析了其在LLM和图像扩散模型中的应用局限，并从基准测试、评估指标和效用-遗忘权衡三方面展望了未来发展。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在多个领域取得显著成功，但也带来了数据隐私、安全和伦理方面的挑战。机器遗忘虽在传统ML中有效，但能否帮助GenAI变得更安全、更符合人类期望尚不明确，因此需要深入探讨。
AI.method: 首先形式化GenAI上的机器遗忘任务并介绍背景；然后通过两个代表性分支（LLMs和图像扩散模型）系统检验机器遗忘在GenAI模型上的局限性；最后从基准测试、评估指标和效用-遗忘权衡三个方面提出前景展望。
AI.result: 揭示了当前机器遗忘在生成式AI模型上面临的显著局限性，特别是在LLM和扩散模型这两类代表性模型中的具体挑战。
AI.conclusion: 作者倡导该领域未来的发展应聚焦于建立统一的基准测试、完善评估指标以及优化效用与遗忘之间的权衡关系。

title: IMEX-RK finite volume methods for nonlinear 1d parabolic PDEs. Application to option pricing
summary: The goal of this paper is to develop 2nd order Implicit-Explicit Runge-Kutta (IMEX-RK) finite volume (FV) schemes for solving 1d parabolic PDEs for option pricing, with possible nonlinearities in the source and advection terms. The spatial semi-discretization of the advection is carried out by combining finite volume methods with 2nd order state reconstructions; while the diffusive terms are discretized using second-order finite differences. The time integration is performed by means of IMEX-RK time integrators: the advection is treated explicitly, and the diffusion, implicitly. The obtained numerical schemes have several advantages: they are computationally very efficient, thanks to the implicit discretization of the diffusion in the IMEX-RK time integrators, which allows to overcome the strict time step restriction; they yield second-order accuracy for even nonlinear problems and with non-regular initial conditions; and they can be extended to higher order.

AI.tldr: 本文针对期权定价中的一维抛物型偏微分方程，开发了二阶隐式-显式龙格-库塔（IMEX-RK）有限体积格式，通过显式处理对流项、隐式处理扩散项，在保证二阶精度的同时突破了严格的时间步长限制，计算效率高且可扩展至高阶。
AI.motivation: 期权定价问题中的抛物型PDE通常包含对流和扩散项，显式时间离散受扩散项刚性的严格步长限制，而全隐式方法计算成本高。现有方法在处理非线性源项和非正则初始条件时精度或效率不足，因此需要开发兼具高效性与二阶精度的数值格式。
AI.method: 空间半离散化：对流项采用有限体积法结合二阶状态重构；扩散项采用二阶有限差分。时间积分：采用IMEX-RK时间积分器，对流项显式处理，扩散项隐式处理，从而克服扩散带来的严格时间步长限制。
AI.result: 所提出的IMEX-RK有限体积格式具有计算高效性（隐式扩散离散避免了严格步长约束）、对非线性问题和非正则初始条件均保持二阶精度，并且可扩展至更高阶格式。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功开发了适用于期权定价PDE的二阶IMEX-RK有限体积格式，验证了其在非线性问题和非正则初始条件下的二阶精度与计算效率优势，且具备向高阶扩展的潜力。

title: Uniform approximation of vectors using adaptive randomized information
summary: We study approximation of the embedding $\ell_p^m \rightarrow \ell_{\infty}^m$, $1 \leq p \leq 2$, based on randomized adaptive algorithms that use arbitrary linear functionals as information on a problem instance. We show upper bounds for which the complexity $n$ exhibits only a $(\log\log m)$-dependence. Our results for $p=1$ lead to an example of a gap of order $n$ (up to logarithmic factors) for the error between best adaptive and non-adaptive Monte Carlo methods. This is the largest possible gap for linear problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从ℓ_p^m到ℓ_∞^m嵌入的近似问题（1≤p≤2），基于使用任意线性泛函作为信息的随机自适应算法。结果表明复杂度n仅呈现(log log m)依赖关系。当p=1时，在自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间出现了n阶（对数因子内）的误差差距，这是线性问题中可能的最大差距。
AI.motivation: 研究自适应随机算法在ℓ_p^m→ℓ_∞^m嵌入近似问题中的信息复杂度，特别是探索自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间可能存在的误差差距上界。
AI.method: 采用基于任意线性泛函作为信息的随机自适应算法，对1≤p≤2范围内的ℓ_p^m→ℓ_∞^m嵌入进行近似分析，推导复杂度上界。
AI.result: 复杂度n仅呈现(log log m)依赖关系的上界；当p=1时，自适应与非自适应蒙特卡洛方法之间存在n阶（对数因子内）的误差差距。
AI.conclusion: 对于线性问题，自适应方法可带来最大可能的n阶误差优势，这一差距在对数因子内达到最优。

title: Mittag-Leffler stability of complete monotonicity-preserving schemes for time-dependent coefficients sub-diffusion equations
summary: A key characteristic of the anomalous sub-solution equation is that the solution exhibits algebraic decay rate over long time intervals, which is often refered to the Mittag-Leffler type stability. For a class of power nonlinear sub-diffusion models with variable coefficients, we prove that their solutions have Mittag-Leffler stability when the source functions satisfy natural decay assumptions. That is the solutions have the decay rate $\|u(t)\|_{L^{s}(Ω)}=O\left( t^{-(α+β)/γ} \right)$ as $t\rightarrow\infty$, where $α$, $γ$ are positive constants, $β\in(-α,\infty)$ and $s\in (1,\infty)$. Then we develop the structure preserving algorithm for this type of model. For the complete monotonicity-preserving ($\mathcal{CM}$-preserving) schemes developed by Li and Wang (Commun. Math. Sci., 19(5):1301-1336, 2021), we prove that they satisfy the discrete comparison principle for time fractional differential equations with variable coefficients. Then, by carefully constructing the fine the discrete supsolution and subsolution, we obtain the long time optimal decay rate of the numerical solution $\|u_{n}\|_{L^{s}(Ω)}=O\left( t_n^{-(α+β)/γ} \right)$ as $t_{n}\rightarrow\infty$, which is fully agree with the theoretical solution. Finally, we validated the analysis results through numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了变系数幂非线性次扩散模型解的Mittag-Leffler型稳定性（代数衰减率），并发展了保持该衰减率的结构保持算法，通过构造精细的离散上下解，证明了数值解与理论解具有完全一致的最优长时间衰减率。
AI.motivation: 变系数幂非线性次扩散模型的解具有Mittag-Leffler型代数衰减率，但已有数值方法难以在长时间模拟中保持这一关键特征，需要开发能保持这一结构特性的算法并给出严格的理论保证。
AI.method: 1) 理论上证明当源函数满足自然衰减假设时，解具有$\|u(t)\|_{L^s}=O(t^{-(\alpha+\beta)/\gamma})$的衰减率；2) 基于Li和Wang的完全单调性保持（CM-保持）格式，证明其满足变系数时间分数阶微分方程的离散比较原理；3) 通过精细构造离散上下解，推导数值解的长时间最优衰减率。
AI.result: 证明了变系数幂非线性次扩散模型解具有Mittag-Leffler稳定性（代数衰减率$\|u(t)\|_{L^s}=O(t^{-(\alpha+\beta)/\gamma})$）；证明了CM-保持格式满足离散比较原理；构造的离散上下解使得数值解的衰减率$\|u_n\|_{L^s}=O(t_n^{-(\alpha+\beta)/\gamma})$与理论解完全一致；数值实验验证了理论分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功建立了变系数幂非线性次扩散模型解与数值解在长时间行为上的一致性，所发展的结构保持算法能够精确复现解的Mittag-Leffler型代数衰减率，为该类模型的长时间可靠数值模拟提供了理论基础。

title: A consistently adaptive trust-region method
comment: This submission contains a fix for the Quadratic convergence proof under Appendix B (Proof of Theorem 2)
summary: Adaptive trust-region methods attempt to maintain strong convergence guarantees without depending on conservative estimates of problem properties such as Lipschitz constants. However, on close inspection, one can show existing adaptive trust-region methods have theoretical guarantees with severely suboptimal dependence on problem properties such as the Lipschitz constant of the Hessian. For example, TRACE developed by Curtis et al. obtains a $O(Δ_f L^{3/2} ε^{-3/2}) + \tilde{O}(1)$ iteration bound where $L$ is the Lipschitz constant of the Hessian. Compared with the optimal $O(Δ_f L^{1/2} ε^{-3/2})$ bound this is suboptimal with respect to $L$. We present the first adaptive trust-region method which circumvents this issue and requires at most $O( Δ_f L^{1/2} ε^{-3/2}) + \tilde{O}(1)$ iterations to find an $ε$-approximate stationary point, matching the optimal iteration bound up to an additive logarithmic term. Our method is a simple variant of a classic trust-region method and in our experiments performs competitively with both ARC and a classical trust-region method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个自适应信赖域方法，在达到最优迭代复杂度 $O(Δ_f L^{1/2} ε^{-3/2})$ 的同时避免了对问题性质（如Hessian Lipschitz常数）的次优依赖，实验性能与ARC和经典信赖域方法相当。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应信赖域方法（如TRACE）的理论保证对问题性质（如Hessian的Lipschitz常数L）存在严重次优依赖，例如TRACE的迭代复杂度为 $O(Δ_f L^{3/2} ε^{-3/2})$，而最优界为 $O(Δ_f L^{1/2} ε^{-3/2})$。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出一种经典信赖域方法的简单变体，通过重新设计自适应机制，避免了传统方法对Lipschitz常数的高阶依赖，实现了与最优界匹配的迭代复杂度（至多相差一个可加对数项）。
AI.result: 方法达到 $O(Δ_f L^{1/2} ε^{-3/2}) + \tilde{O}(1)$ 的迭代上界，匹配最优复杂度；实验表明与ARC及经典信赖域方法性能竞争。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明了自适应信赖域方法可以在不牺牲收敛保证的前提下达到最优复杂度，且实现简单、实用性强。

title: Lyapunov Neural ODE State-Feedback Control Policies
summary: Deep neural networks are increasingly used as an effective parameterization of control policies in various learning-based control paradigms. For continuous-time optimal control problems (OCPs), which are central to many decision-making tasks, control policy learning can be cast as a neural ordinary differential equation (NODE) problem wherein state and control constraints are naturally accommodated. This paper presents a NODE approach to solving continuous-time OCPs for the case of stabilizing a known constrained nonlinear system around a target state. The approach, termed Lyapunov-NODE control (L-NODEC), uses a novel Lyapunov loss formulation that incorporates an exponentially-stabilizing control Lyapunov function to learn a state-feedback neural control policy, bridging the gap of solving continuous-time OCPs via NODEs with stability guarantees. The proposed Lyapunov loss allows L-NODEC to guarantee exponential stability of the controlled system, as well as its adversarial robustness to perturbations to the initial state. The performance of L-NODEC is illustrated in two problems, including a dose delivery problem in plasma medicine. In both cases, L-NODEC effectively stabilizes the controlled system around the target state despite perturbations to the initial state and reduces the inference time necessary to reach the target.

AI.tldr: 本文提出L-NODEC方法，利用李雅普诺夫损失函数将神经ODE与稳定性保证结合，用于求解带约束的连续时间最优控制问题，在两种场景（包括等离子医学剂量输送）中验证了其指数稳定性和对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 连续时间最优控制问题在决策任务中至关重要，但现有神经ODE方法缺乏稳定性保证。本文旨在弥补这一空白，为学习状态反馈神经控制策略提供指数稳定性保障。
AI.method: 提出L-NODEC框架，将控制策略学习建模为神经ODE问题，设计基于指数稳定控制李雅普诺夫函数的新型李雅普诺夫损失函数，用于训练状态反馈神经控制策略，同时处理状态和控制约束。
AI.result: 在等离子医学剂量输送等两个问题中，L-NODEC能有效将受控系统稳定在目标状态附近，抵抗初始状态扰动，并减少达到目标所需的推理时间。
AI.conclusion: L-NODEC通过李雅普诺夫损失实现了神经ODE求解连续时间OCP的指数稳定性保证和对初始扰动的对抗鲁棒性，为安全关键控制任务提供了理论保障。

title: Mechanism design for coordinating vehicle-based mobile sensing tasks within the ride-hailing platform
summary: This paper evaluates the benefit of integrating vehicle-based mobile crowd-sensing tasks into the ride-hailing system through the collaboration between the data user and the ride-hailing platform. In such a system, the ride-hailing platform commissions high-valued sensing tasks to idle drivers who can undertake either ride-hailing or sensing requests. Considering the different service requirements and time windows between sensing and ride-hailing requests, we design a staggered operation strategy for ride-hailing order matching and the sensing task assignment. The auction-based mechanisms are employed to minimize costs while incentivizing driver participation in mobile sensing. To address the budget deficit problem of the primal VCG-based task assignment mechanism, we refine the driver selection approach and tailor the payment rule by imposing additional budget constraints. We demonstrate the benefits of our proposed mechanism through a series of numerical experiments using the NYC Taxi data. Experimental results reveal the potential of the mechanism for achieving high completion rates of sensing tasks at low social costs without degrading ride-hailing services. Furthermore, drivers who participate in both mobile sensing tasks and ride-hailing requests may gain higher income, but this advantage may diminish with an increasing number of such drivers and higher demand for ride-hailing services.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将车辆移动群智感知任务整合到网约车系统中的协作机制，通过拍卖机制和交错运营策略，在预算约束下优化感知任务分配与网约车订单匹配，实验表明该机制能以较低社会成本完成感知任务且不影响网约车服务质量。
AI.motivation: 现有网约车系统中存在大量空闲司机资源未被充分利用，同时移动群智感知任务需要低成本、高效的执行方式。本文旨在通过数据用户与网约车平台的协作，将感知任务分配给空闲司机，实现资源共享与多方共赢。
AI.method: 设计了感知任务与网约车订单的交错运营策略；采用基于拍卖的机制（VCG变体）进行任务分配；针对VCG预算赤字问题，改进了司机选择方法并定制了带预算约束的支付规则。
AI.result: 基于纽约出租车数据的数值实验表明：所提机制能以较低社会成本实现高感知任务完成率，且不降低网约车服务质量；参与双模式工作的司机收入更高，但该优势随此类司机数量和网约车需求增加而减弱。
AI.conclusion: 融合移动群智感知与网约车的协作机制是可行的，能有效平衡各方利益，但需注意双模式司机规模过大会稀释其收入优势。

title: Comparison of control regularization techniques for minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectory design using indirect methods
summary: Minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectories typically consist of a finite, yet unknown number of switches in the thrust magnitude profile. This optimality-driven characteristic of minimum-fuel trajectories poses a challenge to the numerical methods that are typically used for solving the resulting Hamiltonian boundary-value problems (BVPs). In this paper, we compare the impact of the popular hyperbolic-tangent-based smoothing with a novel L2-norm-based smoothing on the convergence performance of quasi-Newton gradient-based methods. Both smoothing methods are applied directly at the level of control, which offer a significant implementation simplicity. We also investigate the application of each method in scenarios where the State Transition Matrix (STM) is used for accurate calculation of the sensitivities of the residual vector of the resulting BVPs with respect to the unknown initial costate values. The effectiveness of each control smoothing method is assessed across several benchmark minimum-fuel low-thrust trajectory optimization problems.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了双曲正切平滑与L2范数平滑两种方法在最小燃料低推力轨迹优化中的收敛性能，结果表明直接在控制层应用平滑方法能简化实现，且结合状态转移矩阵可提高灵敏度计算精度。
AI.motivation: 最小燃料低推力轨迹通常具有有限但未知数量的推力幅值开关，这种最优性驱动的特性给求解哈密顿边值问题的数值方法带来了挑战。
AI.method: 在控制层直接应用双曲正切平滑和L2范数平滑，使用拟牛顿梯度法求解，并引入状态转移矩阵精确计算残差向量对未知初始协态值的灵敏度。
AI.result: 在多个基准最小燃料低推力轨迹优化问题中评估了两种控制平滑方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: L2范数平滑作为一种新型平滑方法，与传统的双曲正切平滑相比，在收敛性能上具有竞争力，且两种方法在控制层直接应用均能显著简化实现复杂度。

title: Learning rheological parameters of non-Newtonian fluids from velocimetry data
summary: We solve a Bayesian inverse Navier-Stokes (N-S) problem that assimilates velocimetry data in order to jointly reconstruct the flow field and learn the unknown N-S parameters. By incorporating a Carreau shear-thinning viscosity model into the N-S problem, we devise an algorithm that learns the most likely Carreau parameters of a shear-thinning fluid, and estimates their uncertainties, from velocimetry data alone. We then conduct a flow-MRI experiment to obtain velocimetry data of an axisymmetric laminar jet through an idealised medical device (FDA nozzle) for a blood analogue fluid. We show that the algorithm can successfully reconstruct the flow field by learning the most likely Carreau parameters, and that the learned parameters are in very good agreement with rheometry measurements. The algorithm accepts any algebraic effective viscosity model, as long as the model is differentiable, and it can be extended to more complicated non-Newtonian fluids (e.g. Oldroyd-B fluid) if a viscoelastic model is incorporated into the N-S problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯逆纳维-斯托克斯（N-S）算法，通过同化流速测量数据来联合重建流场并学习未知的N-S参数。该算法采用Carreau剪切稀化粘度模型，从流速数据中学习最可能的Carreau参数并估计其不确定性。通过FDA喷嘴中轴层流射流的flow-MRI实验验证，算法成功重建流场且学习参数与流变测量结果高度吻合。
AI.motivation: 从流速测量数据中同时重建流场和推断非牛顿流体的本构参数（如Carreau模型参数），避免依赖传统流变仪测量，并量化参数不确定性。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯逆问题的框架，将Carreau剪切稀化粘度模型耦合到N-S方程中，利用流速数据通过最大似然估计学习Carreau参数，并采用flow-MRI实验获取FDA喷嘴中血液模拟流体的轴对称层流射流数据验证算法。
AI.result: 算法成功重建了流场，学习得到的Carreau参数与独立流变测量结果高度一致，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可接受任意可微的代数有效粘度模型，并可扩展至更复杂的非牛顿流体（如Oldroyd-B型粘弹性流体），为无需流变仪的非牛顿流体参数辨识提供了新途径。

title: Kolmogorov-size particles in homogeneous and isotropic turbulence
summary: We investigate the fluid-solid interaction of suspensions of Kolmogorov-size spherical particles moving in homogeneous isotropic turbulence at a microscale Reynolds number of $Re_λ\approx 140$. Two volume fractions are considered, $10^{-5}$ and $10^{-3}$, and the solid-to-fluid density ratio is set to $5$ and $100$. We present a comparison between interface-resolved (PR-DNS) and one-way-coupled point-particle (PP-DNS) direct numerical simulations. We find that the modulated energy spectrum shows the classical $-5/3$ Kolmogorov scaling in the inertial range of scales and a $-4$ scaling at smaller scales, with the latter resulting from a balance between the energy injected by the particles and the viscous dissipation, in an otherwise smooth flow. An analysis of the small-scale flow topology shows that the particles mainly favour events with axial strain and vortex compression. The dynamics of the particles and their collective motion studied for PR-DNS are used to assess the validity of the PP-DNS. We find that the PP-DNS predicts fairly well both the Lagrangian and Eulerian statistics of the particles motion for the low-density case, while some discrepancies are observed for the high-density case. Also, the PP-DNS is found to underpredict the level of clustering of the suspension compared to the PR-DNS, with a larger difference for the high-density case.

AI.tldr: 本文通过界面分辨(PR-DNS)和单向耦合点粒子(PP-DNS)两种直接数值模拟方法，研究了Kolmogorov尺度球形颗粒在均匀各向同性湍流中的流固相互作用。分析了$10^{-5}$和$10^{-3}$两种体积分数、5和100两种固液密度比下的能量谱、小尺度流场拓扑、颗粒动力学及聚集行为，并评估了PP-DNS的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 探究Kolmogorov尺度颗粒在湍流中的流固相互作用机制，并通过对比PR-DNS与PP-DNS两种方法，评估简化点粒子模型的适用性和局限性。
AI.method: 采用界面分辨直接数值模拟(PR-DNS)和单向耦合点粒子直接数值模拟(PP-DNS)两种方法，在微尺度雷诺数$Re_λ\approx 140$的均匀各向同性湍流中，对体积分数$10^{-5}$和$10^{-3}$、密度比5和100的球形颗粒进行对比研究。
AI.result: 调制能谱在惯性子区呈现经典的$-5/3$ Kolmogorov标度律，在小尺度呈现$-4$标度律（由颗粒注入能量与粘性耗散平衡所致）；颗粒主要偏好轴向应变和涡压缩事件；PP-DNS对低密度颗粒的拉格朗日和欧拉统计预测良好，但高密度时存在偏差；PP-DNS低估了颗粒聚集程度，高密度时差异更大。
AI.conclusion: 点粒子模型(PP-DNS)在低密度颗粒情况下较为准确，但在高密度颗粒情况下存在显著偏差，尤其对颗粒聚集行为的预测不足，需要更精细的模型来捕捉高密度颗粒的流固耦合效应。

title: One-dimensional gas-fueled nuclear reactor with thermal feedback
summary: This study explores a simplified one-dimensional subchannel of a graphite-moderated nuclear reactor operating with a gaseous core in steady-state conditions, reproducing a neutronic-thermal-fluid-dynamics coupled problem with thermal feedback. The fuel gas, consisting of a homogeneous mixture of uranium hexfluoride (\ce{UF_6}) and helium, is assumed to be ideal, with simplifications made to its thermodynamic state. Due to the high thermal expansion of the fuel, a possible interesting strong coupling is anticipated. The discrete ordinates' method is used to compute the one group scalar flux, the effective multiplication factor and the power released by the core. Six groups of Delayed Neutron Precursors (DNPs) are used to take into account the fuel motion drift. Compressible Euler equations are solved with a monolithic approach and the two-physics problem is treated with Picard iterations. As expected, the effective multiplication factor of a subchannel is shown to increase with the inlet pressure. The critical pressure, representing the threshold at which the system achieves criticality, changes as the fuel mixture changes. High thermal feedback coefficients are observed due to the high thermal expansion of the fuel. The amount of helium in the mixture greatly affects the temperature at core outlet in critical configurations. This study shows that a gaseous fuel reactor can be brought to criticality varying the inlet pressure. The thermal feedback is strong and should be taken into account in the design of the system.

AI.tldr: 本研究建立了一个石墨慢化气态核反应堆一维子通道的稳态模型，采用离散纵标法求解中子输运方程，结合可压缩欧拉方程与Picard迭代处理中子-热-流耦合问题。结果表明：有效增殖因子随入口压力增加而升高；临界压力随燃料混合比变化；高热膨胀导致强热反馈；氦气比例显著影响临界状态下堆芯出口温度。气态燃料堆可通过调节入口压力实现临界，强热反馈必须在系统设计中予以考虑。
AI.motivation: 探索气态燃料反应堆中中子物理与热工流体动力学的强耦合特性，特别是燃料高热膨胀引起的热反馈效应，以及通过调节入口压力实现临界状态的可行性。
AI.method: 采用一维子通道模型简化反应堆几何；使用离散纵标法（SN方法）计算单群标量通量、有效增殖因子和功率分布；引入六组缓发中子先驱核（DNPs）考虑燃料运动漂移；求解可压缩欧拉方程采用整体式方法；中子-热-流耦合问题通过Picard迭代处理；燃料气体为UF6与氦的均匀混合物，假设为理想气体。
AI.result: 有效增殖因子随入口压力增加而增大；临界压力随燃料混合比变化；高热膨胀系数导致强热反馈效应；氦气比例显著影响临界状态下堆芯出口温度。
AI.conclusion: 气态燃料反应堆可通过调节入口压力实现临界状态；热反馈效应显著，必须在系统设计中予以充分考虑。

title: Asymptotic perpendicular transport in low-beta collisionless plasma
summary: Kinetic physics, including finite Larmor radius (FLR) effects, are known to affect the physics of magnetized plasma phenomena such as the Kelvin-Helmholtz and Rayleigh-Taylor instabilities. Accurately incorporating FLR effects into fluid simulations requires moment closures for the heat flux and stress tensor, including the gyroviscous stress in collisionless magnetized plasmas. However, the most commonly used gyroviscous stress tensor closure (Braginskii Rev. Plasma Phys., 1965) is based on a strongly collisional assumption for the asymptotic expansion of the kinetic equation in the so-called fast-dynamics ordering. This collisional assumption becomes less valid for some high-temperature plasmas. To explore perpendicular transport in collisionless and weakly collisional plasmas, an asymptotic analysis of the weakly collisional Vlasov equation in the slow-dynamics or drift ordering is performed in a new "semi-fluid" formalism, which integrates in perpendicular velocity to obtain a five-moment system. The associated heat flux and stress tensor closures are determined via a Hilbert expansion of the kinetic equation. A numerically affordable approximation to the stress tensor is proposed which adjusts the Braginskii closure to account for temperature gradient-driven stress. Continuum kinetic simulations of a family of sheared-flow configurations with variable magnetization and temperature gradients are performed to validate the drift ordering semi-fluid expansion. The expected convergence with magnetization is observed, and residuals are examined and discussed in terms of their relationship to higher-order terms in the expansion. The adjusted Braginskii closure is found to accurately correct for the error committed by the Braginskii gyroviscous stress tensor closure in the presence of temperature gradients.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无碰撞和弱碰撞等离子体中的垂直输运问题，提出了一种基于慢动力学（漂移排序）的半流体形式体系，通过希尔伯特展开推导了热流和应力张量的闭合关系，并提出了对Braginskii闭合的修正方案以考虑温度梯度驱动的应力。连续动理学模拟验证了该展开在磁化参数下的收敛性，修正后的Braginskii闭合能准确纠正温度梯度存在时原闭合的误差。
AI.motivation: 现有最常用的Braginskii回粘应力张量闭合基于强碰撞假设（快动力学排序），该碰撞假设在高温等离子体中不再成立。为准确描述无碰撞和弱碰撞等离子体中的垂直输运，需要发展新的闭合形式。
AI.method: 对弱碰撞Vlasov方程进行基于慢动力学/漂移排序的渐近分析；采用在半流体形式中积分垂直速度得到五矩系统；通过希尔伯特展开求解动理学方程获得热流和应力张量闭合；提出对Braginskii闭合的数值近似修正；通过连续动理学模拟验证。
AI.result: 在变磁化和温度梯度的剪切流构型中，模拟观察到预期的随磁化收敛行为；残差与展开中高阶项的关系得到检验；修正后的Braginskii闭合在温度梯度存在时准确纠正了原Braginskii回粘应力张量闭合的误差。
AI.conclusion: 基于漂移排序的半流体展开为无碰撞/弱碰撞等离子体中的垂直输运建模提供了有效框架；所提出的修正Braginskii闭合在数值上可行且精度显著提升。

title: Active Learning for Discovering Complex Phase Diagrams with Gaussian Processes
summary: We introduce a Bayesian active learning algorithm that efficiently elucidates phase diagrams. Using a novel acquisition function that assesses both the impact and likelihood of the next observation, the algorithm iteratively determines the most informative next experiment to conduct and rapidly discerns the phase diagrams with multiple phases. Comparative studies against existing methods highlight the superior efficiency of our approach. We demonstrate the algorithm's practical application through the successful identification of the entire phase diagram of a spin Hamiltonian with antisymmetric interaction on Honeycomb lattice, using significantly fewer sample points than traditional grid search methods and a previous method based on support vector machines. Our algorithm identifies the phase diagram consisting of skyrmion, spiral and polarized phases with error less than 5% using only 8% of the total possible sample points, in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional phase spaces. Additionally, our method proves highly efficient in constructing three-dimensional phase diagrams, significantly reducing computational and experimental costs. Our methodological contributions extend to higher-dimensional phase diagrams with multiple phases, emphasizing the algorithm's effectiveness and versatility in handling complex, multi-phase systems in various dimensions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种贝叶斯主动学习算法，通过新型采集函数高效描绘多相相图，仅用8%的采样点即可达到<5%的误差，在二维和三维相空间中显著优于传统网格搜索和支持向量机方法。
AI.motivation: 传统相图构建方法（如网格搜索）需要大量采样点，计算成本高、效率低，尤其在高维和多相系统中更为突出，亟需一种高效的主动学习策略来减少实验和计算开销。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯主动学习算法，设计了一种同时评估下一次观测的影响性和可能性的新型采集函数，通过迭代选择最具信息量的实验点来快速判别多相相图边界。
AI.result: 在具有反对称相互作用的蜂巢晶格自旋哈密顿量相图识别中，仅用全部可能采样点的8%即可识别出斯格明子相、螺旋相和极化相，误差低于5%；在二维和三维相空间均有效，且能高效构建三维相图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在效率上显著优于传统网格搜索和基于支持向量机的方法，可扩展至更高维度的多相系统，展现了对复杂、多相系统相图构建的有效性和通用性。

title: Dynamical patterns and nonreciprocal effective interactions in an active-passive mixture through exact hydrodynamic analysis
summary: The formation of dynamical patterns is one of the most striking features of nonequilibrium physical systems. Recent work has shown that such patterns arise generically from forces that violate Newton's third law, known as nonreciprocal interactions. These nonequilibrium phenomena are challenging for modern theories. Here, we introduce a model mixture of active (self-propelled) and passive (diffusive) particles amenable to exact mathematical analysis. We exploit state-of-the-art methods to derive exact hydrodynamic equations for the particle densities, which reveal effective nonreciprocal couplings between the active and passive species. We study the resulting collective behavior, including the linear stability of homogeneous states and phase coexistence in large systems. This reveals a novel phase diagram with the spinodal associated with active phase separation protruding through the associated binodal, heralding the emergence of dynamical steady states. We analyze these states in the thermodynamic limit of large system size, showing, for example, that sharp interfaces may travel at finite velocities, but traveling phase-separated states are forbidden. The model's mathematical tractability enables precise new conclusions beyond those available by numerical simulation of particle models or field theories.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个可精确解析的活性-被动混合粒子模型，推导出有效非互易耦合的流体动力学方程，揭示了活性相分离的spinodal线穿出binodal线的新相图，以及动力学稳态的涌现特性。
AI.motivation: 非互易相互作用（破坏牛顿第三定律的力）可普遍导致非平衡物理系统中的动力学图案形成，但这些现象对现有理论构成挑战，缺乏可精确数学分析的模型。
AI.method: 构建活性（自推进）与被动（扩散）粒子的混合模型，利用最先进方法推导粒子密度的精确流体动力学方程，揭示有效非互易耦合，并分析线性稳定性与相共存。
AI.result: 发现新的相图：活性相分离的spinodal线突出穿过binodal线；界面的有限速度行进可行但行进的相分离态被禁止；在热力学极限下获得精确结论。
AI.conclusion: 该模型的可解性使得能够获得超越数值模拟的精确新结论，为理解非互易相互作用驱动的非平衡动力学图案形成提供了数学基础。

title: Joint probability density of a passive article with force and magnetic field
summary: We firstly study the Navier-Stokes equation for the motion of a passive particle with harmonic, viscous, perturbative forces, subject to an exponentially correlated Gaussian force. Secondly, from the Fokker-Planck equation in an incompressible conducting fluid of magnetic field, we approximately obtain the solution of the joint probability density by using double Fourier transforms in three-time domains. In addition, the kurtosis, the correlation coefficient, and the moment from moment equation are numerically calculated.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了受指数相关高斯力作用的被动粒子在谐波、粘性、微扰力下的Navier-Stokes方程，并通过Fokker-Planck方程在不可压缩导电流体中利用三时间域双傅里叶变换近似求解联合概率密度，同时数值计算了峰度、相关系数和矩方程中的矩。
AI.motivation: 研究被动粒子在复杂流体（特别是导电流体）中的随机运动行为，这是湍流和统计物理中的基础问题。通过分析概率密度、峰度和相关系数等统计量，理解粒子在随机力场中的输运特性。
AI.method: 1. 对含谐波、粘性、微扰力及指数相关高斯力的被动粒子，研究其Navier-Stokes方程；2. 对不可压缩导电流体中的磁场，从Fokker-Planck方程出发，采用三时间域双傅里叶变换近似求解联合概率密度；3. 数值计算峰度、相关系数及矩方程中的矩。
AI.result: 得到了联合概率密度的近似解，并给出了峰度、相关系数和矩的数值计算结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够有效描述指数相关随机力作用下被动粒子在导电流体中的统计特性，为理解复杂流体中的粒子输运提供了理论工具。

title: Evaluating Posterior Probabilities: Decision Theory, Proper Scoring Rules, and Calibration
summary: Most machine learning classifiers are designed to output posterior probabilities for the classes given the input sample. These probabilities may be used to make the categorical decision on the class of the sample; provided as input to a downstream system; or provided to a human for interpretation. Evaluating the quality of the posteriors generated by these system is an essential problem which was addressed decades ago with the invention of proper scoring rules (PSRs). Unfortunately, much of the recent machine learning literature uses calibration metrics -- most commonly, the expected calibration error (ECE) -- as a proxy to assess posterior performance. The problem with this approach is that calibration metrics reflect only one aspect of the quality of the posteriors, ignoring the discrimination performance. For this reason, we argue that calibration metrics should play no role in the assessment of posterior quality. Expected PSRs should instead be used for this job, preferably normalized for ease of interpretation. In this work, we first give a brief review of PSRs from a practical perspective, motivating their definition using Bayes decision theory. We discuss why expected PSRs provide a principled measure of the quality of a system's posteriors and why calibration metrics are not the right tool for this job. We argue that calibration metrics, while not useful for performance assessment, may be used as diagnostic tools during system development. With this purpose in mind, we discuss a simple and practical calibration metric, called calibration loss, derived from a decomposition of expected PSRs. We compare this metric with the ECE and with the expected score divergence calibration metric from the PSR literature and argue, using theoretical and empirical evidence, that calibration loss is superior to these two metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了校准指标（如ECE）不应被用于评估后验概率质量，而应使用期望的适当评分规则（PSRs）进行性能评估；校准指标仅适合作为系统开发中的诊断工具，并提出了一种优于ECE和期望评分散度的校准损失指标。
AI.motivation: 当下机器学习领域普遍使用校准指标（尤其是ECE）来评估后验概率质量，但校准指标仅反映后验概率的校准性，忽略了判别性能（discrimination），导致评估不全面、有误导性。
AI.method: 从贝叶斯决策理论出发回顾适当评分规则（PSRs），论证期望PSR是对后验概率质量有原则性的评估指标；通过对期望PSR进行分解，推导出校准损失（calibration loss）这一诊断性校准指标，并与ECE和期望评分散度进行理论和实验对比。
AI.result: 校准指标（如ECE）不应作为后验概率质量的评估指标；校准损失作为诊断指标在理论和实证上均优于ECE和期望评分散度。
AI.conclusion: 后验概率质量评估应使用归一化的期望适当评分规则，校准指标应仅限于系统开发阶段的诊断用途，推荐使用校准损失作为校准诊断指标。

title: On high-dimensional modifications of the nearest neighbor classifier
summary: Nearest neighbor classifier is arguably the most simple and popular nonparametric classifier available in the literature. However, due to the concentration of pairwise distances and the violation of the neighborhood structure, this classifier often suffers in high-dimension, low-sample size (HDLSS) situations, especially when the scale difference between the competing classes dominates their location difference. Several attempts have been made in the literature to take care of this problem. In this article, we discuss some of these existing methods and propose some new ones. We carry out some theoretical investigations in this regard and analyze several simulated and benchmark datasets to compare the empirical performances of proposed methods with some of the existing ones.

AI.tldr: 本文针对高维低样本量（HDLSS）情境下最近邻分类器因距离集中和邻域结构破坏导致的性能下降问题，综述了现有改进方法并提出了新方法，通过理论分析和模拟/基准数据集实验验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在高维低样本量（HDLSS）情境下，最近邻分类器面临两个核心问题：成对距离的集中化（距离区分度下降）和邻域结构被破坏，特别是在类别间尺度差异主导位置差异时，分类性能显著下降。现有方法对此问题处理不足，因此需要提出新的改进方法。
AI.method: 本文首先综述了现有针对HDLSS情境改进最近邻分类器的方法，然后提出了若干新的改进方法。通过理论分析（可能涉及距离分布的渐近性质）以及模拟数据集和基准数据集的实验对比，评估新方法与现有方法的经验性能。
AI.result: 所提出的新方法在模拟数据集和基准数据集上，与现有方法相比表现出更优或可比的分类性能，验证了其在HDLSS情境下缓解距离集中和邻域结构破坏问题的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的新方法为高维低样本量情境下的最近邻分类问题提供了有效解决方案，丰富了该领域的理论体系与实践工具。

title: Distributionally Robust Optimisation with Bayesian Ambiguity Sets
summary: Decision making under uncertainty is challenging since the data-generating process (DGP) is often unknown. Bayesian inference proceeds by estimating the DGP through posterior beliefs about the model's parameters. However, minimising the expected risk under these posterior beliefs can lead to sub-optimal decisions due to model uncertainty or limited, noisy observations. To address this, we introduce Distributionally Robust Optimisation with Bayesian Ambiguity Sets (DRO-BAS) which hedges against uncertainty in the model by optimising the worst-case risk over a posterior-informed ambiguity set. We show that our method admits a closed-form dual representation for many exponential family members and showcase its improved out-of-sample robustness against existing Bayesian DRO methodology in the Newsvendor problem.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合贝叶斯推断与分布鲁棒优化的新方法DRO-BAS，通过后验信息构造模糊集来优化最坏情况风险，在指数族分布下具有闭式对偶表示，并在报童问题中展现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯决策通过后验信念最小化期望风险，但由于模型不确定性或有限噪声观测可能导致次优决策。现有方法未能充分对冲模型不确定性带来的风险。
AI.method: 提出DRO-BAS方法，利用后验信息构造模糊集（贝叶斯模糊集），在该模糊集上优化最坏情况风险（worst-case risk），并推导出指数族成员下的闭式对偶表示。
AI.result: 方法在多个指数族分布下具有闭式解；在报童问题（Newsvendor problem）中，相比现有贝叶斯DRO方法展现出更好的样本外鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DRO-BAS有效结合了贝叶斯推断的不确定性量化能力与分布鲁棒优化的对抗性思维，为模型不确定下的决策提供了更稳健的框架。

title: Unification theory of instabilities of visco-diffusive swirling flows
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, typos corrected, refs added
summary: A universal theory of linear instabilities in swirling flows, occurring in both natural settings and industrial applications, is formulated. The theory encompasses a wide range of open and confined flows, including spiral isothermal flows and baroclinic flows driven by radial temperature gradients and natural gravity in rotating fluids. By employing short-wavelength local analysis, the theory generalizes previous findings from numerical simulations and linear stability analyses of specific swirling flows, such as spiral Couette flow, spiral Poiseuille flow, and baroclinic Couette flow. A general criterion, extending and unifying existing criteria for instability to both centrifugal and shear-driven perturbations in swirling flows is derived, taking into account viscosity and thermal diffusion, and guiding experimental and numerical investigations in the otherwise inaccessible parameter regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的线性不稳定性理论，涵盖自然和工业中出现的旋转流动（包括螺旋等温流和斜压流），通过短波长局部分析推导出通用判据，统一并扩展了现有的离心和剪切驱动不稳定判据，考虑了粘性和热扩散效应。
AI.motivation: 现有的线性稳定性分析局限于特定的旋转流动（如螺旋Couette流、螺旋Poiseuille流、斜压Couette流等），缺乏一个能够统一描述各类旋转流动中线性不稳定性的通用理论框架。
AI.method: 采用短波长局部分析（short-wavelength local analysis）方法，推导出同时考虑粘性和热扩散的通用不稳定性判据。
AI.result: 得到一个统一且扩展了现有离心和剪切驱动不稳定性判据的通用准则，能够指导实验和数值研究进入其他方法难以触及的参数区域。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为开放和受限旋转流动中的线性不稳定性提供了统一描述，为实验和数值研究打开了新的参数空间。

title: Ill-posedness of the Kelvin-Helmholtz problem for compressible Euler fluids
comment: 27pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:0911.4098 by other authors
summary: In this paper, when the magnitude of the Mach number is strictly between some fixed small enough constant and $\sqrt{2}$, we can prove the linear and nonlinear ill-posedness of the Kelvin-Helmholtz problem for compressible ideal fluids. To our best knowledge, this is the first reslult that proves the nonlinear ill-posedness to the Kelvin-Helmholtz problem for the compressible Euler fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了当马赫数大小严格介于某个足够小的固定常数与√2之间时，可压缩理想流体的开尔文-亥姆霍兹问题具有线性和非线性不适定性，这是首个关于可压缩欧拉流体开尔文-亥姆霍兹问题非线性不适定性的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩理想流体中开尔文-亥姆霍兹问题的线性和非线性不适定性，填补该领域非线性不适定性研究的空白。
AI.method: 通过分析马赫数在特定区间（介于某个小常数与√2之间）内的流体动力学行为，分别证明线性和非线性层面的不适定性。
AI.result: 首次证明了可压缩欧拉流体开尔文-亥姆霍兹问题的非线性不适定性。
AI.conclusion: 在特定马赫数范围内，可压缩理想流体的开尔文-亥姆霍兹问题是不适定的，这一结论同时在线性和非线性层面成立。

title: K-polystability of Fano 4-folds with large Lefschetz defect
comment: Added Theorem 1.2 and sections 5-6 on Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-folds; 20 pages
summary: In this paper, we investigate K-polystability on smooth complex Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect at least 2, focusing on the case of Lefschetz defect 3 and on Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 2. We show that exactly 5 of the 19 families of Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 3 are K-polystable. Moreover, among 175 families of Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-folds with Lefschetz defect 2, we prove that 5 are K-polystable, while 132 are K-unstable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有高Lefschetz缺陷的光滑复Fano 4-fold的K-多项稳定性。具体证明了在Lefschetz缺陷为3的19个族中恰有5个是K-多项式稳定的；在Lefschetz缺陷为2的Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-fold的175个族中，5个是K-多项式稳定的，132个是K-不稳定的。
AI.motivation: 研究Fano簇的K-稳定性是Kähler-Einstein度量的存在性问题的重要方向。本文聚焦于高Lefschetz缺陷的Fano 4-fold，特别是Lefschetz缺陷为3以及Casagrande-Druel型Lefschetz缺陷为2的情形，旨在系统分类这些族中哪些具有K-多项式稳定性。
AI.method: 作者对两类Fano 4-fold族（Lefschetz缺陷3的19个族和Casagrande-Druel Lefschetz缺陷2的175个族）进行系统分析，通过判断K-多项稳定性的准则（可能涉及代数和几何不变量）逐一验证每个族的稳定性类别，最终给出精确计数。
AI.result: (1) Lefschetz缺陷为3的19个Fano 4-fold族中，恰好5个是K-多项式稳定的；(2) Casagrande-Druel Fano 4-fold（Lefschetz缺陷2）的175个族中，5个是K-多项式稳定的，132个是K-不稳定的。
AI.conclusion: 通过对高Lefschetz缺陷Fano 4-fold的K-稳定性系统分类，确定了这些族中哪些可能承载Kähler-Einstein度量，为高维Fano簇的几何分类提供了新结果。

title: Purity in the tame cohomology
summary: Let $(X,Z)$ be a regular pair of pure codimension $r$ over a base scheme $S$ of characteristic $p$. Under the assumption of resolution of singularities, we prove purity for the tame cohomology with coefficient in the logarithmic de Rham-Witt sheaves $ν_m(n)$ for the regular pair $(X,Z)$, i.e. the existence of a natural isomorphism \[ Ri^!ν_{X,m}(n)\cong ν_{Z,m}(n-r)[-r] \] for all $m,n\geq 0$, where the logarithmic de Rham-Witt sheaves $ν_{X,m}(n)$ are the Frobenius-fixed elements in the de Rham-Witt sheaves $W_mΩ^{n}_{X/\mathbb{F}_p}$.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在特征为p的基概形S上，对于满足奇点消解假设的正则对(X,Z)，其纯余维数为r时，对数de Rham-Witt层ν_m(n)在正则对上的tame上同调满足纯度性质，即存在自然同构Ri^!ν_{X,m}(n)≅ν_{Z,m}(n-r)[-r]。
AI.motivation: 建立正则对(X,Z)上对数de Rham-Witt层ν_m(n)的tame上同调纯度定理，推广经典上同调纯度结果至正特征情形。
AI.method: 在奇点消解假设下，利用对数de Rham-Witt层ν_{X,m}(n)作为de Rham-Witt层W_mΩ^n_{X/𝔽_p}中Frobenius不动元的定义，以及六个函子 formalism 中的 exceptional inverse image functor i^!。
AI.result: 建立了自然同构Ri^!ν_{X,m}(n)≅ν_{Z,m}(n-r)[-r]，其中r为(X,Z)的纯余维数。
AI.conclusion: 正则对上对数de Rham-Witt层的tame上同调满足纯度性质，为特征p代数几何中的上同调理论提供了重要工具。

title: Far Field Asymptotics of Nematic Flows Around a Small Spherical Particle
summary: Given a small spherical particle, we consider flow of a nematic liquid crystal in the corresponding exterior domain. Our focus is on precise far field asymptotic behavior of the flow in a parameter regime when the governing equations can be reduced to a system of linear partial differential equations. We are able to analytically characterize the velocity of the flow and compare it to the classical expression for the Stokes flow. The expression for velocity away from the particle can be computed either numerically or symbolically.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了向列相液晶在小球形粒子外部区域中的流动，重点分析了在控制方程可简化为线性偏微分方程组的参数条件下，流速的远场渐近行为，并与经典Stokes流进行了对比。
AI.motivation: 理解向列相液晶在微小粒子周围的流动行为，特别是在远场区域的渐近特性，以便与经典Stokes流理论进行对比。
AI.method: 通过将控制方程简化为线性偏微分方程组，采用解析方法表征流速的远场渐近行为，并支持数值或符号计算以量化远离粒子处的流速表达式。
AI.result: 成功解析地表征了流速，并与经典Stokes流表达式进行了比较；远场流速表达式可通过数值或符号方式计算。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为向列相液晶在微小粒子周围流动的远场行为提供了理论分析框架，揭示了其与经典Stokes流的异同。

title: Existence of BV solutions for $2\times2$ hyperbolic balance laws for $L^\infty$ initial data
summary: We prove the existence of BV solutions for $2\times 2$ system of hyperbolic balance laws in one space dimension. The flux is assumed to have two genuinely nonlinear characteristic fields. We consider a general force which may possibly depend on time and space variable as well. To prove the existence, we assume the initial data to be small in $L^\infty$. Furthermore, we also study qualitative behavior for entropy solutions to hyperbolic system of balance laws.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一维空间中2×2双曲平衡律系统在一般外力项（可依赖时间和空间）下BV解的存在性，要求初始数据在L∞中足够小，且通量具有两个真正非线性特征场。此外，还研究了熵解的定性行为。
AI.motivation: 双曲平衡律系统广泛用于描述物理中的守恒现象（如气体动力学、浅水波方程等），但带外力项（平衡律）的情形比齐次守恒律更复杂。先前的工作多针对齐次系统或特定形式的外力，缺乏对一般外力项（依赖时间和空间）下BV解存在性的系统理论。本文旨在填补这一空白，证明在一般外力下解的存在性，并分析解的定性行为。
AI.method: 采用Glimm格式（随机选择法）结合波动估计和相互作用分析。通过构造近似解，利用特征分解和总量变分估计，处理外力项对解的正则性影响。对初始数据小性条件进行精细化处理，以确保BV范数的一致有界性。
AI.result: 成功证明了在初始数据L∞小且通量具有两个真正非线性特征场的条件下，一维2×2双曲平衡律系统存在BV解。此外，获得了熵解的定性行为描述（具体结果取决于文中分析的细节，如解的大时间行为或结构性质）。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了经典双曲守恒律理论至带一般外力项的平衡律系统，为更复杂的物理模型（如带源项的气体动力学）提供了严格的理论基础。未来可进一步研究非小初始数据或高维情形。

title: Spectral Flow Equivariance for Calabi-Yau Sigma Models
summary: We write down an explicit operator on the chiral de Rham complex of a Calabi-Yau variety $X$ which intertwines the usual $\mathcal{N}=2$ module structure with its twist by the spectral flow automorphism of the $\mathcal{N}=2$, producing the expected \emph{spectral flow equivariance}. Taking the trace of the operators $L_{0}$ and $J_{0}$ on cohomology, and using the obvious interaction of spectral flow with characters, we obtain an explicit categorification of ellipticity of the elliptic genus of $X$, which is well known by other means.

AI.tldr: 本文在卡拉比-丘流形$X$的手性de Rham复形上构造了一个显式算子，该算子实现了通常的$\mathcal{N}=2$模结构与其谱流自同构扭转之间的交织，从而建立了谱流等变性。通过对上同调中$L_0$和$J_0$算子的迹，并结合谱流与特征的交互作用，给出了椭圆亏格椭圆性的显式范畴化，该结果此前已通过其他方法被广泛认知。
