AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于示踪粒子的单流体DBM模型能够有效研究强可压缩RTI中的混合过程，揭示了可压缩性对RTI演化特征参数（尖峰速度、气泡速度、熵产率）的复杂影响机制。

title: Semi-classical analysis
comment: This article presents some ideas and applications of semi-classical analysis
summary: We introduce three representative topics in semi-classical analysis. Starting from the correspondence between classical and quantum mechanics, basic semi-classical analysis tools and results are presented. The three topics are investigated in the light of the introduced techniques allowing one to emphasize different aspects of semi-classical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了半经典分析中的三个代表性问题，从经典力学与量子力学的对应关系出发，展示了基本半经典分析工具和结果，并通过这三个问题突出了半经典分析的不同方面。
AI.motivation: 介绍半经典分析中的三个代表性问题，展示经典力学与量子力学之间的对应关系，并强调半经典分析工具在不同方面的应用。
AI.method: 从经典力学与量子力学的对应关系出发，介绍基本的半经典分析工具和结果，并通过三个代表性主题来展示这些技术在不同方面的应用。
AI.result: 通过三个代表性问题展示了半经典分析工具在不同方面的应用，强调了经典-量子对应关系的不同侧面。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过三个代表性问题展示了半经典分析的多方面应用，为理解经典力学与量子力学的对应关系提供了工具和视角。

title: Fixed point counts and motivic invariants of bow varieties of affine type A
summary: We compute the equivariant K-theory of torus fixed points of Cherkis bow varieties of affine type A. We deduce formulas for the generating series of the Euler numbers of these varieties and observe their modularity in certain cases. We also obtain refined formulas on the motivic level for a class of bow varieties strictly containing Nakajima quiver varieties. These series hence generalise results of Nakajima-Yoshioka. As a special case, we obtain formulas for certain Zastava spaces. We define a parabolic analogue of Nekrasov's partition function and find an equation relating it to the classical partition function.

AI.tldr: 本文计算了仿射A型Cherkis弓形变体的环面不动点的等变K-理论，推导了这些变体的欧拉数生成级数公式并观察到其模性，在严格包含Nakajima箭图变体的弓形变体类上获得了动机层面的精细公式，定义了Nekrasov配分函数的抛物类比并发现了其与经典配分函数的关系。
AI.motivation: 将Nakajima-Yoshioka关于箭图变体的结果推广到更一般的Cherkis弓形变体，并探索其模性及与Zastava空间、Nekrasov配分函数的联系。
AI.method: 通过计算仿射A型Cherkis弓形变体的环面不动点的等变K-理论，推导生成级数，并在动机层面上获得精细公式，同时定义抛物类比配分函数并建立方程。
AI.result: 获得了弓形变体欧拉数的生成级数公式并观察到模性；在严格包含Nakajima箭图变体的类上得到了动机层精细公式；得到了Zastava空间的公式；发现了抛物Nekrasov配分函数与经典配分函数的关系方程。
AI.conclusion: 成功将Nakajima-Yoshioka的结果推广至更一般的弓形变体，建立了与Zastava空间和Nekrasov配分函数的联系。

title: Symmetric powers: structure, smoothability, and applications
summary: We investigate border ranks of twisted powers of polynomials and smoothability of symmetric powers of algebras. We prove that the latter are smoothable. For the former, we obtain upper bounds for the border rank in general and prove that they are optimal under mild conditions. We give applications to complexity theory. Many of the results rest on the notion of an encompassing polynomial, which we introduce.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多项式扭曲幂的边界秩与代数对称幂的光滑性，证明了对称幂是可光滑化的，给出了边界秩的上界及其在温和条件下的最优性，并应用于复杂度理论。核心创新是引入了"包容多项式"（encompassing polynomial）概念。
AI.motivation: 探讨多项式扭曲幂的边界秩和代数对称幂的光滑性这两个代数和几何中核心但尚未解决的问题，为复杂度理论提供新工具。
AI.method: 引入包容多项式（encompassing polynomial）概念作为统一分析框架，结合代数几何与张量理论的方法。
AI.result: 1) 证明了代数对称幂是可光滑化的；2) 给出了多项式扭曲幂边界秩的通用上界；3) 在温和条件下证明了该上界的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 边界秩和光滑性的新结果有助于理解复杂度下界；包容多项式概念具有独立的理论价值。

title: Optimal regularity of subsonic steady-states solution of Euler-Poisson equations for semiconductors with sonic boundary
summary: In this paper, we study the optimal regularity of the stationary sonic-subsonic solution to the unipolar isothermal hydrodynamic model of semiconductors with sonic boundary. Applying the comparison principle and the energy estimate, we obtain the regularity of the sonic-subsonic solution as $C^{\frac{1}{2}}[0,1]\cap W^{1,p}(0,1)$ for any $p<2$, which is then proved to be optimal by analyzing the property of solution around the singular point on the sonic line, i.e., $ρ\notin C^ν[0,1]$ for any $ν>\frac{1}{2}$, and $ρ\notin W^{1,κ}(0,1)$ for any $κ\ge 2$. Furthermore, we explore the influence of the semiconductors effect on the singularity of solution at sonic points $x=1$ and $x=0$, that is, the solution always has strong singularity at sonic point $x=1$ for any relaxation time $τ>0$, but, once the relaxation time is sufficiently large $τ\gg 1$, then the sonic-subsonic steady-states possess the strong singularity at both sonic boundaries $x=0$ and $x=1$. We also show that the pure subsonic solution $ρ$ belongs to $W^{2,\infty}(0,1)$, which can be embedded into $C^{1,1}[0,1]$, and it is much better than the regularity of sonic-subsonic solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带声速边界的单极等温半导体流体动力学模型稳态亚音速解的最优正则性，证明解属于C^{1/2}[0,1]∩W^{1,p}(0,1)(p<2)且该正则性最优，并分析了半导体效应对声速点奇异性的影响，同时证明了纯亚音速解具有更好的W^{2,∞}(0,1)正则性。
AI.motivation: 探究带声速边界的半导体流体动力学模型稳态亚音速解的最优正则性，分析半导体效应对声速点奇异性的影响。
AI.method: 应用比较原理和能量估计方法分析解的正则性；通过分析声速线上奇点附近解的性质证明正则性的最优性。
AI.result: 亚音速解的最优正则性为C^{1/2}[0,1]∩W^{1,p}(0,1)(p<2)；对于任何ν>1/2，ρ∉C^ν[0,1]；对于任何κ≥2，ρ∉W^{1,κ}(0,1)。在任何弛豫时间τ>0下，声速点x=1处解总有强奇异性；当τ≫1时，两个声速边界x=0和x=1处均出现强奇异性。纯亚音速解正则性为W^{2,∞}(0,1)⊂C^{1,1}[0,1]，优于亚音速解。
AI.conclusion: 阐明了半导体流体动力学模型中声速边界解的最优正则性，揭示了弛豫时间对声速点奇异性的调控作用，并指出纯亚音速解具有显著更好的正则性。

title: Global regularity and optimal decay estimates of large solutions to the compressible FENE system
summary: In this paper, we are concerned with the compressible FENE dumbbell model. By virtue of the dissipative structure and the interpolation method, we firstly prove global regularity in $H^2$ framework for the compressible FENE system with some large data. Then, we obtain optimal decay estimates of large solutions in $H^1$ and remove the smallness assumption of low frequencies by virtue of the Fourier splitting method and the Littlewood-Paley decomposition theory. Furthermore, we establish optimal decay rate for the highest derivative of the solutions by a different method combining time frequency decomposition and the time weighted energy estimate. These obtained results generalize and cover the classical results of the incompressible FENE dumbbell model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究可压缩FENE哑铃模型，通过耗散结构、插值法、Fourier分裂法、Littlewood-Paley分解以及时间-频率分解与时间加权能量估计等方法，证明了H²框架下的大解全局正则性、H¹最优衰减估计以及高阶导数的最优衰减率，推广了不可压缩FENE哑铃模型的经典结果。
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩FENE哑铃模型的全局正则性和最优衰减估计，去除低频小性假设，推广不可压缩情形下的经典结果。
AI.method: 利用耗散结构与插值法证明H²框架下大解的全局正则性；采用Fourier分裂法与Littlewood-Paley分解理论去除低频小性假设，获得H¹最优衰减估计；通过时间-频率分解结合时间加权能量估计建立高阶导数的最优衰减率。
AI.result: 在H²框架下获得了可压缩FENE系统的大解全局正则性；得到了H¹中解的最优衰减估计，且无需低频小性假设；建立了解的最高阶导数的最优衰减率。
AI.conclusion: 所得结果推广并覆盖了不可压缩FENE哑铃模型的经典结论。

title: Fundamentals of Broken Line Convex Geometry
comment: 34 pages, 6 figures. Feedback welcome. Minor corrections and additions to version 1
summary: We develop the fundamentals of a new theory of convex geometry -- which we call "broken line convex geometry". This is a theory of convexity where the ambient space is the rational tropicalization of a cluster variety, as opposed to an ambient vector space. In this theory, line segments are replaced by broken line segments, and we adopt the notion of convexity in [CMN21]. We state and prove broken line convex geometry versions of many standard results from usual convex geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为“断线凸几何”的新凸几何理论，其中环境空间是簇流形的有理热带化，而非通常的向量空间。该理论用断线段替代直线段，并采用[CMN21]中的凸性定义，证明了该框架下许多标准凸几何结果的对应版本。
AI.motivation: 将经典凸几何推广到簇流形的有理热带化空间，发展一种适应热带几何与簇代数结构的凸性理论。
AI.method: 以断线段替代直线段作为基本对象，基于[CMN21]的凸性定义，在有理热带化空间上重构凸几何的公理体系与基本定理。
AI.result: 建立了断线凸几何的基本理论框架，证明了该理论下经典凸几何中若干标准结果的对应版本。
AI.conclusion: 断线凸几何是传统凸几何在热带/簇代数背景下的自然推广，为相关领域提供了新的几何工具。

title: Enhancing Accuracy and Parameter-Efficiency of Neural Representations for Network Parameterization
summary: In this work, we investigate the fundamental trade-off regarding accuracy and parameter efficiency in the parameterization of neural network weights using predictor networks. We present a surprising finding that, when recovering the original model accuracy is the sole objective, it can be achieved effectively through the weight reconstruction objective alone. Additionally, we explore the underlying factors for improving weight reconstruction under parameter-efficiency constraints, and propose a novel training scheme that decouples the reconstruction objective from auxiliary objectives such as knowledge distillation that leads to significant improvements compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Finally, these results pave way for more practical scenarios, where one needs to achieve improvements on both model accuracy and predictor network parameter-efficiency simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于预测器网络的神经网络权重参数化中，精度与参数效率之间的根本权衡。发现仅通过权重重建目标就能有效恢复原始模型精度，并提出了一种将重建目标与知识蒸馏等辅助目标解耦的新训练方案，在模型精度和参数效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 探究在预测器网络对神经网络权重进行参数化时，精度与参数效率之间的根本性权衡关系。
AI.method: 通过实验发现仅使用权重重建目标即可有效恢复原始模型精度；分析了在参数效率约束下改进权重重建的因素；提出了一种将重建目标与知识蒸馏等辅助目标解耦的新型训练方案。
AI.result: 仅使用权重重建目标就能有效恢复原始模型精度；所提出的解耦训练方案在模型精度和预测器网络参数效率上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为同时提升模型精度和预测器网络参数效率的实际应用场景铺平了道路。

title: A Cross-Domain Benchmark for Active Learning
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 24 in the Benchmarks and Datasets Track. Updated version of paper "Toward Comparable Active Learning" (arXiv:2311.18356). "Toward Comparable Active Learning" is deprecated, please use this version. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2311.18356; text overlap with arXiv:2301.10625 by other authors
summary: Active Learning (AL) deals with identifying the most informative samples for labeling to reduce data annotation costs for supervised learning tasks. AL research suffers from the fact that lifts from literature generalize poorly and that only a small number of repetitions of experiments are conducted. To overcome these obstacles, we propose CDALBench, the first active learning benchmark which includes tasks in computer vision, natural language processing and tabular learning. Furthermore, by providing an efficient, greedy oracle, CDALBench can be evaluated with 50 runs for each experiment. We show, that both the cross-domain character and a large amount of repetitions are crucial for sophisticated evaluation of AL research. Concretely, we show that the superiority of specific methods varies over the different domains, making it important to evaluate Active Learning with a cross-domain benchmark. Additionally, we show that having a large amount of runs is crucial. With only conducting three runs as often done in the literature, the superiority of specific methods can strongly vary with the specific runs. This effect is so strong, that, depending on the seed, even a well-established method's performance can be significantly better and significantly worse than random for the same dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出CDALBench，首个涵盖CV、NLP和表格学习的跨领域主动学习基准，支持50次重复实验，证明跨领域评估和大量重复对AL研究至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有AL研究存在两个主要问题：(1) 文献中的性能提升难以泛化到不同任务；(2) 实验重复次数过少（通常仅3次），导致结论不可靠。需要建立一个标准化的、跨领域的、支持大量重复的基准来推动AL领域的可靠评估。
AI.method: 构建CDALBench基准，覆盖计算机视觉、自然语言处理和表格学习三个领域；设计高效的贪婪oracle以支持每个实验进行50次重复运行；通过跨领域对比和不同重复次数下的统计分析来验证基准的必要性。
AI.result: (1) 不同领域中AL方法的优越性存在显著差异，跨领域评估不可或缺；(2) 仅进行3次重复实验时，特定方法的优势会因随机种子而剧烈波动；(3) 即使是成熟的方法，在某些种子下其性能可能显著优于或显著劣于随机基线，证明大量重复实验的必要性。
AI.conclusion: CDALBench作为跨领域、高重复次数的AL基准，能够提供更可靠的评估结果。跨领域评估和大量重复实验是AL研究中不可或缺的两个关键要素。

title: Domain Decomposition-based coupling of Operator Inference reduced order models via the Schwarz alternating method
summary: This paper presents and evaluates an approach for coupling together subdomain-local reduced order models (ROMs) constructed via non-intrusive operator inference (OpInf) with each other and with subdomain-local full order models (FOMs), following a domain decomposition of the spatial geometry on which a given partial differential equation (PDE) is posed. Joining subdomain-local models is accomplished using the overlapping Schwarz alternating method, a minimally-intrusive multiscale coupling technique that works by transforming a monolithic problem into a sequence of subdomain-local problems, which communicate through transmission boundary conditions imposed on the subdomain interfaces. After formulating the overlapping Schwarz alternating method for OpInf ROMs, termed OpInf-Schwarz, we evaluate the method's accuracy and efficiency on several test cases involving the heat equation in two spatial dimensions. We demonstrate that the method is capable of coupling together arbitrary combinations of OpInf ROMs and FOMs, and that speed-ups over a monolithic FOM are possible when performing OpInf ROM coupling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一种基于重叠Schwarz交替方法的非侵入式算子推理（OpInf）降阶模型（ROM）耦合方法（OpInf-Schwarz），通过域分解将子域局部ROM与全阶模型（FOM）耦合，并在二维热方程上验证了其准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的降阶模型通常针对整个计算域构建，难以灵活处理多尺度或多物理场耦合问题。需要一种最小侵入性的方法，能够将不同子域上的局部ROM以及ROM与FOM进行耦合，同时保持计算效率和精度。
AI.method: 采用域分解策略将空间几何划分为多个子域，每个子域独立构建非侵入式算子推理（OpInf）降阶模型或保留全阶模型（FOM）；通过重叠Schwarz交替方法实现子域间耦合，该方法通过子域界面上的传输边界条件进行信息交换，将整体问题转化为一系列子域局部问题的迭代求解。
AI.result: 在二维热方程的多个测试案例上验证了OpInf-Schwarz方法能够准确耦合任意组合的OpInf ROM和FOM；与整体全阶模型相比，使用OpInf ROM耦合可以实现计算加速。
AI.conclusion: OpInf-Schwarz方法是一种有效的多尺度耦合框架，能以最小侵入性方式实现不同保真度模型的耦合，在保证精度的同时提升计算效率。

title: Parametric holomorphy of elliptic eigenvalue problems
summary: The study of parameter-dependent partial differential equations (parametric PDEs) with countably many parameters has been actively studied for the last few decades. In particular, it has been well known that a certain type of parametric holomorphy of the PDE solutions allows the application of deep neural networks without encountering the curse of dimensionality. This paper aims to propose a general framework for verifying the desired parametric holomorphy by utilizing the bounds on parametric derivatives. The framework is illustrated with examples of parametric elliptic eigenvalue problems (EVPs), encompassing both linear and semilinear cases. As the results, it will be shown that the ground eigenpairs have the desired holomorphy. Furthermore, under the same conditions, the bounds for the mixed derivatives of the ground eigenpairs are derived. These bounds are well known to take a crucial role in the error analysis of quasi-Monte Carlo methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带可数无穷多参数的偏微分方程（parametric PDEs），提出了一种利用参数导数界来验证所需参数全纯性的通用框架，并以线性与半线性参数椭圆特征值问题为例，证明了基特征对具有所需全纯性，同时导出了混合导数界，为拟蒙特卡洛方法的误差分析提供关键支撑。
AI.motivation: 参数PDEs在科学与工程中广泛存在，其解关于参数的全纯性对避免维度灾难至关重要（尤其在深度神经网络应用中）。然而，针对参数椭圆特征值问题（EVPs），如何系统验证这种全纯性，并导出用于拟蒙特卡洛方法误差分析的混合导数界，仍缺乏通用框架。
AI.method: 1. 提出通用框架：通过参数导数界来验证parametric PDEs解的参数全纯性。2. 将该框架应用于两类参数椭圆特征值问题：线性情形和半线性情形。3. 基于框架证明基特征对（ground eigenpairs）具有所需的全纯性。4. 在相同条件下推导基特征对的混合导数界。
AI.result: 1. 成功验证了线性与半线性参数椭圆特征值问题中基特征对的参数全纯性。2. 推导出了基特征对的混合导数界，这些界是拟蒙特卡洛方法误差分析中的关键要素。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用框架有效，能够将参数全纯性的验证转化为对参数导数界的检查，并适用于更广泛的参数PDEs问题。该工作为参数椭圆特征值问题的深度神经网络求解和准蒙特卡洛方法分析提供了理论保障。

title: Mixed finite element methods for the Landau--Lifshitz--Baryakhtar and the regularised Landau--Lifshitz--Bloch equations in micromagnetics
summary: The Landau--Lifshitz--Baryakhtar (LLBar) and the Landau--Lifshitz--Bloch (LLBloch) equations are nonlinear vector-valued PDEs which arise in the theory of micromagnetics to describe the dynamics of magnetic spin field in a ferromagnet at elevated temperatures. We consider the LLBar and the regularised LLBloch equations in a unified manner, thus allowing us to treat the numerical approximations for both problems at once. In this paper, we propose a semi-discrete mixed finite element scheme and two fully discrete mixed finite element schemes based on a semi-implicit Euler method and a semi-implicit Crank--Nicolson method to solve the problems. These numerical schemes provide accurate approximations to both the magnetisation vector and the effective magnetic field. Moreover, they are proven to be unconditionally energy-stable and preserve energy dissipativity of the system at the discrete level. Error analysis is performed which shows optimal rates of convergence in $\mathbb{L}^2$, $\mathbb{L}^\infty$, and $\mathbb{H}^1$ norms. These theoretical results are further corroborated by several numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对铁磁材料在高温下的LLBar和LLBloch方程，提出了半离散混合有限元格式及两种全离散混合有限元格式，证明了其无条件能量稳定性和离散能量耗散性，并给出了L²、L∞、H¹范数下的最优收敛速率分析，数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: LLBar和LLBloch方程是描述高温下铁磁体磁自旋场动力学的关键PDE，但缺乏统一的数值逼近框架，现有方法难以同时保证能量稳定性与最优收敛性。
AI.method: 将LLBar与正则化LLBloch方程统一处理；采用半离散混合有限元格式，以及基于半隐式Euler和半隐式Crank-Nicolson方法的两种全离散混合有限元格式进行求解。
AI.result: 所提格式无条件的能量稳定，在离散层面保持能量耗散性；误差分析表明在L²、L∞、H¹范数下达到最优收敛速率；数值实验验证了理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合有限元方案能同时对磁化矢量和有效磁场进行精确逼近，兼具理论严谨性与实际计算可靠性。

title: Sensitivity analysis of multiobjective linear programming from a geometric perspective
summary: Sensitivity analysis plays a crucial role in multiobjective linear programming (MOLP), where understanding the impact of parameter changes on efficient solutions is essential. This work builds upon and extends previous investigations. In this paper, we introduce a novel approach to sensitivity analysis in MOLP, designed to be computationally feasible for decision-makers studying the behavior of efficient solutions under perturbations of objective function coefficients in a two-dimensional variable space. This approach classifies all MOLP problems in $S \subset \mathbb{R}^{2}$ by defining an equivalence relation that partitions the space of linear maps$-$comprising all sequences of linear forms on $\mathbb{R}^2$ of length $K \geq 2-$into a finite number of equivalence classes. Each equivalence class is associated with a unique subset of the boundary of $S$. For any MOLP with $K$ objective functions belonging to the same equivalence class, its set of efficient solutions corresponds to the associated subset of the boundary of $S$. This approach is detailed and illustrated with a numerical example.

AI.tldr: 本文针对二维变量空间下的多目标线性规划（MOLP）问题，提出了一种新的灵敏度分析方法。通过定义线性映射空间上的等价关系，将问题划分为有限个等价类，每个等价类唯一对应S边界的一个子集，从而高效分析目标函数系数扰动下有效解的行为。方法通过数值示例进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 灵敏度分析在多目标线性规划中至关重要，但现有方法在计算可行性上存在不足。本文旨在为决策者提供一种计算上可行的新方法，用于研究二维变量空间中目标函数系数扰动对有效解的影响。
AI.method: 在二维变量空间S⊂ℝ²中，通过定义线性映射空间（所有长度为K≥2的线性形式序列）上的等价关系，将MOLP问题划分为有限个等价类。每个等价类唯一关联S边界的一个子集，属于同一等价类的MOLP问题的有效解集即对应该边界子集。
AI.result: 该方法将二维空间中的MOLP问题分类为有限个等价类，每个类对应S边界上的唯一子集，实现了对有效解集在系数扰动下行为的系统分类和刻画。数值示例验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于等价关系分类的灵敏度分析方法，在二维变量空间中具有计算可行性，能够有效帮助决策者理解目标函数系数变化对有效解的影响，是对现有MOLP灵敏度分析研究的重要扩展。

title: Breaking Down Financial News Impact: A Novel AI Approach with Geometric Hypergraphs
summary:
In the fast-paced and volatile financial markets, accurately predicting stock movements based on financial news is critical for investors and analysts. Traditional models often struggle to capture the intricate and dynamic relationships between news events and market reactions, limiting their ability to provide actionable insights. This paper introduces a novel approach leveraging Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) through the development of a Geometric Hypergraph Attention Network (GHAN) to analyze the impact of financial news on market behaviours. Geometric hypergraphs extend traditional graph structures by allowing edges to connect multiple nodes, effectively modelling high-order relationships and interactions among financial entities and news events. This unique capability enables the capture of complex dependencies, such as the simultaneous impact of a single news event on multiple stocks or sectors, which traditional models frequently overlook.
  By incorporating attention mechanisms within hypergraphs, GHAN enhances the model's ability to focus on the most relevant information, ensuring more accurate predictions and better interpretability. Additionally, we employ BERT-based embeddings to capture the semantic richness of financial news texts, providing a nuanced understanding of the content. Using a comprehensive financial news dataset, our GHAN model addresses key challenges in financial news impact analysis, including the complexity of high-order interactions, the necessity for model interpretability, and the dynamic nature of financial markets. Integrating attention mechanisms and SHAP values within GHAN ensures transparency, highlighting the most influential factors driving market predictions.
  Empirical validation demonstrates the superior effectiveness of our approach over traditional sentiment analysis and time-series models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何超图注意力网络（GHAN）的XAI方法，通过超图结构建模金融新闻与市场行为间的高阶关系，结合BERT语义嵌入和注意力机制，实现更准确、可解释的股票市场预测。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以捕捉金融新闻与市场反应之间复杂、动态的高阶关系，导致预测精度和可解释性不足，亟需一种能建模多实体间高阶交互且具备可解释性的方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建几何超图注意力网络（GHAN），用超边连接多个节点（实体），建模金融实体与新闻事件间的高阶关系；2) 在超图中引入注意力机制，聚焦最相关信息；3) 使用BERT-based嵌入提取新闻文本的语义特征；4) 结合SHAP值增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: 实证结果表明，GHAN在预测性能上显著优于传统情感分析和时间序列模型。
AI.conclusion: GHAN通过超图结构有效捕捉了金融新闻与市场间的高阶交互，结合注意力机制和SHAP值在保证预测精度的同时提供了透明可解释的决策依据，为金融新闻影响分析提供了新范式。

title: Coderivative-Based Newton Methods with Wolfe Linesearch for Nonsmooth Optimization
summary: This paper introduces and develops novel coderivative-based Newton methods with Wolfe linesearch conditions to solve various classes of problems in nonsmooth optimization. We first propose a generalized regularized Newton method with Wolfe linesearch (GRNM-W) for unconstrained $C^{1,1}$ minimization problems (which are second-order nonsmooth) and establish global as well as local superlinear convergence of their iterates. To deal with convex composite minimization problems (which are first-order nonsmooth and can be constrained), we combine the proposed GRNM-W with two algorithmic frameworks: the forward-backward envelope and the augmented Lagrangian method resulting in the two new algorithms called CNFB and CNAL, respectively. Finally, we present numerical results to solve Lasso and support vector machine problems appearing in, e.g., machine learning and statistics, which demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发展了基于余导数的牛顿法结合Wolfe线搜索条件，用于解决非光滑优化中的各类问题，包括无约束C^1,1极小化、凸复合极小化问题，并在Lasso和支持向量机问题上验证了算法效率。
AI.motivation: 非光滑优化问题在机器学习、统计等领域广泛出现，但传统牛顿方法难以直接处理非光滑性。本文旨在设计一种既能处理二阶非光滑（C^1,1）又能处理一阶非光滑（凸复合）的通用牛顿型算法框架。
AI.method: 1) 提出广义正则化牛顿法结合Wolfe线搜索（GRNM-W）用于无约束C^1,1极小化问题；2) 将GRNM-W与forward-backward envelope（FBE）和增广拉格朗日方法（ALM）两种算法框架结合，分别得到CNFB和CNAL算法，用于处理凸复合极小化问题。
AI.result: 理论方面：建立了GRNM-W的全局收敛性和局部超线性收敛速度。数值方面：在Lasso和支持向量机问题上验证了所提算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的余导数牛顿法框架能够有效处理多种非光滑优化问题，结合不同算法框架后可扩展至约束凸复合问题，数值实验表明其在机器学习和统计中的实际应用潜力。

title: Bilateral boundary finite-time stabilization of 2x2 linear first-order hyperbolic systems with spatially varying coefficients
summary: This paper presents bilateral control laws for one-dimensional(1-D) linear 2x2 hyperbolic first-order systems (with spatially varying coefficients). Bilateral control means there are two actuators at each end of the domain. This situation becomes more complex as the transport velocities are no longer constant, and this extension is nontrivial. By selecting the appropriate backstepping transformation and target system, the infinite-dimensional backstepping method is extended and a full-state feedback control law is given that ensures the closed-loop system converges to its zero equilibrium in finite time. The design of bilateral controllers enables a potential for fault-tolerant designs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一维线性2x2双曲型一阶系统（空间变系数），提出了双边控制律（域两端各有两个执行器），通过扩展无穷维反步法设计全状态反馈控制律，使闭环系统在有限时间内收敛至零平衡态，并为容错设计提供可能。
AI.motivation: 已有工作多针对常系数或单边控制情形，而实际系统中传输速度常随空间变化，且双边控制（两端各有两个执行器）更具复杂性。本文旨在将反步法推广至空间变系数的2x2双曲系统，实现双边控制设计。
AI.method: 选择合适的反步变换和目标系统，扩展无穷维反步法，设计全状态反馈控制律。
AI.result: 所设计的全状态反馈控制律能确保闭环系统在有限时间内收敛至零平衡态。
AI.conclusion: 双曲系统的双边控制设计可推广至空间变系数情形，且该设计具备容错控制的潜力。

title: Phase Transitions in Anisotropic Turbulence
summary: Turbulence is a widely observed state of fluid flows, characterized by complex, nonlinear interactions between motions across a broad spectrum of length and time scales. While turbulence is ubiquitous, from teacups to planetary atmospheres, oceans and stars, its manifestations can vary considerably between different physical systems. For instance, three-dimensional (3D) turbulent flows display a forward energy cascade from large to small scales, while in two-dimensional (2D) turbulence, energy cascades from small to large scales. In a given physical system, a transition between such disparate regimes of turbulence can occur when a control parameter reaches a critical value. The behavior of flows close to such transition points, which separate qualitatively distinct \textit{phases} of turbulence, has been found to be unexpectedly rich. Here, we survey recent findings on such transitions in highly anisotropic turbulent fluid flows, including turbulence in thin layers and under the influence of rapid rotation. We also review recent work on transitions induced by turbulent fluctuations, such as random reversals and transitions between large-scale vortices and jets, among others. The relevance of these results and their ramifications for future investigations are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了高度各向异性湍流（如薄层湍流、快速旋转湍流）中不同湍流相（如2D与3D湍流）之间的相变现象，包括由控制参数临界值触发的能量级串方向转变、大尺度涡旋与射流的随机翻转等，并讨论了这些发现对未来研究的意义。
AI.motivation: 湍流在不同物理系统中表现出截然不同的行为（如3D正向能量级串与2D反向能量级串），而控制参数跨越临界值时，系统会发生湍流"相变"。理解这些相变附近的复杂动力学行为，对于揭示湍流普适性与系统特异性之间的关系至关重要。
AI.method: 采用综述方法，系统梳理了近年来关于两类主要各向异性湍流相变的研究：(1) 薄层限制和快速旋转等几何/力场约束下的湍流维度转换；(2) 由湍流涨落自身诱导的相变，如大尺度结构的随机反转、涡旋与射流之间的状态切换。
AI.result: 高度各向异性湍流中，相变附近的流动行为呈现出意想不到的丰富性，包括非平凡的临界现象、迟滞、多重稳态以及自发对称性破缺等特征。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现表明湍流相变是连接不同湍流态的关键机制，对理解大气、海洋、恒星等天体物理系统中的大尺度流动组织具有重要启示，并为未来实验和数值研究指明了方向。

title: A generalized three-dimensional hybrid contact method for smoothed particle hydrodynamics
summary: When the effects of relative motion at the solid object interfaces are not negligible, the contact method is required in the smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) method to prevent virtual shear and tensile stresses. However, there is still a lack of a three-dimensional (3D) contact method that can be well applied to various deformation situations, especially for extreme deformation. In this study, we propose a generalized 3D hybrid contact method for SPH. First, an improved high accuracy free-surface particle detection method is developed, including optimization of the detection process to reduce the detection time and consideration of the effect of material compressibility on the filtering parameters to extend the existing semi-geometric method from the incompressible (weakly-compressible) field to the compressible field. Then, a novel 3D local surface reconstruction method is developed based on the free-surface particles and region growing method, including the selection of the initial edge, the principle of triangle expansion, and the evaluation function, followed by the surface-surface contact detection and enforcement of normal penalty and tangential friction forces according to the penalty function method and Coulomb friction law. Finally, the particle-particle contact method is added to deal with cases where surface-surface contact fails, e.g., some particles are unable to reconstruct the local surface when the material undergoes extreme deformations. The proposed method is validated by several numerical tests, and the results show that the proposed method is capable of handling various contact problems with accuracy and stability, including small, large, and extreme deformation problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于SPH方法的广义三维混合接触方法，结合了改进的自由面粒子检测、局部表面重建和表面-表面/粒子-粒子双重接触机制，能够准确稳定地处理从小变形到极端变形的各种接触问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的SPH接触方法在处理三维问题时，尤其是极端变形场景下，缺乏普适性和可靠性，无法有效防止虚假剪切应力和拉应力。
AI.method: 1. 改进高精度自由面粒子检测方法（优化检测流程、扩展至可压缩领域）；2. 基于区域生长法的三维局部表面重建方法（初始边选取、三角形扩展原则、评价函数）；3. 表面-表面接触检测与法向罚力/切向摩擦力施加；4. 粒子-粒子接触方法作为表面-表面接触失效时的补充。
AI.result: 多个数值测试验证表明，该方法能够精确稳定地处理从小变形、大变形到极端变形的各类接触问题。
AI.conclusion: 该广义三维混合接触方法有效弥补了现有SPH接触方法在极端变形场景下的不足，具有广泛的适用性和良好的数值稳定性。

title: Discrete element method model of soot aggregates
summary: Soot is a component of atmospheric aerosols that affects climate by scattering and absorbing the sunlight. Soot particles are fractal aggregates composed of elemental carbon. In the atmosphere, the aggregates acquire coatings by condensation and coagulation, resulting in significant compaction of the aggregates that changes the direct climate forcing of soot. Currently, no models exist to rigorously describe the process of soot restructuring, reducing prediction accuracy of atmospheric aerosol models. We develop a discrete element method contact model to simulate restructuring of fractal soot aggregates, represented as assemblies of spheres joined by cohesion and by sintered necks. The model is parametrized based on atomic force spectroscopy data and is used to simulate soot restructuring, showing that the fraction of necks in aggregates determines the restructuring pathway. Aggregates with fewer necks undergo local compaction, while aggregates with nearly-full necking prefer global compaction. Additionally, full compaction occurs within tens of nanoseconds, orders of magnitude faster than the time scale of soot aging through condensation. An important implication is that in atmospheric soot aggregates, the rate of condensation determines how many necks are fractured simultaneously, affecting the restructuring pathway, e.g., producing highly compact, thinly-coated soot as observed in recent studies.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种离散单元法接触模型来模拟烟尘颗粒在大气中的重组过程，发现烟尘聚集体的颈部分数决定了重组路径（局部或全局压实），且完全压实可在数十纳秒内完成，远快于凝结老化时间尺度。这意味着大气中凝结速率决定了同时断裂的颈部数量，从而影响重组路径和最终形态。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏能够严格描述烟尘团聚体重组过程的模型，这降低了大气气溶胶模型对烟尘直接气候强迫效应的预测精度。本研究旨在开发一种能够模拟烟尘团聚体重组过程的接触模型。
AI.method: 基于原子力光谱数据参数化，开发了一种离散单元法接触模型，将烟尘聚集体表示为通过内聚力和烧结颈连接的球体组装体，模拟不同颈部比例下的重组过程。
AI.result: 烟尘聚集体的颈部分数决定了重组路径：颈部较少的聚集体发生局部压实，而几乎完全颈化的聚集体倾向于全局压实。完全压实可在数十纳秒内完成，显著快于凝结老化时间尺度。
AI.conclusion: 在大气烟尘聚集体中，凝结速率决定了同时断裂的颈部数量，从而影响重组路径，可产生高度压实但涂层较薄的烟尘颗粒，这与近期观测结果一致。

title: Insights on molecular P implantation for scalable spin-qubit arrays
summary: Quantum information technologies hold immense promise, with quantum computers poised to revolutionize problem-solving capabilities. Among the leading contenders are solid-state spin-qubits, particularly those utilizing the spin of phosphorous donors (31 P ). While significant progress has been made in enhancing quantum coherence and qubit control, challenges persist, notably in achieving precise and scalable P placement in Si substrate. This paper investigates by means of molecular dynamics the use of molecular PF2 ions for implantation, aiming to reduce placement uncertainty while maintaining detection efficiency. We examine energy transfer, molecule integrity, implantation profiles, electronic signal components, and stable damage. Among other things we find that the assumption that the molecule only breaks apart immediately due to the presence of an a-SiO2 layer on the surface of the crystal and that the intensity of the electronic signal from ion-solid interactions does not correlate necessarily with the penetration depth of P.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分子动力学模拟研究了利用PF2分子离子注入在硅基底中实现磷供体自旋量子比特的精确和可扩展放置。研究发现，由于表面的a-SiO2层，分子会立即解离，且电子信号强度与磷的穿透深度不一定相关。
AI.motivation: 量子信息技术中，固态自旋量子比特（特别是磷供体31P）的精确和可扩展放置是实现实用量子计算机的关键挑战。当前方法在实现精确的磷原子定位方面存在困难，因此需要研究新的注入方法以降低位置不确定性，同时保持检测效率。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟方法，研究使用PF2分子离子进行注入的过程。分析了能量传递、分子完整性、注入剖面、电子信号分量以及稳定损伤等多个方面。
AI.result: 发现两个关键结果：1）由于晶体表面存在非晶二氧化硅（a-SiO2）层，分子会立即解离；2）来自离子-固体相互作用的电子信号强度与磷的穿透深度并不一定相关。
AI.conclusion: PF2分子离子注入方法面临分子立即解离的挑战，且电子信号强度不能作为穿透深度的可靠指标，这为量子比特制造中的精确定位提出了新的考量。

title: Stochastic models of advection-diffusion in layered media
summary: Mathematically modelling diffusive and advective transport of particles in heterogeneous layered media is important to many applications in computational, biological and medical physics. While deterministic continuum models of such transport processes are well established, they fail to account for randomness inherent in many problems and are valid only for a large number of particles. To address this, this paper derives a suite of equivalent stochastic (discrete-time discrete-space random walk) models for several standard continuum (partial differential equation) models of diffusion and advection-diffusion across a fully- or semi-permeable interface. Our approach involves discretising the continuum model in space and time to yield a Markov chain, which governs the transition probabilities between spatial lattice sites during each time step. Discretisation in space is carried out using a standard finite volume method while two options are considered for discretisation in time. A simple forward Euler discretisation yields a stochastic model taking the form of a local (nearest-neighbour) random walk with simple analytical expressions for the transition probabilities while an exact exponential discretisation yields a non-local random walk with transition probabilities defined numerically via a matrix exponential. Constraints on the size of the spatial and/or temporal steps are provided for each option to ensure the transition probabilities are non-negative. MATLAB code comparing the stochastic and continuum models is available on GitHub (https://github.com/elliotcarr/Carr2024c) with simulation results demonstrating good agreement for several example problems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对异质分层介质中扩散和对流传输的随机性建模需求，推导了一套与连续介质模型(PDE)等价的离散时间-离散空间随机游走模型，通过有限体积法空间离散和两种时间离散方案(前向欧拉与指数离散化)实现，并提供了确保转移概率非负的步长约束条件。
AI.motivation: 确定性连续介质模型在处理异质分层介质中的粒子传输时，无法捕捉实际问题中固有的随机性，且仅适用于大量粒子的情形。因此需要构建能够兼容随机性的等价随机模型。
AI.method: 采用有限体积法进行空间离散，前向欧拉离散和精确指数离散两种时间离散方案，将连续PDE模型转化为马尔可夫链，得到局部（最近邻）或非局部随机游走模型，并推导转移概率的解析或数值表达式及步长约束条件。
AI.result: 前向欧拉离散得到具有简单解析转移概率表达式的局部随机游走；指数离散化得到需通过矩阵指数数值定义转移概率的非局部随机游走。两种方案均需满足相应时空步长约束以保证非负概率。MATLAB仿真验证了与连续模型的良好一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为跨全透/半透界面的异质分层介质扩散-对流问题提供了从连续PDE到等效随机游走模型的系统转化框架，兼顾了解析简洁性与数值精确性，并提供了开源代码支持可复现性。

title: Symmetry induced enhancement in finite-time thermodynamic trade-off relations
summary: Symmetry imposes constraints on open quantum systems, affecting the dissipative properties in nonequilibrium processes. Superradiance is a typical example in which the decay rate of the system is enhanced via a collective system-bath coupling that respects permutation symmetry. Such model has also been applied to heat engines. However, a generic framework that addresses the impact of symmetry in finite-time thermodynamics is not well established. Here, we show a symmetry-based framework that describes the fundamental limit of collective enhancement in finite-time thermodynamics. Specifically, we derive a general upper bound on the average jump rate, which quantifies the fundamental speed set by thermodynamic speed limits and trade-off relations. We identify the symmetry condition which achieves the obtained bound, and explicitly construct an open quantum system model that goes beyond the enhancement realized by the conventional superradiance model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于对称性的通用框架，用于描述有限时间热力学中的集体增强基本极限，推导了平均跳变速率的通用上界，并构造了一个超越传统超辐射模型的开放量子系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管对称性对开放量子系统的耗散特性有重要影响（如超辐射中的集体增强），但缺乏一个通用框架来阐述对称性在有限时间热力学中的作用。
AI.method: 基于对称性推导平均跳变速率的通用上界，识别实现该上界的对称性条件，并显式构造超越传统超辐射模型的开放量子系统模型。
AI.result: 得到了平均跳变速率的通用上界，该上界量化了热力学速度极限和权衡关系所设定的基本速度；找到了实现该上界的对称性条件；构造了比传统超辐射模型具有更强集体增强效果的开放量子系统。
AI.conclusion: 对称性框架能够系统地描述有限时间热力学中的集体增强基本极限，且通过适当的对称性设计可以实现超越传统超辐射的增强效果。

title: A Partition Function Estimator
summary: We propose a simple estimator that allows to calculate the absolute value of a system's partition function from a finite sampling of its canonical ensemble. The estimator utilizes a volume correction term to compensate the effect that the finite sampling cannot cover the whole configuration space. As a proof of concept, the estimator is applied to calculate the partition function for several model systems, and the results are compared with the numerically exact solutions. Excellent agreement is found, demonstrating that a solution for an efficient calculation of partition functions is possible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单估计器，通过有限采样的正则系综计算系统配分函数的绝对值，利用体积校正项补偿有限采样无法覆盖整个构型空间的影响。在多个模型系统上的测试表明，该估计器结果与精确数值解高度一致。
AI.motivation: 配分函数是统计力学的核心量，但直接计算通常极其困难，尤其在复杂系统中。现有方法往往需要大量采样或近似，效率有限。本文旨在开发一种高效、准确的配分函数计算方法。
AI.method: 提出一个简单估计器，从有限的正则系综采样中计算配分函数的绝对值。引入体积校正项，补偿有限采样未覆盖全部构型空间带来的偏差，从而实现从局部采样外推全局配分函数。
AI.result: 在多个模型系统（具体模型未在摘要中详述）上应用该估计器，并与数值精确解对比，结果显示出极好的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该估计器提供了一种高效计算配分函数的可行方案，验证了从有限采样准确估计配分函数的可能性，为统计力学中配分函数的直接计算开辟了新途径。

title: Maximum a Posteriori Estimation for Linear Structural Dynamics Models Using Bayesian Optimization with Rational Polynomial Chaos Expansions
summary: Bayesian analysis enables combining prior knowledge with measurement data to learn model parameters. Commonly, one resorts to computing the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimate, when only a point estimate of the parameters is of interest. We apply MAP estimation in the context of structural dynamic models, where the system response can be described by the frequency response function. To alleviate high computational demands from repeated expensive model calls, we utilize a rational polynomial chaos expansion (RPCE) surrogate model that expresses the system frequency response as a rational of two polynomials with complex coefficients. We propose an extension to an existing sparse Bayesian learning approach for RPCE based on Laplace's approximation for the posterior distribution of the denominator coefficients. Furthermore, we introduce a Bayesian optimization approach, which allows to adaptively enrich the experimental design throughout the optimization process of MAP estimation. Thereby, we utilize the expected improvement acquisition function as a means to identify sample points in the input space that are possibly associated with large objective function values. The acquisition function is estimated through Monte Carlo sampling based on the posterior distribution of the expansion coefficients identified in the sparse Bayesian learning process. By combining the sparsity-inducing learning procedure with the sequential experimental design, we effectively reduce the number of model evaluations in the MAP estimation problem. We demonstrate the applicability of the presented methods on the parameter updating problem of an algebraic two-degree-of-freedom system and the finite element model of a cross-laminated timber plate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合稀疏贝叶斯学习与自适应实验设计的贝叶斯优化方法，利用有理多项式混沌展开（RPCE）替代模型，在结构动力学模型的频率响应函数框架下高效计算最大后验（MAP）估计，显著减少了昂贵模型调用的次数。
AI.motivation: 在结构动力学模型中计算MAP估计时，频繁调用高保真模型导致计算成本过高，亟需一种既能保持精度又能大幅降低模型评估次数的替代方法。
AI.method: 1) 采用有理多项式混沌展开（RPCE）构建频率响应函数的替代模型；2) 提出基于Laplace近似的稀疏贝叶斯学习方法，对分母系数的后验分布进行近似；3) 引入贝叶斯优化框架，利用期望改进（EI）采集函数通过蒙特卡洛采样自适应地丰富实验设计，从而在MAP估计过程中智能选择新的样本点。
AI.result: 在代数二自由度系统和交叉层压木板有限元模型的参数更新问题中验证了方法的有效性，表明结合稀疏性诱导学习与顺序实验设计能有效减少MAP估计所需的模型评估次数。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法为结构动力学中基于替代模型的贝叶斯推断提供了一条高效途径，尤其适用于计算资源受限的场景。

title: JANET: Joint Adaptive predictioN-region Estimation for Time-series
comment: Accepted to ECML Journal for Machine Learning Alternate Title: Conformalised Joint Prediction Region for Time Series
summary: Conformal prediction provides machine learning models with prediction sets that offer theoretical guarantees, but the underlying assumption of exchangeability limits its applicability to time series data. Furthermore, existing approaches struggle to handle multi-step ahead prediction tasks, where uncertainty estimates across multiple future time points are crucial. We propose JANET (Joint Adaptive predictioN-region Estimation for Time-series), a novel framework for constructing conformal prediction regions that are valid for both univariate and multivariate time series. JANET generalises the inductive conformal framework and efficiently produces joint prediction regions with controlled K-familywise error rates, enabling flexible adaptation to specific application needs. Our empirical evaluation demonstrates JANET's superior performance in multi-step prediction tasks across diverse time series datasets, highlighting its potential for reliable and interpretable uncertainty quantification in sequential data.

AI.tldr: JANET是一个针对单变量和多变量时间序列的联合共形预测框架，通过推广归纳共形预测并控制K族错误率，有效处理多步 ahead 预测的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有共形预测方法基于可交换性假设，不适用于时间序列数据；且多步 ahead 预测任务中缺乏有效的联合不确定性估计。
AI.method: 提出JANET框架，推广归纳共形预测，生成联合预测区域并控制K族错误率，支持单变量与多变量时间序列。
AI.result: 在多个时间序列数据集的多步预测任务中，JANET表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: JANET为时间序列数据提供了可靠且可解释的不确定性量化方法，具有灵活适应不同应用需求的能力。

title: A method to benchmark high-dimensional process drift detection
summary: Process curves are multivariate finite time series data coming from manufacturing processes. This paper studies machine learning that detect drifts in process curve datasets. A theoretic framework to synthetically generate process curves in a controlled way is introduced in order to benchmark machine learning algorithms for process drift detection. An evaluation score, called the temporal area under the curve, is introduced, which allows to quantify how well machine learning models unveil curves belonging to drift segments. Finally, a benchmark study comparing popular machine learning approaches on synthetic data generated with the introduced framework is presented that shows that existing algorithms often struggle with datasets containing multiple drift segments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对制造业过程曲线数据中的漂移检测问题，提出了一个可控的理论框架用于生成合成过程曲线数据，引入了一种新的评估指标（时间曲线下面积，tAUC），并通过基准实验揭示了现有算法在多漂移段数据集上的性能不足。
AI.motivation: 制造业过程曲线数据中存在漂移现象，但缺乏可控的基准数据集和合适的评估指标来系统性地比较机器学习算法在过程漂移检测任务上的表现。
AI.method: 1) 提出了一个理论框架，以可控方式合成生成过程曲线数据；2) 引入了一种新的评估指标——时间曲线下面积（temporal area under the curve, tAUC），用于量化模型识别漂移段曲线的能力；3) 在该合成数据上进行了多种流行机器学习方法的基准对比研究。
AI.result: 现有算法在处理包含多个漂移段的数据集时常常表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 已有的机器学习方法在多漂移段场景下存在明显局限，所提出的框架和指标为后续改进算法提供了有效的评估平台。

title: PSLF: A PID Controller-incorporated Second-order Latent Factor Analysis Model for Recommender System
summary: A second-order-based latent factor (SLF) analysis model demonstrates superior performance in graph representation learning, particularly for high-dimensional and incomplete (HDI) interaction data, by incorporating the curvature information of the loss landscape. However, its objective function is commonly bi-linear and non-convex, causing the SLF model to suffer from a low convergence rate. To address this issue, this paper proposes a PID controller-incorporated SLF (PSLF) model, leveraging two key strategies: a) refining learning error estimation by incorporating the PID controller principles, and b) acquiring second-order information insights through Hessian-vector products. Experimental results on multiple HDI datasets indicate that the proposed PSLF model outperforms four state-of-the-art latent factor models based on advanced optimizers regarding convergence rates and generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种融合PID控制器的二阶潜在因子模型（PSLF），通过PID原理改进学习误差估计并利用Hessian-vector积获取二阶信息，从而在HDI数据上实现更快的收敛速度和更好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SLF模型虽能通过损失曲面曲率信息提升图表示学习性能，但其双线性非凸目标函数导致收敛速度较慢，需要改进优化效率。
AI.method: 提出PSLF模型，包含两个关键策略：a) 引入PID控制器原理优化学习误差估计；b) 通过Hessian-vector积获取二阶信息。
AI.result: 在多个高维不完全数据集上，PSLF模型在收敛速度和泛化性能上均优于四种基于先进优化器的潜在因子模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合PID控制器的二阶优化策略能有效加速SLF模型收敛，同时提升泛化性能。

title: Formation Mission Design for Commercial Aircraft Using Switched Optimal Control Techniques
summary: In this article, the formation mission design problem for commercial aircraft is studied. Given the departure times and the departure and arrival locations of several commercial flights, the relevant weather forecast, and the expected fuel savings during formation flight, the problem consists in establishing how to organize them in formation or solo flights and in finding the trajectories that minimize the overall direct operating cost of the flights. Each aircraft can fly solo or in different positions inside a formation. Therefore, the mission is modeled as a switched dynamical system, in which the discrete state describes the combination of flight modes of the individual aircraft and logical constraints in disjunctive form establish the switching logic among the discrete states of the system. The formation mission design problem has been formulated as an optimal control problem of a switched dynamical system and solved using an embedding approach, which allows switching decision among discrete states to be modeled without relying on binary variables. The resulting problem is a classical optimal control problem which has been solved using a knotting pseudospectral method. Several numerical experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach. The obtained results show that formation flight has great potential to reduce fuel consumption and emissions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了商用飞机的编队任务设计问题，通过将编队飞行建模为切换动力系统的最优控制问题，并采用嵌入方法（无需二进制变量）结合打结伪谱法求解，实验表明编队飞行能显著降低燃油消耗和排放。
AI.motivation: 探索商用飞机编队飞行在降低燃油消耗和排放方面的潜力，即如何在给定航班时刻、起降地点、天气预报和预期燃油节省的情况下，合理安排航班以编队或单独飞行，并规划出使总运营成本最小的轨迹。
AI.method: 将编队任务建模为切换动力系统，离散状态表示各飞机的飞行模式组合，逻辑约束以析取形式描述状态切换逻辑；采用嵌入方法在不依赖二进制变量的情况下建模切换决策，最终将问题转化为经典最优控制问题，并使用打结伪谱法求解。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法有效，编队飞行在降低燃油消耗和排放方面具有巨大潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的嵌入方法结合打结伪谱法能有效求解编队任务设计问题，编队飞行是减少航空碳排放的有效手段。

title: Optimal control of quantum stochastic systems in fermion fields: The Pontryagin-type maximum principle (II)
summary: In the present paper, by using the relaxed transposition method[29], we solve the second-order adjoint equations, corresponding to the optimal control of quantum stochastic systems in fermion fields, which plays the fundamental roles in the study of the Pointryagin-type maximum principle in quantum stochastic optimal control. The second-order adjoint equation is a backard operator valued quantum stochastic differential equation, which has no definition in the algebra of bounded operators, and the solution derived from the relaxed transposition method makes sense in W*-topology.

AI.tldr: 本文利用松弛转置法求解了费米子场中量子随机系统最优控制对应的二阶伴随方程，该方程是定义在W*-拓扑下的反向算子值量子随机微分方程，在无界算子代数中无定义。
AI.motivation: 研究量子随机最优控制中的庞特里亚金型最大值原理，需要解决作为其基础的第二阶伴随方程的求解问题。
AI.method: 采用松弛转置法（relaxed transposition method）处理二阶伴随方程，该方程在通常的有界算子代数中无定义，通过W*-拓扑赋予其解的意义。
AI.result: 得到了在W*-拓扑意义下二阶伴随方程的解，该解在标准算子代数框架下不存在。
AI.conclusion: 松弛转置法为量子随机最优控制中的二阶伴随方程提供了有效的求解途径，为庞特里亚金型最大值原理的建立奠定了理论基础。

title: Unsteady separation and oscillations in a compressible wake of a cylinder
summary: The paper presents a new analysis and a new interpretation of oscillations observed in the experiments of near wakes of cylinders at Mach 4 and Mach 6 and Reynolds number range 2 $\times$ 10$^4$ to 5 $\times$ 10$^5$ by \cite{schmidt2015oscillations} and \cite{thasu2022strouhal}. It is shown that the presence of such oscillations is strongly Reynolds number dependent. It is further shown that there is a threshold Reynolds number below which wake unsteadiness and oscillations do not appear. Attention is drawn to the earlier experimental investigation of supersonic wakes behind cylinders and spheres by \cite{kendall1962exp} which discusses cylinder oscillations and confirms the concept of threshold Reynolds number. Following the earlier work of \cite{goldburg1965strouhal} on hypersonic wakes of spheres and cones, a Strouhal number($St_θ$) based on total wake momentum thickness ($θ$) is shown to be the relevant similarity parameter for correlating the hypersonic and high supersonic wakes of spheres, cones, as well as cylinders. In this limited sense, $St_θ$ can be said to be `universal'. A universal Strouhal number based on only one geometry (\textit{i.e.,} a circular cylinder) and over a limited Reynolds number range as proposed by \cite{schmidt2015oscillations} is much too restrictive.

AI.tldr: 本文对马赫数4和6、雷诺数2×10^4至5×10^5范围内圆柱近尾迹振荡现象进行了新的分析和解释，发现振荡强烈依赖于雷诺数，存在阈值雷诺数，并提出了基于总尾流动量厚度的斯特劳哈尔数作为高超声速和高超声速尾迹的通用相似参数。
AI.motivation: 对Schmidt(2015)和Thasu(2022)实验中观测到的圆柱近尾迹振荡现象进行新的分析和解释，澄清振荡的雷诺数依赖性及阈值效应，并质疑仅基于单一几何形状和有限雷诺数范围提出的通用斯特劳哈尔数的适用性。
AI.method: 通过分析已有实验数据（Schmidt 2015、Thasu 2022、Kendall 1962），比较不同几何形状（圆柱、球体、锥体）在不同马赫数和雷诺数下的尾迹振荡特征，引入基于总尾流动量厚度的斯特劳哈尔数作为相似参数进行关联分析。
AI.result: 1) 振荡现象强烈依赖于雷诺数；2) 存在阈值雷诺数，低于该值尾迹非定常性和振荡不出现；3) 基于总尾流动量厚度的斯特劳哈尔数可作为高超声速和高超声速尾迹（球体、锥体、圆柱）的通用相似参数；4) 仅基于单一圆柱几何和有限雷诺数范围提出的通用斯特劳哈尔数过于局限。
AI.conclusion: 基于总尾流动量厚度的斯特劳哈尔数在一定意义上是“通用的”相似参数，但仅限于高超声速和高超声速尾迹；Schmidt(2015)提出的仅基于单一几何形状的通用斯特劳哈尔数过于严格。

title: Mean field lattice Boltzmann model for reactive mixtures in porous media
comment: Submitted to the Journal of Fluid Mechanics. Presented first at the DSFD 2024. 32 pages, 8 figures
summary: A new lattice Boltzmann model (LBM) is presented to describe chemically reacting multicomponent fluid flow in homogenised porous media. In this work, towards further generalizing the multicomponent reactive lattice Boltzmann model, we propose a formulation which is capable of performing reactive multicomponent flow computation in porous media at the representative elementary volume (REV) scale. To that end, the submodel responsible for interspecies diffusion has been upgraded to include Knudsen diffusion, whereas the kinetic equations for the species, the momentum and the energy have been rewritten to accommodate the effects of volume fraction of a porous media though careful choice of the equilibrium distribution functions. Verification of the mesoscale kinetic system of equations by a Chapman--Enskog analysis reveals that at the macroscopic scale, the homogenized Navier--Stokes equations for compressible multicomponent reactive flows are recovered. The Dusty Gas Model (DGM) capability hence formulated is validated over a wide pressure range by comparison of experimental flow rates of component species counter diffusing through capillary tubes. Next, for developing a capability to compute heterogeneous reactions, source terms for maintaining energy and mass balance across the fluid phase species and the surface adsorbed phase species are proposed. The complete model is then used to perform detailed chemistry simulations in porous electrodes of a Solid Oxide Fuel Cell (SOFC), thereby predicting polarization curves which are of practical interest.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的适用于均质多孔介质中化学反应多组分流体流动的格子玻尔兹曼模型（LBM），该模型在代表体元（REV）尺度上实现了反应性多组分流动的计算，通过引入Knudsen扩散、改写动力学方程并采用Dusty Gas Model（DGM）验证，最终成功应用于固体氧化物燃料电池（SOFC）多孔电极的详细化学模拟和极化曲线预测。
AI.motivation: 现有格子玻尔兹曼模型在处理多孔介质中化学反应多组分流动时，尚缺乏在REV尺度上的通用框架，尤其是在考虑Knudsen扩散及多孔介质体积分数效应方面存在不足，因此需要进一步发展更通用的模型。
AI.method: 采用格子玻尔兹曼方法，升级了种间扩散子模型以包含Knudsen扩散，通过精心选择平衡分布函数，在动力学方程中纳入多孔介质的体积分数效应；运用Chapman-Enskog分析从介观尺度恢复宏观均质Navier-Stokes方程；利用Dusty Gas Model（DGM）进行宽压力范围验证；提出保持能量和质量平衡的源项以处理异相反应。
AI.result: Chapman-Enskog分析表明该模型能够在宏观尺度恢复可压缩多组分反应流的均质Navier-Stokes方程；DGM验证通过对比毛细管中组分逆扩散的实验流量，证明了模型在宽压力范围内的有效性；在SOFC多孔电极模拟中成功预测了极化曲线。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的REV尺度的格子玻尔兹曼模型能够有效描述多孔介质中的化学反应多组分流动，具备实际工程应用价值，尤其适用于SOFC等电化学器件的性能预测。

title: Deep learning density functional theory Hamiltonian in real space
summary: Deep learning electronic structures from ab initio calculations holds great potential to revolutionize computational materials studies. While existing methods proved success in deep-learning density functional theory (DFT) Hamiltonian matrices, they are limited to DFT programs using localized atomic-like bases and heavily depend on the form of the bases. Here, we propose the DeepH-r method for deep-learning DFT Hamiltonians in real space, facilitating the prediction of DFT Hamiltonian in a basis-independent manner. An equivariant neural network architecture for modeling the real-space DFT potential is developed, targeting a more fundamental quantity in DFT. The real-space potential exhibits simplified principles of equivariance and enhanced nearsightedness, further boosting the performance of deep learning. When applied to evaluate the Hamiltonian matrix, this method significantly improved in accuracy, as exemplified in multiple case studies. Given the abundance of data in the real-space potential, this work may pave a novel pathway for establishing a ``large materials model" with increased accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出DeepH-r方法，通过等变神经网络学习DFT实空间势能，实现基组无关的高精度哈密顿量预测，为建立“大材料模型”奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习DFT哈密顿矩阵的方法局限于使用局域原子基组的DFT程序，且高度依赖于基组形式，缺乏基组无关的通用方案。
AI.method: 开发等变神经网络架构建模实空间DFT势能（比哈密顿量更基本的量），利用实空间势能简化的等变性和增强的近程性原理提升学习性能。
AI.result: 在多个案例研究中，该方法在预测哈密顿矩阵时相比现有方法显著提升了精度。
AI.conclusion: 实空间势能数据丰富，该方法为建立更准确的大规模材料模型开辟了新路径。

title: Polymeric Properties of Higher-Order G-Quadruplex Telomeric Structures: Effects of Chemically Inert Crowders
summary: G-quadruplexes are non-canonical DNA structures rather ubiquitous in human genome, which are thought to play a crucial role in the development of 85-90 % of cancers. Here, we present a novel coarse-grained approach in modeling G-quadruplexes which accounts for their structural flexibility. We apply it to study the polymeric properties of G-quadruplex multimers, with and without crowder particles, to mimic in-vivo conditions. We find that, contrary to some suggestions found in the literature, long G-quadruplex multimers are rather flexible polymeric macromolecules, with a local persistence length comparable to monomer size, exhibiting chain stiffness variation profile consistent with a real polymer in good solvent. Moreover, in a crowded environment (up to 10% volume fraction), we report that G-quadruplex multimers exhibit an increased propensity for coiling, with a corresponding decrease in the measured chain stiffness. Accurately accounting for the polymeric properties of G4 multimers is crucial for understanding their interactions with anticancer G4-targeting drugs, thereby significantly enhancing the design and effectiveness of these drugs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种考虑结构灵活性的G-四链体粗粒化建模方法，研究发现长G-四链体多聚体是柔性聚合物分子，在拥挤环境下其卷曲倾向增加、链刚度降低，这对理解抗癌药物与G4的相互作用及药物设计具有重要意义。
AI.motivation: G-四链体在85-90%的癌症发展中起关键作用，但现有模型未能充分捕捉其结构柔韧性，且对其在体内条件下的聚合性质认识不足，尤其关于长G4多聚体是柔性还是刚性存在争议。
AI.method: 采用新型粗粒化方法对G-四链体进行建模，考虑了结构的灵活性；研究了有/无拥挤粒子（模拟体内条件）下G4多聚体的聚合性质；通过测量持续长度等参数评估链刚度。
AI.result: 长G4多聚体是柔性大分子，持续长度与单体尺寸相当，链刚度变化符合良溶剂中真实聚合物的特性；在拥挤环境（体积分数达10%）中，G4多聚体卷曲倾向增加，链刚度测量值降低。
AI.conclusion: 准确描述G4多聚体的聚合性质对理解其与抗癌靶向药物的相互作用至关重要，可显著提升这类药物的设计和疗效。

title: Classification of electronic structures and state preparation for quantum computation of reaction chemistry
summary: Quantum computation for chemical problems will require the construction of guiding states with sufficient overlap with a target state. Since easily available and initializable mean-field states are characterized by an overlap that is reduced for multi-configurational electronic structures and even vanishes with growing system size, we here investigate the severity of state preparation for reaction chemistry. We emphasize weaknesses in current traditional approaches (even for weakly correlated molecules) and highlight the advantage of quantum phase estimation algorithms. An important result is the introduction of a new classification scheme for electronic structures based on orbital entanglement information. We identify two categories of multi-configurational molecules. Whereas class-1 molecules are dominated by very few determinants and often found in reaction chemistry, class-2 molecules do not allow one to single out a reasonably sized number of important determinants. The latter are particularly hard for traditional approaches and an ultimate target for quantum computation. Some open-shell iron-sulfur clusters belong to class 2. We discuss the role of the molecular orbital basis set and show that true class-2 molecules remain in this class independent of the choice of the orbital basis, with the iron-molybdenum cofactor of nitrogenase being a prototypical example. We stress that class-2 molecules can be build in a systematic fashion from open-shell centers or unsaturated carbon atoms. Our key result is that it will always be possible to initialize a guiding state for chemical reaction chemistry in the ground state based on initial low-cost approximate electronic structure information, which is facilitated by the finite size of the atomistic structures to be considered.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子计算在化学问题中制备引导态（guiding states）的可行性，提出了基于轨道纠缠信息的电子结构新分类方案：将多组态分子分为两类——第1类由少数行列式主导，常见于反应化学；第2类无法筛选出有限数量的重要行列式，是传统方法的难点和量子计算的终极目标。研究表明，真正的第2类分子不依赖于轨道基组的选择，并可通过开放壳层中心或碳原子系统构建。关键结论是，基于低成本近似电子结构信息，总能为化学反应基态初始化引导态。
AI.motivation: 量子计算求解化学问题需要构建与目标态重叠足够大的引导态，但容易获取的均值场态在多组态电子结构下重叠度降低，甚至随体系增大而消失。本文旨在探究反应化学中态制备的严重性，揭示传统方法的弱点，并评估量子相位估计算法的优势。
AI.method: 通过分析轨道纠缠信息，提出了一种基于电子结构的新分类方案，将多组态分子区分为第1类（少数行列式主导）和第2类（无法筛选少量重要行列式）。研究了分子轨道基组选择对分类的影响，并系统探讨了第2类分子的构建方式。
AI.result: 识别了两类多组态分子：第1类常见于反应化学，由少数行列式主导；第2类无法选出有限数量的重要行列式，对传统方法极其困难，是量子计算的终极目标。证明了真正的第2类分子不依赖轨道基组选择，铁钼辅因子（FeMoco）是典型例子。同时发现，第2类分子可通过开放壳层中心或不饱和碳原子系统构建。
AI.conclusion: 由于原子结构具有有限尺寸，基于低成本近似电子结构信息总是能够为化学反应基态初始化引导态。第2类分子是传统方法难以处理的终极目标，而量子相位估计算法在此类问题上具有显著优势。

title: Beyond Nearest-neighbour Universality of Spectral Fluctuations in Quantum Chaotic and Complex Many-body Systems
summary: Discerning chaos in quantum systems is an important problem as the usual route of Lyapunov exponents in classical systems is not straightforward in quantum systems. A standard route is the comparison of statistics derived from model physical systems to those from random matrix theory (RMT) ensembles, of which the most popular is the nearest-neighbour-spacings distribution (NNSD), which almost always shows good agreement with chaotic quantum systems. However, even in these cases, the long-range statistics (like number variance, spectral rigidity etc.), which are also more difficult to calculate, often show disagreements with RMT. As such, a more stringent test for chaos in quantum systems, via an analysis of intermediate-range statistics is needed, which will additionally assess the extent of agreement with RMT universality. In this paper, we deduce the effective level-repulsion parameters and the corresponding Wigner-surmise-like results of the next-nearest-neighbor spacing distribution (nNNSD) for integrable systems (semi-Poissonian statistics) as well as the three classical quantum-chaotic Wigner-Dyson regimes, by stringent comparisons to numerical RMT models and benchmarking against our exact analytical results for $3\times 3$ Gaussian matrix models, along with a semi-analytical form for the nNNSD in the Orthogonal-to-Unitary symmetry crossover. To illustrate the robustness of these RMT based results, we test these predictions against the nNNSD obtained from quantum chaotic models as well as disordered lattice spin models. This reinforces the Bohigas-Giannoni-Schmit and the Berry-Tabor conjectures, extending the associated universality to longer range statistics. In passing, we also highlight the equivalence of nNNSD in the apparently distinct Orthogonal-to-Unitary and diluted-Symplectic-to-Unitary crossovers.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了量子混沌系统中最近邻能级间距分布（nNNSD）的有效能级排斥参数和Wigner surmise类结果，覆盖可积系统（半泊松统计）和三种Wigner-Dyson混沌 regime，并通过3×3高斯矩阵模型的精确解析、数值RMT验证以及量子混沌模型和自旋晶格无序模型的测试，证明了nNNSD作为中间范围统计量在检验量子混沌和RMT普适性方面的有效性，同时揭示了正交-幺正与稀释辛-幺正交叉中nNNSD的等价性。
AI.motivation: 标准方法（如最近邻能级间距分布NNSD）虽能标识量子混沌，但其长程统计量（如数方差、谱刚性）常与RMT不符，且长程统计量计算困难。需要一种更严格的中间范围统计量来检验量子混沌并评估与RMT普适性的一致程度。
AI.method: 推导可积系统和三种Wigner-Dyson混沌 regime的nNNSD有效能级排斥参数及Wigner surmise类解析结果；通过3×3高斯矩阵模型得到精确解析形式并与数值RMT对比验证；提出正交-幺正对称性交叉的半解析nNNSD形式；最后在量子混沌模型和 disordered 晶格自旋模型上进行数值测试。
AI.result: 成功推导了各统计 regime的nNNSD解析/半解析形式；数值RMT验证与理论预测高度吻合；量子混沌模型和自旋晶格模型的测试证实了RMT结果的普适性；发现了正交-幺正交叉与稀释辛-幺正交叉中nNNSD的等价性。
AI.conclusion: nNNSD作为中间范围统计量是量子混沌的更严格检验工具，能够更精细地评估系统与RMT普适性的符合程度。结果强化了Bohigas-Giannoni-Schmit和Berry-Tabor猜想，将普适性推广到了更长程的统计量，同时发现了不同对称性交叉之间的等价性。

title: Driven Lorentz model in discrete time
summary: We consider a tracer particle performing a random walk on a two-dimensional lattice in the presence of immobile hard obstacles. Starting from equilibrium, a constant force pulling on the particle is switched on, driving the system to a new stationary state. Our study calculates displacement moments in discrete time (number of steps $N$) for an arbitrarily strong constant driving force, exact to first order in obstacle density. We find that for fixed driving force $F$, the approach to the terminal discrete velocity scales as $\sim N^{-1} \exp(- N F^2 / 16)$ for small $F$, differing significantly from the $\sim N^{-1}$ prediction of linear response. Besides a non-analytic dependence on the force and breakdown of Einstein's linear response, our results show that fluctuations in the directions of the force are enhanced in the presence of obstacles. Notably, the variance grows as $\sim N^3$ (superdiffusion) for $F \to \infty$ at intermediate steps, reverting to normal diffusion ($\sim N$) at larger steps, a behavior previously observed in continuous time but demonstrated here in discrete steps for the first time. Unlike the exponential waiting time case, the superdiffusion regime starts immediately at $N=1$. The framework presented allows considering any type of waiting-time distribution between steps and transition to continuous time using subordination methods. Our findings are also validated through computer simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维晶格上示踪粒子在不可移动硬障碍物存在下的随机游走。从平衡态开始，施加恒定外力驱动系统至新稳态。研究发现，对于小力F，终端离散速度的趋近尺度为~N^{-1} exp(-N F^2/16)，显著不同于线性响应的~N^{-1}预测。方差在F→∞时呈现~N^3的超扩散行为，随后恢复为正常扩散，该现象首次在离散步中展示。
AI.motivation: 探究存在障碍物时外力驱动的示踪粒子随机游走行为，特别是在强外力作用下的非平衡稳态特性，以及传统线性响应理论（如爱因斯坦关系）的失效。
AI.method: 采用离散时间随机游走模型，在二维晶格上布置不可移动硬障碍物，通过解析方法计算到位移矩，精确到障碍物密度的一阶。利用子ordination方法处理等待时间分布，并进行计算机模拟验证。
AI.result: (1) 小力F下终端离散速度趋近尺度为~N^{-1} exp(-N F^2/16)，偏离线性响应的~N^{-1}；(2) 外力方向上的涨落在障碍物存在下增强；(3) F→∞时方差呈现~N^3超扩散行为，随后恢复为~N正常扩散，且超扩散区域从N=1立即开始；(4) 验证了连续时间下的行为在离散步中的对应。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了外力驱动下障碍物系统偏离线性响应的本质，展示了非解析依赖性和超扩散-正常扩散的转变，为理解复杂环境中的输运过程提供了新的理论框架。

title: Bayes-optimal learning of an extensive-width neural network from quadratically many samples
summary: We consider the problem of learning a target function corresponding to a single hidden layer neural network, with a quadratic activation function after the first layer, and random weights. We consider the asymptotic limit where the input dimension and the network width are proportionally large. Recent work [Cui & al '23] established that linear regression provides Bayes-optimal test error to learn such a function when the number of available samples is only linear in the dimension. That work stressed the open challenge of theoretically analyzing the optimal test error in the more interesting regime where the number of samples is quadratic in the dimension. In this paper, we solve this challenge for quadratic activations and derive a closed-form expression for the Bayes-optimal test error. We also provide an algorithm, that we call GAMP-RIE, which combines approximate message passing with rotationally invariant matrix denoising, and that asymptotically achieves the optimal performance. Technically, our result is enabled by establishing a link with recent works on optimal denoising of extensive-rank matrices and on the ellipsoid fitting problem. We further show empirically that, in the absence of noise, randomly-initialized gradient descent seems to sample the space of weights, leading to zero training loss, and averaging over initialization leads to a test error equal to the Bayes-optimal one.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二次激活的单隐层神经网络在输入维度和网络宽度成比例大时的贝叶斯最优测试误差。当样本数量与维度平方成比例时，推导出了闭式解，并提出了GAMP-RIE算法（结合近似消息传递与旋转不变矩阵去噪）渐近达到最优性能。技术上通过建立与广泛秩矩阵最优去噪和椭球拟合问题的联系实现。还发现无噪声时随机初始化梯度下降采样权重空间，初始化平均后测试误差达到贝叶斯最优。
AI.motivation: 挑战Cui等人2023年工作遗留的开放问题：在样本数量与维度平方成比例的更有趣区域中，理论上分析二次激活单隐层神经网络的贝叶斯最优测试误差。
AI.method: 1) 建立与广泛秩矩阵最优去噪问题和椭球拟合问题的理论联系；2) 提出GAMP-RIE算法，融合近似消息传递与旋转不变矩阵去噪；3) 在高维渐近极限下推导贝叶斯最优测试误差的闭式表达式。
AI.result: 1) 推导出样本量二次于维度时的贝叶斯最优测试误差闭式表达式；2) GAMP-RIE算法渐近达到该最优性能；3) 无噪声情形下随机初始化梯度下降平均后测试误差等于贝叶斯最优值。
AI.conclusion: 解决了二次激活单隐层神经网络在二次样本量区域的贝叶斯最优测试误差理论分析难题，提供了可计算的最优误差闭式解以及可达算法，并揭示了无噪声条件下梯度下降与贝叶斯最优的关联。

title: Improving Out-of-Distribution Detection by Combining Existing Post-hoc Methods
summary: Since the seminal paper of Hendrycks et al. arXiv:1610.02136, Post-hoc deep Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection has expanded rapidly. As a result, practitioners working on safety-critical applications and seeking to improve the robustness of a neural network now have a plethora of methods to choose from. However, no method outperforms every other on every dataset arXiv:2210.07242, so the current best practice is to test all the methods on the datasets at hand. This paper shifts focus from developing new methods to effectively combining existing ones to enhance OOD detection. We propose and compare four different strategies for integrating multiple detection scores into a unified OOD detector, based on techniques such as majority vote, empirical and copulas-based Cumulative Distribution Function modeling, and multivariate quantiles based on optimal transport. We extend common OOD evaluation metrics -- like AUROC and FPR at fixed TPR rates -- to these multi-dimensional OOD detectors, allowing us to evaluate them and compare them with individual methods on extensive benchmarks. Furthermore, we propose a series of guidelines to choose what OOD detectors to combine in more realistic settings, i.e. in the absence of known OOD data, relying on principles drawn from Outlier Exposure arXiv:1812.04606. The code is available at https://github.com/paulnovello/multi-ood.

AI.tldr: 本文不再提出新的OOD检测方法，而是研究如何有效组合现有多种检测分数来提升OOD检测性能，提出了四种集成策略（多数投票、经验CDF、Copula-based CDF、最优传输多变量分位数），并扩展了评估指标，提供了无OOD数据时的集成指南。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法众多，但没有哪种方法能在所有数据集上全面优于其他方法，当前最佳实践是在手头数据集上测试所有方法，效率低下。因此本文从开发新方法转向有效组合现有方法以增强OOD检测。
AI.method: 提出了四种集成策略：1) 多数投票；2) 基于经验累计分布函数(CDF)建模；3) 基于Copula的CDF建模；4) 基于最优传输的多变量分位数。同时将AUROC、FPR@TPR等评估指标扩展到多维度OOD检测器。在无OOD数据场景下，借鉴Outlier Exposure原则提出选择组合方法的指南。
AI.result: 在广泛的基准测试上将四种集成策略与单个方法进行了比较，验证了组合方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组合现有OOD检测方法比开发新方法更具实用价值，四种集成策略均能有效提升检测性能，同时提出的评估指标扩展和选择指南为实际应用提供了系统性的框架。

title: Iterative thresholding for non-linear learning in the strong $\varepsilon$-contamination model
summary:
We derive approximation bounds for learning single neuron models using thresholded gradient descent when both the labels and the covariates are possibly corrupted adversarially. We assume the data follows the model $y = σ(\mathbf{w}^{*} \cdot \mathbf{x}) + ξ,$ where $σ$ is a nonlinear activation function, the noise $ξ$ is Gaussian, and the covariate vector $\mathbf{x}$ is sampled from a sub-Gaussian distribution. We study sigmoidal, leaky-ReLU, and ReLU activation functions and derive a $O(ν\sqrt{ε\log(1/ε)})$ approximation bound in $\ell_{2}$-norm, with sample complexity $O(d/ε)$ and failure probability $e^{-Ω(d)}$.
  We also study the linear regression problem, where $σ(\mathbf{x}) = \mathbf{x}$. We derive a $O(νε\log(1/ε))$ approximation bound, improving upon the previous $O(ν)$ approximation bounds for the gradient-descent based iterative thresholding algorithms of Bhatia et al. (NeurIPS 2015) and Shen and Sanghavi (ICML 2019). Our algorithm has a $O(\textrm{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/ε))$ runtime complexity when $\|\mathbf{w}^{*}\|_2 \leq R$, improving upon the $O(\text{polylog}(N,d)/ε^2)$ runtime complexity of Awasthi et al. (NeurIPS 2022).

AI.tldr: 本文研究在标签和协变量可能受到对抗性污染的情况下，使用阈值梯度下降学习单神经元模型的近似界。对于sigmoid、leaky-ReLU和ReLU激活函数，得到了$O(\nu\sqrt{\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon)})$的$\ell_2$范数近似界，样本复杂度为$O(d/\varepsilon)$。对于线性回归，得到了$O(\nu\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon))$的近似界，改进了此前的工作，且算法运行时复杂度为$O(\text{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/\varepsilon))$。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度下降的迭代阈值算法在处理对抗性污染数据时，近似界不够紧（如线性回归中仅为$O(\nu)$），且运行时复杂度较高。本文旨在通过阈值梯度下降方法，推导更紧的近似界并降低算法复杂度。
AI.method: 采用阈值梯度下降（thresholded gradient descent）算法，在数据可能受对抗性污染（标签噪声$\xi$为高斯分布，协变量$\mathbf{x}$来自次高斯分布）的假设下，分别对sigmoid、leaky-ReLU、ReLU激活函数的单神经元模型以及线性回归问题进行分析，推导近似误差界和样本复杂度。
AI.result:
对于sigmoid、leaky-ReLU、ReLU激活函数，得到$O(
u\sqrt{\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon)})$的$\ell_2$范数近似界，样本复杂度$O(d/\varepsilon)$，失败概率$e^{-\Omega(d)}$。对于线性回归，得到$O(
u\varepsilon\log(1/\varepsilon))$的近似界，优于此前$O(
u)$的界；算法运行时复杂度为$O(	ext{polylog}(N,d)\log(R/\varepsilon))$，优于此前$O(	ext{polylog}(N,d)/\varepsilon^2)$的复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的阈值梯度下降方法在对抗性污染环境下，无论是对于非线性激活函数的单神经元模型还是线性回归，均能实现更紧的近似界和更优的算法复杂度，在理论上改进了Bhatia等人和Shen & Sanghavi以及Awasthi等人的结果。

title: Hypersonic Boundary Layer Transition and Heat Loading
summary: Hypersonic boundary layer transition using high-order methods for direct numerical simulations (DNS) is largely unexplored, although a few references exist in the literature. Experimental data in the hypersonic regime are scarce, while almost all existing hypersonic codes have low-order accuracy, which could lead to erroneous results in long-time integration and at high Reynolds numbers. Here, we focus on the transition from laminar to turbulent flow, where the Nusselt number may be five times or higher than the Nusselt number in the turbulent regime. The hypersonic flow regime must be modeled accurately using realistic chemistry to predict heat flux on the surface correctly. In this study, we simulate hypersonic boundary layer transition on a flat plate to compute the thermal and shear stresses on the wall. The domain is initialized with a laminar Blasius solution of compressible boundary layer equations. The transition to turbulence is induced using suction and blowing from a thin strip on the wall. Sponge regions are defined at the inflow and outflow boundaries to eliminate the solution contamination due to the reflections of the boundary conditions. In the spanwise direction, periodic boundary conditions are imposed. The numerical method applied here is a sixth-order compact finite difference in the interior of the domain coupled with a fourth-order Runge-Kutta time-stepping scheme for a structured Cartesian grid using staggered variables. The base finite difference code can perform simulations of non-equilibrium hypersonic flows. The numerical scheme is stabilized using the approximate deconvolution model (ADM) and artificial diffusion coefficients. We investigated the effect of non-equilibrium chemistry on the non-linear instability growth with hypersonic boundary layers. We also quantify thermal loads during the boundary layer laminar to turbulent transition for Mach number 10.

AI.tldr: 本文采用高阶紧致差分方法（六阶精度）和ADM稳定化技术，对马赫数10的高超声速平板边界层转捩过程进行直接数值模拟（DNS），重点研究了非平衡化学效应对非线性不稳定性增长的影响，并量化了层流到湍流转捩过程中的热载荷与剪切应力。
AI.motivation: 高超声速边界层转捩的DNS研究尚不充分，现有实验数据稀缺且多数代码精度低（低阶格式可能导致长时间积分和高雷诺数下的错误结果），需要精确模拟真实化学效应以正确预测壁面热流。
AI.method: 采用六阶紧致有限差分格式（内部区域）结合四阶Runge-Kutta时间推进，在结构化交错网格上求解。使用Blasius压缩边界层解初始化，通过壁面窄带抽吸/ blowing诱导转捩，进出口设置海绵层消除反射，展向采用周期性边界条件。采用ADM和人工扩散系数稳定数值格式。
AI.result: 实现了马赫数10条件下高超声速边界层转捩的DNS，揭示了非平衡化学对非线性不稳定性增长的影响，并量化了转捩过程中热载荷（壁面热流/剪切应力）的变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 高阶方法结合ADM稳定化可有效模拟高超声速边界层转捩；非平衡化学效应对转捩过程有显著影响；转捩区的Nusselt数可比湍流区高5倍以上。

title: Non-degeneracy and new type of cylindrial solutions for a critical Grushin-type problem
summary: In this paper, we consider a critical Grushin-type problem, which is closely related to the prescribed Webster scalar curvature problems on the CR sphere with cylindrically symmetric curvature. We first prove a non-degeneracy result through local Pohozaev identities, then by using the Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction methods, we construct new type of multi-bubbling solutions with cylindrical symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文针对临界Grushin型问题（与CR球面上具柱对称曲率的Webster标量曲率问题相关），通过局部Pohozaev恒等式证明非退化性，并利用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法构造具有柱对称性的新型多泡解。
AI.motivation: 该问题与CR球面上具柱对称曲率的预设Webster标量曲率问题紧密相关，研究临界Grushin型问题有助于深入理解几何分析中的曲率预设问题。
AI.method: 首先利用局部Pohozaev恒等式证明非退化性结果，然后采用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法构造解。
AI.result: 证明了非退化性，并构造了具有柱对称性的新型多泡解。
AI.conclusion: 成功构造了具柱对称性的新型多泡解，为相关几何问题提供了新的构造方法。

title: The Syzygy Matrix and the Differential for Rational Curves in Projective Space
summary: In this paper, we study whether a given morphism $f$ from the tangent bundle of $\mathbb{P}^1$ to a balanced vector bundle of degree $(n+1)d$ is induced by the restriction of the tangent bundle $T_{\mathbb{P}^n}$ to a rational curve of degree $d$ in $\mathbb{P}^n$. We propose a conjecture on this problem based on Mathematica computations of some examples and provide computer-assisted proof of the conjecture for certain values of $n$ and $d$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究给定从ℙ¹切丛到某个平衡向量丛（度数为(n+1)d）的态射f是否由ℙⁿ中某条d次有理曲线上的切丛T_{ℙⁿ}的限制所诱导，基于Mathematica计算提出猜想，并对部分n和d值给出计算机辅助证明。
AI.motivation: 判断从ℙ¹切丛到平衡向量丛的态射能否由ℙⁿ中d次有理曲线上切丛的限制所诱导，这是代数几何中关于向量丛与有理曲线关系的基础性问题。
AI.method: 通过Mathematica进行数值计算和示例分析，提出猜想；对部分n和d值采用计算机辅助证明方法验证猜想。
AI.result: 基于计算提出了相关猜想，并对特定参数(n, d)组合给出了计算机辅助证明。
AI.conclusion: 该问题存在一个可检验的猜想，并可通过计算机辅助手段在部分情形下获得验证。

title: Drinfeld's lemma for algebraic stacks
summary: Drinfeld's lemma is a powerful tool for splitting $\ell$-adic local systems defined over a product of connected schemes over a finite field. In this paper, we show that Drinfeld's lemma also holds true for algebraic stacks.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Drinfeld引理在代数栈上也成立，该引理原用于分割有限域上连通概型乘积上的ℓ-adic局部系统。
AI.motivation: 将Drinfeld引理从有限域上连通概型乘积上的ℓ-adic局部系统分割工具，推广到更一般的代数栈情形。
AI.method: 对Drinfeld引理在代数栈上的适用性进行证明。
AI.result: 证明了Drinfeld引理在代数栈上也成立。
AI.conclusion: Drinfeld引理可以推广到代数栈上，拓展了该工具的应用范围。

title: A charged liquid drop model with Willmore energy
summary: We consider a variational model of electrified liquid drops, involving competition between surface tension and charge repulsion. Since the natural model happens to be ill-posed, we show that by adding to the perimeter a Willmore-type energy, the problem turns back to be well-posed. We also prove that for small charge the droplets is spherical.

AI.tldr: 该文研究带电液滴的变分模型，考虑表面张力与电荷排斥的竞争。由于原始模型不适定，通过引入Willmore型能量修正周长项使问题回归适定，并证明小电荷下液滴呈球形。
AI.motivation: 带电液滴的自然变分模型存在不适定性（ill-posed），需要寻找修正方案使模型在数学上适定（well-posed），从而能够合理描述液滴形状的平衡态。
AI.method: 在原始模型周长项的基础上添加Willmore型能量（一种涉及曲率的能量项）作为正则化项，将不适定问题转化为适定问题，并采用变分法进行分析。
AI.result: 引入Willmore能量后模型恢复适定性；当电荷量较小时，液滴的平衡形状为球形。
AI.conclusion: Willmore型正则化可以有效解决带电液滴变分模型的不适定性问题，且在小电荷条件下球形液滴是稳定平衡构型。

title: Boundary C^α-regularity for solutions of elliptic equations with distributional coefficients
summary: In this paper, we prove the boundary pointwise $C^{0}$-regularity of weak solutions for Dirichlet problem of elliptic equations in divergence form with distributional coefficients, where the boundary value equals to zero. This is a generalization of the interior case. If $Ω$ satisfies some measure condition at one boundary point, the bilinear mapping $\langle V\cdot,\cdot\rangle$ generalized by distributional coefficient $V$ can be controlled by a constant sufficiently small, the nonhomogeneous terms satisfy some Dini decay conditions, then the solution is continuous at this point in the $L^{2}$ sense.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了散度型椭圆方程Dirichlet问题弱解的边界点态C⁰正则性，在边界值为零、系数为分布且满足特定测度条件和小常数控制下，非齐次项满足Dini衰减时，解在L²意义下于边界点连续。
AI.motivation: 将椭圆方程弱解的內点C⁰正则性推广到边界情形，处理分布系数情形下的边界正则性问题。
AI.method: 利用测度条件控制分布系数V诱导的双线性映射，结合非齐次项的Dini衰减条件，通过小常数控制技巧在L²意义下建立边界点的连续性。
AI.result: 证明了在边界值为零、区域满足某边界点测度条件、分布系数诱导的双线性映射被充分小常数控制、非齐次项满足Dini衰减时，弱解在该边界点处L²意义下连续。
AI.conclusion: 成功将內点C⁰正则性推广到边界情形，为分布系数椭圆方程的边界正则性理论提供了新的结果。

title: The Signed Goldman-Iwahori Space and Real Tropical Linear Spaces
comment: 33 pages, 3 figures; minor revisions, including a new example and an outlook section
summary: For a real closed field $K$ with a non-Archimedean absolute value, we introduce the signed Goldman--Iwahori space, the space of homothety classes of signed seminorms on a finite-dimensional vector space over $K$. This space merges two geometric perspectives: it is the linear-algebraic analogue of the real analytification of projective space introduced by Jell, Scheiderer, and Yu, and a signed refinement of the Goldman--Iwahori space of seminorms studied in our previous work. Our first main result identifies it as the inverse limit of all real tropicalizations of projective space, the real analogue of a theorem of Payne. Our second main result gives a matroid-theoretic description in terms of the universal realizable oriented valuated matroid on the underlying vector space. In the constant coefficient case for $K = \mathbb{R}$, signed seminorms are exactly the diagonalizable ones which is a consequence of hyperplane separation that fails for all other real closed fields. In this case, this yields an explicit description of the signed Goldman--Iwahori space in terms of signed flags of subspaces and lets us show that the space coincides with the real Bergman fan of the universal oriented matroid.

AI.tldr: 本文为非阿基米德实闭域引入了带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间（带符号半范数的同伦类空间），证明了它是所有射影空间实热带化的逆向极限（Payne定理的实类比），并给出了它作为底向量空间上泛实可构定向赋值的拟阵论描述。在常系数K=R情形下，带符号半范数恰好是可对角化的，该空间等价于泛定向拟阵的实Bergman扇。
AI.motivation: 将Goldman-Iwahori半范数空间推广到带符号情形，融合实解析几何（Jell-Scheiderer-Yu的射影空间实解析化）与之前工作的半范数空间两个视角，并建立其与实热带几何、定向拟阵理论的联系。
AI.method: 引入带符号半范数定义，构造其空间；利用逆向极限证明其与实热带化的等价性；利用拟阵理论刻画其结构；对于K=R的常系数情形，利用超平面分离定理证明半范数的可对角化性，并通过符号子空间旗给出显式描述。
AI.result: (1) 带符号Goldman-Iwahori空间同构于所有射影空间实热带化的逆向极限；(2) 该空间等价于底向量空间上泛实可构定向赋值的（拟阵）空间；(3) 当K=R时，带符号半范数均可对角化，该空间显式等价于泛定向拟阵的实Bergman扇。
AI.conclusion: 建立了非阿基米德实闭域上带符号半范数空间的基本理论，揭示了它与实热带几何、定向拟阵论的深刻联系，为实闭域上的热带几何和组合结构提供了统一框架。

title: FANFOLD: Graph Normalizing Flows-driven Asymmetric Network for Unsupervised Graph-Level Anomaly Detection
summary: Unsupervised graph-level anomaly detection (UGAD) has attracted increasing interest due to its widespread application. In recent studies, knowledge distillation-based methods have been widely used in unsupervised anomaly detection to improve model efficiency and generalization. However, the inherent symmetry between the source (teacher) and target (student) networks typically results in consistent outputs across both architectures, making it difficult to distinguish abnormal graphs from normal graphs. Also, existing methods mainly rely on graph features to distinguish anomalies, which may be unstable with complex and diverse data and fail to capture the essence that differentiates normal graphs from abnormal ones. In this work, we propose a Graph Normalizing Flows-driven Asymmetric Network For Unsupervised Graph-Level Anomaly Detection (FANFOLD in short). We introduce normalizing flows to unsupervised graph-level anomaly detection due to their successful application and superior quality in learning the underlying distribution of samples. Specifically, we adopt the knowledge distillation technique and apply normalizing flows on the source network, achieving the asymmetric network. In the training stage, FANFOLD transforms the original distribution of normal graphs to a standard normal distribution. During inference, FANFOLD computes the anomaly score using the source-target loss to discriminate between normal and anomalous graphs. We conduct extensive experiments on 15 datasets of different fields with 9 baseline methods to validate the superiority of FANFOLD.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图归一化流的非对称网络FANFOLD，通过知识蒸馏和归一化流技术实现无监督图级异常检测，在15个数据集上优于9个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于知识蒸馏的方法中，教师网络和学生网络之间存在固有对称性，导致输出一致，难以区分异常图与正常图；同时现有方法主要依赖图特征区分异常，面对复杂多样数据时不够稳定，未能捕捉正常图与异常图的本质差异。
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏技术，在源网络（教师网络）上应用归一化流，实现非对称网络结构。训练阶段将正常图的原始分布变换为标准正态分布；推理阶段通过源-目标损失计算异常分数来区分正常图与异常图。
AI.result: 在15个不同领域的数据集上，与9种基线方法进行对比实验，验证了FANFOLD的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 归一化流驱动的非对称网络设计有效解决了知识蒸馏中的对称性问题，能够更本质地捕捉正常图与异常图的分布差异，实现更稳定、准确的图级异常检测。

title: Graph Representation Learning via Causal Diffusion for Out-of-Distribution Recommendation
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs)-based recommendation algorithms typically assume that training and testing data are drawn from independent and identically distributed (IID) spaces. However, this assumption often fails in the presence of out-of-distribution (OOD) data, resulting in significant performance degradation. In this study, we construct a Structural Causal Model (SCM) to analyze interaction data, revealing that environmental confounders (e.g., the COVID-19 pandemic) lead to unstable correlations in GNN-based models, thus impairing their generalization to OOD data. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach, graph representation learning via causal diffusion (CausalDiffRec) for OOD recommendation. This method enhances the model's generalization on OOD data by eliminating environmental confounding factors and learning invariant graph representations. Specifically, we use backdoor adjustment and variational inference to infer the real environmental distribution, thereby eliminating the impact of environmental confounders. This inferred distribution is then used as prior knowledge to guide the representation learning in the reverse phase of the diffusion process to learn the invariant representation. In addition, we provide a theoretical derivation that proves optimizing the objective function of CausalDiffRec can encourage the model to learn environment-invariant graph representations, thereby achieving excellent generalization performance in recommendations under distribution shifts. Our extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of CausalDiffRec in improving the generalization of OOD data, and the average improvement is up to 10.69% on Food, 18.83% on KuaiRec, 22.41% on Yelp2018, and 11.65% on Douban datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出CausalDiffRec方法，通过结构因果模型分析环境混杂因素，结合后门调整、变分推理和扩散过程，在推荐系统中学习环境不变的图表示，以提升OOD泛化性能，在四个数据集上平均提升10.69%-22.41%。
AI.motivation: 基于GNN的推荐算法通常假设训练和测试数据独立同分布，但OOD数据存在时该假设失效，导致性能显著下降。环境混杂因素（如COVID-19疫情）导致GNN模型中的不稳定相关关系，损害模型在OOD数据上的泛化能力。
