AI.method: 构建结构因果模型分析交互数据中的环境混杂因素；采用后门调整和变分推理推断真实环境分布以消除混杂因素影响；将推断的环境分布作为先验知识指导扩散过程逆阶段中的表示学习，以学习环境不变的图表示。
AI.result: 在Food、KuaiRec、Yelp2018和Douban数据集上，CausalDiffRec相比基线平均提升分别为10.69%、18.83%、22.41%和11.65%，验证了其在OOD数据泛化上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 理论推导证明优化CausalDiffRec的目标函数能促使模型学习环境不变的图表示，在分布偏移的推荐场景下实现优异的泛化性能。

title: Convergence of Noise-Free Sampling Algorithms with Regularized Wasserstein Proximals
summary: In this work, we investigate the convergence properties of the backward regularized Wasserstein proximal (BRWP) method for sampling a target distribution. The BRWP approach can be shown as a semi-implicit time discretization for a probability flow ODE with the score function whose density satisfies the Fokker-Planck equation of the overdamped Langevin dynamics. Specifically, the evolution of the density, hence the score function, is approximated via a kernel representation derived from the regularized Wasserstein proximal operator. By applying the dual formulation and a localized Taylor series to obtain the asymptotic expansion of this kernel formula, we establish guaranteed convergence in terms of the Kullback-Leibler divergence for the BRWP method towards a strongly log-concave target distribution. Our analysis also identifies the optimal and maximum step sizes for convergence. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the deterministic and semi-implicit BRWP scheme outperforms many classical Langevin Monte Carlo methods, such as the Unadjusted Langevin Algorithm (ULA), by offering faster convergence and reduced bias. Numerical experiments further validate the convergence analysis of the BRWP method.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了向后正则化 Wasserstein 近端 (BRWP) 方法用于采样目标分布的收敛性质，证明了其在强对数凹目标分布下关于 KL 散度的收敛性，并给出了最优步长和最大步长，数值实验表明该确定性半隐式方法在收敛速度和偏差上优于 ULA 等经典 Langevin 方法。
AI.motivation: 探究 BRWP 方法的理论收敛性质，包括收敛率的严格证明、最优步长与最大步长的确定，以及相较于经典 Langevin 蒙特卡洛方法（如 ULA）的优势验证。
AI.method: 将 BRWP 方法视为概率流 ODE（其密度满足过阻尼 Langevin 动力学 Fokker-Planck 方程）的半隐式时间离散化；通过正则化 Wasserstein 近端算子的核表示近似密度及得分函数的演化；利用对偶公式和局部泰勒级数获得该核公式的渐近展开，进而建立 KL 散度意义下的收敛性分析。
AI.result: 建立了 BRWP 方法在强对数凹目标分布下关于 KL 散度的收敛保证，识别了最优步长与最大步长；理论上证明了确定性半隐式 BRWP 方案相比 ULA 等经典方法具有更快的收敛速度和更小的偏差；数值实验验证了收敛分析结果。
AI.conclusion: BRWP 方法是一种具有理论收敛保证的采样方法，在收敛速度和偏差方面优于经典 Langevin 蒙特卡洛方法，其收敛性分析与步长策略为实际应用提供了理论指导。

title: Error analysis of DGTD for linear Maxwell equations with inhomogeneous interface conditions
comment: 28 pages, 10 figures Revised version for general domains
summary: In the present paper we consider linear and isotropic Maxwell equations with inhomogeneous interface conditions. We discretize the problem with the discontinuous Galerkin method in space and with the leapfrog scheme in time. An analytical setting is provided in which we show wellposedness of the problem, derive stability estimates, and exploit this in the error analysis to prove rigorous error bounds for both the spatial and full discretization. The theoretical findings are confirmed with numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有非均匀界面条件的线性各向同性Maxwell方程，采用空间上的间断Galerkin离散和时间上的蛙跳格式，建立了问题的适定性理论，推导了稳定性估计，并给出了严格的空间和全离散误差界，最后通过数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是解决非均匀界面条件下Maxwell方程的高效数值求解问题，需要为间断Galerkin方法与蛙跳格式结合使用提供严格的数学理论基础。
AI.method: 采用间断Galerkin方法进行空间离散，蛙跳格式进行时间离散；通过分析框架证明问题适定性，推导稳定性估计，并基于此进行误差分析以得到严格的误差界。
AI.result: 建立了问题的适定性，获得了稳定性估计，推导了空间离散和全离散的严格误差界。
AI.conclusion: 数值实验证实了理论分析结果，表明所提出的间断Galerkin-蛙跳格式对于非均匀界面条件下的Maxwell方程具有可靠的理论保证和实际可行性。

title: Petrov-Galerkin Dynamical Low Rank Approximation:SUPG stabilisation of advection-dominated problems
summary: We propose a novel framework of generalised Petrov-Galerkin Dynamical Low Rank Approximations (DLR) in the context of random PDEs. It builds on the standard Dynamical Low Rank Approximations in their Dynamically Orthogonal formulation. It allows to seamlessly build-in many standard and well-studied stabilisation techniques that can be framed as either generalised Galerkin methods, or Petrov-Galerkin methods. The framework is subsequently applied to the case of Streamine Upwind/Petrov Galerkin (SUPG) stabilisation of advection-dominated problems with small stochastic perturbations of the transport field. The norm-stability properties of two time discretisations are analysed. Numerical experiments confirm that the stabilising properties of the SUPG method naturally carry over to the DLR framework.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种广义Petrov-Galerkin动力低秩近似（DLR）框架，用于随机PDE问题。该框架基于标准DLR的动态正交形式，能够无缝集成多种标准稳定化技术（包括广义Galerkin和Petrov-Galerkin方法）。特别针对对流主导问题中输运场存在小随机扰动的情况，应用了SUPG稳定化方法。分析了两种时间离散化的范数稳定性，数值实验表明SUPG的稳定特性自然地延续到了DLR框架中。
AI.motivation: 标准Dynamical Low Rank Approximations在处理随机PDE时缺乏有效的稳定化机制，尤其是在对流主导问题等刚性场景下。现有稳定化技术（如SUPG）与DLR框架的集成缺乏统一的理论基础。
AI.method: 提出了广义Petrov-Galerkin DLR框架，将标准DLR的Dynamic Orthogonal formulation作为基础，通过广义Galerkin或Petrov-Galerkin视角引入多种稳定化技术。具体针对SUPG稳定化进行了实现，并分析了两种时间离散化方案的范数稳定性。
AI.result: 理论分析验证了两种时间离散化的范数稳定性。数值实验证实了SUPG方法的稳定化特性在DLR框架中得以保持，即随机扰动下的对流主导问题能得到有效处理。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的广义Petrov-Galerkin DLR框架为随机PDE提供了统一的稳定化DLR求解途径，SUPG方法的稳定性质可以自然地迁移到该框架中，为处理更多类型的随机PDE问题奠定了基础。

title: Discrete Shortest Paths in Optimal Power Flow Feasible Regions
summary: Optimal power flow (OPF) is a critical optimization problem for power systems to operate at points where cost or other operational objectives are optimized. Due to the non-convexity of the set of feasible OPF operating points, it is non-trivial to transition the power system from its current operating point to the optimal one without violating constraints. On top of that, practical considerations dictate that the transition should be achieved using a small number of small-magnitude control actions. To solve this problem, this paper proposes an algorithm for computing a transition path by framing it as a shortest path problem. This problem is formulated in terms of a discretized piece-wise linear path, where the number of pieces is fixed a priori in order to limit the number of control actions. This formulation yields a nonlinear optimization problem (NLP) with a sparse block tridiagonal structure, which we leverage by utilizing a specialized interior point method. An initial feasible path for our method is generated by solving a sequence of relaxations which are then tightened in a homotopy-like procedure. Numerical experiments illustrate the effectiveness of the algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过将最优潮流过渡路径问题建模为最短路径问题来求解的算法，利用分段线性路径离散化及稀疏块三对角结构的内点法，并通过同伦过程生成初始可行路径。
AI.motivation: 最优潮流问题存在非凸性，使得从当前运行点过渡到最优点的过程中难以保证约束不被违反；同时实际运行要求控制动作数量少且幅度小，现有方法难以兼顾这两点。
AI.method: 将过渡路径构建为最短路径问题，采用预定义段数的分段线性路径离散化，形成具有稀疏块三对角结构的非线性规划问题，利用专用内点法求解；通过序列松弛再逐步收紧的同伦过程生成初始可行路径。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该算法的有效性，能够在有限次小幅度控制动作下实现从当前运行点到最优点的约束满足过渡。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法能有效解决带约束的OPF过渡路径规划问题，兼顾了可行性与控制动作数量的实际限制。

title: Dynamical system prediction from sparse observations using deep neural networks with Voronoi tessellation and physics constraint
summary: Despite the success of various methods in addressing the issue of spatial reconstruction of dynamical systems with sparse observations, spatio-temporal prediction for sparse fields remains a challenge. Existing Kriging-based frameworks for spatio-temporal sparse field prediction fail to meet the accuracy and inference time required for nonlinear dynamic prediction problems. In this paper, we introduce the Dynamical System Prediction from Sparse Observations using Voronoi Tessellation (DSOVT) framework, an innovative methodology based on Voronoi tessellation which combines convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) and long short-term memory (LSTM) and utilizing Convolutional Long Short-Term Memory (ConvLSTM). By integrating Voronoi tessellations with spatio-temporal deep learning models, DSOVT is adept at predicting dynamical systems with unstructured, sparse, and time-varying observations. CED-LSTM maps Voronoi tessellations into a low-dimensional representation for time series prediction, while ConvLSTM directly uses these tessellations in an end-to-end predictive model. Furthermore, we incorporate physics constraints during the training process for dynamical systems with explicit formulas. Compared to purely data-driven models, our physics-based approach enables the model to learn physical laws within explicitly formulated dynamics, thereby enhancing the robustness and accuracy of rolling forecasts. Numerical experiments on real sea surface data and shallow water systems clearly demonstrate our framework's accuracy and computational efficiency with sparse and time-varying observations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSOVT框架，结合Voronoi镶嵌、卷积编码器-解码器、LSTM和ConvLSTM，用于从稀疏且时变的观测数据中预测动力系统，并引入物理约束提升预测精度和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于克里金法的框架在稀疏场时空预测中无法满足非线性动力系统预测所需的精度和推理时间，亟需一种能处理非结构化、稀疏且时变观测的时空预测方法。
AI.method: 提出DSOVT框架：利用Voronoi镶嵌处理非结构稀疏观测；采用CED-LSTM将Voronoi镶嵌映射为低维表示进行时序预测，同时用ConvLSTM直接端到端预测；对具有显式公式的动力系统引入物理约束参与训练。
AI.result: 在真实海面数据和浅水系统上的数值实验表明，DSOVT框架在处理稀疏且时变观测时具有较高的精度和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: DSOVT通过结合Voronoi镶嵌与时空深度学习模型，并融入物理约束，有效提升了稀疏观测下动力系统预测的鲁棒性和准确性，优于纯数据驱动方法。

title: A Stochastic Switched Optimal Control Approach to Formation Mission Design for Commercial Aircraft
summary: This paper studies the formation mission design problem for commercial aircraft in the presence of uncertainties. Specifically, it considers uncertainties in the departure times of the aircraft and in the fuel burn savings for the trailing aircraft. Given several commercial flights, the problem consists in arranging them in formation or solo flights and finding the trajectories that minimize the expected value of the direct operating cost of the flights. The formation mission design problem is formulated as an optimal control problem of a stochastic switched dynamical system and solved using nonintrusive generalized polynomial chaos based stochastic collocation. The stochastic collocation method converts the stochastic switched optimal control problem into an augmented deterministic switched optimal control problem. With this approach, a small number of sample points of the random parameters are used to jointly solve particular instances of the switched optimal control problem. The obtained solutions are then expressed as orthogonal polynomial expansions in terms of the random parameters using these sample points. This technique allows statistical and global sensitivity analysis of the stochastic solutions to be conducted at a low computational cost. The aim of this study is to establish if, in the presence of uncertainties, a formation mission is beneficial with respect to solo flight in terms of the expected value of the direct operating costs. Several numerical experiments have been conducted in which uncertainties on the departure times and on the fuel saving during formation flight have been considered. The obtained results demonstrate that benefits can be achieved even in the presence of these uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了商业飞机在不确定性（起飞时间延迟、编队燃油节省波动）下的编队任务设计问题，通过将问题建模为随机切换动力系统的最优控制，利用非侵入式广义多项式混沌随机配点法将其转化为增广确定性切换最优控制问题，以低计算成本进行统计与全局灵敏度分析。数值实验表明，即使存在不确定性，编队飞行仍能降低预期直接运营成本。
AI.motivation: 现实商业航空中，起飞时间不确定性和编队飞行时燃油节省的波动性客观存在，而传统编队飞行设计方法未充分考虑这些随机因素，可能导致实际运营效益偏离预期。因此，需要在建模中显式引入随机性，评估不确定性环境下编队飞行是否仍优于单机飞行。
AI.method: 将编队任务设计问题建模为随机切换动力系统的最优控制问题；采用非侵入式广义多项式混沌（gPC）随机配点法，选取少量随机参数样本点，联合求解多个确定性切换最优控制实例；将解表示为随机参数的正交多项式展开，从而高效获取期望值、方差及全局灵敏度信息。
AI.result: 在多个数值实验中，同时考虑起飞时间不确定性和编队燃油节省不确定性，结果表明即使存在这些不确定性，编队飞行在预期直接运营成本上仍优于单机飞行，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性环境下，编队飞行任务依然可以带来运营成本优势；所提出的基于gPC随机配点的求解框架能以较低计算代价处理随机切换最优控制问题，为实际商业航空编队运营决策提供了理论支持。

title: New results on the local-nonglobal minimizers of the generalized trust-region subproblem
summary: In this paper, we study the local-nonglobal minimizers of the Generalized Trust-Region subproblem $(GTR)$ and its Equality-constrained version $(GTRE)$. Firstly, the equivalence is established between the local-nonglobal minimizers of both $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ under assumption of the joint definiteness. By the way, a counterexample is presented to disprove a conjecture of Song-Wang-Liu-Xia [SIAM J. Optim., 33(2023), pp.267-293]. Secondly, if the Hessian matrix pair is jointly positive definite, it is proved that each of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ has at most two local-nonglobal minimizers. This result first confirms the correctness of another conjecture of Song-Wang-Liu-Xia [SIAM J. Optim., 33(2023), pp.267-293]. Thirdly, if the Hessian matrix pair is jointly negative definite, it is verified that each of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ has at most one local-nonglobal minimizer. In special, if the constraint is reduced to be a ball or a sphere, the above result is just the classical Martínez's. Finally, an algorithm is proposed to find all the local-nonglobal minimizers of $(GTR)$ and $(GTRE)$ or confirm their nonexistence in a tolerance. Preliminary numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了广义信赖域子问题(GTR)及其等式约束版本(GTRE)的局部非全局极小点。在联合正定性假设下建立了(GTR)与(GTRE)局部非全局极小点的等价关系，否证了Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的一个猜想并证实了另一个猜想。证明了联合正定时各问题至多有两个局部非全局极小点，联合负定时至多有一个（经典Martínez结果为其特例）。最后提出了一个能在容差范围内找到所有此类极小点或确认其不存在的算法，数值实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究广义信赖域子问题(GTR)及其等式约束版本(GTRE)的局部非全局极小点的存在性与数量刻画，并解决Song-Wang-Liu-Xia (2023)中提出的两个猜想。
AI.method: 建立(GTR)与(GTRE)局部非全局极小点之间的等价关系（在联合正定性假设下），通过构造反例否证一个猜想，利用理论分析证明局部非全局极小点的上界（联合正定时至多两个，联合负定时至多一个），并设计求解算法。
AI.result: 否证了Song-Wang-Liu-Xia的一个猜想，证实了其另一个猜想；给出了局部非全局极小点的个数上界；在球/球面约束下退化到经典Martínez结果；提出了有效的数值算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文完整刻画了(GTR)和(GTRE)的局部非全局极小点结构，解决了相关猜想，并提供了实用算法。

title: Block-Operations: Using Modular Routing to Improve Compositional Generalization
summary: We explore the hypothesis that poor compositional generalization in neural networks is caused by difficulties with learning effective routing. To solve this problem, we propose the concept of block-operations, which is based on splitting all activation tensors in the network into uniformly sized blocks and using an inductive bias to encourage modular routing and modification of these blocks. Based on this concept we introduce the Multiplexer, a new architectural component that enhances the Feed Forward Neural Network (FNN). We experimentally confirm that Multiplexers exhibit strong compositional generalization. On both a synthetic and a realistic task our model was able to learn the underlying process behind the task, whereas both FNNs and Transformers were only able to learn heuristic approximations. We propose as future work to use the principles of block-operations to improve other existing architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出块操作（block-operations）概念，通过将网络中的激活张量分割为均匀大小的块并引入归纳偏置来促进模块化路由与修改，从而解决神经网络在组合泛化上的不足。基于此设计了Multiplexer组件增强前馈神经网络（FNN），实验证明其在合成与真实任务上均展现出强组合泛化能力，优于FNN和Transformer。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在组合泛化（compositional generalization）方面表现不佳，作者假设其根本原因在于网络难以学习有效的路由（routing）机制。
AI.method: 提出块操作（block-operations）概念：将网络中所有激活张量分割为统一大小的块，利用归纳偏置鼓励对这些块进行模块化路由与修改。基于该概念设计了Multiplexer组件，用于增强FNN。
AI.result: 在合成任务和真实任务上，Multiplexer能够学习任务背后的真实生成过程，而FNN和Transformer仅能学到启发式近似，表明Multiplexer具有强组合泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 块操作原则能够有效提升组合泛化，未来工作可将其应用于改进其他现有架构。

title: Optimal Compactly Supported Functions in Sobolev Spaces
summary: This paper constructs unique compactly supported functions in Sobolev spaces that have minimal norm, maximal support, and maximal central value, under certain renormalizations. They may serve as optimized basis functions in interpolation or approximation, or as shape functions in meshless methods for PDE solving. Their norm is useful for proving upper bounds for convergence rates of interpolation in Sobolev spaces $H_2^m(\R^d)$, and this paper gives the correct rate $m-d/2$ that arises as convergence like $h^{m-d/2}$ for interpolation at meshwidth $h\to 0$ or a blow-up like $r^{-(m-d/2)}$ for norms of compactly supported functions with support radius $r\to 0$. In Hilbert spaces with infinitely smooth reproducing kernels, like Gaussians or inverse multiquadrics, there are no compactly supported functions at all, but in spaces with limited smoothness, compactly supported functions exist and can be optimized in the above way. The construction is described in Hilbert space via projections, and analytically via trace operators. Numerical examples are provided.

AI.tldr: 本文在Sobolev空间中构造了具有最小范数、最大支撑集和最大中心值的紧支撑函数，证明了插值收敛率为h^(m-d/2)，并提供了数值示例。
AI.motivation: 为了在Sobolev空间中获得优化的紧支撑基函数，用于插值、逼近和无网格PDE求解，并证明插值收敛率的正确上界。
AI.method: 通过Hilbert空间投影和迹算子分析构造，对函数进行重正规化以同时优化范数、支撑集大小和中心值。
AI.result: 得到了最优紧支撑函数，其范数可用于证明Sobolev空间H_2^m(R^d)中插值收敛率m-d/2（网格宽度h→0时收敛为h^(m-d/2)，支撑半径r→0时范数以r^-(m-d/2)增长）。在无限光滑核（如高斯核）的Hilbert空间中不存在紧支撑函数。
AI.conclusion: 在有限光滑度的Sobolev空间中，可以构造并优化紧支撑函数，为数值方法提供理论保证。

title: The random timestep Euler method and its continuous dynamics
summary: ODE solvers with randomly sampled timestep sizes appear in the context of chaotic dynamical systems, differential equations with low regularity, and, implicitly, in stochastic optimisation. In this work, we propose and study the stochastic Euler dynamics - a continuous-time Markov process that is equivalent to a linear spline interpolation of a random timestep (forward) Euler method. We understand the stochastic Euler dynamics as a path-valued ansatz for the ODE solution that shall be approximated. We first obtain qualitative insights by studying deterministic Euler dynamics which we derive through a first order approximation to the infinitesimal generator of the stochastic Euler dynamics. Then we show convergence of the stochastic Euler dynamics to the ODE solution by studying the associated infinitesimal generators and by a novel local truncation error analysis. Next we prove stability by an immediate analysis of the random timestep Euler method and by deriving Foster-Lyapunov criteria for the stochastic Euler dynamics; the latter also yield bounds on the speed of convergence to stationarity. The paper ends with a discussion of second-order stochastic Euler dynamics and a series of numerical experiments that appear to verify our analytical results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了随机欧拉动力学，一种与随机步长欧拉方法等价的连续时间马尔可夫过程，证明了其收敛性和稳定性，并进行了数值实验验证。
AI.motivation: 随机步长ODE求解器在混沌动力系统、低正则性微分方程以及随机优化中隐式出现，但目前缺乏对其理论性质的系统分析，因此有必要对这类方法进行严格的数学研究。
AI.method: 提出随机欧拉动力学（连续时间马尔可夫过程），通过确定性欧拉动力学的无穷小生成器一阶近似获得定性理解；通过生成器分析和局部截断误差分析证明收敛性；通过随机步长欧拉方法的直接分析和Foster-Lyapunov准则证明稳定性并给出收敛到平稳分布的速度界。
AI.result: 证明了随机欧拉动力学收敛到ODE解，建立了稳定性条件（Foster-Lyapunov准则），获得了收敛到平稳分布的速度界限，二阶随机欧拉动力学的数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 随机欧拉动力学作为随机步长ODE求解器的理论框架是有效的，其收敛性和稳定性得以严格证明，二阶扩展和数值实验进一步支持了理论分析的正确性。

title: Efficient Shallow Ritz Method For 1D Diffusion-Reaction Problems
summary:
This paper studies the shallow Ritz method for solving one-dimensional diffusion-reaction problems. The method is capable of improving the order of approximation for non-smooth problems. By following a similar approach to the one presented in [9], we present a damped block Newton (dBN) method to achieve nearly optimal order of approximation. The dBN method optimizes the Ritz functional by alternating between the linear and non-linear parameters of the shallow ReLU neural network (NN). For diffusion-reaction problems, new difficulties arise: (1) for the linear parameters, the mass matrix is dense and even more ill-conditioned than the stiffness matrix, and (2) for the non-linear parameters, the Hessian matrix is dense and may be singular. This paper addresses these challenges, resulting in a dBN method with computational cost of ${\cal O}(n)$.
  The ideas presented for diffusion-reaction problems can also be applied to least-squares approximation problems. For both applications, starting with the non-linear parameters as a uniform partition, numerical experiments show that the dBN method moves the mesh points to nearly optimal locations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一维扩散-反应问题，提出了一种浅层Ritz方法的阻尼块牛顿（dBN）法，通过交替优化线性与非线性参数实现近最优逼近阶，计算复杂度为O(n)，且能自动将网格点移动至近最优位置。
AI.motivation: 扩散-反应问题中，线性参数的质量矩阵稠密且病态比刚度矩阵更严重，非线性参数的Hessian矩阵稠密且可能奇异，现有方法难以处理这些新困难，需要发展高效算法。
AI.method: 采用浅层ReLU神经网络，提出阻尼块牛顿（dBN）法，交替优化线性参数与非线性参数中的Ritz泛函，并针对质量矩阵病态和Hessian矩阵奇异问题设计专门处理策略，实现O(n)计算复杂度。
AI.result: dBN方法解决了扩散-反应问题中质量矩阵稠密病态和Hessian矩阵奇异等挑战，计算复杂度达到O(n)；数值实验表明，从均匀网格初值出发，dBN能将网格点移动至近最优位置。
AI.conclusion: 所提dBN方法不仅适用于扩散-反应问题的浅层Ritz方法，也可推广至最小二乘逼近问题，显著提升非光滑问题的逼近阶。

title: On the Equilibrium of a Class of Leader-Follower Games with Decision-Dependent Chance Constraints
summary: In this paper, we study the existence of equilibrium in a single-leader-multiple-follower game with decision-dependent chance constraints (DDCCs), where decision-dependent uncertainties (DDUs) exist in the constraints of followers. DDUs refer to the uncertainties impacted by the leader's strategy, while the leader cannot capture their exact probability distributions. To address such problems, we first use decision-dependent ambiguity sets under moment information and Cantelli's inequality to transform DDCCs into second-order cone constraints. This simplifies the game model by eliminating the probability distributions. We further prove that there exists at least one equilibrium point for this game by applying Kakutani's fixed-point theorem. Finally, a numerical example is provided to show the impact of DDUs on the equilibrium of such game models.

AI.tldr: 研究带决策依赖机会约束的单领导多跟随者博弈的均衡存在性，利用决策依赖模糊集和Cantelli不等式将问题转化为二阶锥约束，并通过Kakutani不动点定理证明均衡存在，最后用数值例子展示决策依赖不确定性对均衡的影响。
AI.motivation: 实际博弈中，跟随者的约束常受领导者策略影响且概率分布未知，现有方法难以处理这类决策依赖不确定性下的均衡问题，因此需要建立新的理论框架。
AI.method: 首先构建基于矩信息的决策依赖模糊集，结合Cantelli不等式将决策依赖机会约束转化为确定性的二阶锥约束；然后利用Kakutani不动点定理证明转化后博弈模型至少存在一个纳什均衡点。
AI.result: 成功将含决策依赖机会约束的博弈转化为可处理的二阶锥约束形式，并严格证明了均衡点的存在性，数值实验验证了决策依赖不确定性对均衡策略的影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的转化与证明方法为处理领导者策略影响下跟随者约束不确定性问题提供了理论支撑，拓展了Stackelberg博弈在不确定性环境下的应用范围。

title: Advancing Machine Learning in Industry 4.0: Benchmark Framework for Rare-event Prediction in Chemical Processes
comment: This is a preprint for our manuscript to be submitted for publication in Computers and Chemical Engineering Journal. Pages: 22 (including Appendix and References). Figures: 9 (main) + 3 (Appendix). Tables: 3 (main) + 3 (Appendix)
summary: Previously, using forward-flux sampling (FFS) and machine learning (ML), we developed multivariate alarm systems to counter rare un-postulated abnormal events. Our alarm systems utilized ML-based predictive models to quantify committer probabilities as functions of key process variables (e.g., temperature, concentrations, and the like), with these data obtained in FFS simulations. Herein, we introduce a novel and comprehensive benchmark framework for rare-event prediction, comparing ML algorithms of varying complexity, including Linear Support-Vector Regressor and k-Nearest Neighbors, to more sophisticated algorithms, such as Random Forests, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Dense Neural Networks, and TabNet. This evaluation uses comprehensive performance metrics, such as: $\textit{RMSE}$, model training, testing, hyperparameter tuning and deployment times, and number and efficiency of alarms. These balance model accuracy, computational efficiency, and alarm-system efficiency, identifying optimal ML strategies for predicting abnormal rare events, enabling operators to obtain safer and more reliable plant operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对稀有异常事件预测的基准框架，比较了从线性回归到深度神经网络的多种机器学习算法，综合考虑模型精度、计算效率和报警系统效能，为工业安全操作选择最优ML策略。
AI.motivation: 工业过程中存在罕见的、非假设的异常事件，传统方法难以预测。前期工作已利用前向通量采样(FFS)和机器学习(ML)开发了多变量报警系统，但缺乏对不同ML算法在稀有事件预测任务中的系统比较和评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了完整的稀有事件预测基准框架，比较了线性支持向量回归、k近邻、随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、密集神经网络和TabNet等算法，使用RMSE、模型训练/测试/超参数调优/部署时间、报警数量与效率等多维性能指标进行评估。
AI.result: 识别出在预测异常稀有事件中最优的机器学习策略，平衡了模型准确度、计算效率和报警系统效能。
AI.conclusion: 该基准框架为工业操作员提供了选择最优ML策略的依据，有助于实现更安全、更可靠的工厂运行。

title: Data-Driven Probabilistic Methodology for Aircraft Conflict Detection Under Wind Uncertainty
summary: Assuming the availability of a reliable aircraft trajectory planner, this paper presents a probabilistic methodology to detect conflicts between aircraft, in the cruise phase of the flight, in the presence of wind prediction uncertainties quantified by ensemble weather forecasts, which are regarded as realizations of correlated random processes and employed to derive the eastward and northward components of the wind velocity. First, the Karhunen-Lo`eve expansion is used to obtain a series expansion of the wind components in terms of a set of uncorrelated random variables and deterministic coefficients. Then, the uncertainty induced by these uncorrelated random variables in the outputs of the aircraft trajectory planner is quantified by means of the arbitrary polynomial chaos technique. Finally, the probability density function of the great circle distance between each pair of aircraft is derived from the polynomial expansions using a Gaussian kernel density estimator and employed to estimate the probability of conflict. The arbitrary polynomial chaos technique allows the effects of uncertainties in complex nonlinear dynamical system, such as those underlying aircraft trajectory planners, to be quantified with high computational efficiency, only requiring the existence of a finite number of statistical moments of the random variables of the Karhunen-Lo`eve expansion, while avoiding any assumption on their probability distributions. In order to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed conflict detection method, numerical experiments are conducted through an optimal control based aircraft trajectory planner for a given wind forecast represented by an ensemble prediction system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率的飞行冲突检测方法，利用集合天气预报量化风不确定性，结合Karhunen-Loève展开和任意多项式混沌技术，高效计算飞行器对间大圆距离的概率密度函数，从而估计冲突概率。
AI.motivation: 在巡航阶段，风预测不确定性是导致飞行冲突的关键因素之一。现有方法难以高效处理高维随机输入下的非线性动力学系统不确定性传播问题，且通常需要对随机变量的概率分布做出假设。本文旨在提出一种无需分布假设、计算高效的概率冲突检测方法。
AI.method: 1) 将集合天气预报视为相关随机过程的实现，导出风速的东向和北向分量；2) 采用Karhunen-Loève展开将风分量表示为不相关随机变量与确定性系数级数；3) 利用任意多项式混沌技术量化这些随机变量对轨迹规划器输出的不确定性；4) 通过高斯核密度估计从多项式展开推导飞行器对间大圆距离的概率密度函数，进而估计冲突概率。
AI.result: 通过基于最优控制的飞行器轨迹规划器进行数值实验，验证了该方法在集合天气预报不确定风场下的有效性。任意多项式混沌技术仅需KL展开随机变量的有限阶统计矩，无需概率分布假设，即可高效量化复杂非线性动力学系统的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能够在风预测不确定性条件下高效、准确地检测飞行冲突，避免了传统方法对概率分布的假设限制，具有良好的计算效率和应用潜力。

title: Positive definiteness of a class of cyclic symmetric tensors
summary: For a 4th order 3-dimensional cyclic symmetric tensor, a sufficient and necessary condition is bulit for its positive semi-definiteness. A sufficient and necessary condition of positive definiteness is showed for a 4th order $n$-dimensional symmetric tensor. With the help of such a condition, the positive definiteness of a class of 4th order 3-dimensional cyclic symmetric tensors is given. Moreover, the positive definiteness of a class of non-cyclic symmetric tensors is showed also. By applying these conclusions, several (strict) inequalities are erected for ternary quartic homogeneous polynomials.

AI.tldr: 本文针对4阶3维循环对称张量建立了半正定性的充要条件，给出了4阶n维对称张量正定性的充要条件，并据此推导了一类循环对称及非循环对称张量的正定性判据，进而构造了三元四次齐次多项式的若干严格不等式。
AI.motivation: 旨在解决高阶循环对称张量的正定性与半正定性判定问题，填补该领域充要条件的空白，并为相关多项式不等式提供理论支撑。
AI.method: 首先建立4阶3维循环对称张量半正定性的充要条件；其次推导4阶n维对称张量正定性的充要条件；然后利用该条件分析特定类别的循环对称张量及非循环对称张量的正定性。
AI.result: 给出了4阶3维循环对称张量半正定性的充要条件；证明了4阶n维对称张量正定性的充要条件；得到了特定循环与非循环对称张量的正定性判据；推导出三元四次齐次多项式的若干严格不等式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为循环对称张量的正定性提供了完整的判定框架，并能有效应用于构造多元多项式不等式，具有理论价值与应用潜力。

title: Surface detachment and bed entrainment of fluvial plastics
summary: Over the last decade, fluvial plastics have been identified as major threat to aquatic environments and human health. In order to develop adequate mitigation strategies for plastic pollution, a fundamental process understanding of riverine plastic transport is of significant importance. In this context, the implementation of research findings into numerical simulation environments is anticipated to enhance modelling capabilities and to support a rigorous decision making. Recent experimental research has focused on the incipient motion of plastic particles, as well as on the effects of surface tension on plastic concentration profiles. While these investigations have advanced the state-of-the-art knowledge, current literature still displays a lack of basic insights into layer-specific plastic transport physics. In this study, first principles are applied to advance knowledge on free-surface detachment and bed entrainment of fluvial plastics. A novel relationship for the critical surface detachment velocity is derived, followed by the development of a framework that allows to relate plastic Shields parameters to those of natural sediments. Overall, it is anticipated that these developments will trigger new research within the plastics community, and it is hoped that present findings will be implemented into Lagrangian particle tracking software.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理推导了河流塑料的自由表面脱离临界速度和基于Shields参数的河床挟起关系，填补了塑料颗粒层-specific输运物理机制的认知空白，为塑料污染数值模拟提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 河流塑料对水生环境和人类健康构成重大威胁，但现有研究缺乏对塑料颗粒层-specific输运物理机制的基本认知，制约了数值模拟能力的提升和有效缓解策略的制定。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理推导方法，建立了塑料颗粒自由表面脱离的临界速度关系式，并开发了将塑料Shields参数与天然泥沙Shields参数关联的理论框架。
AI.result: 得到了塑料颗粒自由表面脱离临界速度的新关系式，以及塑料与天然泥沙Shields参数之间的关联框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成果有望推动塑料污染领域的后续研究，并为将发现应用于拉格朗日粒子追踪软件提供理论基础。

title: Parameter Analysis in Continuous Data Assimilation for Various Turbulence Models
summary: In this study, we conduct parameter estimation analysis on a data assimilation algorithm for two turbulence models: the simplified Bardina model and the Navier-Stokes-α model. Our approach involves creating an approximate solution for the turbulence models by employing an interpolant operator based on the observational data of the systems. The estimation depends on the parameter alpha in the models. Additionally, numerical simulations are presented to validate our theoretical results

AI.tldr: 本文针对简化Bardina模型和Navier-Stokes-α模型，在数据同化算法框架下进行参数估计分析，通过基于观测数据构建插值算子来获取湍流模型的近似解，并利用数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.motivation: 对两种湍流模型（简化Bardina模型和Navier-Stokes-α模型）进行数据同化算法下的参数估计分析，以提升模型对真实物理系统的逼近能力。
AI.method: 采用数据同化算法，基于系统的观测数据构建插值算子，生成湍流模型的近似解，并围绕模型中的参数alpha进行估计分析。
AI.result: 参数alpha对近似解的估计精度具有关键影响；数值模拟结果支持了所提出理论分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于插值算子的数据同化方法可有效实现两类湍流模型的参数估计，为复杂湍流系统的数值模拟提供了理论支持与实践验证。

title: ELEQTRONeX: A GPU-Accelerated Exascale Framework for Non-Equilibrium Quantum Transport in Nanomaterials
summary: Non-equilibrium electronic quantum transport is crucial for the operation of existing and envisioned electronic, optoelectronic, and spintronic devices. The ultimate goal of encompassing atomistic to mesoscopic length scales in the same nonequilibrium device simulation approach has traditionally been challenging due to the computational cost of high-fidelity coupled multiphysics and multiscale requirements. In this work, we present ELEQTRONeX (ELEctrostatic Quantum TRansport modeling Of Nanomaterials at eXascale), a massively-parallel GPU-accelerated framework for self-consistently solving the nonequilibrium Green's function formalism and electrostatics in complex device geometries. By customizing algorithms for GPU multithreading, we achieve orders of magnitude improvement in computational time, and excellent scaling on up to 512 GPUs and billions of spatial grid cells. We validate our code by computing band structures, current-voltage characteristics, conductance, and drain-induced barrier lowering for various 3D configurations of carbon nanotube field-effect transistors. We also demonstrate that ELEQTRONeX is suitable for complex device/material geometries where periodic approaches are not feasible, such as modeling of arrays of misaligned carbon nanotubes requiring fully 3D simulations.

AI.tldr: ELEQTRONeX是一个基于GPU加速的大规模并行框架，用于自洽求解非平衡格林函数和静电学问题，在512块GPU和数十亿网格单元上实现优异扩展性，可高效模拟碳纳米管场效应晶体管等复杂三维器件。
AI.motivation: 从原子尺度到介观尺度的非平衡器件模拟因高保真耦合多物理和多尺度计算成本过高而极具挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率。
AI.method: 开发了ELEQTRONeX框架，采用GPU多线程定制算法实现大规模并行，自洽求解非平衡格林函数(NEGF)形式与静电学方程。
AI.result: 计算速度提升数个数量级，在512块GPU和数十亿空间网格单元上实现优异扩展性；成功验证了碳纳米管场效应晶体管的能带结构、I-V特性、电导和DIBL效应；实现了非对齐碳纳米管阵列的全三维模拟。
AI.conclusion: ELEQTRONeX适用于周期方法不可行的复杂器件/材料几何结构，为从原子到介观尺度的统一非平衡器件仿真提供了高效解决方案。

title: The Steepest Slope toward a Quantum Few-body Solution: Gradient Variational Methods for the Quantum Few-body Problem
summary:
Quantum few-body systems are deceptively simple. Indeed, with the notable exception of a few special cases, their associated Schrodinger equation cannot be solved analytically for more than two particles. One has to resort to approximation methods to tackle quantum few-body problems. In particular, variational methods have been proposed to ease numerical calculations and obtain precise solutions. One such method is the Stochastic Variational Method, which employs a stochastic search to determine the number and parameters of correlated Gaussian basis functions used to construct an ansatz of the wave function. Stochastic methods, however, face numerical and optimization challenges as the number of particles increases.
  We introduce a family of gradient variational methods that replace stochastic search with gradient optimization. We comparatively and empirically evaluate the performance of the baseline Stochastic Variational Method, several instances of the gradient variational method family, and some hybrid methods for selected few-body problems. We show that gradient and hybrid methods can be more efficient and effective than the Stochastic Variational Method. We discuss the role of singularities, oscillations, and gradient optimization strategies in the performance of the respective methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一系列梯度变分方法，用梯度优化替代随机搜索来求解量子少体问题，实验表明梯度和混合方法比传统随机变分方法更高效、更有效。
AI.motivation: 传统随机变分方法（SVM）在处理量子少体问题时，随着粒子数增加面临数值计算和优化方面的挑战，需要更高效的方法来求解薛定谔方程。
AI.method: 提出了一系列梯度变分方法（Gradient Variational Methods），用梯度优化取代随机搜索来确定相关高斯基函数的数量和参数；同时构建了纯梯度方法和混合方法的家族，并与基线随机变分方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 梯度和混合方法在选定的少体问题上比随机变分方法更高效、更有效。讨论了奇异性、振荡以及梯度优化策略对方法性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 梯度变分方法和混合方法可有效替代随机变分方法用于量子少体问题求解，其性能受奇异性、振荡等物理特性以及梯度优化策略选择的共同影响。

title: A modified recursive transfer matrix algorithm for radiation and scattering computation of a multilayer sphere
summary: We discuss the electromagnetic scattering and radiation problems of multilayered spheres, reviewing the history of the Lorentz-Mie theory and the numerical stability issues encountered in handling multilayered spheres. By combining recursive methods with the transfer matrix method, we propose a modified transfer matrix algorithm designed for the stable and efficient calculation of electromagnetic scattering coefficients of multilayered spheres. The new algorithm simplifies the recursive formulas by introducing Debye potentials and logarithmic derivatives, effectively avoiding numerical overflow issues associated with Bessel functions under large complex variables. Moreover, by adopting a hybrid recursive strategy, this algorithm can resolve the singularity problem associated with logarithmic derivatives in previous algorithms. Numerical test results demonstrate that this algorithm offers superior stability and applicability when dealing with complex cases such as thin shells and strongly absorbing media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的传递矩阵算法，用于多层球体电磁散射与辐射问题的稳定高效计算。该算法结合递归方法与传递矩阵法，引入德拜势和对数导数简化递归公式，有效避免了贝塞尔函数在大复变量下的数值溢出问题，并通过混合递归策略解决了对数导数的奇异性问题。数值测试表明，该算法在处理薄壳和强吸收介质等复杂情况时具有优越的稳定性和适用性。
AI.motivation: 多层球体的电磁散射与辐射问题在光学、电磁学等领域有广泛应用，但现有算法在处理大复变量下的贝塞尔函数时存在数值溢出问题，且对数导数存在奇异性问题，导致计算不稳定。因此，需要一种兼具稳定性和高效性的改进算法。
AI.method: 将递归方法与传递矩阵法相结合，提出改进的传递矩阵算法。通过引入德拜势（Debye potentials）和对数导数对递归公式进行简化，避免大复变量下贝塞尔函数的数值溢出；同时采用混合递归策略，解决对数导数在传统算法中的奇异性问题。
AI.result: 数值测试结果表明，该算法在处理薄壳、强吸收介质等复杂情况时，相比传统算法具有更优越的数值稳定性和更广泛的应用适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进传递矩阵算法有效解决了多层球体电磁散射系数计算中的数值不稳定问题，为多层球体电磁散射与辐射问题提供了一种稳定、高效的计算手段，尤其适用于薄壳和强吸收介质等挑战性场景。

title: Diffusive hydrodynamics from long-range correlations
summary: In the hydrodynamic theory, the non-equilibrium dynamics of a many-body system is approximated, at large scales of space and time, by irreversible relaxation to local entropy maximisation. This results in a convective equation corrected by viscous or diffusive terms in a gradient expansion, such as the Navier-Stokes equations. Diffusive terms are evaluated using the Kubo formula, and possibly arising from an emergent noise due to discarded microscopic degrees of freedom. In one dimension of space, diffusive scaling is often broken as noise leads to super-diffusion. But in linearly degenerate hydrodynamics, such as that of integrable models, diffusive behaviors are observed, and it has long be thought that the standard diffusive picture remains valid. In this letter, we show that in such systems, the Navier-Stokes equation breaks down beyond linear response. We demonstrate that diffusive-order corrections do not take the form of a gradient expansion. Instead, they are completely determined by ballistic transport of initial-state fluctuations, and obtained from the non-local two-point correlations recently predicted by the ballistic macroscopic fluctuation theory (BMFT); the resulting hydrodynamic equations are reversible. To do so, we establish a regularised fluctuation theory, putting on a firm basis the recent idea that ballistic transport of initial-state fluctuations determines fluctuations and correlations beyond the Euler scale. This extends the idea of ``diffusion from convection'' previously developed to explain the Kubo formula in integrable systems, to generic non-equilibrium settings.

AI.tldr: 本文发现一维可积模型中的纳维-斯托克斯方程在非线性响应区失效：扩散阶修正并非梯度展开形式，而是由初态涨落的弹道输运完全决定，可通过弹道宏观涨落理论（BMFT）的非局域两点关联得到，相应流体力学方程是可逆的。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，可积系统的线性退化流体力学被认为仍遵循标准扩散图像（如纳维-斯托克斯方程），但该假设在非线性响应区是否成立尚不清楚。作者旨在揭示扩散阶修正的真正形式及其与初态涨落弹道输运的关系。
AI.method: 建立正则化涨落理论，将初态涨落的弹道输运决定超出欧拉尺度的涨落和关联这一思想置于坚实基础之上，通过弹道宏观涨落理论（BMFT）的非局域两点关联刻画扩散阶修正。
AI.result: 发现可积系统中纳维-斯托克斯方程在非线性响应区失效；扩散阶修正不取梯度展开形式，而是由初态涨落的弹道输运完全决定，相应流体力学方程是可逆的。
AI.conclusion: 将可积系统中此前解释Kubo公式的"扩散来自对流"思想推广到一般非平衡设定，揭示了标准扩散图像在非线性区的根本局限性。

title: Boundary dissipative spin chains with partial solvability inherited from system Hamiltonians
summary: Partial solvability plays an important role in the context of statistical mechanics, since it has turned out to be closely related to the emergence of quantum many-body scar states, i.e., exceptional energy eigenstates which do not obey the strong version of the eigenstate themalization hypothesis. We show that partial solvability of a quantum many-body system can be maintained even when the system is coupled to boundary dissipators under certain conditions. We propose two mechanisms that support partially solvable structures in boundary dissipative systems: The first one is based on the restricted spectrum generating algebra, while the second one is based on the Hilbert space fragmentation. From these structures, we derive exact eigenmodes of the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad equation for a family of quantum spin chain models with boundary dissipators, where we find various intriguing phenomena arising from the partial solvability of the open quantum systems, including persistent oscillations (quantum synchronization) and the existence of the matrix product operator symmetry. We discuss how the presence of solvable eigenmodes affects long-time behaviors of observables in boundary dissipative spin chains based on numerical simulations using the quantum trajectory method.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了量子多体系统在耦合边界耗散器时仍可保持部分可解性，提出了基于受限谱生成代数和希尔伯特空间碎片化两种机制，并在一类边界耗散自旋链模型中导出了GKSL方程的精确本征模，发现了持续振荡（量子同步）和矩阵乘积算符对称性等现象。
AI.motivation: 部分可解性与量子多体疤痕态密切相关，但现有研究多局限于孤立系统。作者希望探索在开放量子系统中（特别是边界耗散条件下），部分可解结构能否被维持，以及由此产生的新奇物理现象。
AI.method: 提出两种维持部分可解性的机制：(1) 基于受限谱生成代数；(2) 基于希尔伯特空间碎片化。利用这些结构对一类边界耗散自旋链模型推导GKSL方程的精确本征模，并通过量子轨迹法进行数值模拟。
AI.result: 成功推导出边界耗散自旋链的精确可解本征模，发现了持续振荡（量子同步）和矩阵乘积算符对称性等新奇现象。数值模拟揭示了可解本征模对可观测量的长时间行为的显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 部分可解性在开放量子系统中可以稳定存在，为理解和操控量子多体疤痕态、量子同步等非平衡现象提供了新的理论框架。

title: Robustness investigation of cross-validation based quality measures for model assessment
comment: accepted for publication in Engineering Modelling, Analysis & Simulation (EMAS)
summary: In this paper the accuracy and robustness of quality measures for the assessment of machine learning models are investigated. The prediction quality of a machine learning model is evaluated model-independent based on a cross-validation approach, where the approximation error is estimated for unknown data. The presented measures quantify the amount of explained variation in the model prediction. The reliability of these measures is assessed by means of several numerical examples, where an additional data set for the verification of the estimated prediction error is available. Furthermore, the confidence bounds of the presented quality measures are estimated and local quality measures are derived from the prediction residuals obtained by the cross-validation approach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了评估机器学习模型预测质量的准确性度量与鲁棒性度量，基于交叉验证方法估算未知数据的近似误差，通过数值示例验证了度量的可靠性，并推导了局部质量度量。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型质量评估方法缺乏对度量本身准确性与鲁棒性的系统研究，需要一种模型无关且可靠的评估框架。
AI.method: 采用交叉验证方法进行模型无关的预测误差估计；通过额外验证数据集检验估计误差的可靠性；估计质量度量的置信区间；从交叉验证的预测残差中推导局部质量度量。
AI.result: 数值示例表明所提出的质量度量具有可靠性；成功估计了度量的置信边界；从预测残差中导出了有效的局部质量度量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型无关交叉验证质量度量能够准确且鲁棒地评估机器学习模型的预测性能，并支持局部质量分析。

title: Long-Term Fairness in Sequential Multi-Agent Selection with Positive Reinforcement
comment: This manuscript has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Information Theory special issue on information-theoretic methods for reliable and trustworthy ML
summary: While much of the rapidly growing literature on fair decision-making focuses on metrics for one-shot decisions, recent work has raised the intriguing possibility of designing sequential decision-making to positively impact long-term social fairness. In selection processes such as college admissions or hiring, biasing slightly towards applicants from under-represented groups is hypothesized to provide positive feedback that increases the pool of under-represented applicants in future selection rounds, thus enhancing fairness in the long term. In this paper, we examine this hypothesis and its consequences in a setting in which multiple agents are selecting from a common pool of applicants. We propose the Multi-agent Fair-Greedy policy, that balances greedy score maximization and fairness. Under this policy, we prove that the resource pool and the admissions converge to a long-term fairness target set by the agents when the score distributions across the groups in the population are identical. We provide empirical evidence of existence of equilibria under non-identical score distributions through synthetic and adapted real-world datasets. We then sound a cautionary note for more complex applicant pool evolution models, under which uncoordinated behavior by the agents can cause negative reinforcement, leading to a reduction in the fraction of under-represented applicants. Our results indicate that, while positive reinforcement is a promising mechanism for long-term fairness, policies must be designed carefully to be robust to variations in the evolution model, with a number of open issues that remain to be explored by algorithm designers, social scientists, and policymakers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体在共同申请池中进行序列化决策时，通过偏向弱势群体的策略能否实现长期社会公平。作者提出Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略，证明在群体得分分布相同时，资源池和录取结果会收敛到长期公平目标；在分布不同时通过实验表明存在均衡。同时警示：在更复杂的演化模型下，智能体的非协调行为可能导致负反馈，减少弱势群体比例。
AI.motivation: 现有公平决策文献多关注单次决策的公平性指标，而近期工作提出了通过序列化决策设计来正向影响长期社会公平的可能性（如在大学录取或招聘中略微偏向弱势群体申请人，以增加未来申请池中弱势群体的比例）。本文旨在检验这一假设及其在多智能体同时从共同申请池中挑选的场景下的后果。
AI.method: 提出Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略，在贪婪分数最大化与公平性之间取得平衡。理论上证明当群体得分分布相同时，资源池和录取结果收敛到智能体设定的长期公平目标；通过合成数据集和适配的真实世界数据集提供非相同得分分布下均衡存在的经验证据；并对更复杂的申请池演化模型下非协调行为可能导致负强化的情况进行警示分析。
AI.result: 1）在相同得分分布下，Multi-agent Fair-Greedy策略可确保资源池和录取结果收敛到长期公平目标。2）在非相同得分分布下，通过实验证明了均衡的存在性。3）在更复杂的演化模型下，智能体的非协调行为可能导致负强化，反而降低弱势群体申请人的比例。
AI.conclusion: 正强化是实现长期公平的一种有前景的机制，但政策设计必须足够稳健以应对演化模型的变化。仍有大量开放问题有待算法设计者、社会科学家和政策制定者共同探索。

title: Active Sampling of Interpolation Points to Identify Dominant Subspaces for Model Reduction
summary: Model reduction is an active research field to construct low-dimensional surrogate models of high fidelity to accelerate engineering design cycles. In this work, we investigate model reduction for linear structured systems using dominant reachable and observable subspaces. When the training set $-$ containing all possible interpolation points $-$ is large, then these subspaces can be determined by solving many large-scale linear systems. However, for high-fidelity models, this easily becomes computationally intractable. To circumvent this issue, in this work, we propose an active sampling strategy to sample only a few points from the given training set, which can allow us to estimate those subspaces accurately. To this end, we formulate the identification of the subspaces as the solution of the generalized Sylvester equations, guiding us to select the most relevant samples from the training set to achieve our goals. Consequently, we construct solutions of the matrix equations in low-rank forms, which encode subspace information. We extensively discuss computational aspects and efficient usage of the low-rank factors in the process of obtaining reduced-order models. We illustrate the proposed active sampling scheme to obtain reduced-order models via dominant reachable and observable subspaces and present its comparison with the method where all the points from the training set are taken into account. It is shown that the active sample strategy can provide us $17$x speed-up without sacrificing any noticeable accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对线性结构化系统的模型降维问题，提出了一种主动采样策略，通过从大规模训练集中选择少量关键插值点来高效估计主导可达子空间和可观子空间，并利用广义Sylvester方程的低秩解实现计算加速，在保持精度的前提下实现了17倍速度提升。
AI.motivation: 高保真线性结构化系统的模型降维中，当训练集（所有可能的插值点）规模很大时，求解主导可达子空间和可观子空间需要求解大量大规模线性系统，计算代价高昂甚至难以处理。因此，需要一种能够从大规模训练集中智能选择少数关键样本的策略，以降低计算负担。
AI.method: 提出一种主动采样策略，将子空间识别问题转化为广义Sylvester方程求解，通过矩阵方程的低秩形式编码子空间信息，并基于此选择训练集中最相关的样本点，从而高效构建降阶模型。
AI.result: 所提出的主动采样策略相比使用全部训练集点的方法，在几乎不牺牲精度的前提下实现了17倍的加速比。
AI.conclusion: 主动采样策略能够有效解决大规模训练集下模型降维的计算瓶颈，通过选择关键插值点即可精确估计主导子空间，为线性结构化系统的高效降阶建模提供了实用方案。

title: Modeling a frustrated Ising square lattice with the D-Wave Quantum Annealer
summary: The Ising model with nearest-neighbor interactions on a two-dimensional (2D) square lattice is one of the simplest models for studying ferro-magnetic to para-magnetic transitions. Extensive results are available in the literature for this model, which has become a paradigm for the study of magnetic phase transitions in materials, both theoretically and numerically. After a brief review of the main results obtained with a classical computer, we show how to implement on the D- Wave quantum annealer a more complex Ising model with the addition of competing antiferromagnetic interactions between the diagonal next-to-nearest neighbors with two coupling constants J1 and J2. The dynamics of this system, owing to frustration, are richer than those of the simple Ising model and exhibit a third striped (or antiferromagnetic) phase in addition to the ferro- and para-magnetic phases. In this work, we observed all three phases on the D-Wave hardware, studied the behavior of the solution with different annealing parameters, such as the chain strength and annealing time, and showed how to identify the phase transition by varying the ratio between the ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic couplings. The same system is studied on a classical computer, with the possibility of taking into account the temperature (fixed on D-Wave) as a free parameter and to explore the full phase diagram: some comparative conclusions with D-Wave are drawn.

AI.tldr: 本文在D-Wave量子退火器上实现了包含最近邻铁磁耦合(J1)和次近邻反铁磁耦合(J2)的二维方格Ising模型，成功观测到了铁磁、顺磁和条纹反铁磁三种相，并研究了退火参数对解的影响，同时与经典计算机上考虑温度的完整相图进行了对比分析。
AI.motivation: 在简单Ising模型（仅含最近邻相互作用）已有大量研究的基础上，引入竞争性的次近邻反铁磁相互作用（J1-J2模型），由于阻挫效应，该系统呈现出比简单Ising模型更丰富的动力学行为（出现第三相——条纹相），作者希望利用D-Wave量子退火器对这种更复杂的模型进行实现和研究。
AI.method: 在D-Wave量子退火器上实现具有最近邻铁磁耦合(J1)和次近邻对角反铁磁耦合(J2)的二维方格Ising模型；通过调节链强度(chain strength)和退火时间等参数观察解的行为；同时利用经典计算机进行相同系统的模拟，将温度作为自由参数探索完整相图，并与D-Wave结果进行对比。
AI.result: 在D-Wave硬件上成功观测到了铁磁、顺磁和条纹反铁磁三种相；研究了不同退火参数（链强度和退火时间）对解的影响；通过改变铁磁与反铁磁耦合比(J1/J2)识别了相变；在经典计算机上得到了考虑温度效应的完整相图，并与D-Wave结果进行了比较。
AI.conclusion: D-Wave量子退火器能够实现具有阻挫效应的J1-J2 Ising模型并观测到三种相，但D-Wave上温度是固定的，而经典模拟可以自由调节温度以获得完整相图，两者可互为补充。

title: Nonuniversality in random criticality
summary: We consider $N$ two-dimensional Ising models coupled in presence of quenched disorder and use scale invariant scattering theory to exactly show the presence of a line of renormalization group fixed points for any fixed value of $N$ other than 1. We show how this result relates to perturbative studies and sheds light on numerical simulations. We also observe that the limit $N\to 1$ may be of interest for the Ising spin glass, and point out potential relevance for nonuniversality in other contexts of random criticality.

AI.tldr: 本文利用标度不变散射理论严格证明了任意N≠1的N个二维Ising模型在淬火无序耦合下存在重整化群不动点线，揭示了与非普适性及自旋玻璃问题的关联。
AI.motivation: 研究淬火无序耦合的多个二维Ising模型的临界行为，特别是其重整化群不动点结构是否存在非平凡连续线，以解释数值模拟中观察到的非普适性现象。
AI.method: 采用标度不变散射理论（scale invariant scattering theory）对淬火无序耦合的N个二维Ising模型进行严格分析，推导重整化群不动点线的存在性，并与微扰研究结果和数值模拟进行对比。
AI.result: 严格证明了对于任意固定的N≠1，存在一条连续的重整化群不动点线；阐明了该结果与微扰研究的关系，并为数值模拟结果提供了理论解释；指出N→1极限与Ising自旋玻璃问题相关。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了淬火无序二维Ising模型中非普适性的起源，为随机临界性领域的非普适性现象提供了新的理论视角，并指出对自旋玻璃及其他随机临界系统的潜在影响。

title: An Efficient Enumeration of Flat-Foldings : Study on Random Single Vertex Origami
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures. Submitted to Origami8: Proceedings of the 8th International Meeting on Origami in Science, Mathematics and Education (8OSME), Melbourne, August 16-18, 2024
summary: This paper deals with themes such as approximate counting/evaluation of the total number of flat-foldings for random origami diagrams, evaluation of the values averaged over various instances, obtaining forcing sets for general origami diagrams, and evaluation of average computational complexity. An approach to the above problems using a physical model and an efficient size reduction method for them is proposed. Using a statistical mechanics model and a numerical method of approximate enumeration based on it, we give the result of approximate enumeration of the total number of flat-foldings of single-vertex origami diagram with random width of angles gathering around the central vertex, and obtain its size dependence for an asymptotic prediction towards the limit of infinite size. In addition, an outlook with respect to the chained determination of local stacking orders of facets caused by the constraint that prohibits the penetration of them is also provided from the viewpoint of organizing the terms included in the physical model. A method to efficiently solve the problem of the determination or enumeration of flat-foldings is discussed based on the above perspectives. This is thought to be closely related to forcing sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于统计力学模型和数值近似枚举的方法，用于随机折纸图的平坦折叠总数近似计数与平均计算复杂度评估，并通过物理模型和高效规模缩减方法，分析了单顶点折纸图中角度随机分布时的平坦折叠数规模依赖性与渐近行为，同时探讨了由面片穿透约束引起的局部堆叠顺序链式确定问题及其与强制集合的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有折纸图平坦折叠计数问题在高维组合空间下计算复杂，缺乏有效的近似方法与物理视角的建模手段，难以评估平均实例上的规模依赖与渐近行为。
AI.method: 采用统计力学模型构建物理对应，结合高效规模缩减方法，对单顶点折纸图（角度宽度随机分布）进行近似枚举；通过组织物理模型中的各项，分析面片穿透约束导致的局部堆叠顺序链式确定机制。
AI.result: 给出了单顶点随机角度折纸图平坦折叠总数的近似枚举结果，揭示了其规模依赖性，并提供了朝向无限大极限的渐近预测。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的物理模型与数值方法为折纸图平坦折叠的确定与枚举提供了高效求解途径，且与强制集合问题密切相关。

title: Hybrid Reinforcement Learning Breaks Sample Size Barriers in Linear MDPs
summary:
Hybrid Reinforcement Learning (RL), where an agent learns from both an offline dataset and online explorations in an unknown environment, has garnered significant recent interest. A crucial question posed by Xie et al. (2022) is whether hybrid RL can improve upon the existing lower bounds established in purely offline and purely online RL without relying on the single-policy concentrability assumption. While Li et al. (2023) provided an affirmative answer to this question in the tabular PAC RL case, the question remains unsettled for both the regret-minimizing RL case and the non-tabular case.
  In this work, building upon recent advancements in offline RL and reward-agnostic exploration, we develop computationally efficient algorithms for both PAC and regret-minimizing RL with linear function approximation, without single-policy concentrability. We demonstrate that these algorithms achieve sharper error or regret bounds that are no worse than, and can improve on, the optimal sample complexity in offline RL (the first algorithm, for PAC RL) and online RL (the second algorithm, for regret-minimizing RL) in linear Markov decision processes (MDPs), regardless of the quality of the behavior policy. To our knowledge, this work establishes the tightest theoretical guarantees currently available for hybrid RL in linear MDPs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对混合强化学习（Hybrid RL）在无需单策略集中性假设下的样本复杂度问题，提出了两种计算高效的算法（分别用于PAC RL和遗憾最小化RL），并在线性MDP中证明了它们的最优理论保证。
AI.motivation: 混合RL（结合离线数据与在线探索）能否在不依赖单策略集中性假设的情况下，突破纯离线或纯在线RL的已知下界？该问题在表格PAC RL中已有肯定答案，但在遗憾最小化RL和非表格情形下仍悬而未决。
AI.method: 基于近期离线RL与奖励无关探索的进展，针对线性函数逼近场景，分别设计了用于PAC RL和遗憾最小化RL的计算高效算法；无需单策略集中性假设。
AI.result: 所提算法在线性MDP中达到了更优的误差/遗憾界，不差于且能改进纯离线RL（PAC算法）和纯在线RL（遗憾最小化算法）的最优样本复杂度，且对行为策略质量鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为线性MDP中的混合RL建立了当前最紧的理论保证，填补了非表格情形下混合RL理论分析的空白。

title: Using Low-Discrepancy Points for Data Compression in Machine Learning: An Experimental Comparison
summary: Low-discrepancy points (also called Quasi-Monte Carlo points) are deterministically and cleverly chosen point sets in the unit cube, which provide an approximation of the uniform distribution. We explore two methods based on such low-discrepancy points to reduce large data sets in order to train neural networks. The first one is the method of Dick and Feischl [4], which relies on digital nets and an averaging procedure. Motivated by our experimental findings, we construct a second method, which again uses digital nets, but Voronoi clustering instead of averaging. Both methods are compared to the supercompress approach of [14], which is a variant of the K-means clustering algorithm. The comparison is done in terms of the compression error for different objective functions and the accuracy of the training of a neural network.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了两种基于低差异点（准蒙特卡洛方法）的数据集缩减方法，用于训练神经网络：一种是Dick和Feischl提出的基于数字网络和平均化的方法，另一种是本文新提出的基于数字网络和Voronoi聚类的方法。两种方法与K-means变体（supercompress方法）在压缩误差和神经网络训练精度上进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 利用低差异点（准蒙特卡洛点）来减少大规模数据集，以便更高效地训练神经网络，同时尽可能保持数据的关键特征。
AI.method: 方法一：Dick-Feischl方法，基于数字网络（digital nets）和平均化过程。方法二（本文新提出）：基于数字网络，但用Voronoi聚类替代平均化。对比基线：supercompress方法（K-means聚类算法的变体）。
AI.result: 两种低差异点方法在压缩误差（针对不同目标函数）和神经网络训练精度方面与supercompress方法进行了定量比较。
AI.conclusion: 基于低差异点的数据缩减方法（特别是新提出的Voronoi聚类版本）在神经网络训练的数据集压缩任务中具有竞争力，可与K-means变体方法相媲美。

title: Entry-Specific Matrix Estimation under Arbitrary Sampling Patterns through the Lens of Network Flows
summary: Matrix completion tackles the task of predicting missing values in a low-rank matrix based on a sparse set of observed entries. It is often assumed that the observation pattern is generated uniformly at random or has a very specific structure tuned to a given algorithm. There is still a gap in our understanding when it comes to arbitrary sampling patterns. Given an arbitrary sampling pattern, we introduce a matrix completion algorithm based on network flows in the bipartite graph induced by the observation pattern. For additive matrices, the particular flow we used is the electrical flow and we establish error upper bounds customized to each entry as a function of the observation set, along with matching minimax lower bounds. Our results show that the minimax squared error for recovery of a particular entry in the matrix is proportional to the effective resistance of the corresponding edge in the graph. Furthermore, we show that our estimator is equivalent to the least squares estimator. We apply our estimator to the two-way fixed effects model and show that it enables us to accurately infer individual causal effects and the unit-specific and time-specific confounders. For rank-$1$ matrices, we use edge-disjoint paths to form an estimator that achieves minimax optimal estimation when the sampling is sufficiently dense. Our discovery introduces a new family of estimators parametrized by network flows, which provide a fine-grained and intuitive understanding of the impact of the given sampling pattern on the relative difficulty of estimation at an entry-specific level. This graph-based approach allows us to quantify the inherent complexity of matrix completion for individual entries, rather than relying solely on global measures of performance.

AI.tldr: 本文针对任意观测模式下的矩阵补全问题，提出基于网络流（特别是电导流和边不交路径）的估计算法，证明每个条目的极小极大均方误差正比于二分图中对应边的有效电阻，并将估计器应用于双向固定效应模型以推断个体因果效应。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵补全方法大多假设观测模式为均匀随机或具有特定结构，缺乏对任意采样模式的理论理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，为任意观测模式提供条目录级别的误差分析。
AI.method: 针对加性矩阵，利用二分图上的电导流（electrical flow）构建估计器，证明其等价于最小二乘估计器，并推导出每个条目的误差上界与极小化极大下界（正比于有效电阻）。针对秩-1矩阵，采用边不交路径（edge-disjoint paths）构建估计器，在稠密采样下达到极小极大最优。整体方法形成一个由网络流参数化的估计器族。
AI.result: 证明了每个条目的极小极大平方误差与二分图中对应边的有效电阻成正比；所提电导流估计器等价于最小二乘估计器；在秩-1场景下边不交路径估计器在稠密采样时达到极小极大最优。
AI.conclusion: 网络流视角为任意观测模式下的矩阵补全提供了细粒度的、条目录级别的误差分析框架，揭示了观测模式对每个条目估计难度的内在影响，超越了传统的全局性能度量。

title: Manipulating liquid-liquid phase separation using patterned flow
summary: The precise control of liquid-liquid phase separation (LLPS) is the key to developing cutting-edge technologies that benefit diverse disciplines. Fluid flow was found to be capable of controlling the structure and effective temperature of LLPS, but the extent and precision of control were less than optimal. In this article, we propose that patterned flow can be employed as a generic tool to manipulate LLPS effectively. By combining theoretical modeling and numerical simulations, we demonstrate that flows with tailor-made structures can become functional, allowing us to control diverse aspects of LLPS. Typical examples include the capture and pinning of droplets, fine-tuning of droplet sizes, forced assembly of periodic droplet arrays, and the remodeling of the kinetics and structure of phase separation. These manipulations are grounded on the redistribution of chemical potential by the structured flow. Our results not only can lead to potential LLPS-based technologies, but also highlight the rich behavior of LLPS introduced by the patterned flow.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用 patterned flow（图案化流动）作为通用工具来有效操控液-液相分离（LLPS），通过理论建模和数值模拟证明，具有定制结构的流动能够实现液滴捕获与钉扎、尺寸精细调控、周期性液滴阵列组装以及相分离动力学与结构的重塑，这些操控基于结构化流动对化学势的重新分布。
AI.motivation: 流体流动已被发现可控制LLPS的结构和有效温度，但控制的精度和范围尚不理想，因此需要开发更有效的操控方法。
AI.method: 结合理论建模与数值模拟，研究图案化流动对液-液相分离的操控效果。
AI.result: 图案化流动能够实现液滴捕获与钉扎、尺寸精细调控、周期性液滴阵列的强制组装，以及相分离动力学和结构的重塑。
AI.conclusion: 这些操控基于结构化流动对化学势的重新分布，不仅可发展基于LLPS的新技术，也揭示了图案化流动引入的丰富LLPS行为。

title: On a multiscale formulation for multiperforated plates
comment: mainly added more introductionary sentences to some sections and cited two-scale FEM of Matache & Schwab
summary: Multiperforated plates exhibit high gradients and a loss of regularity concentrated in a boundary layer for which a direct numerical simulation becomes very expensive. For elliptic equations the solution at some distance of the boundary is only affected in an effective way and the macroscopic and mesoscopic behaviour can be separated. A multiscale formulation in the spirit of the heterogeneous multiscale method is introduced on the example of the Poisson equation. Based on the method of matched asymptotic expansion the solution is separated into a macroscopic far field defined in a domain with only slowly varying boundary and a mesoscopic near field defined in scaled coordinates on possibly varying infinite periodicity cells. The near field has a polynomial behaviour that is coupled to the traces of the macroscopic variable on the mid-line of the multiperforated plate. A variational formulation using a Beppo-Levi space in the strip is introduced and its well-posedness is shown. The variational framework when truncating the infinite strip is discussed and the truncation error is estimated.

AI.tldr: 针对多孔板问题，基于异质多尺度方法（HMM）的思想，结合匹配渐近展开法，将解分离为宏观远场和介观近场，并利用Beppo-Levi空间建立变分框架，证明了适定性并估计了截断误差。
AI.motivation: 多孔板数值模拟中，边界层内梯度大、正则性差，直接数值模拟成本过高，因此需要发展高效的多尺度方法。
AI.method: 基于异质多尺度方法（HMM）的思想，采用匹配渐近展开法将解分离为定义在缓慢变化边界域上的宏观远场和定义在缩放坐标下无限周期胞上的介观近场；近场呈现多项式行为，与宏观变量在多孔板中线上的迹耦合；在带状区域上引入Beppo-Levi空间建立变分公式并证明适定性，同时讨论截断误差。
AI.result: 建立了多孔板问题的多尺度变分框架，证明了在Beppo-Levi空间中变分问题的适定性，给出了无限带状区域截断后的误差估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效分离多孔板问题的宏观与介观行为，在远离边界处仅受有效影响，从而大幅降低计算成本，为多孔板的高效多尺度模拟提供了理论依据。

title: Hyperplane Arrangements in the Grassmannian
summary: The Euler characteristic of a very affine variety encodes the algebraic complexity of solving likelihood (or scattering) equations on this variety. We study this quantity for the Grassmannian with $d$ hyperplane sections removed. We provide a combinatorial formula, and explain how to compute this Euler characteristic in practice, both symbolically and numerically. Our particular focus is on generic hyperplane sections and on Schubert divisors. We also consider special Schubert arrangements relevant for physics. We study both the complex and the real case.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了去除了d个超平面截面的格拉斯曼流形的欧拉示性数，该量编码了该簇上似然方程（或散射方程）的代数求解复杂度。我们提供了组合公式，并解释了如何通过符号和数值方法计算该欧拉示性数，重点关注一般超平面截面和舒伯特除子，同时考虑了物理相关的特殊舒伯特排列以及复数和实数情形。
AI.motivation: 欧拉示性数能够编码非常仿射簇上似然方程（或散射方程）的代数求解复杂度，因此研究格拉斯曼流形在去除超平面截面后的欧拉示性数具有重要的理论意义和应用价值。
AI.method: 通过组合公式推导，并结合符号计算与数值计算方法，分别处理一般超平面截面和舒伯特除子情形，同时研究特殊舒伯特排列（与物理相关）以及复数和实数情形。
AI.result: 给出了格拉斯曼流形在去除d个超平面截面后的欧拉示性数的组合公式，并提供了符号与数值两种计算方式。研究涵盖了一般超平面截面、舒伯特除子以及物理相关的特殊舒伯特排列，并同时考虑了复数和实数情形。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功建立了格拉斯曼流形上去除超平面截面后的欧拉示性数的组合公式与计算方法，为理解该簇上似然/散射方程的求解复杂度提供了重要工具，并为物理应用（如特殊舒伯特排列）奠定了基础。

title: Delta invariants of weighted hypersurfaces
summary: We give a lower bound for the delta invariant of the fundamental divisor of a quasi-smooth weighted hypersurface. As a consequence, we prove K-stability of a large class of quasi-smooth Fano hypersurfaces of index 1 and of all smooth Fano weighted hypersurfaces of index 1 and 2. The proofs are based on the Abban--Zhuang method and on the study of linear systems on flags of weighted hypersurfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文针对拟光滑加权超曲面的基本因子的delta不变量给出下界，进而证明了一大类指数为1的拟光滑Fano超曲面和所有指数为1和2的光滑Fano加权超曲面的K-稳定性。证明基于Abban-Zhuang方法和对加权超曲面旗上线性系统的研究。
AI.motivation: 建立拟光滑加权超曲面基本因子的delta不变量下界，从而证明更多Fano超曲面的K-稳定性。
AI.method: 利用Abban-Zhuang方法，并结合对加权超曲面旗（flag）上线性系统的研究。
AI.result: 得到了基本因子的delta不变量下界，证明了一大类拟光滑Fano超曲面（指数1）和所有光滑Fano加权超曲面（指数1和2）的K-稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了已知的K-稳定Fano超曲面的类别，为加权超曲面的K-稳定性提供了更系统的理论依据。

title: Carleson measures on domains in Heisenberg groups
summary: We study the Carleson measures on NTA and ADP domains in the Heisenberg groups $\mathbb{H}^n$ and provide two characterizations of such measures: (1) in terms of the level sets of subelliptic harmonic functions and (2) via the $1$-quasiconformal family of mappings on the Korányi--Reimann unit ball. Moreover, we establish the $L^2$-bounds for the square function $S_α$ of a subelliptic harmonic function and the Carleson measure estimates for the BMO boundary data, both on NTA domains in $\mathbb{H}^n$. Finally, we prove a Fatou-type theorem on $(ε, δ)$-domains in $\mathbb{H}^n$.

AI.tldr: 本文在Heisenberg群$\mathbb{H}^n$上的NTA域和ADP域中研究Carleson测度，给出了两种刻画方法：(1)通过次椭圆调和函数的水平集，(2)通过Korányi-Reimann单位球上的$1$-拟共形映射族。同时在$\mathbb{H}^n$的NTA域上建立了次椭圆调和函数的平方函数$S_α$的$L^2$有界性以及BMO边值数据的Carleson测度估计。最后在$\mathbb{H}^n$的$(ε, δ)$-域上证明了Fatou型定理。
AI.motivation: 将欧氏空间中关于Carleson测度、NTA域和Fatou定理的经典理论推广到Heisenberg群的次椭圆几何框架下，探析其在非交换、非各向同性环境下的适用性与新刻画。
AI.method: (1) 次椭圆调和函数水平集方法；(2) Korányi-Reimann单位球上的$1$-拟共形映射族方法；(3) 平方函数$S_α$的$L^2$估计与BMO边值数据的Carleson测度估计；(4) $(ε, δ)$-域上的Fatou型定理证明。
AI.result: 给出了Heisenberg群上NTA域和ADP域中Carleson测度的两种等价刻画；证明了平方函数$S_α$的$L^2$有界性和BMO边值数据的Carleson测度估计；建立了$(ε, δ)$-域上的Fatou型定理。
AI.conclusion: 在Heisenberg群的次椭圆几何框架下系统建立了Carleson测度的刻画理论，并推广了调和函数相关的经典分析结果。

title: The well-posedness and scattering theory of nonlinear Schrödinger equations on lattice graphs
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel first-order derivative for functions on a lattice graph, which extends the discrete Laplacian and generalizes the theory of discrete PDEs on lattices. First, we establish the well-posedness of generalized discrete quasilinear Schrödinger equations and give a new proof of the global well-posedness of discrete semilinear Schrödinger equations. Then we provide explicit expressions of higher-order derivatives of the solution map and prove the analytic dependence between the solution and the initial data. At the end, we show the existence of the wave operator and prove the asymptotic completeness of the solutions with the small data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种格图上的新型一阶导数，扩展了离散拉普拉斯算子并推广了格上离散偏微分方程理论；建立了广义离散拟线性薛定谔方程的适定性，给出了离散半线性薛定谔方程整体适定性的新证明；导出了解映射的高阶导数的显式表达式，证明了解与初值之间的解析依赖性；最后证明了波算子的存在性以及小数据下解的渐近完备性。
AI.motivation: 为了在格图上建立更一般的离散偏微分方程理论，特别是为离散拟线性薛定谔方程提供严格的数学基础，并系统研究解的正则性与散射性质。
AI.method: 通过引入格图上的新型一阶导数（扩展离散拉普拉斯算子），利用函数分析和偏微分方程理论，建立适定性证明；通过解映射的高阶导数显式表达式分析解析依赖性；结合波算子理论证明小数据下的渐近完备性。
AI.result: 建立了广义离散拟线性薛定谔方程的适定性；给出了离散半线性薛定谔方程整体适定性的新证明；获得了解映射高阶导数的显式表达式；证明了波算子的存在性及小数据下解的渐近完备性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为格图上的离散偏微分方程提供了更一般的理论框架，并严格证明了离散薛定谔方程类问题的适定性、解析依赖性以及散射理论结果。

title: Modules of derivations, logarithmic ideals and singularities of maps on analytic varieties
summary: We introduce the module of derivations $Θ_{h,M}$ attached to a given analytic map $h:(\mathbb C^n,0)\to (\mathbb C^p,0)$ and a submodule $M\subseteq \mathcal O_n^p$ and analyse several exact sequences related to $Θ_{h,M}$. Moreover, we obtain formulas for several numerical invariants associated to the pair $(h,M)$ and a given analytic map germ $f:(\mathbb C^n,0)\to (\mathbb C^q,0)$. In particular, if $X$ is an analytic subvariety of $\mathbb C^n$, we derive expressions for analytic invariants defined in terms of the module $Θ_X$ of logarithmic vector fields of $X$.

AI.tldr: 本文引入了一个与解析映射h和子模M相关的导子模Θ_{h,M}，分析了多个正合序列，并推导了与(h,M)及解析映射芽f相关的若干数值不变量公式，特别地得到了关于解析子簇X的对数向量场模Θ_X的解析不变量表达式。
AI.motivation: 研究解析映射和子模的导数模结构，并建立相关的数值不变量公式，特别是为了更深入地理解解析子簇的对数向量场模Θ_X的解析不变量。
AI.method: 引入导子模Θ_{h,M}，通过分析正合序列来研究其结构，并推导与解析映射芽f相关的数值不变量公式。
AI.result: 获得了与(h,M)及解析映射芽f相关的多个数值不变量公式，并给出了解析子簇X的对数向量场模Θ_X的解析不变量表达式。
AI.conclusion: 本文为解析映射和子模的导子结构提供了系统的分析框架，并得到了有用的不变量计算公式。

title: Explainability of Machine Learning Models under Missing Data
summary: Missing data is a prevalent issue that can significantly impair model performance and explainability. This paper briefly summarizes the development of the field of missing data with respect to Explainable Artificial Intelligence and experimentally investigates the effects of various imputation methods on SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations), a popular technique for explaining the output of complex machine learning models. Next, we compare different imputation strategies and assess their impact on feature importance and interaction as determined by Shapley values. Moreover, we also theoretically analyze the effects of missing values on Shapley values. Importantly, our findings reveal that the choice of imputation method can introduce biases that could lead to changes in the Shapley values, thereby affecting the explainability of the model. Moreover, we also show that a lower test prediction MSE (Mean Square Error) does not necessarily imply a lower MSE in Shapley values and vice versa. Also, while XGBoost (eXtreme Gradient Boosting) is a method that could handle missing data directly, using XGBoost directly on missing data can seriously affect explainability compared to imputing the data before training XGBoost. This study provides a comprehensive evaluation of imputation methods in the context of model explanations, offering practical guidance for selecting appropriate techniques based on dataset characteristics and analysis objectives. The results underscore the importance of considering imputation effects to ensure robust and reliable insights from machine learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了缺失数据插补方法对SHAP可解释性分析的影响，发现插补方法的选择会显著影响Shapley值，且低预测误差并不等同于低可解释性误差；直接使用XGBoost处理缺失值会严重损害可解释性。
AI.motivation: 缺失数据普遍存在，会对模型性能与可解释性造成显著影响，但目前缺乏对插补方法如何影响模型解释（尤其是SHAP值）的系统研究。
AI.method: 实验比较多种插补策略对SHAP特征重要性和特征交互的影响；理论分析缺失值对Shapley值的影响机制；评估预测MSE与Shapley值MSE之间的关系。
AI.result: 插补方法的选择会引入偏倚，改变Shapley值；较低的预测MSE并不保证较低的Shapley值MSE；XGBoost直接处理缺失值会严重削弱可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 应谨慎选择插补方法以确保模型可解释分析的鲁棒性与可靠性，为不同数据特征和分析目标提供了实践指导。

title: Low-Power Vibration-Based Predictive Maintenance for Industry 4.0 using Neural Networks: A Survey
comment: The final version will be published at the ECML-PKDD 2024 joint post-workshop proceeding in Springer Communications in Computer and Information Science
summary: The advancements in smart sensors for Industry 4.0 offer ample opportunities for low-powered predictive maintenance and condition monitoring. However, traditional approaches in this field rely on processing in the cloud, which incurs high costs in energy and storage. This paper investigates the potential of neural networks for low-power on-device computation of vibration sensor data for predictive maintenance. We review the literature on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) and Artificial Neuronal Networks (ANNs) for vibration-based predictive maintenance by analyzing datasets, data preprocessing, network architectures, and hardware implementations. Our findings suggest that no satisfactory standard benchmark dataset exists for evaluating neural networks in predictive maintenance tasks. Furthermore frequency domain transformations are commonly employed for preprocessing. SNNs mainly use shallow feed forward architectures, whereas ANNs explore a wider range of models and deeper networks. Finally, we highlight the need for future research on hardware implementations of neural networks for low-power predictive maintenance applications and the development of a standardized benchmark dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了SNN和ANN在基于振动数据的低功耗预测性维护中的应用，发现缺乏标准化基准数据集，频域预处理常见，SNN多采用浅层前馈架构而ANN结构更多样，并指出未来需要关注硬件实现和标准化数据集建设。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0中智能传感器为低功耗预测性维护和状态监测提供了机会，但传统云处理方法能耗和存储成本高，因此需要研究神经网络在设备端低功耗计算振动传感器数据的潜力。
AI.method: 通过文献综述的方式，从数据集、数据预处理、网络架构和硬件实现四个维度分析SNN和ANN在振动预测性维护中的应用现状。
AI.result: 1) 缺乏令人满意的标准化基准数据集；2) 频域变换是常用的预处理方法；3) SNN主要采用浅层前馈架构，而ANN探索了更广泛的模型和更深层网络；4) 硬件实现研究不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需要加强神经网络在低功耗预测性维护中的硬件实现研究，并开发标准化基准数据集。

title: Nonlinear PageRank Problem for Local Graph Partitioning
summary: A nonlinear generalisation of the PageRank problem involving the Moore-Penrose inverse of an incidence matrix is developed for local graph partitioning purposes. The Levenberg-Marquardt method with a full rank Jacobian variant provides a strategy for obtaining a numerical solution to the generalised problem. Sets of vertices are formed according to the ranking supplied by the solution, and a conductance criterion decides upon the set that best represents the cluster around a starting vertex. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world inspired graphs demonstrate the capability of the approach to not only produce low conductance sets, but to also recover local clusters with an accuracy that consistently surpasses state-of-the-art algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Moore-Penrose逆的非线性PageRank推广方法用于局部图划分，采用Levenberg-Marquardt算法求解，通过电导率准则确定最优聚类，实验表明该方法在生成低电导率集和恢复局部聚类方面持续优于现有算法。
AI.motivation: 现有局部图划分方法在处理复杂图结构时精度有限，需要一种能更准确恢复局部聚类且产生低电导率集合的新方法。
AI.method: 1) 将PageRank问题非线性推广，引入关联矩阵的Moore-Penrose逆；2) 采用Levenberg-Marquardt方法配合满秩雅可比变体进行数值求解；3) 根据解提供的排序形成顶点集合，利用电导率准则选择最佳聚类。
AI.result: 在合成图和真实图上的实验表明，该方法不仅能产生低电导率集合，而且在局部聚类恢复的准确性上持续超越现有最优算法。
AI.conclusion: 该非线性PageRank推广结合Moore-Penrose逆和Levenberg-Marquardt求解策略，为局部图划分提供了一种精度更高的新途径。

title: Using Linearized Optimal Transport to Predict the Evolution of Stochastic Particle Systems
summary: We develop an Euler-type method to predict the evolution of a time-dependent probability measure without explicitly learning an operator that governs its evolution. We use linearized optimal transport theory to prove that the measure-valued analog of Euler's method is first-order accurate when the measure evolves ``smoothly.'' In applications of interest, however, the measure is an empirical distribution of a system of stochastic particles whose behavior is only accessible through an agent-based micro-scale simulation. In such cases, this empirical measure does not evolve smoothly because the individual particles move chaotically on short time scales. However, we can still perform our Euler-type method, and when the particles' collective distribution approximates a measure that \emph{does} evolve smoothly, we observe that the algorithm still accurately predicts this collective behavior over relatively large Euler steps, thus reducing the number of micro-scale steps required to step forward in time. In this way, our algorithm provides a ``macro-scale timestepper'' that requires less micro-scale data to still maintain accuracy, which we demonstrate with three illustrative examples: a biological agent-based model, a model of a PDE, and a model of Langevin dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于欧拉方法的宏观时间步进算法，通过线性化最优输运理论证明其在一阶精度下的有效性，并利用三个数值实验（生物智能体模型、PDE模型、Langevin动力学模型）展示了该算法在减少微观模拟步数的同时保持对概率测度宏观演化预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要显式学习控制概率测度演化的算子，而本文希望在不显式学习演化算子的前提下，直接预测时变概率测度的演化轨迹，并减少微观模拟的计算成本。
AI.method: 基于线性化最优输运理论，提出概率测度版本的欧拉方法；当测度光滑演化时理论上证明一阶精度；对于由随机粒子系统经验分布构成的非光滑测度，仍采用相同欧拉格式，利用粒子集体分布近似光滑测度的特性实现大时间步长预测。
AI.result: 在生物智能体模型、PDE模型和Langevin动力学模型三个示例中，所提算法能够在减少微观模拟步数的前提下，准确预测概率测度的宏观集体行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为宏观时间步进器，在不显式学习演化算子的情况下，利用较少的微观数据实现对时变概率测度的高效准确预测。

title: Preconditioning of the generalized Stokes problem arising from the approximation of the time-dependent Navier-Stokes equations
summary: The paper compares standard iterative methods for solving the generalized Stokes problem arising from the time and space approximation of the time-dependent incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. Various preconditioning techniques are considered (Schur complement, fully coupled system, with and without augmented Lagrangian). One investigates whether these methods can compete with traditional pressure-correction and velocity-correction methods in terms of throughput (number of degrees of freedom per time step per core per second). Numerical tests on fine unstructured meshes (68 millions degrees of freedoms) demonstrate GMRES/CG convergence rates that are independent of the mesh size and improve with the Reynolds number for most methods. Three conclusions are drawn: (1) Whether solving the pressure Schur complement or the fully coupled system does not make any significant difference in terms of throughput. (2) Although very good parallel scalability is observed for the augmented Lagrangian method, the best throughput is achieved without using the augmented Lagrangian formulation. (3) The throughput of all the methods tested in the paper are on average 25 times slower than that of traditional pressure-correction and velocity-correction methods. Hence, although all these methods are very efficient for solving steady state problems, none of them is unfortunately competitive for solving time-dependent problems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了求解非定常不可压Navier-Stokes方程广义Stokes问题的多种迭代方法（Schur补、全耦合系统、增广拉格朗日等），在6800万自由度非结构化网格上测试发现：尽管所有方法在稳态问题上高效，但应用于瞬态问题时，吞吐量平均比传统压力修正/速度修正方法慢25倍，不具竞争力。
AI.motivation: 探究求解广义Stokes问题的各种预处理迭代方法能否在吞吐量上与传统压力修正和速度修正方法竞争，以确定这些方法是否适用于时间依赖问题。
AI.method: 在6800万自由度的非结构化网格上，对广义Stokes问题采用多种预处理技术（Schur补、全耦合系统、有/无增广拉格朗日），结合GMRES/CG迭代求解，以吞吐量（每核每秒每时间步的自由度数）为评价指标，与传统压力修正和速度修正方法进行对比。
AI.result: (1) 求解压力Schur补与求解全耦合系统在吞吐量上无显著差异；(2) 增广拉格朗日方法并行可扩展性良好，但最佳吞吐量出现在不使用增广拉格朗日时；(3) 所有测试方法的吞吐量平均比传统方法慢25倍。
AI.conclusion: 尽管这些迭代方法在稳态问题上非常高效，但由于吞吐量远低于传统方法，不适用于时间依赖问题的求解。

title: Fairness in Multi-Proposer-Multi-Responder Ultimatum Game
comment: 11 pages main text, 10 pages supplementary information, 3 + 1 figures
summary: The Ultimatum Game is conventionally formulated in the context of two players. Nonetheless, real-life scenarios often entail community interactions among numerous individuals. To address this, we introduce an extended version of the Ultimatum Game, called the Multi-Proposer-Multi-Responder Ultimatum Game. In this model, multiple responders and proposers simultaneously interact in a one-shot game, introducing competition both within proposers and within responders. We derive subgame-perfect Nash equilibria for all scenarios and explore how these non-trivial values might provide insight into proposal and rejection behavior experimentally observed in the context of one vs. one Ultimatum Game scenarios. Additionally, by considering the asymptotic numbers of players, we propose two potential estimates for a "fair" threshold: either 31.8% or 36.8% of the pie (share) for the responder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多人-多响应者最后通牒博弈模型，分析了所有可能的子博弈完美纳什均衡，并提出了两个公平阈值估计：响应者应获得31.8%或36.8%的份额。
AI.motivation: 传统最后通牒博弈仅涉及两名玩家，但现实场景常涉及多人社区互动。为弥合这一差距，作者将标准两人博弈扩展为多提议者-多响应者模式，以更真实地模拟现实中的群体议价行为。
AI.method: 通过构建多提议者-多响应者最后通牒博弈模型，在一次性博弈中允许多名提议者和响应者同时互动，引入提议者间和响应者间的双重竞争机制。运用博弈论推导所有情景下的子博弈完美纳什均衡，并通过渐近分析提出公平阈值估计。
AI.result: 推导出所有情景的子博弈完美纳什均衡；发现均衡值可为单人情景中的提议和拒绝行为提供理论解释；通过玩家数量渐近分析，提出两个公平阈值估计：31.8%或36.8%的份额给响应者。
AI.conclusion: 多人博弈框架能更好地解释现实中的公平感知和议价行为，所提出的两个公平阈值（约31.8%或36.8%）为理解群体互动中的分配正义提供了新的理论参考。

title: Multi-Output Distributional Fairness via Post-Processing
summary: The post-processing approaches are becoming prominent techniques to enhance machine learning models' fairness because of their intuitiveness, low computational cost, and excellent scalability. However, most existing post-processing methods are designed for task-specific fairness measures and are limited to single-output models. In this paper, we introduce a post-processing method for multi-output models, such as the ones used for multi-task/multi-class classification and representation learning, to enhance a model's distributional parity, a task-agnostic fairness measure. Existing methods for achieving distributional parity rely on the (inverse) cumulative density function of a model's output, restricting their applicability to single-output models. Extending previous works, we propose to employ optimal transport mappings to move a model's outputs across different groups towards their empirical Wasserstein barycenter. An approximation technique is applied to reduce the complexity of computing the exact barycenter and a kernel regression method is proposed to extend this process to out-of-sample data. Our empirical studies evaluate the proposed approach against various baselines on multi-task/multi-class classification and representation learning tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多输出模型的后处理公平性方法，通过最优传输将不同组的模型输出映射到Wasserstein重心，实现分布奇偶性（distributions parity）这一任务无关的公平性度量，并采用近似技术和核回归方法处理计算复杂度和样本外数据问题。
AI.motivation: 现有后处理方法大多针对特定任务的公平性度量，且仅适用于单输出模型，无法处理多任务/多分类/表示学习等多输出模型的公平性问题。
AI.method: 利用最优传输映射将不同组的模型输出移至其经验Wasserstein重心；采用近似技术降低精确重心的计算复杂度；使用核回归方法将该过程推广到样本外数据。
AI.result: 在多任务/多分类分类和表示学习任务上，与多种基线方法相比，所提方法有效提升了分布奇偶性公平性度量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的后处理方法成功将分布奇偶性公平性增强扩展到了多输出模型场景，方法直观、计算成本低且具有良好可扩展性。

title: A tactical time slot management problem under mixed logit demand
summary: We study the tactical time slot management problem under mixed logit demand for attended home delivery in subscription settings. We propose a static mixed-integer linear programming model that integrates delivery slot assortment, price discount decisions, and routing optimization while capturing customer heterogeneity through the mixed logit model. To overcome the computational challenges posed by simulation-based choice probabilities, we develop a simulation-based Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search method aligned with a Sample Average Approximation reformulation. Computational experiments on large-scale instances demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in capturing stochastic customer behavior and preference heterogeneity, providing a scalable and flexible method for optimizing time slot management under complex demand structures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了受混合Logit需求驱动的战术时间槽管理问题，提出了一种集成配送时段组合、价格折扣决策与路径优化的静态混合整数线性规划模型，并开发了基于仿真的自适应大邻域搜索方法结合样本均值近似求解，实验证明了方法在大规模实例上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在有订阅服务的上门配送场景中，客户对配送时间槽的选择行为具有异构性（偏好差异），而传统的多项式Logit模型无法充分捕捉这种随机偏好异质性。因此，需要引入混合Logit模型来更真实地刻画客户选择行为，从而优化时间槽管理。
AI.method: 1) 构建混合整数线性规划模型，整合时段组合选择、价格折扣决策和路径优化；2) 采用混合Logit模型捕捉客户异质性；3) 针对基于仿真的选择概率带来的计算挑战，提出结合样本均值近似（SAA）的自适应大邻域搜索（ALNS）方法。
AI.result: 在大规模实例上的计算实验表明，所提方法能够有效捕捉随机客户行为和偏好异质性，提供了可扩展且灵活的时间槽管理优化方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在复杂需求结构下具有可扩展性和灵活性，为解决混合Logit需求下的时间槽管理问题提供了一种有效的求解框架。

title: Stochastic Singular Linear Systems and Related Linear-Quadratic Optimal Control Problems under Finite and Infinite Horizons
summary: In this paper, we study the necessary and sufficient conditions for ensuring the well-posedness of the stochastic singular systems.
