Moreover, we investigate the stochastic singular linear-quadratic control problems, considering both finite and infinite horizons, and transform each of these problems into their corresponding normal linear-quadratic control problem. To guarantee the finiteness of the infinite-horizon linear-quadratic control problem, we establish the Popov-Belevitch-Hautus rank criterion for accessing the controllability of the stochastic system. Furthermore, we derive the feedback form of the optimal control. Finally, we provide solutions for illustrated examples of the stochastic singular linear-quadratic control problem in both finite and infinite horizons.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机奇异系统的适定性条件，将有限/无限时域的随机奇异线性二次型控制问题转化为标准形式，通过建立Popov-Belevitch-Hautus秩判据保证无限时域问题的有限性，推导了最优控制的反馈形式，并给出了数值算例。
AI.motivation: 随机奇异系统在实际工程与控制理论中广泛存在，但其适定性条件尚不完善，且对应的线性二次型控制问题缺乏系统性的求解方法，尤其是无限时域问题的有限性保证尚待解决。
AI.method: 首先推导随机奇异系统适定性的充要条件；然后将有限和无限时域的随机奇异线性二次型控制问题分别转化为对应的标准线性二次型控制问题；利用Popov-Belevitch-Hautus秩判据建立随机系统可控性的判定准则以确保无限时域问题解的有限性；最后推导最优控制的反馈形式。
AI.result: 建立了随机奇异系统适定性的充要条件；完成了随机奇异线性二次型控制问题向标准问题的转化；提出了用于判定随机系统可控性的PBH秩判据；得到了最优控制律的反馈形式；通过有限时域和无限时域的算例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为随机奇异系统的线性二次型控制问题提供了完整的理论框架，包括适定性条件、问题转化、可控性判据及最优反馈控制，为后续工程应用奠定了理论基础。

title: The impact of transience in the interaction between orographic gravity waves and mean flow
comment: 42 pages, 12 figures. This work has been submitted to the Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences. Copyright in this work may be transferred without further notice
summary: A Lagrangian gravity-wave parameterization (MS-GWaM, Multi-Scale Gravity-Wave Model) that allows for fully transient wave-mean-flow interaction and horizontal propagation is applied to orographic gravity waves for the first time. Both linear and nonlinear mountain waves are modeled in idealized simulations within the pseudo-incompressible flow solver PincFlow. Two-dimensional flows over monochromatic orographies are considered, using MS-GWaM either in its fully transient implementation or in a steady-state implementation that represents classic mountain-wave parameterizations. Comparisons of wave-resolving simulations (not using MS-GWaM) and coarse-resolution simulations (using MS-GWaM) show that allowing for transience leads to a significantly more accurate forcing of the resolved mean flow. The model is able to reproduce the transient forcing of linearly generated mountain waves that slowly propagate upwards, in contrast to the instantaneous distribution of wave energy in classic parameterizations. At high altitudes, wave breaking induces a wind reversal that is captured by the transient model but inhibited in steady-state simulations, due to the assumption of critical level formation. This shows that transience can have a substantial impact in the interaction between mountain waves and mean flow.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将允许瞬态波-流相互作用和水平传播的拉格朗日重力波参数化方案（MS-GWaM）应用于地形重力波。在伪不可压缩流求解器PincFlow中进行理想化模拟，对比波分辨模拟和粗分辨率模拟，发现允许瞬态效应能显著提高对解析平均流强迫的准确性，并能捕捉高海拔波致风向反转，而稳态模拟则因临界层假设而抑制该现象。
AI.motivation: 经典的地形重力波参数化通常假设稳态波场，瞬时分布波能，忽略了波流相互作用的瞬态过程和水平传播效应，导致对平均流强迫的描述不够准确。为改进这一缺陷，作者将已开发的瞬态重力波参数化方案MS-GWaM首次应用于地形重力波场景。
AI.method: 在伪不可压缩流求解器PincFlow中，对二维单色地形上的地形重力波进行理想化模拟。分别采用MS-GWaM的完全瞬态实现和稳态实现（代表经典参数化方案），并与未使用MS-GWaM的波分辨模拟进行对比。
AI.result: 瞬态模型能准确再现线性生成的地形重力波缓慢向上传播过程中的瞬态强迫，而经典参数化则瞬时分布波能。在高海拔处，瞬态模型能捕捉波致风向反转，而稳态模拟因临界层假设抑制了该反转。
AI.conclusion: 瞬态效应对地形重力波与平均流之间的相互作用具有显著影响，允许瞬态和水平传播的MS-GWaM参数化方案能更准确地模拟地形重力波对平均流的强迫。

title: Demonstration of Scalability and Accuracy of Variational Quantum Linear Solver for Computational Fluid Dynamics
summary:
The solution for non-linear, complex partial differential Equations (PDEs) is achieved through numerical approximations, which yield a linear system of equations. This approach is prevalent in Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), but it restricts the mesh size since the solution of the linear system becomes computationally intractable when the mesh resolution increases. The reliance on the ability of High-Performance Computers (HPC) to scale up and meet these requirements is myopic; such very high-fidelity simulations require a paradigm shift in computing. This paper presents an exploration of quantum methodologies aimed at achieving high accuracy in solving such a large system of equations.
  Leveraging recent works in Quantum Linear Solver Algorithms (QLSA) and variational algorithms suitable for Quantum Simulation in HPC, we aspire to push the boundaries of CFD-relevant problems that can be solved on hybrid quantum-classical framework. To this end, we consider the 2D, transient, incompressible, viscous, non-linear coupled Burgers equation as a test problem and investigate the accuracy of our approach by comparing results with a classical linear system of equation solvers, such as the Generalized Minimal RESidual method (GMRES). Through rigorous testing, our findings demonstrate that our quantum methods yield results comparable in accuracy to traditional approaches. Additionally, we demonstrate the accuracy, scalability, and consistency of our quantum method. Lastly, we present an insightful estimation of the resources our quantum algorithm needs to solve systems with nearly 2 billion mesh points.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用量子算法（QLSA和变分量子算法）在混合量子-经典框架下求解CFD中的大规模线性方程组，以二维瞬态不可压缩粘性耦合Burgers方程为测试问题，验证了与传统GMRES方法相当的精度，并展示了算法在近20亿网格点规模下的资源需求估算。
AI.motivation: 传统CFD中，高保真数值模拟求解非线性PDE会生成大规模线性方程组，随着网格分辨率增加，计算复杂度急剧上升，依赖HPC扩展存在局限性，需要计算范式的根本转变。
AI.method: 利用量子线性求解算法（QLSA）和适用于HPC量子模拟的变分算法，在混合量子-经典框架下求解CFD问题。以二维瞬态不可压缩粘性非线性耦合Burgers方程为测试案例，与经典GMRES求解器进行精度对比。
AI.result: 量子方法与经典方法在精度上相当；展示了所提方法的精度、可扩展性和一致性；估算了求解近20亿网格点规模系统所需的量子资源。
AI.conclusion: 量子方法能够在混合量子-经典框架下以与传统方法相当的精度求解CFD相关的大规模线性系统，并具有扩展到极高分辨率（近20亿网格点）的潜力，为高保真CFD模拟提供了新的范式。

title: Benchmark: Tao's symplectic integration method
summary: A benchmark test was conducted for a new symplectic integration method originally developed by Molei Tao. The method raises interest due to its explicit evolution equation, with applicability to both separable and non-separable Hamiltonian systems, and an easy-to-implement, easily generalizable algorithm. In order to compare the method with other, more well-known methods, namely Störmer-Verlet and Runge-Kutta, we conducted a series of benchmark tests comparing their performance in terms of CPU time, system invariants functions conservation, and numerical symplectic area conservation. Overall, it was found that despite being slower than the more optimized Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp, Tao's method presents a similar performance to Störmer-Verlet, with the extra perk of being more generic and not requiring the use of implicit equations for the evolution of the equations of motion.

AI.tldr: 本文对Molei Tao提出的新辛积分方法进行了基准测试，与Störmer-Verlet和Runge-Kutta方法在CPU时间、系统不变量函数守恒和数值辛面积守恒方面进行了比较。结果表明，Tao方法虽比优化的Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp慢，但性能与Störmer-Verlet相当，且更具通用性，无需隐式方程即可演化运动方程。
AI.motivation: Tao提出的新辛积分方法具有显式演化方程、适用于可分离和不可分离哈密顿系统、算法易于实现和推广等吸引人的特性，有必要通过基准测试将其与更成熟的方法进行系统比较，以评估其实际性能。
AI.method: 通过一系列基准测试，从CPU时间、系统不变量函数守恒和数值辛面积守恒三个维度，将Tao方法与Störmer-Verlet方法和Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp方法进行性能对比。
AI.result: Tao方法在速度上慢于经过优化的Runge-Kutta-Cash-Karp方法，但与Störmer-Verlet方法性能相近；Tao方法的一个显著优势是更具通用性，且不需要使用隐式方程来演化运动方程。
AI.conclusion: Tao的新辛积分方法在性能上与Störmer-Verlet相当，同时具备更好的通用性和实现简便性，是处理哈密顿系统（尤其是不可分离情况）的一个有前景的替代方案。

title: GSIS-ALE for moving boundary problems in rarefied gas flows
summary: Multiscale rarefied gas flows with moving boundaries pose significant challenges to the numerical simulation, where the primary difficulties involve robustly managing the mesh movement and ensuring computational efficiency across all flow regimes. Build upon recent advancements of the general synthetic iterative scheme (GSIS), this paper presents an efficient solver to simulate the large displacement of rigid-body in rarefied gas flows. The newly developed solver utilizes a dual time step method to solve the mesoscopic kinetic and macroscopic synthetic equations alternately, in an arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian framework. Additionally, the overset mesh is used and the six degree-of-freedom rigid body dynamics equation is integrated to track the motion of solids. Four moving boundary problems encompassing a wide range of flow velocities and gas rarefaction are simulated, including the periodic pitching of airfoil, particle motion in lid-driven cavity flow, two-body separation in supersonic flow, and three-dimensional lunar landing, demonstrating the accuracy and efficiency of the GSIS in handling multi-scale moving boundary problems within an overset framework.

AI.tldr: 本文基于广义合成迭代格式（GSIS），结合双时间步法、任意拉格朗日-欧拉框架和重叠网格技术，开发了一种高效求解多尺度稀薄气体中刚体大位移运动的数值求解器，并通过俯仰翼型、颗粒运动、两体分离和三维月球着陆等算例验证了其精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 多尺度稀薄气体中移动边界问题的数值模拟面临网格运动鲁棒性差和全流域计算效率低下的双重挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率。
AI.method: 基于GSIS框架，采用双时间步法交替求解介观动理学方程与宏观合成方程；在任意拉格朗日-欧拉（ALE）框架下使用重叠网格处理大变形；耦合六自由度刚体动力学方程追踪固体运动。
AI.result: 成功模拟了周期性翼型俯仰、空腔驱动流中颗粒运动、超声速两体分离以及三维月球着陆四个典型算例，覆盖不同速度和稀薄程度范围，验证了方法的准确性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: GSIS结合重叠网格框架能高效、鲁棒地处理多尺度稀薄气体中的移动边界问题，为复杂工程应用（如高超声速飞行器分离、月球着陆等）提供了可靠的数值工具。

title: On the generalization ability of coarse-grained molecular dynamics models for non-equilibrium processes
summary: One essential goal of constructing coarse-grained molecular dynamics (CGMD) models is to accurately predict non-equilibrium processes beyond the atomistic scale. While a CG model can be constructed by projecting the full dynamics onto a set of resolved variables, the dynamics of the CG variables can recover the full dynamics only when the conditional distribution of the unresolved variables is close to the one associated with the particular projection operator. In particular, the model's applicability to various non-equilibrium processes is generally unwarranted due to the inconsistency in the conditional distribution. Here, we present a data-driven approach for constructing CGMD models that retain certain generalization ability for non-equilibrium processes. Unlike the conventional CG models based on pre-selected CG variables (e.g., the center of mass), the present CG model seeks a set of auxiliary CG variables based on the time-lagged independent component analysis to minimize the entropy contribution of the unresolved variables. This ensures the distribution of the unresolved variables under a broad range of non-equilibrium conditions approaches the one under equilibrium. Numerical results of a polymer melt system demonstrate the significance of this broadly-overlooked metric for the model's generalization ability, and the effectiveness of the present CG model for predicting the complex viscoelastic responses under various non-equilibrium flows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的粗粒度分子动力学建模方法，通过时间滞后独立成分分析选取辅助粗粒度变量以最小化未解析变量的熵贡献，从而确保非平衡条件下未解析变量的条件分布接近平衡态分布，提升模型对非平衡过程的泛化能力。聚合物熔体系统的数值结果验证了该方法在预测复杂粘弹性响应方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统粗粒度分子动力学模型基于预选粗粒度变量（如质心）构建，其未解析变量的条件分布在非平衡过程中与平衡态不一致，导致模型对各类非平衡过程的适用性缺乏保障。现有方法普遍忽视这一度量指标对模型泛化能力的影响，因此需要一种能提升非平衡过程预测能力的建模方法。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动方法，基于时间滞后独立成分分析（TICA）选取一组辅助粗粒度变量，通过最小化未解析变量的熵贡献，使得在广泛非平衡条件下未解析变量的条件分布趋近于平衡态下的分布。该方法区别于传统基于预选变量的CG建模策略。
AI.result: 在聚合物熔体系统中，该方法显著提升了模型对非平衡过程的泛化能力，能够有效预测各种非平衡流动下的复杂粘弹性响应，验证了未解析变量条件分布一致性这一广泛被忽视的度量指标的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据驱动CGMD建模方法通过优化粗粒度变量选择来保证未解析变量的条件分布一致性，赋予模型对非平衡过程一定的泛化能力，为构建更可靠的跨尺度非平衡模拟方法提供了新途径。

title: Time-cost-error trade-off relation in thermodynamics: The third law and beyond
summary: Elucidating fundamental limitations inherent in physical systems is a central subject in physics. For important thermodynamic operations such as information erasure, cooling, and copying, resources like time and energetic cost must be expended to achieve the desired outcome within a predetermined error margin. In the context of cooling, the unattainability principle of the third law of thermodynamics asserts that infinite "resources" are needed to reach absolute zero. However, the precise identification of relevant resources and how they jointly constrain achievable error remains unclear within the frameworks of stochastic and quantum thermodynamics. In this work, we introduce the concept of separated states, which consist of fully unoccupied and occupied states, and formulate the corresponding thermokinetic cost and error, thereby establishing a unifying framework for a broad class of thermodynamic operations. We then uncover a three-way trade-off relation between time, cost, and error for thermodynamic operations aimed at creating separated states, simply expressed as $τ\mathcal{C}\varepsilon_τ\ge 1-η$. This fundamental relation is applicable to diverse thermodynamic operations, including information erasure, cooling, and copying. It provides a profound quantification of the unattainability principle in the third law of thermodynamics in a general form. Building upon this relation, we explore the quantitative limitations governing cooling operations, the preparation of separated states, and a no-go theorem for exact classical copying. Furthermore, we extend these findings to the quantum regime, encompassing both Markovian and non-Markovian dynamics. Specifically, within Lindblad dynamics, we derive a similar three-way trade-off relation that quantifies the cost of achieving a pure state with a given error.

AI.tldr: 本文引入“分离态”概念，建立了热力学操作（擦除、冷却、复制）的统一框架，揭示了一个时间、成本与误差的三方权衡关系 τ·C·ετ ≥ 1-η，该关系量化了热力学第三定律中绝对零度不可达原理，并推广到量子马尔可夫与非马尔可夫动力学。
AI.motivation: 在随机和量子热力学框架下，冷却等热力学操作中资源（时间、能量成本）如何共同约束可达误差尚不明确，第三定律中绝对零度不可达原理所需的精确资源识别未被清晰刻画。
AI.method: 引入由完全未占据和完全占据态构成的“分离态”概念，构建相应的热动力学成本与误差统一框架，推导时间、成本与误差的三方权衡关系，并将该关系推广到量子Lindblad动力学及非马尔可夫情形。
AI.result: 得到了普适的三方权衡关系 τ·C·ετ ≥ 1-η，适用于信息擦除、冷却和复制等热力学操作；该关系量化了第三定律中绝对零度不可达原理；在量子Lindblad动力学下得到类似的纯态制备成本与误差的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为热力学操作中的资源权衡提供了统一量化框架，深化了对热力学第三定律的理解，并揭示了冷却操作、分离态制备及经典精确复制不可行定理的定量限制。

title: Absorbing state transitions with long-range annihilation
summary: We introduce a family of classical stochastic processes describing diffusive particles undergoing branching and long-range annihilation in the presence of a parity constraint. The probability for a pair-annihilation event decays as a power-law in the distance between particles, with a tunable exponent. Such long-range processes arise naturally in various classical settings, such as chemical reactions involving reagents with long-range electromagnetic interactions. They also increasingly play a role in the study of quantum dynamics, in which certain quantum protocols can be mapped to classical stochastic processes with long-range interactions: for example, state preparation or error correction processes aim to prepare ordered ground states, which requires removing point-like excitations in pairs via non-local feedback operations conditioned on a global set of measurement outcomes. We analytically and numerically describe features of absorbing phases and phase transitions in this family of classical models as pairwise annihilation is performed at larger and larger distances. Notably, we find that the two canonical absorbing-state universality classes -- directed-percolation and parity-conserving -- are endpoints of a line of universality classes with continuously interpolating critical exponents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类具有长程湮灭和宇称约束的扩散分支粒子系统，发现其吸收态相变的临界指数可连续变化，而定向渗流和宇称守恒两个标准普适类构成了该连续谱的端点。
AI.motivation: 长程湮灭过程自然出现在经典化学反应（如带电试剂间的电磁相互作用）和量子动力学（如基于非局域反馈的态制备与纠错）中，但这类过程的相变行为，尤其是宇称约束下的临界现象，尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 引入一族具有可调幂律指数的长程对湮灭概率的经典随机过程，结合解析分析和数值模拟，研究不同湮灭距离下吸收态及相变行为。
AI.result: 发现当对湮灭作用距离增大时，临界指数连续变化；定向渗流（DP）和宇称守恒（PC）两个标准吸收态普适类分别成为该连续谱的两个端点。
AI.conclusion: 长程相互作用扩展了吸收态相变的普适类图景，揭示了从DP到PC的连续过渡，对理解经典反应扩散系统及量子协议中的非局域反馈过程具有重要启示。

title: Inference with the Upper Confidence Bound Algorithm
summary: In this paper, we discuss the asymptotic behavior of the Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm in the context of multiarmed bandit problems and discuss its implication in downstream inferential tasks. While inferential tasks become challenging when data is collected in a sequential manner, we argue that this problem can be alleviated when the sequential algorithm at hand satisfies certain stability property. This notion of stability is motivated from the seminal work of Lai and Wei (1982). Our first main result shows that such a stability property is always satisfied for the UCB algorithm, and as a result the sample means for each arm are asymptotically normal. Next, we examine the stability properties of the UCB algorithm when the number of arms $K$ is allowed to grow with the number of arm pulls $T$. We show that in such a case the arms are stable when $\frac{\log K}{\log T} \rightarrow 0$, and the number of near-optimal arms are large.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多臂老虎机问题中UCB算法的渐近行为及其在下游推断任务中的意义。证明了UCB算法满足稳定性性质，使得各臂样本均值渐近正态；当臂数K随拉动次数T增长时，在logK/logT→0且近优臂数量多的条件下，臂仍保持稳定。
AI.motivation: 序列数据收集方式使得推断任务变得困难，作者希望探究是否可以通过算法的稳定性性质来缓解这一问题，从而为基于UCB算法收集的数据进行有效统计推断提供理论基础。
AI.method: 基于Lai和Wei（1982）的稳定性概念，分析UCB算法的稳定性性质。分别考虑固定臂数场景和臂数K随拉动次数T增长的高维场景，推导稳定性条件及样本均值的渐近分布。
AI.result: 固定臂数下UCB算法始终满足稳定性性质，各臂样本均值渐近正态。当K随T增长时，若logK/logT→0且近优臂数量足够多，算法仍保持稳定性。
AI.conclusion: UCB算法具有良好稳定性，可用于支持基于其收集数据的统计推断；高维场景下的稳定条件为logK/logT→0且近优臂数量足够大。

title: Stochastic Gradient Descent for Two-layer Neural Networks
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive study on the convergence rates of the stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm when applied to overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Our approach combines the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) approximation with convergence analysis in the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) generated by NTK, aiming to provide a deep understanding of the convergence behavior of SGD in overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Our research framework enables us to explore the intricate interplay between kernel methods and optimization processes, shedding light on the optimization dynamics and convergence properties of neural networks. In this study, we establish sharp convergence rates for the last iterate of the SGD algorithm in overparameterized two-layer neural networks. Additionally, we have made significant advancements in relaxing the constraints on the number of neurons, which have been reduced from exponential dependence to polynomial dependence on the sample size or number of iterations. This improvement allows for more flexibility in the design and scaling of neural networks, and will deepen our theoretical understanding of neural network models trained with SGD.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了过参数化两层神经网络中随机梯度下降（SGD）算法的收敛速率，利用神经正切核（NTK）近似及再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中的收敛分析，建立了SGD最后一次迭代的精确收敛速率，并将神经元数量的约束从指数依赖显著降低为多项式依赖。
AI.motivation: 深入理解过参数化两层神经网络中SGD的收敛行为，特别是通过NTK框架揭示核方法与优化过程之间的相互作用，并从理论上放松对神经元数量的严格约束。
AI.method: 结合NTK近似与NTK生成的RKHS中的收敛分析，构建研究框架以探索核方法与优化过程的相互作用，分析SGD在过参数化两层神经网络中的收敛行为。
AI.result: 建立了SGD算法最后一次迭代的精确收敛速率；将神经元数量的约束从指数依赖降低为多项式依赖（相对于样本量或迭代次数）。
AI.conclusion: 这些进展为神经网络模型的设计和扩展提供了更大的灵活性，加深了对使用SGD训练的神经网络模型的理论理解。

title: Half-VAE: An Encoder-Free VAE to Bypass Explicit Inverse Mapping
summary: Inference and inverse problems are closely related concepts, both fundamentally involving the deduction of unknown causes or parameters from observed data. Bayesian inference, a powerful class of methods, is often employed to solve a variety of problems, including those related to causal inference. Variational inference, a subset of Bayesian inference, is primarily used to efficiently approximate complex posterior distributions. Variational Autoencoders (VAEs), which combine variational inference with deep learning, have become widely applied across various domains. This study explores the potential of VAEs for solving inverse problems, such as Independent Component Analysis (ICA), without relying on an explicit inverse mapping process. Unlike other VAE-based ICA methods, this approach discards the encoder in the VAE architecture, directly setting the latent variables as trainable parameters. In other words, the latent variables are no longer outputs of the encoder but are instead optimized directly through the objective function to converge to appropriate values. We find that, with a suitable prior setup, the latent variables, represented by trainable parameters, can exhibit mutually independent properties as the parameters converge, all without the need for an encoding process. This approach, referred to as the Half-VAE, bypasses the inverse mapping process by eliminating the encoder. This study demonstrates the feasibility of using the Half-VAE to solve ICA without the need for an explicit inverse mapping process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Half-VAE方法，通过舍弃编码器、将潜变量设为可训练参数直接优化，在不依赖显式逆映射过程的情况下解决独立成分分析（ICA）等逆问题。
AI.motivation: 探索变分自编码器（VAE）在不使用显式逆映射过程的前提下解决逆问题的潜力，特别是独立成分分析（ICA）问题。
AI.method: 移除传统VAE中的编码器，将潜变量直接设为可训练参数，通过目标函数直接优化使其收敛到合适的值，配合适当的先验设定实现潜变量间的相互独立。
AI.result: 在适当的先验设置下，作为可训练参数的潜变量在收敛后能够展现出相互独立的性质，无需编码过程即可实现ICA。
AI.conclusion: Half-VAE方法证明了在不依赖显式逆映射过程的情况下，利用VAE解决ICA问题是可行的。

title: Investigation of injector-coupled combustion dynamics in a methane-oxygen combustor using large eddy simulation and dynamic mode decomposition
summary: This paper uses a reactive flow large eddy simulation (LES) and decomposition techniques to study combustion instabilities in a methane-oxygen combustor. This work examines two case scenarios to elucidate the significance of injector-chamber frequency coupling as the cause of thermo-acoustic instability. Initial investigation in a well-known benchmark case of the continuously variable resonance combustor (CVRC) reports the potential instability mechanisms and the role of injector-chamber frequency coupling in thermo-acoustic instability. Subsequently, the multi-element rocket combustor case study identifies the critical resonant modes and highlights potential frequency coupling between the injector and the chamber region. The interplay between longitudinal pressure oscillations in the oxidizer post and transverse pressure waves in the chamber is responsible for the enhanced pressure dynamics in the combustor. The present work uses the dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) technique to reveal the evolution of acoustic modes in injector and chamber for CVRC and multi-element combustor. The dominant pressure mode forms found by DMD analysis also showcase the role of injector-chamber frequency coupling in amplified combustion dynamics. The results demonstrate how the predominant cause of combustion instability in rocket combustors can be effectively determined using the high-fidelity LES framework in conjunction with the modal decomposition technique.

AI.tldr: 本文利用反应流大涡模拟（LES）和模态分解技术（DMD）研究甲烷-氧气燃烧室中的燃烧不稳定性，重点分析了喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合对热声不稳定性的驱动作用，并在CVRC和多单元火箭燃烧器两个案例中验证了该方法识别主导模态和耦合机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 阐明喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合作为热声不稳定性成因的重要性，并提出一种结合高保真LES与模态分解技术来有效判定火箭燃烧器中燃烧不稳定性主导原因的方法。
AI.method: 采用反应流大涡模拟（LES）对两个案例（CVRC基准案例和多单元火箭燃烧器）进行数值模拟，并运用动态模态分解（DMD）技术揭示喷注器和燃烧室中声学模态的演化过程，分析纵向/横向压力波动之间的相互作用。
AI.result: 识别出关键共振模态，发现氧化剂柱中的纵向压力振荡与燃烧室中的横向压力波之间的耦合是增强压力动力学的主要原因；DMD分析揭示了主导压力模态形式，证实了喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合在放大燃烧动力学中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 高保真LES框架结合模态分解技术能够有效判定火箭燃烧器中燃烧不稳定性的主导原因，即喷注器-燃烧室频率耦合是诱发热声不稳定的核心机制。

title: Identification of a Spatially-Dependent Variable Order in One-Dimensional Subdiffusion
comment: 26 pages, to appear at SIAM Journal on Mathematical Analysis
summary: In this work we investigate an inverse problem of identifying a spatially variable order in the one-dimensional subdiffusion model from the boundary flux measurement. The model involves a generalized Caputo derivative in time, and arises in the mathematical modeling of anomalous diffusion in heterogeneous media. We prove the unique recovery of a monotone piecewise constant variable order and its range for known and unknown media, respectively. The analysis is based on a delicate asymptotic expansion of the Laplace transform of the data as $p\to0$, which is of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维次扩散模型中空间变阶参数的逆问题，通过边界通量测量识别可变阶数，证明了单调分段常值变阶函数及其范围的唯一恢复性，分析基于拉普拉斯变换在p→0时的渐近展开。
AI.motivation: 异质介质中的反常扩散现象建模需要更准确的变阶次扩散模型，而如何从可观测的边界数据中唯一确定空间可变阶数是一个具有挑战性的逆问题，目前缺乏系统的理论保证。
AI.method: 利用拉普拉斯变换在p→0时的精细渐近展开，分析边界通量测量数据的渐近行为，分别针对介质参数已知和未知两种情况，证明单调分段常值变阶函数的唯一可识别性。
AI.result: 在介质参数已知和未知两种情形下，均证明了单调分段常值空间变阶函数及其取值范围的唯一恢复性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为变阶次扩散模型的参数识别提供了严格的数学理论基础，所发展的拉普拉斯渐近分析方法具有独立的应用价值，可用于其他相关逆问题。

title: Siegel operators for holomorphic differential forms
summary: We give a geometric interpretation of the Siegel operators for holomorphic differential forms on Siegel modular varieties. This involves extension of the differential forms over a toroidal compactification, and we show that the Siegel operator essentially describes the restriction and descent to the boundary Kuga variety via holomorphic Leray filtration. As a consequence, we obtain equivalence of various notions of "vanishing at boundary'' for holomorphic forms. We also study the case of orthogonal modular varieties.

AI.tldr: 本文给出了Siegel模簇上全纯微分形式的Siegel算子的几何解释，通过环面紧化上的微分形式延拓，证明了Siegel算子本质上描述了通过全纯Leray滤过到边界Kuga簇的限制与下降，并由此建立了全纯形式多种“边界消失”概念的等价性，同时讨论了正交模簇的情形。
AI.motivation: 为Siegel算子提供严格的几何解释，建立全纯微分形式在边界处消失的各种定义之间的等价关系。
AI.method: 利用环面紧化延拓微分形式，结合全纯Leray滤过分析边界Kuga簇上的限制与下降。
AI.result: 证明了Siegel算子描述边界Kuga簇上的限制与下降；建立了全纯形式多种“边界消失”概念的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 给出了Siegel算子的几何本质，并推广到正交模簇情形。

title: Root data in character varieties
summary: Given $G$ an algebraic reductive group over an algebraically closed field of characteristic zero and $Γ$ a finitely generated group, we provide a stratification of the $G$-character variety of $Γ$ in terms of conjugacy classes of parabolic subgroups of $G$. Each stratum has the structure of a pseudo-quotient, which is a relaxed GIT notion capturing the topology of the quotient and, therefore, behaving well for motivic computations of invariants of the character varieties. These stratifications are constructed by analyzing the root datum of $G$ to encode parabolic classes. Finally, detailed and explicit motivic formulae are provided for cases with Dynkin diagram of types $A$, $B$, $C$ and $D$.

AI.tldr: 本文对代数重域群G在有限生成群Γ上的特征簇进行分层，该分层基于G的抛物子群的共轭类，每个分层具有伪商结构，并给出了A、B、C、D型Dynkin图情况下的显式动机公式。
AI.motivation: 为了系统研究特征簇的不变量，需要一种既能反映拓扑结构又适用于动机计算的分层方法。现有方法在一般代数重域群情形下缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 通过分析G的根数据来编码抛物类，基于抛物子群的共轭类构建分层；利用伪商这一松弛的GIT概念刻画每层的拓扑结构，使其适用于动机计算；针对A、B、C、D型Dynkin图给出详细公式。
AI.result: 成功构建了G-特征簇的抛物分层结构，每层具有伪商结构；在A、B、C、D型Dynkin图情形下获得了显式的动机计算公式。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的抛物分层方法为特征簇的动机不变量计算提供了统一有效的框架，特别对于经典李群类型得到了闭合表达式。

title: The Klein-Gordon equation on asymptotically Minkowski spacetimes: causal propagators
summary:
We construct the causal (forward/backward) propagators for the massive Klein-Gordon equation perturbed by a first order operator which decays in space but not necessarily in time. In particular, we obtain global estimates for forward/backward solutions to the inhomogeneous, perturbed Klein-Gordon equation, including in the presence of bound states of the limiting spatial Hamiltonians.
  To this end, we prove propagation of singularities estimates in all regions of infinity (spatial, null, and causal) and use the estimates to prove that the Klein-Gordon operator is an invertible mapping between adapted weighted Sobolev spaces. This builds off work of Vasy in which inverses of hyperbolic PDEs are obtained via construction of a Fredholm mapping problem using radial points propagation estimates. To deal with the presence of a perturbation which persists in time, we employ a class of pseudodifferential operators first explored in Vasy's many-body work.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了受一阶算子扰动的大规模Klein-Gordon方程的因果传播子（正向/反向），该扰动在空间上衰减但不一定在时间上衰减。通过证明所有无穷远区域（空间、零、因果）的奇性传播估计，并利用这些估计证明Klein-Gordon算子在适应的加权Sobolev空间之间是可逆映射，从而得到了非齐次扰动Klein-Gordon方程正向/反向解的全局估计，包括在存在极限空间哈密顿量束缚态的情况下。该工作基于Vasy通过径向点传播估计构造Fredholm映射问题来获得双曲PDE逆的方法，并采用了Vasy多体工作中首次探索的一类伪微分算子来处理随时间持续的扰动。
AI.motivation: 构建受一阶算子扰动的大规模Klein-Gordon方程的因果传播子，该扰动在空间上衰减但时间上不衰减，并处理存在束缚态的情况。
AI.method: 证明所有无穷远区域（空间、零、因果）的奇性传播估计，利用这些估计证明Klein-Gordon算子在适应的加权Sobolev空间之间的可逆性，采用Vasy的径向点传播估计方法构建Fredholm映射问题，并应用Vasy多体工作中发展的伪微分算子类处理时间上持续的扰动。
AI.result: 获得了非齐次扰动Klein-Gordon方程正向/反向解的全局估计，包括在存在极限空间哈密顿量束缚态的情况下。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了受时间持续扰动的大规模Klein-Gordon方程的因果传播子，并建立了全局估计。

title: Global solvability for a class of pseudodifferential operators on the torus
summary: We give a complete characterization for the global solvability of a pseudodifferential operator P=D_t + c(t,D_x) on the (N+1)-dimensional torus T^{N+1} = S^1_t x T^N_x. Our characterization is given in terms of diophantine conditions and a notion of super-logarithmic oscilation of the symbol of the imaginary part of c(t,D_x).

AI.tldr: 本文给出了(N+1)维环面T^{N+1}=S^1_t×T^N_x上伪微分算子P=D_t+c(t,D_x)全局可解性的完整刻画，该刻画基于丢番图条件和符号超对数振荡概念。
AI.motivation: 对伪微分算子全局可解性进行完整刻画，特别是针对环面上的非自伴算子，填补该领域在一般性刻画上的空白。
AI.method: 利用丢番图条件（数论性质）和超对数振荡（符号虚部振荡性）两个关键概念，建立算子全局可解性的充要条件。
AI.result: 得到了一个完整的特征化描述，将算子的可解性归结为丢番图条件是否满足以及符号虚部是否具有超对数振荡行为。
AI.conclusion: 该工作完整回答了(N+1)维环面上该类伪微分算子的全局可解性问题，为相关领域提供了理论依据。

title: Generalized Campana points and adelic approximation on toric varieties
comment: 70 pages; Corollary 4.21 added, minor other changes
summary: We introduce a general framework for studying special subsets of rational points on an algebraic variety, termed $\mathcal{M}$-points. The notion of $\mathcal{M}$-points generalizes the concepts of integral points, Campana points and Darmon points. We introduce and study $M$-approximation over number fields and function fields, which is a notion that generalizes weak and strong approximation. We show that this property implies that the set of $\mathcal{M}$-points is not thin. We then give a simple characterisation of when a split toric variety satisfies $M$-approximation, generalizing work of Nakahara and Streeter. Further, we determine when the set of $\mathcal{M}$-points on a split toric variety is thin.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了M-点的概念，统一了整点、Campana点和Darmon点等有理点特殊子集的研究框架，并在数域和函数域上定义了M-逼近性质（推广了弱逼近和强逼近），证明了该性质蕴含M-点集非稀疏，给出了分裂环面簇满足M-逼近的简单刻画，并确定了其上M-点集何时稀疏。
AI.motivation: 为研究代数簇上有理点的各种特殊子集（整点、Campana点、Darmon点）建立一个统一的框架，并推广逼近性质（弱逼近和强逼近）的概念。
AI.method: 引入M-点的一般框架，定义M-逼近性质，利用该性质研究点集的稀疏性，并在分裂环面簇上给出M-逼近成立的简单刻画条件。
AI.result: 证明了M-逼近性质蕴含M-点集非稀疏；给出了分裂环面簇满足M-逼近的简单刻画；确定了分裂环面簇上M-点集稀疏性的充要条件。
AI.conclusion: M-点框架统一了多种重要有理点子集的概念，M-逼近性质是弱/强逼近的自然推广，并在分裂环面簇上得到了完整的刻画。

title: On the Complexity of Learning to Cooperate with Populations of Socially Rational Agents
summary: Artificially intelligent agents deployed in the real-world will require the ability to reliably \textit{cooperate} with humans (as well as other, heterogeneous AI agents). To provide formal guarantees of successful cooperation, we must make some assumptions about how partner agents could plausibly behave. Any realistic set of assumptions must account for the fact that other agents may be just as adaptable as our agent is. In this work, we consider the problem of cooperating with a \textit{population} of agents in a finitely-repeated, two player general-sum matrix game with private utilities. Two natural assumptions in such settings are that: 1) all agents in the population are individually rational learners, and 2) when any two members of the population are paired together, with high-probability they will achieve at least the same utility as they would under some Pareto efficient equilibrium strategy. Our results first show that these assumptions alone are insufficient to ensure \textit{zero-shot} cooperation with members of the target population. We therefore consider the problem of \textit{learning} a strategy for cooperating with such a population using prior observations its members interacting with one another. We provide upper and lower bounds on the number of samples needed to learn an effective cooperation strategy. Most importantly, we show that these bounds can be much stronger than those arising from a "naive'' reduction of the problem to one of imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限重复双人一般和矩阵博弈中与异构智能体群体实现零样本合作的问题。研究发现仅靠个体理性学习和帕累托有效均衡策略的假设不足以保证零样本合作，需要从群体互动历史中学习合作策略，并给出了样本复杂度的上界和下界，证明其优于简单模仿学习。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的AI代理需要与人类及其他异构AI代理进行可靠合作，为此需要形式化保证成功合作的条件。现有假设（个体理性学习和帕累托有效均衡）不足以确保零样本合作，因此需要研究如何从群体互动数据中学习有效的合作策略。
AI.method: 在有限重复双人一般和矩阵博弈（私有效用）框架下，考虑一个由个体理性学习者组成的群体，假设任意两成员配对时能以高概率达到至少与某帕累托有效均衡策略相同的效用。首先证明这些假设不足以实现零样本合作，然后研究从群体成员间历史互动中学习合作策略的问题，并给出样本复杂度的信息论上下界。
AI.result: 1) 仅有个体理性学习和帕累托有效均衡假设不足以确保零样本合作。2) 从群体互动数据中学习合作策略是可行的。3) 给出了学习有效合作策略所需样本数量的上界和下界。4) 这些界显著优于将问题朴素地归约为模仿学习所得到的界。
AI.conclusion: 要实现与异构智能体群体的可靠合作，不能仅依赖个体理性等假设，而需要从群体互动数据中学习。本文为这一学习问题提供了理论基础，证明了其样本效率远高于简单的模仿学习，为构建能在现实世界中与人和其他AI系统可靠合作的智能体提供了理论指导。

title: Hilbert curves for efficient exploratory landscape analysis neighbourhood sampling
comment: A version of this paper is published as conference proceedings of EvoApps 2024
summary: Landscape analysis aims to characterise optimisation problems based on their objective (or fitness) function landscape properties. The problem search space is typically sampled, and various landscape features are estimated based on the samples. One particularly salient set of features is information content, which requires the samples to be sequences of neighbouring solutions, such that the local relationships between consecutive sample points are preserved. Generating such spatially correlated samples that also provide good search space coverage is challenging. It is therefore common to first obtain an unordered sample with good search space coverage, and then apply an ordering algorithm such as the nearest neighbour to minimise the distance between consecutive points in the sample. However, the nearest neighbour algorithm becomes computationally prohibitive in higher dimensions, thus there is a need for more efficient alternatives. In this study, Hilbert space-filling curves are proposed as a method to efficiently obtain high-quality ordered samples. Hilbert curves are a special case of fractal curves, and guarantee uniform coverage of a bounded search space while providing a spatially correlated sample. We study the effectiveness of Hilbert curves as samplers, and discover that they are capable of extracting salient features at a fraction of the computational cost compared to Latin hypercube sampling with post-factum ordering. Further, we investigate the use of Hilbert curves as an ordering strategy, and find that they order the sample significantly faster than the nearest neighbour ordering, without sacrificing the saliency of the extracted features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用希尔伯特空间填充曲线作为替代方法，高效获取具有空间相关性的有序样本，用于景观分析中的信息内容特征提取，相比拉丁超立方采样加最近邻排序的方法，在保持特征显著性的同时大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 景观分析中估计信息内容特征需要空间相关的有序样本序列，但现有方法（如先获得无序样本再用最近邻排序）在高维空间中计算开销巨大，亟需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用希尔伯特空间填充曲线（一种分形曲线）作为采样器和排序策略：作为采样器可直接生成均匀覆盖搜索空间且空间相关的有序样本；作为排序策略可对已有无序样本进行快速排序，与最近邻排序进行比较。
AI.result: 希尔伯特曲线作为采样器能以远低于拉丁超立方采样加事后排序的计算成本提取显著特征；作为排序策略比最近邻排序显著更快，且不牺牲提取特征的显著性。
AI.conclusion: 希尔伯特空间填充曲线是一种高效且有效的样本获取和排序方法，适用于高维优化问题的景观分析，可替代计算昂贵的最近邻排序方法。

title: Symmetric Gauss-Seidel Method with a Preconditioned Fixed-Point Iteration for the Steady-State Boltzmann equation
summary: We introduce a numerical solver for the steady-state Boltzmann equation based on the symmetric Gauss-Seidel (SGS) method. To solve the nonlinear system on each grid cell derived from the SGS method, a fixed-point iteration preconditioned with its asymptotic limit is developed. The preconditioner only requires solving an algebraic system which is easy to implement and can speed up the convergence significantly especially in the case of small Knudsen numbers. Additionally, we couple our numerical scheme with the multigrid method to accelerate convergence. A variety of numerical experiments are carried out to illustrate the effectiveness of these methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对称高斯-赛德尔(SGS)方法的稳态玻尔兹曼方程数值求解器。针对SGS方法导出的每个网格单元上的非线性系统，开发了以其渐近极限为预条件子的不动点迭代方法。该预条件子仅需求解一个代数系统，易于实现，并能显著加速收敛，尤其是在小Knudsen数情况下。此外，将数值格式与多重网格方法耦合以进一步加速收敛。数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 稳态玻尔兹曼方程的数值求解面临非线性强且在小Knudsen数（近连续区）时收敛缓慢的挑战。现有方法在效率上存在不足，需要开发一种既能处理非线性又能加速收敛的稳健数值格式。
AI.method: 采用对称高斯-赛德尔(SGS)方法离散稳态玻尔兹曼方程；对每个网格单元的非线性系统，采用以渐近极限为预条件子的不动点迭代求解；将所提格式与多重网格方法耦合以加速整体收敛。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的渐近预条件子能显著加速收敛，特别是在小Knudsen数（近连续区）效果尤为突出；与多重网格耦合后进一步提升了求解效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的SGS方法结合渐近预条件子与多重网格加速，是一种高效、鲁棒的稳态玻尔兹曼方程数值求解框架，特别适用于近连续流动区域的求解。

title: Risk and cross validation in ridge regression with correlated samples
comment: 50 pages, 19 figures. v4: ICML 2025 camera-ready. v5: Fix typo in statement of Theorem 5. v6: typos corrected, to appear in 2026 JSTAT Machine Learning focus collection
summary: Recent years have seen substantial advances in our understanding of high-dimensional ridge regression, but existing theories assume that training examples are independent. By leveraging techniques from random matrix theory and free probability, we provide sharp asymptotics for the in- and out-of-sample risks of ridge regression when the data points have arbitrary correlations. We demonstrate that in this setting, the generalized cross validation estimator (GCV) fails to correctly predict the out-of-sample risk. However, in the case where the noise residuals have the same correlations as the data points, one can modify the GCV to yield an efficiently-computable unbiased estimator that concentrates in the high-dimensional limit, which we dub CorrGCV. We further extend our asymptotic analysis to the case where the test point has nontrivial correlations with the training set, a setting often encountered in time series forecasting. Assuming knowledge of the correlation structure of the time series, this again yields an extension of the GCV estimator, and sharply characterizes the degree to which such test points yield an overly optimistic prediction of long-time risk. We validate the predictions of our theory across a variety of high dimensional data.

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机矩阵理论和自由概率技术，为数据点具有任意相关性的高维岭回归提供了精确的渐进分析，揭示了广义交叉验证(GCV)在此情况下的失效，并提出了修正的无偏估计量CorrGCV，同时将分析扩展至训练集与测试点存在相关性的时序预测场景。
AI.motivation: 现有高维岭回归理论假设训练样本独立，但实际应用中数据点往往存在任意相关性（如时间序列、空间数据等），缺乏对此类情况的精确理论刻画。
AI.method: 利用随机矩阵理论和自由概率技术推导具有任意相关性的高维岭回归的渐进风险；基于噪声残差与数据点具有相同相关性的假设，修正GCV得到CorrGCV估计量；进一步将分析扩展至测试点与训练集存在非平凡相关性的时序预测场景。
AI.result: 证明了在数据点存在相关性时，标准GCV无法准确预测样本外风险；提出的CorrGCV在高维极限下是集中且无偏的有效估计；在时序预测中，测试点与训练集的相关性会导致对长期风险的过度乐观估计。
AI.conclusion: 论文为具有相关结构的高维数据提供了理论严谨的岭回归风险分析，并给出了可计算的无偏风险估计方法，对时间序列等实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Split Conformal Prediction under Data Contamination
summary: Conformal prediction is a non-parametric technique for constructing prediction intervals or sets from arbitrary predictive models under the assumption that the data is exchangeable. It is popular as it comes with theoretical guarantees on the marginal coverage of the prediction sets and the split conformal prediction variant has a very low computational cost compared to model training. We study the robustness of split conformal prediction in a data contamination setting, where we assume a small fraction of the calibration scores are drawn from a different distribution than the bulk. We quantify the impact of the corrupted data on the coverage and efficiency of the constructed sets when evaluated on "clean" test points, and verify our results with numerical experiments. Moreover, we propose an adjustment in the classification setting which we call Contamination Robust Conformal Prediction, and verify the efficacy of our approach using both synthetic and real datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分裂共形预测在数据污染场景下的鲁棒性，即校准集中存在小部分异常分数时对预测区间覆盖率和效率的影响，并提出了针对分类任务的污染鲁棒共形预测方法（CRCP）。
AI.motivation: 共形预测在数据可交换假设下能提供边际覆盖保证，但现实中的数据污染（如异常点或对抗样本）可能破坏这一假设。现有研究缺乏对共形预测在数据污染场景下鲁棒性的系统理论分析，因此作者希望量化污染数据对共形预测的影响并设计鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 理论上，作者假设校准分数中有一小部分来自与主体不同的分布，量化了污染对覆盖率和效率的影响；方法上，在分类设置中提出了Contamination Robust Conformal Prediction（CRCP），通过调整分位数阈值来抵御污染，并用合成和真实数据验证。
AI.result: 理论结果量化了污染数据导致覆盖偏差和效率损失的程度；数值实验验证了理论；CRCP方法在分类任务中能有效恢复被污染数据破坏的覆盖保证，同时保持合理的预测集效率。
AI.conclusion: 分裂共形预测在数据污染下可能失效，但通过简单调整（如CRCP）可以在分类场景下恢复鲁棒性；该工作为共形预测在非理想数据环境下的应用奠定了基础。

title: Leveraging Machine Learning for Official Statistics: A Statistical Manifesto
comment: 29 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. To appear in the proceedings of the conference on Foundations and Advances of Machine Learning in Official Statistics, which was held in Wiesbaden, from 3rd to 5th April, 2024
summary: It is important for official statistics production to apply ML with statistical rigor, as it presents both opportunities and challenges. Although machine learning has enjoyed rapid technological advances in recent years, its application does not possess the methodological robustness necessary to produce high quality statistical results. In order to account for all sources of error in machine learning models, the Total Machine Learning Error (TMLE) is presented as a framework analogous to the Total Survey Error Model used in survey methodology. As a means of ensuring that ML models are both internally valid as well as externally valid, the TMLE model addresses issues such as representativeness and measurement errors. There are several case studies presented, illustrating the importance of applying more rigor to the application of machine learning in official statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了总机器学习误差（TMLE）框架，将调查方法论中的总调查误差模型类比应用于官方统计中的机器学习，以增强其方法严谨性，并通过案例研究展示了考虑代表性和测量误差等来源对确保模型内外有效性的重要性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习在官方统计生产中虽有技术进步，但缺乏方法稳健性，无法保证高质量的统计结果，因此需要引入系统性的误差控制框架。
AI.method: 提出总机器学习误差（TMLE）框架，类比总调查误差模型，系统性地识别和分类机器学习模型中的各类误差来源（如代表性和测量误差），并通过案例研究加以验证。
AI.result: TMLE框架能够帮助确保ML模型的内部有效性和外部有效性，案例研究表明在官方统计中应用ML需要更高的方法严谨性。
AI.conclusion: 官方统计生产应在应用机器学习时采用TMLE框架，以统计严谨性应对误差来源，提高结果质量。

title: Towards High Resolution Real-Time Optical Flow Particle Image Velocimetry
summary: Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) is the most commonly used optical technique for measuring 2D velocity fields. However, improving the spatial resolution of instantaneous velocity fields and having access to the velocity field in real time remains a challenge. Optical Flow veolcimetry makes it possible to meet these challenges. In this study, we show that it is possible to access dense velocity fields (1 vector per pixel) in real-time using an appropriate seeding concentration adapted to optical flow algorithms and no longer to cross-correlation PIV algorithms. The influence of concentration on the quality of velocity fields is demonstrated using synthetic images generated for a Rankine vortex. We thus demonstrate that it is possible to precisely measure small vortices using optical flow provided that the seeding is suitable. The notion of "Active Pixels" is also introduced in order to define a seeding optimization criterion adapted to experimental measurements. This criterion is finally successfully applied to the flow downstream of a cylinder leading to a spatial resolution down to one vector per pixel.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过调整示踪粒子浓度使其适配光流算法（而非传统互相关PIV），实现了实时、每像素一个向量的高分辨率速度场测量，并引入"活性像素"概念作为优化准则。
AI.motivation: 传统PIV在瞬时速度场的空间分辨率和实时性方面存在局限，而光流测速有望克服这些挑战，但需要重新审视示踪粒子的布撒策略。
AI.method: 使用Rankine涡合成图像研究粒子浓度对光流算法测量质量的影响；提出"活性像素"准则用于优化实验中的示踪粒子浓度；在圆柱绕流实验中验证该方法。
AI.result: 当粒子浓度适配光流算法时，可达到每像素一个向量的空间分辨率；成功测量了小尺度涡结构；"活性像素"准则在圆柱绕流实验中有效。
AI.conclusion: 光流测速配合适当的粒子浓度可以实现实时、高空间分辨率（1向量/像素）的密集速度场测量，为PIV技术提供了新的优化方向。

title: Measure and continuous vector field at a boundary I: propagation equations and wave observability
summary: The celebrated geometric control condition of Bardos, Lebeau, and Rauch is necessary and sufficient for wave observability [1,7] and exact controllability. It requires that any point in phase-space be transported by the generalized geodesic flow to the region of observation in some finite time. The initial smoothness (\Cinf) required on the coefficients of the metric to prove that exact control and geometric control are essentially equivalent was subsequently relaxed to \Con2-metrics/coefficients and \Con3-domains [2] which is close to the optimal smoothness required to preserve a generalized geodesic flow. In this article, we investigate a natural generalization of the geometric control condition that makes sense for \Con1-metrics and we prove that wave observability holds under this condition. Moreover, we establish that the observability property is stable under rougher (Lipschitz) perturbation of the metric. We also provide a geometric necessary condition for wave observability to hold. Transport equations that describe the propagation of semi-classical measures are at the heart of the arguments. They are natural extensions to geometries with boundaries of usual transport equations. This article is mainly dedicated to the proof of such propagation equations in this very rough context.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了波方程在粗糙度量（C^1及Lipschitz）下的可观性与几何控制条件，证明了在推广的几何控制条件下波的可观性成立，并建立了该性质在Lipschitz扰动下的稳定性，同时给出了波可观性的几何必要条件。核心论证工具是半经典测度的传输方程。
AI.motivation: 经典几何控制条件要求度量系数足够光滑（C^∞），但实际应用中的度量可能更粗糙。本文旨在将几何控制条件推广到C^1度量，并研究波可观性在这种粗糙度量下的成立条件及稳定性。
AI.method: 采用半经典测度作为核心分析工具，推导了在粗糙（C^1）度量及带边界的几何中传输方程的自然推广，通过分析半经典测度沿广义测地流的传播来证明可观性。
AI.result: (1) 提出了适用于C^1度量的几何控制条件的自然推广，并证明了在此条件下波可观性成立；(2) 证明了波可观性在Lipschitz度量扰动下具有稳定性；(3) 给出了波可观性成立的几何必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将经典几何控制条件推广到更粗糙的度量（C^1），并建立了可观性的稳定性结果，拓展了波方程控制理论对非光滑度量的适用性。

title: Prismatic logarithm and prismatic Hochschild homology via norm
summary: In this brief note, we present an elementary construction of the first Chern class of Hodge--Tate crystals in line bundles using a refinement of the prismatic logarithm, which should be comparable to the one considered by Bhargav Bhatt. The key to constructing this refinement is Yuri Sulyma's norm on (animated) prisms. We explain the relation of this construction to prismatic Witt vectors, as a generalization of Kaledin's polynomial Witt vectors. We also propose the prismatic Hochschild homology as a noncommutative analogue of prismatic de Rham complex.

AI.tldr: 本文通过棱镜对数的精炼，给出了线丛中Hodge-Tate晶体的第一陈类的初等构造，该构造与Bhargav Bhatt的考虑可比。关键创新在于使用Yuri Sulyma的（动画化）棱镜上的范数。本文还阐释了该构造与棱镜Witt向量的关系，并将其视为Kaledin多项式Witt向量的推广，同时提出了棱镜Hochschild同调作为棱镜de Rham复形的非交换类比。
AI.motivation: 为Hodge-Tate晶体的第一陈类提供一种初等构造方法，并建立其与已有工作（如Bhatt的工作）的可比性。同时，将棱镜理论推广到非交换情形，提出棱镜Hochschild同调作为非交换类比。
AI.method: 使用棱镜对数的精炼（refinement of prismatic logarithm），并借助Yuri Sulyma在（动画化）棱镜上定义的范数（norm）作为关键工具。通过该范数构造精细化的对数映射，从而定义第一陈类。
AI.result: 成功给出了线丛中Hodge-Tate晶体第一陈类的初等构造；阐明了该构造与棱镜Witt向量的关系，并将其视为Kaledin多项式Witt向量的推广；提出了棱镜Hochschild同调作为棱镜de Rham复形的非交换对应物。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种新的、初等的Hodge-Tate晶体第一陈类构造方法，拓宽了棱镜理论的应用范围，并开启了棱镜Hochschild同调这一非交换研究方向。

title: Bott-Chern characteristic classes of blow-ups
summary: We prove a blow-up formula for Bott-Chern characteristic classes of compact complex manifolds. To this end, we establish a version of Riemann-Roch without denominators for the Bott-Chern characteristic classes. In particular, as an application, we study the behaviour of the Bott-Chern characteristic classes of the Iwasawa manifold under a blow-up transformation.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了紧复流形的Bott-Chern特征类的爆破解构公式，建立了无分母形式的Bott-Chern Riemann-Roch定理，并应用于Iwasawa流形在爆破变换下的Bott-Chern特征类行为研究。
AI.motivation: 建立紧复流形上Bott-Chern特征类在爆破变换下的行为公式，填补该领域理论空白。
AI.method: 通过建立无分母形式的Bott-Chern Riemann-Roch定理，推导出爆破解构公式。
AI.result: 获得了Bott-Chern特征类的爆破解构公式，并成功应用于Iwasawa流形。
AI.conclusion: 为Bott-Chern特征类在爆破下的行为提供了完整理论刻画，并给出了具体应用实例。

title: Nonlinear stability threshold for compressible Couette flow
summary:
This paper concerns the Couette flow for 2-D compressible Navier-Stokes equations (N-S) in an infinitely long flat torus $\Torus\times\R$. Compared to the incompressible flow, the compressible Couette flow has a stronger lift-up effect and weaker dissipation. To the best of our knowledge, there has been no work on the nonlinear stability in the cases of high Reynolds number until now and only linear stability was known in \cite{ADM2021,ZZZ2022}.In this paper, we study the nonlinear stability of 2-D compressible Couette flow in Sobolev space at high Reynolds numbers. Moreover, we also show the enhanced dissipation phenomenon and stability threshold for the compressible Couette flow.
  First, We decompose the perturbation into zero and non-zero modes and obtain two systems for these components, respectively. Different from \cite{ADM2021,ZZZ2022}, we use the anti-derivative technique to study the zero-mode system. We introduce a kind of diffusion wave to remove the excessive mass of the zero-modes and construct coupled diffusion waves along characteristics to improve the resulting time decay rates of error terms and derive a new integrated system \cref{anti}. Secondly, we observe a cancellation with the new system \cref{anti} so that the lift-up effect is weakened. Thirdly, the large time behavior of the zero-modes is obtained by the weighted energy method and a weighted inequality on the heat kernel \cite{HLM2010}.In addition, with the help of the Fourier multipliers method, we can show the enhanced dissipation phenomenon for the non-zero modes by commutator estimates to avoid loss of derivatives. Finally, we complete the higher-order derivative estimates to close the a priori assumptions by the energy method and show the stability threshold.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在无限长平坦环面$\Torus\times\R$上的Couette流动在高Reynolds数下的非线性稳定性，证明了增强耗散现象和稳定性阈值。
AI.motivation: 可压缩Couette流相较于不可压缩情况具有更强的升力效应和更弱的耗散，此前仅有线性稳定性结果（ADM2021, ZZZ2022），非线性稳定性在高Reynolds数情形下尚属空白。
AI.method: 1) 将扰动分解为零模态和非零模态；2) 对零模态系统采用反导数技术和扩散波方法，沿特征线构造耦合扩散波以改善误差项的时间衰减率；3) 利用新系统中的对消现象减弱升力效应；4) 通过加权能量法和热核加权不等式获取零模态的大时间行为；5) 借助Fourier乘子法和对易子估计证明非零模态的增强耗散；6) 通过能量方法完成高阶导数估计并闭合先验假设。
AI.result: 成功证明了可压缩Couette流在高Reynolds数下的非线性稳定性，展示了增强耗散现象，并获得了稳定性阈值。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了可压缩Couette流在高Reynolds数下非线性稳定性的理论空白，发展了反导数技术和扩散波方法，为后续可压缩剪切流稳定性研究提供了新工具。

title: Fujita exponent and blow-up rate for a mixed local and nonlocal heat equation
summary:
In this paper we consider the blow-up problem for a mixed local-nonlocal diffusion operator,
  \[
  u_t=aΔu -b(-Δ)^s u+u^p.
  \]
  We show that the Fujita exponent is given by the nonlocal part, $p_F=1+2s/N$. We also determinate, in some cases, the blow-up rate.

AI.tldr: 本文研究混合局部-非局部扩散算子的爆破问题，发现Fujita指数由非局部部分决定（p_F=1+2s/N），并在某些情况下确定了爆破速率。
AI.motivation: 研究混合局部-非局部扩散算子u_t = aΔu - b(-Δ)^s u + u^p的爆破问题，旨在确定该方程对应的Fujita指数以及爆破速率。
AI.method: 理论分析，通过数学推导研究混合扩散算子的Fujita指数，并分析特定情形下的爆破速率。
AI.result: Fujita指数由非局部部分(-Δ)^s决定，即p_F = 1 + 2s/N；在某些情况下确定了爆破速率。
AI.conclusion: 混合局部-非局部扩散算子中，非局部部分主导了Fujita指数的行为，其爆破阈值与纯非局部扩散情形一致。

title: Existence of arithmetic degrees for generic orbits and dynamical Lang-Siegel problem
summary: We prove the existence of the arithmetic degree for dominant rational self-maps at any point whose orbit is generic. As a corollary, we prove the same existence for étale morphisms on quasi-projective varieties and any points on it. We apply the proof of this fact to dynamical Lang-Siegel problem. Namely, we prove that local height function associated with zero-dimensional subscheme grows slowly along orbits of a rational map under reasonable assumption. Also if local height function associated with any proper closed subscheme grows fast on a subset of an orbit of a self-morphism, we prove that such subset has Banach density zero under some assumptions.

AI.tldr: 证明了双有理自映射在一般轨道点处算术度的存在性；作为推论，证明了拟射影簇上平展态射的算术度存在性；并将此结果应用于动力系统的Lang-Siegel问题，得到局部高度函数的增长性结论。
AI.motivation: 算术度是动力系统与算术几何交叉领域的核心概念，其存在性对于理解有理自映射的动力学行为至关重要。此前对于一般有理自映射的算术度存在性尚未完全解决，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 利用轨道的一般性条件（generic orbit）来证明算术度的极限存在；通过约化到平展态射情形推广结论；结合动力系统与高度函数理论处理Lang-Siegel问题，分别证明零维子概形情形下局部高度函数的慢增长，以及一般闭子概形情形下快增长子集的Banach密度零性质。
AI.result: 1. 证明了dominant rational self-map在一般轨道点处的算术度存在。2. 推出了拟射影簇上étale morphism对任意点算术度存在。3. 在合理假设下，零维子概形对应的局部高度函数沿轨道慢增长。4. 在自同态情形，局部高度函数快增长的轨道子集的Banach密度为零。
AI.conclusion: 本文完善了算术度存在性的理论框架，并将动力系统方法与算术几何方法结合，为动力系统与丢番图逼近的交叉研究提供了新工具。

title: Time Series Clustering with General State Space Models via Stochastic Variational Inference
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel method of model-based time series clustering with mixtures of general state space models (MSSMs). Each component of MSSMs is associated with each cluster. An advantage of the proposed method is that it enables the use of time series models appropriate to the specific time series. This not only improves clustering and prediction accuracy but also enhances the interpretability of the estimated parameters. The parameters of the MSSMs are estimated using stochastic variational inference, a subtype of variational inference. The proposed method estimates the latent variables of an arbitrary state space model by using neural networks with a normalizing flow as a variational estimator. The number of clusters can be estimated using the Bayesian information criterion. In addition, to prevent MSSMs from converging to the local optimum, we propose several optimization tricks, including an additional penalty term called entropy annealing. To our best knowledge, the proposed method is the first computationally feasible one for time series clustering based on general (possibly nonlinear, non-Gaussian) state space models. Experiments on simulated datasets show that the proposed method is effective for clustering, parameter estimation, and estimating the number of clusters.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于混合一般状态空间模型（MSSMs）的模型驱动时间序列聚类方法，利用随机变分推断和神经网络（含归一化流）进行参数估计，并通过熵退火等优化技巧避免局部最优，首次实现了对一般（非线性、非高斯）状态空间模型的计算可行的时间序列聚类。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列聚类方法多局限于特定模型（如线性高斯模型），缺乏对一般状态空间模型（非线性、非高斯）的计算可行聚类方法，且存在可解释性差、聚类与预测精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用混合一般状态空间模型（MSSMs），每个分量对应一个聚类；通过随机变分推断（SVI）进行参数估计，使用含归一化流的神经网络作为变分估计器；利用BIC估计聚类数量；提出熵退火等优化技巧防止局部最优解。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集上的实验表明，该方法在聚类、参数估计和聚类数量估计方面均有效。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出了一种计算可行的一般状态空间模型时间序列聚类方法，在聚类精度、参数估计和模型可解释性方面具有优势。

title: Contrastive Learning with Adaptive Neighborhoods for Brain Age Prediction on 3D Stiffness Maps
summary: In the field of neuroimaging, accurate brain age prediction is pivotal for uncovering the complexities of brain aging and pinpointing early indicators of neurodegenerative conditions. Recent advancements in self-supervised learning, particularly in contrastive learning, have demonstrated greater robustness when dealing with complex datasets. However, current approaches often fall short in generalizing across non-uniformly distributed data, prevalent in medical imaging scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel contrastive loss that adapts dynamically during the training process, focusing on the localized neighborhoods of samples. Moreover, we expand beyond traditional structural features by incorporating brain stiffness - a mechanical property previously underexplored yet promising due to its sensitivity to age-related changes. This work presents the first application of self-supervised learning to brain mechanical properties, using compiled stiffness maps from various clinical studies to predict brain age. Our approach, featuring dynamic localized loss, consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating superior performance and paving the way for new directions in brain aging research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态局部对比损失（dynamic localized loss）的自监督学习方法，首次将脑刚度（brain stiffness）这一力学属性应用于脑龄预测，在多个临床数据集上取得了优于现有方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有脑龄预测方法在非均匀分布的医学影像数据上泛化能力不足，且大多局限于传统结构特征，缺乏对脑力学属性（如刚度）的挖掘。
AI.method: 提出一种在训练过程中动态适应的对比损失，聚焦于样本的局部邻域；首次将自监督学习应用于脑力学属性（刚度图）进行脑龄预测。
AI.result: 该方法在脑龄预测任务上持续优于现有最优方法，展现出更强的泛化性能和预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 动态局部对比损失结合脑刚度特征为脑老化研究提供了新的有效方向，验证了脑力学属性在神经影像分析中的潜力。

title: ELM-FBPINNs: An Efficient Multilevel Random Feature Method
summary: Domain-decomposed variants of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) such as finite basis PINNs (FBPINNs) mitigate some of PINNs' issues like slow convergence and spectral bias through localisation, but still rely on iterative nonlinear optimisation within each subdomain. In this work, we propose a hybrid approach that combines multilevel domain decomposition and partition-of-unity constructions with random feature models, yielding a method referred to as multilevel ELM-FBPINN. By replacing trainable subdomain networks with extreme learning machines, the resulting formulation eliminates backpropagation entirely and reduces training to a structured linear least-squares problem. We provide a systematic numerical study comparing ELM-FBPINNs and multilevel ELM-FBPINNs with standard PINNs and FBPINNs on representative benchmark problems, demonstrating that ELM-FBPINNs and multilevel ELM-FBPINNs achieve competitive accuracy while significantly accelerating convergence and improving robustness with respect to architectural and optimisation parameters. Through ablation studies, we further clarify the distinct roles of domain decomposition and random feature enrichment in controlling expressivity, conditioning, and scalability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合多级域分解与随机特征模型的ELM-FBPINN方法，通过极限学习机替代可训练子域网络，消除反向传播，将训练简化为结构化线性最小二乘问题，在保持精度的同时显著加速收敛并提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于物理信息的神经网络（PINN）存在收敛慢和频谱偏差等问题，现有域分解变体（如FBPINN）通过局部化缓解了部分问题，但仍依赖子域内的迭代非线性优化，计算效率有待提升。
AI.method: 将多级域分解和单位分割构造与随机特征模型结合，用极限学习机（ELM）替代可训练子域网络，消除反向传播，将训练转化为结构化线性最小二乘问题，形成多级ELM-FBPINN方法。
AI.result: 在代表性基准问题上，ELM-FBPINN和多级ELM-FBPINN相比标准PINN和FBPINN，在保持竞争力精度的同时显著加速收敛，提升了对架构和优化参数的鲁棒性。消融实验进一步阐明了域分解和随机特征增强在控制表达能力、条件数和可扩展性上的不同作用。
AI.conclusion: ELM-FBPINN及其多级变体有效克服了传统PINN的收敛瓶颈，通过线性化训练过程实现了更高效、更鲁棒的物理信息学习框架。

title: A Fast Fourier-Galerkin Method for Solving Boundary Integral Equations on Torus-Shaped Surfaces
summary: In this paper, we introduce a fast Fourier-Galerkin method for solving boundary integral equations on torus-shaped surfaces, which are diffeomorphic to a torus. We analyze the properties of the integral operator's kernel to derive the decay pattern of the entries in the representation matrix. Leveraging this decay pattern, we devise a truncation strategy that efficiently compresses the dense representation matrix of the integral operator into a sparser form containing only $\mathcal{O}(N\ln^2 N)$ nonzero entries, where $N$ denotes the degrees of freedom of the discretization method. We prove that this truncation strategy achieves a quasi-optimal convergence order of $\mathcal{O}(N^{-p/2}\ln N)$, with $p$ representing the degree of regularity of the exact solution to the boundary integral equation. Additionally, we confirm that the truncation strategy preserves stability throughout the solution process. Numerical experiments validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速傅里叶-伽辽金方法用于求解环面形状曲面上的边界积分方程，通过利用积分算子核的衰减模式设计截断策略，将稠密表示矩阵压缩为仅含$\mathcal{O}(N\ln^2 N)$个非零元素的稀疏矩阵，并证明了该方法的拟最优收敛阶$\mathcal{O}(N^{-p/2}\ln N)$及稳定性。
AI.motivation: 环面形状曲面上的边界积分方程求解中，传统方法生成的表示矩阵是稠密的，计算和存储成本高昂，亟需高效的压缩与加速算法。
AI.method: 采用快速傅里叶-伽辽金方法，分析积分算子核的衰减特性以揭示表示矩阵元素的衰减模式，据此设计截断策略将稠密矩阵压缩为稀疏矩阵（仅$\mathcal{O}(N\ln^2 N)$个非零元）。
AI.result: 所提截断策略实现拟最优收敛阶$\mathcal{O}(N^{-p/2}\ln N)$，且在整个求解过程中保持数值稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与数值实验共同验证了该方法在环面曲面边界积分方程求解中的高效性与有效性。

title: Generalized Fourier Diffraction Theorem and Filtered Backpropagation for Tomographic Reconstruction
summary: This paper concerns diffraction-tomographic reconstruction of an object characterized by its scattering potential. We establish a rigorous generalization of the Fourier diffraction theorem in arbitrary dimension, giving a precise relation in the Fourier domain between measurements of the scattered wave and reconstructions of the scattering potential. With this theorem at hand, Fourier coverages for different experimental setups are investigated taking into account parameters such as object orientation, direction of incidence and frequency of illumination. Allowing for simultaneous and discontinuous variation of these parameters, a general filtered backpropagation formula is derived resulting in an explicit approximation of the scattering potential for a large class of experimental setups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了傅里叶衍射定理在任意维度下的严格推广，建立了散射波测量与散射势傅里叶域重建之间的精确关系，并推导了适用于多种实验设置的通用滤波反向传播公式。
AI.motivation: 现有衍射层析重建主要基于傅里叶衍射定理，但该定理在任意维度下的严格形式化尚未完善。作者旨在给出该定理的严格数学推广，并建立统一的理论框架以处理不同实验配置下的重建问题。
AI.method: 首先在任意维度下严格推广傅里叶衍射定理，建立散射场测量与散射势傅里叶变换之间的精确关系；随后分析不同实验参数（物体取向、入射方向、照明频率）对傅里叶覆盖范围的影响；最后允许这些参数同步且非连续变化，推导出通用的滤波反向传播公式。
AI.result: 得到了任意维度下傅里叶衍射定理的严格形式化表述；明确了不同实验配置下傅里叶空间的覆盖特性；推导出适用于大类别实验设置的通用滤波反向传播公式，实现了散射势的显式近似重建。
AI.conclusion: 本文为衍射层析重建提供了严格的理论基础，所提出的通用公式可适用于多种实验场景，为实际衍射层析成像系统的设计与重建算法开发提供了理论指导。

title: Full error analysis of policy gradient learning algorithms for exploratory linear quadratic mean-field control problem in continuous time with common noise
summary: We consider reinforcement learning (RL) methods for finding optimal policies in linear quadratic (LQ) mean field control (MFC) problems over an infinite horizon in continuous time, with common noise and entropy regularization. We study policy gradient (PG) learning and first demonstrate convergence in a model-based setting by establishing a suitable gradient domination condition.Next, our main contribution is a comprehensive error analysis, where we prove the global linear convergence and sample complexity of the PG algorithm with two-point gradient estimates in a model-free setting with unknown parameters. In this setting, the parameterized optimal policies are learned from samples of the states and population distribution.Finally, we provide numerical evidence supporting the convergence of our implemented algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了连续时间无限时域下含共同噪声和熵正则化的线性二次型平均场控制问题中的强化学习方法，证明了模型-based策略梯度算法的收敛性，并给出了模型-free设置下基于两点梯度估计的策略梯度算法的全局线性收敛性和样本复杂度分析，最后通过数值实验验证了算法效果。
AI.motivation: 在连续时间无限时域下，含共同噪声和熵正则化的线性二次型平均场控制问题中，现有策略梯度方法的理论收敛性和样本复杂度分析尚不充分，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 采用策略梯度（PG）方法，先在模型-based设置中通过建立梯度支配条件证明收敛性；在模型-free设置中，使用两点梯度估计，从状态和群体分布的样本中学习参数化的最优策略，并进行误差分析。
AI.result: 在模型-based设置中证明了收敛性；在模型-free设置中证明了策略梯度算法的全局线性收敛性并给出了样本复杂度；数值实验支持了算法的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为连续时间无限时域下含共同噪声和熵正则化的LQ-MFC问题中的策略梯度方法提供了完整的理论收敛性保证，包括模型-based和模型-free两种设置，其中模型-free设置实现了全局线性收敛。

title: Two-Stage Hierarchical and Explainable Feature Selection Framework for Dimensionality Reduction in Sleep Staging
summary: Sleep is crucial for human health, and EEG signals play a significant role in sleep research. Due to the high-dimensional nature of EEG signal data sequences, data visualization and clustering of different sleep stages have been challenges. To address these issues, we propose a two-stage hierarchical and explainable feature selection framework by incorporating a feature selection algorithm to improve the performance of dimensionality reduction. Inspired by topological data analysis, which can analyze the structure of high-dimensional data, we extract topological features from the EEG signals to compensate for the structural information loss that happens in traditional spectro-temporal data analysis. Supported by the topological visualization of the data from different sleep stages and the classification results, the proposed features are proven to be effective supplements to traditional features. Finally, we compare the performances of three dimensionality reduction algorithms: Principal Component Analysis (PCA), t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (t-SNE), and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP). Among them, t-SNE achieved the highest accuracy of 79.8%, but considering the overall performance in terms of computational resources and metrics, UMAP is the optimal choice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种两阶段层次化且可解释的特征选择框架，结合拓扑数据分析提取EEG信号的拓扑特征，以改善睡眠阶段的数据可视化和聚类效果。通过对比PCA、t-SNE和UMAP三种降维算法，发现t-SNE准确率最高（79.8%），但综合考虑计算资源和各项指标，UMAP为最优选择。
AI.motivation: EEG信号数据序列具有高维特性，导致不同睡眠阶段的数据可视化和聚类面临挑战。传统频谱时域分析在处理高维EEG数据时存在结构信息损失，亟需一种能够保留数据拓扑结构并提升降维效果的特征选择方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段层次化且可解释的特征选择框架，首先融入特征选择算法提升降维性能；其次，受拓扑数据分析启发，从EEG信号中提取拓扑特征以弥补传统频谱时域分析中的结构信息损失；最后，对比PCA、t-SNE和UMAP三种降维算法的性能。
AI.result: 拓扑特征被证明是传统特征的有效补充；t-SNE取得最高准确率79.8%；UMAP在计算资源和综合指标上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的拓扑特征提取方法能有效增强睡眠阶段分类性能；在降维算法选择上，UMAP在效率和效果的权衡中优于t-SNE和PCA。

title: Subpath-Based Column Generation for Electric Vehicle Routing Problems
summary: Motivated by widespread electrification targets, this paper studies an Electric Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows and Nonlinear Charging (EVRPTWNL) that jointly optimizes routing-scheduling decisions and charging decisions given vehicle capacities, time windows and battery capacities. We develop a column generation scheme with a subpath-based label-setting algorithm that decomposes the pricing problem into two phases: (i) generating subpaths between charging stations, and (ii) combining subpaths into paths while optimizing charging decisions in between. We formalize a domination framework to establish the convergence and exactness of the algorithm, and prove that the methodology can solve a range of EVRP variants (e.g., with vehicle capacities, time windows, and nonlinear charging) and relaxation-tightening strategies (e.g., ng-relaxations and subset-row cuts). Computational results show improvements over path-based benchmarks in both computational time and solution quality, especially when time windows become wider, when vehicles can perform multiple tasks on a single charge and when vehicles still need to recharge several times across the planning horizon. Ultimately, the methodology can scale to otherwise intractable instances with up to 100 customers, thereby enhancing fleet management capabilities across electrified logistics areas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于列生成的子路径标签设置算法，用于求解带时间窗和非线性充电的电动车路径问题，该算法将定价问题分解为两个阶段，并建立了支配框架以证明收敛性和精确性。实验表明，该方法在计算时间和解质量上优于基于路径的基准方法，可扩展至100个客户的实例。
AI.motivation: 受广泛电气化目标的驱动，现有EVRPTW研究在同时优化路径-调度决策与非线性充电决策方面存在不足，需要一种能够处理车辆容量、时间窗、非线性充电等多约束的高效精确算法。
AI.method: 提出列生成方案与基于子路径的标签设置算法，将定价问题分解为两阶段：(i)生成充电站之间的子路径，(ii)组合子路径为完整路径并优化充电决策。建立支配框架确保算法收敛性和精确性，支持ng-松弛和子集行割等松弛-收紧策略。
AI.result: 计算结果表明，该方法在计算时间和解质量上均优于基于路径的基准方法，尤其在时间窗更宽、车辆单次充电可执行多项任务以及需要多次充电的场景下优势显著。可求解多达100个客户的实例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效求解一系列EVRPTW变体，提升电气化物流领域的车队管理能力，具有良好的可扩展性和通用性。

title: Feature-Based Interpretable Surrogates for Optimization
summary: For optimization models to be used in practice, it is crucial that users trust the results. A key factor in this aspect is the interpretability of the solution process. A previous framework for inherently interpretable optimization models used decision trees to map instances to solutions of the underlying optimization model. Based on this work, we investigate how we can use more general optimization rules to further increase interpretability and, at the same time, give more freedom to the decision-maker. The proposed rules do not map to a concrete solution but to a set of solutions characterized by common features. To find such optimization rules, we present an exact methodology using mixed-integer programming formulations as well as heuristics. We also outline the challenges and opportunities that these methods present. In particular, we demonstrate the improvement in solution quality that our approach offers compared to existing interpretable surrogates for optimization, and we discuss the relationship between interpretability and performance. These findings are supported by experiments using both synthetic and real-world data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用更通用的优化规则（而非决策树）来增强优化模型可解释性的方法，这些规则将实例映射到具有共同特征的解集而非具体解，并通过混合整数规划和启发式算法进行求解。
AI.motivation: 用户信任优化模型的结果至关重要，而可解释性是关键因素。现有工作使用决策树作为可解释代理，本文希望引入更通用的优化规则来进一步提升可解释性，同时给予决策者更多自由度。
AI.method: 提出优化规则（optimization rules），将实例映射到由共同特征刻画的解集（而非具体解）；使用混合整数规划（MIP）公式进行精确求解，同时开发了启发式方法。
AI.result: 与现有的可解释优化代理相比，所提方法在解质量上有明显提升；实验基于合成数据和真实数据，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 更通用的优化规则能够在可解释性与性能之间取得更好的平衡，为决策者提供更多灵活性，同时保持可解释性。

title: Flame Transfer Function Measurement of a Hydrogen-Blended Sequential Combustor
summary: The flame transfer function (FTF) relates acoustic perturbations and the coherent heat release rate response. This frequency-dependent function governs the thermoacoustic stability of a combustor. The FTF measurement is therefore of great interest for predicting the stability of the a practical combustor connected to the engine's compressor and turbine. In this study, the flame transfer function of the sequential flame of an atmospheric constant pressure sequential combustor (CPSC) is experimentally measured. The thermal power of both the first- and second-stage flames is kept constant and their ratio is fixed at 1:1. The effects of hydrogen blending in the first and second stage fuel mixture on the sequential FTF are analyzed. The FTF of the sequential flame is fitted with a distributed time delay (DTD) model with two pulses. The trends of the model parameters obtained are consistent with the chemiluminescence OH* of the sequential flame.

AI.tldr: 本文实验测量了常压恒压顺序燃烧器中顺序火焰的火焰传递函数（FTF），分析了第一级和第二级燃料混合物中掺氢对FTF的影响，并采用双脉冲分布式时间延迟模型对FTF进行拟合，模型参数趋势与OH*化学发光信号一致。
AI.motivation: FTF是决定燃烧室热声稳定性的关键参数，准确测量FTF对于预测实际燃烧室与压气机和涡轮耦合后的稳定性具有重要意义。目前对顺序燃烧火焰的FTF特性，特别是氢气掺混的影响尚缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 在常压恒压顺序燃烧器（CPSC）上进行实验，保持两级火焰热功率恒定且比例为1:1，通过改变第一级和第二级燃料中的氢气掺混比例，测量顺序火焰的FTF。采用双脉冲分布式时间延迟（DTD）模型对测量的FTF进行参数拟合。
AI.result: 双脉冲DTD模型能有效拟合顺序火焰的FTF；模型参数随氢掺混比例的变化趋势与实验测量的OH*化学发光信号变化趋势一致。
AI.conclusion: 氢气掺混显著影响顺序火焰的FTF特性，双脉冲DTD模型可用于描述顺序火焰的声-热耦合动力学行为，模型参数与火焰化学发光特性具有良好对应关系。

title: Data-driven turbulent heat flux modeling with inputs of multiple fidelity
summary: Data-driven RANS modeling is emerging as a promising methodology to exploit the information provided by high-fidelity data. However, its widespread application is limited by challenges in generalization and robustness to inconsistencies between input data of varying fidelity levels. This is especially true for thermal turbulent closures, which inherently depend on momentum statistics provided by low or high fidelity turbulence momentum models. This work investigates the impact of momentum modeling inconsistencies on a data-driven thermal closure trained with a dataset with multiple fidelity (DNS and RANS). The analysis of the model inputs shows that the two fidelity levels correspond to separate regions in the input space. It is here shown that such separation can be exploited by a training with heterogeneous data, allowing the model to detect the level of fidelity in its inputs and adjust its prediction accordingly. In particular, a sensitivity analysis and verification shows that such a model can leverage the data inconsistencies to increase its robustness. Finally, the verification with a CFD simulation shows the potential of this multi-fidelity training approach for flows in which momentum statistics provided by traditional models are affected by model uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据驱动RANS建模中动量建模不一致性对热湍流闭合模型的影响，发现不同 fidelity 数据在输入空间中形成分离区域，利用这种分离进行多 fidelity 训练可提升模型鲁棒性，并通过 CFD 仿真验证了该方法在动量统计存在模型不确定性时的潜力。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动RANS建模在泛化能力和对不同 fidelity 数据不一致性的鲁棒性方面存在挑战，尤其是热湍流闭合模型本身依赖动量统计信息，而动量统计可能来自不同 fidelity 的模型，导致不一致性影响预测精度。
AI.method: 使用包含 DNS 和 RANS 两种 fidelity 级别的数据集训练热闭合模型；分析不同 fidelity 数据在输入空间的分布特性；利用输入空间的分离性进行多 fidelity 训练；通过敏感性分析和 CFD 仿真验证模型性能。
AI.result: 不同 fidelity 数据在输入空间中对应分离区域；模型能够利用这种分离检测输入数据的 fidelity 级别并自适应调整预测；多 fidelity 训练方法可增强模型对数据不一致性的鲁棒性；CFD 仿真验证了该方法在动量统计存在模型不确定性时的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多 fidelity 训练方法能够利用不同 fidelity 数据在输入空间中的分离特性，提升数据驱动热湍流闭合模型对动量建模不一致性的鲁棒性，在传统动量模型存在不确定性的流场中具有应用潜力。

title: Application of Machine Learning and Convex Limiting to Subgrid Flux Modeling in the Shallow-Water Equations
summary: We propose a combination of machine learning and flux limiting for property-preserving subgrid scale modeling in the context of flux-limited finite volume methods for the one-dimensional shallow-water equations. The numerical fluxes of a conservative target scheme are fitted to the coarse-mesh averages of a monotone fine-grid discretization using a neural network to parametrize the subgrid scale components. To ensure positivity preservation and the validity of local maximum principles, we use a flux limiter that constrains the intermediate states of an equivalent fluctuation form to stay in a convex admissible set. The results of our numerical studies confirm that the proposed combination of machine learning with monolithic convex limiting produces meaningful closures even in scenarios for which the network was not trained.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合机器学习与通量限制器的子网格尺度建模方法，用于一维浅水方程的有限体积格式，通过神经网络参数化亚网格分量，并利用通量限制器保证正性保持和局部极值原则，数值实验表明该方法在未训练场景下也能生成有意义的闭合模型。
AI.motivation: 现有浅水方程数值方法在粗网格上难以同时保证计算效率与物理约束（如正性、局部极值原则），传统亚网格模型缺乏自适应性，而纯机器学习方法难以保证严格物理约束，需要一种将数据驱动建模与保物理性质数值技术相结合的方法。
AI.method: 1) 将目标格式的数值通量通过神经网络参数化亚网格分量，拟合单调细网格离散的平均值；2) 采用通量限制器约束等价波动格式的中间状态，使其保持在凸可行集内，从而实现正性保持和局部最大/最小原则；3) 将机器学习与整体凸限制（MCL）相结合。
AI.result: 数值研究表明，所提出的ML+MCL组合方法即使在未经训练的场景下也能生成有意义的闭合解，证明该混合方法具有良好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习与通量限制器的融合为保物理性质的亚网格建模提供了可行路径，可推广至更复杂的双曲守恒律问题。

title: Towards a Field Based Bayesian Evidence Inference from Nested Sampling Data
summary: Nested sampling (NS) is a stochastic method for computing the log-evidence of a Bayesian problem. It relies on stochastic estimates of prior volumes enclosed by likelihood contours, which limits the accuracy of the log-evidence calculation. We propose to transform the prior volume estimation into a Bayesian inference problem, which allows us to incorporate a smoothness assumption for likelihood-prior volume relations. As a result, we aim to increase the accuracy of the volume estimates and thus improve the overall log-evidence calculation using NS. The method presented works as a post-processing step for NS and provides posterior samples of the likelihood-prior-volume relation, from which the log-evidence can be calculated. We demonstrate an implementation of the algorithm and compare its results with plain NS on two synthetic datasets for which the underlying evidence is known. We find a significant improvement in accuracy for runs with less than one hundred active samples in NS, but are prone to numerical problems beyond this point.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将嵌套采样中的先验体积估计转化为贝叶斯推断问题的方法，通过引入似然-先验体积关系的平滑性假设来提高对数证据计算的精度，该方法作为NS的后处理步骤，在活跃样本数少于100时显著提升精度。
AI.motivation: 嵌套采样依赖于似然等高线所围成先验体积的随机估计，这限制了log-evidence计算的精度。作者旨在通过将先验体积估计转化为贝叶斯推断问题来提高估计精度。
AI.method: 将先验体积估计转化为贝叶斯推断问题，引入似然-先验体积关系的平滑性假设；该方法作为嵌套采样的后处理步骤，提供似然-先验体积关系的后验样本，从而计算log-evidence。
AI.result: 在两个合成数据集上对比，当活跃样本数少于100时，该方法在精度上有显著提升；但超过该阈值后会出现数值问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法作为NS的后处理步骤，可在低活跃样本数条件下有效提高log-evidence计算精度，但在活跃样本数较多时面临数值稳定性挑战。

title: Shifting sands of hardware and software in exascale quantum mechanical simulations
comment: 10 pages, 3 tables; Published in Nature Reviews Physics
summary: The era of exascale computing presents both exciting opportunities and unique challenges for quantum mechanical simulations. Although the transition from petaflops to exascale computing has been marked by a steady increase in computational power, it is accompanied by a shift towards heterogeneous architectures, with graphical processing units (GPUs) in particular gaining a dominant role. The exascale era, therefore, demands a fundamental shift in software development strategies. This Perspective examines the changing landscape of hardware and software for exascale computing, highlighting the limitations of traditional algorithms and software implementations in light of the increasing use of heterogeneous architectures in high-end systems. We discuss the challenges of adapting quantum chemistry software to these new architectures, including the fragmentation of the software stack, the need for more efficient algorithms (including reduced precision versions) tailored for GPUs, and the importance of developing standardized libraries and programming models.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了百亿亿次计算时代下量子力学模拟面临的机遇与挑战，重点分析了从传统架构向异构架构（尤其是GPU主导）转型对量子化学软件开发的深远影响，指出了现有算法和软件实现的局限性，并讨论了适应新架构所需的策略：包括软件栈碎片化问题、GPU专用高效算法（含降精度版本）的开发需求，以及标准化库和编程模型的重要性。
AI.motivation: 百亿亿次计算时代的到来为量子力学模拟带来了新的机遇，但异构架构（尤其是GPU主导）的兴起使得传统算法和软件实现面临根本性局限。现有量子化学软件难以适应这一硬件变革，亟需重新审视软件开发策略，以充分利用新架构的计算潜力。
AI.method: 本文采用Perspective（观点/展望）的论述方式，通过分析百亿亿次计算时代硬件架构的演变趋势（从同构到异构、GPU主导），系统审视传统量子化学算法和软件面临的挑战，并针对性地提出适应异构架构的软件转型策略。
AI.result: 识别出三个关键挑战：1）软件栈碎片化问题；2）缺乏针对GPU设计的高效算法（包括降精度算法）；3）标准化库和编程模型的缺失。这些因素共同构成了量子化学软件向异构架构迁移的主要障碍。
AI.conclusion: 百亿亿次计算时代要求量子化学软件开发策略进行根本性转变，必须积极应对异构架构带来的挑战，通过开发GPU专用算法、解决软件碎片化、建立标准化编程模型等途径，才能充分利用新一代计算平台的潜力。

title: Scaling and universality for percolation in random networks: A unified view
summary: Percolation processes on random networks have been the subject of intense research activity over the last decades: the overall phenomenology of standard percolation on uncorrelated and unclustered topologies is well known. Still some critical properties of the transition, in particular for heterogeneous substrates, have not been fully elucidated and contradictory results appear in the literature. In this paper we present, by means of a generating functions approach, a thorough and complete investigation of percolation critical properties in random networks. We determine all critical exponents, the associated critical amplitude ratios and the form of the cluster size distribution for networks of any level of heterogeneity. We uncover, in particular for highly heterogeneous networks, subtle crossover phenomena, nontrivial scaling forms and violations of hyperscaling. In this way we clarify the origin of inconsistencies in the previous literature.

AI.tldr: 本文通过生成函数方法，系统研究了随机网络上的渗流临界性质，确定了所有临界指数、临界振幅比和团簇尺寸分布，揭示了高异质性网络中的交叉现象、非平凡标度形式和超标度违背，澄清了文献中的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 尽管标准渗流在无关联、无聚类拓扑中的整体现象已为人熟知，但异质性基底的渗流临界性质尚未完全阐明，文献中存在矛盾结果。
AI.method: 采用生成函数方法，对随机网络的渗流临界性质进行彻底和完整的分析。
AI.result: 确定了所有临界指数和临界振幅比；揭示了高异质性网络中的交叉现象、非平凡标度形式和超标度违背；澄清了先前文献中的不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究统一了随机网络渗流临界性质的理论框架，特别是对异质性网络的理解，解决了长期存在的矛盾问题。

title: Bayesian inference of wall torques for active Brownian particles
summary: The motility of living things and synthetic self-propelled objects is often described using Active Brownian particles. To capture the interaction of these particles with their often complex environment, this model can be augmented with empirical forces or torques, for example, to describe their alignment with an obstacle or wall after a collision. Here, we assess the quality of these empirical models by comparing their output predictions with trajectories of rod-shaped active particles that scatter sterically at a flat wall. We employ a classical least-squares method to evaluate the instantaneous torque. In addition, we lay out a Bayesian inference procedure to construct the posterior distribution of plausible model parameters. In contrast to the least squares fit, the Bayesian approach does not require orientational data of the active particle and can readily be applied to experimental tracking data.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了活性布朗粒子与墙壁碰撞时经验力/力矩模型的预测质量，采用经典最小二乘法和贝叶斯推断两种方法，其中贝叶斯方法无需取向数据即可应用于实验跟踪数据。
AI.motivation: 活性布朗粒子模型在描述自推进物体与环境（如墙壁）相互作用时，通常依赖经验力或力矩来模拟碰撞后的对齐行为，但这些经验模型的预测质量尚缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 采用经典最小二乘法评估瞬时力矩，并设计了贝叶斯推断流程来构建模型参数的后验分布。
AI.result: 贝叶斯推断方法无需活性粒子的取向数据即可有效估计模型参数，相较于最小二乘法更适用于实验跟踪数据。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法为实验条件下活性粒子与壁面相互作用的模型参数估计提供了更实用的工具。

title: A Density Ratio Super Learner
summary: The estimation of the ratio of two density probability functions is of great interest in many statistics fields, including causal inference. In this study, we develop an ensemble estimator of density ratios with a novel loss function based on super learning. We show that this novel loss function is qualified for building super learners. Two simulations corresponding to mediation analysis and longitudinal modified treatment policy in causal inference, where density ratios are nuisance parameters, are conducted to show our density ratio super learner's performance empirically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超级学习(super learning)的新型密度比集成估计方法，采用原创的损失函数，并在因果推断中的中介分析和纵向修正处理策略两个模拟研究中验证了其作为 nuisance 参数时的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 密度比估计在因果推断等多个统计学领域中具有重要应用，但现有估计方法在灵活性和集成性方面存在不足，需要一种更稳健、更具适应性的集成估计框架。
AI.method: 基于超级学习框架，设计了一种新的损失函数来构建密度比的集成估计器，通过交叉验证等方式组合多个候选估计器，以实现最优的加权集成。
AI.result: 在两个因果推断模拟场景（中介分析中的密度比、纵向修正处理策略中的密度比）中，所提出的密度比超级学习器在作为 nuisance 参数估计时展现了良好的实证性能。
AI.conclusion: 该新型损失函数适用于构建超级学习器，所提出的密度比集成估计方法在因果推断的 nuisance 参数估计中具有实用价值。

title: Density Estimation via Binless Multidimensional Integration
summary: We introduce the Binless Multidimensional Thermodynamic Integration (BMTI) method for nonparametric, robust, and data-efficient density estimation. BMTI estimates the logarithm of the density by initially computing log-density differences between neighbouring data points. Subsequently, such differences are integrated, weighted by their associated uncertainties, using a maximum-likelihood formulation. This procedure can be seen as an extension to a multidimensional setting of the thermodynamic integration, a technique developed in statistical physics. The method leverages the manifold hypothesis, estimating quantities within the intrinsic data manifold without defining an explicit coordinate map. It does not rely on any binning or space partitioning, but rather on the construction of a neighbourhood graph based on an adaptive bandwidth selection procedure.
