BMTI mitigates the limitations commonly associated with traditional nonparametric density estimators, effectively reconstructing smooth profiles even in high-dimensional embedding spaces. The method is tested on a variety of complex synthetic high-dimensional datasets, where it is shown to outperform traditional estimators, and is benchmarked on realistic datasets from the chemical physics literature.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Binless Multidimensional Thermodynamic Integration (BMTI)的非参数、鲁棒且数据高效的密度估计方法，通过计算邻近数据点间的log-密度差并结合最大似然估计进行积分，无需分箱或空间划分，在高维嵌入空间中也能有效重建平滑密度分布。
AI.motivation: 传统非参数密度估计器在高维空间中存在局限性（如维数灾难、分箱带来的偏差），需要一种无需显式坐标映射、不依赖分箱或空间划分的密度估计方法，以在高维嵌入空间中鲁棒且数据高效地估计密度。
AI.method: 1) 计算邻近数据点之间的对数密度差异；2) 使用最大似然框架对这些差异进行积分，并加权其相关不确定性；3) 基于流形假设，在内在数据流形内进行估计，无需显式坐标映射；4) 利用自适应带宽选择的邻域图构建，而非分箱或空间划分。
AI.result: 在多种复杂合成高维数据集上优于传统密度估计器，并在化学物理领域的真实数据集上进行了基准测试，证明了其在高维嵌入空间中重建平滑密度分布的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BMTI方法有效克服了传统非参数密度估计器在高维空间中的常见缺陷，提供了一种非参数、鲁棒且数据高效的密度估计方案，可推广到高维和复杂数据场景。

title: Benchmarking Estimators for Natural Experiments: A Novel Dataset and a Doubly Robust Algorithm
summary: Estimating the effect of treatments from natural experiments, where treatments are pre-assigned, is an important and well-studied problem. We introduce a novel natural experiment dataset obtained from an early childhood literacy nonprofit. Surprisingly, applying over 20 established estimators to the dataset produces inconsistent results in evaluating the nonprofit's efficacy. To address this, we create a benchmark to evaluate estimator accuracy using synthetic outcomes, whose design was guided by domain experts. The benchmark extensively explores performance as real world conditions like sample size, treatment correlation, and propensity score accuracy vary. Based on our benchmark, we observe that the class of doubly robust treatment effect estimators, which are based on simple and intuitive regression adjustment, generally outperform other more complicated estimators by orders of magnitude. To better support our theoretical understanding of doubly robust estimators, we derive a closed form expression for the variance of any such estimator that uses dataset splitting to obtain an unbiased estimate. This expression motivates the design of a new doubly robust estimator that uses a novel loss function when fitting functions for regression adjustment. We release the dataset and benchmark in a Python package; the package is built in a modular way to facilitate new datasets and estimators.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个来自早期儿童识字非营利组织的自然实验数据集，发现20多种现有估计器在该数据集上结果不一致。为此构建了基准测试来评估估计器准确性，发现双重稳健估计器表现优于其他复杂方法，并推导了其方差闭式表达式，进而设计了基于新损失函数的改进估计器。相关数据和代码以Python包形式开源。
AI.motivation: 自然实验中处理效应估计虽已有大量研究，但现有估计器在实际数据集上表现不一致，缺乏系统性的基准评估和理论指导。
AI.method: 1) 收集真实非营利组织自然实验数据；2) 构建基于合成结果的基准测试（由领域专家指导设计）；3) 系统评估20多种现有估计器在不同样本量、处理相关性、倾向得分准确性等条件下的表现；4) 推导使用数据拆分获得无偏估计的双重稳健估计器的方差闭式表达式；5) 基于方差表达式设计新的损失函数，提出改进的双重稳健估计器。
AI.result: 1) 简单的双重稳健估计器（基于回归调整）在性能上比其他复杂估计器高出数量级；2) 推导了双重稳健估计器的方差闭式表达式；3) 基于新损失函数设计了改进的双重稳健估计器。
AI.conclusion: 简单直观的双重稳健估计器在实际应用中被证明更为可靠，理论分析和开源工具包为后续研究提供了坚实基础。

title: Optimization study of a Z-type airflow cooling system of a lithium-ion battery pack
summary: The present study aims to optimize the structural design of a Z-type flow lithium-ion battery pack with a forced air-cooling system (FACS) known as BTMS (Battery Thermal Management System). The main goal is to minimize Tmax (maximum temperature) and δTmax (maximum temperature difference) while ensuring an even airflow distribution within the battery module. The present study thoroughly investigates critical factors such as the inlet air velocity, tapered inlet manifold, and the number of secondary outlets to evaluate their impact on thermal performance and airflow uniformity within the battery module. Increasing the inlet air velocity from 3 to 4.5 m/s significantly improves the thermal cooling performance of the BTMS, resulting in a decrease of 4.57 °C (10.05%) in Tmax and 0.29 °C (9.79%) in δTmax compared to the original 3 m/s velocity. Further, the study assesses the significance of a tapered inlet manifold as a critical factor, revealing its substantial impact on cooling performance and temperature reductions in battery cells 3-9. It also facilitates a more uniform airflow distribution, decreasing the velocity difference between channel 9 and channel 1 from 3.32 m/s to 2.50 m/s. Incorporating 7 secondary outlets significantly improves the heat dissipation ability of the BTMS, resulting in a decrease of 0.894 °C (2.18%) in Tmax and 2.23 °C (72.84%) in δTmax compared to the configuration with 0 secondary outlets. By optimizing these parameters, the aim is to enhance BTMS's capabilities, improving LIB packs' performance and reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Z型流锂离子电池组强制风冷热管理系统的结构优化，通过提高进风速度、采用锥形进气歧管和增加二次出口数量，有效降低了电池最高温度和最大温差，改善了气流分布均匀性。
AI.motivation: 优化Z型流锂离子电池组强制风冷系统的结构设计，最小化电池模块的最高温度(Tmax)和最大温差(δTmax)，同时确保均匀的气流分布，以提升电池组的性能和可靠性。
AI.method: 系统研究了进风速度(3-4.5 m/s)、锥形进气歧管设计以及二次出口数量(0-7个)三个关键因素对热性能和气流均匀性的影响，通过对比不同配置下的Tmax、δTmax和通道间速度差异来评估优化效果。
AI.result: 进风速度从3 m/s提升至4.5 m/s使Tmax降低4.57°C(10.05%)，δTmax降低0.29°C(9.79%)；锥形进气歧管使通道9与通道1的速度差从3.32 m/s降至2.50 m/s；增加7个二次出口使Tmax降低0.894°C(2.18%)，δTmax降低2.23°C(72.84%)。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化进风速度、采用锥形进气歧管和增加二次出口数量，可显著提升BTMS的散热能力和气流均匀性，从而改善锂离子电池组的性能与可靠性。

title: Measure and continuous vector field at a boundary II: geodesics and support propagation
summary: Nonnegative measures that are solutions to a transport equation with continuous coefficients have been widely studied. Because of the low regularity of the associated vector field, there is no natural flow since nonuniqueness of integral curves is the general rule. It has been known since the works by L. Ambrosio [2] and L. Ambrosio and G. Crippa [3, 4] that such measures can be described as a superposition of $δ$-measures supported on integral curves. In this article, motivated by some observability questions for the wave equation, we are interested in such transport equations in the case of domains with boundary. Associated with a wave equation with C^1-coefficients are bicharacteristics that are integral curves of a continuous Hamiltonian vector field. We first study in details their behaviour in the presence of a boundary and define their natural generalisation that follows the laws of geometric optics. Then, we introduce a natural class of transport equations with a source term on the boundary, and we prove that any nonnegative measure satisfying such an equation has a union of maximal generalized bicharacteristics for support. This result is a weak form of the superposition principle in the presence of a boundary. With its companion article [7], this study completes the proof of wave observability generalizing the celebrated result of Bardos, Lebeau, and Rauch [5] in a low regularity framework where coefficients of the wave equation (and associated metric) are C^1 and the boundary and the manifold are C^2.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有界域上具有连续系数的输运方程，证明了满足此类方程的非负测度可由沿广义双特征曲线的δ-测度叠加表示，这是边界情形下叠加原理的弱形式。该结果与姊妹篇[7]共同完成了波方程可观性问题的证明，将Bardos-Lebeau-Rauch经典结果推广到低正则性框架（C^1系数、C^2边界与流形）。
AI.motivation: 受波动方程可观性问题的驱动，需要理解具有边界时连续哈密顿向量场下输运方程的解结构，以将经典可观性结果推广到低正则性情形。
AI.method: 首先详细研究C^1系数波方程的双特征曲线在边界处的行为，定义遵循几何光学定律的广义双特征曲线；然后引入含边界源项的输运方程，证明非负测度解的支持集是极大广义双特征曲线的并集，建立了边界情形下的弱叠加原理。
AI.result: 证明了对满足边界输运方程的非负测度，其支撑集是若干条极大广义双特征曲线的并集，即建立了边界情形下的叠加原理弱形式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作与其姊妹篇[7]共同完成了在C^1系数、C^2边界与流形的低正则性框架下波方程可观性的证明，推广了Bardos-Lebeau-Rauch的经典结果。

title: Explicit desingularisation of Kummer surfaces in characteristic two via specialisation
comment: 30 pages. Code added as an ancillary file. Accepted version to be published in the Journal of Symbolic Computation
summary: We study the birational geometry of the Kummer surfaces associated to the Jacobian varieties of genus two curves, with a particular focus on fields of characteristic two. In order to do so, we explicitly compute a projective embedding of the Jacobian of a general genus two curve and, from this, we construct its associated Kummer surface. This explicit construction produces a model for desingularised Kummer surfaces over any field of characteristic not two, and specialising these equations to characteristic two provides a model of a partial desingularisation. Adapting the classic description of the Picard lattice in terms of tropes, we also describe how to explicitly find completely desingularised models of Kummer surfaces whenever the $p$-rank is not zero. In the final section of this paper, we compute an example of a Kummer surface with everywhere good reduction over a quadratic number field, and draw connections between the models we computed and a criterion that determines when a Kummer surface has good reduction at two.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了与亏格2曲线的雅可比簇相关联的库默尔曲面的双有理几何，特别关注特征为2的域。作者通过显式计算一般亏格2曲线雅可比簇的射影嵌入，构建了其库默尔曲面，得到了特征不为2的域上解奇异化库默尔曲面的模型。将该方程特殊化到特征2时，得到了部分解奇异化模型。利用tropes经典方法描述皮卡格点阵，在p-秩非零时给出了完全解奇异化库默尔曲面的显式构造方法。最后在二次数域上计算了一个具有处处好约化的库默尔曲面实例，并建立了所计算模型与库默尔曲面在2处好约化判定准则之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 库默尔曲面在代数几何中具有重要地位，但特征2域上的情况研究较少，且特征2域上的显式模型构造存在技术困难。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立特征2域上库默尔曲面的系统构造方法。
AI.method: 通过显式计算一般亏格2曲线雅可比簇的射影嵌入，推导其库默尔曲面方程；利用tropes描述皮卡格点阵，在p-秩非零时构造完全解奇异化模型；通过特殊化到特征2域得到部分解奇异化模型。
AI.result: 得到了特征不为2域上解奇异化库默尔曲面的显式模型；给出了特征2域上部分解奇异化模型；在p-秩非零时给出了完全解奇异化模型；在二次数域上构造了处处好约化的库默尔曲面例子。
AI.conclusion: 该工作系统建立了特征2域上库默尔曲面的显式构造理论，并揭示了其与好约化判定准则之间的深刻联系，为后续研究提供了具体模型工具。

title: Two results on the Convex Algebraic Geometry of sets with continuous symmetries
summary: We prove two results on convex subsets of Euclidean spaces invariant under an orthogonal group action. First, we show that invariant spectrahedra admit an equivariant spectrahedral description, i.e., can be described by an equivariant linear matrix inequality. Second, we show that the bijection induced by Kostant's Convexity Theorem between convex subsets invariant under a polar representation and convex subsets of a section invariant under the Weyl group preserves the classes of convex semi-algebraic sets, spectrahedral shadows, and rigidly convex sets.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了欧氏空间中正交群作用下不变凸集的两个结果：一是不变谱面体具有等变谱面体描述（即存在等变线性矩阵不等式表示）；二是Kostant凸性定理诱导的凸集间的双射保持半代数集、谱面体阴影和刚性凸集等凸性类。
AI.motivation: 研究正交群作用下不变凸集的结构性质，特别是谱面体的等变描述以及Kostant凸性定理下凸性类的保持性。
AI.method: 利用正交群作用、极表示、Weyl群、Kostant凸性定理等工具，通过等变线性矩阵不等式和凸性类保持性的理论分析。
AI.result: 证明了不变谱面体具有等变谱面体描述；Kostant凸性定理诱导的双射保持半代数集、谱面体阴影和刚性凸集三类凸性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了正交群作用下不变凸集与截面中Weyl群作用下凸集之间的结构对应关系，拓展了谱面体理论和Kostant凸性定理的应用。

title: Overhanging solitary water waves
summary: We provide the first construction of overhanging gravity water waves having the approximate form of a disk joined to a strip by a thin neck. The waves are solitary with constant vorticity, and exist when an appropriate dimensionless gravitational constant $g>0$ is sufficiently small. Our construction involves combining three explicit solutions to related problems: a disk of fluid in rigid rotation, a linear shear flow in a strip, and a rescaled version of an exceptional domain discovered by Hauswirth, Hélein, and Pacard \cite{hauswirth-helein-pacard}. The method developed here is related to the construction of constant mean curvature surfaces through gluing.

AI.tldr: 本文首次构造了具有悬垂形态的重力水波——近似为圆盘通过细颈连接条带。这类波是恒定涡量的孤立波，在无量纲重力常数g足够小时存在。构造方法结合了三个显式解：刚性旋转的流体圆盘、条带中的线性剪切流，以及Hauswirth等人发现的缩放异常域，采用类似常平均曲率曲面的粘合技术。
AI.motivation: 悬垂重力水波在自然界中罕见且难以数学构造，此前缺乏严格的数学存在性证明。作者旨在填补这一空白，通过粘合方法构造具有悬垂形状的孤立重力水波。
AI.method: 将三个已知显式解（旋转圆盘解、线性剪切流条带解、Hauswirth-Hélein-Pacard异常域缩放解）通过类似常平均曲率曲面粘合的技术进行组合，在重力常数g足够小的条件下实现光滑拼接。
AI.result: 成功构造了首例具有悬垂形态的恒定涡量重力水波，证明在g>0足够小时存在近似圆盘-条带-细颈形状的孤立波解。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次从数学上证明了悬垂重力水波的存在性，拓展了水波理论的解空间，并为将几何粘合方法应用于流体力学问题提供了范例。

title: Standing waves with prescribed mass for Schrodinger equations with competing Van Der Waals type potentials
summary: We investigate standing waves with prescribed mass for a class of Schrodinger equations with competing Van Der Waals type potentials, arising in a model of non-relativistic bosonic atoms and molecules. By developing an approach based on a direct minimization of the energy functional on a new constrained manifold, we establish the existence of two normalized solutions for the corresponding stationary problem. One is a local minimizer with positive level and the other one is a global minimizer with negative level. Moreover, we find that the global minimizer is farther away from the origin than the local minimizer. Finally, we explore the relations between the ground state solution and the least action solution, and some dynamical behavior and scattering results are presented as well.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类具有竞争型范德瓦尔斯势的薛定谔方程，通过在新型约束流形上直接最小化能量泛函，建立了两个归一化解（正能级局部极小值和负能级全局极小值）的存在性，并发现全局极小值远离原点，同时探讨了基态解与最小作用解的关系及动力学行为。
AI.motivation: 研究非相对论玻色原子和分子模型中出现的具有竞争型范德瓦尔斯势的薛定谔方程，旨在建立具有指定质量的归一化解的存在性理论。
AI.method: 开发了一种基于新型约束流形上直接最小化能量泛函的方法，从而得到两个归一化解：一个为正能级的局部极小值，另一个为负能级的全局极小值。
AI.result: 建立了两个归一化解的存在性：正能级局部极小值和负能级全局极小值；全局极小值比局部极小值更远离原点；探讨了基态解与最小作用解的关系，并给出了动力学行为与散射结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法为具有竞争型范德瓦尔斯势的薛定谔方程提供了有效的归一化解构造途径，揭示了局部与全局极小解的空间位置关系及其动力学性质。

title: A Pipeline for Data-Driven Learning of Topological Features with Applications to Protein Stability Prediction
summary: In this paper, we propose a data-driven method to learn interpretable topological features of biomolecular data and demonstrate the efficacy of parsimonious models trained on topological features in predicting the stability of synthetic mini proteins. We compare models that leverage automatically-learned structural features against models trained on a large set of biophysical features determined by subject-matter experts (SME). Our models, based only on topological features of the protein structures, achieved 92%-99% of the performance of SME-based models in terms of the average precision score. By interrogating model performance and feature importance metrics, we extract numerous insights that uncover high correlations between topological features and SME features. We further showcase how combining topological features and SME features can lead to improved model performance over either feature set used in isolation, suggesting that, in some settings, topological features may provide new discriminating information not captured in existing SME features that are useful for protein stability prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，用于学习生物分子数据中可解释的拓扑特征，并证明了基于拓扑特征的简约模型在预测合成微型蛋白质稳定性方面的有效性。仅使用拓扑特征的模型达到了专家特征模型92%-99%的平均精度性能。将拓扑特征与专家特征结合可进一步提升模型性能，表明拓扑特征可能提供了专家特征未捕获的新判别信息。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质稳定性预测模型依赖大量由领域专家手工设计的生物物理特征，这些特征构建成本高且可能存在信息冗余。作者希望探索能否通过数据驱动的方式自动学习蛋白质结构的拓扑特征，以更简洁的方式实现同等甚至更优的预测性能。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动方法从蛋白质结构中自动学习可解释的拓扑特征，训练简约模型用于预测合成微型蛋白质的稳定性。与基于大量专家设计生物物理特征的模型进行性能对比，并通过特征重要性分析揭示拓扑特征与专家特征之间的高相关性。
AI.result: 仅基于拓扑特征的模型在平均精度上达到了专家特征模型92%-99%的性能。将拓扑特征与专家特征结合使用可进一步提升预测性能，优于单独使用任何一种特征集。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑特征能够以更少的特征数量实现接近专家特征的预测性能，且包含专家特征未捕获的互补判别信息，有助于提升蛋白质稳定性预测模型的整体表现。

title: Causal inference through multi-stage learning and doubly robust deep neural networks
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated remarkable empirical performance in large-scale supervised learning problems, particularly in scenarios where both the sample size $n$ and the dimension of covariates $p$ are large. This study delves into the application of DNNs across a wide spectrum of intricate causal inference tasks, where direct estimation falls short and necessitates multi-stage learning. Examples include estimating the conditional average treatment effect and dynamic treatment effect. In this framework, DNNs are constructed sequentially, with subsequent stages building upon preceding ones. To mitigate the impact of estimation errors from early stages on subsequent ones, we integrate DNNs in a doubly robust manner. In contrast to previous research, our study offers theoretical assurances regarding the effectiveness of DNNs in settings where the dimensionality $p$ expands with the sample size. These findings are significant independently and extend to degenerate single-stage learning problems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度神经网络在高维因果推断任务中的理论保证，提出了一种双重稳健的DNN框架，适用于条件平均处理效应和动态处理效应等多阶段学习问题，并证明了当维度p随样本量n增长时方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的DNN因果推断研究缺乏对高维场景（p随n增长）的理论保障，且多阶段学习中早期误差会向后传播，亟需一种既能处理高维又能控制误差累积的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用逐阶段构建DNN的方式，并在每个阶段融入双重稳健（Doubly Robust）估计技术，以减轻早期阶段估计误差对后续阶段的影响。
AI.result: 在p随n增长的高维设置下，提供了DNN在因果推断任务中的理论有效性保证；该结果也退化适用于单阶段学习问题。
AI.conclusion: 双重稳健的DNN框架能有效处理高维多阶段因果推断问题，为DNN在复杂因果推断中的可靠应用提供了理论基础。

title: Sliding-Window Thompson Sampling for Non-Stationary Settings
summary: Non-stationary multi-armed bandits (NS-MABs) model sequential decision-making problems in which the expected rewards of a set of actions, a.k.a.~arms, evolve over time. In this paper, we fill a gap in the literature by providing a novel analysis of Thompson sampling-inspired (TS) algorithms for NS-MABs that both corrects and generalizes existing work. Specifically, we study the cumulative frequentist regret of two algorithms based on sliding-window TS approaches with different priors, namely $\textit{Beta-SWTS}$ and $\textit{$γ$-SWGTS}$. We derive a unifying regret upper bound for these algorithms that applies to any arbitrary NS-MAB (with either Bernoulli or subgaussian rewards). Our result introduces new indices that capture the inherent sources of complexity in the learning problem. Then, we specialize our general result to two of the most common NS-MAB settings: the $\textit{abruptly changing}$ and the $\textit{smoothly changing}$ environments, showing that it matches state-of-the-art results. Finally, we evaluate the performance of the analyzed algorithms in simulated environments and compare them with state-of-the-art approaches for NS-MABs.

AI.tldr: 本文对非平稳多臂老虎机（NS-MABs）中的汤普森采样（TS）算法进行了统一的遗憾上界分析，提出了两种基于滑动窗口的TS算法（Beta-SWTS和γ-SWGTS），并推导出适用于任意NS-MAB（伯努利或次高斯奖励）的通用遗憾界，在突变和平滑变化两种常见环境下均达到了现有最优结果。
AI.motivation: 填补非平稳多臂老虎机中汤普森采样算法理论分析的空白，纠正并泛化现有工作中的不足，提供统一的遗憾分析方法。
AI.method: 提出了两种基于滑动窗口的汤普森采样算法（Beta-SWTS和γ-SWGTS），分别采用不同的先验分布；推导了适用于任意非平稳MAB（伯努利或次高斯奖励）的统一遗憾上界；引入了能够捕捉学习问题内在复杂度来源的新指标。
AI.result: 推导出统一的遗憾上界，该上界在突变环境和平滑变化环境两种常见非平稳设定下均与现有最优结果匹配。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的滑动窗口TS算法在非平稳环境中表现良好，理论分析具有通用性，仿真实验进一步验证了其与现有最优方法的竞争力。

title: Novel Pressure-Equilibrium and Kinetic-Energy Preserving fluxes for compressible flows based on the harmonic mean
summary: Employing physically-consistent numerical methods is an important step towards attaining robust and accurate numerical simulations. When addressing compressible flows, in addition to preserving kinetic energy at a discrete level, as done in the incompressible case, additional properties are sought after, such as the ability to preserve the equilibrium of pressure that can be found at contact interfaces. This paper investigates the general conditions of the spatial numerical discretizations to achieve the pressure equilibrium preserving property (PEP). Schemes from the literature are analyzed in this respect, and procedures to impart the PEP property to existing discretizations are proposed. Additionally, new PEP numerical schemes are introduced through minor modifications of classical ones. Numerical tests confirmed the theory hereby presented and showed that the modifications, beyond the enforcement of the PEP property, have a generally positive impact on the performances of the original schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可压缩流动数值离散中保持压力平衡特性（PEP）的通用条件，通过分析现有格式并提出修正方法，实现了在接触界面处保持压力平衡的数值方案，数值实验验证了理论并表明改进方案在保持PEP的同时提升了原始格式的性能。
AI.motivation: 在可压缩流动数值模拟中，除了像不可压缩情形那样保持离散动能守恒外，还需要额外的性质——即在接触界面处保持压力平衡的能力（PEP）。现有格式未必具备此性质，因此需要系统研究实现PEP的通用离散条件，并改进现有格式。
AI.method: 首先推导空间数值离散实现压力平衡保持（PEP）的通用条件；然后分析文献中现有格式的PEP特性；提出将PEP特性赋予现有离散格式的修正程序；通过经典格式的微调引入新的PEP数值格式。
AI.result: 数值测试验证了所提出的理论，并表明修正后的格式不仅满足了PEP性质，还对原始格式的性能产生了普遍积极的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与格式修正，可以系统地实现可压缩流动数值离散中的压力平衡保持特性，且该修正对原始数值方案的整体性能有正面作用。

title: Serrin's overdetermined problem in rough domains
summary: The classical Serrin's overdetermined theorem states that a $C^2$ bounded domain, which admits a function with constant Laplacian that satisfies both constant Dirichlet and Neumann boundary conditions, must necessarily be a ball. While extensions of this theorem to non-smooth domains have been explored since the 1990s, the applicability of Serrin's theorem to Lipschitz domains remained unresolved. This paper answers this open question affirmatively. Actually, our approach shows that the result holds for domains that are sets of finite perimeter with a uniform upper bound on the density, and it also allows for slit discontinuities.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Serrin超定定理在Lipschitz域以及更一般的有限周长集（具有均匀密度上界）上成立，从而解决了自1990年代以来悬而未决的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 经典Serrin超定定理要求$C^2$光滑有界域，但自1990年代以来，将其推广到非光滑域（特别是Lipschitz域）的问题一直未解决，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 作者采用了有限周长集框架，并引入均匀密度上界条件，同时允许缝隙不连续性，从而突破了对域光滑性的传统要求。
AI.result: 成功证明了Serrin定理在Lipschitz域上成立，且进一步推广到具有均匀密度上界的有限周长集，甚至允许域存在缝隙不连续结构。
AI.conclusion: 该结果从本质上扩展了Serrin超定定理的适用范围，为非光滑域上的超定问题提供了完整的理论解答。

title: On the instability of syzygy bundles on toric surfaces
summary: We show that for every toric surface apart from the projective plane and a product of two projective lines and every ample line bundle there exists a polarisation such that the syzygy bundle associated to sufficiently high powers of the line bundle is not slope stable.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了除射影平面和两条射影直线的乘积外，每个环面曲面上的充分高次幂的线丛对应的合冲丛都不是斜率稳定的。
AI.motivation: 研究环面曲线上合冲丛的稳定性，特别是除了已知的射影平面和射影直线乘积两种特例外，其他所有环面曲面的情况。
AI.method: 通过构造特定极化，证明对于任意环面曲面（除两种例外）和任意丰沛线丛，存在极化使得充分高次幂的线丛对应的合冲丛不是斜率稳定的。
AI.result: 证明了对于除射影平面和两条射影直线的乘积外的所有环面曲面，都存在极化使得充分高次幂线丛的合冲丛不是斜率稳定的。
AI.conclusion: 环面曲面上合冲丛的稳定性存在反例，只有射影平面和射影直线乘积这两种特例可能保持稳定性。

title: Topology of $\mathbb{G}_m$-actions and applications to the moduli of Higgs bundles
comment: Accepted version. To appear in Math. Res. Lett
summary: We explain some results concerning the topology of varieties and stacks equipped with an action of the multiplicative group $\mathbb{G}_m$. We apply these techniques to the moduli of Higgs bundles. Our main application is to upgrade the cohomological Nonabelian Hodge Theorem in positive characteristic to an isomorphism of cohomology rings compatible with cup product.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了乘法群作用下簇与栈的拓扑结构，并将其应用于Higgs丛模空间。主要成果是将正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇上同调定理升级为与杯积兼容的上同调环同构。
AI.motivation: 乘法群作用下的簇与栈的拓扑结构尚未被充分理解，且正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇定理仅停留在上同调群层次，未能保持环结构。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 首先建立乘法群作用下簇和栈的拓扑结果，然后将这些技术应用于Higgs丛模空间，通过仔细分析杯积兼容性，将已有的上同调群同构提升为上同调环同构。
AI.result: 成功将正特征下的非阿贝尔霍奇定理升级为与杯积兼容的上同调环同构。
AI.conclusion: 建立了乘法群作用下簇与栈的拓扑理论，并证明该理论在Higgs丛模空间上的应用能实现上同调环结构的完整保持。

title: On the monotonicity of the Fisher information for the Boltzmann equation
summary: We prove that the Fisher information is monotone decreasing in time along solutions of the space-homogeneous Boltzmann equation for a large class of collision kernels covering all classical interactions derived from systems of particles. For general collision kernels, a sufficient condition for the monotonicity of the Fisher information along the flow is related to the best constant for an integro-differential inequality for functions on the sphere, which belongs in the family of the Log-Sobolev inequalities. As a consequence, we establish the existence of global smooth solutions to the space-homogeneous Boltzmann equation in the main situation of interest where this was not known, namely the regime of very soft potentials. This is opening the path to the completion of both the classical program of qualitative study of space-homogeneous Boltzmann equation, initiated by Carleman, and the program of using the Fisher information in the study of the Boltzmann equation, initiated by McKean. From the proofs and discussion emerges a strengthened picture of the links between kinetic theory, information theory and log-Sobolev inequalities.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在空间均匀Boltzmann方程中，Fisher信息随时间单调递减，适用于一大类碰撞核，包括所有经典粒子系统相互作用。这一结果建立了极软势能区域全局光滑解的存在性，并为动力学理论、信息论和对数Sobolev不等式之间的联系提供了强化图景。
AI.motivation: 完成Carleman发起的空间均匀Boltzmann方程定性研究的经典纲领，以及McKean发起的利用Fisher信息研究Boltzmann方程的纲领；解决极软势能区域全局光滑解存在性的关键未决问题。
AI.method: 建立了与球面上函数的积分-微分不等式最佳常数相关的充分条件（属于Log-Sobolev不等式族），以证明Fisher信息沿流的单调性。
AI.result: 证明了Fisher信息在时间上单调递减；建立了极软势能区域全局光滑解的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 强化了动力学理论、信息论和Log-Sobolev不等式之间的联系，为Boltzmann方程的定性研究完成奠定基础。

title: Energy identity for the incompressible Cahn--Hilliard/Navier--Stokes system with non-degenerate mobility
summary: We consider the Cahn--Hilliard/Navier--Stokes system with non-degenerate mobility in the space-periodic case, describing the flow of two viscous immiscible and incompressible Newtonian fluids with matched densities. We identify sufficient conditions on the velocity field for weak solutions to satisfy an energy identity, improving previous results on the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了空间周期情形下具有非退化迁移率的Cahn-Hilliard/Navier-Stokes系统，该模型描述两种密度匹配的粘性不相溶不可压缩牛顿流体。作者识别出了弱解满足能量恒等式的速度场充分条件，相较于先前文献有所改进。
AI.motivation: 为Cahn-Hilliard/Navier-Stokes系统弱解的能量恒等式建立更宽松的充分条件，改进已有理论结果。
AI.method: 在空间周期边界条件下，考虑非退化迁移率，对弱解的速度场施加特定充分条件进行分析。
AI.result: 找到了比现有文献更优的速度场充分条件，使得弱解能够满足能量恒等式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提升了Cahn-Hilliard/Navier-Stokes系统弱解的正则性理论，为后续分析提供了更优的条件框架。

title: Derivative of the Riemann-Hilbert map
summary:
Given a pair $(X,
abla)$, consisting of a closed Riemann surface $X$ and a holomorphic connection $
abla$ on the trivial principal bundle $X	imes\mathrm{SL}_2(\mathbb{C})	o X$, the Riemann-Hilbert map sends $(X,
abla)$ to its monodromy representation. We compute the derivative of this map, and provide a simple description of the locus where it is injective, recovering in the process several previously obtained results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了闭黎曼曲面上的全纯联络的Riemann-Hilbert映射的导数，给出了该映射单射区域的简洁描述，并统一了多个先前结果。
AI.motivation: 理解Riemann-Hilbert映射的局部性质（尤其是其导数的单射性）对于研究模空间上的几何结构和微分方程理论具有基础性意义，但此前缺乏对该映射导数的系统计算和单射区域的统一描述。
AI.method: 对Riemann-Hilbert映射进行微分计算，分析其导数的核与像，从而刻画单射性成立的充分必要条件。
AI.result: 给出了Riemann-Hilbert映射导数的显式计算，并精确描述了该映射为单射的参数区域，该描述简洁且统一涵盖了多个已知结论。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过计算Riemann-Hilbert映射的导数，提供了其单射性的完整刻画，不仅统一了已有结果，也为进一步研究模空间的几何提供了工具。

title: KHNNs: hypercomplex neural networks computations via Keras using TensorFlow and PyTorch
summary: Neural networks used in computations with more advanced algebras than real numbers perform better in some applications. However, there is no general framework for constructing hypercomplex neural networks. We propose a library integrated with Keras that can do computations within TensorFlow and PyTorch. It provides Dense and Convolutional 1D, 2D, and 3D layers architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出一个与Keras集成的库，支持在TensorFlow和PyTorch中进行超复数神经网络计算，提供Dense和1D/2D/3D卷积层架构。
AI.motivation: 超复数代数在神经网络中表现更优，但缺乏构建超复数神经网络的通用框架。
AI.method: 开发一个与Keras集成的库，在TensorFlow和PyTorch框架内实现超复数计算，并提供Dense层及1D、2D、3D卷积层架构。
AI.result: 成功构建了一个跨框架（TensorFlow/PyTorch）的超复数神经网络库，并与Keras集成。
AI.conclusion: 该库填补了超复数神经网络通用框架的空白，便于在主流深度学习框架中应用超复数计算。

title: Learning to Embed Distributions via Maximum Kernel Entropy
summary: Empirical data can often be considered as samples from a set of probability distributions. Kernel methods have emerged as a natural approach for learning to classify these distributions. Although numerous kernels between distributions have been proposed, applying kernel methods to distribution regression tasks remains challenging, primarily because selecting a suitable kernel is not straightforward. Surprisingly, the question of learning a data-dependent distribution kernel has received little attention. In this paper, we propose a novel objective for the unsupervised learning of data-dependent distribution kernel, based on the principle of entropy maximization in the space of probability measure embeddings. We examine the theoretical properties of the latent embedding space induced by our objective, demonstrating that its geometric structure is well-suited for solving downstream discriminative tasks. Finally, we demonstrate the performance of the learned kernel across different modalities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于熵最大化原理的无监督数据依赖分布核学习方法，其学到的嵌入空间几何结构有利于下游判别任务，并在多种模态上验证了性能。
AI.motivation: 分布回归任务中，选择合适的核函数具有挑战性，而数据依赖的分布核学习问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 基于概率测度嵌入空间中的熵最大化原理，提出了无监督学习数据依赖分布核的新目标函数。
AI.result: 理论分析了潜在嵌入空间的几何结构适合下游判别任务；实验展示了学习到的核在不同模态上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的无监督分布核学习方法有效，且学到的嵌入空间具有良好的几何特性，适用于多种模态的分布回归任务。

title: Very high-order symmetric positive-interior quadrature rules on triangles and tetrahedra
summary: We present novel fully-symmetric quadrature rules with positive weights and strictly interior nodes of degrees up to 84 on triangles and 40 on tetrahedra. Initial guesses for solving the nonlinear systems of equations needed to derive quadrature rules are generated by forming tensor-product structures on quadrilateral/hexahedral subdomains of the simplices using the Legendre-Gauss nodes on the first half of the line reference element. In combination with a methodology for node elimination, these initial guesses lead to the development of highly efficient quadrature rules, even for very high polynomial degrees. Using existing estimates of the minimum number of quadrature points for a given degree, we show that the derived quadrature rules on triangles and tetrahedra are more than 95% and 80% efficient, respectively, for almost all degrees. The accuracy of the quadrature rules is demonstrated through numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了三角形（最高84阶）和四面体（最高40阶）上的全新全对称正权内点求积规则，通过Legendre-Gauss节点在四边形/六面体子域上的张量积结构生成初值，结合节点消除方法，实现了非常高的求积效率（三角形>95%，四面体>80%），并通过数值算例验证了精度。
AI.motivation: 为高精度数值计算在单纯形（三角形和四面体）上开发高效的全对称正权求积规则，解决现有规则在较高多项式阶数下效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 利用线参考单元前半区间上的Legendre-Gauss节点在单纯形的四边形/六面体子域上形成张量积结构作为非线性方程组的初值，结合节点消除方法，求解全对称正权求积规则。
AI.result: 得到了三角形上最高84阶、四面体上最高40阶的全对称正权内点求积规则；几乎所有阶数下，三角形效率>95%，四面体效率>80%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能高效生成高阶单纯形上的全对称正权求积规则，效率接近理论下界，数值算例验证了良好的精度。

title: Accelerated 3D Maxwell Integral Equation Solver using the Interpolated Factored Green Function Method
summary: This article presents an $O(N\log N)$ method for numerical solution of Maxwell's equations for dielectric scatterers using a 3D boundary integral equation (BIE) method. The underlying BIE method used is based on a hybrid Nyström-collocation method using Chebyshev polynomials. It is well known that such an approach produces a dense linear system, which requires $O(N^2)$ operations in each step of an iterative solver. In this work, we propose an approach using the recently introduced Interpolated Factored Green's Function (IFGF) acceleration strategy to reduce the cost of each iteration to $O(N\log N)$. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first ever application of the IFGF method to fully-vectorial 3D Maxwell problems. The Chebyshev-based integral solver and IFGF method are first introduced, followed by the extension of the scalar IFGF to the vectorial Maxwell case. Several examples are presented verifying the $O(N\log N)$ computational complexity of the approach, including scattering from spheres, complex CAD models, and nanophotonic waveguiding devices. In one particular example with more than 6 million unknowns, the accelerated IFGF solver runs 42x faster than the unaccelerated method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于插值因子格林函数（IFGF）加速策略的O(N log N)方法，用于求解三维麦克斯韦方程的边界积分方程，首次将IFGF方法应用于全矢量3D Maxwell问题，并通过多个算例验证了其计算复杂度和加速效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的3D边界积分方程方法求解Maxwell方程时会产生稠密线性系统，每次迭代需要O(N²)操作，计算成本高。本文旨在利用IFGF加速策略将每次迭代的计算成本降低到O(N log N)。
AI.method: 采用基于Chebyshev多项式的混合Nyström-配置法作为底层BIE方法，将标量IFGF方法扩展到矢量Maxwell情形，通过插值因子格林函数加速策略减少迭代求解的计算复杂度。
AI.result: 验证了O(N log N)的计算复杂度；在超过600万未知量的算例中，加速后的IFGF求解器比未加速方法快42倍。
AI.conclusion: IFGF加速策略可有效应用于全矢量3D Maxwell问题的BIE求解，显著降低计算成本，适用于散射体、复杂CAD模型及纳米光子波导器件等场景。

title: Science DMZ Networks: How Different are They Really?
summary:
The Science Demilitarized Zone (Science DMZ) is a network environment optimized for scientific applications. A Science DMZ provides an environment mostly free from competing traffic flows and complex security middleware such as firewalls or intrusion detection systems that often impede data transfer performance. The Science DMZ model provides a reference set of network design patterns, tuned hosts and protocol stacks dedicated to large data transfers and streamlined security postures that significantly improve data transfer performance, accelerating scientific collaborations and discovery.
  Over the past decade, many universities and organizations have adopted this model for their research computing. Despite becoming increasingly popular, there is a lack of quantitative studies comparing such a specialized network to conventional production networks regarding network characteristics and data transfer performance. We strive to answer the following research questions in this study: Does a Science DMZ exhibit significantly different behavior than a general-purpose campus network? Does it improve application performance compared to such general-purpose networks? Through a two-year-long quantitative network measurement study, we find that a Science DMZ exhibits lower latency, higher throughput, and lower jitter behaviors. However, we also see several non-intuitive results. For example, a DMZ may take a longer route to external destinations and experience higher latency than the campus network. While the DMZ model benefits researchers, the benefits are not automatic - careful network tuning based on specific use cases is required to realize the full potential of such infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文通过为期两年的定量测量研究，系统比较了Science DMZ（科学非军事区）与通用校园网络在网络特征和数据传输性能上的差异。研究发现Science DMZ总体上具有更低延迟、更高吞吐量和更低抖动，但也存在一些反直觉的结果，如通往外部目的地时可能路由更长、延迟更高。DMZ的优势并非自动获得，需要针对特定用例进行精细网络调优。
AI.motivation: 尽管Science DMZ在过去十年中被广泛采用，但缺乏定量研究将其与常规生产网络在网络特征和数据传输性能方面进行系统比较。作者旨在回答两个核心问题：（1）Science DMZ是否表现出与通用校园网络显著不同的行为？（2）相比通用网络，它是否提升了应用性能？
AI.method: 通过为期两年的定量网络测量研究，对比Science DMZ与通用校园网络在延迟、吞吐量、抖动等关键网络指标上的差异，并分析数据传输性能表现。
AI.result: Science DMZ总体上表现出更低延迟、更高吞吐量和更低抖动；但存在反直觉现象：DMZ可能因路由更长导致访问外部目的地时的延迟高于校园网络。此外，DMZ的优势并非自动获得。
AI.conclusion: Science DMZ模型能够提升科研数据传输性能，但需要根据具体使用场景进行精细的网络调优才能充分发挥其潜力，不能简单地认为部署DMZ就能自动获得性能提升。

title: Optimal Gaussian Strategies for Vector-valued Witsenhausen Counterexample with Non-causal State Estimator
summary: In this study, we investigate a vector-valued Witsenhausen model where the second decision maker (DM) acquires a vector of observations before selecting a vector of estimations. Here, the first DM acts causally whereas the second DM estimates non-causally. When the vector length grows, we characterize, via a single-letter expression, the optimal trade-off between the power cost at the first DM and the estimation cost at the second DM. In this paper, we show that the best linear scheme is achieved by using the time-sharing method between two affine strategies, which coincides with the convex envelope of the solution of Witsenhausen in 1968. Here also, Witsenhausen's two-point strategy and the scheme of Grover and Sahai in 2010 where both devices operate non-causally, outperform our best linear scheme. Therefore, gains obtained with block-coding schemes are only attainable if all DMs operate non-causally.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了向量值Witsenhausen模型，其中第二个决策者（DM）非因果地观测向量并选择估计向量，而第一个DM因果地行动。当向量长度增长时，通过单字母表达式刻画了第一个DM的功率成本与第二个DM的估计成本之间的最优权衡。研究表明，最佳线性方案通过两个仿射策略之间的时间共享实现，这恰好是Witsenhausen（1968）解的凸包。然而，Witsenhausen的两点策略以及Grover和Sahai（2010）中两个设备都非因果工作的方案，均优于本文的最佳线性方案。因此，块编码方案带来的增益仅在所有DM都非因果操作时才能实现。
AI.motivation: 研究向量值Witsenhausen模型，探究当第二个DM非因果观测时，第一个DM因果行动下的最优功率-估计成本权衡。
AI.method: 采用单字母表达式刻画最优权衡；通过时间共享两个仿射策略实现最佳线性方案。
AI.result: 最佳线性方案等于Witsenhausen（1968）解的凸包；但非因果方案（Witsenhausen两点策略和Grover-Sahai方案）优于最佳线性方案。
AI.conclusion: 块编码增益仅在所有DM都非因果操作时才能实现，若第二DM非因果而第一DM因果，则无法获得此类增益。

title: FastBO: Fast HPO and NAS with Adaptive Fidelity Identification
comment: The 18th European Conference on Computer Vision ECCV 2024 Women in Computer Vision Workshop
summary: Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) and neural architecture search (NAS) are powerful in attaining state-of-the-art machine learning models, with Bayesian optimization (BO) standing out as a mainstream method. Extending BO into the multi-fidelity setting has been an emerging research topic, but faces the challenge of determining an appropriate fidelity for each hyperparameter configuration to fit the surrogate model. To tackle the challenge, we propose a multi-fidelity BO method named FastBO, which adaptively decides the fidelity for each configuration and efficiently offers strong performance. The advantages are achieved based on the novel concepts of efficient point and saturation point for each configuration.We also show that our adaptive fidelity identification strategy provides a way to extend any single-fidelity method to the multi-fidelity setting, highlighting its generality and applicability.

AI.tldr: 提出FastBO方法，通过自适应地确定每个超参数配置的保真度（基于高效点和饱和点概念），将贝叶斯优化扩展到多保真度设置，并可将任何单保真度方法扩展至多保真度场景。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯优化（BO）扩展至多保真度设置时，关键挑战在于如何为每个超参数配置确定合适的保真度以拟合代理模型。
AI.method: 提出FastBO方法，引入高效点（efficient point）和饱和点（saturation point）两个新概念，自适应地为每个配置决策保真度。
AI.result: FastBO能够自适应地决定每个配置的保真度，高效地提供强性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应保真度识别策略提供了一种将任何单保真度方法推广至多保真度设置的通用方式，具有广泛的通用性和适用性。

title: A novel shape optimization approach for source identification in elliptic equations
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel shape optimization approach for the source identification of elliptic equations. This identification problem arises from two application backgrounds: actuator placement in PDE-constrained optimal controls and the regularized least-squares formulation of source identifications. The optimization problem seeks both the source strength and its support. By eliminating the variable associated with the source strength, we reduce the problem to a shape optimization problem for a coupled elliptic system, known as the first-order optimality system. As a model problem, we derive the shape derivative for the regularized least-squares formulation of the inverse source problem and propose a gradient descent shape optimization algorithm, implemented using the level-set method. Several numerical experiments are presented to demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的形状优化方法，用于椭圆方程源项识别问题。通过消除源强度变量，将问题简化为耦合椭圆系统的形状优化问题，推导了形状导数，并基于水平集方法实现了梯度下降形状优化算法。数值实验验证了算法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 源识别问题源于两个应用背景：PDE约束最优控制中的执行器布局问题，以及源识别的正则化最小二乘公式。传统方法在同时求解源强度及其支撑区域时面临挑战，因此需要一种能够联合优化的新方法。
AI.method: 首先将源识别问题转化为同时优化源强度及其支撑的形状优化问题；然后通过消去源强度变量，将问题简化为耦合椭圆系统（一阶最优性系统）的形状优化问题；针对正则化最小二乘形式的逆源问题推导形状导数；最后采用水平集方法实现梯度下降形状优化算法。
AI.result: 通过多个数值实验展示了所提出算法在源项识别问题中的有效性，能够准确地恢复源支撑区域。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的形状优化方法能够有效处理椭圆方程源识别问题，水平集方法为支撑区域的演化提供了灵活而稳健的数值实现框架。

title: Open-loop and closed-loop solvabilities for zero-sum stochastic linear quadratic differential games of Markovian regime switching system
summary: This paper investigates zero-sum stochastic linear quadratic (SLQ) differential games with Markovian jumps. Open-loop and closed-loop solvabilities are studied by employing a new ``decomposition method", which decomposes the open-loop and closed-loop solvability problems of zero-sum SLQ differential games into two coupled SLQ control problems. Under the uniform convexity-concavity condition, we construct the open-loop saddle point along with its closed-loop representation based on the solution to a system of constrained coupled differential Riccati equations (CDREs), whose solvability is also established by employing the dimension extension technique and the continuation method. Finally, we provide a concrete example and present its closed-form saddle point based on the theoretical results obtained.

AI.tldr: 本文研究带马尔可夫跳的零和随机线性二次微分博弈，通过“分解方法”将开环和闭环可解性问题分解为两个耦合的SLQ控制问题，在一致凸-凹条件下基于约束耦合微分Riccati方程的解构造了开环鞍点及其闭环表示，并利用维数扩展技术和延拓法证明了CDREs的可解性。
AI.motivation: 现有零和随机线性二次微分博弈研究多针对不带跳的情形，而对带马尔可夫跳的情形，开环与闭环可解性问题的系统研究尚不充分，需要新的理论框架来统一处理这两类可解性问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的“分解方法”，将开环和闭环可解性问题分解为两个耦合的SLQ控制问题；利用一致凸-凹条件，基于约束耦合微分Riccati方程（CDREs）的解构造开环鞍点及其闭环表示；采用维数扩展技术和延拓法建立CDREs的可解性。
AI.result: 在一致凸-凹条件下，成功构造了开环鞍点及其闭环表示；证明了约束耦合微分Riccati方程系统的可解性；给出了具体的数值例子并呈现了闭环形式的鞍点。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分解方法有效解决了带马尔可夫跳的零和SLQ微分博弈的开环与闭环可解性问题，为相关领域提供了统一的理论框架和分析工具。

title: Bubble collapse near a wall. Part 1: An experimental study on the impact of shock waves and microjet on the wall pressure
summary: This study examines the pressure exerted by a cavitation bubble collapsing near a rigid wall. A laser-generated bubble in a water basin undergoes growth, collapse, second growth, and final collapse. Shock waves and liquid jets from non-spherical collapses are influenced by the stand-off ratio $γ$, defined as the bubble centroid distance from the wall divided by the bubble radius. We detail shock mechanisms, such as tip or torus collapse, for various $γ$ values. High-speed and Schlieren imaging visualize the microjet and shock waves. The microjet's evolution is tracked for large $γ$, while shock waves are captured in composite images showing multiple shock positions. Quantitative analyses of the microjet interface, shock wave velocities, and impact times are reported. Wall-mounted sensors and a needle hydrophone measure pressure and compare with high-speed observations to assess the dominant contributions to pressure changes with $γ$, revealing implications for cavitation erosion mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验探究了空化气泡在刚性壁面附近坍塌时产生的压力机制，利用激光生成气泡并结合高速成像与压力传感器，分析了不同距离比γ下的激波、微射流及压力变化规律，揭示了空蚀机理的关键影响因素。
AI.motivation: 空化气泡在刚性壁面附近坍塌时会产生高压冲击波和高速微射流，是导致水力机械表面空蚀破坏的主要原因。然而，不同距离比下激波与微射流对壁面压力的相对贡献尚不明确，缺乏系统的定量实验研究。
AI.method: 在盛水容器中用激光产生单个空化气泡，通过改变气泡中心到壁面的距离与气泡半径之比γ（即距离比）来控制实验条件。使用高速摄像和纹影成像分别记录微射流和激波的发展过程，同时利用壁面安装的传感器和针式水听器同步测量压力，将压力数据与光学观测结果进行对比分析。
AI.result: 获得了不同γ下微射流界面演化、激波传播速度及冲击时间的定量数据；通过复合图像清晰地捕捉了激波的多位置信息；揭示了不同γ下激波（源自尖端坍塌或环状坍塌）与微射流对壁面压力的主导作用变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 空化气泡近壁坍塌对壁面的压力贡献随γ变化而改变：大γ时微射流起主导作用，小γ时则激波贡献更显著。这些定量结果为空蚀机理的理解和防护提供了重要的实验依据。

title: A deep learning approach to wall-shear stress quantification: From numerical training to zero-shot experimental application
summary: The accurate quantification of wall-shear stress dynamics is of substantial importance for various applications in fundamental and applied research, spanning areas from human health to aircraft design and optimization. Despite significant progress in experimental measurement techniques and post-processing algorithms, temporally resolved wall-shear stress dynamics with adequate spatial resolution and within a suitable spatial domain remain an elusive goal. To address this gap, we introduce a deep learning architecture that ingests wall-parallel velocity fields from the logarithmic layer of turbulent wall-bounded flows and outputs the corresponding 2D wall-shear stress fields with identical spatial resolution and domain size. From a physical perspective, our framework acts as a surrogate model encapsulating the various mechanisms through which highly energetic outer-layer flow structures influence the governing wall-shear stress dynamics. The network is trained in a supervised fashion on a unified dataset comprising direct numerical simulations of statistically 1D turbulent channel and spatially developing turbulent boundary layer flows at friction Reynolds numbers ranging from 390 to 1,500. We demonstrate a zero-shot applicability to experimental velocity fields obtained from Particle-Image Velocimetry measurements and verify the physical accuracy of the wall-shear stress estimates with synchronized wall-shear stress measurements using the Micro-Pillar Shear-Stress Sensor for Reynolds numbers up to 2,000. In summary, the presented framework lays the groundwork for extracting inaccessible experimental wall-shear stress information from readily available velocity measurements and thus, facilitates advancements in a variety of experimental applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习架构，能够从湍流壁面边界层对数区的速度场直接预测高时空分辨率的二维壁面剪切应力场，并在实验数据上实现了零样本泛化，为实验流体力学中难以直接测量的壁面剪切应力提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 壁面剪切应力的精确量化在基础研究和应用领域（如人体健康、飞行器设计）中至关重要，但现有实验测量技术和后处理算法在时间分辨率、空间分辨率及空间域大小上难以同时满足需求。
AI.method: 构建深度学习架构，输入湍流壁面边界层对数区的壁面平行速度场，输出相同空间分辨率和域大小的二维壁面剪切应力场；该网络作为代理模型，捕捉外区高能流动结构对壁面剪切应力的影响机制；使用直接数值模拟（DNS）数据集（包括湍流槽道流和空间发展的湍流边界层流，摩擦雷诺数390-1500）进行监督训练。
AI.result: 在零样本条件下成功应用于PIV实验速度场，并通过Micro-Pillar剪切应力传感器同步测量验证了物理精度，适用雷诺数范围扩展至2000。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从易获取的速度测量中提取难以直接测量的实验壁面剪切应力信息奠定了基础，推动了多种实验应用的发展。

title: Inherent structural descriptors via machine learning
summary: Finding proper collective variables for complex systems and processes is one of the most challenging tasks in simulations, which limits the interpretation of experimental and simulated data and the application of enhanced sampling techniques. Here, we propose a machine learning approach able to distill few, physically relevant variables by associating instantaneous configurations of the system to their corresponding inherent structures as defined in liquids theory. We apply this approach to the challenging case of structural transitions in nanoclusters, managing to characterize and explore the structural complexity of an experimentally relevant system constituted by 147 gold atoms. Our inherent-structure variables are shown to be effective at computing complex free-energy landscapes, transition rates, and at describing non-equilibrium melting and freezing processes. The effectiveness of this machine learning strategy guided by the generally-applicable concept of inherent structures shows promise to devise collective variables for a vast range of systems, including liquids, glasses, and proteins.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于固有结构（inherent structures）的机器学习方法，通过将系统瞬时结构与液体理论中的固有结构关联，自动提取少量物理相关的集体变量，成功应用于147个金原子纳米团簇的结构转变研究，有效计算了自由能景观、转变速率，并描述了非平衡熔化和凝固过程。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统和过程的模拟中，寻找合适的集体变量是极具挑战的任务，这限制了实验和模拟数据的解释以及增强采样技术的应用。
AI.method: 提出一种机器学习方法，通过将系统瞬时构型与液体理论中定义的固有结构相关联，蒸馏出少量物理相关的集体变量（固有结构变量）。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于147个金原子纳米团簇的结构转变，有效计算了复杂自由能景观和转变速率，并描述了非平衡熔化和凝固过程。
AI.conclusion: 这种以固有结构为指导的机器学习策略展示了为包括液体、玻璃和蛋白质在内的广泛系统设计集体变量的潜力。

title: Structure and dynamics of the magnetite(001)/water interface from molecular dynamics simulations based on a neural network potential
summary: The magnetite/water interface is commonly found in nature and plays a crucial role in various technological applications. However, our understanding of its structural and dynamical properties at the molecular scale remains still limited. In this study, we develop an efficient Behler-Parrinello neural network potential (NNP) for the magnetite/water system, paying particular attention to the accurate generation of reference data with density functional theory. Using this NNP, we performed extensive molecular dynamics simulations of the magnetite (001) surface across a wide range of water coverages, from the single molecule to bulk water. Our simulations revealed several new ground states of low coverage water on the Subsurface Cation Vacancy (SCV) model and yielded a density profile of water at the surface that exhibits marked layering. By calculating mean square displacements, we obtained quantitative information on the diffusion of water molecules on the SCV for different coverages, revealing significant anisotropy. Additionally, our simulations provided qualitative insights into the dissociation mechanisms of water molecules at the surface.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了磁铁矿/水界面的神经网络势能，通过分子动力学模拟揭示了不同水覆盖度下的表面结构、密度分层、各向异性扩散及解离机制。
AI.motivation: 磁铁矿/水界面在自然界和技术应用中普遍存在，但分子尺度的结构和动力学性质理解仍然有限。
AI.method: 采用Behler-Parrinello神经网络势（NNP），结合密度泛函理论参考数据，对磁铁矿(001)表面进行从单分子到体相水的多覆盖度分子动力学模拟。
AI.result: 发现了低覆盖度水在Subsurface Cation Vacancy（SCV）模型上的多个新基态，获得了呈现明显分层的水密度剖面，定量揭示了扩散的各向异性，并定性获得了水分子表面解离机制。
AI.conclusion: NNP能够高效模拟磁铁矿/水界面，为理解其分子尺度行为提供了新见解。

title: An Efficient Algorithm for Constrained CASSCF(1,2) and CASSCF(3,2) Simulations as Relevant to Electron and Hole Transfer Problems
summary: We propose an efficient algorithm for the recently published electron/hole-transfer Dynamical-weighted State-averaged Constrained CASSCF (eDSC/hDSC) method studying charge transfer states and D$_1$-D$_0$ crossings for systems with odd numbers of electrons. By separating the constrained minimization problem into an unconstrained self-consistent-field (SCF) problem and a constrained non-self-consistent-field (nSCF) problem, and accelerating the direct inversion in the iterative subspace (DIIS) technique to solve the SCF problem, the overall computational cost is reduced by a factor of 8 to 20 compared with directly using sequential quadratic programming (SQP). This approach should be applicable for other constrained minimization problems and, in the immediate future, once gradients are available, the present eDSC/hDSC algorithm should allow for speedy non-adiabatic dynamics simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的eDSC/hDSC算法，通过将约束最小化问题分解为无约束SCF问题和约束nSCF问题，并加速DIIS技术求解SCF，计算成本相比直接使用SQP降低了8-20倍。
AI.motivation: 降低eDSC/hDSC方法在研究电荷转移态和D1-D0交叉时的计算成本，使该方法能够应用于更大体系和非绝热动力学模拟。
AI.method: 将约束最小化问题分解为无约束SCF问题和约束nSCF问题，利用加速DIIS技术求解SCF问题。
AI.result: 相比直接使用SQP，计算成本降低了8到20倍。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可推广至其他约束最小化问题，且一旦得到梯度，可用于快速的eDSC/hDSC非绝热动力学模拟。

title: Committor guided estimates of molecular transition rates
summary: The probability that a configuration of a physical system reacts, or transitions from one metastable state to another, is quantified by the committor function. This function contains richly detailed mechanistic information about transition pathways, but a full parameterization of the committor requires building representing a high-dimensional function, a generically challenging task. Recent efforts to leverage neural networks as a means to solve high-dimensional partial differential equations, often called "physics-informed" machine learning, have brought the committor into computational reach. Here, we build on the semigroup approach to learning the committor and assess its utility for predicting dynamical quantities such as transition rates. We show that a careful reframing of the objective function and improved adaptive sampling strategies provide highly accurate representations of the committor. Furthermore, by directly applying the Hill relation, we show that these committors provide accurate transition rates for molecular system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半群方法的改进策略，通过重构目标函数和自适应采样，利用神经网络高精度地学习物理系统的 committor 函数，并利用 Hill 关系直接从 committor 计算准确的分子系统跃迁速率。
AI.motivation: committor 函数包含丰富的跃迁路径机制信息，但其完整参数化需要表示高维函数，是一项具有挑战性的任务。近年来，利用神经网络求解高维 PDE 的“物理信息”机器学习方法使 committor 的计算成为可能，但仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 基于半群方法学习 committor，通过重构目标函数和改进的自适应采样策略来提高表示精度。随后直接应用 Hill 关系从 committor 计算跃迁速率。
AI.result: 所提出的目标函数重构和自适应采样策略提供了高度准确的 committor 表示；基于 Hill 关系从这些 committor 计算得到的跃迁速率对于分子系统是准确的。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进目标函数和采样策略，半群方法能够高精度地学习 committor，并直接用于计算可靠的跃迁速率，为复杂分子体系的跃迁动力学提供了有效工具。

title: Stochastic Scovil--Schulz-DuBois machine and its three types of cycles
summary: Three types of cycles are identified in the quantum jump trajectories of the Scovil--Schulz-DuBois (SSDB) machine: an R-cycle as refrigeration, an H-cycle as a heat engine, and an N-cycle in which the machine is neutral. The statistics of these cycles are investigated via a semi-Markov process method. We find that in the large time limit, whether the machine operates as a heat engine or refrigerator depends on the ratio between the numbers of R-cycles and H-cycles per unit time. Further increasing the hot bath temperature above a certain threshold does not increase the machine's power output. The cause is that, in this situation, the N-cycle has a greater probability than the H-cycle and R-cycle. Although the SSDB machine operates by randomly switching between these three cycles, at the level of a single quantum jump trajectory, its heat engine efficiency and the refrigerator's coefficient of performance remain constant.

AI.tldr: 本文通过半马尔可夫过程方法，识别了SSDB量子热机量子跳跃轨迹中的三种循环（制冷R-循环、热机H-循环、中性N-循环），发现宏观运行模式取决于R与H循环的单位时间数量比，热浴温度超过阈值后N循环主导导致功率饱和，但单轨迹层面的效率和性能系数保持恒定。
AI.motivation: 揭示SSDB量子热机在量子跳跃轨迹层面的微观循环机制，理解其统计行为如何决定宏观热力学性能，并探究高温极限下的功率限制原因。
AI.method: 采用半马尔可夫过程方法分析量子跳跃轨迹，识别并统计三种循环类型（R、H、N）的发生概率与比率。
AI.result: 1) 宏观运行模式（热机/制冷）由R/H循环单位时间数量比决定；2) 热浴温度超过阈值后，N循环概率超过H和R循环，导致功率不再增加；3) 单量子跳跃轨迹层面的热机效率和制冷系数保持恒定。
AI.conclusion: SSDB量子热机的宏观表现为微观三种循环随机切换的统计结果，高温下中性循环占主导限制了功率提升，但微观单轨迹热力学性能具有恒定性。

title: Causal Discovery of Linear Non-Gaussian Causal Models with Unobserved Confounding
summary: We consider linear non-Gaussian structural equation models that involve latent confounding. In this setting, the causal structure is identifiable, but, in general, it is not possible to identify the specific causal effects. Instead, a finite number of different causal effects result in the same observational distribution. Most existing algorithms for identifying these causal effects use overcomplete independent component analysis (ICA), which often suffers from convergence to local optima. Furthermore, the number of latent variables must be known a priori. To address these issues, we propose an algorithm that operates recursively rather than using overcomplete ICA. The algorithm first infers a source, estimates the effect of the source and its latent parents on their descendants, and then eliminates their influence from the data. For both source identification and effect size estimation, we use rank conditions on matrices formed from higher-order cumulants. We prove asymptotic correctness under the mild assumption that locally, the number of latent variables never exceeds the number of observed variables. Simulation studies demonstrate that our method achieves comparable performance to overcomplete ICA even though it does not know the number of latents in advance.

AI.tldr: 针对含潜在混杂的线性非高斯结构方程模型，提出一种基于递归消除和高阶累积量秩条件的算法，无需预先知道潜变量数量且避免ICA局部最优问题，实现因果效应识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖过完备独立成分分析(ICA)，存在收敛到局部最优的问题，且需要预先知道潜变量数量，这些限制影响了因果效应识别的准确性和实用性。
AI.method: 采用递归策略：先推断一个源变量，估计该源及其潜在父变量对其后代的影响，然后从数据中消除这些影响并重复此过程。源识别和效应估计均基于高阶累计量矩阵的秩条件。
AI.result: 在局部潜变量数不超过观测变量数的温和假设下渐近正确；模拟实验表明，无需预先知道潜变量数量即可达到与过完备ICA相当的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该递归方法有效克服了ICA的局部最优和潜变量数量先验需求问题，为含潜在混杂的非高斯线性因果发现提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: Adaptive Smooth Non-Stationary Bandits
summary:
We study a $K$-armed non-stationary bandit model where rewards change smoothly, as captured by Hölder class assumptions on rewards as functions of time. Such smooth changes are parametrized by a Hölder exponent $β$ and coefficient $λ$. While various sub-cases of this general model have been studied in isolation, we first establish the minimax dynamic regret rate generally for all $K,β,λ$. Next, we show this optimal dynamic regret can be attained adaptively, without knowledge of $β,λ$. To contrast, even with parameter knowledge, upper bounds were only previously known for limited regimes $β\leq 1$ and $β=2$ (Slivkins, 2014; Krishnamurthy and Gopalan, 2021; Manegueu et al., 2021; Jia et al.,2023). Thus, our work resolves open questions raised by these disparate threads of the literature.
  We also study the problem of attaining faster gap-dependent regret rates in non-stationary bandits. While such rates are long known to be impossible in general (Garivier and Moulines, 2011), we show that environments admitting a safe arm (Suk and Kpotufe, 2022) allow for much faster rates than the worst-case scaling with $\sqrt{T}$. While previous works in this direction focused on attaining the usual logarithmic regret bounds, as summed over stationary periods, our new gap-dependent rates reveal new optimistic regimes of non-stationarity where even the logarithmic bounds are pessimistic. We show our new gap-dependent rate is tight and that its achievability (i.e., as made possible by a safe arm) has a surprisingly simple and clean characterization within the smooth Hölder class model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了奖励随时间平滑变化的K臂非平稳老虎机模型，在Hölder类假设下建立了最优动态遗憾率的通用下界，并提出了无需知道Hölder参数的自适应算法。此外，针对存在安全臂的环境，推导了比传统对数界限更快的间隙依赖遗憾率，并给出了简洁的刻画。
AI.motivation: 现有工作仅孤立地研究了非平稳老虎机模型的某些子情形（如β≤1和β=2），缺乏对一般光滑变化情形的统一理解，也未解决自适应性问题。同时，非平稳情形下间隙依赖的加速率问题长期未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 在Hölder类假设下建立极小化极大动态遗憾率的下界，并设计无需知晓β,λ的自适应算法达到该下界。针对存在安全臂的环境，推导间隙依赖遗憾率的上界与下界，并在光滑Hölder模型下给出安全臂存在性的简洁刻画。
AI.result: 首次对所有K,β,λ建立了极小化极大动态遗憾率的通用下界，并证明了自适应可达性。在安全臂环境下，得到了比传统对数界限更快的间隙依赖遗憾率，且该速率紧致。
AI.conclusion: 解决了非平稳老虎机光滑变化情形下的开放问题，揭示了安全臂在非平稳环境中实现快速遗憾率的关键作用，并给出了简洁的充要条件。

title: Empowering Bayesian Neural Networks with Functional Priors through Anchored Ensembling for Mechanics Surrogate Modeling Applications
summary: In recent years, neural networks (NNs) have become increasingly popular for surrogate modeling tasks in mechanics and materials modeling applications. While traditional NNs are deterministic functions that rely solely on data to learn the input--output mapping, casting NN training within a Bayesian framework allows to quantify uncertainties, in particular epistemic uncertainties that arise from lack of training data, and to integrate a priori knowledge via the Bayesian prior. However, the high dimensionality and non-physicality of the NN parameter space, and the complex relationship between parameters (NN weights) and predicted outputs, renders both prior design and posterior inference challenging. In this work we present a novel BNN training scheme based on anchored ensembling that can integrate a priori information available in the function space, from e.g. low-fidelity models. The anchoring scheme makes use of low-rank correlations between NN parameters, learnt from pre-training to realizations of the functional prior. We also perform a study to demonstrate how correlations between NN weights, which are often neglected in existing BNN implementations, is critical to appropriately transfer knowledge between the function-space and parameter-space priors. Performance of our novel BNN algorithm is first studied on a small 1D example to illustrate the algorithm's behavior in both interpolation and extrapolation settings. Then, a thorough assessment is performed on a multi--input--output materials surrogate modeling example, where we demonstrate the algorithm's capabilities both in terms of accuracy and quality of the uncertainty estimation, for both in-distribution and out-of-distribution data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于锚定集成（anchored ensembling）的贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）训练方案，能够将函数空间中的先验信息（如低 fidelity 模型）整合到 BNN 中，并通过学习神经网络参数之间的低秩相关性来在参数空间和函数空间之间传递知识。实验表明，该算法在插值/外推设置及材料代理建模任务中均展现出良好的精度和不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络是确定性函数，仅依赖数据学习输入-输出映射，缺乏不确定性量化能力，尤其无法处理因训练数据不足导致的认知不确定性（epistemic uncertainty）。虽然贝叶斯框架可以量化不确定性并整合先验知识，但神经网络参数空间的高维度、非物理性以及参数与输出之间的复杂关系，使得先验设计和后验推断都十分困难。
AI.method: 提出基于锚定集成（anchored ensembling）的BNN训练方案：(1) 利用低 fidelity 模型等来源在函数空间中构建功能先验；(2) 通过预训练学习神经网络参数之间的低秩相关性；(3) 利用锚定机制将功能先验信息映射到参数空间。该方法特别关注了NN权重之间的相关性（这是现有BNN实现中常被忽略的关键因素），以在函数空间和参数空间先验之间适当传递知识。
AI.result: 在小型1D示例中展示了算法在插值和外推场景下的行为；在多元输入-输出的材料代理建模示例中进行了全面评估，证明了算法在分布内（in-distribution）和分布外（out-of-distribution）数据上的准确性和不确定性估计质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的锚定集成BNN方案能够有效整合函数空间先验知识，并且NN权重之间的相关性对于在函数空间和参数空间先验之间传递知识至关重要。该算法在代理建模任务中表现出良好的准确性和不确定性量化能力。

title: Topological Separation of Vortices
summary: Vortices and their analysis play a critical role in the understanding of complex phenomena in turbulent flows. Traditional vortex extraction methods, notably region-based techniques, often overlook the entanglement phenomenon, resulting in the inclusion of multiple vortices within a single extracted region. Their separation is necessary for quantifying different types of vortices and their statistics. In this study, we propose a novel vortex separation method that extends the conventional contour tree-based segmentation approach with an additional step termed "layering". Upon extracting a vortical region using specified vortex criteria (e.g., $λ_2$), we initially establish topological segmentation based on the contour tree, followed by the layering process to allocate appropriate segmentation IDs to unsegmented cells, thus separating individual vortices within the region. However, these regions may still suffer from inaccurate splits, which we address statistically by leveraging the continuity of vorticity lines across the split boundaries. Our findings demonstrate a significant improvement in both the separation of vortices and the mitigation of inaccurate splits compared to prior methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于"分层"扩展的等值线树分割方法，用于分离湍流中纠缠的涡旋区域，并通过涡量线连续性统计修正分割误差，显著提升了涡旋分离精度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于区域的涡旋提取方法常忽略涡旋之间的纠缠现象，导致单个提取区域包含多个涡旋，难以对不同类型涡旋进行定量分析和统计。
AI.method: 在传统等值线树分割基础上引入"分层"步骤：先根据涡旋判据（如λ₂）提取涡旋区域，构建等值线树进行拓扑分割；再通过分层过程为未分割单元分配分割ID；最后利用涡量线跨分割边界的连续性进行统计修正，减少不准确分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在涡旋分离效果和减少不准确分割方面相较已有方法有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文的分层式等值线树分割方法能有效解决传统方法中涡旋纠缠导致的多涡旋共区域问题，为湍流中涡旋的精细量化提供了可靠手段。

title: On the multicomponent reactive flows in moving domains
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2307.09348
summary: This paper is concerned with the existence of global-in-time weak solutions to the multicomponent reactive flows inside a moving domain whose shape in time is prescribed. The flow is governed by the 3D compressible Navier-Stokes-Fourier system coupled with the equations of species mass fractions. The fluid velocity is supposed to fulfill the complete slip boundary condition, whereas the heat flux and species diffusion fluxes satisfy the conservative boundary conditions. The existence of weak solutions is obtained by means of suitable approximation techniques. To this end, we need to rigorously analyze the penalization of the boundary behavior, viscosity and the pressure in the weak formulation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究移动域中三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统与组分质量分数方程耦合的多组分反应流，在完全滑移边界和保守边界条件下，通过逼近技巧证明了全局弱解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 移动边界上的多组分反应流在工程和物理中广泛存在（如燃烧、化学反应器），但其数学理论尚不完善，特别是全局弱解的存在性问题亟待解决。
AI.method: 采用逼近技巧，对边界行为、粘性和压力进行惩罚处理，结合弱公式化分析，建立全局弱解的存在性证明。
AI.result: 成功证明了在给定的完全滑移边界条件和保守边界条件下，移动域中三维可压缩多组分反应流全局弱解的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为移动域中多组分反应流的数学理论提供了重要的存在性结果，为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: Nash blowups of 2-generic determinantal varieties in positive characteristic
comment: Published in Pure and Applied Mathematics Quaterly
summary: We show that the Nash blowup of 2-generic determinantal varieties over fields of positive characteristic is non-singular. We prove this in two steps. Firstly, we explicitly describe the toric structure of such varieties. Secondly, we show that in this case the combinatorics of Nash blowups are free of characteristic. The result then follows from the analogous result in characteristic zero proved by W. Ebeling and S. M. Gusein-Zade.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在正特征域上，2-一般行列式簇的 Nash 爆破是非奇异的。证明分两步：首先显式描述这类簇的环面结构，其次证明在此情况下 Nash 爆破的组合学与特征无关，从而将特征零的已知结论推广到正特征。
AI.motivation: 将特征零域上关于2-一般行列式簇的 Nash 爆破为非奇异的结论推广到正特征域上，填补正特征情形下的理论空白。
AI.method: 首先显式描述2-一般行列式簇的环面(toric)结构，然后证明在该情形下 Nash 爆破的组合学不依赖于域的特征，从而将 Ebeling 和 Gusein-Zade 在特征零下的结论直接推广到正特征。
AI.result: 证明了在正特征域上，2-一般行列式簇的 Nash 爆破是非奇异的。
AI.conclusion: 通过环面结构的显式描述和组合学与特征无关的论证，成功将 Nash 爆破的非奇异性从特征零推广到正特征域。

title: The Relevant Domain of the Hilbert Function of a Finite Multiprojective Scheme
summary: Let X be a zero-dimensional scheme contained in a multiprojective space. Let $s_i$ be the length of the projection of X onto the i-th component of the multiprojective space. A result of Van Tuyl states that the Hilbert function of X, in the case when X is reduced, is completely determined by its restriction to the product of the intervals $[0, s_i - 1]$. We prove that the same is also true for non-reduced schemes X.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，对于零维非约化子概形，其Hilbert函数仍完全由其在$[0, s_i-1]$区间乘积上的限制决定，将Van Tuyl关于约化情形的结果推广到了非约化情形。
AI.motivation: Van Tuyl已证明零维约化子概形的Hilbert函数可由其在特定区间乘积上的限制完全确定，但该结论是否适用于更一般的非约化子概形尚不清楚。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 利用零维子概形的结构性质，结合投影长度参数$s_i$的定义，通过代数几何方法分析和计算Hilbert函数在非约化情形下的行为，证明其仍由受限区间完全决定。
AI.result: 成功将Van Tuyl的结果从约化子概形推广到非约化子概形，即零维非约化子概形的Hilbert函数同样由其在$[0, s_i-1]$区间乘积上的限制唯一确定。
AI.conclusion: 该推广表明Hilbert函数在零维子概形上的决定性限制性质具有更广泛的适用性，不依赖于子概形的约化性假设。

title: Charge transport systems with Fermi-Dirac statistics for memristors
comment: Correction of the proof of Lemma 16
summary: An instationary drift-diffusion system for the electron, hole, and oxygen vacancy densities, coupled to the Poisson equation for the electric potential, is analyzed in a bounded domain with mixed Dirichlet-Neumann boundary conditions. The electron and hole densities are governed by Fermi-Dirac statistics, while the oxygen vacancy density is governed by Blakemore statistics. The equations model the charge carrier dynamics in memristive devices used in semiconductor technology. The global existence of weak solutions is proved in up to three space dimensions. The proof is based on the free energy inequality, an iteration argument to improve the integrability of the densities, and estimations of the Fermi-Dirac integral. Under a physically realistic elliptic regularity condition, it is proved that the densities are bounded.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了描述忆阻器件中电荷载流子动力学的非稳态漂移-扩散系统（电子、空穴和氧空位），在混合边界条件下证明了至多三维空间弱解的存在性，并在椭圆正则性条件下得到了密度的有界性。
AI.motivation: 为了严格数学分析忆阻器件中电子、空穴和氧空位耦合输运的漂移-扩散模型，建立弱解存在性和有界性的理论基础。
AI.method: 基于自由能不等式、迭代论证提升密度可积性、Fermi-Dirac积分估计以及椭圆正则性条件，在三维有界区域混合边界条件下进行弱解存在性与有界性证明。
AI.result: 在至多三维空间中证明了弱解的全局存在性，并在物理现实的椭圆正则性条件下证明了电子、空穴和氧空位密度的有界性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为忆阻器件中考虑Fermi-Dirac和Blakemore统计的非稳态漂移-扩散系统提供了严格的数学分析框架，验证了模型的理论适定性。

title: On a fractional harmonic oscillator: existence and inexistence of solution, regularity and decay properties
summary: Under simple hypotheses on the nonlinearity $f$, we consider the fractional harmonic operator problem \begin{equation}\label{abstr}\sqrt{-Δ+|x|^2}\,u=f(x,u)\ \ \textrm{in }\ \mathbb{R}^N\end{equation} or, since we work in the extension setting $\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+$, $$\left\{\begin{aligned} -Δv +|x|^2v&=0, &&\mbox{in} \ \mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+,\\ -\displaystyle\frac{\partial v}{\partial x}(x,0)&=f(x,v(x,0)) &&\mbox{on} \ \mathbb{R}^{N}\cong\partial \mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+.\end{aligned}\right.$$ Defining the space $$\mathcal{H}(\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+)=\left\{v\in H^1(\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+): \iint_{\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+}\left[|\nabla v|^2+|x|^2v^2\right]dx dy<\infty\right\},$$ we prove that the embedding $$\mathcal{H}(\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+)\hookrightarrow L^{q}(\mathbb{R}^N)$$ is compact. We also obtain a Pohozaev-type identity for this problem, show that in the case $f(x,u)=|u|^{p^*-2}u$ the problem has no non-trivial solution, compare the extremal attached to this problem with the one of the space $H^1(\mathbb{R}^{N+1}_+)$, prove that the solution $u$ of our problem belongs to $L^p(\mathbb{R}^N)$ for all $p\in [2,\infty]$ and satisfy the polynomial decay $|u(x)|\leq C/|x|$ for any $|x|>M$. Finally, we prove the existence of a solution to a superlinear critical problem in the case $f(x,u)=|u|^{2^*-2}u+λ|u|^{q-1}$, $1<q<2^*-1$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分数阶调和算子问题 sqrt(-Δ+|x|^2) u = f(x,u) 在 R^N 中的解，通过扩展方法在 R^{N+1}_+ 中建立相应系统。证明了空间 H(R^{N+1}_+) 到 L^q(R^N) 的紧嵌入，推导了 Pohozaev 型恒等式，证明了在临界幂次情形下无非平凡解，并建立了解的正则性与多项式衰减估计，最后证明了超线性临界问题解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶调和算子问题，探究其在 Sobolev 空间框架下的嵌入性质、解的适定性、正则性以及临界指数情形下的解的存在性与非存在性。
AI.method: 采用扩展方法将非局部问题转化为高维半空间上的局部问题，利用加权 Sobolev 空间 H(R^{N+1}_+) 进行分析，通过紧嵌入定理、Pohozaev 恒等式、变分法及临界点理论等工具进行研究。
AI.result: (1) 证明了 H(R^{N+1}_+) 到 L^q(R^N) 的紧嵌入；(2) 推导了 Pohozaev 型恒等式；(3) 证明了当 f(x,u)=|u|^{p^*-2}u 时问题无非平凡解；(4) 比较了本问题与 H^1(R^{N+1}_+) 空间的极值函数；(5) 证明了解 u 属于所有 L^p(R^N) (p∈[2,∞]) 且满足多项式衰减 |u(x)| ≤ C/|x|；(6) 证明了超线性临界问题 f(x,u)=|u|^{2^*-2}u+λ|u|^{q-1} 解的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了分数阶调和算子问题的完整分析框架，包括嵌入性质、非存在性、正则性估计及存在性结果，为该类非局部椭圆问题的研究提供了理论基础。

title: Relative Polar Multiplicities and the Real Link
summary: For a hypersurface defined by a complex analytic function, we obtain a chain complex of free abelian groups, with ranks given in terms of relative polar multiplicities, which has cohomology isomorphic to the reduced cohomology of the real link. This leads to Morse-type inequalities between the Betti numbers of the real link of the hypersurface and the relative polar multiplicities of the function.

AI.tldr: 本文为复解析函数定义的超曲面构建了一个自由阿贝尔群链复形，其秩由相对极重数给出，其同调与实链环的约化上同调同构，并由此导出了实链环贝蒂数与相对极重数之间的Morse型不等式。
AI.motivation: 建立复解析超曲面的实链环的拓扑不变量（贝蒂数）与函数本身的代数不变量（相对极重数）之间的定量关系，为研究奇点理论中的拓扑与代数联系提供新工具。
AI.method: 通过构造一个由自由阿贝尔群组成的链复形，其秩显式地由相对极重数确定，并证明该链复形的上同调与实链环的约化上同调同构。
AI.result: 得到了实链环的贝蒂数与相对极重数之间的Morse型不等式，即贝蒂数被相对极重数所控制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为奇点理论中实链环的拓扑结构提供了新的代数刻画，推广了经典Morse理论的思想到复解析超曲面的实链环情形。

title: Open-Source Conversational AI with SpeechBrain 1.0
comment: Accepted to the Journal of Machine Learning research (JMLR), Machine Learning Open Source Software
summary: SpeechBrain is an open-source Conversational AI toolkit based on PyTorch, focused particularly on speech processing tasks such as speech recognition, speech enhancement, speaker recognition, text-to-speech, and much more. It promotes transparency and replicability by releasing both the pre-trained models and the complete "recipes" of code and algorithms required for training them. This paper presents SpeechBrain 1.0, a significant milestone in the evolution of the toolkit, which now has over 200 recipes for speech, audio, and language processing tasks, and more than 100 models available on Hugging Face. SpeechBrain 1.0 introduces new technologies to support diverse learning modalities, Large Language Model (LLM) integration, and advanced decoding strategies, along with novel models, tasks, and modalities. It also includes a new benchmark repository, offering researchers a unified platform for evaluating models across diverse tasks.

AI.tldr: SpeechBrain 1.0 是一个基于 PyTorch 的开源对话式AI工具包，专注于语音处理任务，提供了200多个训练配方和100多个预训练模型，支持多种学习模态、LLM集成和先进解码策略，并包含新的基准测试平台。
AI.motivation: 推动语音处理领域的透明性和可复现性，通过开源预训练模型和完整训练配方来解决现有工具在可复现性方面的不足，并为研究社区提供统一的模型评估平台。
AI.method: 基于PyTorch构建模块化架构，提供200+训练配方（recipes）和100+ Hugging Face预训练模型；引入新技术支持多模态学习、LLM集成、高级解码策略，并建立统一的基准测试仓库。
AI.result: 发布了SpeechBrain 1.0版本，包含200+语音/音频/语言处理任务配方，100+可用模型，新增多模态学习、LLM集成、先进解码策略等功能，以及统一的基准测试平台。
AI.conclusion: SpeechBrain 1.0作为工具包的重要里程碑，通过丰富的配方库、预训练模型和统一基准测试，显著促进了语音处理研究的透明性、可复现性和标准化评估。

title: Convergence Analysis of Natural Gradient Descent for Over-parameterized Physics-Informed Neural Networks
summary: In the context of over-parameterization, there is a line of work demonstrating that randomly initialized (stochastic) gradient descent (GD) converges to a globally optimal solution at a linear convergence rate for the quadratic loss function. However, the learning rate of GD for training two-layer neural networks exhibits poor dependence on the sample size and the Gram matrix, leading to a slow training process. In this paper, we show that for training two-layer $\text{ReLU}^3$ Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), the learning rate can be improved from $\mathcal{O}(λ_0)$ to $\mathcal{O}(1/\|\bm{H}^{\infty}\|_2)$, implying that GD actually enjoys a faster convergence rate. Despite such improvements, the convergence rate is still tied to the least eigenvalue of the Gram matrix, leading to slow convergence. We then develop the positive definiteness of Gram matrices with general smooth activation functions and provide the convergence analysis of natural gradient descent (NGD) in training two-layer PINNs, demonstrating that the learning rate can be $\mathcal{O}(1)$ and at this rate, the convergence rate is independent of the Gram matrix. In particular, for smooth activation functions, the convergence rate of NGD is quadratic. Numerical experiments are conducted to verify our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两层ReLU³物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的训练问题，提出了将梯度下降（GD）的学习率从𝒪(λ₀)提升至𝒪(1/‖H^∞‖₂)，并证明了自然梯度下降（NGD）在平滑激活函数下的学习率可达𝒪(1)且收敛率与Gram矩阵无关，甚至达到二次收敛。
AI.motivation: 过参数化下随机初始化的GD虽能收敛到全局最优，但其学习率对样本量和Gram矩阵的依赖较差，导致训练缓慢。本文旨在改善两层PINNs的训练效率，解决GD收敛慢的问题。
AI.method: 针对两层ReLU³ PINNs，将GD学习率从𝒪(λ₀)改进为𝒪(1/‖H^∞‖₂)；进一步证明平滑激活函数下Gram矩阵的正定性，并提出NGD方法，使其学习率达𝒪(1)且收敛率与Gram矩阵解耦。
AI.result: GD学习率得到提升，收敛速度加快；NGD在平滑激活函数下学习率可达𝒪(1)，收敛率与Gram矩阵无关，且二次收敛。
AI.conclusion: 数值实验验证了理论结果，表明所提方法有效改善了PINNs的训练效率。

title: A virtual element method for a convective Brinkman-Forchheimer problem coupled with a heat equation
summary: We develop a virtual element method to solve a convective Brinkman-Forchheimer problem coupled with a heat equation. This coupled model may allow for thermal diffusion and viscosity as a function of temperature. Under standard discretization assumptions, we prove the well posedness of the proposed numerical scheme. We also derive optimal error estimates under appropriate regularity assumptions for the solution. We conclude with a series of numerical tests performed with different mesh families that complement our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种虚拟单元方法，用于求解耦合热方程的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer问题，该模型允许热扩散和粘度随温度变化，在标准离散化假设下证明了数值格式的适定性，推导了最优误差估计，并通过不同网格族的数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 解决考虑温度依赖的热扩散和粘度的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer问题与热方程耦合的数值求解需求，为这类复杂的耦合多物理场问题提供严谨的数值分析框架。
AI.method: 采用虚拟单元方法（Virtual Element Method, VEM）对耦合系统进行离散化，在标准离散化假设下进行理论分析，证明格式适定性并推导最优误差估计，最后用不同网格族进行数值验证。
AI.result: 证明了所提数值格式的适定性（well-posedness），推导了在适当正则性假设下的最优误差估计，多类网格的数值实验与理论分析一致。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟单元方法能有效求解温度依赖的对流Brinkman-Forchheimer-热方程耦合问题，理论保障与数值验证共同确认了该方法的可靠性和准确性。

title: High-performance computing for the BGK model of the Boltzmann equation with a meshfree Arbitrary Lagrangian-Eulerian (ALE) method
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.05822
summary: In this paper, we present high-performance computing for the BGK model of the Boltzmann equation with a mesh-free method. For the numerical simulation of the BGK equation we use an Arbitrary-Lagrangian-Eulerian (ALE) method developed in previous work, where the approximation of spatial derivatives and the reconstruction of a function is based on the weighted least squares method. A Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) is used to accelerate the code. The result is compared with sequential and parallel versions of the CPU code. Two and three-dimensional driven cavity problems are solved, where a speed-up of several orders of magnitude is obtained compared to a sequential CPU simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无网格方法的BGK模型高性能计算方案，采用任意拉格朗日-欧拉(ALE)方法和加权最小二乘法进行数值模拟，并利用GPU加速，在二维和三维驱动空腔问题中获得了比顺序CPU仿真数个数量级的加速比。
AI.motivation: 为了解决玻尔兹曼方程BGK模型数值模拟计算量巨大的问题，需要开发高性能计算方案来显著提升计算效率。
AI.method: 采用任意拉格朗日-欧拉(ALE)方法，基于加权最小二乘法进行空间导数近似和函数重构，并使用GPU进行代码加速。
AI.result: 在二维和三维驱动空腔问题中，GPU加速版本相比顺序CPU仿真获得了数个数量级的加速比。
AI.conclusion: GPU加速的ALE无网格方法能有效提升BGK模型数值模拟的计算效率，实现高性能计算。

title: Enhancing ZFP: A Statistical Approach to Understanding and Reducing Error Bias in a Lossy Floating-Point Compression Algorithm
summary: The amount of data generated and gathered in scientific simulations and data collection applications is continuously growing, putting mounting pressure on storage and bandwidth concerns. A means of reducing such issues is data compression; however, lossless data compression is typically ineffective when applied to floating-point data. Thus, users tend to apply a lossy data compressor, which allows for small deviations from the original data. It is essential to understand how the error from lossy compression impacts the accuracy of the data analytics. Thus, we must analyze not only the compression properties but the error as well. In this paper, we provide a statistical analysis of the error caused by ZFP compression, a state-of-the-art, lossy compression algorithm explicitly designed for floating-point data. We show that the error is indeed biased and propose simple modifications to the algorithm to neutralize the bias and further reduce the resulting error.

AI.tldr: 本文针对ZFP有损压缩算法对浮点数据产生的误差进行统计分析，发现误差存在偏差，并提出简单修改以消除偏差并进一步降低误差。
AI.motivation: 科学模拟和数据收集应用中生成的数据量持续增长，给存储和带宽带来压力。有损压缩虽然能缓解这一问题，但需理解压缩误差对数据分析准确性的影响，因此需要对误差进行深入分析。
AI.method: 对ZFP压缩算法（一种专为浮点数据设计的有损压缩算法）产生的误差进行统计分析，识别误差的偏置特性，并提出简单算法修改以中和偏置并减少误差。
AI.result: 发现ZFP压缩误差确实存在偏置（非零均值），通过修改算法可消除该偏置并进一步降低整体误差。
AI.conclusion: 有损压缩误差并非随机无偏，通过针对性算法改进可以在保持压缩性能的同时提高数据保真度，对科学数据分析的可靠性具有重要意义。

title: Positive Dynamic Programming: A Critique
summary: In the article Positive Dynamic Programming, David Blackwell tries to answer the question concerning the existence of optimal stationary strategies for a positive dynamic programming problem. The principal results obtained in the paper are indicative of the existence of weakly optimal stationary plans where the optimal return need not be Borel measurable. More specifically, the main theorem establishes the condition for the weakly optimal stationary plan when the optimal return is bounded. Blackwell also gives an example that demonstrates that no optimal plan exists showing that the results obtained in his earlier work on discounted dynamic programming, cannot be generally extended to the positive case.

AI.tldr: David Blackwell在《Positive Dynamic Programming》中证明了正动态规划问题中弱最优平稳策略的存在性条件（最优回报有界时），并指出最优策略可能不存在，因此无法将折扣动态规划的结果推广到正情形。
AI.motivation: 探究正动态规划问题中是否存在最优平稳策略，特别是当最优回报不可Borel可测时，能否找到弱最优的平稳策略。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立主要定理，给出弱最优平稳策略存在的条件（最优回报有界），并构造反例证明最优策略可能不存在。
AI.result: 证明了在最优回报有界的条件下，弱最优平稳策略存在；但最优策略不一定存在，即Blackwell早期关于折扣动态规划的结果不能推广到正动态规划情形。
AI.conclusion: 正动态规划问题中，弱最优平稳策略的存在性有保证，但最优策略的存在性不具备一般性，说明折扣情形与正情形存在本质区别。

title: Hyper-Compression: Model Compression via Hyperfunction
summary: The rapid growth of large models' size has far outpaced that of computing resources. To bridge this gap, encouraged by the parsimonious relationship between genotype and phenotype in the brain's growth and development, we propose the so-called Hyper-Compression that turns the model compression into the issue of parameter representation via a hyperfunction. Specifically, it is known that the trajectory of some low-dimensional dynamic systems can fill the high-dimensional space eventually. Thus, Hyper-Compression, using these dynamic systems as the hyperfunctions, represents the parameters of the target network by their corresponding composition number or trajectory length. This suggests a novel mechanism for model compression, substantially different from the existing pruning, quantization, distillation, and decomposition. Along this direction, we methodologically identify a suitable dynamic system with the irrational winding as the hyperfunction and theoretically derive its associated error bound. Next, guided by our theoretical insights, we propose several engineering twists to make the Hyper-Compression pragmatic and effective. Lastly, systematic and comprehensive experiments on \textcolor{black}{NLP models such as LLaMA and Qwen series and vision models} confirm that Hyper-Compression enjoys the following \textbf{PNAS} merits: 1) \textbf{P}referable compression ratio; 2) \textbf{N}o post-hoc retraining; 3) \textbf{A}ffordable inference time; and 4) \textbf{S}hort compression time. It compresses LLaMA2-7B in an hour and achieves close-to-int4-quantization performance, without retraining and with a performance drop of less than 1\%. We have open-sourced our code in https://github.com/Juntongkuki/Hyper-Compression.git for free download and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hyper-Compression方法，借鉴大脑发育中基因型与表型间的简约关系，利用低维动力系统轨迹填充高维空间的特性，将模型压缩转化为参数表示问题，通过超函数表示目标网络参数。在LLaMA和Qwen系列等NLP模型及视觉模型上验证，实现了无需重训练、接近int4量化性能的压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 大模型规模增长远超计算资源增长速度，现有压缩方法（剪枝、量化、蒸馏、分解）存在局限性，受大脑发育中基因型与表型间简约关系的启发，探索新的压缩范式。
AI.method: 将模型压缩转化为参数表示问题，利用低维动力系统（无理缠绕动力系统）作为超函数，通过轨迹长度或组合数表示目标网络参数。理论推导了误差界，并结合工程技巧使方法实用化。
AI.result: 在LLaMA2-7B上实现一小时压缩，达到接近int4量化性能，性能下降小于1%，且无需重训练。系统性实验验证了PNAS四项优势：高压缩比、无需后训练、推理时间可控、压缩时间短。
AI.conclusion: Hyper-Compression提出了一种不同于现有范式的新型模型压缩机制，通过动力系统超函数表示参数，在压缩比、效率、性能之间取得了良好平衡，具有实际应用价值。

title: Competing for the most profitable tour: The orienteering interdiction game
summary: The orienteering problem is a well-studied and fundamental problem in transportation science. In the problem, we are given a graph with prizes on the nodes and lengths on the edges, together with a budget on the overall tour length. The goal is to find a tour that respects the length budget and maximizes the collected prizes. In this work, we introduce the orienteering interdiction game, in which a competitor (the leader) tries to minimize the total prize that the follower can collect within a feasible tour. To this end, the leader interdicts some of the nodes so that the follower cannot collect their prizes. The resulting interdiction game is formulated as a bilevel optimization problem, and a single-level reformulation is obtained based on interdiction cuts. A branch-and-cut algorithm with several enhancements, including the use of a solution pool, a cut pool and a heuristic method for the follower's problem, is proposed. In addition to this exact approach, a genetic algorithm is developed to obtain high-quality solutions in a short computing time. In a computational study based on instances from the literature for the orienteering problem, the usefulness of the proposed algorithmic components is assessed, and the branch-and-cut and genetic algorithms are compared in terms of solution time and quality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了定向越野博弈问题（Orient. Interdiction Game），其中领导者通过阻断节点来最小化追随者在预算约束下能收集的总奖励。提出了基于双层规划的单层重构、分支切割算法（含解池、割池、启发式方法）以及遗传算法，并通过计算实验验证了算法的有效性。
