AI.motivation: 传统的定向越野问题（OP）只考虑单一决策者最大化收益，缺乏对竞争性或对抗性场景的建模。作者引入领导者-追随者博弈框架，旨在研究对手通过阻断节点来干扰最优路径规划的互动策略，填补了定向越野问题在博弈论层面的空白。
AI.method: 1) 将问题建模为双层优化（bilevel optimization），领导者在上层选择节点阻断，追随者在下层求解标准OP；2) 通过引入阻断割（interdiction cuts）将双层问题转化为单层MILP；3) 设计分支切割算法，集成解池（solution pool）、割池（cut pool）和追随者问题的启发式求解方法；4) 另开发遗传算法（GA）以快速获得高质量解。
AI.result: 在文献中的OP基准实例上进行了计算实验，评估了各算法组件的贡献（解池、割池、启发式），并比较了分支切割算法与遗传算法在求解时间和解质量上的表现。分支切割算法能提供精确解，遗传算法在计算时间上更有优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分支切割算法可有效求解定向越野博弈问题的精确解，遗传算法则适用于需要快速响应的场景。该研究为竞争性路径规划问题提供了新的建模与求解框架，拓展了定向越野问题的应用边界。

title: Logarithmic regret in the ergodic Avellaneda-Stoikov market making model
summary: We analyse the regret arising from learning the price sensitivity parameter $κ$ of liquidity takers in the ergodic version of the Avellaneda-Stoikov market making model. We show that a learning algorithm based on a maximum-likelihood estimator for the parameter achieves the regret upper bound of order $\ln^2 T$ in expectation. To obtain the result we need two key ingredients. The first is the twice differentiability of the ergodic constant under the misspecified parameter in the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation with respect to $κ$, which leads to a second--order performance gap. The second is the learning rate of the regularised maximum-likelihood estimator which is obtained from concentration inequalities for Bernoulli signals. Numerical experiments confirm the convergence and the robustness of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在遍历性Avellaneda-Stoikov做市模型中，学习流动性接受者价格敏感参数κ所产生的遗憾，提出基于最大似然估计的学习算法可实现期望遗憾上界O(ln²T)，并数值验证了算法的收敛性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在遍历性Avellaneda-Stoikov做市模型中，流动性接受者的价格敏感参数κ未知时，做市商需要在线学习该参数以优化策略，但学习过程会带来遗憾（regret），现有研究对此遗憾的理论界缺乏分析。
AI.method: 采用基于最大似然估计的学习算法来估计κ；利用遍历常数关于κ的二阶可微性（来自HJB方程）推导二阶性能差距；通过Bernoulli信号集中不等式获得正则化MLE的学习速率；结合两者导出遗憾上界。
AI.result: 所提学习算法在期望意义下实现了O(ln²T)的遗憾上界；数值实验验证了算法的收敛性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 在遍历性Avellaneda-Stoikov做市模型中，通过MLE学习价格敏感参数κ是可行的，遗憾界为对数平方阶，证明了该学习策略的有效性。

title: Proper orthogonal decomposition analysis of square lid driven cavity flows containing particle suspensions
summary: Continual perturbations to the flow field in the square lid driven cavity can significantly impact both its stability and the dynamic characteristics of the system. In this study, the effect of these perturbations are analyzed via computational fluid dynamics simulations of a square, two-dimensional, lid driven cavity containing varying area fractions of suspended particles. The evolution over time of these particle-particle and particle-fluid interactions generate two-dimensional disturbance velocity changes in the flow field. In order to better understand the characteristics and effects of these changes, proper orthogonal decomposition analysis is performed on the velocity difference flow field to determine the dominant flow structures over the simulation time domain. The resulting eigenvectors and eigenvalues represent the varying dominant flow structures and their respective dominance over the simulation time, respectively. This is carried out at particle suspension area fractions from 10\% - 50\% and for Reynolds numbers of 100, 400, 700, and 1000. Critical flow regimes and particle suspension area fractions are discussed in order to characterize the stability of this particle-in-fluid system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过CFD模拟和POD分析，研究了方形顶盖驱动空腔中悬浮颗粒（面积分数10%-50%，雷诺数100-1000）引起的流场扰动，识别了主导流动结构及其对系统稳定性的影响。
AI.motivation: 持续扰动对方形顶盖驱动空腔流场的稳定性和动态特性有显著影响，但颗粒-流体相互作用产生的扰动效应尚不明确，需要深入分析其主导流动结构和系统稳定性特征。
AI.method: 采用计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟二维方形顶盖驱动空腔中的悬浮颗粒流动，对不同颗粒面积分数（10%-50%）和雷诺数（100、400、700、1000）进行仿真；利用本征正交分解（POD）分析速度差流场，提取特征向量（主导流动结构）和特征值（结构主导性）。
AI.result: 在不同颗粒面积分数和雷诺数条件下，识别了流场中的主导流动结构及其随时间演化的主导性变化；确定了关键的流动 regime 和颗粒悬浮面积分数，表征了颗粒-流体系统的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 颗粒悬浮面积分数和雷诺数是影响顶盖驱动空腔中颗粒-流体系统稳定性的关键参数，POD分析能有效揭示扰动流场的主导结构特征，为理解此类两相流系统的稳定性提供依据。

title: Stochastic identities for random isotropic fields
summary: This letter presents new nontrivial stochastic identities for random isotropic second rank tensor fields. They can be considered as markers of statistical isotropy in turbulent flows of any nature. The case of axial symmetry is also considered. We confirm the validity of the identities using different direct numerical simulations of turbulent flows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了随机各向同性二阶张量场的新非平凡随机恒等式，可作为任意性质湍流中统计各向同性的标记，并验证了其在数值模拟中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 湍流研究中，统计各向同性是一个重要假设，但缺乏有效的数学标记来判别流场是否满足统计各向同性。本文旨在提出新的随机恒等式，作为统计各向同性的可靠标记。
AI.method: 推导了随机各向同性二阶张量场的新非平凡随机恒等式，并扩展至轴对称情形；通过多个直接数值模拟（DNS）湍流数据验证了这些恒等式的有效性。
AI.result: 成功推导出新的恒等式，并在不同直接数值模拟的湍流数据中得到验证，确认其可作为统计各向同性的有效标记。
AI.conclusion: 这些新恒等式可作为任意性质湍流中统计各向同性的可靠标记，并适用于轴对称情形，具有较好的普适性和实用性。

title: Solving physics-based initial value problems with unsupervised machine learning
summary: Initial value problems -- a system of ordinary differential equations and corresponding initial conditions -- can be used to describe many physical phenomena including those arise in classical mechanics. We have developed a novel approach to solve physics-based initial value problems using unsupervised machine learning. We propose a deep learning framework that models the dynamics of a variety of mechanical systems through neural networks. Our framework is flexible, allowing us to solve non-linear, coupled, and chaotic dynamical systems. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on systems including a free particle, a particle in a gravitational field, a classical pendulum, and the Hénon--Heiles system (a pair of coupled harmonic oscillators with a non-linear perturbation, used in celestial mechanics). Our results show that deep neural networks can successfully approximate solutions to these problems, producing trajectories which conserve physical properties such as energy and those with stationary action. We note that probabilistic activation functions, as defined in this paper, are required to learn any solutions of initial value problems in their strictest sense, and we introduce coupled neural networks to learn solutions of coupled systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督机器学习的深度学习框架，用于求解物理初始值问题（常微分方程组），能够有效模拟自由粒子、引力场粒子、经典摆和Hénon–Heiles混沌系统等力学系统的动力学行为，并在严格意义上需要概率激活函数和耦合神经网络来学习耦合系统解，同时保持能量守恒和最小作用量等物理性质。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法求解物理初始值问题存在局限性，本文旨在利用无监督深度学习提供一种灵活、通用的替代方案，能够处理非线性、耦合和混沌动力系统，同时保持物理守恒性质。
AI.method: 采用无监督深度学习框架，使用神经网络对力学系统的动力学进行建模；引入概率激活函数以严格满足初始值问题的解条件；针对耦合系统提出耦合神经网络结构；无需标记数据，通过物理约束（如能量守恒、最小作用量）进行训练。
AI.result: 在自由粒子、引力场粒子、经典摆和Hénon–Heiles系统等案例上，深度神经网络能够成功逼近解，生成的轨迹能够保持能量守恒和静止作用量等物理性质。
AI.conclusion: 深度神经网络可作为一种有效的无监督工具求解物理初始值问题，概率激活函数和耦合神经网络是严格求解该类问题的关键组件。

title: Spin relaxation in graphite due to spin-orbital-phonon interaction from first-principles density-matrix approach
summary: We predict "intrinsic" spin relaxation times ($T_{1}$) of graphite due to spin-orbit-phonon interaction, i.e., the combination of spin-orbit coupling and electron-phonon interaction, using our developed first-principles density-matrix approach. We obtain ultralong $T_{1}$, e.g., $\sim$600 ns at 300 K, which leads to ultralong in-plane spin diffusion length $\sim$110 $μ$m within the drift-diffusion model. Our prediction sets the upper bound of $T_{1}$ of graphite at each given temperature and Fermi level. The anisotropy ratios of $T_{1}$ or values of $T_{1z}/T_{1x}$ are found small and around 0.6. We examine the applicability of the well-known Elliot-Yafet (EY) relation, which declares that spin relaxation rate $T_{1α}^{-1}$ ($α=x,y,z$) is proportional to the product of the ensemble average of spin mixing parameter $\left\langle b_α^{2}\right\rangle $ and carrier relaxation rate $τ_{p}^{-1}$. Our numerical tests suggest that the EY relation works qualitatively if the degeneracy threshold $t^{\mathrm{deg}}$ for evaluating $b_α^{2}$ is elatively large (not much smaller than or comparable to $k_{B}T$), e.g., $10^{-3}$ eV or larger, but fails if $t^{\mathrm{deg}}$ is too tiny (much smaller than $k_{B}T$), e.g., $10^{-6}$ eV or smaller.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理密度矩阵方法预测了石墨中自旋-轨道-声子相互作用导致的本征自旋弛豫时间(T1)，发现其在300K时约600 ns，对应面内自旋扩散长度约110 μm。同时检验了Elliot-Yafet关系的适用条件，发现该关系在退化阈值较大时定性成立，阈值过小则失效。
AI.motivation: 石墨作为一种重要的碳基材料，其自旋输运性质对自旋电子学应用至关重要。然而，由于自旋-轨道耦合较弱，石墨的本征自旋弛豫时间尚未被准确预测，且Elliot-Yafet关系在石墨中的适用性缺乏系统检验。本文旨在通过第一性原理计算填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用自主研发的第一性原理密度矩阵方法，计算了石墨中自旋-轨道-声子相互作用导致的自旋弛豫时间T1。通过系统分析不同温度和费米能级下的弛豫行为，并检验Elliot-Yafet关系在不同退化阈值下的适用性。
AI.result: (1) 300K时本征T1约600 ns，面内自旋扩散长度约110 μm；(2) 各向异性比T1z/T1x约为0.6，较小；(3) Elliot-Yafet关系在退化阈值t_deg≥10^{-3} eV（与k_BT可比或更大）时定性成立，在t_deg≤10^{-6} eV（远小于k_BT）时失效。
AI.conclusion: 石墨具有超长的本征自旋弛豫时间和扩散长度，是潜在的自旋电子学材料。Elliot-Yafet关系在石墨中的适用性依赖于退化阈值的选择，需谨慎使用。

title: A multi-dimensional, robust, and cell-centered finite-volume scheme for the ideal MHD equations
summary: We present a new multi-dimensional, robust, and cell-centered finite-volume scheme for the ideal MHD equations. This scheme relies on relaxation and splitting techniques and can be easily used at high order. A fully conservative version is not entropy satisfying but is observed experimentally to be more robust than standard constrained transport schemes at low plasma beta. At very low plasma beta and high Alfvén number, we have designed an entropy-satisfying version that is not conservative for the magnetic field but preserves admissible states and we switch locally a-priori between the two versions depending on the regime of plasma beta and Alfvén number. This strategy is robust in a wide range of standard MHD test cases, all performed at second order with a classic MUSCL-Hancock scheme.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型多维、鲁棒、基于松弛和分裂技术的单元中心有限体积格式求解理想MHD方程。该方案包含两种版本：完全守恒版本（不满足熵条件，但在低等离子体β下比标准约束输运格式更鲁棒）和熵满足版本（不保守磁场但保持可接受状态），根据等离子体β和阿尔芬数局部先验切换，在多种标准MHD测试中表现出鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有理想的MHD数值格式在低等离子体β和高阿尔芬数等极端条件下存在鲁棒性不足或熵条件不满足的问题，需要设计一种能够适应不同物理参数区域、兼具鲁棒性和熵特性的数值方案。
AI.method: 采用松弛和分裂技术构建单元中心有限体积格式；设计完全守恒版本（不满足熵条件但实验鲁棒）和熵满足版本（非保守磁场但保持可接受状态）；根据等离子体β和阿尔芬数进行局部先验切换；以二阶MUSCL-Hancock方案实现。
AI.result: 守恒版本在低等离子体β下比标准约束输运格式更鲁棒；熵满足版本在极低β和高阿尔芬数下保持可接受状态；两种版本的切换策略在广泛的MHD标准测试中表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于松弛/分裂的混合策略在多种MHD测试案例中验证了其鲁棒性，能够根据局域物理参数自适应选择守恒或熵满足版本，有效应对极端条件下的数值挑战。

title: Improved Actions using The Renormalization Group
summary: We introduce a numerical method to study critical properties near classical and quantum phase transitions. Our method applies ideas of the Tensor Renormalization Group to obtain an improved action which is used to extract critical properties by performing Monte Carlo simulations on relatively small system sizes. We demonstrate this method on the XY model in three dimensions. Our method may provide a framework with which to efficiently study universal properties in a large class of phase transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合张量重整化群与蒙特卡洛模拟的数值方法，通过改进作用量在小尺寸系统上高效提取经典与量子相变的临界性质，并在三维XY模型上验证了该方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的数值方法在研究相变临界性质时通常需要较大的系统尺寸，计算成本高昂。作者希望通过引入张量重整化群的思想来改进作用量，从而在较小的系统尺寸上也能准确提取临界性质，提高研究效率。
AI.method: 将张量重整化群的思想应用于获得改进的作用量（improved action），然后利用该改进作用量在小系统上进行蒙特卡洛模拟，从中提取临界性质。
AI.result: 该方法在三维XY模型上得到了验证，表明其能够有效从较小系统尺寸的蒙特卡洛模拟中提取临界性质。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高效研究一大类相变中的普适性质提供了一个可行的框架。

title: Re-entrant percolation in active Brownian hard disks
summary: Non-equilibrium clustering and percolation are investigated in an archetypal model of two-dimensional active matter using dynamic simulations of self-propelled Brownian repulsive particles. We concentrate on the single-phase region up to moderate levels of activity, before motility-induced phase separation (MIPS) sets in. Weak activity promotes cluster formation and lowers the percolation threshold. However, driving the system further out of equilibrium partly reverses this effect, resulting in a minimum in the critical density for the formation of system-spanning clusters and introducing re-entrant percolation as a function of activity in the pre-MIPS regime. This non-monotonic behaviour arises from competition between activity-induced effective attraction (which eventually leads to MIPS) and activity-driven cluster breakup. Using an adapted iterative Boltzmann inversion method, we derive effective potentials to map weakly active cases onto a passive (equilibrium) model with conservative attraction, which can be characterised by Monte Carlo simulations. While the active and passive systems have practically identical radial distribution functions, we find decisive differences in higher-order structural correlations, to which the percolation threshold is highly sensitive. For sufficiently strong activity, no passive pairwise potential can reproduce the radial distribution function of the active system.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟二维活性布朗粒子，发现在运动诱导相分离（MIPS）之前的弱活性区域，活性会促进团簇形成并降低逾渗阈值；但随活性进一步增强，这一效应部分逆转，导致临界密度出现最小值及重入逾渗现象。这种非单调行为源于活性诱导的有效吸引与活性驱动的团簇破碎之间的竞争。通过改进的迭代玻尔兹曼反演方法，研究将弱活性体系映射到等效被动模型，发现尽管径向分布函数一致，但在高阶结构相关性上存在决定性差异，而逾渗阈值对后者高度敏感。
AI.motivation: 探究活性物质在非平衡态下的团簇化与逾渗行为，特别是MIPS发生前弱活性区域的微观机制，以及活性如何影响体系的结构和相变特征。
AI.method: 采用二维自推进布朗排斥粒子的动态模拟，结合改进的迭代玻尔兹曼反演方法推导有效势，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟对比活性体系与等效被动体系的结构特征。
AI.result: 弱活性促进团簇形成并降低逾渗阈值，但增强活性会部分逆转此效应，出现临界密度最小值和重入逾渗；活性与被动体系径向分布函数一致，但高阶结构相关性存在显著差异，且逾渗阈值对高阶结构高度敏感；强活性下无法用被动对势再现活性体系的径向分布函数。
AI.conclusion: 活性体系中团簇化与逾渗的非单调行为由活性诱导的有效吸引与活性驱动的团簇破碎竞争决定；传统以径向分布函数为目标的被动映射方法无法准确描述活性体系的高阶结构特征及逾渗行为。

title: Variational Bayesian Phylogenetic Inference with Semi-implicit Branch Length Distributions
summary: Reconstructing the evolutionary history relating a collection of molecular sequences is the main subject of modern Bayesian phylogenetic inference. However, the commonly used Markov chain Monte Carlo methods can be inefficient due to the complicated space of phylogenetic trees, especially when the number of sequences is large. An alternative approach is variational Bayesian phylogenetic inference (VBPI) which transforms the inference problem into an optimization problem. While effective, the default diagonal lognormal approximation for the branch lengths of the tree used in VBPI is often insufficient to capture the complexity of the exact posterior. In this work, we propose a more flexible family of branch length variational posteriors based on semi-implicit hierarchical distributions using graph neural networks. We show that this semi-implicit construction emits straightforward permutation equivariant distributions, and therefore can handle the non-Euclidean branch length space across different tree topologies with ease. To deal with the intractable marginal probability of semi-implicit variational distributions, we develop several alternative lower bounds for stochastic optimization. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method over baseline methods on benchmark data examples, in terms of both marginal likelihood estimation and branch length posterior approximation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于半隐式分层分布和图神经网络的变分贝叶斯系统发育推断方法（SI-VBPI），通过引入更灵活的枝长变分后验族，解决了标准VBPI中对角对数正态近似表达力不足的问题，并在边际似然估计和枝长后验近似方面优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 标准VBPI方法使用对角对数正态分布近似枝长后验，但该分布在捕获真实后验分布的复杂性方面能力有限，尤其当序列数量较大时，贝叶斯系统发育推断面临计算效率低下的挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于图神经网络的半隐式分层变分后验族用于枝长建模；利用半隐式构造天然产生置换等变分布，适用于不同树拓扑下的非欧几里得枝长空间；针对半隐式变分分布的不可处理边际概率，推导了多种替代下界用于随机优化。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，所提方法在边际似然估计和枝长后验近似方面均优于基线方法，验证了半隐式变分后验族在系统发育推断中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 半隐式分层分布结合图神经网络为贝叶斯系统发育推断提供了更灵活高效的枝长后验近似方案，显著提升了VBPI框架的表达能力。

title: Modeling Spatial Extremal Dependence of Precipitation Using Distributional Neural Networks
summary: In this work, we propose a simulation-based estimation approach using generative neural networks to determine dependencies of precipitation maxima and their underlying uncertainty in time and space. Within the common framework of max-stable processes for extremes under temporal and spatial dependence, our methodology allows estimating the process parameters and their respective uncertainty, but also delivers an explicit nonparametric estimate of the spatial dependence through the pairwise extremal coefficient function. We illustrate the effectiveness and robustness of our approach in a thorough finite sample study where we obtain good performance in complex settings for which closed-form likelihood estimation becomes intractable. We use the technique for studying monthly rainfall maxima in Western Germany for the period 2021-2023, which is of particular interest since it contains an extreme precipitation and consecutive flooding event in July 2021 that had a massive deadly impact. Beyond the considered setting, the presented methodology and its main generative ideas also have great potential for other applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于生成神经网络的仿真估计方法，用于确定降水极值在时空上的依赖关系及其不确定性，在复杂场景下优于传统闭式似然估计，并以2021-2023年德国西部地区月度降雨极大值为案例进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 降水极值（如暴雨）具有复杂的时空依赖结构，传统基于闭式似然的最大稳定过程估计方法在复杂场景下计算不可行，亟需一种灵活且稳健的替代估计方案。
AI.method: 利用生成神经网络进行基于仿真的参数估计，在最大稳定过程框架下同时估计过程参数及其不确定性，并通过成对极值系数函数提供空间依赖性的显式非参数估计。
AI.result: 在有限样本研究中展示了方法的有效性和鲁棒性，在闭式似然估计不可行的复杂设定下取得良好性能；实际应用于2021-2023年德国西部地区月度降雨极大值分析，成功捕捉了2021年7月极端降水及洪水事件的时空依赖特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的生成式仿真估计方法不仅有效解决了复杂时空极值依赖的估计难题，且其核心思想具有推广至其他应用领域的巨大潜力。

title: UAV-Mounted Movable Antenna: Joint Optimization of UAV Placement and Antenna Configuration
summary: Recently, movable antennas (MAs) have garnered immense attention due to their capability to favorably alter channel conditions through agile movement. In this letter, we delve into a spectrum sharing system enabled by unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) mounted MAs, thereby introducing a new degree of freedom vertically alongside the horizontal local mobility for MAs. Our objective is to maximize the minimum beamforming gain for secondary users (SUs) while ensuring that interference to the primary users (PUs) remains below a predefined threshold, which necessitates a joint optimization involving the UAV's height, the antenna weight vector (AWV), and the antenna position vector (APV). However, the formulated optimization problem is non-convex and challenging to solve optimally. To tackle this issue, we propose an alternating optimization algorithm that optimizes the UAV's height, APV and AWV in an iterative manner, thus yielding a near-optimal solution. Numerical results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed scheme as well as its ability to deliver full beamforming gain to SUs with reduced computational complexity.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一种搭载移动天线（MAs）的无人机（UAV）辅助频谱共享系统，通过联合优化无人机高度、天线权重向量（AWV）和天线位置向量（APV），在确保对主用户（PUs）干扰低于阈值的条件下，最大化次用户（SUs）的最小波束赋形增益。针对非凸优化问题，提出了一种交替优化算法，数值结果验证了所提方案在实现全波束赋形增益和降低计算复杂度方面的优越性。
AI.motivation: 移动天线（MAs）虽能通过灵活移动改善信道条件，但现有研究多局限于水平局部移动；引入无人机平台可为MAs提供垂直方向的新自由度，从而在频谱共享系统中更有效地管理干扰与波束赋形增益之间的权衡。
AI.method: 将问题建模为最大化SUs最小波束赋形增益的联合优化问题，约束包括PU干扰阈值以及UAV高度、APV、AWV的设计变量；由于问题非凸，提出交替优化算法，迭代优化UAV高度、APV和AWV，以获得近优解。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，所提方案相比基准方案具有显著性能优势，能够以较低计算复杂度为SUs提供全波束赋形增益，同时有效控制对PUs的干扰。
AI.conclusion: 将MAs与UAV平台相结合，利用垂直方向的新自由度，能够有效提升频谱共享系统的波束赋形性能；所提出的交替优化算法在保证干扰约束的同时，实现了近优的联合优化效果。

title: Hybrid Surrogate Models: Circumventing Gibbs Phenomenon for Partial Differential Equations with Finite Shock-Type Discontinuities
summary: We introduce the concept of Hybrid Surrogate Models (HSMs) -- combining multivariate polynomials with Heavyside functions -- as approximates of functions with finitely many jump discontinuities. We exploit the HSMs for formulating a variational optimization approach, solving non-regular partial differential equations (PDEs) with non-continuous shock-type solutions. The HSM technique simultaneously obtains a parametrization of the position and the height of the shocks as well as the solution of the PDE. We show that the HSM technique circumvents the notorious Gibbs phenomenon, which limits the accuracy that classic numerical methods reach. Numerical experiments, addressing linear and non-linearly propagating shocks, demonstrate the strong approximation power of the HSM technique.

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合代理模型（HSMs），将多元多项式与Heaviside函数结合，用于逼近具有有限跳跃间断的函数。该方法通过变分优化求解非正则偏微分方程（PDEs）中的不连续激波解，同时参数化激波位置、高度及PDE解。HSM技术有效规避了经典数值方法中的Gibbs现象，在线性和非线性激波传播实验中展现出强大的逼近能力。
AI.motivation: 经典数值方法在求解具有不连续激波型解的偏微分方程时，受Gibbs现象限制，精度低下。需要一种能够同时参数化激波位置、高度并求解PDE的新方法。
AI.method: 提出混合代理模型（HSMs），将多元多项式与Heaviside阶跃函数相结合，构建能够逼近有限个跳跃间断点的函数近似器。基于此模型，采用变分优化方法求解非正则PDE。
AI.result: HSM技术成功规避了Gibbs现象；在线性和非线性激波传播问题的数值实验中表现出强大的逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合代理模型是一种有效的非正则PDE求解方法，能够同时获得激波位置、高度和PDE解的高精度近似，克服了经典方法的根本性局限。

title: Cubic equations with 2 Roots in the interval $[-1, 1]$
summary: The conditions for cubic equations, to have 3 real roots and 2 of the roots lie in the closed interval $[-1, 1]$ are given. These conditions are visualized. This question arises in physics in e.g. the theory of tops.

AI.tldr: 本文给出了三次方程具有三个实根且其中两个根位于闭区间[-1,1]内的条件，并对这些条件进行了可视化。该问题源于物理学中的陀螺理论。
AI.motivation: 该研究源于物理学中陀螺理论的实际需求，需要确定三次方程在特定区间内的根分布条件。
AI.method: 通过数学分析推导三次方程根分布的条件，并采用可视化方法呈现这些条件。
AI.result: 给出了三次方程具有三个实根且其中两个根落在[-1,1]闭区间内的充要条件，并实现了可视化。
AI.conclusion: 本文为三次方程特定根分布问题提供了完整的条件刻画和可视化表示，对陀螺理论等物理应用具有参考价值。

title: On Continuous Terminal Embeddings of Sets of Positive Reach
summary: In this paper we prove the existence of Hölder continuous terminal embeddings of any desired $X \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ into $\mathbb{R}^{m}$ with $m=\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-2}ω(S_X)^2)$, for arbitrarily small distortion $\varepsilon$, where $ω(S_X)$ denotes the Gaussian width of the unit secants of $X$. More specifically, when $X$ is a finite set we provide terminal embeddings that are locally $\frac{1}{2}$-Hölder almost everywhere, and when $X$ is infinite with positive reach we give terminal embeddings that are locally $\frac{1}{4}$-Hölder everywhere sufficiently close to $X$ (i.e., within all tubes around $X$ of radius less than $X$'s reach). When $X$ is a compact $d$-dimensional submanifold of $\mathbb{R}^N$, an application of our main results provides terminal embeddings into $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(d)$-dimensional space that are locally Hölder everywhere sufficiently close to the manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了对于任意子集X⊆ℝᵈ，存在到ℝᵐ（m=𝒪(ε⁻²ω(S_X)²)）的Hölder连续终端嵌入，其中ω(S_X)是X的单位割线的高斯宽度。对有限集提供几乎处处1/2-Hölder嵌入，对正达及无限集提供X附近处处1/4-Hölder嵌入，对紧致d维子流形提供到Õ(d)维空间的局部Hölder嵌入。
AI.motivation: 经典Johnson-Lindenstrauss引理保证欧氏空间中有限点集可在低维空间近似保持距离，但该嵌入通常是Lipschitz的（即1-范数连续）。本文试图构造具有更弱连续性（Hölder连续）的终端嵌入，同时降低嵌入维度依赖从点集大小转为几何复杂度（高斯宽度）。
AI.method: 通过引入高斯宽度ω(S_X)刻画点集几何复杂度，利用概率方法构造随机线性映射，证明其满足Hölder连续条件。对有限集和无限集分别采用不同技术分析局部Hölder指数（1/2和1/4）。对子流形情形，结合流形学习中的降维技术，利用可达性和管状邻域性质。
AI.result: 1）有限集：存在几乎处处局部1/2-Hölder连续的终端嵌入，维度m=𝒪(ε⁻²ω(S_X)²)；2）正达及无限集：存在X附近处处局部1/4-Hölder连续的终端嵌入；3）紧致d维子流形：存在到Õ(d)维空间的局部Hölder连续终端嵌入（处处足够接近流形）。
AI.conclusion: 本文拓展了经典降维嵌入理论，证明可以用Hölder连续性替代Lipschitz连续性来换取更低的嵌入维度（依赖几何复杂度而非点集大小），为流形学习、高维数据分析等任务提供了新的理论工具。

title: Spatio-spectral graph neural operator for solving computational mechanics problems on irregular domain and unstructured grid
summary: Scientific machine learning has seen significant progress with the emergence of operator learning. However, existing methods encounter difficulties when applied to problems on unstructured grids and irregular domains. Spatial graph neural networks utilize local convolution in a neighborhood to potentially address these challenges, yet they often suffer from issues such as over-smoothing and over-squashing in deep architectures. Conversely, spectral graph neural networks leverage global convolution to capture extensive features and long-range dependencies in domain graphs, albeit at a high computational cost due to Eigenvalue decomposition. In this paper, we introduce a novel approach, referred to as Spatio-Spectral Graph Neural Operator (Sp$^2$GNO) that integrates spatial and spectral GNNs effectively. This framework mitigates the limitations of individual methods and enables the learning of solution operators across arbitrary geometries, thus catering to a wide range of real-world problems. Sp$^2$GNO demonstrates exceptional performance in solving both time-dependent and time-independent partial differential equations on regular and irregular domains. Our approach is validated through comprehensive benchmarks and practical applications drawn from computational mechanics and scientific computing literature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合空间图神经网络与谱图神经网络的新型算子学习框架Sp²GNO，有效解决了非结构化网格和不规则域上的偏微分方程求解问题，在规则与不规则域上均表现出优异的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有算子学习方法在处理非结构化网格和不规则域时存在困难，空间图神经网络在深层架构中会出现过平滑和过挤压问题，而谱图神经网络虽能捕获长程依赖但特征分解计算成本高。因此需要一种能结合两者优势并规避各自缺陷的方法。
AI.method: 提出Sp²GNO（Spatio-Spectral Graph Neural Operator），将空间图神经网络的局部卷积与谱图神经网络的全局卷积有效融合，实现任意几何形状上的解算子学习。
AI.result: 在规则和不规则域上求解时间相关和时间无关的偏微分方程中均表现出卓越性能，并通过计算力学和科学计算领域的综合基准测试和实际应用得到验证。
AI.conclusion: Sp²GNO通过整合空间与谱图神经网络的优势，克服了单一方法的局限性，能够适应多种实际问题的任意几何形状，为科学机器学习中的算子学习提供了有效的新范式。

title: On finite termination of quasi-Newton methods on quadratic problems
summary: Quasi-Newton methods form an important class of methods for solving nonlinear optimization problems. In such methods, first order information is used to approximate the second derivative. The aim is to mimic the fast convergence that can be guaranteed by Newton-based methods. In the best case, quasi-Newton methods will far outperform steepest descent and other first order methods, without the computational cost of calculating the exact second derivative. These convergence guarantees hold locally, which follows closely from the fact that, if the objective function is strongly convex, it can be approximated well by a quadratic function close to the solution. Understanding the performance of quasi-Newton methods on quadratic problems with a symmetric positive definite Hessian is therefore of vital importance. In the classic case, an approximation of the Hessian is updated at every iteration and exact line search is used. It is well known that the algorithm terminates finitely, even when the Hessian approximation is memoryless, i.e. requires only the most recent information. In this paper, we explore the possibilities in which reliance on exact line search and dependence on conjugate search directions can be relaxed, while preserving finite termination properties of quasi-Newton methods on quadratic problems. We show that it suffices to create a memoryless quasi-Newton matrix based on two vectors to give ability to compute a Newton direction within a finite number of iterations, independent of step lengths. It is unnecessary for the quasi-Newton approximation to act as the Hessian on the full space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在拟牛顿法中放宽对精确线搜索和共轭搜索方向的依赖，同时保持对二次问题的有限终止特性。作者证明，基于两个向量构建的无记忆拟牛顿矩阵，即使在步长任意的情况下，也能在有限迭代次数内计算出牛顿方向，且拟牛顿近似无需在全空间上充当Hessian矩阵。
AI.motivation: 拟牛顿法是求解非线性优化问题的重要方法，但其经典理论依赖于精确线搜索和共轭方向。理解拟牛顿法在二次问题（对称正定Hessian）上的性能至关重要，而经典结果要求精确线搜索。本文旨在探索能否放宽这些条件（如精确线搜索和共轭搜索方向），同时保留拟牛顿法在二次问题上的有限终止性质。
AI.method: 作者从理论上分析了无记忆拟牛顿法在二次问题上的性质。核心思路是：仅需基于两个向量构建无记忆拟牛顿矩阵，证明该矩阵能在有限迭代次数内（独立于步长）计算出牛顿方向，且无需拟牛顿近似在全空间上充当Hessian矩阵。
AI.result: 证明了放宽精确线搜索和共轭搜索方向依赖的可能性：只需基于两个向量的无记忆拟牛顿矩阵，即可在有限步内获得牛顿方向，且该结果与步长选择无关。拟牛顿近似不必在完整空间上精确模仿Hessian矩阵的行为。
AI.conclusion: 拟牛顿法对精确线搜索和共轭方向的依赖可以显著放宽。在二次问题上，使用两个向量构建的无记忆拟牛顿矩阵足以保证有限终止性，这为设计更灵活、计算代价更低的拟牛顿变体提供了理论基础。

title: Penalty Adversarial Network (PAN): A neural network-based method to solve PDE-constrained optimal control problems
summary: In this work, we introduce a novel strategy for tackling constrained optimization problems through a modified penalty method. Conventional penalty methods convert constrained problems into unconstrained ones by incorporating constraints into the loss function via a penalty term. However, selecting an optimal penalty parameter remains challenging; an improper choice, whether excessively high or low, can significantly impede the discovery of the true solution. This challenge is particularly evident when training neural networks for constrained optimization, where tuning parameters can become an extensive and laborious task. To overcome these issues, we propose an adversarial approach that redefines the conventional penalty method by simultaneously considering two competing penalty problems--a technique we term the penalty adversarial problem. Within linear settings, our method not only ensures the fulfillment of constraints but also guarantees solvability, leading to more precise solutions compared to traditional approaches. We further reveal that our method effectively performs an automatic adjustment of penalty parameters by leveraging the relationship between the objective and loss functions, thereby obviating the need for manual parameter tuning. Additionally, we extend this adversarial framework to develop a neural network-based solution for optimal control problems governed by linear or nonlinear partial differential equations. We demonstrate the efficacy of this innovative approach through a series of numerical examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性罚方法（Penalty Adversarial Problem），通过同时考虑两个竞争的罚问题来自动调整罚参数，无需手动调参，并扩展到基于神经网络的偏微分方程最优控制问题求解。
AI.motivation: 传统罚方法中罚参数的选择极为困难，过高或过低都会阻碍找到真解，尤其在神经网络约束优化中调参费时费力。
AI.method: 提出罚对抗问题（Penalty Adversarial Problem），通过同时考虑两个竞争的罚问题，利用目标函数与损失函数的关系自动调整罚参数；在线性设定下保证约束满足和可解性；进一步扩展到基于神经网络的线性和非线性偏微分方程最优控制问题求解。
AI.result: 在线性设定下，该方法相比传统方法不仅保证约束满足且保证可解性，得到更精确的解；通过数值实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该对抗性罚方法有效解决了罚参数手动调优的难题，实现了自动参数调整，并为PDE约束下的最优控制问题提供了可靠的神经网络求解框架。

title: Asymmetry of imploding detonations in thin channels
summary: The factors that influence the symmetry of an imploding detonation are investigated experimentally and theoretically. Detonations in sub-atmospheric acetylene-oxygen were initiated and made to converge in an apparatus that followed that of Lee and Lee (Phys Fluids 8:2148-2152, 1965). The width of the test section was controlled with a wave-shaping insert, which formed the test section against the viewing window, creating an effectively two-dimensional problem with a channel width comparable to the detonation cell size. The convergence of the detonation was observed via self-luminous open-shutter photography and high-speed videography. The resulting videos were analyzed to quantify the wave speed, degree of asymmetry, and direction and magnitude of the offset in the center of convergence. To determine the experimental parameters that influence the symmetry of the imploding wave, the wave-shaping insert was intentionally canted by 0.3°-0.6°, accentuating the asymmetry of the imploding detonation. The experiment was modeled using a Huygens construction wherein the detonation is treated as a collection of wavelets, each assumed to propagate locally at a velocity determined by the channel width. The results of the model reproduced the observed offsets in detonation convergence from the center of the apparatus, confirming that velocity deficits resulting from the narrow channel width control the observed asymmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验和理论研究了聚爆爆震波对称性的影响因素。在亚大气压乙炔-氧气混合物中，通过可控倾斜波形的波导插片（倾角0.3°-0.6°）研究通道宽度对爆震波汇聚对称性的影响，发现窄通道导致的速度亏损是控制不对称性的关键机制，并利用惠更斯构造模型成功再现了实验观测的汇聚中心偏移。
AI.motivation: 探索影响聚爆爆震波对称性的关键因素，理解窄通道几何约束对爆震波汇聚动力学的影响机制。
AI.method: 实验上采用Lee & Lee (1965)装置，通过可控倾斜波形插片（0.3°-0.6°）制造不对称性，结合自发光开快门摄影和高速摄像记录爆震波汇聚过程；理论上基于惠更斯构造模型，将爆震波视为子波集合，子波传播速度由局部通道宽度决定。
AI.result: 发现通道宽度差异导致的速度亏损是控制爆震波汇聚不对称性的主要因素；惠更斯模型成功再现了实验中观测到的汇聚中心偏移程度和方向。
AI.conclusion: 窄通道引起的速度亏损主导了聚爆爆震波的不对称性，惠更斯构造模型能够有效预测波阵面形状和汇聚中心偏移，为爆震波聚焦控制提供理论依据。

title: An efficient hp-Variational PINNs framework for incompressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are able to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by incorporating the residuals of the PDEs into their loss functions. Variational Physics-Informed Neural Networks (VPINNs) and hp-VPINNs use the variational form of the PDE residuals in their loss function. Although hp-VPINNs have shown promise over traditional PINNs, they suffer from higher training times and lack a framework capable of handling complex geometries, which limits their application to more complex PDEs. As such, hp-VPINNs have not been applied in solving the Navier-Stokes equations, amongst other problems in CFD, thus far. FastVPINNs was introduced to address these challenges by incorporating tensor-based loss computations, significantly improving the training efficiency. Moreover, by using the bilinear transformation, the FastVPINNs framework was able to solve PDEs on complex geometries. In the present work, we extend the FastVPINNs framework to vector-valued problems, with a particular focus on solving the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations for two-dimensional forward and inverse problems, including problems such as the lid-driven cavity flow, the Kovasznay flow, and flow past a backward-facing step for Reynolds numbers up to 200. Our results demonstrate a 2x improvement in training time while maintaining the same order of accuracy compared to PINNs algorithms documented in the literature. We further showcase the framework's efficiency in solving inverse problems for the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations by accurately identifying the Reynolds number of the underlying flow. Additionally, the framework's ability to handle complex geometries highlights its potential for broader applications in computational fluid dynamics. This implementation opens new avenues for research on hp-VPINNs, potentially extending their applicability to more complex problems.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了FastVPINNs框架以处理向量值问题，特别是求解二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的正向和逆向问题。通过张量化损失计算和双线性变换，该方法在保持精度的同时实现了2倍的训练时间改进，并能处理复杂几何形状。
AI.motivation: hp-VPINNs虽然优于传统PINNs，但训练时间长且缺乏处理复杂几何形状的框架，无法应用于Navier-Stokes方程等复杂CFD问题。FastVPINNs虽解决了效率和几何问题，但此前仅适用于标量问题。
AI.method: 将FastVPINNs框架扩展至向量值问题，采用张量化的损失计算提高训练效率，利用双线性变换处理复杂几何形状，对二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程进行正向和逆向求解。
AI.result: 在方腔驱动流、Kovasznay流和后向台阶流（Re≤200）等算例中，相比文献中PINNs算法，训练时间提升2倍且精度相当；能准确识别逆向问题中的雷诺数；可处理复杂几何形状。
AI.conclusion: FastVPINNs成功扩展至向量值问题，高效解决了不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的正向和逆向问题，为hp-VPINNs在更复杂CFD问题中的应用开辟了新途径。

title: REMIX SPH -- improving mixing in smoothed particle hydrodynamics simulations using a generalised, material-independent approach
comment: 55 pages, 36 figures, published in Journal of Computational Physics
summary: We present REMIX, a smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH) scheme designed to alleviate effects that typically suppress mixing and instability growth at density discontinuities in SPH simulations. We approach this problem by directly targeting sources of kernel smoothing error and discretisation error, resulting in a generalised, material-independent formulation that improves the treatment both of discontinuities within a single material, for example in an ideal gas, and of interfaces between dissimilar materials. This approach also leads to improvements in capturing wider hydrodynamic behaviour unrelated to mixing. We demonstrate marked improvements in three-dimensional test scenarios, focusing on cases with particles of equal mass across the simulation. This choice is particularly relevant for use cases in astrophysics and engineering -- specifically those in which particles are free to evolve over a large range of density scales -- where bespoke choices of unequal particle masses in the initial conditions cannot easily be used to address emergent and evolving density discontinuities. We achieve these improvements while maintaining sharp discontinuities; without introducing additional equation of state dependence in, for example, particle volume elements; and without contrived or targeted corrections. Our methods build upon a fully compressible and thermodynamically consistent core-SPH construction, retaining Galilean invariance as well as conservation of mass, momentum, and energy. REMIX is integrated in the open-source, state-of-the-art SWIFT code and is designed with computational efficiency also in mind, meaning that its improved hydrodynamic treatment can be used for high-resolution simulations without prohibitive cost to run-speed.

AI.tldr: REMIX是一种改进的SPH方案，通过直接降低核平滑误差和离散化误差，有效缓解密度不连续处的混合抑制和不稳定性增长，同时保持间断清晰度、无需额外状态方程依赖，并集成于SWIFT代码中，兼顾计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统SPH方法在密度不连续处（如材料界面或单一材料内部密度跳变）容易出现混合抑制和不稳定性增长的问题，影响模拟准确性。现有方案常依赖非通用修正或特殊的非等质量粒子初始化策略，难以适应粒子自由演化至大密度范围的应用场景（如天体物理和工程问题）。
AI.method: REMIX从核平滑误差和离散化误差这两个根本误差来源入手，构建了一种通用、与材料无关的SPH公式。它基于完全可压缩且热力学一致的核心SPH框架，保留伽利略不变性和质量、动量、能量守恒，不引入额外的状态方程依赖（如粒子体积元中的特殊处理），也不采用针对性的修正手段。
AI.result: 在三维测试场景中，REMIX在等质量粒子配置下展现出显著改进：有效提升了密度不连续处的混合和不稳定性模拟质量，同时保持尖锐的间断界面；并且改善了与混合无关的广泛流体动力学行为。该方法集成于开源SWIFT代码中，计算效率足以支持高分辨率模拟。
AI.conclusion: REMIX通过从源头上降低核平滑和离散化误差，在不牺牲间断清晰度、不引入额外状态方程依赖或针对性修正的前提下，显著改善了SPH在密度不连续处的混合与不稳定性表现，同时保持了计算效率和守恒性质，为天体物理和工程领域的应用提供了一种通用且高效的解决方案。

title: Finite-order method to calculate approximate density matrices in the Fock-space multireference coupled cluster theory
summary: An efficient approach to calculate approximate pure-state and transition reduced density matrices in the framework of the multireference relativistic Fock-space coupled cluster (FS CC) theory is proposed. The method is based on the effective operator formalism and consists of the direct substitution of the FS CC Ansatz for a wave operator into the effective operator expression with the subsequent truncation of expansion at the terms quadratic in cluster amplitudes. The final density matrix is defined by active-space density matrices of different ranks "dressed" with contributions from cluster operators. The method gives a connected expression for pure-state density matrices, provided that the intermediate normalization condition is fulfilled. Moreover, under some additional assumptions, the connectivity can also be ensured for calculated transition property matrix elements and natural transition spinors. The developed technique allows for fast and accurate calculations of one-particle reduced density matrices for a wide range of electronic states. A pilot application of the new technique to construct averaged atomic natural orbital (ANO) basis sets for fully relativistic electronic structure calculations is presented.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在多参考相对论Fock空间耦合簇（FS CC）理论框架下高效计算近似纯态和跃迁约化密度矩阵的方法，该方法基于有效算子形式，通过将波算子的FS CC Ansatz直接代入有效算子表达式并截断至簇振幅的二次项，最终得到由不同阶活性空间密度矩阵经簇算符"修饰"后的密度矩阵。该方法保证了纯态密度矩阵的连接性，并在额外假设下也确保了跃迁性质矩阵元及自然跃迁旋量的连接性。技术可快速准确计算宽范围电子态的单粒子约化密度矩阵，并展示了其在构建全相对论电子结构计算的平均原子自然轨道（ANO）基组中的试点应用。
AI.motivation: 现有的多参考相对论Fock空间耦合簇理论缺乏高效计算约化密度矩阵的方法，而密度矩阵对于电子结构分析（如自然轨道、跃迁性质）和基组构建至关重要。作者旨在开发一种既保持连接性（尺寸一致性）又高效实用的近似方案。
AI.method: 基于有效算子形式，将波算子的FS CC Ansatz代入有效算子表达式，截断至簇振幅二次项；将最终密度矩阵表示为不同阶活性空间密度矩阵被簇算符贡献"修饰"后的形式；在中间归一化条件下保证连接性，并通过额外假设确保跃迁性质的连接性。
AI.result: 该方法可快速准确计算宽范围电子态的单粒子约化密度矩阵；成功应用于构建全相对论电子结构计算的平均原子自然轨道（ANO）基组。
AI.conclusion: 提出的近似方案在保持连接性和计算效率的同时，能够准确计算多参考相对论FS CC框架下的纯态和跃迁密度矩阵，为相对论电子结构计算中ANO基组的构建提供了实用工具。

title: MGNN: Moment Graph Neural Network for Universal Molecular Potentials
summary: The quest for efficient and robust deep learning models for molecular systems representation is increasingly critical in scientific exploration. The advent of message passing neural networks has marked a transformative era in graph-based learning, particularly in the realm of predicting chemical properties and expediting molecular dynamics studies. We present the Moment Graph Neural Network (MGNN), a rotation-invariant message passing neural network architecture that capitalizes on the moment representation learning of 3D molecular graphs, is adept at capturing the nuanced spatial relationships inherent in three-dimensional molecular structures. MGNN demonstrates new state-of-the-art performance over contemporary methods on benchmark datasets such as QM9 and the revised MD17. The prowess of MGNN also extends to dynamic simulations, accurately predicting the structural and kinetic properties of complex systems such as amorphous electrolytes, with results that closely align with those from ab-initio simulations. The application of MGNN to the simulation of molecular spectra exemplifies its potential to significantly enhance the computational workflow, offering a promising alternative to traditional electronic structure methods

AI.tldr: 提出了一种旋转不变的矩图神经网络（MGNN），通过3D分子图的矩表示学习，在QM9和MD17基准测试上达到SOTA，并能准确模拟非晶电解质等复杂系统的结构和动力学性质，为分子光谱模拟提供高效替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有消息传递神经网络在捕获3D分子结构中的细微空间关系方面仍有不足，亟需一种既能保持旋转不变性又能高效学习分子表示的方法，以推动化学性质预测和分子动力学研究。
AI.method: 设计了一种旋转不变的MGNN架构，利用3D分子图的矩表示学习来捕获分子结构的空间关系，通过消息传递机制在保持旋转不变性的同时学习分子几何特征。
AI.result: 在QM9和revised MD17基准数据集上取得了优于现有方法的最新性能；在非晶电解质等复杂系统的动态模拟中，准确预测了结构和动力学性质，结果与从头算模拟高度一致；在分子光谱模拟中显著提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: MGNN作为一种旋转不变的图神经网络，在分子性质预测、复杂系统动力学模拟和分子光谱计算中展现了强大的性能和效率，为替代传统电子结构方法提供了有前景的方向。

title: Experimental realization of an analog of entanglement between two Brownian particles
summary: We experimentally investigate the statistical properties of a classical analog of quantum entanglement considering two Brownian particles connected by an elastic force and maintained at different temperatures through separate heat reservoirs. Uncertainty relations between coordinates and coarse-grained velocity can produce a phenomenon similar to quantum entanglement, where temperature plays the role of Planck's constant. The theoretical analysis matches the experimental results, confirming that the interconnected particles exhibit Brownian quantum-inspired classical correlation entanglement. This effect arises from a coarse-grained description of Brownian motion and vanishes at a finer resolution. The coarsening scales range is measured too.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究两个布朗粒子通过弹性力连接并处于不同温度热库中的系统，发现坐标与粗粒化速度间的不确定关系可产生类似量子纠缠的经典关联现象，其中温度起到普朗克常数的作用。理论分析与实验结果一致，证实了这种布朗量子启发式经典关联纠缠。
AI.motivation: 探索经典系统中是否存在类似于量子纠缠的统计现象，研究粗粒化描述下布朗运动能否产生纠缠类关联，以及温度在其中的作用。
AI.method: 实验上构建两个由弹性力连接的布朗粒子，分别与不同温度的热库接触；理论上采用粗粒化速度描述，分析坐标与速度间的不确定关系；测量粗粒化尺度范围。
AI.result: 发现粗粒化描述下坐标与速度的不确定关系产生了类量子纠缠现象，温度扮演了类似普朗克常数的角色；理论预测与实验数据吻合；该效应在更精细分辨率下消失。
AI.conclusion: 证实了经典布朗系统中确实存在量子启发的纠缠类关联，这种关联源于粗粒化描述，且其存在依赖于特定的粗粒化尺度范围。

title: Periodic systems have new classes of synchronization stability
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, plus supplementary material with 5 pages and 6 figures
summary: The Master Stability Function is a robust and useful tool for determining the conditions of synchronization stability in a network of coupled systems. While a comprehensive classification exists in the case in which the nodes are chaotic dynamical systems, its application to periodic systems has been less explored. By studying several well-known periodic systems, we establish a comprehensive framework to understand and classify their properties of synchronizability. This allows us to define five distinct classes of synchronization stability, including some that are unique to periodic systems. Specifically, in periodic systems, the Master Stability Function vanishes at the origin, and it can therefore display behavioral classes that are not achievable in chaotic systems, where it starts, instead, at a strictly positive value. Moreover, our results challenge the widely-held belief that periodic systems are easily put in a stable synchronous state, showing, instead, the common occurrence of a lower threshold for synchronization stability.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了周期系统网络同步稳定性的主稳定函数分类框架，定义了五类同步稳定性行为，发现周期系统在原点处主稳定函数值为零，因此具有混沌系统无法实现的独特行为类别，并挑战了"周期系统易实现同步"的普遍认知，揭示了同步稳定性的下阈值普遍存在。
AI.motivation: 主稳定函数是分析网络同步稳定性的重要工具，在混沌系统中已有全面分类，但在周期系统中的应用尚不充分。作者希望填补这一空白，建立周期系统的同步稳定性分类框架。
AI.method: 通过研究多个经典周期系统，运用主稳定函数方法分析其同步稳定性特征，并与混沌系统的行为进行对比分类。
AI.result: 定义了五类不同的同步稳定性行为，其中部分类别为周期系统所独有。发现周期系统的主稳定函数在原点处值为零（混沌系统则为严格正值），这导致了独特的行为类别。此外，揭示了周期系统中普遍存在同步稳定性的下阈值。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了"周期系统易于实现同步"的传统观点，指出周期系统同步存在下阈值限制，为理解周期耦合系统的同步动力学提供了更完整的理论框架。

title: On expected signatures and signature cumulants in semimartingale models
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.03345
summary: The concept of signatures and expected signatures is vital in data science, especially for sequential data analysis. The signature transform, a Cartan type development, translates paths into high-dimensional feature vectors, capturing their intrinsic characteristics. Under natural conditions, the expectation of the signature determines the law of the signature, providing a statistical summary of the data distribution. This property facilitates robust modeling and inference in machine learning and stochastic processes. Building on previous work by the present authors [Unified signature cumulants and generalized Magnus expansions, FoM Sigma '22] we here revisit the actual computation of expected signatures, in a general semimartingale setting. Several new formulae are given. A log-transform of (expected) signatures leads to log-signatures (signature cumulants), offering a significant reduction in complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文在一般半鞅框架下重新审视期望签名的计算，提出了几个新公式，并通过签名累积量（log-signatures）实现复杂度约简。
AI.motivation: 签名和期望签名是序列数据分析中的重要工具，但期望签名的实际计算在一般半鞅框架下仍具有挑战性，需要更高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 基于前期工作（统一签名累积量与广义Magnus展开），在一般半鞅设定下推导期望签名的新计算公式，并通过log变换（签名累积量）降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 得到了若干计算期望签名的新公式，并展示了log-signatures（签名累积量）在降低复杂度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文推进了期望签名的计算方法，为半鞅框架下的序列数据统计建模提供了更高效的工具。

title: Online Distributional Regression
comment: Revised version January 2026. 34 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables including appendix
summary: Large-scale streaming data are common in modern machine learning applications and have led to the development of online learning algorithms. Many fields, such as supply chain management, weather and meteorology, energy markets, and finance, have pivoted toward probabilistic forecasting. This results in the need not only for accurate learning of the expected value but also for learning the conditional heteroskedasticity and conditional moments. Against this backdrop, we present a methodology for online estimation of regularized, linear distributional models. The proposed algorithm combines recent developments in online estimation of LASSO models with the well-known GAMLSS framework. We provide a case study on day-ahead electricity price forecasting, in which we show the competitive performance of the incremental estimation combined with strongly reduced computational effort. Our algorithms are implemented in a computationally efficient Python package ondil.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线估计正则化线性分布模型的方法，将在线LASSO估计与GAMLSS框架结合，用于概率预测。在日前电价预测案例中展示了竞争性性能和显著降低的计算开销，并提供了高效的Python包ondil实现。
AI.motivation: 大规模流式数据在机器学习中日益普遍，推动了在线学习算法的发展。许多领域（供应链、气象、能源、金融）已转向概率预测，不仅需要准确学习期望值，还需要学习条件异方差性和条件矩。现有方法在在线场景下处理这些需求存在不足。
AI.method: 结合在线LASSO模型估计的最新进展与GAMLSS框架，提出了一种增量式估计正则化线性分布模型的方法。
AI.result: 在日前电价预测案例中，该方法表现出竞争性的预测性能，同时大幅降低了计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模流式数据下的在线概率预测问题，在保持预测精度的同时显著提升了计算效率，并通过ondil Python包实现了工程化落地。

title: Recursive Nested Filtering for Efficient Amortized Bayesian Experimental Design
summary: This paper introduces the Inside-Out Nested Particle Filter (IO-NPF), a novel, fully recursive, algorithm for amortized sequential Bayesian experimental design in the non-exchangeable setting. We frame policy optimization as maximum likelihood estimation in a non-Markovian state-space model, achieving (at most) $\mathcal{O}(T^2)$ computational complexity in the number of experiments. We provide theoretical convergence guarantees and introduce a backward sampling algorithm to reduce trajectory degeneracy. IO-NPF offers a practical, extensible, and provably consistent approach to sequential Bayesian experimental design, demonstrating improved efficiency over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Inside-Out Nested Particle Filter (IO-NPF)，一种用于非可交换场景下在线序贯贝叶斯实验设计的全递归算法，将策略优化视为非马尔可夫状态空间模型中的最大似然估计，获得O(T²)计算复杂度，并提供理论收敛保证和后向采样算法以降低轨迹退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有序贯贝叶斯实验设计方法在非可交换场景（即实验顺序影响后续决策）下计算效率低，缺乏可扩展的递归算法，且难以提供理论收敛保证。
AI.method: 将策略优化建模为非马尔可夫状态空间模型中的最大似然估计问题，提出Inside-Out Nested Particle Filter (IO-NPF)全递归算法，并引入后向采样算法缓解粒子轨迹退化。
AI.result: 算法在最坏情况下的计算复杂度为O(T²)，理论证明算法具有收敛性，在效率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: IO-NPF提供了一种实用、可扩展且理论上一致的序贯贝叶斯实验设计方案，有效提升了计算效率并具备理论保证。

title: Bayesian inference of physics-based models of acoustically-forced laminar premixed conical flames
summary: We perform twenty experiments on an acoustically-forced laminar premixed Bunsen flame and assimilate high-speed footage of the natural emission into a physics-based model containing seven parameters. The experimental rig is a ducted Bunsen flame supplied by a mixture of methane and ethylene. A high-speed camera captures the natural emission of the flame, from which we extract the position of the flame front. We use Bayesian inference to combine this experimental data with our prior knowledge of this flame's behaviour. This prior knowledge is expressed through (i) a model of the kinematics of a flame front moving through a model of the perturbed velocity field, and (ii) a priori estimates of the parameters of the above model with quantified uncertainties. We find the most probable a posteriori model parameters using Bayesian parameter inference, and quantify their uncertainties using Laplace's method combined with first-order adjoint methods. This is substantially cheaper than other common Bayesian inference frameworks, such as Markov Chain Monte Carlo. This process results in a quantitatively-accurate physics-based reduced-order model of the acoustically forced Bunsen flame for injection velocities ranging from 1.75 m/s to 2.99 m/s and equivalence ratio values ranging from 1.26 to 1.47, using seven parameters. We use this model to evaluate the heat release rate between experimental snapshots, to extrapolate to different experimental conditions, and to calculate the flame transfer function and its uncertainty for all the flames. Since the proposed model relies on only seven parameters, it can be trained with little data and successfully extrapolates beyond the training dataset. Matlab code is provided so that the reader can apply it to assimilate further flame images into the model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过贝叶斯推断将高速摄像实验数据同化到含七参数的物理模型中，成功构建了声波激励层流预混本生火焰的降阶模型，并用于热释放率计算、外推及火焰传递函数不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 传统的火焰建模方法要么计算成本高（如DNS），要么缺乏数据驱动的校准能力。作者希望结合实验数据与物理先验知识，以较低计算代价获得定量准确的火焰降阶模型，并实现不确定性量化与跨工况外推。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯参数推断，先验知识由火焰面运动学模型（含扰动速度场）和参数先验估计（含不确定性）共同表达。后验参数通过拉普拉斯方法结合一阶伴随方法高效求解，避免使用MCMC。实验数据来自高速相机拍摄的声波激励本生火焰自然发射图像，提取火焰锋面位置。
AI.result: 模型使用7个参数，在注入速度1.75–2.99 m/s、当量比1.26–1.47范围内实现定量准确的降阶建模。可计算实验帧间热释放率、外推至不同工况，并计算火焰传递函数及其不确定性。模型训练数据需求少，外推性能良好。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的贝叶斯物理信息同化方法能以极低计算成本构建高精度火焰降阶模型，具备良好的泛化能力与不确定性量化能力，提供的Matlab代码便于复现和推广。

title: A multi-field decomposed model order reduction approach for thermo-mechanically coupled gradient-extended damage simulations
summary: Numerical simulations are crucial for comprehending how engineering structures behave under extreme conditions, particularly when dealing with thermo-mechanically coupled issues compounded by damage-induced material softening. However, such simulations often entail substantial computational expenses. To mitigate this, the focus has shifted towards employing model order reduction (MOR) techniques, which hold promise for accelerating computations. Yet, applying MOR to highly nonlinear, multi-physical problems influenced by material softening remains a relatively new area of research, with numerous unanswered questions. Addressing this gap, this study proposes and investigates a novel multi-field decomposed MOR technique, rooted in a snapshot-based Proper Orthogonal Decomposition-Galerkin (POD-G) projection approach. Utilizing a recently developed thermo-mechanically coupled gradient-extended damage-plasticity model as a case study, this work demonstrates that splitting snapshot vectors into distinct physical fields (displacements, damage, temperature) and projecting them onto separate lower-dimensional subspaces can yield more precise and stable outcomes compared to conventional methods. Through a series of numerical benchmark tests, our multi-field decomposed MOR technique demonstrates its capacity to significantly reduce computational expenses in simulations involving severe damage, while maintaining a high level of accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于POD-Galerkin投影的多场分解模型降阶技术，通过将快照向量按物理场（位移、损伤、温度）分离并投影到不同低维子空间，有效解决了热-力耦合梯度扩展损伤塑性模型在材料软化下的计算效率问题。数值基准测试表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低了严重损伤模拟的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 热-力耦合问题伴随损伤诱导的材料软化导致数值模拟计算成本高昂，而现有模型降阶技术在处理这类高度非线性、多物理场问题时尚不成熟，存在诸多未解问题。
AI.method: 基于快照的Proper Orthogonal Decomposition-Galerkin (POD-G) 投影方法，提出多场分解策略：将快照向量按位移、损伤、温度三个物理场分离，分别投影至各自独立的低维子空间。
AI.result: 数值基准测试表明，与常规方法相比，多场分解的MOR技术在严重损伤模拟中能够显著降低计算成本，同时保持较高精度和更好的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 多场分解的MOR技术是处理高度非线性、多物理场且伴随材料软化问题的有效手段，为加速热-力耦合损伤塑性模拟提供了可行方案。

title: Minimal extension property of direct images
summary: Given a projective morphism $f:X\to Y$ from a complex space to a complex manifold, we prove the Griffiths semi-positivity and minimal extension property of the direct image sheaf $f_\ast(\mathscr{F})$. Here, $\mathscr{F}$ is a coherent sheaf on $X$, which consists of the Grauert-Riemenschneider dualizing sheaf, a multiplier ideal sheaf, and a variation of Hodge structure (or more generally, a tame harmonic bundle).

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在复空间到复流形的射影态射下，直接像层$f_\ast(\mathscr{F})$的Griffiths半正定性以及最小扩张性质。其中$\mathscr{F}$是由Grauert-Riemenschneider对偶层、乘子理想层以及Hodge结构变化（或更一般的调和丛）组成的凝聚层。
AI.motivation: 研究射影态射下直接像层的正定性及扩张性质，这是复几何与代数几何中的基本问题。特别地，Griffiths半正定性在模空间理论、Hodge理论以及正性概念的统一中具有核心地位。
AI.method: 论文通过处理由Grauert-Riemenschneider对偶层、乘子理想层和Hodge结构变化（或调和丛）组成的凝聚层$\mathscr{F}$，建立了直接像层的Griffiths半正定性；同时证明了最小扩张性质，这可能涉及解析延拓或L²方法的某种推广。
AI.result: 对于复空间到复流形的射影态射$f:X\to Y$，证明了直接像层$f_\ast(\mathscr{F})$满足Griffiths半正定性，并具有最小扩张性质。
AI.conclusion: 该结果统一并推广了关于直接像层正定性的已知结论，为理解更广泛的凝聚层的正性行为提供了新的框架，可能对模空间、退化族以及Hodge理论中的相关问题有重要应用。

title: An abundance-type result for the tangent bundles of smooth Fano varieties
comment: Version 2: this version adds a prominent notice on the first page regarding a gap found in the original manuscript (V1) and an erratum at the end to explain this error in details. The main text is otherwise unchanged. A corrected new version (V3) will be uploaded within approximately 1 month
summary: In this paper we prove the following abundance-type result: for any smooth Fano variety $X$, the tangent bundle $T_X$ is nef if and only if it is big and semiample in the sense that the tautological line bundle $\mathscr{O}_{\mathbb{P}T_X}(1)$ is so, by which we establish a weak form of the Campana-Peternell conjecture (Camapan-Peternell, 1991).

AI.tldr: 本文证明了：光滑Fano簇$X$的切丛$T_X$是nef的当且仅当它在重言线丛$\mathscr{O}_{\mathbb{P}T_X}(1)$的意义上是big and semiample的，从而建立了Campana-Peternell猜想的一个弱形式。
AI.motivation: Campana-Peternell猜想（1991）提出光滑Fano簇的切丛若为nef则应为半齐性（semihomogeneous）的，但完整证明困难。本文试图建立一个较弱的版本，从丰沛性（bigness）与半丰沛性（semiampleness）的角度刻画nef切丛。
AI.method: 通过将切丛$T_X$的nef性质与其重言线丛$\mathscr{O}_{\mathbb{P}T_X}(1)$的big and semiample性质进行等价转化，利用代数几何中关于线丛正性的标准技术（如Mori理论、收缩映射等）进行分析和证明。
AI.result: 建立了关于光滑Fano簇的Abundance型结果：$T_X$是nef的当且仅当$\mathscr{O}_{\mathbb{P}T_X}(1)$是big and semiample的。这一等价性为原猜想提供了重要的部分验证。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了Campana-Peternell猜想的一个弱形式，揭示了Fano簇切丛的数值正性（nef）与射影正性（big and semiample）之间的深刻联系，为最终解决原猜想奠定了基础。

title: A weighted eigenvalue problem for mixed local and nonlocal operators with potential

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类混合型算子（包含p-Laplacian和分数阶p-Laplacian）在Lipschitz有界区域上的不定权特征值问题，利用变分工具、弱比较原理和强极大值原理证明了主特征值的存在唯一性及其定性性质，并通过Ljusternik-Schnirelman范畴理论证明了存在趋于无穷的非递减正特征值序列，同时证明了所有正特征值的集合是闭的且对应特征函数有界。
AI.motivation: 研究混合型算子（同时包含经典p-Laplacian和分数阶p-Laplacian）的不定权特征值问题，这类算子能更灵活地描述非局部和局部扩散现象的耦合行为，具有重要的物理和数学意义。
AI.method: 采用变分方法结合弱比较原理和强极大值原理证明主特征值的存在唯一性；利用Ljusternik-Schnirelman范畴理论证明非递减正特征值序列的存在性。
AI.result: (1) 证明了主特征值的存在唯一性及其定性性质；(2) 存在一个趋于无穷的非递减正特征值序列；(3) 所有正特征值的集合是闭的；(4) 每个正特征值对应的特征函数是有界的。
AI.conclusion: 在给定的假设条件下，混合型算子的不定权特征值问题具有完整的主特征值理论，并且正特征值具有离散性和良好的正则性。

title: Regularizing factors for the Euler-Poisson equations
summary: he Cauchy problem for the Euler-Poisson equations without pressure is considered and the question of what additional terms added to the system can delay or completely prevent the loss of smoothness of the solution in a finite time is studied. We review already published and recent results in this field.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无压欧拉-泊松方程的柯西问题，探讨哪些附加项能够延迟或完全阻止解在有限时间内失去光滑性，并回顾了该领域的已有及最新成果。
AI.motivation: 理解无压欧拉-泊松系统中解光滑性丧失（爆破）的机制，并寻找通过添加额外项来调控或避免爆破的途径。
AI.method: 综述已有和最新发表的研究成果，从理论分析角度比较不同附加项对解的正则性影响。
AI.result: 系统总结了不同附加项（如粘性、阻尼、色散项等）对延迟或阻止有限时间奇性形成的作用。
AI.conclusion: 某些附加项（如适当的耗散或色散机制）可以有效延迟甚至避免解的光滑性丧失，但具体效果依赖于项的性态和参数条件。

title: On the Zariski invariant of plane branches
summary: We show how to obtain the Zariski invariant of a plane branch employing the contact order or the intersection multiplicity with elements in a particular family of curves and we present some consequences of this result.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了如何通过与特定曲线族中元素的接触阶或相交重数来获得平面分支的Zariski不变量，并给出了该结果的一些推论。
AI.motivation: 寻找通过更直观的几何量（接触阶/相交重数）来刻画和计算平面分支的Zariski不变量的方法。
AI.method: 通过分析平面分支与特定曲线族中元素的接触阶或相交重数，建立这些几何量与Zariski不变量之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 成功证明了可以利用接触阶或相交重数来获得平面分支的Zariski不变量。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为计算平面分支的Zariski不变量提供了新的途径，并产生了一些有意义的推论。

title: MH-pFLGB: Model Heterogeneous personalized Federated Learning via Global Bypass for Medical Image Analysis
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2405.06822
summary: In the evolving application of medical artificial intelligence, federated learning is notable for its ability to protect training data privacy. Federated learning facilitates collaborative model development without the need to share local data from healthcare institutions. Yet, the statistical and system heterogeneity among these institutions poses substantial challenges, which affects the effectiveness of federated learning and hampers the exchange of information between clients. To address these issues, we introduce a novel approach, MH-pFLGB, which employs a global bypass strategy to mitigate the reliance on public datasets and navigate the complexities of non-IID data distributions. Our method enhances traditional federated learning by integrating a global bypass model, which would share the information among the clients, but also serves as part of the network to enhance the performance on each client. Additionally, MH-pFLGB provides a feature fusion module to better combine the local and global features. We validate \model{}'s effectiveness and adaptability through extensive testing on different medical tasks, demonstrating superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出MH-pFLGB方法，通过全局旁路策略和特征融合模块解决联邦学习中的统计与系统异构问题，在医疗任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医疗AI联邦学习中，各机构间的统计异构（非独立同分布数据）和系统异构严重影响联邦学习效果及客户端间的信息交换。
AI.method: 提出MH-pFLGB方法：(1) 全局旁路策略（Global Bypass）减少对公共数据集的依赖，同时作为网络组成部分提升各客户端性能；(2) 特征融合模块（Feature Fusion Module）更好地结合局部与全局特征。
AI.result: 在多种医疗任务上的广泛测试验证了MH-pFLGB的有效性和适应性，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MH-pFLGB通过全局旁路和特征融合有效应对联邦学习的异构挑战，在保护隐私的同时提升了医疗AI模型的协作性能。

title: Privacy-preserving datasets by capturing feature distributions with Conditional VAEs
summary: Large and well-annotated datasets are essential for advancing deep learning applications, however often costly or impossible to obtain by a single entity. In many areas, including the medical domain, approaches relying on data sharing have become critical to address those challenges. While effective in increasing dataset size and diversity, data sharing raises significant privacy concerns. Commonly employed anonymization methods based on the k-anonymity paradigm often fail to preserve data diversity, affecting model robustness. This work introduces a novel approach using Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAEs) trained on feature vectors extracted from large pre-trained vision foundation models. Foundation models effectively detect and represent complex patterns across diverse domains, allowing the CVAE to faithfully capture the embedding space of a given data distribution to generate (sample) a diverse, privacy-respecting, and potentially unbounded set of synthetic feature vectors. Our method notably outperforms traditional approaches in both medical and natural image domains, exhibiting greater dataset diversity and higher robustness against perturbations while preserving sample privacy. These results underscore the potential of generative models to significantly impact deep learning applications in data-scarce and privacy-sensitive environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/francescodisalvo05/cvae-anonymization .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的合成数据生成方法，利用预训练视觉基础模型提取的特征向量来生成多样化、保护隐私且数量可无限扩展的合成特征向量，在医疗和自然图像领域均优于传统k-匿名化方法，展现出更好的数据多样性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于k-匿名范式的匿名化方法常会破坏数据多样性，影响模型鲁棒性；而大规模高质量标注数据集难以获取，尤其在医疗等隐私敏感领域。需要一种既能保护隐私又能保持数据多样性的替代方案。
AI.method: 首先利用大规模预训练视觉基础模型从原始数据中提取特征向量，然后在这些特征向量上训练条件变分自编码器（CVAE），通过CVAE学习原始数据分布的嵌入空间，进而生成多样化的、保护隐私的、数量可无限扩展的合成特征向量。
AI.result: 在医疗和自然图像领域，该方法显著优于传统匿名化方法，展现出更大的数据集多样性和更强的鲁棒性，同时保持了样本隐私性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了生成模型在数据稀缺和隐私敏感环境下推动深度学习应用的巨大潜力。

title: Estimation of Cointegration Vectors in Time Series via Global Optimisation
summary: Time Series Analysis has been given a great amount of study in which many useful tests were developed. The phenomenal work of Engle and Granger in 1987 and Johansen in 1988 has paved the way for the most commonly used cointegration tests so far. Even though cointegrating relationships focus on long-term behaviour and correlation of multiple nonstationary time series, oftentimes we encounter statistical data with limited sample sizes and other information. Thus other tests with empirical advantages may also be of considerable importance. In this paper, we provide an optimisation approach motivated by the Blind Source Separation, or also known as Independent Component Analysis, for cointegration between financial time series. Two methods for cointegration tests are introduced, namely decorrelation for the bivariate case and maximisation of nongaussianity for higher-dimensions. We highlight the empirical preponderances of independent components and also the computational simplicity, compared to common practices of cointegration such as the Johansen's Cointegration Test. The advantages of our methods, especially the better performances in limited sample size, enable a wider range of application and accessibility for researchers and practitioners to identify cointegrating relationships.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于盲源分离（独立成分分析）的优化方法进行金融时间序列协整检验，包括双变量去相关和高维非高斯性最大化两种方法，在小样本场景下优于传统Johansen协整检验，且计算更简便。
AI.motivation: 传统协整检验（如Engle-Granger、Johansen方法）在有限样本量下表现不佳，而实际数据常受限于样本规模，因此需要一种在小样本场景下具有经验优势且计算简便的协整检验方法。
AI.method: 基于盲源分离（独立成分分析）的优化方法：双变量情况下采用去相关方法，高维情况下采用非高斯性最大化方法，通过寻找独立成分来识别协整关系。
AI.result: 所提方法在有限样本场景下表现优于Johansen协整检验，且在计算复杂度上更低，具有经验优势。
AI.conclusion: 基于独立成分分析的协整检验方法在小样本情况下具有更好的性能，计算简便，能够为研究者和实践者提供更广泛的协整关系识别应用。

title: The Immersed Boundary Conformal Method for Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin shells
summary: This work utilizes the Immersed Boundary Conformal Method (IBCM) to analyze Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin shell structures within an immersed domain framework. Immersed boundary methods involve embedding complex geometries within a background grid, which allows for great flexibility in modeling intricate shapes and features despite the simplicity of the approach. The IBCM method introduces additional layers conformal to the boundaries, allowing for the strong imposition of Dirichlet boundary conditions and facilitating local refinement. In this study, the construction of boundary layers is combined with high-degree spline-based approximation spaces to further increase efficiency. The Nitsche method, employing non-symmetric average operators, is used to couple the boundary layers with the inner patch, while stabilizing the formulation with minimal penalty parameters. High-order quadrature rules are applied for integration over cut elements and patch interfaces. Numerical experiments demonstrate the efficiency and accuracy of the proposed formulation, highlighting its potential for complex shell structures modeled through Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin theories. These tests include the generation of conformal interfaces, the coupling of Kirchhoff-Love and Reissner-Mindlin theories, and the simulation of a damaged shell.

AI.tldr: 本文利用浸没边界共形法（IBCM），结合高次样条逼近空间、Nitsche耦合方法与高阶积分规则，在浸没域框架下高效精确地分析了Kirchhoff-Love和Reissner-Mindlin壳结构，并通过数值实验验证了该方法在复杂壳结构建模中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统浸没边界法在处理复杂几何壳结构时，难以强加Dirichlet边界条件且局部细化不便。本文旨在通过IBCM方法引入共形边界层，结合高次样条与Nitsche方法，解决上述问题，提高复杂壳结构建模的灵活性与精度。
AI.method: 采用IBCM方法，在背景网格中嵌入复杂几何，构建与边界共形的额外层以强加Dirichlet边界条件并支持局部细化；使用高次样条逼近空间提升效率；采用非对称平均算子的Nitsche方法耦合边界层与内部区域，以最小惩罚参数稳定公式；对切割单元和界面采用高阶积分规则。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提公式具有高效性和准确性，成功实现了共形界面的生成、Kirchhoff-Love与Reissner-Mindlin理论的耦合，以及对受损壳结构的模拟。
AI.conclusion: IBCM方法结合高次样条与Nitsche耦合，在浸没域框架下有效处理了Kirchhoff-Love和Reissner-Mindlin壳结构问题，为复杂壳结构的精确建模提供了有前景的方案。

title: Conforming/Non-Conforming Mixed Finite Element Methods for Optimal Control of Velocity-Vorticity-Pressure Formulation for the Oseen Problem with Variable Viscosity
summary: This work examines the distributed optimal control of generalized Oseen equations with non-constant viscosity. We propose and analyze a new conforming augmented mixed finite element method and a Discontinuous Galerkin (DG) method for the velocity-vorticity-pressure formulation. The continuous formulation, which incorporates least-squares terms from both the constitutive equation and the incompressibility condition, is well-posed under certain assumptions on the viscosity parameter. The CG method is divergence-conforming and suits any Stokes inf-sup stable velocity-pressure finite element pair, while a generic discrete space approximates vorticity. The DG scheme employs a stabilization technique, and a piecewise constant discretization estimates the control variable. We establish optimal a priori and residual-based a posteriori error estimates for the proposed schemes. Finally, we provide numerical experiments to showcase the method's performance and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非恒定粘度广义Oseen方程的分布式最优控制问题，提出了速度-涡度-压力格式的协调增广混合有限元法和间断伽辽金法，并建立了先验和后验误差估计，通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决非恒定粘度Oseen方程分布式最优控制问题的高效数值求解方法，填补该领域在速度-涡度-压力格式下有限元分析的空白。
AI.method: 提出了两种数值方法：(1) 协调增广混合有限元法，包含最小二乘项，满足散度一致性，可使用任意Stokes inf-sup稳定的速度-压力有限元对；(2) 间断伽辽金法，采用稳定化技术，控制变量用分片常数离散。
AI.result: 建立了最优的先验误差估计和基于残差的后验误差估计，数值实验展示了方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的两种方法均能有效求解非恒定粘度广义Oseen方程的分布式最优控制问题，理论分析与数值实验一致。

title: Randomized quasi-Monte Carlo methods for risk-averse stochastic optimization
summary: We establish epigraphical and uniform laws of large numbers for sample-based approximations of law invariant risk functionals. These sample-based approximation schemes include Monte Carlo (MC) and certain randomized quasi-Monte Carlo integration (RQMC) methods, such as scrambled net integration. Our results can be applied to the approximation of risk-averse stochastic programs and risk-averse stochastic variational inequalities. Our numerical simulations empirically demonstrate that RQMC approaches based on scrambled Sobol' sequences can yield smaller bias and root mean square error than MC methods for risk-averse optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了基于样本近似（包括蒙特卡洛和随机拟蒙特卡洛方法，如加扰网络积分）的律不变风险泛函的上图一致大数定律。这些结果可应用于风险规避随机规划和随机变分不等式的近似。数值实验表明，基于加扰Sobol序列的RQMC方法相比MC方法在风险规避优化中能获得更小的偏差和均方根误差。
AI.motivation: 为基于样本近似的律不变风险泛函建立上图一致大数定律的理论保证，以支持风险规避随机优化问题的近似求解。
AI.method: 建立了样本近似（MC和RQMC，如加扰网络积分）下律不变风险泛函的上图一致大数定律；通过数值模拟比较了基于加扰Sobol序列的RQMC与MC在风险规避优化中的表现。
AI.result: 证明了样本近似方案满足上图一致大数定律；数值结果表明RQMC（加扰Sobol序列）比MC方法具有更小的偏差和均方根误差。
AI.conclusion: 本文为风险规避随机规划及变分不等式的样本近似提供了理论收敛性保障，并验证了RQMC方法在实践中的优越性。

title: Flight Delay Prediction using Hybrid Machine Learning Approach: A Case Study of Major Airlines in the United States
summary: The aviation industry has experienced constant growth in air traffic since the deregulation of the U.S. airline industry in 1978. As a result, flight delays have become a major concern for airlines and passengers, leading to significant research on factors affecting flight delays such as departure, arrival, and total delays. Flight delays result in increased consumption of limited resources such as fuel, labor, and capital, and are expected to increase in the coming decades. To address the flight delay problem, this research proposes a hybrid approach that combines the feature of deep learning and classic machine learning techniques. In addition, several machine learning algorithms are applied on flight data to validate the results of proposed model. To measure the performance of the model, accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score are calculated, and ROC and AUC curves are generated. The study also includes an extensive analysis of the flight data and each model to obtain insightful results for U.S. airlines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合深度学习和经典机器学习的方法来预测航班延误，并在美国航班数据上进行了验证，使用准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score、ROC和AUC等指标评估模型性能。
AI.motivation: 自1978年美国航空业放松管制以来，空中交通持续增长，航班延误成为航空公司和乘客的主要关切，导致燃料、劳动力等有限资源消耗增加，且预计未来延误将进一步加剧，因此迫切需要有效的延误预测方法。
AI.method: 提出一种结合深度学习特征与经典机器学习技术的混合方法，并在航班数据上应用多种机器学习算法进行比较验证。使用准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score评估性能，并生成ROC和AUC曲线。
AI.result: 通过多个指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、F1-score）以及ROC/AUC曲线对模型性能进行了评估，并对美国航空公司的航班数据和各模型进行了深入分析。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合深度学习和机器学习方法能够有效预测航班延误，为航空业资源管理和延误缓解提供了有价值的见解。

title: Incremental Gauss--Newton Methods with Superlinear Convergence Rates
summary: This paper addresses the challenge of solving large-scale nonlinear equations with Hölder continuous Jacobians. We introduce a novel Incremental Gauss--Newton (IGN) method within explicit superlinear convergence rate, which outperforms existing methods that only achieve linear convergence rate. In particular, we formulate our problem by the nonlinear least squares with finite-sum structure, and our method incrementally iterates with the information of one component in each round. We also provide a mini-batch extension to our IGN method that obtains an even faster superlinear convergence rate. Furthermore, we conduct numerical experiments to show the advantages of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增量式高斯-牛顿（IGN）方法用于求解具有Hölder连续雅可比的大规模非线性方程组，该方法实现了显式超线性收敛速率，优于现有仅能达到线性收敛的方法，并提供了小批量扩展版本以获得更快的超线性收敛。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模非线性方程组时，现有方法仅能达到线性收敛速率，难以满足实际应用中对高效求解的需求，尤其是在具有Hölder连续雅可比条件下。
AI.method: 将问题建模为具有有限和结构的非线性最小二乘问题，提出增量式高斯-牛顿（IGN）方法，每轮仅利用一个分量的信息进行增量迭代，并设计了小批量扩展版本。
AI.result: IGN方法实现了显式超线性收敛速率，小批量扩展版本获得更快的超线性收敛速率，数值实验验证了方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的IGN方法及其小批量变体有效解决了具有Hölder连续雅可比的大规模非线性方程组求解问题，在收敛速度上显著优于现有方法。

title: Restriction of Schrödinger eigenfunctions to submanifolds
summary: For Schrödinger operators $H_V=-Δ_g+V$ with critically singular potentials $V$ on compact manifolds, we prove sharp estimates for the restriction of eigenfunctions to submanifolds. Our method refines the perturbative argument by Blair-Sire-Sogge and enables us to deal with submanifolds of all codimensions. As applications, we obtain improved estimates on negatively curved manifolds and flat tori. In particular, we extend the uniform $L^2$ restriction estimates on flat tori by Bourgain-Rudnick to singular potentials.

AI.tldr: 针对具有临界奇异势的Schrödinger算子，证明了本征函数在子流形上的sharp限制估计，改进了Blair-Sire-Sogge的扰动方法，适用于所有余维数的子流形，并在负曲率流形和平坦环面上获得了改进估计。
AI.motivation: 研究具有临界奇异势的Schrödinger算子本征函数在子流形上的限制估计，这是谱几何和调和分析中的重要问题，旨在将已有结果（如Bourgain-Ruddnick的平坦环面均匀L²限制估计）推广到奇异势情形。
AI.method: 通过精炼Blair-Sire-Sogge的扰动论证，处理所有余维数的子流形情形；利用临界奇异势的特定结构进行精细分析。
AI.result: 获得了本征函数在子流形上的sharp限制估计；在负曲率流形和平坦环面上得到改进的估计；将Bourgain-Ruddnick的平坦环面均匀L²限制估计推广到了奇异势情形。
AI.conclusion: 成功将本征函数限制估计理论从光滑势推广到临界奇异势，方法具有一般性，适用于多种几何环境。

title: On the Moduli Space of Coherent Systems of Type $(2, c_1, c_2, 2)$ on Projective Plane
summary: We study the moduli space of coherent systems in $P^2$ using the Segre invariant. We obtain necessary conditions for the existence of $α$-semistable coherent systems $(E,V)$ of type $(2, c_1, c_2, k)$, with $k \geq 2$. Afterwards, we give numerical conditions to the nonemptiness of the moduli space and compute the critical values depending of the Chern classes. Finally, we give some topological properties of the flips.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Segre不变量研究射影平面P²上相干系统的模空间，给出了类型为(2, c₁, c₂, k)且k≥2的α-半稳定相干系统存在的必要条件，给出了模空间非空性的数值条件并计算了依赖于陈类的临界值，最后讨论了翻转的一些拓扑性质。
AI.motivation: 利用Segre不变量研究P²上相干系统的模空间结构，解决特定类型相干系统存在的必要条件及模空间非空性问题。
AI.method: 采用Segre不变量作为工具，结合α-半稳定性条件，对类型为(2, c₁, c₂, k)的相干系统进行分析，通过数值条件推导临界值。
AI.result: 得到了k≥2时α-半稳定相干系统存在的必要条件；给出了模空间非空性的数值条件；计算了依赖于陈类的临界值；揭示了翻转的某些拓扑性质。
AI.conclusion: Segre不变量有效刻画了P²上相干系统的模空间结构，所得到的数值条件和临界值为理解和构造这类模空间提供了重要依据。

title: Beyond Scaleup: Knowledge-aware Parsimony Learning from Deep Networks
summary: The brute-force scaleup of training datasets, learnable parameters and computation power, has become a prevalent strategy for developing more robust learning models. However, due to bottlenecks in data, computation, and trust, the sustainability of this strategy is a serious concern. In this paper, we attempt to address this issue in a parsimonious manner (i.e., achieving greater potential with simpler models). The key is to drive models using domain-specific knowledge, such as symbols, logic, and formulas, instead of purely relying on scaleup. This approach allows us to build a framework that uses this knowledge as "building blocks" to achieve parsimony in model design, training, and interpretation. Empirical results show that our methods surpass those that typically follow the scaling law. We also demonstrate our framework in AI for science, specifically in the problem of drug-drug interaction prediction. We hope our research can foster more diverse technical roadmaps in the era of foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于领域知识（符号、逻辑、公式）的简约建模框架，通过知识驱动而非单纯规模扩展来提升模型性能，在药物相互作用预测等任务上超越了遵循缩放定律的方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模扩展训练数据、参数和算力的策略面临数据、计算和信任瓶颈，可持续性堪忧，亟需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 以领域知识（符号、逻辑、公式）作为"构建块"驱动模型，实现模型设计、训练和解释的简约化，而非依赖暴力规模扩展。
AI.result: 所提方法在经验结果上超越了遵循缩放定律的基线方法，并在药物相互作用预测的AI for Science任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识驱动的简约建模范式有望在基础模型时代催生更多元的技术路线，为解决规模扩展的可持续性问题提供新思路。

title: Enhancing Ethereum Fraud Detection via Generative and Contrastive Self-supervision
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security
summary: The rampant fraudulent activities on Ethereum hinder the healthy development of the blockchain ecosystem, necessitating the reinforcement of regulations. However, multiple imbalances involving account interaction frequencies and interaction types in the Ethereum transaction environment pose significant challenges to data mining-based fraud detection research. To address this, we first propose the concept of meta-interactions to refine interaction behaviors in Ethereum, and based on this, we present a dual self-supervision enhanced Ethereum fraud detection framework, named Meta-IFD. This framework initially introduces a generative self-supervision mechanism to augment the interaction features of accounts, followed by a contrastive self-supervision mechanism to differentiate various behavior patterns, and ultimately characterizes the behavioral representations of accounts and mines potential fraud risks through multi-view interaction feature learning. Extensive experiments on real Ethereum datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our framework in detecting common Ethereum fraud behaviors such as Ponzi schemes and phishing scams. Additionally, the generative module can effectively alleviate the interaction distribution imbalance in Ethereum data, while the contrastive module significantly enhances the framework's ability to distinguish different behavior patterns. The source code will be available in https://github.com/GISec-Team/Meta-IFD.

AI.tldr: 针对以太坊交易环境中账户交互频率和类型的不均衡问题，提出基于元交互概念的双重自监督增强框架Meta-IFD，通过生成式自监督增强交互特征、对比式自监督区分行为模式，并利用多视图交互特征学习检测庞氏骗局和钓鱼诈骗等欺诈行为。
AI.motivation: 以太坊上欺诈活动猖獗，亟需加强监管，但交易环境中存在账户交互频率和交互类型的多重不均衡，给基于数据挖掘的欺诈检测研究带来重大挑战。
AI.method: 首先提出元交互（meta-interactions）概念细化交互行为；然后引入生成式自监督机制增强账户交互特征；接着采用对比式自监督机制区分不同行为模式；最后通过多视图交互特征学习刻画账户行为表征并挖掘潜在欺诈风险。
AI.result: 在真实以太坊数据集上的实验表明，该框架在检测庞氏骗局和钓鱼诈骗等常见欺诈行为时具有有效性和优越性；生成模块能有效缓解交互分布不均衡问题，对比模块显著增强了区分不同行为模式的能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Meta-IFD框架通过双重自监督机制有效解决了以太坊数据中的交互不平衡问题，并在欺诈检测任务上取得了优异性能。

title: Novel Approach for solving the discrete Stokes problems based on Augmented Lagrangian and Global Techniques: Application to Saddle-Point Linear Systems from Incompressible flow
summary: In this paper, a novel augmented Lagrangian preconditioner based on global Arnoldi for accelerating the convergence of Krylov subspace methods applied to linear systems of equations with a block three-by-three structure, these systems typically arise from discretizing the Stokes equations using mixed-finite element methods. In practice, the components of velocity are always approximated using a single finite element space. More precisely, in two dimensions, our new approach based on standard space of scalar finite element basis functions to discretize the velocity space. This componentwise splitting can be shown to induce a natural block three-by-three structure. Spectral analyses is established for the exact versions of these preconditioners. Finally, the obtained numerical results claim that our novel approach is more efficient and robust for solving the discrete Stokes problems. The efficiency of our new approach is evaluated by measuring computational time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全局Arnoldi的增强拉格朗日预条件子，用于加速求解由混合有限元离散Stokes方程产生的块三乘三结构线性系统，数值实验表明该方法在计算时间和鲁棒性上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 针对混合有限元离散Stokes方程产生的块三乘三结构线性系统，现有Krylov子空间方法收敛速度慢，需要设计高效的预条件子来加速求解过程。
AI.method: 基于全局Arnoldi方法构建增强拉格朗日预条件子；采用标准标量有限元基函数对速度空间进行分量分裂（componentwise splitting），诱导出自然的块三乘三结构；对精确版本的预条件子进行谱分析。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，新方法在求解离散Stokes问题时比传统方法更高效、更鲁棒，计算时间显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于全局Arnoldi的增强拉格朗日预条件子是一种高效且鲁棒的求解离散Stokes问题的预条件技术。

title: Structure-preserving approximations of the Serre-Green-Naghdi equations in standard and hyperbolic form
summary: We develop structure-preserving numerical methods for the Serre-Green-Naghdi equations, a model for weakly dispersive free-surface waves. We consider both the classical form, requiring the inversion of a non-linear elliptic operator, and a hyperbolic approximation of the equations, allowing fully explicit time stepping. Systems for both flat and variable topography are studied. Our novel numerical methods conserve both the total water mass and the total energy. In addition, the methods for the original Serre-Green-Naghdi equations conserve the total momentum for flat bathymetry. For variable topography, all the methods proposed are well-balanced for the lake-at-rest state. We provide a theoretical setting allowing us to construct schemes of any kind (finite difference, finite element, discontinuous Galerkin, spectral, etc.) as long as summation-by-parts operators are available in the chosen setting. Energy-stable variants are proposed by adding a consistent high-order artificial viscosity term. The proposed methods are validated through a large set of benchmarks to verify all the theoretical properties. Whenever possible, comparisons with exact, reference numerical, or experimental data are carried out. The impressive advantage of structure preservation, and in particular energy preservation, to resolve accurately dispersive wave propagation on very coarse meshes is demonstrated by several of the tests.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Serre-Green-Naghdi色散波方程，发展了保持总质量和总能量的结构保持数值方法，支持任意数值框架（有限差分、有限元、DG、谱方法等），在平坦地形下还守恒动量，在变地形下满足湖面静止状态的平衡性，并通过大量算例验证了能量守恒在粗网格上精确解析色散波传播的显著优势。
AI.motivation: Serre-Green-Naghdi方程是弱色散自由表面波的重要模型，但现有数值方法往往不能同时保持质量、能量和动量等关键物理不变量，导致粗网格上色散波传播的数值精度不足。因此需要发展结构保持的数值方法以提升长期积分和粗网格计算的准确性。
AI.method: 基于求和分部（Summation-by-Parts, SBP）算子框架，提出一种通用的理论框架，可构造任意类型（有限差分、有限元、间断伽辽金、谱方法等）的结构保持格式。针对经典形式（需反演非线性椭圆算子）和双曲近似形式（全显式时间推进）分别设计。通过添加一致的高阶人工黏性项实现能量稳定变体。在变地形下满足湖面静止状态（lake-at-rest）的平衡性。
AI.result: 通过大量基准算例验证了理论性质，包括与精确解、参考数值解或实验数据的对比。数值结果表明，结构保持（尤其是能量保持）方法在粗网格上能精确解析色散波传播，展现出传统方法无法比拟的优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一套统一的结构保持数值框架，能够同时在平坦和变地形下守恒总质量和总能量，在平坦地形下还额外守恒动量。该框架具有通用性，可适配多种数值离散格式，并且通过能量稳定变体提高了鲁棒性。能量守恒特性是粗网格上高精度解析色散波的关键。

title: Consistency and stability of boundary conditions for a two-velocities lattice Boltzmann scheme
summary: We theoretically explore boundary conditions for lattice Boltzmann methods, focusing on a toy two-velocities scheme to tackle a linear one-dimensional advection equation. By mapping lattice Boltzmann schemes to Finite Difference schemes, we facilitate rigorous consistency and stability analyses. We develop kinetic boundary conditions for inflows and outflows, highlighting the trade-off between accuracy and stability, which we successfully overcome. Consistency analysis relies on modified equations, whereas stability is assessed using GKS (Gustafsson, Kreiss, and Sundstr{ö}m) theory and -- when this approach fails on coarse meshes -- spectral and pseudo-spectral analyses of the scheme's matrix that explain effects germane to low resolutions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过二维速度格子Boltzmann方法求解一维线性平流方程，理论探索了边界条件。将LBM映射到有限差分格式进行一致性和稳定性分析，开发了入流/出流的动力学边界条件，并利用修正方程、GKS理论及谱/伪谱分析解决了精度与稳定性的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 格子Boltzmann方法（LBM）中边界条件的理论分析尚不完善，精度与稳定性之间存在固有矛盾，需要严格的数学框架来理解和设计可靠的边界条件。
AI.method: 采用玩具模型（二维速度格式）简化一维平流方程；将LBM映射到有限差分格式进行等价分析；利用修正方程进行一致性分析；采用GKS理论进行稳定性分析；针对粗网格下GKS理论失效的情况，引入谱分析和伪谱分析来刻画低分辨率效应。
AI.result: 成功建立了入流和出流的动力学边界条件；揭示了精度与稳定性之间的权衡关系，并找到了克服该矛盾的方案；在粗网格上GKS理论失效时，谱和伪谱分析有效解释了低分辨率的非正常行为。
