AI.conclusion: 通过将LBM映射到有限差分框架，可以严格分析边界条件的性质；谱/伪谱分析弥补了GKS理论在粗网格上的不足，为设计高精度且稳定的LBM边界条件提供了理论工具。

title: Discrete approximations and optimality conditions for integro-differential inclusions
summary: This paper addresses a new class of generalized Bolza problems governed by nonconvex integro-differential inclusions with endpoint constraints on trajectories, where the integral terms are given in the general (with time-dependent integrands in the dynamics) Volterra form. We pursue here a threefold goal. First we construct well-posed approximations of continuous-time integro-differential systems by their discrete-time counterparts with showing that any feasible solution to the original system can be strongly approximated in the $W^{1,2}$-norm topology by piecewise-linear extensions of feasible discrete trajectories. This allows us to verify in turn the strong convergence of discrete optimal solutions to a prescribed local minimizer for the original problem. Facing intrinsic nonsmoothness of original integro-differential problem and its discrete approximations, we employ appropriate tools of generalized differentiation in variational analysis to derive necessary optimality conditions for discrete-time problems (which is our second goal) and finally accomplish our third goal to obtain necessary conditions for the original continuous-time problems by passing to the limit from discrete approximations. In this way we establish, in particular, a novel necessary optimality condition of the Volterra type, which is the crucial result for dynamic optimization of integro-differential inclusions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类新的广义Bolza问题，该问题由非凸积分-微分包含（具有端点和轨迹约束）控制，其中积分项为一般Volterra形式（含时变被积函数）。研究目标有三：（1）通过离散时间系统对连续时间系统进行W^{1,2}强逼近；（2）利用变分分析的广义微分工具推导离散时间问题的最优性必要条件；（3）通过离散逼近取极限，获得原连续时间问题的必要最优性条件，其中建立了Volterra型必要条件这一关键结果。
AI.motivation: 研究由非凸积分-微分包含（含Volterra型积分项）控制的广义Bolza问题，这类问题在连续时间动态优化中尚未得到充分解决，特别是缺乏对端点约束和非光滑性的处理。
AI.method: 首先构造离散时间系统对连续时间积分-微分包含的W^{1,2}强逼近，证明可行解的逐段线性延拓强收敛到原问题的局部极小点；然后利用变分分析中的广义微分工具（如次微分）推导离散问题的最优性必要条件；最后通过离散逼近取极限，得到连续时间问题的必要最优性条件。
AI.result: 建立了离散逼近的强收敛性和最优解收敛性；获得了离散时间问题的必要最优性条件；最终推导出连续时间积分-微分包含动态优化的Volterra型必要最优性条件。
AI.conclusion: 本文为含Volterra型积分项的非凸积分-微分包含的广义Bolza问题提供了完整的变分分析框架，通过离散逼近方法成功建立了连续时间问题的Volterra型必要最优性条件，为积分-微分包含的动态优化提供了新工具。

title: Assessing the Impact of Upselling in Online Fantasy Sports
summary: This study explores the impact of upselling on user engagement. We model users' deposit behaviour on the fantasy sports platform Dream11. Subsequently, we develop an experimental framework to evaluate the effect of upselling using an intensity parameter. Our live experiments on user deposit behaviour reveal decreased user recall with heightened upselling intensity. Our findings indicate that increased upselling intensity improves user deposit metrics and concurrently diminishes user satisfaction and conversion rates. We conduct robust counterfactual analysis and train causal meta-learners to personalise users' upselling intensity levels to reach an optimal trade-off point.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在梦幻体育平台Dream11上，追加销售强度对用户参与度的影响。通过建模用户存款行为并设计实验框架，发现增加追加销售强度虽能提升用户存款指标，但会降低用户召回率、满意度和转化率。通过反事实分析和因果元学习器，实现了个性化的最优追加销售强度平衡。
AI.motivation: 探究追加销售策略对用户参与度的双重影响（正面 vs 负面），寻找最优平衡点。
AI.method: 1) 对Dream11平台用户存款行为建模；2) 设计实验框架，引入强度参数评估追加销售效果；3) 进行在线实验；4) 开展反事实分析；5) 训练因果元学习器实现个性化强度优化。
AI.result: 追加销售强度增加会提升用户存款指标，但降低用户召回率、满意度和转化率。
AI.conclusion: 需要个性化调整追加销售强度，以在提升收益与保持用户满意度之间取得最优平衡。

title: On second order conditions for singular optimal control of port-Hamiltonian systems
summary: We study nonlinear singular optimal control problems of port-Hamil-tonian (descriptor) systems. We employ general control-affine cost functionals that include as a special case the energy supplied to the system. We first derive optimality conditions for the case of ordinary differential equations with and without control bounds by applying the general theory to the specially structured port-Hamiltonian case, and show that this leads to elegant optimality conditions, in particular in the linear case. We then extend these results to classes of nonlinear port-Hamiltonian descriptor systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端口-哈密顿(描述子)系统的非线性奇异最优控制问题，采用包含系统供给能量作为特殊情况的通用控制仿射成本泛函。首先推导了有无控制约束的常微分方程的最优性条件，并应用于特殊结构的端口-哈密顿系统，尤其在线性情况下得到了简洁的最优性条件。然后将这些结果扩展到非线性端口-哈密顿描述子系统类。
AI.motivation: 端口-哈密顿系统在物理系统的建模与控制中具有重要地位，但其非线性奇异最优控制问题尚未得到充分研究。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为这类系统提供系统性的最优控制条件。
AI.method: 将一般最优控制理论应用于端口-哈密顿系统的特殊结构，分别处理有无控制约束的常微分方程情况，再扩展到描述子系统情形。通过利用端口-哈密顿系统的结构特性来简化最优性条件。
AI.result: 在线性情况下得到了特别简洁的最优性条件；成功将结果从常微分方程系统扩展到非线性端口-哈密顿描述子系统。
AI.conclusion: 端口-哈密顿系统的特殊结构能够使最优性条件得到显著简化，这些结果可以有效地从标准系统推广到描述子系统。

title: Stochastic maximum principle for optimal control problem with varying terminal time and non-convex control domain
summary: In this paper, we consider a varying terminal time structure for the stochastic optimal control problem under state constraints, in which the terminal time varies with the mean value of the state. In this new stochastic optimal control system, the control domain does not need to be convex and the diffusion coefficient contains the control variable. To overcome the difficulty in the proof of the related Pontryagin's stochastic maximum principle, we develop asymptotic first- and second-order adjoint equations for the varying terminal time, and then establish its variational equation. In the end, two examples are given to verify the main results of this study.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了状态约束下具有可变终端时间结构的随机最优控制问题，其中终端时间随状态均值变化。通过发展一阶和二阶伴随方程及变分方程，在非凸控制域和含控制变量的扩散系数条件下证明了庞特里亚金随机最大值原理，并给出两个示例验证。
AI.motivation: 现有随机最优控制问题通常假设终端时间固定，而实际应用中终端时间可能随系统状态变化。本文旨在解决状态约束下可变终端时间的随机最优控制问题，克服传统方法在非凸控制域和扩散系数含控制变量情形下的证明困难。
AI.method: 针对可变终端时间结构，推导渐近一阶和二阶伴随方程，建立相应的变分方程，进而证明庞特里亚金随机最大值原理。
AI.result: 成功在非凸控制域及扩散系数含控制变量的条件下，建立了可变终端时间的随机最大值原理，并通过两个数值示例验证了理论结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的伴随方程和变分方程方法有效解决了可变终端时间随机最优控制问题，拓展了随机最大值原理的适用范围。

title: The oscillating and vibrating cylinder: a benchmark to study low Mach number aeroacoustics
summary: Hydrodynamic and acoustic scales separate as the Mach number decreases, making the modelling of aeroacoustic phenomena singular in this flow regime. The benchmark of the flow developing around an oscillating and vibrating cylinder is one of the scarce configuration that is fully analytically tractable, and is thus precious in the validation of new theories or solvers. This work carefully derives the complete incompressible flow solution for this case, extending the axisymmetric results of the literature to more complex cylinder motion. High-order finite element method solution of the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations provide a reference to validate the analytical formulae derived here. Both analytical and numerical investigations agree on an independence of the configuration to the Reynolds number. Up to the critical Reynolds number, found to lie above $10^4$, the hydrodynamic solution of this configuration is solely governed by the Stokes number. The exact expression of the sound radiated in the far field is computed by accounting for the cylinder scattering by means of tailored Green's functions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对低马赫数下的气动声学问题，以振荡圆柱绕流为基准案例，推导了完整不可压缩流场解析解（拓展至任意圆柱运动），通过高阶有限元法验证，发现该构型在临界雷诺数（>10^4）以下仅由斯托克斯数决定，并利用定制格林函数计算了远场声辐射。
AI.motivation: 低马赫数下流体动力学与声学尺度分离，导致气动声学建模存在奇异性。振荡圆柱是极少数完全可解析求解的构型，对验证新理论/求解器具有重要价值。
AI.method: (1) 推导不可压缩流场解析解，将文献中轴对称结果推广至任意圆柱运动；(2) 采用高阶有限元法求解不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程作为数值参考；(3) 利用定制格林函数考虑圆柱散射效应，计算远场声辐射。
AI.result: 解析与数值结果高度一致：该构型流场解对雷诺数不敏感，临界雷诺数高于10^4，在临界值以下流场仅由斯托克斯数主导。
AI.conclusion: 建立了振荡圆柱绕流问题的完整解析框架，揭示了该构型在低马赫数下的物理特性（斯托克斯数主导），为气动声学数值方法验证提供了理论基准。

title: Dissipative Collisions of Impinging Liquid Jets Having Uniform Velocity Profiles
summary: The dissipation of energy in the impingement zone from the collision of impinging, free, equal jets of liquids was investigated by comparison with studies on the energy dissipation from the collision of impinging, free, equal sheets of liquids. Loss of energy was studied in terms of the coefficient of restitution (COR) of the collision. With few exceptions, previous analytical studies have assumed that there is no loss of energy resulting from the collision of the jets (COR = 1), and for jets with uniform velocity profiles, the sheet velocity (velocity after the collision) is equal to the jet velocity (velocity before the collision). In this study, mass and momentum balances of impinging jets with uniform velocity profiles are revised to include the impact of non-equal velocities (COR < 1). After development of the applicable theory, the COR for impinging jets is calculated from available data in the literature on jet and sheet velocities as well as the location of the stagnation point in the impingement zone. Simple empirical correlations were developed for 1) the COR of impinging jets as a function of impingement angle and 2) the relationship of the location of the stagnation point to the COR. A theoretical equation was also derived for the impact of dissipative collisions on the thickness distribution in the liquid sheet.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自由射流碰撞过程中撞击区的能量耗散，通过引入恢复系数（COR<1）修正了传统假设无能量损失的质量动量平衡模型，并基于文献数据建立了COR与撞击角及驻点位置的经验关联式，同时推导了耗散碰撞对液膜厚度分布影响的理论方程。
AI.motivation: 以往分析研究大多假设射流碰撞无能量损失（COR=1），且均匀速度分布的射流碰撞后速度不变，但这种理想化假设与实际情况不符。本文旨在通过引入恢复系数（COR<1）来修正射流碰撞的质量动量平衡模型，更准确地描述非理想碰撞中的能量耗散。
AI.method: 首先对均匀速度分布的撞击射流进行质量和动量平衡修正，纳入非等速碰撞（COR<1）的影响；然后利用文献中已有的射流和液膜速度数据以及撞击区驻点位置数据，计算恢复系数；在此基础上建立恢复系数与撞击角的经验关联式，以及驻点位置与恢复系数的关联式；最后推导了耗散碰撞对液膜厚度分布影响的理论方程。
AI.result: 建立了1）撞击射流恢复系数作为撞击角函数的经验关联式；2）驻点位置与恢复系数的关联式；推导了耗散碰撞影响液膜厚度分布的理论方程。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入恢复系数修正传统模型，能够更准确地描述射流碰撞中的能量耗散行为，所建立的关联式和理论方程为撞击射流系统的设计和分析提供了更贴近实际的工具。

title: Moment-preserving Monte-Carlo Coulomb collision method for particle codes
summary: Binary-pairing Monte-Carlo methods are widely used in particle-in-cell codes to capture effects of small angle Coulomb collisions. These methods preserve momentum and energy exactly when the simulation particles have equal weights. However, when the interacting particles are of varying weight, these physical conservation laws are only preserved on average. Here, we 1) extend these methods to weighted particles such that the scattering physics is correct on average, and 2) describe a new method for adjusting the particle velocities post scatter to restore exact conservation of momentum and energy. The efficacy of the model is illustrated with various test problems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对加权粒子对二元配对蒙特卡洛方法中动量能量不精确守恒的问题，提出了修正散射物理平均正确性的扩展方法，并引入了一种后散射速度调整机制以恢复精确守恒，通过多组测试验证了模型有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有二元配对蒙特卡洛方法在处理等权重粒子时能精确守恒动量能量，但面对变权重粒子时仅能平均守恒，导致物理守恒律的破坏，需要发展一种同时保证散射物理正确性和精确守恒性的方法。
AI.method: 1) 将传统二元配对方法扩展至加权粒子，使散射物理在平均意义上正确；2) 提出一种新的后散射速度调整方法，通过调整粒子速度恢复动量和能量的精确守恒。
AI.result: 通过多种算例测试验证了所提模型的有效性，表明该方法能在加权粒子情形下同时实现正确的散射物理和精确的守恒性质。
AI.conclusion: 该工作解决了加权粒子二元配对蒙特卡洛方法中长期存在的动量能量不精确守恒问题，为等离子体粒子模拟中变权重粒子的库仑碰撞提供了更精确的算法基础。

title: Palabos Turret: A Particle-Resolved Numerical Framework for Settling Dynamics of Arbitrary-Shaped Particles
summary: Particles transported in fluids are everywhere, occurring for example in indoor air, the atmosphere, the oceans, and engineering applications. In this study, a novel three-dimensional numerical framework -- the Palabos Turret is presented, which allows fully resolved simulations of the settling dynamics of heavy particles with arbitrary shapes over a wide range of particle Reynolds numbers. The numerical solver is based on the lattice Boltzmann method utilizing immersed-boundary approach and a recursive-regularized collision model to fully resolve the particle-fluid interactions. A predictor-corrector scheme is applied for the robust time integration of the six-degrees-of-freedom (6DOF) rigid-body motion. Finally, the multi-scale nature arising from the long free-fall distances of a particle is addressed through a dynamic memory allocation scheme allowing for a virtually infinite falling distance. This solver allows for the simulation of particles of any arbitrary shape. The proposed framework is validated using the analytical and experimental data of freely-falling spheres, ellipsoids, and an irregular particle in a wide range of Reynolds numbers between $5\times10^{-1}$ and $4\times10^4$. For different Reynolds numbers and particle shapes considered, the Palabos Turret shows excellent agreement compared to theoretical and experimental values with a median relative deviation of $\pm1.5\%$ and a maximum deviation of $\pm5\%$. The Palabos Turret enables an in-depth analysis of the translational and rotational dynamics of particles with complex geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Palabos Turret的三维数值框架，基于格子玻尔兹曼方法、浸入边界法和递归正则化碰撞模型，能够全解析模拟任意形状重颗粒在宽雷诺数范围（5×10⁻¹至4×10⁴）内的沉降动力学。通过预测-校正算法实现六自由度刚体运动鲁棒积分，并采用动态内存分配方案处理长自由落体距离的多尺度问题。经球体、椭球体及不规则颗粒的解析与实验数据验证，中位相对偏差±1.5%，最大偏差±5%。
AI.motivation: 流体中运输的颗粒广泛存在于室内空气、大气、海洋及工程应用中，但现有方法难以对任意形状重颗粒在宽雷诺数范围内的沉降动力学进行全分辨率数值模拟，特别是长自由落体距离带来的多尺度问题尚未得到有效解决。
AI.method: 采用格子玻尔兹曼方法结合浸入边界法和递归正则化碰撞模型全解析颗粒-流体相互作用；应用预测-校正算法实现六自由度刚体运动的时间积分鲁棒性；通过动态内存分配方案处理长自由落体距离的多尺度问题，实现虚拟无限沉降距离。
AI.result: 在5×10⁻¹至4×10⁴雷诺数范围内，对自由沉降的球体、椭球体及不规则颗粒进行验证，与理论和实验值相比，中位相对偏差±1.5%，最大偏差±5%。
AI.conclusion: Palabos Turret框架能够对任意形状复杂几何颗粒的平移和旋转动力学进行深入分析，为颗粒输运研究提供了高精度、高鲁棒性的数值工具。

title: High-Performance Implementation of the Optimized Event Generator for Strong-Field QED Plasma Simulations
summary: Numerical simulation of strong-field quantum electrodynamics (SFQED) processes is an essential step towards current and future high-intensity laser experiments. The complexity of SFQED phenomena and their stochastic nature make them extremely computationally challenging, requiring the use of supercomputers for realistic simulations. Recently, we have presented a novel approach to numerical simulation of SFQED processes based on an accurate approximation of precomputed rates, which minimizes the number of rate calculations per QED event. The current paper is focused on the high-performance implementation of this method, including vectorization of resource-intensive kernels and improvement of parallel computing efficiency. Using two codes, PICADOR and hi-$χ$ (the latter being free and publicly available), we demonstrate significant reduction in computation time due to these improvements. We hope that the proposed approach can be applied in other codes for the numerical simulation of SFQED processes.

AI.tldr: 本文针对强场量子电动力学（SFQED）过程数值模拟的复杂性与随机性导致的计算挑战，提出了一种基于预计算速率精确近似的新方法，通过向量化和并行效率优化实现高性能实现，并在PICADOR和hi-χ两个代码中显著降低了计算时间。
AI.motivation: SFQED过程的数值模拟对当前和未来高强激光实验至关重要，但其复杂性和随机性导致极高的计算需求，需要超级计算机才能完成现实模拟。现有方法面临计算效率瓶颈，亟需更高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 基于预计算速率的精确近似方法，最小化每个QED事件所需的速率计算次数；在实现层面，对资源密集型核进行向量化优化，并改进并行计算效率。
AI.result: 在PICADOR和hi-χ（免费公开）两个代码中验证，显著减少了计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法可应用于其他SFQED过程数值模拟代码，具有较好的推广潜力。

title: Vacancy diffusion and the hydrodynamics of crystals
summary: The hydrodynamics of crystals with vacancies is developed on the basis of local-equilibrium thermodynamics, where the chemical potential of vacancies plays a key role together with a constraint relating the concentration of vacancies to the density of mass and the strain tensor. The microscopic foundations are established, leading to Green-Kubo and Einstein-Helfand formulas for the transport coefficients, including the vacancy conductivities and the coefficients of vacancy thermodiffusion. As a consequence of having introduced the chemical potential of vacancies, a relationship is obtained between the conductivities and the Fickian diffusion coefficients for the vacancies. The macroscopic equations are linearized around equilibrium to deduce the dispersion relations of the eight hydrodynamic modes. The theoretical predictions are confirmed by numerical simulations of the hard-sphere crystal with vacancies. The study explicitly shows that the eighth hydrodynamic mode of nonperfect monatomic crystals is indeed a mode of vacancy diffusion.

AI.tldr: 本文基于局域平衡热力学建立了含空位晶体的流体动力学理论，通过引入空位化学势和质量密度-应变张量约束，推导了输运系数的Green-Kubo和Einstein-Helfand公式，发现了空位扩散的第八个流体动力学模式，并通过硬球晶体数值模拟验证了理论预测。
AI.motivation: 建立含空位晶体的完整流体动力学理论，揭示空位化学势在其中的核心作用，并验证非完美单原子晶体中存在第八个流体动力学模式（空位扩散模式）。
AI.method: 基于局域平衡热力学，引入空位化学势及空位浓度-质量密度-应变张量约束；推导微观Green-Kubo和Einstein-Helfand公式；对宏观方程进行平衡态线性化，求解八个流体动力学模式的色散关系；通过硬球晶体数值模拟验证理论。
AI.result: 建立了含空位晶体的流体动力学理论，给出了输运系数（空位电导率、热扩散系数等）的微观表达式；推导了空位电导率与Fick扩散系数之间的关系；发现了第八个流体动力学模式——空位扩散模式；硬球晶体数值模拟证实了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 非完美单原子晶体的第八个流体动力学模式被确认为空位扩散模式，空位化学势是描述该模式的关键变量，该理论框架可推广至更复杂的晶体缺陷系统。

title: Time-dependent dynamics in the confined lattice Lorentz gas
summary: We study a lattice model describing the non-equilibrium dynamics emerging from the pulling of a tracer particle through a disordered medium occupied by randomly placed obstacles. The model is considered in a restricted geometry pertinent for the investigation of confinement-induced effects. We analytically derive exact results for the characteristic function of the moments valid to first order in the obstacle density. By calculating the velocity autocorrelation function and its long-time tail we find that already in equilibrium the system exhibits a dimensional crossover. This picture is further confirmed by the approach of the drift velocity to its terminal value attained in the non-equilibrium stationary state. At large times the diffusion coefficient is affected by both the driving and confinement in a way that we quantify analytically. The force-induced diffusion coefficient depends sensitively on the presence of confinement. The latter is able to modify qualitatively the non-analytic behavior in the force observed for the unbounded model. We then examine the fluctuations of the tracer particle along the driving force. We show that in the intermediate regime superdiffusive anomalous behavior persists even in the presence of confinement. Stochastic simulations are employed in order to test the validity of the analytic results, exact to first order in the obstacle density and valid for arbitrary force and confinement.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个格点模型，研究示踪粒子在含随机障碍物的受限介质中被牵引的非平衡动力学，解析推导了障碍物密度一阶近似下的矩特征函数，揭示了平衡态下的维度交叉现象、非平衡稳态漂移速度的趋近行为，以及驱动力与受限效应对扩散系数长时行为的联合影响，并通过随机模拟验证了解析结果。
AI.motivation: 理解受限几何中活性示踪粒子在无序介质中受牵引时的非平衡动力学行为，特别是驱动力与空间约束对扩散及反常输运的联合影响。
AI.method: 在含有随机障碍物的格点模型上，采用解析方法推导障碍物密度一阶近似下的矩特征函数；计算速度自相关函数及其长时尾；通过随机模拟验证解析结果。
AI.result: 平衡态下系统即出现维度交叉；漂移速度在非平衡稳态中趋近终端值；扩散系数在长时下受驱动与受限的双重影响；力致扩散系数对受限敏感，受限条件能改变非解析行为；中间区间存在超扩散反常行为。
AI.conclusion: 受限几何能定性改变无序介质中牵引粒子非平衡输运的标度行为，驱动力与约束共同调控扩散及反常涨落。

title: Latent class analysis for multi-layer categorical data
summary: Traditional categorical data, often collected in psychological tests and educational assessments, are typically single-layer and gathered only once.This paper considers a more general case, multi-layer categorical data with polytomous responses. To model such data, we present a novel statistical model, the multi-layer latent class model (multi-layer LCM). This model assumes that all layers share common subjects and items. To discover subjects' latent classes and other model parameters under this model, we develop three efficient spectral methods based on the sum of response matrices, the sum of Gram matrices, and the debiased sum of Gram matrices, respectively. Within the framework of multi-layer LCM, we demonstrate the estimation consistency of these methods under mild conditions regarding data sparsity. Our theoretical findings reveal two key insights: (1) increasing the number of layers can enhance the performance of the proposed methods, highlighting the advantages of considering multiple layers in latent class analysis; (2) we theoretically show that the algorithm based on the debiased sum of Gram matrices usually performs best. Additionally, we propose an approach that combines the averaged modularity metric with our methods to determine the number of latent classes. Extensive experiments are conducted to support our theoretical results and show the powerfulness of our methods in the task of learning latent classes and estimating the number of latent classes in multi-layer categorical data with polytomous responses.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多层多分类响应数据，提出了多层潜类模型（multi-layer LCM），并开发了三种基于响应矩阵求和、Gram矩阵求和及去偏Gram矩阵求和的谱方法，证明了在稀疏条件下的一致性，并发现层数增加可提升性能、去偏Gram矩阵方法最优，同时提出结合平均模块度确定潜类数量的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统潜类分析仅处理单层一次性采集的分类数据，而实际应用中常出现多层多分类响应数据（如重复测量或不同时间点的心理测试），现有方法无法有效建模这种结构，因此需要新的统计模型和高效估计方法。
AI.method: 提出多层潜类模型（multi-layer LCM），假设各层共享相同被试和项目；开发三种谱方法：基于响应矩阵求和（SumR）、基于Gram矩阵求和（SumG）和基于去偏Gram矩阵求和（Debiased SumG）；利用平均模块度（averaged modularity）估计潜类数量。
AI.result: 理论证明了三种方法在数据稀疏条件下的一致性；揭示了两个关键结论：(1) 层数增加可提升估计性能，体现多层分析的优势；(2) 去偏Gram矩阵求和方法通常表现最优。实验验证了理论结果和方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多层潜类模型能有效处理多层多分类响应数据，所提出的谱方法具有理论保证和良好实践表现，尤其推荐使用去偏Gram矩阵求和方法，并通过平均模块度可靠地确定潜类数量。

title: Advanced Graph Clustering Methods: A Comprehensive and In-Depth Analysis
summary: Graph clustering, which aims to divide a graph into several homogeneous groups, is a critical area of study with applications that span various fields such as social network analysis, bioinformatics, and image segmentation. This paper explores both traditional and more recent approaches to graph clustering. Firstly, key concepts and definitions in graph theory are introduced. The background section covers essential topics, including graph Laplacians and the integration of Deep Learning in graph analysis. The paper then delves into traditional clustering methods, including Spectral Clustering and the Leiden algorithm. Following this, state-of-the-art clustering techniques that leverage deep learning are examined. A comprehensive comparison of these methods is made through experiments. The paper concludes with a discussion of the practical applications of graph clustering and potential future research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了图聚类方法，涵盖从传统方法（谱聚类、Leiden算法）到基于深度学习的最新技术的演进，并通过实验对比了各类方法的性能，最后讨论了应用场景与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 图聚类是社交网络分析、生物信息学和图像分割等多个领域的关键技术，本文旨在系统梳理传统与现代图聚类方法，为研究者提供全面的技术概览和比较。
AI.method: 首先介绍图论基本概念与定义，随后阐述背景知识（包括图拉普拉斯矩阵和深度学习在图分析中的融合），接着分别介绍传统聚类方法（谱聚类、Leiden算法）和基于深度学习的最新聚类技术，并通过实验进行系统比较。
AI.result: 通过实验对传统方法与深度学习方法进行了全面的性能对比，展示了不同方法在各类图数据上的表现差异。
AI.conclusion: 总结了图聚类的实际应用价值，并指出了未来的潜在研究方向。

title: When resampling/reweighting improves feature learning in imbalanced classification?: A toy-model study
summary: A toy model of binary classification is studied with the aim of clarifying the class-wise resampling/reweighting effect on the feature learning performance under the presence of class imbalance. In the analysis, a high-dimensional limit of the input space is taken while keeping the ratio of the dataset size against the input dimension finite and the non-rigorous replica method from statistical mechanics is employed. The result shows that there exists a case in which the no resampling/reweighting situation gives the best feature learning performance irrespectively of the choice of losses or classifiers, supporting recent findings in Cao et al. (2019); Kang et al. (2019). It is also revealed that the key of the result is the symmetry of the loss and the problem setting. Inspired by this, we propose a further simplified model exhibiting the same property in the multiclass setting. These clarify when the class-wise resampling/reweighting becomes effective in imbalanced classification.

AI.tldr: 本文通过二元分类的玩具模型研究类别不平衡下重采样/重加权对特征学习的影响。在高维极限下使用复制方法分析发现，某些情况下不进行任何重采样/重加权反而能获得最佳特征学习性能，这一结果的关键在于损失函数和问题设定的对称性。
AI.motivation: 澄清类别不平衡情况下，类别级重采样/重加权对特征学习性能的影响，解释为何在某些情况下不进行重采样/重加权效果更好。
AI.method: 采用二元分类的玩具模型，在输入空间高维极限下（保持数据集大小与输入维度之比有限）进行分析，使用统计力学的非严格复制方法。
AI.result: (1) 存在不进行重采样/重加权时特征学习性能最佳的情况，且此结论不依赖于损失函数或分类器的选择；(2) 该结果的关键在于损失函数和问题设定的对称性；(3) 基于此发现，提出了一个在多类设定下具有相同性质的简化模型。
AI.conclusion: 澄清了类别不平衡分类中重采样/重加权何时有效，支持了近期研究（Cao et al. 2019; Kang et al. 2019）的发现。

title: The interplay of shape and catalyst distribution in the yield of compressible flow microreactors
summary: We develop a semi-analytical model for transport in structured catalytic microreactors, where both reactant and product are compressible fluids. Making use of the lubrication and Fick-Jacobs approximations, we reduce the three-dimensional governing equations to an effective one-dimensional set of equations. Our model captures the effect of compressibility, of corrugations in the shape of the reactor, as well as of an inhomogeneous catalytic coating of the reactor walls. We show that in the weakly compressible limit (e.g., liquid-phase reactors), the distribution of catalyst does not influence the reactor yield, which we verify experimentally. Beyond this limit, we show that introducing inhomogeneities in the catalytic coating and corrugations to the reactor walls can improve the yield.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个半解析模型，研究结构化催化微反应器中的传输问题，其中反应物和产物均为可压缩流体。利用润滑近似和Fick-Jacobs近似，将三维控制方程降维为一维有效方程。模型捕捉了可压缩性、反应器形状的波纹结构以及反应器壁非均匀催化涂层的影响。研究表明，在弱可压缩极限下（如液相反应器），催化剂分布不影响反应器产率（实验验证）；超出该极限时，引入非均匀催化涂层和壁面波纹结构可提高产率。
AI.motivation: 现有催化微反应器模型多假设流体不可压缩或忽略反应器结构非均匀性，而实际工况中可压缩性和几何/催化涂层的不均匀性对传输性能有显著影响，缺乏统一的理论框架来定量描述这些耦合效应。
AI.method: 采用润滑近似和Fick-Jacobs近似，将三维Navier-Stokes方程与反应-扩散方程降维至一维有效模型；实验验证弱可压缩极限下的理论预测。
AI.result: 弱可压缩极限下催化剂分布不影响产率；超过该极限时，非均匀催化涂层与壁面波纹可协同提升反应器产率。
AI.conclusion: 该半解析模型为优化结构化催化微反应器设计提供了理论工具，揭示了可压缩性、几何构型与催化剂分布之间的耦合机制，尤其在高可压缩性工况下可通过工程化非均匀性来提升性能。

title: A proof of Onsager's Conjecture for the SQG equation
summary: We construct solutions to the SQG equation that fail to conserve the Hamiltonian while having the maximal allowable regularity for this property to hold. This result solves the generalized Onsager conjecture on the threshold regularity for Hamiltonian conservation for SQG.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SQG方程，构造了在保持最大允许正则性下破坏哈密顿量守恒的解，解决了关于SQG方程哈密顿量守恒阈值正则性的广义Onsager猜想。
AI.motivation: 解决SQG方程中哈密顿量守恒的阈值正则性问题，即广义Onsager猜想。
AI.method: 通过构造特定解，使其在最大允许正则性条件下仍能破坏哈密顿量守恒，从而证明该正则性阈值是紧的。
AI.result: 成功构造了满足最大允许正则性但不守恒哈密顿量的SQG方程解。
AI.conclusion: 解决了广义Onsager猜想在SQG方程中的情形，确定了哈密顿量守恒的阈值正则性。

title: From Schubert Varieties to Doubly-Spherical Varieties
summary: Horospherical Schubert varieties are determined. It is shown that the stabilizer of an arbitrary point in a Schubert variety is a strongly solvable algebraic group. The connectedness of this stabilizer subgroup is discussed. Moreover, a new family of spherical varieties, called doubly spherical varieties, is introduced. It is shown that every nearly toric Schubert variety is doubly spherical.

AI.tldr: 本文确定了Horospherical Schubert簇，证明了Schubert簇中任意点的稳定子群是强可解代数群，讨论了该稳定子群的连通性，并引入了一类新的球形簇——双球形簇，进一步证明了几乎所有环面的Schubert簇都是双球形的。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在深入理解Schubert簇的几何结构，特别是其稳定子群的性质，并探索球形簇的新分类，以丰富代数几何中关于群作用与簇结构之间关系的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用代数群作用与Schubert簇的几何分析方法，通过研究Horospherical子簇的结构特征，结合稳定子群的代数性质（强可解性、连通性）进行刻画，并引入双球形簇的新定义以扩展球形簇的分类体系。
AI.result: 确定了Horospherical Schubert簇；证明了Schubert簇中任意点稳定子群为强可解代数群；给出了稳定子群连通性的讨论；证明了几乎所有环面的Schubert簇（Nearly Toric Schubert Varieties）是双球形的。
AI.conclusion: Horospherical Schubert簇具有明确的代数结构，且稳定子群的强可解性为理解Schubert簇的局部性质提供了新视角；双球形簇的引入及与环面Schubert簇的关联，为球形簇理论提供了新的研究方向。

title: Lüroth's theorem for fields of rational functions in infinitely many permuted variables
summary:
Lüroth's theorem describes the dominant maps from rational curves over a field.
  In this note we study those dominant rational maps from cartesian powers $X^Ψ$ of geometrically irreducible varieties $X$ over a field $k$ for infinite sets $Ψ$ that are equivariant with respect to all permutations of the factors $X$. At least some of such maps arise as compositions $h:X^Ψ\xrightarrow{f^Ψ}Y^Ψ\to H\backslash Y^Ψ$, where $X\xrightarrow{f}Y$ is a dominant $k$-map and $H$ is a group of birational automorphisms of $Y|k$, acting diagonally on $Y^Ψ$.
  In characteristic 0, we show that this construction, when properly modified, gives all dominant equivariant maps from $X^Ψ$, if $\dim X=1$. For arbitrary $X$, the results are only partial.
  Also, a somewhat similar problem of describing the equivariant integral schemes over $X^Ψ$ of finite type is touched very briefly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无限集Ψ上几何不可约簇X的笛卡尔幂X^Ψ到某空间的所有支配有理映射，这些映射需满足因子置换等变性。在特征0且dim X=1时，给出完整分类；高维情形仅部分结果。
AI.motivation: 推广Lüroth定理（描述有理曲线上的支配映射）到高维簇的无限笛卡尔幂情形，并考虑置换等变性的约束。
AI.method: 将等变映射分解为f^Ψ与对角群作用商映射的复合，并在特征0、一维情形下证明该构造（经适当修正）能穷尽所有映射。
AI.result: 特征0且dim X=1时，所有置换等变支配有理映射均可由上述构造给出；高维簇仅得到部分分类结果。
AI.conclusion: Lüroth型定理在置换等变框架下可部分推广至无限积簇；等变积分概形的分类问题仅简要提及。

title: Three dimensional stationary solutions of the Electron MHD equations
summary: The goal of this paper is to construct non-trivial steady-state weak solutions of the three dimensional Electron Magnetohydrodynamics equations in the class of $H^s(\mathbb T^3)$ for some small $s > 0$. By exploiting the formulation of the stationary EMHD equations one can treat them as generalized Navier-Stokes equations with half Laplacian. Therefore with convex integration scheme we obtained such stationary weak solutions, which is not yet realizable in the case of classical 3D Navier-Stokes equations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过凸积分方法，构造了三维电子磁流体动力学（EMHD）方程在环面 $\mathbb T^3$ 上 $H^s(\mathbb T^3)$（$s>0$ 很小）空间中的非平凡稳态弱解。通过将稳态EMHD方程视为带有半拉普拉斯算子的广义Navier-Stokes方程，作者实现了经典三维Navier-Stokes方程尚未能实现的构造。
AI.motivation: 构造三维EMHD方程的非平凡稳态弱解，特别是利用其与广义Navier-Stokes方程（含半拉普拉斯算子）的相似性，探索凸积分方法在此类方程中的适用性，以填补经典三维Navier-Stokes方程中尚未能实现的结果。
AI.method: 将稳态EMHD方程转化为带有半拉普拉斯算子的广义Navier-Stokes方程形式，然后应用凸积分（convex integration）方案来构造弱解。
AI.result: 成功构造了三维EMHD方程在 $H^s(\mathbb T^3)$（$s>0$ 很小）空间中的非平凡稳态弱解，这是经典三维Navier-Stokes方程尚未能实现的结果。
AI.conclusion: 凸积分方法可以应用于稳态EMHD方程，构造出低正则性空间中的非平凡弱解，表明EMHD方程相较于经典Navier-Stokes方程在某些方面具有更有利的结构（半拉普拉斯算子带来的正则性增益）。

title: Global strong solvability of the Navier-Stokes equations in exterior domains for rough initial data in critical spaces
summary: It is well known that the Navier-Stokes equations have unique global strong solutions for standard domains when initial data are small in $L^n_σ$. Global well-posedness has been extended to rough initial data in larger critical spaces. This paper explores the global strong solvability of the smooth exterior domain problem for initial data that is small in some critical spaces larger than $L^n_σ$

AI.tldr: 本文研究光滑外区域上Navier-Stokes方程在比L^n_σ更大的临界空间中具有小初始数据时的全局强可解性。
AI.motivation: Navier-Stokes方程在标准域上对于L^n_σ中小初始数据已有唯一全局强解，但全局适定性已被推广到更大临界空间中的粗糙初值。本文旨在将这一结果进一步推广到光滑外区域问题，探索比L^n_σ更大的临界空间中初始数据的全局强可解性。
AI.method: 本文采用分析Navier-Stokes方程在光滑外区域上的全局强解存在性问题的方法，考虑初始数据属于比L^n_σ更大的临界空间。
AI.result: 论文结果表明，对于光滑外区域上的Navier-Stokes方程，当初始数据在比L^n_σ更大的临界空间中具有小性条件时，全局强解仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将Navier-Stokes方程全局强解的适定性结果从标准域和L^n_σ空间拓展到光滑外区域和更大的临界空间，丰富了该方程在复杂区域上的理论框架。

title: Universal piecewise polynomiality for counting curves in toric surfaces
summary: Inspired by piecewise polynomiality results of double Hurwitz numbers, Ardila and Brugallé introduced an enumerative problem which they call double Gromov--Witten invariants of Hirzebruch surfaces. These invariants serve as a two-dimensional analogue and satisfy a similar piecewise polynomial structure. More precisely, they introduced the enumeration of curves in Hirzebruch surfaces satisfying point conditions and tangency conditions on the two parallel toric boundaries. These conditions are stored in four partitions and the resulting invariants are piecewise polynomial in their entries. Moreover, they found that these expressions also behave polynomially with respect to the parameter determining the underlying Hirzebruch surfaces. Based on work of Ardila and Block, they proposed that such a polynomiality could also hold while changing between more general toric surfaces corresponding to $h$-transverse polygons. In this work, we answer this question affirmatively. Moreover, we express the resulting invariants for $h$-transverse polygons as matrix elements in the two-dimensional bosonic Fock space.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了h-横截多边形对应的toric曲面上的双Gromov-Witten不变量具有分段多项式结构，并将其表示为二维玻色子Fock空间中的矩阵元。
AI.motivation: Ardila和Brugallé引入了Hirzebruch曲面上的双Gromov-Witten不变量，并发现其具有分段多项式性质。基于Ardila和Block的工作，他们猜想这种多项式性在更一般的h-横截多边形对应的toric曲面上也成立。本文旨在证明这一猜想。
AI.method: 利用组合和代数方法，将h-横截多边形上的曲线计数问题转化为二维玻色子Fock空间中的矩阵元计算，从而证明分段多项式性。
AI.result: 成功证明了对于h-横截多边形对应的toric曲面，双Gromov-Witten不变量确实具有分段多项式结构，并且这些不变量可以表示为二维玻色子Fock空间中的矩阵元。
AI.conclusion: 本文回答了Ardila和Block提出的猜想，将双Gromov-Witten不变量的分段多项式性推广到了更一般的toric曲面，并建立了与Fock空间的联系，为后续研究提供了代数框架。

title: Towards Formalizing Spuriousness of Biased Datasets Using Partial Information Decomposition
comment: Accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
summary: Spuriousness arises when there is an association between two or more variables in a dataset that are not causally related. In this work, we propose an explainability framework to preemptively disentangle the nature of such spurious associations in a dataset before model training. We leverage a body of work in information theory called Partial Information Decomposition (PID) to decompose the total information about the target into four non-negative quantities, namely unique information (in core and spurious features, respectively), redundant information, and synergistic information. Our framework helps anticipate when the core or spurious feature is indispensable, when either suffices, and when both are jointly needed for an optimal classifier trained on the dataset. Next, we leverage this decomposition to propose a novel measure of the spuriousness of a dataset. We arrive at this measure systematically by examining several candidate measures, and demonstrating what they capture and miss through intuitive canonical examples and counterexamples. Our framework Spurious Disentangler consists of segmentation, dimensionality reduction, and estimation modules, with capabilities to specifically handle high-dimensional image data efficiently. Finally, we also perform empirical evaluation to demonstrate the trends of unique, redundant, and synergistic information, as well as our proposed spuriousness measure across $6$ benchmark datasets under various experimental settings. We observe an agreement between our preemptive measure of dataset spuriousness and post-training model generalization metrics such as worst-group accuracy, further supporting our proposition. The code is available at https://github.com/Barproda/spuriousness-disentangler.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部分信息分解（PID）的框架Spurious Disentangler，用于在模型训练前预先解耦数据集中伪关联的本质，通过将关于目标变量的总信息分解为独特信息、冗余信息和协同信息，并据此提出新的数据集伪关联度量方法。
AI.motivation: 数据集中存在变量之间非因果相关的伪关联，这种伪关联会导致模型学习到错误特征，影响泛化性能。现有工作多在模型训练后诊断伪关联，缺乏在训练前预先识别和量化数据集伪关联程度的方法。
AI.method: 利用部分信息分解（PID）理论，将关于目标的总信息分解为核心特征的独特信息、伪特征的独特信息、冗余信息和协同信息四个非负分量。基于此分解提出数据集伪关联度量，并通过多个候选度量的规范示例和反例进行系统验证。框架包含分割、降维和估计三个模块，专门处理高维图像数据。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集上进行了实验评估，展示了独特信息、冗余信息和协同信息的变化趋势，以及所提出的伪关联度量在不同实验设置下的表现。观察发现，预先计算的伪关联度量与训练后的模型泛化指标（如最差组准确率）之间存在一致性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够在模型训练前有效预测量化数据集的伪关联程度，且该度量与模型训练后的泛化性能指标一致，为理解数据中的伪关联并指导模型训练提供了新的视角和工具。

title: Enhancing Multistep Prediction of Multivariate Market Indices Using Weighted Optical Reservoir Computing
summary: We propose and experimentally demonstrate an innovative stock index prediction method using a weighted optical reservoir computing system. We construct fundamental market data combined with macroeconomic data and technical indicators to capture the broader behavior of the stock market. Our approach shows significant higher performance than state-of-the-art methods such as linear regression, decision trees, and neural network architectures including long short-term memory. It captures well the market's high volatility and nonlinear behaviors despite limited data, demonstrating great potential for real-time, parallel, multi-dimensional data processing and predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出并实验验证了一种利用加权光学储备池计算系统进行股票指数预测的创新方法，该方法结合基本面数据、宏观经济数据和技术指标，在有限数据下显著优于线性回归、决策树和LSTM等现有方法，能够捕捉市场的高波动性和非线性行为。
AI.motivation: 股票市场具有高波动性和非线性特征，传统预测方法难以有效捕捉这些复杂动态。现有方法如线性回归、决策树和LSTM在有限数据下表现不佳，亟需一种能够实时、并行处理多维数据且性能更优的预测方法。
AI.method: 采用加权光学储备池计算系统，将基本面市场数据、宏观经济数据和技术指标相结合作为输入特征，利用光学系统的并行处理能力进行股票指数预测。
AI.result: 在实验验证中，该方法在预测性能上显著优于线性回归、决策树和LSTM等现有方法，能够有效捕捉市场的高波动性和非线性行为，且对数据需求量较小。
AI.conclusion: 加权光学储备池计算系统在股票指数预测方面展现出巨大潜力，特别适用于实时、并行、多维数据处理场景，为金融时间序列预测提供了一种高效的新范式。

title: A Parareal algorithm without Coarse Propagator?
summary: The Parareal algorithm was invented in 2001 in order to parallelize the solution of evolution problems in the time direction. It is based on parallel fine time propagators called F and sequential coarse time propagators called G, which alternatingly solve the evolution problem and iteratively converge to the fine solution. The coarse propagator G is a very important component of Parareal, as one sees in the convergence analyses. We present here for the first time a Parareal algorithm without coarse propagator, and explain why this can work very well for parabolic problems. We give a new convergence proof for coarse propagators approximating in space, in contrast to the more classical coarse propagators which are approximations in time, and our proof also applies in the absence of the coarse propagator. We illustrate our theoretical results with numerical experiments, and also explain why this approach can not work for hyperbolic problems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出了一种无粗传播子的Parareal算法，并证明了其在抛物型问题中的有效性，同时解释了为何该方法适用于抛物型问题但不适用于双曲型问题。
AI.motivation: Parareal算法中的粗传播子G是收敛性的关键，但粗传播子的构建和计算本身可能成为瓶颈。作者试图探索是否可以在没有粗传播子的情况下实现Parareal算法的并行加速，从而简化算法并拓展其适用范围。
AI.method: 提出一种无粗传播子的Parareal算法变体，给出针对空间逼近（而非经典时间逼近）粗传播子的新收敛性证明，该证明同样适用于无粗传播子的情形，并通过数值实验验证理论结果。
AI.result: 理论上证明了无粗传播子的Parareal算法对抛物型问题有效；数值实验验证了理论结果；同时从理论角度解释了该方法不适用于双曲型问题的原因。
AI.conclusion: 首次展示了一种无需粗传播子的Parareal算法，对抛物型问题效果良好，但由于双曲型问题的特性，该方法不适用。

title: Decoupling methods for fluid-structure interaction with local time-stepping
summary: We introduce two global-in-time domain decomposition methods, namely the Steklov-Poincare method and the Robin method, for solving a fluid-structure interaction system. These methods allow us to formulate the coupled system as a space-time interface problem and apply iterative algorithms directly to the evolutionary problem. Each time-dependent subdomain problem is solved independently, which enables the use of different time discretization schemes and time step sizes in the subsystems. This leads to an efficient way of simulating time-dependent phenomena. We present numerical tests for both non-physical and physical problems, with various mesh sizes and time step sizes to demonstrate the accuracy and efficiency of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种全局时间域分解方法（Steklov-Poincaré方法和Robin方法），用于求解流固耦合系统。这些方法将耦合系统建模为时空界面问题，并直接对演化问题应用迭代算法，允许子域系统使用不同的时间离散格式和时间步长，通过数值实验验证了方法的精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的流固耦合求解方法在时间维度上通常要求全局统一的时间步长和离散格式，限制了计算效率。本文旨在通过全局时间域分解方法解耦时间维度上的依赖性，实现子域独立求解，从而提高模拟时间依赖现象的灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 提出两种全局时间域分解方法：1) Steklov-Poincaré方法；2) Robin方法。两种方法都将耦合系统转化为时空界面问题，对每个时间依赖的子域问题进行独立求解，支持在子系统中使用不同的时间离散格式和时间步长。
AI.result: 通过非物理问题和物理问题的数值测试，采用多种网格尺寸和时间步长，验证了所提方法在精度和效率上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的两种全局时间域分解方法能够有效求解流固耦合系统，通过允许子域独立选择时间离散格式和步长，为时间依赖现象的模拟提供了一种高效灵活的途径。

title: Robust First and Second-Order Differentiation for Regularized Optimal Transport
summary: Applications such as unbalanced and fully shuffled regression can be approached by optimizing regularized optimal transport (OT) distances, such as the entropic OT and Sinkhorn distances. A common approach for this optimization is to use a first-order optimizer, which requires the gradient of the OT distance. For faster convergence, one might also resort to a second-order optimizer, which additionally requires the Hessian. The computations of these derivatives are crucial for efficient and accurate optimization. However, they present significant challenges in terms of memory consumption and numerical instability, especially for large datasets and small regularization strengths. We circumvent these issues by analytically computing the gradients for OT distances and the Hessian for the entropic OT distance, which was not previously used due to intricate tensor-wise calculations and the complex dependency on parameters within the bi-level loss function. Through analytical derivation and spectral analysis, we identify and resolve the numerical instability caused by the singularity and ill-posedness of a key linear system. Consequently, we achieve scalable and stable computation of the Hessian, enabling the implementation of the stochastic gradient descent (SGD)-Newton methods. Tests on shuffled regression examples demonstrate that the second stage of the SGD-Newton method converges orders of magnitude faster than the gradient descent-only method while achieving significantly more accurate parameter estimations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过解析计算OT距离的梯度与熵正则OT距离的Hessian矩阵，解决了一阶和二阶优化器在大规模数据和小正则化强度下的内存消耗大与数值不稳定性问题，并利用SGD-Newton方法实现了数量级更快的收敛速度和更准确的参数估计。
AI.motivation: 优化正则化最优传输（OT）距离（如熵正则OT和Sinkhorn距离）时，一阶优化器需要梯度，二阶优化器需要Hessian矩阵，但这些导数的计算面临内存消耗大和数值不稳定性挑战，尤其在大数据集和小正则化强度下问题更为突出。
AI.method: 通过解析推导OT距离的梯度与熵正则OT距离的Hessian矩阵，利用谱分析识别并解决关键线性系统的奇异性和不适定性导致的数值不稳定问题，实现Hessian的可扩展稳定计算，进而实现SGD-Newton方法。
AI.result: 在混洗回归测试中，SGD-Newton方法的第二阶段相比仅使用梯度下降的方法，收敛速度快了数量级，且参数估计精度显著更高。
AI.conclusion: 解析计算Hessian矩阵并解决其数值不稳定性，使得二阶优化器可高效应用于OT距离优化，大幅提升收敛速度和参数估计精度。

title: Viability for locally monotone evolution inclusions and lower semicontinuous solutions of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations in infinite dimensions
comment: 20 pages, to appear in ESAIM: Control, Optimisation and Calculus of Variations
summary: We establish necessary and sufficient conditions for viability of evolution inclusions with locally monotone operators in the sense of Liu and Röckner [J. Funct. Anal., 259 (2010), pp. 2902-2922]. This allows us to prove wellposedness of lower semicontinuous solutions of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations associated to the optimal control of evolution inclusions. Thereby, we generalize results in Bayraktar and Keller [J. Funct. Anal., 275 (2018), pp. 2096-2161] on Hamilton-Jacobi equations in infinite dimensions with monotone operators in several ways. First, we permit locally monotone operators. This extends the applicability of our theory to a wider class of equations such as Burgers' equations, reaction-diffusion equations, and 2D Navier-Stokes equations. Second, our results apply to optimal control problems with state constraints. Third, we have uniqueness of viscosity solutions. Our results on viability and lower semicontinuous solutions are new even in the case of monotone operators.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Liu和Röckner意义下的局部单调算子，建立了演化包含可行性的充分必要条件，并由此证明了与演化包含最优控制相关的Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程下半连续解的良好适定性，在多个方向上推广了Bayraktar和Keller的经典结果。
AI.motivation: 将Bayraktar和Keller关于无限维单调算子Hamilton-Jacobi方程的结果推广到局部单调算子情形，以涵盖更广泛的方程类型（如Burgers方程、反应扩散方程和二维Navier-Stokes方程），并解决带状态约束的最优控制问题及粘性解唯一性问题。
AI.method: 通过建立局部单调算子演化包含的可行性条件（必要且充分），以此为工具证明相应Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程下半连续解的存在性和唯一性。
AI.result: 成功将理论从单调算子推广到局部单调算子，适用范围扩展至Burgers方程、反应扩散方程和2D Navier-Stokes方程；解决了带状态约束的最优控制问题；获得了粘性解的唯一性；即使在单调算子情形下，关于可行性和下半连续解的结果也是全新的。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的局部单调算子框架显著拓展了无限维Hamilton-Jacobi方程的理论适用范围，为更广泛的偏微分方程最优控制问题提供了统一的可行性和解的存在唯一性理论。

title: Time-series Crime Prediction Across the United States Based on Socioeconomic and Political Factors
summary: Traditional crime prediction techniques are slow and inefficient when generating predictions as crime increases rapidly \cite{r15}. To enhance traditional crime prediction methods, a Long Short-Term Memory and Gated Recurrent Unit model was constructed using datasets involving gender ratios, high school graduation rates, political status, unemployment rates, and median income by state over multiple years. While there may be other crime prediction tools, personalizing the model with hand picked factors allows a unique gap for the project. Producing an effective model would allow policymakers to strategically allocate specific resources and legislation in geographic areas that are impacted by crime, contributing to the criminal justice field of research \cite{r2A}. The model has an average total loss value of 70.792.30, and a average percent error of 9.74 percent, however both of these values are impacted by extreme outliers and with the correct optimization may be corrected.

AI.tldr: 本文利用LSTM和GRU模型，基于性别比例、高中毕业率、政治状况、失业率和中位收入等人工筛选特征进行犯罪率预测，模型平均损失值为70.79，平均百分比误差为9.74%，但受极端离群值影响。
AI.motivation: 传统犯罪预测技术随着犯罪率快速上升而变得缓慢低效，亟需更高效的预测方法。
AI.method: 构建LSTM和GRU模型，使用多年度各州的性别比例、高中毕业率、政治状况、失业率和中位收入等数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 模型平均总损失值为70.79，平均百分比误差为9.74%，但二者均受极端离群值影响。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可为政策制定者针对犯罪影响地区进行资源分配和立法提供决策支持，通过优化可进一步修正离群值带来的误差问题。

title: Asynchronous Parallel Policy Gradient Methods for the Linear Quadratic Regulator
comment: This article was submitted to IEEE TAC on Jan. 10, 2024
summary: Learning policies in an asynchronous parallel way is essential to the numerous successes of RL for solving large-scale problems. However, their convergence performance is still not rigorously evaluated. To this end, we adopt the asynchronous parallel zero-order policy gradient (AZOPG) method to solve the continuous-time linear quadratic regulation problem. Specifically, as in the celebrated A3C algorithm, there are multiple parallel workers to asynchronously estimate PGs which are then sent to a central master for policy updates. Via quantifying its convergence rate of policy iterations, we show the linear speedup property of the AZOPG, both in theory and simulation, which clearly reveals the advantages of using parallel workers for learning policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出异步并行零阶策略梯度（AZOPG）方法解决连续时间线性二次型调节问题，从理论和仿真两方面证明了其线性加速特性，揭示了并行工作者学习策略的优势。
AI.motivation: 异步并行学习在大规模RL问题中取得了众多成功，但其收敛性能缺乏严格的理论评估，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用异步并行零阶策略梯度（AZOPG）方法，类似于A3C算法，使用多个并行工作者异步估计策略梯度并发送给中央主节点进行策略更新。
AI.result: 通过量化策略迭代的收敛速率，从理论和仿真两方面证明了AZOPG具有线性加速特性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究清晰揭示了并行工作者在策略学习中的优势，为异步并行RL方法的收敛性提供了理论支撑。

title: Revenue Management with Calendar-Aware and Dependent Demands: Asymptotically Tight Fluid Approximations
summary: When modeling the demand in revenue management systems, a natural approach is to focus on a canonical interval of time, such as a week, so that we forecast the demand over each week in the selling horizon. Ideally, we would like to use random variables with general distributions to model the demand over each week. The current demand can give a signal for the future demand, so we also would like to capture the dependence between the demands over different weeks. Prevalent demand models in the literature, which are based on a discrete-time approximation to a Poisson process, are not compatible with these needs. In this paper, we focus on revenue management models that are compatible with a natural approach for forecasting the demand. Building such models through dynamic programming is not difficult. We divide the selling horizon into multiple stages, each stage being a canonical interval of time on the calendar. We have random number of customer arrivals in each stage, whose distribution is arbitrary and depends on the number of arrivals in the previous stage. The question we seek to answer is the form of the corresponding fluid approximation. We give the correct fluid approximation in the sense that it yields asymptotically optimal policies. The form of our fluid approximation is surprising as its constraints use expected capacity consumption of a resource up to a certain time period, conditional on the demand in the stage just before the time period in question. As the resource capacities and number of stages increase with the same rate, our performance guarantee converges to one. To our knowledge, this result gives the first asymptotically optimal policy under dependent demands with arbitrary distributions. Our computational experiments indicate that using the correct fluid approximation can make a dramatic impact in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种支持任意分布且具有阶段间需求依赖性的收益管理流体近似模型，并证明了其渐近最优性，首次在依赖需求和任意分布条件下实现渐近最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有收益管理中的需求模型多基于泊松过程的离散时间近似，无法兼容对任意分布周需求以及周际依赖关系的建模需求。作者希望构建一种与自然预测方法（将销售期划分为标准时间段，如周）兼容的收益管理模型。
AI.method: 将销售期划分为多个阶段（标准时间间隔），每个阶段内顾客到达数为任意分布，且依赖于上一阶段到达数。在此基础上，通过动态规划建模，推导相应的流体近似，其约束形式为：基于前一阶段需求条件，资源截至某时间段的期望消耗量。
AI.result: 流体近似在资源容量和阶段数以相同速率增长时，性能保证收敛到1，即渐近最优。计算实验表明正确使用该流体近似能带来显著的实际效果提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次在任意分布且具有阶段间依赖性的需求下，给出了渐近最优策略，为收益管理中更灵活、更贴近实际的需求建模提供了理论基础和可行方案。

title: Energy Method and Stability of Shear Flows: an Elementary Tutorial
summary: This paper provides a pedagogical introduction to the classical nonlinear stability analysis of the plane Poiseuille and Couette flows. The whole procedure is kept as simple as possible by presenting all the logical steps involved in the application of the energy method and leading to the Euler-Lagrange equations. Then, the eigenvalue problems needed for the evaluation of the nonlinear energy threshold of the Reynolds number for stability are formulated for transverse modes and for longitudinal modes. Such formulations involve the streamfunction and, in the case of longitudinal modes, also the streamwise component of velocity. An accurate numerical solution of the eigenvalue problems, based on Galerkin's method of weighted residuals with the test functions expressed in terms of Chebyshev polynomials, is discussed in details. The numerical codes developed for the software Mathematica 14 (© Wolfram Research, Inc.) are also presented. A critical analysis of the obtained results is finally proposed.

AI.tldr: 本文对平面泊肃叶流和库埃特流的经典非线性稳定性分析进行了教学性介绍，详细阐述了能量方法的逻辑步骤、欧拉-拉格朗日方程的推导、横向与纵向模态的特征值问题求解，以及基于伽辽金方法和切比雪夫多项式的数值实现，并提供了Mathematica 14代码。
AI.motivation: 以教学为导向，系统且清晰地介绍平面泊肃叶流和库埃特流非线性稳定性分析的能量方法，降低该领域的学习门槛。
AI.method: 采用能量方法推导欧拉-拉格朗日方程，分别针对横向模态（涉及流函数）和纵向模态（涉及流函数及流向速度分量）建立特征值问题，并通过伽辽金加权残量法结合切比雪夫多项式作为测试函数进行数值求解，在Mathematica 14中实现编码。
AI.result: 得到了用于评估非线性稳定性的雷诺数能量阈值，并给出了横向与纵向模态的特征值问题的数值解。
AI.conclusion: 对获得的结果进行了批判性分析，确认了能量方法在判定非线性稳定性阈值方面的有效性，并提供了可复现的数值工具。

title: Annular Newtonian Poiseuille flow with pressure-dependent wall slip
summary: We investigate the effect of pressure-dependent wall slip on the steady Newtonian annular Poiseuille flow employing Navier's slip law with a slip parameter that varies exponentially with pressure. The dimensionless governing equations and accompanying auxiliary conditions are solved analytically up to second order by implementing a regular perturbation scheme in terms of the small dimensionless pressure-dependence slip parameter. An explicit formula for the average pressure drop, required to maintain a constant volumetric flowrate, is also derived. This is suitably post-processed by applying a convergence acceleration technique to increase the accuracy of the original perturbation series. The effects of pressure-dependent wall slip are more pronounced when wall slip is weak. However, as the slip coefficient increases, these effects are moderated and eventually eliminated as the perfect slip case is approached. The results show that the average pressure drop remains practically constant until the Reynolds number becomes sufficiently large. It is worth noting that all phenomena associated with pressure-dependent wall slip are amplified as the annular gap is reduced.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了压力依赖型壁面滑移对牛顿流体环形泊肃叶流动的影响，通过正则摄动方法解析求解至二阶，发现弱滑移时压力依赖效应更显著，且环形间隙越小效应越强。
AI.motivation: 探究压力依赖型壁面滑移对环形泊肃叶流动的影响，因为实际工程中（如高分子加工、微流控）壁面滑移常受压力影响，而现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 采用Navier滑移定律（滑移参数随压力指数变化），通过正则摄动方法将无量纲控制方程和边界条件展开至二阶解析求解，并应用收敛加速技术提高摄动序列精度。
AI.result: 弱滑移时压力依赖效应显著；随滑移系数增大效应减弱直至完全滑移时消失；平均压降在低雷诺数时近乎恒定；环形间隙越小，压力依赖滑移现象越明显。
AI.conclusion: 压力依赖型壁面滑移在弱滑移和小环形间隙条件下对流动影响最大，为相关工程应用提供了重要的理论参考。

title: Near-Isotropic Sub-Ångstrom 3D Resolution Phase Contrast Imaging Achieved by End-to-End Ptychographic Electron Tomography
summary: Three-dimensional atomic resolution imaging using transmission electron microscopes is a unique capability that requires challenging experiments. Linear electron tomography methods are limited by the missing wedge effect, requiring a high tilt range. Multislice ptychography can achieve deep sub-Ångstrom resolution in the transverse direction, but the depth resolution is limited to 2 to 3 nanometers. In this paper, we propose and demonstrate an end-to-end approach to reconstructing the electrostatic potential volume of the sample directly from the 4D-STEM datasets. End-to-end multi-slice ptychographic tomography recovers several slices at each tomography tilt angle and compensates for the missing wedge effect. The algorithm is initially tested in simulation with a Pt@$\mathrm{Al_2O_3}$ core-shell nanoparticle, where both heavy and light atoms are recovered in 3D from an unaligned 4D-STEM tilt series with a restricted tilt range of 90 degrees. We also demonstrate the algorithm experimentally, recovering a Te nanoparticle with sub-Ångstrom resolution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并演示了一种端到端的多层叠层衍射层析成像方法，直接从4D-STEM数据集中重建样品的静电势体积，能在有限倾斜角度（90度）下实现亚埃级三维分辨率，并通过模拟和实验验证了该方法对重原子和轻原子的三维恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 透射电子显微镜的三维原子分辨率成像受限于缺失楔效应（需要高倾斜范围），而多层叠层衍射在横向可达深亚埃分辨率但深度方向仅2-3纳米，现有方法无法同时实现高横向和深度分辨率的三维成像。
AI.method: 提出端到端多层叠层衍射层析成像方法：直接从4D-STEM数据集重建样品静电势体积，在每个层析倾斜角恢复多个切片，并通过算法补偿缺失楔效应。
AI.result: 模拟实验中，在90度受限倾斜范围内从未对齐的4D-STEM倾斜序列中恢复了Pt@Al₂O₃核壳纳米颗粒的重原子和轻原子三维结构；实验上恢复了Te纳米颗粒，分辨率达到亚埃级。
AI.conclusion: 端到端多层叠层衍射层析成像方法能够克服传统线性电子层析的缺失楔限制，在有限倾斜范围内实现三维原子分辨率成像，有望成为电子显微镜三维原子成像的重要技术途径。

title: Towards a Unified Benchmark and Framework for Deep Learning-Based Prediction of Nuclear Magnetic Resonance Chemical Shifts
summary: The study of structure-spectrum relationships is essential for spectral interpretation, impacting structural elucidation and material design. Predicting spectra from molecular structures is challenging due to their complex relationships. Herein, we introduce NMRNet, a deep learning framework using the SE(3) Transformer for atomic environment modeling, following a pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm. To support the evaluation of NMR chemical shift prediction models, we have established a comprehensive benchmark based on previous research and databases, covering diverse chemical systems. Applying NMRNet to these benchmark datasets, we achieve state-of-the-art performance in both liquid-state and solid-state NMR datasets, demonstrating its robustness and practical utility in real-world scenarios. This marks the first integration of solid and liquid state NMR within a unified model architecture, highlighting the need for domainspecific handling of different atomic environments. Our work sets a new standard for NMR prediction, advancing deep learning applications in analytical and structural chemistry.

AI.tldr: NMRNet是一种基于SE(3)Transformer的深度学习框架，通过预训练-微调范式实现核磁共振化学位移预测，在液态和固态NMR基准数据集上均达到最先进水平，首次将固态和液态NMR统一到单一模型架构中。
AI.motivation: 从分子结构预测NMR谱图极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效建模结构与谱图间的复杂关系，且缺乏统一的基准评估体系。
AI.method: 采用SE(3) Transformer对原子环境进行等变建模，遵循预训练-微调范式；基于前人研究和数据库构建了涵盖多样化化学体系的综合基准数据集。
AI.result: 在液态和固态NMR基准数据集上均取得最先进性能，验证了模型的鲁棒性和实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 首次将固态与液态NMR统一到单一模型架构中，为NMR预测设立了新标准，推动了深度学习在分析化学和结构化学中的应用。

title: Generalised tangent stabilised nonlinear elasticity: An automated framework for controlling material and geometric instabilities
summary: Tangent stabilised large strain isotropic elasticity was recently proposed by Poya et al. [1] wherein by working directly with principal stretches the entire eigenstructure of constitutive and geometric/initial stiffness terms were found in closed-form, giving fresh insights into exact convexity conditions of highly non-convex functions in discrete settings. Consequently, owing to these tangent eigenvalues an analytic tangent stabilisation was proposed bypassing incumbent numerical approaches routinely used in nonlinear finite element analysis. This formulation appears to be extremely robust for quasi-static simulation of complex deformations even with no load increments and time stepping while still capturing instabilities automatically in ways that are infeasible for path-following techniques in practice. In this work, we generalise the notion of tangent stabilised elasticity to virtually all known invariant formulations of nonlinear elasticity. We show that, closed-form eigen-decomposition of tangents is easily available irrespective of invariant formulation or integrity basis. In particular, we work out closed-form tangent eigensystems for isotropic Total Lagrangian deformation gradient (F )-based and right Cauchy-Green (C)-based as well as Updated Lagrangian left Cauchy-Green (b)-based formulations and present their exact convexity conditions postulated in terms of their corresponding tangent and initial stiffness eigenvalues. In addition, we introduce the notion of geometrically stabilised polyconvex large strain elasticity for models that are materially stable but exhibit geometric instabilities for whom we construct their initial stiffness in a spectrally-decomposed form analytically. We further extend this framework to the case of transverse isotropy where once again, closed-form tangent eigensystems are found for common transversely isotropic invariants.

AI.tldr: 本文推广了切向稳定化大应变各向同性弹性理论到几乎所有的非线性弹性不变量公式，包括总拉格朗日变形梯度基、右柯西-格林基、更新拉格朗日左柯西-格林基公式，以及横向各向同性情况，并给出了切线刚度与初始刚度的闭式特征分解和精确凸性条件。
AI.motivation: 现有切向稳定化弹性理论仅针对主伸长率公式推导，尚未推广到更常用的不变量公式体系；同时，对于材料稳定但存在几何不稳定的多凸大应变弹性模型，缺乏解析的初始刚度谱分解方法。
AI.method: 对总拉格朗日F基、C基以及更新拉格朗日b基公式分别推导闭式切向特征系统；引入几何稳定化多凸大应变弹性概念，对初始刚度进行谱分解形式的解析构造；并将框架扩展到横向各向同性不变量情形。
AI.result: 所有常见不变量公式的切向特征系统均可获得闭式解；凸性条件可用切线刚度和初始刚度特征值精确表达；几何稳定化方法可处理材料稳定但存在几何不稳定性的模型；横向各向同性情形同样可得到闭式特征系统。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了从主伸长率公式到不变量公式的切向稳定化弹性的统一理论框架，使非线性有限元分析中的解析稳定化策略适用于更广泛的材料模型。

title: Truncation error in series expansions linking microcanonical and canonical ensembles
summary: In the microcanonical thermal pure quantum (mTPQ) method, the canonical ensemble is derived using Taylor series expansions. We prove that the truncation error decreases exponentially with system size when the effective temperature of the mTPQ state is smaller than the target temperature, and otherwise, the error remains constant. We also show the discipline to set the mTPQ parameter by considering the trade-off between the error and the numerical cost.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了mTPQ方法中Taylor展开截断误差随系统大小的指数衰减条件，并给出了参数设置准则以平衡误差与计算成本。
AI.motivation: 微正则热纯量子(mTPQ)方法使用Taylor级数展开推导正则系综，但其截断误差的行为尚未被严格分析，需要理论保证和参数优化指导。
AI.method: 通过数学证明分析mTPQ方法中Taylor展开截断误差与系统大小、有效温度和目标温度的关系；基于误差-成本权衡推导参数设置准则。
AI.result: 当mTPQ态的有效温度低于目标温度时，截断误差随系统大小指数衰减；否则误差保持恒定。给出了明确的参数设置原则。
AI.conclusion: 为mTPQ方法提供了严格的误差控制理论，并建立了实用的参数选择策略，确保计算效率与精度的平衡。

title: Quantum percolation on Lieb Lattices
summary: We theoretically investigate the quantum percolation problem on Lieb lattices in two and three dimensions. We study the statistics of the energy levels through random matrix theory, and determine the level spacing distributions, which, with the aid of finite-size scaling theory, allows us to obtain accurate estimates for site- and bond percolation thresholds and critical exponents. Our numerical investigation supports a localized-delocalized transition at finite threshold, which decreases as the average coordination number increases. The precise determination of the localization length exponent enables us to claim that quantum site- and bond-percolation problems on Lieb lattices belong to the same universality class, with $ν$ decreasing with lattice dimensionality, $d$, similarly to the classical percolation problem. In addition, we verify that, in three dimensions, quantum percolation on Lieb lattices belongs to the same universality class as the Anderson impurity model.

AI.tldr: 本文通过随机矩阵理论和有限尺寸缩放，理论研究了二维和三维Lieb晶格上的量子渗流问题，精确估计了渗流阈值和临界指数，发现局域化-退局域化转变发生在有限阈值处，且量子位点和键渗流属于同一普适类，三维情况下与安德森杂质模型同属一类。
AI.motivation: 研究Lieb晶格上量子渗流问题的局域化-退局域化转变特性，确定渗流阈值和临界指数，并明确其所属的普适类。
AI.method: 采用随机矩阵理论分析能级统计，通过能级间距分布结合有限尺寸缩放理论，精确估计位点渗流和键渗流的阈值及临界指数。
AI.result: 发现了有限阈值处的局域化-退局域化转变，阈值随平均配位数增加而降低；量子位点和键渗流属同一普适类，局域化长度指数ν随维度d增加而减小；三维情况下量子渗流与安德森杂质模型属于同一普适类。
AI.conclusion: Lieb晶格上的量子渗流问题存在有限渗流阈值，其临界行为与经典渗流类似（ν随维度增加而减小），且在三维中与安德森杂质模型普适类一致。

title: S-SIRUS: an explainability algorithm for spatial regression Random Forest
summary: Random Forest (RF) is a widely used machine learning algorithm known for its flexibility, user-friendliness, and high predictive performance across various domains. However, it is non-interpretable. This can limit its usefulness in applied sciences, where understanding the relationships between predictors and response variable is crucial from a decision-making perspective. In the literature, several methods have been proposed to explain RF, but none of them addresses the challenge of explaining RF in the context of spatially dependent data. Therefore, this work aims to explain regression RF in the case of spatially dependent data by extracting a compact and simple list of rules. In this respect, we propose S-SIRUS, a spatial extension of SIRUS, the latter being a well-established regression rule algorithm able to extract a stable and short list of rules from the classical regression RF algorithm. A simulation study was conducted to evaluate the explainability capability of the proposed S-SIRUS, in comparison to SIRUS, by considering different levels of spatial dependence among the data. The results suggest that S-SIRUS exhibits a higher test predictive accuracy than SIRUS when spatial correlation is present. Moreover, for higher levels of spatial correlation, S-SIRUS produces a shorter list of rules, easing the explanation of the mechanism behind the predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-SIRUS算法，将SIRUS扩展到空间相关数据场景，通过提取简洁规则列表来解释空间相关数据下的回归随机森林模型。模拟实验表明，在空间相关性存在时，S-SIRUS比SIRUS具有更高的测试预测精度，且空间相关性越强，产生的规则列表越短，解释性越好。
AI.motivation: 现有随机森林解释方法无法处理空间相关数据（spatially dependent data）的解释问题，而空间依赖性在诸多应用科学领域普遍存在，亟需一种能在此类数据下解释随机森林的方法。
AI.method: 提出S-SIRUS算法，作为SIRUS的空间扩展版本。核心思路是从回归随机森林中提取紧凑且简洁的规则列表，但对空间相关数据的特性进行了适配处理。
AI.result: 模拟研究表明：（1）在存在空间相关性时，S-SIRUS的测试预测精度高于SIRUS；（2）空间相关程度越高，S-SIRUS产生的规则列表越短，从而更易于解释预测背后的机制。
AI.conclusion: S-SIRUS能够有效解释空间相关数据下的回归随机森林模型，比SIRUS更适合存在空间依赖性的应用场景，且在强空间相关时解释性更优。

title: Meta-Analysis with Untrusted Data
summary: [See paper for full abstract] Meta-analysis is a crucial tool for answering scientific questions. It is usually conducted on a relatively small amount of ``trusted'' data -- ideally from randomized, controlled trials -- which allow causal effects to be reliably estimated with minimal assumptions. We show how to answer causal questions much more precisely by making two changes. First, we incorporate untrusted data drawn from large observational databases, related scientific literature and practical experience -- without sacrificing rigor or introducing strong assumptions. Second, we train richer models capable of handling heterogeneous trials, addressing a long-standing challenge in meta-analysis. Our approach is based on conformal prediction, which fundamentally produces rigorous prediction intervals, but doesn't handle indirect observations: in meta-analysis, we observe only noisy effects due to the limited number of participants in each trial. To handle noise, we develop a simple, efficient version of fully-conformal kernel ridge regression, based on a novel condition called idiocentricity. We introduce noise-correcting terms in the residuals and analyze their interaction with a ``variance shaving'' technique. In multiple experiments on healthcare datasets, our algorithms deliver tighter, sounder intervals than traditional ones. This paper charts a new course for meta-analysis and evidence-based medicine, where heterogeneity and untrusted data are embraced for more nuanced and precise predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全共形核岭回归的元分析方法，通过整合不可信的大规模观测数据与处理异质性试验，生成比传统方法更紧致且可靠的预测区间，为循证医学开辟新路径。
AI.motivation: 传统元分析通常仅依赖少量"可信"数据（如随机对照试验），导致因果估计精度有限。本文旨在利用大规模观测数据库、相关科学文献等"不可信"数据，在不牺牲严谨性或引入强假设的前提下，显著提升因果问题的回答精度。
AI.method: 基于共形预测框架，发展了一种高效的全共形核岭回归变体。核心创新包括：(1) 提出"idiocentricity"条件以处理元分析中仅能观测到含噪效应的特点；(2) 在残差中引入噪声校正项；(3) 采用"方差削减"技术分析噪声校正项与方差之间的交互作用。
AI.result: 在多个医疗健康数据集上的实验表明，本文方法生成的预测区间比传统方法更紧致（精度更高）且更可靠（覆盖更准确），同时能够处理异质性试验这一元分析中的长期挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本文为元分析和循证医学开辟了新方向：通过拥抱异质性和不可信数据，实现更精细、更精确的预测，从而在保持严谨性的同时大幅提升因果推断的信息利用效率。

title: Optimal Projections for Classification with Naive Bayes
summary:
In the Naive Bayes classification model the class conditional densities are estimated as the products of their marginal densities along the cardinal basis directions. We study the problem of obtaining an alternative basis for this factorisation with the objective of enhancing the discriminatory power of the associated classification model. We formulate the problem as a projection pursuit to find the optimal linear projection on which to perform classification. Optimality is determined based on the multinomial likelihood within which probabilities are estimated using the Naive Bayes factorisation of the projected data. Projection pursuit offers the added benefits of dimension reduction and visualisation. We discuss an intuitive connection with class conditional independent components analysis, and show how this is realised visually in practical applications. The performance of the resulting classification models is investigated using a large collection of (162) publicly available benchmark data sets and in comparison with relevant alternatives. We find that the proposed approach substantially outperforms other popular probabilistic discriminant analysis models and is highly competitive with Support Vector Machines.
  Code to implement the proposed approach, in the form of an R package, is available from https://github.com/DavidHofmeyr/OPNB

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化朴素贝叶斯分类模型的方法，通过投影追踪寻找最优线性投影方向，以增强分类判别能力，并在162个公开数据集上验证了该方法优于其他概率判别分析模型，与支持向量机性能相当。
AI.motivation: 标准朴素贝叶斯模型假设特征在给定类别下条件独立，沿笛卡尔基方向进行因子分解。但这一假设往往不成立，限制了分类性能。作者希望寻找一个替代的投影基，使朴素贝叶斯因子分解在该投影空间中更有效，从而提升判别能力。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为投影追踪（Projection Pursuit），寻找最优线性投影方向，在该投影上基于多项式似然进行朴素贝叶斯因子分解的概率估计。该方法与类条件独立成分分析（class conditional ICA）有直观联系，并可在低维投影空间中进行可视化和降维。
AI.result: 在162个公开基准数据集上与多种相关模型比较，提出的方法显著优于其他流行的概率判别分析模型，并且与支持向量机（SVM）具有高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过投影追踪优化朴素贝叶斯因子分解的基方向，能有效提升分类性能，是一种兼具降维、可视化和高判别能力的概率分类方法。

title: Large scale response of a vehicle wake to on-road perturbations
summary: The aim of this research work is to analyse the large scale response of a vehicle wake to on-road perturbations by using an instrumented vehicle and a combination of scale one wind tunnel tests, track trials and on road experiments. More precisely, in all these tests, we focus on the analysis of the asymmetry of the pressure distribution at the base. Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) is used. For all cases considered, POD analysis reveals two dominant modes, respectively associated with vertical and horizontal wake large scale reorganisation. More than 50\% of the total energy is carried by these two modes and this value increases significantly for on-road tests. Noteworthy, the low-frequency energy content of the temporal coefficients of these modes is significantly higher on-road. Low frequencies (even very low ones) then play a major role, corresponding to a quasi-static perturbation domain of the velocity seen by the vehicle. We show that a quasi-steady exploration of the on-road yaw angle statistical distribution during a wind tunnel test captures phenomena similar to those observed on the road and is therefore interesting to evaluate on-road aerodynamic performances. This also opens perspectives for developing closed loop control strategies aiming to maintain a prescribed wake balance in order to reduce drag experienced on the road.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实车测量、风洞实验、赛道测试和道路实验相结合的方法，研究车辆尾流对道路扰动的响应。使用POD分析发现尾流压力分布存在垂直和水平两种大尺度重构模态，两者携带超过50%的能量（道路测试中更高）。道路测试中低频能量显著增加，表明准静态扰动占主导。研究表明，在风洞中模拟道路偏航角统计分布可复现道路上的类似现象，为开发闭环控制策略以减少实际道路行驶阻力提供了可能。
AI.motivation: 分析车辆尾流在道路实际扰动下的大尺度响应，理解真实行驶环境中尾流动力学行为，为降低实际道路行驶阻力提供理论基础。
AI.method: 使用仪器化实车，结合1:1风洞实验、赛道测试和道路实验，通过基底压力分布的POD（本征正交分解）分析尾流不对称性。
AI.result: POD分析揭示两个主导模态（垂直和水平大尺度重构），携带超过50%总能量（道路测试中更高）。道路测试中模态时间系数的低频能量显著更高，低频（甚至极低频）占主导，对应准静态扰动域。在风洞中准静态探索道路偏航角统计分布可复现道路现象。
AI.conclusion: 风洞中模拟道路偏航角统计分布可用于评估实际道路气动性能，并为开发维持尾流平衡的闭环控制策略以减少实际道路阻力开辟了前景。

title: An Onsager-type theorem for SQG
summary: We construct non-trivial weak solutions $θ\in C_t^0C_x^{0-}$ to the surface quasi-geostrophic (SQG) equations, which have compact support in time and, thus, violate the conservation of the Hamiltonian. The result is sharp in view of the fact that such a conservation law holds for all weak solutions in the class $C_{t,x}^0 \subset L_{t,x}^3$ (Isett-Vicol, 2015) and resolves the Onsager conjecture for SQG. The construction is achieved by means of a Nash iteration together with the linear decoupling method recently introduced in Giri-Radu (2023).

AI.tldr: 本文通过Nash迭代和线性解耦方法构造了具有时间紧支集的SQG方程非平凡弱解，破坏了哈密顿量守恒，解决了SQG的Onsager猜想，且结果在Isett-Vicol (2015)的正则性阈值意义下是最优的。
AI.motivation: 解决SQG方程的Onsager猜想，即确定哈密顿量守恒成立的临界正则性阈值，并构造在该阈值以下破坏守恒的反例。
AI.method: 采用Nash迭代方案，结合Giri-Radu (2023)最新提出的线性解耦方法，构造具有时间紧支集的非平凡弱解。
AI.result: 构造了$C_t^0C_x^{0-}$类中具有时间紧支集的SQG非平凡弱解，破坏了哈密顿量守恒，且该正则性水平在Isett-Vicol (2015)的$C_{t,x}^0 \subset L_{t,x}^3$守恒律意义下是最优的。
AI.conclusion: 解决了SQG方程的Onsager猜想，确定了哈密顿量守恒的临界正则性阈值，并提供了达到该边界的紧致构造。

title: The realization spaces of certain conic-line arrangements of degree 7
summary: We study the embedded topology of certain conic-line arrangements of degree 7. Two new examples of Zariski pairs are given. Furthermore, we determine the number of connected components of the conic-line arrangements. We also calculate the fundamental groups using SageMath and the package Sirocco in the appendix.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了七次圆锥-直线配置的嵌入拓扑，给出了两个新的Zariski对例子，确定了这些配置的连通分支数，并在附录中使用SageMath和Sirocco包计算了基本群。
AI.motivation: 研究圆锥-直线配置的嵌入拓扑结构，寻找新的Zariski对，以深化对代数曲线配置空间拓扑性质的理解。
AI.method: 通过分析七次圆锥-直线配置的拓扑结构，使用计算代数拓扑工具（SageMath和Sirocco包）计算基本群，并采用组合拓扑方法确定连通分支数。
AI.result: 发现了两个新的Zariski对例子；确定了七次圆锥-直线配置的连通分支数量；通过计算得到了这些配置的基本群。
AI.conclusion: 七次圆锥-直线配置的拓扑结构比预期更为丰富，新发现的Zariski对为理解代数曲线配置的嵌入拓扑提供了新的视角，计算工具的有效性也得到了验证。

title: The dynamics of the Hesse derivative on the $j$-invariant
summary: In this paper, we study the Hesse derivative of a cubic curve on the set of $j$-invariants, which can be viewed as a rational function on the Riemann sphere. We then analyze the dynamics of this rational function, including counting the number of orbits of a given size. We proceed to investigate when a cubic curve is isomorphic to its $n$-fold Hesse derivative, showing that when an elliptic curve has a $j$-invariant that is periodic under this rational function, the curve itself must be periodic under the Hesse derivative. We finish with some data collected comparing the sizes of the orbits of elliptic curves to those of their $j$-invariants, and some further questions about this dynamical system.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三次曲线的Hesse导数在j-不变量集合上的动力学性质，将其视为黎曼球面上的有理函数，分析了轨道的计数、曲线与其n重Hesse导数的同构条件，以及椭圆曲线周期性与j-不变量周期性的关系。
AI.motivation: 探究三次曲线的Hesse导数在j-不变量上的动力学行为，理解曲线与其高阶Hesse导数之间的同构关系，以及椭圆曲线周期性与其j-不变量周期性的关联。
AI.method: 将Hesse导数视为黎曼球面上的有理函数，通过分析其动力学性质（如轨道大小计数）来研究j-不变量的演化；通过比较椭圆曲线与其j-不变量的轨道数据来验证周期性关系。
AI.result: 给出了给定大小的轨道数量的计数结果；证明了当椭圆曲线的j-不变量在该有理函数下是周期点时，曲线本身在Hesse导数下也是周期的。
AI.conclusion: 椭圆曲线的周期性与其j-不变量的周期性是一致的，并提出了关于该动力系统的进一步开放问题。

title: The Cauchy problem for the Degasperis-Procesi Equation: Painlevé Asymptotics in Transition Zones

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Degasperis-Procesi (DP)方程在两个过渡区域（|ξ+3/8|t^{2/3}<C 和 |ξ-3|t^{2/3}<C）中的长时渐近行为，得到了用Painlevé II方程解表示的领先阶近似。
AI.motivation: DP方程作为浅水波单向传播的渐近近似模型，其解在孤子区域和孤子无区域之间的过渡区的长时渐近行为尚未被刻画，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用$\bar\partial$-广义Deift-Zhou非线性最速下降法，并结合双尺度极限技术来分析相关联的向量Riemann-Hilbert问题。
AI.result: 在两个过渡区域中，DP方程的解$u(x,t)$的领先阶近似由Painlevé II方程的解给出，建立了从孤子区域到孤子无区域之间的渐近连接。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功推导了DP方程在过渡区的长时渐近行为，完善了该方程在不同时空区域的完整渐近刻画，特别是揭示了过渡区中Painlevé II方程解的出现。

title: Nontrivial solutions for a $(p,q)$-Kirchhoff type system with concave-convex nonlinearities on locally finite graphs
summary: By using the well-known mountain pass theorem and Ekeland's variational principle, we prove that there exist at least two fully-non-trivial solutions for a $(p,q)$-Kirchhoff elliptic system with the Dirichlet boundary conditions and perturbation terms on a locally weighted and connected finite graph $G=(V,E)$.We also present a necessary condition of the existence of semi-trivial solutions for the system. Moreover, by using Ekeland's variational principle and Clark's Theorem, respectively, we prove that the system has at least one or multiple semi-trivial solutions when the perturbation terms satisfy different assumptions. Finally, we present a nonexistence result of solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用山路引理、Ekeland变分原理和Clark定理，研究了带Dirichlet边界条件和扰动项的(p,q)-Kirchhoff椭圆系统在局部加权连通有限图上的解的存在性、多重性及不存在性，获得了至少两个全非平凡解、半平凡解及其存在条件，以及解的不存在性结果。
AI.motivation: 在离散图结构上研究(p,q)-Kirchhoff型椭圆系统的解的存在性与多重性，特别是全非平凡解和半平凡解的存在条件，以及扰动项对解的影响。
AI.method: 使用山路引理(mountain pass theorem)和Ekeland变分原理证明至少两个全非平凡解的存在性；利用Ekeland变分原理和Clark定理分别证明在不同扰动假设下半平凡解的存在性与多重性；给出半平凡解存在的必要条件以及解的不存在性结果。
AI.result: 成功证明了系统至少存在两个全非平凡解；获得了半平凡解存在的必要条件；在不同假设下得到了半平凡解的至少一个或多个存在性结果；给出了解的不存在性结论。
AI.conclusion: 本文在图结构上建立了(p,q)-Kirchhoff椭圆系统的解的存在性、多重性与不存在性理论，拓展了变分方法在离散图上的应用。

title: Smoothing low-dimensional algebraic cycles [after Kollár and Voisin]
summary: Let $X$ be a smooth projective complex algebraic variety. An old question of Borel and Haefliger asks whether any (possibly singular) algebraic subvariety of $X$ is homologically equivalent to a linear combination with integral coefficients of smooth algebraic subvarieties of $X$. In general, this question is too optimistic, and counterexamples have been known for a long time. The aim of this survey is to explain how János Kollár and Claire Voisin have provided a positive answer to Borel and Haefliger's question, for subvarieties of dimension less than half the dimension of $X$.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Kollár和Voisin对Borel-Haefliger经典问题的肯定性解答：对于光滑射影复代数簇X，低于X维数一半的任意代数子簇（可能奇异）在积分系数下同调等价于光滑代数子簇的线性组合。
AI.motivation: Borel和Haefliger提出经典问题：任意（可能奇异的）代数子簇是否在积分系数下同调等价于光滑代数子簇的线性组合。该问题过于乐观，反例早已存在，但在低维数情形下仍未解决。
AI.method: 综述方法，整合Kollár和Voisin的工作，利用代数几何与同调代数工具，针对维数低于X维数一半的子簇建立正合性条件与构造性证明。
AI.result: 对于维数小于dim X/2的代数子簇，Borel-Haefliger问题有肯定答案：此类子簇同调等价于光滑代数子簇的整系数线性组合。
AI.conclusion: Kollár和Voisin的工作在低维数情形下解决了Borel-Haefliger的经典问题，揭示了奇点对同调表示的限制，并为更一般的Hodge理论问题提供了线索。

title: Toward Global Convergence of Gradient EM for Over-Parameterized Gaussian Mixture Models
summary: We study the gradient Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) in the over-parameterized setting, where a general GMM with $n>1$ components learns from data that are generated by a single ground truth Gaussian distribution. While results for the special case of 2-Gaussian mixtures are well-known, a general global convergence analysis for arbitrary $n$ remains unresolved and faces several new technical barriers since the convergence becomes sub-linear and non-monotonic. To address these challenges, we construct a novel likelihood-based convergence analysis framework and rigorously prove that gradient EM converges globally with a sublinear rate $O(1/\sqrt{t})$. This is the first global convergence result for Gaussian mixtures with more than $2$ components. The sublinear convergence rate is due to the algorithmic nature of learning over-parameterized GMM with gradient EM. We also identify a new emerging technical challenge for learning general over-parameterized GMM: the existence of bad local regions that can trap gradient EM for an exponential number of steps.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了过参数化高斯混合模型（GMM）中梯度期望最大化（EM）算法的全局收敛性，首次证明了在n>1个分量的GMM从单个真实高斯分布生成的数据中学习时，梯度EM算法以O(1/√t)的次线性速率全局收敛，并揭示了可能导致算法陷入指数步数的不良局部区域这一新挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管2-高斯混合的特殊情况已有成熟结论，但任意n个分量的过参数化GMM的全局收敛分析仍未解决，且面临收敛变为次线性、非单调等新的技术障碍，亟需建立通用的收敛分析框架。
AI.method: 构建了一种新颖的基于似然的收敛分析框架，严格证明了梯度EM算法在过参数化GMM中的全局收敛性，并分析了收敛速率和潜在的不良局部区域问题。
AI.result: 梯度EM算法以O(1/√t)的次线性速率全局收敛，这是首个针对多于2个分量的高斯混合模型的全局收敛结果。同时发现存在不良局部区域，可能使梯度EM算法陷入指数步数的困境。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化GMM中梯度EM的次线性收敛率源于算法本质特征，而不良局部区域的存在为学习过参数化GMM带来了新的技术挑战。

title: Disentangling Dense Embeddings with Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have shown promise in extracting interpretable features from complex neural networks. We present one of the first applications of SAEs to dense text embeddings from large language models, demonstrating their effectiveness in disentangling semantic concepts. By training SAEs on embeddings of over 420,000 scientific paper abstracts from computer science and astronomy, we show that the resulting sparse representations maintain semantic fidelity while offering interpretability. We analyse these learned features, exploring their behaviour across different model capacities and introducing a novel method for identifying ``feature families'' that represent related concepts at varying levels of abstraction. To demonstrate the practical utility of our approach, we show how these interpretable features can be used to precisely steer semantic search, allowing for fine-grained control over query semantics. This work bridges the gap between the semantic richness of dense embeddings and the interpretability of sparse representations. We open source our embeddings, trained sparse autoencoders, and interpreted features, as well as a web app for exploring them.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将稀疏自编码器（SAE）应用于大型语言模型的稠密文本嵌入，通过在超过42万篇科学论文摘要上训练SAE，实现了语义保真与可解释性的兼顾，并提出了“特征族”概念来表征不同抽象层次的相关概念，展示了可解释特征在语义搜索精细控制中的实用价值。
AI.motivation: 稠密嵌入具有丰富的语义信息但缺乏可解释性，而稀疏表示虽然可解释性更好但往往牺牲语义丰富性。本文旨在弥合这两者之间的差距，探索如何在不损失语义保真度的前提下获得可解释的稀疏表示。
AI.method: 在超过42万篇计算机科学和天文学领域的科学论文摘要上，对来自大型语言模型的稠密文本嵌入训练稀疏自编码器（SAEs）；提出了一种识别“特征族”（feature families）的新方法，用于表征不同抽象层次的相关概念。
AI.result: 训练得到的稀疏表示能够保持语义保真度，同时具备可解释性；SAE在不同模型容量（capacities）下的特征行为表现出差异性；提出的“特征族”方法能有效识别不同抽象层次的相关概念；可解释特征可被用于对语义搜索进行精细控制。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作成功地将稀疏自编码器应用于稠密文本嵌入，在保持语义丰富性的同时提供了可解释性，并通过特征引导的语义搜索展示了实际应用价值，为稠密表示与稀疏可解释性之间的桥梁提供了有效方案。

title: Online learning of quadratic manifolds from streaming data for nonlinear dimensionality reduction and nonlinear model reduction
summary: This work introduces an online greedy method for constructing quadratic manifolds from streaming data, designed to enable in-situ analysis of numerical simulation data on the Petabyte scale. Unlike traditional batch methods, which require all data to be available upfront and take multiple passes over the data, the proposed online greedy method incrementally updates quadratic manifolds in one pass as data points are received, eliminating the need for expensive disk input/output operations as well as storing and loading data points once they have been processed. A range of numerical examples demonstrate that the online greedy method learns accurate quadratic manifold embeddings while being capable of processing data that far exceed common disk input/output capabilities and volumes as well as main-memory sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线贪心方法，用于从流式数据构建二次流形，支持PB级数值模拟数据的原位分析，无需存储全部数据，单次遍历即可增量更新模型。
AI.motivation: 传统批处理方法需要所有数据同时可用并多次遍历，在PB级数据场景下受限于磁盘I/O、存储容量和内存大小，无法高效处理大规模流式数据。
AI.method: 提出在线贪心方法，以单次遍历（one-pass）方式增量更新二次流形嵌入，数据处理后即可丢弃，避免昂贵的磁盘读写和存储开销。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，在线贪心方法能学习到准确的二次流形嵌入，且能够处理远超常规磁盘I/O能力和内存容量的数据规模。
AI.conclusion: 在线贪心方法为大规模流式模拟数据的原位降维分析提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案。

title: Numerical Instability of Algebraic Rootfinding Methods
summary: We demonstrate that the most popular variants of all common algebraic multidimensional rootfinding algorithms are unstable by analyzing the conditioning of subproblems that are constructed at intermediate steps. In particular, we give multidimensional polynomial systems for which the conditioning of a subproblem can be worse than the conditioning of the original problem by a factor that grows exponentially with the number of variables.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了所有常见代数多维根求解算法的最流行变体都是不稳定的，并给出了中间步骤子问题的条件数可能比原问题差、且随变量数指数增长的实例。
AI.motivation: 揭示流行代数多维根求解算法在稳定性方面的根本缺陷，指出中间子问题的条件数可能随变量数指数恶化。
AI.method: 通过分析算法中间步骤构造的子问题的条件数（conditioning），并与原问题对比，给出具体的多维多项式系统反例。
AI.result: 证明了所有常见代数多维根求解算法的最流行变体均不稳定，且子问题的条件数可能比原问题差，恶化因子随变量数指数增长。
AI.conclusion: 这些算法在稳定性上存在根本性问题，中间子问题的条件恶化限制了算法在高维问题上的可靠性。

title: Smoothers with localized residual computations for geometric multigrid methods
summary: We improve the performance of multigrid solvers on many-core architectures with cache hierarchies by reorganizing operations in the smoothing step to minimize memory transfers. We focus on patch smoothers, which offer robust convergence rates with respect to the finite element degree for various equations, in the setting of multiplicative subspace correction for numerical efficiency. By combining the computation of local residuals with local solvers, we increase the locality of the problem and thus reduce data transfers. The thread-parallel implementation of this algorithm is based on coloring, which contradicts cache efficiency. We improve data locality by rearranging the loop into batches so that more data can be reused. The organization of consecutive batches prioritizes data locality.
