AI.tldr: 本文通过重组平滑步骤中的操作来最小化内存传输，提升了多重网格求解器在多核架构上的性能。重点在于使用补丁平滑器，结合局部残差与局部求解器的计算以增强数据局部性，并通过批处理循环优化线程并行实现中的缓存效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的多重网格求解器在多核架构上受限于缓存层次结构，内存传输成为性能瓶颈。特别是补丁平滑器虽收敛鲁棒，但其线程并行实现中的着色策略破坏了缓存效率，亟需优化数据局部性以减少数据搬运。
AI.method: 将平滑步骤中的局部残差计算与局部求解器合并，提高计算局部性；针对线程并行中着色带来的缓存问题，将循环重排为批次，并通过批次组织优先保证数据局部性（而非传统颜色顺序），从而提升缓存重用。
AI.result: 通过减少内存传输提升了多核架构上的性能，具体加速效果取决于架构与问题规模，但核心在于改善了缓存效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过操作重组与批次化循环调度，可在不损失数值收敛性的前提下显著提升补丁平滑器在多核系统上的性能，为高阶有限元多重网格求解器的高效并行实现提供了可行路径。

title: Competitive Facility Location under Cross-Nested Logit Customer Choice Model: Hardness and Exact Approaches
summary: We study the competitive facility location problem, where a firm aims to establish new facilities in a market already occupied by competitors. In this problem, customer behavior is crucial for making optimal location decisions. We explore a general class of customer choice models, known as the cross-nested logit (CNL) model, which is recognized for its flexibility and generality in predicting people's choice behavior. To explore the problem, we first demonstrate that it is NP-hard, even when there is only one customer class. We further show that this hardness result is tight, as the facility location problem under any simpler choice models (such as the logit or nested logit) is polynomial-time solvable when there is one customer class. To tackle the resulting facility location problem, we demonstrate that the objective function under a general cross-nested structure is not concave. Interestingly, we show that by a change of variables, the objective function can be converted to a convex program (i.e., a maximization problem with a concave objective and convex constraints), enabling it to be solved to optimality via an outer-approximation algorithm. Extensive experiments show the efficiency of our approach and provide analyses on the benefits of using the cross-nested model in the facility location context.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了竞争环境下的设施选址问题，采用交叉嵌套Logit（CNL）模型刻画顾客选择行为，证明了该问题即使只有单顾客类别也是NP难的，但通过变量变换可将目标函数转化为凸优化问题，并设计了外逼近算法求解。
AI.motivation: 设施选址问题中顾客行为建模至关重要，现有研究多采用Logit或Nested Logit等简单模型，缺乏对更灵活、更一般的交叉嵌套Logit（CNL）模型下设施选址问题的理论分析与求解方法探索。
AI.method: 首先证明问题NP-hard（即使单顾客类别）；通过变量变换将非凹目标函数转化为等价的凸规划（凹目标+凸约束），并设计外逼近算法求解最优解。
AI.result: 证明了单顾客类别下CNL模型设施选址问题是NP难的，而更简单的Logit/Nested Logit模型则多项式可解；通过变量变换实现了凸化转化；数值实验验证了算法的效率以及CNL模型在设施选址中的优势。
AI.conclusion: CNL模型虽增加计算复杂度，但可通过凸化转化高效求解，为更灵活的顾客选择行为建模提供了可行方案。

title: Knowledge-data fusion oriented traffic state estimation: A stochastic physics-informed deep learning approach
summary: Physics-informed deep learning (PIDL)-based models have recently garnered remarkable success in traffic state estimation (TSE). However, the prior knowledge used to guide regularization training in current mainstream architectures is based on deterministic physical models. The drawback is that a solely deterministic model fails to capture the universally observed traffic flow dynamic scattering effect, thereby yielding unreliable outcomes for traffic control. This study, for the first time, proposes stochastic physics-informed deep learning (SPIDL) for traffic state estimation. The idea behind such SPIDL is simple and is based on the fact that a stochastic fundamental diagram provides the entire range of possible speeds for any given density with associated probabilities. Specifically, we select percentile-based fundamental diagram and distribution-based fundamental diagram as stochastic physics knowledge, and design corresponding physics-uninformed neural networks for effective fusion, thereby realizing two specific SPIDL models, namely \text{$α$}-SPIDL and \text{$\cal B$}-SPIDL. The main contribution of SPIDL lies in addressing the "overly centralized guidance" caused by the one-to-one speed-density relationship in deterministic models during neural network training, enabling the network to digest more reliable knowledge-based constraints.Experiments on the real-world dataset indicate that proposed SPIDL models achieve accurate traffic state estimation in sparse data scenarios. More importantly, as expected, SPIDL models reproduce well the scattering effect of field observations, demonstrating the effectiveness of fusing stochastic physics model knowledge with deep learning frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出随机物理信息深度学习（SPIDL）用于交通状态估计，通过融合随机基本图（百分位数和分布型）替代传统确定性物理模型作为先验知识，解决了确定性模型无法捕捉交通流动态散射效应的问题，在真实数据集上实现了稀疏数据下的准确估计，并成功再现了实测数据的散射特性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理信息深度学习（PIDL）的交通状态估计方法均采用确定性物理模型进行正则化训练，但确定性模型固有的单值速度-密度关系无法表征实际交通流中普遍存在的动态散射效应（即相同密度下速度分布的多样性），导致估计结果不可靠，难以有效支撑交通控制决策。
AI.method: 选择百分位数基本图（α-基本图）和分布型基本图（B-基本图）作为随机物理知识，设计对应的物理非知情神经网络进行深度融合，实现两种SPIDL模型：α-SPIDL和B-SPIDL。核心思想是用随机基本图提供的概率化速度-密度关系（给定密度下完整的速度范围及其概率）替代确定性模型的单值映射关系。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，SPIDL模型在稀疏数据场景下能够实现准确的交通状态估计；更重要的是，SPIDL模型成功再现了实测数据的散射效应，验证了将随机物理模型知识与深度学习框架融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPIDL通过引入随机基本图作为物理先验，解决了确定性模型在神经网络训练中造成的"过度中心化引导"问题，使网络能够吸收更可靠的知识约束。这是首次将随机物理模型引入PIDL框架用于交通状态估计，为处理交通流不确定性提供了新范式。

title: Fast convergence of a Federated Expectation-Maximization Algorithm
summary: Data heterogeneity has been a long-standing bottleneck in studying the convergence rates of Federated Learning algorithms. In order to better understand the issue of data heterogeneity, we study the convergence rate of the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm for the Federated Mixture of $K$ Linear Regressions model (FMLR). We completely characterize the convergence rate of the EM algorithm under all regimes of number of clients and number of data points per client, with partial limits in the number of clients. We show that with a signal-to-noise-ratio (SNR) that is atleast of order $\sqrt{K}$, the well-initialized EM algorithm converges to the ground truth under all regimes. We perform experiments on synthetic data to illustrate our results. In line with our theoretical findings, the simulations show that rather than being a bottleneck, data heterogeneity can accelerate the convergence of iterative federated algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了联邦混合K线性回归模型下EM算法的收敛率，证明了在信噪比至少为√K量级时，良好初始化的EM算法在所有客户端数量和数据点数量配置下均收敛到真实参数，并发现数据异质性实际上可以加速联邦迭代算法的收敛。
AI.motivation: 数据异质性长期以来一直是研究联邦学习算法收敛率的瓶颈，为了更好地理解这一问题，本文研究联邦混合K线性回归模型下EM算法的收敛率。
AI.method: 在联邦混合K线性回归模型（FMLR）下，理论刻画了EM算法在所有客户端数量和数据点数量配置下的收敛率（客户端数量部分有极限），实验在合成数据上进行验证。
AI.result: 当信噪比至少为√K量级时，良好初始化的EM算法在所有配置下收敛到真实参数；仿真结果表明数据异质性可以加速迭代联邦算法的收敛。
AI.conclusion: 数据异质性并非联邦学习的瓶颈，反而可以加速联邦迭代算法的收敛。

title: Granger Causality in Extremes
summary: We introduce a rigorous mathematical framework for Granger causality in extremes, designed to identify causal links from extreme events in time series. Granger causality plays a pivotal role in uncovering directional relationships among time-varying variables. While this notion gains heightened importance during extreme and highly volatile periods, state-of-the-art methods primarily focus on causality within the body of the distribution, often overlooking causal mechanisms that manifest only during extreme events. Our framework is designed to infer causality mainly from extreme events by leveraging the causal tail coefficient. We establish equivalences between causality in extremes and other causal concepts, including (classical) Granger causality, Sims causality, and structural causality. We prove other key properties of Granger causality in extremes and show that the framework is especially helpful under the presence of hidden confounders. We also propose a novel inference method for detecting the presence of Granger causality in extremes from data. Our method is model-free, can handle non-linear and high-dimensional time series, outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in all considered setups, both in performance and speed, and was found to uncover coherent effects when applied to financial and extreme weather observations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于极值格兰杰因果关系的严格数学框架，通过引入因果尾系数从极端事件中推断因果联系，建立了与经典格兰杰因果、Sims因果及结构因果的等价关系，并提出了一个无模型、可处理非线性和高维时间序列的推断方法，在金融和极端天气数据上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推断方法主要聚焦于分布主体内的因果关系，忽略了仅在极端事件期间才显现的因果机制，而极端和高度波动时期恰恰是因果关系最为关键的阶段。
AI.method: 基于因果尾系数构建极值格兰杰因果的数学框架，建立与经典格兰杰因果、Sims因果及结构因果的等价关系，并提出无模型推断方法以检测极值格兰杰因果的存在。
AI.result: 所提出的方法在性能与速度上均优于现有最先进方法，能够处理非线性和高维时间序列，并在金融和极端天气观测数据中发现了 coherent 的效应。
AI.conclusion: 极值格兰杰因果框架在存在隐藏混淆变量时尤其有效，为极端事件下的因果推断提供了理论严谨且实用的工具。

title: K-Fold Causal BART for CATE Estimation
summary: This research aims to propose and evaluate a novel model named K-Fold Causal Bayesian Additive Regression Trees (K-Fold Causal BART) for improved estimation of Average Treatment Effects (ATE) and Conditional Average Treatment Effects (CATE). The study employs synthetic and semi-synthetic datasets, including the widely recognized Infant Health and Development Program (IHDP) benchmark dataset, to validate the model's performance. Despite promising results in synthetic scenarios, the IHDP dataset reveals that the proposed model is not state-of-the-art for ATE and CATE estimation. Nonetheless, the research provides several novel insights: 1. The ps-BART model is likely the preferred choice for CATE and ATE estimation due to better generalization compared to the other benchmark models - including the Bayesian Causal Forest (BCF) model, which is considered by many the current best model for CATE estimation, 2. The BCF model's performance deteriorates significantly with increasing treatment effect heterogeneity, while the ps-BART model remains robust, 3. Models tend to be overconfident in CATE uncertainty quantification when treatment effect heterogeneity is low, 4. A second K-Fold method is unnecessary for avoiding overfitting in CATE estimation, as it adds computational costs without improving performance, 5. Detailed analysis reveals the importance of understanding dataset characteristics and using nuanced evaluation methods, 6. The conclusion of Curth et al. (2021) that indirect strategies for CATE estimation are superior for the IHDP dataset is contradicted by the results of this research. These findings challenge existing assumptions and suggest directions for future research to enhance causal inference methodologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-Fold Causal BART模型用于改进ATE和CATE估计，在合成数据上表现良好，但在IHDP基准数据上未达最优。研究提供多项新见解：ps-BART模型在CATE/ATE估计中泛化性优于包括BCF在内的基准模型；BCF在处理高异质性处理效应时性能显著下降，而ps-BART保持稳健；低异质性下模型对CATE不确定性量化过于自信；K-Fold方法对避免过拟合非必要且增加计算成本；推翻了Curth等人关于间接策略在IHDP上更优的结论。
AI.motivation: 提出并评估一种名为K-Fold Causal BART的新模型，以改进平均处理效应(ATE)和条件平均处理效应(CATE)的估计精度。
AI.method: 采用合成数据集和半合成数据集（包括IHDP基准数据集）进行模型验证，比较K-Fold Causal BART与ps-BART、BCF等基准模型的性能。
AI.result: K-Fold Causal BART在合成场景中表现良好，但在IHDP数据集上未达到最优。主要发现包括：ps-BART在CATE和ATE估计中泛化性最佳；BCF在处理高异质性处理效应时性能显著下降；低异质性下模型对CATE不确定性量化过于自信；K-Fold方法对避免过拟合非必要。
AI.conclusion: ps-BART可能是CATE和ATE估计的首选模型；BCF在高异质性场景下表现不佳；K-Fold方法非必要；推翻了Curth等人关于间接策略在IHDP上更优的结论；强调了理解数据集特征和细致评估方法的重要性。

title: Time-resolved phase-lock pressure-sensitive paint measurement of trailing edge noise dynamics
summary: Pressure-sensitive paint (PSP) was applied to the surface of a NACA0012 airfoil to investigate pressure fluctuations associated with trailing edge (TE) noise under low-velocity flow conditions. The primary focus is to assess the feasibility of employing laser pulses exposed at the airfoil surface to mitigate TE noise. However, the weak pressure fluctuations accompanying TE noise pose a challenge, as they are overshadowed by image sensor noise in high-speed cameras capturing PSP emission changes. A novel time-resolved phase-locking technique was introduced to address this issue, utilizing the signal from a semiconductor pressure transducer at the trailing edge as a phase-lock trigger source. By repetitively conducting phase-locked measurements (1150 times), time series ensemble-averaged data based on PSP emission images were obtained, enabling the capture of these subtle pressure fluctuations. Quantitatively, fluctuations with a dominant frequency of 679 Hz and an amplitude of 50 Pa are resolved within an accuracy of about 15 Pa, achieved at a recording rate of 19.2 kHz. Both the suppression and subsequent redevelopment of the pressure field with the TE noise offer valuable insights into the dynamics of TE noise and open avenues for targeted noise reduction strategies in aerodynamic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文采用压力敏感涂料（PSP）结合新型时间分辨锁相技术，成功测量了NACA0012翼型尾缘噪声相关的微弱压力脉动（679 Hz, 50 Pa），并通过激光脉冲暴露验证了尾缘噪声抑制效果，精度达约15 Pa，为气动噪声控制提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 尾缘噪声伴随的压力脉动极其微弱，容易被高速相机的图像传感器噪声淹没，传统方法难以捕捉。同时，探索利用激光脉冲暴露翼型表面来抑制尾缘噪声的可行性，需要高精度压力测量手段。
AI.method: 提出一种时间分辨锁相技术：以尾缘处半导体压力传感器的信号作为锁相触发源，对PSP发射图像重复进行1150次锁相测量，通过系综平均获得时间序列数据，从而提取微弱压力脉动信号。
AI.result: 成功分辨出主频679 Hz、幅值50 Pa的压力脉动，测量精度约15 Pa，记录速率19.2 kHz。观察到了尾缘噪声的抑制及压力场的重新发展过程。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了强噪声背景下微弱压力脉动的测量难题；PSP结合锁相技术可为尾缘噪声动力学研究提供实验支撑，并为气动噪声定向抑制策略开辟了新途径。

title: Existence, comparison principle and uniqueness for doubly nonlinear anisotropic evolution equation
summary: We prove the existence of solutions to the Cauchy-Dirichlet problem associated with a class of doubly nonlinear anisotropic evolution equations. We also demonstrate the existence of solutions to the corresponding Cauchy problem on $\mathbb{R}^N\times(0,T)$. Under some assumptions on the Caratheodory vector field we prove a comparison principle and utilize it to obtain a uniqueness result for the Cauchy-Dirichlet problem.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一类双非线性各向异性演化方程的Cauchy-Dirichlet问题和Cauchy问题解的存在性，并在特定假设下建立了比较原理和唯一性结果。
AI.motivation: 解决双非线性各向异性演化方程在Cauchy-Dirichlet问题和Cauchy问题中的解的存在性、唯一性这一基础理论问题。
AI.method: 对Caratheodory向量场施加特定假设，通过构建比较原理来推导Cauchy-Dirichlet问题的唯一性结果。
AI.result: 证明了双非线性各向异性演化方程在Cauchy-Dirichlet问题和Cauchy问题上解的存在性，并获得了唯一性结果。
AI.conclusion: 在Caratheodory向量场的特定假设下，比较原理成立，进而确保了Cauchy-Dirichlet问题解的唯一性。

title: Parahoric reduction theory of formal connections (or Higgs fields)
summary: In this paper, we establish the parahoric reduction theory of formal connections (or Higgs fields) on a formal principal bundle with parahoric structures, which generalizes Babbitt-Varadarajan's result for the case without parahoric structures [5] and Boalch's result for the case of regular singularity [9]. As applications, we prove the equivalence between extrinsic definition and intrinsic definition of regular singularity and provide a criterion of relative regularity for formal connections, and also demonstrate a parahoric version of Frenkel-Zhu's Borel reduction theorem of formal connections [23].

AI.tldr: 本文建立了具有抛物结构的正式主丛上形式联络（或希格斯场）的抛物约化理论，推广了Babbitt-Varadarajan（无非抛物结构情形）和Boalch（正则奇点情形）的结果。作为应用，证明了正则奇点的外在定义与内在定义的等价性，给出了形式联络相对正则性的判据，并展示了Frenkel-Zhu形式联络Borel约化定理的抛物版本。
AI.motivation: 将已有的形式联络约化理论推广到具有抛物结构的更一般情形，统一并扩展Babbitt-Varadarajan和Boalch的结果。
AI.method: 建立抛物约化理论，通过形式联络与抛物结构的相互作用，分析约化过程。
AI.result: 证明了正则奇点的外在定义与内在定义的等价性；给出了形式联络相对正则性的判据；得到了Frenkel-Zhu Borel约化定理的抛物版本。
AI.conclusion: 抛物约化理论成功推广了经典结果，并为形式联络的正则奇点研究提供了更通用的理论框架。

title: Quartic surfaces with an outer Galois point and K3 surfaces with an automorphism of order 4
summary: We prove that there exists a one-to-one correspondence between smooth quartic surfaces with an outer Galois point and K3 surfaces with a certain automorphism of order 4. Furthermore, we characterize quartic surfaces with two or more outer Galois points as K3 surfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了光滑四次曲面与外Galois点之间存在一一对应关系，并将其与具有特定4阶自同构的K3曲面联系起来，同时刻画了具有两个或更多外Galois点的四次曲面作为K3曲面的特征。
AI.motivation: 建立光滑四次曲面上的外Galois点与特定K3曲面自同构之间的对应关系，并进一步刻画多重外Galois点的情形。
AI.method: 通过代数几何方法，建立四次曲面与外Galois点之间的对应关系，并利用K3曲面的自同构理论进行刻画。
AI.result: 得到了光滑四次曲面与外Galois点的一一对应关系，以及具有多个外Galois点的四次曲面的K3曲面刻画。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了四次曲面的外Galois点与K3曲面自同构之间的深层联系。

title: Stability of Rayleigh-Jeans equilibria in the kinetic FPU equation
summary: We study the nonlinear dynamics of the kinetic wave equation associated to the FPU problem and prove stability of the non-singular Rayleigh-Jeans equilibria. The lack of a spectral gap for the linearized problem leads to polynomial decay, which we are able to leverage to obtain nonlinear stability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了FPU问题中动力学波方程的非线性动力学，并证明了非奇异Rayleigh-Jeans平衡态的稳定性。针对线性化问题缺乏谱间隙导致多项式衰减的问题，作者利用这一特性实现了非线性稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究FPU问题中动力学波方程的非线性动力学，并证明非奇异Rayleigh-Jeans平衡态的稳定性。
AI.method: 针对线性化问题缺乏谱间隙导致多项式衰减的特性，利用该多项式衰减来推导非线性稳定性。
AI.result: 证明了非奇异Rayleigh-Jeans平衡态的非线性稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 虽然线性化问题缺乏谱间隙，但多项式衰减足够实现非线性稳定性。

title: Clearing-out of dipoles for minimisers of 2-dimensional discrete energies with topological singularities
summary: A key question in the analysis of discrete models for material defects, such as vortices in spin systems and superconductors or isolated dislocations in metals, is whether information on boundary energy for a domain can be sufficient for controlling the number of defects in the interior. We present a general combinatorial dipole-removal argument for a large class of discrete models including XY systems and screw dislocation models, allowing to prove sharp conditions under which controlled flux and boundary energy guarantee to have minimizers with zero or one charges in the interior. The argument uses the max-flow min-cut theorem in combination with an ad-hoc duality for planar graphs, and is robust with respect to changes of the function defining the interaction energies.

AI.tldr: 本文针对离散材料缺陷模型（如XY自旋系统中的涡旋、金属中孤立位错），提出了一种通用的组合偶极子移除论证方法。该方法结合最大流最小割定理与平面图对偶性，证明了在边界能量和通量可控的条件下，可确保内部极小值点具有零个或一个电荷。该论证对相互作用能函数的改变具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 研究离散模型中材料缺陷（如涡旋、位错）的内部分布与边界能量之间的关系，核心问题是判断边界能量信息是否足以控制内部缺陷数量。
AI.method: 提出一种通用的组合偶极子移除论证方法：利用最大流最小割定理结合平面图的ad-hoc对偶性，对一大类离散模型（包括XY系统、螺旋位错模型）进行分析，证明在通量和边界能量受控条件下，极小值点内部电荷数为零或一。
AI.result: 给出了确保极小值点内部具有零个或一个电荷的严格条件，且该条件对相互作用能函数的变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 边界能量的信息足以在特定条件下控制内部缺陷数量，所提出的组合论证方法具有通用性和鲁棒性，适用于多种离散缺陷模型。

title: Projectivity of good moduli spaces of vector bundles on stacky curves
summary: Moduli of vector bundles on stacky curves behave similarly to moduli of vector bundles on curves, except there are additional numerical invariants giving many different notions of stability. We apply the existence criterion for good moduli spaces of stacks to show that the moduli stack of semistable vector bundles on a stacky curve has a proper good moduli space. We moduli-theoretically prove that a natural determinantal line bundle on this moduli space is ample, thus proving this moduli space is projective. Our methods give effective bounds for when a power of this line bundle is basepoint-free. As a special case, we obtain new and effective constructions of moduli spaces of parabolic bundles.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了栈曲线上向量丛的模空间，证明了半稳定向量丛的模栈存在良好的、真射影的模空间，并证明了行列式线丛的丰沛性，给出了有效界限，特别地得到了抛物丛模空间的新有效构造。
AI.motivation: 栈曲线上的向量丛模空间与经典曲线情形类似，但存在额外的数值不变量导致多种稳定性概念。需要建立一般性的存在性和射影性结果，并推广到抛物丛等特例。
AI.method: 利用栈的良好模空间存在性准则，证明半稳定向量丛模栈具有真良好模空间；通过模理论方法证明自然行列式线丛的丰沛性，并给出该线丛幂次无基点的有效界。
AI.result: 证明了栈曲线上半稳定向量丛的模栈存在真良好模空间；证明了行列式线丛是丰沛的（即模空间是射影的）；给出了线丛幂次无基点的有效界；作为特例得到了抛物丛模空间的新有效构造。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将经典曲线向量丛模空间理论推广到栈曲线情形，处理了多种稳定性带来的复杂性，并为抛物丛模空间提供了有效的构造方法。

title: Fast Gibbs sampling for the local and global trend Bayesian exponential smoothing model
summary: In Smyl et al. [Local and global trend Bayesian exponential smoothing models. International Journal of Forecasting, 2024.], a generalised exponential smoothing model was proposed that is able to capture strong trends and volatility in time series. This method achieved state-of-the-art performance in many forecasting tasks, but its fitting procedure, which is based on the NUTS sampler, is very computationally expensive. In this work, we propose several modifications to the original model, as well as a bespoke Gibbs sampler for posterior exploration; these changes improve sampling time by an order of magnitude, thus rendering the model much more practically relevant. The new model, and sampler, are evaluated on the M3 dataset and are shown to be competitive, or superior, in terms of accuracy to the original method, while being substantially faster to run.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Smyl等人提出的广义指数平滑模型计算成本高的问题，提出了多项改进并设计了定制的Gibbs采样器，使采样速度提升一个数量级，同时在M3数据集上保持或提升了预测精度。
AI.motivation: 原始模型虽然性能优异，但其基于NUTS采样器的拟合过程计算成本极高，限制了实际应用价值。因此，本文旨在降低计算成本，提升模型实用性。
AI.method: 对原始模型提出多项修改，并设计了定制的Gibbs采样器替代原有的NUTS采样器，用于后验分布探索。
AI.result: 在M3数据集上的评估表明，新模型和采样器在精度上与原始方法相当或更优，同时运行速度大幅提升（提升一个数量级）。
AI.conclusion: 通过模型改进和定制采样器设计，成功在保持预测精度的前提下显著降低了计算成本，使模型更具实际应用价值。

title: AutoM3L: An Automated Multimodal Machine Learning Framework with Large Language Models
summary: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) offers a promising approach to streamline the training of machine learning models. However, existing AutoML frameworks are often limited to unimodal scenarios and require extensive manual configuration. Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have showcased their exceptional abilities in reasoning, interaction, and code generation, presenting an opportunity to develop a more automated and user-friendly framework. To this end, we introduce AutoM3L, an innovative Automated Multimodal Machine Learning framework that leverages LLMs as controllers to automatically construct multimodal training pipelines. AutoM3L comprehends data modalities and selects appropriate models based on user requirements, providing automation and interactivity. By eliminating the need for manual feature engineering and hyperparameter optimization, our framework simplifies user engagement and enables customization through directives, addressing the limitations of previous rule-based AutoML approaches. We evaluate the performance of AutoM3L on six diverse multimodal datasets spanning classification, regression, and retrieval tasks, as well as a comprehensive set of unimodal datasets. The results demonstrate that AutoM3L achieves competitive or superior performance compared to traditional rule-based AutoML methods. Furthermore, a user study highlights the user-friendliness and usability of our framework, compared to the rule-based AutoML methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoM3L，一个基于大语言模型(LLM)作为控制器的新型自动化多模态机器学习框架，能够自动构建多模态训练流程，在分类、回归和检索等多种任务上取得与规则型AutoML方法相当或更优的性能，并通过用户研究证明了其易用性。
AI.motivation: 现有AutoML框架局限于单模态场景，且需要大量手动配置。LLM在推理、交互和代码生成方面的卓越能力为开发更自动化和用户友好的框架提供了契机。
AI.method: 提出AutoM3L框架，利用LLM作为控制器，自动理解数据模态并基于用户需求选择合适的模型，构建多模态训练流水线，无需手动特征工程和超参数优化。
AI.result: 在6个多模态数据集（涵盖分类、回归和检索任务）及多个单模态数据集上，AutoM3L取得了与规则型AutoML方法相当或更优的性能。用户研究显示其相比规则型AutoML方法更具用户友好性和可用性。
AI.conclusion: AutoM3L通过LLM驱动实现了自动化交互式的多模态机器学习，克服了传统AutoML的局限性，在性能和用户体验上均表现出优势。

title: A hybrid FEM-PINN method for time-dependent partial differential equations
summary: In this work, we present a hybrid numerical method for solving evolution partial differential equations (PDEs) by merging the time finite element method with deep neural networks. In contrast to the conventional deep learning-based formulation where the neural network is defined on a spatiotemporal domain, our methodology utilizes finite element basis functions in the time direction where the space-dependent coefficients are defined as the output of a neural network. We then apply the Galerkin or collocation projection in the time direction to obtain a system of PDEs for the space-dependent coefficients which is approximated in the framework of PINN. The advantages of such a hybrid formulation are twofold: statistical errors are avoided for the integral in the time direction, and the neural network's output can be regarded as a set of reduced spatial basis functions. To further alleviate the difficulties from high dimensionality and low regularity, we have developed an adaptive sampling strategy that refines the training set. More specifically, we use an explicit density model to approximate the distribution induced by the PDE residual and then augment the training set with new time-dependent random samples given by the learned density model. The effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method have been demonstrated through a series of numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合数值方法，将时间有限元法与深度神经网络相结合求解发展型偏微分方程：在时间方向使用有限元基函数，空间依赖系数由神经网络输出定义，通过Galerkin或配点投影得到空间系数方程组并在PINN框架下求解，同时采用自适应采样策略优化训练集。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在时空域上定义神经网络存在统计误差和高维低正则性带来的困难，本文旨在通过混合格式解决这些问题。
AI.method: 1) 在时间方向使用有限元基函数，空间依赖系数由神经网络输出定义；2) 在时间方向应用Galerkin或配点投影，得到空间系数的PDE系统；3) 在PINN框架下近似求解该PDE系统；4) 采用基于显式密度模型的自适应采样策略，通过近似PDE残差诱导的分布来增广训练集。
AI.result: 系列数值实验验证了所提方法的有效性和高效性，避免了时间方向积分的统计误差，神经网络的输出可作为约化空间基函数。
AI.conclusion: 混合格式结合了时间有限元法和深度学习的优势，自适应采样策略有效缓解了高维和低正则性问题，为发展型PDE求解提供了新范式。

title: An asymptotic-preserving semi-Lagrangian algorithm for the anisotropic heat transport equation with arbitrary magnetic fields
summary: We extend the recently proposed semi-Lagrangian algorithm for the extremely anisotropic heat transport equation [Chacón et al., J. Comput. Phys., 272 (2014)] to deal with arbitrary magnetic field topologies. The original scheme (which showed remarkable numerical properties) was valid for the so-called tokamak-ordering regime, in which the magnetic field magnitude was not allowed to vary much along field lines. The proposed extension maintains the attractive features of the original scheme (including the analytical Green's function, which is critical for tractability) with minor modifications, while allowing for completely general magnetic fields. The accuracy and generality of the approach are demonstrated by numerical experiment with an analytical manufactured solution.

AI.tldr: 将半拉格朗日算法从托卡马克有序 regime 扩展到任意磁场拓扑，保持其优良数值特性并通过数值实验验证。
AI.motivation: 原始半拉格朗日算法仅适用于托卡马克有序 regime（磁场强度沿磁力线变化不大），无法处理任意磁场拓扑，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 对原有半拉格朗日格式进行扩展，保留解析格林函数等关键元素，仅作微小修改，使其适用于完全一般的磁场构型。
AI.result: 扩展后的算法能处理任意磁场拓扑，同时保持原方案的优良数值特性；通过制造解析解的数值实验验证了其准确性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: 成功将半拉格朗日各向异性热输运算法推广到一般磁场拓扑，兼顾了精度与可计算性，拓展了该方法在聚变等离子体模拟中的应用范围。

title: A posteriori error estimates for parabolic partial differential equations on stationary surfaces
summary: This paper develops and discusses a residual-based a posteriori error estimator for parabolic surface partial differential equations on closed stationary surfaces. The full discretization uses the surface finite element method in space and the backward Euler method in time. The proposed error indicator bounds the error quantities globally in space from above and below, and globally in time from above and locally from below. Based on the derived error indicator, a space-time adaptive algorithm is proposed. Numerical experiments illustrate and complement the theory.

AI.tldr: 本文针对封闭静止曲面上的抛物型曲面偏微分方程，提出并讨论了一种基于残差的后验误差估计器。空间离散采用曲面有限元法，时间离散采用后向欧拉法。该误差指示器能在空间上全局地、时间上全局（上方）和局部（下方）地界定误差量。基于该指示器，提出了时空自适应算法，并通过数值实验验证了理论。
AI.motivation: 抛物型曲面PDE在诸如曲面扩散、生物膜动力学等应用中广泛出现，但现有的误差估计理论多局限于欧几里得空间中的标准PDE，缺乏针对曲面PDE时空全离散格式的严格后验误差分析，从而难以指导高效的自适应算法设计。
AI.method: 方法上，本文采用曲面有限元法（SFEM）进行空间离散，后向欧拉法进行时间离散，推导了基于残差的后验误差估计器。该估计器在空间上全局上下界、时间上全局上界和局部下界地控制了误差。随后基于该指示器设计了时空自适应算法。
AI.result: 理论结果表明所提出的残差型误差指示器能够有效控制离散误差，具备可靠性和局部效率性。数值实验进一步验证了误差估计器的理论性质以及自适应算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为抛物型曲面PDE的时空自适应有限元求解提供了严格的后验误差理论基础，证明了所提指示器的上下界性质，并展示了自适应算法在实际计算中的可行性与优势。

title: Uniqueness Analysis of Controllability Scores and Their Application to Brain Networks
comment: Full version of Uniqueness Analysis of Controllability Scores and Their Application to Brain Networks accepted to IEEE Transactions on Control of Network Systems
summary: Assessing centrality in network systems is critical for understanding node importance and guiding decision-making processes. In dynamic networks, incorporating a controllability perspective is essential for identifying key nodes. In this paper, we study two control theoretic centrality measures -- the Volumetric Controllability Score (VCS) and Average Energy Controllability Score (AECS) -- to quantify node importance in linear time-invariant network systems. We prove the uniqueness of VCS and AECS for almost all specified terminal times, thereby enhancing their applicability beyond previously recognized cases. This ensures their interpretability, comparability, and reproducibility. Our analysis reveals substantial differences between VCS and AECS in linear systems with symmetric and skew-symmetric transition matrices. We also investigate the dependence of VCS and AECS on the terminal time and prove that when this parameter is extremely small, both scores become essentially uniform. Additionally, we prove that a sequence generated by a projected gradient method for computing VCS and AECS converges linearly to both measures under several assumptions. Finally, evaluations on brain networks modeled via Laplacian dynamics using real data reveal contrasting evaluation tendencies and correlations for VCS and AECS, with AECS favoring brain regions associated with cognitive and motor functions, while VCS emphasizes sensory and emotional regions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两种控制理论中心性测度（VCS和AECS）在动态网络节点重要性评估中的唯一性、对比特性、参数依赖性和算法收敛性，并在真实脑网络数据上验证了它们对不同脑区（认知运动区 vs 感觉情感区）的差异化评价倾向。
AI.motivation: 动态网络中，从可控性视角识别关键节点对于理解节点重要性和指导决策至关重要，但现有中心性测度在唯一性、可比性和适用性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 证明了VCS和AECS在几乎所有指定终端时间下的唯一性；分析了在对称和反对称转移矩阵下的差异；研究了终端时间极小时测度趋于均匀的性质；证明了投影梯度法计算VCS和AECS的线性收敛性；在Laplacian动力学的脑网络真实数据上评估了两种测度。
AI.result: VCS和AECS在多数终端时间下唯一；在对称/反对称系统中表现显著不同；终端时间极小时两者趋近均匀分布；投影梯度法线性收敛；在脑网络中AECS偏向认知与运动功能区域，VCS强调感觉与情感区域。
AI.conclusion: VCS和AECS作为控制理论中心性测度具有唯一性、可比性和可复现性，在不同网络系统中表现出截然不同的评价倾向，为动态网络节点重要性分析提供了互补的视角。

title: Towards Faster Graph Partitioning via Pre-training and Inductive Inference
comment: Champion winner of IEEE HPEC 2024 Graph Challenge (https://graphchallenge.mit.edu/champions)
summary: Graph partitioning (GP) is a classic problem that divides the node set of a graph into densely-connected blocks. Following the IEEE HPEC Graph Challenge and recent advances in pre-training techniques (e.g., large-language models), we propose PR-GPT (Pre-trained & Refined Graph ParTitioning) based on a novel pre-training & refinement paradigm. We first conduct the offline pre-training of a deep graph learning (DGL) model on small synthetic graphs with various topology properties. By using the inductive inference of DGL, one can directly generalize the pre-trained model (with frozen model parameters) to large graphs and derive feasible GP results. We also use the derived partition as a good initialization of an efficient GP method (e.g., InfoMap) to further refine the quality of partitioning. In this setting, the online generalization and refinement of PR-GPT can not only benefit from the transfer ability regarding quality but also ensure high inference efficiency without re-training. Based on a mechanism of reducing the scale of a graph to be processed by the refinement method, PR-GPT also has the potential to support streaming GP. Experiments on the Graph Challenge benchmark demonstrate that PR-GPT can ensure faster GP on large-scale graphs without significant quality degradation, compared with running a refinement method from scratch. We will make our code public at https://github.com/KuroginQin/PRGPT.

AI.tldr: PR-GPT 提出了一种基于预训练与精炼范式的图分割方法，先在小规模合成图上离线预训练深度图学习模型，再通过归纳推理直接泛化到大规模图，并利用高效图分割方法（如 InfoMap）进一步精炼分割质量，在保持高质量的同时显著提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 经典图分割问题在大规模图上计算成本高昂，现有的预训练技术（如大语言模型）的成功启发了将预训练与精炼范式引入图分割领域，旨在实现高效且高质量的图分割，同时支持流式图分割场景。
AI.method: 1) 离线阶段：在具有多样拓扑性质的小规模合成图上预训练深度图学习模型；2) 在线阶段：利用DGL的归纳推理能力，将冻结参数的预训练模型直接泛化到大规模图，得到初始分割结果；3) 精炼阶段：以初始分割作为高效图分割方法（如InfoMap）的良好初始化，进一步优化分割质量；4) 通过降低精炼方法所需处理的图规模，支持流式图分割。
AI.result: 在Graph Challenge基准上，PR-GPT相比从头运行精炼方法，能够在大规模图上实现更快的图分割速度，且无显著的质量下降。
AI.conclusion: PR-GPT提出的预训练与精炼范式能够有效结合深度图学习的迁移能力与高效分割方法的优化能力，在保证分割质量的同时大幅提升推理效率，并具备支持流式图分割的潜力。

title: NewVEM: A Newton Vertex Exchange Method for a Class of Constrained Self-Concordant Minimization Problems
summary: We propose \textbf{NewVEM}, a Newton vertex exchange method for efficiently solving self-concordant minimization problems under generalized simplex constraints. The algorithm features a two-level structure: the outer loop employs a projected Newton method, and the inner loop uses a vertex exchange approach to solve strongly convex quadratic subproblems. Both loops converge locally at linear rates under technical conditions, resulting in a ``fast $\times$ fast'' framework that demonstrates high efficiency and scalability in practice. To get a feasible initial point to execute the algorithm, we also present and analyze a highly efficient semismooth Newton method for computing the projection onto the generalized simplex. The excellent practical performance of the proposed algorithms is demonstrated by a set of numerical experiments. Our results further motivate the potential real-world applications of the considered model and the proposed algorithms.

AI.tldr: NewVEM是一种用于高效求解广义单纯形约束下自和谐最小化问题的牛顿顶点交换方法，采用"快速×快速"的双层线性收敛框架，并配有高效的半光滑牛顿投影方法。
AI.motivation: 解决广义单纯形约束下自和谐最小化问题的高效求解需求，现有方法在可扩展性和收敛速度方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出NewVEM算法，外层采用投影牛顿法，内层采用顶点交换法求解强凸二次子问题；同时提出半光滑牛顿法计算到广义单纯形的投影以获取可行初始点。
AI.result: 双层结构在技术条件下均以线性速率局部收敛，数值实验证明了算法的高效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: NewVEM提供了一种高效、可扩展的框架，适用于广义单纯形约束下的自和谐最小化问题，具有实际应用潜力。

title: Fair Clustering with Minimum Representation Constraints
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2302.03151
summary: Clustering is a well-studied unsupervised learning task that aims to partition data points into a number of clusters. In many applications, these clusters correspond to real-world constructs (e.g., electoral districts, playlists, TV channels), where a group (e.g., social or demographic) benefits only if it reaches a minimum level of representation in the cluster (e.g., 50% to elect their preferred candidate). In this paper, we study the k-means and k-medians clustering problems under the additional fairness constraint that each group must attain a minimum level of representation in at least a specified number of clusters. We formulate this problem as a mixed-integer (nonlinear) optimization problem and propose an alternating minimization algorithm, called MiniReL, to solve it. Although incorporating fairness constraints results in an NP-hard assignment problem within the MiniReL algorithm, we present several heuristic strategies that make the approach practical even for large datasets. Numerical results demonstrate that our method yields fair clusters without increasing clustering cost across standard benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在k-means和k-medians聚类问题中引入群体最低代表比例约束的公平性聚类方法，提出MiniReL交替最小化算法，并通过启发式策略解决NP难的子问题，实验表明该方法在不增加聚类成本的前提下实现公平聚类。
AI.motivation: 在许多实际应用中，聚类结果对应的现实构造（如选举区、播放列表、电视频道）需要确保社会或人口群体在至少指定数量的簇中达到最低代表比例（如50%），而传统聚类算法忽视此类公平性约束。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为混合整数（非线性）优化问题，提出名为MiniReL的交替最小化算法；针对算法中因引入公平约束导致的NP难的分配子问题，设计多种启发式策略以保证大规模数据集上的可行性。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上的数值结果表明，所提方法能在不增加聚类成本的前提下生成满足公平性约束的聚类结果。
AI.conclusion: MiniReL算法能够有效解决带最低代表比例公平约束的k-means和k-medians聚类问题，实现公平性与聚类效率的兼顾。

title: Robust pore-resolved CFD through porous monoliths reconstructed by micro-computed tomography: From digitization to flow prediction
comment: Published in Chemical Engineering Journal (2025). This arXiv version: 33 pages, 22 figures
summary: Porous media are ubiquitous in energy storage and conversion, catalysis, biomechanics, hydrogeology, as well as many other fields. These materials possess high surface-to-volume ratios and their complex channels can restrict and guide the flow. However, optimizing design parameters for specific applications remains challenging due to the intricate structure of porous media. Pore-resolved CFD reveals the effects of their structure on flow characteristics, but is limited by the performance of mesh generation algorithms for such complex geometries. To alleviate this issue, we use a sharp immersed boundary method which enables usage of Cartesian, non-conformal grids, within a massively parallel finite element framework. This method preserves the order convergence of the scheme and allows for adaptive mesh refinement (AMR). We introduce a radial basis function-based representation of solids that allows to solve the flow through complex geometries with precision. We verify the method using the method of manufactured solutions. We validate it using pressure drop measurements through porous silicone monoliths digitized by X-ray computed microtomography, for pore Reynolds numbers up to 30. Simulations are conducted using grids of 200M cells distributed over 8k cores, which would require 16 times more cells without AMR. Results reveal that pore network structure is the principal factor describing pressure evolution and that preferential channels are dominant at this scale. In this work, we demonstrate a robust and efficient workflow for pore-resolved simulations of porous monoliths. This work bridges the gap between sub-millimetric flow and macroscopic properties, which will open the door to design and optimize processes through the usage of physics-based digital twins of complex porous media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于尖锐浸入边界法（sharp immersed boundary method）和径向基函数（RBF）表示的有限元框架，用于在多孔介质中进行孔隙解析CFD模拟。该方法允许使用非共形笛卡尔网格和自适应网格细化（AMR），在200M网格单元、8k核的规模下验证了有效性，并揭示了孔隙网络结构是压力演化的主要因素。
AI.motivation: 多孔介质的复杂结构使得针对特定应用优化设计参数充满挑战。虽然孔隙解析CFD可以揭示结构对流场的影响，但网格生成算法的性能限制了其在复杂几何中的应用。因此需要一种更高效的网格处理方法来桥接亚毫米流动与宏观性质。
AI.method: 采用尖锐浸入边界法（sharp immersed boundary method）在笛卡尔非共形网格上求解流动问题，结合径向基函数（RBF）表示固体几何，并集成自适应网格细化（AMR）技术，在并行有限元框架中实现高性能计算。
AI.result: 通过制造解方法（MMS）验证了方法的收敛性；利用X射线显微CT数字化硅胶整体柱的压降测量数据，在孔隙雷诺数高达30的条件下完成验证；使用200M网格单元分布在8k核上进行仿真，相比无AMR情况节省了16倍的计算资源；结果表明孔隙网络结构是压力演化的主要因素，且在该尺度下优先通道占主导。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了一种稳健高效的孔隙解析多孔整体柱仿真工作流，弥合了亚毫米流动与宏观性质之间的鸿沟，为基于物理的数字孪生设计和优化复杂多孔介质过程奠定了基础。

title: Single-snapshot machine learning for super-resolution of turbulence
comment: To appear in Journal of Fluid Mechanics
summary: Modern machine-learning techniques are generally considered data-hungry. However, this may not be the case for turbulence as each of its snapshots can hold more information than a single data file in general machine-learning settings. This study asks the question of whether nonlinear machine-learning techniques can effectively extract physical insights even from as little as a {\it single} snapshot of turbulent flow. As an example, we consider machine-learning-based super-resolution analysis that reconstructs a high-resolution field from low-resolution data for two examples of two-dimensional isotropic turbulence and three-dimensional turbulent channel flow. First, we reveal that a carefully designed machine-learning model trained with flow tiles sampled from only a single snapshot can reconstruct vortical structures across a range of Reynolds numbers for two-dimensional decaying turbulence. Successful flow reconstruction indicates that nonlinear machine-learning techniques can leverage scale-invariance properties to learn turbulent flows. We also show that training data of turbulent flows can be cleverly collected from a single snapshot by considering characteristics of rotation and shear tensors. Second, we perform the single-snapshot super-resolution analysis for turbulent channel flow, showing that it is possible to extract physical insights from a single flow snapshot even with inhomogeneity. The present findings suggest that embedding prior knowledge in designing a model and collecting data is important for a range of data-driven analyses for turbulent flows. More broadly, this work hopes to stop machine-learning practitioners from being wasteful with turbulent flow data.

AI.tldr: 本文研究发现，通过精心设计的机器学习模型和巧妙的训练数据采样策略，仅用单张湍流快照即可实现超分辨率重建，并有效提取物理信息，从而挑战了机器学习通常需要大量数据的传统认知。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为机器学习技术需要大量数据，但湍流数据本身信息密度极高（单张快照包含的信息量可能超过一般机器学习中的单个数据文件）。作者探究是否可以从极少的湍流数据（仅单张快照）中提取物理洞察，以避免数据浪费。
AI.method: 采用基于机器学习的超分辨率分析，从低分辨率数据重建高分辨率流场。训练数据从单张湍流快照中采样流图块（flow tiles），并利用旋转张量与剪切张量的特性进行巧妙的数据收集策略。在二维各向同性湍流和三维湍流通道流两个案例上验证。
AI.result: 1）对于二维衰减湍流，用单张快照采样的图块训练的模型能够跨越多个雷诺数成功重建涡旋结构；2）对于三维湍流通道流（含非均匀性），单张快照超分辨率分析同样可行；3）成功重建表明非线性机器学习可以借助尺度不变性学习湍流。
AI.conclusion: 在模型设计和数据收集过程中嵌入物理先验知识至关重要。该工作希望提醒机器学习从业者不要浪费湍流数据，即使用少量数据也能获得有意义的物理洞察。

title: Dynamic Mode Decomposition Accelerated Forecast and Optimization of Geological CO2 Storage in Deep Saline Aquifers
summary: Data-driven and non-intrusive DMDc and DMDspc models successfully expedite the reconstruction and forecasting of CO2 fluid flow with acceptable accuracy margins, aiding in the rapid optimization of geological CO2 storage forecast and optimization. DMDc and DMDspc models were trained with weekly, monthly, and yearly simulation pressure and CO2 saturation fields using a commercial simulator. The domain of interest is a large-scale, offshore, highly heterogeneous reservoir model with over 100,000 cells. DMD snapshot reconstruction significantly reduced simulation times from several hours to mere minutes. DMDspc reduced the number of DMD modes for pressure without losing accuracy while sometimes even improving accuracy. Two operation cases were considered: 1. CO2 injection, 2. CO2 injection and water production for pressure maintenance. For pressure, DMDspc achieved a slightly higher than DMDc average error by removing several modes. On the other hand, DMDspc showed limited success in reducing modes for CO2 saturation. The forecast performance of DMD models was evaluated using percent change error, mean absolute error and Pearsons R correlation coefficient metrics. Almost all DMD pressure models managed to successfully forecast pressure fields, while a smaller number of DMD models managed to forecast CO2 saturation. While forecast errors have a considerable range, only DMD models with errors below 5% PCE for pressure or 0.01 MAE for saturation were considered acceptable for geological CO2 storage optimization. Optimized CO2 injection and water production amounts were consistent across selected DMD models and all time scales. The DMDspc-monitored cells approach, which only reconstructs the monitored-during-optimization cells, reduced even further optimization time while providing consistent results with the optimization that used full snapshot reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了基于DMDc和DMDspc的数据驱动非侵入式模型，用于加速大规模、高异构性地层中CO₂地质封存的流体流动重建与预测。实验表明，DMD将仿真时间从数小时缩短至数分钟，DMDspc在不损失精度（甚至略有提升）的前提下减少了压力模态数；对CO₂饱和度的模态压缩效果有限。仅在误差低于阈值（压力PCE<5%，饱和度MAE<0.01）的模型被认为可用于优化，且优化结果在不同时间尺度下保持一致性。进一步提出的DMDspc监测单元方法仅重构优化中关注的单元，进一步缩短优化时间。
AI.motivation: 传统CO₂地质封存数值模拟计算成本高，难以满足快速优化需求，亟需数据驱动、非侵入式的降阶模型以加速大规模、高异构性地层中CO₂流体流动的重建与预测。
AI.method: 采用DMDc（动态模态分解带控制）和DMDspc（稀疏性促进DMDc）两种方法，基于商业模拟器生成的周、月、年尺度压力与CO₂饱和度快照训练模型；在超过10万网格单元的大规模海上高异构性油藏上进行验证；考虑两种操作场景（纯注CO₂、注CO₂+产水保持压力）；评估重建与预测精度（PCE、MAE、Pearson R），并筛选出低误差模型用于优化；进一步提出DMDspc监测单元方法，仅重构优化关注的单元以进一步加速。
AI.result: DMD将仿真时间从数小时降至数分钟；DMDspc有效减少压力模态数且精度略有提升，但对CO₂饱和模态压缩效果有限；仅压力PCE<5%或饱和度MAE<0.01的模型被认为可用于优化；优化得到的注CO₂和产水量在不同DMD模型及时间尺度下一致性良好；DMDspc监测单元方法进一步缩短优化时间且结果一致。
AI.conclusion: DMDc和DMDspc可高效、精确地重建和预测大规模CO₂地质封存中的流体流动，显著加速优化流程；DMDspc对压力场模态压缩有效但对饱和度场效果有限；DMDspc监测单元方法进一步提升了优化效率。

title: Classifying acoustic cavitation with machine learning trained on multiple physical models
summary: Acoustic cavitation threshold charts are used to map between acoustic parameters (mainly intensity and frequency) and different regimes of acoustic cavitation. The two main regimes are transient cavitation, where a bubble collapses, and stable cavitation, where a bubble undergoes periodic oscillations without collapse. The cavitation charts strongly depend on the physical model used to compute the bubble dynamics and the algorithm for classifying the cavitation threshold. The differences between modeling approaches become especially noticeable for resonant bubbles and when sonication parameters result in large-amplitude oscillations. This paper proposes a machine learning approach that integrates three physical models, i.e., the Rayleigh-Plesset, Keller-Miksis and Gilmore equations, and multiple cavitation classification techniques. Specifically, we classify the cavitation regimes based on the maximum radius, the acoustic Mach number, the kurtosis factor of acoustic emissions, and the Flynn criterion on the inertial and pressure functions. Four machine learning strategies were developed to predict the likelihood of the transient and stable cavitation, using equally weighted contributions from classification techniques. By solving the differential equations for bubble dynamics across a range of sonication and material parameters and applying cross-validation on held-out test data, our framework demonstrates high predictive accuracy for cavitation regimes. This physics-informed machine learning approach offers probabilistic insights into cavitation likelihood, combining diverse physical models and classification strategies, each contributing different levels of physical rigor and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的机器学习方法，融合瑞利-普莱塞特、凯勒-米克西斯和吉尔摩三种物理模型以及多种空化分类技术，用于预测声空化阈值和 regimes（瞬态/稳定空化），在保持高预测精度的同时提供概率性洞察。
AI.motivation: 声空化阈值图强烈依赖于所采用的物理模型和分类算法，不同建模方法之间的差异在共振气泡和大振幅振荡条件下尤为明显，现有方法缺乏统一且鲁棒的预测框架。
AI.method: 融合三种物理模型（Rayleigh-Plesset、Keller-Miksis、Gilmore方程）和多种分类技术（最大半径、声学马赫数、声发射峰度因子、Flynn惯性压力函数准则），采用四种等权重贡献的机器学习策略，通过求解气泡动力学微分方程并交叉验证来预测瞬态和稳定空化的概率。
AI.result: 在多种声参数和材料参数下，对保留测试数据交叉验证后，该框架展现出对空化 regimes 的高预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该物理信息机器学习方法能够提供空化可能性的概率性见解，融合了不同物理严谨性和可解释性的模型与分类策略，实现了高精度预测。

title: Evidence for simple "arrow of time functions" in closed chaotic quantum systems
summary: Through an explicit construction, we assign to any infinite temperature autocorrelation function $C(t)$ a set of functions $α^n(t)$. The construction of $α^n(t)$ from $C(t)$ requires the first $2n$ temporal derivatives of $C(t)$ at times $0$ and $t$. Our focus is on $α^n(t)$ that (almost) monotonously decrease, we call these ``arrows of time functions" (AOTFs). For autocorrelation functions of few body observables we numerically observe the following: An AOTF featuring a low $n$ may always be found unless the the system is in or close to a nonchaotic regime with respect to a variation of some system parameter. All $α^n(t)$ put upper bounds to the respective autocorrelation functions, i.e. $α^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$. Thus the implication of the existence of an AOTF is comparable to that of the H-Theorem, as it indicates a directed approach to equilibrium. We furthermore argue that our numerical finding may to some extent be traced back to the operator growth hypothesis. This argument is laid out in the framework of the so-called recursion method.

AI.tldr: 本文通过显式构造，为任意无限温度自关联函数$C(t)$分配一组函数$\alpha^n(t)$，这些函数在低$n$时几乎单调递减（称为“时间之箭函数”AOTF），且满足$\alpha^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$。数值实验表明，除非系统处于或接近非混沌区域，否则总能找到低$n$的AOTF。该发现与算子增长假说相关，可在递归方法框架下理解，其意义类似于H定理，指示了系统趋向平衡的方向性。
AI.motivation: 为量子混沌系统定义一种可计算的“时间之箭”度量，通过自关联函数的构造来捕捉不可逆性和趋近平衡的方向性，并建立与算子增长假说的联系。
AI.method: 利用自关联函数$C(t)$在时间$0$和$t$处的前$2n$阶时间导数，显式构造函数$\alpha^n(t)$。通过数值实验在多种量子系统中检验$\alpha^n(t)$的单调递减性质及对$C^2(t)$的上界约束，并在递归方法框架下将结果追溯至算子增长假说。
AI.result: 低$n$的AOTF在混沌系统中普遍存在，仅在系统参数接近非混沌区域时缺失；所有$\alpha^n(t)$均满足$\alpha^n(t) \geq C^2(t)$，提供了自关联函数的上界约束；数值发现可在算子增长假说下得到部分解释。
AI.conclusion: AOTF的存在性可作为量子混沌系统趋向平衡的判据，类似于经典统计力学的H定理，为理解量子系统中的时间之箭方向性提供了新的构造性工具。

title: Lectures on Statistical Mechanics
summary: Presented here is a transcription of the lecture notes from Professor Allan N. Kaufman's graduate statistical mechanics course at Berkeley from the 1972-1973 academic year. Part 1 addresses equilibrium statistical mechanics with topics: fundamentals, classical fluids and other systems, chemical equilibrium, and long-range interactions. Part 2 addresses non-equilibrium statistical mechanics with topics: fundamentals, Brownian motion, Liouville and Klimontovich equations, Landau equation, Markov processes and Fokker-Planck equation, linear response and transport theory, and an introduction to non-equilibrium quantum statistical mechanics.

AI.tldr: 本文转录了Allan N. Kaufman教授1972-1973学年在伯克利的研究生统计力学课程讲义，涵盖平衡态统计力学（经典流体、化学平衡、长程相互作用）和非平衡统计力学（布朗运动、Liouville/Klimontovich方程、Landau方程、Fokker-Planck方程、线性响应与输运理论、非平衡量子统计力学导论）。
AI.motivation: 保存和传播Kaufman教授在伯克利教授的研究生统计力学课程的完整讲义内容，为统计力学领域的学生和研究者提供系统性的教学参考资料。
AI.method: 该讲义采用分部分、分主题的系统性教学结构，第一部分涵盖平衡态统计力学的四个核心主题，第二部分涵盖非平衡态统计力学的七个核心主题，以课堂讲稿形式呈现。
AI.result: 形成了一份覆盖经典与非平衡统计力学主要理论框架的完整研究生课程讲义转录文档。
AI.conclusion: 该讲义系统性地记录了20世纪70年代初研究生层次统计力学教学的核心内容，兼具历史文献价值与教学参考价值，对理解统计力学理论体系的发展具有意义。

title: Divide-and-Conquer Predictive Coding: a structured Bayesian inference algorithm
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, accepted to Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2024
summary: Unexpected stimuli induce "error" or "surprise" signals in the brain. The theory of predictive coding promises to explain these observations in terms of Bayesian inference by suggesting that the cortex implements variational inference in a probabilistic graphical model. However, when applied to machine learning tasks, this family of algorithms has yet to perform on par with other variational approaches in high-dimensional, structured inference problems. To address this, we introduce a novel predictive coding algorithm for structured generative models, that we call divide-and-conquer predictive coding (DCPC). DCPC differs from other formulations of predictive coding, as it respects the correlation structure of the generative model and provably performs maximum-likelihood updates of model parameters, all without sacrificing biological plausibility. Empirically, DCPC achieves better numerical performance than competing algorithms and provides accurate inference in a number of problems not previously addressed with predictive coding. We provide an open implementation of DCPC in Pyro on Github.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为分治预测编码（DCPC）的新算法，用于结构化生成模型。该算法尊重生成模型的相关结构，可证明执行模型参数的最大似然更新，同时保持生物合理性，并在多个推理问题上优于现有算法。
AI.motivation: 预测编码理论虽然能解释大脑中的"错误"或"惊喜"信号，但将其应用于机器学习任务时，在高维结构化推理问题上的表现不如其他变分方法。因此，需要一种既能保持生物合理性又能提升性能的预测编码算法。
AI.method: 提出分治预测编码（DCPC）算法，该算法区别于其他预测编码公式，尊重生成模型的相关结构，可证明执行模型参数的最大似然更新，同时保持生物合理性。
AI.result: DCPC在数值性能上优于竞争算法，并在多个此前预测编码未涉及的问题上提供了准确的推理。
AI.conclusion: DCPC弥合了预测编码理论与实际机器学习应用之间的差距，为结构化生成模型提供了一种兼具生物合理性与高性能的推理算法。

title: Towards Understanding Epoch-wise Double descent in Two-layer Linear Neural Networks
summary: Epoch-wise double descent is the phenomenon where generalisation performance improves beyond the point of overfitting, resulting in a generalisation curve exhibiting two descents under the course of learning. Understanding the mechanisms driving this behaviour is crucial not only for understanding the generalisation behaviour of machine learning models in general, but also for employing conventional selection methods, such as the use of early stopping to mitigate overfitting. While we ultimately want to draw conclusions of more complex models, such as deep neural networks, a majority of theoretical results regarding the underlying cause of epoch-wise double descent are based on simple models, such as standard linear regression. In this paper, to take a step towards more complex models in theoretical analysis, we study epoch-wise double descent in two-layer linear neural networks. First, we derive a gradient flow for the linear two-layer model, that bridges the learning dynamics of the standard linear regression model, and the linear two-layer diagonal network with quadratic weights. Second, we identify additional factors of epoch-wise double descent emerging with the extra model layer, by deriving necessary conditions for the generalisation error to follow a double descent pattern. While epoch-wise double descent in linear regression has been attributed to differences in input variance, in the two-layer model, also the singular values of the input-output covariance matrix play an important role. This opens up for further questions regarding unidentified factors of epoch-wise double descent for truly deep models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两层线性神经网络中的逐轮双下降现象，推导了连接标准线性回归与对角网络的梯度流，发现除了输入方差外，输入-输出协方差矩阵的奇异值也是影响双下降的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 理解逐轮双下降的驱动机制对于掌握机器学习模型的泛化行为及使用提前停止等方法至关重要，但现有理论结果大多基于简单线性回归模型，缺乏对更复杂模型的理论分析。
AI.method: 首先推导了两层线性神经网络的梯度流，桥接了标准线性回归模型与线性两层对角网络（含二次权重）的学习动力学；随后通过推导泛化误差遵循双下降模式的必要条件，识别了额外网络层带来的新因素。
AI.result: 两层线性模型中，逐轮双下降不仅受输入方差影响（如线性回归），还受输入-输出协方差矩阵的奇异值影响，揭示了深层模型可能存在的未被识别的双下降因素。
AI.conclusion: 该工作向更复杂模型的理论分析迈进一步，为进一步研究深度模型中逐轮双下降的未识别因素开辟了新方向。

title: LLMs Will Always Hallucinate, and We Need to Live With This
summary: As Large Language Models become more ubiquitous across domains, it becomes important to examine their inherent limitations critically. This work argues that hallucinations in language models are not just occasional errors but an inevitable feature of these systems. We demonstrate that hallucinations stem from the fundamental mathematical and logical structure of LLMs. It is, therefore, impossible to eliminate them through architectural improvements, dataset enhancements, or fact-checking mechanisms. Our analysis draws on computational theory and Godel's First Incompleteness Theorem, which references the undecidability of problems like the Halting, Emptiness, and Acceptance Problems. We demonstrate that every stage of the LLM process-from training data compilation to fact retrieval, intent classification, and text generation-will have a non-zero probability of producing hallucinations. This work introduces the concept of Structural Hallucination as an intrinsic nature of these systems. By establishing the mathematical certainty of hallucinations, we challenge the prevailing notion that they can be fully mitigated.

AI.tldr: 本文证明大语言模型中的幻觉并非偶然错误，而是基于计算理论和哥德尔不完备定理不可避免的结构性特征，无法通过任何技术手段完全消除。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在各领域的普及，有必要批判性地审视其固有局限性。当前业界普遍认为幻觉可以通过改进架构、数据或事实核查机制来缓解，作者试图从理论层面证明这种认知是错误的。
AI.method: 基于计算理论（停机问题、空性问题、接受问题的不可判定性）和哥德尔第一不完备定理，从数学和逻辑层面论证LLM各阶段（训练数据编译、事实检索、意图分类、文本生成）必然存在非零概率的幻觉。
AI.result: 提出"结构性幻觉"概念，证明幻觉是LLM系统的内在本质属性，而非偶然错误。每个处理阶段都存在非零概率产生幻觉，且该概率无法归零。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了"幻觉可被完全缓解"的主流观点，确立了幻觉在数学上的必然性，为LLM的理论局限性提供了形式化证明。

title: A nonlinear room mode determines the operating conditions of a large-cavity synthetic jet actuator at low frequencies
summary: Synthetic Jet (SJ) actuators are an intrinsically complex combination of electronics, electric and mechanical systems. When studied theoretically, these elements are often simplified to coupled damped harmonic oscillators (DHO) that induce a pressure field within the cavity and drive momentum exchange. Thus, the performance of an SJ actuator results from coupling these DHOs, naturally leading to a few resonant modes. There is good evidence in the specialized literature of two resonant modes developing in SJ actuators: the membrane/piezoelectric mode and the Helmholtz resonance. In this work, we report on the effect of a third resonant mode that develops at very low frequencies due to a cavity much larger than the volume displaced by the actuator. We present evidence that the large-cavity dynamics determine the SJ performance in combination with the well-described formation criteria. We compare the intensity of this resonant mode with the first room modes using standard frequency analysis. Unlike typical room modes, the distribution of this resonant mode is very biased to lower frequencies. We also show that the resonant mode may be dimmed and focused by adding an obstacle in different cavity positions for the lower sound intensities. This mode overcomes the Helmholtz resonance, dominating the dynamics for higher sound intensities. We show that jet and vortex velocities mimic the sound pressure curve for the low-frequency range. Its effect mitigates for the higher range due to a delve through smaller stroke lengths, characterized as a fixed relation between the Reynolds and the Stokes numbers. We consider that the large-cavity dynamics is an additional element that, if integrated as design criteria, could extend the optimum frequency response of SJs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了合成射流（SJ）致动器中第三种共振模式——大腔体低频共振，该模式在腔体远大于驱动器位移体积时产生，能与Helmholtz共振竞争甚至主导低频动力学，且可通过腔体内障碍物进行调控，为扩展SJ频率响应设计提供了新准则。
AI.motivation: SJ致动器本质上是电子、电气与机械系统的复杂耦合，通常简化为耦合阻尼谐振子模型。已有文献证实SJ中存在膜/压电模态和Helmholtz共振两种模式。本文旨在探究当腔体远大于驱动器体积位移时，是否会产生第三种低频共振模式，并系统分析其对SJ性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用标准频率分析方法，对比大腔体低频共振与第一房间模态的强度分布；通过在不同腔体位置放置障碍物观察该模式的可调控性；测量射流与涡旋速度并与声压曲线进行对比；利用Reynolds数和Stokes数的固定关系分析高频区域的衰减机制。
AI.result: 发现大腔体动力学在低频段决定SJ性能，且与经典形成准则共同作用；该低频共振模态的频谱分布极度偏向低频，不同于典型房间模态；通过腔体内障碍物可抑制或聚焦该模式；在较高声强下该模式可超越Helmholtz共振主导动力学；射流和涡旋速度在低频段与声压曲线高度一致，高频段因冲程长度减小而效应减弱。
AI.conclusion: 大腔体动力学是SJ设计中应纳入的额外设计要素，利用该低频共振机制可拓展SJ的最优频率响应范围。

title: On the interaction of strain and vorticity for solutions of the Navier--Stokes equation
summary: In this paper, we prove a new identity for divergence free vector fields, showing that \begin{equation*} \left<-ΔS,ω\otimesω\right>=0, \end{equation*} where $S_{ij}=\frac{1}{2}\left(\partial_iu_j+\partial_ju_i\right)$ is the symmetric part of the velocity gradient, and $ω=\nabla\times u$ is the vorticity. This identity will allow us to understand the interaction of different aspects of the nonlinearity in the Navier--Stokes equation from the strain and vorticity perspective, particularly as they relate to the depletion of the nonlinearity by advection. We will prove global regularity for the strain-vorticity interaction model equation, a model equation for studying the impact of the vorticity on the evolution of strain which has the same identity for enstrophy growth as the full Navier--Stokes equation. We will also use this identity to obtain several new regularity criteria for the Navier--Stokes equation, one of which will help to clarify the circumstances in which advection can work to deplete the nonlinearity, preventing finite-time blowup.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了一个关于散度自由向量场的新恒等式，揭示了速度梯度对称部分（应变张量）与涡量之间的正交关系，并基于此研究了Navier-Stokes方程非线性项的耗散机制，证明了应变-涡量相互作用模型方程的全局正则性，并推导出多个新的正则性准则。
AI.motivation: 理解Navier-Stokes方程中非线性项的不同方面（应变与涡量）之间的相互作用，特别是平流对非线性项的耗散机制，以及澄清何种条件下平流能够防止有限时间爆破。
AI.method: 证明了一个新的恒等式⟨-ΔS, ω⊗ω⟩=0，其中S为速度梯度的对称部分（应变张量），ω为涡量；基于该恒等式构建应变-涡量相互作用模型方程，并分析其全局正则性；利用该恒等式推导Navier-Stokes方程的新正则性准则。
AI.result: 证明了应变-涡量相互作用模型方程的全局正则性，该模型与完整Navier-Stokes方程具有相同的熵增长恒等式；推导出多个新的正则性准则，其中一个准则有助于阐明平流耗散非线性项从而防止有限时间爆破的条件。
AI.conclusion: 该恒等式为从应变和涡量角度理解Navier-Stokes方程非线性项提供了新工具，为研究平流对非线性项的耗散机制以及有限时间爆破问题提供了新的理论依据和正则性判据。

title: Extremal Contraction of Projective Bundles
summary: In this article, we explore the extremal contractions of several projective bundles over smooth Fano varieties of Picard rank $1$. We provide a whole class of examples of projective bundles with smooth blow-up structures, derived from the notion of drums which was introduced by Occhetta-Romano-Conde-Wiśniewski to study interaction with $\mathbb{C}^*$-actions and birational geometry. By manipulating projective bundles, we give a simple geometric construction of the rooftop flip, which was introduced recently by Barban-Franceschini. Additionally, we obtain analogues of some recent results of Vats in higher dimensions. The list of projective bundles we consider includes all globally generated bundles over projective space with first Chern class $2$. For each of them, we compute the nef and pseudoeffective cones.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Picard秩为1的光滑Fano簇上若干射影丛的极值收缩，基于"鼓"（drums）概念提供了一类具有光滑爆破结构的射影丛例子，并给出了屋顶翻折（rooftop flip）的简单几何构造，还推广了Vats的一些高维结果。特别地，对所有第一陈类为2的全局生成射影空间丛计算了nef和伪有效锥。
AI.motivation: 探索射影丛的极值收缩结构，理解其与C*作用和双有理几何的交互，并推广已有的翻折构造和结果到更高维度。
AI.method: 利用Occhetta-Romano-Conde-Wiśniewski引入的"鼓"（drums）概念，通过操纵射影丛结构给出几何构造，并对所有第一陈类为2的全局生成射影空间丛进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 提供了一类具有光滑爆破结构的射影丛例子；给出了屋顶翻折的简单几何构造；推广了Vats的高维结果；计算了所有第一陈类为2的全局生成射影空间丛的nef锥和伪有效锥。
AI.conclusion: 射影丛的极值收缩与鼓的概念密切关联，能够系统构造具有良好双有理几何性质的例子，并且第一陈类小的射影丛具有可完全描述的锥结构。

title: On the irregular Riemann-Hilbert correspondence
summary:
The original Riemann-Hilbert problem asks to find a Fuchsian ordinary differential equation with prescribed singularities and monodromy in the complex line. In the early 1980's Kashiwara solved a generalized version of the problem, valid on complex manifolds of any dimension. He presented it as a correspondence between regular holonomic D-modules and perverse sheaves. The analogous problem where one drops the regularity condition remained open for about thirty years. We solved it in the paper that received a 2024 Frontiers of Science Award. Our construction requires in particular an enhancement of the category of perverse sheaves. Here, using some examples in dimension one, we wish to convey the gist of the main ingredients used in our work.
  This is a written account of a talk given by the first named author at the International Congress of Basic Sciences on July 2024 in Beijing.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了非正则黎曼-希尔伯特问题的解决方案，该工作获得2024前沿科学奖。作者通过在复流形上增强反常层范畴，建立了非正则全纯D-模与增强反常层之间的对应关系，并通过一维实例阐述了核心思想。
AI.motivation: 经典的黎曼-希尔伯特问题要求寻找具有给定奇点和单值的Fuchs型常微分方程。Kashiwara在1980年代将其推广到任意维复流形上，建立了正则全纯D-模与反常层之间的对应关系。但去掉正则性条件的对应问题困扰了研究者约三十年，本文的工作解决了这一长期悬而未决的问题。
AI.method: 关键在于对反常层范畴进行增强，构造了增强反常层范畴，从而建立起与非正则全纯D-模的对应关系。文章通过一维情况的例子来展示主要构造的核心思想。
AI.result: 成功建立了非正则全纯D-模与增强反常层之间的对应关系，解决了非正则黎曼-希尔伯特问题，该成果获得2024前沿科学奖。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强反常层范畴，完成了非正则全纯D-模与增强反常层之间的对应，是Kashiwara经典结果的实质性推广。

title: On the anisotropic Calderón's problem
summary: We prove that the Riemannian metric on a compact manifold of dimension $n\geq 3$ with smooth boundary can be uniquely determined, up to an isometry fixing the boundary, by the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map associated to the Laplace-Beltrami operator.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了对于维度n≥3且带有光滑边界的紧致流形，其黎曼度量可以通过与拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子相关的Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射，在保持边界固定的等距变换意义下被唯一确定。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在解决逆问题中的一个核心理论问题：能否仅通过边界测量数据（Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射）来唯一确定流形内部的几何结构（黎曼度量）。这对于从边界观测推断内部几何性质具有重要理论意义。
AI.method: 采用数学分析方法，研究拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射与黎曼度量之间的对应关系，通过严格的数学证明论证了在n≥3维紧致流形上度量的唯一可确定性。
AI.result: 成功证明了在维度n≥3且具有光滑边界的紧致流形上，Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射能够唯一确定黎曼度量，唯一性是在保持边界固定的等距变换意义下成立。
AI.conclusion: 该结论表明，通过边界上的Dirichlet和Neumann测量数据，可以唯一恢复流形内部的黎曼几何结构（模去边界固定的等距变换），为逆问题理论提供了重要的唯一性结果。

title: Path-dependent Hamilton-Jacobi equations with u-dependence and time-measurable Hamiltonians
comment: 30 pages, to appear in Applied Mathematics and Optimization
summary: We establish existence and uniqueness of minimax solutions for a fairly general class of path-dependent Hamilton-Jacobi equations. In particular, the relevant Hamiltonians can contain the solution and they only need to be measurable with respect to time. We apply our results to optimal control problems of (delay) functional differential equations with cost functionals that have discount factors and with time-measurable data. Our main results are also crucial for our companion paper Bandini and Keller [arXiv preprint arXiv:2408.02147 (2024)], where non-local path-dependent Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equations associated to the stochastic optimal control of non-Markovian piecewise deterministic processes are studied.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类较广泛的路径依赖Hamilton-Jacobi方程，建立了极小化极大解的存在唯一性，其中Hamiltonian可包含解本身且仅需关于时间可测。结果应用于含折扣因子的时滞泛函微分方程最优控制问题，并为非马尔可夫分段确定过程随机最优控制中的非局部路径依赖HJB方程研究提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 现有路径依赖Hamilton-Jacobi方程理论通常要求Hamiltonian具有更强的正则性（如连续性或Lipschitz连续性），且难以处理解依赖型Hamiltonian及时间可测数据。本文旨在放宽这些条件，建立更一般框架下的极小化极大解理论，以支持更广泛的最优控制问题，特别是含折扣因子的时滞系统和非马尔可夫分段确定过程。
AI.method: 采用极小化极大方法（viscosity解的替代框架），通过构造上、下解对并利用比较原理建立解的存在唯一性。处理的关键在于Hamiltonian仅需时间可测性而无需连续性，同时允许Hamiltonian依赖于解本身。分析工具包括路径依赖的泛函分析和动态规划原理。
AI.result: 证明了一类广泛的路径依赖Hamilton-Jacobi方程（Hamiltonian含解且仅时间可测）极小化极大解的存在唯一性；将该理论成功应用于时滞泛函微分方程的最优控制问题（含折扣因子和时间可测数据）；该结果为其姊妹论文中非局部路径依赖HJB方程的研究提供了核心工具。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的路径依赖HJB方程极小化极大解理论显著推广了现有结果，放宽了对Hamiltonian的正则性要求，使其能覆盖更实际的最优控制问题（如时滞系统、折扣因子、非马尔可夫过程）。该工作为后续非马尔可夫分段确定过程的随机最优控制研究奠定了理论基础。

title: Pencils of plane cubics with one base point
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures. This is an expanded revised version with respect to the one accepted in Rendiconti del Circolo Matematico di Palermo Series 2
summary: We study pencils of plane cubics with only one base point and general member smooth, giving a complete classification. Under the additional hypothesis that all members are irreducible, we prove that there exists a unique non-isotrivial pencil with these properties up to projective transformation. We compare our construction with the classical approaches given by Gattazzo, Beauville and Miranda-Persson.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了只有一个基点且一般成员光滑的平面三次曲线束，给出了完整分类。在附加所有成员都不可约的假设下，证明了在射影变换下存在唯一的非平凡纤维化铅笔。并与Gattazzo、Beauville和Miranda-Persson的经典方法进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 对只有一个基点且一般成员光滑的平面三次曲线束进行完整分类，并探究在不可约性条件下非平凡铅笔的唯一性。
AI.method: 通过分类方法研究平面三次曲线束，在附加不可约性假设下证明唯一性，并与经典方法（Gattazzo、Beauville、Miranda-Persson）进行比较。
AI.result: 给出了只有一个基点且一般成员光滑的平面三次曲线束的完整分类；在全体成员不可约的条件下，证明了在射影变换下存在唯一的非平凡纤维化铅笔。
AI.conclusion: 该文完成了对特定平面三次曲线束的分类，并揭示了在强约束下的唯一性结果，同时与已有经典构造进行了对比验证。

title: Graph Neural Networks Gone Hogwild
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) appear to be powerful tools to learn state representations for agents in distributed, decentralized multi-agent systems, but generate catastrophically incorrect predictions when nodes update asynchronously during inference. This failure under asynchrony effectively excludes these architectures from many potential applications where synchrony is difficult or impossible to enforce, e.g., robotic swarms or sensor networks. In this work we identify "implicitly-defined" GNNs as a class of architectures which is provably robust to asynchronous "hogwild" inference, adapting convergence guarantees from work in asynchronous and distributed optimization. We then propose a novel implicitly-defined GNN architecture, which we call an 'energy GNN'. We show that this architecture outperforms other GNNs from this class on a variety of synthetic tasks inspired by multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文发现标准GNN在异步推理时会产生灾难性错误，识别出"隐式定义"GNN可证明对异步推理鲁棒，并提出了一种名为"能量GNN"的新架构，在多智能体系统启发的合成任务上优于同类方法。
AI.motivation: 标准GNN在分布式、去中心化多智能体系统中进行异步推理时会产生灾难性错误，这阻碍了其在机器人集群、传感器网络等难以保证同步性的应用场景中的使用。
AI.method: 识别"隐式定义"GNN这一架构类别，借鉴异步和分布式优化中的收敛保证理论，证明其对异步"hogwild"推理的鲁棒性；并提出一种名为"能量GNN"的新型隐式定义GNN架构。
AI.result: 能量GNN在多智能体系统启发的多种合成任务上，性能优于其他同类隐式定义GNN架构。
AI.conclusion: 隐式定义GNN可证明对异步推理鲁棒，其中能量GNN作为该类别的新架构表现优越，为GNN在真实异步分布式系统中的应用提供了理论保证和实用方案。

title: An effect analysis of the balancing techniques on the counterfactual explanations of student success prediction models
summary: In the past decade, we have experienced a massive boom in the usage of digital solutions in higher education. Due to this boom, large amounts of data have enabled advanced data analysis methods to support learners and examine learning processes. One of the dominant research directions in learning analytics is predictive modeling of learners' success using various machine learning methods. To build learners' and teachers' trust in such methods and systems, exploring the methods and methodologies that enable relevant stakeholders to deeply understand the underlying machine-learning models is necessary. In this context, counterfactual explanations from explainable machine learning tools are promising. Several counterfactual generation methods hold much promise, but the features must be actionable and causal to be effective. Thus, obtaining which counterfactual generation method suits the student success prediction models in terms of desiderata, stability, and robustness is essential. Although a few studies have been published in recent years on the use of counterfactual explanations in educational sciences, they have yet to discuss which counterfactual generation method is more suitable for this problem. This paper analyzed the effectiveness of commonly used counterfactual generation methods, such as WhatIf Counterfactual Explanations, Multi-Objective Counterfactual Explanations, and Nearest Instance Counterfactual Explanations after balancing. This contribution presents a case study using the Open University Learning Analytics dataset to demonstrate the practical usefulness of counterfactual explanations. The results illustrate the method's effectiveness and describe concrete steps that could be taken to alter the model's prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了三种反事实解释方法（WhatIf、多目标和最近邻）在学生成功预测模型中的有效性，并以开放大学学习分析数据集为案例，展示了这些方法在帮助利益相关者理解模型预测方面的实际应用价值。
AI.motivation: 随着学习分析领域中机器学习预测模型的广泛应用，需要构建学生和教师对模型的信任，这要求模型具备可解释性。反事实解释作为一种有前景的可解释性工具，需要明确哪种生成方法在教育场景中更适合，特别是考虑到特征需具备可操作性和因果性。
AI.method: 分析了三种常见的反事实生成方法：WhatIf反事实解释、多目标反事实解释和平衡后的最近邻反事实解释。以开放大学学习分析数据集为案例，评估这些方法在期望属性、稳定性和鲁棒性方面的表现。
AI.result: 展示了反事实解释方法在学生成功预测模型中的有效性，并描述了改变模型预测结果的具体可行步骤。
AI.conclusion: 反事实解释方法能够有效支持学习分析中的可解释性需求，但需要根据教育数据的特点（可操作性和因果性）选择合适的方法。本研究为教育科学中反事实解释的应用提供了实践指导。

title: Adaptive and frugal BDDC coarse spaces for virtual element discretizations of a Stokes problem with heterogeneous viscosity
summary: The virtual element method (VEM) is a family of numerical methods to discretize partial differential equations on general polygonal or polyhedral computational grids. However, the resulting linear systems are often ill-conditioned and robust preconditioning techniques are necessary for an iterative solution. Here, a balancing domain decomposition by constraints (BDDC) preconditioner is considered. Techniques to enrich the coarse space of BDDC applied to a Stokes problem with heterogeneous viscosity are proposed. In this framework a comparison between two adaptive techniques and a computationally cheaper heuristic approach is carried out. Numerical results computed on a physically realistic model show that the latter approach in combination with the deluxe scaling is a promising alternative.

AI.tldr: 本文针对虚拟元方法（VEM）离散Stokes问题产生的病态线性系统，研究了BDDC预条件子。提出了粗空间 enrichment 技术，比较了两种自适应方法与一种启发式方法，结果表明启发式方法结合deluxe缩放是一种有前途的替代方案。
AI.motivation: VEM离散得到的线性系统通常病态，需要鲁棒的预条件技术才能进行迭代求解。
AI.method: 在BDDC预条件子框架下，针对具有非均匀粘性的Stokes问题，提出粗空间 enrichment 技术，并比较两种自适应方法与一种计算上更便宜的启发式方法。
AI.result: 在物理实际模型上的数值结果表明，启发式方法结合deluxe缩放是一种有前途的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 启发式粗空间 enrichment 方法在成本效益上优于自适应方法，是BDDC预条件子的有效选择。

title: On the construction of scattering matrices for irregular or elongated enclosures using Green's representation formula
summary: Multiple scattering methods are widely used to reduce the computational complexity of acoustic or electromagnetic scattering problems when waves propagate through media containing many identical inclusions. Historically, this numerical technique has been limited to situations in which the inclusions (particles) can be covered by nonoverlapping disks in two dimensions or spheres in three dimensions. This allows for the use of separation of variables in cylindrical or spherical coordinates to represent the solution to the governing partial differential equation. Here, we provide a more flexible approach, applicable to a much larger class of geometries. We use a Green's representation formula and the associated layer potentials to construct incoming and outgoing solutions on rectangular enclosures. The performance and flexibility of the resulting scattering operator formulation in two-dimensions is demonstrated via several numerical examples for multi-particle scattering in free space as well as in layered media. The mathematical formalism extends directly to the three dimensional case as well, and can easily be coupled with several commercial numerical PDE software packages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Green表示公式和层势的广义多散射方法，突破了传统方法对圆形/球形颗粒几何的限制，可处理任意形状包裹体，并适用于二维/三维自由空间及分层介质中的多粒子散射问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多散射方法受限于非重叠圆盘（二维）或球体（三维）的几何假设，无法处理更一般形状的包裹体。本文旨在开发一种更灵活的方法，适用于更广泛的几何构型。
AI.method: 采用Green表示公式和层势，在矩形包络上构造入射和出射解，取代传统的圆柱/球坐标系分离变量方法；基于所得散射算子公式进行数值实现。
AI.result: 通过二维自由空间和分层介质中多粒子散射的多个数值算例，验证了方法的性能和灵活性；该形式可直接推广至三维，并易于与商业PDE软件耦合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著扩展了多散射技术的适用范围，突破了传统几何限制，为复杂散射问题的数值求解提供了统一且灵活的框架。

title: Control theory and splitting methods
comment: enhanced several results to arbitrary order; better exposition; 43p
summary:
Our goal is to highlight some deep connections between numerical splitting methods and control theory. We consider evolution equations of the form $\dot{x} = f_0(x) + f_1(x)$, where $f_0$ encodes non-reversible dynamics, motivating schemes that involve only forward flows of $f_0$. In this context, a splitting method can be interpreted as a trajectory of the control-affine system $\dot{x}(t)=f_0(x(t))+u(t)f_1(x(t))$, associated with a control $u$ that is a finite sum of Dirac masses. The goal is then to find a control such that the flow generated by $f_0 + u(t)f_1$ is as close as possible to the flow of $f_0+f_1$.
  Using this interpretation and classical tools from control theory, we revisit well-known results on numerical splitting methods and prove several new ones. First, we show that there exist numerical schemes of arbitrary order involving only forward flows of $f_0$, provided one allows complex coefficients for $f_1$. Equivalently, for complex-valued controls, we prove that the Lie algebra rank condition is equivalent to small-time local controllability. Second, for real-valued coefficients, we show that the well-known order restrictions are linked to so-called "bad" Lie brackets from control theory, which are known to obstruct small-time local controllability. We investigate the conditions under which high-order methods exist, thanks to a basis of the free Lie algebra that we recently constructed.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了数值分裂方法与控制理论之间的深层联系。通过将分裂方法解释为控制仿射系统 $\dot{x}=f_0(x)+u(t)f_1(x)$ 在Dirac脉冲控制下的轨迹，利用控制理论工具重新审视了分裂方法。主要结果包括：(1) 若允许复数系数，存在任意高阶的仅含 $f_0$ 前向流的数值格式，等价于李代数秩条件与短时局部可控性等价；(2) 实数系数下，高阶方法的阶数限制与"坏"李括号相关，并利用自由李代数基给出了存在高阶方法的条件。
AI.motivation: 建立数值分裂方法与控制理论之间的深层联系，利用控制理论中的经典工具（如李代数秩条件、可控性理论）来重新审视和理解数值分裂方法中的已知结论（如阶数限制）并证明新结果。
AI.method: 将分裂方法重新解释为控制仿射系统 $\dot{x}=f_0(x)+u(t)f_1(x)$ 在控制 $u$ 为Dirac质量有限和下的轨迹。利用控制理论中的李代数秩条件、短时局部可控性等工具进行分析。对于复数系数情形，证明李代数秩条件等价于小时间局部可控性；对于实数系数，将阶数限制与"坏"李括号建立联系，并利用新构造的自由李代数基研究高阶方法存在的条件。
AI.result: (1) 复数系数下：存在任意高阶的仅含 $f_0$ 前向流的数值格式，李代数秩条件等价于小时间局部可控性。(2) 实数系数下：高阶方法的阶数限制与控制理论中阻碍小时间局部可控性的"坏"李括号相关，基于新构造的自由李代数基给出了高阶方法存在的条件。
AI.conclusion: 数值分裂方法与控制理论之间存在深刻联系。控制理论的工具不仅可以统一理解分裂方法中已知的阶数限制等经典结果，还能指导构造新的高阶格式（如复数系数下的任意高阶格式）。"坏"李括号这一控制理论概念为理解实数系数下分裂方法的阶数障碍提供了新视角。

title: The intrinsic reductions and the intrinsic depths in non-archimedean dynamics
summary: In this short paper, we aim at giving a more conceptual and simpler proof of Rumely's moduli theoretic characterization of type II minimal locus of the resultant function $\operatorname{ordRes}_φ$ on the Berkovich hyperbolic space for a rational function $φ$ on $\mathbb{P}^1$ defined over an algebraically closed and complete field that is equipped with a non-trivial and non-archimedean absolute value, and also aim at giving a much simpler and more natural proof of a degenerating limit theorem, in an improved form after DeMarco--Faber, for the family of the unique maximal entropy measures on $\mathbb{P}^1(\mathbb{C})$ associated to a meromorphic family of complex rational functions. We introduce the intrinsic reduction of a non-archimedean rational function $φ$ at each point in the Berkovich projective line and its directionwise intrinsic depths, which are suitable notions for the above aims and defined in terms of the tree and analytic structures of the Berkovich projective line. Then we establish two theorems in non-archimedean dynamics, both of which play key roles in the above aims.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入非阿基米德有理函数在Berkovich射影直线上的内蕴约化及其方向内蕴深度概念，给出了Rumely关于ordRes_φ函数第二类极小轨迹的模理论刻画的更简洁证明，以及DeMarco-Faber退化极限定理的改进形式下复有理函数族极大熵测度收敛性的更自然证明。
AI.motivation: 为Rumely关于ordRes_φ函数在Berkovich双曲空间中第二类极小轨迹的模理论刻画提供一个更概念化、更简单的证明；同时为DeMarco-Faber关于复有理函数族极大熵测度的退化极限定理提供一个更简单、更自然的证明。
AI.method: 引入非阿基米德有理函数在Berkovich射影直线上每个点的内蕴约化及其方向内蕴深度概念，这些概念基于Berkovich射影直线的树结构和解析结构定义。在此基础上建立两个非阿基米德动力系统定理，作为实现上述目标的关键工具。
AI.result: 给出了Rumely定理的简化证明和DeMarco-Faber退化极限定理改进形式的自然证明。
AI.conclusion: 所引入的内蕴约化与方向内蕴深度概念是处理非阿基米德有理函数动力学的有效工具，能够简化核心定理的证明并揭示其本质结构。

title: Two-layers neural networks for Schr{ö}dinger eigenvalue problems
summary: The aim of this article is to analyze numerical schemes using two-layer neural networks withinfinite width for the resolution of high-dimensional Schr{ö}dinger eigenvalue problems with smoothinteraction potentials and Neumann boundary condition on the unit cube in any dimension. Moreprecisely, any eigenfunction associated to the lowest eigenvalue of the Schr{ö}dinger operator is a unitL 2 norm minimizer of the associated energy. Using Barron's representation of the solution witha probability measure defined on the set of parameter values and following the approach initiallysuggested by Bach and Chizat [1], the energy is minimized thanks to a constrained gradient curvedynamic on the 2-Wasserstein space of the set of parameter values defining the neural network. Weprove the existence of solutions to this constrained gradient curve. Furthermore, we prove that,if it converges, the represented function is then an eigenfunction of the considered Schr{ö}dingeroperator. At least up to our knowledge, this is the first work where this type of analysis is carriedout to deal with the minimization of non-convex functionals.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了使用无限宽两层神经网络求解高维薛定谔特征值问题的数值方案，证明了约束梯度曲线解的存在性，并证明了收敛时表示的函数是薛定谔算子的特征函数。
AI.motivation: 解决高维薛定谔特征值问题的数值求解挑战，利用无限宽神经网络的表示能力，首次将Bach-Chizat的Wasserstein梯度流方法应用于非凸泛函的最小化问题。
AI.method: 采用Barron表示将解参数化为概率测度，在参数集上的2-Wasserstein空间中定义约束梯度曲率动力学，通过最小化能量泛函来逼近薛定谔算子的最低特征值对应的特征函数。
AI.result: 证明了约束梯度曲线解的存在性；证明了若该动力学收敛，则其表示的函数是薛定谔算子的特征函数。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将Wasserstein梯度流分析框架应用于非凸泛函的最小化问题，为高维薛定谔特征值问题的神经网络求解提供了理论保障。

title: On Landis' conjecture for positive Schrödinger operators on graphs
comment: A remark on page 11 has been added, several typos are corrected, and the overall presentation is improved. The article has been accepted for publication in International Mathematics Research Notices
summary: In this note we study the Landis conjecture for positive Schrödin\-ger operators on graphs. More precisely, we prove a Landis-type result in the form of a decay criterion that ensures when $\mathcal{H}$-harmonic functions for a positive Schrödinger operator $\mathcal{H}$ with potentials bounded from above by $ 1 $ are trivial. The positivity assumption on the operator allows us to impose slow decay across the entire graph, while requiring fast decay in only one direction, rather than throughout the whole graph. We then specifically look at the special cases of $ \mathbb{Z}^{d} $ and regular trees for which we get a explicit decay criterion. Moreover, we consider the fractional analogue of the Landis conjecture on $ \mathbb{Z}^{d} $. Our approach relies on the discrete version of Liouville comparison principle which is also proved in this article.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图上正Schrödinger算子的Landis猜想，证明了当势函数有上界时，满足慢衰减条件的$\mathcal{H}$-调和函数必为平凡解。该结果仅需在一个方向上快速衰减，而非全图。特别考虑了$\mathbb{Z}^{d}$和正则树的情形，并给出了显式衰减准则。此外，还研究了$\mathbb{Z}^{d}$上分数阶Landis猜想。方法依赖于本文证明的离散Liouville比较原理。
AI.motivation: Landis猜想是椭圆方程解的衰减性质中的重要问题，本文将其推广到图上的正Schrödinger算子，旨在建立更弱条件（仅需单方向快速衰减）下的平凡性判别准则。
AI.method: 利用正Schrödinger算子的正性假设，结合离散Liouville比较原理（本文首次证明），通过构造适当的比较函数，将全局慢衰减与单方向快衰减条件结合，推导出$\mathcal{H}$-调和函数的平凡性。对$\mathbb{Z}^{d}$、正则树和分数阶情形分别给出显式衰减准则。
AI.result: 得到了Landis型定理：若$\mathcal{H}$-调和函数在全局慢衰减且某一方向快速衰减，则函数必为零。对$\mathbb{Z}^{d}$和正则树给出了具体的衰减速率临界值。分数阶情形下同样建立了类似结果。
AI.conclusion: 正Schrödinger算子的Landis猜想在图上成立，且条件可放宽为仅需单方向快速衰减；离散Liouville比较原理是核心工具。

title: Chip-firing on the Platonic solids: a primer for studying graph gonality
summary: This paper provides a friendly introduction to chip-firing games and graph gonality. We use graphs coming from the five Platonic solids to illustrate different tools and techniques for studying these games, including independent sets, treewidth, scramble number, and Dhar's burning algorithm. In addition to showcasing some previously known results, we present the first proofs that the dodecahedron graph has gonality $6$, and that the icosahedron graph has gonality~$9$.

AI.tldr: 本文以柏拉图立体图为例，友好地介绍了芯片发射游戏（chip-firing games）和图亏格（graph gonality）的概念，并首次证明了十二面体图亏格为6、二十面体图亏格为9。
AI.motivation: 旨在以一种可访问的方式介绍芯片发射游戏和图亏格，通过具体例子（柏拉图立体）来演示不同工具和技术，并填补特定图亏格值的知识空白。
AI.method: 使用柏拉图立体（五种正多面体）对应的图作为案例，综合运用独立集、树宽（treewidth）、Scramble数以及Dhar燃烧算法等多种工具和技术来分析芯片发射游戏和计算图亏格。
AI.result: 展示了若干已知结果，并首次证明了十二面体图的亏格为6，二十面体图的亏格为9。
AI.conclusion: 通过柏拉图立体图这一经典结构，为芯片发射游戏和图亏格研究提供了直观而系统的介绍，并补充了具体图类的亏格值结果。

title: A Bayesian Solution To The Imitation Gap
summary: In many real-world settings, an agent must learn to act in environments where no reward signal can be specified, but a set of expert demonstrations is available. Imitation learning (IL) is a popular framework for learning policies from such demonstrations. However, in some cases, differences in observability between the expert and the agent can give rise to an imitation gap such that the expert's policy is not optimal for the agent and a naive application of IL can fail catastrophically. In particular, if the expert observes the Markov state and the agent does not, then the expert will not demonstrate the information-gathering behavior needed by the agent but not the expert.
