In this paper, we propose a Bayesian solution to the Imitation Gap (BIG), first using the expert demonstrations, together with a prior specifying the cost of exploratory behavior that is not demonstrated, to infer a posterior over rewards with Bayesian inverse reinforcement learning (IRL). BIG then uses the reward posterior to learn a Bayes-optimal policy. Our experiments show that BIG, unlike IL, allows the agent to explore at test time when presented with an imitation gap, whilst still learning to behave optimally using expert demonstrations when no such gap exists.

AI.tldr: 针对专家与智能体之间存在可观测性差异（即模仿鸿沟）导致传统模仿学习失败的问题，本文提出贝叶斯解决方案BIG，通过贝叶斯逆强化学习从专家演示推断奖励后验，进而学习贝叶斯最优策略，使智能体在存在模仿鸿沟时能主动探索，无鸿沟时仍能最优模仿。
AI.motivation: 在模仿学习中，专家与智能体的可观测性差异会导致模仿鸿沟：专家观察到完整马尔可夫状态，而智能体只能观测到部分，因此专家的策略不包含信息收集行为，智能体直接模仿会失败。现有IL方法无法处理这种差异，需要一种能从演示中推断奖励并引导智能体主动探索的方法。
AI.method: 提出BIG（Bayesian solution to the Imitation Gap）方法，分两步：（1）利用专家演示加上一个先验（指定未演示的探索行为的成本），通过贝叶斯逆强化学习（Bayesian IRL）推断奖励的后验分布；（2）利用该奖励后验学习一个贝叶斯最优策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，BIG在存在模仿鸿沟时能让智能体在测试阶段主动探索，而在不存在模仿鸿沟时仍能利用专家演示学习最优行为；相比之下，传统IL方法在模仿鸿沟存在时会灾难性失败。
AI.conclusion: BIG通过贝叶斯框架有效弥合了模仿鸿沟，在部分可观测环境下比传统IL方法更具鲁棒性和适应性，为解决专家-智能体信息不对称问题提供了一种可行的理论路径。

title: Accelerating Full Waveform Inversion By Transfer Learning
summary:
Full waveform inversion (FWI) is a powerful tool for reconstructing material fields based on sparsely measured data obtained by wave propagation. For specific problems, discretizing the material field with a neural network (NN) improves the robustness and reconstruction quality of the corresponding optimization problem. We call this method NN-based FWI. Starting from an initial guess, the weights of the NN are iteratively updated to fit the simulated wave signals to the sparsely measured data set. For gradient-based optimization, a suitable choice of the initial guess, i.e., a suitable NN weight initialization, is crucial for fast and robust convergence.
  In this paper, we introduce a novel transfer learning approach to further improve NN-based FWI. This approach leverages supervised pretraining to provide a better NN weight initialization, leading to faster convergence of the subsequent optimization problem. Moreover, the inversions yield physically more meaningful local minima. The network is pretrained to predict the unknown material field using the gradient information from the first iteration of conventional FWI. In our computational experiments on two-dimensional domains, the training data set consists of reference simulations with arbitrarily positioned elliptical voids of different shapes and orientations. We compare the performance of the proposed transfer learning NN-based FWI with three other methods: conventional FWI, NN-based FWI without pretraining and conventional FWI with an initial guess predicted from the pretrained NN. Our results show that transfer learning NN-based FWI outperforms the other methods in terms of convergence speed and reconstruction quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于迁移学习的全波形反演（FWI）方法，通过监督预训练为神经网络权重提供更好的初始化，从而加速收敛并获得更优的物理解。在二维椭圆空洞实验中，该方法在收敛速度和重建质量上均优于传统FWI、无预训练的NN-FWI以及用预训练网络初始化传统FWI等方法。
AI.motivation: 基于神经网络的全波形反演（NN-based FWI）中，权重初始化的选择对梯度优化的收敛速度和鲁棒性至关重要。现有的随机初始化或简单初始化策略往往导致收敛缓慢或陷入不良局部最优，亟需一种更优的初始化方法。
AI.method: 提出迁移学习策略：首先利用传统FWI第一次迭代的梯度信息作为输入，通过监督学习预训练神经网络来预测未知材料场，从而获得良好的权重初始化；随后将预训练网络应用于NN-based FWI，进行迭代优化以拟合实测波场数据。
AI.result: 在二维椭圆空洞基准测试中，迁移学习NN-based FWI在收敛速度和重建质量上均优于传统FWI、无预训练的NN-based FWI以及用预训练网络初始化传统FWI三种对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习能有效改善NN-based FWI的初始权重，不仅加快优化收敛，还能得到物理意义更合理的反演结果，为基于神经网络的全波形反演提供了实用的加速和提升方案。

title: Nonlinear Monolithic Two-Level Schwarz Methods for the Navier-Stokes Equations
summary: Nonlinear domain decomposition methods became popular in recent years since they can improve the nonlinear convergence behavior of Newton's method significantly for many complex problems. In this article, a nonlinear two-level Schwarz approach is considered and, for the first time, equipped with monolithic GDSW (Generalized Dryja-Smith-Widlund) coarse basis functions for the Navier-Stokes equations. Results for lid-driven cavity problems with high Reynolds numbers are presented and compared with classical global Newton's method equipped with a linear Schwarz preconditioner. Different options, for example, local pressure corrections on the subdomain and recycling of coarse basis functions are discussed in the nonlinear Schwarz approach for the first time.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为Navier-Stokes方程的非线性两层Schwarz方法配备了单块GDSW粗基函数，并与经典全局牛顿法+线性Schwarz预条件子进行对比，讨论了局部压力修正和粗基函数重用等新选项。
AI.motivation: 非线性区域分解方法能显著改善牛顿法对复杂问题的非线性收敛行为，但此前尚未有研究将GDSW粗基函数应用于Navier-Stokes方程的非线性Schwarz方法中。
AI.method: 采用非线性两层Schwarz方法，首次配备单块GDSW粗基函数求解Navier-Stokes方程，实验对比经典全局牛顿法+线性Schwarz预条件子，并探讨局部压力修正和粗基函数重用策略。
AI.result: 在lid-driven cavity高雷诺数问题上展示了非线性两层Schwarz方法的有效性，并给出了与经典方法的对比结果。
AI.conclusion: 非线性Schwarz方法结合GDSW粗基函数能有效提升Navier-Stokes方程求解性能，局部压力修正和粗基函数重用是值得进一步研究的优化方向。

title: Numerical Ergodicity of Stochastic Allen--Cahn Equation driven by Multiplicative White Noise
comment: to appear at Commun. Math. Res
summary: We establish the unique ergodicity of a fully discrete scheme for monotone SPDEs with polynomial growth drift and bounded diffusion coefficients driven by multiplicative white noise. The main ingredient of our method depends on the satisfaction of a Lyapunov condition followed by a uniform moments' estimate, combined with the regularity property for the full discretization. We transform the original stochastic equation into an equivalent random equation where the discrete stochastic convolutions are uniformly controlled to derive the desired uniform moments' estimate. Applying the main result to the stochastic Allen--Cahn equation driven by multiplicative white noise indicates that this full discretization is uniquely ergodic for any interface thickness. Numerical experiments validate our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了带有多项式增长漂移和有界扩散系数的单调SPDEs全离散格式的唯一遍历性，并通过随机Allen-Cahn方程的数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 建立单调SPDEs全离散格式的唯一遍历性，填补全离散格式在遍历性理论方面的空白，特别是针对带有多项式增长漂移项的方程。
AI.method: 通过Lyapunov条件满足性、一致矩估计以及全离散格式的正则性相结合的方法。将原随机方程转化为等价随机方程，并均匀控制离散随机卷积以获得所需的一致矩估计。
AI.result: 证明了全离散格式的唯一遍历性，并将其应用于随机Allen-Cahn方程，表明该全离散格式对任意界面厚度均具有唯一遍历性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的全离散格式对于一类单调SPDEs具有唯一遍历性，数值实验支持理论结果。

title: Towards optimal hierarchical training of neural networks
summary: We propose a hierarchical training algorithm for standard feed-forward neural networks that adaptively extends the network architecture as soon as the optimization reaches a stationary point. By solving small (low-dimensional) optimization problems, the extended network provably escapes any local minimum or stationary point. Under some assumptions on the approximability of the data with stable neural networks, we show that the algorithm achieves an optimal convergence rate s in the sense that loss is bounded by the number of parameters to the -s. As a byproduct, we obtain computable indicators which judge the optimality of the training state of a given network and derive a new notion of generalization error.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向标准前馈神经网络的分层训练算法，该算法在优化到达驻点时自适应扩展网络架构，通过求解低维优化问题逃离局部极小值或驻点，并在一定假设下证明算法达到最优收敛率 s（损失随参数数目的 -s 次方衰减），同时得到可计算的最优性判据和新的泛化误差概念。
AI.motivation: 标准神经网络的训练常陷入局部极小值或驻点，而现有方法缺乏理论保证。作者希望设计一种既能逃离驻点又能保证最优收敛率的算法。
AI.method: 采用分层训练策略，在优化到达驻点时自适应地扩展网络架构（增加参数），通过求解小规模（低维）优化问题来证明扩展后的网络可以逃离任何局部极小值或驻点。
AI.result: 算法实现了最优收敛率 s，即损失函数值以参数数目的 -s 次方速率衰减；同时得到了可计算的最优性判据和一种新的泛化误差定义。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分层自适应扩展训练算法在理论上能够逃离驻点并达到最优收敛率，为神经网络训练提供了新的理论工具和评估指标。

title: Global null controllability of stochastic semilinear complex Ginzburg-Landau equations
summary: In this paper, we study the null controllability of forward and backward stochastic semilinear complex Ginzburg-Landau equations with global Lipschitz nonlinear terms. For this purpose, by deriving an improved global Carleman estimates for linear systems, we obtain the controllability results for the stochastic linear systems with a $L^2$-valued source term. Based on it, together with a Banach fixed point argument, the desired null controllability of semilinear systems is derived.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了带有全局Lipschitz非线性项的前向和后向随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程的零可控性，通过推导改进的全局Carleman估计并结合Banach不动点论证，获得了半线性系统的零可控性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程这一重要物理模型的可控性理论，填补其零可控性问题的理论空白。
AI.method: 首先推导改进的全局Carleman估计，获得带有L^2值源项的随机线性系统的可控性结果；然后基于该结果，利用Banach不动点论证处理非线性项，进而推导半线性系统的零可控性。
AI.result: 获得了前向和后向随机半线性复Ginzburg-Landau方程在全局Lipschitz非线性条件下的零可控性结论。
AI.conclusion: 通过Carleman估计与不动点方法的结合，成功建立了该类半线性随机系统的零可控性理论。

title: Preference-Based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning: Data Coverage and Algorithmic Techniques
summary: We initiate the study of Preference-Based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (PbMARL), exploring both theoretical foundations and empirical validations. We define the task as identifying the Nash equilibrium from a preference-only offline dataset in general-sum games, a problem marked by the challenge of sparse feedback signals. Our theory establishes the upper complexity bounds for Nash Equilibrium in effective PbMARL, demonstrating that single-policy coverage is inadequate and highlighting the importance of unilateral dataset coverage. These theoretical insights are verified through comprehensive experiments. To enhance the practical performance, we further introduce two algorithmic techniques. (1) We propose a Mean Squared Error (MSE) regularization along the time axis to achieve a more uniform reward distribution and improve reward learning outcomes. (2) We propose an additional penalty based on the distribution of the dataset to incorporate pessimism, improving stability and effectiveness during training. Our findings underscore the multifaceted approach required for PbMARL, paving the way for effective preference-based multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究基于偏好的多智能体强化学习（PbMARL），从理论和实验两方面证明：在一般和博弈中从纯偏好离线数据中识别纳什均衡需要单边数据集覆盖（而非单策略覆盖），并提出MSE时间正则化和基于数据集分布的悲观惩罚两种算法来提升实际性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL依赖数值奖励信号，但在许多实际场景中只能获得偏好反馈（如人类偏好比较），缺乏对PbMARL的理论理解和高效算法。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立PbMARL的理论基础并设计实用算法。
AI.method: (1) 理论上推导了PbMARL中纳什均衡的上界复杂度，证明单策略覆盖不足，需单边数据集覆盖。(2) 提出MSE时间正则化使奖励分布更均匀。(3) 引入基于数据集分布的悲观惩罚项以增强训练稳定性和有效性。
AI.result: 理论证明单边数据集覆盖是PbMARL中纳什均衡学习的必要条件；实验验证了理论发现，并展示了两种算法技术对性能的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: PbMARL需要多管齐下的方法（理论保证+算法设计），为基于偏好的多智能体系统奠定了基础，指出了数据集覆盖条件在偏好反馈场景下的特殊重要性。

title: Fault-Ride-Through (FRT) Control of a grid-connected Fixed-Speed Wind Energy Conversion System using STATCOM
comment: Accepted for Publication at IEEE IECON-2024
summary: Wind energy conversion system (WECS) is stochastic in nature and has low inertia to grid voltage instability, poor reactive power compensation and most importantly fault susceptibility. Variable speed WECS such as a doubly-fed induction generators (DFIG) are well known to reach steady state quickly after fault occurrence without the need for an external reactive power source because of the presence of a back-to-back converter that provides independent control of the active and reactive power unlike in the fixed-speed squirrel cage induction generator (SCIG) counterpart that cant be stabilized unless ab external source of reactive power support is present. However, controlling DFIG is complicated and costly due to complete tripping unlike the fixed-speed generators which doesnt trip completely when fault occurs. Hence, in this work, a 48-pulse, 3-phase static synchronous compensator (STATCOM) is used to ensure reactive power compensation and fault-ride through (FRT) control of the SCIG against over-voltage emanating from fault occurrence in a grid-connected power system. The goal here is to guarantee voltage stability and fault-ride through control against injected faults within certain time ranges at the point of common coupling (PCC) between the AC sources, the load, and the fixed-speed WECS.

AI.tldr: 针对并网固定转速鼠笼式感应发电机（SCIG）风能转换系统，提出采用48脉冲三相STATCOM进行无功补偿和故障穿越控制，以解决电网故障导致的过电压和电压失稳问题。
AI.motivation: DFIG控制复杂且成本高，而固定转速SCIG在故障时无法自行稳定且缺乏无功补偿能力，需要外部支持以实现电压稳定和故障穿越。
AI.method: 采用48脉冲三相STATCOM作为外部无功补偿装置，对并网固定转速SCIG风能系统进行无功补偿和故障穿越控制，在公共耦合点（PCC）处抵御故障引起的过电压。
AI.result: STATCOM能够保证固定转速SCIG在电网故障期间的无功补偿和故障穿越能力，确保PCC处的电压稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 48脉冲STATCOM可有效替代DFIG的复杂控制方案，为固定转速SCIG提供低成本、有效的电压稳定和故障穿越解决方案。

title: Resilient Two-Time-Scale Local Stochastic Gradient Descent for Byzantine Federated Learning
summary: We study local stochastic gradient descent methods for solving federated optimization over a network of agents communicating indirectly through a centralized coordinator. We are interested in the Byzantine setting where there is a subset of $f$ malicious agents that could observe the entire network and send arbitrary values to the coordinator to disrupt the performance of other non-faulty agents. The objective of the non-faulty agents is to collaboratively compute the optimizer of their respective local functions under the presence of Byzantine agents. In this setting, prior works show that the local stochastic gradient descent method can only return an approximate of the desired solutions due to the impacts of Byzantine agents. Whether this method can find an exact solution remains an open question. In this paper, we will address this open question by proposing a new variant of the local stochastic gradient descent method. Under similar conditions that are considered in the existing works, we will show that the proposed method converges exactly to the desired solutions. We will provide theoretical results to characterize the convergence properties of our method, in particular, the proposed method convergences at an optimal rate $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$ in both strongly convex and non-convex settings, where $k$ is the number of iterations. Finally, we will present a number of simulations to illustrate our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文针对联邦优化中存在的拜占庭攻击问题，提出了一种新的局部随机梯度下降变体方法，能够在强凸和非凸设定下以最优速率 O(1/k) 精确收敛到目标解，解决了此前方法只能返回近似解的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有局部随机梯度下降方法在拜占庭攻击下只能返回近似解，能否找到精确解是一个悬而未决的公开问题。
AI.method: 提出一种新的局部随机梯度下降变体方法，在相同假设条件下，通过改进算法机制来抵御拜占庭攻击，实现精确收敛。
AI.result: 理论证明该方法在强凸和非凸设定下均以最优速率 O(1/k) 精确收敛（k为迭代次数）；仿真实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法成功解决了拜占庭攻击下局部SGD能否精确收敛的公开问题，实现了与无攻击情形相同的收敛速率。

title: Computational Realization of Popping Impinging Sprays of Hypergolic Bipropellants by a Eulerian-Lagrangian Approach
summary: This work adopts a Eulerian-Lagrangian approach to numerically simulate the spray impingement of MMH (Monomethyl hydrazine)/NTO (nitrogen tetroxide), which are prevalent rocket engine bipropellants for deep space missions and satellite orbital maneuvers. The emphasis of the work is to computationally realize the popping phenomenon and to study its parametric dependence on liquid and gas-phase reaction rates. The liquid-phase reaction of MMH/NTO is realized based on the extended spray equation, incorporating the additional independent variable, propellant mass fraction, to account for the mixing of droplets. The spray popping can be computationally reproduced over wide ranges of Damköhler numbers for both liquid- and gas-phase reactions. Furthermore, the computational results have been validated through qualitative comparison with experimental images and quantitative comparison with experimental frequencies. The present results verify our hypothesis that the heat release from the liquid-phase reaction enhances the evaporation of MMH and NTO so that the intense gas-phase reaction zone around the spray impingement point periodically separates the MMH and NTO impinging sprays to cause the popping phenomenon. Furthermore, it was found that the popping phenomenon can be suppressed by reducing the Damköhler numbers of liquid-phase reaction and therefore to suppress the evaporation of the propellants. This work is believed to provide valuable understanding for avoiding the off-design popping phenomenon that may reduce combustion efficiency and increase the risk of combustion instability in rocket engines.

AI.tldr: 本文采用欧拉-拉格朗日方法数值模拟了MMH/NTO火箭发动机推进剂的喷雾撞击 popping 现象，通过引入扩展喷雾方程实现了液相反应，验证了液相反应放热增强蒸发导致周期性气相反应区分离喷雾的假设，并发现降低液相Damköhler数可抑制popping现象。
AI.motivation: 火箭发动机中MMH/NTO双组元推进剂喷雾撞击时出现的popping现象会降低燃烧效率并增加燃烧不稳定性风险，但该现象的物理机制尚不清晰，亟需通过数值模拟揭示其机理并为工程设计提供指导。
AI.method: 采用欧拉-拉格朗日方法进行数值模拟，通过扩展喷雾方程引入推进剂质量分数作为额外独立变量以考虑液滴混合，实现了MMH/NTO液相反应的模拟，并在宽范围的液相和气相Damköhler数下计算再现了popping现象。
AI.result: 计算成功再现了popping现象，并通过与实验图像定性对比和实验频率定量对比验证了计算结果。结果表明液相反应放热增强了推进剂蒸发，导致喷雾撞击点周围形成强烈的气相反应区周期性分隔MMH和NTO喷雾，从而引起popping现象；降低液相反应Damköhler数可抑制popping。
AI.conclusion: 验证了popping现象由液相反应放热驱动蒸发的假设机制，发现通过控制液相反应速率可抑制popping，为火箭发动机避免非设计工况下的燃烧效率降低和燃烧不稳定性风险提供了理论依据。

title: Online learning of eddy-viscosity and backscattering closures for geophysical turbulence using ensemble Kalman inversion
summary: Different approaches to using data-driven methods for subgrid-scale closure modeling have emerged recently. Most of these approaches are data-hungry, and lack interpretability and out-of-distribution generalizability. Here, we use {online} learning to address parametric uncertainty of well-known physics-based large-eddy simulation (LES) closures: the Smagorinsky (Smag) and Leith eddy-viscosity models (1 free parameter) and the Jansen-Held (JH) backscattering model (2 free parameters). For 8 cases of 2D geophysical turbulence, optimal parameters are estimated, using ensemble Kalman inversion (EKI), such that for each case, the LES' energy spectrum matches that of direct numerical simulation (DNS). Only a small training dataset is needed to calculate the DNS spectra (i.e., the approach is {data-efficient}). We find the optimized parameter(s) of each closure to be constant across broad flow regimes that differ in dominant length scales, eddy/jet structures, and dynamics, suggesting that these closures are {generalizable}. In a-posteriori tests based on the enstrophy spectra and probability density functions (PDFs) of vorticity, LES with optimized closures outperform the baselines (LES with standard Smag, dynamic Smag or Leith), particularly at the tails of the PDFs (extreme events). In a-priori tests, the optimized JH significantly outperforms the baselines and optimized Smag and Leith in terms of interscale enstrophy and energy transfers (still, optimized Smag noticeably outperforms standard Smag). The results show the promise of combining advances in physics-based modeling (e.g., JH) and data-driven modeling (e.g., {online} learning with EKI) to develop data-efficient frameworks for accurate, interpretable, and generalizable closures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理模型与在线学习（集成卡尔曼反演）的方法，对二维地球物理湍流中的Smagorinsky、Leith和Jansen-Held亚网格尺度闭合模型进行参数优化，仅需少量训练数据即可获得跨不同流态泛化的最优参数，在能量谱、涡量PDF及跨尺度输运方面均优于标准/动态Smagorinsky及Leith基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动亚网格尺度闭合模型存在数据需求大、可解释性差和分布外泛化能力不足的问题，亟需一种数据高效、可解释且可泛化的闭合建模方法。
AI.method: 采用在线学习（集成卡尔曼反演，EKI）对三种物理LES闭合模型（Smagorinsky、Leith各1个自由参数，Jansen-Held 2个自由参数）进行参数估计，通过使LES能量谱匹配DNS能量谱来优化参数，并在8种不同流态的二维地球物理湍流算例中验证。
AI.result: 优化后参数在主导长度尺度、涡/射流结构及动力学各异的流态中保持恒定，表明模型具有良好的泛化性；后验测试中，优化闭合在涡量PDF尾部（极端事件）显著优于基线；先验测试中，优化JH在跨尺度输运上大幅领先基线及优化Smag/Leith。
AI.conclusion: 结合物理建模（如JH）与数据驱动在线学习（EKI）是一种有前景的范式，可开发数据高效、准确、可解释且可泛化的亚网格尺度闭合模型。

title: Approximating electromagnetic fields in discontinuous media using a single physics-informed neural network
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) are a new family of numerical methods, based on deep learning, for modeling boundary value problems. They offer an advantage over traditional numerical methods for high-dimensional, parametric, and data-driven problems. However, they perform poorly on problems where the solution exhibits high frequencies, such as discontinuities or sharp gradients. In this work, we develop a PINN-based solver for modeling three-dimensional, transient and static, parametric electromagnetic problems in discontinuous media. We use the first-order Maxwell's equations to train the neural network. We use a level-set function to represent the interface with a continuous function, and to enrich the network's inputs with high-frequencies and interface information. Finally, we validate the proposed methodology on multiple 3D, parametric, static, and transient problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的求解器，用于模拟不连续介质中的三维电磁问题。通过采用一阶麦克斯韦方程组训练神经网络，并利用水平集函数表示界面信息以增强网络对高频特征的捕捉能力，在多个三维参数化静态和瞬态问题上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统PINNs在处理包含高频（如不连续性或尖锐梯度）的解时表现不佳，而电磁问题中常涉及介质不连续界面，需要一种能够有效处理此类高频特征的PINN方法。
AI.method: 采用一阶麦克斯韦方程组作为物理约束训练神经网络；引入水平集函数连续表示不连续界面，并将界面信息和高频特征作为网络输入的增强信息。
AI.result: 在多个三维参数化静态和瞬态电磁问题上验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 水平集增强的PINN方法能有效处理不连续介质中的高频电磁问题，拓展了PINNs在复杂电磁场景中的应用潜力。

title: Studies of the Fermi-Hubbard Model Using Quantum Computing
summary: The use of quantum computers to calculate the ground state (lowest) energies of a spin lattice of electrons described by the Fermi-Hubbard model of great importance in condensed matter physics has been studied. The ability of quantum bits (qubits) to be in a superposition state allows quantum computers to perform certain calculations that are not possible with even the most powerful classical (digital) computers. This work has established a method for calculating the ground state energies of small lattices which should be scalable to larger lattices that cannot be calculated by classical computers. Half-filled lattices of sizes 1x4, 2x2, 2x4, and 3x4 were studied. The calculated energies for the 1x4 and 2x2 lattices without Coulomb repulsion between the electrons and for the 1x4 lattice with Coulomb repulsion agrees with the true energies to within 0.60%, while for the 2x2 lattice with Coulomb repulsion the agreement is within 1.50% For the 2x4 lattice, the true energy without Coulomb repulsion was found to agree within 0.18%.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用量子计算机计算Fermi-Hubbard模型基态能量的方法，在1x4、2x2、2x4和3x4晶格上验证了可行性，计算精度在0.18%至1.50%之间，且该方法具有可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 凝聚态物理中Fermi-Hubbard模型的基态能量计算对理解电子自旋晶格至关重要，但经典计算机在处理大规模晶格时存在计算极限，量子计算机的叠加态特性有望突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 建立了可扩展的量子计算方法，用于计算Fermi-Hubbard模型下小晶格的基态能量，并分别在有无库仑排斥力的情况下，对1x4、2x2、2x4和3x4的半填充晶格进行了计算测试。
AI.result: 无库仑排斥时，1x4和2x2晶格的误差在0.60%以内，2x4晶格误差为0.18%；有库仑排斥时，1x4晶格误差在0.60%以内，2x2晶格误差在1.50%以内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小晶格上取得高精度结果，且具有可扩展至经典计算机无法处理的大晶格的潜力，展示了量子计算机在凝聚态物理计算中的优势。

title: Identifying Patterns Using Cross-Correlation Random Matrices Derived from Deterministic and Stochastic Differential Equations
summary: Cross-Correlation random matrices have emerged as a promising indicator of phase transitions in spin systems. The core concept is that the evolution of magnetization encapsulates thermodynamic information [R. da Silva, Int. J. Mod. Phys. C, 2350061 (2023)], which is directly reflected in the eigenvalues of these matrices. When these evolutions are analyzed in the mean-field regime, an important question arises: Can the Langevin equation, when translated into maps, perform the same function? Some studies suggest that this method may also capture the chaotic behavior of certain systems. In this work, we propose that the spectral properties of random matrices constructed from maps derived from deterministic or stochastic differential equations can indicate the critical or chaotic behavior of such systems. For chaotic systems, we need only the evolution of iterated Hamiltonian equations, and for spin systems, the Langevin maps obtained from mean-field equations suffice, thus avoiding the need for Monte Carlo (MC) simulations or other techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建随机矩阵并分析其谱性质，可以检测确定性或随机微分方程映射系统的临界或混沌行为，避免使用蒙特卡洛模拟。
AI.motivation: 探索Langevin方程映射能否像交叉相关随机矩阵方法一样指示相变和混沌行为，从而简化计算。
AI.method: 将确定性或随机微分方程转化为映射，基于这些映射构建交叉相关随机矩阵，分析其特征值谱性质来检测系统的临界或混沌行为。
AI.result: 对于混沌系统，只需迭代Hamiltonian方程；对于自旋系统，只需平均场Langevin映射，无需蒙特卡洛模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推广至多种动力学系统，通过谱分析统一检测相变和混沌行为。

title: Cahier de l'Institut Pascal: Noisy Quantum Dynamics and Measurement-Induced Phase Transitions
comment: 24 pages, 11 Figures, conference proceeding:To appear on Cahier de l'institut Pascal
summary: This is a conference proceeding in the framework of workshop "OpenQMBP2023" at Institute Pascal (Orsay, France) and associated to the lecture given by Prof. Ehud Altman. We provide a comprehensive analysis of recent results in the context of measurement-induced phase transitions (MIPT) in quantum systems, with a particular focus on hybrid quantum circuits as a model system in one-dimension. Recent results, demonstrate how varying the rate of projective measurements can induce phase transitions, resulting in abrupt changes in the properties of the entanglement. The interplay between unitary evolution and measurement processes can be investigated, through mappings to classical statistical models and the application of replica field theory techniques. Starting from a low-entangled state, there can be three regimes characterized by different dynamics of bipartite entanglement entropies for a portion of the system: high-rate measurements leading to rapid entanglement saturation (area law), low-rate measurements allowing linear entanglement growth (up to volume law), and a critical rate at which entanglement grows logarithmically. Finally, we present results on the non-local effects of local measurements by examining the field theory of critical ground states in Tomonaga-Luttinger liquids.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了量子系统中测量诱导相变（MIPT）的研究进展，重点以一维混合量子电路为模型系统，探讨了投影测量频率如何引发纠缠特性的突变，并通过映射到经典统计模型和复制场论技术进行分析。从低纠缠初态出发，存在三种纠缠熵动力学区域：高测量率导致面积律、低测量率导致体积律、临界测量率导致对数增长。此外，还讨论了Tomonaga-Luttinger液体临界基态中局部测量的非局域效应。
AI.motivation: 理解量子系统中测量与幺正演化的竞争如何诱导相变，特别是纠缠特性的突变行为，为量子信息处理和量子热化等问题提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用混合量子电路模型，通过映射到经典统计模型和复制场论技术，分析不同测量率下纠缠熵的动力学行为。
AI.result: 识别出三种纠缠动力学区域：高测量率下纠缠快速饱和（面积律）、低测量率下线性增长（体积律）、临界测量率下对数增长；并揭示了Tomonaga-Luttinger液体中局部测量的非局域效应。
AI.conclusion: 测量诱导相变是量子系统中一种普遍存在的现象，通过调整测量率可实现对纠缠结构的调控，为理解量子测量在量子多体系统中的作用提供了重要见解。

title: Parameters Inference for Nonlinear Wave Equations with Markovian Switching
summary: Traditional partial differential equations with constant coefficients often struggle to capture abrupt changes in real-world phenomena, leading to the development of variable coefficient PDEs and Markovian switching models. Recently, research has introduced the concept of PDEs with Markov switching models, established their well-posedness and presented numerical methods. However, there has been limited discussion on parameter estimation for the jump coefficients in these models. This paper addresses this gap by focusing on parameter inference for the wave equation with Markovian switching. We propose a Bayesian statistical framework using discrete sparse Bayesian learning to establish its convergence and a uniform error bound. Our method requires fewer assumptions and enables independent parameter inference for each segment by allowing different underlying structures for the parameter estimation problem within each segmented time interval. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through three numerical cases, which involve noisy spatiotemporal data from different wave equations with Markovian switching. The results show strong performance in parameter estimation for variable coefficient PDEs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对带有马尔可夫切换的变系数波动方程，提出了一种基于离散稀疏贝叶斯学习的贝叶斯统计框架，用于估计跳跃系数参数，在较少假设下实现了参数独立推断，并通过三个数值案例验证了方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统常系数偏微分方程难以刻画实际现象中的突变，而变系数PDE和马尔可夫切换模型虽已被引入并建立了适定性和数值方法，但关于跳跃系数的参数估计问题研究尚不充分，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯统计框架，采用离散稀疏贝叶斯学习方法，建立了收敛性和一致误差界。该方法允许在每个分段时间区间内采用不同的底层结构，从而实现对每个分段的参数进行独立推断，所需假设条件较少。
AI.result: 通过三个涉及带马尔可夫切换的波动方程含噪时空数据的数值案例，验证了该方法在变系数PDE参数估计中的强性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文有效解决了马尔可夫切换波动方程中跳跃系数的参数推断问题，所提方法在较少假设条件下实现了良好的估计效果。

title: Asymptotic Normality of Generalized Low-Rank Matrix Sensing via Riemannian Geometry
summary: We prove an asymptotic normality guarantee for generalized low-rank matrix sensing -- i.e., matrix sensing under a general convex loss $\bar\ell(\langle X,M\rangle,y^*)$, where $M\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d}$ is the unknown rank-$k$ matrix, $X$ is a measurement matrix, and $y^*$ is the corresponding measurement. Our analysis relies on tools from Riemannian geometry to handle degeneracy of the Hessian of the loss due to rotational symmetry in the parameter space. In particular, we parameterize the manifold of low-rank matrices by $\barθ\barθ^\top$, where $\barθ\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$. Then, assuming the minimizer of the empirical loss $\barθ^0\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$ is in a constant size ball around the true parameters $\barθ^*$, we prove $\sqrt{n}(φ^0-φ^*)\xrightarrow{D}N(0,(H^*)^{-1})$ as $n\to\infty$, where $φ^0$ and $φ^*$ are representations of $\barθ^*$ and $\barθ^0$ in the horizontal space of the Riemannian quotient manifold $\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}/\text{O}(k)$, and $H^*$ is the Hessian of the true loss in the same representation.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了广义低秩矩阵感知问题的渐近正态性，利用黎曼几何工具处理参数空间旋转对称性导致的Hessian退化问题，在特定条件下建立了估计量的中心极限定理。
AI.motivation: 低秩矩阵感知在多种应用中广泛存在，但标准渐近正态性分析因参数空间的旋转对称性导致损失函数的Hessian矩阵退化而失效，需要发展新的理论框架来建立统计推断基础。
AI.method: 将低秩矩阵参数化为$\bar\theta\bar\theta^\top$（$\bar\theta\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}$），在黎曼商流形$\mathbb{R}^{d\times k}/\text{O}(k)$的水平空间上建立表示$\phi$，利用黎曼几何工具处理旋转对称性带来的Hessian退化问题，推导渐近正态性结果。
AI.result: 在经验损失最小化估计量$\bar\theta^0$位于真实参数$\bar\theta^*$附近常数大小球内的假设下，证明了$\sqrt{n}(\phi^0-\phi^*)\xrightarrow{D}N(0,(H^*)^{-1})$，其中$\phi^0,\phi^*$为水平空间表示，$H^*$为真实损失在该表示下的Hessian矩阵。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为广义低秩矩阵感知提供了渐近正态性理论保证，为相关问题的统计推断奠定了基础，展示了黎曼几何在解决参数空间对称性导致的统计推断难题中的有效性。

title: Variational Search Distributions
comment: Accepted as a poster in the thirteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2025
summary: We develop VSD, a method for conditioning a generative model of discrete, combinatorial designs on a rare desired class by efficiently evaluating a black-box (e.g. experiment, simulation) in a batch sequential manner. We call this task active generation; we formalize active generation's requirements and desiderata, and formulate a solution via variational inference. VSD uses off-the-shelf gradient based optimization routines, can learn powerful generative models for desirable designs, and can take advantage of scalable predictive models. We derive asymptotic convergence rates for learning the true conditional generative distribution of designs with certain configurations of our method. After illustrating the generative model on images, we empirically demonstrate that VSD can outperform existing baseline methods on a set of real sequence-design problems in various protein and DNA/RNA engineering tasks.

AI.tldr: VSD是一种通过变分推断实现批量序列式黑箱评估，从而对离散组合设计空间中的生成模型进行条件化，以高效生成稀有目标类别设计的方法（主动生成）。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型难以高效地从离散组合空间中生成满足稀有目标类别的设计，因为评估（实验/仿真）成本高昂。需要一种能够批量序列式利用黑箱评估信号来引导生成的方法。
AI.method: 提出VSD方法，将主动生成任务形式化为变分推断问题；利用现成的梯度优化例程；可结合可扩展的预测模型来学习强大的生成模型；通过理论分析给出了特定配置下学习真实条件生成分布的渐近收敛率。
AI.result: 在图像上进行了生成模型的可视化验证；在多种蛋白质和DNA/RNA工程等真实序列设计任务上，VSD显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VSD为稀有目标类别的离散组合设计提供了一个有效的主动生成框架，兼具理论收敛保证和实际工程应用中的优越性能。

title: Minimal droplet shape representation in experimental microfluidics using Fourier series and autoencoders
summary: We introduce a two-step, fully reversible process designed to project the outer shape of a generic droplet onto a lower-dimensional space. The initial step involves representing the droplet's shape as a Fourier series. Subsequently, the Fourier coefficients are reduced to lower-dimensional vectors by using autoencoder models. The exploitation of the domain knowledge of the droplet shapes allows us to map generic droplet shapes to just 2D space in contrast to previous direct methods involving autoencoders that could map it on minimum 8D space. This 6D reduction in the dimensionality of the droplet's description opens new possibilities for applications, such as automated droplet generation via reinforcement learning, the analysis of droplet shape evolution dynamics and the prediction of droplet breakup. Our findings underscore the benefits of incorporating domain knowledge into autoencoder models, highlighting the potential for increased accuracy in various other scientific disciplines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将液滴形状投影到低维空间的两步可逆方法：先用傅里叶级数表示液滴形状，再用自编码器将傅里叶系数降至2维，相比此前直接使用自编码器的最低8维实现了6维降幅，为强化学习液滴生成、形状演化分析和破碎预测等应用开辟了新可能。
AI.motivation: 现有的直接使用自编码器方法只能将液滴形状降至最低8维空间，降维效果有限，限制了液滴相关应用（如强化学习生成、动力学分析、破碎预测）的发展。
AI.method: 采用两步可逆流程：第一步将液滴形状表示为傅里叶级数；第二步利用自编码器模型将傅里叶系数进一步压缩为低维向量。该方法通过融入液滴形状的领域知识（傅里叶表示）实现了更高效的降维。
AI.result: 成功将通用液滴形状从原先最低8维降至2维，实现了6维的降幅。
AI.conclusion: 将领域知识融入自编码器模型能够显著提升降维效果，该方法可推广至其他科学领域以提高精度，并为液滴自动生成、形状演化分析和破碎预测等应用提供了新的可能性。

title: A note on Landau damping of two-species Vlasov-Poisson system
summary: In this note we adopt an approach by Grenier, Nguyen and Rodnianski in \cite{GNR} for studying the nonlinear Landau damping of the two-species Vlasov-Poisson system in the phase space $\mathbb{T}^d_x \times \mathbb{R}^d_v$ with the dimension $d\geq 1$. The main goal is twofold: one is to extend the one-species case to the two-species case where the electron mass is finite and the ion mass is sufficiently large, and the other is to modify the $G$-functional such that it involves the norm in $L^{d+1}$ instead of $L^2$ as well as derivatives up to only the first order.

AI.tldr: 本文采用Grenier、Nguyen和Rodnianski的方法，将非线性Landau阻尼从单物种Vlasov-Poisson系统推广到双物种情形（电子质量有限、离子质量足够大），并修改G-泛函使其涉及L^{d+1}范数而非L^2范数，且仅需一阶导数。
AI.motivation: 将单物种情形的非线性Landau阻尼理论推广到更物理的双物种Vlasov-Poisson系统，同时改进G-泛函的构造，降低对范数空间和导数阶数的要求。
AI.method: 采用Grenier等人（\cite{GNR}）的分析框架，针对双物种系统（电子质量有限、离子质量充分大）进行推广；修改G-泛函，使用L^{d+1}范数替代L^2范数，并将导数限制到仅一阶。
AI.result: 成功将非线性Landau阻尼结果从单物种推广到双物种情形（电子质量有限、离子质量足够大），并实现了G-泛函在L^{d+1}范数及一阶导数框架下的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为双物种等离子体系统中非线性Landau阻尼的数学分析提供了更简洁、更低正则性要求的理论工具。

title: Fibrations by plane projective rational quartic curves in characteristic two
comment: 33 pages. Minor corrections and updates. Comments welcome at any time!
summary: We give a complete classification, up to birational equivalence, of all fibrations by plane projective rational quartic curves in characteristic two.

AI.tldr: 本文在特征为2的域上，对平面射影有理四次曲线纤维化进行了双有理等价下的完全分类。
AI.motivation: 在特征为2的代数几何中，曲线纤维化的分类是一个基础且重要的问题。四次有理曲线是一类重要的代数曲线，但其在特征2下的纤维化分类此前尚未有完整结果，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用双有理等价作为分类标准，对特征2下的平面射影有理四次曲线纤维化进行系统分析，可能涉及对曲线奇点、退化类型以及纤维化结构的细致考察。
AI.result: 给出了特征2下平面射影有理四次曲线纤维化的完全分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文完成了特征2情形下平面射影有理四次曲线纤维化的双有理等价分类，为相关领域的进一步研究提供了基础。

title: Rational Curves on Real Classical Groups
summary: This paper is concerned with rational curves on real classical groups. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) We determine the structure of quadratic rational curves on real classical groups. As a consequence, we completely classify quadratic rational curves on $\mathrm{U}_n$, $\mathrm{O}_n(\mathbb{R})$, $\mathrm{O}_{n-1,1}(\mathbb{R})$ and $\mathrm{O}_{n-2,2}(\mathbb{R})$. (ii) We prove a decomposition theorem for rational curves on real classical groups, which can be regarded as a non-commutative generalization of the fundamental theorem of algebra and partial fraction decomposition. (iii) As an application of (i) and (ii), we generalize Kempe's Universality Theorem to rational curves on homogeneous spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了实典型群上的有理曲线，主要贡献包括：分类了二次有理曲线结构、证明了有理曲线的分解定理（作为代数学基本定理和部分分式分解的非交换推广），并将Kempe普适性定理推广到齐性空间上的有理曲线。
AI.motivation: 理解实典型群上有理曲线的结构，特别是二次有理曲线的完整分类，以及建立更一般的分解理论。
AI.method: 通过代数几何与李群理论相结合的方法，分析实典型群（酉群、正交群等）上有理曲线的代数结构，利用非交换代数的视角推广经典分解定理。
AI.result: (i) 确定了实典型群上二次有理曲线的结构，并完全分类了U_n、O_n(R)、O_{n-1,1}(R)和O_{n-2,2}(R)上的二次有理曲线；(ii) 证明了有理曲线的分解定理；(iii) 将Kempe普适性定理推广到齐性空间。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为实典型群上的有理曲线提供了系统性的理论框架，建立了与非交换代数、经典分解定理的联系，并拓展了Kempe定理的适用范围。

title: Small-amplitude finite-depth Stokes waves are transversally unstable
comment: Slighted extended revised version, 32 pages, 2 figures
summary: We prove that all irrotational planar periodic traveling waves of sufficiently small-amplitude are spectrally unstable as solutions to three-dimensional inviscid finite-depth gravity water-waves equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了所有小振幅无旋平面周期行波作为三维无粘有限水深重力水波方程的解都是谱不稳定的。
AI.motivation: 研究三维背景下有限水深重力水波方程的谱稳定性，特别是小振幅无旋平面周期行波的稳定性问题。
AI.method: 通过谱分析的方法，对三维无粘有限水深重力水波方程进行稳定性分析。
AI.result: 所有小振幅无旋平面周期行波在三维情况下都是谱不稳定的。
AI.conclusion: 三维有限水深重力水波方程中，小振幅无旋平面周期行波存在谱不稳定性。

title: A note on spatially inhomogeneous Cahn-Hilliard energies
summary:
In 2023, Cristoferi, Fonseca and Ganedi proved that Cahn-Hilliard type energies with spatially inhomogeneous potentials converge to the usual (isotropic and homogeneous) perimeter functional if the length-scale $δ$ of spatial inhomogeneity in the double-well potential is small compared to the length-scale $\varepsilon$ of phase transitions. We give a simple new proof under a slightly stronger assumption on the regularity of $W$ with respect to the phase parameter. The simplicity of the proof allows us to easily find multiple generalizations in other directions, including stochastic potentials and potentials which may become zero outside the wells ('voids'). The theoretical results are complemented by numerical experiments.
  Our main message is that, across a wide variety of settings, nothing that looks sufficiently homogeneous at the transition length scale between phases, affects the limiting behavior in the slightest. The notable exception is the setting of potentials with spatially varying potential wells, where a stronger scale separation $δ\ll \varepsilon^{3/2}$ is needed. Based on the analysis, we further provide a modified Modica-Mortola type energy which does not require such a scale separation.
  The theoretical analysis is complemented by numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Cahn-Hilliard型能量在空间非均匀势下的极限行为，给出了新的简化证明，证明在相变长度尺度ε上足够均匀的势能不会影响极限行为（即退化为各向同性均匀的周长泛函），但空间变化势阱需要更强的尺度分离δ≪ε^{3/2}，并提出了无需该尺度分离的修正Modica-Mortola型能量。理论结果辅以数值实验验证。
AI.motivation: 延续Cristoferi、Fonseca和Ganedi（2023）关于Cahn-Hilliard型能量在空间非均匀势下收敛到均匀周长泛函的工作，但希望在更弱的假设下给出更简洁的证明，并探索更多推广情形（随机势、势阱外为零的势等）。核心动机是理解空间非均匀性如何影响相分离模型的极限行为。
AI.method: 对相参数W施加稍强的正则性假设，给出简化的新证明；通过分析证明的简洁性，自然推广到随机势和允许"空洞"（势阱外为零）的势能情形；特别分析空间变化势阱情形，发现需要δ≪ε^{3/2}的更强尺度分离条件，并据此设计修正的Modica-Mortola型能量以消除该尺度分离要求。
AI.result: 1) 在更简化的证明下，验证了足够均匀的空间非均匀势不影响极限行为；2) 证明了该结论可推广至随机势和含空洞势能；3) 发现空间变化势阱需要更强的尺度分离δ≪ε^{3/2}；4) 提出无需该尺度分离的修正Modica-Mortola能量；5) 数值实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 主要信息是：只要势能在相变过渡长度尺度上看起来足够均匀，就不会影响极限行为；唯一的例外是空间变化势阱，需要更强的尺度分离，但所提出的修正能量可以绕过这一限制。

title: Algebraic cycles and Hitchin systems
comment: Accepted version; to appear at Annales Scientifiques de l'École Normale Supérieure. 48 pages
summary:
The purpose of this paper is to study motivic aspects of the Hitchin system for $\mathrm{GL}_n$. Our results include the following. (a) We prove the motivic decomposition conjecture of Corti-Hanamura for the Hitchin system; in particular, the decomposition theorem associated with the Hitchin system is induced by algebraic cycles. This yields an unconditional construction of the motivic perverse filtration for the Hitchin system, which lifts the cohomological/sheaf-theoretic perverse filtration. (b) We prove that the inverse of the relative Hard Lefschetz symmetry is induced by a relative algebraic correspondence, confirming the relative Lefschetz standard conjecture for the Hitchin system. (c) We show a strong perversity bound for the normalized Chern classes of a universal bundle with respect to the motivic perverse filtration; this specializes to the sheaf-theoretic result obtained earlier by Maulik-Shen. (d) We prove a $χ$-independence result for the relative Chow motives associated with Hitchin systems.
  Our methods combine Fourier transforms for compactified Jacobian fibrations associated with integral locally planar curves, nearby and vanishing cycle techniques, and a Springer-theoretic interpretation of parabolic Hitchin moduli spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了GL_n Hitchin系统的动机方面，证明了Corti-Hanamura的动机分解猜想、相对Hard Lefschetz标准猜想，建立了动机反常滤过的无条件构造，证明了万有丛的Chern类的强反常性界以及Hitchin系统的χ-独立性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究Hitchin系统的动机方面，旨在建立其分解定理与代数环的关联，并验证相关标准猜想。
AI.method: 结合了紧致化雅可比纤维化的Fourier变换、局部平面曲线上的近邻与消失环技术，以及抛物Hitchin模空间的Springer理论解释。
AI.result: (a)证明了Corti-Hanamura的动机分解猜想；(b)证明了相对Hard Lefschetz标准猜想；(c)证明了万有丛归一化Chern类的强反常性界；(d)证明了Hitchin系统相对Chow动机的χ-独立性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Hitchin系统建立了完整的动机理论框架，包括动机反常滤过的无条件构造以及多个重要猜想和结果的证明。

title: A Two-stage Reinforcement Learning-based Approach for Multi-entity Task Allocation
summary: Task allocation is a key combinatorial optimization problem, crucial for modern applications such as multi-robot cooperation and resource scheduling. Decision makers must allocate entities to tasks reasonably across different scenarios. However, traditional methods assume static attributes and numbers of tasks and entities, often relying on dynamic programming and heuristic algorithms for solutions. In reality, task allocation resembles Markov decision processes, with dynamically changing task and entity attributes. Thus, algorithms must dynamically allocate tasks based on their states. To address this issue, we propose a two-stage task allocation algorithm based on similarity, utilizing reinforcement learning to learn allocation strategies. The proposed pre-assign strategy allows entities to preselect appropriate tasks, effectively avoiding local optima and thereby better finding the optimal allocation. We also introduce an attention mechanism and a hyperparameter network structure to adapt to the changing number and attributes of entities and tasks, enabling our network structure to generalize to new tasks. Experimental results across multiple environments demonstrate that our algorithm effectively addresses the challenges of dynamic task allocation in practical applications. Compared to heuristic algorithms like genetic algorithms, our reinforcement learning approach better solves dynamic allocation problems and achieves zero-shot generalization to new tasks with good performance. The code is available at https://github.com/yk7333/TaskAllocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相似性的两阶段强化学习任务分配算法，通过预分配策略、注意力机制和超参数网络结构，有效解决动态任务分配问题，并实现对新任务的零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统任务分配方法假设任务和实体的属性及数量是静态的，依赖动态规划和启发式算法。然而实际中任务分配类似于马尔可夫决策过程，实体和任务的属性会动态变化，现有方法难以处理这种动态性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于相似性的两阶段任务分配算法。第一阶段采用预分配策略，让实体预先选择合适的任务，避免局部最优；第二阶段引入注意力机制和超参数网络结构，适应实体和任务数量及属性的动态变化，实现对新任务的泛化。
AI.result: 在多个环境下的实验表明，所提算法能有效应对动态任务分配挑战。相比遗传算法等启发式方法，强化学习方法能更好地解决动态分配问题，并实现对未见任务的零样本泛化，性能良好。
AI.conclusion: 基于相似性的两阶段强化学习任务分配算法是解决动态任务分配问题的有效方案，具有零样本泛化能力，在实际应用中具有潜力。

title: Granular-Balls based Fuzzy Twin Support Vector Machine for Classification
summary: The twin support vector machine (TWSVM) classifier has attracted increasing attention because of its low computational complexity. However, its performance tends to degrade when samples are affected by noise. The granular-ball fuzzy support vector machine (GBFSVM) classifier partly alleviates the adverse effects of noise, but it relies solely on the distance between the granular-ball's center and the class center to design the granular-ball membership function. In this paper, we first introduce the granular-ball twin support vector machine (GBTWSVM) classifier, which integrates granular-ball computing (GBC) with the twin support vector machine (TWSVM) classifier. By replacing traditional point inputs with granular-balls, we demonstrate how to derive a pair of non-parallel hyperplanes for the GBTWSVM classifier by solving a quadratic programming problem. Subsequently, we design the membership and non-membership functions of granular-balls using Pythagorean fuzzy sets to differentiate the contributions of granular-balls in various regions. Additionally, we develop the granular-ball fuzzy twin support vector machine (GBFTSVM) classifier by incorporating GBC with the fuzzy twin support vector machine (FTSVM) classifier. We demonstrate how to derive a pair of non-parallel hyperplanes for the GBFTSVM classifier by solving a quadratic programming problem. We also design algorithms for the GBTSVM classifier and the GBFTSVM classifier. Finally, the superior classification performance of the GBTWSVM classifier and the GBFTSVM classifier on 20 benchmark datasets underscores their scalability, efficiency, and robustness in tackling classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于粒球计算的孪生支持向量机（GBTWSVM）和模糊孪生支持向量机（GBFTSVM）分类器，通过粒球替代传统点输入，并利用毕达哥拉斯模糊集设计隶属/非隶属函数以增强噪声鲁棒性，在20个基准数据集上验证了其扩展性、效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统TWSVM在噪声影响下性能下降，而GBFSVM仅依赖粒球中心到类中心的距离设计隶属函数，噪声抑制能力有限。本文旨在通过粒球计算与模糊集理论结合，提升TWSVM对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1. 将粒球计算（GBC）与TWSVM结合，用粒球替代点输入，通过求解二次规划问题推导非平行超平面；2. 利用毕达哥拉斯模糊集设计粒球的隶属函数和非隶属函数，区分不同区域粒球的贡献；3. 进一步将GBC与FTSVM结合，构建GBFTSVM，同样通过二次规划求解非平行超平面。
AI.result: 在20个基准数据集上，GBTWSVM和GBFTSVM分类器表现出优于对比方法的分类性能，验证了其可扩展性、效率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的粒球孪生支持向量机系列方法有效缓解了噪声影响，提升了分类性能，为大规模含噪分类任务提供了高效鲁棒的解决方案。

title: On the backward stability of s-step GMRES
summary:
Communication, i.e., data movement, is a critical bottleneck for the performance of classical Krylov subspace method solvers on modern computer architectures. Variants of these methods which avoid communication have been introduced, which, while equivalent in exact arithmetic, can be unstable in finite precision. In this work, we address the backward stability of $s$-step GMRES, also known as communication-avoiding GMRES. Compared to the ``modular framework'' proposed in [A.~Buttari, N.~J.~Higham, T.~Mary, \& B.~Vieublé. Preprint in 2024.], we present an improved framework for simplifying the analysis of $s$-step GMRES, which includes standard GMRES ($s=1$) as a special case, by isolating the effects of rounding errors in the QR factorization and the solution of the least squares problem. The key advantage of this new framework is that it is evident how the orthogonalization method affects the backward error, and it is not necessary to re-evaluate anything other than the orthogonalization itself when modifying the orthogonalization used in GMRES. Using this framework, we analyze $s$-step GMRES with popular block orthogonalization methods: block modified Gram--Schmidt and reorthogonalized block classical Gram--Schmidt algorithms.
  An example illustrates the resulting instability of $s$-step GMRES when paired with the classical $s$-step Arnoldi process and shows the limitations of popular strategies for resolving this instability. To address this issue, we propose a modified $s$-step Arnoldi process that allows for much larger block size $s$ while maintaining satisfactory accuracy, as confirmed by our numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对通信避免的$s$-步GMRES方法，提出了一个改进的后向稳定性分析框架，能够隔离QR分解和最小二乘问题求解的舍入误差影响，并基于此框架分析了块正交化方法（block MGS和reorthogonalized block CGS）的稳定性。作者发现经典的$s$-步Arnoldi过程存在数值不稳定性，并提出了一种修正的$s$-步Arnoldi过程，在保持精度的同时支持更大的块大小$s$。
AI.motivation: 通信（数据移动）是现代计算机架构上经典Krylov子空间方法求解器的关键性能瓶颈。虽然已有避免通信的变体方法（$s$-步方法）被提出，但它们在有限精度算法中可能不稳定。现有工作需要一个更简洁的分析框架来理解$s$-步GMRES的后向稳定性，特别是正交化方法对误差的影响。
AI.method: 1) 提出了一个改进的分析框架，相比Buttari等人的模块化框架，能更清晰地隔离QR分解和最小二乘求解的舍入误差影响，将标准GMRES作为$s=1$的特例。2) 利用该框架分析了$s$-步GMRES结合block MGS和reorthogonalized block CGS两种块正交化方法的稳定性。3) 提出了一种修正的$s$-步Arnoldi过程，以解决经典$s$-步Arnoldi过程的不稳定性问题。
AI.result: 1) 新框架使正交化方法对后向误差的影响变得直观，修改正交化过程时只需重新评估正交化本身。2) 通过实例展示了$s$-步GMRES与经典$s$-步Arnoldi过程结合时的不稳定性，并揭示了现有解决策略的局限性。3) 数值实验证实了所提修正$s$-步Arnoldi过程能够在保持满意精度的同时支持更大的块大小$s$。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进框架简化了$s$-步GMRES的后向稳定性分析，并揭示了经典$s$-步Arnoldi过程的不稳定性根源。所提出的修正$s$-步Arnoldi过程有效地解决了这一问题，允许使用更大的块大小$s$以获取更好的通信避免效果，同时保持良好的数值精度。

title: Flexible Quaternion Generalized Minimal Residual Method for Ill-Posed Quaternion Inverse Problems
summary: The main goal of this paper is to propose a new quaternion total variation regularization model for solving linear ill-posed quaternion inverse problems, which arise from three-dimensional signal filtering or color image processing. The quaternion total variation term in the model is represented by collaborative total variation regularization and approximated by a quaternion iteratively reweighted norm. A novel flexible quaternion generalized minimal residual method is presented to quickly solve this model. An improved convergence theory is established to obtain a sharp upper bound of the residual norm of quaternion minimal residual method (QGMRES). The convergence theory is also presented for preconditioned QGMRES. Numerical experiments indicate the superiority of the proposed model and algorithms over the state-of-the-art methods in terms of iteration steps, CPU time, and the quality criteria of restored color images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于四元数全变分正则化的新模型，用于解决线性不适定四元数逆问题（如3D信号滤波和彩色图像处理）。该模型采用协同全变分正则化，并通过四元数迭代重加权范数近似。同时提出了一种灵活的四元数广义最小残差法来快速求解，并建立了改进的收敛理论。数值实验表明该方法在迭代步数、CPU时间和恢复图像质量上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理三维信号滤波和彩色图像处理中的线性不适定四元数逆问题时存在不足，需要提出更有效的正则化模型和快速求解算法。
AI.method: 提出了四元数全变分正则化模型，使用协同全变分正则化项和四元数迭代重加权范数进行近似，并设计了一种灵活的四元数广义最小残差法（QGMRES）来快速求解该模型。
AI.result: 建立了改进的收敛理论，获得了QGMRES残差范数的锐利上界，并给出了预处理QGMRES的收敛性分析。数值实验表明，在迭代步数、CPU时间和彩色图像恢复质量指标上，所提模型和算法优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的四元数全变分正则化模型和灵活的四元数广义最小残差法能有效解决线性不适定四元数逆问题，在彩色图像恢复等应用中具有优越性能。

title: Solution of parameter-dependent diffusion equation in layered media
summary: This work studies the parameter-dependent diffusion equation in a two-dimensional domain consisting of locally mirror symmetric layers. It is assumed that the diffusion coefficient is a constant in each layer. The goal is to find approximate parameter-to-solution maps that have a small number of terms. It is shown that in the case of two layers one can find a solution formula consisting of three terms with explicit dependencies on the diffusion coefficient. The formula is based on decomposing the solution into orthogonal parts related to both of the layers and the interface between them. This formula is then expanded to an approximate one for the multi-layer case. We give an analytical formula for square layers and use the finite element formulation for more general layers. The results are illustrated with numerical examples and have applications for reduced basis methods by analyzing the Kolmogorov n-width.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维局部镜像对称分层区域中参数依赖的扩散方程，假设每层扩散系数为常数。目标是在两层情况下找到包含三项的显式依赖解公式，并将其推广到多层近似解。对正方形层给出解析公式，一般层使用有限元法，通过Kolmogorov n-width分析应用于降基方法。
AI.motivation: 寻找具有少量项的近似参数-解映射，以高效处理分层介质中的扩散问题，为降基方法提供理论基础。
AI.method: 将解分解为与各层及层界面相关的正交部分；两层情况得到三项显式公式；多层情况扩展为近似公式；正方形层给出解析形式，一般层采用有限元法；通过Kolmogorov n-width分析评估。
AI.result: 两层情况得到包含三项的显式解公式，该公式对扩散系数具有显式依赖；多层情况获得近似解公式；数值算例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分解方法能有效减少参数-解映射的项数，对降基方法中的Kolmogorov n-width分析具有应用价值，适用于分层介质扩散问题的高效求解。

title: Convergence Conditions for Stochastic Line Search Based Optimization of Over-parametrized Models
summary: In this paper, we deal with algorithms to solve the finite-sum problems related to fitting over-parametrized models, that typically satisfy the interpolation condition. In particular, we focus on approaches based on stochastic line searches and employing general search directions. We define conditions on the sequence of search directions that guarantee finite termination and bounds for the backtracking procedure. Moreover, we shed light on the additional property of directions needed to prove fast (linear) convergence of the general class of algorithms when applied to PL functions in the interpolation regime. From the point of view of algorithms design, the proposed analysis identifies safeguarding conditions that could be employed in relevant algorithmic frameworks. In particular, it could be of interest to integrate stochastic line searches within momentum, conjugate gradient or adaptive preconditioning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在过参数化模型（满足插值条件）的有限和问题中，使用随机线搜索和通用搜索方向的算法。定义了保证有限终止和后向追踪过程界限的搜索方向序列条件，并揭示了在插值机制下对PL函数实现快速（线性）收敛所需的额外方向性质。分析识别了可应用于动量法、共轭梯度法或自适应预条件方法等算法框架中的保护条件。
AI.motivation: 解决过参数化模型拟合中有限和问题的算法设计，特别是利用插值条件来保证随机线搜索类算法的收敛性与效率。
AI.method: 对使用通用搜索方向的随机线搜索算法进行理论分析，定义搜索方向序列的条件（保证有限终止和后向追踪界限），并揭示实现PL函数线性收敛所需的额外方向性质。
AI.result: 给出了保证有限终止和后向追踪过程界限的搜索方向条件，以及在插值机制下对PL函数实现线性收敛的额外方向性质。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分析识别了可集成到动量法、共轭梯度法或自适应预条件方法等算法框架中的保护条件，为随机线搜索在更广泛算法框架中的应用提供了理论基础。

title: ContextCite: Attributing Model Generation to Context
summary: How do language models use information provided as context when generating a response? Can we infer whether a particular generated statement is actually grounded in the context, a misinterpretation, or fabricated? To help answer these questions, we introduce the problem of context attribution: pinpointing the parts of the context (if any) that led a model to generate a particular statement. We then present ContextCite, a simple and scalable method for context attribution that can be applied on top of any existing language model. Finally, we showcase the utility of ContextCite through three applications: (1) helping verify generated statements (2) improving response quality by pruning the context and (3) detecting poisoning attacks. We provide code for ContextCite at https://github.com/MadryLab/context-cite.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContextCite方法，用于追溯语言模型生成语句时上下文中的具体来源，并展示了其在验证生成内容、改进响应质量和检测投毒攻击三方面的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在利用上下文生成回复时，用户难以判断生成内容是否真正基于上下文、存在误解或是完全捏造，因此需要一种可解释的方法来定位上下文对生成结果的具体影响。
AI.method: 提出ContextCite方法，这是一种简单且可扩展的上下文归因技术，能够精确识别导致模型生成特定语句的上下文部分，且可与任何现有语言模型结合使用。
AI.result: 通过三个应用场景验证了ContextCite的有效性：帮助验证生成语句的准确性、通过修剪上下文来提升回复质量、以及检测投毒攻击。
AI.conclusion: ContextCite为语言模型的上下文归因问题提供了一种实用解决方案，有助于提升模型输出的可解释性和可信度。

title: Fault-Tolerant Decentralized Control for Large-scale Inverter-based Resources for Active Power Tracking
comment: Accepted for Joint Submission MECC-ASME Letters in Dynamic Systems and Control
summary: Integration of Inverter Based Resources (IBRs) which lack the intrinsic characteristics such as the inertial response of the traditional synchronous-generator (SG) based sources presents a new challenge in the form of analyzing the grid stability under their presence. While the dynamic composition of IBRs differs from that of the SGs, the control objective remains similar in terms of tracking the desired active power. This letter presents a decentralized primal-dual-based fault-tolerant control framework for the power allocation in IBRs. Overall, a hierarchical control algorithm is developed with a lower level addressing the current control and the parameter estimation for the IBRs and the higher level acting as the reference power generator to the low level based on the desired active power profile. The decentralized network-based algorithm adaptively splits the desired power between the IBRs taking into consideration the health of the IBRs transmission lines. The proposed framework is tested through a simulation on the network of IBRs and the high-level controller performance is compared against the existing framework in the literature. The proposed algorithm shows significant performance improvement in the magnitude of power deviation and settling time to the nominal value under faulty conditions as compared to the algorithm in the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原始-对偶的分布式容错控制框架，用于逆变器基资源（IBRs）的功率分配。该框架采用分层控制：底层进行电流控制与参数估计，高层根据期望有功功率和传输线路健康状态自适应分配功率。仿真实验表明，与现有方法相比，该方法在故障条件下能显著降低功率偏差幅度和缩短稳定时间。
AI.motivation: 逆变器基资源（IBRs）缺乏传统同步发电机（SG）固有的惯性响应等特性，给电网稳定性分析带来新挑战。需要开发适应IBRs动态特性的控制框架，实现故障条件下的可靠功率分配。
AI.method: 采用分层控制架构：1）底层负责电流控制和IBRs参数估计；2）高层作为参考功率生成器，基于期望有功功率配置，采用去中心化网络算法，考虑传输线路健康状况，自适应地在各IBRs之间分配功率。整体算法基于原始-对偶框架实现容错控制。
AI.result: 通过网络仿真验证，与现有文献算法相比，所提算法在故障条件下功率偏差幅度显著减小，恢复至额定值的稳定时间明显缩短。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的去中心化原始-对偶容错控制框架能够有效提升IBRs网络在故障条件下的功率分配性能，具有更好的动态响应和鲁棒性。

title: Optimal Placement and Coordinated Scheduling of Distributed Space-Based Lasers for Orbital Debris Remediation
comment: 42 pages, Advances in Space Research (accepted), Copyright 2025. This manuscript version is made available under the CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0 license
summary: The significant expansion of the orbital debris population poses a serious threat to the safety and sustainability of space operations. This paper investigates orbital debris remediation through a constellation of collaborative space-based lasers, leveraging the principle of momentum transfer onto debris via laser ablation. A novel delta-v vector analysis framework quantifies the cumulative effects of multiple concurrent laser-to-debris (L2D) engagements by utilizing the vector composition of the imparted delta-v vectors. The paper formulates the Concurrent Location-Scheduling Optimization Problem (CLSP) to optimize the placement of laser platforms and the scheduling of L2D engagements, aiming to maximize debris remediation capacity. Given the computational intractability of the CLSP, a decomposition strategy is employed, yielding two sequential subproblems: (1) determining optimal laser platform locations via the Maximal Covering Location Problem, and (2) scheduling L2D engagements using a novel integer linear programming approach to maximize debris remediation capacity. Computational experiments evaluate the efficacy of the proposed framework across diverse mission scenarios, demonstrating critical constellation functions such as collaborative and controlled nudging, deorbiting, and just-in-time collision avoidance. A sensitivity analysis further explores the impact of varying the number and distribution of laser platforms on debris remediation capacity, offering insights into optimizing the performance of space-based laser constellations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过空间协作激光卫星星座进行轨道碎片清除的框架，利用激光烧蚀动量转移原理，通过向量分析和优化调度方法最大化碎片清除能力。
AI.motivation: 轨道碎片数量显著增长，严重威胁空间操作的安全性和可持续性，亟需有效的碎片清除方案。
AI.method: 提出delta-v向量分析框架量化多激光-碎片交会的累积效果；建立并发定位-调度优化问题（CLSP），并采用分解策略将其分为最大覆盖定位问题和整数线性规划调度问题两个子问题依次求解。
AI.result: 计算实验验证了框架在多种任务场景中的有效性，展示了协作受控推进、脱轨和及时碰撞规避等功能；敏感性分析探讨了激光平台数量和分布对清除能力的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够有效优化空间激光星座的配置与调度，为提升轨道碎片清除能力提供了理论依据和优化工具。

title: Weak-inertial effects on destabilized receding contact lines
summary: It is known that beyond a critical speed, the straight contact line of a partially-wetting liquid destabilizes into a corner. In one of the earliest theoretical works exploring this phenomenon, [L. Limat and H. A. Stone, Europhys. Lett. 65(3), 2004] elicited a self-similar conical structure of the interface in the viscous regime. However, noting that inertia is not expected to be negligible at contact line speeds close to, and beyond the critical value for many common liquids, we provide the leading-order inertial correction to their solution. In particular, we find the self-similar corrections to the interface shape as well as the flow-field, and also determine their scaling with the capillary number. We find that inertia invariably modifies the interface into a cusp-like shape with an increased film thickness. Furthermore, when incorporating contact line dynamics into the model, resulting in a narrowing of the corner as the contact line speed increases, we still observe an overall increase in the inertial contribution with speed despite the increased confinement.

AI.tldr: 本文针对部分润湿液体接触线超过临界速度时直线失稳形成尖角的现象，在Limat和Stone的粘性自相似圆锥解基础上，引入了惯性修正项。研究发现，惯性修正会使界面变为尖点状并增加薄膜厚度，且随着接触线速度增加，惯性贡献整体增大。
AI.motivation: 前人工作(Limat & Stone, 2004)给出了粘性 regime 下自相似的圆锥界面结构解，但对于许多常见液体，在接触线速度接近或超过临界值时惯性效应不可忽略，需要提供惯性修正。
AI.method: 在Limat和Stone粘性自相似解的基础上，引入惯性项的领头阶修正，求解界面形状和流场的自相似修正量，并确定其随毛细数的标度关系。
AI.result: 惯性修正使界面变为尖点(cusp-like)形状，薄膜厚度增加；将接触线动力学纳入模型后，尽管接触线速度增加导致尖角变窄，惯性贡献仍整体增大。
AI.conclusion: 惯性效应在高速接触线失稳问题中不可忽略，它会显著改变界面形态和薄膜厚度分布，且其影响随速度增加而增强。

title: Air jet impact craters on granular surfaces: a universal scaling
summary: Craters form as the lander's exhaust interacts with the planetary surfaces. Understanding this phenomenon is imperative to ensure safe landings. We investigate crater morphology, where a turbulent air jet impinges on the granular surfaces. To reveal the fundamental aspect of this phenomenon, systematic experiments are performed with various air jet velocities, nozzle positions, and grain properties. The resultant crater morphology is characterized by an aspect ratio. We find a universal scaling law in which the aspect ratio is scaled by the dimensionless variable consisting of air velocity at the nozzle, speed of sound in air, nozzle diameter, nozzle tip distance from the surface, grain diameter, the density of grains, and density of air. The obtained scaling reveals the crossover of the length scales governing crater aspect ratio, providing a useful guideline for ensuring safe landings. Moreover, we report a novel drop shaped subsurface cratering phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统实验研究了湍流射流冲击颗粒表面形成的陨石坑形态，发现宽深比与无量纲变量满足普适标度律，并揭示了控制宽深比的长度尺度交叉现象，为安全着陆提供了指导。此外，还观察到一种新颖的泪滴状次表层成坑现象。
AI.motivation: 着陆器排气与行星表面相互作用形成的陨石坑可能威胁安全着陆，理解这一现象对确保着陆安全至关重要。
AI.method: 通过系统实验，改变射流速度、喷嘴位置和颗粒属性，测量陨石坑的宽深比，并寻找其与无量纲变量（包括喷嘴处空气速度、空气中声速、喷嘴直径、喷嘴距表面距离、颗粒直径、颗粒密度和空气密度）的标度关系。
AI.result: 发现陨石坑宽深比与上述无量纲变量满足普适标度律，揭示了控制宽深比的长度尺度交叉行为；同时观察到一种新颖的泪滴状次表层成坑现象。
AI.conclusion: 该标度律可用于预测陨石坑形态，为确保安全着陆提供实用指导；泪滴状次表层成坑现象的发现丰富了人们对射流-颗粒相互作用的认知。

title: BMach: a Bayesian machine for optimizing Hubbard U parameters in DFT+U with machine learning
summary: Accurately determining the effective Hubbard parameter $(U_{eff})$ in Density Functional Theory plus U (DFT+U) remains a significant challenge, often relying on empirical methods or linear response theory, which frequently fail to predict accurate material properties. This study introduces BMach, an advanced Bayesian optimization algorithm that refines $U_{eff}$ by incorporating electronic properties, such as band gaps and eigenvalues, alongside structural properties like lattice parameters. Implemented within the Quantum Espresso platform, BMach demonstrates superior accuracy and reduced computational cost compared to traditional methods. The BMach-optimized $U_{eff}$ values yield electronic properties that align closely with experimental and high-level theoretical results, providing a robust framework for high-throughput materials discovery and detailed electronic property characterization across diverse material systems.

AI.tldr: BMach是一种基于贝叶斯优化的算法，通过同时优化电子和结构性质来精确确定DFT+U中的有效Hubbard参数(U_eff)，相比传统方法具有更高精度和更低计算成本。
AI.motivation: DFT+U中有效Hubbard参数(U_eff)的精确确定长期依赖经验方法或线性响应理论，这些方法往往无法准确预测材料性质，缺乏可靠且高效的优化框架。
AI.method: 提出BMach算法，采用贝叶斯优化策略，同时整合电子性质（带隙、本征值）和结构性质（晶格参数）作为优化目标，在Quantum Espresso平台上实现。
AI.result: BMach优化的U_eff值使电子性质与实验和高水平理论结果高度吻合，同时相比传统方法显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: BMach为高通量材料发现和多样化材料体系的电子性质表征提供了稳健的框架，在精度和效率上均优于传统方法。

title: PyFR v2.0.3: Towards Industrial Adoption of Scale-Resolving Simulations
summary: PyFR is an open-source cross-platform computational fluid dynamics framework based on the high-order Flux Reconstruction approach, specifically designed for undertaking high-accuracy scale-resolving simulations in the vicinity of complex engineering geometries. Since the initial release of PyFR v0.1.0 in 2013, a range of new capabilities have been added to the framework, with a view to enabling industrial adoption of the capability. This paper provides details of those enhancements as released in PyFR v2.0.3, explains efforts to grow an engaged developer and user community, and provides latest performance and scaling results on up to 1024 AMD Instinct MI250X accelerators of Frontier at ORNL (each with two GCDs), and up to 2048 NVIDIA GH200 GPUs on Alps at CSCS.

AI.tldr: PyFR v2.0.3是一个基于高阶通量重构方法的开源CFD框架，新增了多项功能以推动工业应用，并在AMD Instinct MI250X（最高1024个加速器）和NVIDIA GH200 GPU（最高2048个）上展示了最新的性能和扩展性结果。
AI.motivation: 自2013年发布v0.1.0以来，PyFR旨在实现高精度尺度解析模拟在复杂工程几何体上的工业级应用，需通过持续增强功能和社区建设来推动工业采纳。
AI.method: 基于高阶Flux Reconstruction方法，在PyFR v2.0.3中集成新功能，并在Frontier（ORNL）和Alps（CSCS）超算上开展大规模性能测试。
AI.result: 在Frontier上最高扩展至1024个AMD Instinct MI250X加速器（含双GCD），在Alps上最高扩展至2048个NVIDIA GH200 GPU，均取得良好性能与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: PyFR v2.0.3通过新功能增强和社区建设，向工业级高精度CFD模拟迈出重要一步，大规模异构计算平台验证了其高效并行扩展能力。

title: Link rewiring with local information--induced hybrid percolation transitions
summary: When a link is occupied to restrict the growth of large clusters using the size information of a finite number of finite clusters, so-called local information, an abrupt but continuous transition is exhibited. We report here that a hybrid transition can occur if each node rewires its links to restrict the growth of large clusters using local information continuously up to a finite number of rewirings. For example, on a branch of a Bethe lattice with coordination number $4$, each node rewires its outgoing links to its descendants several times in ascending order of cluster size to reach a steady state. Then a hybrid transition with nontrivial critical exponents occurs as a function of the link fraction at the steady state. We observe this phenomenon even on a Bethe lattice without hierarchy, supporting that such a phenomenon may occur on diverse tree networks with finite degrees.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用局部信息（有限数量的有限簇的大小信息）限制大簇生长时，通过连续有限次重连链路，可以在贝特 lattice 上观察到混合相变（hybrid transition）现象，并具有非平凡临界指数。
AI.motivation: 探索在仅使用局部信息（而非全局信息）限制大簇生长的条件下，是否以及如何产生混合相变（hybrid transition），即相变兼具连续与不连续特征。
AI.method: 在配位数为4的贝特 lattice 分支上，每个节点将其出向链路按子代簇大小升序多次重连，直至达到稳态。通过稳态时链路分数作为控制参数观察相变行为。
AI.result: 在贝特 lattice 上观察到混合相变，具有非平凡的临界指数；即使在无层次结构的贝特 lattice 上也观察到该现象。
AI.conclusion: 利用局部信息的有限次重连可在树状网络上产生混合相变，且该现象可能在多种有限度的树状网络中出现。

title: Shortcuts to adiabaticity in open quantum critical systems
summary: We study shortcuts to adiabaticity (STAs) through counterdiabatic driving in quantum critical systems in the presence of dissipation. We evaluate unitary as well as nonunitary controls, such that the system density matrix follows a prescribed trajectory corresponding to the eigenstates of a time-dependent reference Hamiltonian at any instant of time. The strength of the dissipator control term for the low-energy states shows universal scaling close to criticality. Using the example of free-fermionic systems, in particular, the transverse-field Ising model, we show that in contrast to STAs in closed quantum critical systems, here, STAs may require multibody interactions terms, even away from criticality, owing to the change in entropy of the time-dependent target state. Further, the associated heat current shows an extremum, while power dissipation changes curvature, close to criticality, and analogous to unitary control, no operational cost is associated with implementation of the exact counterdiabatic Hamiltonian. We believe the counterdiabatic protocol studied here could be of fundamental importance for understanding STAs in many-body open quantum systems and could be highly relevant for varied topics involving open many-body quantum systems, such as quantum computation and many-body quantum heat engines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了存在耗散时量子临界系统中的反绝热驱动捷径绝热过程，发现低能态耗散控制项强度在临界点附近表现出普适标度行为。与封闭系统不同，开放系统中即使远离临界点，由于目标态熵变，STAs可能需要多体相互作用项；同时热流在临界点附近出现极值，功率耗散曲率改变，但精确反绝热哈密顿量的实现无操作成本。
AI.motivation: 现有STAs研究主要集中于封闭量子临界系统，但在实际量子系统中耗散不可避免，开放量子临界系统中的STAs性质尚不明确，特别是反绝热驱动在耗散存在时的行为及其普适标度规律有待探索。
AI.method: 采用含时参考哈密顿量本征态对应的密度矩阵轨迹，引入酉控制和非酉控制两类手段；以横场伊辛模型这一自由费米子系统为例，通过解析和数值计算分析耗散控制项强度、热流和功率耗散等物理量在临界点附近的标度行为。
AI.result: 1) 低能态耗散控制项强度在临界点附近呈普适标度；2) 与封闭系统不同，开放系统中即使远离临界点也可能需要多体相互作用项，源于目标态熵随时间变化；3) 临界点附近热流出现极值，功率耗散曲率改变；4) 精确反绝热哈密顿量的实现不伴随额外操作成本。
AI.conclusion: 该反绝热协议对理解多体开放量子系统中的STAs具有基础性意义，可应用于量子计算和多体量子热机等涉及开放多体量子系统的领域。

title: Reciprocal Learning
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2024. v2: fixed typos, added future work. v3: changed def. 4 and proof of thm. 4, added illustrations
summary: We demonstrate that a wide array of machine learning algorithms are specific instances of one single paradigm: reciprocal learning. These instances range from active learning over multi-armed bandits to self-training. We show that all these algorithms do not only learn parameters from data but also vice versa: They iteratively alter training data in a way that depends on the current model fit. We introduce reciprocal learning as a generalization of these algorithms using the language of decision theory. This allows us to study under what conditions they converge. The key is to guarantee that reciprocal learning contracts such that the Banach fixed-point theorem applies. In this way, we find that reciprocal learning algorithms converge at linear rates to an approximately optimal model under relatively mild assumptions on the loss function, if their predictions are probabilistic and the sample adaption is both non-greedy and either randomized or regularized. We interpret these findings and provide corollaries that relate them to specific active learning, self-training, and bandit algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"互惠学习"(reciprocal learning)这一统一范式，证明主动学习、多臂老虎机、自训练等多种机器学习算法都是其特例。这些算法不仅从数据中学习参数，还根据当前模型迭代地改变训练数据。利用决策理论语言形式化互惠学习，并基于Banach不动点定理给出收敛条件：在概率预测、非贪婪且随机化或正则化的样本自适应条件下，互惠学习算法以线性速率收敛到近似最优模型。
AI.motivation: 现有大量机器学习算法（主动学习、多臂老虎机、自训练等）虽然在表面上各不相同，但都共享"双向学习"的核心机制——模型影响数据选择，数据又反过来影响模型更新。然而缺乏一个统一的数学框架来描述和分析这类算法的收敛性质。本文旨在提出互惠学习范式来统一解释这些算法，并利用泛函分析工具（Banach不动点定理）建立收敛性理论。
AI.method: 1) 提出互惠学习的一般形式化框架，使用决策理论语言描述算法在参数空间和数据空间之间的迭代过程。2) 将互惠学习建模为压缩映射，应用Banach不动点定理证明收敛性。3) 推导收敛所需的关键条件：损失函数满足相对温和的假设、预测为概率形式、样本自适应策略非贪婪且具有随机化或正则化特性。4) 将理论结果具体化到主动学习、自训练和bandit算法的推论中。
AI.result: 1) 证明了互惠学习算法在线性速率下收敛到近似最优模型。2) 给出了具体的收敛条件，包括损失函数假设、概率预测要求、以及样本自适应的非贪婪性和随机化/正则化要求。3) 提供了与主动学习、自训练和多臂老虎机算法相关的推论，将通用理论映射到具体算法。
AI.conclusion: 互惠学习为理解一大类"模型-数据双向影响"的机器学习算法提供了统一的理论视角。Banach不动点定理为分析这类算法的收敛性提供了严格的数学工具。这些发现有助于指导设计新的互惠学习算法，并为现有算法提供收敛保证。

title: Augmented prediction of a true class for Positive Unlabeled data under selection bias
summary: We introduce a new observational setting for Positive Unlabeled (PU) data where the observations at prediction time are also labeled. This occurs commonly in practice -- we argue that the additional information is important for prediction, and call this task "augmented PU prediction". We allow for labeling to be feature dependent. In such scenario, Bayes classifier and its risk is established and compared with a risk of a classifier which for unlabeled data is based only on predictors. We introduce several variants of the empirical Bayes rule in such scenario and investigate their performance. We emphasise dangers (and ease) of applying classical classification rule in the augmented PU scenario -- due to no preexisting studies, an unaware researcher is prone to skewing the obtained predictions. We conclude that the variant based on recently proposed variational autoencoder designed for PU scenario works on par or better than other considered variants and yields advantage over feature-only based methods in terms of accuracy for unlabeled samples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的PU学习观测设置——"增强型PU预测"，即预测时部分观测数据也有标签（标签依赖于特征），分析了该场景下的贝叶斯分类器及其风险，并提出了多种经验贝叶斯规则变体。实验表明基于变分自编码器的变体表现最佳，优于仅基于特征的方法。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中，预测时常常存在部分已标签数据（标签依赖于特征），但现有PU学习研究未考虑这一设置。直接使用传统分类规则会导致预测偏差，亟需建立该场景的理论框架和方法。
AI.method: 建立了"增强型PU预测"的理论框架（贝叶斯分类器及风险分析），提出了多种经验贝叶斯规则变体（包括基于变分自编码器的变体），并与仅基于特征的方法进行对比。
AI.result: 基于变分自编码器的变体在增强型PU场景下表现优于或持平于其他变体，并在无标签样本的准确率上优于仅基于特征的方法。
AI.conclusion: 增强型PU预测具有重要实用价值，研究者需警惕直接使用传统分类规则的风险；变分自编码器变体是该场景下的推荐方法。

title: A new paradigm for global sensitivity analysis
summary: It is well-known that Sobol indices, which count among the most popular sensitivity indices, are based on the Sobol decomposition. Here we challenge this construction by redefining Sobol indices without the Sobol decomposition. In fact, we show that Sobol indices are a particular instance of a more general concept which we call sensitivity measures. A sensitivity measure of a system taking inputs and returning outputs is a set function that is null at a subset of inputs if and only if, with probability one, the output actually does not depend on those inputs. A sensitivity measure evaluated at the whole set of inputs represents the uncertainty about the output. We show that measuring sensitivity to a particular subset is akin to measuring the expected output's uncertainty conditionally on the fact that the inputs belonging to that subset have been fixed to random values. By considering all of the possible combinations of inputs, sensitivity measures induce an implicit symmetric factorial experiment with two levels, the factorial effects of which can be calculated. This new paradigm generalizes many known sensitivity indices, can create new ones, and defines interaction effects independently of the choice of the sensitivity measure. No assumption about the distribution of the inputs is required.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了Sobol指数必须基于Sobol分解的传统观点，提出Sobol指数仅是更广义的"敏感性度量"的一个特例。敏感性度量是一种集函数，当且仅当输出不依赖于某子集输入时在该子集上为零。通过将敏感性度量视为关于固定随机输入子集的条件期望不确定性，该方法自然地导出对称两水平因子实验的析因效应，从而推广了现有敏感性指数并定义了新的交互效应，无需假设输入分布。
AI.motivation: 传统上Sobol指数被视为必须从Sobol分解推导而来，作者质疑这一构造的必然性，希望建立更广义的敏感性分析框架，以统一和推广现有的敏感性指数概念。
AI.method: 作者重新定义Sobol指数为"敏感性度量"的特例。敏感性度量是满足特定公理（在某子集上为零当且仅当输出不依赖该子集输入）的集函数。通过将所有输入子集组合视为一个对称两水平因子实验，计算各因子及其交互的析因效应，从而导出敏感性指数。
AI.result: 证明了Sobol指数是敏感性度量的一个实例；新框架可以生成新的敏感性指数，并独立于敏感性度量的选择定义交互效应；不需要对输入分布做任何假设。
AI.conclusion: 该研究统一了敏感性指数理论，扩展了可用的敏感性分析工具，并提供了更灵活的定义方式，同时保持了对输入分布的无假设要求。

title: Swimming Cylinder Wake Control with Plasma Actuator
summary: In this research, the effect of utilizing a micro plasma actuator on controlling the flow through a two-dimensional cylinder is investigated using an advanced electrostatic model. Within this model, by solving two elliptic equations, the potential distribution and plasma distribution in the solution domain are determined, leading to the generation of a volumetric force. This force is added to the momentum equations as a source term. The Reynolds number of the flow is set at 20,000, and the plasma actuator operates in a steady manner. Due to the high Reynolds number, the flow is turbulent, and its time-dependent nature is modeled as unsteady. Plasma actuators are symmetrically mounted at 45 and 90 degrees with respect to the free stream, both above and below the cylinder surfaces. The influence of the actuator placement angle on the flow quality downstream of the cylinder is examined. The results indicate an enhancement of flow quality by 8% to 15% downstream of the cylinder. Moreover, improvements of 40% to 55% in the variation of the lift coefficient and 75% to 90% in the drag coefficient are reported. The findings reveal superior performance of the actuator positioned at 90 degrees compared to the 45-degree orientation. This can be attributed to the proximity of the 90-degree actuator position to the point of boundary layer separation initiation. Furthermore, using the actuator positioned at 90 degrees and applying three different voltages of 10, 13, and 16 kV, the impact of flow control on the first cylinder in a tandem arrangement on the downstream flow of the second cylinder is examined. The results demonstrate an enhancement in downstream flow quality of 20% to 26%.

AI.tldr: 本文采用先进静电模型，研究微等离子体致动器对二维圆柱绕流的控制效果。在雷诺数20,000的湍流条件下，将致动器对称安装在45°和90°位置，发现90°位置性能更优，下游流动质量提升8%-15%，升力系数变化改善40%-55%，阻力系数改善75%-90%。在串联圆柱布局中，90°位置致动器使下游圆柱的流动质量提升20%-26%。
AI.motivation: 探究微等离子体致动器在圆柱绕流控制中的有效性，特别是不同安装角度对流动控制效果的影响，以及其在串联圆柱布局中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用先进静电模型，通过求解两个椭圆方程获得电势和等离子体分布，进而生成体积力作为动量方程源项。设置雷诺数20,000的湍流非定常流动，对称安装致动器于45°和90°位置，并针对90°位置施加10、13、16 kV三种电压，研究串联圆柱布局中的流动控制效果。
AI.result: 下游流动质量提升8%-15%；升力系数变化改善40%-55%；阻力系数改善75%-90%。90°位置性能优于45°。串联布局中下游流动质量提升20%-26%。
AI.conclusion: 微等离子体致动器能有效控制圆柱绕流，90°安装角度性能更优，因为更接近边界层分离起始点。在串联圆柱布局中同样有效，可显著改善下游流动质量。

title: Predefined-time distributed non-convex optimization via a time-base generator
summary: In this paper, we propose two novel multi-agent systems for the resource allocation problems (RAPs) and consensus-based distributed optimization problems. Different from existing distributed optimal approaches, we propose the new time-base generators (TBGs) for predefined-time non-convex optimization. Leveraging the proposed time-base generator, we study the roughness and boundedness of Lyapunov function based on TBGs. We prove that our approach achieves predefined-time approximate convergence to the optimal solution if the cost functions exhibit non-strongly convex or even non-convex characteristics. Furthermore, we prove that our approaches converge to the optimal solution if cost functions are generalized smoothness, and exhibit faster convergence rate and CPU speed. Finally, we present numerous numerical simulation examples to confirm the effectiveness of our approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于新型时间基发生器(TBG)的多智能体系统，用于资源分配问题和基于共识的分布式优化，能够实现非强凸甚至非凸代价函数的预定义时间近似收敛，并在广义平滑条件下实现精确最优解收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化方法在处理非凸优化问题时存在收敛速度慢、收敛时间难以预定义等局限性，亟需开发能在预定义时间内收敛且适用于非强凸/非凸代价函数的高效分布式优化方法。
AI.method: 提出两种新型多智能体系统，引入时间基发生器(TBG)实现预定义时间非凸优化；基于TBG分析Lyapunov函数的粗糙性和有界性；分别处理非强凸/非凸代价函数和广义平滑代价函数两种情况。
AI.result: 针对非强凸甚至非凸代价函数实现了预定义时间近似收敛到最优解；针对广义平滑代价函数实现了精确收敛到最优解，且具有更快的收敛速度和CPU处理速度；数值仿真验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于TBG的多智能体系统在分布式优化中表现出优异的预定义时间收敛性能，能够处理更广泛的代价函数类型（非强凸、非凸、广义平滑），在收敛速度和计算效率上优于现有方法。

title: Numerical simulation and analysis of mixing enhancement due to chaotic advection using an adaptive approach for approximating the dilution index
comment: paper: 25 pages, 15 figures. supplemental material: 4 pages, 3 figures, submitted to Journal of Computational Physics
summary: Lagrangian particle-tracking methods are particularly suitable to study solute transport in velocity fields displaying chaotic advection. They can accurately resolve stretching and folding processes, the increase in the solute-solvent interface available for diffusion as well as Kolmogorov-Arnold-Moser (KAM) islands, non-mixing regions that limit the chaotic area in the domain and, thereby, the mixing enhancement. However, they also display limitations due to the finite number of discrete particles, particularly if we are interested in the quantification of mixing processes, which require an accurate description of the particle density or concentration gradients. In this work, we use the dilution index to quantify the temporal increase in mixing of a solute within its solvent. We introduce a new approach to select a suitable grid size for the approximation of the density function, motivated by the theory of representative elementary volumes. It preserves the central feature of the dilution index, which is monotonically increasing in time, highlighting the importance of a suitable choice for the grid size in the dilution index approximation. We use this approach to demonstrate the mixing enhancement for two chaotic injection-extraction systems that exhibit chaotic structures: a source-sink dipole and a rotated potential mixing. Using our new approach, we assess the choice of design parameters of the injection-extraction systems to effectively engineer chaotic mixing. We demonstrate the important role of diffusion in filling the KAM islands and reaching complete mixing and, consequently, the importance of avoiding numerical diffusion, which often affects Eulerian methods applied on the advection-diffusion equation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对拉格朗日粒子追踪方法在混沌对流混合量化中的局限性，引入基于代表性 elementary 体积理论的网格尺寸选择新方法，利用稀释指数准确量化混合过程，并在两种混沌注入-抽取系统中验证了该方法对工程设计参数评估的有效性，强调了避免数值扩散的重要性。
AI.motivation: 拉格朗日粒子追踪方法虽能精确解析混沌对流中的拉伸、折叠及KAM岛等结构，但受限于离散粒子的有限数量，难以准确描述粒子密度或浓度梯度，从而影响混合过程的量化。现有稀释指数近似对网格尺寸敏感，缺乏合理的选取准则。
AI.method: 基于代表性 elementary 体积理论，提出一种适用于稀释指数计算的网格尺寸选择方法，确保稀释指数的时间单调递增特性。将该方法应用于源-汇偶极子和旋转势混合两种混沌注入-抽取系统，分析设计参数对混沌混合增强的影响。
AI.result: 新方法有效保持了稀释指数的单调递增性，揭示了扩散在填充KAM岛、实现完全混合中的关键作用；同时证明了避免数值扩散（常见于欧拉方法）的重要性，并成功评估了工程系统中的设计参数选择。
AI.conclusion: 提出的网格尺寸选取策略为拉格朗日框架下混合过程的准确量化提供了可靠工具，可用于指导混沌注入-抽取系统的工程设计，以有效实现混沌混合增强。

title: Particle resuspension from complex multilayer deposits by laminar flows: statistical analysis and modeling
summary: Particle resuspension refers to the physical process by which solid particles deposited on a surface are, first, detached and, then, entrained away by the action of a fluid flow. In this study, we explore the dynamics of large and heavy spherical particles forming a complex sediment bed which is exposed to a laminar shear flow. For that purpose, we rely on fine-scale simulations based on a fully-resolved flow field around individual particles whose motion is explicitly tracked. Using statistical tools, we characterize several features: (a) the overall bed dynamics (e.g. the average particle velocity as a function of the elevation), (b) the evolution of the top surface of the sediment bed (e.g. distribution of the surface elevation or of the surface slope) and (c) the dynamics of individual particles as they detach from or re-attach to the sediment bed (including the frequency of these events, and the velocity difference / surface angle for each event). These results show that particles detach more frequently around the peaks in the top surface of the sediment bed and that, once detached, they undergo short hops as particles quickly sediment towards the sediment bed. A simple model based on the surface characteristics (including its slope and elevation) is proposed to reproduce the detachment ratio.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高分辨率数值模拟，研究了层流剪切流作用下大而重的球形颗粒沉积床的颗粒再悬浮动力学，揭示了颗粒从床面脱离的统计特征，并基于床面形貌（坡度与高程）提出了一个简化模型来预测脱离率。
AI.motivation: 理解层流剪切流作用下大而重颗粒从沉积床表面脱离并卷带入流体的物理机制，尤其是颗粒脱离/再附着事件与床面形貌特征之间的统计关联。
