AI.method: 采用完全解析的细尺度数值模拟方法，精确计算单个颗粒周围的流场并显式追踪颗粒运动，结合统计分析床面整体动力学、床面形貌演化及单颗粒脱离/再附着事件的频率、速度差和表面角度等特征。
AI.result: 颗粒更容易在床面顶部（峰值区域）发生脱离；脱离后的颗粒经历短距离跳跃后迅速沉降回床面；基于床面坡度与高程的简单模型能够较好地复现脱离率。
AI.conclusion: 床面形貌（尤其是局部坡度和高程）是控制颗粒脱离行为的关键因素，所提模型可有效预测再悬浮事件的发生概率。

title: Advanced Techniques for High-Performance Fock Matrix Construction on GPU Clusters
summary: This Article presents two optimized multi-GPU algorithms for Fock matrix construction, building on the work of Ufimtsev et al. and Barca et al. The novel algorithms, opt-UM and opt-Brc, introduce significant enhancements, including improved integral screening, exploitation of sparsity and symmetry, a linear scaling exchange matrix assembly algorithm, and extended capabilities for Hartree-Fock caculations up to $f$-type angular momentum functions. Opt-Brc excels for smaller systems and for highly contracted triple-$ζ$ basis sets, while opt-UM is advantageous for large molecular systems. Performance benchmarks on NVIDIA A100 GPUs show that our algorithms in the EXtreme-scale Electronic Structure System (EXESS), when combined, outperform all current GPU and CPU Fock build implementations in TeraChem, QUICK, GPU4PySCF, LibIntX, ORCA, and Q-Chem. The implementations were benchmarked on linear and globular systems and average speed ups across three double-$ζ$ basis sets of 1.5$\times$, 5.2$\times$, and 8.5$\times$ were observed compared to TeraChem, GPU4PySCF, and QUICK respectively. Strong scaling analysis reveals over 91% parallel efficiency on four GPUs for opt-Brc, making it typically faster for multi-GPU execution. Single-compute-node comparisons with CPU-based software like ORCA and Q-Chem show speedups of up to 42$\times$ and 31$\times$, respectively, enhancing power efficiency by up to 18$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种优化多GPU算法(opt-UM和opt-Brc)用于Fock矩阵构建，在EXESS中结合后性能优于TeraChem、QUICK、GPU4PySCF、LibIntX、ORCA和Q-Chem等现有GPU/CPU实现，在双ζ基组上平均加速1.5-8.5倍，单节点相比ORCA和Q-Chem加速高达42倍和31倍，能效提升18倍。
AI.motivation: 现有Fock矩阵构建的GPU算法在积分筛选、稀疏性利用、对称性处理及高角动量基组支持方面存在优化空间，需发展更高效的算法以提升大规模HF计算性能。
AI.method: 在Ufimtsev等和Barca等工作基础上提出两种改进多GPU算法：opt-UM和opt-Brc，采用增强积分筛选、稀疏性与对称性利用、线性缩放交换矩阵组装算法，并扩展支持至f型角动量函数的HF计算。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA A100 GPU上，结合两种算法在EXESS中优于所有现有实现；双ζ基组平均加速TeraChem 1.5倍、GPU4PySCF 5.2倍、QUICK 8.5倍；opt-Brc四GPU并行效率超91%；单节点相比ORCA加速42倍、Q-Chem加速31倍，能效提升18倍。
AI.conclusion: opt-Brc适合小体系和高收缩三ζ基组，opt-UM适合大分子体系，两者结合可全面覆盖不同规模体系，且多GPU扩展性与能效优势显著。

title: Automated computational workflows for muon spin spectroscopy
summary: Positive muon spin rotation and relaxation spectroscopy is a well established experimental technique for studying materials. It provides a local probe that generally complements scattering techniques in the study of magnetic systems and represents a valuable alternative for materials that display strong incoherent scattering or neutron absorption. Computational methods can effectively quantify the microscopic interactions underlying the experimentally observed signal, thus substantially boosting the predictive power of this technique. Here, we present an efficient set of algorithms and workflows devoted to the automation of this task. In particular, we adopt the so-called DFT+μ procedure, where the system is characterised in the density functional theory (DFT) framework with the muon modeled as a hydrogen impurity. We devise an automated strategy to obtain candidate muon stopping sites, their dipolar interaction with the nuclei, and hyperfine interactions with the electronic ground state. We validate the implementation on well-studied compounds, showing the effectiveness of our protocol in terms of accuracy and simplicity of use

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套高效的自动化算法和工作流，基于DFT+μ方法（将μ子视为氢杂质）来自动化计算μ子停止位、与原子核的偶极相互作用以及与电子基态的超精细相互作用，从而增强μ子自旋旋转/弛豫谱的预测能力。
AI.motivation: μ子自旋旋转/弛豫谱是一种成熟的材料实验技术，但计算手段可以量化微观相互作用、提升预测能力。现有方法手工操作繁琐，缺乏自动化流程，因此需要开发高效的自动化算法和工作流。
AI.method: 采用DFT+μ方法，将μ子建模为氢杂质进行密度泛函理论计算；设计自动化策略获取候选μ子停止位、偶极相互作用和超精细相互作用；在已充分研究的化合物上验证。
AI.result: 在已充分研究的化合物上验证了协议的有效性，证明了该方案在精度和易用性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化协议能够高效、准确地计算μ子与材料的微观相互作用，显著提升μ子自旋旋转/弛豫谱技术的预测能力，且易于使用。

title: Explosive percolation on the Bethe lattice is ordinary
summary: The Achlioptas process, which suppresses the aggregation of large-sized clusters, can exhibit an explosive percolation (EP) where the order parameter emerges abruptly yet continuously in the thermodynamic limit. It is known that EP is accompanied by an abnormally small critical exponent of the order parameter. In this paper, we report that a novel type of EP occurs on a Bethe lattice, where the critical exponent of the order parameter is the same as in ordinary bond percolation based on numerical analysis. This is likely due to the property of a finite Bethe lattice that the number of sites on the surface with only one neighbor is extensive to the system size. To overcome this finite size effect, we consider an approximate size of the cluster that each site on the surface along its branch belongs to, and accordingly approximate the sizes of an extensive number of clusters during simulation. As a result, the Achlioptas process becomes ineffective and the order parameter behaves like that of ordinary percolation at the threshold. We support this result by measuring other critical exponents as well.

AI.tldr: 在贝特晶格上，由于表面节点数随系统规模扩展，Achlioptas过程失效，导致新型 explosive percolation 的序参量临界指数与普通渗流相同。
AI.motivation: 探究Achlioptas过程在贝特晶格上的 explosive percolation 行为，特别是序参量临界指数异常的根源，以及有限尺寸效应如何影响该过程。
AI.method: 在有限贝特晶格上进行数值模拟，考虑表面节点沿分支所属簇的近似尺寸，对大量簇的尺寸进行近似处理，以克服有限尺寸效应。
AI.result: 在贝特晶格上，Achlioptas过程失效，序参量在阈值处表现为普通渗流行为，其临界指数与普通键渗流相同。
AI.conclusion: 贝特晶格表面节点数随系统规模扩展的特性使得Achlioptas过程无法有效抑制大簇聚合，从而出现新型 explosive percolation，其临界指数与普通渗流一致。

title: Continuous Dimer Angles on the Silicon Surface: Critical Properties and the Kibble-Zurek Mechanism
comment: 8.5+5+2.5 pages, 10 figures, to appear in PRB
summary: Langevin dynamics simulations are used to analyze the static and dynamic properties of an {XY} model adapted to dimers forming on Si(001) surfaces. The numerics utilise high-performance parallel computation methods on GPUs. The static exponent $ν$ of the symmetry-broken XY model is determined to $ν= 1.04$. The dynamic critical exponent $z$ is determined to $z = 2.13$ and, together with $ν$, shows the behavior of the Ising universality class. For time-dependent temperatures, we observe frozen domains and compare their size distribution with predictions from Kibble-Zurek theory. We determine a significantly larger quench exponent that shows little dependence on the damping or the symmetry-breaking field.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用基于GPU的Langevin动力学模拟，分析了Si(001)表面二聚体XY模型的静态和动态性质，确定了临界指数ν=1.04和z=2.13，属于Ising普适类，并在时变温度下观察到冻结畴，发现淬火指数显著大于Kibble-Zurek理论预测且对阻尼和对称破缺场不敏感。
AI.motivation: 理解Si(001)表面二聚体形成过程中的静态和动态临界行为，并检验Kibble-Zurek理论在该系统中的适用性。
AI.method: 采用Langevin动力学模拟，利用GPU高性能并行计算方法，对适用于Si(001)表面二聚体的XY模型进行数值模拟。
AI.result: 静态临界指数ν=1.04，动态临界指数z=2.13，两者表明属于Ising普适类；淬火指数显著大于Kibble-Zurek理论预测，且对阻尼和对称破缺场依赖很小。
AI.conclusion: 该对称破缺XY模型表现出Ising普适类行为，且非绝热淬火过程中的畴形成与标准Kibble-Zurek机制存在偏差。

title: Multi-marginal Schrödinger Bridges with Iterative Reference Refinement
summary: Practitioners often aim to infer an unobserved population trajectory using sample snapshots at multiple time points. E.g., given single-cell sequencing data, scientists would like to learn how gene expression changes over a cell's life cycle. But sequencing any cell destroys that cell. So we can access data for any particular cell only at a single time point, but we have data across many cells. The deep learning community has recently explored using Schrödinger bridges (SBs) and their extensions in similar settings. However, existing methods either (1) interpolate between just two time points or (2) require a single fixed reference dynamic (often set to Brownian motion within SBs). But learning piecewise from adjacent time points can fail to capture long-term dependencies. And practitioners are typically able to specify a model family for the reference dynamic but not the exact values of the parameters within it. So we propose a new method that (1) learns the unobserved trajectories from sample snapshots across multiple time points and (2) requires specification only of a family of reference dynamics, not a single fixed one. We demonstrate the advantages of our method on simulated and real data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法，能够从多个时间点的样本快照中推断未观测到的种群轨迹，且仅需指定参考动力学模型家族而非固定参数，克服了现有方法只能处理两时间点插值或依赖单一固定参考动力学的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要局限：(1) 仅能对两个时间点之间进行插值，无法捕捉长时间依赖；(2) 需要设定单一固定的参考动力学（如SB中的布朗运动），而实践者通常只能指定参考动力的模型族而无法确定精确参数值。因此需要一种能从多个时间点快照学习未观测轨迹、且仅需指定参考动力学族而非固定参数的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，支持从多个时间点的样本快照中学习未观测的种群轨迹，同时允许用户仅指定参考动力学的模型家族（而非固定参数值），从而在更灵活的条件下进行轨迹推断。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和真实数据上验证了所提方法的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多时间点轨迹推断中现有方法的两大缺陷，即在无需固定参考动力学参数的情况下捕捉长时间依赖，为单细胞测序等破坏性采样场景提供了更实用的轨迹推断工具。

title: Proper losses regret at least 1/2-order
summary: A fundamental challenge in machine learning is the choice of a loss as it characterizes our learning task, is minimized in the training phase, and serves as an evaluation criterion for estimators. Proper losses are commonly chosen, ensuring minimizers of the full risk match the true probability vector. Estimators induced from a proper loss are widely used to construct forecasters for downstream tasks such as classification and ranking. In this procedure, how does the forecaster based on the obtained estimator perform well under a given downstream task? This question is substantially relevant to the behavior of the $p$-norm between the estimated and true probability vectors when the estimator is updated. In the proper loss framework, the suboptimality of the estimated probability vector from the true probability vector is measured by a surrogate regret. First, we analyze a surrogate regret and show that the strict properness of a loss is necessary and sufficient to establish a non-vacuous surrogate regret bound. Second, we solve an important open question that the order of convergence in p-norm cannot be faster than the $1/2$-order of surrogate regrets for a broad class of strictly proper losses. This implies that strongly proper losses entail the optimal convergence rate.

AI.tldr: 本文研究严格适当损失函数下代理遗憾与p-范数收敛速度的关系，证明严格适当性是建立非平凡代理遗憾界的充要条件，并揭示对于广泛严格适当损失，p-范数收敛速度不能快于代理遗憾的1/2阶，从而表明强适当损失具有最优收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习中，损失函数的选择至关重要，但由适当损失诱导的估计量在下游任务（如分类和排序）中表现如何，特别是估计概率向量与真实概率向量之间的p-范数行为，尚未得到充分理解。本文旨在建立代理遗憾与p-范数收敛速度之间的理论联系，解决一个重要的开放性问题。
AI.method: 首先，通过理论分析证明严格适当性是建立非平凡代理遗憾界的充要条件；其次，对于广泛一类严格适当损失函数，证明p-范数收敛速度不能快于代理遗憾的1/2阶，从而得出强适当损失具有最优收敛速率。
AI.result: (1) 严格适当性是建立非平凡代理遗憾界的充要条件；(2) 对于广泛严格适当损失，p-范数收敛速度最多为代理遗憾的1/2阶；(3) 强适当损失实现了最优的收敛速率。
AI.conclusion: 强适当损失在代理遗憾与p-范数收敛之间达到了最优权衡，为下游任务中预测器的性能保证提供了理论基础。

title: Modified Meta-Thompson Sampling for Linear Bandits and Its Bayes Regret Analysis
summary: Meta-learning is characterized by its ability to learn how to learn, enabling the adaptation of learning strategies across different tasks. Recent research introduced the Meta-Thompson Sampling (Meta-TS), which meta-learns an unknown prior distribution sampled from a meta-prior by interacting with bandit instances drawn from it. However, its analysis was limited to Gaussian bandit. The contextual multi-armed bandit framework is an extension of the Gaussian Bandit, which challenges agent to utilize context vectors to predict the most valuable arms, optimally balancing exploration and exploitation to minimize regret over time. This paper introduces Meta-TSLB algorithm, a modified Meta-TS for linear contextual bandits. We theoretically analyze Meta-TSLB and derive an $ O((m+\log(m))\sqrt{n\log(n)})$ bound on its Bayes regret, in which $m$ represents the number of bandit instances, and $n$ the number of rounds of Thompson Sampling. Additionally, our work complements the analysis of Meta-TS for linear contextual bandits. The performance of Meta-TSLB is evaluated experimentally under different settings, and we experimente and analyze the generalization capability of Meta-TSLB, showcasing its potential to adapt to unseen instances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Meta-TSLB算法，将Meta-Thompson Sampling从高斯盗贼拓展到线性上下文盗贼问题，推导出贝叶斯遗憾的O((m+log(m))√(n log(n)))上界，并通过实验验证了其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: Meta-TS此前仅限于高斯盗贼问题的分析，缺乏对更一般的上下文多臂盗贼框架的理论支持。本文旨在将元学习与线性上下文盗贼结合，拓展理论分析并提升算法的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文提出Meta-TSLB算法，是Meta-TS在线性上下文盗贼中的改进版本。通过贝叶斯遗憾分析推导出O((m+log(m))√(n log(n)))的理论上界，其中m为实例数，n为TS轮数。
AI.result: 理论上推导了Meta-TSLB的贝叶斯遗憾上界为O((m+log(m))√(n log(n)))；实验上在多种设置下验证了算法性能，并分析了其对未见过实例的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Meta-TSLB成功将Meta-TS拓展至线性上下文盗贼，完善了Meta-TS的理论分析，并展现出良好的泛化性能，能够适应未见过的实例。

title: Effect of sweep angle on three-dimensional vortex dynamics over plunging wings
summary: The effects of sweep angle and reduced frequency on the leading-edge vortex (LEV) structure over flapping swept wings in the Reynolds number ($Re$) range of $\mathbf{O}(10^4)$ are yet to be completely understood. With increasing interest in designing bio-inspired micro-air-vehicles (MAVs), understanding LEV dynamics in such scenarios is imperative. This study investigates the effects of three different sweep angles ($Λ= 0^\circ$, $30^\circ$ and $60^\circ$) on LEV dynamics through high-fidelity improved delayed detached eddy simulation (IDDES) to analyze the underlying flow physics. Plunge ramp kinematics at two different reduced frequencies ($k = 0.05$ and $0.4$) are studied to investigate the unsteady motion effects on LEV characteristics. The leading-edge suction parameter (LESP) concept is applied to determine LEV initiation, and the results are verified against flow field visualization for swept-wing geometries. The force partitioning method (FPM) is used to investigate the spanwise lift distribution resulting from the LEV. Distinct peaks in the lift coefficient occur for the high reduced frequency case due to the impulse-like plunging acceleration. This causes the LEV to detach from the leading edge more quickly and convect faster, significantly affecting the lift generated by the wing. As reduced frequency increases, the LEV breakdown mechanism switches from vortex bursting to LEV leg-induced instabilities. These results provide insights into the complex vortex structures surrounding swept wings at $Re = 20,000$, and the impact both sweep angle and reduced frequency have on the lift contribution of these flow features.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高保真IDDES模拟，研究了后掠角（0°、30°、60°）和缩减频率（0.05、0.4）对扑动后掠翼在Re=20,000下前缘涡（LEV）结构的影响。发现高缩减频率导致LEV更快分离和传播，且LEV破裂机制从涡爆转变为LEV腿诱导不稳定性。高阶缩减频率下升力系数出现明显峰值，源于脉冲式扑动加速度。
AI.motivation: 随着仿生微型飞行器（MAVs）设计兴趣的增加，需深入理解扑动后掠翼在Re~O(10^4)范围内的前缘涡动态特性，目前该条件下后掠角和缩减频率对LEV结构的影响尚不完全清楚。
AI.method: 采用高保真改进延迟分离涡模拟（IDDES）方法，针对三种后掠角（0°、30°、60°）和两种缩减频率（0.05、0.4）的俯冲斜坡运动展开研究；应用前缘吸气参数（LESP）概念确定LEV起始；使用力分解方法（FPM）分析展向升力分布。
AI.result: 高缩减频率下脉冲式俯冲加速度使LEV更快脱离前缘并加速传播，导致升力系数出现显著峰值；缩减频率增加时，LEV破裂机制从涡爆转变为LEV腿诱导不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了Re=20,000下后掠翼复杂涡结构及其受后掠角和缩减频率的影响机制，为理解扑动后掠翼升力贡献提供了重要见解。

title: On compact complex surfaces with finite homotopy rank-sum
comment: Final version; Proc. Amer. Math. Soc. (to appear)
summary: A topological space (not necessarily simply connected) is said to have finite homotopy rank-sum if the sum of the ranks of all higher homotopy groups (from the second homotopy group onward) is finite. In this article, we characterize the smooth compact complex Kaehler surfaces having finite homotopy rank-sum. We also prove the Steinness of the universal cover of these surfaces assuming holomorphic convexity of the universal cover.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了光滑紧致Kähler曲面的同伦秩和有限性，并证明了其万有覆盖在某种条件下的Stein性质。
AI.motivation: 作者希望刻画那些高阶同伦群（从第二同伦群起）的秩之和为有限的光滑紧致Kähler曲面，并探讨其万有覆盖的复几何性质。
AI.method: 利用代数拓扑和复几何方法，对光滑紧致Kähler曲面的同伦群秩之和进行分析，并在万有覆盖全纯凸的假设下证明其Stein性。
AI.result: 给出了光滑紧致Kähler曲面具有有限同伦秩和的完整刻画，并在万有覆盖全纯凸的条件下证明了万有覆盖是Stein流形。
AI.conclusion: 对于光滑紧致Kähler曲面，同伦秩和有限性是一个有意义的几何条件，且在此条件下万有覆盖具有Stein性（在额外全纯凸假设下）。

title: Stability of the Von Kármán regime for thin plates under Neumann boundary conditions
summary: We analyze the stability of the Von Kármán model for thin plates subject to pure Neumann conditions and to dead loads, with no restriction on their direction. We prove a stability alternative, which extends previous results by Lecumberry and Müller in the Dirichlet case. Because of the rotation invariance of the problem, their notions of stability have to be modified and combined with the concept of optimal rotations due to Maor and Mora. Finally, we prove that the Von Kármán model is not compatible with some specific types of forces. Thus, for such, only the Kirchoff model applies.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了纯Neumann边界条件和任意方向死载荷下Von Kármán薄板模型的稳定性，提出了稳定性备择性定理，扩展了Lecumberry和Müller在Dirichlet情形下的结果。由于问题的旋转不变性，需将稳定性概念与Maor和Mora的最优旋转概念相结合。最后证明Von Kármán模型与某些特定类型的力不兼容，此类情形仅Kirchoff模型适用。
AI.motivation: 现有Von Kármán模型的稳定性研究主要针对Dirichlet边界条件，而纯Neumann边界条件（仅施加表面力载荷，无位移约束）下的稳定性问题尚未解决。由于旋转不变性导致经典稳定性概念失效，需要发展新的分析框架。
AI.method: 采用变分法和Γ-收敛分析，结合Lecumberry-Müller的稳定性理论与Maor-Mora的最优旋转概念，在纯Neumann边界条件下重新定义稳定性条件，并推导稳定性备择性定理。
AI.result: 成功建立了纯Neumann条件下Von Kármán模型的稳定性备择性定理；揭示了模型与特定类型外力的不兼容性，识别出仅Kirchoff模型适用的载荷条件。
AI.conclusion: Von Kármán模型在纯Neumann条件下的稳定性依赖于最优旋转的恰当选取，且其适用性受限于外力类型，为工程中薄板模型的选择提供了理论依据。

title: Existence, Stability and Optimal Drug Dosage for a Reaction-Diffusion System Arising in a Cancer Treatment
comment: 20 pages, 1 figure. We added some new references. Comments are very welcome
summary: In this paper, a reaction-diffusion system modeling injection of a chemotherapeutic drug on the surface of a living tissue during a treatment for cancer patients is studied. The system describes the interaction of the chemotherapeutic drug and the normal, tumor and immune cells. We first establish well-posedness for the nonlinear reaction-diffusion system, then investigate the long-time behavior of solutions. Particularly, it is shown that the cancer cells will be eliminated assuming that its reproduction rate is sufficiently small in a short time period in each treatment interval. The analysis is then essentially exploited to study an optimal drug injection rate problem during a chemotherapeutic drug treatment for tumor cells, which is formulated as an optimal boundary control problem with constraints. For this, we show that the existence of an optimal drug injection rate through the boundary, and derive the first-order optimality condition.

AI.tldr: 本文通过反应-扩散系统建模化疗药物注入活体组织的过程，研究药物与正常细胞、肿瘤细胞和免疫细胞的相互作用。首先建立了非线性系统的适定性，分析了解的长时间行为，证明在治疗周期内若癌细胞繁殖率足够小则会被消除。进而将最优药物注射速率问题建模为带约束的最优边界控制问题，证明了最优药物边界注射速率的存在性并导出了一阶最优性条件。
AI.motivation: 为癌症化疗过程中的药物注射策略提供数学建模与理论分析基础，从理论上研究如何通过优化药物注射速率来更有效地消除肿瘤细胞。
AI.method: 采用反应-扩散系统建模药物与多种细胞（正常细胞、肿瘤细胞、免疫细胞）的相互作用；通过非线性分析建立系统的适定性（解的存在唯一性）；利用长时间行为分析研究癌细胞消除条件；将最优注射速率问题转化为最优边界控制问题，利用变分法导出最优性条件。
AI.result: 证明了当癌细胞繁殖率在治疗周期内足够小时，癌细胞将被消除；证明了最优药物边界注射速率的存在性，并导出了一阶最优性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为化疗药物注射策略提供了理论支撑，数学上证明了合理控制药物注射速率可消除癌细胞，并为后续数值优化奠定了基础。

title: A characterization of quasi-homogeneous singularities of free and nearly free plane curves
comment: 20 pages, 2 figures. Accepted for publication in International Mathematics Research Notices
summary: The goal of this paper is to establish a new characterization of quasi-homogeneous isolated singularities of free curves and nearly free curves $C$ in $\mathbb{P}_\mathbb{C}^2$. The criterion will be in terms of a first syzygy matrix associated with the Jacobian ideal $J_f$ of $f$, where $f=0$ is the equation of the plane curve $C$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种关于$\mathbb{P}_\mathbb{C}^2$中自由曲线与近自由曲线$C$的拟齐次孤立奇点的新刻画，该准则基于与$f$的雅可比理想$J_f$相关的首次合冲矩阵，其中$f=0$是平面曲线$C$的方程。
AI.motivation: 建立自由曲线与近自由曲线拟齐次孤立奇点的新表征方法，为这类曲线奇点性质提供更简洁的代数判别准则。
AI.method: 利用曲线方程$f$的雅可比理想$J_f$的首次合冲矩阵作为核心工具，通过分析该矩阵的结构来刻画曲线的拟齐次孤立奇点性质。
AI.result: 得到了一个关于自由曲线与近自由曲线拟齐次孤立奇点的全新准则，该准则仅依赖于雅可比理想的首次合冲矩阵。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为自由曲线与近自由曲线的奇点分类提供了新的代数工具，进一步丰富了平面曲线奇点理论。

title: Deep Frequency Derivative Learning for Non-stationary Time Series Forecasting
summary: While most time series are non-stationary, it is inevitable for models to face the distribution shift issue in time series forecasting. Existing solutions manipulate statistical measures (usually mean and std.) to adjust time series distribution. However, these operations can be theoretically seen as the transformation towards zero frequency component of the spectrum which cannot reveal full distribution information and would further lead to information utilization bottleneck in normalization, thus hindering forecasting performance. To address this problem, we propose to utilize the whole frequency spectrum to transform time series to make full use of data distribution from the frequency perspective. We present a deep frequency derivative learning framework, DERITS, for non-stationary time series forecasting. Specifically, DERITS is built upon a novel reversible transformation, namely Frequency Derivative Transformation (FDT) that makes signals derived in the frequency domain to acquire more stationary frequency representations. Then, we propose the Order-adaptive Fourier Convolution Network to conduct adaptive frequency filtering and learning. Furthermore, we organize DERITS as a parallel-stacked architecture for the multi-order derivation and fusion for forecasting. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on several datasets which show the consistent superiority in both time series forecasting and shift alleviation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非平稳时间序列预测中的分布漂移问题，提出一种基于频域变换的深度频率导数学习框架DERITS，通过频率导数变换（FDT）和自适应阶数傅里叶卷积网络，实现更全面的分布信息利用，在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅通过调整均值和标准差（即零频分量）来处理分布漂移，无法揭示完整的分布信息，导致归一化过程中的信息利用瓶颈，限制了预测性能。因此需要一种能利用全频谱信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出DERITS框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 频率导数变换（FDT），在频域对信号进行导数操作以获得更平稳的频率表示；(2) 阶数自适应傅里叶卷积网络，进行自适应频率滤波和学习；(3) 并行堆叠架构，实现多阶导数推导与融合以进行预测。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，在时间序列预测性能和分布漂移缓解方面均表现出持续优越性。
AI.conclusion: 利用全频谱信息进行变换比仅使用零频分量（均值/标准差）能更有效地处理非平稳时间序列的分布漂移问题，DERITS框架验证了频域导数学习的有效性。

title: Reinforcement Learning applied to Insurance Portfolio Pursuit
summary: When faced with a new customer, many factors contribute to an insurance firm's decision of what offer to make to that customer. In addition to the expected cost of providing the insurance, the firm must consider the other offers likely to be made to the customer, and how sensitive the customer is to differences in price. Moreover, firms often target a specific portfolio of customers that could depend on, e.g., age, location, and occupation. Given such a target portfolio, firms may choose to modulate an individual customer's offer based on whether the firm desires the customer within their portfolio. We term the problem of modulating offers to achieve a desired target portfolio the portfolio pursuit problem. Having formulated the portfolio pursuit problem as a sequential decision making problem, we devise a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for its solution. We test our method on a complex synthetic market environment, and demonstrate that it outperforms a baseline method which mimics current industry approaches to portfolio pursuit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"投资组合追求问题"的保险定价决策框架，通过强化学习算法动态调整客户报价以实现目标客户组合，并在合成市场环境中验证其优于当前行业基线方法。
AI.motivation: 保险公司在面对新客户时，除了考虑预期赔付成本外，还需要考虑竞争对手报价、客户价格敏感度以及公司自身对特定客户组合（如年龄、地点、职业等维度）的偏好。现有方法缺乏系统性的报价调制机制来实现目标客户组合，因此需要一种能够动态调整个体报价以达到整体组合目标的决策方法。
AI.method: 将投资组合追求问题形式化为序贯决策问题，设计了一种新颖的强化学习算法。具体而言，通过RL框架学习如何根据当前客户特征和公司组合目标，调制针对每个客户的报价，从而在长期内引导客户组合向目标分布收敛。
AI.result: 在复杂的合成市场环境中进行测试，结果表明所提出的强化学习方法优于模仿当前行业实践的基线方法，能够更有效地实现目标客户组合。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为保险行业中的投资组合管理提供了一种有效的报价调制框架，能够综合考虑竞争环境、客户行为和企业目标，实现更精准的客户组合控制。

title: Approximation and application of minimizing movements for surface PDE
summary: By employing the closest point method, we extend the applicability of minimizing movements to the surface PDE setting. The corresponding approximation methods are created, and their convergence is observed. The numerical methods are then used to develop threshold dynamics algorithms for surface-constrained interfacial motions. In particular, show how the minimizing movements enable one to approximate multiphase, volume-preserving, curvature flows on surfaces via generalized MBO and HMBO algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文利用最近点法，将最小化运动拓展到曲面偏微分方程场景，构建了相应的逼近方法并观察其收敛性。进而开发了用于曲面约束界面运动的阈值动力学算法，特别展示了如何通过广义MBO和HMBO算法，利用最小化运动来逼近曲面上的多相、体积保持的曲率流。
AI.motivation: 将最小化运动方法从传统的平面或欧氏空间推广到曲面PDE环境，以处理曲面上的复杂界面运动问题。
AI.method: 采用最近点法（Closest Point Method）作为核心工具，将最小化运动框架拓展至曲面偏微分方程设定；构造相应的数值逼近方法；开发基于阈值的动力学算法（广义MBO和HMBO算法）。
AI.result: 成功构建了曲面约束界面运动的阈值动力学算法，实现了对曲面上的多相、体积保持的曲率流的高效逼近。
AI.conclusion: 最小化运动与最近点法的结合为曲面上复杂界面演化（尤其是多相、体积守恒问题）提供了一套有效的数值框架。

title: An explicit factorization of the Green's function for an acoustic half-space problem with impedance boundary conditions into an oscillatory exponential and a slowly varying function
summary: In this paper, new representations of the Green's function for an acoustic d-dimensional half-space problem with impedance boundary conditions are presented. The main features of the new representation are: a) in addition to additive terms that appear also in the case of Dirichlet or Neumann boundary conditions, the remaining part of the Green's function is factored into an oscillatory complex exponential function (with the product of the wavenumber and the eikonal as argument) and a remaining function which is slowly varying and hence allows for efficient polynomial approximation; b) the representation is given uniformly for all parameters by a single formula which consists of the product of two analytic functions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了声学d维半空间问题中带阻抗边界条件的格林函数新表示，其核心特点是将格林函数分解为振荡复指数函数与慢变函数的乘积，支持高效多项式近似，且对所有参数统一适用。
AI.motivation: 现有格林函数表示在处理阻抗边界条件时计算效率低下，尤其在参数变化范围大的情况下难以实现高效数值近似。需要一种统一且便于多项式逼近的表示形式。
AI.method: 提出一种新的格林函数分解形式：除Dirichlet或Neumann边界条件中已有的附加项外，剩余部分分解为振荡复指数函数（以波数与程函的乘积为宗量）与慢变函数的乘积，整体由两个解析函数的乘积统一表示。
AI.result: 新表示具有两个主要特征：1）剩余部分被分解为振荡指数函数与慢变函数的乘积，后者适合高效多项式逼近；2）对所有参数使用单一公式统一表示，由两个解析函数的乘积构成。
AI.conclusion: 该格林函数新表示为阻抗边界条件下的声学半空间问题提供了一种高效、统一的数值计算框架，有望在波动方程数值模拟、边界元法等应用中提升计算效率。

title: Elasticity-based morphing technique and application to reduced-order modeling
summary: The aim of this article is to introduce a new methodology for constructing morphings between shapes that have identical topology. The morphings are obtained by deforming a reference shape, through the resolution of a sequence of linear elasticity equations, onto every target shape. In particular, our approach does not assume any knowledge of a boundary parametrization, and the computation of the boundary deformation is not required beforehand. Furthermore, constraints can be imposed on specific points, lines and surfaces in the reference domain to ensure alignment with their counterparts in the target domain after morphing. Additionally, we show how the proposed methodology can be integrated in an offline and online paradigm, which is useful in reduced-order modeling involving variable shapes. This framework facilitates the efficient computation of the morphings in various geometric configurations, thus improving the versatility and applicability of the approach. The robustness and computational efficiency of the methodology is illustrated on two-dimensional test cases, including the regression problem of the drag and lift coefficients of airfoils of non-parameterized variable shapes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性弹性方程序列求解的新形态构建方法，用于拓扑相同的形状之间的变形映射，无需边界参数化或预先计算边界变形，支持在参考域上施加点、线、面约束以确保与目标域的对应点对齐，并集成了离线-在线计算范式以提升变几何降阶建模的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有形状变形方法通常依赖边界参数化或需要预先计算边界变形，限制了其在复杂几何配置下的适用性；同时，在变几何降阶建模中缺乏高效的离线-在线计算框架。
AI.method: 通过求解一系列线性弹性方程，将参考形状变形到每个目标形状；不需要边界参数化，也无需预先计算边界变形；支持在参考域中定义点、线、面的约束条件来保证变形后与目标域中对应实体的对齐；耦合离线-在线计算范式以提高变几何配置下的计算效率。
AI.result: 在二维测试案例上验证了方法的鲁棒性和计算效率，包括非参数化变形状机翼的升力和阻力系数回归问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需边界参数化，支持局部约束，并可通过离线-在线框架高效处理变几何形状的形态构建，适用于降阶建模等应用场景。

title: A PINN approach for the online identification and control of unknown PDEs
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have revolutionized solving differential equations by integrating physical laws into neural networks training. This paper explores PINNs for open-loop optimal control problems (OCPs) with incomplete information, such as sparse initial and boundary data and partially unknown system parameters. We derive optimality conditions from the Lagrangian multipliers and use PINNs to predict the state, adjoint, and control variables. In contrast with previous methods, our approach integrates these elements into a single neural network and addresses scenarios with consistently limited data. In addition, we address the study of partially unknown equations identifying underlying parameters online by searching for the optimal solution recurring to a 2-in-series architecture of PINNs, in which scattered data of the uncontrolled solution is used. Numerical examples show the effectiveness of the proposed method even in scenarios characterized by a considerable lack of information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将状态、伴随和控制变量集成到单个神经网络中的PINNs框架，用于求解稀疏数据和不完全已知参数下的开环最优控制问题，并采用2-in-series架构在线识别未知参数，数值实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理稀疏初始/边界数据、部分未知系统参数等不完备信息场景下的开环最优控制问题时存在局限，亟需一种能够集成求解且在数据极度有限条件下仍有效的方法。
AI.method: 采用拉格朗日乘子推导最优性条件，将状态、伴随和控制变量集成到单一神经网络中求解；针对部分未知方程，提出2-in-series架构的PINNs，利用无控制解的散点数据在线识别未知参数。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在信息大量缺失的场景下仍能有效求解开环最优控制问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于PINNs的框架能够有效处理信息不完备下的开环最优控制问题，即使在大规模数据缺失场景下仍表现出良好的效果。

title: Benign Overfitting under Learning Rate Conditions for $α$ Sub-exponential Input
summary: This paper investigates the phenomenon of benign overfitting in binary classification problems with heavy-tailed input distributions, extending the analysis of maximum margin classifiers to $α$ sub-exponential distributions ($α\in (0, 2]$). This generalizes previous work focused on sub-gaussian inputs. We provide generalization error bounds for linear classifiers trained using gradient descent on unregularized logistic loss in this heavy-tailed setting. Our results show that, under certain conditions on the dimensionality $p$ and the distance between the centers of the distributions, the misclassification error of the maximum margin classifier asymptotically approaches the noise level, the theoretical optimal value. Moreover, we derive an upper bound on the learning rate $β$ for benign overfitting to occur and show that as the tail heaviness of the input distribution $α$ increases, the upper bound on the learning rate decreases. These results demonstrate that benign overfitting persists even in settings with heavier-tailed inputs than previously studied, contributing to a deeper understanding of the phenomenon in more realistic data environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了重尾输入分布下二分类问题中的良性过拟合现象，将最大间隔分类器的分析推广到α次指数分布（α∈(0,2]），给出了无正则化逻辑损失梯度下降训练的线性分类器的泛化误差界，证明了在特定条件下误分类误差渐近接近噪声水平（理论最优值），并推导了良性过拟合发生的学习率上界β，发现该上界随尾重参数α增大而降低。
AI.motivation: 将良性过拟合的理论分析从次高斯输入扩展到更实际的重尾输入分布（α次指数分布），以理解在更真实数据环境下该现象的普适性。
AI.method: 对最大间隔分类器在α次指数分布（α∈(0,2]）下进行理论分析，推导梯度下降训练线性分类器（无正则化逻辑损失）的泛化误差界，分析维度p和分布中心距离对误分类误差的影响，并推导学习率上界β与尾重参数α的关系。
AI.result: 在特定条件下，最大间隔分类器的误分类误差渐近接近噪声水平（理论最优值）；良性过拟合发生的学习率上界β随尾重参数α增大而降低。
AI.conclusion: 即使输入分布尾重超过以往研究范围（重尾分布），良性过拟合现象依然存在，这加深了对该现象在更真实数据环境下的理解。

title: Improved Iteration Complexity in Black-Box Optimization Problems under Higher Order Smoothness Function Condition
summary: This paper is devoted to the study (common in many applications) of the black-box optimization problem, where the black-box represents a gradient-free oracle $\tilde{f} = f(x) + ξ$ providing the objective function value with some stochastic noise. Assuming that the objective function is $μ$-strongly convex, and also not just $L$-smooth, but has a higher order of smoothness ($β\geq 2$) we provide a novel optimization method: Zero-Order Accelerated Batched Stochastic Gradient Descent, whose theoretical analysis closes the question regarding the iteration complexity, achieving optimal estimates. Moreover, we provide a thorough analysis of the maximum noise level, and show under which condition the maximum noise level will take into account information about batch size $B$ as well as information about the smoothness order of the function $β$.

AI.tldr: 本文针对黑盒优化问题，提出了一种零阶加速批量化随机梯度下降方法（ZO-Accelerated Batched SGD），在目标函数强凸且具有高阶光滑性（β≥2）的条件下，实现了最优的迭代复杂度，并分析了最大噪声水平与批量大小B及光滑阶数β的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒优化方法在处理强凸且高阶光滑目标函数时，迭代复杂度尚未达到最优，且对噪声水平与批量大小、光滑阶数之间关系的理解不够深入，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出Zero-Order Accelerated Batched Stochastic Gradient Descent方法，利用零阶梯度近似（仅依赖函数值观测）结合加速技巧和批量采样策略，在μ-强凸、L-光滑且β≥2阶光滑的目标函数下进行优化。
AI.result: 理论分析表明该方法达到了最优迭代复杂度；同时揭示了最大噪声水平不仅依赖于批量大小B，还依赖于目标函数的光滑阶数β。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论上解决了该类黑盒优化问题的迭代复杂度下界问题，并提供了噪声水平与关键参数之间的精细刻画。

title: Inertial Proximal Difference-of-Convex Algorithm with Convergent Bregman Plug-and-Play for Nonconvex Imaging
summary: Imaging tasks are typically tackled using a structured optimization framework. This paper delves into a class of algorithms for difference-of-convex (DC) structured optimization, focusing on minimizing a DC function along with a possibly nonconvex function. Existing DC algorithm (DCA) versions often fail to effectively handle nonconvex functions or exhibit slow convergence rates. We propose a novel inertial proximal DC algorithm in Bregman geometry, named iBPDCA, designed to address nonconvex terms and enhance convergence speed through inertial techniques. We provide a detailed theoretical analysis, establishing both subsequential and global convergence of iBPDCA via the Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz property. Additionally, we introduce a Plug-and-Play variant, PnP-iBPDCA, which employs a deep neural network-based prior for greater flexibility and robustness while ensuring theoretical convergence. We also establish that the Gaussian gradient step denoiser used in our method is equivalent to evaluating the Bregman proximal operator for an implicitly weakly convex functional. We extensively validate our method on Rician noise and phase retrieval. We demonstrate that iBPDCA surpasses existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Bregman几何的惯性近端DC算法（iBPDCA），用于处理非凸项并加速收敛，同时引入即插即用变体PnP-iBPDCA，利用深度神经网络先验提升灵活性与鲁棒性，理论证明了收敛性，并在Rician噪声和相位恢复任务中超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有DC算法版本难以有效处理非凸函数或收敛速度慢，亟需一种能兼顾非凸项处理与快速收敛的优化算法。
AI.method: 提出iBPDCA，结合惯性技术和Bregman几何构建近端DC算法；进一步提出PnP-iBPDCA，引入深度神经网络作为先验；理论分析基于Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz性质建立子序列收敛和全局收敛；证明高斯梯度步降噪器等价于隐式弱凸函数的Bregman近端算子。
AI.result: 在Rician噪声和相位恢复任务中，iBPDCA显著超越了现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: iBPDCA及其PnP变体能有效处理DC结构化优化中的非凸项，具备理论收敛保证和实际性能优势。

title: Mode-to-mode nonlinear energy transfer in turbulent channel flows
summary: We investigate nonlinear energy transfer for channel flows at friction Reynolds numbers of $Re_τ=180$ and $590$. The key feature of the analysis is that we introduce a new variable, which quantifies the energy transferred from a source mode to a recipient mode through explicit examination of nonlinear triadic interactions in streamwise-spanwise wavenumber space. First, we use this variable to quantify the nonlinear energy transfer gain and loss for individual Fourier modes. The nonlinear energy transfer gain and loss cannot be directly obtained from the turbulent kinetic energy (TKE) equation. Second, we quantify the nonlinear energy transfer budgets for three types of structures: streamwise streaks, oblique waves and Tollmien-Schlichting waves. We found that a transverse cascade from streamwise-elongated modes to spanwise-elongated modes exists in all three structures. Third, we quantify the forward and inverse cascades between resolved scales and subgrid scales in the spirit of large-eddy simulation. For the cutoff wavelength range we consider, the forward and inverse cascades between the resolved scales and subgrid scales result in a net forward cascade from the resolved scales to the subgrid scales. The shape of the net forward cascade curve with respect to the cutoff wavelength resembles the net forward cascade predicted by the Smagorinsky eddy viscosity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了摩擦雷诺数 Re_τ=180 和 590 下槽道流中的非线性能量传递，通过引入新变量量化傅里叶模式间的三波相互作用能量传递，揭示了横向级联、前向/逆向级联特性，并验证了与Smagorinsky涡粘模型的一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统湍动能方程无法直接获得各傅里叶模式在非线性三波相互作用中的能量增益与损失，需要引入新的分析变量来定量刻画这一过程。
AI.method: 引入新变量，在流向-展向波数空间中显式考查非线性三波相互作用，量化从源模式到接收模式的能量传递；分别对单个傅里叶模式、三类典型结构（流向条纹、斜波、T-S波）以及分辨尺度与亚格子尺度之间的能量级联进行预算分析。
AI.result: 1. 非线性能量传递的增益和损失无法直接从TKE方程获得；2. 三类结构中均存在从流向伸长模态向展向伸长模态的横向级联；3. 在考虑的截止波长范围内，分辨尺度与亚格子尺度之间的净级联为前向（从分辨尺度到亚格子尺度），且净前向级联曲线形状与Smagorinsky涡粘模型的预测吻合。
AI.conclusion: 新变量能够有效量化槽道流中的非线性能量传递过程，揭示了横向级联的普遍存在性，并验证了Smagorinsky模型在平均意义上对亚格子能量传递的刻画合理性。

title: Lattice Boltzmann Model for Transonic Flows
summary: The hydrodynamic limit of a discrete kinetic equation is intrinsically connected with the symmetry of the lattices used in construction of a discrete velocity model. On mixed lattices composed of standard lattices the sixth-order (and higher) moment is often not isotropic and thus they are insufficient to ensure correct imposition of the hydrodynamic moments. This makes the task of developing lattice Boltzmann model for transonic flows quite challenging. We address this by decoupling the physical space lattice from the velocity space lattice to construct a lattice Boltzmann model with very high isotropy. The model is entirely on-lattice like the isothermal models, achieves a Mach number of two with only $81$ discrete velocities, and admits a simple generalization of equilibrium distribution used in isothermal equilibrium. We also present a number of realistic benchmark problems to show that the lattice Boltzmann model with a limited number of velocities is not only feasible for transonic flow but is also quite simple and efficient like its subsonic counterpart.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将物理空间格点与速度空间格点解耦，构建了高各向同性的格子玻尔兹曼模型，仅用81个离散速度即可实现马赫数2的跨音速流动模拟，且保持了与等温模型类似的全格点计算特性。
AI.motivation: 传统离散速度模型在混合格点上高阶矩缺乏各向同性，难以正确施加流体动力学矩，导致跨音速流动的格子玻尔兹曼建模极具挑战性。
AI.method: 将物理空间格点与速度空间格点解耦，构建高各向同性离散速度模型，采用等温平衡分布的简单推广形式，仅需81个离散速度。
AI.result: 模型实现了马赫数2的跨音速流动模拟，在多个基准测试中验证了其可行性、简单性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，有限速度数的格子玻尔兹曼模型不仅可用于跨音速流动，而且能像亚音速对应模型一样简单高效。

title: Multilevel Fast Multipole Algorithm for Electromagnetic Scattering by Large Metasurfaces using Static Mode Representation
summary: Metasurfaces, consisting of large arrays of interacting subwavelength scatterers, pose significant challenges for general-purpose computational methods due to their large electric dimensions and multiscale nature. This paper introduces an efficient boundary element method specifically tailored for metasurfaces, leveraging the Poggio-Miller-Chang-Harrington-Wu-Tsai (PMCHWT) formulation. Our method combines the Multilevel Fast Multipole Algorithm (MLFMA) with a representation of the unknown equivalent surface current density by means of static modes, a set of entire domain basis functions dependent only on object shape but independent of the material and frequency. The compression of the number of unknowns enabled by the Static Mode Representation (SMR), combined with the \(\mathcal{O}(N \log N)\) complexity of MLFMA matrix-vector products, significantly reduces CPU time and memory requirements compared to classical MLFMA with RWG basis functions. We demonstrate the accuracy, time, and memory requirements of this method through several test cases including the full-wave simulation of a $100 λ\times 100 λ$ canonical metalens. The MLFMA-SMR method offers substantial benefits for the analysis and optimization of metasurfaces and metalenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合MLFMA与静态模式表示(SMR)的边界元方法，用于高效分析超表面和超透镜，在保持精度的同时显著降低了计算时间和内存需求。
AI.motivation: 超表面由大量亚波长散射子阵列组成，其大电尺寸和多尺度特性使得通用计算方法面临巨大挑战，需要开发专门的高效数值方法。
AI.method: 基于PMCHWT公式的边界元方法，结合多层快速多极子算法(MLFMA)和静态模式表示(SMR)——一组仅依赖于物体形状、与材料和频率无关的全局域基函数，用于压缩未知量数目。
AI.result: 与传统RWG基函数的MLFMA相比，MLFMA-SMR方法显著降低了CPU时间和内存需求，并通过包括100λ×100λ规范超透镜的全波模拟在内的多个测试案例验证了精度和效率。
AI.conclusion: MLFMA-SMR方法为超表面和超透镜的分析与优化提供了显著的优势。

title: SOLAX: A Python solver for fermionic quantum systems with neural network support
summary: Numerical modeling of fermionic many-body quantum systems presents similar challenges across various research domains, necessitating universal tools, including state-of-the-art machine learning techniques. Here, we introduce SOLAX, a Python library designed to compute and analyze fermionic quantum systems using the formalism of second quantization. SOLAX provides a modular framework for constructing and manipulating basis sets, quantum states, and operators, facilitating the simulation of electronic structures and determining many-body quantum states in finite-size Hilbert spaces. The library integrates machine learning capabilities to mitigate the exponential growth of Hilbert space dimensions in large quantum clusters. The core low-level functionalities are implemented using the recently developed Python library JAX. Demonstrated through its application to the Single Impurity Anderson Model, SOLAX offers a flexible and powerful tool for researchers addressing the challenges of many-body quantum systems across a broad spectrum of fields, including atomic physics, quantum chemistry, and condensed matter physics.

AI.tldr: SOLAX是一个基于JAX的Python库，利用第二量子化形式构建和操作费米子多体量子系统，并集成机器学习能力以应对希尔伯特空间维度指数增长问题，适用于原子物理、量子化学和凝聚态物理等领域。
AI.motivation: 费米子多体量子系统的数值模拟在不同研究领域面临相似挑战，需要通用工具，特别是先进的机器学习技术来缓解希尔伯特空间维度指数增长问题。
AI.method: 基于第二量子化形式构建模块化框架，利用JAX库实现核心低级功能，集成机器学习能力处理大规模量子簇，支持基组、量子态和算符的构建与操作。
AI.result: 成功应用于Single Impurity Anderson Model，验证了SOLAX在处理多体量子系统问题上的灵活性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: SOLAX为原子物理、量子化学和凝聚态物理等多个领域的多体量子系统研究提供了灵活且强大的工具。

title: Tailoring the first law of thermodynamics for convective flows
summary: Equilibrium thermodynamics is grounded in the law of energy conservation, with a specific focus on how systems exchange energy with their environment during transitions between equilibrium states. These transitions are typically characterized by quantities such as heat absorption and the work needed to alter the system's volume. This study is inspired by the potential to develop an analogous, straightforward thermodynamic description for systems that are out of equilibrium. Here, we explore the global energy exchanges that occur during transitions between these nonequilibrium states. We study a system with heat flow and an external (gravity) field that exhibits macroscopic motion, such as Rayleigh-Bénard convection. We show that the formula for system's energy exchange has the same form as in equilibrium. It opens the possibility of describing out-of-equilibrium systems using a few simple laws similar to equilibrium thermodynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了非平衡态系统（如瑞利-贝纳德对流）在状态转换中的全局能量交换，发现其能量交换公式与平衡态具有相同形式，为建立类似平衡态热力学的简单定律描述非平衡系统提供了可能。
AI.motivation: 受平衡态热力学简洁描述的启发，希望为远离平衡态的系统建立类似的、简单的热力学描述框架。
AI.method: 研究存在热流和外力场（重力场）并表现出宏观运动的系统（瑞利-贝纳德对流），分析其在非平衡态之间转换时的全局能量交换。
AI.result: 发现非平衡态系统在状态转换中的能量交换公式与平衡态具有相同的形式。
AI.conclusion: 该发现为使用类似平衡态热力学的少数简单定律来描述非平衡系统开辟了可能性。

title: Full distribution of the ground-state energy of potentials with weak disorder
summary: We study the full distribution $P(E)$ of the ground-state energy of a single quantum particle in a potential $V(\boldsymbol{x}) = V_0(\boldsymbol{x}) + \sqrtε \, v_1(\boldsymbol{x})$, where $V_0(\boldsymbol{x})$ is a deterministic ``background'' trapping potential and $v_1(\boldsymbol{x})$ is the disorder. We consider arbitrary trapping potentials $V_0(\boldsymbol{x})$ and white-noise disorder $v_1(\boldsymbol{x})$, in arbitrary spatial dimension $d$. In the weak-disorder limit $ε\to 0$, we find that $P(E)$ scales as $P(E) \sim e^{-s(E)/ε}$. The large-deviation function $s(E)$ is obtained by calculating the most likely configuration of $V(\boldsymbol{x})$ conditioned on a given ground-state energy $E$. For infinite systems, we obtain $s(E)$ analytically in the limits $E \to \pm \infty$ and $E \simeq E_0$ where $E_0$ is the ground-state energy in the absence of disorder. We perform explicit calculations for the case of a harmonic trap $V_0(\boldsymbol{x}) \propto x^2$ in dimensions $d\in\left\{ 1,2,3\right\}$. Next, we calculate $s(E)$ exactly for a finite, periodic one-dimensional system with a homogeneous background $V_0(x)=0$. We find that, remarkably, the system exhibits a sudden change of behavior as $E$ crosses a critical value $E_c < 0$: At $E>E_c$, the most likely configuration of $V(x)$ is homogeneous, whereas at $E < E_c$ it is inhomogeneous, thus spontaneously breaking the translational symmetry of the problem. As a result, $s(E)$ is nonanalytic: Its second derivative jumps at $E=E_c$. We interpret this singularity as a second-order dynamical phase transition.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了弱无序极限下（ε→0）单个量子粒子在随机势场中基态能量P(E)的完整分布，发现其服从大偏差标度P(E)~e^{-s(E)/ε}。通过计算给定基态能量下势场的最概然构型，得到了大偏差函数s(E)。对于一维有限周期系统（V_0=0），发现当能量跨越临界值E_c时，系统从均匀最概然构型转变为非均匀构型，自发破缺平移对称性，导致s(E)在E_c处出现二阶导数跳跃，被解释为二级动力学相变。
AI.motivation: 理解弱无序势阱中单量子粒子基态能量的完整分布（不仅仅是平均值或典型涨落），揭示无序系统中极端稀有事件的统计规律。
AI.method: 采用大偏差理论框架，将基态能量分布P(E)~e^{-s(E)/ε}中的大偏差函数s(E)转化为变分问题：寻找给定基态能量E下势场V(x)的最概然构型。对无限系统，在E→±∞和E≈E_0极限下解析求解；对一维周期有限系统（V_0=0）精确求解s(E)。
AI.result: 对于一维有限周期系统，发现最概然势场构型在E>E_c时为均匀构型（保持平移对称性），在E<E_c时为非均匀构型（自发破缺平移对称性），大偏差函数s(E)在临界能量E_c处二阶导数不连续。
AI.conclusion: 该二阶导数跳跃对应二级动力学相变，表明无序系统中基态能量的极端稀有事件可以通过动力学相变的形式来理解，揭示了最概然势场构型对称性破缺与分布非解析性之间的深刻联系。

title: Langevin dynamics for high-dimensional optimization: the case of multi-spiked tensor PCA
summary: We study nonconvex optimization in high dimensions through Langevin dynamics, focusing on the multi-spiked tensor PCA problem. This tensor estimation problem involves recovering $r$ hidden signal vectors (spikes) from noisy Gaussian tensor observations using maximum likelihood estimation. We study the number of samples required for Langevin dynamics to efficiently recover the spikes and determine the necessary separation condition on the signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) for exact recovery, distinguishing the cases $p \ge 3$ and $p=2$, where $p$ denotes the order of the tensor. In particular, we show that the sample complexity required for recovering the spike associated with the largest SNR matches the well-known algorithmic threshold for the single-spike case, while this threshold degrades when recovering all $r$ spikes. As a key step, we provide a detailed characterization of the trajectory and interactions of low-dimensional projections that capture the high-dimensional dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Langevin动力学研究高维非凸优化，聚焦于多尖峰张量PCA问题。分析了从含噪高斯张量观测中恢复r个隐藏信号向量所需样本量，确定了信号-噪声比的分离条件，并比较了张量阶数p≥3与p=2两种情况。结果表明，恢复最大SNR对应尖峰的样本复杂度与单尖峰情况下的已知算法阈值一致，而恢复所有r个尖峰时该阈值会退化。
AI.motivation: 研究高维非凸优化中Langevin动力学的有效性，特别是多尖峰张量PCA问题中信号恢复的样本复杂度与信噪比条件，填补多尖峰场景下算法阈值分析的空白。
AI.method: 采用Langevin动力学进行最大似然估计，通过低维投影轨迹和相互作用的详细刻画来分析高维动力学行为，区分张量阶数p≥3与p=2两种情形，推导样本复杂度和SNR分离条件。
AI.result: 恢复最大SNR对应尖峰的样本复杂度与单尖峰已知算法阈值一致；恢复所有r个尖峰时阈值退化。p≥3与p=2情形下所需分离条件不同。
AI.conclusion: Langevin动力学在多尖峰张量PCA问题中具有明确的算法阈值，恢复单一最强信号与恢复全部信号的难度存在本质差异，低维投影分析是理解高维动力学行为的关键工具。

title: Flow Perturbation to Accelerate Unbiased Sampling of Boltzmann distribution
summary: Flow-based generative models have been employed for sampling the Boltzmann distribution, but their application to high-dimensional systems is hindered by the significant computational cost of obtaining the Jacobian of the flow. To overcome this challenge, we introduce the flow perturbation method, which incorporates optimized stochastic perturbations into the flow. By reweighting trajectories generated by the perturbed flow, our method achieves unbiased sampling of the Boltzmann distribution with orders of magnitude speedup compared to both brute force Jacobian calculations and the Hutchinson estimator. Notably, it accurately sampled the Chignolin protein with all atomic Cartesian coordinates explicitly represented, which, to our best knowledge, is the largest molecule ever Boltzmann sampled in such detail using generative models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出流扰动方法，通过向流中引入优化的随机扰动并重加权轨迹，实现了玻尔兹曼分布的无偏采样，在避免昂贵的雅可比矩阵计算的同时获得了数量级加速，并成功采样了Chignolin蛋白质的全原子笛卡尔坐标。
AI.motivation: 基于流的生成模型在采样玻尔兹曼分布时，对于高维系统，计算流的雅可比矩阵计算成本极高，严重限制了其应用。
AI.method: 提出流扰动方法：向流中引入优化的随机扰动生成轨迹，然后通过重加权这些轨迹来实现玻尔兹曼分布的无偏采样。
AI.result: 与暴力雅可比计算和Hutchinson估计器相比，实现了数量级的加速；成功采样了Chignolin蛋白质的全原子笛卡尔坐标，这是迄今为止使用生成模型进行玻尔兹曼采样的最大分子。
AI.conclusion: 流扰动方法能够高效、无偏地采样高维系统的玻尔兹曼分布，显著降低了计算成本，并扩展了生成模型在分子模拟中的应用范围。

title: Constructive Universal Approximation and Finite Sample Memorization by Narrow Deep ReLU Networks
summary:
We present a fully constructive analysis of deep ReLU neural networks for classification and function approximation tasks. First, we prove that any dataset with $N$ distinct points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and $M$ output classes can be exactly classified using a multilayer perceptron (MLP) of width $2$ and depth at most $2N + 4M - 1$, with all network parameters constructed explicitly. This result is sharp with respect to width and is interpreted through the lens of simultaneous or ensemble controllability in discrete nonlinear dynamics.
  Second, we show that these explicit constructions yield uniform bounds on the parameter norms and, in particular, provide upper estimates for minimizers of standard regularized training loss functionals in supervised learning. As the regularization parameter vanishes, the trained networks converge to exact classifiers with bounded norm, explaining the effectiveness of overparameterized training in the small-regularization regime.
  We also prove a universal approximation theorem in $L^p(Ω; \mathbb{R}_+)$ for any bounded domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^d$ and $p \in [1, \infty)$, using MLPs of fixed width $d + 1$. The proof is constructive, geometrically motivated, and provides explicit estimates on the network depth when the target function belongs to the Sobolev space $W^{1,p}$. We also extend the approximation and depth estimation results to $L^p(Ω; \mathbb{R}^m)$ for any $m \geq 1$.
  Our results offer a unified and interpretable framework connecting controllability, expressivity, and training dynamics in deep neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文对深度ReLU神经网络在分类和函数逼近任务中进行了完整的构造性分析。首先证明了任意N个不同点、M个输出类别的数据集可以用宽度为2、深度不超过2N+4M-1的MLP精确分类，该宽度结果是最优的。其次，这些显式构造给出了参数范数的均匀上界，为正则化训练损失函数的最小化器提供了上界估计。随着正则化参数趋零，训练网络收敛到有界范数的精确分类器。此外，还证明了在L^p空间中的通用逼近定理，使用固定宽度d+1的MLP，对Sobolev空间中的目标函数给出了深度显式估计。该结果建立了可控性、表达能力和训练动态之间的统一可解释框架。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络的理论分析多为存在性而非构造性，缺乏对网络结构参数（宽度、深度、权重范数）的显式刻画。本文旨在通过构造性方法，建立数据集精确分类与函数逼近的网络参数显式上界，并揭示过参数化训练中小正则化区域有效性的理论机制，同时连接离散非线性动力学中的可控性理论。
AI.method: 采用完全构造性分析方法：1) 针对分类问题，利用ReLU激活函数构造宽度为2的MLP，通过几何方法将每个数据点映射到不同深度层级，实现精确分类，并证明宽度2的最优性；2) 将显式构造与正则化训练理论结合，分析参数范数上界；3) 对函数逼近，基于几何构造（如多面体逼近）给出固定宽度d+1的通用逼近定理，并对Sobolev空间目标函数提供深度显式估计。
AI.result: 1) 精确分类：宽度2、深度≤2N+4M-1的MLP可精确分类任意N点M类数据集，宽度2是最优的；2) 正则化分析：显式构造的参数范数有界，小正则化下训练网络收敛到有界范数的精确分类器；3) 通用逼近：固定宽度d+1的MLP在L^p空间上具有通用逼近能力，对W^{1,p}函数有深度显式估计，并扩展至向量值函数空间L^p(Ω; ℝ^m)。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个统一且可解释的理论框架，通过构造性方法连接了神经网络的表达能力（分类与逼近）、离散非线性动力学中的可控性理论以及训练动态（正则化行为）。宽度2的分类网络构造是最优的，而固定宽度d+1的逼近构造为深度估计提供了显式上界。这些结果有助于理解过参数化神经网络在实践中的有效性。

title: Laminar-Turbulent Patterns in Shear Flows : Evasion of Tipping, Saddle-Loop Bifurcation and Log scaling of the Turbulent Fraction
summary: We analyze a one-dimensional two-scalar fields reaction advection diffusion model for the globally subcritical transition to turbulence. In this model, the homogeneous turbulent state is disconnected from the laminar one and disappears in a tipping catastrophe scenario. The model however exhibits a linear instability of the turbulent homogeneous state, mimicking the onset of the laminar-turbulent patterns observed in the transitional regime of wall shear flows. Numerically continuing the solutions obtained at large Reynolds numbers, we construct the Busse balloon associated with the multistability of the nonlinear solutions emerging from the instability. In the core of the balloon, the turbulent fluctuations, encoded into a multiplicative noise, select the pattern wavelength. On the lower Reynolds number side of the balloon, the pattern follows a cascade of destabilizations towards larger and larger, eventually infinite wavelengths. In that limit, the periodic limit cycle associated with the spatial pattern hits the laminar fixed point, resulting in a saddle-loop global bifurcation and the emergence of solitary pulse solutions. This saddle-loop scenario predicts a logarithmic divergence of the wavelength, which captures experimental and numerical data in two representative shear flows.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了一个一维双标量场反应-平流-扩散模型，研究全局亚临界湍流转捩。该模型展示了均匀湍流态的线性不稳定性及其导致的层流-湍流斑图，通过数值延拓构建了Busse气球，发现湍流涨落（乘性噪声）选择斑图波长，并在低雷诺数侧经历波长级联失稳，最终通过鞍-环全局分岔产生孤立脉冲解，该分岔预测波长的对数发散，与两个代表性剪切流的实验和数值数据吻合。
AI.motivation: 理解壁剪切流中亚临界转捩过程中层流-湍流斑图形成的物理机制，特别是湍流态的不稳定性如何导致空间斑图以及斑图波长的选择与演化规律。
AI.method: 采用一维双标量场反应-平流-扩散模型，通过数值延拓方法从高雷诺数解出发构建Busse气球，引入乘性噪声编码湍流涨落，分析非线性解的多稳定性及其分岔行为。
AI.result: 发现Busse气球中心区域湍流涨落（乘性噪声）选择斑图波长；低雷诺数侧斑图经历波长级联失稳（波长趋于无穷大）；周期极限环与层流不动点相撞导致鞍-环全局分岔，产生孤立脉冲解，且波长呈对数发散。
AI.conclusion: 该模型提出的鞍-环分岔机制预测的波长对数发散规律能够成功捕捉两种代表性剪切流（如管道流或平面库埃特流）中的实验和数值数据，为理解亚临界湍流转捩中的斑图形成与波长选择提供了统一的理论框架。

title: Approximability and Rouquier dimension for noncommutative algebras over schemes
comment: Current: Corrected typos. Previous: Moved, and developed, some content to arXiv: 2410.01785, added references
summary: This work is concerned with approximability (à la Neeman) and Rouquier dimension for triangulated categories associated to noncommutative algebras over schemes. Amongst other things, we establish that the category of perfect complexes of a Noetherian quasi-coherent algebra over a separated Noetherian scheme is strongly generated if, and only if, there exists an affine open cover where the algebra has finite global dimension. As a consequence, we solve an open problem posed by Neeman. Further, as a first application, we study the existence of generators for Azumaya algebras.

AI.tldr: 本文研究非交换代数的三角范畴中的近似性（Neeman意义下）和Rouquier维数，证明了分离Noetherian概形上的Noetherian拟凝聚代数的完美复形范畴是强生成的当且仅当其具有有限整体维数的仿射开覆盖，并由此解决了Neeman提出的一个公开问题，进而应用于Azumaya代数的生成元存在性。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在解决Neeman提出的一个公开问题，即关于非交换代数上的三角范畴的近似性与生成性条件。作者希望建立分离Noetherian概形上非交换代数的完美复形范畴强生成性的充要条件，并探索其在Azumaya代数上的应用。
AI.method: 本文采用范畴论与代数几何相结合的方法，利用Neeman的近似性理论（approximability）和Rouquier维数理论，通过分析Noetherian拟凝聚代数在仿射开覆盖下的整体维数性质，建立完美复形范畴强生成性的等价条件。
AI.result: 本文的主要结果是：分离Noetherian概形上的Noetherian拟凝聚代数的完美复形范畴是强生成的当且仅当存在一个仿射开覆盖，使得该代数在该覆盖上具有有限整体维数。这一结果直接解决了Neeman的公开问题。作为应用，进一步研究了Azumaya代数上的生成元存在性。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了非交换代数三角范畴的强生成性与仿射开覆盖上有限整体维数之间的等价关系，为Neeman的近似性理论提供了新的视角和具体实例，并展示了该结果在Azumaya代数等非交换几何对象中的应用价值。

title: Boundary regularity for the distance functions, and the eikonal equation
comment: version 2; to appear in Journal of Geometric Analysis
summary: We study the gain in regularity of the distance to the boundary of a domain in $\mathbb R^m$. In particular, we show that if the signed distance function happens to be merely differentiable in a neighborhood of a boundary point, it and the boundary have to be $\mathcal C^{1,1}$ regular. Conversely, we study the regularity of the distance function under regularity hypotheses of the boundary. Along the way, we point out that any solution to the eikonal equation, differentiable everywhere in a domain of the Euclidean space, admits a gradient which is locally Lipschitz.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了欧氏空间中区域边界距离函数的正则性提升问题。主要发现：若符号距离函数在边界点邻域内仅可微，则边界必为C^{1,1}正则；反之，边界正则性也决定距离函数的正则性。此外，证明了处处可微的eikonal方程解其梯度局部Lipschitz连续。
AI.motivation: 探究距离函数与边界正则性之间的精确关系，特别是在可微性假设下能否推出更强的Lipschitz梯度正则性。
AI.method: 通过分析符号距离函数的可微性条件，利用eikonal方程的性质和几何分析工具，建立边界正则性与距离函数正则性的双向蕴含关系。
AI.result: (1) 若符号距离函数在边界点邻域可微，则边界为C^{1,1}正则，且距离函数梯度局部Lipschitz连续；(2) 建立边界正则性对距离函数正则性的正向影响；(3) 推广了eikonal方程解的正则性结论。
AI.conclusion: 距离函数的可微性隐含了比预期更强的正则性（C^{1,1}而非C^1），且eikonal方程处处可微解具有自动的梯度Lipschitz性。

title: Liquid drop with capillarity and rotating traveling waves
comment: Main changes in version 2: Lemma 4.2 has a new, simpler and shorter proof; Section 5 has a simpler, more classical and much shorter proof, and a slightly weaker result; former Section 7 (Appendix) has been removed. Former Sections 5 and 7 of arXiv:2408.02333v1 have been moved, and improved, into a separate article about the Dirichlet-Neumann operator
summary: We consider the free boundary problem for a 3-dimensional, incompressible, irrotational liquid drop of nearly spherical shape with capillarity. We study the problem from the beginning, extending some classical results from the flat case (capillary water waves) to the spherical geometry: the reduction to a problem on the boundary, its Hamiltonian structure, the analyticity and tame estimates for the Dirichlet-Neumann operator in Sobolev class, and a linearization formula for it, both with the method of the good unknown of Alinhac and by a differential geometry approach. Then we prove the bifurcation of traveling waves, which are nontrivial (i.e., nonspherical) fixed profiles rotating with constant angular velocity.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了近球形三维不可压缩无旋液滴在毛细作用下的自由边界问题，将经典平面毛细水波理论推广至球面几何，包括边界约化、哈密顿结构、Dirichlet-Neumann算子的解析性与适定估计，并通过Alinhac好未知量法和微分几何方法给出线性化公式，最终证明了旋转行波（非球形固定轮廓）的分岔存在性。
AI.motivation: 将经典平面毛细水波理论（如边界约化、哈密顿结构、Dirichlet-Neumann算子性质）系统地推广到球面几何背景下的三维液滴自由边界问题，填补该领域从平面到球面的理论空白。
AI.method: 采用边界约化方法将问题降维至液滴表面；利用哈密顿结构刻画动力学；通过Alinhac好未知量法和微分几何方法对Dirichlet-Neumann算子进行线性化与解析性估计；运用分岔理论证明行波解的存在性。
AI.result: 成功将平面毛细水波的经典结果（边界约化、哈密顿结构、Dirichlet-Neumann算子的解析性与线性化）推广至球面几何；发现了以恒定角速度旋转的非球形行波解的分岔现象。
AI.conclusion: 球面几何下的毛细液滴自由边界问题在理论框架上可类比平面情形，且存在非平凡的旋转行波解，为理解三维液滴动力学提供了新的数学工具和结果。

title: A remark on the paper of Deninger and Murre
summary: We show that the results proven by Deninger and Murre directly imply that the Chern classes of the de Rham bundle of an abelian scheme are torsion elements in the Chow ring, a result that was later proven by van der Geer. We also discuss several results about the orders of these classes.

AI.tldr: 本文证明Deninger和Murre的结果直接蕴含了阿贝尔概型的de Rham丛的陈类在Chow环中是挠元（这一结果后来由van der Geer证明），并讨论了这些类的阶的相关结果。
AI.motivation: 建立Deninger-Murre定理与van der Geer结果之间的直接逻辑联系，并进一步探索阿贝尔概型de Rham丛陈类的挠性质及其阶的定量刻画。
AI.method: 基于Deninger和Murre已有的代数几何结果进行直接推导，并结合Chow环理论分析陈类的挠性；通过数论或几何方法进一步研究阶的上界或具体数值。
AI.result: Deninger和Murre的结果直接蕴含了阿贝尔概型de Rham丛的陈类在Chow环中是挠元；给出了关于这些挠类阶的若干新结果。
AI.conclusion: 阿贝尔概型de Rham丛的陈类具有挠性，且其阶可被进一步刻画；本文统一并推广了已知结论。

title: Stochastic stem bucking using mixture density neural networks
summary: Poor bucking decisions made by forest harvesters can have a negative effect on the products that are generated from the logs. Making the right bucking decisions is not an easy task because harvesters must rely on predictions of the stem profile for the part of the stems that is not yet measured. The goal of this project is to improve the bucking decisions made by forest harvesters with a stochastic bucking method. We developed a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network that predicted the parameters of a Gaussian distribution conditioned on the known part of the stem, enabling the creation of multiple samples of stem profile predictions for the unknown part of the stem. The bucking decisions could then be optimized using a novel stochastic bucking algorithm which used all the stem profiles generated to choose the logs to generate from the stem. The stochastic bucking algorithm was compared to two benchmark models: A polynomial model that could not condition its predictions on more than one diameter measurement, and a deterministic LSTM neural network. All models were evaluated on stem profiles of four coniferous species prevalent in eastern Canada. In general, the best bucking decisions were taken by the stochastic LSTM models, demonstrating the usefulness of the method. The second-best results were mostly obtained by the deterministic LSTM model and the worst results by the polynomial model, corroborating the usefulness of conditioning the stem curve predictions on multiple measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM的随机造材方法，通过预测树干未测量部分的高斯分布参数并生成多个样本，优化森林采伐机的造材决策。在四种针叶树种上的实验表明，随机LSTM模型优于确定性LSTM和多项式基准模型。
AI.motivation: 森林采伐机在造材时需要预测树干未测量部分的轮廓，但现有方法难以做出准确决策，导致木材产品价值损失。因此，需要一种能够利用已测量部分信息、考虑预测不确定性的随机造材方法来提升决策质量。
AI.method: 开发LSTM神经网络预测树干已知部分条件下未知部分的高斯分布参数，从而生成多个树干轮廓预测样本；基于这些样本设计随机造材算法以优化造材决策。
AI.result: 在四种加拿大东部针叶树种上评估，随机LSTM模型在造材决策上总体最优，确定性LSTM模型次之，多项式模型最差。
AI.conclusion: 随机造材方法能有效提升造材决策质量，将预测条件建立在多个已测直径数据上比仅依赖单一测量更优。

title: A Natural Language Processing Framework for Hotel Recommendation Based on Users' Text Reviews
summary: Recently, the application of Artificial Intelligence algorithms in hotel recommendation systems has become an increasingly popular topic. One such method that has proven to be effective in this field is Deep Learning, especially Natural Language processing models, which are able to extract semantic knowledge from user's text reviews to create more efficient recommendation systems. This can lead to the development of intelligent models that can classify a user's preferences and emotions based on their feedback in the form of text reviews about their hotel stay experience. In this study, we propose a Natural Language Processing framework that utilizes customer text reviews to provide personalized recommendations for the most appropriate hotel based on their preferences. The framework is based on Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) and a fine-tuning/validation pipeline that categorizes customer hotel review texts into "Bad," "Good," or "Excellent" recommended hotels. Our findings indicate that the hotel recommendation system we propose can significantly enhance the user experience of booking accommodations by providing personalized recommendations based on user preferences and previous booking history.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于BERT和微调/验证管道的NLP框架，通过分析用户评论文本将酒店推荐分为"差"、"好"、"优秀"三类，以提供个性化酒店推荐，显著提升用户预订体验。
AI.motivation: 利用深度学习（尤其是NLP）从用户文本评论中提取语义知识，构建更高效的酒店推荐系统，以解决传统推荐方法无法充分理解用户偏好和情感的问题。
AI.method: 采用基于BERT的NLP框架，通过微调/验证管道对用户酒店评论文本进行分类，将推荐结果划分为"差"、"好"、"优秀"三个等级，结合用户偏好和历史预订记录提供个性化推荐。
AI.result: 所提出的酒店推荐系统能够基于用户偏好和历史预订行为提供个性化推荐，显著提升用户预订住宿的体验。
AI.conclusion: 基于BERT的NLP框架能够有效从用户文本评论中提取语义信息，实现酒店评论的情感分类，从而为用户提供更精准的个性化酒店推荐。

title: A priori and a posteriori error bounds for the fully mixed FEM formulation of poroelasticity with stress-dependent permeability
summary: We develop a family of mixed finite element methods for a model of nonlinear poroelasticity where, thanks to a rewriting of the constitutive equations, the permeability depends on the total poroelastic stress and on the fluid pressure and therefore we can use the Hellinger--Reissner principle with weakly imposed stress symmetry for Biot's equations. The problem is adequately structured into a coupled system consisting of one saddle-point formulation, one linearised perturbed saddle-point formulation, and two off-diagonal perturbations. This system's unique solvability requires assumptions on regularity and Lipschitz continuity of the inverse permeability, and the analysis follows fixed-point arguments and the Babuška--Brezzi theory. The discrete problem is shown uniquely solvable by applying similar fixed-point and saddle-point techniques as for the continuous case. The method is based on the classical PEERS$_k$ elements, it is exactly momentum and mass conservative, and it is robust with respect to the nearly incompressible as well as vanishing storativity limits. We derive a priori error estimates, we also propose fully computable residual-based a posteriori error indicators, and show that they are reliable and efficient with respect to the natural norms, and robust in the limit of near incompressibility. These a posteriori error estimates are used to drive adaptive mesh refinement. The theoretical analysis is supported and illustrated by several numerical examples in 2D and 3D.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非线性孔隙弹性模型，发展了一族混合有限元方法。通过重写本构方程，使渗透率依赖于总孔隙弹性应力和流体压力，从而可以针对Biot方程采用弱施加应力对称性的Hellinger-Reissner原理。问题被结构化为一个耦合系统（一个鞍点公式、一个线性化扰动鞍点公式和两个非对角扰动），通过不动点论证和Babuska-Brezzi理论证明了唯一可解性。离散问题采用经典PEERS_k单元，具有精确动量与质量守恒性，对几乎不可压缩和消失储容极限具有鲁棒性。推导了先验误差估计，提出了完全可计算的后验误差指示子，证明了其在自然范数下的可靠性与有效性，并用于驱动自适应网格细化。2D和3D数值算例验证了理论分析。
AI.motivation: 非线性孔隙弹性模型中渗透率依赖于总应力和流体压力，现有方法难以处理此类强耦合非线性问题，需要发展鲁棒且保守的混合有限元方法。
AI.method: 1) 重写本构方程使渗透率依赖总孔隙弹性应力和流体压力；2) 采用Hellinger-Reissner原理与弱施加应力对称性；3) 将问题分解为一个鞍点公式、一个线性化扰动鞍点公式和两个非对角扰动；4) 基于不动点论证和Babuska-Brezzi理论分析唯一可解性；5) 离散采用经典PEERS_k单元；6) 推导先验误差估计及残差型后验误差指示子。
AI.result: 所提方法在自然范数下具备可靠且有效的后验误差估计，对几乎不可压缩和消失储容极限表现出鲁棒性，2D和3D数值实验支撑了理论分析。
AI.conclusion: 发展的混合有限元方法能有效求解非线性孔隙弹性问题，具备守恒性、鲁棒性和自适应网格细化的能力，理论分析和数值实验共同验证了方法的可行性与优越性。

title: Generalised gradients for virtual elements and applications to a posteriori error analysis
summary: We rewrite the standard nodal virtual element method as a generalised gradient method. This re-formulation allows for computing a reliable and efficient error estimator by locally reconstructing broken fluxes and potentials on elemental subtriangulations. We prove the usual upper and lower bounds with constants independent of the stabilisation of the method and, under technical assumptions on the mesh, the degree of accuracy.

AI.tldr: 将标准节点虚拟元方法重写为广义梯度方法，通过局部重构单元子三角剖分上的破碎通量和势，提出一种可靠且高效的误差估计器，并证明了与稳定化方法和精度阶数无关的上下界常数。
AI.motivation: 标准节点虚拟元方法的误差估计通常依赖于稳定化参数和精度阶数，缺乏通用的、与这些参数无关的可靠误差估计器。本文旨在通过重新表述方法，建立一种不依赖稳定化和精度阶数的通用误差估计框架。
AI.method: 将标准的节点虚拟元方法重新表述为广义梯度方法；基于此，通过在单元子三角剖分上局部重构破碎通量和势，构造误差估计器；并分析该估计器的可靠性（上界）和效率（下界）。
AI.result: 证明了所提出的误差估计器满足上下界性质，且这些界中的常数与方法的稳定化参数以及精度阶数无关（在关于网格的技术假设下）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于广义梯度方法重构的误差估计器是一种可靠且高效的后验误差估计工具，适用于节点虚拟元方法，且其性能不依赖于稳定化参数和精度阶数。

title: Properties of core-EP matrices and binary relationships
summary: In this paper, various properties of core-EP matrices are investigated. We introduce the MPDMP matrix associated with $A$ and by means of it, some properties and equivalent conditions of core-EP matrices can be obtained. Also, properties of MPD, DMP, and CMP inverses are studied and we prove that in the class of core-EP matrices, DMP, MPD, and Drazin inverses are the same. Moreover, DMP and MPD binary relation orders are introduced and the relationship between these orders and other binary relation orders are considered.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了core-EP矩阵的各种性质，引入了与矩阵A相关的MPDMP矩阵，通过它获得了core-EP矩阵的一些性质和等价条件。同时研究了MPD、DMP和CMP逆的性质，证明了在core-EP矩阵类中，DMP、MPD和Drazin逆是相同的。此外，引入了DMP和MPD二元关系序，并考察了这些序与其他二元关系序之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 核心动机是深入探究core-EP矩阵的性质，并建立该类矩阵下不同广义逆（DMP、MPD、Drazin逆）之间的等价关系，同时引入新的二元关系序以丰富core-EP矩阵的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过引入MPDMP矩阵这一新工具作为研究媒介，系统推导core-EP矩阵的性质和等价条件；对比分析MPD、DMP、CMP逆在core-EP矩阵类中的行为，证明三者与Drazin逆的一致性；定义DMP和MPD二元关系序，并将其与已有序关系进行比较研究。
AI.result: 成功获得了core-EP矩阵的若干新性质和等价条件；证明了在core-EP矩阵类中，DMP逆、MPD逆与Drazin逆三者等价；建立了DMP和MPD两种新的二元关系序，并厘清了它们与已有二元关系序之间的联系。
AI.conclusion: MPDMP矩阵是研究core-EP矩阵的有效工具；core-EP矩阵类中多种广义逆的一致性结论简化了该框架下的逆运算理论；新引入的二元关系序丰富了矩阵序理论，为后续研究提供了基础。

title: New global Carleman estimates and null controllability for a stochastic Cahn-Hilliard type equation
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2408.03114
summary: In this paper, we study the null controllability for a stochastic semilinear CahnHilliard type equation, whose semilinear term contains first and second order derivatives of solutions. To start with, an improved global Carleman estimate for linear backward stochastic fourth order parabolic equations with $L^2$-valued source terms is derived, which is based on a new fundamental identity for a stochastic fourth order parabolic operator. Based on it, we establish a new global Carleman estimate for linear backward stochastic fourth order parabolic equations with $H^{-2}$-valued source terms, which, together with a fixed point argument, derive the desired null controllability for the stochastic Cahn-Hilliard type equation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机半线性Cahn-Hilliard型方程（其半线性项包含一阶和二阶导数）的零能控性。通过推导带有$L^2$值和$H^{-2}$值源项的线性后向随机四阶抛物方程的全局Carleman估计，结合不动点论证，建立了该随机Cahn-Hilliard型方程的零能控性。
AI.motivation: 研究随机半线性Cahn-Hilliard型方程（半线性项包含一阶和二阶导数）的零能控性，这类方程在相场模型中具有重要应用。
AI.method: 1. 推导了带有$L^2$值源项的线性后向随机四阶抛物方程的改进全局Carleman估计（基于随机四阶抛物算子的新基本恒等式）；2. 在此基础上建立带有$H^{-2}$值源项的全局Carleman估计；3. 结合不动点论证，导出原方程的零能控性。
AI.result: 成功推导了适用于随机Cahn-Hilliard型方程的全局Carleman估计，并证明了该方程的零能控性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为随机半线性四阶抛物型方程（尤其是Cahn-Hilliard型方程）的零能控性提供了理论依据，所发展的Carleman估计方法可推广至更一般的高阶随机抛物系统。

title: Interpretable Clustering: A Survey
summary: In recent years, much of the research on clustering algorithms has primarily focused on enhancing their accuracy and efficiency, frequently at the expense of interpretability. However, as these methods are increasingly being applied in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, finance, and autonomous systems, the need of transparent and interpretable clustering outcomes has become a critical concern. This is not only necessary for gaining user trust but also for satisfying the growing ethical and regulatory demands in these fields. Ensuring that decisions derived from clustering algorithms can be clearly understood and justified is now a fundamental requirement. To address this need, this paper provides a comprehensive and structured review of the current state of explainable clustering algorithms, identifying key criteria to distinguish between various methods. These insights can effectively assist researchers in making informed decisions about the most suitable explainable clustering methods for specific application contexts, while also promoting the development and adoption of clustering algorithms that are both efficient and transparent. For convenient access and reference, an open repository organizes representative and emerging interpretable clustering methods under the taxonomy proposed in this survey, available at https://hulianyu.xyz/Interpretable-Clustering-Repository

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了可解释聚类算法，提出了分类标准，并建立了开源仓库以促进透明且高效的聚类方法的发展与应用。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类算法研究多聚焦于准确性和效率，忽视了可解释性。然而在高风险领域（如医疗、金融、自动驾驶）中，透明且可解释的聚类结果对于获取用户信任、满足伦理与监管要求至关重要。
AI.method: 采用系统性综述方法，对当前可解释聚类算法进行全面梳理，提出关键分类标准以区分不同方法，并构建了开源仓库对代表性及新兴方法进行分类整理。
AI.result: 提出了可解释聚类方法的分类体系，建立了公开的在线仓库（https://hulianyu.xyz/Interpretable-Clustering-Repository），为研究者选择合适的可解释聚类方法提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文的综述和分类体系能够帮助研究者根据具体应用场景做出更明智的方法选择，同时推动兼具效率与透明性的聚类算法的发展与采纳。

title: A Fully Parameter-Free Second-Order Algorithm for Convex-Concave Minimax Problems
summary: In this paper, we study second-order algorithms for the convex-concave minimax problem, which has attracted much attention in many fields such as machine learning in recent years. We propose a Lipschitz-free cubic regularization (LF-CR) algorithm for solving the convex-concave minimax optimization problem without knowing the Lipschitz constant. It can be shown that the iteration complexity of the LF-CR algorithm to obtain an $ε$-optimal solution with respect to the restricted primal-dual gap is upper bounded by $\mathcal{O}(ρ^{2/3}\|z_0-z^*\|^2ε^{-2/3})$ , where $z_0=(x_0,y_0)$ is a pair of initial points, $z^*=(x^*,y^*)$ is a pair of optimal solutions, and $ρ$ is the Lipschitz constant. We further propose a fully parameter-free cubic regularization (FF-CR) algorithm that does not require any parameters of the problem, including the Lipschitz constant and the upper bound of the distance from the initial point to the optimal solution. We also prove that the iteration complexity of the FF-CR algorithm to obtain an $ε$-optimal solution with respect to the gradient norm is upper bounded by $\mathcal{O}(ρ^{2/3}\|z_0-z^*\|^{4/3}ε^{-2/3}) $. Numerical experiments show the efficiency of both algorithms. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed FF-CR algorithm is a completely parameter-free second-order algorithm, and its iteration complexity is currently the best in terms of $ε$ under the termination criterion of the gradient norm.

AI.tldr: 本文针对凸-凹极小极大问题，提出了两种免Lipschitz常数的三次正则化算法：LF-CR（无需Lipschitz常数）和FF-CR（完全无参数），分别给出了关于限制性原始对偶间隙和梯度范数的迭代复杂度，数值实验验证了算法效率，其中FF-CR是首个完全无参数的二阶算法，且其梯度范数终止准则下的ε复杂度目前最优。
AI.motivation: 凸-凹极小极大问题在机器学习等领域有广泛关注，现有二阶算法通常需要知道Lipschitz常数等参数，限制了实用性。本文旨在设计无需或尽可能少地依赖问题参数的二阶算法。
AI.method: 提出LF-CR算法，在未知Lipschitz常数的情况下使用三次正则化技术求解凸-凹极小极大问题；进一步提出FF-CR算法，完全不需要Lipschitz常数和初始点到最优解距离的上界等任何参数。
AI.result: LF-CR算法在限制性原始对偶间隙下的迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z₀-z^*‖²ε^{-2/3})；FF-CR算法在梯度范数下的迭代复杂度为O(ρ^{2/3}‖z₀-z^*‖^{4/3}ε^{-2/3})，数值实验验证了两种算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FF-CR算法是首个完全无参数的二阶优化算法，且其梯度范数终止准则下的迭代复杂度在ε阶上达到当前最优。

title: Global prescribed-time control of a class of uncertain nonholonomic systems by smooth time-varying feedback
summary: This paper investigates the prescribed-time smooth control problem for a class of uncertain nonholonomic systems. With a novel smooth time-varying state transformation, the uncertain chained nonholonomic system is reformulated as an uncertain linear time-varying system. By fully utilizing the properties of a class of parametric Lyapunov equations and constructing time-varying Lyapunov-like functions, smooth time-varying high-gain state and output feedback controllers are designed. The states and controllers are proven to converge to zero at any prescribed time. The proposed smooth time-varying method combines the advantage of a time-varying high-gain function, which enhances control performance, and a smooth time-varying function that can drive the states to zero at the prescribed time. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is verified by a numerical example.

AI.tldr: 本文针对一类不确定非完整系统，提出了一种预设时间平滑控制方法。通过新颖的平滑时变状态变换将不确定链式非完整系统重构为不确定线性时变系统，并利用参数化Lyapunov方程和时变Lyapunov-like函数，设计了平滑时变高增益状态和输出反馈控制器，使得状态和控制器在任意预设时间内收敛到零。
AI.motivation: 解决不确定非完整系统在预设时间内实现平滑控制的问题，克服传统非完整系统控制方法在时间约束和平滑性方面的局限性。
AI.method: 1) 提出平滑时变状态变换，将不确定链式非完整系统转化为不确定线性时变系统；2) 利用参数化Lyapunov方程的性质；3) 构建时变Lyapunov-like函数；4) 设计平滑时变高增益状态反馈控制器和输出反馈控制器。
AI.result: 所设计的平滑时变高增益状态和输出反馈控制器能够使得系统状态和控制器在任意预设时间内收敛到零，并通过数值算例验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的平滑时变方法兼具时变高增益函数（增强控制性能）和平滑时变函数（驱动状态在预设时间归零）的双重优势，为不确定非完整系统的预设时间控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: Dynamically relevant recurrent flows obtained via a nonlinear recurrence function from two-dimensional turbulence
summary: This paper demonstrates the efficient extraction of unstable recurrent flows from two-dimensional turbulence by using nonlinear triads to diagnose recurrence in direct numerical simulations. Nearly recurrent episodes are identified from simulations and then converged using a standard Newton- GMRES-hookstep method, however with much greater diversity than previous studies which performed this 'recurrent flow analysis'. Unstable periodic and relative periodic orbits are able to be identified which span larger values of dissipation rate, i.e. corresponding to extreme bursting events. The triad variables are found to provide a more natural way to weight the greater variety of spatial modes active in such orbits than a standard Euclidian norm of complex Fourier amplitudes. Moreover the triad variables build in a reduction of the continuous symmetry of the system which avoids the need to search over translations when obtaining relative periodic orbits. Armed with these orbits we investigate optimal weightings when reconstructing the statistics of turbulence and suggest that, in fact, a simple heuristic weighting based on the solution instability provides a very good prediction, provided enough dynamically relevant orbits are included in the expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文利用非线性三元组从二维湍流中高效提取不稳定往复流，通过诊断直接数值模拟中的往复性识别准往复事件，并使用牛顿-GMRES-hookstep方法收敛，获得了比以往研究更多样化的不稳定周期轨道和相对周期轨道，这些轨道跨越了更大的耗散率值（对应极端爆发事件）。三元组变量比标准欧几里得范数更自然地加权空间模式，并内建了连续对称性约化，避免了相对周期轨道中平移搜索的需求。利用这些轨道研究湍流统计重构的最优加权，发现基于解不稳定性的简单启发式加权能提供很好的预测，前提是包含足够多的动力学相关轨道。
AI.motivation: 从二维湍流中高效提取不稳定往复流（周期轨道和相对周期轨道），并利用这些轨道重构湍流统计，克服以往方法轨道多样性不足的问题。
AI.method: 使用非线性三元组变量诊断直接数值模拟中的近往复事件，结合牛顿-GMRES-hookstep方法收敛到精确的周期和相对周期轨道。三元组变量天然约化连续平移对称性，避免了对平移搜索的需求。
AI.result: 成功识别出比以往研究更多样化的不稳定周期和相对周期轨道，这些轨道跨越更大的耗散率值（对应极端爆发事件）。基于解不稳定性的简单启发式加权能很好预测湍流统计重构，前提是包含足够多的动力学相关轨道。
AI.conclusion: 三元组变量为加权空间模式提供了更自然的方式，并内建对称性约化，提高了往复流分析的效率和多样性；基于不稳定性的启发式加权是重构湍流统计的有效策略。

title: Inverse cascade in zonal flows
summary: Zonal winds on Jovian planets play an important role in governing the cloud dynamics, transport of momentum, scalars, and weather patterns. Therefore, it is crucial to understand the evolution of the zonal flows and their sustainability. Based on studies in two-dimensional (2D) $β$ plane setups, zonal flow is believed to be forced at the intermediate scale via baroclinic instabilities, and the inverse cascade leads to the transfer of energy to large scales. However, whether such a process exists in three-dimensional (3D) deep convection systems remains an open and challenging question. To explore a possible answer, we perform Large Eddy Simulations at the geophysically interesting regime of $Ra=$$10^{12}$, $Ek=$$10^{-6}$,$10^{-7}$ and $10^{-8}$ in horizontally rotating Rayleigh-Bénard convection setup and discover the existence of natural forcing through buoyancy and inverse cascade. The turbulent kinetic energy budget analysis and the spectral space assessment of the results corroborate the emanation of a strong mean flow from chaos.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大涡模拟（LES）研究水平旋转Rayleigh-Bénard对流系统中木星类行星纬向流的形成机制，发现在高Rayleigh数和低Ekman数（Ra=10^12, Ek=10^-6至10^-8）条件下，浮力驱动产生的自然强迫和逆能量级联过程能够从混沌中形成强平均流，验证了三维深对流系统中存在类似于二维β平面理论所预测的纬向流自组织机制。
AI.motivation: 理解木星类气态巨行星上纬向流的演化与维持机制。虽然在二维β平面设置中已认为纬向流通过斜压不稳定性在中尺度被强迫、再通过逆级联向大尺度传递能量，但这一过程在三维深对流系统中是否存在仍是一个未解决的关键问题。
AI.method: 采用大涡模拟（Large Eddy Simulations），在水平旋转Rayleigh-Bénard对流装置中设置地球物理感兴趣的高参数区域（Ra=10^12, Ek=10^-6, 10^-7, 10^-8），进行三维数值模拟，并通过湍流动能（TKE）收支分析和谱空间评估来检验流动特性。
AI.result: 发现了通过浮力产生的自然强迫和逆能量级联过程的存在，湍流动能收支分析和谱空间评估结果证实了从混沌中涌现出强平均流。
AI.conclusion: 在三维深对流系统中，浮力驱动的自然强迫和逆级联机制确实能够生成并维持大尺度纬向流，这为理解木星类行星上的纬向流形成提供了三维数值证据。

title: Exploring Nonlinear System with Machine Learning: Chua and Lorenz Circuits Analyzed
comment: This work is a very preliminary result of using machine learning to study nonlinear system. It is not a very mature work, and there are still certain uncertainties in the results. In a responsible manner, we decided to withdraw this manuscript after deliberation, and readers are invited to pay attention to our follow-up work on nonlinear system in machine learning
summary: Nonlinear circuits serve as crucial carriers and physical models for investigating nonlinear dynamics and chaotic behavior, particularly in the simulation of biological neurons. In this study, Chua's circuit and Lorenz circuit are systematically explored for the first time through machine learning correlation algorithms. Specifically, the upgraded and optimized SINDy-PI model, which is based on neural network and symbolic regression algorithm, is utilized to learn the numerical results of attractors generated by these two nonlinear circuits. Through error analysis, we examine the effects of the precision of input data and the amount of data on the algorithmic model. The findings reveal that when the input data quantity and data precision fall within a certain range, the algorithm model can effectively recognize and restore the differential equation expressions corresponding to the two circuits. Additionally, we test the anti-interference ability of different circuits and the robustness of the algorithm by introducing noise into the test data. The results indicate that under the same noise disturbance, the Lorenz circuit has better noise resistance than Chua's circuit, providing a starting point for further studying the intrinsic properties and characteristics of different nonlinear circuits. The above results will not only offer a reference for the further study of nonlinear circuits and related systems using deep learning algorithms but also lay a preliminary theoretical foundation for the study of related physical problems and applications.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地利用机器学习（SINDy-PI模型）对蔡氏电路和Lorenz电路进行学习，发现该算法能在一定数据精度和数量范围内有效识别并恢复电路微分方程，同时Lorenz电路比蔡氏电路具有更好的抗噪能力，为非线性电路的深度学习研究提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 非线性电路是研究非线性动力学和混沌行为的重要载体，尤其在生物神经元模拟中应用广泛。本文旨在通过机器学习相关算法系统探索蔡氏电路和Lorenz电路，以验证算法对电路微分方程识别的有效性。
AI.method: 采用基于神经网络和符号回归算法的升级优化版SINDy-PI模型，学习两种非线性电路吸引子的数值结果；通过误差分析考察输入数据精度和数据量对算法模型的影响；通过引入噪声测试电路抗干扰能力及算法鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在输入数据量和精度处于一定范围内时，算法模型能有效识别并恢复两种电路的微分方程表达式。在相同噪声扰动下，Lorenz电路的抗噪能力优于蔡氏电路。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为利用深度学习算法进一步研究非线性电路及相关系统提供了参考，并为相关物理问题与应用的研究奠定了初步的理论基础。

title: Extensive Composable Entropy for the Analysis of Cosmological Data
summary: Along recent decades, an intensive worldwide research activity is focusing both black holes and cosmos (e.g. the dark-energy phenomenon) on the basis of entropic approaches. The Boltzmann-Gibbs-based Bekenstein-Hawking entropy $S_{BH}\propto A/l_P^2$ ($A \equiv$ area; $l_P \equiv$ Planck length) systematically plays a crucial theoretical role although it has a serious drawback, namely that it violates the thermodynamic extensivity of spatially-three-dimensional systems. Still, its intriguing area dependence points out the relevance of considering the form $W(N)\sim μ^{N^γ}\;\;(μ>1;γ>0)$, $W$ and $N$ respectively being the total number of microscopic possibilities and the number of components; $γ=1$ corresponds to standard Boltzmann-Gibbs (BG) statistical mechanics.
