For this $W(N)$ asymptotic behavior, we introduce here, on a group-theory basis, the entropic functional $S_{α,γ}=k \Bigl[ \frac{\ln Σ_{i=1}^W p_i^α}{1-α} \Bigr]^{\frac{1}γ} \;(α\in \mathbb{R};\,S_{1,1}=S_{BG}\equiv-k\sum_{i=1}^W p_i \ln p_i)$. This functional simultaneously is {\it extensive} (as required by thermodynamics) and {\it composable} (as required for logic consistency), $\forall (α,γ)$. We further show that $(α,γ)=(1,2/3)$ satisfactorily agrees with cosmological data measuring neutrinos, Big Bang nucleosynthesis and the relic abundance of cold dark matter particles, as well as dynamical and geometrical cosmological data sets.

AI.tldr: 本文基于群论提出了一种同时满足热力学广延性和逻辑一致可组合性的熵泛函 \(S_{\alpha,\gamma}=k\left[\frac{\ln\sum_i p_i^\alpha}{1-\alpha}\right]^{1/\gamma}\)，其中参数 \((\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)\) 与中微子、大爆炸核合成、冷暗物质 relic 丰度及宇宙学观测数据高度吻合。
AI.motivation: 传统的 Bekenstein-Hawking 熵 \(S_{BH}\propto A/l_P^2\) 虽然重要，但存在严重缺陷——它违反了三维空间系统的热力学广延性（extensivity）。同时，其面积依赖关系暗示了微观可能性计数 \(W(N)\sim \mu^{N^\gamma}\) 的非标准渐近行为（\(\gamma=1\) 对应标准 Boltzmann-Gibbs 统计）。因此，需要构建一个既能保持热力学广延性、又具备逻辑一致性（可组合性）的广义熵形式。
AI.method: 基于群论框架（group-theory basis），从 \(W(N)\sim \mu^{N^\gamma}\) 的渐近行为出发，引入新的熵泛函 \(S_{\alpha,\gamma}=k\left[\frac{\ln\sum_i p_i^\alpha}{1-\alpha}\right]^{1/\gamma}\)。该泛函在参数空间 \((\alpha,\gamma)\) 中同时满足热力学广延性（extensivity）和可组合性（composability）。进一步将特定参数 \((\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)\) 与多项宇宙学观测数据进行拟合验证。
AI.result: 提出的熵泛函 \(S_{\alpha,\gamma}\) 对任意 \((\alpha,\gamma)\) 均同时具备广延性和可组合性。其中 \((\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)\) 的特定取值与中微子测量数据、大爆炸核合成（BBN）约束、冷暗物质粒子 relic 丰度以及动力学和几何学宇宙学数据集均能满意地吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该工作从群论角度构建了一个兼具热力学广延性和逻辑可组合性的广义熵框架，其特例 \((\alpha,\gamma)=(1,2/3)\) 为理解黑洞熵、暗能量及宇宙学观测提供了一个自洽的熵基础方案。

title: Generalized Multi-hop Traffic Pressure for Heterogeneous Traffic Perimeter Control
comment: 11 pages main body, 13 figures, journal paper
summary: Perimeter control (PC) prevents loss of traffic network capacity due to congestion in urban areas. Homogeneous PC allows all access points to a protected region to have identical permitted inflow. However, homogeneous PC performs poorly when the congestion in the protected region is heterogeneous (e.g., imbalanced demand) since the homogeneous PC does not consider specific traffic conditions around each perimeter intersection. When the protected region has spatially heterogeneous congestion, one needs to modulate the perimeter inflow rate to be higher near low-density regions and vice versa for high-density regions. A naïve approach is to leverage 1-hop traffic pressure to measure traffic condition around perimeter intersections, but such metric is too spatially myopic for PC. To address this issue, we formulate multi-hop downstream pressure grounded on Markov chain theory, which ``looks deeper'' into the protected region beyond perimeter intersections. In addition, we formulate a two-stage hierarchical control scheme that can leverage this novel multi-hop pressure to redistribute the total permitted inflow provided by a pre-trained deep reinforcement learning homogeneous control policy. Experimental results show that our heterogeneous PC approaches leveraging multi-hop pressure significantly outperform homogeneous PC in scenarios where the origin-destination flows are highly imbalanced with high spatial heterogeneity. Moveover, our approach is shown to be robust against turning ratio uncertainties by a sensitivity analysis.

AI.tldr: 针对保护区域内交通拥堵空间异质性问题（如需求不均衡），本文提出基于马尔可夫链理论的多跳下游压力指标，替代传统的单跳压力（过于短视），并结合两阶段分层控制方案，利用该多跳压力重新分配由预训练深度强化学习同质控制策略提供的总允许进入流量。实验表明，在OD流量高度不均衡、空间异质性强的场景下，该方法显著优于同质PC，且对转向比不确定性具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 同质边界控制（PC）在保护区域内拥堵空间异质（如需求不均衡）时性能较差，因为其不考虑每个边界交叉口的具体交通状况。简单采用1跳交通压力作为度量过于短视，无法有效感知保护区域内部的深层拥堵状态。
AI.method: 1) 基于马尔可夫链理论构建多跳下游压力指标，能“更深入”地观测保护区域内超出边界交叉口的交通状态；2) 提出两阶段分层控制方案：第一阶段由预训练的深度强化学习同质控制策略提供总允许进入流量，第二阶段利用多跳压力将该总流量在异构边界交叉口间重新分配。
AI.result: 在OD流量高度不均衡、空间异质性强的场景下，基于多跳压力的异构PC显著优于同质PC；敏感性分析表明该方法对转向比不确定性具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多跳压力指标能有效解决边界控制中空间异质拥堵问题，结合分层控制框架实现了优于同质PC的性能，且具有较好的鲁棒性。

title: Distributed online generalized Nash Equilibrium learning in multi-cluster games: A delay-tolerant algorithm
summary: This paper addresses the problem of distributed online generalized Nash equilibrium (GNE) learning for multi-cluster games with delayed feedback information. Specifically, each agent in the game is assumed to be informed a sequence of local cost functions and constraint functions, which are known to the agent with time-varying delays subsequent to decision-making at each round. The objective of each agent within a cluster is to collaboratively optimize the cluster's cost function, subject to time-varying coupled inequality constraints and local feasible set constraints over time. Additionally, it is assumed that each agent is required to estimate the decisions of all other agents through interactions with its neighbors, rather than directly accessing the decisions of all agents, i.e., each agent needs to make decision under partial-decision information. To solve such a challenging problem, a novel distributed online delay-tolerant GNE learning algorithm is developed based upon the primal-dual algorithm with an aggregation gradient mechanism. The system-wise regret and the constraint violation are formulated to measure the performance of the algorithm, demonstrating sublinear growth with respect to time under certain conditions. Finally, numerical results are presented to verify the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多集群博弈中带延迟反馈信息的分布式在线广义纳什均衡学习问题，提出了一种基于原始-对偶算法与聚合梯度机制的分布式在线延迟容忍GNE学习算法，并在部分决策信息条件下实现了次线性遗憾和约束违反增长。
AI.motivation: 解决多集群博弈中存在的三个挑战：1) 时变延迟的反馈信息；2) 时变耦合不等式约束和局部可行集约束；3) 部分决策信息（每个智能体只能通过与邻居交互估计其他智能体的决策，无法直接访问所有智能体的决策）。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于原始-对偶算法与聚合梯度机制相结合的分布式在线延迟容忍GNE学习算法。该算法允许智能体在仅与邻居交互的情况下估计全局决策信息，并处理时变延迟的代价函数和约束函数。
AI.result: 系统层面的遗憾和约束违反在特定条件下均表现出关于时间的次线性增长，数值实验验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的分布在线延迟容忍GNE学习算法能够有效解决多集群博弈中带延迟反馈和部分决策信息的在线学习问题，理论保证了次线性遗憾和约束违反界。

title: On the mean field limit of consensus based methods
summary: Consensus based optimization (CBO) employs a swarm of particles evolving as a system of stochastic differential equations (SDEs). Recently, it has been adapted to yield a derivative free sampling method referred to as consensus based sampling (CBS). In this paper, we investigate the ``mean field limit'' of a class of consensus methods, including CBO and CBS. This limit allows to characterize the system's behavior as the number of particles approaches infinity. Building upon prior work such as (Huang and Qiu, 2022), we establish the existence of a unique, strong solution for these finite-particle SDEs. We further provide uniform moment estimates, which allow to show a Fokker-Planck equation in the mean-field limit. Finally, we prove that the limiting McKean-Vlasov type SDE related to the Fokker-Planck equation admits a unique solution.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类共识方法（包括CBO和CBS）的平均场极限，证明了有限粒子SDE强解的存在唯一性，给出了均匀矩估计，并导出了平均场极限下的Fokker-Planck方程，最后证明了对应的McKean-Vlasov型SDE解的唯一性。
AI.motivation: 将基于共识的优化（CBO）和采样（CBS）方法在粒子数趋于无穷时的系统行为进行理论刻画，为这类方法提供严格的数学基础。
AI.method: 利用随机微分方程理论，建立有限粒子系统的强解存在唯一性，通过均匀矩估计推导平均场极限下的Fokker-Planck方程，并证明相应的McKean-Vlasov型SDE解的唯一性。
AI.result: 建立了共识方法在平均场极限下的理论框架，包括有限粒子系统强解的存在唯一性、均匀矩估计、Fokker-Planck方程的导出以及极限SDE解的唯一性。
AI.conclusion: 一类共识方法（CBO和CBS）在粒子数趋于无穷时具有良好的极限行为，平均场极限理论为该类方法的进一步分析和应用提供了严格的数学支撑。

title: Viscoelastic Worthington jets & droplets produced by bursting bubbles
summary: Bubble bursting and subsequent collapse of the open cavity at free surfaces of contaminated liquids can generate aerosol droplets, facilitating pathogen transport. After film rupture, capillary waves focus at the cavity base, potentially generating fast Worthington jets that are responsible for ejecting the droplets away from the source. While extensively studied for Newtonian fluids, the influence of non-Newtonian rheology on this process remains poorly understood. Here, we employ direct numerical simulations to investigate the bubble cavity collapse in viscoelastic media, such as polymeric liquids. We find that the jet and drop formation are dictated by two dimensionless parameters: the elastocapillary number $Ec$ (the ratio of the elastic modulus and the Laplace pressure) and the Deborah number $De$ (the ratio of the relaxation time and the inertio-capillary timescale). We show that for low values of $Ec$ and $De$, the viscoelastic liquid adopts a Newtonian-like behavior, where the dynamics are governed by the solvent Ohnesorge number $Oh_s$ (the ratio of visco-capillary and inertio-capillary timescales). In contrast, for large values $Ec$ and $De$, the enhanced elastic stresses completely suppress the formation of the jet. For some cases with intermediate values of $Ec$ and $De$, smaller droplets are produced compared to Newtonian fluids, potentially enhancing aerosol dispersal. By mapping the phase space spanned by $Ec$, $De$, and $Oh_s$, we reveal three distinct flow regimes: (i) jets forming droplets, (ii) jets without droplet formation, and (iii) absence of jet formation. Our results elucidate the mechanisms underlying aerosol suppression versus fine spray formation in polymeric liquids, with implications for pathogen transmission and industrial processes involving viscoelastic fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文通过直接数值模拟研究了粘弹性流体中气泡空腔塌陷的动力学过程，发现射流和液滴形成由弹性毛细数Ec和Deborah数De两个无量纲参数决定。低Ec和De时，粘弹性流体表现为牛顿流体行为；高Ec和De时，弹性应力完全抑制射流形成；中等参数下会产生比牛顿流体更小的液滴。研究揭示了三种流动状态，对病原体传播和工业过程具有重要启示。
AI.motivation: 气泡破裂及空腔塌陷在污染液体自由表面产生的气溶胶 droplets 对病原体传播具有重要作用，而牛顿流体中这一过程已被广泛研究，但非牛顿流变学对该过程的影响尚不清楚。作者旨在填补这一空白，探究粘弹性介质（如聚合物液体）中气泡空腔塌陷的动力学机制。
AI.method: 采用直接数值模拟（DNS）方法，研究粘弹性介质中气泡空腔塌陷过程，系统分析弹性毛细数Ec（弹性模量与Laplace压力之比）、Deborah数De（弛豫时间与惯-毛细时间尺度之比）以及溶剂Ohnesorge数Oh_s（粘-毛细与惯-毛细时间尺度之比）三个无量纲参数对射流和液滴形成的影响。
AI.result: 1) 低Ec和De时，粘弹性液体表现为牛顿流体行为，由Oh_s主导；2) 高Ec和De时，增强的弹性应力完全抑制射流形成；3) 中等Ec和De参数下，可产生比牛顿流体更小的液滴；4) 在Ec、De和Oh_s参数空间中发现三种不同流动状态：(i) 射流形成液滴、(ii) 射流无液滴形成、(iii) 无射流形成。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了粘弹性液体中气泡空腔塌陷的物理机制，阐明了聚合物液体中气溶胶抑制与细喷雾形成之间的竞争关系，对病原体传播防控及涉及粘弹性流体的工业过程具有重要指导意义。

title: Reynolds stress decay modeling informed by anisotropically forced homogeneous turbulence
summary: Models for solving the Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes equations are popular tools for predicting complex turbulent flows due to their computational affordability and ability to provide or estimate quantities of engineering interest. However, results depend on a proper treatment of unclosed terms, which require progress in the development and assessment of model forms. In this study, we consider the Reynolds stress transport equations as a framework for second-moment turbulence closure modeling. We specifically focus on the terms responsible for decay of the Reynolds stresses, which can be isolated and evaluated separately from other terms in a canonical setup of homogeneous turbulence. We show that by using anisotropic forcing of the momentum equation, we can access states of turbulence traditionally not probed in a triply-periodic domain. The resulting data span a wide range of anisotropic turbulent behavior in a more comprehensive manner than extant literature. We then consider a variety of model forms for which these data allow us to perform a robust selection of model coefficients and select an optimal model that extends to cubic terms when expressed in terms of the principal coordinate Reynolds stresses. Performance of the selected decay model is then examined relative to the simulation data and popular models from the literature, demonstrating the superior accuracy of the developed model and, in turn, the efficacy of this framework for model selection and tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于雷诺应力输运方程的湍流封闭建模框架，通过各向异性强迫生成更广泛的各向异性湍流数据，用于筛选和优化雷诺应力耗散模型，最终得到一个优于现有文献的三次项模型。
AI.motivation: 现有雷诺平均Navier-Stokes（RANS）模型对未封闭项的处理依赖模型形式的发展与评估，而传统均匀湍流数据集覆盖的各向异性范围有限，限制了模型系数选择和模型形式的优化。
AI.method: 在均匀湍流的三重周期域中，通过对动量方程施加各向异性强迫，生成覆盖更广泛各向异性状态的湍流数据；基于这些数据对雷诺应力耗散项的各种模型形式进行系数鲁棒选择和模型筛选，最终选出最优的（含三次项）模型。
AI.result: 新生成的数据集比现有文献更全面地覆盖了各向异性湍流行为；筛选出的最优耗散模型在精度上显著优于文献中的经典模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架（各向异性强迫数据生成+模型筛选）能有效提升湍流封闭模型的精度，验证了该方法在模型选择与调参中的有效性。

title: Joining simplified physics models with coarse grids to speed-up intractable 3D time-domain simulations
summary: Full 3D modelling of time-domain electromagnetic data requires tremendous computational resources. Consequently, simplified physics models prevail in geophysics, using a much faster but approximate (1D) forward model. We propose to join the accuracy of a 1D simplified physics model with the flexibility of coarse grids to reduce the modelling errors, thereby avoiding the full 3D accurate simulations. We exemplify our approach on airborne time-domain electromagnetic data, comparing the modelling error with the standard 3% measurement noise. We find that the modelling error depends on the specific subsurface model (electrical conductivity values, angle representing the deviation of the 1D assumption) and the specific (temporal) discretization. In our example, the computation time is decreased by a factor of 27. Our approach can offer an alternative for surrogate models, statistical relations derived from large 3D datasets, to replace the full 3D simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合1D简化物理模型与粗网格灵活性来降低建模误差，避免全3D仿真，在机载时域电磁数据上实现27倍计算加速，并提供了一种替代全3D仿真的代理模型方案。
AI.motivation: 全3D时域电磁数据建模需要巨大计算资源，而简化物理模型（1D）虽快但精度不足，需在计算效率与建模精度之间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 将1D简化物理模型的精度与粗网格的灵活性相结合，通过调整离散化策略降低建模误差，避免进行全3D精确仿真。
AI.result: 建模误差依赖于地下电导率模型、1D假设偏离角度及时间离散化；相比全3D仿真，计算时间降低了27倍；误差可控制在3%测量噪声水平内。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为替代全3D仿真的代理模型方案，为大规模地球物理反演提供高效且精度可控的计算途径。

title: Sine-Gordon model at finite temperature: the method of random surfaces
summary: We study the sine-Gordon quantum field theory at finite temperature by generalizing the method of random surfaces to compute the free energy and one-point functions of exponential operators non-perturbatively. Focusing on the gapped phase of the sine-Gordon model, we demonstrate the method's accuracy by comparing our results to the predictions of other methods and to exact results in the thermodynamic limit. We find excellent agreement between the method of random surfaces and other approaches when the temperature is not too small with respect to the mass gap. Extending the method to more general problems in strongly interacting one-dimensional quantum systems is discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文通过推广随机表面方法，非微扰地计算了正弦-戈登量子场论在有限温度下的自由能和指数算符的一点函数。在带隙相中，当温度不低于质量间隙时，该方法与其他方法及热力学极限下的精确结果高度吻合，并讨论了向强相互作用一维量子系统的推广。
AI.motivation: 将随机表面方法从零温推广到有限温度，以非微扰方式研究正弦-戈登模型的有限温行为，填补现有方法在有限温强耦合区域的不足。
AI.method: 推广随机表面方法（Random Surface Method），计算自由能和指数算符的一点函数；与已知精确解及其他方法（如热力学Bethe ansatz等）进行对比验证。
AI.result: 在温度不低于质量间隙的区域内，随机表面方法的结果与其他方法及热力学极限精确结果高度一致，验证了方法的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 随机表面方法可有效处理有限温正弦-戈登模型的非微扰计算，并有望推广到更一般的强相互作用一维量子系统。

title: Typicality, entropy and the generalization of statistical mechanics
summary: When at equilibrium, large-scale systems obey conventional thermodynamics because they belong to microscopic configurations (or states) that are typical. Crucially, the typical states usually represent only a small fraction of the total number of possible states, and yet the characterization of the set of typical states -- the typical set -- alone is sufficient to describe the macroscopic behavior of a given system. Consequently, the concept of typicality, and the associated Asymptotic Equipartition Property allow for a drastic reduction of the degrees of freedom needed for system's statistical description. The mathematical rationale for such a simplification in the description is due to the phenomenon of concentration of measure. The later emerges for equilibrium configurations thanks to very strict constraints on the underlying dynamics, such as weekly interacting and (almost) independent system constituents. The question naturally arises as to whether the concentration of measure and related typicality considerations can be extended and applied to more general complex systems, and if so, what mathematical structure can be expected in the ensuing generalized thermodynamics. In this paper we illustrate the relevance of the concept of typicality in the toy model context of the "thermalized" coin and show how this leads naturally to Shannon entropy. We also show an intriguing connection: The characterization of typical sets in terms of Renyi and Tsallis entropies naturally leads to the free energy and partition function, respectively, and makes their relationship explicit. Finally, we propose potential ways to generalize the concept of typicality to systems where the standard microscopic assumptions do not hold.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型平衡系统中典型性（typicality）及相关集中测度现象如何导致传统热力学的简化描述，并将其推广至更一般的复杂系统。通过在"热化硬币"玩具模型中展示典型性如何自然导出Shannon熵，并揭示了Renyi熵和Tsallis熵与自由能、配分函数的内在联系，最后提出了在标准微观假设不成立时推广典型性概念的潜在途径。
AI.motivation: 平衡态大尺度系统因服从于典型微观构型而遵循常规热力学，但典型态仅占全部可能状态的一小部分。作者希望探究集中测度及典型性思想能否扩展应用于更一般的复杂系统，并探索由此产生的广义热力学应具有何种数学结构。
AI.method: 采用"热化硬币"玩具模型作为示例，通过分析典型集的特征来展示Shannon熵的自然导出；利用Renyi熵和Tsallis熵对典型集进行表征，从而得到自由能和配分函数，并阐明它们之间的关系。最后理论上探讨在标准微观假设（如弱相互作用、近独立组分）不成立时如何推广典型性概念。
AI.result: 在平衡系统中，典型性（典型集）足以描述宏观行为，且集中测度现象为这种简化提供了数学依据。通过"热化硬币"模型展示了典型性自然导出Shannon熵的过程；发现Renyi熵表征典型集可得到自由能，Tsallis熵表征典型集可得到配分函数，且它们之间存在显式关联。
AI.conclusion: 典型性概念可以从平衡态热力学推广到更一般的复杂系统，即使标准微观假设（弱相互作用、近独立组分）不成立，也存在潜在途径进行这种推广。Renyi熵和Tsallis熵在典型集框架下与热力学量（自由能、配分函数）建立了深刻联系。

title: Variance-Reduced Cascade Q-learning: Algorithms and Sample Complexity
comment: Update from v1: Proposition 1 has been revised. References have been updated
summary: We study the problem of estimating the optimal Q-function of $γ$-discounted Markov decision processes (MDPs) under the synchronous setting, where independent samples for all state-action pairs are drawn from a generative model at each iteration. We introduce and analyze a novel model-free algorithm called Variance-Reduced Cascade Q-learning (VRCQ). VRCQ comprises two key building blocks: (i) the established direct variance reduction technique and (ii) our proposed variance reduction scheme, Cascade Q-learning. By leveraging these techniques, VRCQ provides superior guarantees in the $\ell_\infty$-norm compared with the existing model-free stochastic approximation-type algorithms. Specifically, we demonstrate that VRCQ is minimax optimal. Additionally, when the action set is a singleton (so that the Q-learning problem reduces to policy evaluation), it achieves non-asymptotic instance optimality while requiring the minimum number of samples theoretically possible. Our theoretical results and their practical implications are supported by numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的无模型算法——方差缩减级联Q学习（VRCQ），用于在同步设定下估计γ折扣MDP的最优Q函数。VRCQ结合了直接方差缩减技术和级联Q学习，在ℓ∞范数下提供了优于现有无模型随机逼近算法的理论保证，实现了极小化最优性，并在策略评估场景下达到非渐近实例最优性及理论最小样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有无模型随机逼近类算法在估计最优Q函数时，其ℓ∞范数下的误差保证不够理想，且样本效率有待提升。作者希望通过结合方差缩减技术来突破现有方法的理论局限。
AI.method: VRCQ算法包含两个关键组件：(i) 直接方差缩减技术；(ii) 新提出的级联Q学习方差缩减方案。算法在同步设定下运行，每轮为所有状态-动作对从生成模型中独立采样。
AI.result: VRCQ在ℓ∞范数下达到极小化最优性；当动作集为单元素（退化为策略评估问题）时，实现非渐近实例最优性，且样本复杂度达到理论下界。
AI.conclusion: VRCQ在理论上优于现有无模型随机逼近算法，数值实验验证了理论结果的有效性和实际意义。

title: Enhancing Stochastic Optimization for Statistical Efficiency Using ROOT-SGD with Diminishing Stepsize
comment: arXiv admin note: Author list truncated. This submission has been withdrawn by arXiv administrators as the other author was added without their knowledge or consent
summary: In this paper, we revisit \textsf{ROOT-SGD}, an innovative method for stochastic optimization to bridge the gap between stochastic optimization and statistical efficiency. The proposed method enhances the performance and reliability of \textsf{ROOT-SGD} by integrating a carefully designed \emph{diminishing stepsize strategy}. This approach addresses key challenges in optimization, providing robust theoretical guarantees and practical benefits. Our analysis demonstrates that \textsf{ROOT-SGD} with diminishing achieves optimal convergence rates while maintaining computational efficiency. By dynamically adjusting the learning rate, \textsf{ROOT-SGD} ensures improved stability and precision throughout the optimization process. The findings of this study offer valuable insights for developing advanced optimization algorithms that are both efficient and statistically robust.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了ROOT-SGD方法，通过引入递减步长策略来弥合随机优化与统计效率之间的差距，实现了最优收敛速率和计算效率，提升了优化过程的稳定性和精确性。
AI.motivation: 弥合随机优化与统计效率之间的差距，提升ROOT-SGD方法的性能和可靠性。
AI.method: 在ROOT-SGD中集成精心设计的递减步长策略，动态调整学习率。
AI.result: 实现了最优收敛速率，同时保持了计算效率；优化过程的稳定性和精确性得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 递减步长的ROOT-SGD方法兼顾了效率与统计鲁棒性，为开发高级优化算法提供了有价值的见解。

title: Advancing Causal Inference: A Nonparametric Approach to ATE and CATE Estimation with Continuous Treatments
summary: This paper introduces a generalized ps-BART model for the estimation of Average Treatment Effect (ATE) and Conditional Average Treatment Effect (CATE) in continuous treatments, addressing limitations of the Bayesian Causal Forest (BCF) model. The ps-BART model's nonparametric nature allows for flexibility in capturing nonlinear relationships between treatment and outcome variables. Across three distinct sets of Data Generating Processes (DGPs), the ps-BART model consistently outperforms the BCF model, particularly in highly nonlinear settings. The ps-BART model's robustness in uncertainty estimation and accuracy in both point-wise and probabilistic estimation demonstrate its utility for real-world applications. This research fills a crucial gap in causal inference literature, providing a tool better suited for nonlinear treatment-outcome relationships and opening avenues for further exploration in the domain of continuous treatment effect estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义ps-BART模型，用于连续治疗情境下的平均处理效应（ATE）和条件平均处理效应（CATE）估计，克服了贝叶斯因果森林（BCF）模型的局限性。在三组不同的数据生成过程（DGPs）中，ps-BART模型在高度非线性设置下持续优于BCF模型，尤其在不确定性估计稳健性和点估计与概率估计精度方面表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯因果森林（BCF）模型在处理连续治疗变量时存在局限，难以灵活捕捉治疗与结果变量之间的非线性关系，亟需一种能在连续治疗情境下进行更准确因果效应估计的非参数方法。
AI.method: 提出广义ps-BART模型，利用其非参数特性灵活建模治疗与结果间的非线性关系，并在三类不同数据生成过程下与BCF模型进行系统比较。
AI.result: 在三组不同DGP设定下，ps-BART模型始终优于BCF模型，尤其在高度非线性场景下优势显著；在不确定性估计稳健性、点估计和概率估计精度方面均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: ps-BART模型填补了连续治疗因果推断领域的空白，为非线性治疗-结果关系提供了更有效的估计工具，并为后续研究开辟了新方向。

title: Review of Non-Equilibrium Thermodynamics And Statistical Mechanics of Vortex Gases in Tornado Theory
summary: This work puts into mathematical, statistical mechanical, and thermodynamical context the initial stages of the genesis of tornado-like vortices with the aim to be consistent with the current state of knowledge of the process of tornadogenesis. In particular, it discusses a mathematical foundation of the formation of coherent structures such as ``cusps'' and ``hairpins'' using variants of the nonlinear Schrödinger equation that arise via the Hasimoto transform of a vortex filament model. The behavior of such structures is then analyzed within a quasi-two-dimensional boundary layer model using the statistical mechanics of vortex gases to explain the rearrangement of cusps and other vertical vortex filaments into patches and possibly supercritical vortices. Non-equilibrium thermodynamics is used to obtain the entropic balance and the internal entropy production rate, and connect them to the turbulent heat flux. A formula for the non-equilibrium turbulent heat supply and formulas for the entropy supply and entropy production in the boundary layer are also provided. A relationship between the vorticity and the entropy gradient based on macroscopic fluctuations is given with implications to stretching and tilting of vorticity in the vertical direction. We conclude with some remarks on equivalence of Schrödinger and Gross-Pitaevskii equations in describing vortex filaments.

AI.tldr: 本文运用数学、统计力学和热力学框架，系统分析了龙卷风式涡旋形成的初始阶段，通过非线性薛定谔方程变体描述涡旋细丝模型中的"尖点"和"发卡"等相干结构，并在准二维边界层模型中使用涡旋气体统计力学解释这些结构重组为涡旋斑块甚至超临界涡旋的过程，同时利用非平衡热力学建立熵平衡与湍流热通量的联系。
AI.motivation: 旨在为龙卷风生成（tornadogenesis）的初始阶段提供一致的数学、统计力学和热力学理论基础，将当前对龙卷风生成过程的认识纳入一个统一的物理框架中。
AI.method: 1) 使用变体非线性薛定谔方程（通过涡旋细丝模型的Hasimoto变换）描述"尖点"和"发卡"等相干结构的形成；2) 在准二维边界层模型中运用涡旋气体统计力学分析垂直涡旋细丝重组为斑块和超临界涡旋的行为；3) 利用非平衡热力学推导熵平衡和内部熵产生率，并将其与湍流热通量关联；4) 提供非平衡湍流热供应、熵供应和熵产生公式；5) 基于宏观涨落建立涡度与熵梯度之间的关系。
AI.result: 给出了非平衡湍流热供应公式、边界层内熵供应和熵产生公式；建立了基于宏观涨落的涡度与熵梯度之间的关系，该关系对涡度在垂直方向上的拉伸和倾斜具有物理含义；阐明了薛定谔方程与Gross-Pitaevskii方程在描述涡旋细丝方面的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的数学-热力学框架为理解龙卷风生成初期相干结构的形成与演化提供了统一的理论基础，特别是通过非线性薛定谔方程家族与涡旋气体统计力学、非平衡热力学的结合，揭示了涡度与熵梯度之间的深层联系，并指出了薛定谔方程与Gross-Pitaevskii方程在涡旋细丝描述中的等价性。

title: Shock-induced drop size and distributions
summary: We use an integral analysis of conservation equations of mass and energy, to determine the drop size and distributions during shock-induced drop break-up. The result is an updated form for the drop size as a function of its final velocity, from a series of work applied to various atomization geometries. Comparisons with experimental data demonstrate the validity and utility of this method. The shock-induced drop size and distributions can be predicted within reasonable accuracy as a function of the drop velocity ratio and fluid properties. The result also illustrates the dynamical process of kinetic energy deficit transferred to the surface tension energy, and the skewing of the drop size distribution due to the non-linear dependence on velocity ratio.

AI.tldr: 本文通过质量和能量守恒的整体分析，确定了激波诱导液滴破碎过程中的液滴尺寸与分布，提出了随最终速度变化的液滴尺寸更新形式，并与实验数据验证了方法的有效性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 为了更准确地预测激波诱导液滴破碎后的液滴尺寸及其分布，揭示动能转化为表面张力的动力学过程，并解释液滴尺寸分布偏斜的非线性机制。
AI.method: 采用质量和能量守恒方程的整体分析方法，推导液滴尺寸随最终速度的函数关系，并应用于多种雾化几何构型。
AI.result: 得到了激波诱导液滴破碎后液滴尺寸的更新表达式，可作为液滴速度比和流体性质的函数，在合理精度内预测液滴尺寸及分布。同时揭示了动能赤字向表面张能转移的动力学过程，以及液滴尺寸分布因速度比非线性依赖而产生的偏斜现象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效且实用，能够以合理精度预测激波诱导液滴尺寸与分布，并阐明了动能与表面能之间的能量转移机制及分布偏斜的成因。

title: Effect of a shear flow on the Darrieus-Landau instability in a Hele-Shaw channel
summary: The Darrieus--Landau instability of premixed flames propagating in a narrow Hele-Shaw channel in the presence of a strong shear flow is investigated, incorporating also the Rayleigh--Taylor and diffusive-thermal instabilities. The flow induces shear-enhanced diffusion (Taylor dispersion) in the streamwise direction, but not in the spanwise direction and this leads to anisotropic diffusion and flame propagation. To understand how such anisotropies affect flame stability, two important cases are considered. These correspond to initial unperturbed conditions pertaining to a planar flame propagating in the streamwise or spanwise directions. The analysis is based on a two-dimensional model derived by asymptotic methods and solved numerically. These address the influence of the shear-flow strength (or Peclet number $Pe$), preferential diffusion (or Lewis number $Le$) and gravity (or Rayleigh number $Ra$). Dispersion curves characterizing the perturbation growth rate are computed for selected values of $Pe$, $Le$ and $Ra$. Taylor dispersion induced by strong shear flows is found to suppress the Darrieus--Landau instability and to weaken the flame wrinkling when the flame propagates in the streamwise direction. In contrast, when the flame propagates in the spanwise direction, the flame is stabilized in $Le<1$ mixtures, but destabilized in $Le>1$ mixtures. In the latter case, Taylor dispersion coupled with gas expansion facilitates flame wrinkling in an unusual manner. Specifically, stagnation points and counter-rotating vortices are encountered in the flame close to the unburnt gas side. More generally, an original finding is the demonstration that vorticity can be produced by a curved flame in a Hele-Shaw channel even in the absence of gravity, whenever $Pe \neq 0$, and that the vorticity remains confined to the flame preheat and reaction zones.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强剪切流下Hele-Shaw通道中预混火焰的Darrieus-Landau不稳定性，发现泰勒色散效应可抑制或改变火焰失稳模式，并首次证明无重力下弯曲火焰可在通道中产生涡量。
AI.motivation: 探究强剪切流引起的各向异性扩散（泰勒色散）如何影响预混火焰的Darrieus-Landau不稳定性，并综合考虑瑞利-泰勒不稳定性与扩散-热不稳定性的耦合效应。
AI.method: 基于渐近方法推导二维模型并进行数值求解，分析佩克莱特数Pe、路易斯数Le和瑞利数Ra对扰动增长率的影响，绘制色散曲线。
AI.result: 1) 火焰沿流向传播时，泰勒色散抑制Darrieus-Landau不稳定性并削弱火焰褶皱；2) 火焰沿展向传播时，Le<1混合物稳定化，Le>1混合物失稳化，泰勒色散与气体膨胀耦合产生驻点和反向旋转涡；3) 首次发现Pe≠0时，无重力下弯曲火焰可在Hele-Shaw通道中产生涡量，且涡量局限于火焰预热与反应区。
AI.conclusion: 强剪切流诱导的泰勒色散对火焰稳定性具有方向依赖的调控作用，并能引发无重力条件下的新型涡量生成机制。

title: Three-dimensional diffusive-thermal instability of flames propagating in a plane Poiseuille flow
summary: The three-dimensional diffusive-thermal stability of a two-dimensional flame propagating in a Poiseuille flow is examined. The study explores the effect of three non-dimensional parameters, namely the Lewis number $Le$, the Damköhler number $Da$, and the flow Peclet number $Pe$. Wide ranges of the Lewis number and the flow amplitude are covered, as well as conditions corresponding to small-scale narrow ($Da \ll 1$) to large-scale wide ($Da \gg 1$) channels. The instability experienced by the flame appears as a combination of the traditional diffusive-thermal instability of planar flames and the recently identified instability corresponding to a transition from symmetric to asymmetric flame. The instability regions are identified in the $Le$-$Pe$ plane for selected values of $Da$ by computing the eigenvalues of a linear stability problem. These are complemented by two- and three-dimensional time-dependent simulations describing the full evolution of unstable flames into the non-linear regime. In narrow channels, flames are found to be always symmetric about the mid-plane of the channel. Additionally, in these situations, shear flow-induced Taylor dispersion enhances the cellular instability in $Le<1$ mixtures and suppresses the oscillatory instability in $Le>1$ mixtures. In large-scale channels, however, both the cellular and the oscillatory instabilities are expected to persist. Here, the flame has a stronger propensity to become asymmetric when the mean flow opposes its propagation and when $Le<1$; if the mean flow facilitates the flame propagation, then the flame is likely to remain symmetric about the channel mid-plane. For $Le>1$, both symmetric and asymmetric flames are encountered and are accompanied by temporal oscillations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维火焰在泊肃叶流中传播时的三维扩散-热稳定性，分析了Lewis数(Le)、Damköhler数(Da)和Peclet数(Pe)的影响。在窄通道中火焰始终对称，剪切流增强Le<1时的胞状不稳定性并抑制Le>1时的振荡不稳定性；在宽通道中两种不稳定均存在，火焰在逆流传播且Le<1时更易变得不对称。
AI.motivation: 先前研究主要关注二维火焰的扩散-热不稳定性，但实际火焰在三维流动环境中传播时可能表现出更复杂的失稳行为，尤其是流动剪切对火焰对称性破缺和稳定性的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过线性稳定性分析计算特征值，在Le-Pe平面上识别不稳定区域；同时采用二维和三维时变数值模拟，描述不稳定火焰进入非线性阶段的完整演化过程。
AI.result: 1) 窄通道(Da≪1)中火焰始终关于通道中平面对称，剪切流增强Le<1的胞状不稳定性，抑制Le>1的振荡不稳定性；2) 宽通道(Da≫1)中胞状和振荡不稳定均持续存在；3) 逆流传播且Le<1时火焰更易不对称，顺流传播时保持对称；4) Le>1时对称和非对称火焰均存在并伴随时间振荡。
AI.conclusion: 通道尺寸和流动方向对火焰对称性破缺和稳定性有决定性影响，扩散-热不稳定性与流动诱导的对称性转变之间存在耦合机制。

title: Shear-Layer Perturbation Responses from Time-Resolved Schlieren Data
summary: A novel combination of physics-based and data-driven post-processing techniques is proposed to extract acoustic-related shear-layer perturbation responses directly from spatio-temporally resolved schlieren video. The physics-based component is derived from a momentum potential theory extension that extracts irrotational (acoustic and thermal) information from density gradients embedded in schlieren pixel intensities. For the unheated shear layer, the method spotlights acoustic structures and tones otherwise hidden. The filtered data is then subjected to a data-driven Dynamic Mode Decomposition Reduced Order Model (DMD-ROM), which provides the response to forced perturbations. This method applies a learned linear model to isolate and quantify growth rates of acoustic phenomena suited for efficient parametric studies. A shear-layer comprised of two streams at Mach 2.461 and 0.175, corresponding to a convective Mach number 0.88 and containing shocks, is adopted for illustration. The overall perturbation response is first obtained using an impulse forcing in the wall normal direction of the splitter plate, extending in both subsonic and supersonic streams. Subsequently, impulse and harmonic forcings are independently applied in a local pixel-by-pixel manner for a precise receptivity study. The acoustic response shows a convective wavepacket and an acoustic burst from the splitter plate. The interaction with the primary shock and associated wave dispersion emits a second, slower, acoustic wave. Harmonic forcing indicates higher frequency-dependent sensitivity in the supersonic stream, with the most sensitive location near the outer boundary layer region. Excitation here yields an order of magnitude larger acoustic response compared to disturbances in the subsonic stream. Some receptive forcing inputs do not generate significant acoustic waves, which may guide excitation with low noise impact.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理驱动与数据驱动相结合的后处理技术，从纹影视频中提取声学相关的剪切层扰动响应。物理部分基于动量势理论扩展，从密度梯度中提取无旋信息；数据部分采用动态模态分解降阶模型（DMD-ROM）量化声学现象的增长率。在Ma=2.461/0.175（对流马赫数0.88）的剪切层上验证，成功提取了隐藏的声学结构，发现了冲击波相互作用产生的二次声波，并识别出超音速流中外边界层区域是声学响应最敏感的位置。
AI.motivation: 纹影成像中的密度梯度同时包含无旋（声学/热）和有旋（涡量）信息，传统方法难以直接分离声学成分。需要一种能从实验纹影数据中提取并量化声学扰动响应的方法，以支持高效的参数化研究和噪声控制。
AI.method: 两步法：①物理驱动：基于动量势理论扩展，从纹影像素强度中的密度梯度提取无旋（声学和热）分量；②数据驱动：对滤波后的声学数据进行DMD-ROM，建立线性模型以学习、分离和量化受迫扰动的声学响应增长率。通过脉冲激励（全局壁面法向）和逐点脉冲/谐波激励进行感受性研究。
AI.result: 成功从纹影视频中提取了原本隐藏的声学结构和声调。发现脉冲激励产生对流波包和分裂板声爆发，与主激波相互作用及波色散产生较慢的二次声波。谐波激励显示超音速流灵敏度更高，外边界层区域激励的声学响应比亚音速流大一个数量级。部分激励输入不产生显著声波，可指导低噪声设计。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效从高保真纹影数据中提取和量化声学扰动响应，揭示了激波-声波相互作用机制和不同区域的感受性差异，为噪声控制和低声学影响激励设计提供了指导。

title: A consistent, volume preserving, and adaptive mesh refinement-based framework for modeling non-isothermal gas-liquid-solid flows with phase change
summary: This work expands on our recently introduced low Mach enthalpy method [1] for simulating the melting and solidification of a phase change material (PCM) alongside (or without) an ambient gas phase. The method captures PCM's volume change (shrinkage or expansion) by accounting for density change-induced flows. We present several improvements to the original work. First, we introduce consistent time integration schemes for the mass, momentum, and enthalpy equations, which enhance the method stability. Demonstrating the effectiveness of this scheme, we show that a system free of external forces and heat sources can conserve its initial mass, momentum, enthalpy, and phase composition. This allows the system to transition from a non-isothermal, non-equilibrium, phase-changing state to an isothermal, equilibrium state without exhibiting unrealistic behavior. Furthermore, we show that the low Mach enthalpy method accurately simulates thermocapillary flows without introducing spurious phase changes. We propose an analytical model to validate advanced CFD codes for simulating metal manufacturing processes like welding and 3D printing. These processes involve a heat source melting metal or alloy in an inert gas environment. Traditionally, validation relied on manipulating material properties to match complex experiments. Our model uses the Stefan problem with a density jump to provide a straightforward method for validating multiphysics simulations involving heat sources and phase changes in three-phase flows.Lastly, we demonstrate the practical utility of the method in modeling porosity defects (gas bubble trapping) during metal solidification. A field extension technique is used to accurately apply surface tension forces in a three-phase flow situation. This is where part of the bubble surface is trapped within the (moving) solidification front.

AI.tldr: 本文改进了低马赫数焓法，用于模拟相变材料（PCM）熔化/凝固过程中的体积变化（收缩/膨胀），并提出了稳定时间积分格式、验证模型及多相流中孔隙缺陷（气泡捕获）的模拟方法。
AI.motivation: 现有低马赫数焓法在模拟相变材料熔化/凝固时存在稳定性不足的问题，且缺乏针对三相传热（含环境气体）的简单验证模型。此外，金属制造（如焊接、3D打印）中孔隙缺陷（气泡捕获）的数值模拟需要精确处理表面张力与移动凝固前沿的相互作用。
AI.method: 1) 引入质量、动量、焓方程的一致性时间积分方案；2) 提出含密度跳跃的Stefan问题解析模型作为验证基准；3) 采用场扩展技术精确施加三相流动中气泡部分被凝固前沿捕获时的表面张力。
AI.result: 1) 新时间积分方案使无外力/热源系统能守恒质量、动量、焓和相组成，从非等温非平衡态过渡到等温平衡态而不出现非物理行为；2) 低马赫数焓法能准确模拟热毛细流动而不引入虚假相变；3) 解析模型为多物理场CFD代码提供简单验证方法；4) 成功模拟金属凝固过程中的孔隙缺陷（气泡捕获）。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的低马赫数焓法在稳定性、守恒性和实用性上均有提升，可有效模拟含相变、密度变化及多相界面相互作用的金属制造过程（焊接、3D打印），特别是孔隙缺陷形成机制。
